Genesis1:1 Ekucaleni Nkulunkulu wadala lizulu nemhlaba. 
Genesis1:2 Umhlaba wawulihlane lelingenalutfo, bumnyama babumbonye emanti nekujula kwawo; Moya waNkulunkulu abehla enyuka ahambahamba etikwemanti." 
Genesis1:3 Nkulunkulu watsi: “Akube khona kukhanya,” kwaba khona kukhanya." 
Genesis1:4 Nkulunkulu wabona kutsi kukhanya kuhle. Nkulunkulu wehlukanisa kukhanya nebumnyama. 
Genesis1:5 Nkulunkulu wakwetsa kukhanya watsi: “Yimini,” bumnyama wabetsa watsi: “Busuku.” Kwahlwa, kwasa: Kwaba lilanga lekucala." 
Genesis1:6 Nkulunkulu watsi: “Akube khona umkhatsi emkhatsini wemanti, wehlukanise emanti nemanti.”" 
Genesis1:7 Nkulunkulu wenta umkhatsi, wehlukanisa emanti labengephansi kwemkhatsi nemanti labengetulu kwemkhatsi. Kwase kuba njalo." 
Genesis1:8 Nkulunkulu wawetsa lomkhatsi watsi: “Lizulu.” Kwahlwa, kwasa: Kwaba lilanga lesibili." 
Genesis1:9 Nkulunkulu watsi: “Emanti langephansi kwelizulu akabutsane ndzawonye, kubonakale umhlaba lowomile.” Kwase kuba njalo." 
Genesis1:10 Lokomile Nkulunkulu wakwetsa libito watsi: “Ngumhlaba;” nemanti labutsene ndzawonye wawetsa libito watsi: “Lwandle.” Nkulunkulu wabona kutsi loko kuhle. 
Genesis1:11 Nkulunkulu watsi: “Umhlaba awuvete konkhe lokumilako: lokutsela tinhlavu, netihlahla tetitselo letitsela tinhlavu letiyinhlanyelo ngetinhlobo tato.” Kwase kuba njalo." 
Genesis1:12 Umhlaba waveta konkhe lokumilako lokutsela tinhlavu, netihlahla tetitselo letitsela tinhlavu letiyinhlanyelo ngetinhlobo tato. Nkulunkulu wabona kutsi loko kuhle." 
Genesis1:13 Kwahlwa, kwasa: Kwaba lilanga lesitsatfu." 
Genesis1:14 Nkulunkulu watsi: “Akube khona tibane emkhatsini wesibhakabhaka tehlukanise imini nebusuku; atibe tibonakaliso tetikhatsi, netemalanga, neteminyaka." 
Genesis1:15 Atibe tibane temkhatsi wesibhakabhaka tikhanyisele umhlaba.” Kwase kuba njalo. 
Genesis1:16 Nkulunkulu wenta tibane letikhulu taba tibili: lesikhulu kutsi sibuse imini, lesincane kutsi sibuse busuku. Wenta netinkhanyeti futsi." 
Genesis1:17 Nkulunkulu watibeka emkhatsini wesibhakabhaka kutsi tikhanyisele umhlaba," 
Genesis1:18 tibuse imini nebusuku, tehlukanise kukhanya nebumnyama. Nkulunkulu wabona kutsi loko kuhle." 
Genesis1:19 Kwahlwa, kwasa: Kwaba lilanga lesine." 
Genesis1:20 Nkulunkulu watsi: “Emanti akagcwale yonkhe inhlobo yetilwane letiphilako, kundize tinyoni etikwemhlaba emkhatsini wesibhakabhaka.”" 
Genesis1:21 Ngako-ke Nkulunkulu wadala tilwane letikhulu taselwandle nato tonkhe tinhlobo tetilwane letiphilako letigcwele emantini ngetinhlobo tato, nato tonkhe tinhlobo tetinyoni letinetimphiko. Nkulunkulu wabona kutsi loko kuhle." 
Genesis1:22 Nkulunkulu watibusisa watsi: “Talanani, nandze nigcwalise tilwandle, netinyoni tandze nemhlaba wonkhe.”" 
Genesis1:23 Kwahlwa, kwasa: Kwaba lilanga lesihlanu." 
Genesis1:24 Nkulunkulu watsi: “Umhlaba awuvete tonkhe tinhlobo tetilwane letiphilako: tonkhe tinhlobo tetifuyo, netetilwane letihamba ngesisu, netilo tesiganga.” Kwase kuba njalo." 
Genesis1:25 Nkulunkulu wenta tonkhe tinhlobo: tetilo tesiganga, netetifuyo, netetilwane letihamba ngesisu. Nkulunkulu wabona kutsi loko kuhle." 
Genesis1:26 Nkulunkulu wase utsi: “Asente bantfu, babe ngumfanekiso wetfu, basifute; babuse etikwetinhlanti taselwandle, nasetikwetinyoni tasemoyeni, nasetikwetifuyo, nasetikwemhlaba wonkhe, nasetikwato tonkhe tilwane letihamba ngesisu netilwanyakatana.”" 
Genesis1:27 Ngako Nkulunkulu wadala umuntfu waba ngumfanekiso wakhe; wamdala waba ngumfanekiso waNkulunkulu: wabadala, lomdvuna nalomsikati." 
Genesis1:28 Nkulunkulu wababusisa watsi: “Talanani, nandze, nigcwalise umhlaba, niwuncobe. Nibuse etikwetinhlanti taselwandle, nasetikwetinyoni tasemoyeni, nasetikwato tonkhe tilwane letihamba emhlabeni.”" 
Genesis1:29 Nkulunkulu watsi: “Ase nibuke la, ngininike tonkhe tibhidvo letisemhlabeni wonkhe letimilisa inhlanyelo, nato tonkhe tihlahla letinenhlanyelo etitselweni tato, kutsi kube kudla kwenu." 
Genesis1:30 Kepha konkhe lokuphilako: tilwane temhlaba, nato tonkhe tinyoni tasemoyeni, netilwane letihamba ngesisu, ngikunika konkhe lokuluhlata kutsi kube kudla kwako.” Kwase kuba njalo." 
Genesis1:31 Nkulunkulu wakubona konkhe labesakwentile, kutsi kuhle kakhulu. Kwahlwa, kwasa: Kwaba lilanga lesitfupha." 
Genesis2:1 Ngako-ke kwase kupheleliswe lizulu nemhlaba, nendalo yako konkhe." 
Genesis2:2 Ngelilanga lesikhombisa Nkulunkulu abesawucedzile wonkhe umsebenti wakhe labewenta; wase uyaphumula. 
Genesis2:3 Ngako-ke Nkulunkulu walibusisa lilanga lesikhombisa, walingcwelisa; ngobe ngalo waphumula emsebentini wakhe wonkhe wekudala." 
Genesis2:4 Ladalwa kanjalo-ke lizulu nemhlaba. Ngesikhatsi Nkulunkulu Simakadze enta umhlaba nelizulu," 
Genesis2:5 kusete nakunye lokumilako emhlabeni, netibhidvo tisengakabikho, ngobe Nkulunkulu Simakadze abesengakayinisi imvula emhlabeni, kwakute umuntfu wekuwulima lomhlaba." 
Genesis2:6 Noko kwenyuka inkhungu, iphuma emhlabatsini, yanisela wonkhe umhlaba." 
Genesis2:7 Nkulunkulu Simakadze wase ubumba umuntfu ngelutfuli lwemhlabatsi, waphefumulela umoya wekuphila emakhaleni akhe; umuntfu wase uba ngumuntfu lophilako." 
Genesis2:8 Nkulunkulu Simakadze wahlanyela insimi yase-Edeni ngasemphumalanga; wambeka khona-ke lomuntfu labesamentile. 
Genesis2:9 Nkulunkulu Simakadze wamilisa emhlabatsini tonkhe tihlahla letibukekako letimnandzi; ekhatsi nensimi wamilisa sihlahla sekuphila kanye nesihlahla sekwati lokuhle nalokubi. 
Genesis2:10 Kwavela umfula lowageleta wanisela insimi yase-Edeni, udzabula ekhatsi nayo, bese wehlukana uba ngimifula lemine." 
Genesis2:11 Libito lemfula wekucala yiPhishoni; ngulona logeleta utungelete lonkhe live laseHavila, lapho kunegolide khona." 
Genesis2:12 Igolide yalelo live yinhle kakhulu; kunenhlaka yebhedola kanye nelitje isholamu kulelo live. 
Genesis2:13 Umfula wesibili yiGihoni; ngiwo logeleta utungelete lonkhe live laseKushe. 
Genesis2:14 Libito lemfula wesitsatfu yiThigrisi, logeletela ngasemphumalanga ye-Asiriya. Umfula wesine yiYufrathe." 
Genesis2:15 Nkulunkulu Simakadze wamtsatsa umuntfu wambeka ensimini yase-Edeni kutsi ayilime, ayilindze." 
Genesis2:16 Nkulunkulu Simakadze wamyala umuntfu watsi kuye: “Ungadla ngekutsandza kwakho tonkhe titselo letilapha ensimini; 
Genesis2:17 kodvwa ungasidli sitselo sesihlahla sekwati lokulungile nalokungakalungi, ngobe mhlazana usidla uyakufa nekufa.”" 
Genesis2:18 Nkulunkulu Simakadze watsi: “Akukuhle kutsi umuntfu ahlale yedvwana. Ngitamentela umsiti lolungele yena.” 
Genesis2:19 Ngako-ke Nkulunkulu Simakadze wabumba ngemhlabatsi tonkhe tilwane tesiganga, netinyoni letindiza emoyeni, watiletsa kumuntfu kutsi abone kutsi utetsa njani. Lawo mabito latetsa wona tabitwa ngawo." 
Genesis2:20 Ngako-ke umuntfu watetsa emabito tonkhe tifuyo, netinyoni letindiza emoyeni, nato tonkhe tilwane tesiganga. Kepha Adamu akamtfolanga umsiti labelungele yena." 
Genesis2:21 Ngako-ke Nkulunkulu Simakadze wamehlisela umuntfu butfongo lobukhulu; walala. Nkulunkulu wase ukhipha lolunye lwetimbambo takhe wagcwalisa sikhala ngenyama. 
Genesis2:22 Nkulunkulu Simakadze wambumba lomsikati ngelubhambo labelukhiphe kulomdvuna, wase umyisa endvodzeni." 
Genesis2:23 Indvodza yatsi: “Lona-ke sewulitsambo lematsambo ami, nenyama yenyama yami. Uyawubitwa ngekutsi: ‘yindvodzakati’, ngobe utsetfwe endvodzeni.”" 
Genesis2:24 Ngako-ke indvodza iyawushiya uyise nenina inamatsele kumfati wayo, bese baba nyamanye." 
Genesis2:25 Babehamba ngcunu, bobabili, lendvodza nemkayo, bate emahloni." 
Genesis3:1 Inyoka yayinebucili kwendlula tonkhe tilwane tesiganga labetentile Nkulunkulu Simakadze. Yatsi kumfati: “Kodvwa ngempela Nkulunkulu ushito yini kutsi: ‘Ningadli nome ngusinye nje sitselo setihlahla letisensimini’?” 
Genesis3:2 Umfati waphendvula inyoka watsi: “Singatidla titselo tetihlahla letisensimini," 
Genesis3:3 ngaphandle kwesitselo sesihlahla lesisekhatsi nensimi; Nkulunkulu utsite: ‘Ningasidli sitselo sesihlahla lesisekhatsi nensimi, ningasitsintsi nekusitsintsa, kuze ningafi.’ ”" 
Genesis3:4 Inyoka yatsi kumfati: “Ningeke nife. 
Genesis3:5 Kepha Nkulunkulu uyati kutsi mhlazana nisidla, emehlo enu ayawuvuleka, bese nifanana naNkulunkulu nikwati lokuhle nalokubi.”" 
Genesis3:6 Ngako-ke watsi umfati kube abone kutsi lesihlahla sasifanelwe kudliwa, nekutsi sasibukeka sisihle, nekutsi lesihlahla sasifanele kumhlakaniphisa umuntfu, wakha kulesihlahla wadla. Wanika nendvodza yakhe, nayo yadla." 
Genesis3:7 Emehlo abo bobabili ase ayavuleka, batibona kutsi bangcunu; base batfunga emacembe emkhiwa, batentela kwekuvunula." 
Genesis3:8 Ekupholeni kwelilanga beva Nkulunkulu Simakadze ahambahamba ensimini; bo-Adamu nemkakhe bambhacela Nkulunkulu Simakadze emkhatsini wetihlahla tensimi. 
Genesis3:9 Kodvwa Nkulunkulu Simakadze wabita Adamu watsi: “Ukuphi?” 
Genesis3:10 Waphendvula watsi: “Ngive livi lakho ensimini, ngase ngiyesaba, ngobe ngihamba ngcunu; ngabhaca.”" 
Genesis3:11 Nkulunkulu wambuta watsi: “Ngubani losakutjele kutsi uhamba ngcunu? Sewusidlile yini lesitselo salesihlahla lengakuyala ngaso kutsi ungabosidla?” 
Genesis3:12 Adamu waphendvula watsi: “Ngulomfati lowanginika yena kutsi ahlale nami, nguye lona longinike lesitselo, ngase ngiyasidla.”" 
Genesis3:13 Nkulunkulu Simakadze watsi kumfati: “Yini-ke lena lose uyentile?” Umfati watsi: “Ngikhohliswe yinyoka, ngase ngiyadla.”" 
Genesis3:14 Nkulunkulu Simakadze watsi enyokeni: “Njengobe sewente loku, sewucalekiswe ngetulu kwato tonkhe tilwane: tonkhe tifuyo, nato tonkhe tilwane tesiganga. Sewuyawuhamba ngesisu sakho, ngesikhatsi sonkhe sekuphila kwakho udle lutfuli lwemhlabatsi." 
Genesis3:15 Ngitawubeka butsa emkhatsini wakho nemfati, nasemkhatsini wentalo yakho nentalo yemfati. Yona iyawufihlita inhloko yakho, wena uyawuluma sitsendze sayo.”" 
Genesis3:16 Watsi kumfati: “Ngitakwandzisa buhlungu ekukhulelweni kwakho, bube bukhulu kakhulu; uyawutala bantfwana kabuhlungu. Kufisa kwakho kuyawubasendvodzeni yakho, yona iyakukubusa.”" 
Genesis3:17 Ku-Adamu watsi: “Njengobe ulalele livi lemfati wakho, wasidla lesitselo salesihlahla lengakuyala ngaso ngatsi: ‘Ungasidli,’ umhlaba sewucalekisiwe ngenca yakho. Sewuyakudla kuwo kamatima onkhe emalanga ekuphila kwakho." 
Genesis3:18 Uyawukuvetela emanyeva nelukhula, wena uyakudla lokumila esigangeni." 
Genesis3:19 Uyawusebenta kamatima, ukujulukele kudla kwakho, udzimate ubuyele emhlabatsini, ngobe vele watsatfwa kuwo; njengobe ulutfuli, uyawubuyela elutfulini.”" 
Genesis3:20 Adamu wametsa umkakhe watsi ngu-Eva, ngobe waba ngunina wabo bonkhe labaphilako." 
Genesis3:21 Nkulunkulu Simakadze wentela bo-Adamu nemkakhe kwekwembatsa kwetikhumba, wabembatsisa." 
Genesis3:22 Nkulunkulu Simakadze watsi: “Ase nibuke, Adamu sewunjengatsi, sewuyakwati lokuhle nalokubi. Angahle akhe kulesihlahla sekuphila adle, bese uphila kuze kube phakadze naphakadze.”" 
Genesis3:23 Ngako-ke Nkulunkulu Simakadze wamcosha ensimini yase-Edeni, kutsi alime umhlabatsi labetsatfwe kuwo." 
Genesis3:24 Wamkhipha lo-Adamu; kwase kutsi ngasemphumalanga nensimi yase-Edeni wabeka emakherubhi kanye nenkemba lenelilangabi lephendvuphendvukako ilindze indlela leya esihlahleni sekuphila. 
Genesis4:1 Adamu wamati Eva, umkakhe; Eva wakhulelwa watala Khayini, watsi: “Ngitfole indvodzana ngekusitwa nguSimakadze.”" 
Genesis4:2 Emvakwaloko watala Abela, umnakabo. Yena-ke Abela waba ngumelusi wetimvu, Khayini waba ngumlimi wemhlabatsi." 
Genesis4:3 Ngekuhamba kwesikhatsi Khayini waletsa umnikelo wetitselo temhlabatsi kuSimakadze. 
Genesis4:4 Na-Abela waletsa ematubulo etimvu takhe letikhuluphele. Simakadze wanaka Abela nemnikelo wakhe; 
Genesis4:5 kepha Khayini nemnikelo wakhe akazange amnake. Ngako-ke Khayini watfukutsela kakhulu; buso bakhe banyukumala, bahlwa." 
Genesis4:6 Simakadze watsi kuKhayini: “Utfukutseleleni? Buso bakho bunyukumaleleni? 
Genesis4:7 Angitsi nawenta lokulungile, uyemukeleka? Nawungenti lokulungile, sono siyakucatsamela ngasemnyango. Sifuna wena, kodvwa wena kufanele usincobe.”" 
Genesis4:8 Khayini wase utsi ku-Abela, umnakabo: “Asambe, siye etsafeni.” Batsi kube befike etsafeni, Khayini wesukela umnakabo, wambulala." 
Genesis4:9 Simakadze wabuta kuKhayini watsi: “Uphi umnakenu Abela?” Watsi: “Angimati. Ngingumlindzi wemnaketfu yini mine?” 
Genesis4:10 Simakadze watsi kuye: “Wenteni? Livi lengati yemnakenu liyakhala kimi, lisemhlabatsini." 
Genesis4:11 Sewucalekisiwe emhlabatsini lekunguwona ukhamise umlomo wawo wemukela ingati yemnakenu esandleni sakho. 
Genesis4:12 Nawulima umhlabatsi, ngeke usakunika sivuno sawo lesihle; wena sewuyawuba ngumhambuma neluzulane emhlabeni.”" 
Genesis4:13 Khayini watsi kuSimakadze: “Sijeziso sami singetulu kwemandla ami. 
Genesis4:14 Asubuke, sewuyangicosha lamuhla la emhlabatsini, ngisuke nasebukhoneni bakho, ngibe ngumhambuma neluzulane emhlabeni; kantsi futsi wonkhe lohlangana nami uyawungibulala.”" 
Genesis4:15 Kodvwa Simakadze watsi: “Cha, akunjalo! Lowo lobulala Khayini kuyawuphindziselwa kuye kuze kube kasikhombisa.” Simakadze wabeka Khayini luphawu, khona kutewuba secwayiso sekutsi lowo lohlangana naye angambulali." 
Genesis4:16 Khayini wase uyesuka ebukhoneni baSimakadze wayawuhlala eveni laseNodi, ngasemphumalanga yase-Edeni." 
Genesis4:17 Khayini wamati umkakhe, lowakhulelwa, watala Enoki. Khayini wase wakha lidolobha laletsa ngemsa wakhe, watsi yi-Enoki." 
Genesis4:18 Enoki watala Iradi; Iradi waba nguyise waMehujayeli; Mehujayeli waba nguyise waMethushayeli; Methushayeli waba nguyise waLameki. 
Genesis4:19 Lameki watsatsa bafati lababili; libito lalomunye kwakungu-Ada, lomunye-ke anguSila." 
Genesis4:20 Ada watala Jabale; yena waba nguyise walabo bebahlala emathendeni, bafuye tinkhomo." 
Genesis4:21 Libito lemnakabo kwakunguJubale; yena-ke waba nguyise wabo bonkhe lababedlala lugitali nemntjingozi. 
Genesis4:22 Sila watala Thubali Khayini; yena-ke waba nguyise wabo bonkhe labakha emathulusi ngelitfusi nensimbi. DzadzewaboThubali Khayini kwakunguNama. 
Genesis4:23 Lameki wase utsi kubafati bakhe: “Ada naSila, lalelani livi lami; nine bafati baLameki, lalelani lengitakusho: Indvodza nayingilimata, ngitayibulala; lijaha nalingilimata, ngitalibulala." 
Genesis4:24 Nangabe Khayini ayawuphindziselelwa emahlandla lasikhombisa, Lameki uyawuphindziselelwa kuze kube ngemahlandla langema-77.”" 
Genesis4:25 Adamu waphindze wamati umkakhe, watala indvodzana, wayetsa libito watsi nguSethi, ngobe abetsi: “Nkulunkulu sewungiphe lomunye umntfwana esikhundleni sa-Abela lowabulawa nguKhayini.”" 
Genesis4:26 NaSethi watala indvodzana layetsa libito watsi ngu-Enoshi; ngaleso sikhatsi bantfu bacala kukhuleka kuSimakadze. 
Genesis5:1 Lona ngumlandvo wentalelwane ya-Adamu. Nkulunkulu nakadala umuntfu, wamenta waba ngumfanekiso waNkulunkulu." 
Genesis5:2 Wabadala lomdvuna nalomsikati, wababusisa, wabanika libito mhlazana abadala watsi bantfu." 
Genesis5:3 Kwatsi Adamu asaneminyaka leli-130, watala indvodzana leyamfuta, yafanana naye; wayetsa libito watsi nguSethi." 
Genesis5:4 Emalanga a-Adamu emvakwekutalwa kwaSethi aba ngiminyaka lengema-800, asatele emadvodzana nemadvodzakati." 
Genesis5:5 Adamu wafa asaneminyaka lengema-930. 
Genesis5:6 Kwatsi Sethi nasaneminyaka leli-105, watala Enoshi." 
Genesis5:7 Emvakwekutalwa kwa-Enoshi Sethi waphila iminyaka lengema-807, asatele emadvodzana nemadvodzakati." 
Genesis5:8 Sethi wafa asaneminyaka lengema-912. 
Genesis5:9 Kwatsi Enoshi nasaneminyaka lengema-90, watala Khenani." 
Genesis5:10 Emvakwekutalwa kwaKhenani Enoshi waphila iminyaka lengema-815, asatele emadvodzana nemadvodzakati." 
Genesis5:11 Enoshi wafa asaneminyaka lengema-905. 
Genesis5:12 Kwatsi Khenani nasaneminyaka lengema-70, watala indvodzana lekwakunguMahalaleli." 
Genesis5:13 Emvakwekutalwa kwaMahalaleli, Khenani waphila iminyaka lengema-840, asatele emadvodzana nemadvodzakati." 
Genesis5:14 Khenani wafa asaneminyaka lengema-910. 
Genesis5:15 Kwatsi Mahalaleli nasaneminyaka lengema-65, watala Jaredi." 
Genesis5:16 Emvakwekutalwa kwaJaredi, Mahalaleli waphila iminyaka lengema-830, asatele emadvodzana nemadvodzakati." 
Genesis5:17 Mahalaleli wafa asaneminyaka lengema-895. 
Genesis5:18 Kwatsi Jaredi nasaneminyaka leli-162, watala Enoki." 
Genesis5:19 Emvakwekutalwa kwa-Enoki, Jaredi waphila iminyaka lengema-800, asatele emadvodzana nemadvodzakati." 
Genesis5:20 Jaredi wafa asaneminyaka lengema-962. 
Genesis5:21 Kwatsi Enoki nasaneminyaka lengema-65, watala Methusela." 
Genesis5:22 Emvakwaloko Enoki wahamba anebudlelwane naNkulunkulu iminyaka lengema-300, watala emadvodzana nemadvodzakati." 
Genesis5:23 Enoki waphila iminyaka lengema-365. 
Genesis5:24 Enoki abehamba naNkulunkulu, wase uyanyamalala ngobe Nkulunkulu abesamtsatsile." 
Genesis5:25 Kwatsi Methusela nasaneminyaka leli-187, watala Lameki." 
Genesis5:26 Emvakwekutalwa kwaLameki, Methusela waphila iminyaka lengema-782, asatele emadvodzana nemadvodzakati." 
Genesis5:27 Methusela wafa asaneminyaka lengema-969. 
Genesis5:28 Lameki nasaneminyaka leli-182, watala indvodzana." 
Genesis5:29 Lendvodzana wayetsa libito, watsi nguNowa, atsi: “Lona-ke nguye lotasidvudvuta emsebentini wetfu nasekukhatsatekeni kwetfu kuwo lomhlabatsi lowacalekiswa nguSimakadze.”" 
Genesis5:30 Emvakwekutalwa kwaNowa, Lameki waphila iminyaka lengema-595, asatele emadvodzana nemadvodzakati." 
Genesis5:31 Lameki wafa asaneminyaka lengema-777. 
Genesis5:32 Nowa wakhula waba neminyaka lengema-500 budzala, watala emadvodzana lamatsatfu: BoShemi, naHhamu, naJafethi." 
Genesis6:1 Kwatsi kube bantfu bacale kwandza nemhlaba wonkhe, batala tintfombi," 
Genesis6:2 emadvodzana aNkulunkulu atibona letintfombi kutsi tinhle; ase atikhetsela letinye emkhatsini wato atenta bafati bawo. 
Genesis6:3 Simakadze wase utsi: “Moya wami angeke asabenta bantfu baphile kuze kube phakadze, ngobe bantfu bayinyama, emalanga abo asayawuba ngiminyaka leli-120.”" 
Genesis6:4 Kulawo malanga, nangasemva kwawo, kwakunetichwaga letatitalwa bantfu emhlabeni. Emadvodzana aNkulunkulu nasangene kuletintfombi tebantfu, tawatalela bantfwana. Labantfwabato bekungemachawe asendvulo labenemandla neludvumo." 
Genesis6:5 Simakadze wabona kutsi kukhulu kona kwemuntfu emhlabeni, nekutsi yonkhe imizindlo nemicabango yenhlitiyo yakhe mibi ngaso sonkhe sikhatsi." 
Genesis6:6 Simakadze watisola ngekudala kwakhe umuntfu kutsi abe khona emhlabeni, wadzabuka enhlitiyweni yakhe." 
Genesis6:7 Ngako Simakadze watsi: “Ngitabacitsa labantfu lengibadalile emhlabeni; yebo, bantfu, netifuyo, netilwane letihamba ngesisu, netinyoni letindiza emoyeni, ngobe sengiyatisola ngekutsi ngakwenta.”" 
Genesis6:8 Kodvwa Nowa watfola umusa kuSimakadze. 
Genesis6:9 Nankhu-ke umlandvo ngaNowa. Nowa abelungile amsulwa esitukulwaneni sakhe, ahamba naNkulunkulu." 
Genesis6:10 Nowa abenemadvodzana lamatsatfu: BekuboShemi, naHhamu, naJafethi." 
Genesis6:11 Umhlaba wawonakele emehlweni aNkulunkulu; umhlaba wawugcwele budlova. 
Genesis6:12 Nkulunkulu wabuka umhlaba wabona kutsi wonakele, ngobe bonkhe bantfu babetiphetse ngemonakalo emhlabeni." 
Genesis6:13 Nkulunkulu watsi kuNowa: “Sengincume kutsi ngibacedze bonkhe bantfu; ngobe umhlaba ugcwele budlova ngenca yabo. Ngitawubabhubhisa, ngibesuse bonkhe emhlabeni." 
Genesis6:14 Yakha umkhumbi ngemapulangwe egofari; udzabule emakamelo kulomkhumbi, bese uwupenda ngelitiyela ngekhatsi nangephandle." 
Genesis6:15 Utakuwakha kanje: Budze bemkhumbi butawuba ngemamitha langaba li-133, bubanti bube ngemamitha langaba ngema-22, kuphakama kube ngemamitha langaba li-13." 
Genesis6:16 Wente loluphahla lwalomkhumbi lube nesikhala lesingemasentimitha langaba ngema-44, kusuka elubondzeni lwawo. Wakhe nemnyango emhlubulweni wawo. Uwakhe ube netitezi letitsatfu: lesinye sibe ngaphansi, lesinye sibesemkhatsini, lesinye sibe ngetulu." 
Genesis6:17 Ngitawuletsa zamcolo emhlabeni, utawufika abulale yonkhe inyama lenemoya wekuphila, lengaphansi kwelizulu. Konkhe lokusemhlabeni kutawubhubha." 
Genesis6:18 Kodvwa ngitakwenta sivumelwane sami nawe: Utawungena emkhunjini wena, nemadvodzana akho, nemkakho, nabomalukatana bakho." 
Genesis6:19 Kuto tonkhe tilwane utawungenisa lesidvuna nalesisikati kulolo nakulolo luhlobo, khona titawuphila kanye nawe." 
Genesis6:20 Kuto tinyoni tinhlobo ngetinhlobo tato, nakuto tifuyo tinhlobo ngetinhlobo tato, nasetilwaneni letihamba ngesisu emhlabatsini tinhlobo ngetinhlobo tato, kutawufika kuwe tibe timbili talolo nalolo luhlobo, kuze kutsi tihlale tiphilile." 
Genesis6:21 Utsatse tonkhe tinhlobo tekudla, utigcine; kutawuba kudla kwakho nekwato.”" 
Genesis6:22 Nowa wakwenta konkhe layalwa nguNkulunkulu kutsi akwente. 
Genesis7:1 Simakadze watsi kuNowa: “Ngena emkhunjini wena nendlu yakho, ngobe sengibonile kutsi nguwe wedvwa lolungile kulesitukulwane." 
Genesis7:2 Kuto tonkhe tinhlobo tetilwane letihlambulukile tsatsa tibe sikhombisa letindvuna naletinsikati tibe sikhombisa, nakuto tinhlobo tetilwane letingakahlambuluki utsatse tibe timbili lesidvuna nalesisikati." 
Genesis7:3 Nakuto tonkhe tinhlobo tetinyoni tsatsa tibe sikhombisa letindvuna naletinsikati; khona lungetiwuphela lolo nalolo luhlobo emhlabeni. 
Genesis7:4 Emvakwemalanga lasikhombisa kusukela lamuhla ngitawutfumela imvula emhlabeni, emalanga langema-40 nebusuku bawo; konkhe lokuphilako lengikwentile emhlabeni ngitakubhubhisa.”" 
Genesis7:5 Nowa wakwenta konkhe labekutjelwe nguSimakadze. 
Genesis7:6 Nowa abesaneminyaka lengema-600 budzala, mhlazana kufika zamcolo emhlabeni." 
Genesis7:7 Nowa wangena emkhunjini yena nemadvodzana akhe, nemkakhe, nebafati bemadvodzana akhe, babalekela emanti azamcolo." 
Genesis7:8 Kuto tonkhe tilwane letihlambulukile naletingakahlambuluki, nasetinyonini, nakuto tonkhe tilwane letihamba ngesisu," 
Genesis7:9 tangena ngatimbili, lesidvuna nalesisikati, tangena naNowa emkhunjini, njengobe Nkulunkulu abemtjelile." 
Genesis7:10 Emvakwemalanga lasikhombisa layitsela imvula yazamcolo emhlabeni. 
Genesis7:11 Ngemnyaka wema-600 ekuphila kwaNowa, enyangeni yesibili, mhlazana tili-17, tonkhe tiyalu temhlaba tabhoboka, emafasitelo asezulwini avuleka." 
Genesis7:12 Lana emhlabeni emalanga langema-40 nebusuku bawo. 
Genesis7:13 Ngalelo langa Nowa nemkakhe wangena emkhunjini, naboShemi, naHhamu, naJafethi, emadvodzana akhe, nebafati bawo." 
Genesis7:14 Bangena nato tonkhe tilwane: tonkhe tifuyo ngetinhlobo tato, nato tonkhe tilwane letihamba ngesisu ngetinhlobo tato, nato tonkhe tinyoni ngetinhlobo tato." 
Genesis7:15 Tangena kuNowa emkhunjini ngatimbili tako konkhe lokunemoya wekuphila. 
Genesis7:16 Letangena tangena kwaba ngulesidvuna nalesisikati senyama yonkhe, tangena, njengobe Nkulunkulu abetjele Nowa. Simakadze wavala umnyango." 
Genesis7:17 Layitsela imvula emhlabeni emalanga langema-40 nebusuku bawo; emanti akhula adzimate awuphakamisa umkhumbi, wasukuma emhlabatsini." 
Genesis7:18 Emanti akhula andza kakhulu emhlabeni, nemkhumbi wantanta etikwemanti." 
Genesis7:19 Emanti achubeka akhukhumuka, adzimate ambonya tonkhe tintsaba temhlaba naletindze kakhulu." 
Genesis7:20 Emanti akhukhumuka, adzimate aba ngemamitha lasikhombisa ngetulu kwetintsaba." 
Genesis7:21 Konkhe lokuphilako lokwakusemhlabeni kwafa: tinyoni netifuyo, netilwane tesiganga, nako konkhe lokwakugcwalise umhlaba, nebantfu bonkhe." 
Genesis7:22 Konkhe lokwakusemhlabeni lokwakuphefumula umoya wekuphila emakhaleni, kwafa." 
Genesis7:23 Simakadze wakucitsa kanjalo-ke konkhe lokwakuphila emhlabeni; wacitsa bantfu, netifuyo netilwane letihamba ngesisu, netinyoni letindiza emoyeni. Kwasala Nowa kanye nalabo abenabo emkhunjini." 
Genesis7:24 Emanti ahlala emhlabeni emalanga lali-150. 
Genesis8:1 Nkulunkulu wamkhumbula Nowa, netilwane tonkhe, kanye nato tonkhe tifuyo labenato emkhunjini. Nkulunkulu waletsa umoya waphuphutsa etikwemhlaba, emanti etja." 
Genesis8:2 Tiyalu temhlaba tavaleka, emafasitelo elizulu avaleka, imvula yahhamuka." 
Genesis8:3 Emanti aya ngekuya etja emhlabeni. Emvakwemalanga lali-150 emanti ancipha. 
Genesis8:4 Ngelilanga leli-17, enyangeni yesikhombisa umkhumbi watinta etikwetintsaba tase-Ararathi." 
Genesis8:5 Emanti achubeka nekwetja, kwadzimate kwatsi ngelilanga lekucala enyangeni yelishumi, tihloko tetintsaba tavela tabonakala." 
Genesis8:6 Ekupheleni kwemalanga langema-40 Nowa walivula lelifasitelo labelakhile. 
Genesis8:7 Watfumela lihubhulu, kodvwa alizange libuye, lazulazula kwaze kwasha emanti emhlabeni." 
Genesis8:8 Wase utfumela lituba kutsi liyewuhlola kutsi emanti asanciphile yini emhlabatsini. 
Genesis8:9 Kepha lituba lehluleka kutfola indzawo, ngisho neyekubeka lunyawo lwalo, lancandzeka labuyela kuye emkhunjini, ngobe emanti abesemanyenti emhlabeni wonkhe. Ngako welula sandla sakhe walitsatsa, walingenisa emkhunjini kuye." 
Genesis8:10 Walindza emalanga lasikhombisa, waphindze watfumela lituba walikhipha emkhunjini." 
Genesis8:11 Lituba lancandzeka lefika kuye kusihlwa liphetse licembe lesihlahla semncumo lelalisandza kukhiwa. Ngako Nowa wati kutsi emanti asetjile emhlabeni. 
Genesis8:12 Waphindze walindza emalanga lasikhombisa, wase utfuma lituba futsi; alizange liphindze libuye." 
Genesis8:13 Ngemnyaka wakhe wema-601, mhlazana lulunye enyangeni yekucala emanti abesashile emhlabeni. Nowa walususa luphahla lwemkhumbi, wahlola, wabona umhlabatsi sewomile." 
Genesis8:14 Mhlazana tingema-27 enyangeni yesibili umhlaba wase womile. 
Genesis8:15 Nkulunkulu wakhuluma kuNowa, watsi:" 
Genesis8:16 “Phuma emkhunjini wena, nemkakho, nemadvodzana akho, nebafati bemadvodzana akho." 
Genesis8:17 Phuma kanye nato tonkhe tilwane letiphilako letinawe tayo yonkhe inhlobo: tinyoni, netifuyo, nato tonkhe tilwane letihamba ngesisu, khona titekwandza emhlabeni titalane tigcwalise umhlaba.”" 
Genesis8:18 Ngako-ke Nowa waphuma nemkakhe, nemadvodzana akhe, nebafati bemadvodzana akhe." 
Genesis8:19 Tonkhe tilwane, ngisho naletihamba ngesisu, nato tonkhe tinyoni, konkhe lokuhamba emhlabatsini kwaphuma ngetinhlobo tako emkhunjini." 
Genesis8:20 Nowa wakhela Nkulunkulu lilati, watsatsa kuto tonkhe tifuyo letihlambulukile nakuto tonkhe tinyoni letihlambulukile, wanikela kuNkulunkulu umnikelo wekushiswa elatini." 
Genesis8:21 Nkulunkulu waliva leliphunga lelinuka lusi lolumnandzi, watsi enhlitiyweni yakhe: “Ngingeke ngiphindze ngiwucalekise umhlabatsi ngenca yemuntfu, ngobe imizindlo yenhlitiyo yemuntfu mibi kwasebusheni bakhe. Ngingeke ngiphindze ngikubhubhise konkhe lokuphilako, njengobe ngentile." 
Genesis8:22 “Yingci nawusekhona umhlaba, kuhlanyela nekuvuna, kucandza nekushisa, lihlobo nebusika, imini nebusuku kungeke kuncamuke.”" 
Genesis9:1 Nkulunkulu wambusisa Nowa kanye nemadvodzana akhe, watsi kubo: “Talanani nandze, nigcwalise umhlaba." 
Genesis9:2 Luvalo nekwesatjwa kwenu akubesetilwaneni tonkhe temhlaba, nakuto tonkhe tinyoni letindiza emoyeni, nakuko konkhe lokuhamba ngesisu emhlabatsini, nakuto tonkhe tinhlanti telwandle. Konkhe loko kuniketelwe etandleni tenu." 
Genesis9:3 “Tonkhe tilwane letiphilako tiyawuba kudla kwenu; ngininika kona njengobe nganinika tibhidvo. 
Genesis9:4 Intfo nje, ningayidli inyama lesenengati; loko ngikusho ngobe kuphila kusengatini." 
Genesis9:5 Umuntfu lobulala lomunye umuntfu uyawujeziswa, nesilwane lesibulala umuntfu ngiyawusijezisa. Ngulowo nalowo uyawutilandza ngengati yalomunye." 
Genesis9:6 “Locitsa ingati yalomunye umuntfu, neyakhe iyawucitfwa ngulabanye bantfu, ngobe Nkulunkulu wamenta umuntfu waba ngumfanekiso wakhe." 
Genesis9:7 “Talanani, nandze, nigcwalise umhlaba.”" 
Genesis9:8 Nkulunkulu wakhuluma kuNowa nemadvodzana akhe, watsi:" 
Genesis9:9 “Ase nibuke la, mine ngimisa sivumelwane sami nani netitukulwane tenu letiyawunilandzela," 
Genesis9:10 kanye nato tonkhe tilwane letiphilako letinani: tinyoni, netifuyo, nato tonkhe tilwane tesiganga leniphume nato emkhunjini, ngisho nato tonkhe tilwane temhlaba." 
Genesis9:11 Ngimisa sivumelwane sami nani, kutsi ngeke kuphindze kubhujiswe lutfo ngemanti azamcolo, angeke aseta zamcolo kutewubhubhisa umhlaba.”" 
Genesis9:12 Nkulunkulu wachubeka watsi: “Nalu luphawu lwesivumelwane lengisenta emkhatsini wami nani, nato tonkhe tidalwa letiphilako letinani, nato tonkhe titukulwane letitako:" 
Genesis9:13 Ngibeka umushi wenkosazana emafini, uyawuba luphawu lwesivumelwane emkhatsini wami nemhlaba." 
Genesis9:14 Nangiletsa emafu etikwemhlaba bese kubonakala lomushi emafini," 
Genesis9:15 ngiyawukhumbula sivumelwane sami emkhatsini wami nani, nato tonkhe tilwane letiphilako, ngisho tonkhe tinhlobo tato. Emanti angeke aphindze abe nguzamcolo wekubhubhisa konkhe lokuphilako." 
Genesis9:16 Nakunalomushi emafini, ngiyakuwubuka bese ngikhumbula sivumelwane saphakadze emkhatsini waNkulunkulu nato tonkhe tinhlobo tetilwane letiphila emhlabeni.”" 
Genesis9:17 Nkulunkulu wachubeka watsi kuNowa: “Lolu luphawu lwesivumelwane lesengisimise emkhatsini wami nako konkhe lokuphilako emhlabeni.” 
Genesis9:18 Emadvodzana aNowa laphuma emkhunjini bekuboShemi, naHhamu, naJafethi. Hhamu bekunguyise waKhenani." 
Genesis9:19 Bobatsatfu bekungemadvodzana aNowa; umhlaba wonkhe wagcwaliswa yintalo yabo. 
Genesis9:20 Nowa abengumlimi, waba wekucala kuhlanyela sivini." 
Genesis9:21 Wanatsa liwayini, wadzakwa, wadzimate walala ngcunu, ethendeni lakhe." 
Genesis9:22 Hhamu, uyise waKhenani, wabubona bungcunu beyise, wahamba wayawutjela bomnakabo lababili lababengephandle." 
Genesis9:23 BoShemi naJafethi batsatsa ingubo, batigubhetela emahlombe abo bobabili, bahamba nyova, bafike babumbonya bungcunu beyise. Buso babo babubheke eceleni, ngako abazange babubone bungcunu beyise." 
Genesis9:24 Nowa wavuka asacabukile ekudzakweni kwakhe, weva loko lokwakwentiwe yindvodzana yakhe lencane." 
Genesis9:25 Watsi: “Akacalekiswe Khenani, abe sigcili setigcili kubomnakabo.”" 
Genesis9:26 Waphindze futsi watsi: “Akadvunyiswe Simakadze, iNkhosi, Nkulunkulu waShemi; Khenani akabe sigcili saShemi." 
Genesis9:27 Shangatsi Nkulunkulu angamandzisa Jafethi, ahlale emathendeni aShemi; Khenani abe sigcili saJafethi.”" 
Genesis9:28 Emvakwazamcolo Nowa waphila iminyaka lengema-350. 
Genesis9:29 Wafa asaneminyaka lengema-950. 
Genesis10:1 Nati-ke titukulwane temadvodzana aNowa, boShemi, naHhamu, naJafethi, batalelwa emadvodzana emvakwazamcolo." 
Genesis10:2 Emadvodzana aJafethi bekuboGomeri, naMagogi, naMadayi, naJavani, naThubali, naMesheki, naThirasi." 
Genesis10:3 Emadvodzana aGomeri bekubo-Ashkenazi, naRifathi, naThogama." 
Genesis10:4 Emadvodzana aJavani bekubo-Elisha, naThashishi, nemaKhithi, nemaRodani." 
Genesis10:5 Bavela kulabo-ke labantfu labahamba bayawuhlala emaveni langaselwandle. Babehlala ngemindeni yabo etiveni tabo, bakhuluma tilimi tabo emaveni abo." 
Genesis10:6 Emadvodzana aHhamu bekuboKushe, naGibhithe, naPhuthi, naKhenani." 
Genesis10:7 Emadvodzana aKushe bekuboSeba, naHavila, naSabta, naRama, naSabtekha. Emadvodzana aRama bekuboSheba naDedani." 
Genesis10:8 Kushe waba nguyise waNimrodi. LoNimrodi waba wekucala emhlabeni kutsi abe sichwaga lesinemandla lamakhulu. 
Genesis10:9 Abengumtingeli lonemandla kakhulu embikwaSimakadze, ngako-ke kutsiwa: “NjengaNimrodi umtingeli labenemandla embikwaSimakadze.”" 
Genesis10:10 Umbuso wakhe wacala ngeBhabheli, nase-Ereki, nase-Akhadi, konkhe kwakuseveni laseShinari." 
Genesis10:11 Kusuka lapho umbuso wakhe waze wefika e-Asiriya. Nimrodi wakha iNineve, neRehobothi Iri, neKhala," 
Genesis10:12 neReseni, emkhatsini weNineve neKhala; lelo bekulidolobha lelikhulu." 
Genesis10:13 Gibhithe watala emaLudi, nema-Anami, nemaLehabi, nemaNafethuhi," 
Genesis10:14 nemaPhathrusi, nemaKhasuluhi, lapho kwadzabuka khona emaFilisti nemaKhaftori." 
Genesis10:15 Khenani watubula ngaSidoni, welamisa ngaHethi," 
Genesis10:16 waba nguyise wemaJebhusi, nema-Amori, nemaGirigashi," 
Genesis10:17 nemaHivi, nema-Akhi, nemaSini," 
Genesis10:18 nema-Avadi, nemaSemari, nemaHamathi. Emvakwaloko imindeni yemaKhenani yahlakateka yandza," 
Genesis10:19 kangangekutsi umnyele welive lemaKhenani wawusuka eSidoni ushaye eGerari, naseGaza, naseSodoma, naseGomora, nase-Adma, naseSeboyimu uze ufike eLasha." 
Genesis10:20 Ngito leto-ke titukulwane taHhamu, ngemindeni yato, netilimi tato, emaveni ato, nasetiveni tato." 
Genesis10:21 NaShemi futsi, uyise wabo bonkhe bantfwana ba-Ebheri, umnakaboJafethi lomkhulu, watala bantfwana." 
Genesis10:22 Emadvodzana aShemi bekubo-Elamu, na-Ashuri, na-Aphakshadi, naLudi, na-Aramu." 
Genesis10:23 Emadvodzana a-Aramu bekubo-Use, naHuli, naGetheri, naMashe." 
Genesis10:24 Aphakshadi watala Shela; Shela watala Ebheri. 
Genesis10:25 Ebheri watala emadvodzana lamabili. Lomunye kwakunguPhelegi, ngobe ngesikhatsi sakhe live ladzatjulwa. Umnakabo kwakunguJokthane." 
Genesis10:26 Jokthane kwakunguyise wabo-Almodadi, naShelefi, naHasamavete, naJera," 
Genesis10:27 naHadoramu, na-Uzali, naDikila," 
Genesis10:28 na-Obali, na-Abimayeli, naSheba," 
Genesis10:29 na-Ofiri, naHavila, naJobabi. Bonkhe laba kwakungemadvodzana aJokthane." 
Genesis10:29 na-Ofiri, naHavila, naJobabi. Bonkhe laba kwakungemadvodzana aJokthane." 
Genesis10:30 Live babehlala kulo lalisuka eMesha ngaseSefari, lize lifike eveni letintsaba ngasemphumalanga." 
Genesis10:31 Ngiwo lawo-ke emadvodzana aShemi, ngemindeni yawo, nangetilimi tawo, emaveni awo, nasetiveni tawo." 
Genesis10:32 Ngiyo-ke le imindeni yemadvodzana aNowa ngetitukulwane tawo nangetive tawo. Tive tesukela kuwo, emvakwazamcolo, tandza nemhlaba wonkhe." 
Genesis11:1 Umhlaba wonkhe wawukhuluma lulwimi lunye lunemagama manye etintfo. 
Genesis11:2 Batsi basahambahamba ngasemphumalanga, bakhandza litsafa eveni laseShinari, bafike bahlala khona." 
Genesis11:3 Base bakhulumisana bodvwana, batsi: “Wotani, asente titini, sitishise.” Basebentisa titini esikhundleni sematje, nelitiyela esikhundleni seludzaka." 
Genesis11:4 Batsi: “Wotani, sitakhele lidolobha, nembhoshongo lotawufikela ezulwini, sitentele ligama, sitekwatiwa, khona singetiwulahlekelana sisakateke nemhlaba wonkhe.”" 
Genesis11:5 Simakadze wehla atewubona lelidolobha nalombhoshongo lowawakhiwa bantfu. 
Genesis11:6 Simakadze watsi: “Ase nibheke labantfu basive sinye, nelulwimi lunye; loku kusicalo saloko labatakwenta, kute labatawutsi nabatimisele kukwenta behluleke kukwenta." 
Genesis11:7 Wotani, sehle, siyewusanganisa lulwimi lwabo, khona bangetiwuvana.”" 
Genesis11:8 Ngako Simakadze wabahlakata nemhlaba wonkhe, bayekela kulakha lelo dolobha." 
Genesis11:9 Ngako-ke wetsiwa libito kwatsiwa yiBhabheli, ngobe Simakadze wasanganisa lulwimi lwemhlaba wonkhe. Kusuka lapho Simakadze bantfu wabasakata nemhlaba wonkhe." 
Genesis11:10 Nati-ke titukulwane taShemi. Emvakweminyaka lemibili kwendlule zamcolo, Shemi abesaneminyaka lelikhulu, watala Aphakshadi." 
Genesis11:11 Emvakwekutalwa kwa-Aphakshadi, Shemi waphila iminyaka lengema-500, watala emadvodzana nemadvodzakati." 
Genesis11:12 Aphakshadi abesaneminyaka lengema-35, nakatala Shela." 
Genesis11:13 Emvakwekutalwa kwaShela, Aphakshadi waphila iminyaka lengema-403, watala emadvodzana nemadvodzakati." 
Genesis11:14 Shela abesaneminyaka lengema-30, nakatala Ebheri." 
Genesis11:15 Emvakwekutalwa kwa-Ebheri, Shela waphila iminyaka lengema-403, watala emadvodzana nemadvodzakati." 
Genesis11:16 Ebheri abesaneminyaka lengema-34, nakatala Phelegi." 
Genesis11:17 Emvakwekutalwa kwaPhelegi, Ebheri waphila iminyaka lengema-430, watala emadvodzana nemadvodzakati." 
Genesis11:18 Phelegi abesaneminyaka lengema-30, nakatala Rehu." 
Genesis11:19 Emvakwekutalwa kwaRehu, Phelegi waphila iminyaka lengema-209, watala emadvodzana nemadvodzakati." 
Genesis11:20 Rehu abesaneminyaka lengema-32, nakatala Serugi." 
Genesis11:21 Emvakwekutalwa kwaSerugi, Rehu waphila iminyaka lengema-207, watala emadvodzana nemadvodzakati." 
Genesis11:22 Serugi abesaneminyaka lengema-30, nakatala Nahori." 
Genesis11:23 Emvakwekutalwa kwaNahori, Serugi waphila iminyaka lengema-200, watala emadvodzana nemadvodzakati." 
Genesis11:24 Nahori abesaneminyaka lengema-29, nakatala Thera." 
Genesis11:25 Emvakwekutalwa kwaThera, Nahori waphila iminyaka leli-119, watala emadvodzana nemadvodzakati." 
Genesis11:26 Thera waphila iminyaka lengema-70, watala telamani bo-Abrama, naNahori, naHarani." 
Genesis11:27 Nati-ke titukulwane taThera: Thera abenguyise wa-Abrama, naNahori, naHarani. Harani abenguyise waLoti." 
Genesis11:28 Harani wafa kucala kuneyise, Thera; wafela eveni latalelwa kulo, i-Uri yemaKhaledi." 
Genesis11:29 Bo-Abrama naNahori batsatsa bafati. Libito lemka-Abrama kwakunguSarayi; libito lemkaNahori kwakunguMilkha, indvodzakati yaHarani, uyise waMilkha naJiskha." 
Genesis11:30 Sarayi abeyinyumba, ate bantfwana." 
Genesis11:31 Thera watsatsa Abrama, indvodzana yakhe, naLoti, umtukulu wakhe umsa waHarani, namalukatana wakhe Sarayi, labengumka-Abrama, umsa wakhe, wahamba nabo esuka e-Uri yemaKhaledi, bacondze eveni laseKhenani. Batsi kube befike eHarani, bakha khona." 
Genesis11:32 Thera wafela lapho eHarani asaneminyaka lengema-205. 
Genesis12:1 Simakadze watsi ku-Abrama: “Phuma eveni lakini, nasetihlotjeni takho, nasemndenini weyihlo, uye eveni lengitakukhombisa lona." 
Genesis12:2 Ngitakwenta ube sive lesikhulu, ngikubusise, ngente libito lakho libe likhulu, wena ube sibusiso." 
Genesis12:3 Ngitababusisa labakubusisako, ngibacalekise labakucalekisako. Tive tonkhe temhlaba tiyawubusiswa ngawe.”" 
Genesis12:4 Ngako-ke Abrama wahamba, njengobe Simakadze abesamtjelile, Loti wahamba naye. Abrama abesaneminyaka lengema-75 budzala, nakasuka eHarani." 
Genesis12:5 Abrama watsatsa Sarayi, umkakhe, naLoti, indvodzana yemnakabo, netimphahla tabo labesebatigcogcile, netisebenti labesebatitfole eHarani; bahamba nato baya eveni laseKhenani. Batsi kube befike eveni laseKhenani," 
Genesis12:6 Abrama wahamba wadzabula live, waze wefika eShekhemu, ngasema-okhini aseMore. EmaKhenani abehlala kulelo live ngaleso sikhatsi." 
Genesis12:7 Simakadze wabonakala ku-Abrama, watsi: “Lelive ngiyawulinika titukulwane takho.” Abrama wakhela Simakadze lilati, ngobe abebonakele lapho kuye." 
Genesis12:8 Wesuka waya etintsabeni tangasemphumalanga neBetheli, wafike wemisa lithende lakhe khona; iBetheli beyingasenshonalanga, i-Ayi beyingasemphumalanga. Nakhona lapho wafike wakhela Simakadze lilati; wakhuleka kuSimakadze." 
Genesis12:9 Emvakwaloko Abrama wahamba wacondza ngaseningizimu neKhenani. 
Genesis12:10 Kwase kuba nendlala lenkhulu eKhenani. Ngako-ke Abrama wehlela eGibhithe; wahlala khona sikhashana, ngobe indlala yayiyinkhulu kakhulu eKhenani." 
Genesis12:11 Watsi nasatawufika eGibhithe, wakhuluma kumkakhe Sarayi watsi: “Ase ulalele la: Ngiyakwati kutsi ungumfati lomuhle, nalobukekako." 
Genesis12:12 EmaGibhithe atawutsi angakubona atsi: ‘Ngumkakhe lo,’ bese ayangibulala, wena angakubulali." 
Genesis12:13 Ngako-ke ubotsi ungudzadzewetfu, khona kutangihambela kahle ngisindze ngenca yakho.”" 
Genesis12:14 Watsi Abrama nakewela umnyele angena eGibhithe, emaGibhithe akhangwa buhle balomfati." 
Genesis12:15 Tindvuna taFaro tatsi kube timbone, tambabata kuFaro; wase uyatsatfwa-ke uyiswa esigodlweni saFaro." 
Genesis12:16 Ngenca yalomfati, Abrama waphatseka kahle: Wanikwa timvu netimbuti, netinkhomo, netimbongolo letindvuna naletinsikati, nemakamela, netisebenti letidvuna naletisikati." 
Genesis12:17 Kepha Simakadze washaya Faro nemndeni wakhe ngetinhlupho letinkhulu ngenca yaSarayi, umka-Abrama." 
Genesis12:18 Ngako-ke Faro wabita Abrama, watsi kuye: “Yini lena loyente kimi? Awukangitjeli ngani kutsi lona ngumkakho?" 
Genesis12:19 Ushitoleni kutsi ngudzadzewenu, ngaze ngamtsatsa waba ngumkami? Nangu-ke umkakho, mtsatse, uhambe naye.”" 
Genesis12:20 Faro watfumela emancusa ku-Abrama, amhambisa kanye nemkakhe, nako konkhe labesanako." 
Genesis13:1 Ngako-ke Abrama wakhuphuka eGibhithe, yena nemkakhe, nako konkhe labesanako, wahamba naLoti, baya ngaseningizimu neKhenani." 
Genesis13:2 Abrama abesacebe kakhulu: asanemfuyo, nesiliva, negolide." 
Genesis13:3 Wesuka eningizimu neKhenani wacocoma ngekutfutsa, waze wefika ngaseBetheli. Waphindze wesuka lapho waya endzaweni lesemkhatsini weBetheli ne-Ayi, lapho abeke wemisa khona lithende kucala," 
Genesis13:4 wakha nelilati. Abrama wafike lapho wakhuleka kuSimakadze. 
Genesis13:5 Naye Loti, labehamba na-Abrama, abesanetimvu, netimbuti, netinkhomo kanye nemndeni wakhe netisebenti takhe." 
Genesis13:6 Ngako-ke lelo live lalingeke lisabenela kahle-hle, ngobe timphahla tabo tase titinyenti kangangekutsi babengabe basahlala ndzawonye." 
Genesis13:7 Kwavela kucabana emkhatsini webelusi baka-Abrama nebelusi bakaLoti. Ngaleso sikhatsi emaKhenani nemaPheresi abesahlala kulelo live. 
Genesis13:8 Ngako Abrama watsi kuLoti: “Tsine nawe sitihlobo. Ngako-ke akukafaneli kutsi sicabane ngenca yekucabana kwebelusi betfu. 
Genesis13:9 Angitsi uyalibona lonkhe lelive? Asehlukane. Nawukhetsa kuya ngesancele, mine ngitakuya ngesekudla; nawukhetsa kuya ngesekudla, mine ngitakuya ngesancele.”" 
Genesis13:10 Loti watsi naphakamisa emehlo akhe, wabona litsafa lelinesihlambo semfula iJordane, linemanti lenele yonkhe indzawo, kuze kuyewufika eSowari; lalinjengensimi yaSimakadze nanjengelive laseGibhithe. Ngalesikhatsi Simakadze abesengakayibhubhisi iSodoma neGomora." 
Genesis13:11 Ngako-ke Loti wakhetsa lonkhe litsafa lelalinesihlambo semfula iJordane, wacondza ngasemphumalanga. Kwaba kwehlukana kwabo-ke njalo." 
Genesis13:12 Abrama wahlala eveni laseKhenani, Loti yena wayawuhlala emkhatsini wemiti lesetsafeni lemfula, wemisa lithende lakhe edvute neSodoma." 
Genesis13:13 Kepha bantfu baseSodoma babekhohlakele, bona kakhulu kuSimakadze." 
Genesis13:14 Kwatsi Loti nasehlukene na-Abrama, Simakadze watsi ku-Abrama: “Phakamisa emehlo akho, ubuke ngasenyakatfo, nangaseningizimu, nangasemphumalanga, nangasenshonalanga." 
Genesis13:15 Lonkhe lelive lolibonako ngitawulinika wena netitukulwane takho kuze kube phakadze. 
Genesis13:16 Titukulwane takho ngiyawutenta tibe ngangelutfuli lwemhlaba, kangangekutsi nakukhona longabala lutfuli lwemhlaba, netitukulwane takho angatibala." 
Genesis13:17 Sukuma, uhambe ulidzabule ekhatsi ngebudze nangebubanti balo lelive, ngobe ngitakunika lona.”" 
Genesis13:18 Ngako-ke, Abrama walitfutsa lithende lakhe walimisa ngasetihlahleni tema-okhi eMamre, leseHebroni; wafike lapho wakhela Simakadze lilati." 
Genesis14:1 Emakhosi lamane: Amrafeli, inkhosi yaseShinari, na-Ariyoki, inkhosi yase-Elasare, naKhedolawomere, inkhosi yase-Elamu, naThidali, inkhosi yetive," 
Genesis14:2 ahloma ayawuhlasela lamanye emakhosi lasihlanu, lekwakuboBhera, inkhosi yaseSodoma, naBhisha, inkhosi yaseGomora, naShinabe, inkhosi yase-Adema, naShemebere, inkhosi yaseSeboyimu, nenkhosi yaseBhela, leyiSowari." 
Genesis14:3 Onkhe lamakhosi ahlangana ndzawonye eTsafeni laseSidimu, lesekwaba Lwandle Lweluswayi." 
Genesis14:4 Kwase kuphele iminyaka leli-12 baphansi kwenkhosi Khedolawomere; kepha emnyakeni weli-13 bamhlubuka. 
Genesis14:5 Ngemnyaka weli-14 weta Khedolawomere nalamanye emakhosi labenawo, balwa behlula emaRefa e-Ashtherothe Khanayimu, nemaZuzi eHhamu, nema-Emi eShave Khiriyathayimu," 
Genesis14:6 nemaHori entsabeni yawo iSeyiri, kwadzimate kwaba ngu-Eli Pharani ngasehlane." 
Genesis14:7 Base bayancandzeka, beta e-Eni Mishpati leliyiKhadeshi, balicitsa lonkhe live lema-Amaleki, nelema-Amori labehlala eHasesoni Thamari." 
Genesis14:8 Inkhosi yaseSodoma, neyaseGomora, neyase-Adema, neyaseSeboyimu, neyaseBhela leliyiSowari, ahloma aya kulelitsafa laseSidimu," 
Genesis14:9 kuyakulwa nemakhosi boKhedolawomere wase-Elamu, naThidali inkhosi yetive, na-Amrafeli waseShinari, na-Ariyoki wase-Elasare. Emakhosi lamane alwa nemakhosi lasihlanu." 
Genesis14:10 Litsafa laseSidimu laligcwele imigodzi yelitiyela. Ngesikhatsi emakhosi aseSodoma abaleka, agcumukela kulemigodzi, lamanye abalekela etintsabeni." 
Genesis14:11 Ngako-ke lamakhosi lamane atitsatsa tonkhe timphahla taseSodoma netaseGomora nemiphako yawo yonkhe, ahamba." 
Genesis14:12 Atsatsa naLoti labeyindvodzana yemnakabo-Abrama, njengobe abehlala eSodoma, naye bamtfumba kanye netimphahla takhe." 
Genesis14:13 Lomunye waphunyuka wabaleka wayawubikela Abrama, umHebheru, labehlala ngasetihlahleni tema-okhi aMamre, um-Amori, umnakabo-Eshkoli na-Aneri. Bonkhe-ke laba bebabambisene na-Abrama." 
Genesis14:14 Abrama watsi kube eve kutsi umntfwanemnakabo bamtfumbile, wabutsa emadvodza labetalelwe ekhaya lakhe labececeshelwe timphi. Asawonkhe abesangema-318. Abrama nalamadvodza wacosha lamakhosi lamane wadzimate wawefikisa ngakaDani." 
Genesis14:15 Kwatsi ebusuku wahlelembisa libutfo lakhe ngeticheme talo. Wawahlasela wawehlula, wawacosha waze wawabeka eHoba, enyakatfo neDamaseko." 
Genesis14:16 Watitsatsa tonkhe timphahla wabuya nato kanye naLoti netimphahla takhe nalabasikati kanye nalabanye labanyenti. 
Genesis14:17 Abrama asabuya ekwehluleni Khedolawomere nalamanye emakhosi labenawo, inkhosi yaseSodoma yaphuma yaya kumhlangabeta eSigodzini saseShave, lekuSigodzi Senkhosi." 
Genesis14:18 NaMelkhisedeki, inkhosi yaseSalema, leyayingumphristi waNkulunkulu Losetikwako Konkhe, yaletsa kuye sinkhwa neliwayini." 
Genesis14:19 Melkhisedeki wabusisa Abrama watsi: “Abrama akabusiswe nguNkulunkulu Losetikwako Konkhe, uMdali welizulu nemhlaba." 
Genesis14:20 Akabongwe Nkulunkulu Losetikwako Konkhe lonikete letitsa takho entsendzeni yesandla sakho.” Abrama wanika Melkhisedeki kwelishumi kwako konkhe. 
Genesis14:21 Inkhosi yaseSodoma yatsi ku-Abrama: “Buyisa bonkhe labantfu bami, wena utitsatsele letimphahla.”" 
Genesis14:22 Kodvwa Abrama watsi enkhosini yaseSodoma: “Ngiphakamisela sandla sami, ngifunga kuSimakadze Nkulunkulu Losetikwako Konkhe, uMdali welizulu nemhlaba," 
Genesis14:23 kutsi ngingeke ngitsatse ngisho nelucotfo nome umchilo weticatfulo nome yini lekuyakho. Angifuni kutsi bese utsi: ‘Abrama ngimcebisile.’ 
Genesis14:24 Kute lengitakutsatsa ngaphandle kwaloko lokudliwe ngulamadvodza akami, nesabelo salamadvodza bengihamba nawo: bo-Aneri, na-Eshkoli, naMamre. Abatsatse sabelo sabo.”" 
Genesis15:1 Emvakwaloko livi laSimakadze lefika ku-Abrama ngembono, latsi: “Abrama, ungesabi. Ngisihlangu sakho, umvuzo wakho utawuba mkhulu.”" 
Genesis15:2 Kodvwa Abrama watsi: “Awu, Simakadze Nkulunkulu, utangiphani, ngobe seloku anginamntfwana? Indlalifa yami kutawuba ngu-Eliyezeri waseDamaseko.”" 
Genesis15:3 Abrama wachubeka watsi: “Ase ubuke nje, awungiphanga ntalo, lesisebenti lesesitalelwe la endlini yami ngiso lesitawuba yindlalifa yami.”" 
Genesis15:4 Livi laSimakadze latsi kuye: “Lowo muntfu angeke abe yindlalifa yakho, kodvwa yindvodzana yakho, lephuma elukhalweni lwakho, letawuba yindlalifa yakho.”" 
Genesis15:5 Simakadze wamkhiphela ngaphandle watsi: “Buka etulu esibhakabhakeni ubale tinkhanyeti, nawungatibala.” Wachubeka watsi kuye: “Nentalo yakho-ke iyawuba ngako.”" 
Genesis15:6 Abrama wakholwa nguSimakadze; ngenca yaloko Simakadze wamemukela ngekutsi ulungile. 
Genesis15:7 Watsi kuye: “NginguSimakadze lowakukhipa e-Uri yemaKhaledi, kutsi ngitekupha lelive libe lakho.”" 
Genesis15:8 Kepha Abrama watsi: “Nkhosi, Simakadze, ngitakwati ngani kutsi lelive litawuba ngelami?”" 
Genesis15:9 Wamphendvula watsi: “Ngiletsele sitfokati lesineminyaka lemitsatfu budzala, nembutikati leneminyaka lemitsatfu budzala, nesihhanca lesineminyaka lemitsatfu budzala, nelituba kanye nelizini lelivukutfu.”" 
Genesis15:10 Konkhe loku wakuletsa, wakujuba ekhatsi. Lolo nalolo lucetu walubeka macondzana nalolunye, kodvwa tinyoni akatijubanga." 
Genesis15:11 Emangce ehlela etidvunjini, kepha Abrama wawacosha." 
Genesis15:12 Latsi nalishonako lilanga, Abrama wehlelwa butfongo lobukhulu, walala; asalele wefikelwa luvalo nekwesaba lokukhulu." 
Genesis15:13 Simakadze watsi ku-Abrama: “Yati ngempela kutsi situkulwane sakho siyawuba sihambi eveni lekungesilo laso; siyawuba sigcili sakulelo live, sigcilateke iminyaka lengema-400." 
Genesis15:14 Kodvwa ngiyawusehlulela leso sive lesiyawube sigcilata lesitukulwane sakho; emvakwaloko lesitukulwane sakho siyawuphuma sesinetimphahla letinyenti. 
Genesis15:15 Wena-ke utawukhula, ufe ngekuthula sewumdzala kakhulu, ungcwatjwe." 
Genesis15:16 Lesitukulwane siyawuphindze sibuye lapha sesingesesine, ngobe bubi ba-Amori abukapheli.”" 
Genesis15:17 Kwatsi ngekushona kwelilanga sekumnyama, kwabonakala litiko lemlilo, nelilangabi lemlilo lendlula emkhatsini waletincetu." 
Genesis15:18 Ngalo lelo langa Simakadze wenta sivumelwane na-Abrama, watsi: “Lelive ngilinika situkulwane sakho, kusukela emfuleni waseGibhithe kuze kufike emfuleni lomkhulu iYufrathe," 
Genesis15:19 lekulive lemaKheni, nemaKhenizi, nemaKhadimoni," 
Genesis15:20 nemaHethi, nemaPheresi, nemaRefa," 
Genesis15:21 nema-Amori, nemaKhenani, nemaGirigashi, nemaJebhusi.”" 
Genesis16:1 Sarayi, umka-Abrama, abengenamntfwana. Abenesisebenti lesasingumGibhithe lesasibitwa ngekutsi nguHagari." 
Genesis16:2 Sarayi watsi ku-Abrama: “Ase ubuke, Simakadze ungimile intalo. Ngena kulesisebenti sami, mhlawumbe ngitawutfola ngaso bantfwana.” Abrama walilalela livi laSarayi." 
Genesis16:3 Abrama asahlale iminyaka lelishumi eveni laseKhenani, Sarayi, umka-Abrama, watsatsa Hagari, sisebenti sakhe lesasingumGibhithe, wasinika Abrama kutsi sibe ngumkakhe." 
Genesis16:4 Abrama wangena kuHagari; Hagari wase uyakhulelwa. Watsi kube Hagari abone kutsi sewukhulelwe, wase wedzelela loSarayi." 
Genesis16:5 Sarayi wakhuluma ku-Abrama watsi: “Nguwe lofanele kulungisa letintfo lesetonakala. Ngimi lengakunika loHagari, kodvwa utsite kube abone kutsi sewukhulelwe, wase uyangedzelela. Simakadze akasehlulele abone kutsi ngubani lowonile emkhatsini wakho nami.”" 
Genesis16:6 Abrama watsi kuSarayi: “Lalela la, Hagari sisebenti sakho, uphetfwe nguwe. Mphatse njengekubona kwakho.” Sarayi wase umphatsa ngelulaka loHagari, wadzimate Hagari wabaleka." 
Genesis16:7 Ingilosi yaSimakadze yakhandza Hagari ngasesicojeni semanti, ehlane, endleleni leya eShuri," 
Genesis16:8 yatsi: “Hagari, sisebenti saSarayi, uphumaphi? Uyaphi?” Waphendvula watsi: “Ngibalekela Sarayi, umphatsi wami.”" 
Genesis16:9 Ingilosi yaSimakadze yatsi kuye: “Ncandzeka, buyela kuSarayi, umphatsi wakho, ufike utitfobe ngaphansi kwakhe.”" 
Genesis16:10 Ingilosi yaSimakadze yachubeka yatsi: “Intalo yakho ngitayandzisa kakhulu kangangekutsi kute loyawuba nemandla ekuyibala.” 
Genesis16:11 Ingilosi yachubeka yatsi kuye: “Ase ubuke nje, sewukhulelwe, utawutala indvodzana uyetse libito utsi ngu-Ishmayeli, ngobe Simakadze ukuvile kuhlupheka kwakho." 
Genesis16:12 Uyawuba ngumuntfu lonjengembongolo yesiganga, aphambane naye wonkhe umuntfu, bonkhe bantfu baphambane naye. Uyawuhlala ngekuchukulutana netihlobo takhe.”" 
Genesis16:13 Ngako-ke wase wetsa loSimakadze lowakhuluma kuye watsi: “UnguNkulunkulu longibonako,” ngobe watsi: “Kambe ngabe ngibone Nkulunkulu ngabuye ngaphilela kutsi ngikhulume ngaloko?”" 
Genesis16:14 Ngiko nje lomtfombo losemkhatsini weKhadeshi neBheredi ubitwa ngekutsi yiBheri Lahayi Rohi lokusho kutsi: “Umtfombo waLophilako Longibonako.” 
Genesis16:15 Hagari watalela Abrama indvodzana; Abrama wayetsa libito watsi ngu-Ishmayeli. 
Genesis16:16 Abrama abesaneminyaka lengema-86, mhlazana Hagari amtalela Ishmayeli." 
Genesis17:1 Kwatsi Abrama nasaneminyaka lengema-99 budzala, Simakadze wabonakala kuye watsi: “NginguNkulunkulu Somandla; hamba entsandvweni yami, ube msulwa." 
Genesis17:2 Ngitakwenta sivumelwane sami nawe ngikwandzise kakhulukati.” 
Genesis17:3 Abrama wakhotsamisa buso bakhe, batsintsa phansi, Nkulunkulu watsi kuye:" 
Genesis17:4 “Nasi-ke sivumelwane sami nawe: Uyawuba nguyise wetive letinyenti. 
Genesis17:5 Libito lakho lingeke lisaba ngu-Abrama, kodvwa selitawuba ngu-Abrahama, ngobe sengikwente uyise wetive letinyenti." 
Genesis17:6 Ngitakupha intalo lenyenti, ngikwente tive letinyenti, labanye kuto bayawuba ngemakhosi." 
Genesis17:7 “Ngiyawumisa sivumelwane sami nawe nentalo yakho, emvakwakho, etitukulwaneni ngetitukulwane, kube sivumelwane saphakadze. Ngiyawuba nguNkulunkulu wakho naNkulunkulu wetitukulwane takho emvakwakho." 
Genesis17:8 Lelive lewusihambi kulo ngiyawulinika wena netitukulwane takho emvakwakho. Lonkhe lelive laseKhenani liyawuba letitukulwane takho, libe lifa lato phakadze naphakadze, mine ngiyawuba nguNkulunkulu wato.”" 
Genesis17:9 Nkulunkulu wase utsi ku-Abrahama: “Wena-ke, sewuyawugcina lesivumelwane sami, wena nentalo yakho emvakwakho, tonkhe titukulwane tayo." 
Genesis17:10 Naku-ke kwekugcina sivumelwane sami lekufanele ukwente wena kanye nentalo yakho emvakwakho: Bonkhe labadvuna niyawubasoka. 
Genesis17:11 Niyawusoka; loko kuyawuba luphawu lwesivumelwane sami nani. 
Genesis17:12 Losanemalanga lasiphohlongo atelwe, niyawumsoka: Bonkhe labadvuna kuto tonkhe titukulwane tenu, ngisho nabo bonkhe labatalelwe kakho nalabatsengwe ngemali yakho etihambini tetive letingesito takini." 
Genesis17:13 Lowo lotalelwe endlini yakho nalotsengiwe, bonkhe kufanele basokwe. Ngako-ke lesivumelwane siyawubasemtimbeni wenu, kube sivumelwane saphakadze." 
Genesis17:14 Wonkhe lomdvuna longakasoki uyawuncunywa esiveni sakubo, ngobe wephule sivumelwane sami.”" 
Genesis17:15 Nkulunkulu watsi ku-Abrahama: “Ungabe usambita umkakho ngekutsi nguSarayi, kodvwa ubosale utsi nguSara." 
Genesis17:16 Ngiyawumbusisa, ngikunike indvodzana ngaye. Ngiyawumbusisa, abe ngunina wetive. Kuyawuvela kuye emakhosi etive.”" 
Genesis17:17 Abrahama wakhotsamisa buso bakhe, batsintsa phansi, wahleka, akhuluma yedvwana enhlitiyweni atsi: “Konje kungenteka yini kutsi indvodza itale umntfwana seyineminyaka lelikhulu budzala? Kona kungenteka yini kutsi Sara atale umntfwana asaneminyaka lengema-90?”" 
Genesis17:18 Abrahama waphumisela watsi kuNkulunkulu: “Kube mane Ishmayeli abengemukeleka kuwe.” 
Genesis17:19 Kepha Nkulunkulu watsi: “Cha, Sara, umkakho, utakutalela indvodzana, uyetse libito utsi ngu-Isaka. Ngitawumisa sivumelwane sami naye nentalo yakhe kube sivumelwane saphakadze." 
Genesis17:20 Ngisivile sicelo sakho nga-Ishmayeli. Naye ngitambusisa ngimente achume andze kakhulu. Utawuba nguyise wetikhulu letili-12, ngimente abe sive lesikhulu." 
Genesis17:21 Kepha ngiyawumisa sivumelwane sami na-Isaka, latakutalela yena Sara ngaso lesikhatsi ngemnyaka lotako.”" 
Genesis17:22 Watsi kube Nkulunkulu acedze kukhuluma na-Abrahama, wamshiya, wenyuka." 
Genesis17:23 Ngalo lelo langa Abrahama watsatsa Ishmayeli, indvodzana yakhe, nabo bonkhe lababetalelwe kakhe, nabo bonkhe lababetsengwe ngemali yakhe; bonkhe labadvuna lababekakhe wabasoka, njengobe Nkulunkulu abemtjelile." 
Genesis17:24 Abrahama abesaneminyaka lengema-99 budzala, mhlazana asokwa." 
Genesis17:25 Ishmayeli indvodzana yakhe abesaneminyaka leli-13 budzala, mhlazana asokwa." 
Genesis17:26 Bo-Abrahama nendvodzana yakhe, Ishmayeli, basokwa langa linye bobabili." 
Genesis17:27 Bonkhe labadvuna lababesemndenini wakhe lababetalelwe kakhe nalabo lababetsengwe ngemali yakhe kubetive basokwa kanye naye. 
Genesis18:1 Simakadze wabonakala ku-Abrahama ngasema-okhini aMamre, ahleti ngasemnyango welithende lakhe ngesikhatsi sekushisa kwelilanga." 
Genesis18:2 Abrahama watsi nakaphakamisa emehlo, wabona emadvodza lamatsatfu eme embikwakhe. Watsi kube awabone, wesuka emnyango welithende lakhe wagijima wawahlangabeta, wafike wakhotsama," 
Genesis18:3 watsi: “Banumzane, nangitfole umusa emehlweni enu, ningayendluli inceku yenu." 
Genesis18:4 Ase nginiletsele liyakana lemanti nitewugeza tinyawo tenu, bese niphumula la emtfuntini walesihlahla." 
Genesis18:5 Ngitawulandza lucetwana lwesinkhwa, khona nitewudla kucala ningakahambi, njengobe naku senifike ekhaya lenceku yenu.” Ngako-ke batsi kuye: “Kulungile, yenta njengobe sewushito.”" 
Genesis18:6 Abrahama waphutfuma ethendeni kuSara, watsi: “Sheshisa utsatse emabinta lamatsatfu afulaha uyibhuce, wente emacebelengwane.”" 
Genesis18:7 Abrahama wagijima waya etinkhomeni, wafike wakhetsa litfole lelihle lelikhuluphele, walinika sisebenti, naso saphutfuma salilungisa." 
Genesis18:8 Watsatsa emasi, nelubisi, nalenyama yelitfole leyase ilungisiwe, wakubeka embikwawo; yena wema eceleni kwawo phansi kwesihlahla ngesikhatsi asadla." 
Genesis18:9 Ambuta atsi: “Uphi Sara, umkakho?” Wawaphendvula watsi: “Usethendeni.”" 
Genesis18:10 Simakadze watsi kuye: “Impela ngitawubuya kuwe ngemnyaka lotako ngasona lesikhatsi, Sara umkakho utawuba nendvodzana.” Sara wakuva loko, ngobe abesemnyango welithende emvakwa-Abrahama, alalele." 
Genesis18:11 Kepha bo-Abrahama naSara bese babadzala kakhulu, naSara abengasayi esikhatsini." 
Genesis18:12 Sara watihlekela nje, wadzimate watsi: “Manje sengimdzala kangaka, nenkhosi yami seyigugile, utsi ngingabe ngisaba nayo lenjabulo?”" 
Genesis18:13 Simakadze watsi ku-Abrahama: “Uhlekeleni Sara, atsi: ‘Ngitawutala umntfwana sengimdzala kangaka?’" 
Genesis18:14 Kukhona yini lokungamehlula Simakadze? Njengobe sengishito, ngitawubuya la kuwe ngemnyaka lotako. Sara utawuba nendvodzana.”" 
Genesis18:15 Kodvwa Sara waphika ngenca yekwesaba watsi: “Angikahleki.” Kepha waphendvula watsi: “Cha, vele uhlekile.”" 
Genesis18:16 Lamadvodza esuka lapho ahamba asalibhekise eSodoma, Abrahama wawaphekeletela, entela kuwakhombisa indlela." 
Genesis18:17 Simakadze wase utsi: “Kodvwa ngingamfihlela yini Abrahama loku lengitakwenta? 
Genesis18:18 Phela, Abrahama utawuba sive lesikhulu lesinemandla, tonkhe tive temhlaba tiyawubusiswa ngaye." 
Genesis18:19 Cha, ngeke, ngobe Abrahama ngimkhetsile kutsi ayale emadvodzana akhe netitukulwane takhe emvakwakhe, kutsi bagcine intsandvo yaSimakadze ngekwenta lokuhle nalokulungile. Khona-ke Simakadze uyawunika Abrahama loko lametsembisa kona.”" 
Genesis18:20 Simakadze waphindza wakhuluma ku-Abrahama, watsi: “Njengobe kunekukhala lokukhulu ngeSodoma neGomora, nesono sabo simatima kakhulu," 
Genesis18:21 ngitakwehla ngiyewubona kutsi ngabe bente njengekusho kwesikhalo lesifike kimi yini. Nangabe akunjalo, ngitakwati.”" 
Genesis18:22 Ngako-ke lamadvodza esuka lapho acondza ngaseSodoma; kepha Abrahama wasala embikwaSimakadze. 
Genesis18:23 Abrahama wasondzela kuSimakadze watsi: “Uyawubabhubhisa ngempela yini labalungile kanye nalababi? 
Genesis18:24 Nangabe-ke kulelidolobha kukhona labalungile labangema-50, utawulibhubhisa yini? Ungete walisindzisa yini ngenca yalaba labalungile labangema-50?" 
Genesis18:25 Akube khashane nawe kwenta intfo lenje! Ungababhubhisi labalungile kanye nalababi, bese labalungile baba njengalabangakalungi! Akube khashane nawe loko. Angeke yini umehluleli wemhlaba wonkhe ente kulunga?”" 
Genesis18:26 Simakadze wamphendvula watsi: “Nangikhandze bantfu labalungile labangema-50 eSodoma, yonkhe leyo ndzawo ngiyawuyisindzisa ngenca yabo.”" 
Genesis18:27 Abrahama waphindze wakhuluma futsi, watsi: “Ngiyacolisa kuba nesibindzi sekukhuluma neNkhosi yami, mine lengilutfuli nemlotsa." 
Genesis18:28 Nakwenteka babe ngema-45, utalibhubhisa yini ngenca yalaba labasilele?” Simakadze waphendvula watsi: “Ngingeke ngilibhubhise, nangikhandze kutsi labalungile bangema-45.”" 
Genesis18:29 Abrahama waphindze wakhuluma kuye futsi, watsi: “Ase ngitsi-ke kutfolakala kutsi labalungile bangema-40.” Wamphendvula watsi: “Nakukhona labangema-40 labalungile, ngingeke ngilibhubhise.”" 
Genesis18:30 Abrahama watsi: “Ngicela kutsi iNkhosi ingatfukutseli ngekutsi ngisakhuluma. Nakwenteka-ke kutfolakala labalungile bangema-30?” Wamphendvula watsi: “Ngingeke ngilibhubhise, nangikhandza kutsi labalungile bangema-30.”" 
Genesis18:31 Abrahama watsi: “Ngiyacolisa kuba nesibindzi sekuchubeka ngikhulume neNkhosi. Ase ngitsi-ke ukhandza labalungile bangema-20?” Wamphendvula watsi: “Ngingeke ngilibhubhise, nangikhandza labalungile bangema-20.”" 
Genesis18:32 Abrahama watsi: “Ngicela kutsi iNkhosi ingatfukutseli ngobe sengitawukhuluma kwekugcina-ke manje. Ase ngitsi-ke ukhandza labalungile balishumi?” Wamphendvula watsi: “Ngenca yalabalungile labalishumi ngingeke ngilibhubhise.” 
Genesis18:33 Watsi kube acedze kukhuluma na-Abrahama, Simakadze wase uyahamba; Abrahama wabuyela ethendeni lakhe." 
Genesis19:1 Natifika eSodoma letingilosi letimbili, Loti abehleti esangweni lalowo muti. Watsi kube atibone, Loti wasukuma watihlangabeta; watikhotsamela," 
Genesis19:2 watsi kuto: “Makhosi, ngiyanicela kutsi niphambuke nitewungenisa endlini yenceku yenu kulobusuku balamuhla, khona nitewugeza tinyawo tenu. Kusasa ngeluvivi seningahamba niye lapho niya khona.” Kodvwa taphendvula tatsi: “Cha, sitawuhlala lapha ngaphandle.”" 
Genesis19:3 Kepha Loti watincenga kakhulu letingilosi, tadzimate taphambuka taya tangenisa endlini kakhe. Watentela lidzili, watibhakela sinkhwa lesite imbiliso, tadla." 
Genesis19:4 Kepha tatsi tisengakalali, onkhe emadvodza alomuti waseSodoma, lamadzala nalamancane, ayitungeleta lendlu." 
Genesis19:5 Amemeta Loti atsi: “Aphi lamadvodza langenise lapha kakho kuyo lentsambama? Wakhiphe uwaletse la, khona sitewulala nawo!”" 
Genesis19:6 Loti waphuma waya kuwo, wavala umnyango emvakwakhe," 
Genesis19:7 watsi: “Ngiyanincenga, bomnaketfu, kutsi ningayenti lentfo lembi kangaka." 
Genesis19:8 Ase nilalele la, nginemadvodzakati lamabili langazange asalale nemuntfu lomdvuna. Angimane nginiletsele wona, nente lenikutsandzako kuwo. Kepha ningenti lutfo kulamadvodza, ngobe angenise endlini kami.”" 
Genesis19:9 Kepha atsi kuye: “Khwesha wena mchamuki-ndzini, sewufuna kuba ngumehluleli wetfu! Wena-ke sesitakuphatsa matima kakhulu kunawo.” Bafuca Loti bamcindzetela betama kwephula sivalo." 
Genesis19:10 Kepha lamadvodza lamabili aveta tandla tawo, advonsa Loti amngenisa endlini kuwo, avala umnyango." 
Genesis19:11 Ashaya lamadvodza labesemnyango ngebumphumphutse onkhe lawo labengaphandle kwendlu, lamancane nalamadzala, kangangekutsi abatse ayawufuna umnyango angete awutfola." 
Genesis19:12 Lamadvodza lamabili atsi kuLoti: “Nangabe bakhona labanye bantfu lonabo, labanjengebakhwenyana, nemadvodzana, nemadvodzakati nome ngangubani lokulelidolobha, bakhiphe lapha," 
Genesis19:13 ngobe lendzawo sesitayibhubhisa, ngesizatfu sekutsi sikhalo ngalabantfu balapha sesikhulu kakhulu kuSimakadze; ngako Simakadze usitfume kutsi siteyibhubhisa.”" 
Genesis19:14 Ngako-ke Loti waphuma waya kubakhwenyana bakhe lababetawutsatsa emadvodzakati akhe, wefike watsi: “Sheshisani siphume, ngobe Simakadze sewutayibhubhisa lendzawo.” Kepha bamtsatsa njengemuntfu lonamako nje." 
Genesis19:15 Ekuseni kuseluvivi tingilosi tamgcugcuta Loti tatsi: “Vuka, utsatse umkakho nemadvodzakati akho lamabili lakhona la, ningahle nehlelwe ngulesijeziso salelidolobha.”" 
Genesis19:16 Kepha Loti wabina; ngako-ke ngobe Simakadze waba nesihawu kuye, lamadvodza lamabili ababamba ngetandla, yena nemkakhe kanye nemadvodzakati akhe abakhiphela ngaphandle kwalelidolobha." 
Genesis19:17 Atsi kube abakhiphele ngaphandle, lomunye wawo watsi: “Balekani nitewusindza! Ningasabuki nasemuva, ningemi ndzawo kulelitsafa. Balekani nicondze ngasetintsabeni, ningahle nehlelwe ngulesijeziso.”" 
Genesis19:18 Loti waphendvula watsi: “Cha, Nkhosi, akungabi njalo." 
Genesis19:19 Inceku yakho itfole umusa emehlweni akho, wayentela sihawu lesikhulu ngekusindzisa imphilo yayo; kodvwa ngingeke ngikwati kubalekela etintsabeni, ngobe lesijeziso singahle singijubele ngembili, bese ngiyafa." 
Genesis19:20 Ase ubuke naliya lidolobha ngesheya, kumalula kubalekela kulo ngobe lisedvutane, futsi lincane. Ngicela kubalekela kulelidolobha lelincane, khona ngitewusindza.”" 
Genesis19:21 Yatsi kuye: “Yebo-ke naloko ngiyakwemukela. Ngingeke ngilibhubhise lelidolobha lokhuluma ngalo. 
Genesis19:22 Phangisa-ke ubalekele khona; ngobe ngingeke ngente lutfo ungakefiki khona.” Ngako-ke, njengobe Loti watsi lelidolobha lincane, lase letsiwa ngekutsi yiSowari." 
Genesis19:23 Watsi Loti nakefika eSowari, lilanga lase liphuma." 
Genesis19:24 Simakadze wanisa imvula yesibabule nemlilo, iphuma ezulwini, kwana etikweSodoma neGomora." 
Genesis19:25 Wawabhubhisa lawo madolobha kanye nalo lonkhe lelo tsafa, nebantfu bawo bonkhe, nako konkhe lokwakumile emhlabatsini." 
Genesis19:26 Kepha umkaLoti wabuka emuva, wagucuka masinyane waba yinsika yeluswayi." 
Genesis19:27 Abrahama wavuka ekuseni kuseluvivi waya kulendzawo lapho abehlangene naSimakadze khona. 
Genesis19:28 Wabuka entansi ngaseSodoma neGomora, ematsafeni angakhona. Wabona intfutfu yalelo live yenyuka njengemusi wenkhehlewane yemlilo." 
Genesis19:29 Ngako-ke Nkulunkulu nakabhubhisa lamadolobha alawo matsafa, wakhumbula Abrahama ngekutsi akhiphe Loti ekubhujisweni kwalamadolobha, Loti labehlala kuwo." 
Genesis19:30 Njengobe Loti bekesaba kuhlala eSowari, waphuma wayawuhlala etintsabeni yena nemadvodzakati akhe lamabili; likhaya labo kwaba ngumgedze." 
Genesis19:31 Lendvodzakati yaLoti yematubulo yakhuluma kulena lencane, yatsi: “Babe wetfu semdzala, kantsi futsi kulelive kute indvodza lengalala natsi njengobe bonkhe bantfu benta." 
Genesis19:32 Kota, sitewunatsisa babe liwayini, bese silala naye, sentele kutatitfolela bantfwana kubabe.”" 
Genesis19:33 Kulobo busuku uyise bamnatsisa liwayini, wadzakwa. Litubulo lakhe langena kuye, lalala neyise. Loti akazange asamuve nekutsi wangena nini waphuma nini engutjeni, ngobe bekadzakwe kakhulu." 
Genesis19:34 Ngakusasa lelitubulo latsi kulona lomncane: “Awuboni-ke, mine ngilele naye babe ebusuku bayitolo, asiphindze simnatsise futsi nalamuhla bese uyangena nawe ulale naye, sentele kutitfolela bantfwana kubabe.”" 
Genesis19:35 Ngako-ke baphindza bamnatsisa uyise nakubo lobo busuku wadzakwa. Lona lomncane wahamba wafike walala neyise. Loti akamvanga nakangena nome asaphuma, ngobe bekadzakwe kakhulu." 
Genesis19:36 Ngako-ke omabili emadvodzakati aLoti akhuleliswa nguyise. 
Genesis19:37 Litubulo lakhe latala indvodzana, layetsa libito latsi nguMowabi. Unguyise wemaMowabi alamuhla." 
Genesis19:38 Lencane nayo yatala indvodzana, yayetsa libito yatsi nguBhenani. Unguyise wema-Amoni alamuhla." 
Genesis20:1 Abrahama wesuka kulelo live waya eveni laseNegevu, eningizimu naseKhenani. Wafike wahlala emkhatsini weKhadeshi neShuri; wahlalahlala eGerari." 
Genesis20:2 Wafike lapho watsi: “Sara ngudzadzewetfu.” Ngako-ke Abimeleki, inkhosi yaseGerari, yatfumela kutsi kulandvwe Sara." 
Genesis20:3 Kodvwa Nkulunkulu weta ku-Abimeleki ngeliphupho ebusuku watsi kuye: “Wena utakufa ngenca yalomfati lomtsetse, ngobe ungumfati walendvodza.”" 
Genesis20:4 Abimeleki abesengakaze wangena kuye, ngako-ke wase utsi: “Nkhosi, utasibhubhisa yini nalesive lesite licala?" 
Genesis20:5 Kantsi akasho yini Abrahama kutsi ngudzadzewabo? Naye lomfati utsite ngumnakabo. Loku ngikwente ngenhlitiyo lemhlophe, tandla tami atinacala.”" 
Genesis20:6 Nkulunkulu wamphendvula ephusheni watsi: “Yebo, ngiyati kutsi loku ukwente ngenhlitiyo lemhlophe, futsi ngimi lokuvimbile kutsi ungoni kimi, ngako angikakuvumeli kutsi umtsintse." 
Genesis20:7 Manje-ke, mncandzekise lomfati walendvodza, ngobe ingumphrofethi; itakuthandazela bese uyaphila. Kodvwa nawungamncandzekisi, ubovele wati kutsi utakufa, wena nebantfu bakho.”" 
Genesis20:8 Ngako-ke ekuseni ngeluvivi Abimeleki wavuka, wabita tonkhe tindvuna takhe, waticocela ngako konkhe loko; nato tesaba kakhulu." 
Genesis20:9 Abimeleki wabita Abrahama wambuta watsi: “Yini lena lose uyente la kitsi? Ngikone ngani, kutsi ungaze uletsele mine kanye nembuso wami lesono lesikhulu kangaka? Utenteleni letintfo bewungakafaneli kutenta?”" 
Genesis20:10 Abimeleki wachubeka watsi: “Bewucabangani, nawenta lentfo?”" 
Genesis20:11 Abrahama wamphendvula watsi: “Ngikwente ngobe ngicabange ngatsi: ‘Akukho kwesaba Nkulunkulu kulendzawo, ngako batangibulala ngenca yalomfati wami.’" 
Genesis20:12 Ngaphandle kwaloko nje, vele ungudzadzewetfu, ngobe uyindvodzakati yababe, kodvwa hhayi yamake; kodvwa noko ungumkami." 
Genesis20:13 Nkulunkulu nangikhipha endlini yababe kutsi ngizulazule, ngatsi kuSara: ‘Naku-ke lengicela ungentele kona: Yonkhe indzawo lapho sifika khona, ubobatjela ngami utsi: “Ungumnaketfu.” ’ ”" 
Genesis20:14 Abimeleki watsatsa timvu, netinkhabi, netisebenti letidvuna naletisikati, watipha Abrahama, wabuyisela Sara endvodzeni yakhe." 
Genesis20:15 Abimeleki watsi: “Buka la, nali live lami, yakha lapho utsandza khona.”" 
Genesis20:16 Wagucukela kuSara watsi: “Umnakenu sengimnike emasiliva layinkhulungwane; loku kufakaza kubo bonkhe laba kutsi awunacala, kute lokubi lokwentile.”" 
Genesis20:17 Abrahama wathandaza kuNkulunkulu. Nkulunkulu waphilisa Abimeleki, nemkakhe, netisebenti letisikati kuze bonkhe batale bantfwana." 
Genesis20:18 Phela Simakadze abesavale tonkhe titalo tebemndeni waka-Abimeleki ngenca yaSara, umka-Abrahama." 
Genesis21:1 Simakadze wabusisa Sara njengobe abeshito. Simakadze wentela Sara loko abemetsembise kona. 
Genesis21:2 Sara wakhulelwa, watalela Abrahama indvodzana ngesikhatsi lesasikhonjwe nguNkulunkulu. Abrahama abesamdzala kakhulu." 
Genesis21:3 Abrahama wayetsa libito watsi ngu-Isaka lendvodzana yakhe labeyitalelwe nguSara. 
Genesis21:4 Abrahama wayisoka indvodzana yakhe lengu-Isaka seyinemalanga lasiphohlongo budzala, njengobe Nkulunkulu abemyalile." 
Genesis21:5 Abrahama abesaneminyaka lelikhulu budzala, ngesikhatsi kutalwa indvodzana yakhe Isaka." 
Genesis21:6 Sara watsi: “Nkulunkulu ungiphe luhleko, bonkhe labayivako lendzaba bayawuhleka njengami.”" 
Genesis21:7 Wachubeka watsi: “Ngubani nje labengahle asho ku-Abrahama kutsi Sara uyawuse amunyise bantfwana? Noko sengimtalele indvodzana ebudzaleni bakhe.” 
Genesis21:8 Umntfwana wakhula, kwatsi mhlazana alunyulwa Abrahama wenta lelikhulu lidzili." 
Genesis21:9 Ngalelinye lilanga Sara wabona indvodzana yaHagari, umGibhithe, labeyitalele Abrahama, yeyisa Isaka, indvodzana yakhe." 
Genesis21:10 Ngako-ke wase utsi ku-Abrahama: “Sicoshe lesigcilikati nalendvodzana yaso, ngobe indvodzana yalesigcilikati akufanele ibe yindlalifa kanye nendvodzana yami Isaka.”" 
Genesis21:11 Loku kwamkhatsata kakhulu Abrahama, ngobe bekuphatselene nalendvodzana yakhe." 
Genesis21:12 Kodvwa Nkulunkulu watsi ku-Abrahama: “Ungakhatsateki ngenca yalomfana nangenca yalesigcilikati sakho. Loko lokushiwo nguSara kuwe kwente njengobe akutjelile, ngobe titukulwane takho tiyawubitwa nga-Isaka." 
Genesis21:13 Ngiyakwenta sive nangendvodzana yesigcilikati sakho, ngobe nayo iyintalo yakho.”" 
Genesis21:14 Ngakusasa ekuseni Abrahama wavuka kuseluvivi, watsatsa sinkhwa nesigubhu semanti wakwetjatsisa Hagari, wamnika nemntfwana wabahambisa. Wahamba-ke Hagari azulazula ehlane laseBherisheba." 
Genesis21:15 Atsi kube aphele lamanti esigujini, wabeka umntfwana ngaphansi kwalesinye sihlahla." 
Genesis21:16 Wase uhamba libanga lemjikijelo, wayawuhlala khona acabanga atsi: “Ngingeke ngikumele kubuka umntfwanami afa.” Asahleti phansi afulatsele lomfana, tehla tinyembeti, wakhala kabuhlungu." 
Genesis21:17 Nkulunkulu wakuva kukhala kwalomfana; ingilosi yaNkulunkulu yakhuluma isezulwini, yatsi kuHagari: “Hagari, uhlushwa yini? Ungesabi, ngobe Nkulunkulu sewulivile livi lalomfana lapho akhona." 
Genesis21:18 Sukuma, utsatse lomntfwana, umgone, ngobe ngitakumenta abe sive lesikhulu.”" 
Genesis21:19 Nkulunkulu wawavula emehlo aHagari, wabona sicobho semanti, waya kuwo wafike wagcwalisa sigubhu ngemanti, wanatsisa lomntfwana." 
Genesis21:20 Nkulunkulu waba naye lomntfwana. Wakhula, akhulela ehlane, waba yingcweti kutebutjoki." 
Genesis21:21 Ngesikhatsi ahlala ehlane lasePharani, unina wamtsatsela umfati labengumGibhithe." 
Genesis21:22 Ngaso leso sikhatsi Abimeleki waya ku-Abrahama ahamba naPhikoli, indvuna yemabutfo akhe, wafike watsi: “Nkulunkulu unawe kuko konkhe lokwentako." 
Genesis21:23 Ngako ase ufunge la kimi embikwaNkulunkulu kutsi ungeke ungiyenge mine, nebantfwabami, netitukulwane tami, kepha ngekwemusa wami lengiwente kuwe, wente nakimi nakulo lelive lokhosele kulo.”" 
Genesis21:24 Abrahama watsi: “Ngiyafunga.” 
Genesis21:25 Abrahama wase ubeka sikhalo sakhe ku-Abimeleki macondzana nemtfombo wemanti lowawuchwagwe tisebenti ta-Abimeleki. 
Genesis21:26 Abimeleki watsi: “Hhawu, nami ngiyayicabuka nje lendzaba. Angati kutsi kwentiwe ngubani loko, nawe awuzange sewungitjele, kantsi futsi angizange sengive ngako.”" 
Genesis21:27 Abrahama wase upha Abimeleki timvu netinkhabi, benta sivumelwane bobabili." 
Genesis21:28 Abrahama wakhetsa emazinyane etimvu lamasikati lasikhombisa emhlambini wakhe. 
Genesis21:29 Abimeleki wabuta Abrahama watsi: “Usho kutsini ngalokukhetsa lamazinyane etimvu lamasikati lasikhombisa?” 
Genesis21:30 Abrahama waphendvula watsi: “Yemukela lamazinyane lasikhombisa etimvu la esandleni sami, kube bufakazi bami kutsi lomtfombo wembiwa ngimi.”" 
Genesis21:31 Ngako-ke leyo ndzawo yabitwa ngekutsi yiBherisheba; ngobe ngulapho benta khona sifungo bobabili. 
Genesis21:32 Batsi kube basente lesivumelwane eBherisheba, bo-Abimeleki nendvuna yakhe, Phikoli, besuka kuleyo ndzawo babuyela eveni lemaFilisti." 
Genesis21:33 Abrahama wahlanyela sihlahla selitamariske eBherisheba. Wadvumisa Simakadze, Nkulunkulu waphakadze." 
Genesis21:34 Abrahama wahlala eveni lemaFilisti sikhatsi lesidze. 
Genesis22:1 Emvakwaloko Nkulunkulu wavivinya Abrahama, watsi kuye: “Abrahama! Ye, Abrahama!” Waphendvula watsi: “Ngilapha, Nkhosi!”" 
Genesis22:2 Nkulunkulu watsi: “Tsatsa Isaka, indvodzana yakho, leyodvwana naloyitsandzako, uye eveni laseMoriya, wente umhlatjelo ngayo entsabeni lengitakulayela yona.”" 
Genesis22:3 Ngakusasa ekuseni ngeluvivi, Abrahama wavuka, wabophela imbongolo yakhe, watsatsa tisebenti takhe taba timbili kanye nendvodzana yakhe Isaka. Wakabha tinkhuni temhlatjelo labetawufike awushise, besuka bahamba baya kuleyo ndzawo Nkulunkulu labemlayele yona." 
Genesis22:4 Ngelilanga lesitsatfu Abrahama watsi uphakamisa emehlo, wayibona indzawo isesekhashane." 
Genesis22:5 Abrahama wase ukhuluma kuletisebenti takhe watsi: “Hlalani la nalembongolo, mine nalomfana sisaya lapha kuyawukhonta, sitawubuya sibuye la kini.”" 
Genesis22:6 Abrahama watsatsa tinkhuni temhlatjelo wekushiswa, watetfwesa Isaka, umsa wakhe, yena waphatsa umlilo nemukhwa esandleni sakhe. Bahamba bobabili ndzawonye." 
Genesis22:7 Isaka watsi kuyise Abrahama: “Babe!” Wasabela watsi: “Ngilapha, ndvodzana yami.” Isaka wabuta watsi: “Ngiyatibona tinkhuni nemlilo, kepha liphi lizinyane lemvu yemhlatjelo?”" 
Genesis22:8 Abrahama waphendvula watsi: “Ndvodzana yami, Nkulunkulu utatibonela yena lizinyane lemhlatjelo wekushiswa.” Ngako-ke bachubeka solomane bahamba bobabili." 
Genesis22:9 Batsi kube befike kulendzawo Nkulunkulu labemlayele yona, Abrahama wakha lilati walungisa tinkhuni, wabopha Isaka, umsa wakhe, wambeka etinkhunini etikwelilati." 
Genesis22:10 Abrahama welula sandla sakhe, watsatsa umukhwa asatawuhlaba umsa wakhe." 
Genesis22:11 Kepha ingilosi yaSimakadze yambita isezulwini yatsi: “Abrahama! Ye, Abrahama!” Wasabela watsi: “Ngilapha.”" 
Genesis22:12 Yatsi: “Ungacali ubeke sandla kulomfana, futsi ungenti lutfo kuye; ngobe manje sengiyati kutsi uyamesaba Nkulunkulu, ngekutsi awukangigodleli indvodzana yakho lekukuphela kwayo.”" 
Genesis22:13 Abrahama watsi uphakamisa emehlo uyacalata, wabona emvakwakhe kunesihhanca, sibanjwe ngetimphondvo esihlahleni. Abrahama wahamba wayawutsatsa lesihhanca, wase unikela ngaso, saba ngumhlatjelo esikhundleni sendvodzana yakhe." 
Genesis22:14 Ngako-ke Abrahama wetsa leyo ndzawo libito, watsi: “Simakadze uyatibonela.” Nalamuhla lendzawo bantfu basayibita ngekutsi: “Simakadze uyatibonela entsabeni.”" 
Genesis22:15 Ingilosi yaSimakadze yaphindze yamemeta Abrahama kwesibili isezulwini," 
Genesis22:16 yatsi, “Nali livi laSimakadze litsi: ‘Ngitifunga mine kutsi njengobe wente loku, wangete wayigodla indvodzana yakho yekuphela," 
Genesis22:17 ngiyakukubusisa impela, ngandzise titukulwane takho tibe ngangetinkhanyeti tesibhakabhaka nangangesihlabatsi selugu lwelwandle. Titukulwane takho tiyakwehlula emadolobha etitsa tato." 
Genesis22:18 Tive tonkhe temhlaba tiyawubusiswa ngetitukulwane takho, ngobe ulalele livi lami.’ ”" 
Genesis22:19 Abrahama wancandzeka wabuyela etincekwini takhe, bahambisana sebabuyela eBherisheba, lapho Abrahama afike wakha khona." 
Genesis22:20 Emvakwaloko Abrahama wabikelwa kwatsiwa: “Phela Milkha sewutalele umnakenu Nahori bantfwana: 
Genesis22:21 Litubulo lakhe ngu-Uzi, elanywe nguBuzi, umnakabo, bese kuta Khemuweli, uyise wa-Aramu," 
Genesis22:22 elanywe nguKhesede, naHazo, naPhildashi, naJidilafe, naBethuweli.”" 
Genesis22:23 Bethuweli watala Rebheka. Laba-ke labasiphohlongo Milkha wabatala kuNahori, umnakabo-Abrahama." 
Genesis22:24 Ngetulu kwaloko umfati lomunye waNahori lekwakutsiwa nguRewuma watala boTheba, naGahamu, naThahashi, naMakha." 
Genesis23:1 Sara waphila iminyaka leli-127. 
Genesis23:2 Sara wafela eKhiriyathi Abha, lekuyiHebroni, eveni laseKhenani. Abrahama wakhalela umkakhe, Sara." 
Genesis23:3 Abrahama wasishiya sidvumbu semkakhe, wesuka waya kumaHethi, wefika watsi:" 
Genesis23:4 “Ngisihambi nemchamuki la emkhatsini wenu. Ngicela ningitsengisele indzawo yekungcwaba, khona ngitewungcwaba lesidvumbu semkami.”" 
Genesis23:5 EmaHethi aphendvula Abrahama atsi: 
Genesis23:6 “Ase usilalele, mnumzane, wena usikhulu lesinemandla la emkhatsini wetfu. Lomkakho ungamngcwaba nome ngangukuliphi kulamathuna etfu. Kute la emkhatsini wetfu longete akunika lithuna nome akuphatamise ekungcwabeni lomkakho.”" 
Genesis23:7 Abrahama wasukuma wewakhotsamela lamaHethi, lekwakubantfu bakuleyo ndzawo." 
Genesis23:8 Watsi kubo: “Nanitsandza kutsi ngimngcwabe, esuke embikwami, ngisiteni ningicelele ku-Efroni, umsa waSowari," 
Genesis23:9 kutsi angitsengisele umhume wakhe waseMakhaphela, lesekugcineni kwensimi yakhe. Ngicela angitsengisele ngentsengo lefanele, utewuba wami ube yindzawo yekungcwaba.”" 
Genesis23:10 Efroni labehleti emkhatsini wemaHethi waphendvula Abrahama eva onkhe emaHethi labengena esangweni lelidolobha," 
Genesis23:11 watsi: “Cha, nkhosi yami, asungilalele: Ngiyakunika lensimi kanye nalomhume lokuyo, ngikunika embikwebantfu bakitsi, ngitsi: Lomkakho mngcwabe khona.”" 
Genesis23:12 Abrahama wabakhotsamela bantfu bakulelo live. 
Genesis23:13 Wakhuluma ku-Efroni embikwalabo bantfu, watsi: “Ase ungilalele, ngitakunika intsengo yalensimi, ngicela uyemukele kimi, khona ngitawungcwaba khona umkami.”" 
Genesis23:14 Efroni waphendvula Abrahama watsi: 
Genesis23:15 “Nkhosi yami, asungilalele: Lesicakwana singabita lemashekheli esiliva langema-400. Pho, kuyini loko kuwe nakimi? Mngcwabe kuyo leyo ndzawo lomkakho.”" 
Genesis23:16 Bo-Abrahama na-Efroni bavumelana. Abrahama wase ukalela Efroni isiliva labesavele akhulume ngayo embikwemaHethi. Kwaba ngemashekheli esiliva langema-400, lekwakusilinganiso lesasisemtsetfweni webatsengisi bangaleso sikhatsi." 
Genesis23:17 Ngako-ke insimi ya-Efroni leyayiseMakhaphela ngasemphumalanga neMamre, leyayinemhume nato tonkhe tihlahla letatikuyo, yonkhe leyo ndzawo," 
Genesis23:18 yetfulwa ku-Abrahama embikwemaHethi, nabo bonkhe lababesesangweni lalelo dolobha." 
Genesis23:19 Emvakwaloko Abrahama wangcwaba umkakhe Sara emhumeni wensimi yaseMakhaphela, ngasemphumalanga neMamre, eHebroni, eveni laseKhenani." 
Genesis23:20 Lensimi kanye nemhume emaHethi akunika Abrahama kutsi kube yindzawo yakhe yekungcwaba. 
Genesis24:1 Abrahama abesamdzala kakhulu ngeminyaka. Simakadze abembusisile etintfweni tonkhe. 
Genesis24:2 Abrahama wakhuluma nenceku yakhe lenkhulu ekhaya lakhe, leyayiphetse konkhe labenako, watsi: “Beka sandla sakho ngaphansi kwelitsanga lami." 
Genesis24:3 Ngitekufungisa Simakadze longuNkulunkulu welizulu nemhlaba, kutsi ungacali utsatsele indvodzana yami umfati emkhatsini wemadvodzakati emaKhenani, lengihleti emkhatsini wawo." 
Genesis24:4 Kodvwa ubohamba ubuyele eveni lakitsi lemdzabu, nasetihlotjeni takitsi, ufike umtsatsele khona Isaka, umsa wami, umfati.”" 
Genesis24:5 Lenceku yatsi kuye: “Nangabe lentfombi ingavumi kungilandzela ite nami kulelive, ngibobe sengenta njani? Ngiboyitsatsa yini lendvodzana yakho ngincandzeke nayo ngiyibuyisele kulelo live lakini?”" 
Genesis24:6 Abrahama watsi kuyo: “Caphela ungacali uyibuyisele emuva lendvodzana yami. 
Genesis24:7 Simakadze, Nkulunkulu welizulu, lowangitsatsa endlini yababe, naseveni lakitsi lemdzabu, wakhuluma kimi waphindze wangetsembisa ngesifungo watsi: ‘Lelive ngiyawulinika titukulwane takho,’ utawutfuma ingilosi kutsi ikuhambele embili. Wena-ke, lomsa wami uyawumtsatsela intfombi kuleyo ndzawo ute nayo la." 
Genesis24:8 Kodvwa nangabe lentfombi ayifuni kukulandzela, utawube sewukhululekile kulesifungo. Intfo nje, ungayibuyiseli indvodzana yami kulelo live.”" 
Genesis24:9 Ngako-ke lenceku yabeka sandla sayo ngaphansi kwelitsanga la-Abrahama, inkhosi yayo, yafunga kuye ngalendzaba." 
Genesis24:10 Lenceku yatsatsa emakamela lalishumi emkhatsini wemakamela enkhosi yayo, yahamba netinhlobonhlobo tetipho letiphuma enkhosini yayo. Yesuka yaya eMesophothamiya edolobheni lakaNahori."
