Genesis24:11 Yefika entsambama yakanekisa ngaphandle kwelidolobha, yagucisa emakamela eceleni kwesicobho, ngesikhatsi labakha ngaso emanti labasikati." 
Genesis24:12 Lenceku yathandaza yatsi: “Simakadze, Nkulunkulu wenkhosi yami, ngicela ungiphe imphumelelo lamuhla, ukhombise umusa wakho enkhosini yami Abrahama." 
Genesis24:13 Naku manje sengime la eceleni kwalesicobho, lapho kukha khona emadvodzakati ebantfu bakulelidolobha." 
Genesis24:14 Akutsi kuleyo ntfombi lengitawutsi kuyo: ‘Ngicela ubeke phansi imbita ngitewunatsa,’ yona-ke itsi: ‘Natsa, ngitawunatsisa wena kanye nemakamela akho,’ ngicela kutsi leyo kube ngiyo-ke loyimisele Isaka, inceku yakho. Ngiyawukwati ngaloko-ke kutsi ukhombise umusa enkhosini yami.”" 
Genesis24:15 Watsi asengakacedzi nje kuthandaza, kwase kuchamuka Rebheka labetalwa nguBethuweli, umsa waMilkha, umkaNahori, umnakabo-Abrahama. Rebheka weta etjetse imbita yemanti ehlombe lakhe." 
Genesis24:16 Lentfombi yayiyinhle, ibukeka, iyintfombi, ingazange seyilale nemuntfu lomdvuna. Yewukela esicojeni, yakhelela, yagcwalisa imbita yayo ngemanti, yakhuphuka." 
Genesis24:17 Lenceku yagijima yaya kuyo iyihlangabeta, yafike yatsi: “Ngicela sewumane unginatsise emantana nje la embiteni yakho.”" 
Genesis24:18 Yaphendvula yatsi: “Natsa, nkhosi yami.” Yaphangisa yetfula imbita, yanatsisa lenceku." 
Genesis24:19 Yatsi kube icedze kuyinatsisa, yatsi: “Ngitawunatsisa nalamakamela akho, aze enele onkhe.”" 
Genesis24:20 Ngako-ke, yashesha yatfululela lamanti enkelebheni, yagijima yaya kukha lamanye esicojeni, yawanatsisa onkhe lamakamela enceku." 
Genesis24:21 Lendvodza yayibukisisa lentfombi, ibindzile, ifundzisisa kahle nome Simakadze abeyiphumelelisa indlela yayo, nome cha." 
Genesis24:22 Yatsi kube icedze lentfombi kunatsisa emakamela, lendvodza yatsatsa indandatho yegolide leyayinesisindvo sencenye yelishekheli yayifaka ekhaleni lalentfombi; yatsatsa emajiva egolide labenesisindvo semashekheli lalishumi yawegabisa lentfombi emikhonweni," 
Genesis24:23 yatsi: “Ase ungitjele kutsi wena utalwa ngubani? Singayitfola yini indzawo lena ekhaya kini, simane siyewufihla inhloko lenemehlo?”" 
Genesis24:24 Lentfombi yaphendvula yatsi: “Mine ngiyindvodzakati yaBethuweli, umsa waMilkha naNahori.”" 
Genesis24:25 Yachubeka yatsi: “Sinetjani lobunyenti bemakamela kanye nendlu leyenele kutsi ningangenisa khona.” 
Genesis24:26 Lendvodza yase iyakhotsama, yakhuleka kuSimakadze" 
Genesis24:27 yatsi: “Akabongwe Simakadze, Nkulunkulu wenkhosi yami Abrahama, longakayekeli kukhombisa umusa wakhe nekwetsembeka kwakhe enkhosini yami Abrahama. Mine-ke Simakadze ungihole endleleni, waze wangingenisa endlini yetihlobo tenkhosi yami.”" 
Genesis24:28 Lentfombi yagijima, yaya kubendlu yenina, yafike yabatjela ngako konkhe loko." 
Genesis24:29 Rebheka abenemnakabo, anguLabani. Labani waphuma wagijima waya kuyo lendvodza, ngasesicojeni." 
Genesis24:30 Watsi nakabona indandatho ekhaleni kanye nemabhengela emikhonweni yadzadzewabo, watsi nakeva emavi aRebheka, dzadzewabo, atsi: “Lendvodza ikhulume kimi,” waya kuyo. Wayikhandza ime eceleni kwemakamela madvutane nesicobho." 
Genesis24:31 Wafike watsi: “Ngena, wena lobusiswe nguSimakadze, umeleni ngaphandle? Ngobe indzawo sengiyilungisile endlini, ngisho nendzawo yemakamela imbala.”" 
Genesis24:32 Ngako-ke lendvodza yeta, yangena endlini. Labani wakhumula lamakamela, wawafaka esibayeni wawanika kudla, adla. Wanika lendvodza emanti ekugeza tinyawo tayo, nalamadvodza abehamba nawo ageza tinyawo tawo." 
Genesis24:33 Kwase kuletfwa kudla, kwabekwa embikwayo kutsi itekudla. Kodvwa yona yatsi: “Ngingeke ngidle, ngingakayikhulumi indzaba lengite ngayo.” Labani watsi: “Khuluma phela.”" 
Genesis24:34 Ngako-ke yatsi: “Mine ngiyinceku ya-Abrahama. 
Genesis24:35 Simakadze uyibusise kakhulu inkhosi yami, injinge kakhulu. Simakadze uyibusise ngemihlambi yetimvu netinkhomo, isiliva negolide, tisebenti letidvuna naletisikati, emakamela kanye netimbongolo." 
Genesis24:36 Sara, inkhosikati yenkhosi yami, watalela inkhosi yami indvodzana, asamdzala kakhulu. Inkhosi yami seyinike lendvodzana yayo konkhe lenako." 
Genesis24:37 Inkhosi yami yangifungisa yatsi: ‘Ungayitsatseli indvodzana yami umfati kuletintfombi taseKhenani, kulelive lengihleti kulo." 
Genesis24:38 Kodvwa ubohamba uye elusendvweni lwaketfu esiveni sakitsi, uyitsatsele khona indvodzana yami umfati.’" 
Genesis24:39 Ngabuta enkhosini yami ngatsi: ‘Nangabe ayivumi kuta nami lentfombi, ngibobe sengenta njani?’" 
Genesis24:40 “Yangiphendvula yatsi: ‘Simakadze lengihamba embikwakhe utawutfumela ingilosi yakhe ihambe nawe, akuphumelelise endleleni yakho. Indvodzana yami uyawuyitsatsela umfati esiveni sakitsi, elusendvweni lwaketfu." 
Genesis24:41 Nawuye esiveni sakitsi, uyawube sewuyakhululeka-ke kulesifungo sakho; nome befike bala kukunika lentfombi, uyawukhululeka-ke kulesifungo sakho.’" 
Genesis24:42 “Nangifika esicojeni lamuhla, ngitsite: ‘Simakadze, Nkulunkulu wenkhosi yami, Abrahama, nakuyintsandvo yakho, ngiphumelelise kuloluhambo lwami." 
Genesis24:43 Njengobe ngime la, eceleni kwalesicobho semanti, akutsi intfombi letewukha emanti nangitsi kuyo: “Ngicela unginatsise emantana ngalembita yakho,”" 
Genesis24:44 yona itsi kimi: “Natsa wena, ngitawube senginatsisa nalamakamela akho,” kube ngiyo-ke intfombi Simakadze layimisele indvodzana yenkhosi yami.’" 
Genesis24:45 Ngitsite ngisengakacedzi nje kuthandaza ngenhlitiyo, kwachamuka Rebheka etjetse imbita yemanti. Wewukela esicojeni wefike wakha emanti. Ngase ngitsi kuye: ‘Ngicela unginatsise.’" 
Genesis24:46 Waphangisa wetfula imbita yakhe, watsi: ‘Natsa wena kucala, ngitawube senginatsisa nalamakamela akho futsi.’ Nganatsa-ke, wase unatsisa nemakamela ami futsi." 
Genesis24:47 Ngase ngiyambuta ngitsi: ‘Wena uyindvodzakati yabani?’ Wangiphendvula watsi: ‘Ngiyindvodzakati yaBethuweli, umsa waMilkha naNahori.’ Ngako-ke ngase ngimfaka lendandatho ekhaleni lakhe ngamegabisa nalamajiva emikhonweni yakhe." 
Genesis24:48 Ngase ngikhotsamisa inhloko yami, ngakhuleka kuSimakadze, ngimbonga yena longuNkulunkulu wenkhosi yami Abrahama, ngobe angihole ngendlela lekungiyo sibili kutsi ngitewutsatsa lendvodzakati yesihlobo senkhosi yami itewuba ngumfati wendvodzana yayo." 
Genesis24:49 Manje-ke, njengobe nine nitinini tenkhosi yami, ngitjeleni, nanitsandza kuvelana nayo ngekwetsembeka. Naningatsandzi, ngitjeleni, khona phela ngitekwenta loko lokufanele ngikwente.”" 
Genesis24:50 BoLabani naBethuweli baphendvula batsi: “Lendzaba le iphuma kuSimakadze. Tsine kute lesingakusho. 
Genesis24:51 Nangu Rebheka embikwakho; mtsatse, uhambe naye ayekuba ngumfati wendvodzana yenkhosi yakho, njengobe Simakadze asakhulumile.”" 
Genesis24:52 Yatsi kube ikuve loko inceku ya-Abrahama, yakhotsama yakhuleka kuSimakadze." 
Genesis24:53 Lenceku yakhipha tintfo tesiliva netegolide, netingubo, yatipha Rebheka. Yaphindze yapha umnakabo nenina tintfo letingemagugu." 
Genesis24:54 Lenceku kanye nemadvodza beyihamba nawo badla, banatsa, bahlala khona busuku bonkhe. Nabavuka ngakusasa ekuseni lenceku yatsi: “Ngikhululeni, ngibuyele enkhosini yami.”" 
Genesis24:55 UmnakaboRebheka nenina batsi: “Ase ihlalahlale natsi lentfombatane emalangana langacishe abe lishumi. Emvakwaloko nitawube seniyahamba-ke.” 
Genesis24:56 Kepha inceku yatsi kubo: “Ningangibambeleli, ngobe Simakadze uyiphumelelisile indzaba yami. Ngikhululeni ngiye enkhosini yami.”" 
Genesis24:57 Base batsi: “Ake sibite lentfombatana sitewuva kuyo.” 
Genesis24:58 Babita Rebheka, bambuta batsi: “Utawuhamba nayo yini lendvodza?” Waphendvula watsi: “Yebo, ngitawuhamba nayo.”" 
Genesis24:59 Bamhambisa-ke Rebheka, dzadzewabo, kanye nemongi wakhe. Wahamba nenceku ya-Abrahama kanye nemadvodza leyayihamba nawo." 
Genesis24:60 Bambusisa Rebheka batsi kuye: “Hamba kahle, dzadzewetfu. Shangatsi ungaba ngunina wetinkhulungwane tetinkhulungwane; shangatsi intalo yakho ingawancoba emadolobha etitsa tayo.”" 
Genesis24:61 Rebheka netimphekeleteli takhe batilungisela bagibela emakamela, bahamba nalendvodza. Yamtfola kanjalo-ke Rebheka lendvodza." 
Genesis24:62 Isaka abephuma eBheri Lahayi Royi, ngobe abehlala eNegevu." 
Genesis24:63 Waphuma entsambama waya esigangeni ayewudla ematsambo engcondvo khona; watsi uphakamisa emehlo wabona kuchamuka emakamela eta ngakuye. 
Genesis24:64 Rebheka watsi uphakamisa emehlo akhe, wabona Isaka, wase uyehlika ekameleni." 
Genesis24:65 Wabuta kulenceku watsi: “Ngubani leya ndvodza lesihlangabetako?” Inceku yaphendvula yatsi: “Yinkhosi yami.” Ngako-ke watsatsa iveyili yakhe watimbonya. 
Genesis24:66 Lenceku yafike yalandzisa Isaka ngako konkhe leyase ikwentile. 
Genesis24:67 Isaka watsatsa Rebheka wamfaka ethendeni lakabo lapho kwake kwahlala unina khona, watsatsa Rebheka wamenta umkakhe, Isaka wamtsandza umkakhe. Ngako-ke Isaka wadvudvuteka emuva kwebuhlungu bekufelwa ngunina." 
Genesis25:1 Abrahama watsatsa lomunye umfati, lekwakunguKethura." 
Genesis25:2 Yena-ke wamtalela boZimrani, naJokshane, naMedani, naMidiyani, na-Ishbaki, naShuwa." 
Genesis25:3 Jokshane watala boSheba naDedani. KuDedani ngulapho kwavela khona ema-Ashuri, nemaLethushi, nemaLewumi." 
Genesis25:4 Emadvodzana aMidiyani bekubo-Efa, na-Eferi, naHanoki, na-Abida, naElda. Bonkhe laba kwakubantfwana baKhetura." 
Genesis25:5 Abrahama wakunika Isaka konkhe labenako. 
Genesis25:6 Kodvwa emadvodzana alabanye bafati bakhe wabapha tipho, watsi asaphila nje wawasusa kulendvodzana yakhe Isaka, wawabhekisa ngasemphumalanga nelive." 
Genesis25:7 Abrahama waphila iminyaka leli-175. 
Genesis25:8 Abrahama wafa asamdzala kakhulu asenelisekile emphilweni; walandzela bokhokho bakhe. 
Genesis25:9 Bo-Isaka na-Ishmayeli, emadvodzana akhe, amngcwaba emhumeni waseMakhaphela, ensimini ya-Efroni, umsa waSowari, umHethi, emphumalanga naseMamre." 
Genesis25:10 Lensimi ngulena leyatsengwa ngu-Abrahama kumaHethi. Wangcwatjwa khona lapho-ke Abrahama, kanye nemkakhe Sara." 
Genesis25:11 Emvakwekufa kwa-Abrahama, Nkulunkulu wayibusisa lendvodzana yakhe lengu-Isaka. Isaka wacaba eBheri Lahayi Royi." 
Genesis25:12 Nati-ke titukulwane taka-Ishmayeli, umsa wa-Abrahama, lamtala kuHagari, sisebenti saSara lesasingumGibhithe:" 
Genesis25:13 Emadvodzana a-Ishmayeli ngekwelamana kwawo bekunguNebayothi, litibulo lakhe, naKhedari, na-Adbeli, naMibsamu," 
Genesis25:14 naMishma, naDuma, naMasa," 
Genesis25:15 naHadadi, naThema, naJeturi, naNafishi, naKhedema." 
Genesis25:16 Ngiwo lawo-ke emadvodzana a-Ishmayeli nemabito awo labetsa ngawo imiti netikanekiso tawo; babetikhulu tetive letili-12. 
Genesis25:17 Ishmayeli waphila iminyaka leli-137, wafa; walandzela bokhokho bakhe." 
Genesis25:18 Titukulwane ta-Ishmayeli takha kusukela eHavila kuya eShuri, lemalunga naseGibhithe, kuya ngase-Asiriya. Takha, tatsi cekelele takhweshelana netihlobo tato; tatihlaselana naletihlobo tato." 
Genesis25:19 Nati-ke titukulwane taka-Isaka, umsa wa-Abrahama: Abrahama watala Isaka." 
Genesis25:20 Isaka watsi nasaneminyaka lengema-40 watsatsa Rebheka, indvodzakati yaBethuweli, um-Aramu wasePhadani Aramu, dzadzewabo Labani, um-Aramu." 
Genesis25:21 Isaka wathandazela umkakhe kuSimakadze, ngobe abeyinyumba. Simakadze wawuphendvula umthandazo wakhe; Rebheka, umka-Isaka, wakhulelwa." 
Genesis25:22 Wakhulelwa emaphahla. Atsi asengakatalwa agudlulana kamatima esiswini sakhe, wadzimate watsi: “Loku kwentekelani kimi?” Ngako-ke wayawubuta kuSimakadze." 
Genesis25:23 Simakadze wamphendvula watsi: “Esiswini sakho kunetive letimbili. Utawutala tive letitakwehlukana tinhlobo letimbili. Lesinye sive siyawuba nemandla kunalesinye, lomdzala akhonte lomncane.”" 
Genesis25:24 Kwatsi nakufika emalanga akhe ekubeleka, wabeleka emaphahla." 
Genesis25:25 Lekucala laphuma libovana, lilihwanca wonkhe umtimba, njengengubo yeboya. Baletsa batsi ngu-Esawu." 
Genesis25:26 Emvakwekuphuma kwalomnakabo, sandla salona lomunye lolandzelako saphuma sibambe sitsendze sa-Esawu, ngako-ke bametsa ngekutsi nguJakobe. Isaka abesaneminyaka lengema-60 nabatalwako." 
Genesis25:27 Labafana bakhula. Esawu waba ngumtingeli lonelikhono, angumuntfu wasematsafeni, kantsi Jakobe yena abesithuli ahlala ekhaya." 
Genesis25:28 Isaka abetsandza Esawu, ngobe abedla inyama yenyamatane labeyitingela; kepha Rebheka abetsandza Jakobe." 
Genesis25:29 Ngalelinye lilanga Jakobe abepheke siphuphe, kwase kufika Esawu aphuma etsafeni, alambe kakhulu." 
Genesis25:30 Esawu watsi kuJakobe: “Maye, ngilambile! Ngicela sewumane ungiphe lesiphuphe.” Ngako-ke libito lakhe kwatsiwa ngu-Edomu." 
Genesis25:31 Kodvwa Jakobe watsi: “Ngitsengisele lifa lakho lebutubulo, kucala.”" 
Genesis25:32 Esawu watsi: “Sengitakufa, linalusito luni kimi lelifa?”" 
Genesis25:33 Jakobe watsi: “Funga kimi kucala.” Ngako-ke wafunga, kwaba kulitsengisa kwakhe kuJakobe lifa lakhe lebutubulo." 
Genesis25:34 Jakobe wase unika Esawu lesiphuphe. Esawu wadla, wanatsa, wasukuma wahamba. Esawu waledzelela kanjalo lifa lebutubulo bakhe." 
Genesis26:1 Kwase kwaba khona lenye indlala eveni, kungesiyo lena leyaka yaba khona ngetikhatsi tabo-Abrahama. Isaka-ke wase uyesuka uya eGerari ka-Abimeleki, inkhosi yemaFilisti." 
Genesis26:2 Simakadze wabonakala ku-Isaka watsi: “Ungehleli eGibhithe. Ubohlala eveni lengitakukhombisa lona. 
Genesis26:3 Hlalahlala kulelive, ngitawuba nawe ngikubusise, ngobe onkhe lamave ngitawuwanika wena netitukulwane takho. Ngitasifeza setsembiso sami lengasenta kuyihlo Abrahama." 
Genesis26:4 Titukulwane takho ngiyawutandzisa tibe ngangetinkhanyeti tesibhakabhaka. Onkhe lamave ngiyakuwanika titukulwane takho. Tive tonkhe temhlaba tiyawubusiswa ngetitukulwane takho," 
Genesis26:5 njengobe Abrahama wangihlonipha, wagcina imiyalo yami, nemitsetfo yami, netimiso tami.”" 
Genesis26:6 Ngako-ke Isaka wahalala eGerari. 
Genesis26:7 Kwatsi nakabutwa ngemadvodza aleyo ndzawo ngemfati wakhe, yena watsi ngudzadzewabo. Abengeke avume kutsi ngumkakhe, ngobe abesaba emadvodza aleyo ndzawo kutsi angahle ambulale ngenca yaRebheka. Phela Rebheka abemuhle, abukeka." 
Genesis26:8 Isaka wahlala sikhatsi lesidze kuleyo ndzawo. Ngalelinye lilanga Abimeleki, inkhosi yemaFilisti, yatsi ihlola ngelifasitelo, yabona Isaka anga Rebheka, umkakhe." 
Genesis26:9 Ngako-ke Abimeleki wabita Isaka wambuta watsi: “Kantsi vele ngumkakho yini lo! Kepha ukwentelani lokuhambe utsi ngudzadzewenu?” Isaka wamphendvula watsi: “Kungobe bengicabanga ngitsi: ‘Ngingahle ngife ngenca yaRebheka!’ ” 
Genesis26:10 Abimeleki watsi kuye: “Yini-ke lena lose uyente la kitsi? Buka-ke, ngobe lenye indvodza beyingahle ilale naye kalula nje lomkakho; ngaleyo ndlela bewutawube sewusiletsele licala.”" 
Genesis26:11 Ngako-ke Abimeleki wabayala bonkhe bantfu bakhe watsi: “Lowo lotsintsa lendvodza nome lomkayo utawubulawa.” 
Genesis26:12 Isaka walima kulelo live, kulowo mnyaka wavuna ngalokuphindvwe kalikhulu, ngobe Simakadze wambusisa," 
Genesis26:13 waceba, wachubeka wanotsa, waze waba yinjinga lenkhulu." 
Genesis26:14 Abenetimphahla letinyenti, imihlambi yetimvu, netinkhomo, anemuti lomkhulu, netisebenti letinyenti, kangangekutsi emaFilisti adzimate aba nemona ngaye." 
Genesis26:15 Ngako emaFilisti ase atigcibedzela ngemhlaba tonkhe ticobho letatimbiwe tisebenti ta-Abrahama asekhona; phela, Abrahama bekunguyise wa-Isaka." 
Genesis26:16 Abimeleki wakhuluma ku-Isaka, watsi: “Suka, uhambe la eveni letfu; ngobe sewunemandla kakhulu kunatsi.”" 
Genesis26:17 Isaka wesuka lapho, wahamba waya eSigodzini saseGerari, lapho afike wahlala khona." 
Genesis26:18 Isaka waphindze watimba ticobho temanti letatimbiwe ngu-Abrahama, uyise asekhona; ngobe phela emaFilisti abetigcibedzela emvakwekufa kwa-Abrahama. Leticobho Isaka watetsa emabito letatetsiwe ngawo nguyise." 
Genesis26:19 Kepha tatsi tisebenti ta-Isaka natimba esigodzini, takhandza sicobho lesasinemanti lamnandzi." 
Genesis26:20 Belusi baseGerari bacabana nebelusi ba-Isaka, batsi: “Lamanti ngewetfu!” Ngako lesicobho wasetsa libito watsi yi-Eseki, ngobe baphikisana naye ngaso." 
Genesis26:21 Bemba lesinye futsi sicobho. Naso baphikisana ngaso futsi, ngako wasetsa watsi yiSitna." 
Genesis26:22 Wesuka lapho wayakumba lesinye sicobho, sona-ke abazange baphikisane ngaso, ngako wasetsa watsi yiRehobothi, atsi: “Njengobe Simakadze sewusentele indzawo, sitakwandza sibe tinjinga kulelive.”" 
Genesis26:23 Isaka wesuka lapho, waya eBherisheba." 
Genesis26:24 Simakadze wabonakala kuye ngabona lobo busuku, watsi: “NginguNkulunkulu weyihlo Abrahama; ungesabi, ngobe nginawe, ngiyakukubusisa ngandzise titukulwane takho ngenca yenceku yami Abrahama.”" 
Genesis26:25 Ngako Isaka wakha lilati lapho, wakhuleka kuSimakadze, wemisa lithende lakhe khona lapho. Tisebenti ta-Isaka tase timba sicobho khona lapho." 
Genesis26:26 Abimeleki wesuka eGerari, waya ku-Isaka ahamba na-Ahuzathi, umeluleki wakhe, naPhikoli, indvuna yemabutfo akhe." 
Genesis26:27 Isaka watsi kubo: “Niteleni la kimi, kantsi niyangitondza, futsi nine nangicosha nasemkhatsini wenu?”" 
Genesis26:28 Bamphendvula batsi: “Manje sekusikhanyele kutsi Simakadze unawe. Ngako-ke sitsi: Akube nesifungo emkhatsini wakho natsi. Asente sivumelwane nawe," 
Genesis26:29 sekutsi ungeke usentele lokubi, njengobe natsi singakakuphatsi kabi nje; sikuphetse kahle, sakuhambisa ngekuthula. Sekuyakhanya kutsi Simakadze ukubusisile.”" 
Genesis26:30 Isaka wase ubentela lidzili; badla banatsa. 
Genesis26:31 Ekuseni kuseluvivi ngakusasa bavuka benta sivumelwane lomunye kulomunye, basibeka luphawu ngesifungo. Isaka wabavalelisa, bahamba ngekuthula." 
Genesis26:32 Ngalo lelo langa tisebenti ta-Isaka teta kuye tamtjela ngesicobho letase tisimbile tatsi: “Sesiwatfolile emanti.” 
Genesis26:33 Lesicobho wasetsa watsi yiSheba; ngako-ke libito lalelo dolobha sekwaba yiBherisheba kuze kube ngulamuhla. 
Genesis26:34 Kwatsi Esawu nasaneminyaka lengemashumi lamane, watsatsa umfati, libito lakhe bekunguJudithi, indvodzakati ya-Beri, umHethi; wabuye watsatsa naBhasemathi, indvodzakati ya-Eloni, umHethi." 
Genesis26:35 Labalukatana bayenta yaba lusizi imphilo yabo-Isaka naRebheka. 
Genesis27:1 Kwatsi Isaka asamdzala kakhulu, emehlo akhe asafiphele angasaboni kahle. Watfumela wabita Esawu, indvodzana yakhe lendzala, wafike watsi kuye: “Msawami!” Wasabela watsi: “Ngilapha, babe.”" 
Genesis27:2 Isaka watsi: “Manje sengimdzala, angilati lilanga lami lekuhamba emhlabeni." 
Genesis27:3 Manje-ke, tsatsa tinsungulo nebutjoki bakho, uhambe uye etsafeni, uyekungitingelela inyamatane," 
Genesis27:4 ungilungisele kudla lokumnandzi, ungiletsele kona ngitewudla, bese ngiyakubusisa, ngingakafi.”" 
Genesis27:5 Rebheka bekalalele ngesikhatsi Isaka akhuluma nemsa wakhe, Esawu. Ngako watsi kube Esawu ahambe aye etsafeni kuyewutingela inyamatane atewuyiletsa kuyise," 
Genesis27:6 Rebheka watsi kuJakobe, indvodzana yakhe: “Ngive uyihlo akhuluma nemnakenu Esawu atsi:" 
Genesis27:7 ‘Ngiletsele inyama yenyamatane ungilungiselele kudla lokumnandzi, kuze ngitekudla, ngikubusise embikwaSimakadze, ngisengakafi.’" 
Genesis27:8 Manje-ke, ndvodzana yami, lalela emavi ami, wente lengikushoko." 
Genesis27:9 Hamba uye etimbutini ungilandzele emazinyane lamabili lakhuluphele, kuze ngitewulungiselela uyihlo kudla lokumnandzi." 
Genesis27:10 Utawube sewukumikisa kuyihlo kutsi adle, khona atekubusisa asengakafi.”" 
Genesis27:11 Kepha Jakobe watsi kuRebheka, unina: “Ingani Esawu, umnaketfu, ulihwanca, mine ngibusheleleti." 
Genesis27:12 Babe angahle angiphatse ngesandla, bese ngitfolakala ngingulonebucili, esikhundleni sekutsi angibusise angicalekise.”" 
Genesis27:13 Unina watsi kuye: “Ndvodzana yami, leso sicalekiso asehlele kimi; wena yenta loko lengikutjela kona, hamba ungilandzele lamazinyane.”" 
Genesis27:14 Wahamba, wafike wawatsatsa wawaletsa kunina. Unina walungiselela Isaka kudla lokumnandzi." 
Genesis27:15 Rebheka watsatsa timphahla letincono kakhulu ta-Esawu letatisendlini kabo, watembatsisa Jakobe." 
Genesis27:16 Wamembatsisa letikhumba temazinyane etimbuti etandleni takhe nasentsanyeni yakhe, lapho abeshelela khona." 
Genesis27:17 Watsatsa lokudla lokumnandzi nesinkhwa labesasentile wakunika indvodzana yakhe Jakobe. 
Genesis27:18 Jakobe waya kuyise wafike watsi: “Babe.” Wamphendvula watsi: “Yebo, msawami. Ungubani wena?”" 
Genesis27:19 Jakobe wamphendvula watsi: “Ngingu-Esawu, litubulo lakho; sengikwentile konkhe longitfume kona, babe. Vuka, utekudla inyama yenyamatane, bese uyangibusisa.”" 
Genesis27:20 Kepha Isaka watsi kulomsa wakhe: “Hhawu, ndvodzana yami, washesha kangaka kuyitfola, wente njani?” Jakobe waphendvula watsi: “Kungobe Simakadze, Nkulunkulu wakho, ungiphumelelisile.”" 
Genesis27:21 Isaka watsi kuJakobe: “Sondzela ngitekuphatsa, msawami, ngiteba neliciniso kutsi unguye sibili yini Esawu, indvodzana yami, nome cha.”" 
Genesis27:22 Nembala Jakobe wasondzela ku-Isaka. Isaka welula sandla wamphatsa watsi: “Livi lona laJakobe, kodvwa tandla ta-Esawu.”" 
Genesis27:23 Akazange ati kutsi nguJakobe, ngobe tandla takhe tatineboya njengetandla ta-Esawu. Ngako-ke wase uyambusisa." 
Genesis27:24 Waphindze wambutisisa watsi: “Unguye ngempela yini Esawu?” Jakobe wamphendvula watsi: “Nginguye.” 
Genesis27:25 Isaka watsi: “Ngisondzetele inyama yenyamatane yakho, msawami, ngitekudla ngikubusise.” Wamsondzetela, wadla. Wamniketa neliwayini, walinatsa." 
Genesis27:26 Emvakwaloko uyise Isaka watsi kuye: “Sondzela, ndvodzana yami, ungange.”" 
Genesis27:27 Wasondzela, wamanga. Watsi nakaliva liphunga letimphahla takhe, wambusisa watsi: “Awu, liphunga lendvodzana yami linjengeliphunga lasetsafeni, litsafa lelabusiswa nguSimakadze." 
Genesis27:28 Shangatsi Nkulunkulu angakunika ematolo asezulwini, avundzise nemasimi akho, akuphe inala yemabele neyeliwayini." 
Genesis27:29 Shangatsi tive tingasebenta wena, nemindeni ikukhotsamele. Ube yinkhosi kubomnakenu, emadvodzana enyoko akukhotsamele. Akacalekiswe lokucalekisako, abusiswe lokubusisako.”" 
Genesis27:30 Kwatsi acedza nje Isaka kubusisa Jakobe, naJakobe asandza kusuka nje ku-Isaka, uyise, watseleka Esawu, umnakabo, aphuma ekutingeleni." 
Genesis27:31 Naye walungisa kudla lokumnandzi wakumikisa kuyise. Wafike watsi kuye: “Ngicela asale avuka babe, adle inyama yenyamatane layilungiselwe yindvodzana yakhe, khona atekuyibusisa.”" 
Genesis27:32 Uyise, Isaka, wambuta watsi: “Ungubani wena?” Wamphendvula watsi: “Ngingumsa wakho, Esawu, litubulo lakho.”" 
Genesis27:33 Isaka wetfuka wachachatela kamatima wonkhe umtimba watsi: “Kantsi ngubani lona loletse inyama yenyamatane lapha kimi, ngayidla yonkhe ungakefiki wena, ngase ngiyambusisa? Ngempela utawubusiswa yena.”" 
Genesis27:34 Watsi Esawu nakeva lamavi eyise, wakhala kakhulu, wadzimate watsi kuyise: “Babe, nami ngibusise.”" 
Genesis27:35 Isaka wamphendvula watsi: “Umnakenu ufike wangiyenga, watsatsa sibusiso sakho.”" 
Genesis27:36 Esawu watsi: “Utsi aketsiwanga kahle yini kutsi kutsiwe nguJakobe? Ngobe loku sekwesibili angiphamba. Wacale watsatsa lifa lebutubulo bami, manje-ke sewutsatse sibusiso sami.” Wachubeka Esawu wabuta uyise watsi: “Awukangibekeli yini sakami sibusiso?”" 
Genesis27:37 Isaka wamphendvula watsi: “Asubuke nje, sengimente waba yinkhosi yakho, ngimnike bonkhe bomnakabo kutsi babe tisebenti takhe. Ngimuphe inala yemabele neyeliwayini. Pho, wena ngingabe ngisakwentelani, ndvodzana yami?”" 
Genesis27:38 Esawu watsi kuyise: “Babe, sekukuphela kwato letibusiso bewunato yini, awunaso yini lesinye sibusiso? Babe, nami ngibusise!” Esawu wadzatimula wakhala." 
Genesis27:39 Wamphendvula uyise, Isaka, watsi: “Umuti wakho ungeke ube nemvundvo, uyawuba khashane nematolo elizulu." 
Genesis27:40 Uyawuphila ngenkemba yakho, usebente umnakenu, kodvwa kuyawutsi nawudlubulundzela, uyawulephula lijoko lakhe entsanyeni yakho.”" 
Genesis27:41 Esawu wamtondza Jakobe ngenca yesibusiso labesitsatse kuyise, wadzimate watsi enhlitiyweni yakhe: “Emalanga ekulilela babe asayasondzela, emvakwawo Jakobe, umnaketfu, ngitambulala.”" 
Genesis27:42 Kodvwa Rebheka watsi kube atjelwe ngaloku Esawu, indvodzana yakhe lendzala, labesatimisele kukwenta, Rebheka wabita Jakobe, indvodzana yakhe lencane, wayitjela watsi: “Lalela la, umnakenu Esawu utidvudvuta ngekutsi utakubulala." 
Genesis27:43 Ngako-ke, ndvodzana yami, lalela livi lami: Baleka masinyane uye kamnaketfu Labani eHarani;" 
Genesis27:44 ufike uhlalahlale khona, kuze kuphole kutfukutsela kwemnakenu." 
Genesis27:45 Nangabe kutfukutsela kwakhe sekutse gogololo, asakukhohliwe naloku lokwente kuye, ngiyakutfumela ngikulandze. Ngesaba kulahlekelwa ngini nobabili ngalanga linye.”" 
Genesis27:46 Rebheka watsi ku-Isaka: “Ngidziniwe kuphila ngenca yalabalukatana baka-Esawu labatsatsa kumaHethi. Nangabe naJakobe angatsatsa umfati emkhatsini walamaHethi, lafanana nalawa lengihleti nawo, kungaba ncono ngimane ngife lokungenani!”" 
Genesis28:1 Isaka wabita Jakobe, wambusisa wamyala watsi: “Ungamtsatsi umfati kulamaKhenani." 
Genesis28:2 Hamba uye eMesophothamiya ekhabonyoko, kaBethuweli, utitsatsele khona umfati emadvodzakatini aLabani, malume wakho." 
Genesis28:3 Shangatsi Nkulunkulu Somandla angakubusisa akuchumise, akwandzise, udzimate ube tive letinyenti." 
Genesis28:4 Shangatsi angakunika sibusiso sa-Abrahama, wena kanye netitukulwane takho, uze ulitsatse libe lakho lelive losihambi kulo kwamanje, Nkulunkulu lalinika Abrahama!”" 
Genesis28:5 Ngako-ke Isaka wahambisa Jakobe wamyisa eMesophothamiya kaLabani umsa waBethuweli, um-Aramu, umnakaboRebheka, unaboJakobe na-Esawu." 
Genesis28:6 Esawu weva kutsi Isaka abesabusise Jakobe, wabuye wamhambisa watsi akaye eMesophothamiya, kutsi ayewutsatsa khona umfati. Esawu weva nekutsi Isaka abesayale Jakobe watsi: “Ungamtsatsi umfati kulamaKhenani.”" 
Genesis28:7 Weva nekutsi Jakobe abebahloniphile boyise nenina ngekutsi ahambe aye eMesophothamiya. 
Genesis28:8 Esawu watsi kube abone kutsi emadvodzakati emaKhenani abengamjabulisi uyise," 
Genesis28:9 wesuka wayawutsatsa Mahalathi wamenta umkakhe etikwalabafati labenabo. Mahalathi abengudzadzewaboNebayothi, indvodzakati ya-Ishmayeli, umsa wa-Abrahama." 
Genesis28:10 Jakobe wesuka eBherisheba waya eHarani. 
Genesis28:11 Wefika endzaweni lengcwele wahlala khona busuku, ngobe lilanga lase lishonile. Watsatsa lelinye lematje akuleyo ndzawo wacamela etikwalo, walala." 
Genesis28:12 Wabhudza abona liladi limiswe emhlabatsini, laze lefika ezulwini, wabona tingilosi taNkulunkulu tehla tenyuka ngalo." 
Genesis28:13 Simakadze abeme etikwalo; wakhuluma naye watsi: “NginguSimakadze, Nkulunkulu weyihlo Abrahama, naNkulunkulu wa-Isaka. Lelive lolele kulo ngiyawulinika wena kanye netitukulwane takho." 
Genesis28:14 Titukulwane takho tiyawuba ngangelutfuli lwemhlaba. Uyakwandza nemhlaba wonkhe wenabele enshonalanga, nasemphumalanga, nasenyakatfo, naseningizimu. Tonkhe tive temhlaba tiyawubusiswa ngawe nangetitukulwane takho." 
Genesis28:15 Ukhumbule kutsi ngitawuba nawe ngikulondvolote nome uyaphi, ngikubuyise kulo lelive. Ngobe ngingeke ngikushiye ngingakakwenti loku lesengikwetsembise kona.”" 
Genesis28:16 Jakobe waphaphama ebutfongweni, watsi: “Kantsi Simakadze ukulendzawo, bengingakwati-ke loku.”" 
Genesis28:17 Wefikelwa kwesaba, watsi: “Maye, lendzawo iyesabeka! Ngempela lendzawo iyindlu yaNkulunkulu. Leli lisango lasezulwini.”" 
Genesis28:18 Ngako-ke Jakobe wavuka ekuseni kuseluvivi, walitsatsa lelitje abecamele kulo, walimisa laba luphawu lwesikhumbuto, watsela emafutsa etikwalo." 
Genesis28:19 Lendzawo wayetsa libito watsi yiBetheli, kodvwa ekucaleni lelidolobha lalibitwa ngekutsi yiLuzi." 
Genesis28:20 Jakobe wase wenta sifungo, watsi: “Nangabe Nkulunkulu atawuba nami angilondvolote kuloluhambo lwami, anginike kudla, netimphahla tekwembatsa, ngembatse," 
Genesis28:21 ngidzimate ngibuyele ngekuthula ekhaya ketfu, khona-ke Simakadze uyawuba nguNkulunkulu wami." 
Genesis28:22 Lelitje lengilimise la, kutsi libe sikhumbuto, litawuba yindlu yaNkulunkulu. Kuko konkhe langipha kona ngiyakumnika kwelishumi.”" 
Genesis29:1 Jakobe wachubeka neluhambo lwakhe waya eveni lebantfu bangasemphumalanga. 
Genesis29:2 Watsi asahamba, adzabula imimango, wakhandza sicobho semanti situngeletwe ngimihlambi lemitsatfu yetimvu ilele eceleni kwaso. Lemihlambi yayitewunatsiswa kuso leso sicobho. Kwakunelitje lelikhulu lekwakumbonywe ngalo." 
Genesis29:3 Yayitsi lemihlambi ingaphelela, belusi bese bayaligicita balisuse lelitje, banatsise lemihlambi, babuye balibuyisele." 
Genesis29:4 Jakobe wabuta labelusi watsi: “Ye bomnaketfu, niphumaphi?” Bamphendvula batsi: “Siphuma kaHarani.”" 
Genesis29:5 Wababuta futsi watsi: “Niyamati yini Labani, umsa waNahori?” Bamphendvula batsi: “Yebo, siyamati.”" 
Genesis29:6 Watsi: “Usaphila yini?” Batsi: “Yebo, usaphila. Nanguya nje naRakheli, indvodzakati yakhe, eta netimvu takhe.”" 
Genesis29:7 Jakobe watsi: “Njengobe kusesemini lenkhulu kangaka nyalo, kusengakabi sikhatsi sekutsi letimvu tibutsiswe ndzawonye, anitinatsisi ngani, bese niyakutidlisa eluhlateni?”" 
Genesis29:8 Bamphendvula batsi: “Singeke phela sicale ingakapheleli yonkhe lemihlambi bese kugicitwa lelitje, kungukhona-ke sitinatsisa letimvu.”" 
Genesis29:9 Watsi asakhuluma nje Jakobe, kwase kufika Rakheli netimvu teyise, ngobe bekunguye labetelusa." 
Genesis29:10 Jakobe watsi kube ambone loRakheli, indvodzakati yaLabani, malume wakhe, abone netimvu takaLabani, wesuka waya kulelitje, wafike waligicita, wase uyatinatsisa timvu takamalume wakhe, Labani." 
Genesis29:11 Jakobe wanga Rakheli, wakhala ngenca yenjabulo." 
Genesis29:12 Jakobe watjela Rakheli watsi: “Mine ngisihlobo seyihlo, ngitalwa nguRebheka.” Rakheli wagijima wayawutjela uyise." 
Genesis29:13 Watsi kube Labani ayive lendzaba yemshana wakhe, wagijima wamhlangabeta, wafike wamgona wamanga, wamngenisa endlini. Jakobe watekela Labani yonkhe indzaba yakhe." 
Genesis29:14 Labani watsi kuye: “Ngempela ulitsambo lami nengati yami.” Jakobe wahlala lapho inyanga yonkhe. 
Genesis29:15 Labani wakhuluma kuJakobe, watsi: “Njengobe usinini sami, pho, kufanele yini kutsi ungisebentele mahhala? Ngitjele kutsi ufuna ngikuholele ngani.”" 
Genesis29:16 Labani abenemadvodzakati lamabili, lendzala bekunguLeya, lencane kunguRakheli." 
Genesis29:17 Leya abenemehlo lamahle latsambile, kodvwa Rakheli abeme kahle, amuhle." 
Genesis29:18 Jakobe abetsandza Rakheli, ngako-ke watsi: “Ngitakusebentela iminyaka lesikhombisa, nawunganginika Rakheli, indvodzakati yakho lencane, ibe ngumkami.”" 
Genesis29:19 Labani watsi: “Kuncono mane ngimnike wena kunekutsi ngimnike nome ngubani nje, sale uhlala nami la ekhaya.”" 
Genesis29:20 Ngako-ke Jakobe wamsebentela iminyaka lesikhombisa loRakheli, noko kuJakobe leminyaka lengaka kwaba shangatsi ngemalangana nje, ngobe phela abemtsandza kakhulu." 
Genesis29:21 Jakobe wakhuluma kuLabani, watsi: “Sengisicedzile sikhatsi sami, sale unginika umkami ngingene kuye.”" 
Genesis29:22 Ngako-ke, Labani wamema bonkhe bantfu bakuleyo ndzawo, wenta lidzili." 
Genesis29:23 Kodvwa kwatsi ngalobo busuku Labani watsatsa indvodzakati yakhe, Leya, wayingenisa kuJakobe. Jakobe wamati Leya." 
Genesis29:24 Labani wakhipha Zilpha, labesisebenti sakhe, kutsi atewuba sisebenti saLeya." 
Genesis29:25 Ekuseni ngakusasa Jakobe kwangukhona abona kutsi nguLeya. Jakobe waya kuLabani wafike watsi: “Yini lena longenta yona? Kantsi bengingasebenteli Rakheli yini? Manje ungilutseleni?” 
Genesis29:26 Labani wamphendvula watsi: “Kulelive akwentiwa kutsi kwendziswe lomncane kucala lomdzala angakendzi. 
Genesis29:27 Ase ume kuphele leliviki lemshado, sitawube sesiyakunika futsi nalona lomunye, nawungasebenta leminye iminyaka lesikhombisa.”" 
Genesis29:28 Jakobe wenta njalo, walicedza leliviki lemshado. Labani wase umnika Rakheli, indvodzakati yakhe, kutsi abe ngumkakhe." 
Genesis29:29 Labani wakhipha Bilha labesisebenti sakhe kutsi atewuba sisebenti saRakheli. 
Genesis29:30 Ngako Jakobe wangena kuRakheli. Wamtsandza kakhulu kunaLeya. Jakobe wasebentela Labani leminye futsi iminyaka lesikhombisa. 
Genesis29:31 Watsi kube abone Simakadze kutsi Leya uyaliwa, wavula sitalo sakhe; kepha Rakheli waba yinyumba." 
Genesis29:32 Leya wakhulelwa, watala indvodzana, wayetsa libito watsi nguRubeni, ngobe abetsi: “Simakadze ukubonile kuhlupheka kwami, manje indvodza yami seyitangitsandza.”" 
Genesis29:33 Waphindza wakhulelwa, watala indvodzana, watsi: “Njengobe Simakadze evile kutsi ngiyaliwa, uphindze wangipha lenye indvodzana.” Wayetsa libito watsi nguSimeyoni." 
Genesis29:34 Waphindze futsi wakhulelwa, watala lenye indvodzana, watsi: “Manje-ke indvodza yami seyitawunamatsela kimi, ngobe sengiyitalele emadvodzana lamatsatfu.” Ngako-ke libito layo kwaba nguLevi." 
Genesis29:35 Waphindze wakhulelwa futsi, watala indvodzana, watsi: “Manje-ke ngitamdvumisa Simakadze.” Ngako-ke wayetsa libito watsi nguJuda, wase uyema kutala." 
Genesis30:1 Watsi kube Rakheli abone kutsi akamtaleli Jakobe bantfwana, waba nesikhwele ngadzadzewabo. Watsi kuJakobe: “Ngiphe bantfwana, ngaphandle kwaloko ngitakufa!”" 
Genesis30:2 Jakobe watfukutselela Rakheli, wadzimate watsi: “Kantsi mine nginguNkulunkulu yini, longuyena avale sitalo sakho?”" 
Genesis30:3 Rakheli waphendvula Jakobe watsi: “Nasi sisebenti sami lesinguBilha, ngena kuso, kuze atengitalela, khona nami ngitewuba nebantfwana ngaye.”" 
Genesis30:4 Ngako wamnika Bilha, sisebenti sakhe, kutsi abe ngumkakhe. Jakobe wangena kuBilha, walala naye." 
Genesis30:5 Bilha wakhulelwa, watalela Jakobe indvodzana." 
Genesis30:6 Rakheli watsi: “Nkulunkulu ungehlulele, waliva nelivi lami, wangipha indvodzana.” Ngako-ke wayetsa libito layo watsi nguDani." 
Genesis30:7 Waphindze Bilha, sisebenti saRakheli, wakhulelwa, watalela Jakobe indvodzana yesibili." 
Genesis30:8 Rakheli watsi: “Ngekubambana lokunemandla ngibambene nadzadzewetfu ngamehlula.” Wayetsa libito watsi nguNaftali. 
Genesis30:9 Watsi kube abone Leya kutsi sewumile kutala, watsatsa Zilpha, sisebenti sakhe, wasinika Jakobe kutsi sibe ngumkakhe." 
Genesis30:10 Zilpha sisebenti saLeya, watalela Jakobe indvodzana." 
Genesis30:11 Leya watsi: “Yinhlanhla lenhle,” ngako wayetsa libito watsi nguGadi." 
Genesis30:12 Zilpha, sisebenti saLeya, saphindze selamisa ngendvodzana yesibili." 
Genesis30:13 Leya watsi: “Maye, ngiyajabula! Nyalo labasikati sebayawutsi ngibusisekile.” Ngako wayetsa libito watsi ngu-Asheri." 
Genesis30:14 Ngesikhatsi kuvunwa kolo, Rubeni watsi uyahamba, watfola umutsi wentalo ensimini, wawumikisa kuLeya, unina. Ngako Rakheli watsi kuLeya: “Ngicela sewumane ungiphe lomunye walomutsi wentalo lotfolwe yindvodzana yakho.”" 
Genesis30:15 Leya watsi kuRakheli: “Wena nanyalo awukeneliswa kutsi wena sewugovuke nendvodza yami? Nyalo sewufuna kutsatsa nalomutsi lengiwutfolelwe yindvodzana yami?” Rakheli waphendvula Leya watsi: “Ungamane ulale nayo kulobusuku balamuhla, nawungamane nje ungiphe lomutsi wendvodzana yakho.”" 
Genesis30:16 Entsambama nakabuya etsafeni Jakobe, wahlangabetwa nguLeya. Wafike watsi kuJakobe: “Ubota utewulala nami lamuhla, ngobe ngikucashe ngemutsi wentalo lotfolwe yindvodzana yami.” Ngako-ke wavele wayawulala naye kulobo busuku." 
Genesis30:17 Nkulunkulu wawuva umthandazo waLeya. Leya wakhulelwa, watalela Jakobe indvodzana yesihlanu." 
Genesis30:18 Leya watsi: “Nkulunkulu unginike umvuzo wami, ngobe indvodza yami ngayinika sisebenti sami.” Lendvodzana wayetsa libito watsi ngu-Isakhari." 
Genesis30:19 Leya waphindze wakhulelwa futsi. Watalela Jakobe indvodzana yesitfupha. 
Genesis30:20 Leya watsi: “Nkulunkulu unginike sipho lesihle. Manje indvodza yami seyitawubambelela kimi, ngobe sengiyitalele emadvodzana lasitfupha.” Ngako wayetsa libito watsi nguZebuloni." 
Genesis30:21 Emvakwaloko Leya watalela Jakobe indvodzakati, wayetsa libito watsi nguDina." 
Genesis30:22 Nkulunkulu wakhumbula Rakheli, wawuva umthandazo wakhe, wasivula sitalo sakhe." 
Genesis30:23 Rakheli wakhulelwa, watala indvodzana, watsi: “Nkulunkulu sewulisusile lihlazo lami.”" 
Genesis30:24 Wayetsa libito watsi nguJosefa, atsi: “Shangatsi Simakadze angangengetela lenye indvodzana.”" 
Genesis30:25 Watsi Rakheli asatele Josefa, Jakobe watsi kuLabani: “Ase ungikhulule, ngihambe ngibuyele ekhaya kitsi naseveni lakitsi." 
Genesis30:26 Sale unginika bafati bami, nebantfwabami lengikusebentele ngabo ngitewuhamba, ngobe nawe uyawati umsebenti lengikwentele wona.”" 
Genesis30:27 Labani watsi kuye: “Ase ngisho naku: Sengifundzile, futsi sengiyile ngeva kubemanga kutsi Simakadze ungibusise ngenca yakho." 
Genesis30:28 Shano liholo lakho, ngitakunika.”" 
Genesis30:29 Jakobe watsi kuye: “Nawe matfupha uyati kutsi ngikusebentele kanjani, nekutsi timphahla takho tandze kanganani tiseluswa ngimi." 
Genesis30:30 Leto letimbalwa lewawunato ngisengakefiki setandze kakhulu. Simakadze ukubusise kuyo yonkhe indzawo lapho bengifika khona. Kodvwa-ke manje mine ngitayisebentela nini indlu yami?” 
Genesis30:31 Labani wambuta watsi: “Ufuna ngikuholele ngani?” Jakobe wamphendvula watsi: “Angiwufuni umholo. Ngitawuchubeka ngikwelusele lomhlambi wakho, nawungasemukela nasi sicelo sami:" 
Genesis30:32 Ase ngiyibhidle ekhatsi lemihlambi yakho. Ngitawukhetsa kuyo tonkhe timvu letinemibala naletingemacabhacabha kanye nemazinyane lamnyama, ngikhetse tonkhe timbuti letinemibala naletinemacabhacabha; ngito-ke letitawuba ngumholo wami." 
Genesis30:33 Ngako kwetsembeka nekulunga kwami ngiko lokuyawungifakazela, nase uta ngemuso utewuhlola umholo wami. Nawukhandza imbuti lengenamabala nalengesiwo emacabhacabha nemvu lengemnyama kuleti takami kuyawukhanya kutsi ngitebile.”" 
Genesis30:34 Labani waphendvula watsi: “Kulungile! Akube njengekusho kwakho.” 
Genesis30:35 Kodvwa ngalo lelo langa Labani watikhetsa tonkhe timphongo letinemibala naletimacabhacabha, tonkhe letinalokumhlophe nemazinyane lamnyama, watinika emadvodzana akhe kutsi ateluse," 
Genesis30:36 watsatsa luhambo lwemalanga lamatsatfu kusuka kuJakobe. Jakobe wachubeka wayelusa imihlambi yaLabani leyayisasele. 
Genesis30:37 Jakobe watsatsa imizaca leyayisemanti yetihlahla telibhabhabhulomu, ne-alimondi, nepleni, wayebula wayenta imishi, yasala yaba mhlophe." 
Genesis30:38 Lemizaca wayibeka embikwaletimvu etinkelebheni, lapho tatinatsa khona, ngobe tatekhwelwa natiye kuyewunatsa." 
Genesis30:39 Tekhwelelwa etikwayo lemizaca, temitsa, tatala emazinyane lanemibala, nalangemacabhacabha, nalanemishi." 
Genesis30:40 Jakobe wakhetsa onkhe lamazinyane labetelwe; lemihlambi yeluphawu lwaLabani wayibhekisa ngakulamazinyane. Umhlambi wakhe wawakha ngalendlela wawehlukanisa nemihlambi yaLabani. 
Genesis30:41 Kwakutsi njalo nje letifuyo naseticinile setekhwelwa, Jakobe abeke lemizaca kuletinkelebha tekunatsa embikwalomhlambi entele kutsi titekwemitsela eceleni kwalemizaca." 
Genesis30:42 Kodvwa abengayibeki lemizaca embikwaletifuyo letatiwombile. Ngako-ke Labani wagcina asasalelwe nguletiwombile todvwa, kwatsi leticinile taba taJakobe." 
Genesis30:43 Jakobe wagcina asanjinge kakhulu, waba nemihlambi lemikhulu, netincekukati, netinceku, nemakamela, netimbongolo." 
Genesis31:1 Jakobe weva emadvodzana aLabani akhuluma atsi: “Jakobe sewutsetse konkhe lobekukwababe. Sewunjinge ngaletimphahla tababe.” 
Genesis31:2 Jakobe wabona kutsi buso baLabani babungasamjabuleli njengakucala. 
Genesis31:3 Simakadze wakhuluma kuJakobe watsi: “Hamba ubuyele eveni lakini, lapho watalelwa khona, ngitawuba nawe.”" 
Genesis31:4 Ngako-ke Jakobe wabita boRakheli naLeya kutsi bete kuye emadlelweni, lapho abelusele khona imfuyo yakhe." 
Genesis31:5 Wafike wakhuluma kubo watsi: “Sengibonile kutsi buso beyihlo abusangijabuleli njengakucala, kodvwa Nkulunkulu wababe abenami." 
Genesis31:6 Nani niyati kutsi uyihlo ngimsebentele ngawo onkhe emandla ami. 
Genesis31:7 Kodvwa uyihlo sewungiphambile ngekutsi agucule liholo lami ngalokuphindvwe kalishumi, noko Nkulunkulu akamvumeli kutsi ente lokubi kimi." 
Genesis31:8 Utsite nakatsi: ‘Liholo lakho kutawuba nguletimacabhacabha todvwa,’ umhlambi wonkhe wesuka watala letimacabhacabha. Nome asatsite: ‘Liholo lakho kutawuba nguletinemishi,’ umhlambi wonkhe wesuka watala letinemishi todvwa." 
Genesis31:9 Nkulunkulu uyitsatse kanjalo-ke imfuyo yeyihlo wayinika mine. 
Genesis31:10 “Kwatsi ngesikhatsi tekhwelwa letimbuti ngabhudza, ngatsi ngiyabuka ngabona letiphongo letekhwela letimbutikati kutsi tatinemishi, timacabhacabha, naletimabalabala." 
Genesis31:11 Ingilosi yaNkulunkulu yangibita ephusheni yatsi: ‘Jakobe!’ Ngasabela ngatsi: ‘Ngilapha.’ 
Genesis31:12 Yakhuluma kimi yatsi: ‘Buka la, tonkhe letiphongo letekhwela letimbutikati tinemishi, timacabhacabha, timabalabala; ngobe sengikubone konkhe lokwentiwa nguLabani kuwe." 
Genesis31:13 NginguNkulunkulu waseBetheli, lapho wagcoba khona litje ngemafutsa, walenta sikhumbuto, wafunga kimi. Sukuma-ke manje, utfutse kulelive, ubuyele eveni lakini, lapho kunenkhaba yakho khona.’ ”" 
Genesis31:14 BoRakheli naLeya baphendvula batsi: “Pho, sisenaso yini sabelo nome lifa lekungeletfu endlini yababe?" 
Genesis31:15 Kambe asisesibo bafokati yini? Ngobe sewatsengisa ngatsi, nemali layitfola ngatsi sewayidla wayicedza." 
Genesis31:16 Yonkhe ingcebo letsetfwe nguNkulunkulu kubabe ngeyetfu nebantfwabetfu. Ngako-ke, yenta loko Nkulunkulu lakukhulume kuwe.”" 
Genesis31:17 Jakobe wesuka lapho wagibelisa bantfwabakhe nebafati bakhe emakameleni," 
Genesis31:18 wayichuba yonkhe imfuyo yakhe kanye nako konkhe kwakhe labekuholile eMesophothamiya, wancandzeka wabuyela kuyise, Isaka, eveni laseKhenani." 
Genesis31:19 Labani abengekho ayewuhhula timvu takhe, Rakheli weba tithico takabo." 
Genesis31:20 Jakobe wamnyenyela Labani, umSiriya, ngobe akazange amtjele kutsi utawuhamba." 
Genesis31:21 Wabaleka nako konkhe labenako, wewela umfula iYufrathe, emabombo awabhekise ngasetintsabeni takaGileyadi." 
Genesis31:22 Watsi kube Labani atjelwe ngelilanga lesitsatfu kutsi Jakobe akasekho ubalekile," 
Genesis31:23 watsatsa bomnakabo wamlandzela amcosha ngemuva, kwadzimate kwaphela emalanga lasikhombisa, waze wamkhandza etintsabeni takaGileyadi." 
Genesis31:24 Kodvwa Nkulunkulu weta wakhuluma ngeliphupho kuLabani, umSiriya, watsi: “Ucaphele ungakhulumi lokuhle nome lokubi kuJakobe.”" 
Genesis31:25 Labani wamkhandza Jakobe. Jakobe abemise lithende lakhe kuleto tintsaba takaGileyadi, naLabani kanye nabomnakabo naye wakanekisa kuto leto tintsaba." 
Genesis31:26 Labani wafike wakhuluma kuJakobe, watsi: “Seyini-ke lena lose uyentile, unginyenyeleleni ngekuhamba nemadvodzakati ami kungatsi bafati lobatfumbe emphini?" 
Genesis31:27 Uhambeleni ngekunyenya? Awukangitjeli ngani, khona phela ngitekukhipa ngekujabula, nangekuhlabela, nangelugubhu, nangelihabhu?" 
Genesis31:28 Awukangivumeli ngani kutsi ngivalelise emadvodzana nemadvodzakati ami ngekuwanga? Ibulima-ke lentfo loyentile. 
Genesis31:29 Nginawo emandla ekukulimata; kodvwa Nkulunkulu weyihlo ukhulume kimi itolo ebusuku ephusheni watsi: ‘Ucaphele, ungakhulumi lokuhle nome lokubi kuJakobe.’" 
Genesis31:30 Nyalo-ke njengobe sewuhamba ukhumbule bakini, utebeleni letithico tami?”" 
Genesis31:31 Jakobe waphendvula Labani, watsi: “Kungobe ngesabile kutsi ungahle ungemuke lamadvodzakati akho." 
Genesis31:32 Kodvwa lowo loyawukhandza tithico takho kuye akafe nekufa. Phenya la emkhatsini wetfu ukhombe lokukwakho lokukimi ukutsatse bonkhe bantfu babuka.” Phela Jakobe abengati kutsi letithico tatebiwe nguRakheli. 
Genesis31:33 Ngako-ke Labani waya ethendeni laJakobe, nelaLeya, nasethendeni letisebenti letisikati letimbili; kodvwa akatitfolanga tithico. Waphuma ethendeni laLeya waya ethendeni laRakheli." 
Genesis31:34 Rakheli bekatsetse letithico watifihla ngaphansi kwesihlalo selikamela, wahlala etikwato. Labani, watiphumphutsa lonkhe lithende laRakheli, wangete watitfola." 
Genesis31:35 Rakheli watsi kuyise: “Shangatsi inkhosi yami ingete yangitfukutselela ngekutsi ngingeke ngiphakame embikwayo, ngobe ngisesikhatsini.” Labani waphenya, wanyakulula, kodvwa akazange atitfole letithico." 
Genesis31:36 Jakobe watfukutsela wagcwala kokana, watsetsisa Labani watsi: “Siphi-ke siphambuko sami? Sono sami siphi, kutsi bewungaze ungitfungatse kangaka?" 
Genesis31:37 Njengobe sewuphenye watinyakulula kangaka letimphahla tami, tiphi-ke temndeni wakho? Tibeke la embikwabo bonkhe labantfu babuka kutsi kube ngibo lababehluleli emkhatsini wakho nami." 
Genesis31:38 Ngicedze iminyaka lengema-20 ngihleti nawe. Timvu takho netimbuti takho atizange setiphunte, angizange sengidle kwasasihhanca sakho." 
Genesis31:39 Ngisho naleti letatidliwe tilwane tesiganga ngangingatiletsi kuwe, kodvwa ngangivele ngitenane ngetami. Nawe wawuvele utifune kimi letebiwe emini nome ebusuku." 
Genesis31:40 Emini bengibhadliswa lilanga, ebusuku ngishushwe lichwa, ngiphelelwe nabutfongo." 
Genesis31:41 Bengihleti nawe iminyaka lengemashumi lamabili, emadvodzakati akho ngiwasebentele iminyaka lelishumi namine, timphahla takho ngatelusa iminyaka lesitfupha, nakhona lapho wangidlelela umholo wami ngekuwugucula emahlandla lalishumi." 
Genesis31:42 Kube Nkulunkulu wababe, naNkulunkulu wa-Abrahama, lokwesaba kwa-Isaka, abengekho ngakimi, ngineliciniso kutsi ngabe ungicoshile ngahamba mahhala ngite lutfo. Kodvwa Nkulunkulu ukubonile kuhlupheka kwami nemsebenti wetandla tami, wase uyakwekhuta kulobusuku bayitolo.”" 
Genesis31:43 Labani waphendvula Jakobe watsi: “Lamadvodzakati lawa ngami, nalabantfwana bami, nalemihlambi yami, nako konkhe loku lokubonako kwami. Kodvwa kute lengingabuye ngikwente ngalamadvodzakati nalabantfwabawo lababatele." 
Genesis31:44 Lokuncono kota sente sivumelwane, wena nami, kube bufakazi emkhatsini wetfu sobabili.”" 
Genesis31:45 Ngako-ke Jakobe watsatsa litje walimisa kutsi libe sikhumbuto. 
Genesis31:46 Jakobe wakhuluma kulamadvodza labehamba nawo watsi ababutse ematje. Nembala awabutsa enta ngawo sivivane, badla ndzawonye badlela eceleni kwaso." 
Genesis31:47 Labani wasetsa watsi yiJega Sahadutha; kodvwa Jakobe wasetsa watsi yiGaledi. 
Genesis31:48 Labani wakhuluma kuJakobe watsi: “Lamuhla lesivivane sibufakazi emkhatsini wakho nami.” Ngako-ke wasetsa watsi yiGaledi. 
Genesis31:49 Lelinye libito laso watsi yiMispa, ngobe abetsi: “Shangatsi Simakadze angasigcina sobabili nome sesehlukene." 
Genesis31:50 Nawuwaphatsa kabi lamadvodzakati ami nome sewutsatsa labanye bafati ngaphandle kwawo nome ungabonwa ngumuntfu, kodvwa ubokhumbula kutsi Nkulunkulu ungufakazi emkhatsini wetfu sobabili.”" 
Genesis31:51 Labani wachubeka wakhuluma kuJakobe, watsi: “Buka nasi sivivane nalelitje lelisikhumbuto lengikubeke embikwetfu sobabili." 
Genesis31:52 Lesivivane asibe bufakazi, nalelitje kube ngulona bufakazi, bekutsi ngingeke ngendlule lesivivane nalelitje ngewelele ngakuwe, nawe futsi ungeke wendlule lesivivane nalelitje wewelele ngakimi kutakwenta bubi." 
Genesis31:53 Nkulunkulu wa-Abrahama naNkulunkulu waNahori, utakwehlulela emkhatsini wetfu.” Ngako-ke Jakobe wafunga ngaNkulunkulu weyise Isaka, wagomela kutsi utasigcina lesetsembiso." 
Genesis31:54 Jakobe wanikela ngemhlatjelo etikwentsaba, wase umema lamadvodza kutsi atewudla sinkhwa. Adla ahlala busuku bonkhe kuleyo ntsaba." 
Genesis31:55 Labani wavuka ngakusasa ekuseni ngetingweti, wanga batukulu bakhe nemadvodzakati akhe, wababusisa, wancandzeka wabuyela ekhaya kakhe." 
Genesis32:1 Jakobe wachubeka nendlela yakhe, tingilosi taNkulunkulu tamhlangabeta." 
Genesis32:2 Jakobe watsi kube atibone letingilosi watsi: “Lesi sikanekiso saNkulunkulu!” Wetsa leyo ndzawo libito watsi yiMahanayimu. 
Genesis32:3 Jakobe watfumela tigijimi ku-Esawu umnakabo, eveni laseSeyiri, kulaka-Edomu." 
Genesis32:4 Watibamba ngendlebe watsi: “Nitawufika enkhosini yami, Esawu, niyitjele nitsi: ‘Inceku yakho, Jakobe, itsi: Seloku ngahamba bengisolo ngihleti kaLabani, kuze kube ngulamuhla." 
Genesis32:5 Nginetinkhabi, netimbongolo, netimvu, netimbuti netisebenti letidvuna naletisikati. Sengitfumele ligama enkhosini yami kutsi kumbe ngingatfola umusa ngemukeleke.’ ”" 
Genesis32:6 Titfunywa tabuya kuJakobe, tafike tatsi: “Simkhandzile umnakenu Esawu; naye sewuyeta utekuhlangabeta, uta nemadvodza langemakhulu lamane.”" 
Genesis32:7 Jakobe wesaba kakhulu waba neluvalo. Wehlukanisa labantfu abehamba nabo, wabenta emacembu lamabili, kanjalo nemihlambi yetimvu, neyetimbuti, neyetinkhomo kanye neyemakamela nako wakwenta njalo." 
Genesis32:8 Loku abekwenta acabanga atsi: “Nangabe Esawu efika ahlasela lelinye licembu, leli lelinye-ke lelisasele lisengabaleka.”" 
Genesis32:9 Jakobe wase uyathandaza watsi: “Nkulunkulu wababemkhulu Abrahama, naNkulunkulu wababe wami Isaka! Simakadze, wena wakhuluma kimi watsi: ‘Ncandzeka ubuyele eveni lakini, nasetihlotjeni takho, mine ngitakwentela lokuhle.’" 
Genesis32:10 Umusa wakho awukangifaneli nako konkhe kwetsembeka kwakho lokubonakalise kimi, inceku yakho, akukangifaneli. Ngobe lomfula iJordane ngawewela ngiphetse ludvondvolo lwami lodvwa, manje senginemacembu lamabili." 
Genesis32:11 Ngicela kutsi umane ungephule esandleni semnaketfu Esawu, ngobe ngiyamesaba, kutsi angahle angihlasele abulale bantfwana kanye nabonina." 
Genesis32:12 Kodvwa wena wakhuluma kimi watsi: ‘Ngiyawukwentela lokuhle, ngandzise nentalo yakho ibe ngangesihlabatsi sangaselwandle, ingete yabaleka ngenca yebunyenti.’ ”" 
Genesis32:13 Jakobe wacitsa busuku bonkhe kuleyo ndzawo, wakhetsela Esawu, umnakabo, sipho etifuyweni takhe, wakhetsa" 
Genesis32:14 timbutikati letingemakhulu lamabili, netiphongo letingemashumi lamabili, netimvukati letingemakhulu lamabili, netihhanca letingemashumi lamabili," 
Genesis32:15 nemakamela lasengwako langemashumi lamatsatfu kanye nemankhonyane awo, netinkhomati letingemashumi lamane, netinkunzi letilishumi, netimbongolo letinsikati letingemashumi lamabili, naletindvuna letilishumi." 
Genesis32:16 Tonkhe letifuyo watehlukanisa emkhatsini, taba ngimihlambi leyehlukene, ngulowo nalowo umhlambi wabasesandleni senceku yakhe letsite. Watiyala letinceku takhe watsi: “Hambani ngembili kwami, nishiyelane imikhawu yemabanga latsite, emikhatsini yemihlambi yenu.”" 
Genesis32:17 Inceku yekucala wayiyala watsi: “Nawuhlangana na-Esawu, umnaketfu, akubuta atsi: ‘Wena uwakabani? Uyaphi? Ngetabani letifuyo lotichubako?’" 
Genesis32:18 ubotsi: ‘Tenceku yakho Jakobe. Utitfumele njengesipho enkhosini yakhe Esawu. Naye, Jakobe, usilandzela ngemuva.’ ”" 
Genesis32:19 Wachubeka wayiyala kanjalo futsi neyesibili, neyesitsatfu, nato tonkhe letinceku lebetichuba lemihlambi atsi: “Ngiko loko-ke leniyakukhuluma ku-Esawu, nanihlangana naye." 
Genesis32:20 Nibotsi: ‘Yebo, Jakobe inceku yakho, ita ngemuva, iyangilandzela.’ ” Jakobe abecabanga atsi uyatincengela ngaletipho ngekutitfumela kucala, khona kutawutsi nakahlangana naye, abe asamcolele." 
Genesis32:21 Ngako-ke letipho takhe tahamba embili, yena Jakobe wasala ngemuva esikanekisweni, wabucitsa khona busuku." 
Genesis32:22 Ngabona lobo busuku Jakobe wavuka watsatsa bafati bakhe bobabili, netincekukati takhe letimbili, nebantfwabakhe labalishumi namunye, wabeweta etubukweni lemfula iJabhoki." 
Genesis32:23 Bonkhe wabewetela ngesheya kwemfula nako konkhe labenako," 
Genesis32:24 kodvwa yena wasala ngemuva. Kwase kufika indvodza labambana nayo, kwadzimate kwadzabuka kusa." 
Genesis32:25 Yatsi kube ibone lendvodza kutsi iyehluleka kuphunyula kuJakobe, yase imtsintsa enyongeni. Inyonga yaJakobe yenyela solomane tibambene etulu nalendvodza." 
Genesis32:26 Lendvodza yatsi: “Ngiyekele ngihambe, ngobe sekuyasa.” Jakobe watsi: “Ngingeke ngikuyekele uhambe ungakangibusisi.”" 
Genesis32:27 Yabuta yatsi: “Ngubani libito lakho?” Waphendvula watsi: “NginguJakobe.” 
Genesis32:28 Lendvodza yatsi: “Libito lakho lingeke lisaba nguJakobe, kodvwa sewutawuba ngu-Israyeli, ngobe ubambene naNkulunkulu nebantfu, wajinge wancoba.”" 
Genesis32:29 Jakobe wabuta watsi: “Wena-ke ungubani libito lakho?” Yaphendvula yatsi: “Ufunelani kwati libito lami?” Yase iyambusisa. 
Genesis32:30 Jakobe lendzawo wayetsa libito watsi: “yiPheniyeli,” lokusho kutsi: “Ngibonene naNkulunkulu buso nebuso, noko umphefumulo wami waphephiswa.”" 
Genesis32:31 Jakobe wesuka ePheniyeli nakuphuma lilanga, asahamba achuta ngenca yenyonga yakhe." 
Genesis32:32 Ngako-ke kuze kube ngulamuhla titukulwane taka-Israyeli atiwudli umsipha wenyonga, ngobe ngiwo lowo msipha lowatsintfwa kuJakobe." 
Genesis33:1 Jakobe watsi uphakamisa emehlo, wabona Esawu eta nemadvodza akakhe langemakhulu lamane. Wehlukanisa bantfwabakhe emkhatsini waLeya, naRakheli netincekukati tabo letimbili." 
Genesis33:2 Tincekukati nebantfwabato, bahamba embili, kwalandzela Leya nebantfwabakhe, kwagcina Rakheli naJosefa." 
Genesis33:3 Jakobe wahamba embikwabo bonkhe, wakhotsamela emhlabatsini kasikhombisa, wadzimate wefika kumnakabo." 
Genesis33:4 Kodvwa Esawu wagijima wamhlangabeta, wafike wamgona ngemikhono, wamanga. Bakhala bobabili." 
Genesis33:5 Esawu watsi uyabuka wabona bafati nebantfwana, wabuta watsi: “Bobani laba lohamba nabo?” Jakobe wamphendvula watsi: “Laba-ke bantfwana Nkulunkulu layiphe bona inceku yakho.”" 
Genesis33:6 Letincekukati-ke tase tita nebantfwabato tafike takhotsama nato. 
Genesis33:7 NaLeya wasondzela kanye nebantfwabakhe bafike bakhotsama, ekugcineni-ke kwasondzela Josefa naRakheli, nabo bafike bakhotsama." 
Genesis33:8 Esawu wabuta watsi: “Usho kutsini ngato tonkhe leticumbi lebengihambe ngihlangana nato?” Jakobe waphendvula watsi: “Ngicondze kutsi ngizuze umusa enkhosini yami, ngemukeleke.”" 
Genesis33:9 Kodvwa Esawu waphendvula watsi: “Cha, mnaketfu, nami senginalokunyenti; tigcinele wena loko lonako kube kwakakho.”" 
Genesis33:10 Jakobe watsi: “Cha, mnaketfu, ngiyacela nangabe ngemukele umusa emehlweni akho semukele lesipho sami; ngobe kimi kubona buso bakho kunjengekubona buso baNkulunkulu, kakhulu nje ngobe nawe sewungemukele ngemoya lomuhle." 
Genesis33:11 Ngicela usitsatse lesipho lonikwa sona, ngobe Nkulunkulu ube nemusa kimi, wadzimate wangipha konkhe lengikudzingako.” Ngenca yekuncenga kwaJakobe wagcina asasemukele." 
Genesis33:12 Esawu watsi: “Asitilungisele kuhamba, mine ngitawuhamba embikwakho.”" 
Genesis33:13 Jakobe waphendvula watsi: “Inkhosi yami seyibabonile bantfwana kutsi bancane, timvu netinkhomo ngiyatincenekela ngobe tiyamunyisa. Natishuciswa ngemjako lilanga lonkhe, titakufa." 
Genesis33:14 Ngicela umane wena uhambe embili, mine ngitawusale ngishuca ngincengancenga nalabantfwana. Inkhosi yami ngitayikhandza e-Edomu.”" 
Genesis33:15 Esawu watsi: “Kuncono ngishiye lamanye kulamadvodza lengite nawo ete kanye nani.” Kodvwa Jakobe waphendvula watsi: “Ngiyabonga. Kodvwa loko bekungakadzingeki, kuphela kutsi ngitfole umusa emehlweni enkhosi yami.”" 
Genesis33:16 Ngalona lelo langa Esawu wahamba wabuyela e-Edomu. 
Genesis33:17 Kodvwa Jakobe wahamba waya eSukhothi. Wefika lapho watakhela indlu, wakha nesibaya setinkhomo takhe. Ngako-ke lendzawo wayetsa libito watsi yiSukhothi." 
Genesis33:18 Jakobe wahamba kahle waze wefika ngekuphepha edolobheni laseShekhemu yaseKhenani, nakaphuma eMesophothamiya. Wemisa lithende lakhe madvutane nelidolobha." 
Genesis33:19 Lendzawo lafike wamisa kuyo lithende lakhe wayitsenga emadvodzeni aHamori, uyise waShekhemu, wayikhiphela tinhlavu tesiliva letatilikhulu." 
Genesis33:20 Wakha lilati lapho waletsa libito watsi: yi-Eli Elohe Israyeli. 
Genesis34:1 Ngalelinye lilanga, Dina, indvodzakati yaJakobe layitala kuLeya, wavakashela lamanye emantfombatana akuleyo ndzawo labengemaKhenani." 
Genesis34:2 Shekhemu, umsa waHamori umHivi, labesikhulu saleyo ndzawo, watsi nakambona, wamtsatsa wayakumdlwengula, wamhlazisa." 
Genesis34:3 Inhlitiyo yakhe yanamatsela kuDina, wayitsandza lentfombatana, ngako wayisoma." 
Genesis34:4 Shekhemu wakhuluma kuyise, Hamori, watsi: “Ngicela ungitsatsele lentfombi, ngifuna kuyiteka ibe ngumkami.”" 
Genesis34:5 Jakobe weva kutsi Shekhemu ungcolise indvodzakati yakhe; kodvwa akazange akhulume lutfo, kwaze kwabuya emadvodzana akhe labengekho asekweluseni." 
Genesis34:6 Hamori, uyise waShekhemu, wahamba wayawukhuluma naJakobe." 
Genesis34:7 Atsi emadvodzana aJakobe nakefika eva ngaloku, eva buhlungu atfukutsela agcwala kokana, ngobe Shekhemu abente sento lesibi lesiphambene nesive saka-Israyeli ngekudlwengula lendvodzakati yaJakobe. Leyo kwakuyintfo lengentiwa nje vele ka-Israyeli." 
Genesis34:8 Hamori wefika kuJakobe watsi: “Shekhemu, indvodzana yami, utsandze intfombi yakakho. Ngiyakucela kutsi umane umnike yona ayiteke ibe ngumkakhe." 
Genesis34:9 Yendziselanani natsi: nisendzisele tintfombi tenu nani nititsatsele bafati etintfombini tetfu. 
Genesis34:10 Ningakha kulelive letfu nihlale kanye natsi, ningahlala nome ngukuphi lapho nitsandza khona, ningasebenta ngekukhululeka nome kukuphi, nome nitisikele yenu indzawo.”" 
Genesis34:11 Shekhemu wakhuluma kuyise waDina kanye nebanakabo watsi: “Ngicela nimane ningihawukele, ngitaninika nome ngabe yini leniyifunako." 
Genesis34:12 Ningabita lapho nitsandza khona ngelilobolo kanye nesipho, ngitakukhipha, kuphela nje naningivumele kutsi ngiteke lentfombi.”" 
Genesis34:13 Njengobe Shekhemu abesangcolise Dina, dzadzewabo lamadvodzana aJakobe, wona aphendvula boShekhemu neyise Hamori ngebucili," 
Genesis34:14 atsi: “Ngeke sesikwente-ke loko! Dzadzewetfu singeke simnike indvodza lengakasoki, ngobe phela loko kulihlazo lapha kitsi." 
Genesis34:15 Singavuma kuphela, nangabe nani ningalingisa tsine, nisoke bonkhe labadvuna benu." 
Genesis34:16 Nase nente njalo-ke, singendziselana nani, sihlale emkhatsini wenu, sibe sive sinye nani." 
Genesis34:17 Kodvwa nangabe asivumelani kuloko, sitamtsatsa lodzadzewetfu sihambe naye, sisuke kulendzawo.”" 
Genesis34:18 Lesiphakamiso semukeleka kuboHamori nemsa wakhe Shekhemu. 
Genesis34:19 Lelijaha lelibaluleke kakhulu ekhaya kubo alicitsanga sikhatsi, lavele lasokwa ngekushesha, ngobe beliyitsandza kakhulu lendvodzakati yaJakobe." 
Genesis34:20 Ngako-ke Hamoni nemsa wakhe Shekhemu bancandzeka baya enkhundleni yakubo esangweni lelidolobha, bafike bamemetela kutakhamiti tabo batsi:" 
Genesis34:21 “Labantfu balungile, asibavumele kutsi bakhe bahlale ngekukhululeka kulelive letfu. Lelive lingasenela tsine nabo. Singawateka emadvodzakati abo, nabo bateke emadvodzakati etfu." 
Genesis34:22 Kodvwa lamadvodza ayavuma kutsi angahlala natsi sibe sive sinye nabo kuphela nasingenta naku: kutsi sisoke bonkhe labadvuna betfu sibe njengawo. 
Genesis34:23 Kepha nitsi tifuyo tawo kanye nako konkhe kwawo kungeke yini kube kwetfu? Ngako-ke asivume, kuze atekwakha emkhatsini wetfu.”" 
Genesis34:24 Tonkhe takhamiti telidolobha tasemukela siphakamiso saHamori naShekhemu. Ngako-ke bonkhe labadvuna basokwa. 
Genesis34:25 Kwatsi ngelilanga lesitsatfu basokile, basesebuhlungwini, emadvodzana lamabili aJakobe, lekwakubomnakaboDina, boSimeyoni naLevi, batsatsa tinkemba tabo. Banyenya, bangenela lelidolobha, bafike babulala bonkhe labadvuna." 
Genesis34:26 Bahlahlela Hamori naShekhemu, indvodzana yakhe, ngenkemba. Batsatsa Dina, dzadzewabo, endlini kaShekhemu bahamba naye." 
Genesis34:27 Emvakwekubulawa kwalabantfu, lamanye emadvodzana aJakobe eta kulelidolobha afike akhipha sibhongo sekungcoliswa kwadzadzewabo baze baphanga lelidolobha." 
Genesis34:28 Batsatsa imihlambi yetimvu, netimbuti, netinkhomo, netimbongolo, nako konkhe lokwakungekhatsi nangaphandle kwelidolobha, nasemaphandleni." 
Genesis34:29 Bahamba nato tonkhe timphahla, batfumba bonkhe labasikati nebantfwana, batsatsa konkhe lokwakusetindlini." 
Genesis34:30 Jakobe wakhuluma kuboSimeyoni naLevi watsi: “Manje seningiletsele luhlupho, seningibangele kutsi ngitondzeke lapha kulabantfu bakulendzawo, kumaKhenani nakumaPheresi. Mine nginemadvodza lambalwa, ngako nabangahlangana bangihlasele bonkhe kanyekanye, bangangibhubhisa kanye nemndeni wami.”" 
Genesis34:31 Kodvwa bamphendvula batsi: “Besingeke sivume kutsi dzadzewetfu entiwe ingwadla.” 
Genesis35:1 Nkulunkulu wakhuluma kuJakobe watsi: “Suka lapha, ukhuphuke uye eBetheli uyewuhlala khona; ungakhele lilati lapho mine Nkulunkulu ngabonakala kuwe ngesikhatsi ubalekela Esawu, umnakenu.”" 
Genesis35:2 Ngako-ke Jakobe wakhuluma emndenini wakhe nakubo bonkhe lababekakhe, watsi: “Lahlani tonkhe tithico tebetive leninato, nitihlambulule, nembatse tingubo letihlobile." 
Genesis35:3 Sitawusuka la siye eBetheli, lapho ngitawufika ngakhe khona lilati laNkulunkulu, lowangiva wangiphendvula ngesikhatsi sekuhlupheka kwami, nalowaba nami yonkhe indzawo lapho ngangihamba khona.”" 
Genesis35:4 Ngako-ke base batinika Jakobe tithico tebetive lababenato kanye nemacici lababewafake etindlebeni tabo. Jakobe wakumbela ngaphansi kwesihlahla se-okhi edvute neShekemu. 
Genesis35:5 Ngako-ke base bayesuka boJakobe nemadvodzana akhe. Bantfu balamadolobha abesedvutane behlelwa kwesaba lokukhulu lobekuvela kuNkulunkulu, abazange babacoshe ngemuva." 
Genesis35:6 Jakobe nabo bonkhe bantfu labehamba nabo wefika eLuzi, leseyatiwa ngekutsi yiBetheli eveni laseKhenani." 
Genesis35:7 Wafike wakha lilati lapho. Lendzawo wayetsa libito watsi yi-Eli Betheli ngobe ngukhona lapho Nkulunkulu atibonakalisa kuye ngesikhatsi abalekela umnakabo. 
Genesis35:8 Debhora, sisebenti saRebheka, wafa wangcwatjwa ngaphansi kwesihlahla se-okhi eningizimu neBetheli, ngako-ke Jakobe lendzawo wayetsa libito watsi yi-Aloni Bhakhuthi." 
Genesis35:9 Waphindze futsi Nkulunkulu watibonakalisa kuJakobe ngesikhatsi asabuyile eMesophothamiya, wambusisa." 
Genesis35:10 Nkulunkulu watsi kuJakobe: “Libito lakho nguJakobe, kodvwa kusukela nyalo sewutawubitwa ngekutsi ungu-Israyeli.” Ngako-ke Nkulunkulu wametsa ngekutsi ngu-Israyeli." 
Genesis35:11 Nkulunkulu wachubeka watsi kuye: “NginguNkulunkulu, Somandla. Tala, wandze ube sive. Tive letinyenti titawuphuma kuwe, ube ngukhokho wemakhosi." 
Genesis35:12 Ngikunika lelive, lona leli lengalinika bo-Abrahama na-Isaka ngiyawuphindze ngilinike titukulwane takho nasufile wena.”" 
Genesis35:13 Nkulunkulu wase uyesuka kuleyo ndzawo bekakhulumela kuyo, wamshiya wenyuka." 
Genesis35:14 Kwase kutsi lapho akhuluma khona naNkulunkulu Jakobe wemisa litje lesikhumbuto, walitsela ngeliwayini nangemafutsa." 
Genesis35:15 Jakobe wayetsa lendzawo Nkulunkulu abebonakale kuye khona watsi yiBetheli. 
Genesis35:16 Jakobe nemuti wakhe batfutsa eBetheli, batsi basesekhashane ne-Efratha, Rakheli wafikelwa sikhatsi sekubeleka; wahelwa kamatima." 
Genesis35:17 Kodvwa asahelwa kamatima umbelekisi wamdvudvuta watsi: “Ungesabi, Rakheli, sewutfole lenye indvodzana.”" 
Genesis35:18 Kwatsi nasafa wetsa loluswane lwakhe watsi nguBhenoni, kodvwa uyise wametsa libito watsi nguBhenjamini." 
Genesis35:19 Rakheli wafa wangcwatjwa eceleni kwemgwaco loya e-Efratha, lendzawo leseyatiwa ngekutsi yiBhetlehema." 
Genesis35:20 Jakobe wemisa litje lesikhumbuto kuleyo ndzawo, kuze kube ngulamuhla seloku lisakhombisa lelitje lapho kunelithuna laRakheli khona." 
Genesis35:21 Israyeli wesuka lapho wemisa lithende lakhe ngesheya kweMigdala Ederi. 
Genesis35:22 Israyeli asahleti kuleyo ndzawo, Rubeni walala nenina lomncane, Bhilha, lomunye webafati beyise. Israyeli wakuva loko. Asawonkhe emadvodzana aJakobe abelishumi namabili." 
Genesis35:23 Emadvodzana aLeya bekuboRubeni, litubulo laJakobe, bese kuba nguSimeyoni, naLevi, naJuda, na-Isakhari, naZebuloni." 
Genesis35:24 Emadvodzana aRakheli bekuboJosefa naBhenjamini. 
Genesis35:25 Emadvodzana aBhilha, sisebenti saRakheli, bekuboDani naNaftali." 
Genesis35:26 Emadvodzana aZilpha, sisebenti saLeya, bekuboGadi na-Asheri. Ngiwo lawa-ke emadvodzana aJakobe lawatalelwa eMesophothamiya." 
Genesis35:27 Jakobe wahamba waze wefika ekhaya leyise, Isaka, eMamre ngaseKhiriyathi Abha leseyatiwa ngekutsi iHebroni, lapho kwakuhlala khona Abrahama na-Isaka." 
Genesis35:28 Isaka wafa asaneminyaka leli-180. 
Genesis35:29 Wafa asamdzala kakhulu, walandzela bokhokho bakhe. Wangcwatjwa bo-Esawu naJakobe, emadvodzana akhe." 
Genesis36:1 Nati-ke titukulwane taka-Esawu lobitwa ngekutsi ngu-Edomu. 
Genesis36:2 Esawu watsatsa bafati etintfombini temaKhenani: Ada, indvodzakati ya-Eloni, umHethi, na-Oholibama, indvodzakati ya-Ana, umsa waSibeyoni, umHivi," 
Genesis36:3 naBhasemathi, indvodzakati ya-Ishmayeli, dzadzewabo Nebayothi." 
Genesis36:4 Ada watalela Esawu Elifazi, Bhasemathi watala Rehuweli." 
Genesis36:5 Oholibama watala Jewushe, naJalamu, naKhora. Ngiwo lawa-ke emadvodzana a-Esawu lawatalelwa aseseveni laseKhenani." 
Genesis36:6 Esawu wesuka lapho watsatsa bafati bakhe, nemadvodzana, nemadvodzakati akhe, nabo bonkhe bendlu yakhe, netinkhomo takhe tonkhe, nayo yonkhe imfuyo yakhe, nayo yonkhe imphahla yakhe labeyitfole aseseKhenani; wesuka kumnakaboJakobe, waya kulelinye live." 
Genesis36:7 Sizatfu lesamenta ehlukane nemnakabo kutsi bobabili bese banetimphahla letinyenti kakhulu. Live labebahlala kulo lalingabe lisabenela bobabili. 
Genesis36:8 Ngako-ke Esawu, labekatiwa ngekutsi ngu-Edomu, wahlala eveni letintsaba eSeyiri." 
Genesis36:9 Nati-ke titukulwane taka-Esawu, uyise wema-Edomu, esifundzeni saseSeyiri." 
Genesis36:10 Emadvodzana a-Esawu bekubo-Elifazi lamtala ku-Ada, umkakhe, naRehuweli, umsa waBhasemathi, umka-Esawu." 
Genesis36:11 Emadvodzana a-Elifazi bekubo-Themani, na-Omari, naSefo, naGatamu, naKhenazi." 
Genesis36:12 Umsa wa-Esawu, Elifazi, abenemfati lomunye lomncane, lekwakutsiwa nguThimna. Yena-ke wamtalela indvodzana lekwakutsiwa ngu-Amaleki. Ngulawo-ke emadvodzana a-Ada, umka-Esawu." 
Genesis36:13 Emadvodzana a-Rehuweli bekuboNahathi, naZera, naShama, naMiza. Ngulabo-ke batukulu baBhasemathi, umka-Esawu." 
Genesis36:14 Oholibama, umka-Esawu, labeyindvodzakati ya-Ana, aphindze abe ngumtukulu waSibeyoni, watalela Esawu nankha emadvodzana: boJewushe, naJalamu, naKhora." 
Genesis36:15 Nati-ke tive letadzabuka ku-Esawu. Emadvodzana a-Elifazi, litubulo la-Esawu, bekutikhulu bo-Themani, na-Omari, saSefo, naKhenazi," 
Genesis36:16 naKhora, naGatamu, na-Amaleki. Ngito-ke tikhulu letadzabuka ku-Elifazi, eveni lase-Edomu. Ngulawo-ke emadvodzana a-Ada." 
Genesis36:17 Emadvodzana aRehuweli, umsa wa-Esawu, labetikhulu bekubo-Nahathi, naSera, naShama, naMiza. Ngito leto-ke tikhulu letadzabuka kuRehuweli eveni lase-Edomu. Ngulawo lamanye emadvodzana aBhasemathi, umka-Esawu." 
Genesis36:18 Emadvodzana a-Oholibama, umka-Esawu, bekutikhulu boJewushe, naJalamu, naKhora. Ngito leto-ke tikhulu letatalwa ngu-Oholibama, indvodzakati ya-Ana, umka-Esawu." 
Genesis36:19 Ngulawo-ke emadvodzana netikhulu ta-Esawu; Esawu bekungu-Edomu. 
Genesis36:20 Emadvodzana aSeyiri, umHori, takhamiti temdzabu kulelo live, bekuboLotani, naShobali, naSibeyoni, na-Ana," 
Genesis36:21 na-Dishoni, na-Eseri, naDishani. Ngito leto-ke tikhulu temaHori letatingemadvodzana aSeyiri, kulaka-Edomu." 
Genesis36:22 Emadvodzana aLotani bekuboHori naHemami. Thimna bekungudzadzewaboLotani. 
Genesis36:23 Emadvodzana aShobali bekubo-Alvani, naManahati, na-Ebali, naShefo, na-Onamu." 
Genesis36:24 Sibeyoni abenemadvodzana lamabili bo-Aya, na-Ana. Ngulo-Ana lowatsi eluse timbongolo teyise, Sibeyoni, watfola manzana ehlane." 
Genesis36:25 Bantfwana ba-Ana bekuboDishoni, na-Oholibama labeyindvodzakati." 
Genesis36:26 Emadvodzana aDishoni bekubo-Hemdani, na-Eshbani, naJithrani, naKherani." 
Genesis36:27 Emadvodzana a-Eseri bekuboBilhani, naZavani, na-Akhani." 
Genesis36:28 Emadvodzana aDishani bekubo-Use na-Arani. 
Genesis36:29 Tikhulu temaHori bekuboLotani, naShobali, naSibeyoni, na-Ana," 
Genesis36:30 naDishoni, na-Eseri, naDishani. Leti-ke kwakutikhulu temaHori eveni laka-Edomu." 
Genesis36:31 Lawa ngemabito emakhosi labebusa eveni laka-Edomu kusengakabusi inkhosi ka-Israyeli: 
Genesis36:32 Bela, umsa waBheyori, waba yinkhosi ka-Edomu; inhlokodolobha yakhe bekuyiDinihabha." 
Genesis36:33 Kwatsi kube kufe Bela, kwase kubekwa Jobabi, umsa waZera. Inhlokodolobha yakhe bekuyiBhosra." 
Genesis36:33 Kwatsi kube kufe Bela, kwase kubekwa Jobabi, umsa waZera. Inhlokodolobha yakhe bekuyiBhosra." 
Genesis36:34 Kwatsi kube kufe Jobabi, kwase kubekwa Hushamu welive lemaThemani." 
Genesis36:34 Kwatsi kube kufe Jobabi, kwase kubekwa Hushamu welive lemaThemani." 
Genesis36:35 Kwatsi kube kufe Hushamu, kwase kubekwa Hadadi, umsa waBedadi. Bedadi ngulona lowancoba emaMidiyani eveni lakaMowabi. Inhlokodolobha yakhe bekuyi-Avithi." 
Genesis36:36 Kwatsi kube kufe Hadadi, kwase kubekwa Samla waseMasreka." 
Genesis36:37 Kwatsi kube kufe Samla, kwase kubekwa Shawula waseRehobothi ngasemfuleni." 
Genesis36:38 Kwatsi kube kufe Shawula, kwase kubekwa Bhali Hanani, umsa wa-Akbori." 
Genesis36:39 Kwatsi kube kufe Bhali Hanani, kwase kubekwa Hadadi. Inhlokodolobha yakhe bekutsiwa yiPhawu, kantsi umkakhe bekunguMehethabeli, indvodzakati yaMatredi, indvodzakati yaMe Zahabe." 
Genesis36:40 Emabito etikhulu letatidzabuka ku-Esawu, imindeni yato netindzawo tato bekuboThimna, na-Alva, naJethethi," 
Genesis36:41 na-Oholibama, na-Ela, naPhinoni," 
Genesis36:42 naKhenazi, naThemani, naMibsari," 
Genesis36:43 naMagdiyeli, na-Iramu. Ngito leti-ke tikhulu taka-Edomu netindzawo lapho tatihlala khona, eveni lelalilifa lato. Esawu abenguyise wema-Edomu." 
Genesis37:1 Jakobe wachubeka wahlala eKhenani, live lapho bekuhlala khona uyise." 
Genesis37:2 Lona-ke ngumlandvo wesitukulwane saJakobe. Josefa, labesaneminyaka leli-17, abelusa timvu netimbuti kanye nabomnakabo bekutalwa nguBilha, naZilpha, bafati beyise. Josefa abeletsa umbiko kuyise ngaloko lokubi lababekwenta." 
Genesis37:3 Israyeli abetsandza kakhulu Josefa kunawo onkhe emadvodzana akhe, sizatfu kwakukutsi wamtala asamdzala kakhulu. Ngako-ke wamtfungela ingubo lendze leyayinemikhono lemidze kantsi futsi ihlotjisiwe." 
Genesis37:4 Batsi kube bomnakabo babone kutsi uyise umtsandza kakhulu kunabo bonkhe, base bayamtondza loJosefa, kangangekutsi babengasamkhulumisi kahle." 
Genesis37:5 Ngalelinye lilanga Josefa wabhudza; watsi nakabatjela labomnakabo, bamtondza kakhulu futsi." 
Genesis37:6 Watsi kubo: “Ase nilalele naku lengikubhudzile. 
Genesis37:7 Ngibhudze sibopha titfungo ekhatsi nensimi, sitfungo sami sasukuma sema satsi mpo, leti tenu tase titungeleta lesi sami tasikhotsamela.”" 
Genesis37:8 Labomnakabo bambuta batsi: “Usho kutsi wena utawuba yinkhosi ubuse etikwetfu?” Bachubeka bamtondza kakhulu ngenca yemaphupho akhe nenkhulumo yakhe. 
Genesis37:9 Josefa waphindze wabhudza, wabatjela watsi: “Ase nginitjele nali lelinye liphupho. Ngibhudze lilanga, nenyana, netinkhanyeti leti-11 tingikhotsamela.”" 
Genesis37:10 Kwatsi nakalitjela boyise nabomnakabo leliphupho, uyise wamtsetsisa watsi kuye: “Yini lena loyibhudzako wena? Ucabanga kutsi mine, nenyoko, nabomnakenu, sitakuta sitekukhotsama la kuwe?”" 
Genesis37:11 Bomnakabo baba nemona, kodvwa uyise wawagcina engcondvweni yakhe lamaphupho." 
Genesis37:12 BomnakaboJosefa bahamba baya eShekhemu bayakwelusa timvu netimbuti teyise. 
Genesis37:13 Israyeli wakhuluma kuJosefa, watsi: “Angitsi bomnakenu belusele eShekhemu? Kota-ke ngitekutfuma kubo.” Waphendvula watsi: “Kulungile, babe.”" 
Genesis37:14 Uyise watsi: “Hamba-ke uyewuhlola kutsi bomnakenu basekahle yini, nekutsi timvu tisaphephile yini, bese uyabuya-ke utengitjela.” Wamtfuma esuka esigodzini saseHebroni." 
Genesis37:15 Josefa wahamba waze wefika eShekhemu. Abesazulazula kuleyo ndzawo ngesikhatsi abona indvodza letsite leyambuta yatsi: “Ufunani lapha?” 
Genesis37:16 Josefa wayiphendvula watsi: “Ngifuna bomnaketfu. Ngicela mane ungilayele lapho belusele ngakhona.” 
Genesis37:17 Lendvodza yatsi: “Sebatfutsile lapha. Ngabeva bakhuluma batsi baya eDothani.” Josefa wabalandzela, wabakhandza khona eDothani." 
Genesis37:18 Kodvwa bona bambona asesekhashane eta kubo, watsi asengakefiki, bavumelana ngekutsi bambulale." 
Genesis37:19 Bakhuluma bodvwana batsi: “Nanso phela inkunzi yemaphupho ita. 
Genesis37:20 Wotani simbulale, sidvumbu sakhe sisilahle kuleminye yalemigodzi. Sitabe sesitsi ubulewe tilwane tesiganga. Sitase sibone kutsi lamaphupho akhe atawugcinwa yini.”" 
Genesis37:21 Rubeni watsi nakuva lokuvumelana kwabo, wetama kumsindzisa ngekutsi atsi: “Cha, asisumbulala." 
Genesis37:22 Asimhholokoshisele kulomgodzi lolapha ehlane, singayicitsi ingati yakhe.” Phela Rubeni abecondze kumkhipha kulomgodzi bese umbuyisela kuyise." 
Genesis37:23 Josefa watsi nakefika kubomnakabo, bamkhumula lengubo yakhe leyayihlotjisiwe inemikhono lemidze." 
Genesis37:24 Bambamba bamhholokoshisela emgodzini lowawute emanti. 
Genesis37:25 Bahlala phansi badla. Batsi basadla babona ludvwendvwe lwema-Ishmayeli luchamuka kaGileyadi lwehlela eGibhithe. Emakamela abo abetfwele tinandzisi tekudla nemakha. 
Genesis37:26 Juda wakhuluma kubomnakabo watsi: “Kusitani kutsi simbulale lomnaketfu bese sifihla lengati yakhe? 
Genesis37:27 Wotani, sitemtsengisa kunankha ema-Ishmayeli, singambulali; empeleni, ungumnaketfu, uyinyama yenyama yetfu, nengati yengati yetfu.” Bomnakabo bamvumela." 
Genesis37:28 Kwatsi nase kwendlula bahwebi bemaMidiyani, Josefa bamkhipha kulomgodzi, bamtsengisa kulama-Ishmayeli ngetinhlavu tesiliva letatingemashumi lamabili. Ema-Ishmayeli ahamba naye aya eGibhithe." 
Genesis37:29 Rubeni watsi ubuyela kulomgodzi wakhandza Josefa angasekho, wadzabula timphahla takhe." 
Genesis37:30 Waya kubomnakabo wafike watsi: “Umfana akasekho! Pho, mine ngitawutsini?”" 
Genesis37:31 Batsatsa ingubo yaJosefa, babulala siphongo, benya lengubo engatini yaso." 
Genesis37:32 Base bayitfumela kuyise nemlayeto lowawutsi: “Naku lesikutfolile. Ase ubukisise kutsi akusiyo ingubo yendvodzana yakho yini.” 
Genesis37:33 Wavele wayibona kutsi ngiyo, watsi: “Ngiyo! Silwane lesibi simdlile Josefa, indvodzana yami; udzatjulwe waba ticucwana.”" 
Genesis37:34 Jakobe wadzabuka wadzimate wadzabula timphahla takhe, wavunula emasaka, walilela lendvodzana yakhe emalanga lamanyenti." 
Genesis37:35 Onkhe emadvodzana akhe ase eta kuye atekumdvudvuta. Kodvwa wala kudvudvutwa watsi: “Ngiyawuze ngehle ngiye endzaweni yalabafile, lapho kunendvodzana yami khona, seloku ngililela indvodzana yami.” Ngako-ke uyise wachubeka walila." 
Genesis37:36 Lena eGibhithe, emaMidiyani afike atsengisa Josefa kuPhotifari, lomunye wetiphatsimandla taFaro; loPhotifari abeyindvuna yetingadzi tesigodlo." 
Genesis38:1 Ngaso leso sikhatsi Juda wesuka kubomnakabo wayawuhlala naHira, indvodza yase-Adulamu." 
Genesis38:2 Asekhona lapho wabonana nentfombi yemKhenani leyayibitwa ngekutsi nguShuwa, wayiteka," 
Genesis38:3 yakhulelwa, yatalela Juda indvodzana, wayetsa libito watsi ngu-Era." 
Genesis38:4 LomkaJuda waphindze wakhulelwa, wamtalela lenye futsi indvodzana, wayetsa libito watsi ngu-Onani." 
Genesis38:5 Waphindza lenye futsi indvodzana, wayetsa libito watsi nguShela. BoJuda babeseKhesibi ngesikhatsi italwa lendvodzana." 
Genesis38:6 Juda watsatsela Era, litubulo lakhe, umfati labebitwa ngekutsi nguThamari." 
Genesis38:7 Kodvwa Era, litubulo laJuda, watiphatsa kabi embikwaSimakadze. Ngako-ke Simakadze wambulala." 
Genesis38:8 Juda wase utsi ku-Onani, umnakabo-Era: “Ngena lomfelokati wemnakenu, wente lokufanele njengemkhula wakho, utalele umufi bantfwana.”" 
Genesis38:9 Kodvwa Onani, njengobe abati kutsi utabe utalele umnakabo, inhlanyelo yakhe abeyicitsela phansi njalo nje nakalala nalomkhula wakhe." 
Genesis38:10 Simakadze watfukutsela ngaleso sento sa-Onani, ngako naye wambulala." 
Genesis38:11 Juda wakhuluma kumalukatana wakhe, Thamari, watsi: “Ncandzeka ubuyele kini, ekhaya leyihlo, uhlale khona ungumfelokati kuze kukhule Shela, indvodzana yami.” Loko abekusho ngobe abesaba kutsi naye angahle afe njengabomnakabo. Ngako-ke Thamari wahamba wabuyela ekhaya kubo, wayawuhlala khona." 
Genesis38:12 Emvakwesikhatsi lesidze umkaJuda, indvodzakati yaShuwa, wafa. Kwatsi kube kuphele sikhatsi sekulila, Juda naHira wase-Adulamu benyuka baya kubagundzi betimvu eThimna." 
Genesis38:13 Lomunye watjela Thamari watsi: “Uyihlotala uyakhuphuka uya eThimna kuyewugundza timvu takhe.” 
Genesis38:14 Ngako-ke Thamari wakhumula inzilo yakhe, watimbonya ngendvwangu wase uhlala esangweni lase-Enayimu, emgwacweni lophambukela eThimna. Abesati kutsi Shela abesakhulile, kodvwa abesengakanikwa kutsi amteke." 
Genesis38:15 Watsi nakambona Juda, wacabanga kutsi yingwadla, ngobe abetimbonye buso." 
Genesis38:16 Waphambuka waya kuye wafike watsi: “Kota ngitewulala nawe.” Abengati kutsi lowo kwakungumalukatana wakhe. Thamari watsi: “Wena utanginikani nangilala nawe?” 
Genesis38:17 Waphendvula watsi: “Ngitakunika lizinyane lembuti lelisemhlambini wami.” Thamari watsi: “Kulungile-ke, unganginika sibambiso, uze ungitfumelele lelo zinyane.”" 
Genesis38:18 Juda wabuta watsi: “Sibambiso sini lengingakunika sona?” Wamphendvula watsi: “Indandatho leneluphawu lwakho, nentsambo yakho, neludvondvolo lwakho lolusesandleni sakho.” Wamnika. Wangena, walala naye; Thamari wakhulelwa." 
Genesis38:19 Wesuka lapho Thamari wahamba, wayisusa leveyili, wembatsa inzilo yakhe yebufelokati." 
Genesis38:20 Juda wase utfumela lomngani wakhe Hira wase-Adulamu, kutsi amikise lelizinyane abuye nalesibambiso kulomfati, kodvwa akazange amtfole." 
Genesis38:21 Wabuta kulamadvodza aleyo ndzawo, watsi: “Iphi lengwadla beyilapha endleleni ngase-Enayimu?” Baphendvula batsi: “Kute ingwadla leke yaba khona lapha.”" 
Genesis38:22 Wancandzeka wabuyela kuJuda wafike watsi: “Ngehlulekile kuyitfola lengwadla, nemadvodza aleyo ndzawo atsi kute ingwadla leke yaba khona lapho.”" 
Genesis38:23 Juda wamphendvula watsi: “Yiyekele itigcine leto tintfo, singaze sibe yinhlekisa kubantfu. Ngetamile kuyitfumelela lelizinyane, kodvwa wena wehlulekile kuyitfola.”" 
Genesis38:24 Emvakwetinyanga letintsatfu wabikelwa Juda kwatsiwa: “Thamari, malukatana wakakho ugwadlile, manje nje sewutetfwele.” Juda waphendvula watsi: “Mkhipheni, nimshise aze afe.”" 
Genesis38:25 Kwatsi kube akhishelwe ngaphandle, watfumela livi kuyisetala lelitsi: “Umnikati waletimphahla nguye longitfolise lesisu. Ngiyakucela kutsi utibukisise ubone kutsi tabani letimphahla: indandatho leneluphawu lwakhe, nalentsambo, naloludvondvolo.”" 
Genesis38:26 Juda watibona letimphahla kutsi takhe wase utsi: “Akanacala lomakoti. Ngimi lengingawufezanga umsebenti wami ngekutsi ngimnike indvodzana yami Shela.” Juda akazange aphindze alale naye futsi. 
Genesis38:27 Watsi nasabeleka, kwatfolakala kutsi esiswini sakhe kunemaphahla." 
Genesis38:28 Watsi nasabeleka, lelinye lakhipha umkhono, umbelekisi walibamba walibekisa, walegabisa lucotfo lolubovu, wase utsi: “Nali lelitelwe kucala.”" 
Genesis38:29 Kodvwa lawufinyeta lomkhono walo, kwase kuphuma umnakabo kucala. Lombelekisi wase utsi: “Sewuphuma ngekufohla!” Ngako-ke wametsa libito watsi nguPheresi." 
Genesis38:30 Emvakwakhe lomnakabo waphuma seloku agabe lolo lucotfo lolubovu esandleni, wametsa libito watsi nguZera." 
Genesis39:1 Ema-Ishmayeli ehla naye Josefa aya eGibhithe, efike amtsengisa kuPhotifari, siphatsimandla saFaro lesasiyindvuna yetingadzi tesigodlo." 
Genesis39:2 Simakadze waba naJosefa wamphumelelisa kuko konkhe. Josefa abehlala kalomnumzane waseGibhithe. 
Genesis39:3 Nalomnumzane wabona kutsi Simakadze abenaJosefa nekutsi Simakadze abekwenta kuchume konkhe lokuke kwaphatfwa tandla taJosefa. 
Genesis39:4 Ngako-ke Josefa wazuza umusa kuPhotifari; wambeka kutsi abe yindvuna yakhe leyengamele likhaya lakhe nayo yonkhe imphahla yakhe. 
Genesis39:5 Kusukela ngalelo langa labekwa ngalo kwengamela likhaya laPhotifari netimphahla takhe, Simakadze walibusisa lelikhaya lalomGibhithe ngenca yaJosefa. Sibusiso saSimakadze sasisetikwako konkhe Photifari labenako ekhaya nasemasimini." 
Genesis39:6 Ngako-ke Photifari wakuyekelela etandleni taJosefa. Abengasahlupheki ngalutfo ngaphandle kwekudla labekudla. Josefa abemuhle, alikhwa." 
Genesis39:7 Ngekuhamba kwesikhatsi umkaPhotifari wafisa Josefa, waze waphahluka watsi kuye: “Lala nami.”" 
Genesis39:8 Kodvwa Josefa wala, watsi: “Lalela la, inkhosi yami kute lesahlupheka ngako lapha ekhaya, ngobe konkhe ikubeke esandleni sami." 
Genesis39:9 Inkhosi ingilinganise nayo kulelikhaya, futsi kute lengigodlele kona ngaphandle kwakho, ngobe ungumkayo. Pho, ngingabenta kanjani lobubi lobungaka, ngone kuNkulunkulu?”" 
Genesis39:10 Kwala nome lomfati ambekele siye amcela onkhe emalanga, kodvwa akazange avume Josefa kulala naye, ngisho nekutsi ahlale naye imbala." 
Genesis39:11 Kodvwa kwatsi ngalelinye lilanga Josefa asesendlini enta umsebenti wakhe, netisebenti tasendlini tingekho," 
Genesis39:12 lomfati wadvumela Josefa wambamba ngengubo yakhe, watsi: “Lala nami!” Kodvwa Josefa wanyomula lengubo wabaleka wamshiya nayo, waphuma kulendlu." 
Genesis39:13 Watsi kube abone lomfati kutsi Josefa sewuphunyulile, wamshiya nalengubo wabaleka waphuma," 
Genesis39:14 wamemeta lamadvodza lasebenta kulendlu watsi kuwo: “Ase nibheke! LomHebheru uletselwe kudlala ngatsi la. Ungingenele ekamelweni wangibamba afuna kulala nami. Ngesuka mine ngahlaba inyandzaleyo.
