Genesis39:15 Utsite kube eve kutsi ngihlaba umkhosi, wabaleka washiya nayi ingubo yakhe, waphuma la endlini.”" 
Genesis39:16 Lengubo wayigcina lomfati, kwaze kwefika indvodza yakhe." 
Genesis39:17 Yatsi kube ifike indvodza yakhe, wayitjela leyo ndzaba ngalokufananako, watsi: “Lesigcili semHebheru, losiletse la, emkhatsini wetfu, singene seta kimi satawudlala ngami." 
Genesis39:18 Kodvwa ngitsite kube ngihlabe inyandzaleyo, sabaleka sashiya nayi ingubo yaso, saphuma la endlini.”" 
Genesis39:19 Lomfati wagcina ngekutsi: “Singiphatse kanjena-ke lesigcili sakho.” Lendvuna yatfukutselela Josefa kamatima. 
Genesis39:20 Yamtsatsa yamfaka ejele, lapho efike wahlala khona kanye netiboshwa tenkhosi, Faro. Ngesikhatsi Josefa asesejele," 
Genesis39:21 Simakadze wajinge waba naye, wamentela umusa, wamupha kutsandzeka emehlweni emgcinijele." 
Genesis39:22 Umgcinijele wabeka tonkhe tiboshwa ngaphansi kwesandla saJosefa; yonkhe imisebenti leyayentiwa ejele yabekwa ngaphansi kwesandla saJosefa. 
Genesis39:23 Umgcinijele akazange aphindze ahlupheke ngaloko lokwakungaphansi kwesandla saJosefa, ngobe Simakadze abenaye, futsi konkhe labekwenta Josefa Simakadze abekuphumelelisa." 
Genesis40:1 Emvakwesikhashana umphatsi lomkhulu wetitja tenkhosi yaseGibhithe nempheki lomkhulu wetinkhwa tayo bona kuFaro, inkhosi yaseGibhithe." 
Genesis40:2 Faro watitfukutselela totibili letiphatsimandla takhe: indvuna yebatseli beliwayini nendvuna yebapheki," 
Genesis40:3 wase ubavalela esitokisini, endlini yendvuna yetingadzi kulelo jele lapho kwakunaJosefa khona." 
Genesis40:4 Indvuna yelijele yetfula Josefa kubo kutsi abanakekele, wabanakekela. Bahlalisana sikhatsi lesidze basejele." 
Genesis40:5 Ngalobunye busuku bobabili basejele babhudza, umphatsi wetitja lomkhulu wabhudza lakakhe liphupho, nembhaki lomkhulu wabhudza lakakhe; tinchazelo tawo tatehlukene." 
Genesis40:6 Josefa nakefika kubo ekuseni, wakhandza kutsi bobabili bakhatsateke kakhulu." 
Genesis40:7 Ngako-ke Josefa watibuta letiphatsimandla taFaro letatinaye ejele, watsi: “Buso benu bubukeka bukhatsatekile lamuhla kwenteke njani?”" 
Genesis40:8 Bamphendvula batsi: “Sobabili sibhudzile, futsi kute nalongachaza kutsi asho kutsini lamaphupho etfu.” Josefa wabaphendvula watsi: “Kantsi tinchazelo temaphupho atiphumi kuNkulunkulu yini? Ase ningitjele kutsi nibhudzeni.”" 
Genesis40:9 Ngako-ke lomphatsi wetitja lomkhulu walandzisa Josefa watsi: “Mine ngibhudze ngibona umvini 
Genesis40:10 unemagala lamatsatfu. Kutsite nakuhluma emacembe, kwase kuchakaza timbali, emagelebisi ase ayavutfwa." 
Genesis40:11 Bengiphetse indzebe yaFaro esandleni sami, ngase ngitsatsa lamagelebisi ngiwahlutela endzebeni yaFaro, ngayitsatsa ngayibeka esandleni saFaro.”" 
Genesis40:12 Josefa watsi kuye: “Nayi-ke inchazelo yalo: Emagala lamatsatfu amele emalanga lamatsatfu. 
Genesis40:13 Emvakwemalanga lamatsatfu Faro utakukhulula ejele, akubuyisele emsebentini wakho. Utawuphindze ube ngumphatsi weliwayini laFaro njengobe wawuvele unguye." 
Genesis40:14 Kodvwa ngicela umane ungikhumbule nasekukumele kahle konkhe, ungihawukele ngekungiveta kuFaro, kuze angikhiphe nami ejele." 
Genesis40:15 Empeleni ngebiwa eveni lemaHebheru; kunjalo nje nakhona lapha eGibhithe kute lengikwentile lokubangele kutsi ngifakwe lapha ejele.” 
Genesis40:16 Kwatsi kube indvuna yebabhaki betinkhwa ibone kutsi inchazelo yaleliphupho ibe yinhle, yase itsi kuJosefa: “Nami ngibhudzile: Ngibhudze ngetfwele titja letitsatfu tekuphatsa tinkhwa." 
Genesis40:17 Kulesitja lesingetulu bekukhona tonkhe tinhlobo tekudla lokuphekiwe kwaFaro, kodvwa kwefika tinyoni takudla konkhe loko kudla bekusesitjeni, takudla takucedza ngikwetfwele.”" 
Genesis40:18 Josefa wamphendvula watsi: “Nayi-ke inchazelo: Letitja letitsatfu timele emalanga lamatsatfu. 
Genesis40:19 Emvakwemalanga lamatsatfu, Faro utakukhipha lapha ejele akugwebe intsambo! Utakulengisa elugodvweni, tinyoni tidle sidvumbu sakho.”" 
Genesis40:20 Emvakwemalanga lamatsatfu, Faro wagubha lusuku lwakhe lwekutalwa. Wenta lidzili, wentela tonkhe tisebenti takhe. Umphatsi wetitja kanye nempheki lomkhulu wetinkhwa wabakhipha ejele; babasemkhatsini wetisebenti nabo." 
Genesis40:21 Wabuyisela umphatsi wetitja lomkhulu emsebentini wakhe, kuze aphindze abe ngumphatsi weliwayini laFaro," 
Genesis40:22 kodvwa umpheki lomkhulu wetinkhwa wamlengisa entsanjeni. Konkhe kwaya njengobe Josefa abechazile. 
Genesis40:23 Noko lomphatsi wetitja akazange amkhumbule Josefa; wamkhohlwa. 
Genesis41:1 Kwatsi sekuphele iminyaka lemibili legcwele, Faro wabhudza eme eceleni kwemfula iNayili." 
Genesis41:2 Wabona tinkhomati letisikhombisa letatibukeka kahle tikhuluphele tichamuka, tikhuphuka emfuleni, tefike tadla emhlangeni." 
Genesis41:3 Kwatsi kusenjalo kwakhuphuka letinye futsi emfuleni, nato tisikhombisa; tona-ke tatibukeka kabi tondze tingimikhehlekhehle, tema elusentseni lwemfula eceleni kwaleti letinye." 
Genesis41:4 Leti letondzile tesuka tadla leti letisikhombisa letikhuluphele. Faro wase uyaphaphama. 
Genesis41:5 Waphindze wabuyela walala. Wabhudza lelinye futsi liphupho. Wabhudza abona tibhuluja letisikhombisa letatitikhulu tibhaceka eluhlangeni lunye. 
Genesis41:6 Emvakwato, kwase kubhaceka tikhutu letisikhombisa kungatsi tihangulwe ngumoya wasemphumalanga." 
Genesis41:7 Letikhutu tamita letibhuluja; Faro wase uyaphaphama, nalapho wakhandza kutsi abebhudza." 
Genesis41:8 Ngakusasa ekuseni umphefumulo wakhe wakhatsateka kakhulu kangangekutsi wadzimate wabita tonkhe tangoma taseGibhithe kanye nabo bonkhe bosiyazi bakhona. Batsi kube befike, Faro wabalandzisa lamaphupho akhe, kodvwa kwabate ngisho namunye lowaba nemandla ekumchazela ngawo." 
Genesis41:9 Lomphatsi lomkhulu wetitja taFaro wakhuluma kuFaro watsi: “Sengiyakhumbula tiphosiso tami lamuhla. 
Genesis41:10 Ngesikhatsi inkhosi itfukutselele tisebenti tayo, yafaka mine nendvuna yebapheki betinkhwa ejele lelisendlini yendvuna yetingadzi." 
Genesis41:11 Ngabusuku bunye sobabili sabhudza, lelo nalelo phupho lalinenchazelo yalo." 
Genesis41:12 Sasinalomunye umHebheru labesemncane asisebenti sendvuna yabogadzi. Satsi nasimtjela lamaphupho etfu, wasinika inchazelo yalelo nalelo phupho." 
Genesis41:13 Nangempela konkhe kwenteka njengobe abesitjelile: Mine ngabuyiselwa emsebentini wami, yena wajutjelwa intsambo.”" 
Genesis41:14 Ngako Faro watfumela kutsi kulandvwe Josefa; wakhishwa masinyane ejele. Watsi kube ahhule silevu, agcoke letinye timphahla, wase uletfwa kuFaro." 
Genesis41:15 Faro wakhuluma kuJosefa watsi: “Ngibhudzile, kodvwa kute nome munye lonemandla ekungichazela ngaleliphupho. Kodvwa sengivile kutsi wena utsi ungalandziswa ngeliphupho, ulichaze njengobe linjalo.”" 
Genesis41:16 Josefa waphendvula watsi: “Akusimi, nkhosi, kodvwa nguNkulunkulu lotawunika Faro inchazelo lengiyo.”" 
Genesis41:17 Faro wase ulandzisa Josefa utsi: “Ngibhudze ngime elusentseni lwemfula iNayili," 
Genesis41:18 kwase kuchamuka tinkhomati letisikhombisa, tibukeka kahle, tikhuluphele, tikhuphuka emfuleni, tadla emhlangeni." 
Genesis41:19 Kutsite kusenjalo kwachamuka letinye letisikhombisa emvakwato, tona tatitimbi, tondze lengingazange sengikubone lapha kuleli laseGibhithe." 
Genesis41:20 Leti letondzile tesuka tadla leti tekucala betitinhle tikhuluphele. 
Genesis41:21 Kodvwa kutsite nome setitidlile kwangete kwabonakala, ngobe betisolo tinjalo nje, tondze tingimikhehlekhehle. Ngase ngiyaphaphama." 
Genesis41:22 Ngaphindze ngabhudza futsi: Ngabhudza ngibona tibhuluja letisikhombisa tibhaceka eluhlangeni lunye. 
Genesis41:23 Kutsite kusenjalo kwase kubhaceka tikhutu letimbi letibunile, kungatsi tihangulwe ngumoya wasemphumalanga." 
Genesis41:24 Letikhutu tesuka tamita letibhuluja letisikhombisa. Sengititjele tonkhe tangoma, kodvwa kute nasinye lesibe nemandla ekunginika inchazelo.”" 
Genesis41:25 Josefa wakhuluma kuFaro watsi: “Omabili lamaphupho aFaro, asho intfo yinye. Nkulunkulu wembulele Faro ngaloko latakwenta." 
Genesis41:26 Tinkhomati letinhle letisikhombisa timele iminyaka lesikhombisa, kanjalo futsi naletibhuluja letisikhombisa timele iminyaka lesikhombisa; kokubili kuchaza intfo yinye." 
Genesis41:27 Tinkhomati letisikhombisa letimbi kantsi tondzile letalandzela, tona-ke timele iminyaka lesikhombisa, kanjalo futsi netikhutu letihangulwe ngumoya wasemphumalanga: Timele iminyaka lesikhombisa yendlala." 
Genesis41:28 Kunjengobe ngishito kuFaro, Nkulunkulu wembulele Faro ngaloko latakwenta." 
Genesis41:29 Kutawufika iminyaka lesikhombisa yenala lenkhulu eveni lonkhe laseGibhithe. 
Genesis41:30 Kodvwa emvakwayo kutawulandzela leminye iminyaka lesikhombisa yendlala lenkhulu, yonkhe inala iyawukhohlakala eGibhithe; indlala italigubudzela lonkhe live." 
Genesis41:31 Inala ingeke iphindze ikhunjulwe eveni, ngenca yendlala letawulandzela, ngobe itawuba matima kakhulu." 
Genesis41:32 Lokuphindzaphindzeka kwaleliphupho laFaro kuchaza kutsi loku kumiswe nguNkulunkulu, futsi Nkulunkulu utakwenta masinyane." 
Genesis41:33 “Ngako-ke Faro akakhetse indvodza lecaphelako, nalecotfo, ayibeke yengamele lonkhe live laseGibhithe." 
Genesis41:34 Akachubeke Faro abeke tindvuna kuyo yonkhe imimango yalelive. Letindvuna tibotsatsa incenye yesihlanu yesivuno kulo lonkhe laseGibhithe, ngaleminyaka yenala lenkhulu." 
Genesis41:35 Tibutse konkhe lokudla ngaleminyaka yenala lesikhombisa letako, konkhe tikwente ngeligama nangemandla aFaro, tikubutsele emadolobheni lokudla, bese tiyakulondvolota." 
Genesis41:36 Lokudla-ke kutawugcinelwa lelive kutsi kudliwe ngesikhatsi sendlala letakwembesa iGibhithe yonkhe, kuze live lingabhubhi ngenca yendlala.”" 
Genesis41:37 Lesiphakamiso semukeleka kuFaro nakuto tonkhe tindvuna takhe. 
Genesis41:38 Faro wakhuluma kuletindvuna takhe watsi: “Kodvwa singamtfolaphi umuntfu lofana nalona, lonaMoya waNkulunkulu?”" 
Genesis41:39 Faro wase utsi kuJosefa: “Njengobe Nkulunkulu akukhombise konkhe loku, angiboni kutsi ukhona umuntfu locaphelako nalocotfo kwendlula wena." 
Genesis41:40 Ngako ngitakubeka wengamele live lami; bantfu bami batakwenta konkhe lokushoko. Mine ngitaba mkhulu kunawe ngesihlalo sebukhosi kuphela.” 
Genesis41:41 Wachubeka Faro watsi: “Sengikubekile kutsi wengamele lonkhe live laseGibhithe.” 
Genesis41:42 Faro wakhipha indandatho yakhe esandleni sakhe, wayifaka esandleni saJosefa; wamembatsisa ingubo yelineni lecolisakele, wamegabisa buhlalu begolide entsanyeni." 
Genesis41:43 Wamekhweta encoleni yakhe yesibili. Bogadzi bakhe bahamba embikwakhe, bamemeta batsi: “Khweshani! Khweshani!” Wambeka kanjalo-ke kutsi engamele lonkhe laseGibhithe." 
Genesis41:44 Ngetulu kwaloko Faro wakhuluma kuJosefa watsi: “NginguFaro; ngaphandle kwakho kute umuntfu lotawuphakamisa sandla sakhe nome lunyawo lwakhe lapha kuleli laseGibhithe.” 
Genesis41:45 Faro wetsa Josefa libito watsi nguSafenathi Phaneya; wamendzisela Asenathi, indvodzakati yaPhotifera, umphristi wase-Oni. Ngako-ke Josefa waphuma wahamba kulo lonkhe laseGibhithe." 
Genesis41:46 Josefa abesaneminyaka lengemashumi lamatsatfu nakacala kusebenta ngaphansi kwaFaro. Wesuka kuFaro walihamba lonkhe laseGibhithe. 
Genesis41:47 Kwatsi ngeminyaka lesikhombisa yenala, live laba nesivuno lesikhulu." 
Genesis41:48 Konkhe lokudla kweminyaka lesikhombisa yenala Josefa wakubutsela emadolobheni. Lelo nalelo dolobha eGibhithe kwaba yindzawo yekugcina kudla, nasekuvuniwe emasimini lasedvutane nalo." 
Genesis41:49 Josefa wasigcina sonkhe ngebunyenti baso lesivuno lesasingangetihlabatsi taselwandle, wadzimate wakuyekela nekusibala, ngobe sasingeke sisabaleka." 
Genesis41:50 Yatsi isengakefiki iminyaka yendlala, Josefa abesanemadvodzana lamabili labesawatalelwe ngu-Asenathi, indvodzakati yaPhotifera, umphristi wase-Oni." 
Genesis41:51 Lona wekucala Josefa wametsa libito watsi nguManase, ngobe ngaloko abesho kutsi: “Nkulunkulu ungente ngakhohlwa konkhe kuhlupheka kwami nemndeni waketfu.”" 
Genesis41:52 Lona wesibili Josefa wametsa libito watsi ngu-Efrayimu, ngaloko abesho kutsi: “Nkulunkulu ungiphe bantfwana eveni lekuhlupheka kwami.”" 
Genesis41:53 Yaphela-ke iminyaka lesikhombisa yenala eveni laseGibhithe," 
Genesis41:54 kwacala iminyaka yendlala, njengobe abeshito Josefa. Kwaba nendlala emaveni onkhe, kodvwa kulo lonkhe laseGibhithe kwakusekhona kudla." 
Genesis41:55 Yatsi kube indlala yembese lonkhe live, baseGibhithe bahamba bayawukhala kuFaro bamtjela kutsi sebabulawa yindlala. Faro wabaphendvula watsi: “Hambani niye kuJosefa, nente konkhe latanitjela kona.”" 
Genesis41:56 Ngako-ke yatsi kube indlala yandze nalo lonkhe live, Josefa wativula tonkhe tingungu takhe watsengisela baseGibhithe kudla, ngobe indlala yase ilikhungetse lonkhe laseGibhithe." 
Genesis41:57 Ngetulu kwaloko, wonkhe umhlaba weta eGibhithe kutawutsenga kudla kuJosefa, ngobe lendlala yase ikhungetse wonkhe umhlaba." 
Genesis42:1 Watsi kube eve Jakobe kutsi kunekudla lokutsengisako eGibhithe, wakhuluma kumadvodzana akhe watsi: “Yini nilibale kubukana emehlweni nje?" 
Genesis42:2 Ngivile kutsi kunekudla le eGibhithe. Hambani niyesitsengela khona, singaze sife sibulawe yindlala.”" 
Genesis42:3 Ngako-ke bomnakaboJosefa labalishumi behlela eGibhithe kuyawutsenga kudla. 
Genesis42:4 Kodvwa Jakobe akazange amvumele Bhenjamini, labelama Josefa, kutsi ahambe nabo, ngobe phela abesaba kutsi angahle naye avelelwe yingoti." 
Genesis42:5 Ngako emadvodzana a-Israyeli ahamba kanye nalabanye batsengi kuyawutsenga kudla, ngobe lendlala yase ilikhungetse lonkhe laseKhenani." 
Genesis42:6 Ngaleso sikhatsi Josefa abesangundvunankhulu walo lonkhe live. Kwakunguye labetsengisela bonkhe bantfu kudla. Batsi bomnakaboJosefa nabefika, bamkhotsamela, babhekise buso babo phansi." 
Genesis42:7 Kodvwa Josefa wababona kanye nje kutsi bomnakabo, noko watsalalisa nje wenta shangatsi akabati, wabaphatsa njengetihambi wakhuluma kubo ngelulaka, wababuta watsi: “Niphumaphi?” Bamphendvula batsi: “Siphuma kulela laseKhenani, sitewutsenga kudla.”" 
Genesis42:8 Nome Josefa abebabona labomnakabo, kodvwa bona babengamboni." 
Genesis42:9 Josefa wawakhumbula emaphupho akhe ngabo, wase utsi kubo: “Nine nitinhloli, nitewuhlola tikhala leningalingenela ngato lelive letfu.”" 
Genesis42:10 Bamphendvula batsi: “Cha, nkhosi, tinceku takho titewutsenga kudla." 
Genesis42:11 Singemadvodzana andvodza yinye; sitinceku takho letetsembekile, asisito tinhloli.”" 
Genesis42:12 Wabaphendvula watsi: “Cha, nitele kutawuhlola tikhala leningalingenela ngato lelive letfu.”" 
Genesis42:13 Batsi: “Nkhosi, tinceku takho tingemadvodzana lalishumi namabili andvodza yinye, eveni laseKhenani. Lomncane kunatsi sonkhe usele nababe ekhaya, lona lomunye-ke akasekho.”" 
Genesis42:14 Josefa wabaphendvula watsi: “Kunjengobe ngishito kutsi nitinhloli. 
Genesis42:15 Nitawuvivinywa kanjena-ke: Ngifunga Faro, ngitsi ningeke nikhululeke kutsi nihambe, ningakamletsi la umnakenu lomncane." 
Genesis42:16 Lomunye emkhatsini wenu kufanele amlandze, nine labanye nitawuvalelwa esitokisini kuze kubonakale kahle kutsi kuliciniso yini loko lenikushoko. Nakungenjalo, ngiyanisola, ngifunga Faro, kutsi nine nitinhloli.”" 
Genesis42:17 Wabavalela esitokisini emalanga lamatsatfu. 
Genesis42:18 Ngelilanga lesitsatfu Josefa wakhuluma nabo watsi: “Mine ngingumuntfu lowesaba Nkulunkulu, yentani naku kuze nitewuphila." 
Genesis42:19 Naningemadvodza letsembekile, shiyani munye la esitokisini, laba labanye bahambe bayewutsatsa lokudla bakumikise emakhaya enu, ngobe naku indlala ibhokile." 
Genesis42:20 Kufanele nite naye la kimi lomnakenu lomncane. Ngako-ke nitabe senikhombise ngempela kutsi benikhuluma liciniso, futsi ningeke nisabulawa.” Bakuvuma loko." 
Genesis42:21 Bakhuluma bodvwana batsi: “Ase nibheke-ke manje sesiyavuna ngalobubi lesabenta kumnaketfu Josefa. Satsi sesikubona kukhatsateka kwemphefumulo wakhe, nasincenga, satsalalisa sangete samlalela. Ngiko nje sesikulenhlupheko manje.”" 
Genesis42:22 Rubeni wakhuluma watsi: “Angitsi nganitjela kutsi ningamlimati lomfana. Kodvwa nangete nangilalela. Manje sekumele sitilandze ngaleyo ngati yakhe.” 
Genesis42:23 Babengati kutsi Josefa abeluva lolulwimi lwabo, ngobe kwakukhona labemhumushela." 
Genesis42:24 Josefa wesuka kubo wayawukhala. Watsi kube acedze kukhala, asakwati kukhuluma kahle, wabuya weta kubo, wafike watsatsa Simeyoni wambopha embikwabo." 
Genesis42:25 Josefa wayala kutsi bagcwaliselwe kudla emasakeni abo, nemali yalowo nalowo wabo ibuyiselwe esakeni lakhe, banikwe nemiphako yeluhambo lwabo. Konkhe loko kwentiwa." 
Genesis42:26 BomnakaboJosefa bayikhweta-ke imitfwalo yabo etimbongolweni tabo, besuka bahamba." 
Genesis42:27 Kwatsi lapho befike baphumula khona, lomunye wabo watsi uvula esakeni lakhe atewupha imbongolo yakhe, wakhandza imali yakhe emlonyeni welisaka lakhe." 
Genesis42:28 Wakhuluma kubomnakabo watsi: “Imali yami ibuyiselwe nayi emlonyeni welisaka lami.” Tinhlitiyo tabo takhatsateka kakhulu ngaloko, badzimate bakhulumisana batsi: “Yini lena lasentele yona Nkulunkulu?”" 
Genesis42:29 Batsi nabefika kuyise Jakobe eveni laseKhenani bamlandzisa ngako konkhe lokwabehlela, batsi:" 
Genesis42:30 “Lendvodza lengundvunankhulu kulela laseGibhithe yakhuluma natsi ngelulaka, yasitsatsa njengetinhloli telive labo." 
Genesis42:31 Kodvwa samphendvula satsi: ‘Asisito tinhloli, singemadvodza letsembekile." 
Genesis42:32 Singemadvodzana andvodza yinye lali-12. Lenye ayisekho, lencane kakhulu isekhaya kubabe, eveni laseKhenani.’" 
Genesis42:33 Lendvodza lengundvunankhulu isiphendvule yatsi: ‘Naku lengitanihlola ngako kutsi netsembekile: Lomunye wenu utawusala nami, laba labanye benu bahambe bamikise kudla emakhaya, ngobe naku indlala ibhokile." 
Genesis42:34 Niboletsa lomnakenu lomncane lapha kimi. Ngitawubona ngaloko-ke kutsi nine ningemadvodza letsembekile, anisito tinhloli. Ngitabe sengiyaninika-ke futsi lomnakenu nani nihambe nikhululekile kulelive; kutsi ningakha, nitsenge, nitsengise ngekutsandza.’ ”" 
Genesis42:35 Base bakhumula emasaka abo, kwaba ngulowo nalowo watfola imali yakhe emlonyeni welisaka lakhe. Bona neyise befikelwa kwesaba nekudvumala lokukhulu." 
Genesis42:36 Uyise wakhuluma kubo watsi: “Maye mine bo! Bonkhe bantfwabami bayangiphelela; Josefa akasekho, naSimeyoni akasekho, kodvwa manje senifuna kutsatsa naBhenjamini. Mine konkhe nje kuyangihlanekela.”" 
Genesis42:37 Rubeni waphendvula uyise watsi: “Nangabe Bhenjamini angikambuyisi, ubobulala lamadvodzana ami lamabili. Myekelele etandleni tami, ngitambuyisa kuwe.”" 
Genesis42:38 Kodvwa Jakobe watsi kuye: “Indvodzana yami angiyivumeli kutsi uhambe nayo, yewukele eGibhithe. Umnakabo ufile, nguye yedvwa losasele. Nakungahle kwenteke avelelwe yingoti nisesendleleni, ngitakufa ngibulawe buhlungu ebudzaleni bami.”" 
Genesis43:1 Indlala yadlanga kakhulu eveni. 
Genesis43:2 Kwatsi sebakudle konkhe kudla lababekutsenge eGibhithe, uyise wakhuluma kubo watsi: “Hambani njalo niyesitsengela lokunye kudla.”" 
Genesis43:3 Kodvwa Juda wamphendvula watsi: “Leya ndvodza yasiyalisisa yatsi: ‘Ningeke ningibone ngisho nekungibona, naningeti naye lomnakenu.’" 
Genesis43:4 Nawungasivumela kutsi sihambe nemnaketfu, kulungile, sitawuhamba siyekutsengela lokudla." 
Genesis43:5 Kodvwa nawungasivumeli kutsi sihambe naye, singeke sewuke, ngobe lendvodza yakhuluma yatsi: ‘Ningeke ningibone ngisho nekungibona, naningeti naye lomnakenu.’ ”" 
Genesis43:6 Israyeli watsi: “Ningiphatseleni kabuhlungu kangaka ngekutjela lendvodza kutsi ukhona lomunye umnakenu?” 
Genesis43:7 Baphendvula batsi: “Lendvodza yasibutisisa, yabuta konkhe ngatsi nangemndeni wakitsi yatsi: ‘Uyihlo usaphila yini? Ninaye yini lomunye umnakenu?’ Natsi-ke sasiphendvula imibuto yakhe. Besingati ngani tsine kutsi utawube sewutsi: ‘Yehlani naye lomnakenu’?”" 
Genesis43:8 Juda wakhuluma kuyise, Israyeli, watsi: “Mkhulule lomfana, ngihambe naye, sitewushesha sihambe, kutewubate lotawubulawa yindlala." 
Genesis43:9 Mine ngitawuba sibambiso sakhe ngemphilo yami; nangabe ngingakabuyi naye la kuwe, licala laloko ngitawuletfwala ngize ngife." 
Genesis43:10 Kube asikabambeleleki nje, ngabe sesihambe saze sabuyela nakabili.”" 
Genesis43:11 Israyeli, uyise, wakhuluma kubo watsi: “Nangabe kufanele kube njalo-ke, hambani netipho letititselo telikhetselo talelive, nitifake emasakeni enu, nifike nitiphe lendvodza leniyishoko: nitsatse litsantana lebhalisamu, neleluju lwetinyosi, nelemakha, nelemure, nelemaphisitakhiwo, nelema-alimondi." 
Genesis43:12 Nibophatsa imali yekutsenga, niyiphatse ngalokuphindvwe kabili, nincandzekise nalemali leyabuyiswa ifakwe emilonyeni yemasaka enu; mhlawumbe yafakeka ngesiphosiso." 
Genesis43:13 Hambani nalomnakenu niyewukhombisa lendvodza. 
Genesis43:14 Shangatsi Nkulunkulu Somandla anganipha umusa ebusweni balowo muntfu, anikhululele umnakenu nibuye kanye naye naBhenjamini. Kepha-ke mine nangemukwa bantfwabami, ngiyemukwa.”" 
Genesis43:15 Ngako-ke lamadvodza esuka lapho atsatsa sipho, nemali seyiphindvwe kabili, batsatsa naBhenjamini bahamba naye baya eGibhithe bafike bakhulekela kuJosefa." 
Genesis43:16 Watsi kube Josefa ababone bahamba naBhenjamini, watjela indvuna yetisebenti tasendlini kakhe watsi: “Tsatsa lamadvodza uwangenise endlini kami, bese uyahlaba ulungise kudla, ngobe atakudla kanye nami emini.”" 
Genesis43:17 Sisebenti senta njengobe Josefa abeshito; satsatsa lamadvodza sawangenisa endlini kaJosefa. 
Genesis43:18 BomnakaboJosefa besaba kakhulu, ngobe babengeniswe endlini kaJosefa, badzimate batsi: “Singeniswe lapha ngenca yalemali leyabuyiselwa emasakeni etfu nasite lapha kwekucala. Wentele kutsi atesituma, asitfumbe asente tigcili takhe, asemuke naletimbongolo tetfu.”" 
Genesis43:19 Ngako bahamba baya kulendvuna yetisebenti tendlu yaJosefa, bakhuluma nayo beme emnyango," 
Genesis43:20 batsi: “Manje nkhosi, ngesikhatsi site lapha kwekucala sitewutsenga kudla," 
Genesis43:21 satsi lapho sefika saphumula khona, savula emasaka etfu sonkhe sakhandza kutsi emilonyeni yawo kunalemali besitewutsenga ngayo, iphelele. Ngako sesibuye nayo." 
Genesis43:22 Sehle nalenye futsi imali kutewutsenga ngayo kudla. Asati kutsi ngubani lona labeyibuyisele lemali lapha emasakeni etfu.” 
Genesis43:23 Lendvuna yabaphendvula yatsi: “Cha, kulungile, ningesabi. Nkulunkulu wenu, longuNkulunkulu weyihlo, uniphile lomcebo emasakeni enu. Mine ngayitfola inkhokhelo yenu.” Yase ibakhiphela Simeyoni, yabaletsela yena." 
Genesis43:24 Lendvuna yawatsatsa lamadvodza yawangenisa endlini kaJosefa, yawanika emanti, ageza tinyawo tawo, yabe seyipha netimbongolo tawo kudla." 
Genesis43:25 Lamadvodza abe asalungisa tipho tawo alungela kutetfula kuJosefa nakefika emini, njengobe abesavile kutsi abetakudla kanye nawo." 
Genesis43:26 Watsi kube efike ekhaya Josefa, bomnakabo base bangenisa tipho lababemphatsele tona batetfula kuye, bamkhotsama." 
Genesis43:27 Wababuta imphilo watsi: “Linjani likhehla lelinguyihlo, lenakhuluma ngalo, lisaphila yini?”" 
Genesis43:28 Baphendvula batsi: “Inceku yakho lengubabe, isaphila.” Bamkhotsamela, bamshayela sihlutfu." 
Genesis43:29 Watsi Josefa nakaphakamisa emehlo, wabona Bhenjamini, umntfwanakabo, labelamana naye emhlane, watsi: “Nguye lona yini lomnakenu lomncane lenangitjela ngaye? Shangatsi Nkulunkulu angaba nemusa kuwe, ndvodzana yami!”" 
Genesis43:30 Josefa washesha waphuma, ngobe inhlitiyo yakhe yefikelwa buhlungu, wafuna indzawo lesitsele, wangena khona wakhala." 
Genesis43:31 Asagezile buso bakhe, waphindze waphuma; waticinisa watsi: “Phakelani kudla.”" 
Genesis43:32 Josefa bamphakela yedvwa, nabomnakabo babaphakela bodvwana, nalamaGibhithe labedla nawo aphakelwa odvwana, ngobe phela emaGibhithe abekutsatsa ngekutsi kutehlisa kudla nemaHebheru." 
Genesis43:33 BomnakaboJosefa bahlaliswa etafuleni, ngekwelamana kwabo: litubulo ngebudzala balo nelitfunjana ngebuncane balo, bonkhe babebheke ngakuJosefa. Batsi nabakubona loko bomnakaboJosefa babukana bodvwana, bamangele." 
Genesis43:34 Batsi nabanikwa kudla kwasetafuleni laJosefa, kwakaBhenjamini kwaphindvwa kahlanu kunekwabo bonkhe. Ngako-ke badla, banatsa, bajabula kanye naye." 
Genesis44:1 Josefa wase utjela lendvuna yetisebenti watsi: “Gcwalisani emasaka alamadvodza ngekudla lokulingene nekutsi bangakwetfwala, emlonyeni walelo nalelo saka laleyo ndvodza ufake leyo mali yayo letsenge ngayo." 
Genesis44:2 Emlonyeni welisaka lelitfunjana ufake indzebe yami yesiliva kanye naleyo mali lekutsengwe ngayo kudla.” Indvuna yenta njengobe yayitjelwe nguJosefa. 
Genesis44:3 Ekuseni ngakusasa, lamadvodza akhululeka ahanjiswa wona kanye netimbongolo tawo." 
Genesis44:4 Atsi kube aphume edolobheni asengakahambi nelibanga nje, Josefa watfumela indvuna yetisebenti takhe watsi: “Phutfuma uwalandzele lamadvodza, utsi ungawakhandza ufike uwabute utsi: ‘Nentiwa yini kubonga lokuhle ngalokubi? Seniyibeleni indzebe yesiliva yenkhosi yami?" 
Genesis44:5 Angitsi ngiyo lena lenatsa ngayo, ibuye yembule ngayo konkhe lokufihlakele? Nine nigange kakhulu.’ ”" 
Genesis44:6 Yatsi kube iwakhandze endleleni lendvuna, yafike yakhuluma lawo mavi." 
Genesis44:7 Lamadvodza aphendvula atsi: “Usho kutsini-ke, mnumzane, nawukhuluma kanje? Siyafunga kutsi besingeke siyente tsine intfo lenjalo." 
Genesis44:8 Nalemali lesayikhandza emasakeni etfu, siphindze sabuya nayo nasiphuma eKhenani. Pho, besingayeba kanjani isiliva negolide endlini yenkhosi yakho?" 
Genesis44:9 Nakwenteka uyikhandza kulomunye wetfu, lowo utakufa, tsine-ke sibe tigcili tenkhosi yami.”" 
Genesis44:10 Yatsi: “Akube njengobe nishito kutsi lowo letfolakala kuye utawuba sigcili sami, nine labanye ningeke nibe nacala.”" 
Genesis44:11 Kwaba nguleyo naleyo ndvodza yehlisa umtfwalo wayo masinyane, yavula lisaka layo." 
Genesis44:12 Wafuna acala ngalomdzala waze wagcina ngalomncane. Indzebe yesiliva yaze yatfolakala esakeni laBhenjamini. 
Genesis44:13 Besuka badzabula tingubo tabo ngenca yekudzabuka, kwaba ngulowo nalowo wekhweta umtfwalo wakhe embongolweni yakhe, bancandzeka sebabuyela edolobheni." 
Genesis44:14 Watsi kube Juda nabomnakabo befike endlini kaJosefa, bamkhandza naye asekhona. Bakhotsama phansi embikwakhe." 
Genesis44:15 Josefa watsi kubo: “Yini-ke lena leseniyentile? Utsi benati nje kutsi umuntfu lokulesikhundla sami angabona timfihlakalo ngemlingo?” 
Genesis44:16 Juda waphendvula watsi: “Kute lesingahle sikusho kuwe, nkhosi yami. Singakhulumani nje? Singaphikani nje? Nkulunkulu sewulembulile licala letfu. Sonkhe sesitigcili tenkhosi yami, tsine sonkhe kanye nalona lekutfolakale kuye indzebe.”" 
Genesis44:17 Josefa watsi: “Cha, ngingeke ngikwente loko! Sigcili sami kutawuba ngulona lekutfolakale kuye indzebe. Kodvwa nine labanye hambani ngekuthula niye kuyihlo.”" 
Genesis44:18 Juda wasondzela kuJosefa watsi: “Ngiyakuncenga, nkhosi yami, kutsi sengimane ngikhulume nawe inhlitiyo yami yonkhe. Ngicela ungangicansukeli, nome ulingana naFaro matfupha." 
Genesis44:19 Kucala inkhosi yami yabuta tinceku tayo yatsi: ‘Ninaye yini uyihlo nome umnakenu?’ 
Genesis44:20 Sayiphendvula satsi: ‘Sinaye babe, semdzala kakhulu, ukhona nemnaketfu losemncane, lamtala ebudzaleni bakhe, umnakabo akasekho. Senguye kuphela losasele esiswini senina. Uyise umtsandza kakhulu.’" 
Genesis44:21 Inkhosi yatsi etincekwini tayo: ‘Mletseni la kimi ngitembona ngemehlo.’ 
Genesis44:22 Sakhuluma enkhosini yami satsi: ‘Lomfana angeke ehlukane neyise, ngobe nangenta njalo, uyise angafa.’" 
Genesis44:23 Kodvwa watjela tinceku takho watsi: ‘Ngaphandle kwekutsi nite nemnakenu lomncane, ningeke niyitfole imvume yekubonana nami.’" 
Genesis44:24 “Satsi nasincandzeka sibuyela emuva kubabe, sefike samtjela onkhe emavi akho." 
Genesis44:25 Ngesikhatsi babe asatsi: ‘Hambani futsi niyewusitsengela kudlanyana,’" 
Genesis44:26 satsi kuye: ‘Singeke siye lapho, nasingahambi naye lomnaketfu lomncane. Nasimshiya, singeke siyitfole imvume yekubonana nalenkhosi.’" 
Genesis44:27 Inceku yakho, lengubabe, yatsi: ‘Nani niyati kutsi Rakheli umkami, wangitalela emadvodzana lamabili kuphela." 
Genesis44:28 Lomunye sewangishiya, kungahle kube nje waklejuklejulwa tilwane tesiganga waba ticucwana. Kusukela ngalelo langa angizange ngiphindze ngimbone." 
Genesis44:29 Nangabe nalona senimtsatsa lapha kimi, bese wehlelwa yingoti endleleni, ngitawufa ngibulawe buhlungu, ngobe vele sengimdzala.’" 
Genesis44:30 “Ngako-ke, nkhosi yami, nangifika kubabe, inceku yakho, ngingeti naye lomfana, kantsi imphilo yakhe ibophene kangaka neyakhe," 
Genesis44:31 nakabona kutsi lomfana akekho, anganhlakayeka afe. Ngaloko tsine, tinceku takho, sitawube sibangele inceku yakho, lengubabe, kutsi ife kabuhlungu ebudzaleni bayo." 
Genesis44:32 Ngetulu kwaloko mine ngatidzela ematsambo ngaba sibambiso kubabe, ngatsi kuye: ‘Nangingabuyi nalomfana kuwe, licala laloko litawubasemahlombe ami ngize ngiyekufa.’" 
Genesis44:33 Ngako-ke ngiyakuncenga kutsi kumane kusale mine ngibe sigcili sakho, ukhulule lomfana ahambe nabomnakabo abuyele ekhaya." 
Genesis44:34 Ngingancandzeka kanjani ngiye kubabe, nangabe ngingeti naye lomfana? Ngingeke ngikumele kubona buhlungu lobungaka behlela babe ngibukile.”" 
Genesis45:1 Josefa wehluleka kutibamba embikwetisebenti takhe, ngako watsi: “Abakhishwe bonkhe la endlini.” Ngako-ke kwakungasekho muntfu ngesikhatsi atjela bomnakabo kutsi ungubani." 
Genesis45:2 Wakhala kakhulu, kwadzimate kweva nemaGibhithe, kanye nebendlu yakaFaro." 
Genesis45:3 Josefa watjela bomnakabo watsi: “Phela mine nginguJosefa; babe usaphila yini?” Kodvwa bomnakabo abazange bakhone kumphendvula, ngobe babesetfuke kakhulu." 
Genesis45:4 Josefa wakhuluma kubo watsi: “Ngicela, senisondzele la.” Nembala basondzela, watsi kubo: “NginguJosefa, umnakenu, lenamtsengisa eGibhithe." 
Genesis45:5 Kodvwa ningakhatsateki futsi ningahlupheki ngekutsi nangitsengisa la. Empeleni nguNkulunkulu lowangitfumela kutsi ngite kulendzawo. Abentela kutsi nginendvulele ngekuta lapha ngitewusindzisa timphilo tebantfu. 
Genesis45:6 Kusengumnyaka wesibili lona indlala ikhungetse umhlaba; kusasele leminye iminyaka lesihlanu kungalinywa kungavunwa. 
Genesis45:7 Ngako nguNkulunkulu lowatsi anginendvulele ngekuta lapha, kuze anilondvolote nibe yinsali emhlabeni, nisindziswe kube kukhululwa lokukhulu." 
Genesis45:8 “Ngako-ke, akusini lenangitfumela la, kodvwa nguNkulunkulu. Sewungente ngaba nguyise waFaro, nenkhosi yendlu yakhe, nembusi etikwelive lonkhe laseGibhithe." 
Genesis45:9 “Sheshani nibuyele kubabe nifike nimtjele nitsi: ‘Josefa, indvodzana yakho, utsi: Nkulunkulu ungente ngaba yinkhosi eveni laseGibhithe lonkhe; shesha wehle ute kimi ungalibali." 
Genesis45:10 Utawuhlala eveni laseGosheni, ubesedvute nami, wena nebantfwabakho, nebatukulu bakho, nemihlambi yakho yetimvu, neyetinkhomo, nako konkhe lonako." 
Genesis45:11 Ngitaninakekela kahle nanilapho, ngobe kusasele iminyaka lesihlanu yendlala. Angifuni kutsi wena nendlu yakho nako konkhe nife nibulawe yindlala.’ ”" 
Genesis45:12 Josefa wachubeka watsi: “Manje, seniyabona-ke ngisho nawe, Bhenjamini, niyabona kutsi nginguJosefa." 
Genesis45:13 Nibotjela babe kutsi sengaba mkhulu kanganani lapha eGibhithe, nimtekele nangako konkhe lenikubonile. Sheshani nilandze babe, ehle ete la.”" 
Genesis45:14 Wase ugaca imikhono entsanyeni yaBhenjamini wakhala; naBhenjamini wakhalela entsanyeni yaJosefa. 
Genesis45:15 Bonkhe labomnakabo wabanga, akhala; emvakwaloko bonkhe labomnakabo base bakhuluma naye." 
Genesis45:16 Kwatsi lendzaba nayibikwa kuFaro kutsi bomnakaboJosefa laba labefikile, Faro netiphatsimandla takhe bajabula kakhulu." 
Genesis45:17 Faro wakhuluma kuJosefa watsi: “Tjela labomnakenu kutsi ababophele imitfwalo yabo etimbongolweni tabo bahambe baye eveni laseKhenani," 
Genesis45:18 balandze uyihlo nemindeni yabo bete la kimi. Ngitabanika lokuhle kakhulu la eGibhithe bahlale benabe ngekutsandza kwabo. 
Genesis45:19 Ubatjele batsatse tincola talapha eGibhithe, batekwetfwala ngato bantfwababo, nebafati babo, neyihlo, bete nabo." 
Genesis45:20 Bangahlupheki ngekushiya emagugu abo emuva, ngobe konkhe lokuhle kakhulu kwalapha eGibhithe kutawuba kwabo.”" 
Genesis45:21 Emadvodzana a-Israyeli enta njengobe abetjeliwe. Josefa wabanika tincola njengekuyala kwaFaro, wabanika nemiphako yendlela." 
Genesis45:22 Kwaba ngulowo nalowo wamnika ingubo yekushintja; kodvwa Bhenjamini wamnika tinhlavu tesiliva letingemakhulu lamatsatfu netingubo letisihlanu tekushintja. 
Genesis45:23 Uyise wamtfumelela timbongolo letatilishumi letatitfwele tintfo letinhle taseGibhithe, netimbongolo letinsikati letatetfwele kudla, netinkhwa, nemiphako yeyise labetayidla nasehla eta eGibhithe." 
Genesis45:24 Wase uyabahambisa labomnakabo, batsi nase besuka wabayala watsi: “Ningabohambe nilwa endleleni.”" 
Genesis45:25 Besuka-ke bahamba babuyela kuyise Jakobe eKhenani. 
Genesis45:26 Bafike bamtjela batsi: “Josefa usaphila! Ungumbusi etikwalo lonkhe live laseGibhithe.” Jakobe wamane waphela emandla nje, wacale wangete wabakholwa." 
Genesis45:27 Kodvwa kwatsi sebamtjele yonkhe inkhulumo yaJosefa layikhulume kubo, asabone netincola letatitfunyelwe nguJosefa kutsi titemetfwala, umoya waJakobe, uyise, wavuseleleka." 
Genesis45:28 Israyeli wakhuluma watsi: “Sengenelisekile kutsi Josefa, indvodzana yami, uyaphila. Angehle ngiyekumbona, ngingakafi.”" 
Genesis46:1 Ngako Israyeli watsatsa konkhe labenako wahamba, waze wefika eBherisheba, lapho efike wanikela iminikelo kuNkulunkulu wa-Isaka, uyise." 
Genesis46:2 Nkulunkulu wakhuluma ku-Israyeli embonweni ebusuku, watsi: “Jakobe! Ye Jakobe!” Waphendvula watsi: “Ngilapha!”" 
Genesis46:3 Watsi: “NginguNkulunkulu, Nkulunkulu weyihlo. Ungesabi kwehlela eGibhithe, ngiyawukwenta ube sive lesikhulu khona." 
Genesis46:4 Ngitawuba nawe ngehle ngiye eGibhithe, ngiyawuphindze ngenyuke nawe ngikubuyise futsi; Josefa cobo lwakhe nguye loyawuvala emehlo akho ekufeni kwakho ngetandla takhe.”" 
Genesis46:5 Jakobe wesuka eBherisheba; emadvodzana akhe agibelisa uyise, nebantfwabawo, nebafati bawo etincoleni lababetitfunyelelwe nguFaro kutsi titewubetfwala." 
Genesis46:6 Bahamba netinkhomo tabo netimphahla tabo lababetitfole baseseveni laseKhenani. Labaya eGibhithe kwakunguJakobe nentalo yakhe yonkhe: 
Genesis46:7 emadvodzana akhe, nemadvodzana awo, nemadvodzakati akhe, nemadvodzakati emadvodzana akhe; tonkhe titukulwane takhe wefika nato eGibhithe." 
Genesis46:8 Nankha ema-Israyeli langena eGibhithe naJakobe: Rubeni bekulitubulo lakhe. 
Genesis46:9 Emadvodzana aRubeni bekuboHanoki, naPhalu, naHesroni, naKhami." 
Genesis46:10 Emadvodzana aSimeyoni bekuboJemuweli, naJamini, na-Ohade, naJakhini, naSohari, naShawule, indvodzana leyatalwa ngumfati labengumKhenani." 
Genesis46:11 Emadvodzana aLevi bekuboGeshoni, naKhohati, naMerari." 
Genesis46:12 Emadvodzana aJuda bekubo-Era, na-Onani, naShela, naPheresi, naZera; kodvwa Era na-Onani bafela eveni laseKhenani. Emadvodzana aPheresi bekubo-Hesroni naHamule." 
Genesis46:13 Emadvodzana a-Isakhari bekuboThola, naPhuwa, naJashubi, naShimroni." 
Genesis46:14 Emadvodzana aZebuloni bekuboSeredi, na-Eloni, naJaleli." 
Genesis46:15 Lawa-ke ngemadvodzana aLeya, lawatalela Jakobe eMesophothamiya ngaphandle kwaDina. Asawonkhe emadvodzana nemadvodzakati aLeya abengema-33." 
Genesis46:16 Emadvodzana aGadi bekuboSefoni, naHagi, naShuni, na-Esboni, na-Eri, na-Arodi, na-Areli." 
Genesis46:17 Emadvodzana a-Asheri bekuboJimna, naJishuwa, naJishvi, naBheriya, naSera labengudzadzewabo. Emadvodzana aBheriya bekuboHebere naMalkhiyeli." 
Genesis46:18 Lawa-ke kwakungemadvodzana aZilpha, Labani lamnika Leya, indvodzakati yakhe. Watalela Jakobe bantfu lababeli-16." 
Genesis46:19 Emadvodzana aRakheli, umkaJakobe, bekuboJosefa naBhenjamini." 
Genesis46:20 Eveni laseGibhithe Josefa watalelwa boManase na-Efrayimu; lamtalela bona Asenathi, indvodzakati ya-Photifera, umphristi wase-Oni." 
Genesis46:21 Emadvodzana aBhenjamini bekuboBela, naBekheri, na-Ashbeli, naGera, naNamani, na-Ehi, naRoshe, naMuphimi, naHuphimi, na-Adi." 
Genesis46:22 Lawo-ke kwakungemadvodzana aRakheli lawatalela Jakobe; wamtalela bantfu lababeli-14. 
Genesis46:23 Indvodzana yaDani bekunguHushimu. 
Genesis46:24 Emadvodzana aNaftali bekuboJasiyeli, naGuni, naJeseri, naShilemi." 
Genesis46:25 Lawo-ke kwakungemadvodzana aBilha, Labani lamnika Rakheli, indvodzakati yakhe. Sebabonkhe kwakubantfu labasikhombisa." 
Genesis46:26 Sebabonkhe bantfu bekutalwa nguJakobe labaya eGibhithe babengema-66, ngaphandle kwabomalukatana bakakhe." 
Genesis46:27 Emadvodzana aJosefa latalelwa eGibhithe aba mabili; ngako-ke bantfu bemndeni wakaJakobe labehlela eGibhithe babengema-70 sebabonkhe. 
Genesis46:28 Jakobe watfumela Juda embili kuJosefa kutsi atewubahlangabeta eGosheni. Bahamba baze befika eGosheni. 
Genesis46:29 Josefa wagibela incola yakhe waphikelela khona eGosheni, wayawuhlangabeta uyise Israyeli. Watsi achamuka nje, Josefa wambona uyise watigaca entsanyeni yakhe, wakhalela kuye sikhatsi lesidze." 
Genesis46:30 Israyeli watsi kuJosefa: “Cha, sengingafa-ke manje, ngobe sengibubonile buso bakho, futsi sengiyati kutsi usaphila.”" 
Genesis46:31 Josefa wakhuluma kubomnakabo kanye nemndeni wonkhe weyise, watsi: “Kufanele ngenyuke ngiye kuFaro ngimatise kutsi bomnaketfu nemndeni wababe labebaseKhenani, sebefikile, bete kimi." 
Genesis46:32 Ngitawufike ngimtjele kutsi nine nibelusi betinkhomo, nifuyile, ngimtjele nekutsi nite nayo yonkhe imihlambi yenu, netimvu, netinkhomo, nako konkhe leninako." 
Genesis46:33 Nasanibita-ke Faro abuta atsi: ‘Yini umsebenti wenu?’ 
Genesis46:34 nibomphendvula nitsi: ‘Tinceku takho tibelusi betinkhomo kusukela ebusheni bato kuze kube ngunyalo, tsine nabobabe betfu.’ Nanimlandzise kanjalo, utanivumela kutsi nakhe lapha eGosheni.” Phela Josefa abesho loku, ngobe emaGibhithe abewubukela phansi umsebenti wekwelusa." 
Genesis47:1 Ngako-ke Josefa wahamba wayawubikela Faro, watsi: “Babe, nabomnaketfu, netimvu tabo, netinkhomo tabo, nako konkhe labanako sebefikile baphuma eKhenani, sebaseGosheni.”" 
Genesis47:2 Emkhatsini wabomnakabo wakhetsa baba sihlanu wayawubetfula kuFaro. 
Genesis47:3 Inkhosi Faro yababuta yatsi: “Yini umsebenti wenu?” Bamphendvula batsi: “Sibelusi, njengobe nabobabe babengibo." 
Genesis47:4 Sitfutsele kulelive, ngobe eKhenani indlala seyibhoke kangangobe sekuze kuphele nemadlelo alemfuyo yetfu. Siyakucela kutsi mane usivumele sikhosele eGosheni.”" 
Genesis47:5 Faro wakhuluma kuJosefa watsi: “Uyihlo nabomnakenu bete kuwe. 
Genesis47:6 Lonkhe lelive laseGibhithe lisetandleni takho. Babeke bakhe endzaweni lencono kakhulu, abakhe eGosheni. Nakukhona labanelikhono lekwelusa emkhatsini wabo, babeke babe tindvuna tebelusi bemfuyo yami.”" 
Genesis47:7 Josefa wabe sewungenisa Jakobe, uyise, wametfula kuFaro. Jakobe wakhulekela kuFaro amfisela tibusiso." 
Genesis47:8 Faro wabuta Jakobe watsi: “Sewuneminyaka lemingakhi budzala?” 
Genesis47:9 Jakobe wamphendvula watsi: “Iminyaka yami yekuzulazula seyili-130. Leminyaka lembalwa inebulukhuni emphilweni yami. Noko ngisengakabi mdzala ngefika eminyakeni yabokhokho ekuzulazuleni kwabo.” 
Genesis47:10 Jakobe wase ubusisa Faro, wavalelisa, waphuma." 
Genesis47:11 Josefa wabeka uyise nabomnakabo wabakhela eveni lelincono laseGibhithe, endzaweni levundze kakhulu, eceleni kwelidolobha laka-Ramsesi, njengobe abeyalwe nguFaro." 
Genesis47:12 Josefa wapha uyise kudla, wapha nabomnakabo, nemndeni weyise; kwaya ngebunyenti babo." 
Genesis47:13 Kudla kwaphela yonkhe indzawo; ngobe indlala yase ibhoke kakhulu eveni laseGibhithe nelaseKhenani, ngako-ke bantfu balamba." 
Genesis47:14 Josefa wase ubutsela ndzawonye yonkhe lemali leyayingene ngekutsengiswa kwekudla eveni laseGibhithe nelaseKhenani. Yonkhe lemali wayiletsa endlini yaFaro. 
Genesis47:15 Yatsi kube iphele yonkhe imali eveni laseGibhithe nelaseKhenani, onkhe emaGibhithe eta kuJosefa afike atsi: “Siphe kudla! Ungasiyekela nje kodvwa sibulawe yindlala embikwakho? Yonkhe imali yetfu seyiphelile.”" 
Genesis47:16 Josefa wabaphendvula watsi: “Letsani tinkhomo tenu, nitsenge ngato, ngitaninika-ke kudla, nangabe imali yenu seyiphelile.”" 
Genesis47:17 Ngako-ke baletsa tinkhomo tabo batinika Josefa, batsenga ngato. Josefa wabanika kudla bonkhe labeta kutawushintjisa ngemahhashi, nangetimvu, nangetimbuti, nangetinkhomo, nangetimbongolo. Wonkhe lowo mnyaka waphela seloku abanika kudla ngekutsi bakuntjintjise ngetifuyo." 
Genesis47:18 Watsi kube uphele lowo mnyaka, beta kuye ekucaleni kwemnyaka lolandzelako, bafike batsi: “Singeke sikufihle loku, nkhosi, kutsi imali yetfu yonkhe seyiphelile, nekutsi imfuyo yetfu ngeyakho. Kute lesingabe sisakunika kona manje, ngaphandle kwemitimba yetfu nemasimi etfu." 
Genesis47:19 Utasiyekela nje sibulawe yindlala embikwakho tsine nelive letfu? Sitsengisele kudla ngatsi nangemasimi etfu. Tsine nelive letfu sitawuba tigcili taFaro. Siphe kudla kuze siphunge indlala, singafi; usiphe nenhlanyelo sitewuhlanyela emasimini etfu.”" 
Genesis47:20 Ngako-ke Josefa walitsenga lonkhe live laseGibhithe, ngobe onkhe emaGibhithe atsengisa ngawo onkhe emasimi awo, ngenca yekubhokelwa yindlala. Live lonkhe laba laFaro." 
Genesis47:21 Bonkhe bantfu baba tigcili taFaro kusukela ngale kwelive kuze kubesekugcineni ngale kwelive laseGibhithe. 
Genesis47:22 Live langalitsenganga kwaba lebaphristi kuphela; ngobe baphristi babephila ngesabelo sekudla lababesinikwa nguFaro. Ngako-ke abalitsengisanga live labo. 
Genesis47:23 Josefa wase ukhuluma kubantfu watsi: “Lalelani-ke, kusukela lamuhla nine nelive lenu senginitsengele Faro. Nansi-ke inhlanyelo yenu, hlanyelani emasimini." 
Genesis47:24 Nanivunako, incenye yesihlanu yesivuno nitawuyetfula kuFaro, bese kutsi tincenye letine esihlanwini tibe tenu netemindeni yenu.”" 
Genesis47:25 Bamphendvula batsi: “Utisindzisile timphilo tetfu. Usiphetse ngesandla lesihle, nkhosi. Sitaba tigcili taFaro.”" 
Genesis47:26 Ngako-ke Josefa wakwenta kwaba ngumtsetfo lomile welive laseGibhithe, kuze kube ngulamuhla, kutsi Faro anikwe incenye yesihlanu yesivuno. Live lebaphristi lodvwa lelasala langete ladliwa nguFaro." 
Genesis47:27 Ngako ema-Israyeli ahlala eGibhithe akha eveni laseGosheni; achuma, anotsa, andza kakhulu." 
Genesis47:28 Jakobe wahlala eveni laseGibhithe iminyaka leli-17. Iminyaka yekuphila kwaJakobe yaba li-147. 
Genesis47:29 Watsi nasatakufa, wabita indvodzana yakhe Josefa, watsi kuyo: “Nangemukeleka kuwe, beka sandla sakho ngaphansi kwelitsanga lami, wetsembise ngesifungo kimi kutsi ungeke ungingcwabe lapha eGibhithe." 
Genesis47:30 Ngifuna kungcwatjwa lapho kwangcwatjwa khona bobabe. Ubongetfwala, ungikhiphe eGibhithe ngiyekungcwatjwa lapho kwangcwatjwa khona bobabe.” Josefa wamphendvula watsi: “Ngiyawukwenta loko njengobe ushito.”" 
Genesis47:31 Jakobe wase utsi: “Funga kimi kutsi uyawukwenta loko.” Wafunga kuye. Israyeli wabonga akhotsama embhedzeni wakhe. 
Genesis48:1 Emvakwaloko Josefa wabikelwa kutsi uyise uyagula. Ngako-ke Josefa wesuka watsatsa emadvodzana akhe omabili boManase na-Efrayimu, waya nawo kuyise." 
Genesis48:2 Wase uyabikelwa Jakobe kwatsiwa: “Indvodzana yakho, Josefa, seyifikile itekuvusela.” Israyeli waticinisa abuyisa emandla akhe, wavuka wahlala ngetibunu embhedzeni." 
Genesis48:3 Jakobe wakhuluma kuJosefa watsi: “Nkulunkulu Somandla wabonakala kimi eLuzi, eveni laseKhenani wangibusisa," 
Genesis48:4 watsi kimi: ‘Lalela la, ngitakwandzisa ngikwente ube tive letinyenti, lelive ngiliphe titukulwane takho emvakwakho. Liyawuba lato phakadze naphakadze.’ ”" 
Genesis48:5 Wachubeka watsi: “Lamadvodzana akho lamabili lowawatalelwa lapha eveni laseGibhithe ngisengakafiki mine, nguwona awami. Efrayimu naManase batawuba bami, njengobe Rubeni naSimeyoni babami." 
Genesis48:6 Bantfwana lotawubatala emvakwabo batawuba bakho, hhayi bami; lifa labo liyawubitwa ngemagama alaba bomnakabo." 
Genesis48:7 Loku ngikwenta ngenca yekudzabuka lengaba nako nangifelwa ngunyoko Rakheli, ngisesendleleni ngisuka eMesophothamiya sengitawufika e-Efratha, eveni laseKhenani. Ngamngcwaba e-Efratha.” Manje leyo ndzawo seyibitwa ngekutsi yiBhetlehema." 
Genesis48:8 Israyeli nakabona emadvodzana aJosefa, wabuta watsi: “Bakabani labafana?”" 
Genesis48:9 Josefa waphendvula uyise watsi: “Ngemadvodzana ami, Nkulunkulu langiphe wona ngisekuleli laseGibhithe.” Israyeli watsi: “Ase uwaletse, khona ngitewabusisa.”" 
Genesis48:10 Emehlo a-Israyeli abengasaboni kahle, ngenca yebudzala, abesafifiyela. Ngako Josefa wawasondzeta kuye. Jakobe wawanga, wawagaca ngemikhono." 
Genesis48:11 Israyeli wakhuluma kuJosefa watsi: “Ngangingasacabangi kutsi ngiyawuphindze ngibubone buso bakho, kodvwa Nkulunkulu sewungivumele kutsi ngikubone, ngaze ngabona ngisho nebantfwabakho futsi.”" 
Genesis48:12 Josefa wase uyawesusa emadvodzana akhe emadvolweni aJakobe, wakhotsama abhekise buso bakhe phansi." 
Genesis48:13 Josefa wawatsatsa omabili wawabeka emaceleni a-Israyeli: Efrayimu angesancele, Manase ngesekudla." 
Genesis48:14 Kodvwa Israyeli welula sandla sakhe sangesekudla wasibeka etikwa-Efrayimu, nome abengulomncane; sandla sakhe sangesancele waselula wasibeka etikwaManase, labelitubulo." 
Genesis48:15 Jakobe wabe sewubusisa Josefa, watsi: “Shangatsi Nkulunkulu wabobabe, lowakhontwa bo-Abrahama na-Isaka, yena loNkulunkulu longihole kuyo yonkhe imphilo yami, kwaze kwaba ngulamuhla, angababusisa labafana." 
Genesis48:16 Shangatsi lengilosi leyangiphephisa kuto tonkhe tingoti ingababusisa labafana. Shangatsi bangabitwa ngelibito lami, nangelibito labobabe Abrahama na-Isaka. Shangatsi bangandza, babe banyenti emhlabeni.”" 
Genesis48:17 Watsi kube Josefa abone kutsi uyise ubeke sandla sakhe sekudla etikwenhloko ya-Efrayimu, wakhubeka. Watsatsa sandla seyise sekudla etikwa-Efrayimu kuze asibeke etikwenhloko yaManase." 
Genesis48:18 Wakhuluma kuyise watsi: “Cha, phela babe, lona nguyena alitubulo, beka sandla sakho sekudla etikwakhe.”" 
Genesis48:19 Kodvwa uyise wala, watsi: “Ngiyati, ndvodzana yami, ngiyati. Naye utaba sive, naye futsi utaba mkhulu. Kodvwa nome kunjalo, lona lomncane utawuba mkhulu kunaye, netitukulwane takhe tiyawuba tive letinkhulu.”" 
Genesis48:20 Wababusisa ngalelo langa atsi: “Ema-Israyeli nakabusisa ayawubita emabito enu atsi: ‘Shangatsi Nkulunkulu angakwenta ufanane nabo-Efrayimu naManase.’ ” Wambeka kanjalo-ke Efrayimu kutsi abe ngetulu kwaManase. 
Genesis48:21 Israyeli wakhuluma kuJosefa watsi: “Manje sengitawufa, kodvwa Nkulunkulu utawuba nani, aphindze anibuyisele eveni labokhokho benu." 
Genesis48:22 Lelicele lentsaba iShekhemu lengalitsatsa ngenkemba yami nangebutjoki bami kuma-Amori, ngengeta ngekulinika wena, hhayi bomnakenu.”" 
Genesis49:1 Jakobe wabita onkhe emadvodzana akhe wakhuluma nawo, watsi: “Buyani la kimi nonkhe, ngitenitjela lokutanehlela ngemuso." 
Genesis49:2 “Hlanganani ndzawonye, nive, nine madvodzana aJakobe; nilalelisise ku-Israyeli, uyihlo." 
Genesis49:3 “Rubeni, wena ulitubulo lami, nemandla ami, ngabona ngawe kutsi nami ngiyindvodza. Uyingcwele ngesitfunti nengcwele ngemandla." 
Genesis49:4 Njengobe uyaluka njengemanti nje, kodvwa utawulahlekelwa kuba yingcwele kwakho, ngobe walala nenyoko lomncane, wangcolisa umbhedze wami." 
Genesis49:5 “Simeyoni naLevi nine ningematse nelulwimi, tinkemba tenu tekususa lutfutfuva." 
Genesis49:6 Shangatsi ngingete ngatingena tindzaba tenu, ngingeke ngihlanganyele nani, ngobe nitsi ningatfukutsela nibulale bantfu ngebudlova benu, nigawule imisipha yetinkhomo." 
Genesis49:7 Intfukutselo yenu ayicalekiswe, ngobe iyesabeka; nelulaka lwenu lucalekiswe, ngobe lunelunya. Niyawusakateka nalo lonkhe lakaJakobe, nicitseke nalo lonkhe laka-Israyeli." 
Genesis49:8 “Juda, bomnakenu bayakukudvumisa. Titsa takho uyawutibamba ngentsamo; emadvodzana eyihlo ayawukukhotsamela." 
Genesis49:9 Juda ufanana neliwundlu lelibhubesi, ndvodzana yami, usukile enyamataneni loyibulele wabuyela esikhundleni sakho, waguca, walala njengelibhubesi nanjengelibhubesikati, ngubani nje longahle akucale?" 
Genesis49:10 Bukhosi bungeke busuke esandleni saJuda. Titukulwane takhe tiyawubusa njalonjalo, tive tiyakwetfula kuye timlalele." 
Genesis49:11 Uyawuba nenala, bantfu bayawubopha timbongolo tabo emivinini, nematfole etimbongolokati tabo emivinini lemihle. Bayawugeza tingubo tabo ewayinini, netembatfo tabo ewayinini lelibovu sangati." 
Genesis49:12 Emehlo abo ayawuba bovu ngenca yeliwayini, ematinyo abo ayawuba mhlophe ngenca yelubisi." 
Genesis49:13 “Zebuloni uyakwakha elusentseni lwelwandle; lusentse lwakakhe luyawuba sikhumulo semikhumbi, umnyele wakakhe ubeseSidoni." 
Genesis49:14 “Isakhari uyimbongolo lengumkhehlekhehle leyalala emkhatsini wemitfwalo. 
Genesis49:15 Watsi kube abone kutsi lendzawo yekuphumula yinhle, nekutsi lelive lihle, wase uyagobondzela entela kwetfwala ngelihlombe, waphoceleka kutsi asebente njengesigcili." 
Genesis49:16 “Dani uyawumelela emalungela ebantfu bakhe, bayawufanana naletinye tive taka-Israyeli." 
Genesis49:17 Dani uyawuba yinyoka eceleni kwemgwaco, abe yinyoka lenesihlungu eceleni kwendlela, lehlalela kuluma titsendze telihhashi, kuze umgibeli walo awe nyova." 
Genesis49:18 “Simakadze, ngilindzele insindziso yakho." 
Genesis49:19 “Gadi uyawuhlaselwa libutfo letigebengu, kodvwa yena uyawuticosha." 
Genesis49:20 “Live laka-Asheri liyawuba nesivuno lesikhulu. Kudla kwalo kuyawufanela emakhosi. 
Genesis49:21 “Naftali unjengenyamatane lekhululekile; ukhuluma emavi lamnandzi. 
Genesis49:22 “Josefa uligala lelitselako lemvini, ligala lelitsela ngasemtfonjeni wemanti, emagala akhe ayakhula acance lubondza." 
Genesis49:23 Titsa takhe timhlasela ngalokwesabekako, timcoshe ngebutjoki nangemicibisholo." 
Genesis49:24 Kodvwa butjoki bakhe buhlala bucinile, imikhono yakhe iciniswa tandla taLonemandla waJakobe, nguMelusi loliDvwala laka-Israyeli." 
Genesis49:25 NguNkulunkulu weyihlo lokusitako. NguNkulunkulu Somandla lotakubusisa ngetibusiso tangetulu ezulwini, nangetibusiso temfuyo netebantfwana." 
Genesis49:26 Tibusiso teyihlo tinemandla kunetibusiso letiphuma etintsabeni taphakadze, tendlula ngisho nenala yasetintsabeni. Shangatsi tonkhe letibusiso tingehlela etikwaJosefa nasebuntini lakhe lowehlukaniswa kubomnakabo." 
Genesis49:27 “Bhenjamini uyimphisi lebefutelako; ekuseni uchwaga lakuphangile, entsambama akwabe loko lakuphangile.”" 
Genesis49:28 Tonkhe leti tive taka-Israyeli letili-12. Ngiwo lawa-ke emavi lakhulunywa nguyise asabavalelisa bonkhe ngamunye ngulowo amnika sibusiso lesifanele yena. 
Genesis49:29 Jakobe wabe sewuyabayala utsi: “Sekusele kancane ngilandzele bokhokho. Ngicela ningingcwabe kubokhokho emhumeni losensimini ya-Efroni, umHethi." 
Genesis49:30 Lomhume usensimini yaseMakhaphela, emphumalanga neMamre, eveni laseKhenani. Abrahama wawutsenga kanye nensimi ku-Efroni, umHethi, kutsi ube yindzawo yekungcwaba." 
Genesis49:31 Abrahama naSara, umkakhe, bangcwatjwa khona; Isaka naRebheka, umkakhe, bangcwatjwa khona; naLeya ngamngcwaba khona." 
Genesis49:32 Lensimi nalomhume lokuyo kwatsengwa kumaHethi.” 
Genesis49:33 Watsi kube Jakobe acedze kuwayala emadvodzana akhe, wabuyela walala wafa, walandzela bokhokho bakhe." 
Genesis50:1 Josefa watijika etikweyise, wakhala, amanga." 
Genesis50:2 Josefa wayala tisebenti takakhe nabochwephesha bekomisa tidvumbu kutsi batsatse sidvumbu seyise bayesomisa ngemitsi kuze singaboli; ngempela sidvumbu sa-Israyeli somiswa ngemitsi. 
Genesis50:3 Lesidvumbu sasetjentwa emalanga langema-40 lekwakusikhatsi lesasidzingeka ekufezeni lowo msebenti. EmaGibhithe azilela Israyeli emalanga langema-70. 
Genesis50:4 Kwatsi kube kuphele emalanga ekuzila, Josefa wakhuluma etindvuneni taFaro kutsi tiyewumbika kuFaro, watsi: “Ngicela ningibike kuFaro kutsi:" 
Genesis50:5 Babe wangifungisa asengakafi watsi: ‘Sengitakufa, uze ungisite ungingcwabe ethuneni lami lengalimba eveni laseKhenani.’ Manje-ke, ngicela kutsi angivumele Faro, ngiyewungcwaba babe, ngitawuphindze ngibuye.”" 
Genesis50:6 Faro wamphendvula watsi: “Hamba uyewungcwaba uyihlo njengobe akufungisa.” 
Genesis50:7 Ngako-ke Josefa wenyuka wayawungcwaba uyise. Waphekeletelwa ngito tonkhe tisebenti taFaro, netikhulu taFaro, netikhulu telive laseGibhithe," 
Genesis50:8 kanye nemndeni waJosefa, nabomnakabo, nemndeni wonkhe weyise. Kwasala bantfwana labancane babo netifuyo kulaseGosheni." 
Genesis50:9 Wenyuka ngetincola kanye nebagibeli bemahhashi; kwaba sicumbi lesikhulu. 
Genesis50:10 Batsi nabefika ka-Athadi ebaleni lekubhulela emabele ngesheya kwe-Jordane, bakhala kabuhlungu. Josefa wenta imisimeto yekulila emalanga lasikhombisa." 
Genesis50:11 Kwatsi kube emaKhenani, takhamiti takulelo live, bakubone lokulila, ebaleni laka-Athadi, atsi: “Maye, lokulila kwemaGibhithe kubuhlungu bo!” Ngako-ke, lendzawo yetsiwa libito ngekutsi yi-Abela Misrayimu; ingesheya kwemfula iJordane." 
Genesis50:12 Ngako emadvodzana aJakobe enta njengobe abewayalile. 
Genesis50:13 Emadvodzana aJakobe ametfwala uyise ambuyisela eveni laseKhenani, amngcwaba emhumeni wensimi yaseMakhaphela, ngasemphumalanga yeMamre. Lomgedze watsengwa kanye nensimi ngu-Abrahama ku-Efroni, umHethi, kutsi ube yindzawo yekungcwaba." 
Genesis50:14 Watsi kube Josefa angcwabe uyise, wancandzeka wabuyela eGibhithe, ahamba kanye nabomnakabo nabo bonkhe labehambe nabo." 
Genesis50:15 Kwatsi kube bomnakaboJosefa babone kutsi uyise sewufile, bakhuluma bodvwana batsi: “Kungahle kwenteke kutsi Josefa usasibambele emagcubu, afune kutenanela ngako konkhe lokubi lesamenta kona.”" 
Genesis50:16 Ngako-ke batfumela kuJosefa batsi: “Babe wasinika lomyalo ngaphambi kokufa kwakhe watsi: ‘Nibohamba niye kuJosefa nifike nitsi: 
Genesis50:17 Mine yihlo ngicela ubatsetselele laba bomnakenu ngalobubi lababenta kuwe, ngobe bakona.’ Sesiyakucela-ke kutsi usitsetselele kulobubi lesabenta kuwe, tsine tinceku taNkulunkulu weyihlo.” Josefa wakhala nakeva lomlayeto." 
Genesis50:18 Bomnakabo befika kuJosefa bamkhotsama, batsi: “Sesilapha tsine tinceku takho.”" 
Genesis50:19 Kodvwa Josefa wakhuluma kubo watsi: “Ningesabi. Ngingeke ngitibeke endzaweni yaNkulunkulu. 
Genesis50:20 Nine nanitimisele lokubi ngami; kodvwa Nkulunkulu loko wakugucula kwaba ngulokuhle, entela kutsi ngalesikhatsi kusindziswe bantfu labanyenti, bangabulawa yindlala." 
Genesis50:21 Ngako-ke ningesabi. Nine nebantfwabenu ngitaniphatsa ngetandla letifutfumele.” Ngalenkhulumo wabanika siciniseko, tinhlitiyo tabo tadvudvuteka." 
Genesis50:22 Josefa wachubeka wahlala eGibhithe, yena nemndeni weyise. Wakhula waze waba neminyaka leli-110 budzala, wase uyafa." 
Genesis50:23 Josefa wakhula, wadzimate wabona bantfwana ba-Efrayimu nebatukulu bakhe; wabona nebantfwana baMakhire, umsa waManase; Josefa wabafaka emndenini wakhe." 
Genesis50:24 Josefa wakhuluma kubomnakabo, watsi: “Sengitakufa; kodvwa ngiyati kutsi Nkulunkulu utawuba nani anikhiphe kulelive, anibuyisele eveni labetsembisa lona bo-Abrahama, na-Isaka, naJakobe.”" 
Genesis50:25 Josefa wabafungisa bomnakabo, emadvodzana a-Israyeli, watsi: “Ngetsembiseni kutsi Nkulunkulu nanikhumbula atenikhipha la, niyawuhamba nawo ematsambo ami.”" 
Genesis50:26 Ngako-ke Josefa wafela eGibhithe asaneminyaka leli-110, sidvumbu sakhe somiswa ngemitsi, kuze singaboli, sabe sesiyalondvolotwa." 
Exodus1:1 Nankha-ke emabito emadvodzana aka-Israyeli laya eGibhithe ahamba neyise Jakobe, nguleyo naleyo ndvodzana beyihamba nemndeni wakayo:" 
Exodus1:2 bekuboRubeni, naSimeyoni, naLevi, naJuda," 
Exodus1:3 na-Isakhari, naZebuloni, naBhenjamini," 
Exodus1:4 naDani, naNaftali, naGadi, na-Asheri." 
Exodus1:5 Sewuwonkhe umndeni wakaJakobe wawubantfu lababengema-70. Phela Josefa abesavele aseGibhithe. 
Exodus1:6 Ngekuhamba kwesikhatsi boJosefa, nabomnakabo, nalo lonkhe lelo butfo labo, lafa laphela." 
Exodus1:7 Kodvwa titukulwane tabo, ema-Israyeli, tatalana, tandza, taba nemandla kakhulu, kangangobe live laseGibhithe lase ligcwele tona." 
Exodus1:8 Kwase kubekwa inkhosi lensha eGibhithe, leyayingati lutfo ngaJosefa." 
Exodus1:9 Yacaphelisa bantfu bayo, yatsi: “Bukani la, lama-Israyeli asandza kakhulu lapha eveni letfu, kantsi futsi anemandla kakhulu kunatsi, asayingoti kitsi." 
Exodus1:10 Ase siwabuke ngalamanye emehlo, sente lisu, funa andze kakhulu, ngobe nakungesuka imphi, angahle asite letitsa tetfu, bese ayabaleka kulelive.”" 
Exodus1:11 Ngako-ke emaGibhithe agcilata ema-Israyeli ngekuwabekela tindvuna letatiwashayela njengetinkhabi, tiwahlupha ngekuwetfwesa imitfwalo lematima. Ema-Israyeli akhela boFaro iPhithomu neRamsesi lekwakutingungumadolobha." 
Exodus1:12 Kodvwa kuwahlupha nekuwacindzetela lama-Israyeli kwawenta andza kakhulu, andza nalo lonkhe live. EmaGibhithe acala kuwesaba ema-Israyeli." 
Exodus1:13 Ngako-ke emaGibhithe asebentisa sive sema-Israyeli ngesihluku; 
Exodus1:14 imphilo yawo ayenta yababa ngekuwagcilata kamatima: awabhucisa ludzaka, awafolomisa netitini, awentisa yonkhe inhlobo yemisebenti yasemasimini. Kuko konkhe labekwenta emaGibhithe asebentisa ema-Israyeli kamatima." 
Exodus1:15 Inkhosi yaseGibhithe yakhuluma kuboShifra naPhuwa, labo bekubabelekisi bebafati bemaHebheru, yatsi:" 
Exodus1:16 “Nanibelekisa bafati bemaHebheru, kubotsi luswane nalungumfana nilubulale, kodvwa naluyintfombatane ningalubulali.”" 
Exodus1:17 Kodvwa babelekisi besaba Nkulunkulu, ngako abazange bawente lomyalo wenkhosi, babengatibulali letinswane letibafana." 
Exodus1:18 Ngako-ke inkhosi yababita lababelekisi, yababuta yatsi: “Nikwentelani loku? Anitibulali ngani letinswane letibafana?”" 
Exodus1:19 Babelekisi bayiphendvula inkhosi batsi: “Bafati bemaHebheru abafanani nebafati bemaGibhithe. Bafati bemaHebheru banemandla, babeleka masinyane umbelekisi asengakefiki.”" 
Exodus1:20 Ngako-ke Nkulunkulu waba nemusa kulababelekisi. Ema-Israyeli andza kakhulu, adlanga kuba nemandla." 
Exodus1:21 Njengobe lababelekisi bamesaba Nkulunkulu, yena wabapha imiti." 
Exodus1:22 Ngako-ke Faro wayala bonkhe bantfu bakhe, watsi: “Lonkhe luswane lwemHebheru lolungumfana lubotsi nalutalwa nilugcumukisele emfuleni iNayili, kodvwa luswane loluyintfombatane niboluyekela luphile.”" 
Exodus2:1 Ngaso leso sikhatsi kwesuka indvodza yesive sakaLevi yateka umfati wesive sakubo. 
Exodus2:2 Lomfati wakhulelwa, watala indvodzana, watsi kube abone indlela lolwaluluhle ngayo loluswane, walufihla lwaze lwaba netinyanga letintsatfu." 
Exodus2:3 Kodvwa lwatsi kube lufike esigabeni sekungafihleki, wase ulufaka esitjeni lesaselukwe ngelikhwane, wasihuca ngalokusalibumba nangelitiyela, kuze singangenwa ngemanti. Walufaka ekhatsi loluswane, wase ulubeka emhlangeni elusentseni lwemfula iNayili." 
Exodus2:4 Dzadzewabo loluswane wema bucalu, entela kubuka kutsi kutakwentekani kulo." 
Exodus2:5 Kwase kufika indvodzakati yaFaro itewugeza lapha kulomfula; timphekeleteli tayo tatihamba tigudla lusentse lwemfula. Yatsi nayisibona lesitja sisekhatsi emhlangeni, yatfuma imphekeleteli yayo yatsi asilandvwe." 
Exodus2:6 Lendvodzakati yaFaro yatsi nayisivula lesitja, yakhandza kuneluswane lwemfana, lukhala. Yaluhawukela, yase itsi: “Lolu ngulolunye lwetinswane temaHebheru.”" 
Exodus2:7 Dzadzewabo loluswane wakhuluma kulendvodzakati yaFaro, watsi: “Ngingakufunela yini umfati longumHebheru atekumunyisela loluswane?”" 
Exodus2:8 Indvodzakati yaFaro yatsi: “Ngingabonga, hamba.” Ngako-ke lentfombatana yagijima yalandza unina waloluswane." 
Exodus2:9 Indvodzakati yaFaro yakhuluma kulonina, yatsi: “Ngitsatsele nangu umntfwana ungimunyisele yena, mine ngitakuholela.” Ngako lomake walutsatsa loluswane walumunyisa." 
Exodus2:10 Watsi nasakhulakhulile lomntfwana, wamtsatsa wammikisa kulendvodzakati yaFaro. Lendvodzakati yaFaro yamfaka esiswini sayo, waba ngumntfwanayo, yatsi: “Njengobe ngimkhiphe emantini, ngitametsa ngitsi nguMosi.”" 
Exodus2:11 Kwatsi nasakhulile Mosi, wahamba wavakashela bantfu besive sakubo, emaHebheru; wabona indlela lababephocelelwa ngayo kutsi bente umsebenti lomatima. Wabona umGibhithe ashaya lomunye wesive sakubo, umHebheru." 
Exodus2:12 Mosi wacalata ngala nangala, watsi kube abone kutsi kute lombonako, wabulala lomGibhithe; wammbela esihlabatsini." 
Exodus2:13 Ngakusasa wabuyela futsi wabavakashela; wabona emadvodza lamabili emaHebheru alwa odvwa. Wakhuluma kulona lekwakunguyena onile, watsi: “Umshayelani lomuntfu wakini, longumHebheru?”" 
Exodus2:14 Lendvodza yaphendvula yatsi: “Ngubani losakwente indvuna nemehluleli wetfu wena? Sewufuna kungibulala nami njengalomGibhithe lombulele itolo?” Mosi wetfuka, wesaba kakhulu, amangaliswa kutsi kantsi lendzaba beseyatiwa." 
Exodus2:15 Watsi kube Faro ayive lendzaba, wafuna Mosi, amfunela kumbulala. Kodvwa Mosi wabaleka eveni laFaro wayawuhlala eveni lakaMidiyani. Ngalelinye lilanga, Mosi ahleti eceleni kwesicobho," 
Exodus2:16 kwase kufika emantfombatana lasikhombisa emphristi wakaMidiyani. Lamantfombatana abetewugcwalisa emanti emikhunjini, khona kutewunatsiswa imihlambi yetimvu neyetimbuti teyise." 
Exodus2:17 Kwase kufika labanye belusi bawacosha lamantfombatana, kodvwa Mosi wesuka wawalamlela lamantfombatana ngekunatsisa lomhlambi wawo." 
Exodus2:18 Atsi nakefika ekhaya kuyise, Rehuweli, watsi: “Lamuhla kwentiwe yini kutsi nisheshe kangaka kubuya?”" 
Exodus2:19 Amphendvula atsi: “Kukhona umGibhithe losivikele kubelusi, wadzimate wasikhelela nemanti ekunatsisa umhlambi.”" 
Exodus2:20 Wawabuta watsi: “Uphi kepha lomGibhithe? Nimshiyeleni? Hambani nimlandze ete lapha ekhaya atewutfola lokudliwako.” 
Exodus2:21 Ngako Mosi wavuma kuhlala ekhaya kalendvodza. Rehuweli wamendzisela intfombi yakakhe lekwakunguSiphora. 
Exodus2:22 Watala indvodzana, Mosi wayetsa libito watsi nguGeshomu, ngobe abetsi: “Ngisihambi kulelive.”" 
Exodus2:23 Emvakweminyaka leminyenti Faro waseGibhithe wafa. Ema-Israyeli abubula ngalokugcilatwa kwawo, akhala kuNkulunkulu acela lusito. Kukhala kwawo kwenyuka kwefika kuNkulunkulu." 
Exodus2:24 Nkulunkulu wakuva kububula kwawo, wase uyasikhumbula sivumelwane sakhe lasenta ku-Abrahama, naku-Isaka, nakuJakobe." 
Exodus2:25 Ngako Nkulunkulu wababuka bantfwana baka-Israyeli, wabanaka." 
Exodus3:1 Kwatsi ngalelinye lilanga Mosi eluse umhlambi wetimvu netimbuti teyisetala, Jethro, labengumphristi wakaMidiyani, asachuba lomhlambi weyisetala ayakuwelusela ngesheya kwelihlane, wadzimate wefika eHorebe, intsaba yaNkulunkulu." 
Exodus3:2 Ingilosi yaSimakadze yabonakala kuye iselangabini lemlilo ekhatsi nekhatsi esihlahleni. Watsi uyabuka, wabona lesihlahla sivutsa kodvwa singashi." 
Exodus3:3 Mosi wakhuluma watsi: “Ase ngiphambuke ngitewubona lesihlahla kutsi, njengobe naku siyavutsa, asishi ngani?”" 
Exodus3:4 Simakadze watsi kube abone kutsi Mosi uyaphambukela kutewubona, wamemeta watsi: “Mosi! Ye Mosi!” Mosi wasabela watsi: “Ngilapha!”" 
Exodus3:5 Nkulunkulu watsi: “Ungasasondzeli, khumula tincabule takho, ngobe lendzawo lome kuyo ingumhlabatsi longcwele." 
Exodus3:6 NginguNkulunkulu wabokhokho bakho: Nkulunkulu wa-Abrahama, naNkulunkulu wa-Isaka, naNkulunkulu waJakobe.” Mosi wambonya buso bakhe, ngobe esaba kubukana naNkulunkulu." 
Exodus3:7 Simakadze wakhuluma watsi: “Sengikubone ngempela kuhlushwa kwebantfu bami labaseGibhithe. Sengikuvile nekukhala kwabo ngekucindzetelwa nguletindvuna tabo temisebenti. Ngiyakwati kuhlupheka kwabo. 
Exodus3:8 Ngako-ke sengehlile kutebakhulula esandleni semaGibhithe nekubakhipha eveni laseGibhithe, ngibayise eveni lelibanti nalelivundzile, lelinelubisi neluju lwetinyosi. Lelive liyindzawo yemaKhenani, nemaHethi, nema-Amori, nemaPheresi, nemaHivi, nemaJebhusi." 
Exodus3:9 Sengikuvile kukhala kwebantfu bami, sengikubonile nalokucindzetelwa kwabo ngemaGibhithe." 
Exodus3:10 Kota ngitekutfumela kuFaro, kutsi uyewukhulula bantfu bami, emadvodzana a-Israyeli, ubakhiphe eveni laseGibhithe.”" 
Exodus3:11 Mosi wakhuluma kuNkulunkulu, watsi: “Ngingubani mine kutsi ngingaya kuFaro, ngiyewukhipha ema-Israyeli eGibhithe?”" 
Exodus3:12 Nkulunkulu watsi: “Mine, ngitawuba nawe. Nasi-ke sibonakaliso loyawubona ngaso kutsi ngimi lona lokutfumile: Kuyawutsi nase ubakhiphile bantfu bami eGibhithe, bese niyeta nifike ningikhonte kulentsaba.”" 
Exodus3:13 Mosi wakhuluma kuNkulunkulu, watsi: “Nangifika kuma-Israyeli ngitsi kubo: ‘Nkulunkulu waboyihlomkhulu ungitfume kini,’ bese bangibuta batsi: ‘Ngubani libito lakhe?’ ngiyawubaphendvula ngitsini?”" 
Exodus3:14 Nkulunkulu watsi kuMosi: “Nginguye Lenginguye. Nguloko loyawubatjela kona baka-Israyeli, utsi: ‘Nginguye ungitfumile.’ ”" 
Exodus3:15 Nkulunkulu waphindze watsi kuMosi: “Ubokhuluma kuma-Israyeli utsi: ‘Simakadze, Nkulunkulu wabokhokho benu, naNkulunkulu wabo-Abrahama, naNkulunkulu wa-Isaka, naNkulunkulu waJakobe, ungitfume kini.’ Leli-ke libito lami phakadze naphakadze, tonkhe titukulwane tiyawungibita kanjalo." 
Exodus3:16 Hamba uhlanganise baholi bema-Israyeli ndzawonye ukhulume kubo utsi: ‘Simakadze, Nkulunkulu waboyihlomkhulu, Nkulunkulu wabo-Abrahama, na-Isaka, naJakobe, ubonakele kimi, watsi: “Sengikubonile konkhe lokwentiwa ngemaGibhithe kini." 
Exodus3:17 Sengincumile kutsi ngitanikhipha ekuhluphekeni kwenu kwaseGibhithe nginimikise eveni lemaKhenani, nemaHethi, nema-Amori, nemaPheresi, nemaHivi, nemaJebhusi, live leligcwele lubisi, neluju lwetinyosi.” ’" 
Exodus3:18 “Bantfu bami batakulalela loko lokushoko. Wena-ke nebaholi bema-Israyeli nitawube seniya kuFaro, inkhosi yaseGibhithe, nifike nitsi: ‘Simakadze, Nkulunkulu wemaHebheru uhlangene natsi. Sicela kutsi usikhulule sitsatse luhambo lwemalanga lamatsatfu siye ehlane, kuze siyekwenta umhlatjelo kuSimakadze longuNkulunkulu wetfu.’" 
Exodus3:19 Ngiyati kutsi Faro, inkhosi yaseGibhithe, angeke anivumele ngaphandle kwekutsi avunyiswe sandla lesinemandla." 
Exodus3:20 Ngiyakwelula sandla sami ngishaye iGibhithe ngetinhlupheko letinyenti lengiyawutenta kuyo. Emvakwaloko-ke uyawube sewuyanivumela kutsi nihambe. 
Exodus3:21 “Ngiyakwenta emaGibhithe kutsi anihloniphe anentele sisa, kuze kutsi nase niphuma, ningahambi ningakaphatsi lutfo." 
Exodus3:22 Wonkhe longumfati wem-Israyeli uyawucela kumakhelwane wakhe, acele nome ngukumuphi umfati lohlala ekhaya kakhe kutsi amuphe timphahla tekwembatsa kanye nemihlobiso yesiliva neyegolide. Emadvodzana kanye nemadvodzakati enu ayawuhamba nato letintfo; niyakuwaphundla kanjalo-ke emaGibhithe.”" 
Exodus4:1 Mosi waphendvula Nkulunkulu watsi: “Ngitawutsini, nangitawutsi ngiyabatjela labantfu bangete bangikholwa bangangilaleli nekungilalela bangitjele batsi: ‘Nkulunkulu akaze abonakale kuwe’?”" 
Exodus4:2 Simakadze wambuta watsi: “Yini lena lesesandleni sakho?” Waphendvula watsi: “Yindvuku.” 
Exodus4:3 Simakadze watsi: “Yijike phansi.” Mosi wayijika phansi, yagucuka lendvuku yaba yinyoka. Mosi wayibalekela." 
Exodus4:4 Simakadze watsi kuMosi: “Yelula sandla sakho uyibambe ngemsila.” Ngako Mosi welula sandla sakhe wayibamba ngemsila, yagucuka yaba yindvuku futsi esandleni sakhe." 
Exodus4:5 Simakadze wachubeka watsi: “Uyakwenta loko-ke embikwema-Israyeli kuze akukholwe kutsi Simakadze, Nkulunkulu waboyihlomkhulu, Nkulunkulu wa-Abrahama, na-Isaka, naJakobe, utibonakalisile kuwe.”" 
Exodus4:6 Simakadze wachubeka wakhuluma kuMosi watsi: “Faka sandla sakho esifubeni sakho.” Mosi wenta njalo; watsi uyasikhipha sandla, saphuma sesinebulephelo, sesimhlophe njengangcocwane." 
Exodus4:7 Nkulunkulu wase utsi: “Phindza futsi usifake esifubeni sakho sandla sakho.” Mosi waphindza futsi wasifaka esifubeni; watsi uyasikhipha, saphuma sesite bulephelo, sesifana nemtimba wakhe wonkhe." 
Exodus4:8 Nkulunkulu wachubeka watsi: “Nabangakukholwa nome bangasikholwa lesibonakaliso sekucala, lesi sesibili sitawubenta bakukholwe." 
Exodus4:9 Nangabe abatikholwa totimbili letibonakaliso bangakwemukeli naloko lokushoko, ubokha emanti emfuleni iNayili uwatsele emhlabatsini lowomile. Lamanti ayawugucuka abe yingati.”" 
Exodus4:10 Kodvwa Mosi watsi kuSimakadze: “Awu, Simakadze! Mine angisilo libeka ekukhulumeni; ngiyehluleka kukhuluma kahle seloku ngaba khona, nanyalo seloku ngicalile kukhuluma nawe. Ngikhuluma nginamule, kantsi futsi ngiyangingita.”" 
Exodus4:11 Simakadze watsi kuye: “Ngubani lowanika umuntfu umlomo? Ngubani lowenta umuntfu abe simungulu, nome sihhulu? Ngubani lowenta umuntfu abone nome abe yimphumphutse? Akusimi yini, mine Simakadze?" 
Exodus4:12 Hamba nyalo! Ngiyawukusita nase ukhuluma, ngikutjele kutsi utawukhuluma utsini.”" 
Exodus4:13 Kodvwa Mosi waphendvula watsi: “Awu, Nkhosi! Ngicela umane utfume lomunye.”" 
Exodus4:14 Nkulunkulu watfukutselela Mosi kakhulu, watsi: “Unjani-ke umnakenu Aroni longumLevi? Ngiyati kutsi ulibeka ekukhulumeni. Empeleni sewusendleleni utekuhlangabeta, utawujabula kakhulu enhlitiyweni yakhe nakakubona." 
Exodus4:15 Wena-ke ubokhuluma naye umtjele onkhe emagama lofanele kuwasho. Ngiyawunisita nobabili ekukhulumeni, nginitjele kutsi kufanele nenteni." 
Exodus4:16 Nguye lotakukhulumela kubantfu, abe ngumlomo wakho, wena ube njengaNkulunkulu kuye." 
Exodus4:17 Kodvwa ubotsatsa lendvuku yakho uhambe nayo utakwenta ngayo imimangaliso.” 
Exodus4:18 Mosi wabuyela kuJethro, uyisetala, watsi kuye: “Ngicela umane ungivumele ngibuyele eGibhithe, ngiyewuhlola bantfu bakitsi kutsi basekhona yini labasaphila.” Jethro wamvumela, wamvalelisa kahle watsi: “Hamba, ngikufisela inhlanhla lenhle.”" 
Exodus4:19 Mosi asekaMidiyani, Simakadze abeke wakhuluma watsi: “Ncandzeka ubuyele eGibhithe, ngobe bonkhe labo bebafuna kukubulala sebafile.”" 
Exodus4:20 Ngako Mosi watsatsa umkakhe nemadvodzana akhe wabagibelisa embongolweni, wahamba wabuyela eGibhithe. Esandleni sakhe Mosi abephetse lendvuku yaNkulunkulu." 
Exodus4:21 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi: “Nase ubuyele eGibhithe, ucaphele kutsi uyente embikwaFaro yonkhe lemimangaliso lengikunike emandla ekuyenta. Kodvwa ngiyawuyenta ibe lukhuni inhlitiyo yaFaro, ngako angeke asivumele sive sami kutsi sihambe." 
Exodus4:22 Ubokhuluma kuFaro utsi: ‘Simakadze utsi: Israyeli litubulo lami. 
Exodus4:23 Ngikutjelile ngatsi: “Khulula indvodzana yami kuze ingikhonte,” kodvwa wena walile kuyikhulula. Ngako-ke ngitawubulala indvodzana yakho yematubulo.’ ”" 
Exodus4:24 Kwatsi asesendleleni leya eGibhithe, ahleti ethendeni aphumula, Simakadze wafuna kubulala Mosi." 
Exodus4:25 Siphora watsatsa litje lelikhaliphako wajuba lijwabu lendvodzana yakhe, walidzaceka etinyaweni taMosi watsi: “Impela wena ungumyeni wami wengati.”" 
Exodus4:26 Ngaloko Nkulunkulu wase uyamyekela loMosi emvakwekuba Siphora asatsite: “Wena ungumyeni wami wengati” ngekwelisiko lekusoka. 
Exodus4:27 Simakadze wakhuluma ku-Aroni, watsi: “Hamba uye ehlane uyewuhlangabeta Mosi.” Ngako-ke Aroni wahamba waya kuyawuhlangabeta Mosi entsabeni yaNkulunkulu, wafike wamanga." 
Exodus4:28 Ngako Mosi watjela Aroni konkhe Simakadze labemtfume kona, wamlandzisa nangaletimangaliso abemnikete tona kutsi atente." 
Exodus4:29 BoMosi na-Aroni bahamba bafike bahlanganisa bonkhe baholi bema-Israyeli. 
Exodus4:30 Aroni wabatjela konkhe Nkulunkulu labekukhulumile kuMosi. Mosi wabakhombisa naletibonakaliso labetinikwe nguNkulunkulu. 
Exodus4:31 Ngako bakholwa. Batsi kube beve kutsi Simakadze ubanakile nekutsi abesakubonile kuhlupheka kwabo, bakhotsamisa tinhloko tabo bakhonta Simakadze." 
Exodus5:1 Emvakwaloko boMosi na-Aroni bahamba baya kuFaro, bafike batsi: “Simakadze longuNkulunkulu wema-Israyeli utsi: ‘Khulula sive sami sihambe, siyewungentela sibhimbi sekungidvumisa ehlane.’ ”" 
Exodus5:2 Faro wabuta watsi: “Ungubani yena lowo Simakadze, kutsi mine ngingalalela livi lakhe, ngikhulule ema-Israyeli kutsi ahambe? Angimati lowo Simakadze, futsi ngingeke ngisikhulule sive sema-Israyeli kutsi sihambe.”" 
Exodus5:3 BoMosi na-Aroni bamphendvula batsi: “Nkulunkulu wemaHebheru uhlangene natsi. Sivumele kutsi sitsatse luhambo lwemalanga lamatsatfu, siye ehlane, siyewunikela ngemhlatjelo kuSimakadze longuNkulunkulu wetfu; ngobe nasingakwenti loko, utasishaya ngesifo lesingelapheki nome asibulale ngemphi.”" 
Exodus5:4 Kodvwa lenkhosi yaseGibhithe yatsi kubo: “Nine Mosi, nawe Aroni, labantfu nibayekeliseleni umsebenti wabo? Buyelani emsebentini wenu nine.”" 
Exodus5:5 Wachubeka Faro watsi: “Ase nibuke nje, labantfu sebanyenti kakhulu lapha eveni. Nyalo senibayekelisa lemitfwalo yabo!”" 
Exodus5:6 Ngalo lelo langa Faro wanika tindvuna nebashayeli bakakhe imitsetfo yemisebenti, watsi:" 
Exodus5:7 “Labantfu ningabobe nisabaletsela tjani bekufoloma titini, njengobe benenta. Kodvwa babosale sebatifunela bona tjani." 
Exodus5:8 Kodvwa nome kunjalo, lesitoko sabo setitini lekufanele batifolome ngelilanga singehliswa, ngobe mncane kakhulu lomsebenti labawentako; bayavilapha, ngiko nje balibele kukhonona ngekutsi: ‘Sikhulule siyewunikela ngemhlatjelo kuNkulunkulu wetfu.’" 
Exodus5:9 Wengetele umsebenti lomnyenti lamadvodza atewusebenta angacedzi, kuze ayekele lokulibala ngemanga.”" 
Exodus5:10 Ngako-ke bashayeli netindvuna takakhe tabuyela kuma-Israyeli, tafike tatsi kuwo: “Utsi Faro: ‘Ngingeke ngisaninika tjani bekufoloma." 
Exodus5:11 Tifuneleni nine tjani nome ngukuphi lapho ningabutfola khona; kodvwa sitoko semsebenti wenu singeke sincishiswe.’ ” 
Exodus5:12 Ngako-ke ema-Israyeli asakateka nalo lonkhe live laseGibhithe afunana netjani. 
Exodus5:13 Bashayeli bawo betama kuwacindzetela, batsi: “Cedzani umsebenti wenu wesitoko selilanga ngelilanga, kufanane nje nangesikhatsi tjani nisabuletselwa.”" 
Exodus5:14 Tindvuna tema-Israyeli letatibekwe bashayeli baFaro tabhanjabulwa tabutwa kutsi: “Kuye ngani kutsi ningasenti sitoko semsebenti wekufoloma titini itolo nome lamuhla njengawo onkhe emalanga?” 
Exodus5:15 Tindvuna tema-Israyeli takhala, tashuca taya kuFaro, tafike tatsi: “Hhawu, nkhosi! Utiphatselani kanjena letinceku takho?" 
Exodus5:16 Tinceku takho atisanikwa nakunikwa tjani, kodvwa kusajinge kutsiwe: ‘Folomani titini.’ Tinceku takho tiyabhanjabulwa, kantsi licala likulabantfu bakho.”" 
Exodus5:17 Faro wabaphendvula watsi: “Niyavilapha! Anifuni kusebenta! Ngiko nilibele kutsi: ‘Sicela mane sihambe siyewunikela ngemihlatjelo kuSimakadze.’ 
Exodus5:18 Ncandzekani nibuyele emsebentini wenu! Akunatjani nitabuniketwa la, kodvwa kusafuneka nente leso sitoko setitini lenanisenta nisaletselwa tjani.”" 
Exodus5:19 Tindvuna tema-Israyeli tavele tabona kutsi tisenhluphekweni nakutsiwa: “Akufanele lesitoko setitini sehle kulelinani benilifoloma nisaletselwa tjani.” 
Exodus5:20 Tatsi tindvuna natisuka lapho kuFaro, tahlangana naboMosi na-Aroni lababevele bemele tona." 
Exodus5:21 Takhuluma kuboMosi na-Aroni tatsi: “Shangatsi Simakadze angakubona loko lesenikwentile, anijezise, ngobe senente liphunga letfu lenyanyeka kuFaro nakutiphatsimandla takhe. Senibahlomisile kuze kutsi basibulale kalula.”" 
Exodus5:22 Mosi wabuyela kuSimakadze, watsi: “Awu, Simakadze, ubaphatselani ngesihluku labantfu bakho? Wangitfumelani la?" 
Exodus5:23 Seloku ngicalile kuya kuFaro kuyewukhuluma egameni lakho, ubaphatse ngesihluku labantfu. Kute nelusito lolwentile kubalamulela kulenhlupheko.”" 
Exodus6:1 Simakadze watsi kuMosi: “Utawubona-ke nyalo lengitakwenta kuFaro. Utabakhulula bantfu bami bahambe ngenca yesandla lesinemandla; yebo, ngenca yesandla sami lesinemandla uyawubacosha besuke eveni lakhe.”" 
Exodus6:2 Nkulunkulu wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi: “NginguSimakadze." 
Exodus6:3 Ngabonakala ku-Abrahama, naku-Isaka, nakuJakobe kutsi nginguNkulunkulu Somandla, kodvwa angizange ngibatise lelibito lami lelingcwele, Simakadze." 
Exodus6:4 Ngaphindze ngenta sivumelwane sami kanye nabo, ngabetsembisa kutsi ngiyawubanika live laseKhenani, lapho babehlala khona njengetihambi." 
Exodus6:5 Ngikuvile, futsi, kububula nekukhala kwesive sami ema-Israyeli lagcilatwe ngemaGibhithe; ngisikhumbulile sivumelwane sami." 
Exodus6:6 Ngako-ke tjela ema-Israyeli utsi: ‘NginguSimakadze; ngitanikhulula kulokugcilatwa kwenu ngemaGibhithe. Ngengalo yami leyelulekile nangetento temandla lengiyawubajezisa ngato ngiyawunephula kubo. 
Exodus6:7 Ngitanenta nibe sive sami, mine ngibe nguNkulunkulu wenu. Nine-ke niyawungati kutsi nginguSimakadze longuNkulunkulu wenu lowanikhipha ngaphansi kwelijoko laseGibhithe." 
Exodus6:8 Ngitaningenisa eveni njengobe ngafunga ngekuphakamisa tandla kutsi ngitalinika bo-Abrahama, na-Isaka, naJakobe. Ngitanipha lona libe live lenu. NginguSimakadze.’ ”" 
Exodus6:9 Mosi wawatjela loko ema-Israyeli, kodvwa akazange amlalele, ngobe umoya wawo wawephulwe sihluku nekugcilatwa kwawo." 
Exodus6:10 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi:" 
Exodus6:11 “Hamba utjele Faro, inkhosi yaseGibhithe, kutsi akakhulule ema-Israyeli aphume kulelive lakhe.”" 
Exodus6:12 Kodvwa Mosi waphendvula Simakadze, watsi: “Ingani ema-Israyeli akangilaleli; pho, Faro angangilalela kanjani? Angisilo libeka ekukhulumeni.”" 
Exodus6:13 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi na-Aroni, watsi: “Tjelani ema-Israyeli naFaro, inkhosi yaseGibhithe, kutsi nginitfume kutsi nihole ema-Israyeli aphume eGibhithe.”" 
Exodus6:14 Laba-ke baholi betive tabo: Emadvodzana aRubeni, labelitubulo la-Israyeli: bekuboHanoki, naPhalu, naHesroni, naKhami; leyo-ke bekungimindeni yakaRubeni." 
Exodus6:15 Emadvodzana aSimeyoni bekuboJemuweli, naJamini, na-Ohadi, naJakhini, naSohari, naShawula, indvodzana yemKhenanikati; leyo-ke bekungimindeni yakaSimeyoni." 
Exodus6:16 Lawa ngemabito emadvodzana aLevi: bekuboGeshoni, naKhohati, naMerari; leyo-ke bekungimindeni yakaLevi. Levi waphila wadzimate waba neminyaka leli-137 budzala." 
Exodus6:17 Emadvodzana aGeshoni, ngemindeni yayo, bekuboLibni naShimeyi." 
Exodus6:18 Emadvodzana aKhohati bekubo-Amramu, naJisihari, naHebroni, na-Uziyeli. Khohati waphila wadzimate waba neminyaka leli-133 budzala." 
Exodus6:19 Emadvodzana aMerari bekuboMahali naMushi. Leyo-ke bekungimindeni yakaLevi kanye netitukulwane tayo. 
Exodus6:20 Amramu watsatsa Jokhebedi, labengudzadzewaboyise; wamtalela Aroni naMosi. Amramu waphila wadzimate waba neminyaka leli-137 budzala." 
Exodus6:21 Emadvodzana aJisihari bekuboKhora, naNefegi, naZikhri." 
Exodus6:22 Emadvodzana a-Uziyeli bekuboMishayeli, na-Elsafani, naSithri." 
Exodus6:23 Aroni watsatsa Elisheba, indvodzakati ya-Aminadabi, dzadzewaboNasoni. Wamtalela Nadabi, na-Abihu, na-Eleyazare, na-Ithamari." 
Exodus6:24 Emadvodzana aKhora bekubo-Asiri, na-Elkhana, na-Abiyasafa; leyo-ke bekungimindeni yakaKhora." 
Exodus6:25 Eleyazare, umsa wa-Aroni, watsatsa indvodzakati yaPhutiyeli; wamtalela Finehasi. Ngito leti-ke tinhloko tetindlu temaLevi ngemindeni yato." 
Exodus6:26 Bo-Aroni naMosi ngibo lakhuluma kubo Simakadze, watsi: “Khiphani sive sema-Israyeli onkhe eveni laseGibhithe.”" 
Exodus6:27 Ngibo lababekhuluma naFaro, inkhosi yaseGibhithe, kutsi akakhulule sive sema-Israyeli siphume eGibhithe." 
Exodus6:28 Mhlazana Nkulunkulu akhuluma kuMosi aseveni laseGibhithe," 
Exodus6:29 watsi: “NginguSimakadze. Tjela Faro, inkhosi yaseGibhithe, konkhe loko lengikutjela kona.”" 
Exodus6:30 Kodvwa Mosi waphendvula Nkulunkulu watsi: “Nawe uyati kutsi angisilo libeka ekukhulumeni; pho, Faro angangilalela kanjani?”" 
Exodus7:1 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi: “Buka la, wena ngitakwenta ufane naNkulunkulu kuFaro; Aroni, umnakenu, yena abe ngumphrofethi wakho." 
Exodus7:2 Wena utawutjela Aroni konkhe loko lengikuyale ngako; yena-ke utabe sewutjela Faro kutsi akhulule sive sami, ema-Israyeli, siphume eveni lakhe." 
Exodus7:3 Kodvwa ngitayenta ibe lukhuni inhlitiyo yaFaro, nome ngingaze ngente tibonakaliso netimangaliso letinyenti la eveni laseGibhithe." 
Exodus7:4 Faro angeke anilalele, ngako-ke ngiyakwehlisela sandla sami eGibhithe, ngiyijezise kabuhlungu, ngikhiphe sive sami, bantfwana baka-Israyeli, eGibhithe." 
Exodus7:5 EmaGibhithe ngulapho ayawungati khona kutsi nginguSimakadze, nase ngelule sandla sami ngikhulula ema-Israyeli emkhatsini wawo.”" 
Exodus7:6 BoMosi na-Aroni benta njengobe babeyalwe nguSimakadze. 
Exodus7:7 Mosi abesaneminyaka lengema-80, kantsi Aroni abesaneminyaka lengema-83, nabakhulumisana naFaro." 
Exodus7:8 Simakadze wakhuluma kuboMosi na-Aroni, watsi:" 
Exodus7:9 “Faro nakatsi: ‘Ase nente ummangaliso lotanifakazela,’ ubotsi ku-Aroni: ‘Tsatsa indvuku yakho uyijike phansi embikwaFaro, itawugucuka ibe yinyoka.’ ”" 
Exodus7:10 Ngako-ke boMosi na-Aroni baya kuFaro befike benta njengobe Nkulunkulu abebayalile. Aroni wajika indvuku yakhe phansi embikwaFaro netiphatsimandla takhe, indvuku yagucuka yaba yinyoka." 
Exodus7:11 Faro wabita tihlakaniphi kanye nalabalumbako bakakhe. Nabo labalumbi baseGibhithe bakwenta loko ngemilingo yabo. 
Exodus7:12 Nabo batijika phansi tindvuku tabo, tagucuka taba tinyoka. Kodvwa indvuku ya-Aroni yatimita tonkhe leti letinye tindvuku." 
Exodus7:13 Inhlitiyo yaFaro yajinge yaba lukhuni, akazange abalalele, njengobe Simakadze abeshito." 
Exodus7:14 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi: “Inhlitiyo yaFaro seyilukhuni, uyala kukhulula labantfu kutsi bahambe." 
Exodus7:15 Hamba uye kuFaro ekuseni ngesikhatsi aya emfuleni iNayili, ubommela elusentseni lwayo. Uboyiphatsa lendvuku leyagucuka yaba yinyoka."
