Leviticus1:3 Nangabe anikela ngesilwane kutsi sibe ngumnikelo wekushiswa, kufanele aletse inkunzana lengenasiyela. Kufanele ayinikelele ekungeneni kwelithende lekuhlangana, khona Simakadze atewumemukela." 
Leviticus1:4 Lowo muntfu uyawubeka sandla sakhe etikwenhloko yalomnikelo wekushiswa, khona-ke utawube sewuyemukelwa egameni lakhe kutsi umentele inhlawulo yekubuyisana." 
Leviticus1:5 Lenkunzana utawube sewuyayihlaba embikwaSimakadze, bese-ke baphristi labangemadvodzana a-Aroni, batsatsa lengati bayinikela kuSimakadze bayifafate yonkhe emngcengcemeni welilati ndzawo tonkhe lapha ekungeneni kwelithende lekuhlangana." 
Leviticus1:6 Utawube sewuyayihlinza lenkunzana, bese uyayihlahlela ibe ngemacatsa." 
Leviticus1:7 Emadvodzana a-Aroni, umphristi, alungise tinkhuni letisetikwelilati bese ayatokhela." 
Leviticus1:8 Emadvodzana a-Aroni, baphristi, babowahlela lamacatsa kanye nenhloko nemanoni alomhlatjelo etikwetinkhuni letisetikwelilati." 
Leviticus1:9 Lomuntfu kufanele ageze loku kwangekhatsi nemilente; umphristi bese ushisa wonkhe lomhlatjelo etikwelilati. Loku kungumnikelo wekushiswa, umnikelo lowentiwa ngemlilo, liphunga lelinuka lusi lolumnandzi kuSimakadze." 
Leviticus1:10 “Nangabe anikela ngemvu nome ngembuti kutsi ibe ngumnikelo wekushiswa, kufanele kube sihhanca nome siwewe lesingenasiyela." 
Leviticus1:11 Utawube sewusibulalela ngasenyakatfo yelilati embikwaSimakadze; emadvodzana a-Aroni, baphristi, lengati atawube asayifafata emngcengcemeni welilati ndzawo tonkhe." 
Leviticus1:12 Lomuntfu utawutsi angayibulala ayihlahlele, umphristi bese uhlela onkhe lamacatsa, nenhloko kanye nemanoni ayo etikwetinkhuni letivutsako letiselatini." 
Leviticus1:13 Lomuntfu kufanele ageze loku kwangekhatsi kwayo nemilente yayo; umphristi bese ushisa wonkhe lomhlatjelo etikwelilati. Loku kungumnikelo wekushiswa, umnikelo lowentiwa ngemlilo, liphunga lelinuka lusi lolumnandzi kuSimakadze." 
Leviticus1:14 “Nangabe umuntfu anikela ngetinyoni kutsi tibe ngumhlatjelo wekushiswa, kufanele kube lituba nome lizini lelivukutfu." 
Leviticus1:15 Umphristi utalinikela elatini ngekutsi ashwile lenhloko yalo bese uyishisela etikwelilati. Lengati yalo ayiphomphisele eceleni kwelilati. 
Leviticus1:16 Abosusa ingingila nekwangekhatsi kwayo akulahle ngasemphumalanga nelilati, lapho kulahlwa khona umlotsa." 
Leviticus1:17 Utalibamba ngetimphiko totimbili alidzabule ekhatsi ngaphandle kwekuhluphula timphiko talo, bese ulishisa lonkhe etikwetinkhuni letivutsako letiselatini. Loku kungumnikelo wekushiswa, umnikelo lowentiwa ngemlilo, liphunga lelinuka lusi lolumnandzi kuSimakadze.”" 
Leviticus2:1 “Nangabe umuntfu aletsa kuSimakadze umnikelo walokutinhlavu, kufanele kube yimphuphu lecolisakele. Kufanele afake emafutsa emncumo kanye nemphepho," 
Leviticus2:2 bese ukuletsa kumadvodzana a-Aroni labaphristi. Umphristi utawukha libinta lemphuphu kanye nemafutsa emncumo, nemphepho yawo yonkhe akushisele etikwelilati kube sikhumbuto, umnikelo lowentiwa ngemlilo, kube liphunga lelinuka lusi lolumnandzi kuSimakadaze." 
Leviticus2:3 Yonkhe lemphuphu lesele itawuba ya-Aroni nemadvodzana akhe; ingcwele, ngobe itsetfwe ekudleni bekunikelwe ngemlilo kuSimakadze." 
Leviticus2:4 “Nangabe uletsa umnikelo walokutinhlavu longumpotongwane lophekiwe, kufanele kube ngulote imbiliso, lowentiwe ngafulaha wabhicwa nemafutsa emncumo nome-ke kube ngimicatsane legcotjiswe ngalawo mafutsa." 
Leviticus2:5 “Nangabe lomnikelo walokutinhlavu utfoswa ngelikesi, kufanele wentiwe ngafulaha lobhicwe nemafutsa emncumo kodvwa kubete imbiliso lefakwako." 
Leviticus2:6 Kufanele uhleshulwe ube ticucu bese utselwa ngemafutsa. Lowo-ke ngumnikelo walokutinhlavu. 
Leviticus2:7 “Nangabe lomnikelo walokutinhlavu uphekwe ngelibhodo, kufanele wentiwe ngafulaha nemafutsa emncumo." 
Leviticus2:8 Uboletsa kuSimakadze lomnikelo walokutinhlavu lowentiwe ngaleto tintfo, uwetfule kumphristi kucala, yena-ke utawumikisa elatini." 
Leviticus2:9 Umphristi utawutsatsa licashana lawo libe sikhumbuto bese ulishisela elatini, kube ngumnikelo lowentiwa ngemlilo, liphunga lelinuka lusi lolumnandzi kuSimakadze." 
Leviticus2:10 Incenye yawo lesele iyawuba sabelo sa-Aroni nemadvodzana akhe; ingcwele kakhulu ngobe itsetfwe emnikelweni lowentiwa ngemlilo kuSimakadze. 
Leviticus2:11 “Konkhe lokutinhlavu lokunikelwa kuSimakadze akuyiwufakwa imbiliso; ningacali nikufake imbiliso nome luju lwetinyosi kuloko lokunikelwa kuSimakadze ngemlilo. 
Leviticus2:12 Niyawukuletsa kuSimakadze njengemnikelo losivuno sekwendvulelisa, kodvwa ngeke sishiselwe elatini kutsi sibe liphunga lelinuka lusi lolumnandzi kuye." 
Leviticus2:13 Wonkhe umnikelo wenu walokutinhlavu nibowuvanga ngeluswayi. Ningacali nilushiye luswayi lwesivumelwane saNkulunkulu eminikelweni yenu yalokutinhlavu. Kufanele niyifake luswayi yonkhe iminikelo yenu. 
Leviticus2:14 Nawuletsa umnikelo walokutinhlavu wesivuno sekwendvulelisa kuSimakadze, ubonikela ngako kulukhotse." 
Leviticus2:15 Ubengeta emafutsa emncumo kanye nemphepho; lowo ngumnikelo walokutinhlavu. 
Leviticus2:16 Umphristi uyawushisa incenye yalokutinhlavu ibe sikhumbuto, ayishise kanye nemafutsa, nemphepho; loko-ke ngumnikelo lowentiwa ngemlilo kuSimakadze.”" 
Leviticus3:1 “Nangabe kukhona lonikela ngenkhomo kutsi ibe ngumnikelo wekuthula, kufanele kube yinkunzana nome sitfokati lesingenasiyela, awetfule embikwaSimakadze." 
Leviticus3:2 Lowo muntfu uyawubeka sandla sakhe etikwenhloko yalomnikelo wakhe, bese uwubulalela ekungeneni kwelithende lekuhlangana. Emadvodzana a-Aroni labaphristi ayawufafata ngalengati emngcengcemeni walelilati alitungelete ndzawo tonkhe." 
Leviticus3:3 Emnikelweni wekuthula utawuletsa umhlatjelo lowentiwa ngemlilo kuSimakadze: emanoni lembese kwangekhatsi kanye nemanoni lahlanganisa loku kwangekhatsi," 
Leviticus3:4 netinso totimbili, nemanoni lakuto, nemanoni lembese sibindzi, nalawo latawusuka kanye nato." 
Leviticus3:5 Emadvodzana a-Aroni atawushisa konkhe loko elatini kanye neminikelo yekushiswa etikwetinkhuni temlilo. Kungumnikelo lowentiwa ngemlilo, liphunga lelinuka lusi lolumnandzi kuSimakadze." 
Leviticus3:6 “Nangabe yimvu nome yimbuti lena lesetjentiswa emnikelweni wekuthula, ingaba yindvuna nome ibe yinsikati, kodvwa kufanele kube ngulengenasiyela." 
Leviticus3:7 Nangabe umuntfu anikela ngemvu, kufanele ayetfule kuSimakadze," 
Leviticus3:8 bese ubeka sandla sakhe etikwenhloko yalomnikelo, ayibulalele embikwelithende lekuhlangana. Emadvodzana a-Aroni ayawufafata lengati emngcengcemeni walelilati alitungelete ndzawo tonkhe." 
Leviticus3:9 Kulomnikelo wekuthula kufanele aletse umhlatjelo lowentiwa ngemlilo kuSimakadze: emanoni nemsila wonkhe ngekunona kwawo usikwe ekugcineni kwemgogodla, nemanoni alokungekhatsi," 
Leviticus3:10 netinso totimbili, nemanoni lakuto nasematsebeni, nemanoni lembese sibindzi latawusuka kanye netinso." 
Leviticus3:11 Umphristi utakushisela etikwelilati njengekudla, kube ngumnikelo lowentiwa ngemlilo kuSimakadze." 
Leviticus3:12 “Nangabe umuntfu anikela ngembuti, kufanele ayetfule kuSimakadze," 
Leviticus3:13 uyawubeka sandla sakhe etikwenhloko yayo ayibulalele embikwelithende lekuhlangana. Emadvodzana a-Aroni atawube asafafata lengati emngcengcemeni walelilati alitungelete ndzawo tonkhe. 
Leviticus3:14 Kulomnikelo naku-ke latakunikela kube ngumnikelo lowentiwa ngemlilo kuSimakadze: emanoni lembese kwangekhatsi nawo onkhe lanamatsele kuko," 
Leviticus3:15 netinso totimbili, nemanoni lakuto nasematsebeni, nemanoni lembese sibindzi, nalawo latawusuka kanye netinso." 
Leviticus3:16 Umphristi utawube sewushisa konkhe loku elatini kube ngumnikelo wemlilo, liphunga lelinuka lusi lolumnandzi. Onkhe emanoni ngewaSimakadze." 
Leviticus3:17 Lona kutawuba ngumtsetfo wetitukulwane ngetitukulwane tenu, nome ngukuphi lapho niyawuhlala khona: kubete lodla emanoni nengati.”" 
Leviticus4:1 Simakadze wayala Mosi watsi: 
Leviticus4:2 “Tjela sive sema-Israyeli utsi: ‘Nangabe umuntfu onile wephula nome ngangumuphi wemiyalo yaSimakadze, angakacondzi, kufanele ahambe ngalemitsetfo." 
Leviticus4:3 “ ‘Nangabe kona umphristi logcotjiwe waze wehlisela lelo cala lakhe esiveni, uyawuletsa inkunzana lengenasiyela ayinikele ibe ngumhlatjelo wesono sakhe kuSimakadze." 
Leviticus4:4 Lenkunzana uyayiletsa ekungeneni kwelithende lekuhlangana, abeke sandla etikwenhloko yayo, bese uyibulalela khona lapho embikwaSimakadze." 
Leviticus4:5 Umphristi logcotjiwe uyawube sewutsatsa lengati yalenkunzana, angene nayo ethendeni lekuhlangana." 
Leviticus4:6 Uyakwenya umuno wakhe kulengati, bese uyifafata embikwaSimakadze embikwendvwangu lengcwele, kuze kube kasikhombisa." 
Leviticus4:7 Lenye ingati umphristi uyayibhoca etimphondvweni telilati lemphepho lenuka kamnandzi embikwaSimakadze ngekhatsi kwelithende lekuhlangana. Incenye yalengati uyayitsela emasekweni elilati lemnikelo wekushiswa lelisekungeneni kwelithende lekuhlangana. 
Leviticus4:8 Kulenkunzana yemhlatjelo wesono uyawasusa onkhe emanoni lembese kwangekhatsi kanye nalawo lahlangene nako," 
Leviticus4:9 netinso totimbili, nemanoni lakuto nalasematsebeni, nemanoni lembese sibindzi kanye nalawo layawusuka kanye netinso." 
Leviticus4:10 Umphristi uyawutsatsa lamanoni alenkhomo awashisele elatini leminikelo yekushiswa, njengobe enta nakashisa umnikelo wekuthula." 
Leviticus4:11 Kodvwa uyawutsatsa sikhumba sayo, nenyama yayo yonkhe, nenhloko yayo, nemilente yayo, nekwangekhatsi kwayo, nemswane wayo." 
Leviticus4:12 Yonkhe lenkunzana uyawuyitsatsa aphumele nayo ngaphandle kwenkambu endzaweni lehlantekile ngekwemtsetfo, lapho kucitfwa khona umlotsa, afike akushisele khona ngemlilo wetinkhuni, etikwendvundvuma yemlotsa." 
Leviticus4:13 “ ‘Nangabe kone sonkhe sive saka-Israyeli, saba nelicala lekwephula umyalo waSimakadze, singakacondzi, nome sive besingakakucapheli loko, noko sinelicala." 
Leviticus4:14 Siyawutsi singabona kutsi sonile, bese siletsa inkunzana lengenasiyela itewuba ngumhlatjelo wesono; iyakwetfulwa embikwelithende lekuhlangana." 
Leviticus4:15 Baholi besive bayawubeka tandla tabo etikwenhloko yayo embikwaSimakadze, bese ibulawelwa khona lapho embikwaSimakadze." 
Leviticus4:16 Umphristi logcotjiwe uyawutsatsa lenye yalengati angene nayo ethendeni lekuhlangana," 
Leviticus4:17 bese wenya umuno wakhe kulengati, ayifafate embikwaSimakadze embikwendvwangu kuze kube kasikhombisa." 
Leviticus4:18 Lenye ingati uyayibhoca etimphondvweni telilati lelisembikwaSimakadze ethendeni lekuhlangana. Incenye yalengati lesele uyayitsela esisekelweni selilati lemnikelo wekushiswa ekungeneni kwelithende lekuhlangana. 
Leviticus4:19 Onkhe lawo manoni ayo uyawatsatsa awashisele elatini. 
Leviticus4:20 Uyakwenta njalo nakulenkunzana njengobe entile ngaleyo nakenta ngayo umhlatjelo wesono; umphristi uyawubentela kanjalo-ke inhlawulo yekubuyisana naSimakadze, bese bayatsetselelwa." 
Leviticus4:21 Lenkunzana uyawube sewuyayitsatsa, aphumele nayo ngaphandle kwenkambu afike ayishisele khona, njengobe entile nakashisa umnikelo wekucala. Lona-ke ngiwo umhlatjelo wekususa sono sesive sonkhe." 
Leviticus4:22 “ ‘Nangabe kone umholi, waba nelicala lekwephula umyalo waSimakadze longuNkulunkulu wakhe, angakacondzi," 
Leviticus4:23 bese uyatiswa kutsi wonile, uyawuletsa siphongo lesingenasiyela sibe ngumnikelo wakhe wesono." 
Leviticus4:24 Uyawubeka sandla sakhe etikwenhloko yalembuti, bese uyibulalela lapho kubulawelwa khona tonkhe tilwane temhlatjelo wekushiswa embikwaSimakadze. Lowo ngumnikelo wesono." 
Leviticus4:25 Umphristi uyakwenya umuno wakhe kulengati yalesilwane, bese uyibhoca etimphondvweni telilati leminikelo yekushiswa, lena lenye ingati ayitsele esisekelweni selilati." 
Leviticus4:26 Uyawushisa onkhe lamanoni awashisele elatini, njengobe enta nakashisa emanoni emnikelo wekuthula; umphristi uyawumentela kanjalo-ke umholi inhlawulo yekubuyisana naSimakadze, bese lomholi uyatsetselelwa sono sakhe." 
Leviticus4:27 “ ‘Nangabe kone umuntfu nje, abe nelicala lekwephula lomunye wemiyalo yaSimakadze, angakacondzi," 
Leviticus4:28 uyawutsi angatiswa kutsi wonile, bese uletsa imbutikati lengenasiyela ibe ngumnikelo waleso sono lasentile." 
Leviticus4:29 Uyawubeka sandla sakhe etikwenhloko yalomnikelo wesono, bese uyibulalela lapho kubulawelwa khona tonkhe tilwane temhlatjelo wekushiswa." 
Leviticus4:30 Umphristi uyakwenya umuno wakhe kulengati yalesilwane, bese uyibhoca etimphondvweni telilati lemihlatjelo yekushiswa, lena lenye ingati lesele ayitsele esisekelweni selilati." 
Leviticus4:31 Uyawube sewukhipha onkhe emanoni ayo, njengobe enta nakukhishwa emanoni kuletilwane temnikelo wekuthula. Umphristi uyawube sewuwashisela elatini, khona kutawuba liphunga lelinuka lusi lolumnandzi kuSimakadze, uyawumentela kanjalo-ke inhlawulo yekubuyisana naSimakadze, bese-ke lomuntfu uyatsetselelwa sono sakhe." 
Leviticus4:32 “ ‘Nangabe lomuntfu aletsa imvu, kufanele kube ngulensikati lengenasiyela." 
Leviticus4:33 Kufanele abeke sandla sakhe etikwenhloko yayo, bese uyayibulala njengemnikelo wesono, ayibulalele lapho kubulawelwa khona tonkhe tilwane temnikelo wekushiswa." 
Leviticus4:34 Umphristi uyakwenya umuno wakhe kulengati yalesilwane, bese uyibhoca etimphondvweni telilati lemnikelo wekushiswa, lena lenye ingati ayitsele esisekelweni selilati." 
Leviticus4:35 Uyawube sewukhipha onkhe emanoni, njengobe kwentiwa nakukhishwa onkhe emanoni kulemvu yemnikelo wekuthula; umphristi uyawushisela etikwelilati kulomnikelo lowentiwa ngemlilo kuSimakadze. Umphristi uyawumentela kanjalo-ke inhlawulo yekubuyisana naSimakadze, bese-ke lomuntfu uyatsetselelwa sono sakhe.’ ”" 
Leviticus5:1 “ ‘Nangabe umuntfu onile ngekutsi atsi afunwa ngumtsetfo kutsi atewufakaza ecaleni, kepha angabe asafakaza ngaloko lakubonile nome lakuvile, kufanele ajeziselwe lelo cala lakhe." 
Leviticus5:2 “ ‘Nangabe umuntfu kwenteka angakacondzi atsintsa nome yini lengcolile ngekwemtsetfo, njengesidvumbu sesilwane lesingcolile, nome sifuyo, nome silwanyakatana, naye sewungcolile, sewunelicala." 
Leviticus5:3 “ ‘Nangabe umuntfu kwenteka angakacondzi atsintsa nome yini yemuntfu lengcolile, levamisile kumngcolisa umuntfu, unelicala laloko, nasakubonile loko lakwentile." 
Leviticus5:4 “ ‘Nangabe kwenteka umuntfu wafunga ngekunganaki, kwenta lokuhle nome lokubi, njengobe umuntfu afunge nome ngayini angakacabangisisi nome abengakanaki, noko unelicala, nasakubonile loko lakwentile." 
Leviticus5:5 “ ‘Nangabe umuntfu anelicala ngalokunye kwaloku lokubaliwe, kufanele avume lesono asho nekutsi usente kanjani." 
Leviticus5:6 Inhlawulo yaso kufanele kube lizinyane lelisikati, lemvu nome lembuti, kube ngumhlatjelo wesono kuSimakadze. Umphristi utamentela inhlawulo yekubuyisana kuSimakadze ngesono sakhe." 
Leviticus5:7 “ ‘Nangabe lomuntfu angeke akhone kukhipha lizinyane lemvu, uyawuletsa ematuba lamabili nome emazini lamabili elivukutfu kuSimakadze, kube yinhlawulo yesono: linye libe ngumnikelo wesono, lelinye libe ngumnikelo wekushiswa." 
Leviticus5:8 Utawaletsa kumphristi, loyawucale anikele ngaloko lokungumnikelo wesono. Uyalishwila intsamo kodvwa angayihluphuli inhloko," 
Leviticus5:9 bese ufafata lengati yalo emhlubulweni welilati. Incenye yalengati kufanele iphomphiselwe esisekelweni selilati. Lona-ke ngumnikelo wesono. 
Leviticus5:10 Leli lelinye lesibili liyawuba lemnikelo wekushiswa, njengobe kusho umtsetfo. Umphristi uyawumentela kanjalo-ke inhlawulo yekubuyisana naSimakadze, bese-ke lomuntfu uyatsetselelwa sono sakhe." 
Leviticus5:11 “ ‘Nangabe lomuntfu angeke akhone kukhokha ematuba lamabili nome emazini lamabili elivukutfu, kufanele aletse imphuphu lengaba yikhilogremu kutsi itewuba ngumnikelo wesono. Kufanele angayifaki emafutsa emncumo nome imphepho, ngobe ingumnikelo wesono." 
Leviticus5:12 Uyayiletsa kumphristi, loyawufike acaphune libinta lesandla kube sikhumbuto, bese uwushisela elatini etikweminikelo yemlilo leyetfulwe kuSimakadze; lowo-ke ngumnikelo wesono." 
Leviticus5:13 Umphristi uyawumentela kanjalo-ke umuntfu inhlawulo yekubuyisana naSikmakadze, nome sono sakhe ngabe saluphi luhlobo, uyawube sewuyatsetselelwa. Loku lokusele kufanele kube sabelo semphristi, njengobe kunjalo emnikelweni walokutinhlavu.’ ”" 
Leviticus5:14 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi:" 
Leviticus5:15 “Nangabe umuntfu ona ngekwephula munye walemiyalo lengcwele yaSimakadze angakacondzi, kufanele ahlawule kuSimakadze ngesihhanca lesingenasiyela. Bungako balesihhanca buyawubonwa nguwe ngekwesilinganiso sendzawo lengcwele; lowo-ke ngumnikelo loyinhlawulo yelicala." 
Leviticus5:16 Kufanele abuyisele konkhe loko lehlulekile kukwenta macondzana nemiyalo lengcwele aphindze engete kwesihlanu. Loko uyawukunika umphristi, yena-ke uyawube sewunikela ngalesihhanca lesingumnikelo welicala. Uyawumentela kanjalo-ke inhlawulo yekubuyisana naSimakadze; lowo muntfu uyawube sewuyatsetselelwa." 
Leviticus5:17 “Nangabe umuntfu ona ngekutsi ephule lomunye wemitsetfo yaSimakadze, nome abengati, unelicala, kufanele ahlawule." 
Leviticus5:18 Kufanele ahlawule kumphristi, ngesihhanca lesingenasiyela. Bungako baso buyawukalwa nguwe njengesimiso semnikelo welicala. Umphristi uyawumentela kanjalo-ke inhlawulo yekubuyisana naSimakadze; lowo muntfu uyawube sewuyatsetselelwa licala lakhe lalente angakacondzi." 
Leviticus5:19 Lowo-ke ngumnikelo loyinhlawulo yelicala; empeleni abenelicala kuSimakadze.” 
Leviticus6:1 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi watsi: 
Leviticus6:2 “Nangabe umuntfu ona, futsi angetsembeki kuSimakadze ngekutsi entele makhelwane wakhe bucili, nome ngekutsengiselana, nome ngekumhumusha, nome ngani," 
Leviticus6:3 nome asatfole lokwakulahlekile, akuphike aze afungele lite, nome-ke one ngekwenta nome ngabe yini lembi umuntfu langahle one ngayo," 
Leviticus6:4 uyawuba nelicala lekona. Kufanele abuyisele leyontfo layitfole ngekuyeba, nome layitfole ngebucili, nome layiniketiwe kutsi ayigcine, nome lebekulahlekile wakutfola," 
Leviticus6:5 nome ngabe ufungele emanga, uyawukhokha inhlawulo lephelele, aphindze engete kwesihlanu ngetulu, akubuyisele kumnikati ngelilanga laletsa ngalo umnikelo wakhe welicala." 
Leviticus6:6 Uyawube sewuletsa kumphristi lowo mnikelo welicala kuSimakadze, ube sihhanca lesingenasiyela, kube nguleso lesilingene kube ngumnikelo welicala." 
Leviticus6:7 Umphristi uyawumentela kanjalo-ke inhlawulo yekubuyisana naSimakadze, lowo muntfu uyawutsetselelwa konkhe lakonile.”" 
Leviticus6:8 Simakadze wayala Mosi watsi: 
Leviticus6:9 “Nika Aroni nemadvodzana akhe nansi imitsetfo lelandzelako lecondzene nemnikelo wekushiswa: Umnikelo wekushiswa uyawubekwa etikwelilati uhlale khona busuku bonkhe, nemlilo kufanele uhlale uvutsa busuku bonkhe kuze kuse." 
Leviticus6:10 Umphristi uyawufaka umjiva wakhe lowentiwe ngendvwangu yelineni lecolisakele, nelibhuluko langaphansi lelentiwe ngendvwangu yelineni lecolisakele, bese ususa lomlotsa wemnikelo wekushiswa loshiswe elatini, awucitse eceleni kwalo lelilati." 
Leviticus6:11 Uyawube sewukhumula letimphahla, afake letinye timphahla, acitse nalomlotsa ngaphandle kwenkambu endzaweni lehlantekile ngekwemtsetfo." 
Leviticus6:12 Lomlilo losetikwelilati kufanele uhlale uvutsa; ungacali ucime. Onkhe emalanga ekuseni umphristi kufanele engete tinkhuni, alungise umnikelo wekushiswa etikwalo, ashise lamanoni emnikelo wekuthula." 
Leviticus6:13 Lomlilo kufanele uhlale uvutsa lapha etikwelilati, ungacali ucime.”" 
Leviticus6:14 “Lena-ke ngimitsetfo yeminikelo yalokutinhlavu. Emadvodzana a-Aroni kufanele etfule umnikelo walokutinhlavu kuSimakadze embikwelilati. 
Leviticus6:15 Umphristi uyawucaphuna libinta lafulaha wakolo lobhicwe nemafutsa nemphepho yonkhe yemnikelo walokutinhlavu, akushisele elatini kube sikhumbuto, liphunga lelinuka lusi lolumnandzi kuSimakadze." 
Leviticus6:16 Lokuyawusala lapho kuyawudliwa bo-Aroni nemadvodzana akhe. Kuyawudliwa kungakafakwa imbiliso, kudlelwe endzaweni lengcwele; kufanele kudlelwe esibuyeni selithende lekuhlangana." 
Leviticus6:17 Akuyiwuphekwa ngembiliso. Loko ngibanikele kutsi kube sabelo sabo kuleminikelo leletfwe kimi kutsi ishiswe ngemlilo; kungcwelengcwele, njengawo umnikelo wesono nemnikelo welicala." 
Leviticus6:18 Loko sekuyawuba simiso etitukulwaneni nasetitukulwaneni kutsi onkhe emadvodza ekutalwa ngu-Aroni kube ngiwo ladla kudla lokunikelwe ngemlilo kuSimakadze kutsi kube sabelo sawo. Konkhe lokukutsintsako kuyawuba ngcwele.” 
Leviticus6:19 Simakadze wachubeka wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi:" 
Leviticus6:20 “Lena ngiminikelo leyawuletfwa ngu-Aroni nemadvodzana akhe kuSimakadze ngelilanga lekugcotjwa kwabo: ngufulaha lonesisindvo losingaba yikhilogremu yinye, lokusilinganiso semnikelo walokutinhlavu wemalanga onkhe, incenye ibe yasekuseni, nalenye incenye ibe yasentsambama." 
Leviticus6:21 Kufanele ibhicwe nemafutsa, bese iphekwa ngelikesi; uyente ibe tincetu leticotjiwe; kube ngumnikelo walokutinhlavu, kube liphunga lelinuka lusi lolumnandzi kuSimakadze." 
Leviticus6:22 Loku sekuyawuba simiso setitukulwane ngetitukulwane: kutsi situkulwane sa-Aroni lesiyawukhonta singumphristi logcotjiwe esikhundleni sakhe siyawunikela ngawo. Leyo mphuphu iyawushiswa yonkhe, ibe ngumnikelo kuSimakadze." 
Leviticus6:23 Ngako-ke wonkhe umnikelo walokutinhlavu wemphristi uyawushiswa wonkhe. Kute incenye leyawudliwa.” 
Leviticus6:24 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi:" 
Leviticus6:25 “Tjela Aroni nemadvodzana akhe utsi: ‘Umnikelo wesono uyawuhlatjelwa embikwaSimakadze lapho kuhlatjelwa khona umnikelo wekushiswa; kungumnikelo longcwelengcwele. 
Leviticus6:26 Umphristi lonikela ngalomhlatjelo uyakuwudla asendzaweni lengcwele, esibuyeni selithende lekuhlangana." 
Leviticus6:27 Umuntfu nome yini letsintsa inyama yalesilwane kuyawuba ngcwele. Nangabe ingati yalesilwane semhlatjelo ichaphateleke emphahleni nome engutjeni, kufanele igezelwe endzaweni lengcwele." 
Leviticus6:28 Lembita bekuphekwe ngayo lenyama kufanele ibulawe; kodvwa nangabe bekulibhodo lelitfusi, kufanele ligezisiswe ngemanti." 
Leviticus6:29 Nome ngubani lomdvuna welusendvo lwebaphristi angawudla lomnikelo; ungcwelengcwele. 
Leviticus6:30 Kodvwa nangabe kuletfwa umnikelo wesono ethendeni lekuhlangana, ingati yawo letawuhlawulela sono endzaweni lengcwele, lowo mnikelo akukafaneli udliwe; kufanele ushiswe.’ ”" 
Leviticus7:1 “ ‘Lena-ke ngimitsetfo lecondzene neminikelo yemacala, ngiminikelo lengcwelengcwele:" 
Leviticus7:2 Silwane lesingulomnikelo kufanele sibulawelwe lapho kubulawelwa khona tilwane letiletselwe kuba ngiminikelo yekushiswa, nengati yaso kufanele ifafatwe emngcengcemeni welilati ndzawo tonkhe." 
Leviticus7:3 Onkhe emanoni aso kufanele anikelwe elatini: emanoni emsila, nemhlehlo," 
Leviticus7:4 netinso totimbili, nemanoni lakuto nalasematsebeni, nemanoni onkhe lembese sibindzi layawusuka kanye netinso." 
Leviticus7:5 Umphristi uyawushisa onkhe lamanoni elatini abe ngumnikelo lowentiwa ngemlilo embikwaSimakadze. Kungumnikelo welicala. 
Leviticus7:6 Bonkhe labadvuna lababemndeni webaphristi bavunyelwe kuwudla lomnikelo. Kufanele udlelwe endzaweni lengcwele; ungcwelengcwele. 
Leviticus7:7 “ ‘Indlela yekuphatfwa kwemnikelo welicala kanye nemnikelo wesono iyawufanana. Inyama iyawuba yalowo mphristi lowenta inhlawulo yekubuyisana. 
Leviticus7:8 Sikhumba semnikelo wekushiswa siyawuba salowo mphristi. 
Leviticus7:9 Wonkhe umnikelo walokutinhlavu lophekwe kuhhavini, nome ngelibhodo, nome ngelikesi, uyawuba walowo mphristi." 
Leviticus7:10 Kodvwa yonkhe iminikelo yalokutinhlavu lebhicwe nemafutsa nome lengakabhicwa nawo, yawo onkhe emadvodzana a-Aroni, ngako kufanele ehlukaniselane yona.’ ”" 
Leviticus7:11 “ ‘Lena-ke ngimitsetfo lecondzene neminikelo yekuthula lenikelwa kuSimakadze. 
Leviticus7:12 Nangabe umuntfu enta umnikelo wekubonga, uyawuletsa lomhlatjelo kanye nemipotongwane lete imbiliso lebhicwe nemafutsa, nemicatsane lebhicwe nemafutsa nemacebelengwane laphekwe ngemphuphu lecolisakele lete imbiliso lebhicwe nemafutsa." 
Leviticus7:13 Ngetulu kwalomnikelo wakhe wekuthula layawubonga ngawo uyawuletsa umpotongwane lonembiliso. 
Leviticus7:14 Uyawuletsa lolo nalolo luhlobo lwemnikelo umpotongwane ube munye, kube ngumnikelo kuSimakadze; loko kwemphristi lofafata lengati yemnikelo wekuthula." 
Leviticus7:15 Inyama yalesilwane kufanele idliwe ngalelo langa lenikelwe ngalo; akukafaneli ibekelwe likusasa. 
Leviticus7:16 “ ‘Nangabe umuntfu aletsa umnikelo wekufeza setsembiso nome umnikelo wesihle, kufanele udliwe ngalelo langa lawunikela ngalo; nakukhona lokusele, kungaphindze kudliwe futsi nangakusasa." 
Leviticus7:17 Nangabe lenyama yemhlatjelo seyize yalala kabili, kufanele ishiswe yonkhe ngemlilo." 
Leviticus7:18 Nangabe leyo nyama yemnikelo wakhe wekuthula seyidliwa ngelilanga lesitsatfu, lomnikati wawo angeke asemukeleka kanye nemnikelo wakhe. Lomnikelo utawuba sinengiso, nalowo lowudlako uyakwetfwala licala." 
Leviticus7:19 Nangabe leyo nyama kwenteka itsintsana nome ngayini lengcolile ngekwemtsetfo, akukafaneli idliwe, kodvwa kufanele ishiswe. “ ‘Lowo lohlantekile ngekwemtsetfo yena angayidla," 
Leviticus7:20 kodvwa nakukhona longcolile ngekwemtsetfo lodla lenyama yemnikelo wekuthula kuSimakadze, kufanele lowo muntfu ancunywe esiveni sakubo." 
Leviticus7:21 Nangabe umuntfu atsintsa lokungcolile ngekwemtsetfo, kungaba kungcola kwemuntfu nome silwane lesingcolile nome ngayini lengcolile nalenengekako, bese udla inyama yemnikelo wekuthula kuSimakadze, kufanele lowo muntfu ancunywe esiveni sakubo.’ ”" 
Leviticus7:22 Simakadze wachubeka wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi:" 
Leviticus7:23 “Khuluma esiveni sema-Israyeli utsi: ‘Ningawadli emanoni enkhomo, newemvu, newembuti." 
Leviticus7:24 Ningawadli emanoni esilwane lesitifele nome lesibulewe tilwane tesiganga, kodvwa emanoni angasetjentiswa kulokunye." 
Leviticus7:25 Umuntfu loyakudla emanoni alesilwane lesinikelelwe umnikelo wekushiswa kuSimakadze, kufanele ancunywe esiveni sakubo." 
Leviticus7:26 Nome ngukuphi lapho niyawuhlala khona, aniyikuyidla ingati yetinyoni nome yetilwane." 
Leviticus7:27 Nome ngubani loyakudla ingati, lowo muntfu kufanele ancunywe esiveni sakubo.’ ”" 
Leviticus7:28 Simakadze wachubeka wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi:" 
Leviticus7:29 “Khuluma esiveni sema-Israyeli utsi: ‘Lowo lonikela ngemnikelo wekuthula kufanele aletse incenye yawo ibe ngumhlatjelo wakhe kuSimakadze. 
Leviticus7:30 Kufanele ayiletse yena matfupha ngetandla takhe kuSimakadze kutsi kube ngumnikelo lowentiwa ngemlilo. Utawuletsa emanoni alesilwane kanye nemganga waso, kuze kutsi lomganga utewujikitiswa ube ngumnikelo wekujikitiswa kuSimakadze." 
Leviticus7:31 Umphristi uyawushisa lamafutsa etikwelilati, kodvwa lomganga uyawuba wa-Aroni kanye nemadvodzana akhe." 
Leviticus7:32 Umlente wesekudla weminikelo yekuthula uyawuyetfula kulowo mphristi kutsi kube sabelo sakhe. 
Leviticus7:33 Indvodzana ya-Aroni lenikela ngalengati nalamanoni emnikelo wekuthula iyawutsatsa umlente wesekudla kutsi ube sabelo sayo. 
Leviticus7:34 Umganga lojikitiswako nalomlente wesekudla lonikelwe kumphristi ngiwutsetse esiveni sema-Israyeli ngawunika Aroni nemadvodzana akhe kutsi kube sabelo sabo titukulwane ngetitukulwane.’ ” 
Leviticus7:35 Loko kwaba sabelo sa-Aroni nemadvodzana akhe lesatsatfwa emnikelweni lowawuletfwe kuSimakadze, mhlazana bagcotjwa kutsi bakhonte Simakadze njengebaphristi." 
Leviticus7:36 Ngalelo langa labagcotjwa ngalo Simakadze wayala ema-Israyeli kutsi abanike loko kube tabelo tabo. Loko kwamiswa kutsi kube ngumtsetfo wetitukulwane ngetitukulwane tabo. 
Leviticus7:37 Ngiyo lena-ke imitsetfo lecondzene neminikelo yekushiswa, neminikelo yalokutinhlavu, neminikelo yesono, neminikelo yelicala, neminikelo yemgcobo kanye neminikelo yekuthula," 
Leviticus7:38 Simakadze layinika Mosi entsabeni yaseSinayi, mhlazana ayala ema-Israyeli kutsi anikele ngeminikelo yawo kuSimakadze, ehlane laseSinayi." 
Leviticus8:1 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi:" 
Leviticus8:2 “Tsatsa bo-Aroni nemadvodzana akhe ubemise ekungeneni kwelithende lekuhlangana, uletse tembatfo tabo tebuphristi, nemafutsa emgcobo, nenkunzi yemnikelo wesono, netihhanca letimbili, nelibhasikidi lelinetinkhwa letingenambiliso," 
Leviticus8:3 bese ubutsa sonkhe sive sema-Israyeli usihlanganise ndzawonye ekungeneni kwelithende lekuhlangana.” 
Leviticus8:4 Mosi wenta njengobe Simakadze abemyalile kutsi akwente, satsi kube sonkhe sive sibutsane ndzawonye ekungeneni kwelithende lekuhlangana," 
Leviticus8:5 wakhuluma kuso watsi: “Loku lese ngikwenta nguloko Simakadze langiyale kutsi ngikwente.” 
Leviticus8:6 Mosi wasondzeta Aroni nemadvodzana akhe, wafike wabageza ngemanti." 
Leviticus8:7 Wase wembesa Aroni ingubo lete imikhono, wambopha ngelibhande elukhalweni. Wamembatsisa umjiva, nesidziya, wambopha elukhalweni ngelibhande lelihlotjisiwe." 
Leviticus8:8 Wamfaka sembatfo sesifuba, nalesembatfo sesifuba wasifaka i-Urimu neThumimu." 
Leviticus8:9 Wamfaka umshuculo wenhloko kwatsi etikwawo ngembili wafaka ngcwengcwe wegolide, umchele longcwele; kwaya njengobe Simakadze abeyale Mosi." 
Leviticus8:10 Mosi watsatsa emafutsa emgcobo wagcoba ngawo lithende lekukhontela nako konkhe lokwakungekhatsi kwalo, wakungcwelisa." 
Leviticus8:11 Wakha incenye yalamafutsa wawafafata kasikhombisa etikwelilati, agcoba lilati nako konkhe lokuhambisana nalo kanye nemgezelo nesibunu sawo, wakungcwelisa." 
Leviticus8:12 Watsela incenye yalamafutsa emgcobo etikwenhloko ya-Aroni, amgcoba, amnikela kuSimakadze kuze abe ngcwele." 
Leviticus8:13 Emvakwaloko, Mosi wasondzeta emadvodzana a-Aroni ngembili wawagcokisa tembatfo tawo tebuphristi, wawabopha ngemabhande etinkhalweni tawo, wabophela imishuculo yawo etinhloko tawo, njengobe Simakadze abemyalile." 
Leviticus8:14 Mosi wase uletsa inkunzi yemnikelo wesono, Aroni nemadvodzana akhe babeka tandla etikwenhloko yayo." 
Leviticus8:15 Mosi wayihlaba lenkunzi, wase utsatsa lenye ingati yayo wenya umuno wakhe kuyo, wabhoca timphondvo telilati kutsi alihlambulule. Lena lenye ingati lesele wayitsela esisekelweni selilati, walingcwelisa ngekulentela inhlawulo yekubuyisana kuSimakadze." 
Leviticus8:16 Mosi watsatsa onkhe emanoni labesetibilinini, nemanoni labembonye sibindzi, netinso totimbili, nemanoni lakuto, wakushisela elatini." 
Leviticus8:17 Titfo talenkunzi letatisele, sikhumba, nenyama, nemswane wayo wakushisela ngaphandle kwenkambu; kwaya njengobe Simakadze abeyale Mosi." 
Leviticus8:18 Emvakwaloko Mosi waletsa lesihhanca lesingumnikelo wekushiswa, Aroni nemadvodzana akhe babeka tandla tabo etikwenhloko yaso." 
Leviticus8:19 Mosi wasihlaba wase ufafata ngengati yaso ndzawo tonkhe kutungeleta lilati. 
Leviticus8:20 Watsi kube Mosi asicobe sibe ngemacatsa, wase ushisa lenhloko yaso, nemacatsa kanye nemanoni aso." 
Leviticus8:21 Wageza loku kwangekhatsi nemilente yaso, wase usishisa sonkhe elatini. Lomnikelo kwaba ngumnikelo wekushiswa, liphunga lelinuka lusi lolumnandzi, umnikelo lowentiwa ngemlilo kuSimakadze, njengobe Simakadze abeyale Mosi." 
Leviticus8:22 Mosi wase uletsa lesinye sihhanca lesasisekugcoba baphristi; ngako Aroni nemadvodzana akhe babeka tandla tabo etikwenhloko yaso. 
Leviticus8:23 Mosi wase uyasibulala, watsatsa lenye yalengati wabhoca ngayo lihwandza lendlebe ya-Aroni yangesekudla, nesitfupha sangesekudla, naqukulu wangesekudla." 
Leviticus8:24 Wasondzeta emadvodzana a-Aroni ngembili, nawo wawabhoca ngalengati emahwandzeni etindlebe tawo tangesekudla, nasetitfupheni tawo tangesekudla kanye nakuboqukulu bangesekudla. Ingati leyayisele, Mosi wayitsela ndzawo tonkhe atungeleta lilati." 
Leviticus8:25 Watsatsa lamanoni, nalomsila lononile, nemanoni lasetibilinini, nalambonye sibindzi, netinso totimbili kanye nemanoni lakuto, nemlente wangesekudla." 
Leviticus8:26 Watsatsa libhasikidi lekuphatsa sinkhwa lesingenambiliso embikwaSimakadze, wakhipha umpotongwane wesinkhwa lesingenambiliso, nempotongwane wesinkhwa lesinemafutsa, nelicebelengwane linye, wakubeka etikwalamanoni nasetikwemlente wangesekudla." 
Leviticus8:27 Konkhe lokudla wakwetfula etandleni tabo-Aroni nemadvodzana akhe, base bayakujikitisa kutsi kube ngumnikelo wekujikitiswa kuSimakadze." 
Leviticus8:28 Mosi watsatsa lokudla kubo wakushisela elatini, etikwemnikelo wekushiswa, waba ngumnikelo wekugcotjwa lowentiwa ngemlilo, kwaba liphunga lelinuka lusi lolumnandzi kuSimakadze." 
Leviticus8:29 Mosi wase utsatsa umganga waso wawujikitisa njengemnikelo wekujikitiswa embikwaSimakadze; loko kwaba sabelo saMosi kuleso sihhanca semgcobo. Mosi wakwenta konkhe loko njengobe abeyalwe nguSimakadze. 
Leviticus8:30 Mosi watsatsa lenye incenye yemafutsa emgcobo kanye nengati leyayisetikwelilati, wafafata ngayo bo-Aroni nemadvodzana akhe netimphahla tabo. Wabanikela kanjalo-ke bo-Aroni nemadvodzana akhe kanye netembatfo tabo kuSimakadze." 
Leviticus8:31 Mosi wakhuluma ku-Aroni nemadvodzana akhe watsi: “Tsatsani lenyama niyekuyiphekela ekungeneni kwelithende lekuhlangana, bese niyidlela khona lapho kanye naleso sinkhwa lesisekhatsi kulelo bhasikidi leminikelo yemgcobo, njengobe Simakadze ashito." 
Leviticus8:32 Konkhe lokusala lapho, inyama nesinkhwa, nibokushisa." 
Leviticus8:33 Ningesuki lapho ekungeneni kwelithende lekuhlangana, kuze kuphele lawo malanga lasikhombisa emgcobo wenu; ngobe umgcobo wenu uyawutsatsa emalanga lasikhombisa." 
Leviticus8:34 Simakadze usiyale kutsi sente loku lesikwente lamuhla khona kutewuba yinhlawulo yenu yekubuyisana naSimakadze. 
Leviticus8:35 Kufanele nihlale ekungeneni kwelithende lekuhlangana, imini nebusuku, kuze kuphelele emalanga lasikhombisa, nente loko Simakadze latsite nikwente. Lomyalo lengininika wona nami lengiwunikwe nguSimakadze nibowenta, khona ningetikufa.”" 
Leviticus8:36 Ngako-ke bo-Aroni nemadvodzana akhe bakwenta konkhe Simakadze labekukhulume ngaMosi kutsi bakwente. 
Leviticus9:1 Ngelilanga lesiphohlongo sekuphele inkonzo yemgcobo, Mosi wabita Aroni nemadvodzana akhe kanye nebaholi bema-Israyeli." 
Leviticus9:2 Wakhuluma ku-Aroni watsi: “Tsatsa inkunzana lengenasiyela nesihhanca lesingenasiyela utekunikela kuSimakadze: inkunzana ibe ngumnikelo wesono, sihhanca sibe ngumnikelo wekushiswa." 
Leviticus9:3 Tjela lesive sema-Israyeli kutsi sitsatse imbuti letawuba ngumnikelo wesono, neliguca lenkhomo lelinemnyaka munye budzala kanye nelizinyane lemvu lelinemnyaka munye budzala, kokubili kungabi nasiyela kube ngumnikelo wekushiswa;" 
Leviticus9:4 inkhomo nesihhanca kube ngumnikelo wekuthula. Kufanele kube ngumhlatjelo wenu kuSimakadze kanye nemnikelo walokutinhlavu lokubhicwe nemafutsa. Loku kufanele nikwente, ngobe Simakadze utawubonakala kini lamuhla.”" 
Leviticus9:5 Konkhe loko latsi Mosi akuletfwe, bakuletsa ekungeneni kwelithende lekuhlangana, sonkhe sive sasondzela sema embikwaSimakadze." 
Leviticus9:6 Mosi wakhuluma kubo watsi: “Simakadze uniyale kutsi konkhe loku nikwente, khona kutawubonakala inkhatimulo yakhe kini.”" 
Leviticus9:7 Wachubeka watsi ku-Aroni: “Sondzela elatini unikele umnikelo wakho wesono kanye nemnikelo wakho wekushiswa, utentele wena nesive sonkhe inhlawulo yekubuyisana naSimakadze. Letsa lomnikelo wesive, usentele inhlawulo yekubuyisana naSimakadze, njengobe Simakadze ashito.”" 
Leviticus9:8 Aroni waya elatini, wafike wabulala lenkunzana leyayiyemnikelo wesono sakhe." 
Leviticus9:9 Emadvodzana akhe amletsela ingati, wenya umuno wakhe, wayifafata etimphondvweni telilati; lena lenye wayitsela esisekelweni selilati." 
Leviticus9:10 Emanoni netinso totimbili kanye nemanoni lakuto, nemanoni lembese sibindzi wakushisela elatini, njengobe Simakadze abelayele Mosi." 
Leviticus9:11 Inyama nesikhumba wakushisela ngaphandle kwenkambu. 
Leviticus9:12 Wabulala nesilwane semnikelo wakhe wekushiswa. Emadvodzana akhe amnika ingati, wase uyifafata ndzawo tonkhe kutungeleta lilati." 
Leviticus9:13 Aphindza amnika umnikelo wekushiswa, sitfo ngesitfo, ngisho nenhloko yaso imbala, konkhe wakushisela etikwelilati." 
Leviticus9:14 Wase ugeza loku kwangekhatsi kanye nemilente, nako wakushisela etikwelilati kanye nemnikelo wekushiswa." 
Leviticus9:15 Emvakwaloko Aroni wase uletsa umnikelo wesive sonkhe. Watsatsa imbuti leyayitewunikelelwa lesive wayibulala, wayinikela elatini, kwaba ngumnikelo wesono sesive sonkhe, njengobe abentile emnikelweni wesono labecale ngawo." 
Leviticus9:16 Wase uletsa umnikelo wekushiswa, nawo wawunikela alandzela leyo mitsetfo yakhona leyayibekiwe." 
Leviticus9:17 Wanikela ngemnikelo walokutinhlavu, wacupha libinta ngesandla walishisela elatini. Phela loku kwakwentiwa ekwengeteni umnikelo wekushiswa wasekuseni." 
Leviticus9:18 Wabulala inkhomo kanye nesihhanca, kwaba ngumnikelo wekuthula wesive sonkhe. Emadvodzana akhe amnika ingati, wayifafata ndzawo tonkhe kutungeleta lilati." 
Leviticus9:19 Aphindza amnika emanoni alenkhomo, newalesihhanca, nemsila waso lononile, nemhlehlo, netinso totimbili, nemanoni lakuto, nemanoni lembese sibindzi;" 
Leviticus9:20 abuye abeka emanoni etikwemganga, Aroni wawashisela etikwelilati." 
Leviticus9:21 Imiganga nemlente wangesekudla Aroni wakujikitisa embikwaSimakadze, kwaba ngumnikelo wekujikitiswa, njengobe Mosi abeshito." 
Leviticus9:22 Aroni wasiphakamisela tandla takhe sive, wasibusisa. Wase uyehla, nasacedze kunikela umnikelo wesono, newekuthula, newekushiswa." 
Leviticus9:23 BoMosi na-Aroni bangena ethendeni lekuhlangana, batsi nase baphuma, babusisa sive, inkhatimulo yebukhosi baSimakadze yabonakala kubo bonkhe bantfu." 
Leviticus9:24 Kwachamuka umlilo usuka kuSimakadze wacedza lomnikelo wekushiswa kanye nemanoni labesetikwelilati. Satsi kube sive sikubone loku, samemeta sakhotsamisa nebuso baso, sawela phansi." 
Leviticus10:1 BoNadabi na-Abihu, emadvodzana a-Aroni, batsatsa titja tabo temphepho, ngulowo nalowo wafaka umlilo esitjeni sakhe watsela nemphepho, banikela kuSimakadze. Kodvwa lowo mnikelo wawungesingcwele, ngobe Simakadze abengakabatfumi kutsi banikele ngawo." 
Leviticus10:2 Masinyane kwachamuka umlilo kuSimakadze wabadla, bafela khona lapho, ebukhoneni bakhe Simakadze." 
Leviticus10:3 Mosi wakhuluma ku-Aroni watsi: “Simakadze abesho kona loku-ke ngesikhatsi atsi: ‘Ngiyawutibonakalisa ngingcwele kulabo labasedvute nami; ngiyawukhatimuliswa embikwabo bonkhe bantfu.’ ” Kodvwa Aroni wathula. 
Leviticus10:4 Mosi wabita boMishayeli na-Elsafani, emadvodzana a-Uziyeli, labenguyise lomncane wa-Aroni, wakhuluma kubo watsi: “Wotani lapha nitewutsatsa tidvumbu tabomnakenu nitisuse lapha endzaweni lengcwele, nitikhiphele ngaphandle kwenkambu.”" 
Leviticus10:5 Beta-ke batsatsa letidvumbu batibamba ngetembatfo tato, batetfwala bafike batibeka ngaphandle kwenkambu, njengobe Mosi abeshito." 
Leviticus10:6 Mosi wakhuluma ku-Aroni nemadvodzana akhe bo-Eleyazare na-Ithamari, watsi: “Tinwele tenu ningatiyekeli tingemahlutse, kantsi netimphahla tenu akufuneki nitidzabule. Funa nitsi niyakwenta loko nife, nelulaka lwaNkulunkulu lwehlele sive sonkhe. Kodvwa ema-Israyeli wona avumelekile kutsi abazilele labazalwane babo lababulewe ngumlilo lophume kuSimakadze." 
Leviticus10:7 Ningaphumi lapho ekungeneni kwelithende lekuhlangana, funa nife; ngobe emafutsa emgcobo waSimakadze asetikwenu.” Ngako bavele benta njengobe Mosi abeshito." 
Leviticus10:8 Simakadze wakhuluma ku-Aroni, watsi:" 
Leviticus10:9 “Wena nemadvodzana akho aniyikulinatsa liwayini nome tjwala nome yini ledzakisanako, nanitakuya ethendeni lekuhlangana, ngobe nanike nakwenta loko, niyawufa. Lomtsetfo kufanele ugcinwe titukulwane ngetitukulwane." 
Leviticus10:10 Kufanele nente umehluko emkhatsini walokungcwele nalokungengcwele, nemehluko emkhatsini walokuhlantekile ngekwemtsetfo nalokungcolile ngekwemtsetfo." 
Leviticus10:11 Kufanele nifundzise sive sema-Israyeli yonkhe imitsetfo Simakadze lasinike yona ngaMosi.” 
Leviticus10:12 Mosi wakhuluma ku-Aroni nakumadvodzana akhe lamabili labesasele, bo-Eleyazare na-Ithamari, watsi: “Tsatsani lomnikelo walokutinhlavu losele kuleminikelo leyentiwe ngemlilo kuSimakadze, lesinkhwa lesingenambiliso nisidlele eceleni kwelilati, ngobe lomnikelo ungcwele kakhulu." 
Leviticus10:13 Ngako nibowudlela endzaweni lengcwele; loko kusabelo sakho nesemadvodzana akho emnikelweni lowentiwa kuSimakadze ngemlilo. Simakadze wangiyala kanjalo-ke. 
Leviticus10:14 Kodvwa umganga lojikitiswako nemlente lonikelwe niyakuwudlela endzaweni lehlantekile ngekwemtsetfo, nine nemadvodzana nemadvodzakati enu, ngobe kusabelo senu nesemadvodzana enu eminikelweni yekuthula lenikelwe sive sema-Israyeli." 
Leviticus10:15 Umlente lonikelwe nalomganga lojikitiswako bayakuwuletsa kanye nemafutsa emnikelo lowentiwa ngemlilo lojikitiswako kube ngumnikelo wekujikitiswa kuSimakadze. Uyakuba wenu newemadvodzana enu ube sabelo senu saphakadze naphakadze, njengobe Simakadze ashito.”" 
Leviticus10:16 Mosi wabutisisa ngembuti yemnikelo wesono; watsi nakatfola kutsi seyishisiwe, wabatfukutselela bo-Eleyazare na-Ithamari, emadvodzana a-Aroni labesasele, wadzimate wakhuluma kubo watsi:" 
Leviticus10:17 “Anikawudleli ngani endzaweni lengcwele lomnikelo wesono? Lomnikelo ungcwele kakhulu, futsi unikelwe kini, khona kutewususwa sono sesive ngekwenta umsimeto wekutsetselelwa kwetono taso embikwaSimakadze." 
Leviticus10:18 Njengobe ingati yayo ingazange iletfwe ngekhatsi kwendzawo lengcwele, bekufanele niwudlele endzaweni lengcwele lomhlatjelo, njengobe nginiyalile.”" 
Leviticus10:19 Aroni waphendvula Mosi watsi: “Lamuhla bantfu baletse iminikelo yabo yesono neminikelo yabo yekushiswa embikwaSimakadze, kantsi nami bengehlelwe nguletintfo letinje; kube bengiwudlile lomnikelo wesono lamuhla, bekutakwemukeleka yini loko emehlweni aSimakadze?”" 
Leviticus10:20 Nakuva loko Mosi, weneliswa." 
Leviticus11:1 Simakadze wakhuluma kuboMosi na-Aroni, watsi:" 
Leviticus11:2 “Tjelani ema-Israyeli nitsi: ‘Kuto tonkhe tilwane letiphilako emhlabeni ningadla nati: 
Leviticus11:3 Tonkhe tilwane letinetinselo letehlukene naletihlabulako. 
Leviticus11:4 Kodvwa leti letihlabulako kuphela naletehlukanisa tinselo kuphela ningabotitsintsa. Likamela liyahlabula, kantsi alehlukanisi tinselo; lona-ke lingcolile kini." 
Leviticus11:5 Imbila iyahlabula, kodvwa ayehlukanisi tinselo; nayo ingcolile kini." 
Leviticus11:6 Umgwaja uyahlabula, kodvwa awehlukanisi tinselo; ungcolile kini." 
Leviticus11:7 Ningayidli ingulube. Ingcolile, ngobe nome tinselo tayo tehlukene, kodvwa ayihlabuli." 
Leviticus11:8 Letilwane ningatidli, futsi ningatsintsi ngisho netidvumbu tato, ngobe tingcolile kini." 
Leviticus11:9 “ ‘Ningatidla tonkhe tilwane letihlala elwandle nasemifuleni letinetimphiko tekuntjweza netincwencwe. 
Leviticus11:10 Kodvwa tonkhe tilwane letihlala elwandle nasemifuleni letite timphiko tekuntjweza netincwencwe kufanele tingadliwa; yebo, tonkhe leto tilwane tisinengiso kini." 
Leviticus11:11 Leto tilwane tonkhe nititsatse ngekutsi tisinengiso kini. Ningacali nitidle, ngisho netidvumbu tato tisinengiso kini." 
Leviticus11:12 Ningacali nidle nome ngangusiphi silwane lesihlala emantini lesite timphiko tekuntjweza netincwencwe, ngobe sisinengiso kini." 
Leviticus11:13 “ ‘Nati-ke tinyoni lekungakafaneli kutsi nitidle, ngobe tisinengiso: lusweti, nelingce, nengculungculu," 
Leviticus11:14 nanhloyile, nalohheya ngetinhlobo takhe;" 
Leviticus11:15 nemahhwabayi, ngetinhlobo tawo," 
Leviticus11:16 nenshi, nenkovazana, nenkanku, naloklebe ngetinhlobo takhe;" 
Leviticus11:17 nemswelele, nesahhukulu, nemphishamanti, nesikhova," 
Leviticus11:18 nemfuketi, nelivuba, nelilanda," 
Leviticus11:19 nadvoye, namatalatingwenya ngetinhlobo takhe, natsekwane, nelilulwane." 
Leviticus11:20 “ ‘Tonkhe tilwanyakatana letinetimphiko letihamba ngetinyawo letine kufanele tibe sinengiso kini. 
Leviticus11:21 Tikhona, noko, tilwane letinetimphiko, letihamba ngetinyawo letine leningatidla: nguleto letigcumagcuma emhlabatsini ngemilente lengemancondvo." 
Leviticus11:22 Tintsetse leningatidla nguleti: sikhonyane ngetinhlobo taso, nemaboni ngetinhlobo tawo, nemadziya ngetinhlobo tawo, nemahhwele ngetinhlobo tawo." 
Leviticus11:23 Tonkhe letilwanyakatana letinetimphiko naletinabutela phansi ngetinyawo letine tingcolile ngekwemtsetfo. 
Leviticus11:24 “ ‘Nati-ke tilwane letingcolile nome letiyawuningcolisa; wonkhe lotsintsa tidvumbu tato uyawuba ngulongcolile kuze kuhlwe. 
Leviticus11:25 Lowo lowetfwala tidvumbu tato uyawuhlanta tingubo takhe abe ngulongcolile kuze kuhlwe. 
Leviticus11:26 Tonkhe tilwane letehlukanisa tinselo tingayidzabuli kabili kantsi atihlabuli kufanele titsatfwe ngekutsi tingcolile; lowo lotsintsa tidvumbu tato uyawuba ngulongcolile. 
Leviticus11:27 Tonkhe tilwane letihamba ngetidladla letine tingcolile kini; lowo lotsintsa tidvumbu tato uyawungcola kuze kuhlwe. 
Leviticus11:28 Lowo lowetfwala tidvumbu tato kufanele ahlambulule timphahla takhe, ngobe tingcolile; utawuhlala angcolile kuze kuhlwe. Tingcolile kini." 
Leviticus11:29 “ ‘Nati-ke tilwane letingcolile kini letihamba emhlabeni: nguchakidze, neligundvwane, netibankhwa ngetinhlobo tato," 
Leviticus11:30 nentfulo, naholoholo, nachamu, nelunwabu." 
Leviticus11:31 Leto-ke tingcolile kini, tonkhe tilwane letihamba ngesisu. Wonkhe lotsintsa tidvumbu tato uyawuba ngulongcolile kuze kuhlwe." 
Leviticus11:32 Yonkhe intfo lekuwele kuyo nome ngusinye saletilwane nasifile, leyontfo iyawuba ngulengcolile: nome ngabe leyontfo yentiwe ngelukhuni nome ngendvwangu yemasaka, konkhe lokusetjentiselwa nome yini, kufanele kwenyiwe emantini; kuyawuba ngulokungcolile kuze kuhlwe, emvakwaloko-ke bese kuyahlanteka." 
Leviticus11:33 Nangabe lesinye saletilwane siwela esitjeni selibumba, leso sitja kufanele siphihlitwe; konkhe lokukuso kuyawuba ngulokungcolile." 
Leviticus11:34 Konkhe kudla lebekungekhatsi kwaso lebekufanele kudliwe, nako kutawube sekuba ngulokungcolile, kanjalo konkhe lokunatfwako bekungekhatsi nako sekuyawuba ngulokungcolile." 
Leviticus11:35 Nangabe sidvumbu saso nome ngusiphi siwela nome etikwani, leyontfo itawuba ngulengcolile ngekwemtsetfo: kungaba litiko nome yimbita yekupheka, kufanele kubhidlitwe, ngobe kungcolile ngekwemtsetfo kini, futsi kutawuhlala kungcolile kini," 
Leviticus11:36 noko umtfombo nome sicobho nome umfula wemanti uyawuhlala uhlantekile. Kodvwa wonkhe lotsintsa lesidvumbu salesilwane uyawuba ngulongcolile. 
Leviticus11:37 Nangabe sidvumbu saso siwela etikwenhlanyelo, leyo nhlanyelo iyawuhlala seloku ihlantekile." 
Leviticus11:38 Kodvwa nangabe lenhlanyelo imanti bese-ke sidvumbu sesiwela etikwayo, itawuba ngulengcolile kini." 
Leviticus11:39 “ ‘Nangabe silwane lenivunyelwe kusidla sesifile, lowo lotsintsa sidvumbu saso uyawuba ngulongcolile kuze kuhlwe." 
Leviticus11:40 Lowo lodla ingcuba yaso kufanele ageze timphahla takhe, utawuba ngulongcolile kuze kuhlwe, nalowo lotsintsa leso sidvumbu uyawuba ngulongcolile kuze kuhlwe." 
Leviticus11:41 “ ‘Sonkhe silwane lesihamba ngesisu emhlabeni sisinengiso; akukafaneli sidliwe. 
Leviticus11:42 Kufanele ningasidli silwane lesihamba ngesisu nome lesihamba ngemilente lemine nome leminyenti, leso silwane sisinengiso kini." 
Leviticus11:43 Ningacali nitingcolise ngaletilwane letihamba ngesisu; nicaphele ningatingcolisi ngato, ningangcoliswa nangito." 
Leviticus11:44 Mine nginguSimakadze longuNkulunkulu wenu; tehlukaniseleni mine, nibe ngcwele, ngobe nami matfupha ngingcwele. Ningatingcolisi nganome ngusiphi silwane lesihamba ngesisu." 
Leviticus11:45 Yebo, nginguSimakadze lowanikhipha eGibhithe kutsi ngitewuba nguNkulunkulu wenu; ngako-ke banini ngcwele njengobe nami ngingcwele." 
Leviticus11:46 “ ‘Lena-ke ngimiyalo nemitsetfo macondzana netilwane, netinyoni, nako konkhe lokuphilako lokuhlala emantini, nato tonkhe tilwane letihamba ngesisu." 
Leviticus11:47 “ ‘Ngiyo letawunenta nikwati kwehlukanisa tilwane letingcolile naletihlantekile, nehlukanise nasemkhatsini wetilwane letiphilako lekufanele tidliwe netilwane letiphilako lekungakafaneli tidliwe.’ ”" 
Leviticus12:1 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi:" 
Leviticus12:2 “Khuluma kuma-Israyeli utsi: ‘Nangabe umfati akhulelwa bese utala indvodzana, utawuba ngulongcolile ngekwemtsetfo emalanga lasikhombisa, njenganakaye esikhatsini usuke angcolile." 
Leviticus12:3 Ngelilanga lesiphohlongo lijwabu lalomfana lotelwe liyawujutjwa. 
Leviticus12:4 Lomfati kufanele ahlale esikhundleni, kuze kuphele emalanga lengema-33, kuze ahlambuluke ekopheni kwakhe. Akukafaneli atsintse lutfo lolungcwele nome aye endzaweni lengcwele, kuze kuphele emalanga akhe ekuhlanjululwa." 
Leviticus12:5 Kodvwa nangabe atele intfombatana, utawuba ngulongcolile kuze kuphele emaviki lamabili, njenganakaye esikhatsini. Emvakwaloko kufanele ahlale esikhundleni, kuze kuphele emalanga langema-66, kuze ahlambuluke ekopheni kwakhe." 
Leviticus12:6 “ ‘Nangabe sekwendlule lamalanga akhe ekuhlanjululwa nome utele umfana nome intfombatana, kufanele aye kumphristi ekungeneni kwelithende lekuhlangana aletse lizinyane lemvu lelinemnyaka munye libe ngumnikelo wekushiswa, nelivukutfu nome lituba, libe ngumnikelo wesono." 
Leviticus12:7 Umphristi utakunikela loku kube yinhlawulo yekubuyisana kuSimakadze, ngaloko utawuhlanjululwa ekopheni kwengati yakhe. Lena-ke ngimitsetfo lemacondzana nemfati lobeleke umfana nome intfombatana." 
Leviticus12:8 “ ‘Nangabe ehluleka kutfola lizinyane lemvu, kufanele aletse emavukutfu lamabili nome ematuba lamabili lasemancane, lelinye libe lemnikelo wekushiswa, lelinye libe lemnikelo wesono. Umphristi utawumentela inhlawulo yekubuyisana kuSimakadze, utawube sewuyahlambuluka.’ ”" 
Leviticus13:1 Simakadze wakhuluma kuboMosi na-Aroni, watsi:" 
Leviticus13:2 “Nangabe umuntfu avuvukile nome anelidzengedla nome anelichashata lelimhlophe esikhunjeni sakhe bese kuyagucuka kuba sabulephelo kufanele aletfwe ku-Aroni, umphristi, nome kulomunye wemadvodzana akhe, longumphristi." 
Leviticus13:3 Lomphristi kufanele ahlolisise lelichashata lelisesikhunjeni salomuntfu. Nangabe lunwele lolukulo selugucuke lwaba mhlophe, nalo lelichashata seligubhile, kusuke sekusifo lesisabulephelo. “Nangabe umphristi asamhlolisisile, kufanele asho kutsi ungcolile ngekwemtsetfo." 
Leviticus13:4 Nangabe lelichashata lelisesikhunjeni sakhe limhlophe, kodvwa kubonakala kutsi alikagubhi esikhunjeni nelunwele lolukulo lungakagucuki lwaba mhlophe, umphristi utawutsatsa lomuntfu amehlukanise kulabanye emalanga lasikhombisa." 
Leviticus13:5 Ngelilanga lesikhombisa umphristi utamhlolisisa, nabona kutsi seloku linjalo lelichashata alikagucuki, kantsi futsi lisengakagubhi landza, utawuphindze amgcine lapho emalanga lasikhombisa futsi." 
Leviticus13:6 Ngelilanga lesikhombisa umphristi kufanele amhlolisise futsi, nangabe lelichashata selifiphele langete landza nesikhumba, umphristi utametfula ngekwemtsetfo kutsi uhlobile; bekumane kukucubuka nje. Lomuntfu kufanele ageze tingubo takhe; uhlambulukile." 
Leviticus13:7 Kodvwa nangabe lelichashata liphindze landza esikhunjeni sakhe emvakwekutibonakalisa kwakhe kumphristi kutsi atsatfwe njengemuntfu lohlambulukile, kufanele aphindze atibonakalise kumphristi futsi." 
Leviticus13:8 Umphristi kufanele amhlolisise, nangabe lelichashata selandze nesikhumba, utametfula kutsi ungcolile; loko kusifo lesisabulephelo." 
Leviticus13:9 “Nangabe umuntfu ahlaselwa sifo lesisabulephelo, kufanele aletfwe kumphristi." 
Leviticus13:10 Umphristi utamhlolisisa, nangabe kunelichashata lelimhloshana esikhunjeni sakhe lese lidzimate lagucula lunwele lwaba mhlophe, kuphindze kube nesilondza lesinebovu," 
Leviticus13:11 leso sifo sisabulephelo lesitsatsa sikhatsi lesidze singapholi, umphristi kufanele atise bantfu kutsi ungcolile, angamehlukanisi nebantfu, ngobe vele sewungcolile." 
Leviticus13:12 “Nangabe umphristi abona kutsi loko lokusabulephelo kwandza nemtimba wakhe wonkhe kusukela etulu enhloko kuye elunyaweni ngaphansi," 
Leviticus13:13 lomphristi kufanele amhlolisise; nangabe loko lokusabulephelo kwembese wonkhe umtimba, lomuntfu utametfula kutsi uhlantekile." 
Leviticus13:14 Kodvwa nangabe kuvela silondza lesinebovu, utawuba ngulongcolile." 
Leviticus13:15 Nangabe umphristi asibona lesilondza lesinebovu, utawumetfula kutsi ungcolile, lesilondza lesinebovu singcolile, ngobe sisabulephelo." 
Leviticus13:16 Nangabe lesilondza sigucuka siba mhlophe, kufanele aye kumphristi." 
Leviticus13:17 Umphristi kufanele amhlolisise; nangabe lesilondza sesigucuke saba mhlophe, umphristi utawumetfula ngekwemtsetfo kutsi sewuhlantekile, ngobe vele uhlantekile." 
Leviticus13:18 “Nangabe umuntfu anelitfumba esikhunjeni sakhe bese liyaphola," 
Leviticus13:19 lapho belikhona khona kube nelidzengedla lelimhlophe nome lichashata lelicwebetelako kantsi libovu sakubamhlophe, kufanele atibonakalise kumphristi." 
Leviticus13:20 Umphristi utamhlolisisa; nakabona kutsi ligubhile, neboya lobukulo sebumhlophe, utawumetfula ngekwemtsetfo kutsi ungcolile; kusifo lesisabulephelo lesesichume kulesibati selitfumba." 
Leviticus13:21 Kodvwa nangabe umphristi utsite uyamhlolisisa wakhandza kutsi kute boya lobumhlophe kulo kantsi nalelichashata alikagubhi futsi selinyamalele, umphristi kufanele lomuntfu amehlukanise nebantfu kuze kuphele emalanga lasikhombisa." 
Leviticus13:22 Nangabe lelichashata landza nesikhumba, umphristi kufanele atise bantfu kutsi ungcolile; kusifo lesisabulephelo." 
Leviticus13:23 Kodvwa nangabe lelichashata lingagucuki futsi lingandzi, lihleli nje lisibati selitfumba, kufanele umphristi ametfule ngekwemtsetfo kutsi uhlantekile." 
Leviticus13:24 “Nangabe umuntfu ashe esikhunjeni sakhe kwabe sekuvela silondza lesibovu sakubamhlophe nome sabamhlophe kulenyama lebovu leshile," 
Leviticus13:25 umphristi kufanele asihlolisise. Nangabe loboya lobukuso bugucuke baba mhlophe, kubonakala futsi kutsi sesigubhile, loko kusuke sekusabulephelo sebumilele kulesilondza sekusha, umphristi utawukusho kutsi ungcolile; unesifo lesisabulephelo." 
Leviticus13:26 Kodvwa nangabe umphristi utsite uyasihlolisisa, wakhandza kutsi kute boya lobumhlophe kulesilondza, kantsi asikagubhi, futsi sesifiphele, kufanele umphristi amehlukanise nebantfu, kuze kuphele emalanga lasikhombisa." 
Leviticus13:27 Ngelilanga lesikhombisa umphristi kufanele amhlolisise, nangabe sandza nemtimba, kufanele umphristi asho kutsi ungcolile; kusifo lesisabulephelo." 
Leviticus13:28 Nangabe lesilondza singakagucuki, sangete sandza nesikhumba kodvwa sashwaca lesilondza sekusha, kufanele umphristi asho kutsi uhlantekile; bekusibati nje sekusha." 
Leviticus13:29 “Nangabe lomdvuna nome lomsikati anesilondza enhloko nome esilevini," 
Leviticus13:30 umphristi kufanele asihlolisise lesilondza; nangabe siyagubha, neboya lobukuso bumtfubi kantsi buncane, lowo muntfu umphristi kufanele asho kutsi ungcolile; ngumbandzama, sifo sasenhloko nome sasesilevini." 
Leviticus13:31 Kodvwa, nangabe umphristi utsite uyasihlolisisa, wakhandza kutsi asikagubhi nekutsi kute neboya lobumnyama kuso, lomphristi kufanele lomuntfu amehlukanise kulabanye, kuze kuphele emalanga lasikhombisa." 
Leviticus13:32 Ngelilanga lesikhombisa umphristi asihlolisise futsi, nangabe asikandzi, neboya lobumtfubi abukho kuso kantsi asikagubhi," 
Leviticus13:33 kufanele ahhulwe kusale lendzawo lenesilondza; umphristi utawube sewumehlukanisa kulabanye bantfu, abe yedvwana kuze kuphele emalanga lasikhombisa." 
Leviticus13:34 Ngelilanga lesikhombisa umphristi utawuphindze asihlolisise lesilondza; nangabe singakandzi nemtimba wonkhe saze sagubha, umphristi asho kutsi uhlantekile. Kufanele ageze timphahla takhe, utawube sewuyahlanteka." 
Leviticus13:35 Kodvwa nangabe lesilondza sandza nemtimba kantsi bese kutsiwe uhlambulukile ngekwemtsetfo," 
Leviticus13:36 kufanele umphristi aphindze amhlolisise, atsi nakakhandze kutsi siyandza, asho kutsi ungcolile, futsi akadzingi nekuhlolisisa kutsi loboya bumtfubi yini; lomuntfu ungcolile." 
Leviticus13:37 Kodvwa nangabe utsite uyahlolisisa, wakhandza kutsi asikagucuki, neboya lobumnyama lobukuso sebukhulile, kusho kutsi leso silondza sesipholile; uhlambulukile, nemphristi kufanele asho kutsi uhlantekile." 
Leviticus13:38 Nangabe lomdvuna nome lomsikati anemachashata lacwebetelako esikhunjeni sakhe," 
Leviticus13:39 kufanele umphristi amhlolisise. Nangabe amhlophe, kutawube kukucubuka lokungesiyo ingoti emtimbeni; lowo muntfu uhlantekile." 
Leviticus13:40 “Nangabe indvodza icotfukelwe tinwele tayo yase iba yimphandla, ihlantekile." 
Leviticus13:41 Nangabe tinwele tayo ticotfuka ngembili elukhakhayini bese iba nemphandla lehlangana nebuso, ihlantekile." 
Leviticus13:42 Kodvwa nangabe kuvumbuka silondza lesibovu sakubamhlophe kulemphandla lesetulu enhloko nome ebuntini, loko kusabulephelo lobuvumbuka enhloko nome ebuntini." 
Leviticus13:43 Umphristi kufanele ayihlolisise; nangabe lesilondza sibovu sakubamhlophe njengebulephelo," 
Leviticus13:44 kusho kutsi lendvodza inalokusabulephelo; ngako ingcolile. Umphristi utakusho kutsi ingcolile ngenca yaleso silondza lesisenhloko. 
Leviticus13:45 “Umuntfu lonalokusabulephelo kufanele agcoke emanikiniki, tinwele atiyekele tingemahlutse angatikami, ambonye umlomo wangetulu, akhale atsi: ‘Ngingcolile, ngingcolile!’" 
Leviticus13:46 Utawuhlala angcolile yingci nakasenaloku lokusabulephelo; kufanele ahlaliswe yedvwana ethendeni lelingaphandle kwenkambu.” 
Leviticus13:47 “Nangabe kunesifo lesisasikhuntsa emphahleni leyentiwe ngensontfo nome leyelukwe ngemtiya welineni," 
Leviticus13:48 nome endvwangwini leyentiwe ngensontfo, nome ngemtiya welineni nome esikhunjeni nome ngabe yini lenye leyentiwe ngesikhumba," 
Leviticus13:49 nangabe-ke lelibala liluhlatana nome libovana endvwangwini nome kulesikhumba leselukiwe nome lesephotselwe, loko kulibala lelisasikhuntsa lekufanele likhonjiswe umphristi." 
Leviticus13:50 Umphristi utawutsi angalihlolisisa lelibala, bese lengubo uyayikhipha emkhatsini webantfu ihlale iyodvwana, kuze kuphele emalanga lasikhombisa." 
Leviticus13:51 Ngelilanga lesikhombisa utawuphindze ayihlolisise; nangabe lelibala selandzile kulendvwangu nome kulemitiya yalendvwangu nome kulesikhumba nome kulentfo leyentiwe ngesikhumba nome ngangukuphi, loko kusasikhuntsa lesitsatselwanako; leyo ngubo ingcolile." 
Leviticus13:52 Kufanele ayishise leyo ngubo, nome imicu nome umtiya nome insontfo, nome intfo yesikhumba nome yentiwe ngani, lapho kubonakale lelobala khona; ngobe phela loko kusasikhuntsa lesitsatselwanako lekufanele kushiswe." 
Leviticus13:53 Kodvwa nangabe umphristi utsite uyahlolisisa, wakhandza kutsi lelibala alikandzi nalengubo nome lemicu nome insontfo nome sikhumba nome ngabe yini-ke leyontfo," 
Leviticus13:54 utawushaya umtsetfo kutsi loko lokunalelibala kugezwe, bese ukwehlukanisa kubantfu, kuze kuphele emalanga lasikhombisa." 
Leviticus13:55 Leyontfo itawutsi ingagezwa, umphristi aphindze ayihlolisise; nangabe lelo bala alikagucuki nome alikandzi, leyo mphahla ingcolile. Ifanele kushiswa ngemlilo, nome lelibala lingekhatsi nome lingephandle kwalendvwangu." 
Leviticus13:56 “Kodvwa nangabe umphristi utsite uyayihlolisisa, wakhandza kutsi lelibala laloko lokusasikhuntsa lisukile ngesikhatsi igezwa, kufanele akapulute lendzawo lapho bekunelibala khona kulendvwangu nome kulemicu nome kulesikhumba." 
Leviticus13:57 Kodvwa nangabe lelibala liphindze libonakala kuleyo ndvwangu nome kulemicu nome kulesikhumba nome yentiwe ngani-ke loko, kutawube kusho kutsi loko lokusasikhuntsa kusasebenta; loko lokunalokusasikhuntsa kufanele kushiswe emlilweni." 
Leviticus13:58 Lendvwangu nome lemicu nome lesikhumba nome ngabe yentiwe ngani-ke lapho kunyamalele khona lelibala kutawuhlanteka emvakwekugezwa kwesibili. 
Leviticus13:59 “Lena-ke ngimitsetfo lecondzene nalokusasikhuntsa nakusengutjeni, nome emphahleni leyentiwe ngensontfo, nome emicwini yengubo nome emphahleni yesikhumba nome ngayentiwe ngani-ke. Niyawuyisebentisa ekwehlukaniseni nasekuphawuleni lokungcolile nalokuhlantekile.”" 
Leviticus14:1 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi:" 
Leviticus14:2 “Lena ngimitsetfo yekuhlanjululwa kwemuntfu lonalokusabulephelo nakaletfwa kumphristi: 
Leviticus14:3 Umphristi utawuphumela ngaphandle kwenkambu ayewumhlolisisa. Nangabe ukhandze kutsi lesigulane sesiphilisiwe kuloku lokusabulephelo," 
Leviticus14:4 umphristi utawukhipha umyalo kutsi kuletfwe tinyoni letimbili letiphilako kanye netinkhuni temsedari, nemtiya lobovu ngalokutopele, nehisophu, kwentelwe lowo lotewuhlanjululwa." 
Leviticus14:5 Umphristi utawube sewuyala kutsi kubulawe lenye yaletinyoni, ibulawelwe eludziweni lolusemantini lageletako." 
Leviticus14:6 Utawube sewutsatsa lena lephilako kanye naletinkhuni temsedari, nalomtiya lobovu ngalokutopele, nehisophu, akwenye engatini yalena lebulawelwe emantini lageletako." 
Leviticus14:7 Kufanele afafate lesigulane kasikhombisa, bese umetfula kutsi uhlambulukile, akhulule nalenyoni lephilako, itindizele iye esigangeni." 
Leviticus14:8 “Umuntfu lohlanjululwako kufanele ageze timphahla takhe, ahhule tonkhe tinwele, ageze umtimba wakhe emantini, bese uyahlambuluka-ke. Emvakwaloko angancandzeka abuyele enkambu, ahlale ngaphandle kwelithende lakhe kuze kuphele emalanga lasikhombisa." 
Leviticus14:9 Ngelilanga lesikhombisa kufanele ahhule tonkhe tinwele enhloko yakhe, ashefe silevu, nemashiya, nako konkhe lokusatinwele. Kufanele ageze tingubo takhe tekwembatsa kanye nemtimba wakhe, utawuhlambuluka." 
Leviticus14:10 “Ngelilanga lesiphohlongo kufanele aletse emazinyane emvu lamabili lamadvuna nalelisikati lelinemnyaka munye budzala, onkhe angabi nasiyela, aletse nemalitha langaba sikhombisa emphuphu lecolisakele lehlanganiswe nemafutsa kube ngumnikelo walokutinhlavu, aletse nemafutsa langaba yincenye yelitha." 
Leviticus14:11 Umphristi lowenta lenkonzo yekuhlambulula uyawuletsa kuSimakadze lomuntfu lotewuhlanjululwa amletse kanye naletintfo ekungeneni kwelithende lekuhlangana. 
Leviticus14:12 “Umphristi utawutsatsa linye lalamazinyane lamadvuna alinikele njengemnikelo welicala kanye nemafutsa langaba yincenye yelitha, awetfule kutsi kube ngumnikelo wekujikitiswa embikwaSimakadze." 
Leviticus14:13 Kufanele lelizinyane lemvu alibulalele endzaweni lapho kwentelwa khona umnikelo wesono kanye nemnikelo wekushiswa endzaweni lengcwele. Umnikelo welicala, njengemnikelo wesono, ngekwemphristi, ngobe ungcwele kakhulu." 
Leviticus14:14 Umphristi utawube sewutsatsa litsantana lengati yemnikelo welicala, abhoce lihwandza lendlebe yangesekudla yalowo lotewuhlanjululwa, nesitfupha sakhe sangesekudla, naqukulu wangesekudla." 
Leviticus14:15 Umphristi utawutsatsa libinta lemafutsa awatsele entsendzeni yesandla sakhe sangesancele," 
Leviticus14:16 acwilise umuno wakhe wangesekudla, afafate incenye yalamafutsa kasikhombisa embikwaSimakadze." 
Leviticus14:17 Lamafutsa lasele entsendzeni yesandla sakhe, lamanye awo umphristi utawabhoca endlebeni yangesekudla, nasesitfupheni sangesekudla, nakuqukulu wangesekudla salowo lotewuhlanjululwa, etikwengati yemnikelo welicala." 
Leviticus14:18 Lawa lajinge asala entsendzeni yesandla semphristi, kufanele awesulele enhloko yalona lohlanjululwako, amentele inhlawulo yekubuyisana kuSimakadze." 
Leviticus14:19 “Umphristi kufanele ente umhlatjelo wemnikelo wesono, entele lona lotewuhlanjululwa inhlawulo yekubuyisana, khona atewuhlanjululwa ekungcoleni kwakhe. Emvakwaloko utawuhlaba lomnikelo wekushiswa," 
Leviticus14:20 bese umphristi ukunikela elatini kanye nemnikelo walokutinhlavu, amentele inhlawulo yekubuyisana, utawube sewuyahlambuluka." 
Leviticus14:21 “Kodvwa, nangabe angeke akhone ngobe aphuyile, kufanele atsatse lizinyane lelidvuna litewuba ngumnikelo welicala litewujikitiswa, khona litewuba yinhlawulo yekubuyisana kwakhe naSimakadze, aletse nemphuphu lengaba ngemalitha lamabili lebhicwe nemafutsa kube ngumnikelo walokutinhlavu kanye nemafutsa langaba yincenye yelitha," 
Leviticus14:22 nematuba lamabili nome emavukutfu lamabili lasemancane, loko langakhona kukwenta; lelinye litawuba lemnikelo wesono, lelinye libe lemnikelo wekushiswa." 
Leviticus14:23 “Ngelilanga lesiphohlongo kufanele akuletse kumphristi ekungeneni kwelithende lekuhlangana embikwaSimakadze khona kutemhlambulula. 
Leviticus14:24 Umphristi utawutsatsa lelizinyane lemnikelo welicala kanye nemafutsa langaba yincenye yelitha. Umphristi utawube sewuyakunikela kube ngumnikelo wekujikitiswa embikwaSimakadze. 
Leviticus14:25 Utawuhlaba lelizinyane lemvu lelingumnikelo welicala, bese utsatsa ingati yalo uyibhoca ehwandzeni lendlebe yangesekudla, nasesitfupheni sangesekudla, nakuqukulu wangesekudla salowo lotewuhlanjululwa." 
Leviticus14:26 Umphristi utawube sewutsatsa lamanye emafutsa awatsele entsendzeni yesandla sangesancele," 
Leviticus14:27 bese ufafata ngenkhotsa yangesekudla sakhe, lamafutsa lasesandleni sangesancele, awafafate kasikhombisa embikwaSimakadze." 
Leviticus14:28 Umphristi uyakwesulela incenye yalamafutsa lasesandleni sakhe ehwandzeni lendlebe yangesekudla yalowo lotewuhlanjululwa, nasesitfupheni sakhe sangesekudla, nakuqukulu wakhe wangesekudla, endzaweni lapho kubhocwe khona ingati yesono." 
Leviticus14:29 Umphristi lamafutsa lasala lapha esandleni sakhe utawabhoca enhloko yalowo lotewuhlanjululwa, kuze amentele inhlawulo yekubuyisana kuSimakadze." 
Leviticus14:30 Nangabe lomuntfu angakhona, utawube sewunikela linye lalamavukutfu lamabili lasemancane." 
Leviticus14:31 Umuntfu utawunikela ngaloko langakhona kukunikela, linye libe ngumnikelo wesono, lelinye libe ngumnikelo wekushiswa kanye nemnikelo walokutinhlavu. Ngako-ke umphristi utakwentela lowo lotewuhlanjululwa inhlawulo yekubuyisana kuSimakadze.”" 
Leviticus14:32 Lona-ke ngumtsetfo locondzene nesifo salokusabulephelo kulowo longeke akhone kukhokha loko lokucondzene nekuhlanjululwa kwakhe. 
Leviticus14:33 Simakadze wakhuluma kuboMosi na-Aroni, watsi:" 
Leviticus14:34 “Niyawutsi naningena eveni laseKhenani, lengininika lona libe lenu, bese ngishaya indlu ngesikhuntsa," 
Leviticus14:35 umniyo walendlu kufanele ahambe ayewubikela umphristi, afike atsi: ‘Ngibone sikhuntsa lena endlini yami.’" 
Leviticus14:36 Umphristi kufanele akhiphe umlayeto kutsi konkhe lokungekhatsi kulendlu akukhishwe, yena asengakefiki kuteyihlola, kutawubate lapha endlini lekungahle kubitwe ngekutsi kungcolile. Emvakwaloko umphristi utawungena ahlolisise lendlu." 
Leviticus14:37 Utawube sewuhlolisisa lesikhuntsa lesiselubondzeni lwalendlu, nangabe lesikhuntsa sitigojana letiluhlatana nome letibovana letibholeke kulolubondza," 
Leviticus14:38 umphristi kufanele aphume kuleyondlu avale umnyango wayo, kuze kuphele emalanga lasikhombisa." 
Leviticus14:39 Ngelilanga lesikhombisa umphristi utawubuyela atewuhlolisisa lendlu. Nangabe lesikhuntsa sesandze nalo lonkhe lolubondza lwalendlu," 
Leviticus14:40 kufanele akhiphe umtsetfo kutsi lamatje lasanalesifo afutwe kulendlu alahlwe endzaweni lengcolile lengaphandle kwelidolobha. 
Leviticus14:41 Kufanele lingekhatsi lonkhe lelubondza lwalendlu luhwaywe, kutsi loko lokuhwaywe kulo kubutfwe kuyewulahlwa endzaweni lengcolile ngekwemtsetfo, lengaphandle kwelidolobha." 
Leviticus14:42 Kufanele kuchitjelwe leyo ndzawo ngalamanye ematje, yonkhe indlu ibhadvwe ngeludzaka lolusha." 
Leviticus14:43 “Nangabe lesifo siphindze sivela kulendlu emvakwekube lamatje asake adzilitwa kwahwaywa nalolubondza lwaphindze lwabhadvwa kabusha," 
Leviticus14:44 umphristi kufanele angene kulendlu atewuhlolisisa lesifo; nangabe akhandza kutsi lesifo sesandzile futsi kulendlu, kusuke kusifo sesikhuntsa lesitsatselwanako, leyondlu ingcolile." 
Leviticus14:45 Kufanele leyondlu idzilitwe, ematje ayo, neludzaka lwayo, netingodvo tayo, neluphahla lwayo; konkhe kubutfwe kuyewulahlwa ngaphandle kwelidolobha endzaweni lengcolile ngekwemtsetfo." 
Leviticus14:46 “Lowo longena kuleyondlu ngesikhatsi isavaliwe utawuba ngulongcolile kuze kuhlwe. 
Leviticus14:47 Lowo lolala kuleyondlu kufanele ageze timphahla takhe, nalowo lodlela kuyo kufanele ageze timphahla takhe." 
Leviticus14:48 “Kodvwa nangabe umphristi utsite nakahlolisisa, wakhandza kutsi lesifo asikandzi nalolubondza emvakwekwakhiwa kabusha, kufanele ayetfule kutsi ihlambulukile, ngobe phela lesifo sesiphelile." 
Leviticus14:49 Kuze ahlambulule lendlu, kufanele atsatse tinyoni letimbili, netinkhuni temsedari, nemtiya lobovu ngalokutopele kanye nehisophu," 
Leviticus14:50 bese ubulala lenye yaletinyoni, ayibulalele eludziweni lolusemantini lageletako." 
Leviticus14:51 Utawube sewutsatsa letinkhuni temsedari, nehishophu, nalomtiya lobovu ngalokutopele kanye nalenyoni lephilako, akwenye engatini yalena lebulewe, kanye nasemantini lageletako, afafate lendlu kasikhombisa." 
Leviticus14:52 Lendlu utayihlambulula asebentisa lengati yalenyoni, nalamanti lageletako, nalenyoni lephilako, naletinkhuni temsedari, nehisophu kanye nemtiya lobovu ngalokutopele." 
Leviticus14:53 Utawube sewukhiphela lenyoni lephilako ngaphandle kwelidolobha, ayiyekele itindizele iye esigangeni. “Uyakuyenta kanjalo-ke inhlawulo yekuhlanjululwa kwendlu. Leyondlu iyawuhlambuluka.”" 
Leviticus14:54 Lena-ke ngimitsetfo lecondzene nalokusabulephelo, netifo tesikhumba letitsatselwanako, nelukhwekhwe," 
Leviticus14:55 nalokusasikhuntsa setimphahla nesetindlu," 
Leviticus14:56 nekuvuvuka, nekucubuka, nemachashata lamhlophe," 
Leviticus14:57 lekufanele ubone wati ngako kutsi intfo ingcolile ngekwemtsetfo nome ihlambulukile yini. Lena-ke ngimitsetfo yalokusabulephelo netifo tesikhumba letitsatselwanako kanye nalokusasikhuntsa. 
Leviticus15:1 Simakadze wakhuluma kuboMosi na-Aroni, watsi:" 
Leviticus15:2 “Khuluma esiveni sema-Israyeli utsi kuso: ‘Nangabe indvodza inalokuvutako, loko lokuvutako kungcolile." 
Leviticus15:3 Ngulowo-ke umtsetfo wekungcola, nome ngabe lokuvuta kuyachubeka nome sekuncamukile, vele seyingcolile." 
Leviticus15:4 Wonkhe umbhedze lelala kuwo nako konkhe lehlala kuko lendvodza, kutawungcola," 
Leviticus15:5 nome ngubani lotsintsa lombhedze wayo, kufanele ageze timphahla takhe ngemanti, aphindze ageze nemtimba wakhe, abe ngulongcolile kuze kuhlwe." 
Leviticus15:6 Lowo lohlala lapho bekuhleti khona leyo ndvodza, kufanele ageze timphahla takhe nemtimba wakhe ngemanti, abe ngulongcolile kuze kuhlwe." 
Leviticus15:7 Lowo lotsintsa leyo ndvodza levutelwako, kufanele ageze timphahla takhe nemtimba wakhe ngemanti, abe ngulongcolile kuze kuhlwe." 
Leviticus15:8 Nangabe lendvodza legulako ikhafulela umuntfu lohlantekile ngematse, lomuntfu kufanele ageze timphahla takhe nemtimba wakhe ngemanti, abe ngulongcolile kuze kuhlwe." 
Leviticus15:9 Tonkhe tihlalo lahlala kuto nakagibele, titawuba nguletingcolile." 
Leviticus15:10 Bonkhe labo labake batsintsa nome yini leke yaba ngaphansi kwakhe, nabo batawuba ngulabangcolile kuze kuhlwe." 
Leviticus15:11 Bonkhe labo labatsintfwa ngulendvodza ingakagezi tandla, kufanele bageze timphahla tabo nemitimba yabo ngemanti, babe ngulabangcolile kuze kuhlwe." 
Leviticus15:12 Ludziwo lolutsintfwe ngulendvodza, kufanele lubhidlitwe, nangabe kusitja selugodvo kufanele sihlanjululwe ngemanti." 
Leviticus15:13 “ ‘Nangabe lendvodza levutelwako seyiphilile, kufanele ihlale emalanga lasikhombisa ekuhlanjululwa kwayo, igeze timphahla tayo nemtimba wayo emantini lageletako, itawube seyiyahlambuluka." 
Leviticus15:14 Ngelilanga lesiphohlongo kufanele itsatse ematuba lamabili nome emazini emavukutfu lamabili ite embikwaSimakadze ekungeneni kwelithende lekuhlangana, ifike iwetfule kumphristi." 
Leviticus15:15 Umphristi kufanele anikele lelinye libe ngumnikelo wesono, leli lelinye libe ngumhlatjelo wekushiswa. Ngaleyo ndlela umphristi uyakwentela leyo ndvodza inhlawulo yekubuyisana kuSimakadze ngekuvutisa kwayo." 
Leviticus15:16 “ ‘Nangabe indvodza ishaye litubuko, kufanele igeze wonkhe umtimba wayo ngemanti, ihlale ingcolile kuze kuhlwe." 
Leviticus15:17 Yonkhe imphahla leyentiwe ngendvwangu nome ngesikhumba lesitselwe ngulesidvodza, kufanele kugezwe, kutawungcola kuze kuhlwe." 
Leviticus15:18 Nangabe indvodza ilele nemfati kwase kuchitseka sidvodza, bobabili bafanele bageze imitimba yabo ngemanti, babe ngulabangcolile kuze kuhlwe.’ ”" 
Leviticus15:19 “ ‘Nangabe lomsikati aye esikhatsini, kungcola kwakhe kuyawumtsatsa emalanga lasikhombisa. Lowo lomtsintsako utawuhlala angcolile kuze kuhlwe." 
Leviticus15:20 Konkhe lalala kuko nalahlala kuko asesekulesimo, kutawungcola." 
Leviticus15:21 Wonkhe lotsintsa intfo labekalele kuyo, kufanele ageze timphahla takhe nemtimba wakhe, ahlale angulongcolile kuze kuhlwe." 
Leviticus15:22 Lowo lotsintsa nome ngabe yini leyo labehleti etikwayo, kufanele ageze timphahla takhe nemtimba wakhe, ahlale angulongcolile kuze kuhlwe." 
Leviticus15:23 Yonkhe intfo lake wahlala kuyo, nome ngumbhedze, nome ngabe sihlalo lake wahlala kuso, lowo lositsintsako utawungcola kuze kuhlwe." 
Leviticus15:24 Nangabe indvodza ilala naye, nayo itawutselelwa lokungcola kwasesikhatsini. Itawuhlala ingcolile kuze kuphele emalanga lasikhombisa. Umbedze lelala kuwo lendvodza nawo utawungcola." 
Leviticus15:25 “ ‘Nangabe lona lomsikati achubeka kopha kuze kwendlule emalanga lavamise kopha ngawo, utawuchubeka nekungcola kuze kuphele kopha kwaleyo nyanga." 
Leviticus15:26 Wonkhe umbhedze lalala kuwo nome yini lahlala etikwayo, nayo itawuchubeka ibe ngulengcolile, yingci nakasachubeka nekopha." 
Leviticus15:27 Wonkhe umuntfu lotsintsa leto tintfo latitsintsile, utawungcola; kufanele ageze timphahla takhe nemtimba wakhe ngemanti, abe ngulongcolile kuze kuhlwe." 
Leviticus15:28 Kodvwa nangabe asahlambululekile kulokopha kwakhe, uyawutibalela yena emalanga lasikhombisa emvakwaloko uyawube sewuhlambulukile." 
Leviticus15:29 Ngelilanga lesiphohlongo uyawutsatsa ematuba lamabili nome emazini lamabili emavukutfu awaletse kumphristi ekungeneni kwelithende lekuhlangana. 
Leviticus15:30 Umphristi utawunikela lelinye libe ngumnikelo wesono, lelinye libe ngumnikelo wekushiswa. Ngaleyo ndlela umphristi uyawumentela inhlawulo yekubuyisana kuSimakadze ngekungcola kwakhe kwekopha." 
Leviticus15:31 “ ‘Kufanele uwehlukise kanjalo-ke ema-Israyeli etintfweni letingabenta bangcole, kuze bangafeli ekungcoleni kwabo ngekwedzelela lithende lami lekukhontela nome indzawo yami lengcwele lesemkhatsini wabo." 
Leviticus15:32 “ ‘Lena ngimitsetfo lecondzene nendvodza levutisako, nalengcoliswe kucitseka kwesidvodza," 
Leviticus15:33 neyemfati nakasesikhatsini, nalecondzene nendvodza nome nalomsikati lovuta bovu, nalecondzene nendvodza lelala nalomsikati longcolile.’ ”" 
Leviticus16:1 Kwatsi kube kufe emadvodzana lamabili a-Aroni ngesizatfu sekutsi banikela kuSimakadze ngemlilo longengcwele," 
Leviticus16:2 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi watsi: “Tjela Aroni, umnakenu, kutsi angangeni nome ngunini emvakwendvwangu lesendzaweni lengcwelengcwele, embikwesihlalo semusa lesisebhokisini lesivumelwane funa afe, ngobe ngivela ngisefini lelisetikwesihlalo semusa." 
Leviticus16:3 “Angakangeni endzaweni lengcwelengcwele kufanele ete nenkunzana yemnikelo wesono kanye nesihhanca semhlatjelo wekushiswa. 
Leviticus16:4 “Ngaphambi kwekutsi Aroni angene endzaweni lengcwelengcwele, kufanele atigeze ngemanti bese ugcoka letembatfo tebuphristi: ingubo lengcwele yelineni lete umkhono, nelibhuluko langaphansi lelineni, nelibhande laselukhalweni kanye nemshuculo wenhloko." 
Leviticus16:5 “Aroni uyakwemukela esandleni sema-Israyeli tiphongo letimbili temnikelo wesono nesihhanca sinye semnikelo wekushiswa. 
Leviticus16:6 Aroni utawunikela ngalenkunzana ibe ngumhlatjelo wesono, atentele yena nemndeni wakhe inhlawulo yekubuyisana kuSimakadze." 
Leviticus16:7 Emvakwaloko Aroni kufanele atsatse letiphongo letimbili atetfule kuSimakadze ekungeneni kwelithende lekuhlangana. 
Leviticus16:8 Utawube sewenta tinkatho tibe timbili, lenye ibe yaSimakadze lenye kutsiwe ya-Azazeli." 
Leviticus16:9 Aroni utawunikela ngalembuti lekhetseke ngenkatho kutsi ibe yaSimakadze, ayinikele ibe ngumnikelo wesono." 
Leviticus16:10 Lembuti ledliwe yinkatho kutsi ibe ya-Azazeli itawuletfwa iphila embikwaSimakadze, kwentiwe ngayo inhlawulo yekubuyisana kuSimakadze ngekutsi iyekelwe iye ehlane ibe ngeya-Azazeli." 
Leviticus16:11 “Aroni kufanele anikele ngalenkunzana lekufanele ibe ngumhlatjelo wesono sakhe, ente inhlawulo yekubuyisana kwakhe nekwemndeni wakhe kuSimakadze, bese uyayibulala-ke." 
Leviticus16:12 Emvakwaloko utawube sewutsatsa sitja semlilo lesigcwele emalahle lavutsako latsetfwe elatini lelisembikwaSimakadze, Aroni atsatse nemabinta lamabili esandla emphepho lenuka kamnandzi nalecolisakele, bese ukungenisa endzaweni lengcwelengcwele, ngale kwendvwangu." 
Leviticus16:13 Lemphepho utawube sewuyifaka emlilweni embikwaSimakadze, lentfutfu itawube seyibhunya ize isitselise sihlalo semusa selibhokisi lesivumelwane, khona angetikufa." 
Leviticus16:14 Kufanele enye umuno wakhe kulengati yalenkunzana, bese uyifafata ngemuno etikwesihlalo semusa; aphindze ayifafate kasikhombisa embikwesihlalo semusa." 
Leviticus16:15 “Emvakwaloko uyawube sewubulala lembuti kutsi itewuba ngumnikelo wesono sesive sonkhe, bese ungenisa lengati yayo ngale kwendvwangu ente njengobe entile ngengati yenkunzi, afafate ngayo etikwesihlalo semusa nasembikwaso." 
Leviticus16:16 Ngaleyo ndlela uyakwentela indzawo lengcwelengcwele inhlawulo yekubuyisana ngenca yekungcola kwebantfu baka-Israyeli ngekwemtsetfo nangenca yekona kwabo nato tonkhe tono tabo, alentele njalo nelithende lekuhlangana lelihlala emkhatsini wabo, litungeletwe kungcola kwabo ngekwemtsetfo." 
Leviticus16:17 Kufanele kubete lobasethendeni lekuhlangana kusukela ngesikhatsi Aroni nakangena endzaweni lengcwelengcwele kuyawukwenta inhlawulo yekubuyisana kuSimakadze kuze kube sikhatsi sekuphuma kwakhe, asente kuSimakadze inhlawulo yekubuyisana kwakhe nekwemndeni wakhe kanye nekwesive sonkhe sema-Israyeli." 
Leviticus16:18 Uyawuphuma ete elatini embikwaSimakadze ente inhlawulo yekubuyisana kwelilati kuSimakadze. Uyawutsatsa lenye yalengati yalenkunzi nalenye yalengati yembuti ayibeke etimphondvweni tonkhe telilati. 
Leviticus16:19 Ingati uyawuyifafata ngemuno wakhe kasikhombisa kulelilati atelihlambulula ekungcoleni kwema-Israyeli, alehlukanisele Simakadze libe ngcwele.”" 
Leviticus16:20 “Uyawutsi Aroni angacedza kwenta inhlawulo yekubuyisana kwendzawo lengcwelengcwele nekwelithende lekuhlangana nekwelilati, bese uletsa lembuti lephilako," 
Leviticus16:21 abeke tandla takhe etikwenhloko yayo ativume tonkhe tiphambuko tesive saka-Israyeli, nabo bonkhe bubi babo, netono tabo, akubeke enhloko yalembuti. Lembuti uyawube sewuyayikhulula kutsi iye ehlane ihanjiswe nguleyo ndvodza lebekelwe lowo msebenti." 
Leviticus16:22 Leyo mbuti iyakwetfwala tonkhe leto tono tabo iye nato ehlane kalashameshame, lembuti iyawuyichuba leyo ndvodza iyimikise eveni lelingenalutfo." 
Leviticus16:23 “Aroni uyawube sewubuyela ethendeni lekuhlangana, afike akhumule letembatfo takhe leticolisakele labetigcoke nakayewungena endzaweni lengcwelengcwele, atishiye khona lapho." 
Leviticus16:24 Utawutigeza umtimba ngemanti, agezele endzaweni lengcwele, bese ugcoka letimphahla takhe temihla ngemihla. Emvakwaloko utawuphuma atinikelele yena nesive sonkhe ngemnikelo wekushiswa, ente kuSimakadze inhlawulo yekubuyisana kwakhe nekwesive sonkhe." 
Leviticus16:25 Emanoni emnikelo wesono uyawashisela etikwelilati. 
Leviticus16:26 Lendvodza lekhululele lembuti lesesulelo kufanele igeze timphahla tayo nemtimba wayo ngemanti, emvakwaloko seyingancandzeka ibuyele enkambu ngekhatsi." 
Leviticus16:27 Inkunzi nalembuti yeminikelo yesono, ingati yayo lengeniswe endzaweni lengcwelengcwele kuyawukwenta inhlawulo yekubuyisana kuSimakadze kufanele kutsatfwe kukhishelwe ngaphandle kwenkambu; tikhumba tato, nenyama yato, nekwangekhatsi kwato kushiswe ngemlilo." 
Leviticus16:28 Lowo lobekashisa loku kufanele ageze timphahla takhe nemtimba wakhe ngemanti, emvakwaloko sekangangena ngekhatsi enkambu.”" 
Leviticus16:29 “Lona-ke ngumtsetfo lekufanele niwugcine titukulwane ngetitukulwane: Ngelilanga lelishumi enyangeni yesikhombisa ema-Israyeli, nebetive labasemkhatsini wenu kufanele bazile, bangadli, bangasebenti," 
Leviticus16:30 ngobe ngalelo langa nitakwentela inhlawulo yekubuyisana kuSimakadze, khona nitewuhlambuluka etonweni tenu nibe msulwa embikwaSimakadze." 
Leviticus16:31 Lelo lilanga lekuphumula, kufanele nizile, ningadli, ningasebenti. Lomtsetfo uyawuhlala ukhona titukulwane ngetitukulwane." 
Leviticus16:32 UMphristi Lomkhulu logcotjwe ngalokufanele nalobekwe kulandzela uyise, nguye loyawukwenta inhlawulo yekubuyisana kuSimakadze. Uyawugcoka letembatfo tebuphristi," 
Leviticus16:33 ente kuSimakadze inhlawulo yekubuyisana kwendzawo lengcwelengcwele nekwelithende lekuhlangana, nekwelilati, nekwebaphristi kanye nekwesive sonkhe." 
Leviticus16:34 Lomtsetfo kufanele ugcinwe, wentiwe titukulwane ngetitukulwane. Inhlawulo yekubuyisana kuSimakadze iyakwentiwa kanye ngemnyaka, yentelwe tonkhe tono tema-Israyeli.” Konkhe kwentiwa njengobe Simakadze abeyale Mosi."
