Leviticus17:1 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi watsi: 
Leviticus17:2 “Khuluma ku-Aroni nakumadvodzana akhe nakuwo onkhe ema-Israyeli, utsi: ‘Naku-ke Simakadze layale kutsi kwentiwe:" 
Leviticus17:3 Wonkhe um-Israyeli lobulala inkhomo nome lizinyane lemvu nome imbuti, akubulalele ngekhatsi nome ngaphandle kwenkambu," 
Leviticus17:4 angakakuletsi ekungeneni kwelithende lekuhlangana kutsi atewukunikela kuSimakadze ethendeni lekukhontela embikwaSimakadze, lowo muntfu unelicala lekucitsa ingati. Kufanele ancunywe esiveni sakubo, ngobe sewucitse ingati." 
Leviticus17:5 Loku lokucondvwe ngulomtsetfo kutsi sive sema-Israyeli siletse kuSimakadze leto tilwane besitibulala esigangeni. Manje sesitawutiletsa kumphristi, ekungeneni kwelithende lekuhlangana tinikelwe kuSimakadze njengemhlatjelo wekuthula." 
Leviticus17:6 Umphristi utawufafata ingati elatini laSimakadze ekungeneni kwelithende lekuhlangana, ashise lamanoni, kube liphunga lelinuka lusi lolumnandzi kuSimakadze." 
Leviticus17:7 Kufanele bangasakuphindzi kunikela imihlatjelo yabo kuletithico letisatimbuti, labaphinga nato. Loku kutawuba ngumtsetfo wetitukulwane ngetitukulwane.’" 
Leviticus17:8 “Khuluma kubo utsi: ‘Wonkhe um-Israyeli nome wetive lohlala nani lonikela ngemnikelo wekushiswa nome ngemhlatjelo," 
Leviticus17:9 kodvwa angawuletsi ekungeneni kwelithende lekuhlangana kutewunikela ngawo kuSimakadze, lowo muntfu kufanele ancunywe esiveni sakubo." 
Leviticus17:10 “ ‘Wonkhe umIsrayeli nome wetive lohlala nani lodla ingati, ngiyawumelana naye ngimncume esiveni sakubo." 
Leviticus17:11 Phela kuphila kwemtimba kusengatini; mine ngininike ingati kutsi ifeze inkonzo yekuhlenga timphilo tenu etikwelilati. Ngobe yingati lefeza inkonzo yekubuyisana nekuhlenga imphilo. 
Leviticus17:12 Ngako-ke nine ma-Israyeli, ngitsi kini: Ningacali niyidle ingati, kanjalo nabo futsi betive lebahlala emkhatsini wenu bangacali bayidle ingati." 
Leviticus17:13 “ ‘Wonkhe um-Israyeli nome wetive lohlala nani lotingela inyamatane nome inyoni ledliwako, kufanele aphomphise yonkhe lengati yayo, bese uyigcibedzela ngemhlaba," 
Leviticus17:14 ngobe phela kuphila kwenyama nome yasiphi silwane kusengatini yaso. Ngiko nje ngitsite kuma-Israyeli kufanele angayidli ingati nome yasiphi silwane, ngobe kuphila kwesilwane, nome ngusiphi, kusengatini yaso. Lowo loyidlako kufanele ancunywe." 
Leviticus17:15 “ ‘Wonkhe um-Israyeli nome wetive lohlala nani, lodla lokutfolakale kutifele nome kudzatjulwe tilwane tesiganga, kufanele ageze timphahla takhe nemtimba wakhe ngemanti, abe ngulongcolile kuze kuhlwe; utawube sewuyahlambuluka." 
Leviticus17:16 Kodvwa nangabe akatigezi timphahla takhe nemtimba wakhe ngemanti utawuba nelicala.’ ” 
Leviticus18:1 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi:" 
Leviticus18:2 “Khuluma kuma-Israyeli utsi: ‘NginguSimakadze, Nkulunkulu wenu." 
Leviticus18:3 Ningayenti imikhuba yaseGibhithe, lapho nase nahlala khona, futsi aniyikwenta njengaloku benta eveni laseKhenani, lapho nginimikisa khona. Ningacali niyente lemikhuba yabo." 
Leviticus18:4 Hloniphani imitsetfo yami, nicaphele kulandzela timiso tami. NginguSimakadze longuNkulunkulu wenu." 
Leviticus18:5 Gcinani, nihambe, ngetimiso nemitsetfo yami, ngobe lowo loyihloniphako uyawuphila ngayo. NginguSimakadze." 
Leviticus18:6 “ ‘Ungalali nesinini sakho. NginguSimakadze. 
Leviticus18:7 “ ‘Ungamhlazisi uyihlo ngekulala nenyoko, ungumake wakho, ungalali naye." 
Leviticus18:8 “ ‘Ungalali nemkayihlo, loko kutawuhlazisa uyihlo." 
Leviticus18:9 “ ‘Ungalali nadzadzewenu, nome ayindvodzakati yeyihlo nome ayindvodzakati yenyoko, nome watalwa kulelo khaya nome watalelwa kulenye indzawo." 
Leviticus18:10 “ ‘Ungalali nendvodzakati yendvodzana yakho nome yendvodzakati yakho; loko kuyakuhlazisa. 
Leviticus18:11 “ ‘Ungalali nendvodzakati yemkayihlo, letelwe nguyihlo; ingudzadzewenu." 
Leviticus18:12 “ ‘Ungalali nadzadzewaboyihlo; usinini sakho sengati ngeyihlo. 
Leviticus18:13 “ ‘Ungalali nadzadzewabonyoko, ngobe usinini sakho sengati ngenyoko." 
Leviticus18:14 “ ‘Ungamhlazisi umnakaboyihlo ngekulala nemkakhe; ungunyoko. 
Leviticus18:15 “ ‘Ungalali namalokatana wakho. Ungumkandvodzana yakho, ngako ungalali naye." 
Leviticus18:16 “ ‘Ungalali nemkhula wakho, loko kungahlazisa lomnakenu." 
Leviticus18:17 “ ‘Ungalali nemfati kanye nendvodzakati yakhe. Ungalali ngisho nendvodzakati yendvodzana yakhe nome nendvodzakati yendvodzakati yakhe; batinini takhe tengati. Kubi loko. 
Leviticus18:18 “ ‘Dzadzewabomkakho ungamtsatsi njengemfati loyimbangi, udzimate ulale naye umkakho asaphila." 
Leviticus18:19 “ ‘Ungasondzeli kulomsikati utewulala naye, kantsi usangcoliswe kubasesikhatsini." 
Leviticus18:20 Ungalali nemkamakhelwane wakho utingcolise ngaye. 
Leviticus18:21 Unganikeli ngemntfwanakho kutsi abe ngumhlatjelo kuMoloki, ngobe kufanele ningalihlambalati libito laNkulunkulu wenu. NginguSimakadze." 
Leviticus18:22 Ungalali nalomdvuna kube shangatsi ulele nalomsikati; loko kusinengiso. 
Leviticus18:23 Ungalali nesilwane, utingcolise ngaso. Lomsikati angabotinikela esilwaneni kutsi silale naye; loko kuhlanekela tintfo." 
Leviticus18:24 “ ‘Ningatingcolisi nome nganguyiphi yaletindlela, ngobe naletive lengitatikhipha lapho niya khona titingcolise kanjalo." 
Leviticus18:25 Ngisho nelive imbala selangcoliseka; ngako ngalijezisela leso sono salo, lelive lavele latihlanta leto takhamiti talo." 
Leviticus18:26 Kodvwa nine kufanele nitigcine timiso tami nemitsetfo yami. Ema-Israyeli nome betive labahlala emkhatsini wenu bangacali bente ngisho nome kunye kwaletintfo letisinengiso," 
Leviticus18:27 ngobe tonkhe letintfo tatentiwa bantfu lababehlala kulelive lenitawungena kulo, lase liyangcola." 
Leviticus18:28 Uma nike nalingcolisa lelive, litanihlanta njengobe latihlanta letive betihlala kulo." 
Leviticus18:29 Lowo lowenta letintfo letisinengiso kufanele ancunywe esiveni sakubo. 
Leviticus18:30 “ ‘Gcinani lemiyalo yami, ningayilandzeli lemikhuba nemasiko lababewenta nisengakafiki. Ningatingcolisi ngayo. NginguSimakadze, Nkulunkulu wenu.’ ”" 
Leviticus19:1 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi:" 
Leviticus19:2 “Khuluma kulo lonkhe libandla lema-Israyeli, utsi: ‘Banini ngcwele, ngobe mine Simakadze, Nkulunkulu wenu, ngingcwele." 
Leviticus19:3 Nguloyo naloyo kufanele ahloniphe unina neyise, agcine emaSabatha ami. NginguSimakadze, Nkulunkulu wenu." 
Leviticus19:4 “ ‘Ningagucuki bese nikhonta tithico nome nitentele bonkulunkulu lababunjwe ngensimbi. NginguSimakadze, Nkulunkulu wenu." 
Leviticus19:5 “ ‘Naninikela umhlatjelo wekuthula kuSimakadze, wunikeleleni kutsi nemukeleke." 
Leviticus19:6 Kufanele udliwe ngalona lelo langa lonikelwe ngalo nome ngakusasa kwalo; loko lokusele kwaze kwaba lilanga lesitsatfu kuyawushiswa ngemlilo. 
Leviticus19:7 Nase kudliwa ngelilanga lesitsatfu, sekusinengiso, ngeke kwemukeleke." 
Leviticus19:8 Wonkhe lokudlako uyawuba nelicala, ngobe uhlambalate lokungcwele lokukwaSimakadze. Lowo muntfu kufanele ancunywe esiveni sakubo." 
Leviticus19:9 “ ‘Nanivuna sivuno selive lenu, aniyiwuvuna eminyeleni yemasimi enu, ningakhwimiti ngisho nekukhwimita emvakwekuvuna kwenu." 
Leviticus19:10 Aniyiwubuyela ensimini yenu yemagelebisi kuyawukhwimita, ningawabutsi nemagelebisi lawele phansi nakuvunwako, niwashiyele labamphofu nemihambima. NginguSimakadze, Nkulunkulu wenu." 
Leviticus19:11 “ ‘Ningebi, ningakhohlisani. Ningacalelani emanga." 
Leviticus19:12 Ningalifungeli lite libito lami, ningalihlambalati libito laNkulunkulu wenu. NginguSimakadze." 
Leviticus19:13 “ ‘Ungamebeli makhelwane wakho; ungawubambi umholo wesisebenti kuze kube ngakusasa. 
Leviticus19:14 Ungasicalekisi sihhulu, futsi ungayetsiyi imphumphutse, kodvwa uyakwesaba Nkulunkulu wakho. NginguSimakadze." 
Leviticus19:15 “ ‘Ungehluleli ngekukhetsa, ngekulahla lomphofu ngelicala uvune lomkhulu, kodvwa mehlulele ngekulunga makhelwane wakho." 
Leviticus19:16 Ungahambi unyundzela bantfu bakini; ungamelani nekuphila kwamakhelwane wakho, nginguSimakadze." 
Leviticus19:17 “ ‘Ungamtondzi umnakenu enhlitiyweni yakho; yekhuta makhelwane wakho ungamgegi, funa wetfwale licala kanye naye." 
Leviticus19:18 Ungatibuyiseleli nome ube nemagcubu nebantfwana bebantfu bakini, kodvwa uyawutsandza makhelwane wakho njengobe utitsandza wena. NginguSimakadze." 
Leviticus19:19 “ ‘Uyawugcina imiyalo yami. Awuyiwuvuma kutsi tinkhomati takho tekhwelwe tinkunzi talolunye luhlobo. Awuyiwuhlanyela ensimini yakho tinhlobo letimbili letehlukene. Ungembatsi lutfo lolwentiwe ngetinhlobo letimbili temtiya. 
Leviticus19:20 “ ‘Nangabe indvodza ilala nengcuce yesigcili, isengakahlengwa futsi isengakakhululeki, kuyawuba licala, bayawujeziswa. Noko abayiwubulawa, ngobe lentfombatana beyisengakakhululeki." 
Leviticus19:21 Lendvodza kufanele iletse sihhanca kuSimakadze ekungeneni kwelithende lekuhlangana, sibe ngumnikelo wayo welicala kuSimakadze." 
Leviticus19:22 Umphristi uyawumentela inhlawulo yekubuyisana kuSimakadze ngalesihhanca semnikelo welicala embikwaSimakadze, leso sono sakhe siyawutsetselelwa." 
Leviticus19:23 Naningena eveni bese nihlanyela nome nguluphi luhlobo lwesihlahla lesitselako, caphelani ningasidli sitselo saso, kuze kuphele iminyaka lemitsatfu, ngobe asikavumeleki leso sihlahla." 
Leviticus19:24 Ngemnyaka wesine tonkhe titselo taso tiyawube setingcwele, setingumnikelo wekudvumisa kuSimakadze." 
Leviticus19:25 Kodvwa ngemnyaka wesihlanu ningatidla titselo taso. Ngaleyo ndlela sivuno senu siyawukwandza. NginguSimakadze, Nkulunkulu wenu." 
Leviticus19:26 “ ‘Ningayidli inyama lesenengati kuyo, ningabi tangoma nome labenta imilingo." 
Leviticus19:27 Ningatihhuli tinwele tenu etinhlafunweni tenu nasetilevini tenu nikhombise kutsi nizilile. 
Leviticus19:28 Ningatigati imitimba yenu nentele labafile nome nitibeke timphawu ngekutisika imitimba yenu; nginguSimakadze. 
Leviticus19:29 “ ‘Ungahlazisi indvodzakati yakho ngekuyenta ingwadla, funa live lonkhe ligcwale bugwadla nako konkhe kungcola." 
Leviticus19:30 Nibogcina liSabatha lami, nihloniphe indzawo yami lengcwele; nginguSimakadze." 
Leviticus19:31 “ ‘Ningayi kuyawukhendla kulabanemadloti nome kuyawuphengula etangomeni; ngobe nanenta loko, niyawuba ngulabangcolile. NginguSimakadze, Nkulunkulu wenu." 
Leviticus19:32 “ ‘Niyawutitfoba embikwalasebakhulile, nibahloniphe, nidvumise Nkulunkulu wenu. NginguSimakadze." 
Leviticus19:33 “ ‘Ungamhluphi umuntfu longumchamuki lohleti nawe eveni lakini. 
Leviticus19:34 Umchamuki lohlala eveni lakini ubomphatsa njengemuntfu wakini. Umtsandze njengobe utitsandza wena, ngobe nani nake naba tihambi eveni laseGibhithe. NginguSimakadze." 
Leviticus19:35 “ ‘Ningenti bucili nanilinganisa budze nome sisindvo nome bunyenti. 
Leviticus19:36 Nibosebentisa tilinganiso tebudze, netesisindvo kanye netebunyenti letisemtsetfweni. NginguSimakadze, Nkulunkulu wenu, lowanikhipha eGibhithe." 
Leviticus19:37 Nibogcina yonkhe imiyalo yami nemitsetfo yami niyilandzele. NginguSimakadze.’ ” 
Leviticus20:1 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi watsi: 
Leviticus20:2 “Khuluma esiveni sema-Israyeli utsi: ‘Wonkhe um-Israyeli nome wetive lohlala nani lonikela ngemntfwana wakhe akhonte Moloki, kufanele abulawe. Sive sonkhe siyawumbulala ngekumgcoba ngematje." 
Leviticus20:3 Buso bami ngiyawubufulatselisa kulowo muntfu ngimncume esiveni sakubo, ngobe phela ngekunikela ngebantfwabakhe kuMoloki ungcolise indlu yami lengcwele, wahlambalata libito lami lelingcwele." 
Leviticus20:4 Nangabe sive sivala emehlo aso singabuki ngesikhatsi lomuntfu anikela ngemntfwanakhe kuMoloki, sehluleke nekumbulala," 
Leviticus20:5 ngiyawubufulatselisa buso bami kulowo muntfu kanye nasemndenini wakhe kanye nakulabo labamlandzelako ngekugwadla nekuphinga kwakhe naMoloki, angihlubuka." 
Leviticus20:6 “ ‘Ngiyawubufulatselisa buso bami kulowo muntfu locela lusito kulabaphansi agwadle nabo ngekubalandzela; yebo, lowo muntfu ngiyawumncuma esiveni sakubo." 
Leviticus20:7 Tigcineni nibe ngcwele, ngobe mine nginguSimakadze, Nkulunkulu wenu." 
Leviticus20:8 Gcinani imitsetfo yami, niyilandzele, ngobe ngimi loningcwelisako." 
Leviticus20:9 “ ‘Umuntfu localekisa uyise nome unina, kufanele abulawe, ngobe sewucalekise uyise nome unina; ingati yakhe iyawubasetikwakhe." 
Leviticus20:10 “ ‘Nangabe indvodza iphinga nemfati walenye indvodza, nome yamakhelwane wayo, bobabili, lesiphingi nalesiphingikati, kufanele babulawe." 
Leviticus20:11 Nangabe indvodza ilala nemkayise, seyimhlazisile uyise. Bobabili, lendvodza nalomfati, kufanele babulawe; ingati yabo iyawubasetikwabo." 
Leviticus20:12 Nangabe indvodza ilala namalokatana wayo, bobabili kufanele babulawe. Loku labakwentile kuphambene nemvelo; ingati yabo iyawubasetikwabo." 
Leviticus20:13 Nangabe indvodza ilala nendvodza njengobe yenta nayilele nalomsikati, bobabili bente intfo lesinengiso. Kufanele babulawe, ingati yabo iyawubasetikwabo." 
Leviticus20:14 Nangabe indvodza ishada nendvodzakati kanye nenina walendvodzakati, loko kubi. Lendvodza kanye nabo kufanele bashiswe ngemlilo, khona kungetikuba khona lokusinengiso emkhatsini wenu." 
Leviticus20:15 Nangabe indvodza ilala nesilwane, kufanele ibulawe, nalesilwane sibulawe." 
Leviticus20:16 Nangabe lomsikati etama kulala nesilwane, bulalani lomsikati kanye nalesilwane. Kufanele babulawe; ingati yabo iyawubasetikwabo." 
Leviticus20:17 “ ‘Nangabe indvodza ishada nadzadzewabo, ngeyise nome ngenina, balalane, loko kulihlazo. Kufanele bancunywe emehlweni ebantfu bakubo. Seyihlazise dzadzewabo, ngako iyawuba nelicala laloko." 
Leviticus20:18 Nangabe indvodza ilala nalomsikati asesesikhatsini, lendvodza seyembule kopha kwalona lomsikati, kantsi-ke vele naye sewukugwabulile loko kopha kwakhe. Bobabili kufanele bancunywe esiveni sakubo." 
Leviticus20:19 “ ‘Ungalali nadzadzewabonyoko nome dzadzewaboyihlo, ngobe loko kungahlazisa sihlobo sakho sengati; nobabili niyawuba nelicala." 
Leviticus20:20 Nangabe indvodza ilala nadzadzewaboyise, seyihlazise umkhwenyewabo. Bayawuba nelicala, bafe bangenamntfwana." 
Leviticus20:21 Nangabe indvodza ishada nemkamnakabo umnakabo asaphila, leso sento sekungcola, ihlazise umnakabo. Bangeke bamtfole umntfwana." 
Leviticus20:22 “ ‘Gcinani yonkhe imitsetfo yami niyilandzele, khona lelive lapho nginimikisa khona kutsi niyewuhlala kulo lingeke linihlante." 
Leviticus20:23 Ningacali nente lawo masiko aleto tive lengitatikhipha nisengakangeni. Tingicunulile ngalawo masiko ato. 
Leviticus20:24 Kodvwa nine nganetsembisa kutsi lelo live labo, leligcwele lubisi neluju lwetinyosi liyawuba lenu, ngiyakunipha lona libe lifa lenu. NginguSimakadze, Nkulunkulu wenu, lonehlukise kuletinye tive." 
Leviticus20:25 Ngako-ke kufanele niwente umehluko emkhatsini wetilwane letihlantekile naletingcolile ngekwemtsetfo, nasemkhatsini wetinyoni letihlantekile naletingcolile ngekwemtsetfo. Ningatingcolisi nome ngangusiphi silwane nome yinyoni nome ngayini lehamba emhlabatsini, leto lenginehlukanisele tona kutsi tingcolile kini." 
Leviticus20:26 Kufanele nibe ngcwele kimi, ngobe mine, Simakadze, ngingcwele, ngitehlukanisele nine emkhatsini wetive tonkhe kutsi nibe sive sami." 
Leviticus20:27 “ ‘Indvodza nome lomsikati losangoma nome longumtsakatsi nibombulala. Labo nibobagcoba ngematje baze bafe; ingati yabo iyawubasetikwabo.’ ” 
Leviticus21:1 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi: “Khuluma kubaphristi, emadvodzana a-Aroni, utsi kubo: ‘Akukafaneli kutsi umphristi atingcolise ngekwemtsetfo ngekutsi kube khona lakwentako nakungcwatjwa sihlobo sakhe," 
Leviticus21:2 ngaphandle kwekutsi lona lofile usinini lesisondzele kakhulu njengenina nome uyise, nome umsa wakhe, nome indvodzakati yakhe, nome umnakabo," 
Leviticus21:3 nome dzadzewabo labesengakendzi labehlala naye encike kuye, ngobe ate indvodza; lowo-ke angatingcolisa ngaye." 
Leviticus21:4 Akukafaneli atingcolise ngenca yekufa kwalahlobene naye ngemshado. 
Leviticus21:5 “ ‘Baphristi abafanele bahhule tinwele, nome basinge tilevu, nome basike imitimba yabo bakhombise kutsi bazilile." 
Leviticus21:6 Kufanele babe ngcwele embikwaNkulunkulu wabo, bangalihlambalati libito laNkulunkulu wabo, ngobe ngabo labaletsa umnikelo lowentiwa ngemlilo kuSimakadze, sinkhwa saNkulunkulu wabo; ngako-ke kufanele babe ngcwele." 
Leviticus21:7 Bafanele bangayishadi ingwadla nome umfati lolahlwe yindvodza yakhe; yebo, baphristi bangcwele kuNkulunkulu wabo." 
Leviticus21:8 Ma-Israyeli, batiseni kutsi bangcwele, ngobe banikela ngekudla kwaNkulunkulu wenu. Bangcwele ngobe mine, Simakadze, lenginingcwelisako ngingcwele." 
Leviticus21:9 Nangabe indvodzakati yemphristi itingcolisa ngekugwadla, ihlazisa uyise, iyawushiswa ngemlilo ize ife." 
Leviticus21:10 “ ‘UmPhristi Lomkhulu logcotjwe enhloko ngemafutsa, emkhatsini webanakabo, wangcweliselwa kutsi agcoke tembatfo tebuphristi, akayiwutiyekela tinwele tenhloko yakhe tingemahlutse, nome aklebhule kwekwembatsa kwakhe." 
Leviticus21:11 Akayiwungena endlini lenesidvumbu; yebo, angatingcolisi nome kungeseyise nome kungesenina," 
Leviticus21:12 akayiwusuka nekusuka endzaweni lengcwele yaNkulunkulu wakhe, nome ayihlazise, ngobe bungcwele bemgcobo wemafutsa aNkulunkulu busetikwakhe. NginguSimakadze." 
Leviticus21:13 Uyawushada nentfombi lengazange seyilale nalomdvuna. 
Leviticus21:14 Akayiwushada nemfelokati nome nemfati lowehlukene nendvodza yakhe nome umfati longcoliswe bugwadla, kodvwa uyawushada nentfombi yesive sakubo lengazange ilale nalomdvuna," 
Leviticus21:15 khona angeyiwungcolisa bantfwabakhe besive sakubo. NginguSimakadze lomngcwelisako.’ ” 
Leviticus21:16 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi:" 
Leviticus21:17 “Tjela Aroni utsi: ‘Etitukulwaneni takho kute namunye lonesici loyawusondzela atewunikela ngekudla kwaNkulunkulu wakhe. 
Leviticus21:18 Kute lonesici loyawusondzela: loyimphumphutse nome lochutako, nome lonebuso lobungakapheleli, nome lonetitfo temtimba letichwalile," 
Leviticus21:19 nome lonemilente netinyawo netandla letichwalile," 
Leviticus21:20 nome lonelichubu, nome lomfishane kakhulu, nome lonemasoli, nome lonesifo sesikhumba, nome lonesilondza lesivuta bovu, nome lonemasendze lalimele." 
Leviticus21:21 Kuyawubate esitukulwaneni sa-Aroni lonesici nome ngesaluphi luhlobo loyawusondzela atewunikela ngesinkhwa saNkulunkulu wakhe. 
Leviticus21:22 Lowo muntfu angakudla kudla lokungcwelengcwele kwaNkulunkulu wakhe kanye nekudla lokungcwele; 
Leviticus21:23 kodvwa ngenca yesici sakhe akayiwusondzela endvwangwini nome elatini kutsi ahlazise indzawo yami lengcwele. NginguSimakadze lobangcwelisako.’ ” 
Leviticus21:24 Ngako-ke Mosi wakhuluma ku-Aroni, nakumadvodzana akhe, nakuso sonkhe sive saka-Israyeli, abatjela konkhe loko." 
Leviticus22:1 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi:" 
Leviticus22:2 “Tjela Aroni nemadvodzana akhe kutsi bayihloniphe iminikelo lengcwele lenikelwe kimi ngema-Israyeli, khona bangetiwulihlambalata libito lami lelingcwele. NginguSimakadze." 
Leviticus22:3 Nangabe lomunye wetitukulwane letitako, ngesikhatsi asangcolile ngekwemtsetfo, kwenteka asondzela eceleni kweminikelo lengcwele, lenikelwe ngema-Israyeli kuSimakadze, lowo muntfu kufanele ancunywe ebukhoneni bami. NginguSimakadze." 
Leviticus22:4 “Nangabe lomunye wesitukulwane sa-Aroni anesifo sesikhumba nome analokuvuta emtimbeni, kufanele angawudli umnikelo longcwele aze ahlantwe. Utawuba ngulongcolile nakwenteka atsintsa lokungcoliswe sidvumbu nome ngumuntfu lonalokuvutako," 
Leviticus22:5 nome kwenteka atsintsa nome yini intfo lehuma ngesisu imngcolise, nome ngubani lomngcolisako nome ngabe kungcola kwaluphi luhlobo." 
Leviticus22:6 Lowo lotsintsa nome yini yaletintfo, utawuba ngulongcolile kuze kuhlwe. Kufanele angadli lutfo lweminikelo lengcwele ngaphandle kwekutsi ageze umtimba wakhe ngemanti." 
Leviticus22:7 Nakushona lilanga, utawuhlanteka; emvakwaloko sangatidla leto tintfo letingcwele, ngobe phela tikudla kwakhe." 
Leviticus22:8 Kufanele angayidli ingcuba nome lokuklejulwe tilwane tesiganga, ngobe loko kutamngcolisa. NginguSimakadze." 
Leviticus22:9 “Baphristi kufanele bayigcine yonkhe imitsetfo lengibanika yona, khona bangetiwuba nelicala bafe ngenca yekungangihloniphi. NginguSimakadze lobangcwelisako." 
Leviticus22:10 “Umuntfu longesilo lilunga lemndeni wemphristi akukafaneli adle lutfo lolungcwele, ngisho nesivakashi nome sisebenti semphristi imbala." 
Leviticus22:11 Kodvwa nangabe umphristi atsenga sigcili njengemphahla yakhe yemali, lesigcili singadla kulokungcwele, nome ngulesitalelwe kulowo mndeni naso singadla kulokungcwele." 
Leviticus22:12 Nangabe indvodzakati yemphristi ishada nome ngubani longesiye umphristi, ayikafaneli kudla nome yini lengcwele." 
Leviticus22:13 Kodvwa nangabe lendvodzakati iba ngumfelokati nome ilahlwe yindvodza isengakabi nabo bantfwana bese ibuyela ekhaya kubo njenganayiseyinsha, ingakudla loko kudla kweyise. Kodvwa lowo lote lilungelo akukafaneli akudle." 
Leviticus22:14 “Nakwenteka umuntfu adla umnikelo longcwele ngesiphosiso, kufanele ahlawule kumphristi, engete incenye yawo yesihlanu." 
Leviticus22:15 Baphristi akukafaneli bayiphatse ngalokungakafaneli iminikelo lengcwele lenikelwe ngema-Israyeli kuSimakadze 
Leviticus22:16 ngekutsi bawavumele adle iminikelo lengcwele, ngobe ngaloko utawaletsela licala lelitawudzinga kuhlawulwa. NginguSimakadze, lobangcwelisako.”" 
Leviticus22:17 Simakadze wachubeka wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi:" 
Leviticus22:18 “Tjela Aroni nemadvodzana akhe kanye nesive sonkhe sema-Israyeli, utsi: ‘Nome ngangubani wesive sema-Israyeli nome wetive losemkhatsini wenu nakaletsa umnikelo wekushiswa kuSimakadze wekufeza setsembiso nome umnikelo wesihle," 
Leviticus22:19 kufanele niletse lokudvuna lokute siyela kukhetfwe etinkhomeni, nome etimvini, nome etimbutini, khona kutawukwemukelwa egameni lenu." 
Leviticus22:20 Ningakuletsi lokunesiyela, ngobe kungeke kwemukeleke kutsi kubesesikhundleni senu." 
Leviticus22:21 Nangabe umuntfu aletsa umnikelo wekuthula kuSimakadze kutsi atewufeza setsembiso sakhe nome umnikelo wesihle, leso silwane kufanele sibete sici, khona sitekwemukeleka." 
Leviticus22:22 Unganikeli kuSimakadze ngesilwane lesingaboni, nome lesilimele, nome lesichwalile, nome lesinetilondza, nome lesinetinsumphe, nome lesinetilondza letivuta luhluti. Ningacali ninikele ngaletilwane letinjena elatini kutsi tibe ngumnikelo lowentiwa ngemlilo kuSimakadze." 
Leviticus22:23 Noko ninganikela ngenkhomo nome ngemvu lechwalile kutsi ibe ngumnikelo wesihle, kodvwa ingeke yemukeleke nayinikelelwa kufeza setsembiso." 
Leviticus22:24 Akukafaneli ninikele kuSimakadze ngesilwane lesinemasendze lahuzukile, nome lapitjitekile, nome laphakuliwe nome lasikekile. Ningacali nikwente loko eveni lenu." 
Leviticus22:25 “ ‘Ningacali ninikele ngetilwane letinjalo, ningatemukeli natiletfwa betive, nangabe batinikelela kutsi tibe kudla kwaNkulunkulu wenu. Tingeke temukeleke esikhundleni senu, ngobe tichwalile futsi tinetici.’ ”" 
Leviticus22:26 Simakadze wachubeka wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi:" 
Leviticus22:27 “Nakutelwe linkhonyane, nome lizinyane lemvu, nome lembuti, litawuhlala nenina emalanga lasikhombisa. Kusukela ngelilanga lesiphohlongo, selingemukeleka kutsi libe ngumnikelo lowentiwa ngemlilo kuSimakadze." 
Leviticus22:28 Aniyiwunikela ngenkhomo nelinkhonyane layo, nome ngemvu nelizinyane layo, nome ngembuti nelizinyane layo kokubili ngalanga linye." 
Leviticus22:29 Naninikela umhlatjelo wekubonga kuSimakadze, nibowunikelela kutsi wemukeleke esikhundleni senu." 
Leviticus22:30 Kufanele udliwe wonkhe ngalona lelo langa, ningashiyi lutfo lwawo kuze kubesekuseni. NginguSimakadze." 
Leviticus22:31 “Niyawugcina imiyalo yami niyente. NginguSimakadze. 
Leviticus22:32 Ningalihlambalati libito lami lelingcwele. Sonkhe sive sema-Israyeli siyawungidvumisa sitsi ngingcwele. NginguSimakadze loningcwelisako," 
Leviticus22:33 nalowanikhipha eGibhithe kutsi abe nguNkulunkulu wenu. NginguSimakadze.” 
Leviticus23:1 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi:" 
Leviticus23:2 “Tjela sive sema-Israyeli utsi: ‘Lena-ke ngimikhosi yami lengiyimisile, lekufanele ema-Israyeli ayatise kutsi ingcwele." 
Leviticus23:3 Ninemalanga lasitfupha leningasebenta ngawo nente umsebenti wenu, kodvwa lilanga lesikhombisa liSabatha lekuphumula, lilanga lekukhonta. Akukafaneli nente nome ngumuphi umsebenti lapho nihlala khona. Lelo liSabatha laSimakadze." 
Leviticus23:4 Lena ngimikhosi lemiswe nguSimakadze, imikhosi lengcwele, yemihlangano yekukhonta, leniyawuyimemetela ngesikhatsi lesimiselwe yona.’ ”" 
Leviticus23:5 “ ‘LiPhasika laSimakadze liyawucala kugujwa kusukela nakudzabuka kusa ngelilanga leli-14 enyangeni yekucala. 
Leviticus23:6 Ngelilanga leli-15 kuleyo nyanga kuyawucala uMkhosi waSimakadze weSinkhwa Lesingenambiliso; kuyawuze kuphele emalanga lasikhombisa nidla sinkhwa lesingenambiliso. 
Leviticus23:7 Ngelilanga lekucala lalomkhosi niyawuba nemhlangano longcwele, ningenti lutfo lolungumsebenti wenu." 
Leviticus23:8 Kuwo onkhe lamalanga lasikhombisa niyawuletsa umnikelo lowentiwa ngemlilo kuSimakadze. Kanjalo nangelilanga lesikhombisa niyawuba nemhlangano longcwele, ningatsintsi lutfo lolungumsebenti.’ ”" 
Leviticus23:9 Simakadze wachubeka wakhuluma kuMosi watsi: 
Leviticus23:10 “Tjela sive sema-Israyeli utsi: ‘Naningena kulelive lengitaninika lona, niyawutsi nanivuna sivuno salo, bese niletsa kumphristi sitfungo emkhatsini wetitselo talokutinhlavu tekucala ekuvuneni," 
Leviticus23:11 yena uyawusijikitisa embikwaSimakadze, khona atewusemukela egameni lenu. Umphristi uyawusijikitisa ngelilanga lelilandzela liSabatha." 
Leviticus23:12 Ngalelo langa leniyawujikitisa ngalo sitfungo emvakweliSabatha kufanele ninikele kuSimakadze umhlatjelo wekushiswa, ube lizinyane lemvu lelite siyela," 
Leviticus23:13 kanye nemnikelo walokutinhlavu longemakhilogremu langaba mabili afulaha lobhicwe nemafutsa. Lowo ngumnikelo lowentiwa ngemlilo kuSimakadze, liphunga lelinuka lusi lolumnandzi kuSimakadze. Niyakuwunikela kanye nemnikelo weliwayini longagcwala lilitha linye." 
Leviticus23:14 Aniyikukuluma kudla lokusha kuze kufike lelo langa lekuletsa loko kudla kuNkulunkulu wenu. Lona kuyawuba ngumkhosi leniyakuwenta titukulwane ngetitukulwane, nome kukuphi lapho niyawuhlala khona.’ ”" 
Leviticus23:15 “ ‘Kusukela ngelilanga lelilandzela liSabatha, mhlazana niletsa sitfungo lesingumnikelo wekujikitiswa, nibobala emaviki lagcwele lasikhombisa." 
Leviticus23:16 Niyawubala emalanga langema-50 kuze kuyewuba lilanga lelilandzela liSabatha, bese niletsa kuSimakadze umnikelo wesivuno lesisha." 
Leviticus23:17 Nome ngukuphi lapho nihlala khona, niyawuletsa tinkhwa letimbili letentiwe taba ngemakhilogremu langaba mabili afulaha lobhakwe nembiliso, tibe ngumnikelo wekujikitiswa wetitselo tekucala kuSimakadze." 
Leviticus23:18 Lesinkhwa niyawusiletsa kanye nemazinyane lamadvuna etimvu lasikhombisa lanemnyaka munye budzala langenasiyela, nenkunzana yinye netihhanca letimbili, tibe ngumnikelo wekushiswa kuSimakadze kanye naleminikelo yato yalokutinhlavu, neminikelo yetinatfo, umnikelo lowentiwa ngemlilo, liphunga lelinuka lusi lolumnandzi kuSimakadze." 
Leviticus23:19 Niyawunikela ngesiphongo sinye kube ngumnikelo wesono, nemazinyane lamabili emvu lanemnyaka munye budzala, kube ngumnikelo wekuthula." 
Leviticus23:20 Umphristi uyawukujikitisa kanye nesinkhwa setitselo tekucala, kube ngumnikelo wekujikitiswa kuSimakadze nalamazinyane emvu lamabili, ayawuba ngcwele kuSimakadze, abe sabelo salomphristi." 
Leviticus23:21 Niyawumemetela ngalona lelo langa, nibe nemhlangano longcwele ningenti lutfo lolungumsebenti. Lowo-ke ngumyalo yonkhe indzawo leniyawuhlala kuyo titukulwane ngetitukulwane." 
Leviticus23:22 “ ‘Nanivuna tivuno temasimi enu, aniyiwuvuna nize nifike eminyeleni yemasimi enu, aniyiwubutsa ngisho nemikhwimito emvakwekuvuna kwenu. Niyawushiyela labamphofu nemihambima. NginguSimakadze, Nkulunkulu wenu.’ ”" 
Leviticus23:23 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi:" 
Leviticus23:24 “Shano kuma-Israyeli utsi: ‘Ngelilanga lekucala enyangeni yesikhombisa niyawuba nelilanga lekuphumula, umkhosi loyawumenyetelwa ngekukhaliswa kwemacilongo, umhlangano longcwele." 
Leviticus23:25 Aniyikwenta lutfo lolungumsebenti, niyawuletsa umnikelo lowentiwa ngemlilo kuSimakadze.’ ”" 
Leviticus23:26 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi:" 
Leviticus23:27 “Ngelilanga lelishumi lalenyanga yesikhombisa kuyawuba Lilanga Lenhlawulo Yekubuyisana kuSimakadze. Kini lelo langa kuyawuba lemkhosi longcwele. Niyawutitfoba ngekutsi niletse umnikelo lowentiwa ngemlilo kuSimakadze. 
Leviticus23:28 Ngalelo langa aniyiwutsintsa lutfo lolungumsebenti, ngobe kuLilanga Lenhlawulo Yekubuyisana kuSimakadze lekutsi nibuyisane ngenhlawulo kuSimakadze longuNkulunkulu wenu." 
Leviticus23:29 Ngobe wonkhe longakaze atitfobe ngalelo langa, uyawuncunywa esiveni sakubo." 
Leviticus23:30 Nome ngubani loyawutsintsa umsebenti ngalelo langa ngiyawumbhubhisa, angabikho esiveni sakubo." 
Leviticus23:31 Aniyiwuphatsa msebenti ngalelo langa: Ngumtsetfo waphakadze loyawugcinwa titukulwane ngetitukulwane, nome ngukuyiphi indzawo lapho niyawube nihlala khona." 
Leviticus23:32 Lelo kuyawuba liSabatha kini lekuphumula leniyawutitfoba ngalo; ngelilanga lemfica kuleyo nyanga kusukela nakuhwalalako kuze kube ngunakuhwalalako ngelilanga lelishumi kuyo leyo nyanga, niyawulitsatsa ngekutsi lilanga lekuphumula lelimcoka, ningenti lutfo.”" 
Leviticus23:33 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi:" 
Leviticus23:34 “Shano kubantfwana baka-Israyeli utsi: ‘Ngelilanga leli-15 kulenyanga yesikhombisa, emalanga lasikhombisa ngeweMkhosi Wemadlangala kuSimakadze wenu." 
Leviticus23:35 Ngelilanga lekucala ngumkhosi longcwele, aniyikwenta lutfo lolungumsebenti." 
Leviticus23:36 Emalanga lasikhombisa niyawube niletsa umnikelo lowentiwa ngemlilo kuSimakadze, ngelilanga lesiphohlongo niyawuba nemkhosi longcwele niletse umnikelo lowentiwa ngemlilo kuSimakadze; lowo ngumgidvo lomkhulu lapho ningayiwusebenta lutfo khona." 
Leviticus23:37 “ ‘Leyo-ke ngimikhosi lemisiwe nguSimakadze leniyawuyimemetela esiveni kutsi iyawuba tikhatsi temihlangano lengcwele yekumikisa iminikelo leyentiwa ngemlilo kuSimakadze; iminikelo yekushiswa neminikelo yalokutinhlavu, nemihlatjelo, neminikelo yetinatfo, ngulowo nalowo mnikelo ngelilanga lelicondzene nawo." 
Leviticus23:38 Ngaphandle kweliSabatha laSimakadze nangaphandle kwetipho tenu kanye naleminye nje iminikelo lenitentela yona ngetetsembiso neminikelo yenu yesihle leniyinikela kuSimakadze. 
Leviticus23:39 “ ‘Ngelilanga leli-15 lenyanga yesikhombisa, nase nibutse sonkhe sivuno selive lenu, niyawugcina lomkhosi waSimakadze emalanga lasikhombisa. Lilanga lekucala liyawuba lekuphumula, kodvwa nangelilanga lesiphohlongo ningenti lutfo." 
Leviticus23:40 Ngelilanga lekucala niyawutsatsa titselo tetihlahla letihle, nemagala etihlahla telisundvu, nemagala etihlahla letinemacembe latibhelekeca, neminyetane yasetihlanjeni nijabule kuSimakadze, longuNkulunkulu wenu, kuze kuphele emalanga lasikhombisa." 
Leviticus23:41 Niyawuligcina libe lilanga lemkhosi kuSimakadze emalanga lasikhombisa ngemnyaka; kungumyalo wenu titukulwane ngetitukulwane, leniyakuwugcina ngenyanga yesikhombisa." 
Leviticus23:42 Niyawuhlala emadlangaleni emalanga lasikhombisa, bonkhe lababewutalwa baka-Israyeli bayawuhlala emadlangaleni," 
Leviticus23:43 kuze titukulwane tenu tati kutsi ngenta sive sema-Israyeli kutsi sihlale emadlangaleni, mhlazane ngibakhipha eveni laseGibhithe. NginguSimakadze, Nkulunkulu wenu.’ ”" 
Leviticus23:44 Wabetfulela kanjalo-ke Mosi bantfwana baka-Israyeli imitsetfo yemikhosi leyemiswa nguSimakadze. 
Leviticus24:1 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi:" 
Leviticus24:2 “Tjela ema-Israyeli kutsi akakuletsele emafutsa lacengekile ekukhanyisa tibane laphehlwe etitselweni temncumo. Letibane kufanele tihlale tikhanya njalo tingacimi. 
Leviticus24:3 Njalo nje entsambama Aroni utabotikhanyisa tihlale tikhanya embikwaSimakadze kuze kuse, ethendeni lekuhlangana ngaphandle kwendvwangu lesembikwelibhokisi lesivumelwane. Lomtsetfo uyawugcinwa wentiwe titukulwane ngetitukulwane." 
Leviticus24:4 Aroni uyawuhlela kahle letibane, atimise etikwelutsi lwegolide lecengekile atikhanyise onkhe emalanga embikwaSimakadze.”" 
Leviticus24:5 “Uyawupheka tinkhwa letili-12 tafulaha; sinkhwa sisinye siyakwentiwa ngemalitha langaba mane nencenye. 
Leviticus24:6 Uyawutimisa tinhlu letimbili, luhlu lulunye lube netinkhwa letisitfupha etikwelitafula legolide lecengekile embikwaSimakadze." 
Leviticus24:7 Etikwalolo nalolo luhlu lwato uyawubeka imphepho lengakabhicwa nalutfo, ibe sikhumbuto lesiyawumela sinkhwa lesingumnikelo lowentiwa ngemlilo kuSimakadze." 
Leviticus24:8 Onkhe emaSabatha Aroni uyawubeka lesinkhwa embikwaSimakadze, emelele sive sonkhe sema-Israyeli, kube sivumelwane saphakadze." 
Leviticus24:9 Siyawuba sa-Aroni nesemadvodzana akhe. Bayawusidlela endzaweni lengcwele, ngobe ngusona sabelo sabo lesingcwelengcwele eminikelweni leyentiwa ngemlilo kuSimakadze, kube simiso saphakadze naphakadze.”" 
Leviticus24:10 Indvodzana yemfati longum-Israyeli labendze endvodzeni lengumGibhithe yesuka yangena emkhatsini wesive saka-Israyeli yacabana nem-Israyeli enkambu. 
Leviticus24:11 Lendvodzana yemfati longum-Israyeli yahlambalata libito laSimakadze ngekulicalekisa; bayitsatsa bayiletsa kuMosi. Unina bekunguShelomithi, indvodzakati yaDibri wesive sakaDani." 
Leviticus24:12 Lendvodzana bayibopha, base balindzela kutsi intsandvo yaNkulunkulu itawutsini kubo ngayo." 
Leviticus24:13 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi watsi: 
Leviticus24:14 “Mkhipheleni ngaphandle kwenkambu lomhlambalati, bese kutsi bonkhe laba labamvile babeke tandla etikwenhloko yakhe, sive sonkhe simtselekele simgcobe ngematje." 
Leviticus24:15 Shano kuma-Israyeli utsi: ‘Nome ngubani loyakwetfuka Nkulunkulu wakhe, uyakwetfwala licala lesono sakhe." 
Leviticus24:16 Lowo lohlambalata libito laSimakadze uyawubulawa. Sive sonkhe siyawumgcoba ngematje. Yebo, nome lomuntfu wetive nome angum-Israyeli wengati, kodvwa nahlambalata libito laSimakadze, uyawubulawa." 
Leviticus24:17 “ ‘Lowo lobulala lomunye umuntfu, naye uyawubulawa." 
Leviticus24:18 Lowo lobulala sifuyo salomunye umuntfu kufanele asenane. Umtsetfo utsi imphilo ihlawulwa ngemphilo. 
Leviticus24:19 “ ‘Nangabe umuntfu alimate makhelwane wakhe, naye kufanele entiwe njalo:" 
Leviticus24:20 nangabe amephule litsambo, nelakhe liyakwephulwa, liso ngeliso, litinyo ngelitinyo. Njengobe naye alimatile, kufanele naye alinyatwe." 
Leviticus24:21 Lowo lobulala sifuyo kufanele asihlawule, kodvwa lowo lobulala umuntfu naye kufanele abulawe." 
Leviticus24:22 Niyawuba nemtsetfo munye nonkhe, umuntfu wetive nome wekutalwa. NginguSimakadze, Nkulunkulu wenu.’ ”" 
Leviticus24:23 Mosi wakhuluma esiveni sema-Israyeli, bamkhiphela ngaphandle kwenkambu lomhlambalati, bamtselekela bamgcoba ngematje. Ngako-ke ema-Israyeli enta njengobe Simakadze abeyale Mosi." 
Leviticus25:1 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi asentsabeni yaseSinayi, watsi:" 
Leviticus25:2 “Tjela sive sema-Israyeli utsi: ‘Naningena eveni lengininika lona, lelive kufanele ligcinele Simakadze liSabatha." 
Leviticus25:3 Emasimi enu niyakuwalima iminyaka lesitfupha, niyawutsena tivini tenu, nivune netilimo tenu iminyaka lesitfupha." 
Leviticus25:4 Kodvwa ngemnyaka wesikhombisa emasimi enu kufanele abe neliSabatha lekuphumula, liSabatha kuSimakadze." 
Leviticus25:5 Aniyikukuvuna lokuyawutimilela, ngisho nemvini longakanakekelwa imbala aniyikuwuvuna. Emasimi enu ayawuba nemnyaka wekuphumula." 
Leviticus25:6 Nome emasimi ayawube angakalinywa, kodvwa loko lokuyawumila kuwo kulowo mnyaka weSabatha kuyawuba kudla kwenu: nine matfupha, netisebenti tenu letidvuna naletisikati, nemcashwa wenu kanye nesihambi lesihleti emkhatsini wenu," 
Leviticus25:7 netifuyo tenu, netilwane tesiganga letisemafusini enu. Konkhe lokutimilele kulawo masimi kuyawudliwa.’ ”" 
Leviticus25:8 “ ‘Niyawubala iminyaka lesikhombisa niyiphindze kasikhombisa, nase kuhlangene kube ngiminyaka lengema-49." 
Leviticus25:9 Ngelilanga lelishumi enyangeni yesikhombisa niyawushaya licilongo; yebo, ngalo lelo langa lekubuyisana niyawuvakalisa licilongo eveni lenu lonkhe." 
Leviticus25:10 UMnyaka Wema-50 niyakuwungcwelisa nimemetele inkhululeko eveni lonkhe nakuto tonkhe takhamiti takhona. Kuyawuba nguMkhosi wekugubha iMinyaka Lengema-50 kini, ngulowo nalowo uyawuncandzeka abuyele kuleyo ndzawo bekungeyakhe, iphindze ibe yakhe nesitukulwane sakhe." 
Leviticus25:11 LoMnyaka Wekubuyiselwa uyawuba ngumkhosi wekugubha iMinyaka Lengema-50 kini; ngalowo mnyaka aniyiwuhlanyela, futsi aniyiwuvuna lutfo kuloko lokutimilele, nome nivune umvini longakanakekelwa." 
Leviticus25:12 Lowo nguMnyaka Wema-50 lekufanele ube ngcwele kini; nibodla loko lenikutsetse emasimini. 
Leviticus25:13 “ ‘Ngalowo Mnyaka Wema-50 bonkhe bantfu bayawubuyela etindzaweni lebekuvele kulifa labo. 
Leviticus25:14 Nanitsengiselana ngendzawo nebantfu bakini, ningadlelelani." 
Leviticus25:15 Intsengo yaleyo ndzawo iyawumiswa incike ekutseni sekusele iminyaka lemingaki kufike umkhosi weMinyaka Lengema-50. 
Leviticus25:16 Nangabe kusele iminyaka leminyenti, intsengo yayo iyawuba yinkhulu; kodvwa nangabe sekusele iminyaka lembalwa, intsengo yayo iyawuba yincane, ngobe empeleni intfo lakutsengisela yona ngulesivuno." 
Leviticus25:17 Ningadlelelani, kodvwa yesabani Nkulunkulu wenu. NginguSimakadze, Nkulunkulu wenu.’ ”" 
Leviticus25:18 “ ‘Ngako-ke hambani ngetimiso tami nilalele imitsetfo yami, khona nitawuphila ngekuphepha kulelive." 
Leviticus25:19 Umhlaba uyawutsela titselo tawo, nidle nesutse, nihlale kulo niphephile." 
Leviticus25:20 “ ‘Ningabuta nitsi: “Pho, sitawudlani ngemnyaka wesikhombisa, nasingalimi singavuni lutfo loludliwako?”" 
Leviticus25:21 Ngemnyaka wesitfupha ngiyawunehlisela tibusiso tenala yesivuno sekudla lokuyakwenela iminyaka lemitsatfu. 
Leviticus25:22 Niyawutsi nihlanyela ngemnyaka wesiphohlongo, nibe nisadla kudla lokudzala kuze kuvunwe kudla kwemnyaka wemfica.’ ”" 
Leviticus25:23 “ ‘Indzawo aniyiwuyitsengisa siphelane, ngobe phela lelive ngelami, nine nitihambi nebacashi bami." 
Leviticus25:24 “ ‘Kulo lonkhe lelive lekungelenu lowo longumniyo uyawuba nelilungelo lekuyihlenga leyo ndzawo. 
Leviticus25:25 Nangabe um-Israyeli kwenteka aphuya kangangekutsi aphoceleke kutsi atsengise lendzwawo yakhe, sinini sakhe sengati siyawuphutfuma siyitsenge lendzawo beseyitsengisiwe." 
Leviticus25:26 Nangabe ate sinini sengati lesingamhlengela lendzawo ngekuyitsenga, kodvwa nakwenteka anotsa abe nako lokwenele kuyihlenga," 
Leviticus25:27 uyawubala intsengo yayo, kuye ngekutsi kusele mingaki iminyaka kufike lowo Mnyaka Wema-50, uMnyaka Wekubuyiselwa, akhiphe kulomuntfu labeyitsengise kuye imali lelingene leminyaka lebeyisasele; lapho-ke angaphindze abuyele kuleyo, iphindze ibe yakhe." 
Leviticus25:28 Kodvwa nangabe ehluleka kutfola lokwenele kuyihlenga lendzawo layitsengisile, iyawuba ngeyemtsengi kuze kufike uMnyaka Wekubuyiselwa. Ngalowo mnyaka lendzawo iyawubuyiselwa kumnikati wayo." 
Leviticus25:29 “ ‘Nangabe umuntfu atsengise ngendlu leyakhiwe edolobheni lelitungeletwe lubondza, uyawuba nelilungelo lokuphindze ayihlenge ngekuyitsenga umnyaka ungakapheli ayitsengisile." 
Leviticus25:30 Nangabe lomniyo kwaze kwaphela umnyaka angakayihlengi lendlu lekulelidolobha lelitungeletwe lubondza, itawube seyiba ngeyalomtsengi wayo netitukulwane takhe; ingeke iphindze ibuyele kulomniyo nome sekufike uMnyaka Wekubuyiselwa." 
Leviticus25:31 Kodvwa tindlu letisemadolobheni late lubondza tiyawuhlengwa ngendlela lenjengeyekuhlengwa kwendzawo; nato tiyawuhlengwa ngeMnyaka Wekubuyiselwa. 
Leviticus25:32 EmaLevi wona ayawuba nelilungelo lekuhlenga tindlu tawo nome ngunini kulawo madolobha lasesandleni sawo. 
Leviticus25:33 Ngako-ke indlu lengeyemaLevi iyawuhlengwa, nayitsengiswe kulawo madolobha lasesandleni sawo, kufanele ibuyiselwe kuwo ngeMnyaka Wekubuyiselwa, ngobe letindlu letisemadolobheni emaLevi tawo kuso sive sema-Israyeli." 
Leviticus25:34 Kodvwa emadlelo langewemadolobha awo akayiwuze atsengiswe, ngobe lifa lawo laphakadze.’ ”" 
Leviticus25:35 “ ‘Nangabe lomunye emkhatsini wenu aba mphofu ehluleke nekutondla, msiteni njengobe bewungamsita losihambi nome losisebenti sesikhashana, kuze achubeke ahlale emkhatsini wenu." 
Leviticus25:36 Ungambiti intalo, kodvwa yesaba Nkulunkulu wakho, kuze lomnakenu atewuhlala nawe." 
Leviticus25:37 Ungameboleki imali wentele kumbita intalo, kantsi futsi ungamtsengiseli kudla ngentalo wentele kutfola inzuzo." 
Leviticus25:38 NginguSimakadze, Nkulunkulu wenu, lowanikhipha eveni laseGibhithe kutaninika lelive laseKhenani, nekutsi ngibe nguNkulunkulu wenu.’ ”" 
Leviticus25:39 “ ‘Nangabe lomunye wenu aba mphofu bese utitsengisa yena kuwe, awuyiwumenta akusebentele njengesigcili." 
Leviticus25:40 Kufanele atsatfwe njengesisebenti lesicashiwe nome sisebenti sesikhashana lesisemkhatsini wenu akusebentele kuze kube nguMnyaka Wekubuyiselwa. 
Leviticus25:41 Kulowo mnyaka yena nebantfwabakhe kufanele bakhululwe, bese ubuyela emndenini wakubo emhlabeni waboyisemkhulu." 
Leviticus25:42 Njengobe ema-Israyeli atinceku tami lengatikhipha eGibhithe, kufanele angatsengiswa njengetigcili." 
Leviticus25:43 Kufanele ningawabusi ngelulaka, kodvwa yesabani Nkulunkulu wenu." 
Leviticus25:44 Tigcili netigcilikati tenu tiyawutfolakala kuletive lenakhelene nato; tigcili ningatitsenga kuleto tive. 
Leviticus25:45 Ningatitsenga tigcili nakulabo betive labahambisana nani nakuleyo mindeni lesemkhatsini wenu letalelene eveni lenu, babe timphahla tenu." 
Leviticus25:46 Letigcili ningatishiyela bantfwabenu tibe lifa labo; nabatsandza bangatenta tibe tigcili tabo siphelane. Kodvwa umnakenu longum-Israyeli awuyikumbusa ngelulaka. Ningabusani lomunye etikwalomunye. 
Leviticus25:47 “ ‘Nangabe wetive nome sisebenti sesikhashana lesisemkhatsini wenu kwenteka sinjinga, bese kutsi lomnakenu loseceleni aba mphofu aze atitsengise kulona wetive losemkhatsini wenu," 
Leviticus25:48 nome asatitsengisile, unalo lilungelo lekuhlengwa. Lomunye wabomnakabo angamhlenga," 
Leviticus25:49 nome malume wakhe, nome umzala wakhe, nome ngusiphi-ke sihlobo sakhe sengati, nome naye nasanjingile angatihlenga." 
Leviticus25:50 Bayawubonisana nalowo labemtsengile kusukela ngalowo mnyaka latitsengisa ngawo kuze kube nguMnyaka Wekubuyiselwa. Intsengo yekukhululwa kwakhe iyakuya ngaleminyaka asehleti nemtsengi wakhe kube shangatsi abe sisebenti lesicashiwe kuleyo minyaka. 
Leviticus25:51 Nangabe kusalele iminyaka leminyenti, kufanele akhokhe inhlawulo yakhe lelingene leminyaka lesele." 
Leviticus25:52 Nangabe sekusele iminyaka lembalwa kufike uMnyaka Wekubuyiselwa, kufanele babonisane nemtsengi wakhe ngentsengo yakhe lekufanele ayikhiphe." 
Leviticus25:53 Kufanele atsatfwe njengemuntfu lobekacashiwe yonkhe leminyaka, kubukisiswe nekutsi lomnikati wakhe akamphatsi kabi ngesihluku yini." 
Leviticus25:54 Nome ngabe akahlengwa nangayinye yaletindlela, kodvwa kufanele yena nemndeni wakhe akhululwe ngeMnyaka Wekubuyiselwa," 
Leviticus25:55 ngobe kimi phela sive sema-Israyeli tinceku, yebo, tinceku tami lengatikhipha eveni laseGibhithe. NginguSimakadze, Nkulunkulu wenu.’ ”" 
Leviticus26:1 “ ‘Ningatenteli nkulunkulu nome sithico lesibatwe ngelitje, nome umfanekiso waluphi luhlobo lobatwe ngelitje eveni lenu kutsi nitewukhotsama embikwawo. NginguSimakadze, Nkulunkulu wenu." 
Leviticus26:2 Gcinani emaSabatha ami niyihloniphe nendzawo yami lengcwele. NginguSimakadze. 
Leviticus26:3 “ ‘Nanihamba ngetimiso tami nilalele, nemiyalo yami niyente," 
Leviticus26:4 ngiyawunitfumelela imvula ngesikhatsi sayo, nemhlaba uninike sivuno lesihle, netihlahla tesiganga titsele titselo tato." 
Leviticus26:5 Sivuno siyawuba sikhulu kangangekutsi niyawuchubeka nivune, kuze kushaye sikhatsi sekukha emagelebisi. Nekukha emagelebisi kuyawuchubeka kuze kushaye sikhatsi sekuhlanyela. Yebo, niyawudla konkhe kudla lenikufunako, niphindze nihlale ngekuthula eveni lenu." 
Leviticus26:6 “ ‘Lelive ngiyawulipha kuthula, nicambalale ngekukhululeka ningesatjiswa lutfo. Tonkhe tilwane letiyingoti kini ngiyawutisusa kulelo live, kungabikho timphi eveni lenu." 
Leviticus26:7 Titsa tenu niyawuticosha niticotfule ngenkemba. 
Leviticus26:8 Labasihlanu benu bayawuba nemandla ekwehlula likhulu lato, nelikhulu lenu liyawuba nemandla ekwehlula titsa leti-10 000; yebo, titsa tenu niyawutehlula niticotfule ngenkemba." 
Leviticus26:9 Ngiyawunibusisa, nginiphe bantfwana labanyenti, nandze; sivumelwane lengisenta nani ngiyawusigcina ngisifeze." 
Leviticus26:10 Sivuno senu siyawuba sinyenti kangangekutsi niyawuze nisilahle lesi sanyakenye, nentele kwekhweta lesi salonyaka." 
Leviticus26:11 Ngiyawuhlala emkhatsini wenu ngisethendeni lekukhontela, ngingesuki kini." 
Leviticus26:12 Ngiyawuhamba emkhatsini wenu ngibe nguNkulunkulu wenu, nine nibe sive sami." 
Leviticus26:13 Mine nginguSimakadze, Nkulunkulu wenu, lowanikhipha eGibhithe, kuze ningabe nisaba tigcili temaGibhithe. Ngephula tikeyi telijoko lenu, nganenta nahambela etulu nikhululekile.’ ”" 
Leviticus26:14 “ ‘Nangabe ningangilaleli, ningayenti yonkhe lemiyalo yami," 
Leviticus26:15 ningatilandzeli netimiso tami, ningayenti nemitsetfo yami, nehluleke nekuyifeza lemiyalo yami ngekuphambana nesivumelwane sami," 
Leviticus26:16 ngiyawunijezisa nganaku: Ngiyawunehlisela kutfutfumela lokwesabekako, netifo letingelapheki, nemikhuhlane lephumphutsekisa emehlo, nginente nihusheke. Niyawulima nihlanyelele lite, ngobe titsa tenu tiyawunehlula tidle konkhe loko kudla." 
Leviticus26:17 Buso bami buyawumelana nani, bese nehlulwa titsa tenu, tona leto letinitondzako tiyawunibusa, nani nibaleke, ngisho nome seningasacoshwa ngumuntfu." 
Leviticus26:18 “ ‘Nanichubeka ngekungangilaleli nome sekunehlele konkhe loku, sijeziso senu ngiyawusikhulisa siphindvwe kasikhombisa." 
Leviticus26:19 Ligcabho lenu lelinenkhani ngiyawulifohlota; sibhakabhaka senu ngiyawusenta sibe njengensimbi, sibete imvula; umhlaba ngiyakuwomisa ube lukhuni njengelitfusi." 
Leviticus26:20 Konkhe kusebenta kwenu kamatima kungeke kunibuyisele lutfo, ngobe emasimi enu angeke abe nesivuno, netihlahla tingeke titsele titselo." 
Leviticus26:21 “ ‘Nanichubeka kumelana nami nale nekungilalela, lokuhlupheka kwenu ngiyawukuphindza kasikhombisa kuye ngaleto tono lenitentile." 
Leviticus26:22 Ngiyawunitfumelela tilwane tesiganga, tidle bantfwabenu netinkhomo tenu, nize nibe mbalwa, kangangekutsi ngisho nemigwaco yenu iyawubate bantfu." 
Leviticus26:23 “ ‘Emvakwalesijeziso nanichubeka nekungangilaleli ngekungakwemukeli kucondziswa ngimi ngekutsi nijinge nimelane nami," 
Leviticus26:24 nami-ke sengiyawumelana nani ngekunivisa buhlungu ngalokuphindvwe kasikhombisa ngenca yetono tenu. 
Leviticus26:25 Ngiyawuniletsela imphi itenijezisa ngekwephula kwenu sivumelwane. Niyawutsi nanihlangana emadolobheni enu etindzaweni tekuphepha, bese nginihlasela ngetifo letingelapheki, nivele niphoceleke kutinikela etitseni tenu." 
Leviticus26:26 Umtfombo wesinkhwa ngiyakuwujuba kangangekutsi bafati labalishumi bayawuhlanganyela hhavini munye kupheka sonkhe sinkhwa labanaso. Bayawukwenetisana ngalelo lite labayawube banalo. Niyawudla, kodvwa ningeke nesutse." 
Leviticus26:27 “ ‘Nangabe etikwako konkhe loku seloku aningilaleli, nichubeka nekumelana nami," 
Leviticus26:28 ngiyawunigucukela ngentfukutselo yami ngimelane nani, sijeziso ngisente sibe buhlungu ngekusiphindza kasikhombisa." 
Leviticus26:29 Niyawudla inyama yemitimba yemadvodzana nemadvodzakati enu. 
Leviticus26:30 Ngiyawubhidlita tindzawo tenu tekukhontela, ngidzilite nemalati enu etimphepho, tidvumbu tenu ngitibutsisele ndzawonye etikwetithico tenu letite imphilo naletiwile; umphefumulo wami uyawunicansukela." 
Leviticus26:31 Emadolobha enu ngiyakuwenta abe tindzala, netindzawo tenu tekukhontela ngitente tibe lihlane, kantsi neliphunga lelinuka lusi lelimnandzi leminikelo yenu yekushiswa ngingeke ngilemukele." 
Leviticus26:32 Live lenu ngiyawuliphundla, kuze kutsi netitsa tenu letingena kulo timangale ngalo." 
Leviticus26:33 Ngiyawunisakatela kuletinye tive, nginicoshe ngenkemba yami. Live lenu liyawuphundleka nemadolobha enu abe tindzala." 
Leviticus26:34 Live liyawuba nesikhatsi senjabulo ngeminyaka yemaSabatha ngalesikhatsi lisaphundlekile nani nisahleti eveni letitsa tenu; live liyawuphumula libe nesikhatsi lesimnandzi ngeminyaka yemaSabatha. 
Leviticus26:35 Ngaso sonkhe lesikhatsi live lenu lisaphundlekile liyawuba nekuphumula lelalingazange selibe nako ngesikhatsi semaSabatha enu nisahlala kulo. 
Leviticus26:36 “ ‘Labo benu labayawube basasele bangakafi kulawo mave labayawube batfunjelwe kuwo, ngiyawukwenta tinhlitiyo tabo tibe nekwesaba kangangekutsi ngisho nemsindvo welicembe lelipheshulwa ngumoya liyawubenta babaleke batephule, kube shangatsi babalekela imphi. Bayawukuwa nome kungekho lobacoshako." 
Leviticus26:37 Bayawugilana bawe, lomunye etikwalomunye, kube shangatsi babalekela imphi, nome kungekho lobacoshako. Ngako-ke aniyikuba nawo emandla ekuma embikwetitsa tenu." 
Leviticus26:38 Niyawufela emkhatsini webantfu betive, live letitsa tenu liyawunidla linicedze." 
Leviticus26:39 Labo benu labayawube basasele bangakafi eveni letitsa tabo, bayawukondza babe tincotfo ngenca yetono tabo, nangenca yetono taboyise bayawukondza besabeke." 
Leviticus26:40 “ ‘Kodvwa nabavuma tono tabo netaboyise ekungihlubukeni kwabo nasekumelaneni nami kwabo," 
Leviticus26:41 lokungukona kwangenta ngaze ngabayisa eveni letitsa tabo, nangabe netinhlitiyo tabo letingakasoki titfobeka bayikhipha nenkhokhelo yesono sekuhlubuka kwabo," 
Leviticus26:42 ngiyawusikhumbula sivumelwane sami naJakobe, sivumelwane sami na-Isaka, sivumelwane sami na-Abrahama, ngilikhumbule live." 
Leviticus26:43 Lelo live bayawulifulatsela lisale litijabulisa ngemaSabatha alo ngesikhatsi liselihlane bangekho kulo. Bayawukhipha inkhokhelo yetono tabo, ngobe bayilahlile imitsetfo baticansukela netimiso tami." 
Leviticus26:44 Kodvwa nome kunjalo, nasebaseveni letitsa tabo, ngingeke ngibadvube, futsi ngingeke ngibacansukele kangangekutsi ngize ngibabhubhise baphele nya, ngephule sivumelwane sami nabo. NginguSimakadze, Nkulunkulu wabo." 
Leviticus26:45 Kodvwa ngenca yabo ngiyawusikhumbula sivumelwane sami nabokhokho babo, lengabakhipha eveni laseGibhithe embikwato tonkhe tive kutsi ngitewuba nguNkulunkulu wabo. NginguSimakadze.’ ”" 
Leviticus26:46 Leti-ke timiso, nemiyalo, nemitsetfo Simakadze layenta entsabeni yaseSinayi emkhatsini wakhe nesive sema-Israyeli ngesandla saMosi." 
Leviticus27:1 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi:" 
Leviticus27:2 “Tjela sive sema-Israyeli utsi: ‘Nangabe umuntfu ente setsembiso ngebantfu kuSimakadze ngekunika intsengo lelingene bona," 
Leviticus27:3 lomdvuna loneminyaka lesemkhatsini kwalengema-20 kuya kulengema-60 budzala, kuyawuba tinhlavu tesiliva letingaba ngema-50 ngekwesilinganiso lesisemtsetfweni." 
Leviticus27:4 Nangabe lomuntfu amsikati, inhlawulo yakhe kuyawuba tinhlavu tesiliva letingaba ngema-30." 
Leviticus27:5 Nangabe lomuntfu uneminyaka lesihlanu kuya kulengema-20 budzala, nakangulomdvuna, inhlawulo yakhe kuyawuba tinhlavu tesiliva letingaba ngema-20, kantsi nakamsikati, inhlawulo yakhe kuyawuba tinhlavu tesiliva letingaba lishumi." 
Leviticus27:6 Nangabe lomuntfu unenyanga atelwe kuya eminyakeni lesihlanu budzala, inhlawulo yakhe nakangulomdvuna, kuyawuba tinhlavu tesiliva letingaba sihlanu, kantsi nakamsikati, kuyawuba tinhlavu tesiliva letingaba tintsatfu." 
Leviticus27:7 Nangabe lomuntfu aneminyaka lengema-60 kuya etulu budzala, nakangulomdvuna, inhlawulo yakhe kuyawuba tinhlavu tesiliva letingaba li-15, kantsi nakangulomsikati, kuyawuba tinhlavu tesiliva letingaba lishumi." 
Leviticus27:8 “ ‘Nangabe lomuntfu amphofu kakhulu angakhoni kukhokha lenhlawulo loyibitako, lomuntfu kufanele aletse umuntfu kumphristi lotawubala inhlawulo yakhe lengakhonwa ngulowo muntfu." 
Leviticus27:9 “ ‘Nangabe wetsembise ngesilwane lesingemukeleka kutsi sibe ngumnikelo kuSimakadze, leso silwane lesesinikwe Simakadze sesiyawuba ngcwele." 
Leviticus27:10 Akukafaneli enane silwane lesihle ngalesibi, nome lesibi ngalesihle; nangabe asenana ngalesinye silwane, leso lenana ngaso naleso lesenanwako totimbili tiyawuba ngcwele." 
Leviticus27:11 Nangabe kwetsenjiswe ngesilwane lesingcolile, lesingemukeleki kuSimakadze kutsi sibe ngumnikelo, lomuntfu kufanele amikise lesilwane kumphristi," 
Leviticus27:12 lokunguyena atawuhlolisisa simo saso kutsi sihle nome sibi. Inhlawulo yaso iyawuba nguleyo lejutjwe ngumphristi ngekwesimo saleso silwane. 
Leviticus27:13 Nangabe umniyo afuna kusihlenga, uyakwengeta incenye yesihlanu yenhlawulo yaso." 
Leviticus27:14 “ ‘Nangabe umuntfu anikela ngendlu yakhe kutsi ibe ngcwele kuSimakadze, umphristi uyawuyihlolisisa kutsi ilungile yini nome cha. Leyo nhlawulo lebalwa ngumphristi ngalelo langa kuyawuma yona." 
Leviticus27:15 Nangabe lomuntfu lonikela lendlu asafuna kuyihlenga, kufanele engete incenye yesihlanu yenhlawulo yayo, bese lendlu iphindze iba ngeyakhe." 
Leviticus27:16 “ ‘Nangabe umuntfu anikela ngencenye yemhlaba wemndeni wakhe kuSimakadze, inhlawulo yawo iyawubalwa isuselwa entsengweni yenhlanyelo lehlanyelwa kulowo mhlaba lekutinhlavu tesiliva letingaba lishumi kuleso nakuleso sisindvo sebhali lesingemakhilogremu langaba ngema-20." 
Leviticus27:17 Nangabe anikela ngensimi yakhe kusukela ngalowo Mnyaka Wekubuyiselwa, inhlawulo yayo iyawuba ngulephelele." 
Leviticus27:18 Kodvwa nangabe anikela ngensimi yakhe emvakwaloMnyaka Wekubuyiselwa, umphristi uyawubala inhlawulo ayinciphise kuye ngeminyaka lesasele kutsi kufike uMnyaka Wekubuyiselwa." 
Leviticus27:19 Nangabe lomuntfu lonikele lensimi asafuna kuyihlenga futsi, kufanele engete incenye yesihlanu yenhlawulo, bese-ke lensimi iphindze iba ngeyakhe." 
Leviticus27:20 Kodvwa nakangafisi kuyihlenga lensimi nome asayitsengisele lomunye umuntfu, ingeke iphindze ihlengeke." 
Leviticus27:21 Kutawutsi lensimi nase ikhululekile ngeMnyaka Wekubuyiselwa, iyawuba ngcwele kuSimakadze njengensimi leseyinikelwe kuye, ibe ngeyebaphristi." 
Leviticus27:22 “ ‘Nangabe umuntfu anikela kuSimakadze ngensimi layitsengile, lengesilo lifa lemndeni wakubo," 
Leviticus27:23 umphristi uyawubala inhlawulo yayo kuye ngeminyaka lesele kuze kufike uMnyaka Wekubuyiselwa, lomuntfu uyawukhipha inhlawulo yayo ngalona lelo langa, bese yehlukaniselwa Simakadze." 
Leviticus27:24 NgeMnyaka Wekubuyiselwa leyo nsimi iyawuphindze ibuyiselwe kulomnikati lebeyitsengwe kuye, kulifa lakhe." 
Leviticus27:25 “ ‘Yonkhe inhlawulo iyawubasemtsetfweni, kusetjentiswe silinganiso sasendzaweni lengcwele." 
Leviticus27:26 “ ‘Kufanele kubete lonikela ngelitubulo lesilwane, ngobe phela lona vele laSimakadze: nome lenkhomo, nome lemvu, laSimakadze." 
Leviticus27:27 Nangabe litubulo kusilwane lesingcolile ngekwemtsetfo, umuntfu angalihlenga ngaleyo nhlawulo lesemtsetfweni, engete kulo incenye yesihlanu yenhlawulo yalo. Nangabe angalihlengi, kufanele litsengiswe ngalelo nani lalo lese libaliwe." 
Leviticus27:28 “ ‘Kodvwa kufanele kubete umuntfu lotawutsengisa nome lotawuhlenga loko lesekunikelwe kuSimakadze, nome kungumuntfu, nome kusilwane, nome kungumhlaba lolifa lakhe. Konkhe loko sekuyawuhlala kukwaSimakadze kungcwelengcwele." 
Leviticus27:29 Umuntfu lonikelwe ekufeni kuSimakadze akayiwuhlengwa; kufanele abulawe. 
Leviticus27:30 “ ‘Konkhe kwelishumi kwako konkhe lokulinywako kwetilimo nome kwetitselo kwaSimakadze; kungcwele kuSimakadze. 
Leviticus27:31 Nangabe umuntfu afisa kuhlenga kwelishumi kwakhe, kufanele engete incenye yesihlanu yako enhlawulweni yako." 
Leviticus27:32 Konkhe kwelishumi emhlambini wetinkhomo netimvu, ngisho sonkhe silwane selishumi lesendlula ngaphansi kwendvuku yemelusi, siyawuba ngcwele kuSimakadze." 
Leviticus27:33 Lomnikati akayiwutiphambanisa leto tilwane, khona kutewukhetseka leto letinesici. Nakwenteka enana lesilwane ngalesinye, totimbili letilwane, lesenaniwe nalekwenanwa ngaso tiyawuba taSimakadze, futsi atiyiwuhlengwa.’ ”" 
Leviticus27:34 Ngiyo lena-ke imiyalo yesive sema-Israyeli Simakadze layinika Mosi entsabeni yaseSinayi. 
Numbers1:1 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi asethendeni lekuhlangana eHlane laseSinayi ngelilanga lekucala, enyangeni yesibili, emnyakeni wesibili ema-Israyeli aphuma eGibhithe, watsi:" 
Numbers1:2 “Yentani lubalo lwaso sonkhe sive saka-Israyeli, lusendvo ngelusendvo, nemindeni ngemindeni, nibabhalise ngetindlu taboyise onkhe emadvodza ngemabito awo, ngayinye ngayinye," 
Numbers1:3 kusukela kulasebaneminyaka lengema-20 kuya etulu, onkhe emadvodza aka-Israyeli lase angalungela kuya emphini, wena na-Aroni niyakuwabala ngeticheme tawo." 
Numbers1:4 Kulowo nalowo mndeni niyawucela munye loyinhloko lemelele lowo mndeni kutsi anisite. 
Numbers1:5 Lawa-ke ngemabito emadvodza lenitawusitana nawo kulomsebenti: “Emndenini wakaRubeni kuyawuba ngu-Elisuri, umsa waShedewuri." 
Numbers1:6 Emndenini wakaSimeyoni kuyawuba nguShelumiyeli, umsa waSurishadayi." 
Numbers1:7 Emndenini wakaJuda kuyawuba nguNasoni, umsa wa-Aminadabi." 
Numbers1:8 Emndenini waka-Isakhari kuyawuba nguNethaneli, umsa waSuwari." 
Numbers1:9 Emndenini wakaZebuloni kuyawuba ngu-Eliyabe, umsa waHeloni." 
Numbers1:10 Kumadvodzana aJosefa: Emndenini waka-Efrayimu kuyawuba ngu-Elishama, umsa wa-Amihudi; emndenini wakaManase kuyawuba nguGamaliyeli, umsa waPhedasuri." 
Numbers1:11 Emndenini wakaBhenjamini kuyawuba ngu-Abidani, umsa waGideyoni." 
Numbers1:12 Emndenini wakaDani kuyawuba ngu-Ahiyezeri, umsa wa-Amishadayi." 
Numbers1:13 Emndenini waka-Asheri kuyawuba nguPhagiyeli, umsa wa-Okrani." 
Numbers1:14 Emndenini wakaGadi kuyawuba ngu-Eliyasafa, umsa waDehuweli." 
Numbers1:15 Emndenini wakaNaftali kuyawuba ngu-Ahira, umsa wa-Enani.”" 
Numbers1:16 Laba-ke ngibo lababekhetsiwe kutsi babe baholi emindenini yabo. Babebaholi bemindeni yaka-Israyeli. 
Numbers1:17 BoMosi na-Aroni batsatsa lamadvodza labesakhetsiwe," 
Numbers1:18 base babita sonkhe sive ngelilanga lekucala enyangeni yesibili. Bonkhe bantfu babhalisa, ngulowo nalowo wabhalisa ngeyisemkhulu, kwabhaliswa emabito awo onkhe emadvodza kusukela kulabeneminyaka lengema-20 kuya etulu, ngayinye ngayinye," 
Numbers1:19 njengobe Simakadze abeyale Mosi. Bonkhe babalelwa eHlane laseSinayi: 
Numbers1:20 Titukulwane takaRubeni, litubulo la-Israyeli, tema kanje: Onkhe emadvodza kusukela kulabesaneminyaka lengema-20 kuya etulu, labesangalungela kuya emphini abhaliswa ngemabito awo, ngayinye ngayinye, njengekutalana kwawo, lusendvo ngelusendvo nangemindeni yawo." 
Numbers1:21 Bunyenti besive sakaRubeni baba ti-46 500. 
Numbers1:22 Titukulwane takaSimeyoni tema kanje: Onkhe emadvodza kusukela kulabesaneminyaka lengema-20 kuya etulu, labesangalungela kuya emphini abhaliswa ngemabito awo, ngayinye ngayinye, njengekutalana kwawo, lusendvo ngelusendvo nangemindeni yawo." 
Numbers1:23 Bunyenti besive sakaSimeyoni baba ti-59 300. 
Numbers1:24 Titukulwane takaGadi tema kanje: Onkhe emadvodza kusukela kulabesaneminyaka lengema-20 kuya etulu, labesangalungela kuya emphini abhaliswa ngemabito awo, ngayinye ngayinye, njengekutalana kwawo, lusendvo ngelusendvo nangemindeni yawo." 
Numbers1:25 Bunyenti besive sakaGadi baba ti-45 650. 
Numbers1:26 Titukulwane takaJuda tema kanje: Onkhe emadvodza kusukela kulabesaneminyaka lengema-20 kuya etulu, labesangalungela kuya emphini abhaliswa ngemabito awo, ngayinye ngayinye, njengekutalana kwawo, lusendvo ngelusendvo nangemindeni yawo." 
Numbers1:27 Bunyenti besive sakaJuda baba ti-74 600. 
Numbers1:28 Titukulwane taka-Isakhari tema kanje: Onkhe emadvodza kusukela kulabesaneminyaka lengema-20 kuya etulu, labesangalungela kuya emphini abhaliswa ngemabito awo, ngayinye ngayinye, njengekutalana kwawo, lusendvo ngelusendvo nangemindeni yawo." 
Numbers1:29 Bunyenti besive saka-Isakhari baba ti-54 400. 
Numbers1:30 Titukulwane takaZebuloni tema kanje: Onkhe emadvodza kusukela kulabesaneminyaka lengema-20 kuya etulu, labesangalungela kuya emphini abhaliswa ngemabito awo, ngayinye ngayinye, njengekutalana kwawo, lusendvo ngelusendvo nangemindeni yawo." 
Numbers1:31 Bunyenti besive sakaZebuloni baba ti-57 400. 
Numbers1:32 Kumadvodzana akaJosefa: Titukulwane taka-Efrayimu tema kanje: Onkhe emadvodza kusukela kulabesaneminyaka lengema-20 kuya etulu, labesangalungela kuya emphini abhaliswa ngemabito awo, ngayinye ngayinye, njengekutalana kwawo, lusendvo ngelusendvo nangemindeni yawo." 
Numbers1:33 Bunyenti besive saka-Efrayimu baba ti-40 500. 
Numbers1:34 Titukulwane takaManase tema kanje: Onkhe emadvodza kusukela kulabesaneminyaka lengema-20 kuya etulu, labesangalungela kuya emphini abhaliswa ngemabito awo, ngayinye ngayinye, njengekutalana kwawo, lusendvo ngelusendvo nangemindeni yawo." 
Numbers1:35 Bunyenti besive sakaManase baba ti-32 200. 
Numbers1:36 Titukulwane takaBhenjamini tema kanje: Onkhe emadvodza kusukela kulabesaneminyaka lengema-20 kuya etulu, labesangalungela kuya emphini abhaliswa ngemabito awo, ngayinye ngayinye, njengekutalana kwawo, lusendvo ngelusendvo nangemindeni yawo." 
Numbers1:37 Bunyenti besive sakaBhenjamini baba ti-35 400. 
Numbers1:38 Titukulwane takaDani tema kanje: Onkhe emadvodza kusukela kulabesaneminyaka lengema-20 kuya etulu, labesangalungela kuya emphini abhaliswa ngemabito awo, ngayinye ngayinye, njengekutalana kwawo, lusendvo ngelusendvo nangemindeni yawo." 
Numbers1:39 Bunyenti besive sakaDani baba ti-62 700. 
Numbers1:40 Titukulwane taka-Asheri tema kanje: Onkhe emadvodza kusukela kulabesaneminyaka lengema-20 kuya etulu, labesangalungela kuya emphini abhaliswa ngemabito awo, ngayinye ngayinye, njengekutalana kwawo, lusendvo ngelusendvo nangemindeni yawo." 
Numbers1:41 Bunyenti besive saka-Asheri baba ti-41 500. 
Numbers1:42 Titukulwane takaNaftali tema kanje: Onkhe emadvodza kusukela kulabesaneminyaka lengema-20 kuya etulu, labesangalungela kuya emphini abhaliswa ngemabito awo, ngayinye ngayinye, njengekutalana kwawo lusendvo ngelusendvo nangemindeni yawo." 
Numbers1:43 Bunyenti besive sakaNaftali baba ti-53 400. 
Numbers1:44 Ngiwo lawa-ke emadvodza labalwa nguMosi na-Aroni kanye nebaholi bema-Israyeli lababeli-12, ngulowo nalowo emele umndeni wakubo." 
Numbers1:45 Onkhe ema-Israyeli kusukela kulabesaneminyaka lengema-20 kuya etulu, labesangalungela kuya emphini abhaliswa ngemabito awo, ngayinye ngayinye, njengekutalana kwawo, lusendvo ngelusendvo nangemindeni yawo." 
Numbers1:46 Bunyenti bawo asawonkhe aba ti-603 550. 
Numbers1:47 Sive sema-Levi sona asizange sibhaliswe kanye naleti letinye tive. 
Numbers1:48 Simakadze abekhulume kuMosi, watsi:" 
Numbers1:49 “Sive semaLevi ungasifaki elubalweni kanye nesive sonkhe sema-Israyeli. 
Numbers1:50 Esikhundleni saloko, beka emaLevi kutsi aphatse lelithende lesivumelwane nako konkhe lokukulo lokuhambisana nalo. Kufanele etfwale lelithende nato tonkhe timphahla letihambisana nalo; yebo, kufanele alinakekele, ente inkonzo kulo, akambe emathende awo alitungelete." 
Numbers1:51 Njalo nje nangabe lithende lekukhontela selitfutsa, ngemaLevi lekufanele alehlise; kanjalo, nome selimiswa, ngemaLevi lekufanele alimise. Lowo longesiye umLevi loyawusondzela eceleni kwalelithende uyawubulawa, afe." 
Numbers1:52 Ema-Israyeli ayawumisa emathende awo ngeticheme, ngulowo nalowo esichemeni sakhe lesinesiboniso sebuve baso." 
Numbers1:53 EmaLevi wona emathende awo ayakuwamisa awatungeletise lithende lesivumelwane, khona lulaka lwami lungetikwehlela etikwesive sema-Israyeli. Kuyawuba ngumsebenti wemaLevi kunakekela nekuphatsa lithende lesivumelwane.”" 
Numbers1:54 Ngako sive sema-Israyeli senta konkhe Simakadze layala ngako Mosi kutsi kwentiwe. 
Numbers2:1 Simakadze wakhuluma kuboMosi na-Aroni, watsi:" 
Numbers2:2 “Ema-Israyeli kufanele akambe bucamama atungelete lithende lekuhlangana, ngulowo nalowo esichemeni semndeni wakhe ngaphansi kwesiboniso sebuve baso." 
Numbers2:3 “Ngasemphumalanga kufanele kukambe ticheme tenkambu lenesiboniso sebuve bakaJuda. Umholi wesive sakaJuda nguNasoni, umsa wa-Aminadabi." 
Numbers2:4 Sicheme saso saba ti-74 600. 
Numbers2:5 “Sive saka-Isakhari siyawukamba eceleni kwaso. Umholi wesive saka-Isakhari nguNethaneli, umsa waSuwari." 
Numbers2:6 Sicheme saso saba ti-54 400. 
Numbers2:7 “Sive sakaZebuloni siyawukamba eceleni kwaso. Umholi wesive sakaZebuloni ngu-Eliyabe, umsa waHeloni." 
Numbers2:8 Sicheme saso saba ti-57 400. 
Numbers2:9 “Asawonkhe emadvodza eticheme tenkambu yakaJuda aba ti-186 400. Ngiwo latawuphuma ahambe kucala. 
Numbers2:10 “Ngaseningizimu kutawuba neticheme tenkambu lenesiboniso sebuve bakaRubeni. Umholi wesive sakaRubeni ngu-Elisuri, umsa waShedewuri." 
Numbers2:11 Sicheme saso saba ti-46 500. 
Numbers2:12 “Sive sakaSimeyoni siyawukamba eceleni kwaso. Umholi wesive sakaSimeyoni nguShelumiyeli, umsa waSurishadayi." 
Numbers2:13 Sicheme saso saba ti-59 300. 
Numbers2:14 “Sive sakaGadi siyawukamba eceleni kwaso. Umholi wesive sakaGadi ngu-Eliyasafa, umsa waDehuweli." 
Numbers2:15 Sicheme saso saba ti-45 650. 
Numbers2:16 “Asawonkhe emadvodza eticheme tenkambu yakaRubeni aba ti-151 450. Nase kuhanjwa ngiwo latawulandzela. 
Numbers2:17 “Lithende lekuhlangana kanye nenkambu yemaLevi kuyawumiswa emkhatsini wetinkambu. Bayawutfutsa emathende ngulowo nalowo endzaweni yakhe ngaphansi kwesiboniso sebuve bakhe. 
Numbers2:18 “Ngasenshonalanga kutawuba yinkambu yeticheme tesiboniso sebuve baka-Efrayimu. Umholi wesive saka-Efrayimu ngu-Elishama, umsa wa-Amihudi." 
Numbers2:19 Sicheme saso saba ti-40 500. 
Numbers2:20 “Sive sakaManase siyawukamba eceleni kwaso. Umholi wesive sakaManase nguGamaliyeli, umsa waPhedasuri." 
Numbers2:21 Sicheme saso saba ti-32 200. 
Numbers2:22 “Sive sakaBhenjamini siyawukamba eceleni kwaso. Umholi wesive sakaBhenjamini ngu-Abidani, umsa waGideyoni." 
Numbers2:23 Sicheme saso saba ti-35 400. 
Numbers2:24 “Asawonkhe emadvodza eticheme tenkambu yaka-Efrayimu aba ti-108 000. Nase kuhanjwa ayakulandzela abe ngesitsatfu. 
Numbers2:25 “Ngasenyakatfo kutawuba yinkambu yeticheme takaDani. Umholi wesive sakaDani ngu-Ahiyezeri, umsa wa-Amishadayi." 
Numbers2:26 Sicheme saso saba ti-62 700. 
Numbers2:27 “Sive saka-Asheri siyawukamba eceleni kwaso. Umholi wesive saka-Asheri nguPhagiyeli, umsa wa-Okrani." 
Numbers2:28 Sicheme saso saba ti-41 500. 
Numbers2:29 “Sive sakaNaftali siyawukamba eceleni kwaso. Umholi wesive sakaNaftali ngu-Ahira, umsa wa-Enani." 
Numbers2:30 Sicheme saso saba ti-53 400. 
Numbers2:31 “Asawonkhe emadvodza eticheme tenkambu yakaDani aba ti-157 600. Nase kuhanjwa bayawulandzela babe bekugcina, ngaphansi kwesiboniso sebuve babo.”" 
Numbers2:32 Onkhe lawa ngema-Israyeli labalwa ngemindeni yawo. Onkhe lawa labesetinkambu ngeticheme tawo aba ti-603 550. 
Numbers2:33 EmaLevi akabalwanga kanye nema-Israyeli, kwaya njengobe Simakadze abeyale Mosi." 
Numbers2:34 Ngako-ke ema-Israyeli akwenta konkhe Simakadze labeyale Mosi kutsi akwente. Akamba onkhe ngulowo nalowo ngaphansi kwesiboniso sebuve bakhe; baphuma bahamba. Wonkhe umuntfu wangena emndenini wakhe naselusendvweni lwakubo. 
Numbers3:1 Leti titukulwane taka-Aroni naMosi ngesikhatsi Simakadze akhuluma naMosi eNtsabeni iSinayi. 
Numbers3:2 Emabito emadvodzana a-Aroni ngulawa: NguNadabi litubulo, na-Abihu, na-Eleyazare, na-Ithamari." 
Numbers3:3 Ngiwo lawo-ke emabito emadvodzana a-Aroni labebaphristi lababegcotjiwe, babegcotjelwe kutsi bakhonte enkonzweni yebuphristi," 
Numbers3:4 kodvwa boNadabi na-Abihu bawa phansi bafa embikwaSimakadze ngesikhatsi banikela ngemlilo lowawungengcwele eHlane laseSinayi. Babete emadvodzana; ngako-ke Eleyazare na-Ithamari baba baphristi ngesikhatsi sonkhe sekuphila kweyise, Aroni." 
Numbers3:5 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi:" 
Numbers3:6 “Letsa sive semaLevi usetfule ku-Aroni, umphristi, kutsi sitemsita." 
Numbers3:7 Kufanele emaLevi ente imisebenti letsite entele yena kanye nesive sonkhe sema-Israyeli ethendeni lekuhlangana nakakhonta ethendeni. 
Numbers3:8 Kufanele aphatse tonkhe timphahla tasethendeni lekuhlangana, afezele ema-Israyeli timfanelo tawo ngekukhonta endzaweni lengcwele." 
Numbers3:9 Uyawunikela emaLevi ku-Aroni nakumadvodzana akhe njengemnikelo wakhe lophelele lovela esiveni saka-Israyeli. 
Numbers3:10 Uyawubeka Aroni nemadvodzana akhe kutsi bente imisebenti yebuphristi. Wonkhe umuntfu, ngaphandle kwabo, loyawusondzela eceleni kwalendzawo lengcwele uyawubulawa.”" 
Numbers3:11 Simakadze wachubeka wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi:" 
Numbers3:12 “Sive semaLevi ngisikhetse emkhatsini wato tonkhe tive tema-Israyeli esikhundleni sematubulo awo onkhe lavula sitalo semadvodzakati ema-Israyeli. EmaLevi ngewami," 
Numbers3:13 ngobe onkhe ematubulo ngewami. Mhlazana ngishaya onkhe ematubulo aseGibhithe, ngatehlukanisela onkhe ematubulo aka-Israyeli, ebantfu newetifuyo. Ayawuba ngewami. NginguSimakadze.”" 
Numbers3:14 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi aseHlane laseSinayi, watsi:" 
Numbers3:15 “Bala emaLevi, lusendvo ngelusendvo nangemindeni yawo. Bala bonkhe labadvuna kusukela kulabanenyanga budzala kuya etulu.”" 
Numbers3:16 Ngako Mosi wawabala njengekusho kwelivi laSimakadze. 
Numbers3:17 Lawa-ke, ngemabito emadvodzana akaLevi: boGeshoni, naKhohati, naMerari." 
Numbers3:18 Lawa-ke ngemabito emadvodzana akaGeshoni: boLibni, naShimeyi, lusendvo ngelusendvo." 
Numbers3:19 Emadvodzana aKhohati lusendvo ngelusendvo emabito ngemabito: bekubo-Amramu, naJisihari, naHebroni, na-Uziyeli." 
Numbers3:20 Lawa-ke ngemadvodzana aMerari, lusendvo ngelusendvo: boMahali, naMushi. Bonkhe babe ngimindeni yemaLevi, lusendvo ngelusendvo." 
Numbers3:21 Lusendvo lwakaGeshoni bekungemaLibni nemaShimeyi: leyo-ke bekungimindeni yemaGeshoni. 
Numbers3:22 Sibalo sabo bonkhe labadvuna kusukela kulababenenyanga budzala kuya etulu saba ti-7 500. 
Numbers3:23 Lusendvo lwemaGeshoni lwemisa ngasenshonalanga emvakwelithende lekukhontela. 
Numbers3:24 Umholi wetinsendvo temaGeshoni kwaba ngu-Eliyasafa, umsa waLayeli." 
Numbers3:25 Umsebenti wemaGeshoni ethendeni lekuhlangana kuyawuba kunakekela lithende lekukhontela, nelithende, netimbonyo talo, nendvwangu lesemnyango welithende lekuhlangana," 
Numbers3:26 netindvwangu tasesibuyeni, nendvwangu lesekungeneni kwesibuya lesitungelete indzawo lengcwele, nelilati, netindophi, nako konkhe lokuhambisana nako." 
Numbers3:27 Khohati watala nati tinsendvo: ema-Amramu, nemaJisihari, nemaHebroni, nema-Uziyeli; leto-ke bekutinsendvo temaKhohati." 
Numbers3:28 Sibalo semaKhohati onkhe lamadvuna kusukela kulababenenyanga budzala kuya etulu saba ti-8 600. Umsebenti wawo bekukunakekela indzawo lengcwele. 
Numbers3:29 Tinsendvo temaKhohati takamba ngaseningizimu nendzawo lengcwele. 
Numbers3:30 Umholi wemindeni yemaKhohati, lusendvo ngelusendvo, bekungu-Elisafani, umsa wa-Uziyeli." 
Numbers3:31 Umsebenti wawo bekukunakekela libhokisi lesivumelwane, nelitafula, nelutsi lwetibane, nemalati, naletinye tintfo letisetjentiswa enkonzweni yebuphristi endzaweni lengcwele, nendvwangu, nako konkhe lokuhambisana nako." 
Numbers3:32 Umholi lomkhulu wemaLevi bekungu-Eleyazare, umsa wa-Aroni, umphristi. Wakhetselwa kutsi engamele bonkhe labo babenakekela indzawo lengcwele." 
Numbers3:33 Merari watala nati tinsendvo: emaMahali nemaMushi; leto-ke bekutinsendvo temaMerari. 
Numbers3:34 Sibalo sabo bonkhe labadvuna kusukela kulababenenyanga budzala kuya etulu saba ti-6 200. 
Numbers3:35 Umholi wemindeni yemaMerari bekunguSuriyeli, umsa wa-Abihayili; bebatawukamba ngasenyakatfo kwelithende lekukhontela." 
Numbers3:36 EmaMerari akhetselwa inkonzo yekunakekela tinsikabhaluko telithende lekukhontela, nemakabha, netinsika, nemaseko, nako konkhe lokuhambisana nako, nako konkhe lokusetjentiswa kanye nako," 
Numbers3:37 kanye netinsika taso sonkhe sibuya, nemaseko ato, netikhonkhwane telithende, netindophi." 
Numbers3:38 Mosi, na-Aroni nemadvodzana akhe bebafanele bakambe ngasemphumalanga nendzawo lengcwele, lapho kuphuma lilanga ngakhona, embikwelithende lekuhlangana. Bona babekelwa inkonzo yekunakekela indzawo lengcwele egameni lema-Israyeli. Wonkhe umuntfu, ngaphandle kwawo, lobekasondzela eceleni kwayo abefanele abulawe, afe." 
Numbers3:39 Onkhe emaLevi labalwa nguMosi na-Aroni njengekusho kwaSimakadze ngetinsendvo tawo, bonkhe labebabadvuna kusukela kulababenenyanga budzala kuya etulu, nababalwa sebabonkhe baba ti-22 000." 
Numbers3:40 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi watsi: “Bala onkhe ematubulo lamadvuna ema-Israyeli kusukela kulabanenyanga budzala kuya etulu, wente luhla lwemabito awo." 
Numbers3:41 Ngitsatsele emaLevi esikhundleni sawo onkhe ematubulo esive sema-Israyeli, netinkhomo temaLevi esikhundleni sematubulo onkhe etifuyo tema-Israyeli. NginguSimakadze.”" 
Numbers3:42 Ngako Mosi wawabala onkhe ematubulo esive saka-Israyeli njengobe Simakadze abeshito. 
Numbers3:43 Sibalo sawo asawonkhe ematubulo lamadvuna kusukela kulababenenyanga budzala kuya etulu, lababhaliswa ngemabito abo, baba ti-22 273." 
Numbers3:44 Simakadze wachubeka wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi:" 
Numbers3:45 “Ngitsatsele emaLevi esikhundleni sawo onkhe ematubulo esive sema-Israyeli kanye nematubulo etifuyo tawo, ninikele ngetifuyo temaLevi esikhundleni sematubulo etifuyo taka-Israyeli. EmaLevi ayawuba ngewami. NginguSimakadze." 
Numbers3:46 Njengobe ematubulo ema-Israyeli endlula emaLevi ngema-273, kufanele uwahlenge lamatubulo langetulu." 
Numbers3:47 Uyawukhipha emagremu esiliva langaba ngema-55 litubulo lilinye njengekwesimiso lesisemtsetfweni, endzaweni lengcwele, lesingemagremu langaba li-12." 
Numbers3:48 Lemali yenhlawulo uboyinika Aroni nemadvodzana akhe.” 
Numbers3:49 Ngako-ke Mosi wabutsa yonkhe leyo mali yenhlawulo kulabo bebengca sibalo lesasihlengwe ngemaLevi. 
Numbers3:50 Kuwo onkhe ematubulo ema-Israyeli wabutsa isiliva leyayingaba ngemakhilogremu lali-15 nemagremu langema-500 njengesimiso lesisemtsetfweni endzaweni lengcwele. 
Numbers3:51 Lemali yenhlawulo Mosi wayinika Aroni nemadvodzana akhe, njengobe abeyalwe livi laSimakadze." 
Numbers4:1 Simakadze wakhuluma kuboMosi na-Aroni, watsi:" 
Numbers4:2 “Bala emaKhohati langemaLevi lusendvo ngelusendvo nangemindeni yawo. 
Numbers4:3 Bala onkhe emadvodza kusukela kulasaneminyaka lengema-30 kuya kulengema-50 budzala, labo lase bangena enkonzweni yekukhonta ethendeni lekuhlangana." 
Numbers4:4 Umsebenti walamaKhohati ethendeni lekuhlangana bekukunakekela tintfo letingcwelengcwele. 
Numbers4:5 “Nase kufanele kutfutfwe inkambu, bo-Aroni nemadvodzana akhe kufanele bangene ekhatsi ethendeni lekukhontela, betfule lendvwangu lesembikwelibhokisi lesivumelwane, bese baliphutsa ngayo." 
Numbers4:6 Batawube sebaphindze balembonya ngesikhumba lesishukiwe selihhashi laselwandle, ngetulu bendlale indvwangu leluhlata njengesibhakabhaka, bafake timboko talo endzaweni yato." 
Numbers4:7 “Ngetulu kwelitafula lesinkhwa sekubekwa embikwaSimakadze kufanele bendlale indvwangu leluhlata njengesibhakabhaka, bese etikwalo babeka emapulede, netitja temphepho, netindishi, netindzebe temnikelo wekunatfwa; kufanele nesinkhwa sekubekwa embikwaSimakadze sihlale sikhona etikwalo." 
Numbers4:8 Etikwako konkhe loku kufanele bendlale indvwangu lebovu ngalokutopele, bese kumbonywa ngesikhumba lesishukiwe selihhashi laselwandle, bafake timboko talo endzaweni yato." 
Numbers4:9 “Bayawutsatsa indvwangu leluhlata njengesibhakabhaka baphutse lolutsi lwetibane tekukhanyisa, kanye netibane talo, nentsambo yalo, netijubantsambo, netitsebe, netindzebe temafutsa." 
Numbers4:10 Batakugocotela kanye naletintfo letihambisana nalo ngesikhumba lesishukiwe semahhashi aselwandle, bakufake eluhlakeni lwekwetfwala." 
Numbers4:11 “Etikwelilati legolide kufanele bendlale indvwangu leluhlata njengesibhakabhaka, bese bambonya loko ngesikhumba lesishukiwe semahhashi aselwandle, bafake timboko talo endzaweni yato." 
Numbers4:12 Kufanele batsatse tonkhe letintfo letisetjentiswa ekukhonteni endzaweni lengcwele, batigocote ngalendvwangu leluhlata njengesibhakabhaka, bakumbonye ngesikhumba semahhashi aselwandle, bese bakubeka eluhlakeni lwekwetfwala." 
Numbers4:13 Kufanele besuse umlotsa elatini lelitfusi, bese bendlala indvwangu lebukhwebeletane etikwalo." 
Numbers4:14 Bayawubeka etikwayo tonkhe titja letisetjentiswa enkonzweni yelilati: emakesi, netintsi tenyama, nemafosholo, nemigezelo yekunyenyeta, nato tonkhe titja taselatini. Etikwalo bese bendlala sikhumba lesishukiwe semahhashi aselwandle, bafake timboko talo endzaweni yato." 
Numbers4:15 Nase bacedzile bo-Aroni nemadvodzana akhe kumbonya indzawo lengcwele nato tonkhe timphahla tayo, nenkambu yonkhe seyilungele kusuka ihambe, emaKhohati kufanele kube ngiwo letfwalako, kodvwa angatitsintsi letintfo letingcwele, funa afe. “Ngito leto tintfo tasethendeni lekuhlangana letifanele kwetfwalwa ngemaKhohati." 
Numbers4:16 “Eleyazare, indvodzana ya-Aroni, umphristi, nguye lotawuphatsa emafutsa etibane, nemphepho lenuka kamnandzi, neminikelo yafutsi yalokutinhlavu, nemafutsa emgcobo, abe liso etikwalo lonkhe lithende lekukhontela nako konkhe lokukulo, ngisho etikwayo yonkhe indzawo lengcwele nako konkhe lokukuyo.”" 
Numbers4:17 Simakadze wakhuluma kuboMosi na-Aroni, watsi:" 
Numbers4:18 “Caphelani kutsi tinsendvo tesive semaKhohati tingapheli emkhatsini wemaLevi," 
Numbers4:19 kodvwa niwaphatse ngendlela yekutsi aphile angafi, nakasondzela eceleni kwetintfo letingcwelengcwele. Bo-Aroni nemadvodzana akhe kufanele bangene endzaweni lengcwele bawabele ngulowo nalowo inkonzo nemsebenti locondzene naye." 
Numbers4:20 Kodvwa emaKhohati akukafaneli kutsi angene abuke tintfo letingcwele ngisho nangesikhashana nje, funa afe.”" 
Numbers4:21 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi:" 
Numbers4:22 “Bala futsi emaGeshoni, lusendvo ngelusendvo nangemindeni yawo." 
Numbers4:23 Bala onkhe emadvodza kusukela kulasaneminyaka lengema-30 kuya kulengema-50 budzala lase bangena enkonzweni yekukhonta ethendeni lekuhlangana. 
Numbers4:24 Lena-ke yinkonzo yelusendvo lwemaGeshoni nabenta imisebenti yabo betfwala lemitfwalo: 
Numbers4:25 Batakwetfwala tindvwangu telithende lekukhontela, nelithende lekuhlangana, kanye netimbonyo talo letingetulu tesikhumba lesishukiwe semahhashi aselwandle, netindvwangu letisekungeneni kwelithende lekuhlangana," 
Numbers4:26 netindvwangu tesibuya, nendvwangu lesekungeneni kwesibuya lesitungeleta lithende lekukhontela nelilati, netintsambo tato, nato tonkhe timphahla letisetjentiswa ekukhonteni, babuye bente konkhe lokudzinga kwentiwa macondzana nato." 
Numbers4:27 Yonkhe inkonzo yemaGeshoni itakwentiwa ngekuyala kwa-Aroni nemadvodzana akhe, nako konkhe lokufanele bakwetfwale nalokufanele bakwente. Nine-ke nibone kutsi bakwenta konkhe yini labatjelwe kona." 
Numbers4:28 Lena-ke yinkonzo yelusendvo lwakaGeshoni ethendeni lekuhlangana, umsebenti batakuwenta ngaphansi kwesandla sa-Ithamari, indvodzana ya-Aroni, umphristi.”" 
Numbers4:29 “Bala emaMerari, lusendvo ngelusendvo nangemindeni yawo." 
Numbers4:30 Bala bonkhe labadvuna kusukela kulabaneminyaka lengema-30 budzala kuya kulengema-50, laba lase bangena enkonzweni yekukhonta ethendeni lekuhlangana." 
Numbers4:31 Lena-ke ngimisebenti lekufanele bayente: kufanele betfwale tinsikabhaluko tendzawo lengcwele, nemakabha, netinsika kanye nemaseko ato," 
Numbers4:32 netinsika letitungeleta sibuya, nemaseko ato, netikhonkhwane telithende, netintsambo, nato tonkhe timphahla nalokunye lokuhambisana nako. Nguleyo naleyo ndvodza uyibhalise eceleni kwelibito laleyo mphahla lekufanele iyetfwale." 
Numbers4:33 Lena-ke yinkonzo yemindeni yemaMerari ethendeni lekuhlangana ngaphansi kwesandla sa-Ithamari, indvodzana ya-Aroni, umphristi.”" 
Numbers4:34 BoMosi, na-Aroni, nebaholi besive babala emaKhohati, lusendvo ngelusendvo nangemindeni yawo." 
Numbers4:35 Onkhe emadvodza kusukela kulabeneminyaka lengema-30 budzala kuya kulengema-50, laba lase bangena enkonzweni yekukhonta ethendeni lekuhlangana," 
Numbers4:36 abalwa, lusendvo ngelusendvo, aba ti-2 750." 
Numbers4:37 Ngibo bonkhe-ke laba netinsendvo temaKhohati labebatawukhonta ethendeni lekuhlangana. Bo-Mosi na-Aroni bawabala njengekuyalwa kwaMosi nguSimakadze. 
Numbers4:38 EmaGeshoni abalwa, lusendvo ngelusendvo nangemindeni yawo." 
Numbers4:39 Onkhe emadvodza kusukela kulabeneminyaka lengema-30 budzala kuya kulengema-50, laba lase bangena enkonzweni yekukhonta ethendeni lekuhlangana," 
Numbers4:40 abalwa, lusendvo ngelusendvo nangemindeni yawo, aba ti-2 630. Ngibo bonkhe lababetinsendvo temaGeshoni lababekhonta ethendeni lekuhlangana." 
Numbers4:41 BoMosi na-Aroni bababala njengekuyalwa kwaMosi nguSimakadze. 
Numbers4:42 EmaMerari abalwa, lusendvo ngelusendvo nangemindeni yawo." 
Numbers4:43 Onkhe emadvodza kusukela kulabeneminyaka lengema-30 budzala kuya kulengema-50, laba lase bangena enkonzweni yekukhonta ethendeni lekuhlangana," 
Numbers4:44 abalwa, lusendvo ngelusendvo aba ti-3 200."
