Numbers4:45 Ngibo bonkhe-ke lababetinsendvo temaMerari. BoMosi na-Aroni bawabala njengekuyalwa kwaMosi nguSimakadze. 
Numbers4:46 Ngako boMosi, na-Aroni, nebaholi bema-Israyeli bawabala onkhe emaLevi, lusendvo ngelusendvo nangemindeni yawo." 
Numbers4:47 Asawonkhe emadvodza labeneminyaka lengema-30 budzala kuya kulengema-50, laba lase bangena enkonzweni yekukhonta ethendeni lekuhlangana," 
Numbers4:48 aba ti-8 580. 
Numbers4:49 Kwaya njengekuyalwa kwaMosi nguSimakadze kutsi ngulowo nalowo ente umsebenti wakhe lowawucondzene naye kutsi awente. Ngako-ke bonkhe babalwa njengobe Simakadze abeyale Mosi. 
Numbers5:1 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi:" 
Numbers5:2 “Yala ema-Israyeli uwatjele kutsi wonkhe umuntfu lonesifo salokusabulephelo nome lonekuvuta nome kwaluphi luhlobo, nome longcole ngenca yesidvumbu latsintsene naso, akacoshwe akhishelwe ngephandle kwenkambu." 
Numbers5:3 Bonkhe bantfu labanjalo, lomdvuna nome lomsikati, kufanele bakhishelwe ngephandle kwenkambu, khona bangetikuyingcolisa lenkambu yabo lapho ngihleti khona emkhatsini wabo.”" 
Numbers5:4 Ema-Israyeli awulalela lomyalo; abakhiphela ngephandle kwenkambu, njengobe Mosi abeyalwe nguSimakadze." 
Numbers5:5 Simakadze wachubeka wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi:" 
Numbers5:6 “Tjela ema-Israyeli utsi: ‘Nangabe indvodza nome umfati ona nome ngaluphi luhlobo lwekungetsembeki kuSimakadze, lowo muntfu uyawuba nelicala," 
Numbers5:7 ngako kufanele avume sono sakhe lasentile, bese ukhipha inhlawulo lephelele ngaloko kona kwakhe, engete incenye yako yesihlanu, ayinike lowo lamonile." 
Numbers5:8 Kodvwa nangabe lomuntfu asafile ate nesihlobo sakhe sengati lapho lenhlawulo ingakhishwa khona, uyawuyiletsa kuSimakadze ibe yemphristi, kuletfwe nesihhanca kutsi sibe yinhlawulo yekubuyisana leyentelwe yena lamonile." 
Numbers5:9 Yonkhe iminikelo lengcwele letsite leyawunikelwa ngema-Israyeli kuSimakadze iyawuba yalowo mphristi leyetfulwe kuye. 
Numbers5:10 Tonkhe tintfo latingcwelisile umuntfu tiyawuba takhe; konkhe umuntfu lakunike umphristi kuyawuba kwalowo mphristi.’ ” 
Numbers5:11 Simakadze wachubeka wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi:" 
Numbers5:12 “Tjela ema-Israyeli utsi: ‘Nangabe umfati wendvodza eduka ngekungetsembeki endvodzeni yakhe 
Numbers5:13 ngekulala nalenye indvodza, kodvwa loko kube kufihlakale emehlweni endvodza yakhe, nalesento singete satfolakala, kantsi vele sewutingcolisile, kubete nafakazi lomlahlako ngobe angakabanjwa elucotjeni," 
Numbers5:14 nangabe umoya wesikhwele ungena enhlitiyweni yendvodza yakhe imsole lomkayo kantsi vele ungcolile, nome-ke imsole kantsi akangcoli," 
Numbers5:15 lendvodza kufanele itsatse umkayo iye naye kumphristi. Kufanele iphatsele lomfati wayo umnikelo loyimphuphu yebhali lengemalitha langaba mabili. Kufanele ingawatseli emafutsa etikwayo nome ingayifaki nemphepho etikwayo, ngobe phela loko kungumnikelo walokutinhlavu lonikelelwa sikhwele. Lomnikelo wentelwe kutsi liciniso liphumele ebaleni." 
Numbers5:16 “ ‘Lomphristi utawusondzeta lomfati ammise embikwaSimakadze. 
Numbers5:17 Utawuchubeka atsele litsantana lemanti langcwele embiteni, bese ufaka kuwo litsantana lemhlabatsi wesiyilo salelithende lekukhontela." 
Numbers5:18 Utawutsi umphristi angemisa lomfati embikwaSimakadze, bese umtfukulula tinwele takhe afake etandleni talomfati umnikelo walokutinhlavu lekungewesikhumbuto sesikhwele, lomphristi utawube aphetse lamanti lababako laletsa sicalekiso." 
Numbers5:19 Lomphristi utawube sewufungisa lomfati ngekukhuluma lamavi atsi: “Nangabe kute indvodza lolele nayo, waphambuka, watingcolisa ngekuphinga kantsi usesesandleni salendvodza yakho, shangatsi lamanti esicalekiso angete akulimata." 
Numbers5:20 Kodvwa nangabe uphambukile usesesandleni salendvodza yakho watingcolisa ngekushenda nalenye indvodza,”" 
Numbers5:21 bese umphristi ufungisa lomfati ngesicalekiso atsi kuye: “Shangatsi Simakadze angenta bantfu bakini bakucalekise, baphindze bakusole. Shangatsi angashwaphanisa ematsanga akho, akhukhumukise nesisu sakho." 
Numbers5:22 Shangatsi lamanti laletsa lesicalekiso angangena emtimbeni wakho khona atewukhukhumukisa lesisu sakho ashwaphanise nematsanga akho.” “ ‘Lomfati uyawuphendvula atsi: “Amen, akube njalo.”" 
Numbers5:23 “ ‘Umphristi uyawube sewubhala leticalekiso encwadzini legocotwako, aphindze lombhalo awugezele kulamanti lababako lasembiteni." 
Numbers5:24 Utawube sewunatsisa lomfati lamanti lababako laletsa sicalekiso; lamanti esicalekiso atawutsi angangena kuye avete buhlungu lobesabekako. 
Numbers5:25 Umphristi utawutsatsa lomnikelo walokutinhlavu wesikhwele etandleni talomfati awujikitise embikwaSimakadze, bese uwubeka etikwelilati." 
Numbers5:26 Umphristi utawube sewutsatsa lelibinta lemnikelo walokutinhlavu wemphuphu kube ngumnikelo wesikhumbuto, awushise elatini; emvakwaloko-ke, sanganatsisa lomfati lamanti." 
Numbers5:27 Nangabe lomfati utingcolisile wangete wetsembeka endvodzeni yakhe, waphinga nalenye indvodza, lamanti esicalekiso lanatsiswe wona ngumphristi atawutsi angangena kuye amvetele buhlungu lobukhulu: abe nebunyumba, abe nesinye lesikhipha tisu, abe sicalekiso emkhatsini wesive sakubo." 
Numbers5:28 Kodvwa nangabe lomfati angakatingcolisi angenacala, angeke alimale, kantsi futsi utawuchubeka atale bantfwana." 
Numbers5:29 “ ‘Lona-ke ngumtsetfo locondzene nesikhwele, nangabe umfati aphambukile watingcolisa ngekulala nalenye indvodza, asesesandleni sendvodza yakhe," 
Numbers5:30 nome-ke nangabe lendvodza ifikelwa ngumoya wesikhwele, ngobe imsola lomkayo. Iyawummikisa embikwaSimakadze, bese umphristi ufeza wonkhe lomtsetfo kuye lomfati." 
Numbers5:31 Indvodza ingeke ibe nelicala ngaloko, kodvwa umfati uyawutetfwalela licala lakhe.’ ”" 
Numbers6:1 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi:" 
Numbers6:2 “Tjela sive sema-Israyeli utsi: ‘Nome ngubani lomdvuna nome lomsikati, loyakwenta setsembiso sekuba ngumNaziri ngekutehlukanisela Simakadze," 
Numbers6:3 uyakwehlukana neliwayini netjwala. Akasayikuyinatsa iviniga leyentiwe ngeliwayini nome-ke nganguluphi luhlobo lwetjwala. Akukafaneli anatse nesinatfo semagelebisi, angasawadli ngisho nemagelebisi nome ngulomisiwe nome ngulamanti." 
Numbers6:4 Ngaso sonkhe sikhatsi sakhe sekutehlukanisela Simakadze akayikudla lutfo loluvela esihlahleni semvini, ngisho nenhlanyelo nome sikhumba semagelebisi." 
Numbers6:5 “ ‘Ngaso sonkhe leso sikhatsi sakhe sekutehlukanisela Simakadze, akayikutihhula tinwele takhe. Uboshwe sifungo sakhe sekutidzela atinikele kuSimakadze ngalokuphelele abe ngulongcwele kuSimakadze; uyawutiyekela tonkhe tinwele takhe tikhule tibe tindze." 
Numbers6:6 Ngawo onkhe lawo malanga layawube atehlukanisela ngawo Simakadze akayiwusondzela edvute nesidvumbu," 
Numbers6:7 nome kunguyise, nome kungunina, nome kungumnakabo, nome kungudzadzewabo, nakwenteka bafa, akafaneli kutingcolisa ngaloko, ngobe umgcobo wekutehlukanisela Nkulunkulu uyawube usesetikwenhloko yakhe." 
Numbers6:8 Ngaso sonkhe sikhatsi sekutehlukanisela uyawuba ngcwele kuSimakadze. 
Numbers6:9 “ ‘Nangabe umuntfu afa ngekutumeka eceleni kwakhe, ngaloko kungcole tinwele takhe lasanikele ngato, uyawuhhula inhloko yakhe ngelilanga lekuhlanjululwa kwakhe, lekulilanga lesikhombisa." 
Numbers6:10 Kuyawutsi ngelilanga lesiphohlongo uyawuletsa ematuba lamabili nome emavukutfu lamancane lamabili kumphristi amnyango welithende lekuhlangana. 
Numbers6:11 Umphristi-ke uyawunikela linye libe ngumnikelo wesono, lelinye libe lemnikelo wekushiswa, amentele inhlawulo yekubuyisana, ngobe wonile ngenca yaleso sidvumbu. UmNaziri uyawutehlukanisela inhloko yakhe ngalona lelo langa lekuhlanjululwa," 
Numbers6:12 atehlukanisele Simakadze ngawo onkhe lawo malanga ekutehlukanisela kwakhe, aletse lizinyane lemvu lelidvuna lelinemnyaka munye budzala libe lemnikelo welicala; noko sikhatsi sekucala asiyikubalwa, ngobe kutehlukanisela kwakhe kwangcoliseka." 
Numbers6:13 “ ‘Lona-ke ngumtsetfo wemNaziri, nasekuphele sikhatsi sakhe sekutehlukanisela: Uyawuletfwa embikwemnyango welithende lekuhlangana," 
Numbers6:14 bese unikela ngesipho sakhe kuSimakadze: lizinyane lemvu lelidvuna lelinemnyaka munye budzala, lingabi nasici, libe lemnikelo wekushiswa, nelizinyane lemvu lelisikati lelinemnyaka munye budzala, lelingenasici, libe lemnikelo wesono, nesihhanca sinye lesingenasici, sibe ngumnikelo wekuthula." 
Numbers6:15 Uyawunikela nangelibhasikidi linye letinkhwa letingenambiliso, nangemacebelengwane lentiwe ngafulaha lobhicwe nemafutsa emncumo, nangemicatsane legcotjiswe ngemafutsa emncumo, bese wengeta nangemnikelo wakhe walokutinhlavu neweliwayini." 
Numbers6:16 “ ‘Umphristi-ke uyakukuletsa embikwaSimakadze, anikele ngemnikelo wesono nangemnikelo wekushiswa," 
Numbers6:17 anikele nangalesihhanca sibe ngumhlatjelo wemnikelo wekuthula kuSimakadze, kanye nalelibhasikidi letinkhwa letingenambiliso; umphristi uyawunikela nemnikelo walokutinhlavu newekunatfwa." 
Numbers6:18 LomNaziri-ke uyawube sewuyatihhula tinwele takhe enhloko yakhe ahhulele emnyango welithende lekuhlangana, atsatse letinwele tenhloko yakhe lengcwele atifake emlilweni longaphansi kwemnikelo wekuthula." 
Numbers6:19 “ ‘Umphristi uyawutsatsa siphanga lesibilisiwe sesihhanca, asibhice nelicebelengwane linye lelingenambiliso lelisebhasikidini nemcatsane munye, awubeke etandleni temNaziri, nase acedze kuhhula tinwele tekutehlukanisela." 
Numbers6:20 Umphristi uyakukujikitisa, ente umnikelo wekujikitiswa embikwaSimakadze; kusabelo lesingcwele semphristi kanye nemnikelo wemganga lojikitiswako, nemlente lonikelwe. Emvakwaloko-ke lomNaziri sekangalinatsa liwayini." 
Numbers6:21 Lona-ke ngumtsetfo wemNaziri lowenta sifungo. Umnikelo wakhe kuSimakadze uyakuya njengekwetsembisa kwakhe njengemNaziri ngetulu kwaloko langakhona kunikela ngako. Kufanele agcwalise sifungo sakhe lasentile njengekwemtsetfo wemNaziri.’ ” 
Numbers6:22 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi:" 
Numbers6:23 “Shano ku-Aroni nakumadvodzana akhe utsi sive saka-Israyeli niyawusibusisa kanjena: 
Numbers6:24 “ ‘Shangatsi Simakadze angakubusisa akugcine. 
Numbers6:25 Shangatsi Simakadze angakhanyisa buso bakhe kuwe, abe nemusa kuwe." 
Numbers6:26 Shangatsi Simakadze angaphakamisela buso bakhe ngakuwe, akuphe nekuthula.’" 
Numbers6:27 “Bayawulibita kanjalo-ke libito lami kuso sive saka-Israyeli, mine-ke ngiyawusibusisa.”" 
Numbers7:1 Watsi kube Mosi acedze kumisa lithende lekukhontela, waligcoba ngemafutsa, walinikela kanye nato tonkhe timphahla letihambisana nalo. Waphindze wagcoba lilati nato tonkhe titja talo." 
Numbers7:2 Baholi lababetinhloko tetive tema-Israyeli labo lababephetse nakwentiwa lubalo, baletsa iminikelo." 
Numbers7:3 Baletsa iminikelo yabo kuSimakadze: tincola letisitfupha letimbonyiwe, netinkhabi letili-12, incola iyinye yayiphuma kubaholi lababili, inkhabi iyinye yayiphuma kumholi munye; konkhe loku bakunikela embikwelithende lekukhontela." 
Numbers7:4 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi watsi: 
Numbers7:5 “Yemukele leminikelo, khona itawusetjentiswa ethendeni lekuhlangana. Yinike emaLevi njengekwesidzingo salowo nalowo muntfu emsebentini wakhe.”" 
Numbers7:6 Ngako Mosi watsatsa letincola naletinkhabi wakunika emaLevi. 
Numbers7:7 EmaGeshoni wawanika tincola letimbili netinkhabi letine njengekwesidzingo semsebenti wawo; 
Numbers7:8 kwatsi emaMerari wawanika tincola letine netinkhabi letisiphohlongo njengekwesidzingo semsebenti wawo. Onkhe abeholwa ngu-Ithamari, indvodzana ya-Aroni, umphristi." 
Numbers7:9 Kodvwa Mosi akawanikanga lutfo emaKhohati, ngobe phela wona bekufanele letintfo letingcwele atetfwale emahlombe awo." 
Numbers7:10 Latsi kube lelilati ligcotjwe ngemafutsa, baholi baletsa iminikelo yabo yekulinikela, bayibeka embikwalo." 
Numbers7:11 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi: “Akunikele umholi munye ngelilanga linye, aletse lowo mnikelo wakhe wekunikelwa kwelilati.”" 
Numbers7:12 Lowaletsa umnikelo wakakhe ngelilanga lekucala kwaba nguNasoni, umsa wa-Aminadabi, wesive sakaJuda." 
Numbers7:13 Umnikelo wakhe kwakulipulede lesiliva lelalinesisindvo lesasingaba yikhilogremu nencenye, nendishi yesiliva yekunyenyeta lenesisindvo lesasingemagremu labengaba ngema-800, kokubili kwaya ngekwesilinganiso lesisemtsetfweni, kokubili kwakugcwele fulaha abhicwe nemafutsa, kutsi kutewuba ngumnikelo walokutinhlavu;" 
Numbers7:14 ingwembe yegolide lenesisindvo lesasingemagremu labengaba li-110, igcwele imphepho;" 
Numbers7:15 inkunzana, nesihhanca, nelizinyane lemvu lelidvuna lelinemnyaka munye budzala, kwaba kwemnikelo wekushiswa;" 
Numbers7:16 siphongo semnikelo wesono; 
Numbers7:17 tinkunzana letimbili, netihhanca letisihlanu, netiphongo letisihlanu, nemazinyane lamadvuna etimvu lasihlanu lanemnyaka munye budzala, kutsi kutewuba ngumnikelo wekuthula. Kwaba ngulowo-ke umnikelo waNasoni, umsa wa-Aminadabi." 
Numbers7:18 Ngelilanga lesibili Nethaneli, umsa waSuwari, umholi wesive saka-Isakhari, waletsa umnikelo wakakhe." 
Numbers7:19 Umnikelo wakhe kwakulipulede lesiliva lelalinesisindvo lesasingaba yikhilogremu nencenye, nendishi yesiliva yekunyenyeta lenesisindvo lesasingemagremu labengaba ngema-800, kokubili kwaya ngekwesilinganiso lesisemtsetfweni, kokubili kwakugcwele fulaha abhicwe nemafutsa, kutsi kutewuba ngumnikelo walokutinhlavu;" 
Numbers7:20 ingwembe yegolide lenesisindvo lesasingemagremu labengaba li-110, igcwele imphepho;" 
Numbers7:21 inkunzana, nesihhanca, nelizinyane lemvu lelidvuna lelinemnyaka munye budzala, konkhe kwaba kwemnikelo wekushiswa;" 
Numbers7:22 siphongo semnikelo wesono; 
Numbers7:23 tinkunzana letimbili, netihhanca letisihlanu, netiphongo letisihlanu, nemazinyane lamadvuna etimvu lasihlanu lanemnyaka munye budzala, kutsi kutewuba kwemnikelo wekuthula. Kwaba ngulowo-ke umnikelo waNethaneli, umsa waSuwari." 
Numbers7:24 Ngelilanga lesitsatfu Eliyabe, umsa waHeloni, umholi wesive sakaZebuloni, waletsa umnikelo wakakhe." 
Numbers7:25 Umnikelo wakhe kwakulipulede lesiliva lelalinesisindvo lesasingaba yikhilogremu nencenye, nendishi yesiliva yekunyenyeta lenesisindvo lesasingemagremu labengaba ngema-800, kokubili kwaya ngekwesilinganiso lesisemtsetfweni, kokubili kwakugcwele fulaha abhicwe nemafutsa, kutsi kutewuba ngumnikelo walokutinhlavu;" 
Numbers7:26 ingwembe yegolide lenesisindvo lesasingemagremu labengaba li-110; igcwele imphepho; 
Numbers7:27 inkunzana, nesihhanca, nelizinyane lemvu lelidvuna lelinemnyaka munye budzala, kwaba kwemnikelo wekushiswa;" 
Numbers7:28 siphongo semnikelo wesono; 
Numbers7:29 tinkunzana letimbili, netihhanca letisihlanu, netiphongo letisihlanu, nemazinyane lamadvuna etimvu lasihlanu lanemnyaka munye budzala, kutsi kutewuba ngumnikelo wekuthula. Kwaba ngulowo-ke umnikelo wa-Eliyabe, umsa waHeloni." 
Numbers7:30 Ngelilanga lesine Elisuri, umsa waShedewuri, umholi wesive sakaRubeni, waletsa umnikelo wakakhe." 
Numbers7:31 Umnikelo wakhe kwakulipulede lesiliva lelalinesisindvo lesasingaba yikhilogremu nencenye, nendishi yesiliva yekunyenyeta lenesisindvo lesasingemagremu labengaba ngema-800, kokubili kwaya ngekwesilinganiso lesisemtsetfweni, kokubili kwakugcwele fulaha abhicwe nemafutsa, kutsi kutewuba ngumnikelo walokutinhlavu;" 
Numbers7:32 ingwembe yegolide lenesisindvo lesasingemagremu labengaba li-110, igcwele imphepho;" 
Numbers7:33 inkunzana, nesihhanca, nelizinyane lemvu lelidvuna lelinemnyaka munye budzala, kwaba kwemnikelo wekushiswa;" 
Numbers7:34 siphongo semnikelo wesono; 
Numbers7:35 tinkunzana letimbili, netihhanca letisihlanu, netiphongo letisihlanu, nemazinyane lamadvuna etimvu lasihlanu lanemnyaka munye budzala, kutsi kutewuba ngumnikelo wekuthula. Kwaba ngulowo-ke umnikelo wa-Elisuri, umsa waShedewuri." 
Numbers7:36 Ngelilanga lesihlanu Shelumiyeli, umsa waSurishadayi, umholi wesive sakaSimeyoni, waletsa umnikelo wakakhe." 
Numbers7:37 Umnikelo wakhe kwakulipulede lesiliva lelinesisindvo lesasingaba yikhilogremu nencenye, nendishi yesiliva yekunyenyeta lenesisindvo lesasingemagremu labengaba ngema-800, kokubili kwaya ngekwesilinganiso lesisemtsetfweni; kokubili kwakugcwele fulaha abhicwe nemafutsa, kutsi kutewuba ngumnikelo walokutinhlavu;" 
Numbers7:38 ingwembe yegolide lenesisindvo lesasingemagremu labengaba li-110 igcwele imphepho; 
Numbers7:39 inkunzana, nesihhanca, nelizinyane lemvu lelidvuna lelinemnyaka munye budzala, kwaba kwemnikelo wekushiswa;" 
Numbers7:40 siphongo semnikelo wesono; 
Numbers7:41 tinkunzana letimbili, netihhanca letisihlanu, netiphongo letisihlanu, nemazinyane lamadvuna etimvu lasihlanu lanemnyaka munye budzala, kutsi kutewuba ngumnikelo wekuthula. Kwaba ngulowo-ke umnikelo waShelumiyeli, umsa waSurishadayi." 
Numbers7:42 Ngelilanga lesitfupha Eliyasafa, umsa waDehuweli, umholi wesive sakaGadi, waletsa umnikelo wakakhe." 
Numbers7:43 Umnikelo wakhe kwakulipulede lesiliva lelinesisindvo lesasingaba yikhilogremu nencenye, nendishi yesiliva yekunyenyeta lenesisindvo lesasingemagremu labengaba ngema-800, kokubili kwaya ngekwesilinganiso lesisemtsetfweni, kokubili kwakugcwele fulaha abhicwe nemafutsa, kutsi kutewuba ngumnikelo walokutinhlavu;" 
Numbers7:44 ingwembe yegolide lenesisindvo lesasingemagremu labengaba li-110, igcwele imphepho;" 
Numbers7:45 inkunzana, nesihhanca, nelizinyane lemvu lelidvuna lelinemnyaka munye budzala, kwaba kwemnikelo wekushiswa;" 
Numbers7:46 siphongo semnikelo wesono; 
Numbers7:47 tinkunzana letimbili, netihhanca letisihlanu, netiphongo letisihlanu, nemazinyane lamadvuna etimvu lasihlanu lanemnyaka munye budzala, kutsi kutewuba ngumnikelo wekuthula. Kwaba ngulowo-ke umnikelo wa-Eliyasafa, umsa waDehuweli." 
Numbers7:48 Ngelilanga lesikhombisa Elishama, umsa wa-Amihudi, umholi wesive saka-Efrayimu, waletsa umnikelo wakakhe." 
Numbers7:49 Umnikelo wakhe kwakulipulede lesiliva lelinesisindvo lesasingaba yikhilogremu nencenye, nendishi yesiliva yekunyenyeta lenesisindvo lesasingemagremu labengaba ngema-800, kokubili kwaya ngekwesilinganiso lesisemtsetfweni, kokubili kwakugcwele fulaha abhicwe nemafutsa, kutsi kutewuba ngumnikelo walokutinhlavu;" 
Numbers7:50 ingwembe yegolide lenesisindvo lesasingemagremu labengaba li-110, igcwele imphepho;" 
Numbers7:51 inkunzana, nesihhanca, nelizinyane lemvu lelidvuna lelinemnyaka munye budzala, kwaba kwemnikelo wekushiswa;" 
Numbers7:52 siphongo semnikelo wesono; 
Numbers7:53 tinkunzana letimbili, netihhanca letisihlanu, netiphongo letisihlanu, nemazinyane lamadvuna etimvu lasihlanu lanemnyaka munye budzala, kutsi kutewuba ngumnikelo wekuthula. Kwaba ngulowo-ke umnikelo wa-Elishama, umsa wa-Amihudi." 
Numbers7:54 Ngelilanga lesiphohlongo Gamaliyeli, umsa Phedasuri, umholi wesive sakaManase, waletsa umnikelo wakakhe." 
Numbers7:55 Umnikelo wakhe kwakulipulede lesiliva lelinesisindvo lesasingaba yikhilogremu nencenye, nendishi yesiliva yekunyenyeta lenesisindvo lesasingemagremu labengaba ngema-800, kokubili kwaya ngekwesilinganiso lesisemtsetfweni, kokubili kwakugcwele fulaha abhicwe nemafutsa, kutsi kutewuba ngumnikelo walokutinhlavu;" 
Numbers7:56 ingwembe yegolide lenesisindvo lesasingemagremu labengaba li-110, igcwele imphepho," 
Numbers7:57 inkunzana, nesihhanca, nelizinyane lemvu lelidvuna lelinemnyaka munye budzala, kwaba kwemnikelo wekushiswa;" 
Numbers7:58 siphongo semnikelo wesono; 
Numbers7:59 tinkunzana letimbili, netihhanca letisihlanu, netiphongo letisihlanu, nemazinyane lamadvuna etimvu lasihlanu lanemnyaka munye budzala, kutsi kutewuba ngumnikelo wekuthula. Kwaba ngulowo-ke umnikelo waGamaliyeli, umsa waPhedasuri." 
Numbers7:60 Ngelilanga lemfica Abidani, umsa waGideyoni, umholi wesive sakaBhenjamini, waletsa umnikelo wakakhe." 
Numbers7:61 Umnikelo wakhe kwakulipulede lesiliva lelinesisindvo lesasingaba yikhilogremu nencenye, nendishi yesiliva yekunyenyeta lenesisindvo lesasingemagremu labengaba ngema-800, kokubili kwaya ngekwesilinganiso lesisemtsetfweni; kokubili kwakugcwele fulaha abhicwe nemafutsa, kutsi kutewuba ngumnikelo walokutinhlavu;" 
Numbers7:62 ingwembe yegolide lenesisindvo lesasingemagremu labengaba li-110, igcwele imphepho;" 
Numbers7:63 inkunzana, nesihhanca, nelizinyane lemvu lelidvuna lelinemnyaka munye budzala, kwaba kwemnikelo wekushiswa;" 
Numbers7:64 siphongo semnikelo wesono; 
Numbers7:65 tinkunzana letimbili, netihhanca letisihlanu, netiphongo letisihlanu, nemazinyane lamadvuna etimvu lasihlanu lanemnyaka munye budzala, kutsi kutewuba ngumnikelo wekuthula. Kwaba ngulowo-ke umnikelo wa-Abidani, umsa waGideyoni." 
Numbers7:66 Ngelilanga lelishumi Ahiyezeri, umsa wa-Amishadayi, umholi wesive sakaDani, waletsa umnikelo wakakhe." 
Numbers7:67 Umnikelo wakhe kwakulipulede lesiliva lelinesisindvo lesasingaba yikhilogremu nencenye, nendishi yesiliva yekunyenyeta lenesisindvo lesasingemagremu labengaba ngema-800, kokubili kwaya ngekwesilinganiso lesisemtsetfweni, kokubili kwakugcwele fulaha abhicwe nemafutsa, kutsi kutewuba ngumnikelo walokutinhlavu;" 
Numbers7:68 ingwembe yegolide lenesisindvo lesasingemagremu labengaba li-110, igcwele imphepho;" 
Numbers7:69 inkunzana, nesihhanca, nelizinyane lemvu lelidvuna lelinemnyaka munye budzala, kwaba ngumnikelo wekushiswa;" 
Numbers7:70 siphongo semnikelo wesono; 
Numbers7:71 tinkunzana letimbili, netihhanca letisihlanu, netiphongo letisihlanu, nemazinyane lamadvuna etimvu lasihlanu lanemnyaka munye budzala, kutsi kutewuba ngumnikelo wekuthula. Kwaba ngulowo-ke umnikelo wa-Ahiyezeri, umsa wa-Amishadayi." 
Numbers7:72 Ngelilanga leli-11 Phagiyeli, umsa wa-Okrani, umholi wesive saka-Asheri, waletsa umnikelo wakakhe." 
Numbers7:73 Umnikelo wakhe kwakulipulede lesiliva lelinesisindvo lesasingaba yikhilogremu nencenye, nendishi yesiliva yekunyenyeta lenesisindvo lesasingemagremu labengaba ngema-800, kokubili kwaya ngekwesilinganiso lesisemtsetfweni, kokubili kwakugcwele fulaha abhicwe nemafutsa, kutsi kutewuba ngumnikelo walokutinhlavu;" 
Numbers7:74 ingwembe yegolide lenesisindvo lesasingemagremu labengaba li-110, igcwele imphepho;" 
Numbers7:75 inkunzana, nesihhanca, nelizinyane lemvu lelidvuna lelinemnyaka budzala, kwaba kwemnikelo wekushiswa;" 
Numbers7:76 siphongo semnikelo wesono; 
Numbers7:77 tinkunzana letimbili, netihhanca letisihlanu, netiphongo letisihlanu, nemazinyane lamadvuna etimvu lasihlanu lanemnyaka munye budzala, kutsi kutewuba ngumnikelo wekuthula. Kwaba ngulowo-ke umnikelo waPhagiyeli, umsa wa-Okrani." 
Numbers7:78 Ngelilanga leli-12 Ahira, umsa wa-Enani, umholi wesive sakaNaftali, waletsa umnikelo wakakhe." 
Numbers7:79 Umnikelo wakhe kwakulipulede lesiliva lelinesisindvo lesasingaba yikhilogremu nencenye, nendishi yesiliva yekunyenyeta lenesisindvo lesasingemagremu labengaba ngema-800, kokubili kwaya ngekwesilinganiso lesisemtsetfweni, kokubili kwakugcwele fulaha abhicwe nemafutsa, kutsi kutewuba ngumnikelo walokutinhlavu;" 
Numbers7:80 ingwembe yegolide lenesisindvo lesasingemagremu labengaba li-110, igcwele imphepho;" 
Numbers7:81 inkunzana, nesihhanca, nelizinyane lemvu lelidvuna lelinemnyaka munye budzala, kwaba kwemnikelo wekushiswa;" 
Numbers7:82 siphongo semnikelo wesono; 
Numbers7:83 tinkunzana letimbili, netihhanca letisihlanu, netiphongo letisihlanu, nemazinyane lamadvuna etimvu lasihlanu, lanemnyaka munye budzala, kutsi kutewuba ngumnikelo wekuthula. Kwaba ngulowo-ke umnikelo wa-Ahira, umsa wa-Enani." 
Numbers7:84 Lena-ke ngiminikelo yebaholi besive saka-Israyeli yekunikela lilati nase ligcotjwe ngemafutsa, seyiyonkhe yema kanje: emapulede esiliva labeli-12, netindishi tesiliva tekunyenyeta letili-12, netingwembe tegolide letili-12." 
Numbers7:85 Ngulelo nalelo pulede lalinesisindvo lesasingaba yikhilogremu nencenye, nguleyo naleyo ndishi yesiliva yekunyenyeta yayinesisindvo lesasingemagremu labengaba ngema-800. Setitonkhe tindishi tesiliva tatinesisindvo lesasingemakhilogremu labengaba ngema-28 ngekwesilinganiso lesisemtsetfweni." 
Numbers7:86 Letingwembe tegolide letili-12 iyinye igcwele imphepho yayinesisindvo lesasingemagremu labengaba li-110, ngekwesilinganiso lesisemtsetfweni. Setitonkhe letingwembe tegolide tatinesisindvo lesasingaba yikhilogremu nemagremu langema-320." 
Numbers7:87 Setitonkhe tifuyo letatitawushiswa kulomnikelo kwaba tinkunzana letili-12, netihhanca letili-12, nemazinyane etimvu lamadvuna lali-12 lanemnyaka munye budzala, kanye neminikelo yalokutinhlavu. Kwasetjentiswa tiphongo letili-12 emnikelweni wesono." 
Numbers7:88 Setitonkhe tifuyo temhlatjelo wemnikelo wekuthula kwaba tinkunzana letingema-24, netihhanca letingema-60, netiphongo letingema-60, nemazinyane etimvu lamadvuna langema-60 lanemnyaka munye budzala. Konkhe loko kwakukwemnikelo wekunikelwa kwelilati nase ligcotjwe ngemafutsa." 
Numbers7:89 Ngesikhatsi Mosi angena ethendeni lekuhlangana kuyawukhuluma naSimakadze, weva livi likhuluma naye liphuma esihlalweni semusa lesasisetikwelibhokisi lesivumelwane emkhatsini wemakherubhi lamabili. Bakhulumisana." 
Numbers8:1 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi:" 
Numbers8:2 “Tjela Aroni utsi: ‘Ngesikhatsi ulumeka letibane letisikhombisa, kufanele tikhanyise lendzawo lesembikwelutsi lwetibane.’ ”" 
Numbers8:3 Aroni wavele wakwenta loko; wemisa letibane, takhanyisa lendzawo lesembikwelutsi lwetibane, njengobe Simakadze abeshito kuMosi." 
Numbers8:4 Lolutsi lwalwakhiwe ngegolide legcotjiwe, kusukela esibunu salo kuze kube ngusetimbalini talo. Lolutsi lwalwakhiwe ncamashi ngendlela Mosi labeyilayelwe nguNkulunkulu." 
Numbers8:5 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi:" 
Numbers8:6 “Yehlukanisa emaLevi emkhatsini wesive sema-Israyeli, bese uyawahlambulula." 
Numbers8:7 Kufanele uwahlambulule kanje: Wafafate ngemanti ekuhlambulula, bese ahhula wonkhe umtimba, ageze timphahla tawo, atawube asayahlanteka." 
Numbers8:8 Akatsatse inkunzana nemnikelo wayo walokutinhlavu kwafulaha lobhicwe nemafutsa, bese utsatsa inkunzana yesibili letawuba yemnikelo wesono." 
Numbers8:9 Uyakwetfula emaLevi embikwelithende lekuhlangana, bese uhlanganisa sonkhe sive sema-Israyeli." 
Numbers8:10 Uyakwetfula lamaLevi kuSimakadze, bese sive sema-Israyeli sibeka tandla taso etikwawo." 
Numbers8:11 Aroni uyawube sewetfula lamaLevi kuSimakadze abe ngumnikelo wekujikitiswa wesive sema-Israyeli, kuze alungele kwenta umsebenti waSimakadze." 
Numbers8:12 EmaLevi atawutsi angabeka tandla tawo etinhloko taletinkunzana, wena-ke bese unikela lenye ibe ngumnikelo wesono, lena lenye ibe ngumnikelo wekushiswa kuSimakadze kutekwenta inhlawulo yekubuyisana kwemaLevi naSimakadze." 
Numbers8:13 “LamaLevi uyakuwemisa embikwabo-Aroni nemadvodzana akhe, bese uyawetfula njengemnikelo wekujikisiswa kuSimakadze." 
Numbers8:14 Uyakuwehlukanisa kanjalo-ke emaLevi emkhatsini wesive sema-Israyeli; lamaLevi atawuba ngewami. 
Numbers8:15 Emvakwaloko-ke emaLevi ayawungena ayekwenta inkonzo yawo ethendeni lekuhlangana, nase uwahlambululile wawetfula njengemnikelo wekujikitiswa." 
Numbers8:16 Bona bangema-Israyeli lekufanele nginikwe wona ngalokuphelele. Ngititsatsele wona kutsi abe ngewami esikhundleni sematubulo onkhe latalwa ngiso sonkhe sive sema-Israyeli. 
Numbers8:17 Onkhe ematubulo lamadvuna esive sema-Israyeli, ebantfu nome etilwane ngewami. Ngesikhatsi ngibulala onkhe ematubulo eGibhithe ngatehlukanisela wona." 
Numbers8:18 Ngititsatsele emaLevi esikhundleni sawo onkhe ematubulo esive saka-Israyeli. 
Numbers8:19 Emkhatsini waso sonkhe sive sema-Israyeli emaLevi ngiwaphe bo-Aroni nemadvodzana akhe kutsi abe tipho tabo, ente inkonzo ethendeni lekuhlangana egameni lesive sonkhe sema-Israyeli nekutsi asentele inhlawulo yekubuyisana sitewuvikeleka esijezisweni lesingahle sisehlele, nakwenteka sisondzela endzaweni lengcwele.”" 
Numbers8:20 Ngako-ke boMosi, na-Aroni, nesive sonkhe sema-Israyeli bavele bakwenta konkhe loko kumaLevi; bakwenta kuwo njengobe Simakadze abeyale Mosi." 
Numbers8:21 EmaLevi atihlambulula, ageza netimphahla tawo. Aroni wawetfula aba ngumnikelo wekujikitiswa kuSimakadze, wawentela nenhlawulo yekubuyisana, wawahlambulula." 
Numbers8:22 Emvakwaloko emaLevi eta kutakwenta umsebenti wawo ethendeni lekuhlangana ngephansi kwa-Aroni nemadvodzana akhe. Bakwenta kumaLevi konkhe loko Simakadze abeyale Mosi macondzana nawo. 
Numbers8:23 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi:" 
Numbers8:24 “Nangu umtsetfo locondzene nemaLevi: Onkhe emaLevi kusukela eminyakeni lengema-25 budzala kuye etulu ayakuyingenela lenkonzo yawo ethendeni lekuhlangana," 
Numbers8:25 kodvwa kusukela eminyakeni lengema-50 budzala ayawutsatsa umhlalaphansi, angabe asasebenta," 
Numbers8:26 kodvwa noko angasita labanakabo ekwenteni inkonzo yelithende lekuhlangana. Wona ngekwawo akufanele ayente leyo nkonzo. Uyakwenta njalo-ke, nawunika emaLevi inkonzo yawo.”" 
Numbers9:1 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi eHlane laseSinayi ngenyanga yekucala, emnyakeni wesibili kusukela ema-Israyeli aphuma eGibhithe, watsi:" 
Numbers9:2 “Ema-Israyeli akagubhe uMkhosi weliPhasika ngaleso sikhatsi lesimisiwe. 
Numbers9:3 Akaligubhe ngaleso sikhatsi lesimisiwe, kusihlwa ngelilanga leli-14 kuyo lenyanga; kulandzelwe yonkhe leyo mitsetfo nemiyalo lemacondzana nalo.”" 
Numbers9:4 Ngako Mosi watjela sive sema-Israyeli kutsi akagubhe umkhosi weliPhasika; 
Numbers9:5 avele akwenta loko eHlane laseSinayi kusihlwa ngelilanga leli-14 enyangeni yekucala. Ema-Israyeli akwenta konkhe loko njengobe Simakadze abeyale Mosi. 
Numbers9:6 Noko labanye babo abazange bawugubhe lomkhosi, ngobe babengcolile ngekwemtsetfo, ngekutsi babetsintse sidvumbu. Ngako beta kuMosi na-Aroni ngalo lelo langa bafike" 
Numbers9:7 batsi: “Sesingcolile ngenca yekutsintsa sidvumbu, kodvwa kuya ngani kutsi tsine sikhishwe sivinjelwe kutsi siletse umnikelo waSimakadze kanye nalamanye ema-Israyeli ngaleso sikhatsi lesesimisiwe?”" 
Numbers9:8 Mosi wabaphendvula watsi: “Ase nime, ngize ngitfole umyalo waSimakadze ngani.”" 
Numbers9:9 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi:" 
Numbers9:10 “Tjela ema-Israyeli utsi: ‘Nangabe lomunye wenu nome wetitukulwane tenu angcole ngenca yekutsintsa sidvumbu nome aseluhambeni khashane, kodvwa noko angaligubha lelo Phasika laSimakadze." 
Numbers9:11 Kufanele bona baligubhe ngelilanga leli-14 enyangeni yesibili kusihlwa. Kufanele baligubhe ngekudla lizinyane lemvu, nesinkhwa lesite imbiliso kanye netibhidvo letibabako." 
Numbers9:12 Kufanele kubete labakushiyela likusasa, kantsi nematsambo alo bangawephuli. Nabagubha loMkhosi weliPhasika, kufanele bayente yonkhe imitsetfo yalo." 
Numbers9:13 Kodvwa nakwenteka lomunye ayekela kuwugubha loMkhosi weliPhasika, kantsi akasiye longcolile ngekwemtsetfo futsi akekho ekuhambeni, lowo muntfu uyawuncunywa esiveni sakubo, ngobe phela akawuletsi umnikelo waSimakadze ngaleso sikhatsi lesijutjiwe. Lowo muntfu uyawulitfwala lelo cala lesono sakhe." 
Numbers9:14 “ ‘Umuntfu wetive lohlala emkhatsini wenu lofuna kuwugubha loMkhosi weliPhasika, naye angachubeka awugubhe alandzele leyo mitsetfo nemiyalo. Niyawuba nayo yona leyo mitsetfo kubetive nakubemdzabu.’ ”" 
Numbers9:15 Ngelilanga lekumiswa kwelithende lekukhontela, lifu lalimbonya. Kusukela kusihlwa kwaze kwaba ngusekuseni lelifu lelalisetikwelithende lekukhontela, lalifanana nemlilo." 
Numbers9:16 Lalivamise kwenta njalo nje ngekutsi lelifu lilimbonye, bese kutsi ebusuku lifanane nemlilo." 
Numbers9:17 Kwakutsi nangabe lifu liphakama etikwelithende, ema-Israyeli atfutse, litsi lapho lima khona, ema-Israyeli nawo emise khona." 
Numbers9:18 Ema-Israyeli abetfutsa ngekuyalwa nguSimakadze, ngalokufananako abemisa nase kusho Simakadze. Babengatfutsi kuleyo nkambu, nangabe lelifu seloku lisetikwelithende lekukhontela." 
Numbers9:19 Nangabe lelifu lihleti etikwelithende lekukhontela emalanga lamanyenti, ema-Israyeli abelalela umyalo waSimakadze, angatfutsi." 
Numbers9:20 Ngaletinye tikhatsi lelifu lalike libesetikwelithende lekukhontela emalanga lambalwa; abetsi Simakadze angawatjela kutsi akeme, bese ayemisa atsi angawatjela kutsi akahambe, vele atfutse." 
Numbers9:21 Ngaletinye tikhatsi lelifu lalihlala etikwelithende kusukela kusihlwa kuze kube ngusekuseni, litsi lingaphakama ekuseni, batfutse futsi. Babechubeka bahambe nase kuphakeme lelifu nome ngusemini nome ngusebusuku." 
Numbers9:22 Kwakutsi lelifu nalihleti etikwalelithende lekukhontela emalanga lamabili nome inyanga nome umnyaka, ema-Israyeli abechubeka kuhlala lapho, angatfutsi; kodvwa lalitsi lingaphakama, nawo vele atfutse." 
Numbers9:23 Simakadze abetsi angawatjela kutsi akeme, nawo eme, atsi angawatjela kutsi akahambe vele nawo ahambe, alalela umyalo waSimakadze ngesandla saMosi." 
Numbers10:1 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi:" 
Numbers10:2 “Yakha emacilongo lamabili esiliva legcotjiwe; lamacilongo ayawusetjentiswa ekubiteni sive nasekudzilitweni kwemathende nase kutfutfwa. 
Numbers10:3 Nakushaywa lamacilongo lamabili, sive sonkhe siyawubutsana kuwe ekungeneni kwelithende lekuhlangana." 
Numbers10:4 Kodvwa nakukhala linye licilongo kuphela, kuyawubutsana kuwe baholi bodvwa, lekungutona tinhloko tetive tema-Israyeli." 
Numbers10:5 Licilongo nalikhala tikhawu letimfisha kwekucala, tonkhe tive letingasemphumalanga tiyawuphuma tihambe." 
Numbers10:6 Licilongo nalikhala tikhawu letimfisha kwesibili, tonkhe tive letingaseningizimu tiyawuphuma tihambe. Ngako-ke emathende ayawudzilitwa, nangabe licilongo likhala tikhawu letimfisha," 
Numbers10:7 kodvwa nangabe kubitwa sive sonkhe, liyawukhala tikhawu letindze." 
Numbers10:8 Lamacilongo ayawushaywa ngemadvodzana a-Aroni, baphristi. “Lomyalo uyakwentiwa sive sema-Israyeli kuto tonkhe titukulwane." 
Numbers10:9 Naniyakulwa imphi eveni lenu nihlaselwa titsa tinivimbetela, niyawukhalisa licilongo ngetikhawu tekuhlaba inyandzaleyo. Mine, Simakadze, Nkulunkulu wenu ngiyakunikhumbula nginisite, bese ngiyanephula etitseni tenu." 
Numbers10:10 Nangemikhosi yenu yekujabula, ngemkhosi wekwetfwasa kwenyanga lensha nangaleminye imikhosi yekukhonta, niyawushaya emacilongo, nanetfula iminikelo yenu yekushiswa neminikelo yenu yekuthula lenguyona iyawuba sikhumbuto senu embikwaNkulunkulu wenu. Mine nginguSimakadze Nkulunkulu wenu.”" 
Numbers10:11 Mhlazana tingema-20, enyangeni yesibili, emnyakeni wesibili, lifu lelalisetikwelithende lesivumelwane laphakama." 
Numbers10:12 Sive sema-Israyeli satfutsa eHlane laseSinayi, siphuma ngeticheme taso. Lifu lahamba laze layakuma eHlane lasePharani." 
Numbers10:13 Babecala kutfutsa bayalwa nguSimakadze ngemlomo waMosi. 
Numbers10:14 Ticheme tesive sakaJuda tatfutsa kucala ngetigaba taso ngaphansi kwesiboniso sebuve baso. Umholi wato bekunguNasoni, umsa wa-Aminadabi." 
Numbers10:15 Umholi wesicheme sesive saka-Isakhari bekunguNethaneli, umsa waSuwari." 
Numbers10:16 Umholi wesicheme sesive sakaZebuloni bekungu-Eliyabe, umsa waHeloni." 
Numbers10:17 Kwase kufutwa lelithende lekukhontela, emadvodzana akaGeshoni newakaMerari labenguwona etfwala lithende, aphuma ahamba." 
Numbers10:18 Kwase kulandzela ticheme tesive sakaRubeni ngetigaba taso ngaphansi kwesiboniso sebuve baso. Umholi waso bekungu-Elisuri, umsa waShedewuri." 
Numbers10:19 Umholi wesive sakaSimeyoni bekunguShelumiyeli, umsa waSurishadayi." 
Numbers10:20 Umholi wesicheme sesive sakaGadi bekungu-Eliyasafa, umsa waDehuweli." 
Numbers10:21 Kwase kulandzela sicheme sesive semaKhohati lesasingusona setfwala tintfo letingcwele. Sona sasitsi sifika sikhandze lithende lekukhontela selakhiwe laphelela. 
Numbers10:22 Kwase kulandzela ticheme tesive saka-Efrayimu ngetigaba taso ngaphansi kwesiboniso sebuve baso. Umholi waso bekungu-Elishama, umsa wa-Amihudi." 
Numbers10:23 Umholi wesive sakaManase bekunguGamaliyeli, umsa waPhedasuri." 
Numbers10:24 Umholi wesive sakaBhenjamini bekungu-Abidani, umsa waGideyoni." 
Numbers10:25 Ekugcineni kwase kulandzela tigaba teticheme tesive sakaDani ngaphansi kwesiboniso sebuve baso letaba sivikelo sema-Israyeli ngemuva. Umholi waso bekungu-Ahiyezeri, umsa wa-Amishadayi." 
Numbers10:26 Umholi wesive saka-Asheri bekunguPhagiyeli, umsa wa-Okrani." 
Numbers10:27 Umholi wesicheme sesive sakaNaftali bekungu-Ahira, umsa wa-Enani." 
Numbers10:28 Loko-ke bekungukona kuhleleka kwekuphuma kwema-Israyeli ngekweticheme tawo, njalo nje nakatfutsa." 
Numbers10:29 Mosi wakhuluma kuHobabi, umsa waRehuweli, umMidiyani, uyisetala waMosi, watsi: “Tsine sesiyatfutsa lapha, sesiya eveni latsi Simakadze utasinika lona. Hamba kanye natsi, sitakuphatsa kahle, ngobe Simakadze ema-Israyeli uwetsembise tintfo letinhle.”" 
Numbers10:30 Hobabi waphendvula watsi: “Cha, ngingeke ngihambe nani; sengibuyela eveni lakitsi nasesiveni sakitsi.”" 
Numbers10:31 Mosi wamncenga atsi: “Mane ungasishiyi; wena phela uyati lapho kufanele simise khona kutsi ngusehlane; wena ungasisita ube liso letfu. 
Numbers10:32 Nawungahamba natsi, siyawuhlephunelana nawe konkhe lokuhle Simakadze layakusipha kona.”" 
Numbers10:33 Satsi sive sema-Israyeli nasisuka eNtsabeni yaSimakadze, satsatsa emalanga lamatsatfu sihamba. Libhokisi lesivumelwane saSimakadze lalihamba embikwabo ngawo onkhe lawo malanga lamatsatfu, libabukela indzawo lapho kwakufanele baphumule khona." 
Numbers10:34 Babetsi njalo nje nabatfutsako, lifu laSimakadze libesetikwabo emini." 
Numbers10:35 Kwakutsi njalo nakuphuma libhokisi lesivumelwane, Mosi atsi: “Phakama Simakadze, uhlakate titsa takho, ubacoshe labo labakutondzako.”" 
Numbers10:36 Kwakutsi njalo nalima lelibhokisi, atsi: “Buya Simakadze, buya etigidzigidzini temindeni yaka-Israyeli.”" 
Numbers11:1 Sive sacala sasola Simakadze ngenca yetinhlupheko taso; watsi kube asive, lulaka lwakhe lwabavutsela. Watfumela umlilo lowavutsa emkhatsini wabo, waze washisa nalababesemaphetselweni enkambu." 
Numbers11:2 Batsi kube bantfu bakhale kuMosi, wase uthandaza kuSimakadze, umlilo wacima." 
Numbers11:3 Ngako-ke lendzawo yabitwa ngekutsi iThabera, ngobe umlilo waSimakadze wavutsa emkhatsini wabo." 
Numbers11:4 Kukhona bantfu betive lababesemkhatsini wema-Israyeli, lababekhala ngekukhanuka inyama. Nawo ema-Israyeli akhala, atsi: “Ngubani lotasipha inyama sitekudla?" 
Numbers11:5 Sesikhumbule eGibhithe lapho sasidla khona inhlanti mahhala, sasidla emaselwa, nemajoti, nashaladi na-anyanisi, negalikhi." 
Numbers11:6 Kodvwa nyalo sesilahlekelwe lutsandvo lwekudla. Kute kudla lapha, ngaphandle kwalemana!”" 
Numbers11:7 Imana yayifanana nenhlanyelo lencane lemhlophe, kufanane nemanafu." 
Numbers11:8 Bantfu babehamba bayewubutsa, bese bayakusila esigayweni setandla nome etjeni lekusila. Babekupheka ngelibhodo nome bente ngako emacebelengwane. Kwakunambitseka njengekudla lokuphekwe ngemafutsa emncumo." 
Numbers11:9 Ngesikhatsi kwehla ematolo ebusuku enkambu, nemana yayehla kanye nawo." 
Numbers11:10 Mosi weva bantfu emindenini yonkhe balila, ngulaba nalaba emnyango welithende labo. Simakadze watfukutsela wabilelana; naMosi waphatseka kabi emoyeni ngaloko." 
Numbers11:11 Wabuta kuSimakadze watsi: “Inceku yakho uyiletseleleni lokuhlupheka? Ngenteni lembi kuwe, kutsi ungaze ungeleke ngalomtfwalo wabo bonkhe labantfu?" 
Numbers11:12 Bemitfwa ngimi yini bonkhe labantfu? Batalwa ngimi yini, kutsi ungaze ungitjele kutsi angibagone ngemikhono njengesidzandzane nasiphetse luswane, ngize ngiyewubangenisa eveni lowaletsembisa bokhokho babo ngesifungo?" 
Numbers11:13 Ngingayitsatsaphi nje inyama lengenela bonkhe labantfu? Bayangikhalela batsi: ‘Siphe inyama sitekudla.’ 
Numbers11:14 Anginawo emandla ekwetfwala bonkhe labantfu, ngobe bangumtfwalo lomatima kakhulu lapha kimi." 
Numbers11:15 Nangabe utangiphatsa kanjena, ngiyacela kutsi usale sewungibulala khona manje nje, nangizuze umusa ebusweni bakho, khona ngingasayiwuphindze ngibone lusizi lwami.”" 
Numbers11:16 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi: “Letsa baholi bema-Israyeli labangema-70 lobatiko kutsi babaholi netiphatsimandla emkhatsini walabantfu. Baletse lapha ethendeni lekuhlangana, kutsi batekuma lapha kanye nawe." 
Numbers11:17 Ngitakwehla ngitewukhuluma nawe lapho, ngitsatse lokunye lokukwaMoya lokukuwe ngikunike bona. Batakusita ekwetfwaleni umtfwalo walesive kanye nawe, khona ungetikwetfwala wedvwa." 
Numbers11:18 Tjela labantfu utsi: ‘Tihlambululeni nitilungiselele likusasa; kukhona inyama lenitayidla kusasa kona loku. Simakadze univile nanikhala nitsi: “Ngubani longasipha inyama sitekudla? Sasincono eGibhithe.” Manje-ke Simakadze utanipha inyama, futsi vele nitayidla." 
Numbers11:19 Ningeke niyidle lilanga linye, nome lamabili, nome lasihlanu, nome lalishumi nome langema-20," 
Numbers11:20 kodvwa niyakuyidla inyanga yonkhe, ize iphume nangemakhala, inenyanyise, ngobe senimlahlile Simakadze losemkhatsini wenu, nakhala kuye natsi: “Empeleni saphumelani khona lena eGibhithe?” ’ ”" 
Numbers11:21 Kodvwa Mosi wakhuluma watsi: “Naku lapha ngihola emadvodza lati-600 000, lahamba ngetinyawo, kodvwa ujinge utsi: ‘Ngitawubanika inyama labatayidla inyanga yonkhe!’" 
Numbers11:22 Beyingabenela yini inyama kube bekungahlatjwa yonkhe imihlambi yetimvu, netimbuti, netinkhomo? Betingabenela yini tona tinhlanti tonkhe telwandle lebetingabanjelwa bona?”" 
Numbers11:23 Simakadze waphendvula Mosi watsi: “Sandla saSimakadze sifishane yini? Utase ubone-ke kutsi loku lengikushoko kutakwenteka ngempela yini kuwe, nome cha!”" 
Numbers11:24 Ngako-ke Mosi waphuma wayawutjela sive konkhe labekutjelwe nguSimakadze. Wahlanganisa bonkhe baholi lababengema-70, wabemisa batungeleta lithende lekukhontela." 
Numbers11:25 Simakadze wase uyehla asekhatsi efini, wakhuluma naye. Wase utsatsa lokunye kwaMoya lokwakukuMosi, wakubeka etikwalabaholi labangema-70. Watsi kube Moya ahlale etikwalabaholi, baphrofetha, kodvwa abazange baphindze baphrofethe." 
Numbers11:26 Lababili balabaholi labangema-70, bo-Eldadi neMedadi, bona babesele enkambu, bangakayi ethendeni lekuhlangana. Nabo behlelwa nguMoya baphrofetha." 
Numbers11:27 Kwaphuma lelinye lijaha lagijima layawubikela Mosi, lafike latsi: “Bo-Eldadi naMedadi bayaphrofetha lena enkambu.”" 
Numbers11:28 Joshuwa, umsa waNuni, labengumsiti waMosi kusukela ebusheni bakhe, wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi: “Nkhosi yami, Mosi, bathulise!”" 
Numbers11:29 Mosi wamphendvula, watsi: “Unemona yini ngami? Ngifisa shangatsi sonkhe sive saSimakadze ngabe sibaphrofethi nekutsi Simakadze abeke Moya wakhe kuso.”" 
Numbers11:30 Mosi nabo bonkhe baholi besive sema-Israyeli bancandzeka babuyela enkambu. 
Numbers11:31 Masinyane Simakadze wakhuphula umoya lomkhulu ngaselwandle waletsa tigwaca leteta tindizela phansi kuphakama lokungaba limitha linye kusuka emhlabatsini, tacondza ngasenkambu tichamuka ngenhla nangentasi, tatungeleta inkambu; kusuka ngala kwato kuya ngale kwakungaba luhambo lwelilanga linye ngetinyawo." 
Numbers11:32 Ngalelo langa bantfu basukuma bagola letigwaca lonkhe lilanga nebusuku balo, ngisho nangakusasa kwakhona, kute noko lowagola ngaphansi kwemakhilogremu labengaba yinkhulungwane. Bateneka ngephandle kwenkambu." 
Numbers11:33 Kwatsi naleyo nyama yabo isegcwele umlomo, bangakayihlafuni nekuyihlafuna, lulaka lwaSimakadze lwabavutsela wabashaya ngesifo lesimatima." 
Numbers11:34 Ngako-ke libito laleyo ndzawo kwabe sekutsiwa yiKhibrothi Hathava, ngobe lapho ngulapho bangcwaba bantfu lababehahela kudla." 
Numbers11:35 Sive satfutsa eKhibrothi Hathava, sahamba saze semisa eHaserothi, lapho sefika sahlala khona." 
Numbers12:1 BoMiriyamu na-Aroni bakhuluma kabi ngaMosi, bamsola kutsi abetsetse umfati labengumKushe. Phela Mosi bekashade umfati labengumKushe." 
Numbers12:2 Babekhuluma batsi: “Kambe ngabe Simakadze ukhulume ngaMosi kuphela yini? Akakhulumi yini nangatsi futsi?” Simakadze wakuva loko. 
Numbers12:3 Mosi bekangumuntfu lotfobekile kwendlula wonkhe umuntfu labekhona emhlabeni. 
Numbers12:4 Masinyane Simakadze wakhuluma kuboMosi, na-Aroni, naMiriyamu, watsi: “Phutfumani nobatsatfu nite kimi ethendeni lekuhlangana.” Baphuma bobatsatfu." 
Numbers12:5 Simakadze wehla ngensika yelifu, wema emnyango welithende lekuhlangana; wabita boMiriyamu na-Aroni bobabili, basondzela." 
Numbers12:6 Simakadze watsi kubo: “Lalelani la kimi: Nakunemphrofethi lapha emkhatsini wenu, ngimi Simakadze lengitibonakalisa ngemibono kuye ngikhulume naye ngemaphupho." 
Numbers12:7 Kodvwa angenti njalo kulenceku yami Mosi. Kuyo yonkhe indlu yami wetsembekile. 
Numbers12:8 Kuye ngikhuluma umlomo nemlomo, ngikhulume ebaleni, ngingabi ngigega liguma; ubukana nesimo saSimakadze. Nine-ke nisitsatsaphi lesibindzi lesingaka sekukhuluma kabi ngenceku yami, Mosi?”" 
Numbers12:9 Lulaka lwaSimakadze lwabavutsela; wase uyahamba. 
Numbers12:10 Latsi lisuka nje lelifu ethendeni lekuhlangana, Miriyamu wabe asamhlophe hhu lokusabulephelo wonkhe umtimba, asamhlophe njengesitfwatfwa. Aroni wagucukela kuMiriyamu, wamkhandza asatse hhu wonkhe umtimba." 
Numbers12:11 Aroni watsi kuMosi: “Hhawu, nkhosi, mane ungasijezisi ngalesono setfu lesisente ngebulima." 
Numbers12:12 Mane umente angabi njengeluswane lolutelwe lufile ngekutsi inyama yakhe ibe njengaledlovotekile kwasesiswini senina.” 
Numbers12:13 Mosi wakhala kuSimakadze atsi: “Mphilise Nkulunkulu, ngiyakuncenga.”" 
Numbers12:14 Simakadze watsi kuMosi: “Kube bekakhafulelwe nguyise ebusweni bakhe bekangetiletfwala yini lelihlazo lakhe emalanga lasikhombisa? Akavalelwe ngephandle kwenkambu ahlale khona emalanga lasikhombisa, kutawutsi emvakwaloko bese niyamngenisa-ke.”" 
Numbers12:15 Ngako-ke Miriyamu wavalelwa ngephandle kwenkambu emalanga lasikhombisa. Sive sonkhe asizange sichubeke nekutfutsa, waze wabuyiswa." 
Numbers12:16 Emvakwaloko sive satfutsa eHaserothi sayakumisa eHlane lasePharani. 
Numbers13:1 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi:" 
Numbers13:2 “Tfumela lamanye emadvodza kutsi ayewuhlola lelive laseKhenani lengilipha ema-Israyeli. Tfumela umholi abe munye kuleso nakuleso sive.” 
Numbers13:3 Ngako-ke Mosi wenta njengobe abeyalwe nguSimakadze, wabatfuma aseseHlane lasePharani. Onkhe lamadvodza abebaholi bema-Israyeli." 
Numbers13:4 Nankha-ke emabito awo: Esiveni sakaRubeni kwakunguShamuwa, umsa waZakhuri;" 
Numbers13:5 esiveni sakaSimeyoni kwakunguShafati, umsa waHori;" 
Numbers13:6 esiveni sakaJuda kwakunguKhalebi, umsa waJefune;" 
Numbers13:7 esiveni saka-Isakhari kwakungu-Igali, umsa waJosefa;" 
Numbers13:8 esiveni saka-Efrayimu kwakunguHosheya, umsa waNuni;" 
Numbers13:9 esiveni sakaBhenjamini kwakunguPhaliti, umsa waRafu;" 
Numbers13:10 esiveni sakaZebuloni kwakunguGadiyeli, umsa waSodi;" 
Numbers13:11 esiveni sakaManase, lekwakusive sakaJosefa, kwakunguGadi, umsa waSusi;" 
Numbers13:12 esiveni sakaDani kwakungu-Amiyeli, umsa waGemali;" 
Numbers13:13 esiveni saka-Asheri kwakunguSethuri, umsa waMikhayeli;" 
Numbers13:14 esiveni sakaNaftali kwakunguNahibi, umsa waVofisi;" 
Numbers13:15 esiveni sakaGadi kwakunguGewuweli, umsa waMakhi." 
Numbers13:16 Ngiwo lawa-ke emabito alamadvodza latfunywa nguMosi kutsi ayewuhlola lelo live. Mosi wetsa Hosheya, umsa waNuni, libito, watsi nguJoshuwa." 
Numbers13:17 Mosi nabatfuma kutsi baye kuyawuhlola lelo live laseKhenani, wakhuluma kubo, watsi: “Khuphukani, ningene ngaseningizimu nelive laseKhenani nize niyewufika etintsabeni." 
Numbers13:18 Hlolisisani kutsi lelo live linjani, nekutsi labantfu labahlala kulo bacinile yini nome babutsakatsaka, nekutsi bambalwa yini nome banyenti." 
Numbers13:19 Bahlala eveni lelinjani? Lihle yini nome libi? Bahlala emadolobheni lanjani? Lamadolobha abo akabiyelwe yini ngetibondza nome abiyelwe atinqaba? 
Numbers13:20 Umhlaba walo unjani? Uvundzile yini nome awukavundzi? Tikhona yini tihlahla nome atikho? Nibetama ngawo onkhe emandla enu kutsi niphatse titselo talo lelive!” Bekusikhatsi sekuvutfwa kwemagelebisi ekucala emnyakeni. 
Numbers13:21 Benyuka, bafike balihlola lonkhe lelo live kusukela eHlane laseSini kuze kuyewufika eRehobu, edvute nemsaho, iHamathi." 
Numbers13:22 Benyuka badzabula iNegevu, lekuyiningizimu yelive laseKhenani, baze befika eHebroni, lapho kwakuhlala khona bo-Ahimani, naSheshayi, naThalmayi, titukulwane ta-Anaki. IHebroni yayakhiwe iminyaka lesikhombisa ngaphambi kweSowani yaseGibhithe." 
Numbers13:23 Batsi nabefika eSihosheni sase-Eshikholi, bajuba ligala lelalinesikhehle semagelebisi. Lababili babo baletfwala ngekuletjatsa ngelubhoko emkhatsini wabo, bengeta ngemahananandza nangemakhiwa." 
Numbers13:24 Leyo ndzawo yetsiwa ngekutsi Sihosha sase-Eshikholi, ngobe ngulapho tinhloli tema-Israyeli tajuba khona sikhehle semagelebisi." 
Numbers13:25 Ekupheleni kwemalanga langema-40 babuya ekuhloleni kwabo live. 
Numbers13:26 Befika kuboMosi, na-Aroni kanye nesive sonkhe sema-Israyeli eKhadeshi, eHlane lasePharani. Befika bababikela kanye nesive sonkhe, badzimate babakhombisa netitselo talelo live." 
Numbers13:27 Betfula umbiko kuMosi, batsi: “Sihambile saya kulelive lositfume kutsi siyekulihlola; sakhandza kutsi, vele live leligcwele lubisi neluju lwetinyosi. Nati nje letinye titselo talo." 
Numbers13:28 Kodvwa bantfu labahlala kulelive banemandla, nemadolobha akhona atinqaba kantsi futsi makhulu kakhulu. Sabona ngisho netitukulwane ta-Anaki khona lapho." 
Numbers13:29 Ema-Amaleki ahlala eningizimu nelive; emaHethi, nemaJebhusi, nema-Amori wona ahlala eveni letintsaba, emaKhenani ahlala ngaselwandle, nangasemfuleni iJordane.”" 
Numbers13:30 Khalebi wababindzisa bonkhe bantfu embikwaMosi, wakhuluma watsi: “Asikhuphuke siyewulidla lelive, ngobe vele singakhona kulincoba.”" 
Numbers13:31 Kodvwa lamadvodza labenyuke naye akhuluma atsi: “Singeke sikhone kulwa nalabantfu; bacinile kunatsi.” 
Numbers13:32 Ngako basakata umbiko lomubi esiveni sema-Israyeli ngalelive bebayewulihlola. Bakhuluma, batsi: “Lelive lesidzabule kulo silihlola, lilive lelidla bantfu labahlala kulo. Bonkhe labantfu lesibabonile kulo badze kakhulu." 
Numbers13:33 Size sabona ngisho nemaNifilu, emadvodzana a-Anaki layintalelwane yemaNifilu. Sitibone singangetintsetse kubo, nabo futsi basibona singangato.”" 
Numbers14:1 Kubo lobo busuku bonkhe bantfu bakhihla lesikhulu sililo. 
Numbers14:2 Onkhe ema-Israyeli asola boMosi na-Aroni atsi kubo: “Kube samane safela eGibhithe nome ehlane. 
Numbers14:3 Simakadze usiletseleni kulelive kutsi sitewubulawa bese kutfunjwa bafati betfu nebantfwabetfu? Kungete kwaba ncono yini kutsi sincandzeke sibuyele eGibhithe?” 
Numbers14:4 Bakhuluma bodvwana batsi: “Asikhetse umholi, sincandzeke sibuyele eGibhithe.”" 
Numbers14:5 BoMosi na-Aroni bakhotsamisa buso babo embikwesive sonkhe sema-Israyeli lesasihlangene lapho. 
Numbers14:6 Joshuwa, umsa waNuni, naKhalebi, umsa waJefune, lababehambe nalamadvodza labeyewuhlola lelive, badzabula timphahla tabo," 
Numbers14:7 bakhuluma kulesive sonkhe sema-Israyeli, batsi: “Lelive silihambe lonkhe, silihlola; salikhandza kutsi lihle kakhulu." 
Numbers14:8 Nangabe Simakadze asitfokotela, utasihola, siyewungena kulelive leligcwele lubisi neluju lwetinyosi, asiphe lona." 
Numbers14:9 Musani kuhlubuka Simakadze, futsi ningabesabi nalabantfu balelive, ngobe sitabagwinya. Sivikelo sabo sesihambile, kodvwa Simakadze unatsi. Ningabesabi.”" 
Numbers14:10 Sonkhe sive savele satimisela kubagcoba ngematje. Kwase kubonakala inkhatimulo yaSimakadze ethendeni lekuhlangana; onkhe ema-Israyeli ayibona. 
Numbers14:11 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi: “Labantfu batawuchubeka nekungedzelela kuze kube ngunini? Batakwala kukholwa ngimi kuze kube ngunini, etikwaletibonakaliso temimangaliso lengitente kubo?" 
Numbers14:12 Ngitawubashaya ngesifo sitekubabhubhisa, kodvwa wena ngitakwenta ube nguyise wesive lesitawuba sikhulu sibe nemandla kunabo.”" 
Numbers14:13 Mosi wakhuluma kuSimakadze, watsi: “EmaGibhithe atakuva ngaleyontfo. Lesive wasikhipha emkhatsini wawo ngemandla akho." 
Numbers14:14 Loko ayakukutjela letive letakhe kulelive. Nabo labantfu bakulesive sebevile kutsi wena, Simakadze, usemkhatsini walesive nekutsi wena, Simakadze, ubonakala kuso buso nebuso; lifu lakho lihlala etikwabo, nekutsi emini uhamba embikwabo ngensika yelifu, bese kutsi ebusuku uhambe embikwabo ngensika yemlilo." 
Numbers14:15 Nawusibulala ngasikhatsi sinye lesive sonkhe, tonkhe letive letiwuvile lombiko ngawe tiyawutsi:" 
Numbers14:16 ‘Simakadze wehlulekile kungenisa lesive sakhe eveni labefunge kutsi utasingenisa kulo; wababulalela ehlane bonkhe.’ 
Numbers14:17 Ngako-ke ngicela kutsi Simakadze akhombise emandla akhe, njengobe asho, watsi:" 
Numbers14:18 ‘Simakadze uyephuta kutfukutsela andze ngemusa, atsetselele sono nekuhlubuka. Noko lonelicala akamshiyi angakamjezisi; yena ujezisa bantfwana ngesono saboyise situkulwane sesitsatfu nesesine.’" 
Numbers14:19 Njengobe wena, Simakadze, unelutsandvo lolukhulu, tsetselela sono salabantfu njengobe bewusolo ubatsetselela, kusukela besuka eGibhithe kuze kube ngunyalo.”" 
Numbers14:20 Simakadze wamphendvula watsi: “Sengibatsetselele, njengobe ucelile." 
Numbers14:21 Kodvwa ngiyetsembisa ngitsi ngifunga kuphila kwami nenkhatimulo yami legcwele umhlaba wonkhe," 
Numbers14:22 kute nome munye walabantfu lababona inkhatimulo yami netibonakaliso letiyimimangaliso lengatenta eGibhithe nasehlane kodvwa bangete bangilalela, bangilinga emahlandla lalishumi," 
Numbers14:23 kute namunye wabo loyawulibona lelive lengafunga ngalo kuboyisemkhulu kutsi ngitabanika lona. Kute namunye lotalibona kulabo labangedzelela. 
Numbers14:24 Kodvwa njengobe inceku yami Khalebi anemoya lowehlukile futsi ungilandzela ngenhlitiyo yakhe yonkhe, ngitamngenisa kulelive laya kulo, nebatukulu bakhe bayawulidla libe lifa labo." 
Numbers14:25 Njengobe ema-Amaleki nemaKhenani ahlala kulesigodzi, ncandzeka kusasa ucondze ngasehlane ngemgwaco lobheke ngaseLwandle Lolubovu.”" 
Numbers14:26 Simakadze wakhuluma kuboMosi na-Aroni, watsi:" 
Numbers14:27 “Kutawuze kube ngunini lesive lesikhohlakele singisola? Sengikuvile kusola kwalama-Israyeli lakhononako. 
Numbers14:28 Ngako-ke batjele utsi: ‘Simakadze utsi: Ngifunga kuphila kwami kutsi ngitakwenta kini tona kanye leto tintfo benginive nitisho. 
Numbers14:29 Nitakufa, tidvumbu tenu tigcwale lonkhe lelihlane, nonkhe nine lenineminyaka lengema-20 kuya etulu nangenela lubalo, nangisola nekungisola." 
Numbers14:30 Kute nome munye wenu loyawungena kulelo live lengalifungela ngekuphakamisa sandla kutsi kutawuba likhaya lenu, ngaphandle kwaboKhalebi, umsa waJefune, kanye naJoshuwa, umsa waNuni." 
Numbers14:31 Bantfwabenu lenakhuluma ngabo natsi batawubulawa batfunjwe, mine-ke ngitabangenisa futsi balati lelive lenilalile." 
Numbers14:32 Kodvwa nine nitawufela lapha ehlane. 
Numbers14:33 Bantfwabenu batawuba belusi khona lapha, kuze kuphele iminyaka lengema-40, bahlupheka ngenca yekungetsembeki kwenu, kuze kufe newekugcina wenu." 
Numbers14:34 Niyawuhlupheka kuze kuphele iminyaka lengema-40 ngenca yetono tenu, umnyaka umele lilanga linye lalawo langema-40, lenawacitsa nihlolisisa lelive, kuze nati kahle kutsi kuyini kumelana kwenu nami.’" 
Numbers14:35 Mine, Simakadze, sengikhulumile, futsi ngitakwenta loko kuso sonkhe lesive lesonakele lesihlanganele kumelana nami. Batawuhlangana nesiphetfo sabo lapha kulelihlane, baphelele khona.”" 
Numbers14:36 Ngako lamadvodza labetfunywe nguMosi kuyawuhlola lelive ase abuya afaka umoya wekusola kuso sonkhe sive ngalombiko wawo lomubi ngalelive," 
Numbers14:37 yebo, lamadvodza lafike asakata lomoya wekusola ngekuletsa umbiko lomubi ngalelive, ashaywa ngesifo afa, embikwaSimakadze." 
Numbers14:38 Emkhatsini walamadvodza laya kuyawuhlola lelive kwasala boJoshuwa, umsa waNuni, naKhalebi, umsa waJefune." 
Numbers14:39 Watsi kube Mosi awabikele onkhe ema-Israyeli loko, akhala kakhulukati." 
Numbers14:40 Ekuseni ngeluvivi ngakusasa enyukela etulu acondza eveni letintsaba, afike atsi: “Sonile, sitakuya eveni Simakadze lasetsembisa lona.”" 
Numbers14:41 Mosi wakhuluma watsi: “Pho, nentelani lokungawulaleli umyalo waNkulunkulu? Loku ngeke kuphumelele!" 
Numbers14:42 Ningacali nenyuke, ngobe Simakadze akekho emkhatsini wenu. Titsa tenu titawunehlula," 
Numbers14:43 ngobe ema-Amaleki nemaKhenani atawuhlangana nani lapho. Njengobe nisukile kuSimakadze, naye angeke abe nani, ngako nitakuwa ngelusiko lwenkemba.”" 
Numbers14:44 Noko bajinge benyukela etulu eveni letintsaba, nome Mosi kanye nelibhokisi lesivumelwane lalingakesuswa enkambu." 
Numbers14:45 Ema-Amaleki nemaKhenani labehlala kulelo live letintsaba ehla atewubahlasela, abehlula abacosha, adzimate ababeka eHoma." 
Numbers15:1 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi:" 
Numbers15:2 “Khuluma kuma-Israyeli utsi: ‘Nase ningene eveni lenginipha lona kutsi libe likhaya lenu," 
Numbers15:3 nibobe seniletsa iminikelo leyentiwa ngemlilo kuSimakadze, ibe yetinkhomo, nome yetimbuti, nome yetimvu, kube liphunga lelinuka lusi lolumnandzi kuSimakadze. Kungaba ngumnikelo wekushiswa, nome umhlatjelo wekugcwalisa setsembiso lesitsite, nome umnikelo wesihle, nome iminikelo yemikhosi." 
Numbers15:4 Lowo loletsa umnikelo wakhe utawuletsa kuSimakadze umnikelo walokutinhlavu ngemalitha langaba mabili afulaha lobhicwe nemafutsa emncumo langaba yilitha. 
Numbers15:5 Lungisa liwayini lelingaba yilitha ngelizinyane lemvu, libe ngumnikelo wekushiswa nome wemhlatjelo, kutsi liwayini libe ngumnikelo wesinatfo." 
Numbers15:6 Nawunikela ngesihhanca, bhica fulaha wemnikelo walokutinhlavu longemakhilogremu langaba mabili labhicwe nemafutsa emncumo langaba yilitha nencenye," 
Numbers15:7 kunikelwe kanye neliwayini lelingaba yilitha nencenye, kube ngumnikelo wesinatfo. Kunikele kube liphunga lelinuka lusi lolumnandzi kuSimakadze." 
Numbers15:8 Nawulungisa inkunzana kutsi ibe ngumnikelo wekushiswa nome ibe ngumhlatjelo wesetsembiso lesitsite nome semnikelo wekuthula kuSimakadze," 
Numbers15:9 uyawuyiletsa kanye nemnikelo walokutinhlavu kube ngufulaha longemalitha langaba sitfupha nencenye lobhicwe nemafutsa emncumo langemalitha langaba mabili," 
Numbers15:10 kanye neliwayini lelingemalitha langaba mabili, lemnikelo walokunatfwako kube ngumnikelo lowentiwa ngemlilo, liphunga lelinuka lusi lolumnandzi kuSimakadze." 
Numbers15:11 “ ‘Kutabonikelwa kanjalo-ke, nakunikelwa ngenkunzi, nome ngesihhanca, nome ngelizinyane lemvu nome lembuti." 
Numbers15:12 Ngulowo nalowo mnikelo ubowentela loko kuye ngebunyenti bawo. 
Numbers15:13 Wonkhe um-Israyeli wekutalwa kufanele ente njalo nakaletsa umnikelo lowentiwa ngemlilo, kube liphunga lelinuka lusi lolumnandzi kuSimakadze." 
Numbers15:14 Nakwenteka nome ngunini wetive lohlala emkhatsini wenu, nome kukwesikhashana nome sikhatsi lesidze, aletsa umnikelo lowentiwa ngemlilo, kube liphunga lelinuka lusi lolumnandzi kuSimakadze, naye kufanele ente njengobe nani nenta." 
Numbers15:15 Sive siyawuba nemtsetfo lofananako: wenu kanye newebetive labahlala emkhatsini wenu. Leso-ke simiso setitukulwane ngetitukulwane. Nine nebetive niyawufanana embikwaSimakadze. 
Numbers15:16 Imitsetfo nemiyalo yenu iyawusebenta ngalokufananako kini nakubetive labasemkhatsini wenu.’ ” 
Numbers15:17 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi:" 
Numbers15:18 “Khuluma kuma-Israyeli utsi: ‘Nase ningene eveni lenginipha lona," 
Numbers15:19 kufanele nehlukanisele Simakadze sabelo sakhe, nanidla sinkhwa salelo live." 
Numbers15:20 Kufanele sinkhwa setilinga tenu tekwendvulelisa nisetfule njengemnikelo wesivuno senu sekucala ekubhuleni kwenu. 
Numbers15:21 Tonkhe titukulwane tenu seniyawunikela kuSimakadze umnikelo wetivuno tenu tekwendvulelisa. 
Numbers15:22 “ ‘Nangabe kwenteka nona ngesiphosiso ngekungayigcini lemiyalo Simakadze layinika Mosi," 
Numbers15:23 konkhe loko Simakadze laniyala ngako ngaMosi kusukela mhlazana Mosi acala kuniyala kuye embili titukulwane ngetitukulwane," 
Numbers15:24 nakwenteka-ke nona ngesiphosiso, nangabe sive sonkhe besingati, kufanele sive sinikele ngenkunzana yinye ibe ngumnikelo wekushiswa, liphunga lelinuka lusi lolumnandzi kuSimakadze, kanye nemnikelo walokutinhlavu, nemnikelo walokunatfwako, kanye nesiphongo sinye kube ngumnikelo wesono." 
Numbers15:25 Umphristi uyakwenta inhlawulo yekubuyisana kwesive sonkhe sema-Israyeli siyawube sesiyatsetselelwa, ngobe sone ngesiphosiso, futsi sitsite ngekona kwaso sasesiletsa kuSimakadze umnikelo lowentiwa ngemlilo kanye nemnikelo wesono." 
Numbers15:26 Sonkhe sive sema-Israyeli kanye nebetive labahlala emkhatsini waso bayawutsetselelwa, ngobe sonkhe lesive sone ngesiphosiso." 
Numbers15:27 “ ‘Kodvwa nangabe kone umuntfu munye ngesiphosiso, uyawuletsa sibhutatana lesinemnyaka munye budzala, sibe ngumnikelo wesono." 
Numbers15:28 Umphristi uyawukwentela lowo muntfu lowone ngesiphosiso inhlawulo yekubuyisana naSimakadze. Nase amentele leyo nhlawulo yekubuyisana naSimakadze, lowo muntfu uyawube sewuyatsetselelwa." 
Numbers15:29 Lowo mtsetfo wekona ngesiphosiso uyawusebenta ngalokufananako, nome ngabe kone um-Israyeli wekutalwa nome ngabe wetive." 
Numbers15:30 “ ‘Kodvwa umuntfu lowona ngemabomu, nome angewemdzabu nome angewetive, uyawuba nelicala lekungahloniphi Simakadze, uyawuncunywa esiveni sakubo." 
Numbers15:31 Njengobe lomuntfu wedzelele livi laSimakadze, wephula lomunye wemitsetfo yakhe ngemabomu, kufanele ancunywe; licala lakhe libe setikwakhe.’ ”" 
Numbers15:32 Atsi ema-Israyeli asesehlane, kwatfolakala indvodza itfota tinkhuni ngelilanga leliSabatha." 
Numbers15:33 Labo labayikhandza itfota tinkhuni bayitsatsa bayimikisa kuMosi na-Aroni nesive sonkhe," 
Numbers15:34 bayivalela esitokisini, ngobe kwakungakakhanyi kahle kutsi kufanele kwentiweni kuyo." 
Numbers15:35 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi: “Lendvodza kufanele ife. Sive sonkhe kufanele siyigcobe ngematje, siyigcobele ngephandle kwenkambu.”" 
Numbers15:36 Ngako-ke sive sayitsatsa sayikhiphela ngephandle kwenkambu, sayigcoba ngematje yaze yafa, njengobe Simakadze abeyale Mosi." 
Numbers15:37 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi:" 
Numbers15:38 “Khuluma kuma-Israyeli, utsi: ‘Kuto tonkhe titukulwane tenu letiyawulandzela kufanele nente timvakaza emiphetfweni yetingubo tenu ngelucotfo loluluhlata njengesibhakabhaka." 
Numbers15:39 Niyawutsi nanitibuka letimvakaza, bese nikhumbula yonkhe imiyalo yaSimakadze, niyilalele, khona ningetiwuba tingwadla ngekudvonswa tinkhanuko tetinhlitiyo tenu netemehlo enu." 
Numbers15:40 Niyawukhumbula kulalela yonkhe imiyalo yami, nibe ngulabehlukaniselwe Nkulunkulu wenu." 
Numbers15:41 NginguSimakadze, Nkulunkulu wenu lowanikhipha eGibhithe, kutsi ngibe nguNkulunkulu wenu. NginguSimakadze, Nkulunkulu wenu.’ ”" 
Numbers16:1 Khora, umsa wa-Jisihari, lotalwa nguKhohati, umsa waLevi, nemaRubeni latsite, boDathani na-Abiramu, emadvodzana a-Eliyabe, kanye na-Oni, umsa waPhelethi, bedzelela," 
Numbers16:2 bavukela Mosi. Babutsa bantfu labanyenti labebatiwa esiveni sonkhe, kwaba ngema-Israyeli labengema-250, lababengubona bakhetsiwe batinhloko." 
Numbers16:3 Babutsana ndzawonye bahlasela boMosi na-Aroni, batsi kubo: “Senihambe kakhulu! Sonkhe lesive singcwele, bonkhe ngamunye ngamunye wabo, futsi naNkulunkulu unabo. Nine-ke nitiphakamiselani etikwalesive saSimakadze?”" 
Numbers16:4 Kwatsi Mosi nakakuva loko, wawa phansi ngebuso." 
Numbers16:5 Watsi kuKhora nalesicumbi labesihola: “Ekuseni kusasa Simakadze utasikhombisa kutsi ngubani longewakhe nekutsi ngumuphi longcwele, utamsondzeta edvute naye. Lowo muntfu latikhetsele yena uyawumenta abesedvute naye." 
Numbers16:6 Wena Khora, nabo bonkhe balandzeli bakho niyakwenta kanje: Niyawutsatsa titja temphepho," 
Numbers16:7 bese kutsi kusasa ekuseni nifake kuto umlilo nemphepho embikwaSimakadze. Lowo Simakadze latamkhetsa nguye loyawube angcwele. Nine maLevi senitiphakamise kakhulu.” 
Numbers16:8 Mosi wachubeka watsi kuKhora: “Lalelani, nine maLevi." 
Numbers16:9 Akukanenelisi yini lokutsi Nkulunkulu wema-Israyeli watehlukanisela nine kuso sonkhe sive sema-Israyeli, wanenta nabasedvute naye kutsi nente inkonzo ethendeni laSimakadze, nime embikwesive, nisikhonte?" 
Numbers16:10 Unisondzetile nine nawo onkhe emaLevi edvutane naye, kodvwa nyalo senifuna buphristi futsi." 
Numbers16:11 Kuphambene naSimakadze kutsi wena nalabalandzeli bakho nihlangane ngekududana kanje. Ngubani yena lo-Aroni kutsi ningemelana naye nine?” 
Numbers16:12 Mosi wabe sewutfumela kutsi kuyewubitwa boDathani na-Abiramu, emadvodzana a-Eliyabe, kodvwa bona batsi: “Singeke site!" 
Numbers16:13 Akukakwenelisi lokutsi wasikhipha eveni lelivundzile leligcwele lubisi neluju lwetinyosi, wasiletsela kutesibulala lapha ehlane? Nyalo ufuna kulibala kutibusa la etikwetfu?" 
Numbers16:14 Ngetulu kwaloko awukasimikisi eveni leligcwele lubisi neluju lwetinyosi, nelifa lemasimi netivini. Ucabanga kutsi lamadvodza langaka ungawenta timphumphutse? Singeke site.”" 
Numbers16:15 Mosi watfukutsela wabila, watsi kuSimakadze: “Ungawemukeli umnikelo wabo. Angizange ngitsatse ngisho imbongolo kubo, futsi angikoni ngisho nome munye wabo.”" 
Numbers16:16 Mosi watsi kuKhora: “Wena nebalandzeli bakho bonkhe nimele nibonakale embikwaSimakadze kusasa lolokusako, na-Aroni uyawube akhona lapho." 
Numbers16:17 Wonkhe umuntfu kufanele aphatse sitja sakhe semphepho afake kuso imphepho anikele kuSimakadze. Kutakuba titja letingema-250 setitonkhe. Wena na-Aroni kufanele nani ninikele ngetitja tenu.” 
Numbers16:18 Ngako wonkhe umuntfu watsatsa sitja sakhe wafaka umlilo nemphepho kuso, bema kanye naboMosi na-Aroni ekungeneni kwelithende lekuhlangana." 
Numbers16:19 Watsi kube Khora ahlanganise bonkhe labalandzeli bakhe, lababemelene naMosi, embikwelithende lekuhlangana, inkhatimulo yaSimakadze yabonakala kuso sonkhe sive sema-Israyeli." 
Numbers16:20 Simakadze wakhuluma kuboMosi na-Aroni, watsi:" 
Numbers16:21 “Khweshani kulesicumbi kuze ngisicedze masinyane.” 
Numbers16:22 Kodvwa boMosi na-Aroni bawa phansi ngebuso bakhotsama, batsi: “Awu Nkulunkulu! Nkulunkulu wemimoya yebantfu bonkhe, kungatsi ngekona kwemuntfu munye bese utfukutselela sonkhe sive?”" 
Numbers16:23 Simakadze watsi kuMosi: 
Numbers16:24 “Tjela sive sikhweshe emathendeni aboKhora, naDathani, na-Abiramu.”" 
Numbers16:25 Mosi wasukuma waya kuboDathani na-Abiramu, nebaholi bema-Israyeli bamlandzela." 
Numbers16:26 Wasiyala sonkhe sive, watsi: “Khweshani emathendeni aletigangi leti! Ningatsintsi lutfo etintfweni tabo, funa nani nikhukhulwe kanye netono tabo.”" 
Numbers16:27 Ngako sive sakhwesha emathendeni aboKhora, naDathani, na-Abiramu. BoDathani na-Abiramu bese baphumile emathendeni abo, beme eminyango yawo nebafati babo nebantfwababo." 
Numbers16:28 Mosi wakhuluma watsi: “Niyawukwati ngaloku-ke kutsi nguSimakadze longitfumile; akusho kutsi ngitentela ingcondvo yami nje: 
Numbers16:29 Nangabe labantfu batifela njengabo bonkhe bantfu nome babulawe sifo nje lesivamise kubulala bantfu, kuyawube kusho kutsi angikatfunywa nguye Simakadze." 
Numbers16:30 Kodvwa nangabe Simakadze aveta intfo lensha lengazange seyenteke, umhlaba uvule umlomo wawo ubamite kanye nako konkhe lokungekwabo, bashobele phansi, baye endzaweni yalabafile beva, niyawube seniyati-ke kutsi labantfu bedzelele Simakadze.”" 
Numbers16:31 Kwatsi acedza nje kulisho lelo, umhlaba labebeme kuwo boDathani na-Abiramu wachekeka tindvonga," 
Numbers16:32 wakhamisa umlomo wawo, wabamita kanye nemindeni yabo, nawo onkhe emadvodza labebalandzeli baKhora, nako konkhe lokwakukwawo." 
Numbers16:33 Bashobela phansi endzaweni yalabafile beva, nato tonkhe timphahla tabo, umhlaba wabasibekela, babhubha bangaphindzi baba khona emkhatsini wesive." 
Numbers16:34 Ekukhaleni kwabo onkhe ema-Israyeli labesedvutane abaleka, amemeta atsi: “Umhlaba utasimita natsi futsi.”" 
Numbers16:35 Umlilo lowaphuma kuSimakadze wadla onkhe lamadvodza labengema-250 labekashisa imphepho. 
Numbers16:36 Simakadze watsi kuMosi: 
Numbers16:37 “Tjela Eleyazare, umsa wa-Aroni, umphristi, kutsi akatsatse letitja atisuse lapha elangabini, bese usakata lamalahle emlilo khashane, ngobe letitja tingcwele," 
Numbers16:38 tona letitja talabantfu labalahlekelwe kuphila kwabo ngenca yekona kwabo. Gcobani letitja temphepho tibe bongcwengcwe bekumbonya lilati, ngobe tanikelwa kuSimakadze tase tiba ngcwele. Setiyawuba secwayiso esiveni sema-Israyeli.”" 
Numbers16:39 Ngako Eleyazare, umphristi, watsatsa letitja telitfusi letatinikelwe ngulabo labebashisiwe, tagcotjwa tentiwa simbonyo selilati," 
Numbers16:40 njengobe Simakadze amlayela ngaMosi. Loko kwaba sikhumbuto esiveni sema-Israyeli kutsi wonkhe umuntfu longesiye umphristi, longesiyo intalelwane ya-Aroni, akayiwusondzela ashise imphepho embikwaSimakadze. Loyakwenta njalo uyawubona saKhora nesebalandzeli bakhe." 
Numbers16:41 Kwatsi ngakusasa sive sonkhe sema-Israyeli sabasola boMosi na-Aroni sitsi: “Senibulele bantfu baSimakadze.” 
Numbers16:42 Kwatsi lesicumbi sisahlanganele kumelana naMosi na-Aroni, satsi sijikela ngasethendeni lekuhlangana, masinyane sabona lifu lilisibekela kwase kubonakala inkhatimulo yaSimakadze." 
Numbers16:43 BoMosi na-Aroni base baya embikwelithende lekuhlangana," 
Numbers16:44 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi:" 
Numbers16:45 “Sukani emkhatsini walabantfu, kuze ngibabhubhise ngekushesha.” Bobabili bakhotsama babhekisa tinhloko tabo phansi." 
Numbers16:46 Mosi wakhuluma ku-Aroni, watsi: “Tsatsa sitja sakho semphepho ufake kuso emalahle lavutsako aselatini, bese ufaka imphepho, uphutfume kulesive masinyane usentele inhlawulo yekubuyisana naSimakadze, ngobe lulaka lwakhe seluphumile, sifo sesiphindze sicalele phansi.”" 
Numbers16:47 Ngako Aroni naye watsatsela etulu njengekusho kwaMosi, waphutfuma emkhatsini walesicumbi, sabe sesingenile sesibacalile sifo, watsela imphepho kulesitja sakhe wabentela inhlawulo yekubuyisana naSimakadze." 
Numbers16:48 Wema emkhatsini walabafile nalabaphilako, sifo sancamuka." 
Numbers16:49 Sibalo salabo lababulawa nguleso sifo besiti-14 700, ngaphandle kwalabo labafa ngenca yaKhora." 
Numbers16:50 Satsi kube sincamuke lesifo, Aroni wancandzeka wabuyela kuMosi embikwelithende lekuhlangana." 
Numbers17:1 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi:" 
Numbers17:2 “Khuluma kuma-Israyeli akunike tindvuku letili-12, yinye kuleso nakuleso sive lephuma kumholi waso. Bhala libito laleyo naleyo ndvodza endvukwini yayo." 
Numbers17:3 Endvukwini yakaLevi ubobhala libito la-Aroni, ngobe kufanele kube nendvuku yalowo nalowo mholi waleso sive." 
Numbers17:4 Letindvuku ubotibeka embikwelibhokisi lesivumelwane ethendeni lekuhlangana, lapho ngihlangana nani khona." 
Numbers17:5 Indvuku yalowo lengimkhetsile itawuhluma, ngitakucedza kanjalo kusola kwalama-Israyeli lakhononako.”" 
Numbers17:6 Ngako Mosi wakhuluma kuma-Israyeli, nebaholi bawo bamnika letindvuku letili-12, leyo naleyo ndvuku imele umholi wesive, nendvuku ya-Aroni yayisemkhatsini wato." 
Numbers17:7 Letindvuku Mosi watitsatsa watibeka embikwaSimakadze embikwelibhokisi lesivumelwane lelalisethendeni lebufakazi. 
Numbers17:8 Ngelilanga lelilandzelako Mosi wangena ethendeni lebufakazi, kulelibhokisi lesivumelwane, wakhandza kutsi indvuku ya-Aroni, leyayimele sive semaLevi, yayingakahlumi kuphela kodvwa yaze yaba nemidvumba yachakaza yatsela titselo tema-alimondi." 
Numbers17:9 Ngako Mosi watsatsa tonkhe letindvuku embikwaSimakadze watiletsa kuma-Israyeli. Atibuka, kwaba ngulowo watsatsa yakakhe." 
Numbers17:10 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi: “Buyisela indvuku ya-Aroni uyibeke embikwelibhokisi lesivumelwane, igcinelwe kutsi ibe secwayiso kulabahlubukako. Loko kutawucedza kungisola nekumelana kwabo nami, khona bangetikufa.”" 
Numbers17:11 Mosi wenta njengobe abeyalwe nguSimakadze. 
Numbers17:12 Sive sema-Israyeli sakhuluma kuMosi, satsi: “Sitakufa! Silahlekile! Silahleke sonkhe!" 
Numbers17:13 Nangabe lowo losondzela eceleni kwelithende laSimakadze atakufa, ngabe kusho kutsi sitakufa sonkhe yini?”" 
Numbers18:1 Simakadze wakhuluma ku-Aroni, watsi: “Wena, nemadvodzana akho, nemndeni weyihlo kufanele netfwale bubi lobuphambene nendzawo lengcwele; wena-ke nemadvodzana akho niyakwetfwala tono leticondzene nebuphristi benu." 
Numbers18:2 Letsa bomnakenu labangemaLevi esiveni seyihlo batewuhlangana nawe bakusite ngesikhatsi wena nemadvodzana akho nikhonta ethendeni lebufakazi. 
Numbers18:3 Kufanele babe ngaphansi kwakho bente umsebenti wonkhe welithende, kodvwa bangasondzeli etimphahleni tendzawo lengcwele nome elatini. Nakwenteka basondzela, bona nani nitakufa." 
Numbers18:4 Kufanele batihlanganise nani banakekele lithende lekuhlangana, nayo yonkhe imisebenti yalo; kufanele kubete losondzela kini lapho nikhona khona nine." 
Numbers18:5 “Nine kufanele ninakekele indzawo lengcwele kanye nelilati, khona intfukutselo yaSimakadze ingetiwuphindza yehlele sive sema-Israyeli." 
Numbers18:6 Mine matfupha ngikhetse labazalwane bakho labangemaLevi emkhatsini wema-Israyeli kutsi babe sipho kini, banikelwe kuSimakadze kutsi bente umsebenti welithende lekuhlangana." 
Numbers18:7 Kodvwa wena nemadvodzana akho niyawukhonta njengebaphristi kuko konkhe lokukwaselatini nangekhatsi kwendvwangu. Ngininika inkonzo yebuphristi njengesipho. Lowo longakafaneli loyawusondzela eceleni kwalelilati, uyawubulawa.”" 
Numbers18:8 Simakadze wakhuluma ku-Aroni, watsi: “Mine ngikubeka kutsi uphatse iminikelo leletfwe kimi, yonkhe iminikelo lengcwele lenginikwa yona ngema-Israyeli, mine ngiyinika wena nemadvodzana akho kutsi ibe sabelo sakho titukulwane ngetitukulwane." 
Numbers18:9 Itawuba ngeyenu incenye yaleminikelo lengcwelengcwele lengayiswa emlilweni. Kuto tonkhe tipho labatiletsa kimi njengeminikelo lengcwelengcwele, nome ingeyalokutinhlavu nome yesono nome yelicala, leyo ncenye lengcwele kakhulu yakho nemadvodzana akho." 
Numbers18:10 Uyakuwudla njengentfo lengcwelengcwele; wonkhe lomdvuna uyakuwudla. Kufanele uwutsatse ube ngcwele. 
Numbers18:11 “Ngetulu kwaloko, konkhe lokubekwe kwehlukaniswa neminikelo yekujikitiswa yesive sema-Israyeli lesikunikela kimi kutawuba kwenu. Ngikupha wena nemadvodzana akho kanye nemadvodzakati akho kube sabelo sakho titukulwane ngetitukulwane. Wonkhe umuntfu lohlantekile ngekwemtsetfo emndenini wakho angakudla." 
Numbers18:12 “Ngikupha sonkhe sivuno lesihle setilinga lesinikelwa kuSimakadze kulowo nalowo mnyaka: semafutsa emncumo, neseliwayini kanye nesakolo." 
Numbers18:13 Tonkhe titselo tekucala letivutsiwe tako konkhe lokusensimini yabo, labakunikela kuSimakadze, tiyawuba takho. Bonkhe bantfu labahlantekile ngekwemtsetfo ekhaya lakho bangakudla." 
Numbers18:14 “Konkhe lokunikelwe kuSimakadze ka-Israyeli kutawuba kwakho. 
Numbers18:15 “Sitselo sekucala sesitalo sakho, nome semuntfu nome sesifuyo, lesinikelwe kimi, sitawuba sakho. Kodvwa kufanele ulihlenge litubulo lemuntfu lelingumfana, kanjalo futsi nelitubulo lelidvuna lesilwane lesingcolile ngekwemtsetfo." 
Numbers18:16 Kufanele kutsi angaba nenyanga budzala, bese niyawahlenga ngaleyo ntsengo yesihlengo setinhlavu tesiliva letisihlanu ngekwesilinganiso lesisemtsetfweni." 
Numbers18:17 “Kodvwa ningabolihlenga litubulo lenkhomo nome lemvu, nome lembuti, ngobe kungcwele. Ingati yawo kufanele ifafatwe elatini bese kushiswa emanoni awo, kutsi kutewuba ngumnikelo lowentiwa ngemlilo, kube liphunga lelinuka lusi lolumnandzi kuSimakadze." 
Numbers18:18 Inyama yawo kufanele ibe yakho, njengemganga wemnikelo wekujikitiswa, nemlente wesekudla ube wakho." 
Numbers18:19 “Konkhe lokwehlukaniselwe eceleni eminikelweni lengcwele lenikelwe ngema-Israyeli kuSimakadze ngikupha wena nemadvodzana akho nemadvodzakati akho, kutsi kube ngusona sabelo sakho titukulwane ngetitukulwane. Kusivumelwane saphakadze seluswayi kuSimakadze, kutsi sibe sakho nesebantfwabakho.”" 
Numbers18:20 Simakadze wakhuluma ku-Aroni, watsi: “Wena uyawubate lifa eveni labo, kantsi uyawubate nesabelo njengabo. Ngimi lengisabelo sakho nelifa lakho esiveni sonkhe sema-Israyeli.”" 
Numbers18:21 “Konkhe kwelishumi ngikupha emaLevi kuma-Israyeli, kutsi kube lifa lawo kulowo msebenti lawentako asakhonta kulomsebenti wabo ethendeni lekuhlangana." 
Numbers18:22 Kusukela manje ema-Israyeli kufanele angasondzeli edvutane nelithende lekuhlangana, ngaphandle kwaloko atawutetfwalela wona umvuzo wekona kwawo, afe." 
Numbers18:23 NgemaLevi layawukwenta umsebenti welithende lekuhlangana etfwale bubi lobuphambene nalo. Lesi kutawuba simiso lesingeyiwuphindze siguculwe titukulwane ngetitukulwane letitako. Bangeke balinikwa lifa kuma-Israyeli. 
Numbers18:24 Esikhundleni saloko, emaLevi ngiwapha kutsi lifa lawo kube kwelishumi kwaloko lokunikelwe ngema-Israyeli kuSimakadze. Ngiko nje ngitsite kuwo: ‘Bona bangeke babe nelifa kuma-Israyeli.’ ”" 
Numbers18:25 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi:" 
Numbers18:26 “Khuluma kumaLevi utsi: ‘Nanemukela kuma-Israyeli kwelishumi lokulifa lenu lenginipha lona, nani kufanele ninikele kwelishumi kwaloko kwelishumi kube ngumnikelo waSimakadze." 
Numbers18:27 Lomnikelo wenu uyawutsatfwa njengalokutinhlavu lokusandza kuhhudlwa nome inkhovu yeliwayini lephuma etjeni lekuhluta emagelebisi. 
Numbers18:28 Ngaleyo ndlela nani nitawunikela umnikelo wekwelishumi kuSimakadze, niwutsatse kuko konkhe kwelishumi lenikwemukela kuma-Israyeli. Kuko kona loko kwelishumi kufanele ninikele sabelo saSimakadze ngekusinika Aroni, umphristi." 
Numbers18:29 Kufanele ninikele sabelo saSimakadze kube nguloko lokuhle kakhulu, nalokungcwelengcwele kuko konkhe leninikwe kona.’" 
Numbers18:30 “Khuluma kumaLevi utsi: ‘Naninikela loko lokuhle kakhulu, loko kuyawutsatfwa njengemphumela wekudla lokuhhudliwe nome inkhovu yeliwayini lephume etjeni lekuhluta emagelebisi." 
Numbers18:31 Nine nemindeni yenu ningakudla-ke konkhe loko lokusalako, ningakudlela nome ngabe nikuyiphi indzawo, ngobe loko kungumholo wenu ngemsebenti leniwentako ethendeni lekuhlangana." 
Numbers18:32 Njengobe nitawunikela ngalokuhle kakhulu kwako, ningeke nibe nelicala ngaloko; ngako-ke ningeke niyingcolise iminikelo lengcwele yema-Israyeli, futsi ningeke nife ngalelo cala.’ ”" 
Numbers19:1 Simakadze wakhuluma kuboMosi na-Aroni, watsi:" 
Numbers19:2 “Lesi-ke sekuyawuba simiso semtsetfo lomiswe nguSimakadze: Tjela sive sema-Israyeli kutsi siletse litfokati lelibovu lelingenasiyela nasici, lekungazange sekubekwe lijoko entsanyeni yalo." 
Numbers19:3 Niyawulinika Eleyazare, umphristi, liyawukhishelwa ngephandle kwenkambu lihlatjelwe embikwakhe." 
Numbers19:4 Eleyazare-ke, umphristi, uyawube sewutsatsa ingati yalo ngemuno wakhe, afafate kasikhombisa ngalengati yalo abhekise ngasembikwelithende lekuhlangana." 
Numbers19:5 Lelitfokati liyawube seliyashiswa-ke embikwakhe, kushiswe sikhumba salo, nenyama yalo, nengati yalo, nemswane walo." 
Numbers19:6 Umphristi-ke uyawutsatsa umsedari, nehisophu, nendvwangu lebovu ngalokutopele, akujike emlilweni etikwalelitfokati lelishiswako." 
Numbers19:7 Lomphristi-ke uyawube sewugeza tingubo takhe, nemtimba wakhe ngemanti, emvakwaloko-ke sekangangena enkambu, abe ngulongcolile ngekwemtsetfo kuze kuhlwe." 
Numbers19:8 Lomuntfu longuyena ashise lelitfokati kufanele naye ageze tingubo takhe kanye nemtimba wakhe ngemanti, abe ngulongcolile kuze kuhlwe." 
Numbers19:9 “Kuyawutsi umuntfu lohlantekile kube nguyena abutsa lomlotsa walelitfokati ayewulahla ngephandle kwenkambu endzaweni lehlobile ngekwemtsetfo, uhlaliswe lapho, uhlalele kutsi sive sema-Israyeli siwusebentise emantini ekuhlambulula nasitewugeza sono ngawo." 
Numbers19:10 Lomuntfu longuyena abutse lomlotsa walelitfokati kufanele naye ageze timphahla takhe abe ngulongcolile kuze kuhlwe. Lesimiso siyakwentiwa ngabo bonkhe baka-Israyeli kanye nebetive labasemkhatsini wenu, titukulwane ngetitukulwane.”" 
Numbers19:11 “Umuntfu loyawutsintsa sidvumbu nome ngabe sabani uyawuba ngulongcolile ngekwemtsetfo emalanga lasikhombisa. 
Numbers19:12 Uyawutigeza yena ngemanti ngelilanga lesitsatfu nangelesikhombisa, bese-ke uba ngulohlantekile. Kodvwa nakangatigezi yena ngelilanga lesitsatfu nangelesikhombisa, angeke ahlanteke." 
Numbers19:13 Nome ngubani lotsintsa sidvumbu, nome sabani, angakaze atihlambulule, uyawube wedzelela lithende laSimakadze. Lowo muntfu kufanele ancunywe esiveni sakubo, ngobe emanti ekuhlambulula angakaze afafatwe etikwakhe, ngako ungcolile; kungcola kwakhe kusesekuye." 
Numbers19:14 “Lona-ke ngumtsetfo lomacondzana nemuntfu lofele ethendeni lakhe. Nome ngubani loyawungena kulo nalobekasuke akulo lelithende, uyawuba ngulongcolile ngekwemtsetfo emalanga lasikhombisa." 
Numbers19:15 Tonkhe titja lebetingakambonyisiseki taciniswa ngesidekiselo tiyawuba nguletingcolile. 
Numbers19:16 “Nangabe umuntfu utsite asebaleni watsintsa sidvumbu semuntfu lofe ngekugwazwa, nome lofe ngesifo lesetayelekile, nome lotsintsa litsambo laso, nome lithuna, uyawuba ngulongcolile ngekwemtsetfo emalanga lasikhombisa." 
Numbers19:17 “Macondzana nalabangcolile ngekwemtsetfo uyawutsatsa umlotsa wemnikelo wesono utsele kuwo emanti lahlobile esitjeni. 
Numbers19:18 Kuyawutsi umuntfu lohlantekile ngekwemtsetfo atsatse ihisophu ayenye kulamanti, bese ufafata lelithende nako konkhe lokusekhatsi kanye nalabantfu bebakhona lapho. Kufanele afafate bonkhe labake batsintsa litsambo lemufi, nome sidvumbu semuntfu lobulewe nome lotifele, nome-ke lithuna."
