Numbers19:19 Lona lohlantekile kufanele afafate lowo longcolile ngelilanga lesitsatfu nangelesikhombisa; ngaleli lesikhombisa uyawube asamhlambulula. Lona lotewuhlanjululwa kufanele ageze timphahla takhe tekwembatsa kanye nemtimba wakhe ngemanti, uyawuba ngulohlambulukile ngabona lobo busuku." 
Numbers19:20 “Kodvwa nangabe lomuntfu longcolile angatihlambululi yena, kufanele ancunywe esiveni sakubo, ngobe uhlambalate indzawo lengcwele yaSimakadze. Emanti ekuhlambulula akaze afafatwe etikwakhe, ungcolile." 
Numbers19:21 Lesi-ke simiso sabo lesiyawuhlala sentiwa titukulwane ngetitukulwane. “Lomuntfu lobafafata ngemanti ekuhlambulula kufanele naye ageze timphahla takhe tekwembatsa, nalowo lotsintsa lamanti ekuhlambulula uyawuba ngulongcolile kuze kuhlwe." 
Numbers19:22 Yonkhe intfo letsintfwe ngumuntfu longcolile nayo iyawuba ngulengcolile, nalowo loyawutsintsa leyontfo uyawuba ngulongcolile kuze kuhlwe.”" 
Numbers20:1 Ngenyanga yekucala sonkhe sive sema-Israyeli sefika eHlane laseSini, sefike semisa eKhadeshi. Miriyamu wafela khona lapho, wangcwatjwa." 
Numbers20:2 Kwakute emanti kuleyo ndzawo, ngako bantfu babutsana ndzawonye basola boMosi na-Aroni." 
Numbers20:3 Balwa naMosi batsi: “Kube mane savele safa kanye nebanaketfu ngesikhatsi bafela embikwaSimakadze. 
Numbers20:4 Nisiletseleni lesive saSimakadze kulelihlane lelinje? Nentele kutsi tsine kanye naletifuyo tetfu sitewufela lapha! 
Numbers20:5 Nasikhiphelani lena eveni laseGibhithe nasiletsa lapha kulelive lelibi kangaka? Lelive alinakudla, namakhiwa, namagelebisi; lite nemahananandza. Kute ngisho nemanti nje ekunatsa!”" 
Numbers20:6 BoMosi na-Aroni besuka emkhatsini walesive bacondza ekungeneni kwelithende lekuhlangana. Bafike bawa phansi ngebuso, bakhotsama. Inkhatimulo yebukhona baSimakadze yabonakala kubo." 
Numbers20:7 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi:" 
Numbers20:8 “Tsatsa lendvuku, bese-ke wena na-Aroni, umnakenu, nibutsela sonkhe sive ndzawonye. Khuluma kulelidvwala, embikwaso sibuka, litawube selikhipha emanti. Uyawukhipha emanti kulelidvwala, kuze sonkhe sive kanye netifuyo taso sinatse kulo.”" 
Numbers20:9 Ngako Mosi watsatsa indvuku ebukhoneni baSimakadze, njengobe abetjeliwe." 
Numbers20:10 Yena na-Aroni bahlanganisa sonkhe sive embikwalelidvwala, Mosi watsi kubo: “Lalelani-ke, nine mahlubuka, sinikhokhele yini emanti kulelidvwala?”" 
Numbers20:11 Ngako Mosi waphakamisa sandla sakhe washaya lelidvwala kabili ngalendvuku, emanti ampompota kulelidvwala, banatsa bona bonkhe kanye netifuyo tabo." 
Numbers20:12 Kodvwa Simakadze wabatsetsisa boMosi na-Aroni, watsi: “Njengobe ningakangikholwa kangangekutsi nize ningingcwelise, ningihloniphe embikwalesive sema-Israyeli, anisenawusihola lesive nize nisifikise eveni lengisiphe lona.”" 
Numbers20:13 Lawo kwakungemanti aseMeribha, lapho sive sema-Israyeli sefike salwa khona naSimakadze, nalapho ativeta kubo khona angulongcwele." 
Numbers20:14 Mosi watfumela tigijimi kusuka eKhadeshi, taya enkhosini yaka-Edomu, tafike tatsi: “Umnakenu Israyeli utsi wena uyabati bonkhe bulukhuni lobusehlele." 
Numbers20:15 Bobabemkhulu behlela eveni laseGibhithe, sahlala lapho sikhatsi lesidze. Bantfu baseGibhithe basigcilata kanye nabobabe betfu," 
Numbers20:16 kodvwa satsi kube sikhale kuSimakadze, wakuva kukhala kwetfu wase utfumela ingilosi, wasikhipha eveni laseGibhithe. “Nyalo-ke sesilapha eKhadeshi, edolobhaneni lelisemnyeleni welive lakho." 
Numbers20:17 Sicela kwendlula sidzabule ekhatsi nelive lakho. Singeke sihambe emasimini nome etivinini takho, singeke sinatse ngisho nemanti emitfonjeni yakho. Sitawuhamba ngemgwaco lomkhulu sicondze, singaphambukeli ngesekudla nome ngesancele, size siphumele ngale kwalelive lakho.”" 
Numbers20:18 Kodvwa Edomu waphendvula, watsi: “Ningeke nengce lapha; naningake nilokotse, siyawuphuma sinihlasele ngetikhali.”" 
Numbers20:19 Ema-Israyeli aphendvula, atsi: “Sitawuhamba ngemgwaco lomkhulu, nangabe tifuyo tetfu natsi sinatse emitfonjeni yenu, sitanikhokhela. Tsine sifuna kumane sendlule nje ngetinyawo, hhayi lokunye.”" 
Numbers20:20 Baphindza baka-Edomu baphendvula, batsi: “Asifuni kutsi nendlule.” Base bayaphuma baka-Edomu babesukela ngalenkhulu imphi nalenemandla." 
Numbers20:21 Njengobe baka-Edomu bawalela ema-Israyeli kutsi endlule eveni labo, ema-Israyeli abe asayancandzeka, esuka kubo." 
Numbers20:22 Sonkhe sive sema-Israyeli sesuka eKhadeshi sayawufika eNtsabeni iHori. 
Numbers20:23 SebaseNtsabeni iHori, eceleni kwemnyele waka-Edomu, Simakadze wakhuluma kuboMosi na-Aroni, watsi:" 
Numbers20:24 “Aroni sewutakuya kulabafile bakubo, ngako akasoze angene eveni lengilinike ema-Israyeli, ngobe nine nobabili aningihloniphanga ngasemantini aseMeribha." 
Numbers20:25 Bita bo-Aroni nendvodzana yakhe, Eleyazare, ukhuphukele nabo eNtsabeni yaseHori." 
Numbers20:26 Khumula Aroni tembatfo takhe utembatsise indvodzana yakhe, Eleyazare, ngobe Aroni sewutawunishiya abuyele kubakubo, utawufike afele kuyo.”" 
Numbers20:27 Mosi wenta njengobe Simakadze abemtjelile: Wakhuphukela nabo eNtsabeni yaseHori embikwesive sonkhe sibuka. 
Numbers20:28 Mosi wakhumula Aroni tembatfo takhe watembatsisa indvodzana yakhe Eleyazare. Aroni wafela khona lapho etulu entsabeni. Bo-Mosi na-Eleyazare behla entsabeni. 
Numbers20:29 Sonkhe sive saka-Israyeli satsi kube sive kutsi Aroni sewufile, samlilela emalanga langema-30." 
Numbers21:1 Yatsi kube inkhosi yemaKhenani, yase-Aradi, leyayihlala eNegevu, eningizimu nelive laseKhenani, ive kutsi ema-Israyeli abeta ngemgwaco wase-Atharimu, yavele yawahlasela, yaphindze yatfumba lamanye awo." 
Numbers21:2 Israyeli wenta sifungo kuSimakadze, watsi: “Nawungahle usinikele lesive etandleni tetfu, sitasincoba sibhubhise nemadolobha aso.”" 
Numbers21:3 Simakadze wakulalela waba neluvela ngema-Israyeli, wawanika emaKhenani. Ema-Israyeli abhubhisa onkhe emaKhenani kanye nemadolobha awo; ngako-ke leyo ndzawo yetsiwa libito kwatsiwa yiHoma." 
Numbers21:4 Ema-Israyeli ahamba kusukela eNtsabeni iHori ngendlela leya eLwandle Lolubovu, entela kugega lelive lase-Edomu. Kodvwa bantfu baba nenhlitiyo lencane endleleni;" 
Numbers21:5 basola Nkulunkulu naMosi batsi: “Nasikhiphelani eGibhithe kuze sitewufela lapha ehlane? Kute kudla! Kute nemanti! Siyakwenyanya lokudla lokungenamsoco!” 
Numbers21:6 Simakadze wase ubatfumelela tinyoka letatinesihlungu; taluma labantfu, labanyenti babo bafa." 
Numbers21:7 Bantfu beta kuMosi, bafike batsi: “Sonile ngekukhuluma kabi ngaSimakadze nangawe. Thandaza kuSimakadze kutsi esuse letinyoka lapha kitsi.” Ngako-ke Mosi wabathandazela labantfu." 
Numbers21:8 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi: “Yenta inyoka lenesitfoze yelitfusi uyiphanyeke etulu elugodvweni; wonkhe labesalunywe yinyoka, utawutsi angayibuka aphile.”" 
Numbers21:9 Ngako Mosi wakha inyoka ngelitfusi, wase uyiphanyeka etulu elugodvweni. Kwatsi wonkhe labesalunywe yinyoka watsi nabuka lenyoka yelitfusi, waphila." 
Numbers21:10 Ema-Israyeli atfutsa lapho ahamba ayawumisa e-Obothi. 
Numbers21:11 Esuka e-Obothi afike emisa e-Iye Abharimu, ehlane lelibhekene neMowabi, ngasemphumalanga." 
Numbers21:12 Atfutsa lapho ayawumisa eSihosheni saseZeredi. 
Numbers21:13 Esuka lapho emisa ngase-Anoni ehlane leliseveni lema-Amori. I-Anoni isemnyeleni weMowabi, emkhatsini welakaMowabi nelaka-Amori," 
Numbers21:14 ngiko nje incwadzi yetimphi taSimakadze itsi: “... lidolobha laseWahebi, esifundzeni saseSufa netihosha; umfula i-Anoni," 
Numbers21:15 nemacele etihosha lehlela edolobheni lase-Ari, ehlele nangasemnyeleni welive lakaMowabi.”" 
Numbers21:16 Kusuka lapho bachubekela eBheyeri, emtfonjeni lapho Simakadze akhuluma kuMosi, watsi: “Butsa lesive sibuye ndzawonye, mine ngitasinika emanti.”" 
Numbers21:17 Ngaso sona leso sikhatsi ema-Israyeli ahlabela ingoma atsi: “Geletisa emanti, wena mtfombo! Sitakwemukela ngekuhlabela," 
Numbers21:18 umtfombo lowembiwa ngemakhosi wembiwa nabaholi, wembiwa ngetindvuku tebukhosi, kanye nangemizaca yawo.” Esuka lapho kulelo hlane aya eMathana," 
Numbers21:19 esuka eMathana aya eNahaliyeli, esuka eNahaliyeli aya eBamothi," 
Numbers21:20 esuka eBamothi aya esigodzini sakaMowabi, ngaphansi kwentsaba iPhisga leyengamele lihlane." 
Numbers21:21 Sive saka-Israyeli satfumela titfunywa kuSihoni, inkhosi yema-Amori, satsi:" 
Numbers21:22 “Sicela kwendlula sidzabule lelive lakho. Singeke siphambukele emasimini nome esivinini nome sinatse emanti kunome ngumuphi umtfombo. Sitawuhamba ngemgwaco wenkhosi size siphumele ngale kwelive lakho.” 
Numbers21:23 Kodvwa Sihoni wala kutsi bendlule badzabule live lakhe. Wahlanganisa emabutfo akhe onkhe, wawahlomisa wawavivisa awacondzise ehlane kuyawulwa nema-Israyeli. Watsi nakefika eJahasi, walwa nema-Israyeli." 
Numbers21:24 Ema-Israyeli alwa naye amehlula, adla live lakhe kusukela e-Anoni kuya eJabhoki, kuze kugcine ngaseveni lema-Amoni, ngobe iminyele yawo yayakhiwe, itinqaba." 
Numbers21:25 Ema-Israyeli awatfumba onkhe emadolobha ema-Amori, awadla aba ngewawo kanye neHeshboni netabelo tayo tonkhe." 
Numbers21:26 IHeshboni bekulidolobha laSihoni, inkhosi yema-Amori, leyayike yalwa nalenkhosi leyayingeyemaMowabi, yatsatsa lonkhe live layo kuze kuyewugcina e-Anoni." 
Numbers21:27 Ngiko nje timbongi titsi: “Wotani eHeshboni, lidolobha lenkhosi Sihoni! Alakhiwe kabusha, yebo, aliphindze livuswe, lakhiwe." 
Numbers21:28 “KuleHeshboni kwase kuphuma umlilo, lilangabi lelidolobha laSihoni. Lashisa i-Ari yakaMowabi, takhamiti tasetintsabeni, e-Anoni." 
Numbers21:29 Nako kini, sive sakaMowabi! Nibhujisiwe nine sive sakaKhemoshi! Uyekelele emadvodzana akhe, aba bakhoseli; kwatsi emadvodzakati akhe aba titfunjwa taSihoni, inkhosi yema-Amori." 
Numbers21:30 “Kodvwa sesibancobile, iHeshboni ibhujiswe yonkhe indlela kuze kuyewufika eDiboni. Sibabhubhise saze sayawufika eNofa, kuze kufike eMedeba.”" 
Numbers21:31 Ngako ema-Israyeli ahlala eveni lema-Amori. 
Numbers21:32 Watsi kube Mosi atfumele tinhloli eJazeri, ema-Israyeli atfumba lonkhe lelo dolobha kanye netabelo talo, acosha lawo ma-Amori labelapho." 
Numbers21:33 Ema-Israyeli ajika enyuka ngemgwaco locondza eBhashani; kwase kutsi Ogi, inkhosi yaseBhashani, waphuma kanye nemabutfo akhe onkhe, wayawuhlasela ema-Israyeli emphini yase-Edreyi." 
Numbers21:34 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi: “Ungamesabi, ngobe yena kanye nemabutfo akhe onkhe, nelive lakhe, sengimnikele etandleni takho. Yenta kuye kona loko lowakwenta kuSihoni, inkhosi yema-Amori, labebusa eHeshboni.”" 
Numbers21:35 Ngako ema-Israyeli abulala Ogi kanye nemadvodzana akhe, naso sonkhe sive sakhe, kwabate ngisho namunye lowasindza. Ase ayalidla lelo live lakhe." 
Numbers22:1 Sive sema-Israyeli sesuka lapho sacondza ematsafeni akaMowabi, sefike semisa emathende ngesheya kwemfula iJordane malungana neJerikho." 
Numbers22:2 Watsi kube Bhalaki, umsa waSiphori, abone konkhe lekwase kwentiwe sive sema-Israyeli esiveni sema-Amori," 
Numbers22:3 Mowabi watfutfumela ngenca yebunyenti bawo. Yebo, Mowabi watfutfumela ngenca yema-Israyeli." 
Numbers22:4 BakaMowabi bakhuluma nebaholi bakaMidiyani, batsi: “Lesicumbi sebantfu sitawudla konkhe lesinako, njengenkhomo idla luhlata lwesiganga.” Ngako Bhalaki, umsa waSiphori, labeyinkhosi yakaMowabi ngaleso sikhatsi," 
Numbers22:5 watfumela tigijimi kutsi tiyewumbitela Bhalamu, umsa waBheyori, labesePhethori ngasemfuleni iYufrathe, eveni laka-Amawu; tafike tatsi kuye: “Kunesive lesaphuma eGibhithe lesesigcwele umhlaba wonkhe, manje sesize semisa nalapha eceleni kwelive lami." 
Numbers22:6 Manje kota utengicalekisela lesive, ngobe sinemandla kakhulu kunami; kumbe ngingakhona kusehlula ngisikhiphe lapha eveni lami. Ngiyati kutsi lababusiswa nguwe bayabusiseka, nalabo labacalekiswa nguwe bayacalekiseka.”" 
Numbers22:7 Ngako-ke baholi bakaMowabi nebakaMidiyani besuka bahamba baphatsa imali yekuphengula. Batsi nabefika kuBhalamu, bafike bamtjela loko bebakutfunywe nguBhalaki." 
Numbers22:8 Bhalamu wabaphendvula watsi: “Lalani lapha kulobusuku, kusasa ngitanibuyela nemphendvulo levela kuSimakadze.” Ngako labaholi bakaMowabi balala kaBhalamu." 
Numbers22:9 Nkulunkulu wefika wabuta Bhalamu, watsi: “Ngakabani lamadvodza lalele lapha kakho?”" 
Numbers22:10 Bhalamu waphendvula Nkulunkulu, watsi: “Bhalaki, umsa waSiphori, inkhosi yakaMowabi, utfumele kimi umbiko lotsi:" 
Numbers22:11 ‘Kunesive lesaphuma kulela laseGibhithe lesigcwele umhlaba wonkhe. Ngako wota utengicalekisela sona, kumbe ngingakhona kusehlula ngisicoshe kulelive lami.’ ”" 
Numbers22:12 Kodvwa Nkulunkulu wakhuluma kuBhalamu, watsi: “Ungacali uhambe nawo. Ungasibeki sicalekiso kuleso sive leso, ngobe sabusiswa.”" 
Numbers22:13 Ngakusasa ekuseni Bhalamu wavuka watjela labaholi lababetfunywe nguBhalaki, watsi: “Hambani nibuyele eveni lakini, Simakadze walile kutsi ngihambe nani.”" 
Numbers22:14 Ngako labaholi bakaMowabi babuyela kuBhalaki, bafike bamtjela batsi: “Bhalamu walile kuta natsi.”" 
Numbers22:15 Waphindza Bhalaki watfumela labanye baholi lababemcoka, baba banyenti kakhulu kunalaba bekucala." 
Numbers22:16 Befika kuBhalamu batsi: “Bhalaki, umsa waSiphori, utsi: ‘Akubete lutfo lolukuvimbelako kutsi ute kimi," 
Numbers22:17 ngobe ngiyakukukhokhela kahle kakhulu nome ungangibitani; kota ungicalekisele lesive.’ ” 
Numbers22:18 Kodvwa Bhalamu wabaphendvula, watsi: “Ngisho nome Bhalaki abenganginika sigodlo sakhe sigcwele isiliva negolide, ngingeke sengente lutfo lolukhulu nome loluncane loluphambene nemyalo waSimakadze Nkulunkulu wami." 
Numbers22:19 Hlalani nani kulobusuku njengalaba bakucala, ngize ngati kutsi yini lenye Simakadze latangitjela yona.”" 
Numbers22:20 Ngalobo busuku Nkulunkulu wefika kuBhalamu, watsi: “Njengobe lamadvodza akulandzile, hamba nawo, kuphela wente loko lengikutjela kona.”" 
Numbers22:21 Bhalamu wavuka ekuseni wabophela imbongolo yakhe, wahamba nalabaholi bakaMowabi." 
Numbers22:22 Simakadze wamtfukutselela kakhulu nasahamba, ingilosi yaSimakadze yammela endleleni imvimbela. Bhalamu abegibele imbongolo yakhe, ahamba netinceku takhe letimbili." 
Numbers22:23 Imbongolo yatsi kube ibone lengilosi ime endleleni, yelule inkemba yayo iyiphetse ngesandla, yaphambuka endleleni yacondza esigangeni. Bhalamu wayishaya, ayibuyisela endleleni." 
Numbers22:24 Ingilosi yaSimakadze yachubeka yayakuma emngcingweni wendlela leyayijuba emkhatsini wetivini letimbili, kume tibondza emaceleni ngala nangala." 
Numbers22:25 Imbongolo yatsi kube ibone ingilosi yaSimakadze, yagudla lubondza yahhudla umbala waBhalamu kulolubondza. Bhalamu waphindza wayishaya futsi." 
Numbers22:26 Ingilosi yaSimakadze yaphindza yachubekela ngembidlana, yefika yema emngcengcemaneni wendlela, lapho bekute khona ngisho nendzawana nje yekujikela ngesekudla nome ngesancele." 
Numbers22:27 Imbongolo yatsi kube ibone lengilosi yaSimakadze, yalala phansi, Bhalamu asetulu kuyo; watfukutsela wabila, wayishaya ngalendvuku yakhe." 
Numbers22:28 Simakadze wase uvula umlomo walembongolo, yakhuluma kuBhalamu yatsi: “Kodvwa ngenteni kuwe kutsi ungaze ungishaye kuze kube katsatfu?”" 
Numbers22:29 Bhalamu wayiphendvula watsi: “Ungente silima! Kube bengiphetse inkemba esandleni sami, ngabe ngiyakubulala khona nyalo.”" 
Numbers22:30 Imbongolo yaphendvula Bhalamu, yatsi: “Angisiyo yini imbongolo yakho lohlala ngekuyigibela njalo nje, kuze kube ngulamuhla? Ngake ngakwenta yini loku kuwe?” Bhalamu watsi: “Cha.”" 
Numbers22:31 Simakadze wase uvula emehlo eBhalamu, wayibona lengilosi yaSimakadze ime endleleni yelule inkemba yayo. Ngako watitfoba, wawa phansi ngebuso." 
Numbers22:32 Ingilosi yaSimakadze yambuta yatsi: “Uyishayeleni lembongolo yakho kuze kube katsatfu? Ngite lapha kutewuncandza wena, ngobe lendlela yakho inengoti embikwami." 
Numbers22:33 Lembongolo beyibona mine ingibalekele kulamahlandla lamatsatfu. Kube beyingangibalekeli, ngabe wena sengikubulele nyalo, kodvwa yona bengitayishiya iphila.”" 
Numbers22:34 Bhalamu wakhuluma kulengilosi yaSimakadze, watsi: “Ngonile, bengingaboni kutsi ume endleleni kutewuncandza mine. Nangabe-ke akukujabulisi lokuhamba kwami, ngitawuncandzeka.”" 
Numbers22:35 Ingilosi yaSimakadze yakhuluma kuBhalamu, yatsi: “Hamba nalamadvodza, kodvwa ukhulume kuphela loko lengitakutjela kona.” Ngako Bhalamu wahamba nalabaholi bakaBhalaki." 
Numbers22:36 Watsi kube eve Bhalaki kutsi Bhalamu sewuyeta, waphuma wayawumhlangabeta edolobheni lakaMowabi lelise-Anoni, lekungumnyele lokhashane kakhulu welive lakhe." 
Numbers22:37 Bhalaki wakhuluma naBhalamu, watsi: “Angikatfumeli yini tigijimi kuwe kutsi tikulandze masinyane? Awuketi ngani kimi? Bewucabanga kutsi anginalutfo yini lwekukukhokhela?”" 
Numbers22:38 Bhalamu waphendvula watsi: “Sengikhona, kepha nginawo yini mine emandla ekukhuluma lutfo ngaphandle kwaloko lengikutjelwa nguNkulunkulu?”" 
Numbers22:39 Ngako Bhalamu wahamba naBhalaki, baya eKhiriyathi Husothi." 
Numbers22:40 Bhalaki wenta umhlatjelo ngetinkhomo netimvu, lenye inyama wayinika Bhalamu nalabaholi lababehamba naye." 
Numbers22:41 Ngakusasa ekuseni Bhalaki watsatsa Bhalamu, benyukela etulu eBhamothi Bhali, lapho afike wabona kahle incenye yalesive." 
Numbers23:1 Bhalamu wakhuluma kuBhalaki, watsi: “Ngakhele emalati lasikhombisa, ungilungiselele tinkunzi letisikhombisa netihhanca letisikhombisa.”" 
Numbers23:2 Bhalaki wakwenta konkhe loko lekwakufunwe nguBhalamu, bobabili base banikela ngenkunzi nesihhanca kulelo nakulelo lilati." 
Numbers23:3 Bhalamu wakhuluma kuBhalaki, watsi: “Mani lapha eceleni kwemnikelo wakho, mine ngisaphambuka; ngisafuna kuhlola kutsi Simakadze utawuhlangabetana yini nami. Loko langembulela kona nawe ngitakwatisa.” Asakushito loko, wase ukhuphukela egcumeni lelingenatihlahla." 
Numbers23:4 Nkulunkulu wahlangabetana naye, naBhalamu watsi kuye: “Sengilungise emalati lasikhombisa, etikwalelo nalelo lati nginikele ngenkunzi nesihhanca.”" 
Numbers23:5 Simakadze wabeka emavi emlonyeni waBhalamu, watsi: “Ncandzeka uye kuBhalaki, ufike umtjele lelivi.”" 
Numbers23:6 Ngako-ke wancandzeka wamkhandza aseme eceleni kwemnikelo wakhe kanye nebaholi bakaMowabi. 
Numbers23:7 Bhalamu wakhuluma umlayeto wakhe, watsi: “Bhalaki wangisusa e-Aramu, inkhosi yakaMowabi, etintsabeni letingasemphumalanga, watsi: ‘Kota utengicalekisela Jakobe, ungijivazele Israyeli.’" 
Numbers23:8 Ngingabacalekisa kanjani labo labangakacalekiswa nguNkulunkulu? Ngingabajivaza kanjani labo labangakajivazwa nguSimakadze? 
Numbers23:9 Ngiyababona loku ngilapha esicongweni sentsaba lesilidvwala. Yebo, ngiyababona loku ngilapha etulu ekuphakameni, ngibasinga umkhanya. Ngababona basive lesitihlalela sodvwa, sitehlukanise naletinye tive." 
Numbers23:10 Ngubani longabala lutfuli lwaJakobe, nome abale incenye yesive saka-Israyeli? Angimane ngife kufa kwalolungile, shangatsi nesiphetfo sami singaba njengesabo.”" 
Numbers23:11 Bhalaki wakhuluma kuBhalamu, watsi: “Yini lena lese uyente kimi? Ngikuletse lapha kutsi utewucalekisa letitsa tami, kodvwa kute lokwentile; esikhundleni saloko utibusisile.”" 
Numbers23:12 Bhalamu waphendvula watsi: “Kantsi akukafaneli yini ngikhulume loko lokubekwe nguSimakadze emlonyeni wami?” 
Numbers23:13 Bhalaki wakhuluma kuye, watsi: “Kota la sihambe nawe siye kulenye indzawo, khona utawubabona; noko utawubona incenye yabo, hhayi bonkhe. Utawube sewungicalekisela bona.”" 
Numbers23:14 Ngako wamtsatsa wahamba naye baya etsafeni laseSofimu, etulu esicongweni sentsaba iPhisga, wefika lapho wakha emalati lasikhombisa, wanikela ngenkunzi nangesihhanca etikwalelo nalelo lati." 
Numbers23:15 Bhalamu wakhuluma kuBhalaki, watsi: “Mani lapha eceleni kwemnikelo wakho, mine ngisetawuhlangana naSimakadze lapha.”" 
Numbers23:16 Simakadze wahlangana naBhalamu, wamtjela emavi lekufanele awakhulume, watsi: “Ncandzeka, uye kuBhalaki uyewumtjela lelivi.”" 
Numbers23:17 Ngako-ke wancandzeka waya kuye, wamkhandza eceleni kwemnikelo wakhe, eme nebaholi bakaMowabi. Bhalaki wambuta watsi: “Utsiteni Simakadze?”" 
Numbers23:18 Bhalamu wakhuluma umlayeto wakhe, watsi: “Sukuma, Bhalaki, ulalele, ngive kahle wena, msa waSiphori." 
Numbers23:19 Nkulunkulu akasiye umuntfu kutsi angacala emanga, futsi akasiyo indvodzana yemuntfu legucukako engcondvweni yayo. Uyakhuluma yini angabe asenta? Uyetsembisa yini angabe asasifeza setsembiso sakhe?" 
Numbers23:20 Nginikwe umyalo wekutsi ngibusise, yena sewubusisile, mine ngingabe ngisakugucula loko." 
Numbers23:21 “Kute emashwa latakwehlela Jakobe, Israyeli angeke abe nelusizi. Simakadze Nkulunkulu wabo, unabo; kumenyetwa nekudvunyiswa kweNkhosi kusemkhatsini wabo." 
Numbers23:22 Nkulunkulu lowabakhipha eGibhithe, ubalwela ngemandla lanjengewenyatsi." 
Numbers23:23 Kute longaloya Jakobe, kute longaphengula Israyeli; kuyawukhulunywa ngaJakobe nanga-Israyeli kutsiwe: ‘Bukani lokwentiwe nguNkulunkulu!’" 
Numbers23:24 Lesive sivuka njengelibhubesi lelisikati, siphakame njengenkunzi yelibhubesi, lelingaphumuli lingakayidli layicedza inyamatane leliyibambile, linatse nengati yaleto tinyamatane lelitibulele.”" 
Numbers23:25 Bhalaki wakhuluma kuBhalamu, watsi: “Njengobe awukabacalekisi, lokungenani ungababusisi.”" 
Numbers23:26 Bhalamu waphendvula, watsi: “Angikakutjeli yini kutsi kufanele ngikhulume loko lengikutjelwa nguSimakadze?”" 
Numbers23:27 Bhalaki wakhuluma kuBhalamu, watsi: “Kota, sihambe nawe, siye kulenye indzawo, mhlawumbe kungahle kumjabulise Nkulunkulu, akuvumele kutsi ungicalekisele lesive ukuleyo ndzawo.”" 
Numbers23:28 Bhalaki watsatsa Bhalamu, bobabili benyukela esicongweni sentsaba iPheyori leyengamele lihlane." 
Numbers23:29 Bhalamu wakhuluma watsi: “Ngakhele emalati lasikhombisa lapha, ungilungisele tinkunzi letisikhombisa netihhanca letisikhombisa.”" 
Numbers23:30 Bhalaki wenta njengekusho kwaBhalamu, wanikela inkunzi nesihhanca kulelo nakulelo lilati." 
Numbers24:1 Ngaleso sikhatsi Bhalamu bese ati kahle kutsi kuyamjabulisa Simakadze nakabusisa lesive sema-Israyeli, ngako akazange aphindze afune letinye tibonakaliso njengakucala, kodvwa wesuka wabheka ngasehlane." 
Numbers24:2 Bhalamu watsi uyabuka wabona ema-Israyeli emisile, sive ngesive, Moya waNkulunkulu wehlela etikwakhe," 
Numbers24:3 walayetela watsi: “Umlayeto waBhalamu, umsa waBheyori, umlayeto walowo lonemehlo labona kahle konkhe." 
Numbers24:4 Umlayeto walowo lova emavi aNkulunkulu, lowo lobona umbono waSomandla, lowo lokhotsamako, lonemehlo lavulekile." 
Numbers24:5 Maye mahle emathende akho, sive sakaJakobe, emakhaya lapho uhlala khona, Israyeli!" 
Numbers24:6 “Njengemifula lenemanti, nanjengetivandze letiseceleni kwemfula; nanjengenhlaba lehlanyelwe nguSimakadze, nanjengemisedari ngasemantini emfula," 
Numbers24:7 emanti atawugeleta asuka etimbiteni takhe, nenhlanyelo yakhe itfole emanti lamanyenti. “Inkhosi yabo iyawuba yinkhulu kuna-Agagi, nembuso wabo uyawuphakanyiswa." 
Numbers24:8 Nkulunkulu wabakhipha eveni laseGibhithe, unjengenyatsi lenemandla kubo. Bayakudla tive letititsa tabo, bephule ematsambo ato abe timvutfu, bagwaze leto tive ngetikhali." 
Numbers24:9 Njengelibhubesi bayahoshoba bacambalale phansi, yebo, nanjengelibhubesi lelisikati, ngubani nje longacala abavuse? “Ababusiswe labo labakubusisako, bacalekiswe labo labakucalekisako!”" 
Numbers24:10 Lulaka lwaBhalaki lwamvutsela kamatima Bhalamu, washaya tandla takhe, watsi kuye: “Ngikulandzele kutsi utewucalekisa titsa tami, kodvwa wena sewutibusise kwaze kwaba katsatfu." 
Numbers24:11 Nyamalala nyalo ubuyele ekhaya lakho; bengitsi ngitakubonga ngesibongo lesihle, kodvwa Simakadze ukwalele kutsi utfole lesibongo.”" 
Numbers24:12 Bhalamu watsi kuBhalaki: “Angititjelanga yini letigijimi lewawutitfumele kimi, ngatsi kuto:" 
Numbers24:13 ‘Ngisho nome ngabe Bhalaki anganginika sigodlo sakhe sigcwele isiliva negolide, bengingeke ngitentele lutfo lolusuka kimi, lokuhle nome lokubi, lokuphambene nemyalo waSimakadze. Ngitakusho kuphela loko lokushiwo nguSimakadze.’ ”" 
Numbers24:14 “Sengiyancandzeka ngibuyela eveni lakitsi, kodvwa kota lapha ngikutjele kutsi yini letakwentiwa ngulesive kulesive sakho kulamalanga letako.”" 
Numbers24:15 Walayetela, watsi: “Umlayeto waBhalamu, umsa waBheyori, umlayeto walowo lonemehlo labona kahle konkhe." 
Numbers24:16 Umlayeto walowo lova emavi aNkulunkulu, lowo lonelwati loluvela kuLosetikwako Konkhe, lowo lobona umbono waSomandla, lowo lokhotsamako, lonemehlo lavulekile." 
Numbers24:17 “Ngiyambona, noko, hhayi nyalo; ngibuke kuye, noko, akekho edvute. Inkhanyeti iyawuvela kuJakobe, intfonga yebukhosi iyawumila ka-Israyeli, uyawupitjita tinhloko tesive sakaMowabi, tinkhakhayi tawo onkhe emadvodza akaShethi." 
Numbers24:18 Edomu uyawuncotjwa; Seyiri, sitsa sakhe, naye uyawuncotjwa, kodvwa Israyeli uyawukhula abe nemandla." 
Numbers24:19 Umbusi uyawuvela kuJakobe abhubhise bonkhe lababesele nakuhlaselwa lelo dolobha.” 
Numbers24:20 Bhalamu wabona Amaleki, wase ubeka umlayeto wakhe, watsi: “Amaleki waba wekucala etiveni tonkhe, kodvwa, noko ekugcineni uyawubhubha.”" 
Numbers24:21 Waphindza wabona emaKheni, wase ubeka umlayeto wakhe utsi: “Emakhaya akho avikelekile, sidleke sakho sakhelwe edvwaleni." 
Numbers24:22 Noko nine maKheni niyawubhujiswa ngesikhatsi nitfunjwa ngu-Ashuri.” 
Numbers24:23 Walayetela futsi watsi: “Awu! Ngubani nje longaphila, Simakadze nase acala kwenta loku?" 
Numbers24:24 Imikhumbi iyawuchamuka elusentseni lwelwandle eKhithimu, imncobe Ashuri na-Ebheri, noko, naye uyawubhujiswa.”" 
Numbers24:25 Bhalamu wesuka wancandzeka wabuyela eveni lakubo, naBhalaki watsatsa yakhe indlela." 
Numbers25:1 Ngesikhatsi sive sema-Israyeli siseseShithimu, emadvodza acala kungenela kulalana nalabasikati besive semaMowabi." 
Numbers25:2 Laba labasikati bawamema lamadvodza kutsi ete atekwenta umhlatjelo kubonkulunkulu babo. Lamadvodza adla, akhotsama, akhonta labonkulunkulu bemaMowabi." 
Numbers25:3 Ngako sive sema-Israyeli sahlanganyela ekukhonteni Bhali wasePheyori. Lulaka lwaSimakadze lwabavutsela. 
Numbers25:4 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi: “Tsatsa bonkhe baholi balesive, ubabulale, bese ubeneka emini kubona wonkhe umuntfu embikwaSimakadze, khona kutewutsi lulaka lolwesabekako lwaSimakadze lungetiwusivutsela lesive saka-Israyeli.”" 
Numbers25:5 Mosi wakhuluma nebaholi baka-Israyeli, watsi: “Ngulowo nalowo wenu kufanele abulale onkhe emadvodza esive sakabo lahlanganyele ekukhonteni Bhali wasePheyori.”" 
Numbers25:6 Lenye indvodza yem-Israyeli yeta nalomsikati umMidiyani yamngenisa ethendeni layo, Mosi abuka, nesive sonkhe sema-Israyeli sisalila ekungeneni kwelithende lekuhlangana." 
Numbers25:7 Watsi kube akubone loko Finehasi, umsa wa-Eleyazare, umsa wa-Aroni, umphristi, washiya sonkhe lesive, watsatsa sikhali ngesandla sakhe," 
Numbers25:8 walandzela lendvodza yem-Israyeli waze wayawungena ethendeni layo. Wafike wabagwaza bobabili, sikhali sangena kulom-Israyeli saze sayawuphumela ngale kulona lomsikati. Lesishayo lesasihlasele ema-Israyeli sakhawula," 
Numbers25:9 kodvwa labesebafile ngaso bese bati-24 000. 
Numbers25:10 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi:" 
Numbers25:11 “Finehasi, umsa wa-Eleyazare, lotalwa ngu-Aroni, umphristi, sewukuncandzile kutfukutsela kwami ngitfukutselela sive sema-Israyeli, ngobe nguye yedvwa emkhatsini wabo lobe nenshisekelo yekugcina ludvumo lwami; ngiko nje ngingakasicedzi ngelulaka sive sema-Israyeli." 
Numbers25:12 Ngako-ke mtjele kutsi sengenta sivumelwane sekuthula naye. 
Numbers25:13 Yena netitukulwane takhe batawuba nesivumelwane sebuphristi baphakadze naphakadze, ngobe waba nenshisekelo yekugcina ludvumo lwami, wenta inhlawulo yekubuyisana kwesive sonkhe sema-Israyeli nami.”" 
Numbers25:14 Libito lalom-Israyeli lowabulawa kanye nemMidiyani lomsikati bekunguZimri, umsa waSalu, umholi wemndeni wakaSimeyoni." 
Numbers25:15 Libito lalona lomsikati bekunguKhozibi, indvodzakati yaSuri, sikhulu semndeni lotsite wesive semaMidiyani." 
Numbers25:16 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi:" 
Numbers25:17 “Sive semaMidiyani niyawusiphatsa njengetitsa nisibulale," 
Numbers25:18 ngobe naso saniphatsa njengetitsa, ngesikhatsi siniyenga ngalendzaba yasePheyori, nangenca yadzadzewabo, Khozibi, labeyindvodzakati yemholi wesive semaMidiyani. Khozibi nguye lona lowafa ngekubulawa, nakufika lesishayo sasePheyori.”" 
Numbers26:1 Emvakwaleso sishayo Simakadze wakhuluma kuboMosi na-Eleyazare, umsa wa-Aroni, umphristi, watsi:" 
Numbers26:2 “Yentani lubalo lwaso sonkhe sive sema-Israyeli ngemindeni yaso, kusukela kulabaneminyaka lengema-20 budzala kuya etulu, bonkhe lasebangalungela kungenela imphi esiveni saka-Israyeli.”" 
Numbers26:3 Ngako-ke, ematsafeni akaMowabi, ngesheya kweJordane, malungana neJerikho, boMosi na-Eleyazare, umphristi, bakhuluma nesive batsi:" 
Numbers26:4 “Yentani lubalo lwawo onkhe emadvodza kusukela kulabaneminyaka lengema-20 budzala kuya etulu, njengobe Simakadze ayale Mosi.” Nankha-ke ema-Israyeli laphuma eGibhithe:" 
Numbers26:5 Titukulwane takaRubeni, litubulo la-Israyeli, lusendvo ngelusendvo kwaba ngemaHanoki labetalwa nguHanoki, nemaPhalu labetalwa nguPhalu," 
Numbers26:6 nemaHesroni labetalwa nguHesroni, nemaKhami, labetalwa nguKhami." 
Numbers26:7 Leto-ke bekutisendvo takaRubeni. Lababalwa babeti-43 730. 
Numbers26:8 Umsa waPhalu bekungu-Eliyabe. 
Numbers26:9 Emadvodzana a-Eliyabe bekuboNemuweli, naDathani, na-Abiramu. BoDathani na-Abiramu bebangulabaholi labavukela Mosi na-Aroni; bebangulabanye bebalandzeli baKhora nabavukela Simakadze." 
Numbers26:10 Umhlaba wakhamisa wabagwinya bonkhe naKhora, balandzeli bakhe labafa ngesikhatsi umlilo ubhubhisa emadvodza langema-250, baba luphawu lwesecwayiso." 
Numbers26:11 Noko intalelwane yaKhora ayizange ife iphele. 
Numbers26:12 Titukulwane takaSimeyoni lusendvo ngelusendvo kwaba ngemaNemuweli labetalwa nguNemuweli, nemaJamini labetalwa nguJamini, nemaJakhini labetalwa nguJakhini," 
Numbers26:13 nemaZera labetalwa nguZera, nemaShawula labetalwa nguShawula." 
Numbers26:14 Leto-ke bekutinsendvo takaSimeyoni. Lababalwa babeti-22 200. 
Numbers26:15 Titukulwane takaGadi lusendvo ngelusendvo kwaba ngemaSefoni labetalwa nguSefoni, nemaHagi labetalwa nguHagi, nemaShuni labetalwa nguShuni," 
Numbers26:16 nema-Ozni labetalwa ngu-Ozni, nema-Era labetalwa ngu-Era," 
Numbers26:17 nema-Arodi labetalwa ngu-Arodi, nema-Areli labetalwa ngu-Areli." 
Numbers26:18 Leto-ke bekutinsendvo takaGadi. Lababalwa babeti-40 500. 
Numbers26:19 Bo-Era na-Onani bekungemadvodzana aJuda, kodvwa afela eKhenani." 
Numbers26:20 Titukulwane takaJuda lusendvo ngelusendvo kwaba ngemaShela, labetalwa nguShela, nemaPheresi, labetalwa nguPheresi, nemaZera, labetalwa nguZera." 
Numbers26:21 Titukulwane takaPheresi lusendvo ngelusendvo kwaba ngemaHesroni labetalwa nguHesroni, nemaHamuli labetalwa nguHamuli." 
Numbers26:22 Leto-ke bekutinsendvo takaJuda. Lababalwa babeti-76 500. 
Numbers26:23 Titukulwane taka-Isakhari lusendvo ngelusendvo kwaba ngemaThola labetalwa nguThola, nemaPhuwa labetalwa nguPhuwa," 
Numbers26:24 nemaJashubi labetalwa nguJashubi, nemaShimroni labetalwa nguShimroni." 
Numbers26:25 Leto-ke bekutinsendvo taka-Isakhari. Lababalwa babeti-64 300. 
Numbers26:26 Titukulwane takaZebuloni lusendvo ngelusendvo kwaba ngemaSeredi labetalwa nguSeredi, nema-Eloni labetalwa ngu-Eloni, nemaJaleli labetalwa nguJaleli." 
Numbers26:27 Leto-ke bekutinsendvo takaZebuloni. Lababalwa babeti-60 500. 
Numbers26:28 Titukulwane takaJosefa lusendvo ngelusendvo kusukela kuboManase na-Efrayimu tatime kanje: 
Numbers26:29 Titukulwane takaManase lusendvo ngelusendvo kwaba ngemaMakhire labetalwa nguMakhire, Makhire kwakunguyise waGileyadi, emaGileyadi abetalwa nguGileyadi." 
Numbers26:30 Leti-ke bekutinsendvo takaGileyadi: ema-Iyezeri labetalwa ngu-Iyezeri, nemaHelekhi labetalwa nguHelekhi," 
Numbers26:31 nema-Asriyeli labetalwa ngu-Asriyeli, nemaShekhemu labetalwa nguShekhemu," 
Numbers26:32 nemaShemida labetalwa nguShemida, nemaHeferi labetalwa nguHeferi." 
Numbers26:33 Selofehadi, umsa waHeferi, abete emadvodzana, abenemantfombatana odvwana lekwakuboMahala, naNowa, naHogila, naMilkha, naThisa." 
Numbers26:34 Leto-ke bekutinsendvo takaManase. Lababalwa babeti-52 700. 
Numbers26:35 Titukulwane taka-Efrayimu lusendvo ngelusendvo kwaba ngemaShuthela labetalwa nguShuthela, nemaBekheri labetalwa nguBekheri, nemaThahani labetalwa nguThahani." 
Numbers26:36 Leti-ke bekutinsendvo takaShuthela: ema-Erani labetalwa ngu-Erani. 
Numbers26:37 Leto-ke bekutinsendvo taka-Efrayimu. Lababalwa babeti-32 500. Leti-ke ngito titukulwane takaJosefa lusendvo ngelusendvo. 
Numbers26:38 Titukulwane takaBhenjamini lusendvo ngelusendvo kwaba ngemaBela labetalwa nguBela, nema-Ashbeli labetalwa ngu-Ashbeli, nema-Ahiramu labetalwa ngu-Ahiramu" 
Numbers26:39 nemaShufamu labetalwa nguShufamu, nemaHufamu labetalwa nguHufamu." 
Numbers26:40 Titukulwane takaBela tekutalwa ngu-Adi naNamani kwaba nguleti: ema-Adi labetalwa ngu-Adi, nemaNamani labetalwa nguNamani." 
Numbers26:41 Leto-ke bekutinsendvo takaBhenjamini. Lababalwa babeti-45 600. 
Numbers26:42 Titukulwane takaDani lusendvo ngelusendvo kwaba ngemaShuhamu labetalwa nguShuhamu. Leti-ke bekutinsendvo takaDani. 
Numbers26:43 Bonkhe babengemaShuhamu. Lababalwa babeti-64 400. 
Numbers26:44 Titukulwane taka-Asheri lusendvo ngelusendvo kwaba ngemaJimna labetalwa nguJimna, nemaJishvi labetalwa nguJishvi, nemaBheriya labetalwa nguBheriya." 
Numbers26:45 Titukulwane takaBheriya lusendvo ngelusendvo kwaba ngemaHebere labetalwa nguHebere, nemaMalkhiyeli labetalwa nguMalkhiyeli." 
Numbers26:46 Asheri abenendvodzakati leyayinguSera. 
Numbers26:47 Leto-ke bekutinsendvo taka-Asheri. Lababalwa babeti-53 400. 
Numbers26:48 Titukulwane takaNaftali lusendvo ngelusendvo kwaba ngemaJasiyeli labetalwa nguJasiyeli, nemaGuni labetalwa nguGuni," 
Numbers26:49 nemaJeseri labetalwa nguJeseri, nemaShilemi labetalwa nguShilemi." 
Numbers26:50 Leto-ke bekutinsendvo takaNaftali. Lababalwa babeti-45 400. 
Numbers26:51 Asawonkhe emadvodza esive saka-Israyeli labalwa abeti-601 730. 
Numbers26:52 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi:" 
Numbers26:53 “Lelive litakwabiwa libe lifa labo, kuye ngebunyenti balawo mabito labhalisiwe." 
Numbers26:54 Sive lesinebantfu labanyenti usabele lifa lelikhulu, sive lesinebantfu labambalwa usabele lifa lelincane. Nguleso naleso sive siyawukwabelwa lifa laso kuye ngebunyenti balawo mabito labhalwe phansi." 
Numbers26:55 Ucaphelisise kutsi lelive labiwa ngenkatho. Nguleso naleso sive siyawukwabelwa ngangekwemabito aboyisemkhulu ngekwebuve baso. 
Numbers26:56 Ngulelo nalelo lifa liyakwabiwa ngenkatho nalahlukaniselwa sive lesinyenti nalesincane.” 
Numbers26:57 Lawa-ke ngemaLevi labalwa ngetinsendvo tawo: emaGeshoni, labetalwa nguGeshoni, nemaKhohati labetalwa nguKhohati, nemaMerari labetalwa nguMerari." 
Numbers26:58 Naleti bekutinsendvo temaLevi: emaLibni, nemaHebroni, nemaMahali, nemaMushi, nemaKhora. Khohati abenguyisemkhulu wa-Amramu." 
Numbers26:59 Umka-Amramu bekunguJokhebedi, umtukulu waLevi lowatalelwa emndenini wemaLevi baseseGibhithe. Jokhebedi watalela Amramu bo-Aroni, naMosi kanye naMiriyamu, dzadzewabo." 
Numbers26:60 Aroni abenguyise waboNadabi, na-Abihu, na-Eleyazare, na-Ithamari." 
Numbers26:61 BoNadabi naAbihu ngulaba labafa ngesikhatsi banikela ngemlilo longengcwele. 
Numbers26:62 Onkhe emaLevi lamadvuna kusukela kulabenenyanga budzala kuya etulu abeti-23 000. Wona akazange abalwe kanye nema-Israyeli lamanye, ngobe wona akemukeliswanga sabelo selive." 
Numbers26:63 Tonkhe letinsendvo tabalwa nguMosi na-Eleyazare, umphristi, ngesikhatsi kubalwa ema-Israyeli ematsafeni akaMowabi, ngesheya kweJordane, malunga neJerikho." 
Numbers26:64 Kwabate ngisho yinye indvodza leyabalwa kulawa lababalwe nguMosi na-Aroni umphristi elubalweni lwekucala lolwalwentiwe eHlane laseSinayi. 
Numbers26:65 Kungobe Simakadze abetjele ema-Israyeli kutsi nakanjani atawufela ehlane, ngako kwabate nome munye lowasala ngaphandle kwaboKhalebi, umsa waJefune, naJoshuwa, umsa waNuni." 
Numbers27:1 Emadvodzakati aSelofehadi, umsa waHeferi, umsa waGileyadi, umsa waMakhire, umsa waManase, abewelusendvo lwakaManase, umsa waJosefa. Emabito alamadvodzakati bekuboMahala, naNowa, naHogila, naMilkha, naThisa. Asondzela" 
Numbers27:2 ekungeneni kwelithende lekuhlangana ema embikwaMosi, na-Eleyazare, umphristi, nebaholi besive sonkhe, atsi:" 
Numbers27:3 “Babe wetfu wafela ehlane. Abengesiye lomunye webalandzeli baKhora, labadudana ngekuhlubuka Simakadze; wafela sono sakhe, washiya kute emadvodzana." 
Numbers27:4 Pho, kwentiwa yini libito lababe lingaveli elusendvweni ngobe abete indvodzana? Sinikeni sabelo emkhatsini wetihlobo tababe.”" 
Numbers27:5 Ngako Mosi wayitsatsa lendzaba yawo wayimikisa kuSimakadze. 
Numbers27:6 Simakadze watsi kuye: 
Numbers27:7 “Kuliciniso loku lokushiwo ngemadvodzakati aSelofehadi. Kufanele uwanike sabelo sawo etihlotjeni teyise, aniketwe lifa leyise." 
Numbers27:8 Tjela ema-Israyeli utsi: ‘Nangabe indvodza ifa, ishiye kute indvodzana, imphahla nelifa layo alendluliselwe endvodzakatini yayo." 
Numbers27:9 Nangabe ite ngisho nendvodzakati, lifa layo linikeni banakabo." 
Numbers27:10 Nangabe ite banakabo, lifa layo linikeni bomnakaboyise." 
Numbers27:11 Nangabe uyise abete banakabo, lifa linikeni sihlobo lesisedvutane elusendvweni lwayo kutsi litewuba laso. Loku kufanele kube ngumtsetfo wema-Israyeli, njengobe Simakadze ayala Mosi.’ ”" 
Numbers27:12 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi: “Yenyukela eNtsabeni i-Abarimu utewubuka lelive lengiliphe ema-Israyeli." 
Numbers27:13 Utawutsi ungalibona nawe bese uya kubakini, njengemnakenu Aroni," 
Numbers27:14 ngobe ngesikhatsi bantfu bangihlubuka ngasemantini eHlane laseSini, nani nobabili nangihlubuka lapho nangete nawulalela umyalo wami, ngekunganginiki kwenu ludvumo lwekungingcwelisa embikwabo kulawo manti.” Lawo bekungemanti aseMeribha, eKhadeshi, eHlane laseSini." 
Numbers27:15 Mosi wakhuluma kuSimakadze, watsi:" 
Numbers27:16 “Shangatsi Simakadze, Nkulunkulu wemimoya yebantfu bonkhe, angabeka lenye indvodza ibe ngumholi emkhatsini walesive," 
Numbers27:17 iphume ingene embikwaso, isihole ngekusikhipha nekusingenisa, kuze sive saSimakadze singafani netimvu letingenamelusi.”" 
Numbers27:18 Ngako-ke Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi: “Tsatsa Joshuwa, umsa waNuni, indvodza lenaMoya, umbeke sandla." 
Numbers27:19 Mmise embikwa-Eleyazare, umphristi, nesive sonkhe, umbeke embikwaso." 
Numbers27:20 Mnike lamanye emagunya nemandla akho, kuze sive sonkhe sema-Israyeli sitawumlalela simhloniphe." 
Numbers27:21 Utakuma embikwa-Eleyazare, umphristi, lotamtsatsela tincumo latitfole nge-Urimu kuSimakadze. Ngekukhuluma kwakhe yena nesive sonkhe sema-Israyeli bayawuphuma baphindze bangene njengekuyala kwakhe.”" 
Numbers27:22 Mosi wenta njengobe abeyalwe nguSimakadze. Watsatsa Joshuwa, wammisa embikwa-Eleyazare, umphristi, kanye nesive sonkhe." 
Numbers27:23 Wabeka tandla takhe etikwakhe, wamnika sikhundla, njengobe Simakadze abeyale Mosi." 
Numbers28:1 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi:" 
Numbers28:2 “Yala sive sema-Israyeli utsi: ‘Caphelani kutsi niletse kimi ngesikhatsi lesimisiwe kudla lokungumnikelo wami lowentiwa ngemlilo, kube liphunga lelinuka lusi lolumnandzi kimi.’" 
Numbers28:3 Shano kubo utsi: ‘Lona ngumnikelo lowentiwa ngemlilo leniyakuwetfula kuSimakadze: emazinyane lamabili lanemnyaka munye budzala langenasiyela, kube ngumnikelo loshiswa onkhe emalanga." 
Numbers28:4 Niyawunikela linye lizinyane ekuseni, leli lelinye nilinikele nakushona lilanga," 
Numbers28:5 libe nemnikelo walokutinhlavu lokuyikhilogremu yinye yafulaha wakolo lobhicwe nemafutsa emncumo langaba yilitha yinye. 
Numbers28:6 Lona ngumnikelo loshiswa onkhe emalanga, lowamiswa entsabeni yaseSinayi kube liphunga lelinuka lusi lolumnandzi, umnikelo lowentiwa ngemlilo kuSimakadze." 
Numbers28:7 Uyawuhambisana nemnikelo wesinatfo lesingaba yilitha yinye ngelizinyane linye. Kuyawutselwa kuSimakadze umnikelo wesinatfo lesinemandla endzaweni lengcwele. 
Numbers28:8 Niyawunikela leli lelinye lizinyane nakushona lilanga kanye nemnikelo walokutinhlavu nemnikelo wesinatfo lofanana newasekuseni. Lowo-ke ngumnikelo lowentiwa ngemlilo, kube liphunga lelinuka lusi lolumnandzi kuSimakadze.’ ”" 
Numbers28:9 “ ‘Ngelilanga leliSabatha yentani umnikelo ngemazinyane lamabili lanemnyaka munye langenasiyela, niwanikele kanye nemnikelo wawo wesinatfo nemnikelo walokutinhlavu longemalitha langaba mane nencenye yafulaha lobhicwe nemafutsa." 
Numbers28:10 Lowo-ke kuyawuba ngumnikelo wekushiswa wemaSabatha onkhe ngetulu kwalona loshiswa onkhe emalanga kanye nemnikelo wawo wesinatfo.’ ” 
Numbers28:11 “ ‘Ngelilanga lekucala enyangeni niyakwetfula kuSimakadze umnikelo wekushiswa wetinkunzana letimbili, nesihhanca sinye, nemazinyane lamadvuna etimvu lasikhombisa, lanemnyaka munye budzala, nalangenasiyela." 
Numbers28:12 Inkunzana iyinye iyawuba nemnikelo walokutinhlavu longemalitha langaba sitfupha nencenye afulaha lobhicwe nemafutsa; nalesihhanca sibe nemnikelo walokutinhlavu longemalitha langaba mane nencenye yafulaha lobhicwe nemafutsa," 
Numbers28:13 lizinyane lemvu lilinye libe nemnikelo walokutinhlavu longaba yikhilogremu yafulaha lobhicwe nemafutsa. Lowo-ke ngumnikelo wekushiswa, kube liphunga lelinuka lusi lolumnandzi, umnikelo lowentiwa ngemlilo kuSimakadze." 
Numbers28:14 Inkunzana iyinye iyawuba nemnikelo wesinatfo lesingemalitha langaba mabili eliwayini, nesihhanca sibe neliwayini lelingaba yilitha nencenye; lizinyane lilinye liyawuhambisana neliwayini lelingaba yilitha. Lona-ke ngumnikelo wekushiswa lekufanele wentiwe njalo ekwetfwaseni kwenyanga." 
Numbers28:15 Ngetulu kwemnikelo wekushiswa lovamile lohambisana nemnikelo wesinatfo, imbuti yinye lendvuna kufanele inikelwe kuSimakadze ibe ngumnikelo wesono.’ ”" 
Numbers28:16 “ ‘Ngelilanga leli-14 lenyanga yekucala kuyawuba liPhasika laSimakadze. 
Numbers28:17 Ngelilanga leli-15 kulenyanga kufanele kube nesibhimbi. Niyawudla sinkhwa lesingenambiliso emalanga lasikhombisa. 
Numbers28:18 Ngelilanga lekucala niyawuba nemhlangano longcwele ningatsintsi lutfo lolungumsebenti. 
Numbers28:19 Niyakwetfula kuSimakadze umnikelo lowentiwa ngemlilo, umnikelo wekushiswa wetinkunzana letimbili, nesihhanca sinye, nemazinyane lamadvuna etimvu lasikhombisa lanemnyaka munye budzala, onkhe abe ngulangenasiyela." 
Numbers28:20 Inkunzana niyawuyilungisa kanye nemnikelo walokutinhlavu longemalitha langaba sitfupha nencenye yafulaha lobhicwe nemafutsa; lesihhanca sibe nemalitha langaba mane nencenye; 
Numbers28:21 lilinye lizinyane kulawa lasikhombisa kube ngemalitha langaba mabili. 
Numbers28:22 Niyakwengeta nangembuti yinye lendvuna kube ngumnikelo wesono lotanentela inhlawulo yekubuyisana kuSimakadze. 
Numbers28:23 Loko nikwente ngetulu kwaleminikelo yekushiswa leyentiwa njalo nje ekuseni. 
Numbers28:24 Ngaleyo ndlela niyakwenta umnikelo wekudla lowentiwa ngemlilo onkhe emalanga, kuze kuphelele lamalanga lasikhombisa, kube liphunga lelinuka lusi lolumnandzi kuSimakadze. Uyakwengetelwa ngetulu kwalomnikelo wekushiswa lowentiwa onkhe emalanga kanye nemnikelo wawo wesinatfo." 
Numbers28:25 Ngelilanga lesikhombisa niyawuba nemhlangano longcwele ningatsintsi lutfo lolungumsebenti.’ ” 
Numbers28:26 “ ‘Ngelilanga letitselo tekucala ekuvuneni, ngeMkhosi Wekuvuna, nanetfula kuSimakadze umnikelo walokutinhlavu letinsha, niyawuba nemhlangano longcwele ningatsintsi lutfo lolungumsebenti." 
Numbers28:27 Niyakwetfula umnikelo wekushiswa wetinkunzana letimbili, nesihhanca sinye, nemazinyane lamadvuna etimvu lasikhombisa lanemnyaka munye budzala, kube liphunga lelinuka lusi lolumnandzi kuSimakadze." 
Numbers28:28 Inkunzana iyinye kufanele ibe nemnikelo walokutinhlavu longemalitha langaba sitfupha nencenye afulaha lobhicwe nemafutsa; lesihhanca sibe nemalitha langaba mane nencenye," 
Numbers28:29 lilinye lizinyane kulawa lasikhombisa kufanele libe nemalitha langaba mabili. 
Numbers28:30 Niyakwengeta nangembuti yinye lendvuna lekunguyona iyawunentela inhlawulo yekubuyisana kuSimakadze. 
Numbers28:31 Leyo-ke niyawuyenta kanye neminikelo yayo yesinatfo, ngetulu kwalena leshiswa onkhe emalanga neminikelo yayo yalokutinhlavu. Nicaphelisise kutsi letifuyo atinasiyela ngempela yini.’ ”" 
Numbers29:1 “ ‘Ngelilanga lekucala lenyanga yesikhombisa niyawuba nemhlangano longcwele, ningatsintsi lutfo lolungumsebenti. Lilanga lenu lekushaya emacilongo." 
Numbers29:2 Niyakwenta umnikelo wekushiswa ngenkunzana yinye nesihhanca sinye, nemazinyane etimvu lamadvuna lasikhombisa, lanemnyaka munye budzala, nalangenasiyela. Loko-ke liphunga lelinuka lusi lolumnandzi kuSimakadze." 
Numbers29:3 Lenkunzana niyawuyinikela kanye nemnikelo walokutinhlavu lokungemalitha langaba sitfupha nencenye afulaha lobhicwe nemafutsa; lesihhanca sibe nemalitha langaba mane nencenye; 
Numbers29:4 lizinyane lilinye kulawa lasikhombisa libe nemalitha langaba mabili. 
Numbers29:5 Niyakwengeta nangembuti yinye lendvuna kube ngumnikelo wesono lotanentela inhlawulo yekubuyisana kuSimakadze. 
Numbers29:6 Lena-ke ngulengetulu kwaleminikelo leshiswa ekucaleni kwenyanga, kanye neminikelo leshiswa onkhe emalanga kanye neminikelo yayo yalokutinhlavu neyesinatfo, njengobe kubalelwe. Ngiminikelo leyentiwa kuSimakadze ngemlilo, liphunga lelinuka lusi lolumnandzi.’ ”" 
Numbers29:7 “ ‘Ngelilanga lelishumi lalenyanga yesikhombisa niyawuba nemhlangano longcwele; ningadli, ningasebenti." 
Numbers29:8 Niyakwetfula umnikelo wekushiswa ngenkunzana, nesihhanca, nemazinyane etimvu lamadvuna lasikhombisa lanemnyaka munye budzala, onkhe abete siyela, kube liphunga lelinuka lusi lolumnandzi kuSimakadze." 
Numbers29:9 Lenkunzana niyawuyetfula kanye nemnikelo walokutinhlavu lokungemalitha langaba sitfupha nencenye afulaha lobhicwe nemafutsa, lesihhanca sibe nemalitha langaba mane nencenye;" 
Numbers29:10 linye lizinyane kulawa lasikhombisa libe nemalitha langaba mabili. 
Numbers29:11 Nengete nangembuti yinye lendvuna lengumnikelo wesono, ngetulu kwalomnikelo wesono wekwenta inhlawulo yekubuyisana kuSimakadze, nalomnikelo wemalanga onkhe wekushiswa kanye nemnikelo wawo walokutinhlavu, neminikelo yayo yesinatfo.’ ”" 
Numbers29:12 “ ‘Ngelilanga leli-15 lenyanga yesikhombisa niyawuba nemhlangano longcwele, ningatsintsi lutfo lolungumsebenti. Niyakwenta lomkhosi kuSimakadze emalanga lasikhombisa." 
Numbers29:13 Niyakwetfula kuSimakadze umnikelo lowentiwa ngemlilo, kube liphunga lelinuka lusi lolumnandzi kuSimakadze, umnikelo wekushiswa wetinkunzana letili-13, netihhanca letimbili, nemazinyane lamadvuna lali-14 etimvu lanemnyaka munye budzala, onkhe angabi nasiyela." 
Numbers29:14 Iyinye inkunzana kuleti letili-13 niyente kanye nemnikelo walokutinhlavu lokungemalitha langaba sitfupha nencenye afulaha lobhicwe nemafutsa; sisinye sihhanca kuleti letimbili sibe nemalitha langaba mane nencenye; 
Numbers29:15 lilinye lizinyane kulawa lali-14 libe nemalitha langaba mabili. 
Numbers29:16 Niyakwengeta ngembuti yinye lendvuna lengumnikelo wesono, ngetulu kwalomnikelo wekushiswa lowentiwa onkhe emalanga kanye nemnikelo wawo walokutinhlavu newesinatfo." 
Numbers29:17 “ ‘Ngelilanga lesibili niyawulungisa tinkunzana letili-12, netihhanca letimbili, nemazinyane lamadvuna etimvu lali-14 lanemnyaka munye budzala, onkhe abe ngulangenasiyela." 
Numbers29:18 Letinkunzana, naletihhanca, nalamazinyane nibokwentela iminikelo yako yalokutinhlavu neyesinatfo, njengobe kubalelwe." 
Numbers29:19 Nibengeta nangembuti lendvuna ibe ngumnikelo wesono ngetulu kwalomnikelo wekushiswa lowentiwa onkhe emalanga kanye nemnikelo wawo walokutinhlavu kanye neminikelo yesinatfo yayo. 
Numbers29:20 “ ‘Ngelilanga lesitsatfu niyawulungisa tinkunzi letili-11, netihhanca letimbili, nemazinyane lamadvuna etimvu lali-14, lanemnyaka munye budzala, onkhe angabi nasiyela." 
Numbers29:21 Letinkunzi, naletihhanca, nalamazinyane nibotilungisela kanye neminikelo yako yalokutinhlavu neyesinatfo, njengobe kubalelwe." 
Numbers29:22 Nibengeta nangembuti lendvuna lengumnikelo wesono ngetulu kwalomnikelo wekushiswa lowentiwa onkhe emalanga kanye nemnikelo wawo walokutinhlavu newesinatfo. 
Numbers29:23 “ ‘Ngelilanga lesine niyawulungisa tinkunzi letilishumi, netihhanca letimbili, nemazinyane lamadvuna etimvu lali-14 lanemnyaka munye budzala, onkhe angabi nasiyela." 
Numbers29:24 Letinkunzi, naletihhanca, nalamazinyane, niyakukulungisa kanye neminikelo yako yalokutinhlavu neyesinatfo, njengobe kubalelwe." 
Numbers29:25 Nibengeta ngembuti yinye lendvuna ibe ngumnikelo wesono ngetulu kwalomnikelo wekushiswa lowentiwa onkhe emalanga kanye nemnikelo wawo walokutinhlavu newesinatfo. 
Numbers29:26 “ ‘Ngelilanga lesihlanu niyakulungisa tinkunzi letiyimfica, netihhanca letimbili, nemazinyane lamadvuna etimvu lali-14 lanemnyaka munye budzala, onkhe angabi nasiyela." 
Numbers29:27 Letinkunzi, naletihhanca, nalamazinyane, niyakukulungisa kanye neminikelo yako yalokutinhlavu neyesinatfo njengobe kubalelwe." 
Numbers29:28 Nibengeta ngembuti yinye lendvuna ibe ngumnikelo wesono ngetulu kwalomnikelo wekushiswa lowentiwa onkhe emalanga nemnikelo wawo walokutinhlavu newesinatfo. 
Numbers29:29 “ ‘Ngelilanga lesitfupha niyakulungisa tinkunzi letisiphohlongo, netihhanca letimbili, nemazinyane lamadvuna etimvu lali-14 lanemnyaka munye budzala, onkhe angabi nasiyela." 
Numbers29:30 Letinkunzi, naletihhanca, nalamazinyane, niyakukulungisa kanye neminikelo yako yalokutinhlavu neyesinatfo, njengobe kubalelwe." 
Numbers29:31 Nibengeta ngembuti yinye lendvuna ibe ngumnikelo wesono ngetulu kwalomnikelo wekushiswa lowentiwa onkhe emalanga neminikelo wawo walokutinhlavu newesinatfo. 
Numbers29:32 “ ‘Ngelilanga lesikhombisa niyawulungisa tinkunzi letisikhombisa, netihhanca letimbili, nemazinyane lamadvuna etimvu lali-14 lanemnyaka munye budzala, onkhe angabi nasiyela." 
Numbers29:33 Letinkunzi, naletihhanca, nalamazinyane niyakulungisa kanye neminikelo yako yalokutinhlavu neyesinatfo, njengobe kubalelwe." 
Numbers29:34 Nibengeta ngembuti yinye lendvuna kube ngumnikelo wesono, ngetulu kwalomnikelo wekushiswa lowentiwa onkhe emalanga nemnikelo wawo walokutinhlavu newesinatfo." 
Numbers29:35 “ ‘Ngelilanga lesiphohlongo niyawuba nemhlangano longcwele; ningatsintsi lutfo lolungumsebenti. 
Numbers29:36 Niyakwetfula umnikelo lowentiwa ngemlilo, kube liphunga lelinuka lusi lolumnandzi kuSimakadze, umnikelo wekushiswa wenkunzi yinye, nesihhanca sinye, nemazinyane lamadvuna etimvu lasikhombisa lanemnyaka munye budzala, onkhe angabi nasiyela." 
Numbers29:37 Lenkunzi, nalesihhanca, nalamazinyane lasikhombisa niyakulungisela iminikelo yako yalokutinhlavu neyesinatfo, njengobe kubalelwe." 
Numbers29:38 Nibengeta ngembuti yinye lendvuna kube ngumnikelo wesono, ngetulu kwalomnikelo wekushiswa lowentiwa onkhe emalanga nemnikelo wawo walokutinhlavu newesinatfo." 
Numbers29:39 “ ‘Ngetulu kweminikelo yenu yesetsembiso neyesihle, niyakwentela Simakadze ngetikhatsi temikhosi yenu leminikelo lelandzelako: iminikelo yenu yekushiswa, neminikelo yenu yalokutinhlavu, neminikelo yenu yesinatfo kanye neminikelo yenu yekuthula.’ ”" 
Numbers29:40 Mosi wawatjela ema-Israyeli konkhe loko Simakadze abemtfume kona. 
Numbers30:1 Mosi wakhuluma nebaholi betive tema-Israyeli, watsi: “Nankhu umyalo waSimakadze:" 
Numbers30:2 Nangabe umuntfu enta sincumo kuSimakadze nome ente sifungo sekutibopha ngesetsembiso, kufanele angawephuli emavi akhe, kodvwa ente konkhe lakukhulumile." 
Numbers30:3 “Nangabe intfombi lesesekhaya leyise yenta sincumo kuSimakadze nome yatibopha ngesetsembiso," 
Numbers30:4 uyise ayive nayenta lesincumo nome lesetsembiso, kodvwa angete asho lutfo kuyo, tonkhe tincumo tayo netetsembiso tayo tiyawukuma." 
Numbers30:5 Kodvwa nangabe uyise ayalela ngesikhatsi asasiva lesincumo sayo isisho, leso sincumo sayo nome setsembiso sayo letibophe ngaso ngeke sime; Simakadze uyakuyikhulula, ngobe yalelwe nguyise." 
Numbers30:6 “Nangabe intfombi yenta sincumo isengakashadi, nome isente ngekusheshisa nome ngemabomu, nome yetsembisa kungatenti letinye tintfo, bese iyashada," 
Numbers30:7 indvodza yayo ikuve loko kodvwa ingasho lutfo, tincumo tayo netetsembiso tayo titawukuma." 
Numbers30:8 Kodvwa nangabe indvodza yayo iyalela kutsi ifeze leso sincumo sayo nayitjelwa ngaso, akukabhekeki kutsi lentfombi isifeze. Simakadze uyakuyikhulula." 
Numbers30:9 “Umfelokati nome umfati lowehlukene nendvodza yakhe kufanele afeze tonkhe tincumo takhe latentile, nako konkhe kwetsembisa kwakhe kuyawuba sibopho kuye." 
Numbers30:10 “Nangabe umfati lohlala nendvodza yakhe enta sincumo nome sifungo atibophe ngesetsembiso ngekufunga," 
Numbers30:11 indvodza yakhe imuve nakasenta ingasho lutfo kuye, ingete yamalela, leso sincumo sakhe nesetsembiso sakhe latibophe ngaso siyawukuma sinjalo." 
Numbers30:12 Kodvwa nangabe indvodza yakhe imalela kutsi atifeze leto tetsembiso netincumo takhe ngesikhatsi iva ngato, leto tetsembiso netincumo takhe latishito ngemlomo wakhe atiyikuma. Indvodza yakhe itawube itente lite, Simakadze uyakumkhulula kuto." 
Numbers30:13 Indvodza yemfati iyawutinyembenya nome iticinise tincumo temfati wayo latentile nome-ke ngusiphi sifungo lasentile kutsi angatenti tintfo letitsite. 
Numbers30:14 Kodvwa nangabe indvodza yakhe ingasho lutfo kuye ngaso emalanga ngemalanga, kusho kutsi iyavumelana nesincumo nome setsembiso latibophe ngaso. Iyavuma ngekuthula ingasho lutfo ngato kuye nayitjelwa ngato." 
Numbers30:15 Kodvwa nangabe seyiphikisana nato emvakwesikhatsi seyitjeliwe ngato, ngiyo leyakwetfwala lelo cala lalomfati wayo.”" 
Numbers30:16 Lena-ke ngimiyalo Simakadze layiniketa Mosi macondzana nebudlelwane emkhatsini wendvodza nemfati wayo, nasemkhatsini weyise nentfombi yakakhe lesengakendzi." 
Numbers31:1 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi:" 
Numbers31:2 “Khiphela sive saka-Israyeli sibhongo esiveni sakaMidiyani, bese-ke uyafa.”" 
Numbers31:3 Ngako Mosi wakhuluma esiveni saka-Israyeli, watsi: “Hlomisani lamanye emadvodza emkhatsini wenu atilungiselele kulwa nemaMidiyani, alungele kuchuba imphindziselo yaSimakadze kubo." 
Numbers31:4 Tfumelani libutfo leliyinkhulungwane yemadvodza kuleso nakuleso sive saka-Israyeli.” 
Numbers31:5 Ngako kwaphuma emadvodza labeti-12 000, labehlomele kulwa imphi, kuleso nakuleso sive ka-Israyeli kwaphuma inkhulungwane yinye." 
Numbers31:6 Mosi wabatfumela emphini. Kwaphuma inkhulungwane esiveni sisinye, wabakhipha naFinehasi, umsa wa-Eleyazare, umphristi. Yena-ke watsatsa tintfo endzaweni lengcwele, watsatsa nemacilongo lababetawukhombisa ngawo indlela." 
Numbers31:7 EmaMidiyani bawahlasela bawashaya bawacotfula onkhe emadvodza, njengekusho kwaSimakadze kuMosi." 
Numbers31:8 Babulala ngisho nemakhosi lasihlanu akaMidiyani, bo-Evi, naRekhemu, naSuri, naHure, naReba. Babulala ngisho naBhalamu, umsa waBheyori, ngelusiko lwenkemba." 
Numbers31:9 Ema-Israyeli ahlasela emaMidiyani atfumba bafati bawo kanye nebantfwana, nemfuyo yawo yonkhe, nekudla kwawo, nato tonkhe timphahla." 
Numbers31:10 Bashisa onkhe emadolobha, lapho bekuhlala khona emaMidiyani, bashisa netinkambu tawo." 
Numbers31:11 Batfumba tonkhe timphahla tekwembatsa, nekudla, nebantfu, netifuyo." 
Numbers31:12 Baletsa imphango nebatfunjwa kuMosi na-Eleyazare, umphristi, nakulo lonkhe libandla lema-Israyeli enkambu yabo ematsafeni akaMowabi, edvute nemfula iJordane macondzana neJerikho." 
Numbers31:13 BoMosi na-Eleyazare, umphristi, nebaholi besive bahamba bayawubahlangabeta ngephandle kwenkambu." 
Numbers31:14 Mosi wabatfukutselela labaholi bemphi, baholi betinkhulungwane nebemakhulu labancandzeka emphini." 
Numbers31:15 Wababuta watsi: “Nibayekele bonkhe yini labasikati nangete nababulala? 
Numbers31:16 Ngibo laba labalandzela teluleko taBhalamu, bekungubona bashushisi labebacondze kwedukisa ema-Israyeli kutsi ahlubuke kuSimakadze kulentfo leyenteka ePheyori, kuze lulaka lwehlele sive saSimakadze." 
Numbers31:17 Bulalani bonkhe bafana, nibulale bonkhe labasikati labake balala nemuntfu lomdvuna," 
Numbers31:18 kodvwa nitishiyele tonkhe tintfombi letingazange setilale nemuntfu lomdvuna. 
Numbers31:19 “Nonkhe nine lenibulele umuntfu nome lenitsintse sidvumbu nifanele nihlale ngephandle kwenkambu, kuze kuphele emalanga lasikhombisa. Ngelilanga lesitsatfu nelesikhombisa kufanele nitihlambulule kanye nalabo lenibatfumbile." 
Numbers31:20 Niyawuhlanta tonkhe timphahla tekwembatsa nako konkhe lokwentiwe ngesikhumba, nome ngeboya betimbuti nome yini lokubatiwe.”" 
Numbers31:21 Eleyazare, umphristi, wakhuluma kulamabutfo labebuya emphini, watsi: “Loko ngulokufunwa ngumtsetfo Simakadze lawunika Mosi:" 
Numbers31:22 Igolide, nesiliva, nelitfusi, nensimbi, nemfimfi, nemtfofu," 
Numbers31:23 nako konkhe lokungamelana nemlilo kufanele kufakwe emlilweni, khona kutewuhlanteka. Kodvwa nako kuyadzinga kutsi kuhlanjululwe ngemanti enhlambuluko. Konkhe lokungasha emlilweni kufanele kufakwe kulawo manti ekuhlambulula." 
Numbers31:24 Ngelilanga lesikhombisa niyawugeza timphahla tenu, bese niba ngulabahlambululekile. Emvakwaloko-ke seningangena enkambu.”" 
Numbers31:25 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi:" 
Numbers31:26 “Wena na-Eleyazare, umphristi, nebaholi bemindeni yesive kufanele nibale bonkhe labantfu nalemfuyo letfunjiwe." 
Numbers31:27 Lemphango niyawuyehlukanisa nabele onkhe emabutfo labehlanganyele emphini naso sonkhe-ke sive. 
Numbers31:28 Kulamabutfo labekayile emphini niyakwehlukanisela Simakadze kube kunye lokusibongo senu emakhulwini lasihlanu: ebantfu, newetinkhomo, newetimbongolo, newetimvu, kanye newetimbuti." 
Numbers31:29 Niyawutsatsa lesibongo encenyeni yabo nisinike Eleyazare, umphristi, sibe sabelo saSimakadze." 
Numbers31:30 Encenyeni yema-Israyeli niyakwehlukanisa kunye emashumini lasihlanu: ebantfu, newetinkhomo, newetimbongolo, newetimvu, newetimbuti, nome-ke aletinye nje tilwane. Niyakukunika emaLevi lekunguwona anakekela tintfo tasendzaweni lengcwelengcwele.”" 
Numbers31:31 Ngako boMosi na-Eleyazare, umphristi, benta njengobe Simakadze abeyale Mosi." 
Numbers31:32 Imphango leyasala kuloko lokwakutfunjiwe leyatsatfwa ngemabutfo kwaba timvu letiti-675 000," 
Numbers31:33 netinkhomo letiti-72 000," 
Numbers31:34 netimbongolo letiti-61 000," 
Numbers31:35 netintfombi letiti-32 000 letatingazange setilale nemuntfu lomdvuna. 
Numbers31:36 Incenye yeliphakelo lalamabutfo labekaye emphini kwaba timvu letiti-337 500," 
Numbers31:37 sabelo saSimakadze saba timvu letingema-675; 
Numbers31:38 tinkhomo taba ti-36 000, sabelo saSimakadze saba tinkhomo letatingema-72;" 
Numbers31:39 timbongolo taba ti-30 500, sabelo saSimakadze saba timbongolo letatingema-61;" 
Numbers31:40 bantfu baba ti-16 000, sabelo saSimakadze saba ngema-32 ebantfu." 
Numbers31:41 Mosi waniketa Eleyazare lesibongo lebesisabelo saSimakadze, njengobe Mosi abeyalwe nguSimakadze." 
Numbers31:42 Lencenye leyayingeyema-Israyeli Mosi labeyehlukanise kulena yemabutfo," 
Numbers31:43 lena yesive yaba timvu letiti-337 500; 
Numbers31:44 netinkhomo letiti-36 000," 
Numbers31:45 netimbongolo letiti-30 500; 
Numbers31:46 nebantfu labati-16 000. 
Numbers31:47 Kulencenye yesive Mosi wehlukanisa kunye kuwo onkhe ema-50 ebantfu newetilwane, njengobe Simakadze abemyalile; wakuniketa emaLevi labenguwona anakekela indzawo lengcwelengcwele yaSimakadze." 
Numbers31:48 Baholi lababehola emabutfo emphi, labo labebahola tinkhulungwane nemakhulu, baya kuMosi," 
Numbers31:49 bafike batsi: “Tinceku takho setiwabalile emabutfo letiwaholako, kute nalinye lelilahlekile." 
Numbers31:50 Ngako sesiletse umnikelo kuSimakadze, tintfo tegolide lesititfumbile: emabhengela, nemigaco, netindandatho letitimphawu, nemacici, netingcibe. Sitetentela inhlawulo yetfu yekubuyisana kuSimakadze.”" 
Numbers31:51 BoMosi na-Eleyazare, umphristi, batemukela letintfo tegolide nato tonkhe tintfo tebuchwephesha." 
Numbers31:52 Yonkhe igolide leyaletfwa baholi betinkhulungwane nebemakhulu, leyemukelwa boMosi na-Eleyazare bayetfula kuSimakadze yayinesisindvo lesasingemakhilogremu labengaba li-190." 
Numbers31:53 Ngulelo nalelo butfo latitsatsela sabelo salo emphangweni. 
Numbers31:54 BoMosi na-Eleyazare, umphristi, bayemukela legolide kulabaholi betinkhulungwane nebemakhulu, bayimikisa ethendeni lekuhlangana, kwaba sikhumbuto sema-Israyeli embikwaSimakadze." 
Numbers32:1 EmaRubeni nemaGadi labenemihlambi lemikhulu yetinkhomo, netimvu, netimbuti abona ematsafa aseJazeri naseGileyadi kutsi abelungele kuba ngemadlelo." 
Numbers32:2 Ngako baya kuboMosi na-Eleyazare, umphristi, kanye nebaholi besive, bafike batsi:" 
Numbers32:3 “I-Atharothe, neDiboni, neJazeri, neNimra, neHeshboni, ne-Eleyale, neSebamu, neNebo, kanye neBheyoni," 
Numbers32:4 live Simakadze lalincoba walinika sive sema-Israyeli, lilungele kuba ngemadlelo, kantsi tinceku takho tinemihlambi yetifuyo.”" 
Numbers32:5 Bachubeka batsi: “Nangabe sizuze umusa emehlweni enu, lelive alabelwe tinceku tenu kube sabelo sato. Ningaseweti umfula iJordane.”" 
Numbers32:6 Mosi waphendvula lamaGadi nemaRubeni, watsi: “Nisho kutsi nine ningasala lapha, abe emabutfo akini lenishuca nawo ayekulwa imphi?" 
Numbers32:7 Niwacedzelani emandla ema-Israyeli kutsi angeweleli ngesheya eveni Simakadze lawaphe lona? 
Numbers32:8 Naboyihlo benta njalo, nangibatfuma eKhadeshi Bhaneya kutsi bayewuhlola live." 
Numbers32:9 Ngemva kwekwewelela eSihosheni sase-Eshikholi kuyewubuka live, bawacedza emandla ema-Israyeli kutsi angangeni eveni Simakadze lawaphe lona." 
Numbers32:10 Ngalelo langa intfukutselo yaSimakadze yavutsa, waze wafunga watsi:" 
Numbers32:11 ‘Njengobe bangazange bangilandzele ngenhlitiyo yonkhe, kute namunye wemadvodza, kusukela kulaneminyaka lengema-20 kuya etulu, laphuma eGibhithe layawulibona lelive lengaletsembisa ngekufunga ku-Abrahama, na-Isaka, naJakobe;" 
Numbers32:12 kute namunye ngaphandle kwaKhalebi, umsa waJefune, umKhenizi, naJoshuwa, umsa waNuni, ngobe bona baphikelela balandzela Simakadze ngayo yonkhe inhlitiyo yabo.’" 
Numbers32:13 Intfukutselo yaSimakadze yavutsela sive sema-Israyeli, wasenta sazulazula ehlane iminyaka lengema-40, saze safa saphela sonkhe leso situkulwane lesasente lokubi embikwaSimakadze." 
Numbers32:14 “Nani-ke, ntalelwane yetoni, nime kuleyo ndzawo yaboyihlo, nentela kutsi Simakadze asitfukutselele kakhulu kunakucala sive sema-Israyeli." 
Numbers32:15 Nanijika ningamlandzeli, utawuphindze asishiye sonkhe futsi lesive ehlane, nine-ke nitawuba sisusa sekubhujiswa kwaso.”" 
Numbers32:16 Beta kuye, bafike batsi: “Sifuna kwakhela tifuyo tetfu tibaya, sakhe nemadolobha lapha, kuze kutewuhlala khona bafati betfu nebantfwabetfu." 
Numbers32:17 Kodvwa tsine silungele kutsi sihlome sihambe embili kwema-Israyeli, size siwafikise eveni lawo. Ngaleso sikhatsi bafati betfu nebantfwabetfu batawube bahleti emadolobheni lavikelekile, kuze bavikeleke baphephe kulabantfu balelive." 
Numbers32:18 Singeke sibuyele emakhaya etfu, sive sema-Israyeli singakatfoli sabelo saso." 
Numbers32:19 Singeke semukele lifa kanye naso ngesheya kweJordane, ngobe phela tsine lifa letfu sesilemukele ngalapha ngasemphumalanga kweJordane.”" 
Numbers32:20 Mosi wakhuluma kubo, watsi: “Nangabe nitawukwenta loko, nihlomele imphi embikwaSimakadze," 
Numbers32:21 nangabe nonkhe nitawuhloma newelele ngesheya kweJordane embikwaSimakadze, aze aticoshe tonkhe titsa takhe embikwakhe," 
Numbers32:22 litawutsi lelive lingatfunjwa embikwaSimakadze, bese niyancandzeka nikhululeke kulesibopho senu naSimakadze nasesiveni sonkhe sema-Israyeli. Lelive-ke seliyawuba sabelo senu embikwaSimakadze." 
Numbers32:23 Kodvwa naningakwenti loko, niyona kuSimakadze, futsi-ke nibociniseka-ke kutsi salakutjelwa sibona ngemopho." 
Numbers32:24 Bafati benu nebantfwabenu bakheleni emadolobha, netifuyo tenu nitakhele tibaya; kodvwa nibokwenta loko lenikwetsembisile.”" 
Numbers32:25 EmaGadi nemaRubeni akhuluma kuMosi, atsi: “Tsine, tinceku takho, sitakwenta njengekusho kwenkhosi yetfu." 
Numbers32:26 Bantfwabetfu, nebafati betfu, nemihlambi yetifuyo tetfu kutawusala kulamadolobha aleli lakaGileyadi." 
Numbers32:27 Kodvwa tinceku takho, onkhe emadvodza lahlomele kuyakulwa emphini, atakwewela ayekulwa embikwaSimakadze, njengobe inkhosi yetfu isho.”" 
Numbers32:28 Ngako-ke Mosi wanika imiyalo ngabo ku-Eleyazare, umphristi, nakuJoshuwa, umsa waNuni, nakubaholi betive tema-Israyeli." 
Numbers32:29 Wakhuluma watsi kubo: “Nangabe emaGadi nemaRubeni, onkhe emadvodza lahlomele imphi, ewelela nani ngesheya kweJordane embikwaSimakadze, nitawutsi lelive nase nilitfumbile, bese nibanika live lakaGileyadi kutsi libe labo." 
Numbers32:30 Kodvwa nabangaweli kanye nani bahlomile, kufanele bemukele sabelo sabo kanye nani eKhenani.”" 
Numbers32:31 EmaGadi nemaRubeni aphendvula atsi: “Tinceku takho titakwenta njengobe Simakadze ashito. 
Numbers32:32 Sitakwewela sihlomile embikwaSimakadze siye eKhenani, kodvwa live lelilifa letfu lesilidlile litawuba mshiya ngalo kweJordane.”" 
Numbers32:33 Ngako-ke Mosi emaGadi nemaRubeni nencenye yesive sakaManase, umsa waJosefa, wawabela live lembuso wakaSihoni, inkhosi yema-Amori, nelaka-Ogi, inkhosi yaseBhashani, lonkhe lelo live nemadolobha alo nemave lakhelene nalo." 
Numbers32:34 EmaGadi akha emadolobha iDiboni ne-Atharothe, ne-Aroyeri," 
Numbers32:35 ne-Atrothe Shofani, neJazeri, neJogbeha," 
Numbers32:36 neBhethi Nimra, neBhethi Haramu, aba ngemadolobha lavikelekile, akha netibaya temihlambi yawo." 
Numbers32:37 EmaRubeni akha emadolobha iHeshboni, ne-Eleyale, neKhiriyathayimu," 
Numbers32:38 kanye neNebo, neBhali Meyoni, lawo magama aguculwa, neSibima. Bawetsa emabito lamasha lamadolobha labawakha kabusha." 
Numbers32:39 Titukulwane takaMakhire, umsa waManase, tahamba taya kaGileyadi, talihlasela, talidla, tawacosha onkhe ema-Amori labekalapho." 
Numbers32:40 Ngako-ke live lakaGileyadi Mosi waliniketa emaMakhire, titukulwane takaManase, akha khona lapho." 
Numbers32:41 Jayire, umtukulu waManase, watfumba takhiwo tabo, watetsa libito watsi ngemaHavothi Jayire." 
Numbers32:42 Kwatsi Noba yena watfumba iKhenathi kanye netabelo letatitungelete lelo dolobha, watetsa ngelibito lakhe watsi yiNoba." 
Numbers33:1 Leti-ke tigaba teluhambo lwesive sema-Israyeli, nasiphuma eGibhithe ngetive taso ngaphansi kwesandla saboMosi na-Aroni." 
Numbers33:2 Ngekuyala kwaSimakadze Mosi wabhala onkhe emabito etindzawo lapho babefike bemise khona. Nalu-ke luhambo lwaso ngetigaba talo: 
Numbers33:3 Sive sema-Israyeli sesuka eRamsesi ngelilanga leli-15 lenyanga yekucala emnyakeni, lilanga lelilandzela liPhasika, ngenyanga yekucala. Baphuma ngesibindzi nangetigi emehlweni awo onkhe emaGibhithe abuka." 
Numbers33:4 EmaGibhithe abengcwaba ematubulo awo onkhe labeshaywe nguSimakadze emkhatsini wawo; ngobe Simakadze abebehlulele bonkhe bonkulunkulu bawo. 
Numbers33:5 Ema-Israyeli esuka eRamsesi emisa eSukhothi. 
Numbers33:6 Esuka eSukhothi ayawumisa e-Ethamu, emnyeleni welihlane." 
Numbers33:7 Esuka e-Ethamu ancandzeka aya ePhi Hahirothi, ngasemphumalanga kweBhali Sefoni, emisa embikweMigdoli." 
Numbers33:8 Esuka ePhi Hahirothi, adzabula lwandle ekhatsi ewelela ehlane, atsi kube ahambe emalanga lamatsatfu eHlane lase-Ethamu, emisa eMara." 
Numbers33:9 Esuka eMara aya e-Elimu, lapho bekunemitfombo leli-12 netihlahla temasundvu letatingema-70, emisa khona lapho." 
Numbers33:10 Esuka e-Elimu emisa ngaseLwandle Lolubovu. 
Numbers33:11 Esuka ngaseLwandle Lolubovu emisa eHlane laseSini. 
Numbers33:12 Esuka eHlane laseSini emisa eDofkha. 
Numbers33:13 Esuka eDofkha emisa e-Alushi. 
Numbers33:14 Esuka e-Alushi emisa eRefidimu, lapho kwakute khona emanti ekunatfwa bantfu." 
Numbers33:15 Esuka eRefidimu emisa eHlane laseSinayi. 
Numbers33:16 Esuka eHlane laseSinayi emisa eKhibrothi Hathava. 
Numbers33:17 Esuka eKhibrothi Hathava emisa eHaserothi. 
Numbers33:18 Esuka eHaserothi emisa eRitma. 
Numbers33:19 Esuka eRitma emisa eRimoni Pheresi. 
Numbers33:20 Esuka eRimoni Pheresi emisa eLibna. 
Numbers33:21 Esuka eLibna emisa eRisa. 
Numbers33:22 Esuka eRisa emisa eKhehelatha. 
Numbers33:23 Esuka eKhehelatha emisa eNtsabeni iSheferi. 
Numbers33:24 Esuka eNtsabeni iSheferi emisa eHarada. 
Numbers33:25 Esuka eHarada emisa eMakhelothi. 
Numbers33:26 Esuka eMakhelothi emisa eThahathi. 
Numbers33:27 Esuka eThahathi emisa eThera. 
Numbers33:28 Esuka eThera emisa eMithka. 
Numbers33:29 Esuka eMithka emisa eHashmona. 
Numbers33:30 Esuka eHashmona emisa eMoserothi. 
Numbers33:31 Esuka eMoserothi emisa eBhene Jakani. 
Numbers33:32 Esuka eBhene Jakani emisa eHori Hagidigadi. 
Numbers33:33 Esuka eHori Hagidigadi emisa eJotbatha. 
Numbers33:34 Esuka eJotbatha emisa e-Abrona. 
Numbers33:35 Esuka e-Abrona emisa e-Esiyoni Geberi. 
Numbers33:36 Esuka e-Esiyoni Geberi emisa eKhadeshi, eHlane laseSini." 
Numbers33:37 Esuka eKhadeshi emisa eNtsabeni iHori, emnyeleni we-Edomu." 
Numbers33:38 Ngekuyala kwaSimakadze Aroni, umphristi, wenyukela eNtsabeni iHori, lapho wafike wafela khona ngelilanga lekucala enyangeni yesihlanu ngemnyaka wema-40 ema-Israyeli aphuma eGibhithe." 
Numbers33:39 Aroni abesaneminyaka leli-123 budzala ngesikhatsi afela eNtsabeni iHori. 
Numbers33:40 Inkhosi yase-Aradi leyayingumKhenani, ihlala eningizimu nelive laseKhenani, yeva kutsi sive sema-Israyeli siyeta." 
Numbers33:41 Ema-Israyeli esuka eNtsabeni iHori emisa eSalmona. 
Numbers33:42 Esuka eSalmona emisa ePhunoni. 
Numbers33:43 Esuka ePhunoni emisa e-Obothi. 
Numbers33:44 Esuka e-Obothi emisa e-Iye Abarimu, emnyeleni wakaMowabi." 
Numbers33:45 Esuka e-Iyimu emisa eDiboni Gadi. 
Numbers33:46 Esuka eDiboni Gadi emisa e-Alimoni Diblathayimu. 
Numbers33:47 Esuka e-Alimoni Diblathayimu emisa etintsabeni tase-Abarimu, edvute neNebo." 
Numbers33:48 Esuka etintsabeni tase-Abarimu, emisa ematsafeni akaMowabi, edvute nemfula iJordane malungana neJerikho." 
Numbers33:49 Ematsafeni akaMowabi emisa edvute nemfula iJordane kusuka eBhethi Jeshimothi kuya e-Abela Shithimu. 
Numbers33:50 Ematsafeni akaMowabi edvute nemfula iJordane malungana neJerikho, Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi watsi:" 
Numbers33:51 “Khuluma kuma-Israyeli utsi: ‘Nanewela iJordane ningena eKhenani," 
Numbers33:52 niboticosha nitikhiphe tonkhe letive lenitatikhandza khona. Nibotibhubhisa tonkhe letitfombe tato, netithico tato letibatiwe kanye netindzawo tato letiphakeme tekukhontela." 
Numbers33:53 Lelive nibolidla libe lenu nihlale kulo, ngobe nginiphe lona kutsi libe lenu." 
Numbers33:54 Lelive nibolabelana ngenkatho kulolo nakulolo lusendvo. Sive lesinebantfu labanyenti nibabele lifa lelikhulu, kanjalo nakulabo labasive lesincane nibabele lelincane. Nome ngabe yini labayitfole ngenkatho kuyawuba kwabo. Lelive nibolabelana ngekwetive tenu." 
Numbers33:55 “ ‘Kodvwa nangabe letive lenitikhandze kulelo live anikaticoshi natikhipha, leto lenitivumele kutsi tihlale tiyawuba ngemazubela emehlweni enu tibe ngemanyeva emihlubulweni yenu. Tiyawuba luhlupho kini kulelo live leniyawuhlala kulo." 
Numbers33:56 Mine ngiyawukwenta kini loko lengitimisele kukwenta kubo.’ ” 
Numbers34:1 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi:" 
Numbers34:2 “Yala ema-Israyeli utsi kuwo: ‘Naningena eKhenani, live lenitakwabelwa lona kutsi libe lifa lenu, litawuba naleminyele lena:" 
Numbers34:3 Ngaseningizimu litawufaka liHlane laseSini kugudla umnyele waka-Edomu. Ngasemphumalanga, umnyele utawucala ngaseningizimu ngasekugcineni kweLwandle Lweluswayi," 
Numbers34:4 wewelele ngesheya eningizimu yemsaho longuFecela, i-Akrabhimu, wendlule uye eHlane laseSini ucondze eningizimu yeKhadeshi Bhaneya. Utawushaya ucondze eHasari Adari uze ufike e-Asmoni," 
Numbers34:5 lapho utawufike ujike khona, ucondze emfudlaneni waseGibhithe uhambelane nawo ugcine eLwandle." 
Numbers34:6 “ ‘Umnyele wenu ngasenshonalanga kutawuba lugu lweLwandle Lolukhulu. Kuyawuba ngulowo-ke umnyele ngasenshonalanga. 
Numbers34:7 “ ‘Umnyele wenu ngasenyakatho utawuhamba usuke eLwandle Lolukhulu ucondze eNtsabeni iHori," 
Numbers34:8 usuke eHori ucondze eLebo Hamathi. Lomnyele utawuhamba ucondze eSedadi," 
Numbers34:9 uchubekele eZifroni ugcine eHasari Enani. Kutawuba ngulowo-ke umnyele wenu ngasenyakatfo. 
Numbers34:10 “ ‘Umnyele wenu ngasemphumalanga utawuhamba usuke eHasari Enani uze ufike eShefamu. 
Numbers34:11 Umnyele utawucondza eningizimu, kusukela eShefamu kuya eRibla ngasemphumalanga ye-Ayini, uchubeke ugudle emacele ngasemphumalanga yeLwandle iKhinerethi." 
Numbers34:12 Lomnyele utakwewuka ugudle iJordane ugcine ngeLwandle Lweluswayi. “ ‘Ngiyo lena-ke iminyele yelive lenu kuyo yonkhe leyo mihlubulo yalo.’ ” 
Numbers34:13 Ngako Mosi wakhuluma kuma-Israyeli, watsi: “Lelive nitakwabelana ngenkatho kutsi libe lifa lenu. Simakadze uyale kutsi labelwe tive letiyimfica kanye nencenye yesive," 
Numbers34:14 ngobe imindeni yesive sakaRubeni, nesive sakaGadi, nencenye yesive sakaManase seyilemukele lifa lato." 
Numbers34:15 Letive letimbili nencenye setilemukele lifa lato, ngasemphumalanga yemfula iJordane, malungana neJerikho kubheka ngasemphumalanga.”" 
Numbers34:16 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi:" 
Numbers34:17 “Nankha-ke emabito alamadvodza latawunabela lelive kutsi libe lifa lenu: bo-Eleyazare, umphristi, naJoshuwa, umsa waNuni." 
Numbers34:18 Beka umholi waleso naleso sive kutsi asisite ekwabeni lelive lelilifa lenu. 
Numbers34:19 Nankha-ke emabito abo: “Khalebi, umsa waJefune, wesive sakaJuda;" 
Numbers34:20 Shemuweli, umsa wa-Amihudi, wesive sakaSimeyoni;" 
Numbers34:21 Elidadi, umsa waKhisloni, wesive sakaBhenjamini;" 
Numbers34:22 Bukhi, umsa waJogli, umholi labephuma esiveni sakaDani;" 
Numbers34:23 Haniyeli, umsa wa-Efodi, umholi labephuma esiveni sakaManase, umsa waJosefa;" 
Numbers34:24 Khemuweli, umsa waShifthani, umholi labephuma esiveni saka-Efrayimu, umsa waJosefa;" 
Numbers34:25 Elisafani, umsa waPhanaki, umholi labephuma esiveni sakaZebuloni;" 
Numbers34:26 Phaltiyeli, umsa wa-Azani, umholi labephuma esiveni saka-Isakhari;" 
Numbers34:27 Ahihudi, umsa waShelomi, umholi labephuma esiveni saka-Asheri;" 
Numbers34:28 Phedaheli, umsa wa-Amihudi, umholi labephuma esiveni sakaNaftali.”" 
Numbers34:29 Kwaba ngiwo lawa-ke emabito emadvodza Simakadze lawanika umsebenti wekwabela ema-Israyeli lifa lawo lekwakulive laseKhenani. 
Numbers35:1 Ematsafeni akaMowabi ngaseJordane macondzana neJerikho, Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi:" 
Numbers35:2 “Yala ema-Israyeli kutsi abele emaLevi lawo madolobha latawuhlala kuwo kuleso sabelo lesitawuba ngesawo ema-Israyeli. Wabeleni nalawo madlelo latungelete lawo madolobha. 
Numbers35:3 Ngako atawuba nemadolobha latawuhlala kuwo abe nemadlelo, lapho atawukhotsisa khona tifuyo tawo." 
Numbers35:4 “Bubanti balawo madlelo latungelete lawo madolobha lenitakuwanika emaLevi butawuba ngemamitha langaba ngema-450 kusuka elubondzeni lwelidolobha. 
Numbers35:5 Ngephandle kwelidolobha niyawulinganisa indzawo lelibanga lelingemamitha langaba ngema-900 ngasemphumalanga, nalengemamitha langaba ngema-900 ngaseningizimu, nalengemamitha langaba ngema-900 ngasenshonalanga, nalengemamitha langaba ngema-900 ngasenyakatfo, lidolobha libesemkhatsini. Lendzawo iyawuba ngemadlelo alawo madolobha awo." 
Numbers35:6 “Kulamadolobha, leniwabela emaLevi, lasitfupha atawuba ngewekukhoselisa umuntfu lobulele lomunye umuntfu. Ngetulu kwawo nibowabela lamanye langema-42," 
Numbers35:7 lokusho kutsi asawonkhe emadolobha lekufanele niwabele wona atawuba ngema-48 kanye nemadlelo awo. 
Numbers35:8 Lamadolobha lenitawanika emaLevi kulelive lelabelwe ema-Israyeli kufanele alingane nalelo live laleso naleso sive ngebukhulu nangebuncane baso: Tsatsani emadolobha lamanyenti kuleso sive lesikhulu, kodvwa nitsatse emadolobha lambalwa kuleso sive lesincane.”" 
Numbers35:9 Simakadze wakhuluma kuMosi, watsi:" 
Numbers35:10 “Khuluma kuma-Israyeli utsi: ‘Naniwela iJordane, ningena eKhenani," 
Numbers35:11 khetsani lamanye emadolobha kutsi atewuba ngemadolobha enu ekukhosela, lapho kungabalakela khona umuntfu, nangabe abulele lomunye umuntfu angakacondzi." 
Numbers35:12 Ayawuba tindzawo tekukhosela ekubalekeleni umphindziseli, khona kutewutsi lona lobulele angetikufa asengakalitfoli litfuba lekutsi licala lakhe litekwe ebandla." 
Numbers35:13 Lamadolobha lasitfupha nitawakhetsela kutsi abe ngewekukhosela. 
Numbers35:14 Lamatsatfu atawuba ngala kweJordane, lamatsatfu abe ngale ngesheya kweJordane eKhenani." 
Numbers35:15 Lamadolobha lasitfupha atawuba yindzawo yekukhoselisa ema-Israyeli, nebetive, nome ngubani umuntfu lohlala emkhatsini wabo, khona kutewutsi lowo lobulele umuntfu ngesiphosiso atewubalekela khona ayewukhosela." 
Numbers35:16 “ ‘Nangabe umuntfu ashaye lomunye umuntfu ngensimbi, wafa, lowo lomshayile ungumbulali; lombulali uyawubulawa." 
Numbers35:17 Nome-ke nangabe umuntfu anelitje esandleni sakhe lelingabulala umuntfu, bese kuyenteka ushaya umuntfu ambulale ngalo, lowo lomshayile ungumbulali; lombulali uyawubulawa." 
Numbers35:18 Nome-ke nangabe umuntfu aphetse intfo leyentiwe ngelukhuni lengambulala umuntfu, bese kuyenteka ushaya umuntfu ambulale ngayo, lowo lomshayile ungumbulali; lombulali uyawubulawa naye." 
Numbers35:19 Umphindziseli losihlobo sengati semufi nasihlangana nalombulali, siyawumbulala." 
Numbers35:20 “ ‘Nangabe umuntfu atondza lomunye, adzimate ambulale ngekumchilitela phansi nome ambulale ngekumjikijela ngentfo acondze kumbulala, nembala afe," 
Numbers35:21 nome atfukutsele wamshaya wambulala ngesibhakela, lowo muntfu uyawubulawa; ungumbulali. Umphindziseli losihlobo semufi utawutsi angahlangana nalombulali ambulale." 
Numbers35:22 “ ‘Kodvwa nakwenteka ngaphandle kwekutfukutsela umuntfu wachilita lomunye nome wamjikijela ngentfo angakacondzi," 
Numbers35:23 nome wamshaya angaboni, ngelitje lelingambulala, nembala afe, kantsi abengesiso sitsa sakhe futsi abengakacondzi kumlimata," 
Numbers35:24 libandla kufanele lehlulele emkhatsini wakhe nalomphindziseli losihlobo semufi, lilandzele lemitsetfo." 
Numbers35:25 Libandla kufanele livikele lona lonelicala lekubulala kulomphindziseli losihlobo semufi ngekutsi lincandzekise lombulali, abuyele edolobheni lekukhosela, lapho abebalekele khona. Kufanele ahlale lapho, kuze kufe umphristi lomkhulu, labegcotjwe ngemafutsa langcwele." 
Numbers35:26 “ ‘Kodvwa nangabe lombekwacala kwenteka aphumela ngephandle kwalelidolobha lekukhosela labalekele kulo," 
Numbers35:27 bese lomphindziseli losihlobo semufi ukhandza lombulali ngephandle kwalelidolobha, lomphindziseli angambulala futsi angabi nacala ngaloko kumbulala kwakhe." 
Numbers35:28 Umbulali kufanele ahlale kulelo dolobha lekukhosela, kuze kufe umPhristi Lomkhulu; emvakwekufa kwemPhristi Lomkhulu sangancandzeka abuyele endzaweni lesabelo sakhe." 
Numbers35:29 Lena-ke nguyona mitsetfo yenu lenitawuhamba ngayo titukulwane ngetitukulwane. 
Numbers35:30 “ ‘Umuntfu lobulala lomunye umuntfu naye uyawubulawa njengembulali ngebufakazi babofakazi. Kodvwa kute umuntfu loyawubulawa ngebufakazi bemuntfu munye. 
Numbers35:31 Ningayemukeli inhlawulo yekuhlenga kuphila kwembulali, lofanele kufa. Lowo kufanele afe." 
Numbers35:32 Ningayemukeli inhlawulo yemuntfu lobalekele edolobheni lekukhosela ngekutsi nimvumele kutsi abuyele ayewuhlala eveni lakhe, umPhristi Lomkhulu asengakafi." 
Numbers35:33 Ningalingcolisi lelive lenikulo. Kucitsa ingati kuyalingcolisa live, nenhlawulo yekubuyisana naSimakadze ingeke yentelwe live, lapho kucitselwe khona ingati, ngaphandle kwengati yalowo lobulele." 
Numbers35:34 Ningalingcolisi lelive, lapho nine nami sihlala khona, ngobe mine, Simakadze, ngihlala emkhatsini wema-Israyeli.’ ”" 
Numbers36:1 Baholi bemindeni yelusendvo lwakaGileyadi, umsa waMakhire, umsa waManase, lababebetinsendvo tebatukulwane taJosefa, beta bakhuluma embikwaMosi nebaholi, lababetinhloko temindeni yema-Israyeli." 
Numbers36:2 Batsi: “Ngesikhatsi Simakadze ayala inkhosi yami kutsi lelive ulabele ngenkatho kuma-Israyeli kutsi kube lifa lawo, wayala kutsi lifa lemnaketfu Selofehadi linikwe emadvodzakati akhe." 
Numbers36:3 Ake sitsi bashada nemadvodza aletinye tive taka-Israyeli, loko kutawusho kutsi lelo lifa labo litawutsatfwa lingabe lisaba ngilo lifa labokhokho betfu, bese liba lalawo madvodza labashade nawo. Ngaloko-ke kusho kutsi incenye yalelo lifa lelabelwe tsine itawube seyiyatsatfwa." 
Numbers36:4 Nakufika umnyaka wekubuyiselwa ka-Israyeli, lifa labo litakwengetelwa kuleso sive lashade kuso, nalelo lifa labo litawutsatfwa lingabe lisaba lifa labokhokho betfu.”" 
Numbers36:5 Mosi watsi kube ayalwe nguSimakadze, wabe sewetfula nankhu umlayeto kuma-Israyeli, watsi: “Loko lokushiwo sive setitukulwane taJosefa kungiko ngempela." 
Numbers36:6 Naku-ke lokungumyalo waSimakadze macondzana nemadvodzakati aSelofehadi: Angashada nome ngangubani lamtsandzako yingci nakungewelusendvo lwesive seyise.
