Numbers36:7 Kute lifa lelingumhlaba lekuyawuphiwana ngalo ka-Israyeli lisuke kulesinye sive liye kulesinye sive, ngobe wonkhe um-Israyeli uyawuligcina lelo live lalitfola kubokhokho bakhe." 
Numbers36:8 Indvodzakati lenelifa lelilive kuso sonkhe sive sema-Israyeli kufanele ishade nemuntfu welusendvo lwesive seyise, kuze kutsi wonkhe um-Israyeli atewuba nelifa laboyise." 
Numbers36:9 Kute lifa lelilive leliyakwendluliswa lisuswe kulesinye sive liye kulesinye sive, ngobe nguleso naleso sive siyawutigcinela lifa laso.”" 
Numbers36:10 Ngako emadvodzakati aSelofehadi enta loko Simakadze layala Mosi kutsi kwentiwe. 
Numbers36:11 Emadvodzakati aSelofehadi, boMahala, naThisa, naHogila, naMilkha, naNowa, ashada nabomzala bawo lababetihlobo teyise." 
Numbers36:12 Ashada etinsendvweni tetitukulwane taManase, umsa waJosefa, kwase kutsi lifa labo lajinge ladliwa belusendvo lwesive sabo." 
Numbers36:13 Ngiyo lena-ke imiyalo nemitsetfo yaSimakadze layinika ema-Israyeli ngesandla saMosi ngesikhatsi asemise ematsafeni akaMowabi ngaseJordane ngesheya kwemfula iJordane malungana neJerikho. 
Deuteronomy1:1 Lawa-ke ngemavi aMosi lawakhuluma kuso sonkhe sive sema-Israyeli basesehlane ngasemphumalanga nemfula iJordane, e-Arabha, macondzana neSufi, emkhatsini wePharani neThofeli, neLabani, neHaserothi, neDizahabi." 
Deuteronomy1:2 Kutsatsa emalanga lali-11 kuhamba usuka eHorebe uye eKhadeshi Bhaneya, nawuhamba ngemgwaco weNtsaba iSeyiri." 
Deuteronomy1:3 Ngemnyaka wema-40, ngelilanga lekucala enyangeni yeli-11, kusukela baphuma eGibhithe, Mosi wakhuluma kuma-Israyeli konkhe loko Simakadze labemyale ngako kutsi awatjele kona, lokumacondzana nawo." 
Deuteronomy1:4 Loko wakwenta emvakwekuba asehlule Sihoni, inkhosi yema-Amori, leyayibusa eHeshboni. Emphini yase-Edreyi abehlule Ogi, inkhosi yaseBhashani, leyayibusa e-Ashtarothe." 
Deuteronomy1:5 Ngasemphumalanga nemfula iJordane, eveni lakaMowabi, Mosi wacala wawufundzisa lomtsetfo. Wakhuluma watsi:" 
Deuteronomy1:6 “Simakadze Nkulunkulu wetfu ukhulume kitsi siseseHorebe, watsi: ‘Senihleti kakhulu kulentsaba." 
Deuteronomy1:7 Tfutsani, nichubekele etintsabeni tema-Amori, nakuto tonkhe leto tive letisedvutane, tase-Arabha, naletisetintsabeni, naletingaphansi kwetintsaba ngasenshonalanga, naletiseNegevu, lekuyiningizimu yelive, naletigudla lwandle, eveni lemaKhenani kuya kulaseLebanoni, kufike ngisho nasemfuleni lomkhulu iYufrathe." 
Deuteronomy1:8 Libukeni-ke lonkhe lelo live lenginiphe lona. Ngenani kulo nilidle lelive Simakadze lafunga ngalo kutsi utalipha bokhokho benu bo-Abrahama, na-Isaka, naJakobe, kanye netitukulwane tabo letiyawuvela emvakwabo.’ ”" 
Deuteronomy1:9 “Ngaleso sikhatsi ngakhuluma kini, ngatsi: ‘Ningumtfwalo losindza kakhulu kimi kutsi ngiwetfwale ngedvwa." 
Deuteronomy1:10 Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu sewunandzisile manje, senibanyenti kakhulu, senize naba ngangetinkhanyeti tesibhakabhaka." 
Deuteronomy1:11 Shangatsi Simakadze, Nkulunkulu waboyihlomkhulu, anganandzisa ngetinkhulungwane letiphindziwe, anibusise njengobe etsembisa!" 
Deuteronomy1:12 Kodvwa ngingatetfwala kanjani tinkinga tenu, nemitfwalo yenu, nemibango yenu, mine ngingedvwa?" 
Deuteronomy1:13 Khetsani emadvodza lahlakaniphile, nalanekucondza, nalatiwako kuleso nakuleso sive, ngitawube sengiyawabeka kutsi anengamele.’" 
Deuteronomy1:14 “Nani nangiphendvula natsi: ‘Loko loncoma kukwenta kuhle.’ 
Deuteronomy1:15 Ngako ngatsatsa labaholi betive tenu, emadvodza lahlakaniphile nalahloniphekile, ngawabeka kutsi anengamele, abe tindvuna tetinkhulungwane, netemakhulu, netema-50, netemashumi, nekutsi abe tiphatsimandla taletive tenu." 
Deuteronomy1:16 “Labaholi ngabayala ngaso leso sikhatsi ngatsi: ‘Hlolisisani imibango yalabanakenu, bese nehlulela ngekungakhetsi, nome licala lisemkhatsini wema-Israyeli nome lisemkhatsini wema-Israyeli newetive." 
Deuteronomy1:17 Ningacali nehlulele ngekukhetsa; lalelani lomkhulu nalomncane ngalokufananako. Ningesabi muntfu, ngobe kwehlulela kwaNkulunkulu. Licala lelilukhuni kini niboliletsa lapha kimi, ngitekuliva.’" 
Deuteronomy1:18 Ngaleso sikhatsi nganitjela konkhe lebenifanele kukwenta.” 
Deuteronomy1:19 “Satfutsa eHorebe, njengobe Simakadze Nkulunkulu wetfu abesiyalile, sacondza ngasetintsabeni, eveni lema-Amori, sadzabula lonkhe lelo hlane lelesabekako lesenilibonile, saze sefika eKhadeshi Bhaneya." 
Deuteronomy1:20 Ngase ngitsi kini: ‘Senifikile eveni letintsaba, live lema-Amori, lesiliphiwa nguSimakadze Nkulunkulu wetfu." 
Deuteronomy1:21 Libukeni-ke lelive leniliphiwe nguSimakadze Nkulunkulu wenu. Khuphukelani kulo niyekulidla lelo live, njengobe natjelwa nguSimakadze Nkulunkulu waboyihlomkhulu. Ningesabi, ningalahlekelwa nalitsemba.’" 
Deuteronomy1:22 “Nonkhe neta kimi, nafike natsi: ‘Asitfumele emadvodza ayesihlolela lelive, bese aletsa umbiko macondzana nendlela lekufanele sihambe ngayo, kanye nemadolobha lesitawakhandza khona.’" 
Deuteronomy1:23 “Lomcondvo wabonakala umuhle kimi; ngako ngavele ngakhetsa emadvodza lali-12 emkhatsini wenu, yaba yinye kuleso nakuleso sive." 
Deuteronomy1:24 Esuka akhuphukela eveni letintsaba efika eSihosheni sase-Eshikholi, asihlolisisa." 
Deuteronomy1:25 Lamadvodza akha letinye tetitselo talelo live atiphatsa, eta nato lapha kitsi; afike asibikela atsi: ‘Lelive lasinika lona Simakadze Nkulunkulu wetfu lihle kakhulu.’" 
Deuteronomy1:26 “Kodvwa noko nabe seniyala kukhuphuka; nahlubuka, nangawulaleli umyalo waSimakadze Nkulunkulu wenu." 
Deuteronomy1:27 Nakhonona emathendeni enu, natsi: ‘Simakadze uyasenyanya; kungako nje asikhipha eveni laseGibhithe, abentela kutasinikela etandleni tema-Amori kutsi atesibhubhisa." 
Deuteronomy1:28 Siyaphi nje? Labanaketfu sebasesabisile, batsi: “Bantfu bakhona bacinile, kantsi futsi badze kunatsi; emadolobha abo makhulu, futsi atinqaba, netibondza tawo tiphakeme taze tatsintsa sibhakabhaka. Sabona ngisho nemadvodzana a-Anaki khona lapho.” ’" 
Deuteronomy1:29 “Ngase ngitsi kini: ‘Ningesabi; nabo ningabesabi. 
Deuteronomy1:30 Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu, lohamba embikwenu, utanilwela njengobe enta eGibhithe embikwenu nibuka," 
Deuteronomy1:31 kanjalo nasehlane futsi. Nabona lapho kutsi Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu wanetfwala kanjani, njengababe etfwele indvodzana yakhe, kuyo yonkhe indlela nahamba naze nefika kuyo lendzawo.’" 
Deuteronomy1:32 Kodvwa najinge nangete nametsemba Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu," 
Deuteronomy1:33 labehamba embikwenu, ngemlilo ebusuku nangelifu emini. Loko abekwentela kunifunela tindzawo lapho ningemisa khona, nekutsi anikhombise indlela lekufanele nihambe ngayo.”" 
Deuteronomy1:34 “Watsi kube Simakadze eve loko kusola kwenu, watfukutsela waze wafunga watsi:" 
Deuteronomy1:35 ‘Kute nome munye umuntfu walesitukulwane lesibi loyakulibona lelive lelihle lengafunga ngalo kutsi ngiyakulinika bokhokho benu," 
Deuteronomy1:36 ngaphandle kwaKhalebi, umsa waJefune. Yena-ke uyakulibona, nginike yena netitukulwane takhe live lapho lunyawo lwakhe belunyatsele khona, ngobe walandzela Simakadze ngenhlitiyo yakhe yonkhe.’" 
Deuteronomy1:37 Simakadze wangitfukutselela ngenca yenu, waze watsi kimi: ‘Nawe ungeke ungene kulo." 
Deuteronomy1:38 Kodvwa umsiti wakho, Joshuwa, umsa waNuni, utawungena kulo. Mkhutsate, ngobe utawuhola lama-Israyeli kutsi alidle.’" 
Deuteronomy1:39 “Labo bantfwana benu labasebancane lenitsite batawutfunjwa, bona labo labasengakakwati kwehlukanisa lokuhle kulokubi, batawungena kulelo live. Ngitabapha lona, nabo batalidla." 
Deuteronomy1:40 Kodvwa nine bantfu, ncandzekani, nicondze ngasehlane ngendlela leya eLwandle Lolubovu." 
Deuteronomy1:41 “Nine naphendvula natsi: ‘Sonile kuSimakadze. Sitawukhuphuka siyekulwa, njengobe Simakadze asiyalile.’ Ngako-ke nonkhe nahloma, nicabanga kutsi kutawuba malula kukhuphukela kulelive letintsaba." 
Deuteronomy1:42 “Kodvwa Simakadze wakhuluma kimi, watsi: ‘Batjele utsi: “Ningakhuphuki kuyakulwa, ngobe mine ngingeke ngibe nani. Titsa tenu titakunehlula.” ’" 
Deuteronomy1:43 Ngabe sengiyanitjela, kodvwa anizange nifune kungilalela. Nahlubuka ngekungawulaleli umyalo waSimakadze, ngekutiphakamisa kwenu nachubeka nashuca, nakhuphukela eveni letintsaba." 
Deuteronomy1:44 Ema-Amori, labehlala kuleto tintsaba, aphuma anihlasela, anicosha anitselekela njengelibulo letinyosi, anishaya anilahla phansi kusukela eSeyiri kuze kuyewufika eHoma." 
Deuteronomy1:45 Nabuya lapho nakhala kuSimakadze, kodvwa akazange akunake loko kukhala kwenu, wasuke watsalalisa nje.”" 
Deuteronomy1:46 “Ngako-ke nahlala eKhadeshi emalanga lamanyenti, nacitsa sikhatsi lesidze nilapho." 
Deuteronomy2:1 “Sesuka lapho sancandzeka sacondza ehlane, ngendlela leya eLwandle Lolubovu, njengobe Simakadze abevele ashito kimi kucala. Sacitsa sikhatsi lesidze sizulazula, situngeleta live letintsaba taseSeyiri." 
Deuteronomy2:2 “Simakadze wase ukhuluma kimi utsi: 
Deuteronomy2:3 ‘Senihambe sikhatsi lesidze seloku nitungeleta lelive letintsaba, manje-ke sale nijikela ngasenyakatfo." 
Deuteronomy2:4 Nika labantfu nansi imiyalo utsi: “Senitalidzabula ekhatsi lelive lebanakenu, titukulwane ta-Esawu, letihlala eSeyiri. Batawunesaba, kodvwa nibocaphela." 
Deuteronomy2:5 Ningabachukuluti kutsi baze balwe nani, ngobe ngingeke ngininike, ngisho nalokuncane kwalelive labo, ngisho nekwekubeka lunyawo lwenu imbala. Ngilinike Esawu lelive letintsaba iSeyiri, kutsi libe lakhe." 
Deuteronomy2:6 Kufanele nibakhokhele ngesiliva konkhe kudla kwabo lenikudlako, nemanti abo leniwanatsako.” ’" 
Deuteronomy2:7 “Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu unibusisile ngayo yonkhe imisebenti yenu yetandla leniyentako. Uninakekele ngesikhatsi nisahamba nidzabula lelihlane lelikhulukati. Kuyo yonkhe leminyaka lengema-40 Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu abesolomane anani, anizange seneswele lutfo." 
Deuteronomy2:8 “Ngako sahamba sendlula labanaketfu labatitukulwane taka-Esawu, lababehlala eSeyiri. Sawushiya umgwaco i-Arabha lochamuka e-Elathi nase-Esiyoni Geberi; sahamba ngemgwaco welihlane lakaMowabi." 
Deuteronomy2:9 Simakadze wakhuluma kimi, watsi: ‘Ningawahlaseli emaMowabi, futsi ningawachukuluti kutsi aze alwe, ngobe ngingeke ngininike, ngisho nencenye nje yelive lawo. I-Ari yona ngiyiphe titukulwane taLoti kutsi ibe yato.’ ”" 
Deuteronomy2:10 Ema-Emi abehlala lapho. Lesi bekusive lesasinemandla, kantsi sasisinyenti; sasisidze njengema-Anaki." 
Deuteronomy2:11 Naso sasatiwa kutsi singemaRefa njengawo ema-Anaki; kodvwa emaMowabi abesibita ngekutsi ngema-Emi. 
Deuteronomy2:12 EmaHori abehlala eSeyiri, kodvwa titukulwane taka-Esawu tawacosha. Tawabhubhisa onkhe emaHori labelapho, kwabe sekuhlala tona kuleyo ndzawo yawo, njengobe ema-Israyeli enta eveni lanikwa lona nguSimakadze kutsi alidle." 
Deuteronomy2:13 “Simakadze wakhuluma watsi: ‘Khuphukani manje newele umfudlana iZeredi.’ Savele sewela. 
Deuteronomy2:14 Kwendlula iminyaka lengema-38 kusukela esikhatsini sekusuka eKhadeshi Bhaneya. Ngaleso sikhatsi lonkhe lelo butfo lemadvodza aleso situkulwane abesafe aphela, njengobe Simakadze abefungile." 
Deuteronomy2:15 Sandla saSimakadze sachubeka kumelana nabo, baze bafa bonkhe baphela enkambu." 
Deuteronomy2:16 “Kwatsi kube kufe ekugcina kulawo madvodza, emkhatsini walabo bantfu," 
Deuteronomy2:17 Simakadze wakhuluma kimi, watsi:" 
Deuteronomy2:18 ‘Lamuhla nitakwewelela ngesheya kwe-Ari lekungumnyele welive lakaMowabi. 
Deuteronomy2:19 Nase nifike esiveni sema-Amoni, ningawachukuluti futsi ningawakhubi, ngobe ngingeke ngininike, ngisho nencenye nje yalelive lawo kutsi libe lifa lenu, ngobe phela ngalipha titukulwane taLoti kutsi libe lifa lato.’ ”" 
Deuteronomy2:20 Lelo bekutsiwa live lemaRefa labehlala kulo kucala; kodvwa ema-Amori abewabita ngekutsi ngemaZamzumi. 
Deuteronomy2:21 Bekusive lesasinemandla, kantsi futsi sasisinyenti, futsi sisidze njengema-Anaki, kodvwa Simakadze wawabhubhisa. Kwefika ema-Amoni acosha lamaRefa, kwase kwakha wona kulelo live." 
Deuteronomy2:22 Simakadze bekatentele njalo titukulwane taka-Esawu letatihlala eSeyiri, ngesikhatsi abhubhisa emaHori, lawacosha kulelo live, kwabe sekwakha tona kuze kube ngulamuhla." 
Deuteronomy2:23 Ema-Avi labakhe emadolobheni lagudla lwandle kuze kuyewufika eGaza, wona-ke abhujiswa ngemaKhrethe labechamuka eKhrethe. Lelive lase lidliwa ngulawo maKhrethe." 
Deuteronomy2:24 “Sukumani, nihambe nidzabule Sihosha sase-Anoni. Bukani la, indzawo yaSihoni, um-Amori, inkhosi yaseHeshboni, nelive lakhe, ngikwetfule etandleni tenu. Mhlaseleni nidle lelive lakhe." 
Deuteronomy2:25 Kusukela lamuhla ngitawucala kwenta tonkhe tive temhlaba tinesabe titfutfumele ngani. Nativa kukhulunywa ngani, tiyawukwesaba tikhatsateke kakhulu ngani.”" 
Deuteronomy2:26 “Ngako ngatfumela titfunywa ngesikhatsi siseseHlane laseKhedemothi, taya enkhosini Sihoni, eHeshboni, ngatsi tibofike tikhulume ngemavi ekuthula titsi:" 
Deuteronomy2:27 ‘Sicela kwendlula sidzabule lelive lakho. Sitawuhamba ngemgwaco, singeke siphambukele ngesekudla nome ngesancele." 
Deuteronomy2:28 Sitsengisele kudla, khona sitekudla, usitsengisele nemanti sitewunatsa; konkhe usitsengisele ngesiliva. Sicela mane usivumele kutsi sendlule ngetinyawo," 
Deuteronomy2:29 njengobe kwenta titukulwane taka-Esawu letihlala eSeyiri, nanjengobe kwenta emaMowabi lahlala e-Ari, size sewelele ngesheya kweJordane, eveni lasinika lona Simakadze Nkulunkulu wetfu.’" 
Deuteronomy2:30 “Kodvwa Sihoni, inkhosi yaseHeshboni, akazange asivumele kutsi sendlule sidzabule live lakhe, ngobe Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu wenta umoya wakhe waba lukhuni nenhlitiyo yakhe yaba nenkhani; loko wakwentela kutsi atekumnikela etandleni tenu, njengobe kunjalo lamuhla." 
Deuteronomy2:31 “Simakadze wakhuluma kimi, watsi: ‘Buka la, Sihoni nelive lakhe sengimnikele kuwe. Cala manje kumncoba, khona utekulidla lelive lakhe.’" 
Deuteronomy2:32 “Sihoni nemabutfo akhe waphuma atewusihlasela emphini yaseJahasi," 
Deuteronomy2:33 Simakadze Nkulunkulu wetfu wamnikela kitsi, samncoba yena nemadvodzana akhe kanye nesive sakhe sonkhe." 
Deuteronomy2:34 Ngaleso sikhatsi sawatsatsa onkhe emadolobha akhe, sawabhubhisa onkhe, nemadvodza, nebafati, nebantfwana. Akuzange kusale ngisho namunye." 
Deuteronomy2:35 Kodvwa tifuyo nalesasikutfumbe emadolobheni lesasiwancobile sakutfutsa sahamba nako. 
Deuteronomy2:36 Kusukela e-Aroyeri lesemngcengcemeni weSihosha sase-Anoni, kanye nekusuka edolobheni lelisesikhunjini semfula, kuze kuyewufika eGileyadi kwabate ngisho nalinye lidolobha lelaba ngetulu kwemandla etfu. Simakadze Nkulunkulu wetfu wawanikela kitsi onkhe." 
Deuteronomy2:37 Kodvwa asizange sisondzele eveni lema-Amoni: nome eceleni kugudla umfula iJabhoki, nome ngasemadolobheni laseveni letintsaba, nome ngukuphi-ke lapho Simakadze Nkulunkulu wetfu abesiyale kutsi singayi khona.”" 
Deuteronomy3:1 “Sesuka lapho senyuka ngemgwaco locondza eBhashani; Ogi, inkhosi yaseBhashani, waphuma kanye nemabutfo akhe onkhe atesihlasela emphini e-Edreyi." 
Deuteronomy3:2 Kodvwa Simakadze wakhuluma kimi, watsi: ‘Ungamesabi, ngobe yena kanye nemabutfo akhe onkhe, nelive lakhe, sengimnikele etandleni takho. Yenta kuye kona loko lowakwenta kuSihoni, inkhosi yema-Amori, labebusa eHeshboni.’" 
Deuteronomy3:3 “Ngako Simakadze Nkulunkulu wetfu, wanikela Ogi, inkhosi yaseBhashani, kanye nabo bonkhe bantfu bakhe etandleni tetfu. Sabagwaza bonkhe, kwangete kwasala ngisho namunye lowasindza." 
Deuteronomy3:4 Ngaleso sikhatsi sawatfumba onkhe emadolobha akhe; kute ngisho nalinye kulamadolobha labengema-60 lelasala sangete salitfumba kuso sonkhe leso sifundza sase-Agobhu, embusweni wa-Ogi, inkhosi yaseBhashani." 
Deuteronomy3:5 Onkhe lamadolobha abetinqaba ngekwawo, anetibondza letiphakeme nemasango laveletelwa ngemishudvo yensimbi, kanye nalamanye emadolobha lamanyenti kakhulu labete tibondza." 
Deuteronomy3:6 Sawabhubhisa sawacedza onkhe, njengobe senta kuSihoni, inkhosi yaseHeshboni; sabhubhisa onkhe emadolobha, nemadvodza, nebafati nebantfwana." 
Deuteronomy3:7 Kodvwa tonkhe tifuyo nalokunye lokwakuyimphango sakwetfwala, sahamba nako." 
Deuteronomy3:8 “Ngako lelive salitsatsa ngaso leso sikhatsi esandleni semakhosi lamabili ema-Amori, ngesheya emphumalanga nemfula iJordane, kusuka eSihosheni sase-Anoni, kuze kuyewufika eNtsabeni iHemoni.”" 
Deuteronomy3:9 INtsaba iHemoni emaSidoni ayibita ngekutsi yiSiriyoni, kantsi ema-Amori wona ayibita ngekutsi yiSeniri." 
Deuteronomy3:10 “Salidla lonkhe live laka-Ogi, inkhosi yaseBhashani: emadolobha lasentsabeni, netifundza takaGileyadi naseBhashani, kuze kuyewufika emadolobheni aseSalekha nase-Edreyi lekungemadolobha embuso wa-Ogi eBhashani.”" 
Deuteronomy3:11 Kwase kusele Ogi, inkhosi yaseBhashani, kuphela kuleyo nsali yesive semaRefa. Umbhedze wakhe wawentiwe ngensimbi, budze ungemamitha labengaba mane, bubanti ungemamitha labengaba mabili. Ungatfolakala eRabha, edolobheni lema-Amoni." 
Deuteronomy3:12 “Lelive salidla kanjalo-ke ngaleso sikhatsi. Indzawo lesukela enyakatfo yase-Aroyeri ngaseSihosheni sase-Anoni nencenye yelive letintsaba takaGileyadi kanye nemadolobha alo ngakwabela emaRubeni nemaGadi. 
Deuteronomy3:13 Lenye incenye yelive lakaGileyadi neBhashani yonkhe, umbuso wa-Ogi, ngisho sonkhe sifundza sase-Agobhu ngayabela incenye yesive sakaManase. “IBhashani yayatiwa ngekutsi live lakaRefa." 
Deuteronomy3:14 Jayire, umsa waManase, watsatsa sonkhe sifundza sase-Agobhu, kuze kuyewufika emnyeleni wemaGeshuri nemaMakhathi. Leyo ndzawo wayetsa ngaye; kuze kube ngulamuhla iBhashani yatiwa ngekutsi yiHavothi Jayire." 
Deuteronomy3:15 “IGileyadi ngayabela Makhire. 
Deuteronomy3:16 Sive sakaRubeni nesakaGadi ngatabela live lakaGileyadi, kuze kuyewufika eSihosheni sase-Anoni, ekhatsi nesihosha kwaba ngumnyele, kanye nasemfuleni iJabhoki, umnyele wesive sema-Amoni." 
Deuteronomy3:17 Ngasenshonalanga lelive labo lalihamba lize liyewufika emfuleni iJordane, e-Arabha, lalisuka eKhinerethi lize liyewufika eLwandle lwase-Arabha, Lwandle Lweluswayi, ngaphansi kwemacele asePhisga." 
Deuteronomy3:18 “Ngaso leso sikhatsi ngabe sengiyaniyala, ngatsi: ‘Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu uniphe lelive kutsi nilidle. Nonkhe nine mabutfo emphi lenihlomele kulwa, hambani embikwetive tema-Israyeli, newelele ngesheya kwemfula." 
Deuteronomy3:19 Kodvwa bafati benu, nebantfwabenu, netifuyo tenu , njengobe ngiyati kutsi ninetifuyo letinyenti , kutawusala kulamadolobha lenginiphe wona," 
Deuteronomy3:20 aze Simakadze anike banakenu lendzawo lesasele, njengobe enta nakini, nabo futsi sebalitsetse lelo live Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu labanika lona lelingesheya kwemfula iJordane. Emvakwaloko-ke nonkhe seningabuyela emuva, nguloyo naloyo aye eveni lakhe lengimabele lona.’" 
Deuteronomy3:21 “Ngaso leso sikhatsi ngayala Joshuwa, ngatsi: ‘Nawe utibonele ngewakho emehlo konkhe loko Simakadze Nkulunkulu wakho lakwentile kulamakhosi lamabili; utakwenta njalo-ke kuyo yonkhe lemibuso lenisetakwewelela kuyo." 
Deuteronomy3:22 Ningayesabi, ngobe Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu nguye lotanilwela.’ ”" 
Deuteronomy3:23 “Ngaphindze ngancusa Simakadze ngaleso sikhatsi, ngatsi:" 
Deuteronomy3:24 ‘Hawu! Nkhosi Simakadze, sewucalile kukhombisa inceku yakho bukhulu bakho nesandla sakho lesinemandla. Ngumuphi nje nkulunkulu losezulwini nome losemhlabeni longenta lemisebenti nalemimangaliso yemandla loyentako?" 
Deuteronomy3:25 Ngicela kwewela ngiyewubona lelive lelihle lelingesheya kweJordane, live lelihle letintsaba, kanye neLebanoni.’" 
Deuteronomy3:26 “Kodvwa ngenca yenu Simakadze wangitfukutselela, wangabe asangilalela nekungilalela, watsi kimi: ‘Sekwenele! Ungaphindze ukhulume kimi ngalendzaba." 
Deuteronomy3:27 Yenyuka uye esicongweni sentsaba iPhisga, ubukisise ngasenshonalanga, nangasenyakatfo, nangaseningizimu kanye nangasemphumalanga; lelive ulibukisise ngemehlo akho, ngobe wena ungeke usawewela umfula iJordane." 
Deuteronomy3:28 Kodvwa yala Joshuwa, umcinise umkhutsate, ngobe nguye lotakuhola lesive asewetele ngesheya kwemfula; nguye futsi lotabenta badle lelive lolibonako.’" 
Deuteronomy3:29 “Ngako sahlala esihosheni, macondzana nelidolobha laseBhethi Pheyori.”" 
Deuteronomy4:1 “Lalelani sive sema-Israyeli imiyalo nemitsetfo lesengitanifundzisa yona. Hambani ngayo, khona nitewuphila ningene eveni nilidle, live Simakadze, Nkulunkulu wabokhokho benu, lanipha lona." 
Deuteronomy4:2 Ningacali nengete lutfo kulamavi lenginiyala ngawo, futsi ningaphunguli lutfo kuwo, kodvwa gcinani lemiyalo yaSimakadze Nkulunkulu wenu lengininika yona." 
Deuteronomy4:3 Natibonela ngemehlo enu loko lokwentiwa nguSimakadze eBhali Pheyori. Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu wababhubhisa bonkhe labo bantfu bakini lababelandzela Bhali wasePheyori," 
Deuteronomy4:4 kodvwa nonkhe nine lenabambelela kuSimakadze Nkulunkulu wenu nisaphila nalamuhla. 
Deuteronomy4:5 “Nginifundzise yonkhe imiyalo nemitsetfo, njengobe Simakadze Nkulunkulu wami angitfumile kutsi ngente, kuze nihambe ngayo nakulelo live leniyakungena kulo niyekulidla." 
Deuteronomy4:6 Ngako yigcineni niyicaphelisise, ngobe loko kuyawuba kuhlakanipha nekucondza kwenu emehlweni aleto tive letiyakuva ngayo yonkhe lemiyalo, bese titsi: ‘Impela lesive lesikhulu sisive lesihlakaniphile nalesinekucondza.’" 
Deuteronomy4:7 “Ngusiphi nje lesinye sive lesikhulu lesinabonkulunkulu labasedvute naso, njengaSimakadze Nkulunkulu wetfu lohlala asedvute natsi njalo nje nasithandaza kuye?" 
Deuteronomy4:8 Ngusiphi nje lesinye sive lesikhulu kangangekutsi singaba nemiyalo nemitsetfo lelungile njengawo wonkhe lomtsetfo lenginifundzise wona lamuhla? 
Deuteronomy4:9 Caphelani-ke nilindze kahle imiphefumulo yenu, ningaze nikhohlwe nguletintfo lenitibone ngemehlo enu nome nitiyekele tiphunyuke enhlitiyweni yenu yingci nanisaphila. Niyakutifundzisa bantfwabenu nebantfwana bebantfwabenu." 
Deuteronomy4:10 Khumbulani lilanga lenema ngalo embikwaSimakadze Nkulunkulu wenu ngesikhatsi akhuluma kimi eHorebe atsi: ‘Hlanganisa sonkhe sive sibutsane la embikwami. Ngifuna kutsi sive kahle emavi ami, khona sitewufundza kungihlonipha, yingci nasisaphila kulomhlaba sibuye sifundzise nebantfwabaso.’" 
Deuteronomy4:11 “Nasondzela edvute nema ngephansi kwentsaba naloku yayivutsa emalangabi emlilo lowawufikela esibhakabhakeni, unemafu lamnyama nentfutfu leyesabekako." 
Deuteronomy4:12 Simakadze wakhuluma asekhatsi emlilweni, nakuva kudvuma kwemavi, kodvwa anizange nisibone simo sakhe, kwakulivi nje." 
Deuteronomy4:13 Wetfula kini sivumelwane sakhe semiyalo lelishumi laniyala kutsi nihambe ngayo, wase uyibhala phansi etibhelekeceni letimbili tematje." 
Deuteronomy4:14 Simakadze wangikhombisa ngaleso sikhatsi kutsi nginifundzise imiyalo nemitsetfo lekufanele nihambe ngayo kulelive lelingesheya kweJordane, lenewelela kulo kuyakulidla.”" 
Deuteronomy4:15 “Ngako-ke ticaphelisiseni nine, ngobe anibonanga simo salutfo mhlazana Simakadze akhuluma nani asemlilweni entsabeni yaseHorebe." 
Deuteronomy4:16 Caphelani ningoni ngekutentela tithico letibatiwe, titfombe nome taluphi luhlobo lwendvodza nome lwemfati," 
Deuteronomy4:17 nome lokufanana nesilwane nome ngangusiphi lapha emhlabeni, nome lokufanana neluhlobo lwanome nganguyiphi inyoni lendiza emoyeni," 
Deuteronomy4:18 nome ngangusiphi silwane lesihuma ngesisu emhlabatsini, nome nganguyiphi inhlanti lesemantini ngaphansi kwemhlaba." 
Deuteronomy4:19 Nicaphele ningatikhonti tinkhanyiso lenitibona esibhakabhakeni njengelilanga, nenyanga, netinkhanyeti. Ningacali niwungeke ngekutikhotsamela nikhonte leto tintfo Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu latabela tonkhe tive ngephansi kwelizulu." 
Deuteronomy4:20 Kodvwa nine, Simakadze wanikhipha eGibhithe, emlilweni lomkhulu loncibilikisa insimbi, kutsi nitekuba sive lesilifa lakhe, njengobe senaba ngilo nje." 
Deuteronomy4:21 “Simakadze wangitfukutselela ngenca yenu, waze wafunga kutsi ngingeke ngisawewela umfula iJordane ngingene eveni lelihle Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu lanipha kutsi libe lifa lenu." 
Deuteronomy4:22 Ngitawufela kulelive ngingeke ngiwewele umfula iJordane, kodvwa nine seniyakwewelela ngesheya niyekudla lelive lelihle." 
Deuteronomy4:23 Caphelani ningasikhohlwa sivumelwane saSimakadze Nkulunkulu wenu lasenta nani. Ningatenteli sithico nome saluphi luhlobo Simakadze Nkulunkulu lanalele kutsi nisente. 
Deuteronomy4:24 Ngobe Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu ungumlilo locotfulako, unguNkulunkulu lonesikhwele." 
Deuteronomy4:25 “Nase nitelene nandza naba nebantfwana kanye nebantfwana bebantfwabenu, senihleti sikhatsi lesidze kulelo live, ningacali nome ngekutentela tithico nome taluphi luhlobo. Loko kuyawuba kubi emehlweni aSimakadze Nkulunkulu wenu, kumente atfukutsele." 
Deuteronomy4:26 Ngibita lizulu nemhlaba kutsi kungifakazele lamuhla kutsi naningangilaleli, niyawunyamalala masinyane emhlabeni. Ningeke nikhonse kulelo live lelingesheya kwemfula iJordane lenewelela kuyawulidla. Niyawubhujiswa niphele." 
Deuteronomy4:27 Simakadze uyawunisakatela etiveni letinye, bayawuba yingcosana benu labayawusala kuleto tive Simakadze layakube anisakatele kuto." 
Deuteronomy4:28 Kuleto tive niyawukhonta tithico letentiwe bantfu ngetingodvo nangematje, letingaboni naletingeva, naletingadli, naletingakwati kunuka." 
Deuteronomy4:29 Kodvwa khona lapho nanifuna Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu, niyawumtfola nanimfunisisa ngenhlitiyo yenu yonkhe nangemphefumulo wenu wonkhe." 
Deuteronomy4:30 Naniselusizini senehlelwe ngito tonkhe letintfo, kuyawutsi emvakwaloko nibuyele kuSimakadze Nkulunkulu wenu, nimlalele." 
Deuteronomy4:31 Ngobe Simakadze, Nkulunkulu wenu, unguNkulunkulu lonemusa, angeke anishiye nome anibhubhise nome akhohlwe sivumelwane sakhe lasenta naboyihlomkhulu, lasicinisa kubo ngesifungo." 
Deuteronomy4:32 “Phenyisisani ngalokwenteka emalangeni akadzeni nisengakatalwa, kusukela ngelilanga Nkulunkulu ladala ngalo umuntfu emhlabeni; phenyisisani kusukela ngale kwemazulu kuye ngale kwawo. Intfo lenkhulu kangaka yake yenteka yini nome intfo lenjengayo yake yevakala yini?" 
Deuteronomy4:33 Sikhona sive lesake saliva liphimbo laNkulunkulu likhuluma emlilweni, njengani, sachubeka saphila?" 
Deuteronomy4:34 Sikhona yini sithico lesake setama kutikhetsela sive emkhatsini waletinye tive ngetivivinyo, nangetibonakaliso letimangalisako, nangetimangaliso, nangemphi, nangesandla lesinemandla, nangengalo leyelulekile nome ngetento letinkhulu naletimangalisako, njengato tonkhe letintfo Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu latenta kini eGibhithe emehlweni enu nibuka?" 
Deuteronomy4:35 “Letintfo natikhonjiselwa kutsi nati kutsi Simakadze unguNkulunkulu; ngaphandle kwakhe kute lomunye. 
Deuteronomy4:36 Wanenta neva livi lakhe asezulwini kutsi atenicondzisa kahle. Emhlabeni wanikhombisa umlilo wakhe, naweva emavi akhe aphuma emlilweni." 
Deuteronomy4:37 Ngobe wabatsandza boyihlomkhulu, wakhetsa titukulwane tabo emvakwabo, wanikhipha eGibhithe ngebukhona bakhe nangemandla akhe lamakhulu," 
Deuteronomy4:38 wacosha tive letinkhulu naletinemandla kunani, nisengakefiki, kuze aniletse kulelo live lato; walipha nine, laba lifa lenu, njengobe lingilo nje lamuhla." 
Deuteronomy4:39 “Ngako khumbulani ningaphindzi nikhohlwe kusukela lamuhla kutsi Simakadze unguNkulunkulu, ezulwini etulu nasemhlabeni phansi. Kute lomunye." 
Deuteronomy4:40 Gcinani timiso takhe nemiyalo yakhe lengininika yona lamuhla, kuze kulungele nine nebantfwabenu, khona nitewuphila siphelane kulelo live Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu lanipha lona.”" 
Deuteronomy4:41 Mosi wabe sewumisa emadolobha lamatsatfu ngasemphumalanga kwemfula iJordane," 
Deuteronomy4:42 lapho bekungakhosela khona nome ngubani lobulele umuntfu ngesiphosiso, angakacondzi. Lowo muntfu abengabaleka akhosele kulelinye lalamadolobha aphephise imphilo yakhe angabe asabulawa." 
Deuteronomy4:43 Lamadolobha bekuyiBheseri, ehlane letintsaba, yona yaba yebakaRubeni, neRamothi kulaseGileyadi, yona yaba yebakaGadi, iGolani leseBhashani, yona yaba yebakaManase." 
Deuteronomy4:44 Lona ngumtsetfo Mosi lawetfula embikwesive sema-Israyeli. 
Deuteronomy4:45 Lena ngimilayeto, nemiyalo, nemitsetfo Mosi labanika yona nabaphuma eGibhithe," 
Deuteronomy4:46 sebaseSihosheni saseBhethi Pheyori ngasemphumalanga kweJordane, eveni lakaSihoni, inkhosi yema-Amori, labebusa eHeshboni, wancotjwa nguMosi nema-Israyeli nabaphuma eGibhithe." 
Deuteronomy4:47 Balidla live lakhe nelive la-Ogi, inkhosi yaseBhashani, lamakhosi lamabili esive sema-Amori ngasemphumalanga kwemfula iJordane." 
Deuteronomy4:48 Lelive lalisuka e-Aroyeri emngcengcemeni weSihosha sase-Anoni, lize liyewufika eNtsabeni iSiyoni, leyo yiHemoni," 
Deuteronomy4:49 lifake ekhatsi lonkhe live lase-Arabha ngasemphumalanga kweJordane, kuze kuyewufika eLwandle lwase-Arabha, ngaphansi kwemacele asePhisga." 
Deuteronomy5:1 Mosi wabita sonkhe sive sema-Israyeli wakhuluma kuso, watsi: “Lalelani, ma-Israyeli, timiso nemitsetfo lengininika yona lamuhla. Yifundzeni nibe neliciniso kutsi nitayilalela niyilandzele." 
Deuteronomy5:2 Simakadze Nkulunkulu wetfu wasenta natsi sivumelwane eHorebe. 
Deuteronomy5:3 Yebo, Simakadze akasentanga nabobabe betfu leso sivumelwane, kodvwa wasenta natsi tsine lesisaphila lamuhla." 
Deuteronomy5:4 Simakadze wakhuluma nani buso nebuso asemlilweni etikwentsaba. 
Deuteronomy5:5 Ngaleso sikhatsi mine ngema emkhatsini waSimakadze nani kuze ngimementele livi laSimakadze kini, ngobe nine benesaba umlilo anizange nenyukele entsabeni. “Simakadze watsi:" 
Deuteronomy5:6 ‘NginguSimakadze Nkulunkulu wakho lowakukhipha eGibhithe, eveni lebugcili." 
Deuteronomy5:7 “ ‘Ungabi nalabanye bonkulunkulu ngaphandle kwami. 
Deuteronomy5:8 “ ‘Ungatenteli sithico lesinesimo salokusezulwini etulu, nome salokusemhlabeni phansi, nome emantini ngaphansi kwemhlaba." 
Deuteronomy5:9 Ungasikhotsameli nome usikhonte; ngobe mine, Simakadze Nkulunkulu wakho, nginguNkulunkulu lonesikhwele, ngijezisa bantfwana ngesono saboyise esitukulwaneni sesitsatfu nesesine kulabo labangitondzako," 
Deuteronomy5:10 kodvwa ngentela lutsandvo kuto titukulwane letitinkhulungwane talabangitsandzako bagcine imiyalo yami. 
Deuteronomy5:11 “ ‘Ungalisebentiseli lite libito laSimakadze Nkulunkulu wakho, ngobe Simakadze angeke ahlale angambeki licala lowo lolisebentisa ngelite libito lakhe." 
Deuteronomy5:12 “ ‘Gcina liSabatha ngekulenta libe ngcwele, njengobe Simakadze akuyala." 
Deuteronomy5:13 Uyawusebenta emalanga lasitfupha, wente wonkhe umsebenti wakho," 
Deuteronomy5:14 kodvwa lilanga lesikhombisa liSabatha kuSimakadze Nkulunkulu wakho. Awuyikuwenta umsebenti, wena, nendvodzana yakho, nendvodzakati yakho, nenceku yakho, nencekukati yakho, nenkhabi yakho, nembongolo yakho, nome ngusiphi setifuyo takho, newetive lokakho, khona inceku yakho nencekukati yakho batewuphumula, njengawe." 
Deuteronomy5:15 Khumbula kutsi nawe bewusigcili eGibhithe nekutsi Simakadze Nkulunkulu wakho wakukhipha lapho ngesandla lesinemandla nemkhono lowelulekile. Ngako-ke Simakadze Nkulunkulu wakho ukuyalile kutsi uligcine liSabatha. 
Deuteronomy5:16 “ ‘Hlonipha uyihlo nenyoko, njengobe Simakadze Nkulunkulu wakho akuyala, khona utewuphila sikhatsi lesidze kuze kukuhambele kahle eveni Simakadze Nkulunkulu wakho lakupha lona." 
Deuteronomy5:17 “ ‘Ungabulali. 
Deuteronomy5:18 “ ‘Ungaphingi. 
Deuteronomy5:19 “ ‘Ungebi. 
Deuteronomy5:20 “ ‘Ungafakazi emanga ngamakhelwane wakho. 
Deuteronomy5:21 “ ‘Ungamkhanuki umfati wamakhelwane wakho. Ungayihawukeli ngisho nendlu yamakhelwane wakho, nemhlaba wakhe, nesisebenti sakhe lesidvuna nome lesisikati, nenkhabi yakhe, nembongolo yakhe, nome ngabe seyini-ke yamakhelwane wakho.’" 
Deuteronomy5:22 “Lena-ke ngimiyalo Simakadze laninika yona akhuluma ngeliphimbo lelikhulu kini nonkhe, yena akhuluma asekhatsi emlilweni, etulu entsabeni efini nasebumnyameni lobulicinsi; kute lokunye lakwengeta. Wayibhala etibhelekeceni letimbili tematje, wase unginika tona.”" 
Deuteronomy5:23 “Natsi naniliva lelivi likhuluma ebumnyameni, intsaba isavutsa umlilo, onkhe emadvodza labaholi betive tenu netikhulu tenu teta kimi." 
Deuteronomy5:24 Nafike natsi: ‘Simakadze Nkulunkulu wetfu usikhombise inkhatimulo yakhe nebukhosi bakhe, neliphimbo lakhe silive ekhatsi emlilweni. Lamuhla sesibonile kutsi kantsi umuntfu angajinge aphile nome Nkulunkulu akhuluma naye." 
Deuteronomy5:25 Kodvwa-ke manje sifelani? Lomlilo lomkhulu kangaka utasishisa usicedze, futsi sitakufa nangabe sichubeka kuliva leliphimbo laSimakadze Nkulunkulu wetfu." 
Deuteronomy5:26 Kwase kwenteka yini kutsi umuntfu lobhubhako eve liphimbo laNkulunkulu lophilako likhuluma emlilweni, njengatsi, abuye aphile?" 
Deuteronomy5:27 “ ‘Sondzela wena uyekuva konkhe loko Simakadze Nkulunkulu wetfu lakushoko. Tsine sitawutjelwa nguwe loko Simakadze lakutjela kona, natsi sitawulalela sikwente loko.’" 
Deuteronomy5:28 “Simakadze waniva nanikhuluma kimi, wase ukhuluma kimi utsi: ‘Ngikuvile loku lokukhulunywe ngulabantfu kuwe. Konkhe loko labakukhulume kuwe kulungile kuhle." 
Deuteronomy5:29 Yebo, shangatsi tinhlitiyo tabo tingatsambela ekungesabeni, bagcine imiyalo yami ngaso sonkhe sikhatsi, khona kutawubahambela kahle bona nebantfwababo kuze kube phakadze!" 
Deuteronomy5:30 Hamba ubatjele bancandzeke babuyele emathendeni abo. 
Deuteronomy5:31 Kodvwa wena hlala nami lapha, khona ngitekunika yonkhe imiyalo yami, netimiso tami, nemitsetfo yami lekufanele uyifundzise kutsi bayilandzele eveni lengibanika lona kutsi libe labo.’" 
Deuteronomy5:32 “Ngako caphelani kwenta loko Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu laniyale ngako kutsi nikwente; ningacali nijikele ngesekudla nome ngesancele. 
Deuteronomy5:33 Hambani endleleni Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu laniyale kutsi nihambe ngayo, khona nitewuphila nichume, netinsuku tenu tandze eveni lelitawuba lenu.”" 
Deuteronomy6:1 “Lena ngimiyalo, netimiso, nemitsetfo Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu langiyale ngayo kutsi nginifundzise yona kutsi niyigcine eveni lenitakwewela iJordane newelele kulo kutsi libe lenu," 
Deuteronomy6:2 khona kutewutsi nine, nebantfwabenu, nebantfwababo emvakwabo batekwesaba Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu, yingci nanisagcina tonkhe timiso nemiyalo lengininika yona, khona nitewuva bumnandzi bekuphila imphilo lendze." 
Deuteronomy6:3 Lalelani, ma-Israyeli, nicaphelisise kutsi niyalalela, khona kutanihambela kahle nekutsi nandze kakhulu kulelo live leligcwele lubisi neluju lwetinyosi, njengobe Simakadze Nkulunkulu waboyihlo anetsembisa." 
Deuteronomy6:4 “Lalelani, ma-Israyeli, Simakadze Nkulunkulu wetfu nguye yedvwana longuSimakadze." 
Deuteronomy6:5 Tsandza Simakadze Nkulunkulu wakho, ngayo yonkhe inhlitiyo yakho, nangawo wonkhe umphefumulo wakho, nangawo onkhe emandla akho." 
Deuteronomy6:6 Lemiyalo lengininika yona lamuhla kufanele ibesetinhlitiyweni tenu. 
Deuteronomy6:7 Niyakuyinamatsisela etingcondvweni tebantfwabenu, nikhulume ngayo nanihleti emakhaya, nome nihamba endleleni, nome nilala nome nivuka." 
Deuteronomy6:8 Niyakuyibophela ibe timphawu etandleni tenu nasemabuntini enu. 
Deuteronomy6:9 Niyakuyibhala etinsikeni teminyango yetindlu tenu nasemasangweni enu.” 
Deuteronomy6:10 “Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu utawutsi anganingenisa eveni lafunga ngalo kuboyihlo, Abrahama, na-Isaka, naJakobe kutsi utanipha lona, lelo live linemadolobha lamakhulu lanotsile leningazange niwakhe," 
Deuteronomy6:11 tindlu letigcwele tonkhe tinhlobo tetintfo letinhle leningazange nite nato, nemitfombo leningazange niyimbe, netivini, nemasimi etitselo temncumo leningazange nitihlanyele, nitawutsi ningadla nesutse," 
Deuteronomy6:12 nicaphele kutsi ningamkhohlwa Simakadze lowanikhipha eGibhithe, eveni lebugcili." 
Deuteronomy6:13 Yesabani Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu, nikhonte yena yedvwa, nifunge ngelibito lakhe." 
Deuteronomy6:14 Ningatilandzeli letinye tithico, lekutithico taletive letinihacile;" 
Deuteronomy6:15 ngobe Nkulunkulu wenu, losemkhatsini wenu, nguNkulunkulu lonesikhwele; nentfukutselo yakhe itanivutsela inishise inicedze niphele nya kulelive." 
Deuteronomy6:16 “Ningamlingi Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu njengobe nenta eMasa. 
Deuteronomy6:17 Cinisekani kutsi niyayigcina imiyalo yaSimakadze Nkulunkulu wenu kanjalo futsi nato timiso laninike tona. 
Deuteronomy6:18 Yentani lokulungile nalokuhle ebusweni baSimakadze, khona kutanihambela kahle, nitsi ningangena nilitsatse lelive lelihle Simakadze laletsembisa ngesifungo kubokhokho benu," 
Deuteronomy6:19 nicitse tonkhe titsa tenu embikwenu, njengobe Simakadze asho." 
Deuteronomy6:20 “Etikhatsini letitako indvodzana yakho iyawutsi nayibuta itsi: ‘Isho kutsini lemiyalo, naletimiso, nalemitsetfo Simakadze Nkulunkulu wetfu lasiyala kutsi siyigcine?’" 
Deuteronomy6:21 uyawuphendvula utsi: ‘Sasitigcili taFaro eGibhithe, kodvwa Simakadze wasikhipha eGibhithe ngesandla sakhe lesinemandla." 
Deuteronomy6:22 Satibonela tsine ngewetfu emehlo Simakadze enta tibonakaliso netimanga letesabekako naletinkhulu eGibhithe kuFaro nasemndenini wakhe wonkhe. 
Deuteronomy6:23 Kodvwa wasikhipha lapho wasiletsa lapha, wasipha lelive laletsembisa ngekufunga kwakhe kubokhokho betfu." 
Deuteronomy6:24 Simakadze wasiyala kutsi sihloniphe tonkhe letimiso nekutsi sesabe Simakadze Nkulunkulu wetfu, kuze sihlale sichuma njalo, njengobe kunjalo nalamuhla." 
Deuteronomy6:25 Nasinakekela kutsi sihloniphe wonkhe lomtsetfo nalemiyalo embikwaSimakadze Nkulunkulu wetfu, njengobe asiyalile, loko kutawuba kulunga kwetfu.’ ”" 
Deuteronomy7:1 “Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu utaningenisa eveni lenitawuhlala kulo libe lenu. Utawucosha embikwenu letive letinyenti letikulo: emaHethi, nemaGirigashi, nema-Amori, nemaKhenani, nemaPheresi, nemaHivi, nemaJebhusi, tive letisikhombisa letinkhulu naletinemandla kunani." 
Deuteronomy7:2 Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu letive utawutsi angatinikela etandleni tenu, nitehlule, niboticedza tiphele nya. Ningenti sivumelwane nato, ningabi namusa kuto." 
Deuteronomy7:3 Ningendziselani nato. Emadvodzakati enu ningavumi kutsi ashade nemadvodzana ato, nemadvodzana enu ningavumi kutsi ashade nemadvodzakati ato," 
Deuteronomy7:4 ngobe ayawuhlubukisa lamadvodzana enu angabe asangilandzela, awente akhonte labanye bonkulunkulu, intfukutselo yaSimakadze bese iyanivutsela, inibhubhise ngekushesha." 
Deuteronomy7:5 Naku-ke lenitakwenta kuto: Bhidlitani emalati ato, nephule netinsikamatje tato lekutsiwa tingcwele, nijube tinsika tato tabo-Ashera losithicokati sabo, nishise netithico tato ngemlilo." 
Deuteronomy7:6 Ngobe nine nisive lesingcwele saSimakadze Nkulunkulu wenu. Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu unikhetse emkhatsini wato tonkhe tive letisebusweni bemhlaba, kutsi nibe sive sakhe, sive lesiligugu lelingelakhe." 
Deuteronomy7:7 “Simakadze akazange anitsandze waze wanikhetsa ngobe nisive lesinyenti kwendlula letinye, ngobe vele nanisive lesincane kunato tonkhe." 
Deuteronomy7:8 Kodvwa kwaya ngekutsi Simakadze wanitsandza wasigcina sifungo sakhe lasenta kubokhokho benu kutsi anikhiphe ngesandla lesinemandla, wanihlenga eveni lebugcili, nasemandleni aFaro, inkhosi yaseGibhithe." 
Deuteronomy7:9 Yatini-ke kutsi Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu unguNkulunkulu; unguNkulunkulu lowetsembekile losigcinako sivumelwane sakhe selutsandvo kuto titukulwane letitinkhulungwane kulabo labamtsandzako bagcine imiyalo yakhe," 
Deuteronomy7:10 kodvwa labo labamtondzako uyawuphindzisela kubo yena matfupha ngekubabhubhisa; angeke alibale kuphindzisela kubo babukile labo labamtondzako. 
Deuteronomy7:11 Ngako-ke caphelani nilandzele imiyalo, netimiso, nemitsetfo lengininika yona lamuhla.”" 
Deuteronomy7:12 “Naniyilandzela lemitsetfo, niyinakekela ngekuyenta njengobe injalo, naye Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu utasigcina setsembiso sakhe selutsandvo kini, njengobe afunga kuboyihlomkhulu." 
Deuteronomy7:13 Utanitsandza, anibusise, anandzise nibe banyenti. Utasibusisa sitselo sesisu senu, netilimo telive lenu, nakolo wenu, neliwayini lenu lelisha, nemafutsa enu, nemankhonyane etinkhomo tenu, nemazinyane emihlambi yenu kulelive lafunga ngalo kuboyihlomkhulu kutsi utawunipha lona." 
Deuteronomy7:14 Niyawubusiswa kwendlula tonkhe tive; kute lomdvuna nome lomsikati longeyiwutala umntfwana, ngisho netifuyo tenu tingeke tibe tinyumba." 
Deuteronomy7:15 Simakadze utanigcina aniphephise kuto tonkhe tifo. Angeke anijezise ngetifo letesabekako lenatibona eGibhithe, kodvwa uyakubajezisa ngato labo labanitondzako." 
Deuteronomy7:16 Kufanele nibhubhise tonkhe leto tive Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu lataninika tona. Ningatihawukeli ningabakhonti ngisho nabonkulunkulu bato, ngobe loko kuyawuba lugibe kini." 
Deuteronomy7:17 “Encenye etinhlitiyweni tenu nitsi: ‘Letive tinemandla kakhulu kunatsi; singaticosha kanjani lapha sitikhiphe?’ 
Deuteronomy7:18 Cha, ningatesabi, khumbulani kahle kutsi Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu wentani kuFaro naseveni lonkhe laseGibhithe." 
Deuteronomy7:19 Natibonela nine ngewenu emehlo timangaliso letinkhulu netibonakaliso, nesandla lesinemandla leseluliwe, Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu lanikhiphe ngaso. Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu utakwenta njalo kuto tonkhe tive lenitesabako nyalo." 
Deuteronomy7:20 Ngetulu kwaloko Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu utawutfumela kutfutfumela nekwesaba emkhatsini wato, kuze kutsi ngisho nalabo labasasele banibhacele nabo babhujiswe." 
Deuteronomy7:21 Ningabesabi, ngobe Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu, losemkhatsini wenu, unguNkulunkulu lomkhulu nalowesabekako." 
Deuteronomy7:22 Tonkhe letive letisembikwenu Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu utatikhipha kancane kancane. Ningeke nivunyelwe kutsi niticitse tonkhe tiphele ngasikhatsi sinye, ngobe phela kungabe sekwandza tilwane tesiganga emkhatsini wenu." 
Deuteronomy7:23 Kodvwa Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu letive utatinikela esandleni senu, atisanganise kakhulu tize tibhujiswe." 
Deuteronomy7:24 Emakhosi ato utawanikela esandleni senu, nine niwabhubhise, emabito awo aphele emhlabeni. Kute loyakuba nemandla ekumelana nani; niyakuwabhubhisa." 
Deuteronomy7:25 Tithico tato niyakutishisa ngemlilo. Ningacali nihawukele isiliva negolide lekuto, ningatitsatseli loko, ngobe nitawubanjwa lugibe lwato, ngobe loko kusinengiso kuSimakadze Nkulunkulu wenu." 
Deuteronomy7:26 Ningacali niletse loko lokusinengiso etindlini tenu, funa nani nehlukaniswe nibekwe eceleni, khona nitewubhujiswa njengako. Kufanele nitenyanye letithico, ngobe setivele tehlukaniselwe kubhujiswa.”" 
Deuteronomy8:1 “Caphelani kutsi nilandzela yonkhe imitsetfo lengininika yona lamuhla, khona nitewuphila, nandze, ningene nilidle lelive Simakadze laletsembisa ngesifungo kubokhokho benu." 
Deuteronomy8:2 Khumbulani kutsi Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu wanihola njani kuyo yonkhe indlela yenu ehlane kuleminyaka lengema-40, wanitfobisa wanivivinya, khona atewukwati lenanikucondzile enhlitiyweni yenu nekutsi nitayigcina yini imiyalo yakhe, nome cha." 
Deuteronomy8:3 Wanitfobisa, wanenta nalamba, wabe sewunondla ngemana, lenaningayati nekuyati nine naboyihlo benu, wentela kunifundzisa kutsi umuntfu akaphili ngesinkhwa sodvwa kodvwa nangawo onkhe emavi laphuma emlonyeni waSimakadze." 
Deuteronomy8:4 Timphahla tenu atizange tiguge, netinyawo tenu atizange tivuvuke kuleminyaka lengema-40." 
Deuteronomy8:5 Yatini-ke etinhlitiyweni tenu kutsi njengobe indvodza iyicondzisa ibuye iyijezise indvodzana yayo, kanjalo Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu uyanicondzisa abuye anijezise." 
Deuteronomy8:6 Gcinani imiyalo yaSimakadze Nkulunkulu wenu, nihambe etindleleni takhe nimhloniphe." 
Deuteronomy8:7 Ngobe Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu uniyisa eveni lelihle: live lelinemifula netitiba temanti, netiyalu letigeleta etihosheni nasetintsabeni;" 
Deuteronomy8:8 live lelinakolo, nebhali, nemivini, nemakhiwa, nemahananandza, nemafutsa emncumo, neluju lwetinyosi;" 
Deuteronomy8:9 live lapho singeke sesweleke khona sinkhwa, ningeke neswele lutfo; live lapho emadvwala akhona ayinsimbi, lapho ningemba khona litfusi etintsabeni talo." 
Deuteronomy8:10 Nase nidlile nesutsa, dvumisani Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu ngalelive lelihle laniphe lona.”" 
Deuteronomy8:11 “Caphelani-ke kutsi ningamkhohlwa Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu ngekungagcini imiyalo yakhe, nemitsetfo yakhe kanye netimiso takhe lengininika tona lamuhla." 
Deuteronomy8:12 Ngaphandle kwaloko niyawutsi nase nidle nesutsa, nakha netindlu letinhle, natinta," 
Deuteronomy8:13 nemihlambi yetifuyo tenu seyandzile, nesiliva yenu negolide yenu seyandzile, nako konkhe leninako sekwandzile," 
Deuteronomy8:14 inhlitiyo yenu bese iyakhukhumala, nize nikhohlwe Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu, lowanikhipha eGibhithe, eveni lebugcili." 
Deuteronomy8:15 Wanihola nadzabula ekhatsi lihlane lelikhulukati nalelesabekako, live lelomile nalelite emanti, lelinetinyoka letinesihlungu nabofecela. Wanitfululela emanti edvwaleni lelilukhuni." 
Deuteronomy8:16 Wanipha imana kutsi nitewudla ehlane, intfo boyihlo lababengazange sebayati, entela kunitfobisa anivivinye, khona kutawutsi ekugcineni kunihambele kahle." 
Deuteronomy8:17 Wena ungatitjela utsi: ‘Ngemandla ami netikhwepha temikhono yami letingikhitsitele wonkhe lomcebo.’ 
Deuteronomy8:18 Kodvwa khumbula Simakadze Nkulunkulu wakho, ngobe nguye lokunika emandla ekukhitsita lomcebo, abuye agcizelele sivumelwane sakhe lasenta ngesifungo kuboyihlo njengalamuhla." 
Deuteronomy8:19 “Nanike nakhohlwa Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu nalandzela labanye bonkulunkulu nabakhonta naze nakhotsama kubo, ngiyanecwayisa lamuhla kutsi nakanjani niyawubhujiswa." 
Deuteronomy8:20 Naningamlaleli Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu, nani niyawubhujiswa njengato letive Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu latibhubhisa embikwenu.”" 
Deuteronomy9:1 “Lalelani-ke, ma-Israyeli! Manje senitakwewela iJordane ningene niyewucosha letive letinyenti naletinemandla kunani, letinemadolobha lamakhulu lanetibondza letindze letifikela esibhakabhakeni." 
Deuteronomy9:2 Labantfu banemandla, kantsi futsi badze, bangema-Anaki. Niyabati labo bantfu futsi nise neva ngabo kutsiwa: ‘Ngubani longamelana nema-Anaki?’" 
Deuteronomy9:3 Kodvwa banini nesiciniseko lamuhla kutsi Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu nguye lohamba embikwenu njengemlilo locotfulako. Utababhubhisa, abehlule embikwenu nibuka. Nitawubakhipha nibacedze ngekushesha, njengobe Simakadze anetsembisa." 
Deuteronomy9:4 “Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu uyawutsi angaticosha embikwenu, nine-ke ningabosho enhlitiyweni yenu nitsi: ‘Simakadze ungiletse lapha ngitewudla lelive libe lami ngenca yekulunga kwami.’ Cha, akunjalo; kuye ngebubi baletive kutsi Simakadze aticoshe embikwenu." 
Deuteronomy9:5 Akukayi ngekulunga kwenu nome ngebucotfo benu kutsi nihambe niyekudla lelive lato; kodvwa kuye ngebubi baletive kutsi Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu aticoshe embikwenu, kuze kufezeke loko lakufungela kubokhokho benu bo-Abrahama, na-Isaka, naJakobe." 
Deuteronomy9:6 Condzisisani-ke kutsi akukayi ngekulunga kwenu kutsi Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu aniphe lelive lelihle kutsi nilidle libe lenu, ngobe nine nisive lesinenhloko lelukhuni." 
Deuteronomy9:7 “Khumbulani loku ningakhohlwa kutsi Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu namcansula kanjani ehlane. Kusukela ngelilanga lenaphuma ngalo eGibhithe kuze kube ngulesikhatsi lenifike ngaso lapha seloku animlaleli Simakadze. 
Deuteronomy9:8 Naluvusa lulaka lwaSimakadze eHorebe, naluvusa waze watfukutsela wafuna kunibhubhisa anicedze nonkhe." 
Deuteronomy9:9 Ngesikhatsi ngenyukela etulu entsabeni kuyawukwemukela tibhelekeca tematje lekwakutibhelekeca tesivumelwane Simakadze lasenta nani, ngahlala entsabeni emalanga langema-40 nebusuku lobungema-40; ngangingadli kudla, nginganatsi manti." 
Deuteronomy9:10 Simakadze wanginika tibhelekeca letimbili tematje letatibhalwe ngumuno waNkulunkulu. Yayibhalwe kuto yonkhe imiyalo yaSimakadze layimemetela kini emlilweni etikwentsaba ngalelo langa lemhlangano. 
Deuteronomy9:11 Ekupheleni kwalamalanga langema-40 nebusuku lobungema-40, Simakadze wanginika letibhelekeca letimbili tematje, lekwakutibhelekeca tesivumelwane." 
Deuteronomy9:12 “Simakadze wangitjela watsi: ‘Yewuka ngekushesha, ngobe labantfu bakho lowabakhipha eGibhithe sebonakele. Sebahlubuke ngekushesha kuloko lengabayala ngako, futsi sebatibumbele sithico.’" 
Deuteronomy9:13 “Simakadze wakhuluma kimi, watsi: ‘Sengibabonile labantfu kutsi basive lesinenhloko lelukhuni ngempela!" 
Deuteronomy9:14 Ase ungiyekele, khona ngitewubabhubhisa ngesule nelibito labo ngaphansi kwelizulu. Wena ngitakwenta ube sive lesinemandla nalesikhulu kunabo.’" 
Deuteronomy9:15 “Ngako ngancandzeka ngehla entsabeni leyayisavutsa umlilo. Letibhelekeca letimbili tematje tatisetandleni tami. 
Deuteronomy9:16 Ngatsi nangibuka, ngabona kutsi senonile kuSimakadze Nkulunkulu wenu; senitentele sithico senu, nasibumba saba nesimo selitfole. Nase nisheshe niyaphambuka endleleni Simakadze labeniyale kutsi nihambe ngayo." 
Deuteronomy9:17 Ngako ngatsatsa letibhelekeca letimbili tematje ngatilahla phansi, tabhidlika, taba ticucu embikwenu nibuka." 
Deuteronomy9:18 “Ngaphindza ngatitfoba ngakhotsama kuSimakadze futsi emalanga langema-40 nebusuku lobungema-40; ngangingadli kudla nginganatsi nemanti, ngenca yato tonkhe tono lenase nitentile, ngekwenta lokubi kuSimakadze, ngaloko namcunula, wase uyatfukutsela." 
Deuteronomy9:19 Ngesaba intfukutselo nelulaka lwaSimakadze, ngobe watfukutsela waze wafuna kunibhubhisa anicedze nonkhe. Kodvwa Simakadze waphindza wangilalela." 
Deuteronomy9:20 Simakadze watfukutselela kubhubhisa Aroni amcedze, kodvwa nangaleso sikhatsi ngamncusela futsi na-Aroni." 
Deuteronomy9:21 Ngaphindza ngatsatsa leyontfo yenu lesono, litfole lenase nilentile, ngalishisa emlilweni. Ngaligaya laba yimphuphu lecolisakele njengelutfuli, ngatsela lolutfuli kulomfula lowawugeleta, wehla kulentsaba." 
Deuteronomy9:22 “Naphindze natfukutselisa Simakadze eThabera, naseMasa kanye naseKhibrothi Hathava." 
Deuteronomy9:23 “Ngesikhatsi Simakadze anikhipha eKhadeshi Bhaneya watsi: ‘Hambani nenyuke niyekulidla lelive lenginiphe lona.’ Kodvwa nine anizange niwulalele umyalo waSimakadze, nangete namkholwa, nangete nalilalela ngisho nelivi lakhe." 
Deuteronomy9:24 Nine anizange nimlalele Simakadze, seloku ngacala kunati." 
Deuteronomy9:25 “Ngawa phansi ngakhotsamisa buso bami embikwaSimakadze kuwo onkhe lamalanga langema-40 nebusuku lobungema-40, ngobe Simakadze abetsite utanibhubhisa." 
Deuteronomy9:26 Ngathandaza kuSimakadze ngatsi: ‘Hawu, Somandla, Simakadze, ungasibhubhisi sive sakho lesilifa lakho lowalihlenga ngemandla akho lamakhulu, wasikhipha eGibhithe ngesandla lesinemandla." 
Deuteronomy9:27 Khumbula tinceku takho bo-Abrahama, na-Isaka, naJakobe. Ungabunaki buhlongandlebe balesive, nebubi baso, nesono saso." 
Deuteronomy9:28 Nakungenjalo, lesive lowasikhipha kuso sitawutsi: “Kungobe Simakadze wehluleka kubangenisa kulelive labebatsembise lona, kantsi futsi kungobe abebatondza, ngako wabakhiphela kutawubabulalela ehlane.”" 
Deuteronomy9:29 Empeleni basive sakho lesilifa lakho, lowalikhipha ngemandla akho lamakhulu nangengalo yakho leyelulekile.’ ”" 
Deuteronomy10:1 “Ngaleso sikhatsi Simakadze wakhuluma kimi, watsi: ‘Bata tibhelekeca letimbili tematje letifanana naleta takucala, bese wenyuka nato uta lapha kimi etulu entsabeni. Yakha nelibhokisi ngemapulango." 
Deuteronomy10:2 Mine ngitawubhala kuletibhelekeca tematje wona lawo mavi labebhalwe etibhelekeceni tekucala lowatiphihlita. Utawube sewutifaka kulelo bhokisi.’ 
Deuteronomy10:3 “Ngako lelo bhokisi ngavele ngalakha ngemgamba, ngabata naleto tibhelekeca letimbili tematje, tafanana netekucala, ngenyuka ngaya etulu entsabeni ngiphetse leto tibhelekeca letimbili ngetandla tami." 
Deuteronomy10:4 Simakadze wabhala kuto kona loko labekubhale kwekucala, imiyalo lelishumi labeyikhulume kini entsabeni, emlilweni, ngelilanga lemhlangano. Simakadze wase unginika tona." 
Deuteronomy10:5 Ngabe sengiyancandzeka, ngehla, ngabeka letibhelekeca tematje ebhokisini lesivumelwane lengase ngilentile, njengobe Simakadze abengiyalile, namanje tisekhona lapho.”" 
Deuteronomy10:6 Ema-Israyeli esuka emitfonjeni yemaJakani ahamba aya eMosera. Ngulapho Aroni afela khona wangcwatjwa. Eleyazare, indvodzana yakhe, wabe sewuba ngumphristi esikhundleni sakhe." 
Deuteronomy10:7 Esuka lapho emisa eGudgoda, abesendlulela eJotbatha eveni lelinemifula." 
Deuteronomy10:8 Ngaso leso sikhatsi Simakadze wehlukanisela sive semaLevi kutsi umsebenti waso kube kwetfwala libhokisi lesivumelwane saSimakadze, nekuma embikwaSimakadze sikhonte siphimisele tibusiso egameni lakhe, njengobe sisenta nalamuhla." 
Deuteronomy10:9 Ngiko nje emaLevi angenaso sabelo nome lifa emkhatsini wabomnakabo. Simakadze ulifa lawo, njengobe Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu awatjela." 
Deuteronomy10:10 “Ngahlala entsabeni emalanga langema-40 nebusuku bawo, njengobe ngangente njalo kwekucala; Simakadze waphindza wangilalela futsi nangaleso sikhatsi. Bekungesiyo intsandvo yakhe kutsi anibhubhise." 
Deuteronomy10:11 Wakhuluma kimi watsi: ‘Sukuma wehle uyewuhola lesive sitewuhamba singene silidle lelive lengafunga ngalo kubokhokho baso kutsi ngiyawubapha lona.’ ” 
Deuteronomy10:12 “Manje-ke, ma-Israyeli, yini lokufunwa nguSimakadze Nkulunkulu wenu kini ngaphandle kwekutsi nesabe Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu, nihambe etindleleni takhe tonkhe, nimtsandze nimkhonte Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu ngenhlitiyo yenu yonkhe, nangemphefumulo wenu wonkhe," 
Deuteronomy10:13 nigcine nemiyalo yaSimakadze kanye netimiso takhe lengininika tona lamuhla kutsi tibe lusito kini? 
Deuteronomy10:14 “Emazulu ngewaSimakadze Nkulunkulu wenu, ngisho nemazulu lasetulu kakhulu imbala; nemhlaba nako konkhe lokukuwo kwakhe." 
Deuteronomy10:15 Noko Simakadze lutsandvo lwakhe walwenta lwanamatsela kubokhokho benu, wabatsandza, wanikhetsa nine titukulwane tabo, ngetulu kwato tonkhe tive, njengobe kunjalo lamuhla." 
Deuteronomy10:16 Ngako-ke, sokani tinhlitiyo tenu, ningaphindzi nibe netinhloko letilukhuni." 
Deuteronomy10:17 Ngobe Simakadze longuNkulunkulu wenu nguNkulunkulu wabonkulunkulu, neNkhosi yemakhosi, nguNkulunkulu lomkhulu, nalonemandla nalowesabekako; akakhetsi, kantsi futsi akadizelwa." 
Deuteronomy10:18 Uyabavikela labo labatintsandzane nebafelokati; nesihambi uyasitsandza asiphe kudla nekwekwembatsa. 
Deuteronomy10:19 Kufanele nibatsandze labo labatihambi, ngobe nani nake naba tihambi eveni laseGibhithe." 
Deuteronomy10:20 Yesabani Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu, nimkhonte. Bambelelani kuye nitsatse tifungo tenu egameni lakhe." 
Deuteronomy10:21 LoNkulunkulu nguye loludvumo lwenu, nguye lowanentela leto tintfo letinkhulu netimangaliso letesabekako, lenatibonela nine ngewenu emehlo." 
Deuteronomy10:22 Bokhokho benu labehla baya eGibhithe babengema-70 sebabonkhe, kodvwa manje Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu sewunente nandza naba ngangetinkhanyeti tesibhakabhaka.”" 
Deuteronomy11:1 “Niyawutsandza Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu nente konkhe lafuna kutsi nikwente, nilalele timiso takhe, nemitsetfo yakhe kanye nemiyalo yakhe ngaso sonkhe sikhatsi." 
Deuteronomy11:2 Khumbulani-ke lamuhla kutsi bekungini, hhayi bantfwabenu, labakubona nalabakuva kujeziswa nekucondziswa nguSimakadze Nkulunkulu wenu: bukhosi bakhe, nesandla sakhe lesinemandla kanye nengalo yakhe leyelulekile," 
Deuteronomy11:3 tibonakaliso latenta netintfo latenta ekhatsi esigodlweni saseGibhithe kuFaro, inkhosi yaseGibhithe, naseveni lakhe lonkhe;" 
Deuteronomy11:4 kutsi wentani emabutfweni aseGibhithe, nasemahhashini awo, nasetincoleni tawo, ngekutsi akudvungulule ngemanti eLwandle Lolubovu ngesikhatsi emaGibhithe anicosha, aphela onkhe atsi nya." 
Deuteronomy11:5 Bekungini, hhayi bantfwabenu, lababona kutsi wanentelani ehlane naze nefika lapha," 
Deuteronomy11:6 nekutsi wentani kuboDathani na-Abiramu, emadvodzana a-Eliyabe, labengumRubeni, ngesikhatsi umhlaba ukhamisa, onkhe ema-Israyeli abuka, wabagwinya bona kanye nemindeni yabo, nemathende abo, nako konkhe lokuphefumulako lokwakungekwabo." 
Deuteronomy11:7 Kodvwa ngini lenatibonela ngewenu emehlo tonkhe tintfo letinkhulu letentiwa nguSimakadze.” 
Deuteronomy11:8 “Niboyigcina yonkhe imiyalo lengininika yona lamuhla, khona nitewucina nilidle lelive leningena kulo kutsi nitewulenta libe lenu," 
Deuteronomy11:9 nekutsi nitewuphila imphilo lendze kulelo live leligcwele lubisi neluju lwetinyosi, Simakadze lafunga ngalo kubokhokho benu kutsi utalinika bona kanye netitukulwane tabo." 
Deuteronomy11:10 Ngobe lelive leningena kulo kutsi nilidle libe lenu alifanani nelive laseGibhithe, lapho niphuma khona. Lapho nanihlanyela khona inhlanyelo yenu, bese ninisela ngemisele njengengadze yetibhidvo." 
Deuteronomy11:11 Kodvwa lelive leningena kulo kuyawulidla live letintsaba netihosha temifula, yebo, live lelinemvula." 
Deuteronomy11:12 Leli live Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu lalinakekelako; emehlo aSimakadze Nkulunkulu wenu akesuki kulo, kusukela ekucaleni kwemnyaka kuze kube ngusekupheleni kwawo." 
Deuteronomy11:13 “Nangabe niyayilalela imiyalo lengininika yona lamuhla, nitsandze Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu, nimkhonte ngayo yonkhe inhlitiyo yenu, nangawo wonkhe umphefumulo wenu," 
Deuteronomy11:14 uyawunipha imvula eveni lenu ngesikhatsi sayo, imvula yekucala neyekugcina, kuze nibutse kahle kudla kwenu, neliwayini lenu, kanye nemafutsa enu." 
Deuteronomy11:15 Uyawuhlumisa tjani emadlelweni enu, kuze tinkhomo tenu titewudla kahle, nani niyawudla nesutse." 
Deuteronomy11:16 “Caphelani-ke kutsi tinhlitiyo tenu tingayengeki bese niyaphambuka nikhonte labanye bonkulunkulu nikhotsamele bona. 
Deuteronomy11:17 Ngobe lulaka lwaSimakadze luyawunivutsela, avale emazulu kuze kungabikho mvula lenako, nemhlaba ubete sitselo, nani nibhubhe niphele kulelo live lelihle Simakadze lanipha lona." 
Deuteronomy11:18 “Lamavi ami niyakuwagcina etinhlitiyweni tenu, niwanamatselise nasetingcondvweni tenu, niyakuwabophela abe luphawu etandleni tenu, abe ngimihlobiso yemabunti enu." 
Deuteronomy11:19 Niyakuwafundzisa bantfwabenu nikhulume ngawo nanihleti emakhaya, nome nihamba endleleni, nome nilala, nome nivuka." 
Deuteronomy11:20 Wabhaleni etinsikeni teminyango yetindlu tenu nasemasangweni enu," 
Deuteronomy11:21 khona kutawutsi emalanga enu newebantfwana benu atewuba madze kulelo live Simakadze lafunga ngalo kubokhokho benu kutsi uyawubanika lona, yingci sibhakabhaka nasisengetulu kwemhlaba." 
Deuteronomy11:22 “Nangabe ninakekela kahle yonkhe lemiyalo lengininika yona, ngekutsi nitsandze Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu, nihambe etindleleni takhe tonkhe, nibambelele kuye," 
Deuteronomy11:23 Simakadze utatikhipha aticoshe tonkhe letive letisembikwenu, nilidle nalelo live lelinetive letinkhulu naletinemandla kunani." 
Deuteronomy11:24 Yonkhe indzawo lapho niyawunyatsela khona iyawuba live lenu: Kusukela ehlane kuze kube nguseLebanoni, nekusuka emfuleni iYufrathe kuze kube nguseLwandle Lwasenshonalanga." 
Deuteronomy11:25 Kute umuntfu loyawuba nemandla ekumelana nani. Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu uyakwenta bantfu batfutfumele ngani banesabe eveni lonkhe leniyawunyatsela kulo, njengobe anetsembisa." 
Deuteronomy11:26 “Bukani la, ngibeka embikwenu sibusiso nesicalekiso." 
Deuteronomy11:27 Kuyawuba sibusiso kini, naniyilalela imiyalo yaSimakadze Nkulunkulu wenu lengininika yona lamuhla." 
Deuteronomy11:28 Kuyawuba sicalekiso kini, naningayilaleli imiyalo yaSimakadze Nkulunkulu wenu, niphindze niphambuke endleleni lenginiyale ngayo lamuhla, bese nilandzela labanye bonkulunkulu leningazange senibati." 
Deuteronomy11:29 Ngesikhatsi Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu aniletsa kulelive leningena kulo kutsi nitewulidla, tibusiso niyawutimemetela eNtsabeni iGerizimu, ticalekiso nitimemetele eNtsabeni i-Ebhali." 
Deuteronomy11:30 Letintsaba leti tingesheya kweJordane ngasenshonalanga kwemgwaco loya lapho kushona ngakhona lilanga, eceleni kwetihlahla letikhulu taseMore, eveni lalawo maKhenani labehlala e-Arabha esigodzini saseGilgali." 
Deuteronomy11:31 Senitayewela iJordane nitewudla lelive Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu lanipha lona. Niyawutsi ningalidla nasenihleti kulo," 
Deuteronomy11:32 nicaphele kutsi nitigcina tonkhe timiso nemitsetfo lengiyibeka lapha embikwenu lamuhla.” 
Deuteronomy12:1 “Leti-ke timiso nemitsetfo lekufanele niyilalelisise, nase nikulelive Simakadze Nkulunkulu wabokhokho benu laniphe lona kutsi libe lenu, niyakuyigcina yingci nanisaphila kulelo live." 
Deuteronomy12:2 Nibotibhubhisa tonkhe letindzawo letisetulu etintsabeni, nasemagcumeni, nangaphansi kwato tonkhe tihlahla letiluhlata, lapho letive lenitemuka lelive betikhontela khona bonkulunkulu bato." 
Deuteronomy12:3 Niyakuwadzilita emalati ato, nibhidlite tinsikamatje tato letitsi tingcwele, nishise naletinsika ta-Ashera wabo ngemlilo, nigawule naletithico tato, nesule emabito ato kuleto tindzawo." 
Deuteronomy12:4 “Aniyikumkhonta Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu ngendlela yabo. 
Deuteronomy12:5 Kodvwa nine niyawufunisisa indzawo leyawukhetfwa nguSimakadze Nkulunkulu wenu leyawubasemkhatsini wato tonkhe tive tenu, lapho ayawubeka khona Libito lakhe, ahlale khona. Ngukuleyo ndzawo-ke lapho niyakuya khona," 
Deuteronomy12:6 nimikise iminikelo yenu yekushiswa nemihlatjelo, nekwelishumi kwenu, netipho tenu leto lenincume ngato kutsi nitatiletsa, neminikelo yenu yesihle kanye nematubulo enu etinkhomo netimvu." 
Deuteronomy12:7 Ngulapho-ke lapho niyawudlela khona nine nemindeni yenu, nijabule embikwaSimakadze ngako konkhe lenabeka sandla senu kuko, ngobe Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu anibusisile." 
Deuteronomy12:8 “Aniyikwenta njengobe senta lamuhla lokutsi wonkhe umuntfu atentele njengekubona kwakhe 
Deuteronomy12:9 nisengakefiki endzaweni yekuphumula, nasefeni Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu lanipha lona." 
Deuteronomy12:10 Kodvwa niyakwewela iJordane nakhe kulelive Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu lanipha lona kutsi libe lifa lenu, uyawunipha kuthula kuto tonkhe titsa tenu letinitungeletile, nihlale ngekuphepha." 
Deuteronomy12:11 Kuleyo ndzawo-ke Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu layakuyikhetsa ibe yakhe, niyawuletsa khona konkhe lenginiyale ngako: iminikelo yenu yekushiswa, nemihlatjelo yenu, nekwelishumi kwenu, netipho tenu letimcoka kanye nayo yonkhe iminikelo yenu yelikhetselo lenanetsembisa ngayo kuSimakadze." 
Deuteronomy12:12 Tfokotani kuSimakadze Nkulunkulu wenu, nine nemadvodzana nemadvodzakati enu, netisebenti tenu letidvuna naletisikati, nemLevi lohlala kulelo dolobha lenu, njengobe yena ate sabelo nome lifa lelingelakhe." 
Deuteronomy12:13 Nicaphele ninganikeli iminikelo yenu yekushiswa kunome nguyiphi indzawo leniyitsandzako. 
Deuteronomy12:14 Niyakuyinikela kuphela kuleyo ndzawo Simakadze latayikhetsa emkhatsini walesinye setive tenu, ngulapho niyawutigcinela khona tonkhe letintfo lenginiyala ngato." 
Deuteronomy12:15 “Noko ningahlaba nidle inyama kunome ngukuliphi lalamadolobha enu, kuye ngekutsandza kwenu nangesibusiso saSimakadze Nkulunkulu wenu laninike sona. Longcolile nome lohlantekile ngekwemtsetfo bobabili bangadla ngalokufananako inswephe nome inyamatane." 
Deuteronomy12:16 Kodvwa kufanele ningayidli ingati; niyakuyicitsela phansi emhlabatsini njengemanti. 
Deuteronomy12:17 Aniyikudlela emadolobheni enu kwelishumi kwenu kwalokutinhlavu, nome kweliwayini lelisha, nome kwemafutsa, nome kwematubulo emihlambi yenu yetinkhomo, neyetimbuti, neyetimvu, nome ngabe seyini-ke lenetsembisele kwephana ngayo, neminikelo yenu yesihle, netipho tenu letimcoka." 
Deuteronomy12:18 Kodvwa niyawutidlela embikwaSimakadze Nkulunkulu wenu endzaweni leyawukhetfwa nguSimakadze Nkulunkulu wenu, nine nemadvodzana enu, nemadvodzakati enu, netisebenti tenu letidvuna naletisikati, kanye nemaLevi lahlala emadolobheni enu. Niyawujabula embikwaSimakadze Nkulunkulu wenu kuko konkhe leniyawukwenta." 
Deuteronomy12:19 Caphelani kutsi ningawalibali emaLevi, yingci nanisahlala kulelo live lenu." 
Deuteronomy12:20 “Nangabe Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu asalandzisile lelive lenu, njengobe anetsembisa lona, bese nikhanuka inyama nitsi: ‘Ngikhanuka inyama,’ niyakuyidla niyesutse njengekutsandza kwenu." 
Deuteronomy12:21 Nangabe indzawo Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu layikhetsele kubeka Libito lakhe ikhashane kakhulu kunani, ningahlaba emihlambini Simakadze laniphe yona, njengobe senginiyalile, nidlele emadolobheni enu kuye ngekutsandza kwenu." 
Deuteronomy12:22 Niyakuyidla njengobe beningadla inswephe nome inyamatane. Longcolile nome lohlantekile ngekwemtsetfo bobabili bangadla ngalokufananako. 
Deuteronomy12:23 Kodvwa nibocaphela kutsi ningayidli ingati, ngobe ingati ikuphila, akufanele nidle kuphila kanye nenyama." 
Deuteronomy12:24 Kufanele ningayidli ingati; niyakuyicitsela phansi emhlabatsini njengemanti. 
Deuteronomy12:25 Aniyikuyidla, khona kuyawunihambela kahle nine kanye nebantfwabenu emvakwenu, ngobe niyakube nenta lokuhle emehlweni aSimakadze." 
Deuteronomy12:26 “Kodvwa niyawutsatsa tintfo tenu letingcwelisiwe nako konkhe lenetsembise kutsi niyawunikela ngako niye endzaweni leyawukhetfwa nguSimakadze. 
Deuteronomy12:27 Niyakwetfula iminikelo yenu yekushiswa elatini laSimakadze Nkulunkulu wenu, inyama nengati kokubili. Ingati yemihlatjelo yenu kufanele icitselwe emaceleni elilati laSimakadze Nkulunkulu wenu, kodvwa lenyama ningatidlela." 
Deuteronomy12:28 Caphelani kutsi niyilalele yonkhe lemiyalo lengininika yona, kuze kutenihambela kahle ngaso sonkhe sikhatsi, nine nebantfwabenu emvakwenu, ngobe nitawube nenta lokuhle nalokwemukelekile emehlweni aSimakadze Nkulunkulu wenu.”" 
Deuteronomy12:29 “Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu utaticedza letive letisembikwenu leniyawutivimbetela nidle live lato. Kodvwa nase niticoshile nahlala eveni lato," 
Deuteronomy12:30 nase tiphelile embikwenu, caphelani ningabhajwa elugibeni lwekubuta ngabonkulunkulu bato, nitsi: ‘Letive tibakhonta njani bonkulunkulu bato? Natsi sitakwenta njengato.’" 
Deuteronomy12:31 Aniyikumkhonta Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu ngendlela yato, ngobe tona natikhonta bonkulunkulu bato, tenta tonkhe tintfo letenyanyekako naletisinengiso kuSimakadze. Tona tize tishise nemadvodzana nemadvodzakati ato emlilweni njengemihlatjelo kulabonkulunkulu bato." 
Deuteronomy12:32 “Caphelani kutsi niyakwenta konkhe loko lenginiyala ngako; ningengeti, ninganciphisi.”" 
Deuteronomy13:1 “Nangabe umphrofethi nome umphuphi wemaphupho achamuka emkhatsini wenu bese umemetela sibonakaliso nome simangaliso kini," 
Deuteronomy13:2 nangabe lesibonakaliso nome lesimangaliso lakhulume ngaso sesenteka, bese utsi: ‘Asilandzele labanye bonkulunkulu leningazange senibati, sikhonte bona,’" 
Deuteronomy13:3 ningacali niwalalele emavi alowo mphrofethi nome lowo mphuphi wemaphupho. Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu uyanivivinya kutsi atfole kahle kutsi niyamtsandza yini Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu ngayo yonkhe inhlitiyo yenu nangawo wonkhe umphefumulo wenu. 
Deuteronomy13:4 Niyawulandzela yena Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu, nimesabe, nigcine imiyalo yakhe nilalele nelivi lakhe; niyawukhonta yena ninamatsele kuye." 
Deuteronomy13:5 Kodvwa lowo mphrofethi nome lowo mphuphi wemaphupho uyawubulawa, ngobe unifundzise kutsi nihlubuke Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu lowanikhipha eGibhithe, wanihlenga eveni lebugcili; yebo, abetama kuniphambukisa endleleni Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu laniyala kutsi nihambe ngayo. Niyakukukhipha kanjalo-ke lokubi lokumila emkhatsini wenu." 
Deuteronomy13:6 “Nangabe umnakenu, nome indvodzana yakho, nome indvodzakati yakho, nome umkakho lomtsandzako, nome umnganakho lomkhulu akuwunga ngasense atsi: ‘Asambe siyewukhonta labanye bonkulunkulu,’ leningazange senibati nine naboyihlo," 
Deuteronomy13:7 bonkulunkulu betive lenakhelene nato, letisedvutane naletikhashane, kusuka ngala kwelive kuye ngale," 
Deuteronomy13:8 ungacali umvumele, futsi ungamlaleli. Ungabi naluvelo ngaye. Ungamphephisi, futsi ungamvikeli." 
Deuteronomy13:9 Nome kanjani lowo kufanele nimbulale, afe. Sandla sakho kufanele sibe sekucala ekumbulaleni, bese kulandzela letinye-ke tandla tesive sonkhe." 
Deuteronomy13:10 Mgcobeni ngematje aze afe, ngobe wetame kunigudlula kuSimakadze Nkulunkulu wenu lowanikhipha eGibhithe, eveni lebugcili." 
Deuteronomy13:11 Israyeli wonkhe uyakuva esabe, kute nome munye emkhatsini wenu loyawuphindze ayente leyontfo lembi." 
Deuteronomy13:12 “Naniva kushiwo loko ngalelinye lalamadolobha Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu lanipha wona kutsi nihlale kuwo," 
Deuteronomy13:13 kutsi sekuvele bantfu lababi emkhatsini wenu baphambukisa bantfu balelo dolobha labo babedukise batsi: ‘Asambe siyewukhonta labanye bonkulunkulu,’ leningazange senibati," 
Deuteronomy13:14 kufanele loko nikuhlolisise, nikuphenyisise kahle. Nangabe kutfolakala kuliciniso kutsi lentfo lesinengiso yentiwe emkhatsini wenu," 
Deuteronomy13:15 kufanele nibabulale ngenkemba bonkhe labahlala kulelo dolobha. Nilibhubhise lonkhe lelo dolobha, bantfu balo kanye netifuyo talo." 
Deuteronomy13:16 Butsani konkhe loko lokuphangwe kulo nikubutsele ndzawonye enkhundleni yelidolobha, nilishise lonkhe lelo dolobha kanye nemphango yalo kube ngumnikelo wekushiswa samuku kuSimakadze Nkulunkulu wenu. Liyawusala litindzala phakadze naphakadze, aliseyiwuphindze lakhiwe kabusha." 
Deuteronomy13:17 Kute nome yinye yaleto tintfo letilahliwe lekufanele titfolakale etandleni tenu, kuze Simakadze atewugucuka ekutfukutseleni kwakhe lokwesabekako. Uyakunentela umusa abe nesihawu kini, anandzise, njengobe afunga kuboyihlomkhulu," 
Deuteronomy13:18 ngobe phela nimlalele Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu, nagcina yonkhe imiyalo yakhe lengininika yona lamuhla, nenta lokulungile embikwakhe.”" 
Deuteronomy14:1 “Nine nibantfwana baSimakadze Nkulunkulu wenu. Ningatisiki nome nihhule lingembili letinhloko tenu ngenca yalabafile," 
Deuteronomy14:2 ngobe nisive lesingcwele saSimakadze Nkulunkulu wenu. Kuto tonkhe tive letisebusweni bemhlaba, Simakadze ukhetse nine kutsi nibe sive lesiligugu lakhe.”" 
Deuteronomy14:3 “Ningadli lutfo lolusinengiso. 
Deuteronomy14:4 Nati-ke tilwane leningatidla: yinkhomo, nemvu, nembuti," 
Deuteronomy14:5 nenyamatane, nenswephe, nelincala, nemphala, nelingcina, neliwula, neligoga." 
Deuteronomy14:6 Ningatidla tonkhe tilwane letehlukanisa tinselo kabili naletihlabulako. 
Deuteronomy14:7 Noko kuleto letihlabulako nome kuleto letinetinselo letehlukene ningete nalidla likamela, nemgwaja, nembila. Nome tihlabula, kodvwa tinetinselo letingakehlukani, tingcolile kini ngekwemtsetfo." 
Deuteronomy14:8 Nehhontji ingcolile kini, nome inetinselo letehlukene, noko ayihlabuli. Akukafaneli niyidle inyama yato, futsi ningatitsintsi ngisho netidvumbu tato." 
Deuteronomy14:9 “Kuto tonkhe tilwane letihlala emantini, ningatidla tonkhe leto letinetimphikwana tekuntjweza netincwencwe." 
Deuteronomy14:10 Kodvwa konkhe lokute timphikwana tekuntjweza netincwencwe ningacali nikudle; ngekwemtsetfo kungcolile kini. 
Deuteronomy14:11 “Ningayidla nome nguyiphi inyoni lehlantekile. 
Deuteronomy14:12 Kodvwa leti ningacali nitidle: lusweti, nelingce, nelingce lelimnyama," 
Deuteronomy14:13 nanhloyile lobovu, nanhloyile lomnyama, nalohheya wekufuywa nome waluphi luhlobo," 
Deuteronomy14:14 nelihhwabayi nome laluphi luhlobo," 
Deuteronomy14:15 sikhova, nesahhukulu, nenkhankhu, naloklebe nome waluphi luhlobo," 
Deuteronomy14:16 nenkovazana, nesikhova lesikhulu, nesikhova lesimhlophe," 
Deuteronomy14:17 nesikhova sasehlane, nenkwazi, nemphishamanti," 
Deuteronomy14:18 nagilonki, namatalatingwenya nome waluphi luhlobo, natsekwane, nelilulwane." 
Deuteronomy14:19 “Tonkhe tilwanyakatana letindiza tibe libulo tingcolile kini ngekwemtsetfo, ningatidli." 
Deuteronomy14:20 Kodvwa niyawutidla tonkhe tilwane letihlantekile letinetimphiko. 
Deuteronomy14:21 “Ningacali nidle lutfo lenilukhandze lutifele. Loko ningakupha umuntfu wetive lohlala kunome ngukuliphi lalamadolobha enu; yena-ke angakudla nome nine nikutsengisele lomunye wetive. Kodvwa nine nisive lesingcwele kuSimakadze Nkulunkulu wenu. “Ningalipheki lizinyane lembuti elubisini lwenina.” 
Deuteronomy14:22 “Yehlukanisani kwelishumi kwaso sonkhe sivuno, umnyaka ngemnyaka." 
Deuteronomy14:23 Niyawudla kwelishumi kwenu kwalokutinhlavu, nekweliwayini lelisha, nekwemafutsa, nekwematubulo etinkhomo netimvu, netimbuti embikwaSimakadze Nkulunkulu wenu endzaweni layawuyikhetsela kubeka Libito lakhe, kuze nitewufundza kuhlonipha Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu ngaso sonkhe sikhatsi." 
Deuteronomy14:24 Kodvwa nangabe leyo ndzawo ikhashane, kantsi Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu unibusisile futsi ningeke nikhone kwetfwala loko kwelishumi kwenu, ngobe phela lendzawo letawukhetfwa nguSimakadze kutsi kubekwe Libito lakhe kuyo ikhashane kakhulu," 
Deuteronomy14:25 ngako shintjiselanani kwelishumi kwenu ngemali, bese nitsatsa leyo mali niyimikisa kuleyo ndzawo Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu latayikhetsa." 
Deuteronomy14:26 Ngaleyo mali niyawutsenga nome ngabe yini leniyitsandzako: tinkhomo, nome timvu, nome liwayini, nome sinatfo lesifakwe imbiliso, nome ngabe yini leniyifisako. Wena nendlu yakho uyawudla lapho utfokote embikwaSimakadze Nkulunkulu wakho." 
Deuteronomy14:27 “Ningawakhohlwa emaLevi lahlala emadolobheni enu, ngobe wona akanaso sabelo nome lifa." 
Deuteronomy14:28 Njalo nje ekupheleni kweminyaka lemitsatfu niyawuletsa konkhe kwelishumi lokusivuno salowo mnyaka nikulondvolote emadolobheni enu," 
Deuteronomy14:29 kuze kutsi emaLevi late sabelo nome lifa lekungelawo, nebetive, netintsandzane, nebafelokati labahlala emadolobheni enu bangeta batekudla besutse, kuze Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu anibusise kuko konkhe lenikwentako.”" 
Deuteronomy15:1 “Ekupheleni kwayo yonkhe iminyaka lesikhombisa kufanele nitesule tikwelede talabo labanikweledako. 
Deuteronomy15:2 Loku kuyakwentiwa kanje: Wonkhe umbolekisi kufanele asesule sikwelede umnakabo longum-Israyeli lanaso kuye. Angeke aphindze asihambele sikwelede sakhe kumnakabo longum-Israyeli, ngobe phela sikhatsi saSimakadze sekwesula tikwelede sesimenyetelwe." 
Deuteronomy15:3 Ungamhambela sikwelede umuntfu wetive, kodvwa kufanele ukwesule konkhe lokweledwa kona ngumnakenu." 
Deuteronomy15:4 “Noko akufanele kube nalomphofu emkhatsini wenu, ngobe kulelive Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu lanipha lona kutsi nilidle libe lifa lenu utanibusisa kakhulu ngemcebo," 
Deuteronomy15:5 nangabe kambe nimlalela kuko konkhe Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu, futsi ninakekela nilandzele yonkhe lemiyalo lengininika yona lamuhla." 
Deuteronomy15:6 Ngobe Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu utanibusisa njengobe etsembisile, niyakwebolekisa etiveni letinyenti, kodvwa nine ningeke neboleke lutfo kunome ngukusinye sato. Niyawubusa tive letinyenti, kodvwa kute nome sinye lesiyakunibusa." 
Deuteronomy15:7 “Nangabe kukhona lomphofu emkhatsini webanakenu nome ngukuliphi lalamadolobha alelive Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu lanipha lona, ningacali nibe nelunya nekwemana kumnakenu lomphofu." 
Deuteronomy15:8 Kepha nine niyakwephana nimeboleke ngekukhululeka nangesihle nome ngabe yini layidzingako. 
Deuteronomy15:9 Nicaphele kutsi ningawufukameli lomcabango lomubi lotsi: ‘Umnyaka wesikhombisa lekungumnyaka wekwesulwa kwetikwelede sewusondzele,’ nize nikhombise inhlitiyo lembi kumnakenu lonesidzingo ngekungamniki lutfo. Ngobe angahle akhale ngani kuSimakadze, bese-ke nine nitfolakala ninelicala lesono." 
Deuteronomy15:10 Mupheni ngaphandle kwenhlitiyo lebubulako nalenemagcubu; ngobe ngenca yaloko Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu uyawunibusisa emsebentini wenu wonkhe nakuko konkhe lenikwenta ngetandla tenu. 
Deuteronomy15:11 Bantfu labamphofu bayawuhlala bakhona njalo nje eveni. Ngako-ke ngiyaniyala ngitsi banini ngulabephanako kubomnakenu, nakulabamphofu, nalabeswele eveni lenu.”" 
Deuteronomy15:12 “Nangabe umnakenu longumHebheru, indvodza nome umfati, atsengiswa kuwe, abotsi angakusebentela iminyaka lesitfupha, ngemnyaka wesikhombisa umkhulule ahambe." 
Deuteronomy15:13 Nawumkhulula ungacali umhambise yabayaba. 
Deuteronomy15:14 Muphe ngekukhululeka, umkhetsele emihlambini yakho, umkhiphele nasengungwini yekudla, kanye nasetjeni lakho lekuhluta liwayini. Uyawumupha ngangekubusiswa kwakho nguSimakadze Nkulunkulu wakho." 
Deuteronomy15:15 Khumbula kutsi nawe wake waba sigcili eGibhithe, Simakadze Nkulunkulu wakho wakuhlenga. Nguko nje ngikunika lomyalo lamuhla." 
Deuteronomy15:16 “Kodvwa nangabe lesigcili sakho sitsi kuwe: ‘Angifuni kusuka lapha kuwe,’ ngesizatfu sekutsi sitsandza wena kanye nemndeni wakho, futsi siphatseke kahle lapha kakho," 
Deuteronomy15:17 ubobe sewutsatsa lusungulo ubhobosele lihwandza lalendlebe yaso etikwesivalo; sesiyakuba sigcili sakho size sife. Uyakwenta njalo nakuso sigcilikati sakho. 
Deuteronomy15:18 Ungakutsatsi ngekutsi kuyintfo lematima kakhulu kukhulula sigcili sakho, ngobe kukusebentela kwaso kuleminyaka lesitfupha kulingana nalokuphindvwe kabili lebekungentiwa sisebenti lesicashiwe. Simakadze Nkulunkulu wakho uyakukubusisa kuko konkhe lokwentako.”" 
Deuteronomy15:19 “Simakadze Nkulunkulu wakho uyakumehlukanisela onkhe ematubulo lamadvuna etinkhomo netimvu kanye netimbuti. Ungawabopheli ematubulo etinkhomo takho futsi ungawahhuli ematubulo etimvu takho. 
Deuteronomy15:20 Yonkhe iminyaka wena nemndeni wakho uyawutidlela embikwaSimakadze Nkulunkulu wakho kuleyo ndzawo leyawukhetfwa nguye. 
Deuteronomy15:21 Nangabe sifuyo sichwalile, sichuta nome siyimphumphutse, nome sinesiyela lesibi kabi, ungacali usente umhlatjelo kuSimakadze Nkulunkulu wakho." 
Deuteronomy15:22 Uyakusidlela edolobheni lakho. Bonkhe, labangcolile ngekwemtsetfo nalabahlantekile, bangasidla, kube shangatsi badla inswephe nome inyamatane." 
Deuteronomy15:23 Kodvwa ungaboyidla ingati; uboyicitsa phansi emhlabatsini njengemanti.” 
Deuteronomy16:1 “Njalo nje ngenyanga ya-Abibi nibowugcina niwugubhe uMkhosi weliPhasika laSimakadze Nkulunkulu wenu, ngobe ngayo lenyanga wanikhipha ebusuku eGibhithe." 
Deuteronomy16:2 Niyakwenta umhlatjelo weliPhasika kuSimakadze Nkulunkulu wenu ngesilwane leniyawusitsatsa emihlambini yenu yetimvu nome yetinkhomo, niwentele endzaweni Simakadze layakuyikhetsela kubeka Libito lakhe." 
Deuteronomy16:3 LeliPhasika ningalidli kanye nesinkhwa lesinembiliso. Kuyawuze kuphele emalanga lasikhombisa solomane nidla sinkhwa lesite imbiliso, sinkhwa selusizi, ngobe naphuma ngekuphutfuma lokukhulu eGibhithe. Loko kuyakwenta kutsi nihlale nilikhumbula njalo lilanga lenaphuma ngalo eGibhithe, yonkhe imphilo yenu." 
Deuteronomy16:4 Kufanele kubete lotfolakala anembiliso eveni lenu kuwo onkhe lawo malanga lasikhombisa. Kubete inyama yemhlatjelo lowentiwe ebusuku belilanga lekucala, leyawusala kuze kuse." 
Deuteronomy16:5 “Ningacali nente umhlatjelo weliPhasika kunome ngukuliphi lidolobha Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu layawunipha lona," 
Deuteronomy16:6 ngaphandle kwaleyo ndzawo layakuyikhetsela kubeka Libito lakhe. Umhlatjelo weliPhasika niyakuwentela khona lapho kusihlwa nakushona lilanga ngemgubho wekuphuma kwenu eGibhithe. 
Deuteronomy16:7 Leyo nyama niyakuyosa niyidlele kuleyo ndzawo leyawukhetfwa nguSimakadze Nkulunkulu wenu, bese kutsi ekuseni nincandzeke niye emakhaya enu." 
Deuteronomy16:8 Niyawudla sinkhwa lesite imbiliso kuze kuphele emalanga lasitfupha, bese kutsi ngelilanga lesikhombisa nente umhlangano kuSimakadze Nkulunkulu wenu, ningatsintsi lutfo lolungumsebenti.”" 
Deuteronomy16:9 “Niyawubala emaviki lasikhombisa kusukela ekucaleni kwekuvunwa kwalokutinhlavu. 
Deuteronomy16:10 Niyakube senigubha uMkhosi Wemaviki, lekunguMkhosi Wekuvuna Kolo, kuSimakadze Nkulunkulu wenu ngekuletsa iminikelo yesihle ngangekwesibusiso Simakadze Nkulunkulu lanibusise ngaso." 
Deuteronomy16:11 Niyawujabula embikwaSimakadze Nkulunkulu wenu endzaweni layakuyikhetsela kubeka Libito lakhe, kujabule nine, kanye nemadvodzana nemadvodzakati enu, netigcili netigcilikati tenu, nemaLevi lakulamadolobha enu, nebetive, netintsandzane, nebafelokati labahlala kanye nani." 
Deuteronomy16:12 Nibokhumbula kutsi nani nake naba tigcili eGibhithe, ngako tilandzeleni ngekunakekela letimiso.”" 
Deuteronomy16:13 “Niyawugubha uMkhosi Wemadlangala emalanga lasikhombisa emvakwekucedza kwenu kuvuna kolo nemagelebisi. 
Deuteronomy16:14 Niyawujabula eMkhosini wenu nine, nemadvodzana nemadvodzakati enu, netigcili kanye netigcilikati tenu, nemaLevi, nebetive, netintsandzane, nebafelokati labahlala emadolobheni enu." 
Deuteronomy16:15 LoMkhosi niyakuwugubha emalanga lasikhombisa kuSimakadze Nkulunkulu wenu kuleyo ndzawo Simakadze layakuyikhetsa. Ngobe Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu uyawunibusisa kuto tonkhe tivuno tenu nakuyo yonkhe imisebenti yetandla tenu, nekujabula kwenu kuyawuphelela." 
Deuteronomy16:16 “Onkhe emadvodza esive sakini kufanele ete katsatfu ngemnyaka atetibonakalisa kuSimakadze Nkulunkulu wenu kuleyo ndzawo Simakadze latayikhetsa: eMkhosini Wesinkhwa Lesingenambiliso, naseMkhosini Wemaviki, naseMkhosini Wemadlangala. Kufanele kubete indvodza leyawuta itetibonakalisa kuSimakadze ingakaphatsi lutfo." 
Deuteronomy16:17 Ngulowo nalowo akaletse sipho lesifanele sibusiso lasemukele kuSimakadze Nkulunkulu wenu.” 
Deuteronomy16:18 “Khetsani behluleli kanye netindvuna tetinkhundla taleso naleso sive kuwo onkhe emadolobha enu Simakadze Nkulunkulu lanipha wona. Ngibo labayakwehlulela ngekungakhetsi.
