1Samuel19:24 Naye wakhumula tingubo takhe, asahhungulekile njengalaba labanye, naye waphrofetha embikwaSamuweli. Walala angcunu, lonkhe lilanga nebusuku bakhona. Ngiko nje bantfu baze batsi: “Kantsi naSawula sewusemkhatsini webaphrofethi yini?”" 
1Samuel20:1 Davide wesuka wabaleka eNayothi, eRama, waya kuJonathani, wafike wabuta watsi: “Sengenteni? Yini licala lami? Siyini sono sami kuyihlo kutsi angaze afune kungibulala?”" 
1Samuel20:2 Jonathani wamphendvula watsi: “Cha, ungeke ufe! Buka la kimi; babe kute lakwentako, nome kukhulu nome kuncane, angakangitjeli. Pho, angakufihlelani loko kimi? Akunjalo.”" 
1Samuel20:3 Kodvwa Davide wenta sifungo, watsi: “Uyihlo uyati kutsi wena ungitsandza kanganani, waze watsi: ‘Jonathani akufanele akwati loku, ngobe angaphatseka kabi.’ Noko ngifunga ngekuphila kwaSimakadze nangekwakho kutsi sinye sinyatselo kuphela lesisemkhatsini wami nekufa.”" 
1Samuel20:4 Jonathani wakhuluma kuDavide, watsi: “Nome ngabe yini lofuna ngikwentele kona, mine ngitakwentela.”" 
1Samuel20:5 Ngako Davide watsi: “Buka la, kusasa kunemkhosi wekwetfwasa kwenyanga, mine kufanele ngidle nenkhosi; kodvwa ase ngimane ngiyewubhaca esigangeni, kuze kube nguntsambama yangemhlomunye." 
1Samuel20:6 Nangabe uyihlo abona kutsi angikho ekudleni, mtjele utsi: ‘Davide ungincengile wacela imvume kimi kutsi usajakele ekhaya kubo, eBhetlehema, ngobe lusendvo lwakhe lonkhe lwenta umhlatjelo wemnyaka.’" 
1Samuel20:7 Nangabe utsi: ‘Cha, kulungile,’ ngitawube ngisindzile. Kodvwa nangabe atfukutsela, utawuvele utibonele nawe kutsi ucondze lokubi." 
1Samuel20:8 Wena kufanele ukhombise kungitsandza kwakho ngekugcina leso setsembiso lowasenta kimi embikwaSimakadze. Nangabe ngitfolakala nginelicala, ngibulale wena matfupha. Unginiketelelani kuyihlo?”" 
1Samuel20:9 Jonathani wakhuluma watsi: “Cha, ngeke! Nangabe kukhona lokubi bengikwati kutsi babe ukucondzile, bengingeke yini ngikutjele?”" 
1Samuel20:10 Davide wakhuluma kuJonathani, watsi: “Pho, ngubani lotangatisa kutsi uyihlo ukuphendvule ngelulaka?”" 
1Samuel20:11 Jonathani waphendvula watsi: “Kota, sambe siye lena esigangeni.” Ngako bahamba bobabili baya esigangeni." 
1Samuel20:12 Jonathani wakhuluma kuDavide, watsi: “Shangatsi Simakadze Nkulunkulu wema-Israyeli angaba ngufakazi wetfu! Ngalesikhatsi kusasa nome ngemhlomunye ngitawukhuluma nababe; nangabe uyakwemukela, ngitawuvele ngikwatise." 
1Samuel20:13 Kodvwa nangabe babe afuna kukulimata, shangatsi Simakadze angangijezisa ngekungibulala, nangabe ngingakakwatisi bese ngiyakukhulula kutsi uhambe uphephile. Shangatsi Simakadze angaba nawe, njengobe abenababe." 
1Samuel20:14 Kodvwa ase ungiphatse ngemusa longeke ugucuke waSimakadze, yingci nangisaphila, kutsi ngingeke ngibulawe," 
1Samuel20:15 nekutsi ungeke wehlukane nemndeni wami phakadze naphakadze, nome ngabe Simakadze asaticitse tonkhe titsa taDavide emhlabeni.”" 
1Samuel20:16 Ngako Jonathani wenta sivumelwane nendlu yaDavide, watsi: “Shangatsi Simakadze angatibeka licala titsa taDavide.”" 
1Samuel20:17 Jonathani waphindze wenta Davide kutsi asicinise kabusha sifungo sakhe sekutsi uyamtsandza, ngobe Jonathani abetsandza Davide njengobe atitsandza yena." 
1Samuel20:18 Jonathani wakhuluma kuDavide, watsi: “Kusasa kutawuba ngumkhosi wekwetfwasa kwenyanga. Sitaba nesitunge, ngobe kutabe kungekho muntfu esihlalweni sakho." 
1Samuel20:19 Ngemhlomunye ntsambama, hamba uye kulendzawo, lapho bewubhace khona nakucala lenhlupheko, ume ngasetjeni i-Ezeli." 
1Samuel20:20 Ngitawudubula imicibisholo lemitsatfu eceleni kwalo, kube shangatsi ngidubula intfo letsite." 
1Samuel20:21 Ngitawube sengitfumela umfana ngitsi kuye: ‘Hamba uyewufuna lemicibisholo.’ Nangabe ngitsite kuye: ‘Ase ubuke lemicibisholo isedvutane nawe, yiletse lapha,’ kulungile ungeta, ngobe loko kutawube kusho kutsi ayikho ingoti. Loko ngikufunga ngekuphila kwaSimakadze kutsi kute ingoti lekhona." 
1Samuel20:22 Kodvwa nangikhulume kulomfana ngatsi: ‘Ase ubuke lemicibisholo ingembili kwakho,’ ubovele uhambe, ngobe Simakadze ukuhambisile." 
1Samuel20:23 Mayelana naleyo ndzaba lesike sayikhuluma nawe, khumbula kutsi Simakadze ungufakazi emkhatsini wetfu sobabili phakadze naphakadze.”" 
1Samuel20:24 Ngako Davide wabhaca esigangeni; kwatsi kube kufike umkhosi wekwetfwasa kwenyanga, inkhosi yahlala phansi, yadla." 
1Samuel20:25 Inkhosi yahlala endzaweni lapho yayivamise kuhlala khona, ngaselubondzeni. Jonathani wahlala wabhekana nayo. Abneri wahlala eceleni kwaSawula, kwatsi endzaweni yaDavide kwabate lohlala kuyo." 
1Samuel20:26 Sawula kwabate lakushoko ngalelo langa, ngobe abecabanga atsi: “Mhlawumbe kukhona lokwehlele Davide, kwamenta waba ngulongcolile ngekwemtsetfo.”" 
1Samuel20:27 Kodvwa ngelilanga lelilandzelako, lilanga lesibili kuleyo nyanga, lendzawo yaDavide yaphindze yabate umuntfu lohlala kuyo. Sawula wase ubuta kuJonathani, umsa wakhe, watsi: “Kwentiwe yini kutsi umsa waJese angeti kutakudla, itolo nalamuhla?”" 
1Samuel20:28 Jonathani wamphendvula watsi: “Davide ungincusile wacela imvume kimi kutsi aye eBhetlehema," 
1Samuel20:29 watsi: ‘Ase ngihambe, ngobe umndeni wakitsi wenta umhlatjelo edolobheni lawo, ngako umnaketfu utsite kufanele ngibe khona lapho. Nangabe ngizuze umusa kuwe, ngicela kutsi ungivumele ngiyewubona bomnaketfu.’ Ngiko nje angaketi lapha kutakudla nenkhosi.”" 
1Samuel20:30 Sawula watfukutselela Jonathani kamatima, waze wamkhahlameta, watsi: “Wena ndvodzana yemfati lolihlongandlebe nalosihlubuki! Utsi angati yini kutsi wena sewukhetse kuhambisana nemsa waJese, kwaze kwaba lihlazo kuwe nakunyoko lowakutala?" 
1Samuel20:31 Yingci indvodzana yaJese nayisaphila kulomhlaba, wena nembuso wakho ungeke ume. Sheshisa nyalo umlandze ete la, ngobe kufanele afe!”" 
1Samuel20:32 Jonathani wabuta Sawula, uyise, watsi: “Utawubulawelani? Woneni?”" 
1Samuel20:33 Kodvwa Sawula wamjijimeta ngesikhali acondze kumbulala. Ngako Jonathani wavele wabona kutsi uyise abetimisele ngekubulala Davide. 
1Samuel20:34 Jonathani wasukuma lapho ekudleni asatfukutsele abila; ngalelo langa lesibili kuleyo nyanga akazange adle, ngobe abekhutjwe nguyise ngekuphatsa kabi Davide." 
1Samuel20:35 Ngakusasa ekuseni Jonathani wahamba waya lena esigangeni ngaleso sikhatsi bebavumelene ngaso naDavide. Abehamba nemfana. 
1Samuel20:36 Wakhuluma kulomfana watsi: “Gijima uyewulandza nansi imicibisholo lengiyidubulako.” Watsi lomfana asagijima, Jonathani wadubula umcibisholo ngembili kwakhe." 
1Samuel20:37 Watsi kube lomfana efike lapho kwakufike kwawela khona umcibisholo waJonathani, Jonathani wase uyamemeta utsi: “Lomcibisholo awukho ngembili kwakho yini?”" 
1Samuel20:38 Wamemeta lomfana watsi: “Sheshisa! Hamba kakhulu! Ungemi!” Lomfana watsatsa lemicibisholo wayibuyisela kuJonathani. 
1Samuel20:39 Lomfana abengati kutsi konkhe loko kwakusho kutsini; kwaba nguJonathani naDavide kuphela labebati ngaloko. 
1Samuel20:40 Jonathani wabe sewunika lomfana letikhali takhe watsi kuye: “Hamba nato utibuyisele ekhaya.” 
1Samuel20:41 Watsi kube lomfana ahambe, Davide wesuka lapho eningizimu nelitje, wakhotsamela Jonathani katsatfu, abhekise buso bakhe phansi. Base bayangana, bakhala bobabili, kodvwa Davide wakhala kakhulu." 
1Samuel20:42 Jonathani wakhuluma kuDavide, watsi: “Hamba ngekuthula, ngobe lobungani betfu sesibufungele egameni laSimakadze satsi: ‘Simakadze ungufakazi emkhatsini wetfu sobabili nasemkhatsini wetitukulwane tetfu phakadze naphakadze.’ ” Davide wahamba, naJonathani wancandzeka, wabuyela emuva edolobheni." 
1Samuel21:1 Davide wahamba waya ku-Ahimeleki, umphristi, eNobi. Ahimeleki watfutfumela kakhulu, nakahlangana naye, wambuta watsi: “Uhambelani wedvwa? Awuhambi ngani nemuntfu?”" 
1Samuel21:2 Davide waphendvula Ahimeleki, umphristi, watsi: “Inkhosi ingitfume indzaba letsite, yatsi: ‘Kufanele kubete lowatiko ngemsebenti wakho.’ Mine-ke lamadvodza akami ngiwatjele kutsi abongihlangabeta endzaweni letsite." 
1Samuel21:3 Manje-ke, yini lonako? Ngiphe imikhama yetinkhwa letisihlanu, nome yini-ke longaba nayo.”" 
1Samuel21:4 Kodvwa umphristi waphendvula Davide, watsi: “Ngite sinkhwa lesivamile lengingakunika sona; noko sikhona lapha sinkhwa lesingcwele. Ungasitsatsa, nangabe lamajaha lohamba nawo angakalali nalabasikati.”" 
1Samuel21:5 Davide waphendvula watsi: “Vele, akakaze kulamalanga, ngobe lamadvodza akami atigcina amsulwa kulabasikati njalo nje nasitawuba neluhambo. Imitimba yawo ihlala ingcwele, nome ngabe aneluhambo loluvamile, kakhulu kangakanani-ke nangabe loluhambo lumcoka!”" 
1Samuel21:6 Umphristi wase utsatsa lesinkhwa lesasingcwele wasinika Davide, ngobe kwakute sinkhwa lapho ngaphandle kwesinkhwa sebukhona baSimakadze, lesase sisusiwe embikwaSimakadze, kwatsi esikhundleni saso kwabekwa leso lesasisesisha sisashisa." 
1Samuel21:7 Lomunye wetinceku taSawula, lekwakunguDowegi, um-Edomu, abelapho embikwaSimakadze ngalelo langa, angumholi webelusi baSawula." 
1Samuel21:8 Davide wabuta Ahimeleki watsi: “Kute yini sikhali nome inkemba lonayo lapha? Angiketi nayo inkemba yami nome nguluphi nje luhlobo lwesikhali, ngobe lomsebenti wenkhosi bewunekuphutfuma lokukhulu.”" 
1Samuel21:9 Umphristi waphendvula watsi: “Yinkemba yaGoliyathi, umFilisti, lowambulala eSigodzini sase-Ela, lekhona lapha; igocotwe ngendvwangu lapha emvakwesidziya. Nawuyifuna, yitsatse; kute lenye inkemba lelapha ngaphandle kwaleyo.” Davide watsi: “Kute lefanana nayo; nginike yona.”" 
1Samuel21:10 Ngalona lelo langa Davide wabalekela Sawula waya ku-Akhishi, inkhosi yaseGathi." 
1Samuel21:11 Kodvwa tinceku ta-Akhishi takhuluma kuye tatsi: “Akusiye Davide yini lona, loyinkhosi yalelive? Akusiye yini lona labahlabela ngaye nabagidzako batsi: “ ‘Sawula ubulele tinkhulungwane takhe, kodvwa Davide ubulele emashumi etinkhulungwane takhe’?”" 
1Samuel21:12 Davide watsatsa lamavi wawafaka enhlitiyweni yakhe. Wamesaba kakhulu Akhishi, inkhosi yaseGathi." 
1Samuel21:13 Ngako kwakutsi njalo nje nabalapho Davide atentise kube shangatsi uyahlanya. Abevame kudvweba tivalo tesigodlo, nematse awavutisele esilevini sakhe." 
1Samuel21:14 Akhishi wakhuluma netinceku takhe, watsi: “Ase nibuke lendvodza. Iyahlanya! Niyiletselani lapha kimi?" 
1Samuel21:15 Bantfu labahlanyako ngibeswele kangangobe ningaze niletse lomuntfu lapha embikwami? Lendvodza niyiletseleni lapha endlini yami?” 
1Samuel22:1 Davide wesuka eGathi, wabaleka, wayawubhaca emgedzeni wase-Adulamu. Batsi kube bakuve loko bomnakabo nebakubo, behla baya kuye." 
1Samuel22:2 Kwatsi bonkhe laba bebahluphekile, nalababenetikwelede, nalababengeneliseki babutsana kuye, waba ngumholi wabo. Kwaba ngemadvodza labengaba ngema-400." 
1Samuel22:3 Davide wesuka lapho waya eMispa yakaMowabi, wafike wakhuluma enkhosini yakhona, watsi: “Ngicela kukhontela bobabe namake bahlale lapha kakho, ngize ngati kahle kutsi Nkulunkulu utangentelani.”" 
1Samuel22:4 Wase uyabaletsa, beta enkhosini yakaMowabi, bahlala nayo ngaso sonkhe leso sikhatsi, yena asesebhacile enqabeni." 
1Samuel22:5 Kodvwa umphrofethi Gadi wakhuluma kuDavide, watsi: “Ungahlali lapha enqabeni. Hamba uye eveni lakaJuda.” Ngako Davide wesuka wahamba, waya ehlatsini laseHarethi." 
1Samuel22:6 Sawula weva kutsi Davide nebalandzeli bakhe utfolakele. Sawula wahlala ngephansi kwesihlahla sethamariske, aphetse sikhali sakhe ngesandla, entsabeni yaseGibeya, tonkhe tindvuna takhe tatimile timtungeletile." 
1Samuel22:7 Sawula wakhuluma kuto watsi: “Lalelani, madvodza akaBhenjamini! Indvodzana yaJese itaninika nonkhe yini emasimi netivini? Itanenta nonkhe yini kutsi nibe tindvuna tetinkhulungwane netindvuna temakhulu?" 
1Samuel22:8 Kungabe nguloko yini lokunente nangibophela lifindvo? Kute namunye lowangitjela indvodzana yami nayenta sivumelwane nendvodzana yaJese. Kute namunye wenu lohluphekile ngami nalongitjelako kutsi indvodzana yami seyitsenge inceku yami kutsi ingilalele endleleni, njengobe yenta lamuhla.”" 
1Samuel22:9 Kodvwa Dowegi, um-Edomu, labeme kanye netindvuna taSawula, watsi: “Ngiyibonile indvodzana yaJese iya eNobi ku-Ahimeleki, umsa wa-Ahitubi." 
1Samuel22:10 Ahimeleki wayibutela kuSimakadze kutsi kufanele yente njani, wayipha nemiphako kanye nenkemba yaGoliyathi, umFilisti.”" 
1Samuel22:11 Inkhosi yatfumela kutsi akulandvwe umphristi Ahimeleki, umsa wa-Ahitubi, nendlu yeyise yonkhe, lebekunguyona ibaphristi baseNobi; beta bonkhe enkhosini." 
1Samuel22:12 Sawula wakhuluma ku-Ahimeleki, watsi: “Lalela-ke, msa wa-Ahitubi.” Waphendvula watsi: “Yebo, nkhosi yami.”" 
1Samuel22:13 Sawula watsi kuye: “Ningibopheleleni lisu wena nendvodzana yaJese, ngekutsi umnike sinkhwa nenkemba, waze wambutela nakuNkulunkulu, kuze amelane nami, angilalele endleleni, njengobe enta lamuhla?”" 
1Samuel22:14 Ahimeleki wayiphendvula inkhosi watsi: “Ngubani kuto tonkhe tinceku takho lowetsembeke kuwe njengaDavide, umkhwenyane wenkhosi, indvuna yemabutfo lagadza wena, umuntfu lohlonishwa kangaka endlini yakho yonkhe?" 
1Samuel22:15 Bekukucala yini ngalelo langa kutsi ngimbutele kuNkulunkulu? Bengingacali vele! Inkhosi ayingayibeki licala inceku yayo, ngisho namunye webendlu yami, ngobe inceku yenkhosi ayati lutfo ngayo lendzaba.”" 
1Samuel22:16 Kodvwa inkhosi yatsi: “Utakufa nome kanjani, wena Ahimeleki, kanye nayo yonkhe indlu yeyihlo.”" 
1Samuel22:17 Inkhosi yase itjela letindvuna letatiyikakile, yatsi: “Babulaleni labaphristi baSimakadze, ngobe nabo bahlangene naDavide. Bebati kutsi uyabaleka, kodvwa bangete bangitjela.” Kodvwa tindvuna tenkhosi tesaba kubeka sandla sato etikwebaphristi baSimakadze." 
1Samuel22:18 Inkhosi yase itfuma Dowegi, yatsi: “Suka ubulale labaphristi.” Dowegi, um-Edomu, wagucuka wabesukela wababulala. Ngalelo langa wababulala baphristi labangema-85, emadvodza abegcoka sidziya selineni." 
1Samuel22:19 Wachubeka wahlasela nelidolobha laseNobi, lekwakulidolobha lebaphristi, wabulala emadvodza akhona, kanye nebafati bakhona, nebantfwana, netinswane, netinkhomo, netimbongolo kanye netimvu." 
1Samuel22:20 Kodvwa Abiyatha, umsa wa-Ahimeleki, lotalwa ngu-Ahitubi, waphunyula wabaleka, waya kuDavide." 
1Samuel22:21 Wafike watjela Davide kutsi Sawula sewubabulele baphristi baSimakadze. 
1Samuel22:22 Davide wase utsi ku-Abiyatha: “Ngalela langa ngesikhatsi Dowegi, um-Edomu, alapha, ngavele ngati nje kutsi utamtjela nome kanjani Sawula; indlu yeyihlo yonkhe ife ngenca yami." 
1Samuel22:23 Hlala lapha kimi, ungesabi; ngobe lowo lofunana nemphilo yakho ufunana neyami futsi. Utawuphepha lapha kimi.”" 
1Samuel23:1 Base batjela Davide, batsi: “Buka la, emaFilisti asahlasele iKheyila, atfumba nemabala ekubhulela.”" 
1Samuel23:2 Davide wabuta kuSimakadze watsi: “Ngihambe yini ngiyewuhlasela lamaFilisti?” Simakadze wamphendvula watsi: “Hamba uyewuhlasela emaFilisti, usindzise iKheyila.”" 
1Samuel23:3 Kodvwa emadvodza aDavide akhuluma kuye, atsi: “Lapha kaJuda siyesaba, kangakanani-ke nase sisukela iKheyila siyewuhlaselana nemabutfo emaFilisti.”" 
1Samuel23:4 Davide waphindza futsi wabutisisa kuSimakadze. Simakadze wamphendvula watsi: “Yehla uye eKheyila, ngobe emaFilisti ngiwanikela esandleni sakho.”" 
1Samuel23:5 Ngako Davide nemphi yakhe behlela eKheyila, bahlasela emaFilisti bawabulala, batfumba netifuyo tawo. Davide wabasindzisa kanjalo bantfu baseKheyila." 
1Samuel23:6 Abiyatha, umsa wa Ahimeleki, abete nesidziya sebaphristi ngesikhatsi abalekela kuDavide eKheyila." 
1Samuel23:7 Sawula watjelwa kutsi Davide sewehlele eKheyila; ngako watsi: “Simakadze sewumnikele esandleni sami, ngobe Davide sewutivalele yena enkambu ngekutsi angene edolobheni lelinemasango lanemishudvo.”" 
1Samuel23:8 Sawula wabutsa onkhe emabutfo akhe kutsi ehlele eKheyila ayewuhlasela Davide nemadvodza akakhe. 
1Samuel23:9 Watsi kube Davide aluve loluzungu lolwase luboshwe nguSawula ngaye, wakhuluma ku-Abiyatha, umphristi, watsi: “Letsa lapha lesidziya sebaphristi.”" 
1Samuel23:10 Davide wachubeka watsi: “Awu! Simakadze, Nkulunkulu wesive sema-Israyeli, inceku yakho seyivile kutsi ngempela Sawula ufuna kwehlela eKheyila atewubhubhisa lelidolobha ngenca yami." 
1Samuel23:11 Bantfu baseKheyila batanginikela yini kuye? Yena Sawula usetakwehla ngempela yini, njengobe inceku yakho ivile? Awu! Simakadze, Nkulunkulu wema-Israyeli, tjela inceku yakho.” Simakadze watsi: “Utakwehla.”" 
1Samuel23:12 Davide wabuta watsi: “Bantfu baseKheyila batanginikela yini mine nalamadvodza akami esandleni saSawula?” Simakadze wamphendvula watsi: “Bataninikela.” 
1Samuel23:13 Ngako Davide nemabutfo akhe, emadvodza langema-600, babaleka eKheyila, besuka behla benyuka tindzawo ngetindzawo. Kwatsi Sawula nakatjelwa kutsi Davide sewubalekile eKheyila, wangabe asehla." 
1Samuel23:14 Davide wahlala etinqabeni tasehlane, lekwakutintsaba telihlane laseZifu. Sawula abesolomane amfuna onkhe emalanga, kodvwa Simakadze akazange amnikele etandleni takhe." 
1Samuel23:15 Davide wabona kutsi Sawula abephume umkhankhaso wekumbulala, ngako wavele wahlala eHoreshi, ehlane laseZifu." 
1Samuel23:16 Jonathani, umsa waSawula, wesuka lapho waya eHoreshi kuDavide kuyawucinisa sandla sakhe kuNkulunkulu." 
1Samuel23:17 Wafike wakhuluma kuye watsi: “Ungesabi, ngobe sandla sababe, Sawula, singeke sifinyelele kuwe. Wena utawuba yinkhosi ka-Israyeli, mine nje ngitawuba wesibili kuwe. Ngisho nababe Sawula uyakwati loko.”" 
1Samuel23:18 Bobabili base benta sivumelwane embikwaSimakadze. Jonathani wase uyancandzeka ubuyela ekhaya kubo, kodvwa Davide wasala, wahlala khona lapho eHoreshi." 
1Samuel23:19 Bantfu baseZifu bakhuphukela kuSawula eGibeya, bafike bamtjela batsi: “Davide akabhaci yini lapha etinqabeni taseHoreshi, entsabeni iHakhila, ngaseningizimu nelihlane?" 
1Samuel23:20 Manje-ke, nkhosi, wota, nangabe kukuhle kuwe loko, yewuka; tsine sitamnikela esandleni senkhosi.”" 
1Samuel23:21 Sawula waphendvula watsi: “Simakadze akanibusise, ngobe nibe nesihawu kimi." 
1Samuel23:22 Hambani nente lamanye emalungiselelo, nimfunisise, nize nati, niyibone kahle futsi lendzawo lapho Davide akhona, nalapho ahamba khona, nekutsi ngubani lose wambona alapho. Sengivile kutsi ulicili kakhulu." 
1Samuel23:23 Ngako-ke tifuneni nitati kahle tonkhe leto tindzawo labhaca kuto, nibuye nite lapha kimi senineliciniso ngato. Mine-ke ngitawube sengihamba nani, nangabe akulelo live, ngitawutfunguluta ngimfune emkhatsini wato tonkhe tinsendvo temaJuda.”" 
1Samuel23:24 Ngako-ke base bayesuka kuSawula bacondza eZifu. Ngaleso sikhatsi Davide nebalandzeli bakhe bese basehlane laseMayoni, e-Arabha, ngaseningizimu nelihlane." 
1Samuel23:25 BoSawula nemabutfo akhe bacala batfungatsa, bafuna Davide, naDavide watjelwa ngaloko. Davide wabe sewehlela entansi edvwaleni, wahlala ehlane laseMayoni. Watsi kube eve Sawula, wahamba waya ehlane laseMayoni, acosha Davide." 
1Samuel23:26 Sawula abehamba ngakulelinye licele lentsaba, kantsi naDavide nebalandzeli bakhe babehamba ngale kulelinye licele. Davide washesha wahamba lapho, ngobe abesaba Sawula. Kwatsi lapho Sawula nemabutfo akhe asatungelete Davide nemadvodza akakhe asacondze kubatfumba," 
1Samuel23:27 kwefika sigijimi kuSawula, satsi: “Phutfuma! EmaFilisti asatseleke ngekhatsi eveni lakho lena emuva.”" 
1Samuel23:28 Sawula washiya phansi kucoshana naDavide, wahamba wayakulwa nemaFilisti. Nguko nje leyo ndzawo yetsiwa libito, kwatsiwa Lidvwala Lekwehlukanisa." 
1Samuel23:29 Davide wakhuphuka kusuka lapho, wayawubhaca etinqabeni tase-Eni Gedi." 
1Samuel24:1 Kwatsi Sawula asabuyile ekucosheni emaFilisti, watjelwa kwatsiwa: “Davide sewusehlane lase-Eni Gedi.”" 
1Samuel24:2 Sawula wase ukhetsa tingwazi telucobo kulo lonkhe laka-Israyeli, kwaba ngemadvodza lati-3 000; waphuma wayawufuna Davide kanye nebalandzeli bakhe ngase-Emadvwaleni Emagoga." 
1Samuel24:3 Wahamba wefika etibayeni tetimvu endleleni, wakhandza kunemhume lapho, Sawula wangena wayawutikhulula kuwo. BoDavide nemabutfo akhe bebasekhatsi kulowo mhume babhacile." 
1Samuel24:4 Lamadvodza atsi: “Lamuhla ngilo lilanga Simakadze lakhuluma ngalo ngesikhatsi atsi kuwe: ‘Ngitawunikela sitsa sakho esandleni sakho, kuze wente kuso njengekutsandza kwakho.’ ” Davide wanyonyoba wajuba umphetfo wasembatfo saSawula bangamboni." 
1Samuel24:5 Emvakwaloko Davide wakhatsateka enhlitiyweni yakhe ngenca yekujuba lomphetfo wengubo yaSawula. 
1Samuel24:6 Wakhuluma kulamabutfo akhe, watsi: “Simakadze akakutsandzi kutsi ngente intfo lenje enkhosini yami, lengulogcotjiwe waSimakadze, ngiphakamise sandla sami etikwayo, ngobe ingulogcotjiwe waSimakadze.”" 
1Samuel24:7 Ngalawo mavi Davide wekhuta lamabutfo akhe, wawavimbela kutsi ahlasele Sawula. Sawula waphuma kulomhume, wahamba." 
1Samuel24:8 Davide naye wase uyaphuma kulomhume; wamemeta Sawula watsi: “Bayethe, nkhosi yami.” Watsi uyagucuka Sawula, Davide wakhotsama wabhekisa buso bakhe phansi." 
1Samuel24:9 Watsi kuSawula: “Ubalalelelani labantfu labatsi: ‘Davide ufuna kukulimata?’ 
1Samuel24:10 Lamuhla utibonele ngewakho emehlo kutsi Simakadze abekunikele kanjani esandleni sami lapha emhumeni. Labanye bebatsi angikubulale, kodvwa mine ngakuhawukela, ngatsi: ‘Ngingeke ngiyiphakamisele sandla inkhosi yami, ngobe ingulogcotjiwe waSimakadze.’" 
1Samuel24:11 Buka, babe wami, buka nasi sicephu sengubo yakho sisesandleni sami! Ngijube umphetfo wengubo yakho, kodvwa wena ngangete ngakubulala. Yati kahle-ke nyalo, ucondzisise kutsi mine anginacala lekwenta bubi nelekumelana nawe. Mine angikakoni ngalutfo, kodvwa nguwe longitfungatsela kutsi utengibulala." 
1Samuel24:12 Shangatsi Simakadze angakhipha sigwebo emkhatsini wetfu sobabili. Shangatsi Simakadze angangiphindziselela ngabo bonkhe lobubi lobente kimi; kodvwa mine sandla sami singeke sikutsintse. 
1Samuel24:13 Njengobe kusho sisho salabadzala sitsi: ‘Kubenti balokubi kuvela tento letimbi,’ ngako mine ngingeke ngikubeke sandla." 
1Samuel24:14 “Inkhosi yema-Israyeli iphumele kulandzelana nemkhondvo wabani? Umkhondvo wenja lefile! Umkhondvo welikululu? 
1Samuel24:15 Shangatsi Simakadze angaba ngumehluleli ehlulele emkhatsini wetfu sobabili, angimelele ngekungitfola ngite licala, angikhulule esandleni sakho.”" 
1Samuel24:16 Kwatsi kube Davide acedze kusho lamavi, Sawula wabuta watsi: “Livi lakho yini lelo, Davide, ndvodzana yami?” Wakhala kakhulu, amemeta." 
1Samuel24:17 Sawula wakhuluma kuDavide, watsi: “Wena ulunge kakhulu kwengca mine; ngobe wena ungentele lokuhle, kodvwa mine ngikubonge ngebubi." 
1Samuel24:18 Sewukushito manje lokuhle longentele kona, kutsite nome Simakadze asanginikele esandleni sakho, kodvwa wena wangete wangibulala." 
1Samuel24:19 Umuntfu nakabamba sitsa sakhe, uyasiyekela yini siphunyule angakasilimati? Shangatsi Simakadze angakuvuza ngalokuhle ngaloku lokwente kimi lamuhla." 
1Samuel24:20 Manje sengiyati kutsi ngempela wena utawuba yinkhosi, nekutsi umbuso waka-Israyeli utawusimamisa ngesandla sakho." 
1Samuel24:21 Manje funga kimi ngaSimakadze kutsi ungeke usincume situkulwane sami, nelibito lami ngeke ulesule emndenini wababe.”" 
1Samuel24:22 Ngako Davide wafunga kuSawula. Sawula wase uyancandzeka, wabuyela ekhaya lakhe, kodvwa Davide nebalandzeli bakhe bakhuphukela enqabeni." 
1Samuel25:1 Samuweli wafa, kwatsi sonkhe sive sema-Israyeli seta, sahlangana ndzawonye, satakumlilela. Wangcwatjwa ekhaya lakhe, eRama. Davide wase uyehla waya eHlane laseMayoni." 
1Samuel25:2 Bekukhona indvodza leyayicebile eMayoni, yayinetimphahla khona lapho eKhameli. Yayinetimbuti letatiyinkhulungwane netimvu letati-3 000 leyayitifuyele eKhameli, lapho yayitihhulela khona." 
1Samuel25:3 Libito layo lendvodza bekunguNabali, kantsi umkayo bekungu-Abigayili. Lomkakhe abehlakaniphile amuhle, kodvwa lendvodza yayingumKhalebi losibheva lesibi." 
1Samuel25:4 Watsi Davide asesehlane, weva kutsi Nabali uhhula timvu takhe," 
1Samuel25:5 wase utfuma emajaha lalishumi, wakhuluma kuwo watsi: “Yenyukani niye kuNabali eKhameli, nifike nimbingelele egameni lami." 
1Samuel25:6 Nikhulume kuye nitsi: ‘Lunwele loludze kuwe! Ngikufisela imphilo lenhle wena nemndeni wakho, nako konkhe kwakho!" 
1Samuel25:7 “ ‘Ngiva kutsi manje sesikhatsi sekuhhula timvu. Ngesikhatsi belusi bakho banatsi, asizange sibaphatse kabi; nangaso sonkhe sikhatsi baseseKhameli kute nome kunye lokwase kwabalahlekela." 
1Samuel25:8 Buta kuleto tinceku takho, titakutjela. Ngako-ke ngicela uwaphatse kahle lawo majaha ami, ngobe sesifike ngesikhatsi selidzili. Ngicela uphe tinceku takho kanye nendvodzana yakho Davide, loko longahle ubaphe kona.’ ”" 
1Samuel25:9 Lamajaha afike ayetfula kuNabali yonkhe lenkhulumo yaDavide. Abe asayahlalahlala khona lapho. 
1Samuel25:10 Nabali waphendvula letinceku taDavide, watsi: “Ngubani yena loDavide? Ngubani yena lomsa waJese? Tigcili letinyenti tibalekela baphatsi bato kulamalanga." 
1Samuel25:11 Ngingasitsatselani sinkhwa sami, nemanti ami kanye nenyama lengiyihlabele bahhuli betimvu bami, ngikuphe emadvodza lengingawati nekutsi aphumaphi?”" 
1Samuel25:12 Lamajaha akaDavide ancandzeka abuyela emuva. Atsi kube efike, abika konkhe lokwakukhulunywe nguNabali." 
1Samuel25:13 Davide wakhuluma kulamadvodza, watsi: “Hlomani tinkemba tenu!” Ngako lamadvodza avele ahloma, naDavide naye wahloma ngeyakakhe. Bekungemadvodza labengaba ngema-400 lenyuka naDavide, kwatsi lawa langema-200 wona asala agadza timphahla." 
1Samuel25:14 Lenye yetinceku yatjela Abigayili, umkaNabali, yatsi: “Ngesikhatsi Davide asehlane utfumele titfunywa kutsi tiletse umkhontiso kumnumzane lapha ekhaya, kodvwa yena usuke watitsela ngenhlamba." 
1Samuel25:15 Noko lamadvodza abesiphetse kahle. Akazange asihluphe, kuso sonkhe leso sikhatsi sisedvute nawo etsafeni, kute lokwase kwasilahlekela." 
1Samuel25:16 Ebusuku nasemini aba lutsango lwetfu lolwalusitungeletile, ngaso sonkhe sikhatsi siseluse timvu tetfu edvute nawo." 
1Samuel25:17 Ase ucabange, ubone kutsi ungahle wenteni, ngobe umnumzane wetfu lona kanye nemndeni wakhe wonkhe ulengela engotini lenkhulu. Unenkhani kangangobe kute lamlalelako, nakhuluma naye.”" 
1Samuel25:18 Abigayili akacitsanga sikhatsi. Watsatsa tinkhwa letatingema-200 netikhumbasikhwama letimbili tigcwele liwayini, netimvu letisihlanu lesetihlinziwe, nembasha yemmbila lengemakhilogremu labengaba li-17, nemacebelengwane lalikhulu emagelebisi lomisiwe, nemacebelengwane langema-200 emakhiwa lahlutiwe, wakwekhweta etimbongolweni." 
1Samuel25:19 Wabe sewutjela tinceku takhe watsi: “Hambani embili; mine ngitanilandzela ngemuva.” Kodvwa akazange ayitjele indvodza yakhe, Nabali." 
1Samuel25:20 Watsi aseta agibele imbongolo yakhe acondze esihosheni sentsaba, wabona Davide nemadvodza akakhe behla, bacondze kuye, wahlangabetana nabo." 
1Samuel25:21 Davide abesacedza kutsi: “Akukasiti ngalutfo kugadzela lomuntfu timvu takhe lena ehlane kangangekutsi kwabate ngisho nakunye lokwalahleka. Ungibuyisele lokubi ngalokuhle. 
1Samuel25:22 Shangatsi Simakadze angangibulala, nangingakababulali bonkhe labadvuna kusengakasi lamuhla nje!”" 
1Samuel25:23 Watsi kube Abigayili abone Davide, washesha wehla embongolweni yakhe, wakhotsama embikwaDavide abhekise buso bakhe phansi." 
1Samuel25:24 Watijika etinyaweni takhe, watsi: “Nkhosi yami, licala alibe setikwami. Ngicela mane uvumele incekukati yakho kutsi seyimane ikhulume; ulalele kutsi incekukati yakho itawutsini." 
1Samuel25:25 Shangatsi inkhosi ingete yayinaka lendvodza lekhohlakele lenguNabali. Ufanana nelibito lakhe, lelisho Silima, naye unebulima. Kodvwa mine, ncekukati yakho, angikawaboni lamadvodza labetfunyelwe yinkhosi yami." 
1Samuel25:26 “Njengobe Simakadze ukuphephisile wena, nkhosi yami, ekucitseni ingati kanye nasekutikhipheleni sibhongo ngetandla takho, ngifunga ngekuphila kwaSimakadze nangekwakho ngitsi, shangatsi tonkhe titsa takho nabo bonkhe labafuna kukwenta silo sengubo bangafanana naNabali." 
1Samuel25:27 Shangatsi lesipho lesiletfwe ngulencekukati yakho enkhosini yayo singanikwa lawo madvodza layilandzelako. 
1Samuel25:28 Ngicela inceku yakho uyitsetselele ngalesono lesentile, ngobe Simakadze utakwenta ube yinkhosi wena kanye netitukulwane takho, ngobe ulwa timphi takhe. Shangatsi kungabate lokubi lokutfolakala kuwe, yingci nawusaphila." 
1Samuel25:29 Nome ngabe kukhona lokucosha ngemuva afuna kukubulala, kuphila kwenkhosi yami Simakadze Nkulunkulu wakho utakuvikela ngekutsi akubophe inyandza kanye nalabaphilako. Kodvwa kuphila kwetitsa takho utakujikijela akulahle khashane njengelitje liphuma esidubulelweni." 
1Samuel25:30 Utawutsi Simakadze angentela inkhosi yami konkhe lokuhle lakwetsembisa ngayo, nasayibeke yaba yinkhosi etikwa-Israyeli," 
1Samuel25:31 inkhosi yami ingeke itivele inelicala enhlitiyweni yayo ngekubulala ngaphandle kwesizatfu nome ngekutikhiphela sibhongo. Utawutsi Simakadze angayinika kuphumelela inkhosi yami, bese-ke iyayikhumbula incekukati yayo.”" 
1Samuel25:32 Davide wakhuluma ku-Abigayili, watsi: “Akadvunyiswe Simakadze Nkulunkulu wema-Israyeli lokutfume lamuhla kutsi utengihlangabeta." 
1Samuel25:33 Shangatsi ungabusiswa ngalomcondvo wakho lokhaliphile, nekutsi ungivimbe ngingayicitsi ingati lamuhla, nekutsi ngingatiphindziseleli ngetandla tami." 
1Samuel25:34 Simakadze ungigcinile, ngangete ngakulimata. Kodvwa ngifunga ngekuphila kwaNkulunkulu wema-Israyeli kutsi kube awukasheshisi waphutfuma kutengihlangabeta, bekutawutsi kudzabuka kusa lamuhla kube sekute ngisho namunye lomdvuna lophilako kulamadvodza akaNabali.”" 
1Samuel25:35 Davide wakwemukela esandleni sa-Abigayili loko bekakuletse kuye, watsi: “Hamba ngekuthula ubuyele ekhaya. Ngiyivile lenkhulumo yakho, kantsi futsi naloko lokucelako nako sengikunikile.”" 
1Samuel25:36 Watsi Abigayili nakaya kuNabali, wamkhandza asendlini ente lidzili lelifana nelenkhosi. Abetsakasile, adzakwe angumhlaba. Ngako kute lamtjela kona, kwaze kwaba ngusekuseni ngakusasa." 
1Samuel25:37 Kwatsi ekuseni Nabali asasangulukile engcondvweni, asazitsile, umkakhe wamtjela tonkhe leto tintfo. Inhlitiyo yaNabali yashaya kancane, wamane woma nje, wafanana nelitje." 
1Samuel25:38 Emvakwemalanga labengaba lishumi Simakadze washaya Nabali, wafa." 
1Samuel25:39 Watsi kube Davide eve kutsi Nabali sewufile, watsi: “Akadvunyiswe Simakadze, longiphindziselele kuNabali ngekungetfuka kwakhe. Ungigcinile, ngangete ngakwenta lokubi, kodvwa wajezisa Nabali ngenca yekona kwakhe.” Davide watfumela livi ku-Abigayili, amsoma kutsi abe ngumkakhe." 
1Samuel25:40 Tinceku takhe taya eKhameli, tafike takhuluma ku-Abigayili, tatsi: “Davide usitfume kuwe kutsi sitekulandza uyekuba ngumkakhe.”" 
1Samuel25:41 Abigayili wakhotsama abhekise buso bakhe phansi, watsi: “Nansi incekukati yakho, ilungele kukukhonta, nekugeza tinyawo tetinceku tenkhosi yami.”" 
1Samuel25:42 Wasukuma ngekushesha wakhwela embongolweni yakhe, aphekeletelwa timphekeleteli takhe letisihlanu; wahamba netitfunywa taDavide, wafike waba ngumkakhe." 
1Samuel25:43 Davide abeshade na-Ahinowami waseJezreyeli, bobabili baba bafati bakhe." 
1Samuel25:44 Kodvwa Sawula abesatsatse indvodzakati yakhe, Mikhali, umkaDavide, wamendzisela Phaltiyeli, umsa waLayishi, waseGalimu." 
1Samuel26:1 Bantfu labatsite baseZifu bahamba baya kuSawula eGibeya, bafike babika batsi: “Davide ubhace egcumeni lekutsiwa yiHakhila lebhekene nelihlane.”" 
1Samuel26:2 Ngako Sawula wewuka waya eHlane laseZifu, ahamba nemadvodza akakhe elikhetselo lati-3 000 aka-Israyeli, kuyawufuna Davide." 
1Samuel26:3 Sawula wafike wemisa inkambu yakhe eceleni kwemgwaco etikweligcuma iHakhila lebhekene nelihlane, kodvwa Davide wahlala ehlane. Watsi kube abone kutsi Sawula abesamlandzele waze wefika lapho," 
1Samuel26:4 Davide wabe sewutfumela tinhloli letafike takhandza kutsi vele Sawula abesafikile lapho. 
1Samuel26:5 Davide waphuma waya lapho bekumise khona Sawula. Wafike wabona lapho boSawula na-Abneri, umsa waNeri, indvuna yelibutfo, bebalele khona. Sawula abelele ekhatsi nenkambu, atungeletwe libutfo." 
1Samuel26:6 Davide wabuta ku-Ahimeleki, umHethi, na-Abishayi, umsa waSeruya, umnakaboJowabe, watsi: “Ngubani lotakwehla nami siye lapha enkambu kuSawula?” Abishayi waphendvula watsi: “Mine ngitawuhamba nawe.”" 
1Samuel26:7 Ngako boDavide na-Abishayi bahamba baya kulelo butfo ebusuku, bakhandza Sawula alele ekhatsi nenkambu, sikhali sakhe asigcumeke phansi emhlabatsini eceleni kwenhloko yakhe. Abneri nemabutfo bebalele, batungelete Sawula." 
1Samuel26:8 Abishayi wakhuluma kuDavide, watsi: “Lamuhla Nkulunkulu sitsa sakho usetfule etandleni takho. Mane ungivumele ngimgwaze ngesikhali, size siyewuphumela emhlabatsini; ngingeke ngiphindze kwesibili.”" 
1Samuel26:9 Kodvwa Davide wakhuluma ku-Abishayi, watsi: “Ungacali umbulale! Ngubani nje longabeka sandla kulogcotjiwe waSimakadze ajinge angabi nacala?" 
1Samuel26:10 Ngifunga ngekuphila kwaSimakadze kutsi nguSimakadze cobo lwakhe lotakumshaya. Loko kuyakwenteka ngekutsi kufike sikhatsi sakhe sekufa, nome atsi uye emphini afike afele khona." 
1Samuel26:11 Kodvwa Simakadze akangavumi kutsi ngingabeka sandla sami etikwalogcotjiwe waSimakadze. Asitsatse lesikhali sakhe kanye nalelichaga lakhe lemanti lokusedvute nenhloko yakhe, sihambe.”" 
1Samuel26:12 Davide wase utsatsa sikhali nelichaga lemanti lokwakusedvute nenhloko yaSawula, bahamba. Kute namunye lowase wababona nome wati ngaloko, kantsi futsi kute namunye lowake waphaphama. Bonkhe babedvodla butfongo, ngobe Simakadze abebehlisele butfongo lobukhulu." 
1Samuel26:13 Davide wewelela ngesheya, wema khashane etikweligcuma; bekulibanga lelikhulu emkhatsini wabo." 
1Samuel26:14 Wamemeta lelibutfo kanye na-Abneri, umsa waNeri, watsi: “Uyangiva yini, ye Abneri?” Abneri waphendvula watsi: “Ungubani wena lomemeta inkhosi?”" 
1Samuel26:15 Davide wakhuluma watsi: “Angitsi uyindvodza? Ngubani nje lofanana nawe ka-Israyeli? Lenkhosi yakho bewungakayigadzi ngani? Kukhona lofike kutawubulala leyo nkhosi yakho. 
1Samuel26:16 Loko lokwentile akukuhle. Ngifunga ngekuphila kwaSimakadze ngitsi, wena nemabutfo akho kufanele nife, ngobe nehlulekile kuciza inkhosi yenu, lekungulogcotjiwe waSimakadze. Ase nibuke eceleni kwenu. Siphi nje sikhali senkhosi kanye nelichaga lemanti bekulapho eceleni kwenhloko yayo?”" 
1Samuel26:17 Sawula waliva liphimbo laDavide, watsi: “Lelo ngabe livi lakho yini, Davide, ndvodzana yami?” Davide wamphendvula watsi: “Yebo, nkhosi yami, ngimi, nkhosi.”" 
1Samuel26:18 Wachubeka wambuta watsi: “Pho, inkhosi yami iyicoshelani inceku yayo? Ngenteni? Nginacala lini?" 
1Samuel26:19 Nkhosi! Inkhosi yami ayilalele emavi enceku yayo. Nangabe nguSimakadze lokutjotjotele kutsi ungibulale, kulungile-ke, akawutsatse lowo mnikelo. Kodvwa noko nangabe loko kwentiwe bantfu, ababe ngulabacalekisiwe kuSimakadze! Manje sebangikhiphile eveni lekusabelo sami, efeni laSimakadze, batsi: ‘Hamba uyewukhonta labanye bonkulunkulu.’" 
1Samuel26:20 Ungavumi kutsi ingati yami icitsekele emhlabatsini lokhashane nebukhona baSimakadze. Inkhosi yema-Israyeli iphumele kutewufuna likululu, njengemuntfu lotewutingela intsendzele etintsabeni.”" 
1Samuel26:21 Sawula wakhuluma watsi: “Ngonile. Buya, Davide, ndvodzana yami. Ngingeke ngiphindze ngetame kukulimata, ngobe imphilo yami uyisindzisile lamuhla. Impela ngibe silima, ngona kakhulu.”" 
1Samuel26:22 Davide waphendvula watsi: “Nasi-ke sikhali senkhosi. Lomunye wemajaha lalapho akete atekusitsatsa. 
1Samuel26:23 Simakadze umnika umvuzo wonkhe umuntfu lolungile nalowetsembekile. Lamuhla Simakadze abekunikele esandleni sami, kodvwa angikatsandzi kubeka sandla sami etikwalogcotjiwe waSimakadze." 
1Samuel26:24 Njengobe ngisindzise imphilo yakho lamuhla, kanjalo, shangatsi naSimakadze angenta njalo kimi angikhulule kuto tonkhe tinhlupheko.”" 
1Samuel26:25 Sawula wakhuluma kuDavide, watsi: “Shangatsi Simakadze angakubusisa, Davide, ndvodzana yami; utakwenta tintfo letinkhulu, uphindze uphumelele kuko konkhe lokwentako.” Ngako Davide wase uyahamba, naSawula wancandzeka wabuyela ekhaya kakhe." 
1Samuel27:1 Kodvwa Davide wacabanga watsi: “Kuwo lamalanga Sawula utangibulala. Lokuncono kakhulu kutsi vele ngibaleke ngiye eveni lemaFilisti. Sawula utawuvele adzinwe angabe asangifuna nome ngabe kukuphi kulelive laka-Israyeli, ngiyawube sengiphephile-ke esandleni sakhe.”" 
1Samuel27:2 Ngako Davide kanye nalamadvodza langema-600 labenawo, bahamba bewelela ngesheya ku-Akhishi, umsa waMayoki, inkhosi yaseGathi." 
1Samuel27:3 Davide kanye nalamadvodza akakhe bahlala ka-Akhishi eGathi. Nguleyo naleyo ndvodza yayinemndeni wayo, naDavide abenalabafati bakhe lababili: bo-Ahinowami waseJezreyeli kanye na-Abigayili waseKhameli, umfelokati waNabali." 
1Samuel27:4 Watsi kube Sawula atjelwe kutsi Davide ubalekele eGathi, wangabe asachubeka nekumtfungatsa." 
1Samuel27:5 Davide wakhuluma ku-Akhishi, watsi: “Nangabe ngitfole umusa emehlweni akho, ngicela ungabele indzawo kulelinye lalamadolobha akho, khona ngitewuhlala khona. Inceku yakho ingahlala kanjani nawe edolobheni lakho lebukhosi?”" 
1Samuel27:6 Ngalelo langa Akhishi wamabela iSikilagi, kwacala lapho kutsi libe lidolobha lemakhosi akaJuda." 
1Samuel27:7 Davide wahlala eveni lemaFilisti umnyaka netinyanga letine. 
1Samuel27:8 Davide nemadvodza akakhe benyuka bayawuhlasela emaGeshuri, nemaGizi kanye nema-Amaleki. Kusukela etikhatsini takadzeni letive tatihlala kulelo live, kuze kuyekufika eShuri naseGibhithe." 
1Samuel27:9 Kwakutsi njalo nje Davide nakahlasela indzawo letsite, abulale konkhe kungasali ndvodza namfati kuphila, bese utfumba timvu, netinkhomo, netimbongolo, nemakamela kanye netimphahla tekwembatsa abuyele nako ku-Akhishi." 
1Samuel27:10 Kwakutsi Akhishi nakambuta atsi: “Bewuyewuhlasela kuphi lamuhla?” Davide abetsi: “Bengiyewuhlasela eNegevu, lekuyiningizimu yakaJuda,” nome: “eNegevu, lekuyiningizimu yemaJerameli,” nome: “eNegevu, lekuyiningizimu yemaKheni.”" 
1Samuel27:11 Abengashiyi ndvodza namfati aphila, kutsi ete naye eGathi, ngobe abecabanga atsi: “Bangahle bakhulume ngatsi batsi: ‘Naku-ke Davide lakwentile.’ ” Loko kwakungumkhuba wakhe ngesikhatsi asahlala nemaFilisti eveni lawo." 
1Samuel27:12 Akhishi wametsemba Davide, waze wacabanga watsi: “Bantfu bakubo baka-Israyeli bamtondza kakhulu, ngako sewutaba yinceku yami kokuphela.”" 
1Samuel28:1 Ngalawo malanga emaFilisti abutsana ngemabutfo awo atilungiselela kulwa nema-Israyeli. Akhishi wakhuluma kuDavide, watsi: “Kufanele wati kutsi wena kanye nemphi yakho nitawuhamba natsi siyekulwa imphi.”" 
1Samuel28:2 Davide wakhuluma ku-Akhishi, watsi: “Nawe utatibonela ngewakho emehlo kutsi inceku yakho itakwentani.” Akhishi waphendvula watsi: “Kulungile, ngitakwenta ube ngulomunye wetindvuna tami letingisingatsako, imphilo yakho yonkhe.”" 
1Samuel28:3 Ngaleso sikhatsi Samuweli abesafile. Sonkhe sive sema-Israyeli sasimlilele, sase simngcwaba edolobheni lakubo eRama. Sawula bekasaticoshe tonkhe tinyanga netangoma eveni lakhe." 
1Samuel28:4 EmaFilisti abutsana ahamba ayawukamba eShunemu, kwatsi Sawula naye wabutsa onkhe emabutfo ema-Israyeli bayawukamba eGilbowa." 
1Samuel28:5 Kwatsi Sawula nakabona imphi yemaFilisti, wesaba kakhulu, watfutfumela." 
1Samuel28:6 Sawula wase ubuta kuSimakadze, kodvwa Simakadze akazange amphendvule ngisho nangemaphupho, nome nge-Urimu, nome ngebaphrofethi." 
1Samuel28:7 Sawula wakhuluma etincekwini takhe, watsi: “Ngifuneleni sangoma lesingumfati, kuze ngitewuhamba ngiyewuva kuso.” Batsi: “Sikhona lesise-Eni Dori.”" 
1Samuel28:8 Ngako Sawula waphica umkhondvo ngekwembatsa letinye tembatfo, kwatsi ebusuku wahamba kanye nemadvodza lamabili baya kulomfati losangoma. Wafike watsi: “Ngikhulekela inhloko, ungibitele lowo lengitamusho.”" 
1Samuel28:9 Kodvwa lesangoma satsi: “Empeleni uyakwati lokwentiwe nguSawula. Uticitse tonkhe tinyanga netangoma kulelive lakhe. Ungibekelelani lugibe ngekufuna kungibulalisa ngaSawula?” 
1Samuel28:10 Sawula wafunga kuso ngaSimakadze, watsi: “Ngempela kuphila kwaSimakadze, ungeke ukufele loko.”" 
1Samuel28:11 Lesangoma sabuta satsi: “Ngikubitele bani?” Sawula watsi: “Ngikhuphulele Samuweli.” 
1Samuel28:12 Lesangoma satsi nasibona kukhuphuka Samuweli, samemeta kakhulu satsi kuSawula: “Hawu, kodvwa ungiyengelani? Wena kantsi unguSawula!”" 
1Samuel28:13 Inkhosi Sawula yakhuluma kuye, yatsi: “Ungesabi. Ubonani?” Lesangoma satsi: “Ngibona umoya ukhuphuka phansi emhlabatsini.”" 
1Samuel28:14 Sawula wasibuta watsi: “Unjani?” Lesangoma samphendvula satsi: “Likhehla lelidzala lelembetse umjiva, liyakhuphuka.” Ngako Sawula wavele wati kutsi nguSamuweli; wakhotsama wawa phansi ngebuso." 
1Samuel28:15 Samuweli wabuta Sawula watsi: “Ungiphatamiselani ngalokube ungikhuphula?” Sawula watsi: “Ngisebuhlungwini lobukhulu. EmaFilisti ayangihlasela. Nkulunkulu ungifulatsele. Akasangiphendvuli ngisho nangebaphrofethi nome ngemaphupho. Manje sengibite wena kutsi ungitjele kutsi ngifanele ngente njani.” 
1Samuel28:16 Samuweli wakhuluma kuye, watsi: “Kepha ungifunelani mine, njengobe Simakadze sewukufulatsele, waba sitsa sakho?" 
1Samuel28:17 Simakadze wente loko labekuphrofethile ngami. Simakadze uwudzabulile umbuso esandleni sakho, wawunika lomunye wabomakhelwane bakho, longuDavide." 
1Samuel28:18 Wena awuzange umlalele Simakadze, futsi awuzange ukhombise lulaka lwakhe kuma-Amaleki, lamuhla Simakadze sewente loko kuwe." 
1Samuel28:19 Simakadze utaninikela etandleni temaFilisti, wena kanye naso sonkhe sive sema-Israyeli. Kusasa wena kanye nemadvodzana akho nitawube senikanye nami lapha. Simakadze utawunikela ngisho nemphi yema-Israyeli etandleni temaFilisti.”" 
1Samuel28:20 Masinyane Sawula wadzimuleka phansi, wenaba watsi tfwi, emhlabatsini; watfutfumela, agcwele kwesaba ngenca yemavi labekhulunywe nguSamuweli. Emandla akhe aphela, ngobe abengakaze watsi namu ngalelo langa ngisho nasebusuku bakhona." 
1Samuel28:21 Lesangoma satsi nasifika kuSawula, sibona nekutsi wetfuke kanganani, satsi: “Buka la; incekukati yakho ikulalele. Ngitinikele ngemphilo yami yonkhe ngenta loko lotsite angikwente." 
1Samuel28:22 Manje sengiyakuncenga mane ulalele incekukati yakho, ngimane ngikunike kudla udle, khona kutewubuya emandla akho ubambe indlela yakho uhambe.”" 
1Samuel28:23 Sawula wala, watsi: “Ngingeke ngidle.” Kodvwa lamadvodza labehamba naye asita lesangoma, amncenga ngekumcindzetela, waze wavuma. Wavuka wahlala etikwembhedze." 
1Samuel28:24 Lesangoma sasinelitfokati lelikhuluphalisiwe lapha kaso, lesalihlaba masinyane, satsatsa fulaha samdova sapheka sinkhwa lesingenambiliso." 
1Samuel28:25 Sase sikubeka embikwaSawula nalamadvodza labehamba nawo, badla. Ngabona lobo busuku bavuka bahamba." 
1Samuel29:1 EmaFilisti abutsa onkhe emabutfo awo awabutsela e-Afeki, kwatsi ema-Israyeli wona abutsana ngasemtfonjeni loseJezreyeli." 
1Samuel29:2 Kwatsi ngesikhatsi tindvuna temabutfo emaFilisti tishuca ngeticheme tato temakhulu netetinkhulungwane, Davide abeshuca ngemva nelibutfo lakakhe bana-Akhishi." 
1Samuel29:3 Tindvuna temphi yemaFilisti tabuta tatsi: “Afunani lamaHebheru lawa?” Akhishi waphendvula watsi: “AkusiDavide yini lona lobekayindvuna lenkhulu yaSawula, inkhosi yema-Israyeli? Sekuze kuphele umnyaka wonkhe solomane ahlala nami lapha, kusukela ngelilanga labaleka ngalo kuSawula kuze kube ngulamuhla, angikaze ngamtfola anelicala.”" 
1Samuel29:4 Kodvwa tindvuna temphi yemaFilisti tatfukutselela Akhishi, tatsi: “Ncandzekisa lomuntfu abuyele endzaweni lowamnika yona. Akukafaneli ahambe natsi kuya emphini, funa asigucukele nasekuliwa lena embili. Kungaba malula kakhulu kuye kutsi atigcebele enkhosini yakhe ngekutsi ayinikete tinhloko temadvodza akitsi." 
1Samuel29:5 Akusiye nje loDavide lekwakuhlatjelwa ngaye emgidvweni wabo sigiyo lesitsi: “ ‘Sawula ubulele tinkhulungwane takhe, kodvwa Davide ubulele emashumi etinkhulungwane takhe’?”" 
1Samuel29:6 Ngako Akhishi wabita Davide, wamtjela watsi: “Kuphila kwaSimakadze, wena bewusetsembekile, nami bengingajabula kakhulu kuhamba nawe siyekulwa imphi. Kusukela ngelilanga lowefika ngalo kami kuze kube ngunyalo, angikaze ngasitfola sono kuwe, kodvwa noko tindvuna tami atikuvumeli wena kutsi uhambe natsi." 
1Samuel29:7 Ncandzeka-ke uhambe ngekuthula; ungenti lutfo lolutawucunula letindvuna temaFilisti.” 
1Samuel29:8 Davide wabuta watsi: “Kodvwa ngenteni? Cala lini lolitfole encekwini yakho, seloku ngefika lapha kuwe kuze kube ngulamuhla? Angihambi ngani ngiyekulwa netitsa tenkhosi yami?”" 
1Samuel29:9 Akhishi waphendvula, watsi: “Ngiyati kutsi emehlweni ami ujabulisa njengengilosi yaNkulunkulu, noko-ke tindvuna temphi yemaFilisti titsite: ‘Akukafaneli kutsi ahambe natsi kuya emphini.’" 
1Samuel29:10 Manje-ke nibovuka ekuseni kanye netinceku tenkhosi yakho, lenite kanye nato, nihambe masinyane nje, nakudzabuka kusa.”" 
1Samuel29:11 Ngako Davide nelibutfo lakakhe bavuka ekuseni nakudzabuka kusa, bancandzeka baya eveni lemaFilisti labebasikelwe lona. EmaFilisti wona akhuphuka aya eJezreyeli." 
1Samuel30:1 Davide nelibutfo lakhe befika eSikilagi ngelilanga lesitsatfu. Ema-Amaleki abetselekele iNegevu neSikilagi, ayiphanga. Abefike ahlasela iSikilagi aphindze ayishisa ngemlilo," 
1Samuel30:2 atfumba bafati kanye nabo bonkhe lababekuyo, labadzala nalabancane. Abengazange abulala ngisho namunye wabo, kodvwa abatfumba abaleka nabo." 
1Samuel30:3 Batsi bayefika boDavide nelibutfo lakakhe eSikilagi, balikhandza lidolobha libhubhe lingumlotsa, bafati babo nebantfwababo, emadvodzana nemadvodzakati abo batfunjiwe." 
1Samuel30:4 Ngako Davide nelibutfo lakakhe bakhala, baze baphelelwa ngemandla ekukhala." 
1Samuel30:5 BomkaDavide bobabili babetfunjiwe, bo-Ahinowami waseJezreyeli, na-Abigayili, umfelokati waNabali waseKhameli." 
1Samuel30:6 Davide wadzabuka kakhulu, ngobe lamadvodza abesakhuluma ngekumgcoba ngematje. Ngulowo nalowo abemunyu emoyeni wakhe ngemadvodzana nangemadvodzakati akhe. Kodvwa Davide watfola emandla kuSimakadze Nkulunkulu wakhe." 
1Samuel30:7 Davide wase ukhuluma ku-Abiyatha, umphristi, umsa wa-Ahimeleki, watsi: “Nginikete sidziya sebaphristi.” Abiyatha wamniketa," 
1Samuel30:8 Davide wabuta kuSimakadze watsi: “Ngibacoshe yini labatfumbi? Ngitabakhandza yini?” Simakadze watsi: “Bacoshe, utabakhandza nome kanjani, futsi utawukhona kukubuyisa loku labakutfumbile.”" 
1Samuel30:9 Davide nalelibutfo lakakhe, emadvodza langema-600 labehamba nawo, befika emfudlaneni iBhesori, lapho kwafike kwasala khona labanye," 
1Samuel30:10 ngobe emadvodza langema-200 abesadzinwe kakhulu, ngako ehluleka kwewela lomfudlana iBhesori. Kodvwa Davide nemadvodza langema-400 bachubeka, bagijima." 
1Samuel30:11 Bakhandza umGibhithe esigangeni, bamletsa kuDavide, base bamnatsisa emanti, bamupha nekudla." 
1Samuel30:12 Bamupha lucetu lwelicebelengwane lemakhiwa lahlutiwe nemacebelengwane lamabili emagelebisi lomisiwe, wadla, wase ubuyelwa ngemandla. Phela kwase kuphele emalanga lamatsatfu nebusuku bawo angakaze afake lutfo emlonyeni wakhe." 
1Samuel30:13 Davide wambuta watsi: “Uwakabani wena, uwekuklezaphi?” Watsi: “NgingumGibhithe, sigcili salomunye um-Amaleki. Lomnumzane wami ungishiye lapha, nangicalwa kugula, kulamalanga lamatsatfu lendlulile." 
1Samuel30:14 Besihlasele iningizimu yemaKherethi neyelive lakaJuda, kanye neningizimu yelive lakaKhalebi, sashisa neSikilagi.”" 
1Samuel30:15 Davide wambuta watsi: “Ungangiyisa yini kubo labatfumbi?” Wamphendvula watsi: “Funga kimi embikwaNkulunkulu kutsi ungeke ungibulale nome unginikele kumnumzane wami, ngitawube sengiyakumikisa kubo.”" 
1Samuel30:16 Wamikisa Davide, wabakhandza bakhona lapho, basakateke nato tonkhe leto tikhotsa, badla, banatsa, batitika ngemphango, ngenca yebunyenti baloko lababekutfumbile eveni lemaFilisti nelakaJuda." 
1Samuel30:17 Davide wabahlasela wabacitsa kusukela nakuhwalalako, kwaze kwaba ngusebusuku bangakusasa solo abaphetse; kwabate ngisho namunye lowaphunyula ngaphandle kwemajaha langema-400 lagibela emakamela awo, zaya." 
1Samuel30:18 Davide wabemuka konkhe loko lobekutfunjwe ngema-Amaleki, ngisho nebafati bakhe bobabili imbala." 
1Samuel30:19 Kute lokwase kulahlekile, labancane nalabadzala, bafana nemantfombatana, imphango, nako konkhe lokunye lababekutfumbile; Davide wabuya nako konkhe." 
1Samuel30:20 Watsatsa tonkhe tifuyo nemihlambi, emabutfo akhe akuchuba embili kunaleti letinye tifuyo, atsi: “Lena yimphango yaDavide.”" 
1Samuel30:21 Davide waze wefika kulamadvodza langema-200, labesele emfudlaneni iBhesori ngenca yekutsi abesadzinwe kakhulu, aphuma ahlangabeta Davide nalaba lababenaye. Davide kanye nalaba abenabo wababingelela baseta nje." 
1Samuel30:22 Kodvwa bonkhe lababenetinhlitiyo letimbi nalabanelutfutfuva emkhatsini walaba lababeta naDavide batsi: “Singeke sibacetunele imphango lesiyiphangile, ngobe abakahambi natsi kuyakulwa. Noko nguleyo naleyo ndvodza sitayinika umfati wayo nebantfwabayo, ihambe.”" 
1Samuel30:23 Davide wabaphendvula watsi: “Cha, phela, bomnaketfu, ningete nakwenta loko ngaloku lesikunikwe nguSimakadze. Usivikele wanikela labatfumbi betfu etandleni tetfu." 
1Samuel30:24 Ngubani-ke lotawulalela loku lenikushoko? Sabelo sendvodza lesele netimphahla kufanele silingane nesendvodza leyile yayakulwa. Sonkhe sitawucetunelana ngalokufananako.” 
1Samuel30:25 Davide wenta leso kwaba simiso nelisiko laka-Israyeli kusukela ngalelo langa kuze kube ngulamuhla. 
1Samuel30:26 Davide watsi kube efike eSikilagi, watfumela incenye yemphango kubaholi bakaJuda lababebangani bakhe, atsi: “Naso sipho senu lesiyimphango lephuma etitseni taSimakadze.”" 
1Samuel30:27 Wasitfumela kulabo lababeseBetheli, naseRamothi yaseningizimu, naseJathiri;" 
1Samuel30:28 nakulabo labase-Aroyeri, naseSifmothi, nase-Eshtemowa," 
1Samuel30:29 naseRakali; nakulabo labasemadolobheni emaJerameli nemaKheni; 
1Samuel30:30 nakulabo lababeseHoma, naseBhori Ashani, nase-Athakhi," 
1Samuel30:31 naseHebroni; nakulabo lababekuletinye tindzawo, lapho Davide nebalandzeli bakhe bebasakatekele khona." 
1Samuel31:1 EmaFilisti alwa nema-Israyeli; ema-Israyeli abaleka, labanyenti basala bafile entsabeni iGilbowa." 
1Samuel31:2 EmaFilisti abahlala emsileni boSawula nemadvodzana akhe. EmaFilisti abulala emadvodzana aSawula: boJonathani, na-Abinadabi, naMalkhi Shuwa." 
1Samuel31:3 Imphi yashuba ngakuSawula, labadubula ngebutjoki bamkhandza, bamhlaba kamatima ngemicibisholo." 
1Samuel31:4 Sawula wakhuluma neludzibi lwakhe, watsi: “Khipha inkemba yakho ungicedzele, kungaze kufike labantfu labangasoki bangicedzele, ngihlazeke.” Kodvwa loludzibi lwakhe lwalwesaba, lungeke lukwente loko; ngako Sawula watsatsa inkemba yakhe, watiwisela kuyo, atibulala." 
1Samuel31:5 Loludzibi lwakhe lwatsi kube lubone kutsi Sawula sewufile, nalo lwawela enkembeni yalo, lwafa naye." 
1Samuel31:6 Sawula nemadvodzana akhe omatsatfu, kanye neludzibi lwakhe, nawo onkhe emabutfo akhe bafela ndzawonye ngalanga linye." 
1Samuel31:7 Ema-Israyeli labengasesigodzini nalowo bekangesheya kweJordane, atsi kube abone kutsi imphi yema-Israyeli seyibalekile, nekutsi Sawula nemadvodzana akhe sebafile, esuka abaleka, ashiya emadolobha awo. EmaFilisti efika ahlala kuwo lawo madolobha." 
1Samuel31:8 Kwatsi ngakusasa emaFilisti nasatewuhlubula letidvumbu talabafile, akhandza Sawula nemadvodzana akhe omatsatfu, bafele entsabeni iGilbowa." 
1Samuel31:9 Ajuba inhloko yakhe, atsatsa netikhali takhe, atfumela tigijimi kulo lonkhe lemaFilisti kumemetela lendzaba endlini yabonkulunkulu bawo nakubantfu bakubo." 
1Samuel31:10 Afaka tikhali takhe ethempelini la-Ashtarothe, abetsela sidvumbu sakhe elubondzeni lwaseBhethi Shani." 
1Samuel31:11 Batsi kube bantfu baseJabeshi Gileyadi beve ngalesento semaFilisti lasenta kuSawula," 
1Samuel31:12 tonkhe tihlabani takhona tashuca busuku bonkhe tacondza eBhethi Shani. Tafike tetfula tidvumbu taboSawula nemadvodzana akhe elubondzeni lweBhethi Shani, tancandzeka nato tabuyela eJabeshi, lapho tafike tatishisela khona ngemlilo." 
1Samuel31:13 Tatsatsa ematsambo abo tayakuwangcwaba ngaphansi kwesihlahla selitamariske, eJabeshi, tazila emalanga lasikhombisa." 
2Samuel1:1 Emvakwekufa kwaSawula, Davide wancandzeka nasancobe ema-Amaleki, wafike wahlala eSikilagi emalanga lamabili." 
2Samuel1:2 Ngelilanga lesitsatfu kwefika indvodza iphuma enkambu yaSawula, inetimphahla tayo letidzabukile kanye nelutfuli enhloko. Yatsi nayifika kuDavide, yawa phansi, yakhotsama, imhlonipha." 
2Samuel1:3 Davide wayibuta watsi: “Uphumaphi?” Yaphendvula yatsi: “Ngibaleke enkambu yaka-Israyeli.” 
2Samuel1:4 Davide wayibuta watsi: “Kwenteke njani? Ngitjele.” Yamphendvula yatsi: “Emadvodza abalekile ashiya imphi. Linyenti lawo ligwaziwe lafa. NaboSawula nemsa wakhe Jonathani bafile.” 
2Samuel1:5 Davide wakhuluma kulelijaha lelalimletsele lombiko, watsi: “Wati ngani kutsi Sawula nemsa wakhe Jonathani bafile?”" 
2Samuel1:6 Lelijaha latsi: “Kwentekile ngaba setikwentsaba iGilbowa, ngabona Sawula eyeme etikwesikhali sakhe, tincola kanye nebagibeli bemahhashi sekusondzele kutawukhwela etikwakhe." 
2Samuel1:7 Watsi kube agucuke angibone, wamemeta, mine ngabuta ngatsi: ‘Yini nje lengingayenta?’" 
2Samuel1:8 “Wase uyangibuta watsi: ‘Ungubani wena?’ “Mine ngamphendvula ngatsi: ‘Ngingum-Amaleki.’ 
2Samuel1:9 “Wabe sewukhuluma kimi utsi: ‘Mani lapha ngenhla kwami ungibulale! Sengisemlonyeni wekufa, kodvwa seloku ngisaphila.’" 
2Samuel1:10 “Ngako ngivele ngema ngenhla kwakhe, ngambulala, ngobe ngatile kutsi njengobe asawile angeke aphindze asindze. Ngibese ngitsatsa lomchele lobewusenhloko yakhe kanye nelibhengela lelisemkhonweni wakhe, ngakuletsa lapha enkhosini yami.”" 
2Samuel1:11 Davide kanye nawo onkhe emadvodza labenawo badzabula tembatfo tabo. 
2Samuel1:12 Balila bakhala kwaze kwaba nguntsambama, bazilela Sawula, nemsa wakhe Jonathani, nemabutfo aSimakadze, nesive sema-Israyeli, ngobe babebulewe ngenkemba." 
2Samuel1:13 Davide wabuta lelijaha lelaliletse lombiko kuye, watsi: “Wena uphumaphi?” Laphendvula latsi: “Mine ngiyindvodzana yemuntfu wesive, um-Amaleki.”" 
2Samuel1:14 Davide wambuta watsi: “Wena awukesabi ngani kuphakamisa sandla sakho nekubulala umgcotjwa waSimakadze?” 
2Samuel1:15 Ngako Davide wabita lenye yalamadvodza, watsi kuyo: “Hamba kuye, umbulale!” Wavele wambulala, wafa." 
2Samuel1:16 Ngobe Davide abetsite kuye: “Ingati yakho itawubasetikwakho. Nemlomo wakho ukulahla ngebufakazi, nawutsi: ‘Ngibulele logcotjiwe waSimakadze.’ ”" 
2Samuel1:17 Davide washo nasi sililo, alilela Sawula nemsa wakhe Jonathani," 
2Samuel1:18 wakhipha nemlayeto kutsi emadvodza akaJuda afundziswe lesililo sebutjoki. Sibhalwe encwadzini yaJasheri: 
2Samuel1:19 “Bukhosi bakho, Israyeli, bulele phansi, bubulawelwe etintsabeni. Emachawe lanemandla kakhulu asawile!" 
2Samuel1:20 “Loku akusiwumenyetelwa eGathi, kungakhulunywa nasetitaladini tase-Ashkeloni, funa emadvodzakati emaFilisti ajabule, funa emadvodzakati alabangakasoki atfokote." 
2Samuel1:21 “Nine tintsaba taseGilbowa, shangatsi ningabate ematolo nemvula, nibete nemasimi laneminikelo yalokutinhlavu. Ngobe lihawu lalabanemandla lilele ehlazweni, lihawu laSawula alisamanyateliswa ngemafutsa." 
2Samuel1:22 Engatini yalabagwaziwe nasetidvunjini temachawe, butjoki baJonathani bashaya bacotfula, nenkemba yaSawula ayibuyanga yabayaba." 
2Samuel1:23 “Sawula naJonathani basaphila babetsandvwa, baligugu, nasekufeni abazange behlukane. Bebanematubane kwendlula emangce, bebanemandla kwendlula emabhubesi." 
2Samuel1:24 “Awu, madvodzakati aka-Israyeli, lilelani Sawula. Wanembatsisa ngaletibovu naleticolisakele, wahlobisa tingubo tenu ngemihlobiso yegolide." 
2Samuel1:25 “Emachawe lanemandla awile emphini! Jonathani ulele, ubulawelwe etintsabeni takho." 
2Samuel1:26 “Ngiyakukhalela, mnaketfu Jonathani, bewuligugu kimi! Lutsandvo lwakho kimi belumangalisa, lumangalisa kwendlula lwalabasikati." 
2Samuel1:27 “Emachawe lanemandla awile! Tikhali temphi nato setibhubhile.” 
2Samuel2:1 Emvakwesikhatsi Davide wabuta kuSimakadze, watsi: “Kufanele yini ngenyuke kuyawutsatsa lelinye lalamadolobha akaJuda?” Simakadze watsi: “Yenyuka.” Davide wabuta watsi: “Kufanele ngiye kuphi?” Simakadze wamphendvula watsi: “EHebroni.”" 
2Samuel2:2 Ngako Davide wenyuka kanye nebafati bakhe lababili, bo-Ahinowami waseJezreyeli kanye na-Abigayili, umfelokati waNabali waseKhameli." 
2Samuel2:3 Davide wahamba kanye nalamadvodza labemsingatsile, nguleyo naleyo inemndeni wayo; bafike bakha emadolobhaneni aseHebroni." 
2Samuel2:4 Emadvodza akaJuda eta eHebroni, afike amgcobela lapho Davide kutsi abe yinkhosi etikwendlu yakaJuda. Watsi kube Davide eve kutsi emadvodza aseJabeshi Gileyadi ngiwo labengcwabe Sawula," 
2Samuel2:5 watfumela titfunywa kulawo madvodza aseJabeshi Gileyadi, tafike tatsi: “Simakadze akanibusise ngekukhombisa umusa wenu ngekungcwaba Sawula, inkhosi yenu." 
2Samuel2:6 Shangatsi Simakadze manje anganiphatsa ngemusa nangekwetsembeka, nami futsi ngitaniphatsa ngalowo musa, njengobe nani nentile." 
2Samuel2:7 Manje-ke, cinani nibe nesibindzi, ngobe Sawula, inkhosi yenu, sewufile, kodvwa indlu yakaJuda seyigcobe mine kutsi ngibe yinkhosi etikwayo.”" 
2Samuel2:8 Ngaso leso sikhatsi Abneri, umsa waNeri, labeyindvuna yemphi yaSawula abesatsetse Ishboshethi, umsa waSawula, wamletsa eMahanayimu." 
2Samuel2:9 Wafike wambeka inkhosi yakaGileyadi, neyaka-Asheri, neyaseJezreyeli, neyaka-Efrayimu, neyakaBhenjamini, naku-Israyeli wonkhe." 
2Samuel2:10 Ishboshethi, umsa waSawula, abesaneminyaka lengema-40, nakabekwa kuba yinkhosi etikwa-Israyeli; wabusa iminyaka lemibili. Kodvwa indlu yakaJuda yona yalandzela Davide." 
2Samuel2:11 Davide waba yinkhosi eHebroni etikwaJuda iminyaka lesikhombisa netinyanga letisitfupha. 
2Samuel2:12 Abneri, umsa waNeri, kanye nemadvodza labelandzela Ishboshethi, umsa waSawula, besuka eMahanayimu baya eGibeyoni." 
2Samuel2:13 Jowabe, umsa waSeruya, kanye nemadvodza akaDavide bahamba bahlangana nabo esitibeni saseGibeyoni. Lelinye licembu lahlala ngalapha kwalesitiba, kwatsi leli lelinye lahlala ngale kwaso, abukana." 
2Samuel2:14 Abneri wakhuluma kuJowabe, watsi: “Ake sivulele lamajaha alwe, embikwetfu sibuka.” Jowabe watsi: “Kulungile, ase balwe.”" 
2Samuel2:15 Ngako asukuma abalwa, kwaba ngemadvodza lali-12 akaBhenjamini na-Ishboshethi, umsa waSawula, kwatsi lali-12 aba ngakaDavide." 
2Samuel2:16 Lelo nalelo jaha labamba lelo lelicondzene nalo ngenhloko laligwaza ngenkemba emhlubulweni, awa phansi kanyekanye. Ngako lendzawo yaseGibeyoni yetsiwa libito kwatsiwa yiHelkathi Hasurimu." 
2Samuel2:17 Ngalelo langa imphi yayesabeka kakhulu, Abneri nemadvodza aka-Israyeli behlulwa ngemadvodza akaDavide." 
2Samuel2:18 Emadvodzana aSeruya lamatsatfu abelapho, boJowabe na-Abishayi kanye na-Asaheli. Asaheli abegijimisa kwenyamatane yesiganga." 
2Samuel2:19 Wacosha Abneri, wacondzana naye; abengajikeli ngesekudla nome ngesancele, asamcosha." 
2Samuel2:20 Abneri wabuka emvakwakhe, wabuta watsi: “Asaheli, nguwe yini lowo?” Waphendvula watsi: “Ngimi.”" 
2Samuel2:21 Abneri wakhuluma kuye watsi: “Phambukela ngasesandleni sekudla nome sesancele ucondzane nalelinye lalamajaha ulemuke letikhali talo.” Kodvwa Asaheli akazange ayekele kumcosha. 
2Samuel2:22 Waphindza futsi Abneri wecwayisa Asaheli, watsi: “Yekela kungicosha ngemuva! Ungiphocelelelani kutsi ngikugwaze? Ngingambukelwa ngubani umnakenu, Jowabe?”" 
2Samuel2:23 Kodvwa Asaheli akayekelanga kumcosha ngemuva; ngako Abneri wagucuka wamgwaza ngesikhali sakhe esiswini, saze saphumela ngemuva. Wawela phansi, wafa khona lapho. Bonkhe babefike beme lapho Asaheli abewele khona, wafa." 
2Samuel2:24 Kodvwa Jowabe na-Abishayi bachubeka bacosha Abneri; latsi lilanga nalishona, befika egcumeni lase-Ama, edvute naGiya, endleleni leya emacwacwasini aseGibeyoni." 
2Samuel2:25 Ngako emadvodza akaBhenjamini abutsana ndzawonye emvakwa-Abneri. Aba sicumbi, abese ema esicongweni seligcuma." 
2Samuel2:26 Abneri wamemeta Jowabe, watsi: “Kufanele sichubeke nekulwa siphelane yini? Awuboni ngani kutsi loku kuyawugcina sekumunyu? Lamadvodza akakho utawatjela nini kutsi akakuyekele lokucosha bomnakabo ngemuva?”" 
2Samuel2:27 Jowabe waphendvula watsi: “Ngifunga kuphila kwaNkulunkulu, ngitsi kube awukakhulumi, lamadvodza akami abetawuchubeka nekunicosha, kuze kube ngukusasa ekuseni.”" 
2Samuel2:28 Ngako Jowabe washaya licilongo lakhe, onkhe emadvodza ema. Akazange achubeke nekuwacosha lamadvodza aka-Israyeli, kantsi futsi akazange aphindze alwe nawo." 
2Samuel2:29 Kubo bonkhe lobo busuku Abneri nemadvodza akakhe bashuca badzabula sihosha saseJordane, i-Arabha. Bewela iJordane, badzabula iBhithroni ekhatsi, baye befika eMahanayimu." 
2Samuel2:30 Jowabe wabuya ekucosheni Abneri, wahlanganisa onkhe emadvodza akakhe. Ngaphandle kwa-Asaheli, kwatfolakala kutsi emadvodza akaDavide lali-19 abesanyamalele." 
2Samuel2:31 Kodvwa emadvodza akaDavide abebulele bakaBhenjamini labangema-360 labebahamba na-Abneri. 
2Samuel2:32 BoJowabe batsatsa Asaheli bamngcwaba ethuneni leyise eBhetlehema. Base bashuca busuku bonkhe, befika eHebroni nakudzabuka kusa." 
2Samuel3:1 Kulwa emkhatsini wendlu yakaSawula neyakaDavide kwachubeka sikhatsi lesidze. Davide wakhula wachubeka kuba nemandla, kantsi indlu yakaSawula yachubeka kuba butsakatsaka." 
2Samuel3:2 Emadvodzana Davide lawatalelwa eHebroni ngulawa: Litubulo lakhe bekungu-Amnoni ku-Ahinowami waseJezreyeli. 
2Samuel3:3 Yesibili bekunguKhileyabi, umsa wa-Abigayili, umfelokati waNabali waseKhameli. Yesitsatfu bekungu-Absalomu, umsa waMakha, indvodzakati yaThalmayi, inkhosi yaseGeshuri." 
2Samuel3:4 Yesine bekungu-Adoniya, umsa waHagithi. Yesihlanu bekunguShefathiya, umsa wa-Abitali." 
2Samuel3:5 Yesitfupha bekunguJithreyamu ku-Egla, umkakhe. Bonkhe laba batalelwa Davide eHebroni." 
2Samuel3:6 Ngesikhatsi semphi leyayisemkhatsini wendlu yakaSawula nendlu yakaDavide, Abneri yena abechubeka nekucinisa sikhundla sakhe endlini yaSawula." 
2Samuel3:7 Sawula abenesingani, libito laso kunguRispha, indvodzakati ya-Aya. Ishboshethi wabuta Abneri, watsi: “Ulaleleni nesingani sababe?”" 
2Samuel3:8 Abneri watfukutsela wabilelana ngenca yalenkhulumo ya-Ishboshethi, waphendvula watsi: “Ucabanga kutsi mine ngikhonta Juda yini? Lamuhla loku mine ngihlonipha indlu yeyihlo, Sawula, nemndeni wakhe kanye nebangani bakhe. Angikaze ngikunikele esandleni saDavide. Noko manje sewungibeka licala macondzana nalomfati!" 
2Samuel3:9 Shangatsi Nkulunkulu angangiphatsa kabuhlungu mine Abneri, nangingamenteli Davide loko Simakadze lametsembisa kona ngesifungo," 
2Samuel3:10 esuse bukhosi endlini yaSawula, bese umisa Davide esihlalweni sebukhosi kutsi abuse etikwa-Israyeli naJuda, kusukela kaDani kuye kufike eBherisheba.”" 
2Samuel3:11 Ishboshethi akazange aphindze abe nesibindzi sekukhuluma lelinye livi ku-Abneri, ngobe abesamesaba." 
2Samuel3:12 Abneri watfumela titfunywa takakhe kuDavide, tafike tatsi: “Labani lelive? Yenta nami sivumelwane, mine ngitakusita ekubuyiseni wonkhe Israyeli kutsi abe ngakuwe.”" 
2Samuel3:13 Davide watsi: “Kulungile, ngitasenta nawe sivumelwane. Kodvwa kunye lengikufuna kuwe: Ungeti lapha embikwami, nawungakaletsi Mikhali, indvodzakati yaSawula, nawuta kutangibona.”" 
2Samuel3:14 Davide watfumela titfunywa ku-Ishboshethi, umsa waSawula, wamtjela, watsi: “Letsa umkami Mikhali, lengamtsatsa ngekumkhokhela likhulu lemajwabu emaFilisti.”" 
2Samuel3:15 Ngako Ishboshethi wakhipha umlayeto kutsi atsatfwe endvodzeni yakhe Phaltiyeli, umsa waLayishi." 
2Samuel3:16 Lendvodza yakhe yahamba naye, ikhala emvakwakhe yonkhe indlela, kwaze kwaba nguseBhahurimu. Abneri wakhuluma kuyo watsi: “Ncandzeka, ubuyele ekhaya!” Yancandzeka-ke lendvodza." 
2Samuel3:17 Abneri wakhuluma nebaholi baka-Israyeli, watsi: “Sesikhatsi lesidze seloku nifuna kubeka Davide kutsi abe yinkhosi yenu." 
2Samuel3:18 Manje kwenteni loko! Ngobe Simakadze wetsembisa Davide watsi: ‘Ngenceku yami Davide ngiyakwephula sive sonkhe sema-Israyeli esandleni semaFilisti nasetandleni tato tonkhe titsa taso.’ ” 
2Samuel3:19 Abneri waphindze wakhuluma yena cobo lwakhe kubakaBhenjamini. Wabe sewuya eHebroni kuyawutjela Davide konkhe Israyeli nendlu yakaBhenjamini lababekufuna. 
2Samuel3:20 Ngesikhatsi Abneri, labehamba nalamadvodza langema-20, efika kuDavide eHebroni, Davide wamlungiselela lidzili yena kanye nalamadvodza labehamba nawo." 
2Samuel3:21 Abneri wakhuluma kuDavide, watsi: “Ngicela kutsi ngihambe khona nyalo inkhosi yami ngiyihlanganisele Israyeli wonkhe, khona sitekwenta sivumelwane kanye nawe, nekutsi utewubusa etikwako konkhe lokufisako.” Ngako Davide wase uhambisa Abneri; wahamba ngekuthula." 
2Samuel3:22 Kwatsi kusenjalo, emabutfo aDavide anaJowabe efika aphuma ekuhlaseleni eta nemphango lenyenti. Kodvwa Abneri abesangekho kuDavide eHebroni, ngobe Davide abesamhambisile, naye wahamba ngekuthula." 
2Samuel3:23 Watsi kube Jowabe nemabutfo onkhe labehambe nawo efike, watjelwa kutsi Abneri, umsa waNeri, abete enkhosini, nenkhosi yamhambisa ngekuthula." 
2Samuel3:24 Ngako Jowabe wahamba waya enkhosini, wafike watsi: “Wenteni? Buka, Abneri ufike lapha. Umyekeleleni ahambe? Manje sewuhambile!" 
2Samuel3:25 Nawe uyamati Abneri, umsa waNeri; abetele kutakukuyenga nekubukisisa kuphuma nekungena kwakho, kuze atekuhlolisisa kahle konkhe lokwentekako.”" 
2Samuel3:26 Jowabe wesuka lapho watfumela titfunywa talandzela Abneri, tamncandza tambuyisa asasemtfonjeni waseSira. Kodvwa Davide abengakwati loko." 
2Samuel3:27 Watsi kube Abneri efike eHebroni, Jowabe wamdvonsela nganhlanye esangweni, kwaba shangatsi kukhona lafuna kutsi akukhulume ngasemasitseleni. Khona lapho, wabe sewumgwaza esiswini, wafa. Ngako Abneri wabulawelwa kutsi naye abebulale Asaheli, umnakaboJowabe." 
2Samuel3:28 Emvakwaloko, watsi kube Davide eve ngaloku, watsi: “Mine nembuso wami embikwaSimakadze anginalo licala lengati ya-Abneri, umsa waNeri." 
2Samuel3:29 Shangatsi licala lengati yakhe lingaba setikwenhloko yaJowabe kanye nendlu yeyise! Shangatsi indlu yaJowabe ingete yahlala ingenaye umuntfu lonesilondza lesincincako nome lonalokusabulephelo, nome lohamba ngetimboko, nome lobulawa ngenkemba, nome loswele kudla.”" 
2Samuel3:30 Ngako boJowabe na-Abishayi bakhokha sibhongo ngekubulala Abneri, ngobe abebulele umnakabo Asaheli eGibeyoni." 
2Samuel3:31 Davide wakhuluma kuJowabe nakubo bonkhe bantfu lababelapho, watsi: “Klebhulani timphahla tenu nembatse emasaka, nihambe nendlule embikwa-Abneri.” Davide, inkhosi, naye cobo lwakhe wahamba emvakweluhlaka lwemngcwabo wa-Abneri." 
2Samuel3:32 Abneri bamngcwaba eHebroni, inkhosi yakhala yadzatimula ethuneni la-Abneri; nebantfu bonkhe bakhala." 
2Samuel3:33 Inkhosi yahlabela sililo sa-Abneri, yatsi: “Abneri bekufanele yini afe njengemuntfu losilima?" 
2Samuel3:34 Tinyawo takho betingakaboshwa, netandla takho tingakankinkwa. Uwele phansi wafa njengemuntfu lobulewe tigelekece.” Sive sonkhe saphindza samkhalela futsi." 
2Samuel3:35 Base bayefika kutawucela Davide kutsi sale asadla kusesemini, kodvwa Davide watsatsa sifungo, watsi: “Shangatsi Nkulunkulu angangishaya ngife, nangingadla lilanga lisengakashoni!”" 
2Samuel3:36 Bonkhe bantfu bakubona loko bajabula; empeleni, konkhe lokwakwentiwa yinkhosi kwabajabulisa." 
2Samuel3:37 Ngako ngalelo langa bonkhe bantfu nesive sonkhe sema-Israyeli sakwati kutsi inkhosi yayingazange ifake sandla ekubulaweni kwa-Abneri, umsa waNeri." 
2Samuel3:38 Inkhosi yakhuluma kulamadvodza ayo, yatsi: “Utsi niyabona nje kutsi lamuhla kufe umbusi longumuntfu lomkhulu ka-Israyeli?" 
2Samuel3:39 Lamuhla mine nome sengigcotjiwe, kodvwa angikacini, lamadvodzana aSeruya atidlova. Shangatsi Simakadze angamkhokhisa lomubi ngetento takhe letimbi!”" 
2Samuel4:1 Watsi kube Ishboshethi, umsa waSawula, eve kutsi Abneri ufele eHebroni, wesaba kakhulu, sonkhe sive sema-Israyeli setfuka." 
2Samuel4:2 Indvodzana yaSawula yayinemadvodza lamabili labebaholi betidlova tekuhlasela. Lomunye bekunguBhana, lomunye kunguRekhabi; babengemadvodzana eRimoni, umBherothi, wesive sakaBhenjamini. IBherothi itsatfwa njengencenye yakaBhenjamini," 
2Samuel4:3 ngobe sive saseBherothi sabaleka saya kuyakwakha eGithayimu; seloku sahlala khona lapho njengebafokatana kuze kube ngulamuhla. 
2Samuel4:4 Jonathani, umsa waSawula, abenendvodzana leyayichwalile etinyaweni. Yayineminyaka lesihlanu, nakufika umbiko wekufa kwaSawula naJonathani eJezreyeli. Umzanyana wakhe wamtsatsa wammema, wabaleka naye; kodvwa watsi asabhudvuteliswa kubaleka, lendvodzana yawa, yabe seyiba sishosha. Libito layo bekunguMefiboshethi." 
2Samuel4:5 BoRekhabi naBhana, emadvodzana aRimoni, umBherothi, bahamba baya endlini ya-Ishboshethi, befika emini selishisa, naye asecambalele kwasemini." 
2Samuel4:6 Bangena ngekhatsi endlini, kwaba shangatsi bayawufuna kolo, bafike bamgwaza esiswini, wafa. BoRekhabi naBhana, umnakabo, besuka lapho babaleka." 
2Samuel4:7 Babengene endlini ngesikhatsi asalele embhedzeni, ekamelweni lakhe lekulala. Batsi kube bamgwaze bambulale, base bancuma inhloko yakhe. Bayitsatsa bahamba nayo bonkhe busuku ngendlela yase-Arabha." 
2Samuel4:8 Lenhloko ya-Ishboshethi bayimikisa kuDavide eHebroni, bafike kuye, batsi: “Nansi inhloko ya-Ishboshethi, umsa waSawula, sitsa sakho labetama kukubulala. Lamuhla Simakadze sewukhokhele inkhosi yami sibhongo kuSawula nentalelwane yakhe.”" 
2Samuel4:9 Davide waphendvula boRekhabi naBhana, umnakabo, emadvodzana aRimoni, umBherothi, watsi: “Ngifunga kuphila kwaSimakadze longikhulule kuko konkhe kuhlupheka," 
2Samuel4:10 yatsi indvodza nayingitjela itsi: ‘Sawula ufile,’ yona icabanga kutsi ingiletsele tindzaba letimnandzi, ngayibamba ngayibulalela eSikilagi. Lowo kwaba ngumholo nemvuzo lengamnika wona ngaleto tindzaba takhe!" 
2Samuel4:11 Kubi kakhulu kanganani-ke kulabantfu lababi kangaka lababulele umuntfu longenacala, endlini yakhe atilalele embhedzeni wakhe. Mine ngitamkhiphela sibhongo kini ngekunibulala, nginitsanyele emhlabeni!”" 
2Samuel4:12 Ngako Davide wakhipha umlayeto wawucondzisa kulamadvodza akakhe, ababulala. Bajuba tandla tabo netinyawo tabo, tidvumbu tabo batilengisa ngasesitibeni saseHebroni. Kodvwa batsatsa inhloko ya-Ishboshethi bayingcwaba ethuneni la-Abneri, eHebroni." 
2Samuel5:1 Tonkhe tive tema-Israyeli teta kuDavide eHebroni, tafike tatsi: “Tsine siyinyama yakho nengati yakho." 
2Samuel5:2 Kadzeni, ngesikhatsi Sawula aseyinkhosi etikwetfu, nguwe lowawuhola sive sema-Israyeli nasiyekulwa etimphini. Simakadze wakhuluma kuwe, watsi: ‘Wena utawuba ngumelusi wesive sami ema-Israyeli, ube ngumbusi waso.’ ”" 
2Samuel5:3 Batsi kube befike bonkhe baholi bema-Israyeli enkhosini Davide eHebroni, inkhosi yenta nabo sivumelwane eHebroni embikwaSimakadze; base bagcoba Davide kutsi abe yinkhosi yema-Israyeli." 
2Samuel5:4 Davide abeneminyaka lengema-30, nakabekwa kuba yinkhosi, wabusa iminyaka lengema-40." 
2Samuel5:5 EHebroni wabusa Juda iminyaka lesikhombisa netinyanga letisitfupha, kwatsi eJerusalema wabusa Israyeli naJuda iminyaka lengema-33." 
2Samuel5:6 Inkhosi nemadvodza ayo yahloma yashuca kuyawuhlasela emaJebhusi labehlala eJerusalema. EmaJebhusi akhuluma kuDavide, atsi: “Ungeke ungenise lapha; ngisho imphumphutse nesishosha imbala, singamane sikuchilite nje wena.” Bacabanga batsi: “Davide angeke angene lapha ngekhatsi.”" 
2Samuel5:7 Noko, Davide wayitfumba inqaba yaseSiyoni, lidolobha laDavide." 
2Samuel5:8 Ngalelo langa Davide wakhuluma, watsi: “Lowo lotawuncoba emaJebhusi kufanele asebentise imihubhe yemanti, khona atewufikela ‘kulabatishosha nalabatimphuphutse,’ labatitsa taDavide.” Ngiko nje batsi: “ ‘Timphumphutse netishosha’ tingeke tingene endlini.”" 
2Samuel5:9 Davide watsi kube ayitfumbe lenqaba, wabe sewuhlala kuyo, wayetsa libito watsi Lidolobha laDavide. Wakha lidolobha ndzawo tonkhe kuyitungeleta, kusukela kulendzawo leyayigcwalisiwe ngasemphumalanga neligcuma." 
2Samuel5:10 Wachubeka waba nemandla kakhulu, ngobe Simakadze Nkulunkulu longuSomandla abenaye." 
2Samuel5:11 Hiramu, inkhosi yaseThire, watfumela titfunywa kuDavide, kanye netingodvo temsedari, nebabati kanye nebacoti bematje, bafike bakha sigodlo saDavide." 
2Samuel5:12 Davide abati kutsi Simakadze sewumbeke kutsi abe yinkhosi yema-Israyeli, waphakamisa umbuso wakhe ngenca yesive sema-Israyeli." 
2Samuel5:13 Watsi kube esuke eHebroni, Davide watsatsa labanye bafati, waba netingani letinye nasaseJerusalema, watalelwa emadvodzana nemadvodzakati lamanyenti." 
2Samuel5:14 Lawa-ke ngemabito ebantfwana labatalelwa eJerusalema: boShamuwa, naShobabi, naNathani, naSolomoni," 
2Samuel5:15 naJibhari, na-Elishuwa, naNefegi, naJafiya," 
2Samuel5:16 na-Elishama, na-Eliyada, na-Elifeleti." 
2Samuel5:17 Atsi kube emaFilisti eve kutsi Davide sewugcotjwe kutsi abe yinkhosi yema-Israyeli, esusa lomkhulu umkhankhaso wekuyakumfuna, kodvwa Davide weva ngaloko, wabe sewuyehla uya enqabeni." 
2Samuel5:18 EmaFilisti abesafike asabalala naso sonkhe leso Sigodzi semaRefa. 
2Samuel5:19 Ngako Davide wabuta kuSimakadze, watsi: “Kufanele yini ngihambe kuyawuhlasela lamaFilisti? Utawanikela yini esandleni sami?” Simakadze wamphendvula watsi: “Yebo, hamba, ngobe nakanjani emaFilisti ngitawanikela esandleni sakho.”" 
2Samuel5:20 Ngako Davide wahamba waya eBhali Pherasimu, wafike walwa nawo, wawehlula. Wakhuluma watsi: “Simakadze utibhidlite watehlula titsa tami embikwami, watikhukhula njengekukhukhula kwazamcolo.” Ngako leyo ndzawo yetsiwa libito kwatsiwa yiBhali Pherasimu." 
2Samuel5:21 EmaFilisti abaleka ashiya tithico tawo khona lapho, boDavide nemadvodza akakhe batitsatsela bahamba nato." 
2Samuel5:22 Aphindza futsi emaFilisti enyuka asabalala naso sonkhe leso Sigodzi semaRefa. 
2Samuel5:23 Ngako Davide wabuta kuSimakadze, lowaphendvula watsi: “Ungenyukeli lapho, kodvwa tungeleta ngemuva kwawo, bese uwahlasela ngembili kwetihlahla tebhalisamu." 
2Samuel5:24 Utawutsi ungeva tigi tekushuca kwawo lena enhla nato letihlahla tebhalisamu, usheshise ushakutele, ngobe loko kutawube kusho kutsi Simakadze sewuhambe embili kuyawubulala emabutfo emaFilisti.”" 
2Samuel5:25 Ngako Davide wenta loko Simakadze labemyale ngako kutsi akwente, emaFilisti wawabulala yonkhe indlela kusukela eGibeyoni kuze kufike eGezeri." 
2Samuel6:1 Davide waphindze wabutsela ndzawonye emadvodza elikhetselo aka-Israyeli, labeti-30 000 asawonkhe." 
2Samuel6:2 Davide kanye nawo onkhe lamadvodza labewabutsile bashuca besuka eBhala lakaJuda kuyakwenyusa libhokisi lesivumelwane saSimakadze khona, lelalibitwa ngeLibito, libito laSimakadze longuSomandla, lobusela esihlalweni sebukhosi asemkhatsini wemakherubhi lasetikwelibhokisi lesivumelwane." 
2Samuel6:3 Bekhweta libhokisi lesivumelwane saNkulunkulu encoleni lensha, balikhipha endlini yaka-Abinadabi, leyayisetulu entsatjananeni. Bo-Uza na-Ahiyo, emadvodzana a-Abinadabi, babeshayela lencola lensha," 
2Samuel6:4 leyayetfwele libhokisi lesivumelwane saNkulunkulu; Ahiyo yena abelihambela embili. 
2Samuel6:5 Davide kanye nayo yonkhe indlu yaka-Israyeli babejabula bagidza ngawo onkhe emandla abo embikwaSimakadze bamdvumisa ngetingoma, nangemahabhu, nangemalire, nangemafahlawane, nangetikhelekehle, nangabokhencekhence." 
2Samuel6:6 Batsi nabefika ebaleni lekubhulela lakaNakhoni, letinkhabi takhubatela, ngako Uza welula sandla, wabamba libhokisi lesivumelwane saNkulunkulu." 
2Samuel6:7 Lulaka lwaSimakadze lwamvutsela Uza, ngenca yesento sakhe sekungahloniphi. Ngako Nkulunkulu wamshaya, wafa, wafela khona lapho eceleni kwelibhokisi lesivumelwane saNkulunkulu." 
2Samuel6:8 Davide wase uyatfukutsela, ngobe lulaka lwaSimakadze lwalwehlele etikwa-Uza. Kuze kube ngulamhla loku leyo ndzawo seyabitwa ngekutsi yiPheresi Uza." 
2Samuel6:9 Ngalelo langa Davide wesaba Simakadze, wadzimate watsi: “Lingeta kanjani-ke libhokisi lesivumelwane kami?”" 
2Samuel6:10 Ngako wangabe asavuma kulitsatsa ahambe nalo aye eJerusalema, Lidolobha laDavide. Wabe sewuyaphambuka, walimikisa ekhaya ka-Obedi Edomu, waseGathi." 
2Samuel6:11 Libhokisi lesivumelwane saSimakadze lahlala ekhaya ka-Obedi Edomu, waseGathi, tinyanga letintsatfu; Simakadze wambusisa Obedi Edomu kanye nayo yonkhe indlu yakhe." 
2Samuel6:12 Inkhosi Davide bayitjela batsi: “Simakadze sewuyibusisile indlu yaka-Obedi Edomu, kanye nako konkhe kwakakhe ngenca yelibhokisi lesivumelwane saSimakadze.” Ngako Davide wase uyehla uyawulandza libhokisi lesivumelwane saNkulunkulu ekhaya ka-Obedi Edomu, weta nalo, waliletsa eJerusalema, Lidolobha laDavide, ahamba ajabula." 
2Samuel6:13 Kwatsi laba lababetfwele lelibhokisi lesivumelwane nase batsetse tinyatselo letisitfupha, wase unikela ngemhlatjelo wenkunzi nangelitfokati lelikhuluphele." 
2Samuel6:14 Davide abembetse sidziya sebaphristi lesasentiwe ngelineni, wagidza embikwaSimakadze ngawo onkhe emandla akhe ajabulile," 
2Samuel6:15 ngesikhatsi yena kanye nayo yonkhe indlu yema-Israyeli beta nelibhokisi lesivumelwane saSimakadze badvumisa ngekuhlabela nangekushaya emacilongo. 
2Samuel6:16 Latsi libhokisi lesivumelwane saSimakadze nalingena eDolobheni laDavide, Mikhali, indvodzakati yaSawula, wabukela, avele ngelifasitelo. Watsi nakabona inkhosi Davide igiya igcabashula embikwaSimakadze, wayedzelela enhlitiyweni yakhe." 
2Samuel6:17 Libhokisi laSimakadze baliletsa balibeka endzaweni yalo ekhatsi ethendeni Davide labelakhele lona, Davide wenta umhlatjelo wekushiswa kanye neminikelo yebudlelwane embikwaSimakadze." 
2Samuel6:18 Watsi nase acedzile kwenta iminikelo yekushiswa neminikelo yebudlelwane, wase ubusisa sive egameni laSimakadze longuSomandla." 
2Samuel6:19 Wase uniketa wonkhe umuntfu labekhona kuleso sicuku umkhama wesinkhwa, nelicebelengwane lemasundvu kanye nelemagelebisi lomisiwe, onkhe ema-Israyeli, labadvuna nalabasikati. Bonkhe bantfu bacitseka babuyela emakhaya abo." 
2Samuel6:20 Watsi Davide nasabuyele ekhaya lakhe kuyawubusisa indlu yakakhe, wahlangatjetwa nguMikhali, indvodzakati yaSawula, wafike watsi: “Inkhosi yema-Israyeli itentele ligama lelikhulu lamuhla, itivete njengalesikhulu silima emehlweni aletidzandzane tetindvuna tayo!”" 
2Samuel6:21 Davide wamphendvula watsi: “Bengigcabashula embikwaSimakadze lona lowakhetsa mine kuneyihlo, nakubo bonkhe bantfu basendlini kakhe, mzukwane angigcoba kutsi ngibe ngumholi etikwesive saSimakadze, ema-Israyeli. Ngisetawugiya embikwaSimakadze." 
2Samuel6:22 Ngisetakwehla kakhulu kunaloku, futsi ngitakwedzeleleka kakhulu emehlweni ami. Kodvwa-ke kuletigcili letitintfombi lokhuluma ngato ngitawuhlonipheka.”" 
2Samuel6:23 Mikhali, indvodzakati yaSawula, akazange abe namntfwana, kwaze kwaba lilanga lakhe lekufa." 
2Samuel7:1 Davide inkhosi watsi nase ahleti kahle, atintile esigodlweni sakhe, Simakadze asamphumutile nekumphumuta etitseni takhe tonkhe letatakhelene naye," 
2Samuel7:2 wase ukhuluma kuNathani, umphrofethi, watsi: “Buka la, mine ngihleti kahle esigodlweni lesakhiwe ngemisedari, kodvwa libhokisi lesivumelwane saNkulunkulu lihleti ethendeni.”" 
2Samuel7:3 Nathani wayiphendvula inkhosi, watsi: “Loko lonako engcondvweni yakho, chubeka ukwente, ngobe Simakadze unawe.”" 
2Samuel7:4 Ngalobo busuku kwefika livi laSimakadze kuNathani, latsi:" 
2Samuel7:5 “Hamba utjele inceku yami Davide, utsi: ‘Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: Nguwe yini lofanele kungakhela indlu yekuhlala?" 
2Samuel7:6 Mine angizange sengihlale endlini kusukela ngelilanga lengakhipha ngalo ema-Israyeli eveni laseGibhithe kuze kube ngulamuhla. Bengisolo ngihamba tindzawo ngetindzawo, nelithende lekuhlangana kunguyonandlu yami lengihlala kuyo." 
2Samuel7:7 Yonkhe indzawo lapho bengihamba khona nema-Israyeli, ngase ngasho yini khona kumunye webaholi babo, lengangibatfuma kutsi beluse sive sami ema-Israyeli, ngatsi: “Awukangakheli ngani indlu yekuhlala yemisedari?” ’" 
2Samuel7:8 “Manje-ke tjela inceku yami Davide, utsi: ‘Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, utsi: “Ngakutsatsa emadlelweni, ekulandzeleni imihlambi, kutsi utewuba ngumholi wesive sami, ema-Israyeli." 
2Samuel7:9 Benginawe kuyo yonkhe indzawo lapho bewuhamba khona, ngibhubhise tonkhe titsa takho embikwakho. Manje ngitakwenta libito lakho libe likhulu njengemabito ebaholi labakhulu emhlabeni." 
2Samuel7:10 Sive sami, ema-Israyeli, ngitasentela indzawo lenhle, ngisihlanyele khona kuze sibe nelikhaya laso, singaphindzi sikhatsateke. Bantfu lababi bangeke baphindze basihluphe sive njengobe bebenta ekucaleni," 
2Samuel7:11 njengobe benta seloku ngacala kubeka baholi etikwesive ami, ema-Israyeli. Ngitakupha nekuphumula kuto tonkhe titsa takho. “ ‘ “Simakadze ukhipha livi kuwe lekutsi Simakadze yena matfupha utakwakhela wena indlu." 
2Samuel7:12 Emalanga akho nase aphelile, sewulele kuboyihlomkhulu, ngiyawuvusa umliba wakho kutsi uhlale esihlalweni sakho sebukhosi, loyo loyawuphuma elukhalweni lwakho, ngiyakuwumisa umbuso wakhe." 
2Samuel7:13 Nguye-ke longuyena ayawungakhela indlu, ayakhele Libito lami, ngiyakumisa sihlalo sebukhosi bembuso wakhe phakadze naphakadze." 
2Samuel7:14 Mine ngiyawuba nguyise wakhe, yena abe yindvodzana yami. Nakenta lokubi, ngiyakumjezisa ngeluswati lwemadvodza, nangemivimba leyentiwa boyise kubantfwana."
