2Kings16:3 Wahamba etinyatselweni temakhosi aka-Israyeli, yena-ke wadzimate wanikela nangendvodzana yakhe kutsi ishiswe ngemlilo; alandzela imikhuba lesinengiso yaletive takhona Simakadze labeticoshe ngesikhatsi nakufika ema-Israyeli." 
2Kings16:4 Wanikela nangemihlatjelo, watfuncisa imphepho etindzaweni letiphakeme, nasetulu eticongweni temagcuma, nangephansi kwetihlahla letikhulu letendlala emagala ato." 
2Kings16:5 Kwase kusuka boResini, inkhosi yaseSiriya, naPhekha, umsa waRemaliya, inkhosi yaka-Israyeli, bashulungana bayawuhlasela iJerusalema, bavimbetela Ahazi, kodvwa bangete bamkhona." 
2Kings16:6 Ngaleso sikhatsi Resini, inkhosi yaseSiriya, yabuyisela i-Elathi eSiriya ngekudvungulula onkhe emadvodza akaJuda. Ema-Edomu ase ayawungena e-Elathi ayakwakha khona, ahlala lapho kuze kube ngulamuhla loku." 
2Kings16:7 Ahazi watfumela tigijimi kuyawutjela Thiglathi Phileseri, inkhosi yase-Asiriya, watsi: “Ngiyinceku lesisebenti sakho. Khuphuka utengephula etandleni tenkhosi yaseSiriya nasenkhosini yaka-Israyeli, naba bangihlasela.”" 
2Kings16:8 Ahazi watsatsa isiliva negolide leyayingatfolakala ethempelini laSimakadze nasendlini yengcebo yasesigodlweni senkhosi, wakutfumela njengesipho enkhosini yase-Asiriya." 
2Kings16:9 Thiglathi Phileseri, inkhosi yase-Asiriya, wasemukela sicelo sa-Ahazi, washuca nemphi yakhe wayawuhlasela iDamaseko, wayitfumba, wabulala Resini, wase utfumba labantfu bakhe wabayisa eKhiri." 
2Kings16:10 Inkhosi Ahazi yase iya eDamaseko yayawuhlangana naThiglathi Phileseri, inkhosi yase-Asiriya. Wafike wabona lilati eDamaseko, wase utfumela umfanekiso walo ku-Uriya, umphristi, kanye nayo yonkhe imininingwane yekwakhiwa kwalo." 
2Kings16:11 Ngako Uriya, umphristi, wase wakha lilati ngekulandzela yonkhe ipulani leyayitfunyelwe yinkhosi Ahazi iseseDamaseko; walakha walicedza, inkhosi Ahazi isengakabuyi." 
2Kings16:12 Inkhosi yatsi nayifika ibuya eDamaseko, yalibona lelilati, yasondzela yayakwetfula iminikelo kulo." 
2Kings16:13 Wanikela ngemnikelo wakhe wekushiswa, nangewalokutinhlavu, watfululela nemnikelo wakhe wesinatfo, wanyenyeta nangengati yemnikelo wakhe webudlelwane etikwelilati." 
2Kings16:14 Lilati lelitfusi lelalime embikwaSimakadze walisusa ekungeneni kwelithempeli emkhatsini welilati lelisha nendlu yaSimakadze, waliletsa ngasenyakatfo yelilati lelisha." 
2Kings16:15 Inkhosi Ahazi yase iyala umphristi Uriya, yatsi: “Kulelilati lelikhulu lelisha, ubonikela ngemnikelo wasekuseni wekushiswa kanye nangemnikelo wasentsambama walokutinhlavu, nangemnikelo wenkhosi wekushiswa, nangemnikelo wayo walokutinhlavu, nangemnikelo wekushiswa wesive sonkhe, nangemnikelo waso walokutinhlavu, nangemnikelo waso wesinatfo. Ubonyenyeta etikwelilati yonkhe ingati yemnikelo wekushiswa neyemihlatjelo. Kodvwa mine ngitawusebentisa lelilati lelitfusi, nangifuna teluleko.”" 
2Kings16:16 Umphristi Uriya wenta njengobe inkhosi Ahazi imyalile. 
2Kings16:17 Inkhosi Ahazi yatsatsa lamaphanela latikwele lasemaceleni kuletincodlana letindondiswako, yesusa nalemigezelo kuto. Yesusa nalelibhavu kuletinkunzi telitfusi letatilisimisile, yalibeka etikwesisekelo sematje." 
2Kings16:18 Yatsatsa nalendvundvuma leyayakhiwe ethempelini, yesusa naletitebhisi tekungena inkhosi letatingephandle ethempelini laSimakadze, yentela kutincengela enkhosini yase-Asiriya." 
2Kings16:19 Leminye imininingwane ngekubusa kwa-Ahazi, nako konkhe lakwenta, kubhaliwe encwadzini yemilandvo yemakhosi akaJuda." 
2Kings16:20 Ahazi wase uyakhotsama, wafihlwa kuboyisemkhulu eDolobheni laDavide. Hezekiya, umsa wakhe, waba yinkhosi esikhundleni sakhe." 
2Kings17:1 Ngemnyaka weli-12 wekubusa kwa-Ahazi, inkhosi yakaJuda, ka-Israyeli kwabekwa Hosheya, umsa wa-Ela, waba yinkhosi. Wabusela eSamariya iminyaka leyimfica." 
2Kings17:2 Wenta lokubi emehlweni aSimakadze, kodvwa hhayi njengalawa lamanye emakhosi aka-Israyeli labewalandzela." 
2Kings17:3 Shalmaneseri, inkhosi yase-Asiriya, wakhuphuka watawuhlasela Hosheya, labengumuntfu longaphansi kwakhe, atsela kuye umtselo." 
2Kings17:4 Kodvwa inkhosi yase-Asiriya yase iyatfola kutsi Hosheya abelimbuka, ngobe abetfumele emancusa eSayisi kuyo inkhosi yaseGibhithe, wangabe asatsela kulenkhosi yase-Asiriya, njengobe bekenta iminyaka ngeminyaka. Ngako-ke Shalmaneseri wambamba, wamvalela ejele." 
2Kings17:5 Inkhosi yase-Asiriya yahlasela lonkhe live, yavimbetela iSamariya, kwaze kwaba ngiminyaka lemitsatfu." 
2Kings17:6 Kwatsi ngemnyaka wemfica wekubusa kwaHosheya, inkhosi yase-Asiriya yatfumba iSamariya, yase itfumba baka-Israyeli yabayisa e-Asiriya. Yabeka labanye eHala, labanye eGozani ngasemfuleni iHabori, nalabanye emadolobheni emaMede." 
2Kings17:7 Konkhe loku kwenteka ngobe baka-Israyeli bona kuSimakadze Nkulunkulu wabo, labekabakhiphe eGibhithe, ngaphansi kwemandla aFaro, inkhosi yaseGibhithe. Besuka bakhonta labanye bonkulunkulu," 
2Kings17:8 balandzela imikhuba yaleto tive Simakadze labetidvungulule nabefikako, benta nemikhuba lemisha leyayentiwa ngemakhosi aka-Israyeli." 
2Kings17:9 Baka-Israyeli benta tintfo ngasense letatiphambene naSimakadze Nkulunkulu wabo, letatingakalungi. Kusukela etimbonisweni kuye emadolobheni labiyelwe, batakhela tindzawo letiphakeme tekukhontela tithico kuwo onkhe emadolobha abo." 
2Kings17:10 Batimisela tithicomatje netinsika ta-Ashera kuto tonkhe tintsaba letiphakeme, nangaphansi kwato tonkhe tihlahla letikhulu letendlele emagala ato." 
2Kings17:11 Kuto tonkhe letindzawo letiphakeme, babetfuncisa imphepho njengaletive Simakadze latidvungulula ngesikhatsi ema-Israyeli efika. Benta tintfo letimbi letamcunula Simakadze waze watfukutsela." 
2Kings17:12 Bakhonta tithico, nome Simakadze abekadze ashito watsi: “Ningabokwenta loko.”" 
2Kings17:13 Simakadze abebayalile baka-Israyeli nebakaJuda ngabo bonkhe baphrofethi nebaboniswa bakhe, watsi: “Phendvukani etindleleni tenu letimbi. Nakekelani imiyalo yami netimiso tami, mayelana nawo wonkhe umtsetfo lengayala ngawo boyihlomkhulu kutsi bawulalele, nalengawetfula kini ngetinceku tami baphrofethi.”" 
2Kings17:14 Kodvwa abazange balalele, bacinisa tinhloko njengaboyise, labangazange betsembele kuSimakadze Nkulunkulu wabo." 
2Kings17:15 Batala timiso takhe nesivumelwane sakhe labesente naboyisemkhulu, kanye neteluleko labebeluleke ngato. Balandzela tithico letingenamsebenti walutfo, nabo bagcina sebangenamsebenti walutfo. Basuke balingisa letive letatakhelene nabo, kantsi Simakadze abebayalile watsi: “Ningabalingisi.” Benta kona kanye loko Simakadze labetsite bangabokwenta." 
2Kings17:16 Bayifulatsela yonkhe imiyalo yaSimakadze Nkulunkulu wabo, batakhela tabo tithico letimbili letimise kwematfole, batakhela nensika ya-Ashera. Bakhotsama tinkhanyeti, bakhonta sithico saBhali." 
2Kings17:17 Benta imihlatjelo ngemadvodzana nangemadvodzakati abo bawashisa ngemlilo. Baphengula, babhula, batitsengisa ekwenteni bubi emehlweni aSimakadze, bamcunula." 
2Kings17:18 Simakadze wase uyabatfukutselela baka-Israyeli, wabesusa ebukhoneni bakhe, kwasala kuphela sive sakaJuda;" 
2Kings17:19 naso sive sakaJuda asizange siwugcine umyalo waSimakadze Nkulunkulu waso. Salandzela imikhuba lemibi leyase ifakwe baka-Israyeli. 
2Kings17:20 Ngako-ke Simakadze wase uyatala tonkhe tive tema-Israyeli, watihlupha, watinikela etandleni tebatfumbi bato, waze waticosha ebukhoneni bakhe." 
2Kings17:21 Kwatsi ngesikhatsi adzabula baka-Israyeli emndenini wakaDavide, besuka babeka Jerobowamu, umsa waNebati, kutsi abe yinkhosi yabo. Jerobowamu wasihuha sive saka-Israyeli, wasiphambukisa ekulandzeleni Simakadze, wasentisa sono lesikhulu." 
2Kings17:22 Baka-Israyeli baphikelela njalo kuto tonkhe tono taJerobowamu, bangete baphendvuka kuto," 
2Kings17:23 waze wabesusa Simakadze ebukhoneni bakhe, njengobe abevele abecwayisile ngato tonkhe tinceku takhe baphrofethi. Ngako-ke bantfu baka-Israyeli batsatfwa emitini yabo naseveni labo, bayiswa ekutfunjweni e-Asiriya; basesekhona lapho nalamhlanje." 
2Kings17:24 Inkhosi yase-Asiriya yaletsa bantfu baseBhabhulona nebaseKutha, nebase-Ava, nebaseHamathi, nebaseSefavayimu, yabahlalisa emadolobheni aseSamariya, esikhundleni sema-Israyeli. Bayitsatsa-ke iSamariya, bahlala emadolobheni ayo." 
2Kings17:25 Ngesikhatsi basandza kufika khona, abazange bamkhonte Simakadze, ngako Simakadze wabatfumelela ngemabhubesi, afike adla labanye babo." 
2Kings17:26 Loko kwabikwa enkhosini yase-Asiriya, kwatsiwa: “Labantfu lowabatfumba wayakubahlalisa emadolobheni aseSamariya abamati nkulunkulu wakhona kutsi ufunani. Sewutfumele emabhubesi emkhatsini wabo, ayababhobabhoba nje nyalo, ngobe labantfu abakwati lakufunako kubo.”" 
2Kings17:27 Ngako inkhosi yase-Asiriya yase ikhipha umyalo, yatsi: “Khiphani munye walabo baphristi lenabatfumba eSamariya abuyele emuva ayewuhlala nabo, abafundzise labantfu kutsi nkulunkulu wakhona ukhontwa njani.”" 
2Kings17:28 Ngako-ke lomunye webaphristi lababetfunjwe eSamariya waya wayawuhlala eBetheli, wabafundzisa kutsi ukhontwa njani Simakadze." 
2Kings17:29 Noko, nguleso sive satentela taso tithico kulawo madolobha letatihleti kuwo, satimisa etindzaweni letatihlonishwa letatakhiwe ngulabantfu baseSamariya etindzaweni letiphakeme." 
2Kings17:30 Emadvodza aseBhabhulona atakhela Sukhothi Bhenothi, aseKutha atakhela Negali, aseHamathi atakhela Ashima," 
2Kings17:31 ase-Ava amisa boNibhazi naThataki, tithico tawo. EmaSefavayimu wona abeshisa bantfwabawo emlilweni njengemhlatjelo ku-Adrameleki naku-Anameleki, bonkulunkulu bakubo eSefavayimu." 
2Kings17:32 Babekhonta naSimakadze, kodvwa babetimisela yonkhe inhlobo yebantfu bakubo kutsi bakhonte njengebaphristi kuletithico tabo etindzaweni letiphakeme." 
2Kings17:33 Babechubeka bona bamkhonte Simakadze, kodvwa babechubeka bakhonte naletithico tabo njengekwemasiko etive takubo lapho babesuswe khona." 
2Kings17:34 Kuze-ke kube ngulamuhla loku basaphikelele nekwenta imikhuba yabo yakadzeni. Abamkhonti Simakadze, futsi abayilandzeli imiyalo netimiso, nemitsetfo, neteluleko Simakadze lakunika titukulwane taJakobe, lametsa libito watsi ngu-Israyeli." 
2Kings17:35 Mzukwana Simakadze enta sivumelwane nema-Israyeli, wabayala watsi: “Ningabakhonti labanye bonkulunkulu, futsi ningabakhotsameli, nibasebentele nome nibahlabele imihlatjelo." 
2Kings17:36 Kodvwa Simakadze lowanikhipha eGibhithe ngemandla lamakhulu, nangengalo leyelulekile, nguye yedvwa lekufanele nimkhonte. Niyawukhotsama kuye, ninikele kuye ngemihlatjelo." 
2Kings17:37 Nifanele nicaphele njalo kugcina imiyalo netimiso takhe, imitsetfo neteluleko takhe lanibhalela tona. Ningabakhonti labanye bonkulunkulu." 
2Kings17:38 Ningasikhohlwa sivumelwane lengisente nani, futsi ningabakhonti labanye bonkulunkulu," 
2Kings17:39 kodvwa niyawukhonta Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu. Nguye loyakunikhulula esandleni sato tonkhe titsa tenu.” 
2Kings17:40 Noko abazange balalele, kodvwa baphikelela ekwenteni imikhuba yabo yakadzeni." 
2Kings17:41 Nangesikhatsi labantfu sebakhonta Simakadze, kodvwa babesachubeka nekukhonta tithico tabo. Kuze kube ngulamuhla loku, bantfwababo, nebantfwana bebantfwababo basachubeka nekwenta njengaboyisemkhulu." 
2Kings18:1 Ngemnyaka wesitsatfu waHosheya, umsa wa-Ela, inkhosi yaka-Israyeli, Hezekiya, umsa wa-Ahazi, inkhosi yakaJuda, wacala kubusa." 
2Kings18:2 Abeneminyaka lengema-25 budzala, nakabekwa kuba yinkhosi. Wabusela eJerusalema iminyaka lengema-29. Libito lenina bekungu-Abiya, indvodzakati yaZakhariya." 
2Kings18:3 Hezekiya wenta lokuhle emehlweni aSimakadze, wenta njengobe kwakwenta uyisemkhulu Davide." 
2Kings18:4 Wadzilita tindzawo letiphakeme tekukhontela tithico, wabhidlita tithicomatje, wagawula tinsika tabo-Ashera, waphahlata inyoka yelitfusi leyayakhiwe nguMosi, ngobe kwaze kwaba ngungaleso sikhatsi solomane ema-Israyeli atfuncisa imphepho kuyo, kwakutsiwa nguNehushtani libito layo." 
2Kings18:5 Hezekiya wametsemba Simakadze Nkulunkulu wema-Israyeli. Kute nayinye inkhosi leyaba njengaye kuwo onkhe emakhosi akaJuda, langembili kwakhe nalangasemva kwakhe." 
2Kings18:6 Hezekiya wabambelela kuSimakadze, akazange ayekele kumlandzela, wayigcina yonkhe imitsetfo yaSimakadze labeyinike Mosi." 
2Kings18:7 Simakadze waba naye, wamphumelelisa kuko konkhe labekwenta. Wayivukela inkhosi yase-Asiriya wangete wayihlehlela." 
2Kings18:8 Wahlasela, wehlula emaFilisti kusukela etimbonisweni kuye emadolobheni latinqaba, waze wefika eGaza nasesifundzeni sayo." 
2Kings18:9 Kwatsi ngemnyaka wesine wekubusa kwaHezekiya, lekwakungumnyaka wesikhombisa waHosheya, umsa wa-Ela, inkhosi yaka-Israyeli, wesuka Shalmaneseri, inkhosi yase-Asiriya, washuca wahlasela iSamariya wayivimbetela." 
2Kings18:10 Kwatsi emvakweminyaka lemitsatfu ema-Asiriya ayitfumba. Ngako iSamariya yatfunjwa ngemnyaka wesitfupha waHezekiya lekwakungumnyaka wemfica waHosheya, inkhosi yaka-Israyeli." 
2Kings18:11 Inkhosi yase-Asiriya yatfumba baka-Israyeli yabayisa e-Asiriya, labanye yafike yababeka eHala, labanye eGozani ngasemfuleni iHabori, nalabanye emadolobheni emaMede." 
2Kings18:12 Loku kwenteka, ngobe babengakamlaleli Simakadze Nkulunkulu wabo, kodvwa basephula sivumelwane sakhe, konkhe loko Mosi, inceku yaSimakadze, labebayale ngako. Abazange balalele imiyalo yakhe, futsi abahambanga nangayo." 
2Kings18:13 Ngemnyaka weli-14 wekubusa kwenkhosi Hezekiya, kwesuka Senaheribi, inkhosi yase-Asiriya, wahlasela onkhe emadolobha latinqaba akaJuda, wawatfumba." 
2Kings18:14 Ngako Hezekiya, inkhosi yakaJuda, wase utfumela umlayeto enkhosini yase-Asiriya, eLakhishi, watsi: “Ngonile. Ngicolele, ngitakunika konkhe lokufuna kimi.” Inkhosi yase-Asiriya yamgulula Hezekiya, inkhosi yakaJuda, ngekumkhokhisa emakhilogremu labengaba ti-10 000 etinhlavu tesiliva, kanye nemakhilogremu labengaba yinkhulungwane yetinhlavu tegolide." 
2Kings18:15 Ngako Hezekiya wayinika yonkhe isiliva leyatfolakala ethempelini laSimakadze kanye nasendlini yengcebo yasesigodlweni. 
2Kings18:16 Ngaleso sikhatsi Hezekiya, inkhosi yakaJuda, wahhibita yonkhe igolide labembese ngayo tivalo kanye netinsika tetivalo tasethempelini laSimakadze, wakunika inkhosi yase-Asiriya." 
2Kings18:17 Inkhosi yase-Asiriya yatfumela khenela wayo, nendvuna yemabutfo, nendvuna lenkhulu yemphi kanye nalelikhulu libutfo lemphi, lelesuka eLakhishi yaya enkhosini, Hezekiya, eJerusalema. Lemphi yefika eJerusalema yakanekisa emseleni wesitiba lesisenhla, emgwacweni loya eNsimini yeMgezi Wetingubo." 
2Kings18:18 Befika lapho babita inkhosi, kwaphuma bo-Eliyakimu, umsa waHilkiya, indvuna yesigodlo, naShebna labengumabhalane, naJowa, umsa wa-Asafa, umbhalisi, baya kubo." 
2Kings18:19 Indvuna lenkhulu yemphi yafike yakhuluma kubo, yatsi: “Tjelani Hezekiya, nitsi: ‘Naku lokushiwo yinkhosi lenkhulu, inkhosi yase-Asiriya, itsi: Ulibeke kubani litsemba lakho?" 
2Kings18:20 Utsi unemasu nemabutfo emphi lanemandla, kodvwa ukhuluma lite nje. Ngubani lona lowetsembele kuye kutsi ungaze uvukele mine?" 
2Kings18:21 Buka la, nyalo wetsembele eGibhithe, kulolubhatu lwendvuku yemhlanga lolugwaza sandla semuntfu lumlimate, nakatsi ubambelela kulo! Unjalo-ke Faro, inkhosi yaseGibhithe, kubo bonkhe labetsembela kuye." 
2Kings18:22 Nangabe utsi kimi: “Setsembele kuSimakadze Nkulunkulu wetfu,” akusiye yini lona Hezekiya ladzilita tindzawo takhe letiphakeme tekukhontela nemalati akhe, atsi kubakaJuda nebaseJerusalema: “Kufanele nikhonte embikwanali lilati leliseJerusalema?”" 
2Kings18:23 “ ‘Buya-ke nyalo, wente sivumelwane nemphatsi wami, inkhosi yase-Asiriya: Ngitakunika emahhashi lati-2 000, nawungaba nebantfu labangawagibela." 
2Kings18:24 Ungayeyisa yini yona yinye nje kuto tonkhe tindvuna letincane temphatsi wami, nome ngabe wetsembele eGibhithe ngetincola temphi kanye nebagibeli bemahhashi?" 
2Kings18:25 Ngetulu kwaloko nje, kantsi lapha ngitele kutawuhlasela nekubhubhisa lendzawo ngaphandle kwaSimakadze yini? Simakadze nguye cobo lwakhe longitjele kutsi angishuce ngite kulelive ngitekulibhubhisa.’ ”" 
2Kings18:26 Bo-Eliyakimu, umsa waHilkiya, naShebna, naJowa bakhuluma kulendvuna lenkhulu yemphi, batsi: “Sicela umane ukhulume ngesiSiriya etincekwini takho, ngobe ngulona lulwimi lesiluvako. Ungakhulumi natsi ngesiHebheru kuva bonkhe labantfu labalapha etulu elubondzeni.”" 
2Kings18:27 Kodvwa lendvuna lenkhulu yemphi yabaphendvula yatsi: “Kantsi inkhosi yami beyingitfume kini nalenkhosi yenu nodvwa yini kutsi ngitewukhuluma lamagama? Beyingakangitfumi yini nakubo labantfu labalapha etulu elubondzeni, nabo labanjengani, labatawudla emangcoliso abo, baphindze banatse nemichamo yabo?”" 
2Kings18:28 Lendvuna lenkhulu yemphi yase iyasukuma yamemeta ngesiHebheru, yatsi: “Lalelani emavi enkhosi lenkhulu, inkhosi yase-Asiriya!" 
2Kings18:29 Naku lokushiwo yinkhosi, itsi: ‘Ningacali niyengwe nguHezekiya. Ngeke anisindzise esandleni sami." 
2Kings18:30 Ningavumi kutsi Hezekiya aniyenge netsembele kuSimakadze, nakatsi: “Simakadze utasephula ngempela, lelidolobha lingeke linikelwe esandleni senkhosi yase-Asiriya.” ’" 
2Kings18:31 “Inkhosi yase-Asiriya itsi: ‘Ningamlaleli Hezekiya, yentani sivumelwane nami, niphume nite kimi, nguleyo naleyo ndvodza-ke iyawube seyitidlela kahle esivinini sayo, nasemkhiwaneni wayo, inatse nemanti laphuma emtfonjeni wayo," 
2Kings18:32 ngize ngifike nginitsatse nginimikise eveni lelifanana nelenu, live lelinalokutinhlavu, nalelineliwayini lelisha, live lesinkhwa neletivini, live letihlahla temincumo neluju lwetinyosi: Khetsani kuphila kunekufa.’ “Ningamlaleli Hezekiya, ngobe uyanedukisa nakatsi: ‘Simakadze utasikhulula.’" 
2Kings18:33 Ukhona yini nkulunkulu wanome ngusiphi sive lowake wakhulula live lakhe esandleni senkhosi yase-Asiriya? 
2Kings18:34 Baphi bonkulunkulu baseHamathi ne-Aphadi? Baphi bonkulunkulu baseSefavayimu, neHena, nebase-Ava? Bayisindzisile yini iSamariya esandleni sami?" 
2Kings18:35 Ngumuphi kubo bonkhe labonkulunkulu balamave lowake wakhona kusindzisa live lakhe esandleni sami? Simakadze-ke yena angayisindzisa kanjani iJerusalema esandleni sami?” 
2Kings18:36 Kodvwa labantfu babindza nje batsi gudvu, bangete basho lutfo, ngobe inkhosi yayibadvonse ngendlebe, yatsi: “Ningacali nimphendvule.”" 
2Kings18:37 Bo-Eliyakimu, umsa waHilkiya, labeyindvuna yesigodlo, naShebna labengumabhalane, kanye naJowa, umsa wa-Asafa, labengulobhalisako, bahamba bayawubikela Hezekiya, sebadzabule tingubo tabo, bafike bamtjela konkhe lokwakushiwo yindvuna lenkhulu yemphi yase-Asiriya." 
2Kings19:1 Hezekiya, inkhosi, watsi kube akuve loko, wadzabula tingubo takhe wembatsa emasaka, wahamba wangena ethempelini laSimakadze." 
2Kings19:2 Watfumela bo-Eliyakimu, indvuna yasesigodlweni, naShebna, labengumabhalane, kanye nebaholi bebaphristi, bonkhe bagcoke emasaka baya kumphrofethi Isaya, umsa wa-Amose." 
2Kings19:2 Watfumela bo-Eliyakimu, indvuna yasesigodlweni, naShebna, labengumabhalane, kanye nebaholi bebaphristi, bonkhe bagcoke emasaka baya kumphrofethi Isaya, umsa wa-Amose." 
2Kings19:3 Bamtjela batsi: “Naku lokushiwo nguHezekiya, utsi: ‘Lelilanga lalamuhla lilanga lenjabhiso, nekutsetsiswa nelihlazo, njenganakufika tikhatsi tekubelekwa kwebantfwana kube kute emandla ekubabeleka." 
2Kings19:4 Kungenteka kube Simakadze Nkulunkulu wakho utaweva onkhe emavi endvuna lenkhulu yemphi, letfunywe ngumphatsi wayo, inkhosi yase-Asiriya, kutsi itewuhlazisa Nkulunkulu lophilako, nekutsi yena utayitsetsisela emavi Simakadze Nkulunkulu wakho lawevile. Ngako-ke thandazela lensali lesolomane isasele.’ ”" 
2Kings19:5 Tatsi letindvuna takaHezekiya natifika ku-Isaya," 
2Kings19:6 Isaya wakhuluma kuto, watsi: “Tjelani inkhosi yenu nitsi: ‘Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: Ningesatjiswa nguloko lenikuvile, lawo mavi ledzelelako etinceku tenkhosi yase-Asiriya letingihlambalate ngawo." 
2Kings19:7 Lalelani! Ngitawufaka kuye umoya lotamenta kutsi atsi nakeva umbiko lotsite, ancandzeke abuyele eveni lakhe, ngulapho-ke ngiyawumenta afele khona ngenkemba.’ ”" 
2Kings19:8 Lendvuna lenkhulu yemphi yatsi kube ive kutsi inkhosi yase-Asiriya ayisekho eLakhishi, yase iyancandzeka nayo, yakhandza inkhosi ibambene etulu neLibna." 
2Kings19:9 Senaheribi watfola umbiko wekutsi Thihakha, inkhosi yaseKushe, nayo iyashuca itewuhlasela yena. Ngako waphindze watfumela tigijimi kuHezekiya nelivi lelitsi:" 
2Kings19:10 “Tjelani Hezekiya, inkhosi yakaJuda, nitsi: ‘Ungayengwa ngulonkulunkulu wakho lometsembako nakatsi: “IJerusalema ngeke inikelwe etandleni tenkhosi yase-Asiriya.”" 
2Kings19:11 Angitsi sewuvile kutsi entani emakhosi ase-Asiriya kuwo onkhe lamanye emave, acotfule imbokodvo nesisekelo kuwo. Wena-ke ungaphepha kanjani?" 
2Kings19:12 Labonkulunkulu betive letabhujiswa bobabemkhulu, batikhulula yini letive tabo, bonkulunkulu baseGozani, nebaseHarani, nebaseResefu kanye nebebantfu base-Edeni lababeseThelasari?" 
2Kings19:13 Iphi inkhosi yaseHamathi, nenkhosi yase-Aphadi, nenkhosi yelidolobha laseSefavayimu, neyaseHena, neyase-Ava?’ ”" 
2Kings19:14 Hezekiya watsatsa lencwadzi kuletigijimi wayifundza, wase ukhuphukela nayo ethempelini laSimakadze, wafike wayendlala embikwaSimakadze." 
2Kings19:15 Hezekiya wase uyathandaza kuSimakadze, watsi: “Awu, Simakadze, Nkulunkulu wesive sema-Israyeli, wena lohleli emkhatsini wemakherubhi, wena wedvwa unguNkulunkulu etikwayo yonkhe imibuso yemhlaba. Wena wadala lizulu nemhlaba." 
2Kings19:16 Vula indlebe yakho! Awu, Simakadze, vani; uvule emehlo akho, Simakadze, ubone; lalela emavi latfunyelwe nguSenaheribi ekwetfuka wena, Nkulunkulu lophilako." 
2Kings19:17 “Kuliciniso kona, Simakadze, kutsi emakhosi ase-Asiriya atibhubhisile letive kanye nemave ato." 
2Kings19:18 Bajikijele bonkulunkulu bato emlilweni, bababhubhisa, ngobe bebangesibo bonkulunkulu sibili, bekutigodvo nje nematje labatwe tandla tebantfu." 
2Kings19:19 Manje-ke, Simakadze Nkulunkulu wetfu, sephule esandleni sakhe, kuze yonkhe imibuso yemhlaba yati kutsi wena wedvwa, Simakadze, unguNkulunkulu.”" 
2Kings19:20 Isaya, umsa wa-Amose, wase utfumela livi kuHezekiya, atsi: “Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze Nkulunkulu wema-Israyeli, utsi: ‘Ngiwuvile umkhuleko wakho macondzana naSenaheribi, inkhosi yase-Asiriya.’" 
2Kings19:20 Isaya, umsa wa-Amose, wase utfumela livi kuHezekiya, atsi: “Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze Nkulunkulu wema-Israyeli, utsi: ‘Ngiwuvile umkhuleko wakho macondzana naSenaheribi, inkhosi yase-Asiriya.’" 
2Kings19:21 Nali-ke livi lelikhulunywe nguSimakadze lelimelene naye, litsi: “ ‘Indvodzakati yaseSiyoni iyakwedzelela, ikubukela phansi. Indvodzakati yaseJerusalema igencetisa inhloko yayo, nawubaleka." 
2Kings19:22 Ngubani lona lometfukile wamhlambalata? Ngubani lona bewumbhodlela umetfwalela emehlo? NguLongcwele waka-Israyeli! 
2Kings19:23 Ngetigijimi takho umpongise tindvundvuma tetinhlamba kuSimakadze, futsi watsi: “Ngetincola tami temphi letinyenti ngigibele ticongo tetintsaba, ticongo letiphakeme kakhulu taseLebanoni. Ngijube imisedari yakhona lemidze kakhulu, kanye netipheshula telikhetselo. Ngifinyelele kuletikhashane tindzawo takhona, emahlatsi akhona elikhetselo." 
2Kings19:24 Ngimbe imitfombo emaveni etive, nganatsa nemanti ayo khona lapho. Ngetitsendze tetinyawo tami ngomise yonkhe imifula yaseGibhithe.”" 
2Kings19:25 “ ‘Awuzange uve yini? Ngakumisa kadzeni. Ngakuhlela ngemalanga asendvulo, manje sesikhatsi sekutsi kwenteke, kutsi ugucule emadolobha latinqaba, uwente tindvundvuma tematje." 
2Kings19:26 Bantfu bawo baphelelwe ngemandla, badzangele, batselwa ngelihlazo. Bafanana netihlahla tesiganga, banjengemidvumba leluhlata yemahlumela, emahlumela etjani lobusungula etikwetindlu, base bubhadliswa lilanga busamila." 
2Kings19:27 “ ‘Kodvwa ngiyati kutsi uhlalaphi, ngikwati nawungena nome uphuma, nekutsi ungibhodlela kanjani." 
2Kings19:28 Njengobe uyangibhodlela, nekungicoloshela kwakho sekufikile etindlebeni tami, ngitawufaka umkhala wami ekhaleni lakho nelitomu lami emlonyeni wakho. Ngiyawukuncandzekisa ngaleyo ndlela lote ngayo.’" 
2Kings19:29 “Loku-ke kuyawuba sibonakaliso kuwe, Hezekiya: “Kulomnyaka uyawudla loko lokutimilele, ngemnyaka wesibili udle emahlumela ako. Kodvwa ngemnyaka wesitsatfu uyawuhlanyela uvune. Uyawuhlanyela tivini ubuye udle emagelebisi ato." 
2Kings19:30 Insali yendlu yakaJuda iyawuphindza futsi ifake timphandze tayo phansi, ngetulu itsele titselo tayo." 
2Kings19:31 Ngobe eJerusalema kuyawuvela insali. ESiyoni kuyawuvela libutfo lalabasindze ekufeni. Kushisekela kwaSimakadze longuSomandla kuyawukuphelelisa loko. 
2Kings19:32 “Ngako-ke naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze macondzana nenkhosi yase-Asiriya: “Ngeke ingene kulelidolobha nome icibishele imicibisholo kulo. Ngeke ime embikwalo ngelihawu, futsi ngeke yente lutfo lwekulivimbetela." 
2Kings19:33 Iyawuncandzeka ngaleyo ndlela lete ngayo. Ngeke ingene kulelidolobha,” kusho Simakadze." 
2Kings19:34 “Ngitalivikela lelidolobha ngilisindzise, ngenca yami nangenca yenceku yami Davide.”" 
2Kings19:35 Ngalobo busuku ingilosi yaSimakadze yaphuma yabhubhisa emadvodza lati-185 000, labesenkambu yema-Asiriya. Batsi bantfu nabavuka ekuseni ngakusasa, bakhangwa lucaca lwetidvumbu!" 
2Kings19:36 Ngako Senaheribi, inkhosi yase-Asiriya, wadzilita inkambu yakhe, wahamba wabuyela eNineve, wayawuhlala khona." 
2Kings19:37 Kwatsi ngalelinye lilanga aselibele kukhonta ethempelini lankulunkulu wakhe, Nisroki, kwesuka emadvodzana akhe, bo-Adrameleki naShareseri, bamjuba ngenkemba, besuka lapho babalekela eveni lase-Ararathi. Esahadoni, umsa wakhe, waba yinkhosi yase-Asiriya esikhundleni sakhe." 
2Kings20:1 Kulawo malanga Hezekiya wagula wabangwa netibi. Umphrofethi, Isaya, umsa wa-Amose, waya kuye, wafike watsi: “Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: Sale ulungisa kahle tonkhe tintfo tasemndenini wakakho, ngobe sewutakufa, ngeke usindze.”" 
2Kings20:1 Kulawo malanga Hezekiya wagula wabangwa netibi. Umphrofethi, Isaya, umsa wa-Amose, waya kuye, wafike watsi: “Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: Sale ulungisa kahle tonkhe tintfo tasemndenini wakakho, ngobe sewutakufa, ngeke usindze.”" 
2Kings20:2 Hezekiya wagucuka wabheka ngaselubondzeni, wathandaza kuSimakadze watsi:" 
2Kings20:3 “Awu, Simakadze, khumbula kutsi bengihamba ngekwetsembeka lokunjani embikwakho, nekutsi bengitinikele kangakanani embikwakho, ngayo yonkhe inhlitiyo yami, ngenta lokuhle emehlweni akho.” Hezekiya wakhala kabuhlungu." 
2Kings20:4 Kwatsi nje Isaya asengakaphumi nasemabaleni, livi laSimakadze lefika kuye, latsi:" 
2Kings20:5 “Ncandzeka uyewutjela Hezekiya, umholi wesive sami, utsi: ‘Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, Nkulunkulu weyihlomkhulu, Davide, utsi: Ngiwuvile umthandazo wakho, ngatibona netinyembeti takho; ngitakuphilisa. Ngelilanga lesitsatfu kusukela lamuhla utawukhuphukela ethempelini laSimakadze." 
2Kings20:6 Ngitakwengetela iminyaka leli-15 ebudzeni bemphilo yakho. Ngitawukhulula wena kanye nalelidolobha esandleni senkhosi yase-Asiriya. Ngitalivikela lelidolobha ngenca yami nangenca yenceku yami Davide.’ ” 
2Kings20:7 Isaya wase utsi: “Futfumetani sitfobo semakhiwa.” Basilungisa, bamtfoba ngaso kulamatfumba, wase uyaphila." 
2Kings20:8 Hezekiya abebute ku-Isaya watsi: “Sitawuba yini sibonakaliso sekutsi Simakadze utangiphilisa, nekutsi ngitawukhuphukela ethempelini laSimakadze ngelilanga lesitsatfu kusukela nyalo?”" 
2Kings20:9 Isaya waphendvula watsi: “Nasi sibonakaliso saSimakadze kuwe, sekutsi Simakadze utakwenta loko lakwetsembisile: Sitfunti sitawuya embili tinyatselo letilishumi yini nome sitawuya emuva tinyatselo letilishumi etitebhisini tesikhatsi?”" 
2Kings20:10 Hezekiya watsi: “Kuyintfo lelula kutsi sitfunti siye embili tinyatselo letilishumi. Lokungenani sitfunti singamane sibuyele emuva tinyatselo letilishumi kuleto titebhisi.” 
2Kings20:11 Umphrofethi Isaya wabita Simakadze, Simakadze wase ubuyisela sitfunti emuva tinyatselo letilishumi lesase sitehlile etitebhisini tetikhatsi letatakhiwe ngu-Ahazi." 
2Kings20:12 Ngaleso sikhatsi Merodaki Baladani, umsa waBaladani, inkhosi yaseBhabhulona, watfumelela Hezekiya tincwadzi nesipho, njengobe abebikelwe ngekugula kwaHezekiya." 
2Kings20:13 Hezekiya watemukela ngekujabula letitfunywa, watikhombisa konkhe lokwakusetindlini takhe tengcebo, lekwakuyisiliva, negolide, netinongo tekudla, nemafutsa lamahle, netikhali takhe tekulwa kanye nato tonkhe tintfo letatikhona endlini yakhe yengcebo: Kwakute lutfo esigodlweni sakhe nasembusweni wakhe wonkhe langazange Hezekiya atikhombise kona." 
2Kings20:14 Isaya, umphrofethi, wase uya kuHezekiya, inkhosi, wambuta watsi: “Atsiteni lamadvodza, kona abebuyaphi?” Hezekiya waphendvula watsi: “Abebuya eveni lelikhashane kakhulu, eBhabhulona.”" 
2Kings20:15 Lomphrofethi wabuta watsi: “Baboneni lapha esigodlweni sakho?” Hezekiya watsi: “Babone konkhe lapha esigodlweni sami. Kute nakunye engcebeni yami lengingakabakhombisi kona.” 
2Kings20:16 Isaya wase utsi kuHezekiya: “Vani livi laSimakadze: 
2Kings20:17 ‘Sikhatsi sitawufika ngempela, lapho konkhe lokusesigodlweni sakho, nako konkhe loko lokwalondvolotwa boyihlomkhulu kusukela kadzenidzeni kuze kube ngulamuhla, kutakwetfwalwa kuyiswe eBhabhulona. Kute nakunye lokuyawusala, kusho Simakadze." 
2Kings20:18 Labanye betitukulwane takho, labayingati yakho nenyama yakho, lewuyawutalelwa bona, bayawutfunjwa bayekwentiwa batsenwa basesigodlweni senkhosi yaseBhabhulona.’ ”" 
2Kings20:19 Hezekiya waphendvula watsi: “Lelivi laSimakadze lose ulikhulumile lilungile ngempela.” Hezekiya abecabanga kutsi loko kwakusho kutsi kusetakuba nekuthula kanye nekuvikeleka ngaso sonkhe sikhatsi sekuphila kwakhe. 
2Kings20:20 Leminye imininingwane ngekubusa kwaHezekiya, nako konkhe kuphumelela kwakhe, nekutsi walakha njani lichibi nemsele labeletsa ngawo emanti ekhatsi edolobheni, kubhaliwe encwadzini yemilandvo yemakhosi akaJuda." 
2Kings20:21 Hezekiya wase uyakhotsama. Manase, umsa wakhe, waba yinkhosi esikhundleni sakhe." 
2Kings21:1 Manase abeneminyaka leli-12 budzala, nakabekwa kuba yinkhosi. Wabusela eJerusalema iminyaka lengema-55. Libito lenina bekunguHefsiba." 
2Kings21:2 Manase wenta lokubi emehlweni aSimakadze, alandzela leto tintfo letatisinengiso letatentiwa nguleto tive Simakadze latidvungulula ngesikhatsi nakufika sive sema-Israyeli." 
2Kings21:3 Wavusa kabusha tindzawo letiphakeme tekukhontela tithico, letatibhidlitwe nguyise Hezekiya. Waphindze wakha emalati aBhali, wakha nensika ya-Ashera, njengobe na-Ahabi, inkhosi yaka-Israyeli, abentile. Wakhotsama wakhonta tonkhe tinkhanyeti tesibhakabhaka." 
2Kings21:4 Wakha emalati ekhatsi ethempelini laSimakadze, Simakadze labekhulume ngalo watsi: “Libito lami ngiyakulibeka eJerusalema.”" 
2Kings21:5 Kuto totimbili tibuya telithempeli laSimakadze wakha emalati ekukhonta tinkhanyeti. 
2Kings21:6 Wanikela ngendvodzana yakhe kutsi ishiswe ngemlilo, wangenela bungoma nemilingo, wabuye watihlanganisa nalabanemadloti kanye nalabaphengulako. Wenta lokubi kakhulu emehlweni aSimakadze, wamtfukutselisa." 
2Kings21:7 Watsatsa insika ya-Ashera labeyentile wayibeka ethempelini, lelo Simakadze labekhulume ngalo kuDavide nakuSolomoni, umsa wakhe, watsi: “Kulelithempeli naseJerusalema lengiyikhetse emkhatsini wato tonkhe tive tema-Israyeli, ngitawubeka Libito lami kuyo phakadze naphakadze." 
2Kings21:8 Ngingeke ngiphindze ngente tinyawo tema-Israyeli tibe solomane tizulazula tisuke kulelive lengalipha bokhokho bawo, kuphela nje nangabe bangacaphela kutsi bente konkhe loko lengabayala ngako kutsi bakwente nekutsi bagcine wonkhe umtsetfo lengawunika Mosi, inceku yami.”" 
2Kings21:9 Kodvwa bantfu abazange balalele. Manase wabedukisa, ngako benta lokubi kakhulu kwendlula letive letabhujiswa nguSimakadze, ngesikhatsi nakufika ema-Israyeli." 
2Kings21:10 Simakadze wakhuluma ngetinceku takhe, baphrofethi, watsi:" 
2Kings21:11 “Manase, inkhosi yakaJuda, wente letono letisinengiso. Wente lokubi kakhulu kwendlula ema-Amori labekhona ngaphambi kwakhe, sewuze wahola bakaJuda wayawubafaka esonweni sekukhonta tithico." 
2Kings21:12 Ngako-ke naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze Nkulunkulu wema-Israyeli, utsi: ‘Ngitakwehlisela inhlekelele eJerusalema nakaJuda, kangangekutsi tindlebe talowo loyawuva ngayo tiyawuncencetsa." 
2Kings21:13 IJerusalema ngiyayijezisa njengeSamariya nanjengobe ngajezisa Ahabi, inkhosi yaka-Israyeli. Ngitabashanyela bonkhe bantfu baseJerusalema, sincane sendishi lekususwe kuyo konkhe bekungekhatsi, yase ibhekiswa phansi." 
2Kings21:14 Insali yelifa lami ngitayifulatsela, ngiyetfule etitseni tayo. Insali itawuphangwa ichwagwe ngito tonkhe titsa tayo," 
2Kings21:15 ngobe yente lokubi emehlweni ami yangitfukutselisa, ngatfukutsela kusukela mhlazana bokhokho bayo baphuma eGibhithe kuze kube ngulamuhla.’ ”" 
2Kings21:16 Ngetulu kwaloko, Manase wacitsa kakhulu ingati yalabangenacala, kangangekutsi titaladi taseJerusalema tatigeleta ingati kusukela ekucaleni kuze kuyewuphuma ekugcineni. Loko wakwengetela ekwenteni sive sakaJuda kutsi sikhonte tithico, wasenta sona kuSimakadze." 
2Kings21:17 Leminye imininingwane ngekubusa kwaManase, nako konkhe lakwenta, netono latenta, kubhaliwe encwadzini yemilandvo yemakhosi akaJuda." 
2Kings21:18 Manase wase uyakhotsama, wafihlwa ensimini yesigodlo lekwakutsiwa yinsimi ya-Uza. Amoni, umsa wakhe, waba yinkhosi esikhundleni sakhe." 
2Kings21:19 Amoni abeneminyaka lengema-22 budzala, nakabekwa kuba yinkhosi. Wabusela eJerusalema iminyaka lemibili. Libito lenina bekunguMeshulemethi, indvodzakati yaHarusi, waseJotbha." 
2Kings21:20 Amoni wenta lokubi emehlweni aSimakadze, walingisa uyise Manase." 
2Kings21:21 Wahamba kuto tonkhe tindlela teyise; wakhonta wakhotsamela letithico, njengobe kwenta uyise." 
2Kings21:22 Walahla Simakadze, Nkulunkulu waboyise, wangete wahamba endleleni yaSimakadze." 
2Kings21:23 Tiphatsimandla ta-Amoni, tamakhela luzungu tamenta silo sengubo tambulalela endlunkhulu yakhe." 
2Kings21:24 Kodvwa sonkhe sive salelo live sabulala bonkhe labo bebente luzungu lwekubulala Amoni, inkhosi. Sabeka Josaya, umsa wakhe, kutsi abe yinkhosi esikhundleni sakhe." 
2Kings21:25 Leminye imininingwane ngekubusa kwa-Amoni, nako konkhe lakwenta, kubhaliwe encwadzini yemilandvo yemakhosi akaJuda." 
2Kings21:26 Wafihlwa ethuneni lakhe, ensimini ya-Uza. Josaya, umsa wakhe, waba yinkhosi esikhundleni sakhe." 
2Kings22:1 Josaya abeneminyaka lesiphohlongo budzala, nakabekwa kuba yinkhosi. Wabusela eJerusalema iminyaka lengema-31. Libito lenina bekunguJedida, indvodzakati ya-Adaya, waseBhoskhathi." 
2Kings22:2 Josaya wenta lokuhle emehlweni aSimakadze, wahamba ngato tonkhe tindlela teyise Davide, akazange aphambukele ngesekudla nome ngesancele." 
2Kings22:3 Emnyakeni weli-18 ekubuseni kwakhe, inkhosi Josaya watfumela mabhalane Shafani, umsa wa-Asaliya, umsa waMeshulamu, kutsi aye ethempelini laSimakadze. Wakhuluma kuye watsi:" 
2Kings22:4 “Hamba uye kuHilkiya, umPhristi Lomkhulu, umtjele alungise lemali beyiletfwa kuSimakadze ethempelini, lebeyitsatfwa ngulabomahlalesangweni kubantfu." 
2Kings22:5 Mtjele ayinike lamadvodza labekelwa kwengamela umsebenti welithempeli. Lamadvodza akakhokhele labo labavusetela lithempeli laSimakadze: 
2Kings22:6 babati, nebakhi, nebacoti bematje. Lokunye futsi kufanele batsenge tingodvo kanye nematje labatiwe ekuvusetela lelithempeli." 
2Kings22:7 Lamadvodza akukafaneli alandzise ngalemali lanikwe yona, ngobe asebenta ngekwetsembeka.”" 
2Kings22:8 Hilkiya, umPhristi Lomkhulu, wakhuluma kumabhalane Shafani, watsi: “Ngiyitfolile incwadzi yemtsetfo ekhatsi ethempelini laSimakadze.” Wase uyinika Shafani, kutsi ayifundze." 
2Kings22:9 Shafani, mabhalane, waya enkhosini, wafike wabika watsi: “Tinceku takho setiyikhiphile lemali beyisethempelini laSimakadze, tivele tayibeka etandleni tetisebenti nebagcugcuteli.”" 
2Kings22:10 Shafani, mabhalane, wayibikela inkhosi, watsi: “Hilkiya, umphristi, unginike incwadzi.” Shafani wase ufundzela inkhosi lencwadzi." 
2Kings22:11 Inkhosi yatsi kube iweve lamavi alencwadzi yemtsetfo, yeklebhula tembatfo tayo." 
2Kings22:12 Yase ikhuluma kuboHilkiya, umphristi, na-Ahikamu, umsa waShafani, na-Akbori, umsa waMikhaya, naShafani, labengumabhalane, kanye na-Asaya, inceku yenkhosi, yatsi:" 
2Kings22:13 “Hambani niyekungibutela kuSimakadze mine kanye nebantfu kanye nesive sonkhe sakaJuda macondzana naloko lokubhalwe kulencwadzi leseyitfolakele. Yinkhulu kabi intfukutselo yaSimakadze lesivutselako; ngobe bobabe abazange bawalalele emavi alencwadzi. Abazange bakwente konkhe loku lokubhalwe kuyo macondzana natsi.” 
2Kings22:14 Hilkiya, umphristi, na-Ahikamu, na-Akbori, naShafani kanye na-Asaya bahamba bayawukhuluma naHulda, umphrofethikati, labengumkaShalumi, umsa waThikva, umsa waHahasi; Shalumi abengumphatsi wetembatfo tasethempelini. Lomphrofethikati abehlala eJerusalema eSifundzeni Sesibili." 
2Kings22:15 Wabatjela watsi: “Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, Nkulunkulu wema-Israyeli, utsi: Tjelani lendvodza lenitfumele lapha kimi, nitsi:" 
2Kings22:16 ‘Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: Ngitakwehlisela inhlekelele kulendzawo nakubantfu bayo, kuye njengobe kubhaliwe kulencwadzi lefundvwe yinkhosi yakaJuda." 
2Kings22:17 Njengobe bangikhohliwe mine, batfuncisa imphepho kulabanye bonkulunkulu, bangitfukutselisa ngato tonkhe letithico labatente ngetandla tabo, intfukutselo yami itawuvutsela lendzawo, futsi ingeke icisheke.’" 
2Kings22:18 Tjelani inkhosi yakaJuda lenitfumele kutsi nitekuyibutela kuSimakadze, kutsi: ‘Naku-ke lokushiwo nguSimakadze, Nkulunkulu wema-Israyeli, macondzana nalamavi lowevile:" 
2Kings22:19 Njengobe inhlitiyo yakho itsintsekile, wase uyatitfoba embikwaSimakadze, nawuva loko lengikukhulumile ngalendzawo kanye nangebantfu bayo, kutsi batawucalekiswa balahlwe njengetibi, nekutsi njengobe uklebhule tingubo takho, wakhala embikwami, sengikuvile, kusho Simakadze." 
2Kings22:20 Ngako-ke ngitakuyisa kuboyihlomkhulu, wena uyawufihlwa ngekuthula. Emehlo akho akayikuyibona yonkhe lenhlekelele lengitayehlisela kulendzawo.’ ” Ngako batsatsa lemphendvulo yakhe lomphrofethikati bayimikisa enkhosini." 
2Kings23:1 Josaya, inkhosi, wase ubita bonkhe baholi bakaJuda nebaseJerusalema." 
2Kings23:2 Wenyuka nabo waya ethempelini laSimakadze akanye nalamadvodza akaJuda, nebantfu bonkhe baseJerusalema, nebaphristi nebaphrofethi, ngisho nabo bonkhe bantfu kusukela kulomncane kuze kuyewufika kulomkhulu. Wabafundzela, baweva onkhe emavi encwadzi yesivumelwane, leyayitfolakele ethempelini laSimakadze." 
2Kings23:3 Inkhosi yema eceleni kwensika yavusetela sivumelwane embikwaSimakadze, yavuma kulandzela Simakadze nekugcina imiyalo yakhe, nemitsetfo yakhe kanye netimiso takhe ngayo yonkhe inhlitiyo yayo nangawo wonkhe umphefumulo wayo, ngaloko yacinisa kwemukela emavi esivumelwane labhalwe kulencwadzi. Bonkhe bantfu batifaka kuleso sivumelwane." 
2Kings23:4 Inkhosi yatjela Hilkiya, umPhristi Lomkhulu, nebaphristi labebangaphansi kwakhe kanye nabomahlalesangweni kutsi bakhiphe ethempelini laSimakadze konkhe lokwakwentelwe Bhali na-Ashera, nako konkhe lokwakwentelwe tonkhe tinkhulungwane tetinkhanyeti. Wakushisela ngaphandle kweJerusalema etikhotseni letigudla iKhidroni, wase utsatsa lomlotsa uwumikisa eBetheli." 
2Kings23:5 Wabacitsa bonkhe baphristi bebumnyama lababekhetfwe ngemakhosi akaJuda kutsi batfuncise imphepho etindzaweni letiphakeme takaJuda kanye nasemaphetselweni aseJerusalema, labo bebatfuncisa imphepho kuBhali, naselangeni, nasenyangeni, nakuto tonkhe tinkhulungwane tetinkhanyeti." 
2Kings23:6 Watsatsa insika ya-Ashera ethempelini laSimakadze, wayimikisa emfudlaneni iKhidroni ngephandle kweJerusalema, wayishisela khona. Wayisila, yaba yimphuphu, wabe sewuyisakata seyilutfuli etikwemadliza ebantfukatana." 
2Kings23:7 Wabhidlita nemalawu etitabane labesethempelini laSimakadze, lapho labasikati babetfungela khona tingubo tekukhonta Ashera." 
2Kings23:8 Josaya walandza bonkhe baphristi lababesemadolobheni akaJuda wahlazisa letindzawo letiphakeme, kusukela eGeba kuye eBherisheba, lapho baphristi bebatfuncisela khona imphepho. Wabhidlita tindzawo letiphakeme ekungeneni kwelisango laJoshuwa, umphatsi welidolobha, ngesancele kwelisango lelidolobha." 
2Kings23:9 Nome baphristi baletindzawo letiphakeme bangazange bakhonte elatini laSimakadze eJerusalema, noko sinkhwa lesingenamvubelo babesidla kanye nalabanye baphristi." 
2Kings23:10 Inkhosi Josaya yahlazisa indzawo iThofethi, leyayiseSigodzini sakaBheni Hinomu, ngako kwabate umuntfu labengayisebentisa ekunikeleni indvodzana yakhe nome indvodzakati yakhe ngekutsi ishiswe ngemlilo kuMoloki." 
2Kings23:11 Titfombe temahhashi, emakhosi akaJuda labenikele ngato elangeni, watisusa emnyango welithempelini laSimakadze. Betibekwe ngekhatsi esibuyeni eceleni kwelikamelo lemphatsi lekwakutsiwa nguNathani Meleki. Josaya watishisa naletincola letatinikelwe elangeni." 
2Kings23:12 Wawabhidlita onkhe lamalati labekakhiwe ngemakhosi akaJuda etulu eluphahleni eceleni kwelikamelo la-Ahazi lelisesitezi; wabhidlita nalamalati Manase labewakhe kuletibuya letimbili ethempelini laSimakadze. Wawesusa lapho, wawabhidlita, aba timvitsi letakhukhulelwa emfudlaneni iKhidroni." 
2Kings23:13 Inkhosi yaphindza yacitsa letindzawo letiphakeme letatakhiwe ngasemphumalanga neJerusalema eningizimu neliGcuma Lekonakala, tona leto Solomoni, inkhosi yaka-Israyeli, latakhela Ashtarothe, sithicokati lesenyanyekako semaSidoni, naKhemoshi, sithico lesenyanyekako sakaMowabi, kanye naMoloki, sithico lesisinengiso sema-Amoni." 
2Kings23:14 Josaya waphahlata ematje lekwakutsiwa angcwele, wagumula tinsika ta-Ashera, wasakata ematsambo ebantfu kuleto tindzawo." 
2Kings23:15 Ngisho nelilati laseBetheli lekwakuyindzawo lephakeme leyayakhiwe nguJerobowamu, umsa waNebati, lowenta Israyeli kutsi one, nalo lelo lati nalendzawo lephakeme wakubhidlita. Washisa lendzawo lephakeme, wayigaya yaba yimphuphu, washisa nalensika ya-Ashera futsi." 
2Kings23:16 Josaya wacalata, watsi kube abone emadliza labeseceleni lentsaba, wabutsa lamatsambo lakuwo wawashisela elatini kutawulingcolisa, kwaya ngekwelivi laSimakadze lalikhuluma ngemuntfu waNkulunkulu lowakhuluma kucala ngato letintfo tisengakenteki." 
2Kings23:17 Inkhosi yabuta yatsi: “Labani lela dliza?” Bantfu baseBetheli baphendvula batsi: “Lidliza lalowo muntfu waNkulunkulu labephuma kaJuda, wakhuluma ngato letintfo telilati laseBetheli kutsi titakwenteka, njengobe setentekile nje.”" 
2Kings23:18 Yakhuluma yatsi: “Liyekeleni. Ningavumeli muntfu kutsi aphatamise ematsambo akhe.” Ngako ematsambo akhe kanye newemphrofethi labephuma eSamariya bavele bawayekela. 
2Kings23:19 Josaya wachubeka wenta njengobe enta eBetheli ngekususa kanye nekuhlazisa tonkhe tindzawo lekwakutsiwa tingcwele, etindzaweni letiphakeme letatakhiwe ngemakhosi aka-Israyeli emadolobheni aseSamariya, tona kanye letacunula Simakadze tamtfukutselisa." 
2Kings23:20 Josaya wababulalela emalatini bonkhe baphristi baleto tindzawo letiphakeme, lamatsambo ebantfu wabashisela etikwawo. Wase uyancandzeka ubuyela eJerusalema." 
2Kings23:21 Inkhosi Josaya yakhipha umlayeto lowawuya esiveni sonkhe, yatsi: “Gubhani liPhasika laSimakadze Nkulunkulu wenu, njengobe kubhaliwe encwadzini yesivumelwane.”" 
2Kings23:22 Bekungazange sekube neliPhasika lelake lagujwa njengaleli kusukela ngetikhatsi tetikhulu letatihola ema-Israyeli nangesikhatsi semakhosi aka-Israyeli kanye newakaJuda. 
2Kings23:23 Kodvwa ngalomnyaka weli-18 wekubusa kwenkhosi Josaya leliPhasika lagujelwa Simakadze eJerusalema. 
2Kings23:24 Ngetulu kwaloko Josaya wabucitsa bonkhe bungoma, nemandzawe, netithico temindeni, netitfombe kanye nato tonkhe tintfo letisinengiso kaJuda naseJerusalema. Loko wakwentela kugcwalisa nekuhlangabetana naloko lokwakufunwa ngumtsetfo lowawubhalwe encwadzini leyatfolwa nguHilkiya, umphristi, ethempelini laSimakadze." 
2Kings23:25 Akuzange sekube nenkhosi leyake yafanana naJosaya, ngembili kwakhe nangemuva kwakhe, ngekutsi itilahlele kuSimakadze njengobe yena enta, ngenhlitiyo yakhe yonkhe, nangemphefumulo wakhe wonkhe, nangemandla akhe onkhe ngekulandzela wonkhe umtsetfo waMosi." 
2Kings23:26 Noko nome kunjalo, Simakadze akazange agucuke ekufutsekeni kwentfukutselo yakhe leyavutsela Juda ngenca yako konkhe Manase lakwenta kwamtfukutselisa." 
2Kings23:27 Ngako Simakadze wakhuluma, watsi: “Juda ngitamsusa ebukhoneni bami, njengobe ngamsusa na-Israyeli; neJerusalema, lidolobha lengalikhetsa, ngitalisusa, ngisho nalo lithempeli imbala lengase ngakhuluma ngalo ngatsi: Libito lami liyawuhlala lapho.”" 
2Kings23:28 Leminye imininingwane ngekubusa kwenkhosi Josaya, nako konkhe lakwenta, kubhaliwe encwadzini yemilandvo yemakhosi akaJuda." 
2Kings23:29 Ngesikhatsi Josaya ayinkhosi, Faro Nekho, inkhosi yaseGibhithe, wenyuka wayawusita inkhosi yase-Asiriya ngasemfuleni iYufrathe. Inkhosi Josaya yamhlangabeta, imphi yabambana etulu, kodvwa Nekho wabhekana naJosaya, wambulalela eMegido." 
2Kings23:30 Tindvuna taJosaya tatsatsa sidvumbu sakhe tasekhweta encoleni kusuka eMegido tambuyisela eJerusalema, tafike tamfihla ethuneni lakhe. Sive sakaJuda satsatsa Jehoyahazi, umsa waJosaya, samgcoba, samenta inkhosi esikhundleni seyise." 
2Kings23:31 Jehoyahazi abeneminyaka lengema-23 budzala, nakabekwa kuba yinkhosi. Wabusela eJerusalema tinyanga letintsatfu. Libito lenina bekunguHamutali, indvodzakati yaJeremiya, waseLibna." 
2Kings23:32 Jehoyahazi wenta lokubi emehlweni aSimakadze, njengobe boyise babentile." 
2Kings23:33 Faro Nekho wambopha ngetinketane eRibla, eveni laseHamathi, kuze kutsi angakhoni kubusa eJerusalema, wabe sewuhlisibeta bakaJuda ngemtselo wesiliva lengemakhilogremu labengaba ti-3 400, negolide lengemakhilogremu labengaba ngema-34." 
2Kings23:34 Faro Nekho wabeka Eliyakimu, umsa waJosaya, kutsi abe yinkhosi esikhundleni seyise. Wagucula libito la-Eliyakimu, wametsa libito watsi nguJehoyakimu. Kodvwa watsatsa Jehoyahazi wammikisa eGibhithe, lapho wafike wafela khona." 
2Kings23:35 Jehoyakimu wanika Faro Nekho isiliva negolide labetsite ayikhishwe. Loko wakwenta ngekutselisa live, wagulula isiliva negolide kubantfu bakhona, kwaya ngebungako babo." 
2Kings23:36 Jehoyakimu abeneminyaka lengema-25 budzala, nakabekwa kuba yinkhosi. Wabusela eJerusalema iminyaka leli-11. Libito lenina bekunguZebida, indvodzakati yaPhedaya, waseRuma." 
2Kings23:37 Wenta lokubi emehlweni aSimakadze, njengobe bekwenta boyise." 
2Kings24:1 Ngesikhatsi sekubusa kwaJehoyakimu, Nebukhadnezari, inkhosi yaseBhabhulona, wahlasela live. Jehoyakimu waba yinceku yaNebukhadnezari, iminyaka lemitsatfu. Kodvwa wabe sewugucula ingcondvo yakhe, wavukela Nebukhadnezari." 
2Kings24:2 Simakadze wamtfumelela emaBhabhulona, nemaSiriya, nemaMowabi, nema-Amoni kutsi atemhlasela. Wabatfumela kutsi batewubhubhisa Juda, ngekulandzela livi laSimakadze lalikhuluma ngetinceku takhe baphrofethi." 
2Kings24:3 Ngempela letintfo tenteka kaJuda njengekwemyalo waSimakadze, kuze atekubasusa ebukhoneni bakhe ngenca yetono taManase nako konkhe labekwentile," 
2Kings24:4 kanye nekucitsa kwakhe ingati leyayingenacala, ngobe phela iJerusalema yayigcwele ingati yebantfu lababengenacala. Simakadze abengakatimiseli kutsetselela Manase ngaloko." 
2Kings24:5 Leminye imininingwane ngekubusa kwenkhosi Jehoyakimu, nako konkhe lakwenta, kubhaliwe encwadzini yemilandvo yemakhosi akaJuda." 
2Kings24:6 Jehoyakimu wakhotsama, Jehoyakhini, umsa wakhe, waba yinkhosi esikhundleni sakhe." 
2Kings24:7 Inkhosi yaseGibhithe nemabutfo ayo ayizange iphindze ivive iyewuhlasela ngephandle kwelive layo, ngobe phela inkhosi yaseBhabhulona yase ilitsetse lonkhe live layo, kusukela emfudlaneni waseGibhithe kuze kufike emfuleni iYufrathe." 
2Kings24:8 Jehoyakhini abeneminyaka leli-18 budzala, nakabekwa kuba yinkhosi. Wabusela eJerusalema tinyanga letintsatfu. Libito lenina bekunguNehushta, indvodzakati ya-Elnathani, waseJerusalema." 
2Kings24:9 Jehoyakhini wenta lokubi emehlweni aSimakadze, njengobe bekwente uyise." 
2Kings24:10 Ngaleso sikhatsi tindvuna taNebukhadnezari, inkhosi yaseBhabhulona, tahlasela iJerusalema tayivimbetela," 
2Kings24:11 naNebukhadnezari cobo lwakhe, waya kulo lelidolobha ngesikhatsi tindvuna takhe tisalivimbetele." 
2Kings24:12 Jehoyakhini, inkhosi yakaJuda, nenina, netinceku takhe, netikhulu takhe, kanye netindvuna takhe bavele baphakamisa tandla bashweleta kuye. Ngemnyaka wesiphohlongo wekubusa kwenkhosi yaseBhabhulona, lenkhosi yatfumba Jehoyakhini, waba siboshwa." 
2Kings24:13 Njengobe Simakadze abeshito, Nebukhadnezari watsatsa yonkhe ingcebo, wayisusa ethempelini laSimakadze nasesigodlweni senkhosi, watitsatsa tonkhe leto timphahla tegolide letatentiwe nguSolomoni, inkhosi yaka-Israyeli, latentela lithempeli laSimakadze." 
2Kings24:14 Wayitfumba yonkhe iJerusalema: tonkhe tindvuna, netingwazi, nato tonkhe tingcweti temisebenti yetandla kanye nebabumbi betinsimbi; babeti-10 000 sebabonkhe. Kwashiywa labo bantfu lababetimphofana kuphela." 
2Kings24:15 Nebukhadnezari watfumba Jehoyakhini, wahamba naye waya eBhabhulona. Labanye labatfumba lapha eJerusalema bekungunina wenkhosi Jehoyakhini, nemakhosikati aJehoyakhini, netindvuna takhe kanye nemadvodza lamcoka elive." 
2Kings24:16 Inkhosi yaseBhabhulona yatfumbela eBhabhulona tingwazi letiti-7 000, letaticinile tilungele kulwa imphi; watitfumba kanye nenkhulungwane yetingcweti emisebentini yetandla kanye nasekubumbeni tintfo ngensimbi." 
2Kings24:17 Nebukhadnezari wase ubeka Mathaniya, malume waJehoyakhini, kutsi abe yinkhosi esikhundleni sakhe, wabe sewumetsa libito watsi nguSedekiya." 
2Kings24:18 Sedekiya abeneminyaka lengema-21 budzala, nakabekwa kuba yinkhosi. Wabusela eJerusalema iminyaka leli-11. Libito lenina bekunguHamutali, indvodzakati yaJeremiya, waseLibna." 
2Kings24:19 Wenta lokubi emehlweni aSimakadze, njengobe naJehoyakimu abentile." 
2Kings24:20 Kwabangelwa yintfukutselo yaSimakadze lokutsi loku kwenteke eJerusalema nakaJuda, kwaze kwatsi ekugcineni wabesusa ebukhoneni bakhe. Sedekiya wase uyayivukela inkhosi yaseBhabhulona." 
2Kings25:1 Kwatsi ngemnyaka wemfica wekubusa kwenkhosi Sedekiya ngelilanga lelishumi, enyangeni yelishumi, Nebukhadnezari, inkhosi yaseBhabhulona, washuca nemabutfo akhe onkhe, wahlasela iJerusalema. Bemisa ngephandle kwelidolobha, bakha tivimbetelo letalitungeleta lonkhe." 
2Kings25:2 Lelidolobha lahlala livinjetelwe, kwaze kwaba ngumnyaka weli-11 wekubusa kwenkhosi Sedekiya." 
2Kings25:3 Kwatsi ngelilanga lemfica enyangeni yesine, indlala yakhungatsa lelidolobha kamatima, kangangekutsi kwaze kwabate lokwakungadliwa bantfu." 
2Kings25:4 Lubondza-ke lwalelidolobha lwase luyafohlwa, imphi yonkhe yabhuza ebusuku seyibaleka, yaphuma ngelisango lelisemkhatsini wetibondza letimbili letatingasengadzeni yenkhosi, lite nome emaBhabhulona abelitungeletile lelidolobha. Yabaleka yabhekisa emabombo ngase-Arabha," 
2Kings25:5 kodvwa emabutfo emaBhabhulona acosha Sedekiya, inkhosi, aze amkhandza etsafeni laseJerikho. Onkhe emasotja akhe esuswa kuye asakatwa," 
2Kings25:6 yena wabe sewuyatfunjwa. Watsatfwa wamikiswa enkhosini yaseBhabhulona eRibla, lapho yefike yakhipha sigwebo sayo kuye." 
2Kings25:7 Emadvodzana aSedekiya abulawa embikwemehlo akhe abukile. Emvakwaloko bakupuluta emehlo aSedekiya, bambopha ngetinketane telitfusi, bammikisa eBhabhulona." 
2Kings25:8 Ngelilanga lesikhombisa enyangeni yesihlanu, emnyakeni weli-19 wekubusa kwaNebukhadnezari, inkhosi yaseBhabhulona, Nebuzaradani, indvuna yabomahlalesangweni benkhosi, siphatsimandla senkhosi yaseBhabhulona, weta eJerusalema." 
2Kings25:9 Wafike wokhela ngemlilo lithempeli laSimakadze, nesigodlo senkhosi kanye nato tonkhe tindlu taseJerusalema. Watokhela ngemlilo tonkhe tindlu letibalulekile." 
2Kings25:10 Yonkhe-ke imphi yaseBhabhulona, leyayingaphansi kwendvuna yabomahlalesangweni, yatidzilita tonkhe tibondza letatitungeleta iJerusalema." 
2Kings25:11 Nebuzaradani, indvuna yabomahlalesangweni, wabatfumba bonkhe labantfu lababesele kulelidolobha neluntfu lonkhe lolwalusele, wabatfumba kanye nalaba lababehlubuke baya enkhosini yaseBhabhulona." 
2Kings25:12 Kodvwa lendvuna yabashiya labanye lababemphofu bakulelo live, kuze batewulima tivini nemasimi." 
2Kings25:13 EmaBhabhulona afohlota letinsika telitfusi, netincodlana kanye nalelibhavu lelitfusi, lokwakusethempelini laSimakadze, betfwala lelitfusi baliyisa eBhabhulona." 
2Kings25:14 Batsatsa ngisho nemabhodo, nemafosholo, netijubantsambo, netingwembe, kanye nako konkhe lokwakwentiwe ngelitfusi lokwakusetjentiswa enkonzweni yekukhonta ethempelini." 
2Kings25:15 Lendvuna yabomahlalesangweni yatsatsa titja tekushisela imphepho kanye netitja tekunyenyeta, tonkhe letatentiwe ngegolide lecengekile nome ngesiliva lecengekile." 
2Kings25:16 Litfusi letinsika letimbili, nalelibhavu kanye naletincodlana letatakhiwe nguSolomoni, akwakhela lithempeli laSimakadze, kwakungetulu kwekukalwa." 
2Kings25:17 Nguleyo naleyo nsika yayingemamitha labengaba siphohlongo kuphakama. Nguleyo naleyo ngcongwane leyayakhelwe etikwaleyo naleyo nsika yayingaba limitha nesigamu kuphakama. Kutungeleta leyo naleyo ngcongwane kwakunemhlobiso lowawusamahananadza labentiwe ngelitfusi. 
2Kings25:18 Lendvuna yabomahlalesangweni yatfumba Seraya, umPhristi Lomkhulu, naZefaniya, umphristi longaphansi kwakhe ngesikhundla, kanye nebagcini beminyango labatsatfu." 
2Kings25:19 Kulabo lababesesedolobheni watsatsa indvuna leyayiphetse emadvodza emphi kanye nebeluleki benkhosi labasihlanu. Watsatsa namabhalane wendvuna yekubutsekisa bantfu balelo live, kanye nemadvodza langema-60 labetfolakala edolobheni." 
2Kings25:20 Nebuzaradani, indvuna yabomahlalesangweni, wabatsatsa bonkhe, wayawubetfula enkhosini yaseBhabhulona eRibla." 
2Kings25:21 Lapha eRibla, eveni laseHamathi, inkhosi yafike yababulalela khona. Ngako-ke sive sakaJuda satfunjelwa khashane nelive laso." 
2Kings25:22 Nebukhadnezari, inkhosi yaseBhabhulona, yabeka Gedaliya, umsa wa-Ahikamu, umsa waShafani, kutsi abuse bonkhe labantfu lababesele kaJuda." 
2Kings25:23 Tatsi kube tonkhe tindvuna temphi nemabutfo ato beve kutsi inkhosi yaseBhabhulona seyibeke Gedaliya kutsi abe ngumbusi, teta kuGedaliya eMispa. Letindvuna bekubo-Ishmayeli, umsa waNethaniya, naJohanani, umsa waKhareya, naSeraya, umsa waThanhumethi waseNethofa, naJazaniya, indvodzana yemMakha, nemadvodza abo." 
2Kings25:24 Gedaliya wafunga kubo nakulamadvodza abo, watsi: “Ningatesabi tindvuna taseBhabhulona. Hlalani phansi lapha eveni, nikhonte lenkhosi yaseBhabhulona, kutawunihambela kahle.”" 
2Kings25:25 Ngenyanga yesikhombisa, Ishmayeli, umsa waNethaniya, umsa wa-Elishama, labewendlu yasebukhosini, weta nemadvodza lalishumi, wafike wabulala Gedaliya kanye nalamadvodza akaJuda nemaBhabhulona labenaye lapha eMispa." 
2Kings25:26 Kwatsi kube kwenteke loko, sonkhe sive, kusukela kulabancane kuye kulabakhulu, kanye netindvuna temphi babalekela eGibhithe ngenca yekwesaba emaBhabhulona." 
2Kings25:27 Ngemnyaka wema-37 wekudzingiswa kwaJehoyakhini, inkhosi yakaJuda, ngemnyaka lapho Evili Merodaki abekwa khona waba yinkhosi yaseBhabhulona, wakhulula Jehoyakhini ejele, mhla tingema-27, enyangeni yeli-12." 
2Kings25:28 Wakhuluma kahle naye, wabe sewumnika sihlalo lesihloniphekile, lesingetulu kwaleto talamanye emakhosi labenaye lapha eBhabhulona." 
2Kings25:29 Ngako Jehoyakhini wabeka eceleni labomfengeni bakhe basejele, kusukela ngalelo langa naye abedla etafuleni lenkhosi njalo nje, imphilo yakhe yonkhe." 
2Kings25:30 Onkhe emalanga inkhosi yayinika Jehoyakhini imbasha nalokunye lekwakusabelo sakhe lesimile semihla ngemihla, yingci nasaphila." 
1Chronicles1:1 Adamu abenguyise waSethi, umsa waSethi kungu-Enoshi," 
1Chronicles1:2 wa-Enoshi kunguKhenani, waKhenani kunguMahalaleli, waMahalaleli kunguJaredi," 
1Chronicles1:3 waJaredi kungu-Enoki, wa-Enoki kunguMethusela, waMethusela kunguLameki, waLameki kunguNowa." 
1Chronicles1:4 Emadvodzana aNowa bekuboShemi, naHhamu, naJafethi." 
1Chronicles1:5 Emadvodzana aJafethi bekuboGomeri, naMagogi, naMadayi, naJavani, naThubali, naMesheki, naThirasi." 
1Chronicles1:6 Emadvodzana aGomeri bekubo-Ashkenazi, naRifathi, naThogama." 
1Chronicles1:7 Emadvodzana aJavani bekubo-Elisha, naThashishi, nemaKhithi, nemaRodani." 
1Chronicles1:8 Emadvodzana aHhamu bekuboKushe, naGibhithe, naPhuti, naKhenani." 
1Chronicles1:9 Emadvodzana aKushe bekuboSeba, naHavila, naSabta, naRama, naSabtekha. Emadvodzana aRama bekuboSheba naDedani." 
1Chronicles1:10 Kushe abenguyise waNimrodi lowakhula waba sichwaga lesasinemandla emhlabeni wonkhe. 
1Chronicles1:11 Gibhithe abenguyise wemaLudi, nema-Anami, nemaLehabi, nemaNafethuhi," 
1Chronicles1:12 nemaPhathrusi, nemaKhasuluhi, nemaKhaftori, lapho kwadzabuka khona emaFilisti." 
1Chronicles1:13 Khenani abenguyise waSidoni, litubulo lakhe, naHethi," 
1Chronicles1:14 nemaJebhusi, nema-Amori, nemaGirigashi," 
1Chronicles1:15 nemaHivi, nema-Akhi, nemaSini," 
1Chronicles1:16 nema-Avadi, nemaSemari, nemaHamathi." 
1Chronicles1:17 Emadvodzana aShemi bekubo-Elamu, na-Ashuri, na-Aphakshadi, naLudi, na-Aramu, na-Use, naHuli, naGetheri, naMesheki." 
1Chronicles1:18 Aphakshadi abenguyise waShela, Shela anguyise wa-Ebheri." 
1Chronicles1:19 Ebheri watala emadvodzana lamabili. Lomunye bekunguPhelegi, ngobe ngesikhatsi sakhe tive temhlaba tehlukana, lomunye bekunguJokthane." 
1Chronicles1:20 Jokthane abenguyise wabo-Almodadi, naShelefi, naHasamavethi, naJera," 
1Chronicles1:21 naHadoramu, na-Uzali, naDikila," 
1Chronicles1:22 na-Obali, na-Abimayeli, naSheba," 
1Chronicles1:23 na-Ofiri, naHavila, naJobabi. Bonkhe laba bekungemadvodzana aJokthane." 
1Chronicles1:23 na-Ofiri, naHavila, naJobabi. Bonkhe laba bekungemadvodzana aJokthane." 
1Chronicles1:24 Kutalana kwebantfu kusukela kuShemi kuye ku-Abrama, lokusho Abrahama, bekume kanje: bekunguShemi, na-Aphakshadi, naShela," 
1Chronicles1:25 na-Ebheri, naPhelegi, naRehu," 
1Chronicles1:26 naSerugi, naNahori, naThera," 
1Chronicles1:27 na-Abrahama lowabe sewubitwa ngekutsi ngu-Abrahama. 
1Chronicles1:28 Abrahama abenemadvodzana lamabili, bo-Isaka na-Ishmayeli." 
1Chronicles1:29 Emadvodzana a-Ishmayeli bekunguNebayothi, litubulo lakhe, naKhedari, na-Adbeli, naMibsamu," 
1Chronicles1:30 naMishma, naDuma, naMasa, naHadadi, naThema," 
1Chronicles1:31 naJeturi, naNafishi, naKhedema. Ngiwo lawo-ke emadvodzana a-Ishmayeli." 
1Chronicles1:32 Emadvodzana latalwa nguKhetura, singani sa-Abrahama, bekubo-Zimrani, naJokshane, naMedani, naMidiyani, na-Ishbaki, naShuwa. Emadvodzana aJokshane bekuboSheba naDedani." 
1Chronicles1:33 Emadvodzana aMidiyani bekubo-Efa, na-Eferi, naHanoki, na-Abida, na-Elda. Bonkhe laba bekuyintalelwane yaKhetura." 
1Chronicles1:34 Abrahama abenguyise wa-Isaka. Isaka abenemadvodzana lamabili: bo-Esawu na-Israyeli. 
1Chronicles1:35 Emadvodzana a-Esawu bekubo-Elifazi, naRehuweli, naJewushe, naJalamu, naKhora." 
1Chronicles1:36 Emadvodzana a-Elifazi bekuboThemani, na-Omari, naSefo, naGatamu, naKhenazi, naThimna, na-Amaleki." 
1Chronicles1:37 Emadvodzana aRehuweli bekuboNahathi, naZera, naShama, naMiza." 
1Chronicles1:38 Emadvodzana aSeyiri bekuboLotani, naShobali, naSibeyoni, na-Ana, naDishoni, na-Eseri, naDishani." 
1Chronicles1:39 Emadvodzana aLotani bekuboHori naHemami. Thimna bekungudzadzewaboLotani. 
1Chronicles1:40 Emadvodzana aShobali bekubo-Alvani, naManahathi, na-Ebali, naShefi, na-Onamu. Emadvodzana aSibeyoni bekubo-Aya na-Ana." 
1Chronicles1:41 Umsa wa-Ana bekunguDishoni. Emadvodzana aDishoni bekuboHemdani, na-Eshbani, na-Jithrani, naKherani." 
1Chronicles1:42 Emadvodzana a-Eseri bekuboBilhani, naZavani, na-Akhani. Emadvodzana aDishani bekubo-Use na-Arani." 
1Chronicles1:43 Lawa ngemabito emakhosi labebusa eveni laka-Edomu kusengakabusi inkhosi ka-Israyeli: Bela, umsa waBheyori, waba yinkhosi ka-Edomu; inhlokodolobha yakhe bekuyiDinihabha." 
1Chronicles1:44 Kwatsi kube kufe Bela, kwase kubekwa Jobabi, umsa waZera labewekutalwa eBhosra, waba yinkhosi emvakwakhe." 
1Chronicles1:44 Kwatsi kube kufe Bela, kwase kubekwa Jobabi, umsa waZera labewekutalwa eBhosra, waba yinkhosi emvakwakhe." 
1Chronicles1:45 Kwatsi kube kufe Jobabi, kwase kubekwa Hushamu waseveni lemaThemani kutsi abe yinkhosi emvakwakhe." 
1Chronicles1:45 Kwatsi kube kufe Jobabi, kwase kubekwa Hushamu waseveni lemaThemani kutsi abe yinkhosi emvakwakhe." 
1Chronicles1:46 Kwatsi kube kufe Hushamu, kwase kubekwa Hadadi, umsa waBedadi. Bedadi ngulona lowancoba emaMidiyani eveni lakaMowabi. Inhlokodolobha yakhe bekuyi-Avithi." 
1Chronicles1:47 Kwatsi kube kufe Hadadi, kwase kubekwa Samla waseMasrekha." 
1Chronicles1:48 Kwatsi kube kufe Samla, kwase kubekwa Shawula waseRehobothi ngasemfuleni." 
1Chronicles1:49 Kwatsi kube kufe Shawula, kwase kubekwa Bhali Hanani, umsa wa-Akbori." 
1Chronicles1:50 Kwatsi kube kufe Bhali Hanani, kwase kubekwa Hadadi. Inhlokodolobha yakhe bekutsiwa yiPhayi, kantsi umkakhe bekunguMehethabeli, indvodzakati yaMatredi, indvodzakati yaMe Zahabe," 
1Chronicles1:51 naHadadi wafa. Tikhulu taka-Edomu bekuboThimna, na-Alva, naJethethi," 
1Chronicles1:52 na-Oholibama, na-Ela, naPhinoni," 
1Chronicles1:53 naKhenazi, naThemani, naMibsari," 
1Chronicles1:54 naMagdiyeli, na-Iramu. Leti-ke bekutikhulu taka-Edomu." 
1Chronicles2:1 Emadvodzana a-Israyeli bekuboRubeni, naSimeyoni, naLevi, naJuda, na-Isakhari, naZebuloni," 
1Chronicles2:2 naDani, naJosefa, naBhenjamini, naNaftali, naGadi, na-Asheri." 
1Chronicles2:3 Emadvodzana aJuda bekubo-Era, na-Onani, naShela. Lamadvodzana omatsatfu wawatalelwa nguBhatishuwa, umKhenanikati. Era, litubulo laJuda, wenta lokubi emehlweni aSimakadze, ngako Simakadze wambulala." 
1Chronicles2:4 Thamari, malukatana waJuda, wamtalela boPheresi naZera. Juda abenemadvodzana lasihlanu asawonkhe." 
1Chronicles2:5 Emadvodzana aPheresi bekuboHesroni naHamuli. 
1Chronicles2:6 Emadvodzana aZera bekuboZimri, na-Ethani, naHemani, naKhalkoli, naDara; babe ngemadvodzana lasihlanu sebabonkhe." 
1Chronicles2:7 Umsa waKhami bekungu-Akhani, lowadvonsela ema-Israyeli inhlupheko ngekutsintsa intfo lekwakungakafaneli ayitsintse." 
1Chronicles2:8 Umsa wa-Ethani bekungu-Azariya. 
1Chronicles2:9 Emadvodzana latalelwa Hesroni bekuboJerameli, naRamu, naKhalebi." 
1Chronicles2:10 Ramu abenguyise wa-Aminadabi, Aminadabi anguyise waNasoni, umholi wesive sakaJuda." 
1Chronicles2:11 Nasoni abenguyise waSalmoni, Salmoni anguyise waBowazi;" 
1Chronicles2:12 Bowazi abenguyise wa-Obedi, Obedi anguyise waJese." 
1Chronicles2:13 Jese abenguyise wa-Eliyabe, litubulo lakhe, Eliyabe abelanywa ngu-Abinadabi, wesitsatfu bekunguShimeya," 
1Chronicles2:14 wesine kunguNethaneli, wesihlanu kunguRadayi," 
1Chronicles2:15 wesitfupha bekungu-Osemi, wesikhombisa kunguDavide." 
1Chronicles2:16 Bodzadzewabo bekuboSeruya na-Abigayili. Emadvodzana lamatsatfu aSeruya bekubo-Abishayi, naJowabe, na-Asaheli." 
1Chronicles2:17 Abigayili watala Amasa. Uyise wa-Amasa bekunguJetheri, um-Ishmayeli." 
1Chronicles2:18 Khalebi, umsa waHesroni, umkakhe labengu-Azubha wamtalela indvodzakati lekwatsiwa nguJeriyothi. Azubha abenemadvodzana lekwakuboJesheri, naShobabi, na-Aridoni." 
1Chronicles2:19 Kwatsi kube kufe Azubha, Khalebi watsatsa Efratha lamtalela Hure." 
1Chronicles2:20 Hure abenguyise wa-Uri, Uri anguyise waBesaleli." 
1Chronicles2:21 Emvakwaloko Hesroni walala nendvodzakati yaMakhire, uyise waGileyadi; Hesroni wayitsatsa asaneminyaka lengema-60 budzala; yamtalela Segubi." 
1Chronicles2:22 Segubi abenguyise waJayire, labephetse emadolobha langema-23 eveni lakaGileyadi." 
1Chronicles2:23 Kodvwa imibuso yaseGeshuri newaseSiriya yehlula emadolobha langema-60 khona lapho, yatfumba iHavothi Jayire, neKhenathi kanye netabelo takhona. Tonkhe leti bekutitukulwane taMakhire, uyise waGileyadi." 
1Chronicles2:24 Watsi kube Hesroni afele eKhalebi Efratha, Abiya, umfati waHesroni, wamtalela Ashuri, uyise waThekhowa." 
1Chronicles2:25 Emadvodzana aJerameli, litubulo laHesroni, bekuboRamu, litubulo lakhe, naBuna, na-Oreni, na-Osemi kanye na-Ahiya." 
1Chronicles2:26 Jerameli abenalomunye umfati, libito lakhe kungu-Atara; yena abengunina wa-Onamu." 
1Chronicles2:27 Emadvodzana aRamu, litubulo laJerameli, bekuboMazi, naJamini, na-Ekeri." 
1Chronicles2:28 Emadvodzana a-Onamu bekuboShamayi naJada, emadvodzana aShamayi bekuboNadabi na-Abishuri." 
1Chronicles2:29 Libito lemka-Abishuri bekungu-Abihayili, lamtalela bo-Abani naMolidi." 
1Chronicles2:30 Emadvodzana aNadabi bekuboSeledi na-Aphayimi. Seledi wafa angenamntfwana. 
1Chronicles2:31 Umsa wa-Aphayimi bekungu-Ishi, Ishi labenguyise waSheshani. Umsa waSheshani bekungu-Ahilayi." 
1Chronicles2:32 Emadvodzana aJada, umnakaboShamayi, bekuboJetheri naJonathani. Jetheri wafa angenamntfwana." 
1Chronicles2:33 Emadvodzana aJonathani bekuboPhelethi naZaza. Tonkhe leti bekutitukulwane takaJerameli. 
1Chronicles2:34 Sheshani abete emadvodzana, anemadvodzakati kuphela. Abenesisebenti lesasingumGibhithe, libito laso kunguJaha." 
1Chronicles2:35 Sheshani wanika lesisebenti lesinguJaha indvodzakati yakhe, kutsi siyitsatse ibe ngumkaso. Batala Athayi." 
1Chronicles2:36 Athayi abenguyise waNathani, Nathani anguyise waZabadi;" 
1Chronicles2:37 Zabadi abenguyise wa-Eflali, Eflali anguyise wa-Obedi." 
1Chronicles2:38 Obedi abenguyise waJehu, Jehu anguyise wa-Azariya;" 
1Chronicles2:39 Azariya abenguyise waHelesi, Helesi anguyise wa-Eleyasa;" 
1Chronicles2:40 Eleyasa abenguyise waSismayi, Sismayi anguyise waShalumi;" 
1Chronicles2:41 Shalumi abenguyise waJekamiya, Jekamiya anguyise wa-Elishama." 
1Chronicles2:42 Emadvodzana aKhalebi, umnakaboJerameli, bekunguMesha, litubulo lakhe, labenguyise waZifi, Zifi anguyise waMaresha; Maresha abenguyise waHebroni." 
1Chronicles2:43 Emadvodzana aHebroni bekuboKhora, naThaphuwa, naRekhemu, naShema." 
1Chronicles2:44 Shema abenguyise waRahamu, Rahamu anguyise waJokeyamu. Rekhemu abenguyise waShamayi." 
1Chronicles2:45 Umsa waShamayi bekunguMayoni, Mayoni anguyise waBhethi Suri." 
1Chronicles2:46 Khalebi abenesingani lesasingu-Efa, labengunina waboHarani, naMosa, naGazezi. Harani abenguyise waGazezi." 
1Chronicles2:47 Emadvodzana aJahadayi bekuboRegemi, naJothamu, naGeshani, naPheleti, na-Efa, naShafi." 
1Chronicles2:48 Khalebi abenesingani lesasinguMakha, labengunina waboSheberi naThihana." 
1Chronicles2:49 Waphindze watala naShafi, uyise waMakbena naGibeya. Indvodzakati yaKhalebi bekungu-Akhisa." 
1Chronicles2:50 Leti-ke bekutitukulwane takaKhalebi: Emadvodzana aHure, litubulo la-Efratha, bekuboShobali, uyise waKhiriyathi Jeyarimu," 
1Chronicles2:51 naSalma, uyise waBhetlehema, naHarefi, uyise waBhethi Gaderi." 
1Chronicles2:52 Titukulwane takaShobali, uyise waKhiriyathi Jeyarimu, bekuboHarowe, nencenye yesive semaManahathi," 
1Chronicles2:53 nemindeni yaseKhiriyathi Jeyarimu, lekungemaJetheri, nemaPhuthi, nemaShumathi, nemaMishra. EmaSorathi nema-Eshtayoli adzabuka kulemindeni." 
1Chronicles2:54 Titukulwane takaSalma, uyise waBhetlehema, bekungemaNethofa, nebase-Atrothe Bhethi Jowabe, nencenye yemaManahathi, nemaSori," 
1Chronicles2:55 nemaSoferi, lekwakungimindeni yebabhali lababehlala eJabesi: emaThirathi, nemaShimeyathi, nemaSukathi. Laba-ke bekungemaKheni labevela kuHamathi, titukulwane tawo tatitekudzabuka emndenini waRekhabi." 
1Chronicles3:1 Lawa ngemadvodzana aDavide latalelwa wona aseseHebroni: Litubulo bekungu-Amnoni, labetalwa ngu-Ahinowami waseJezreyeli; yesibili bekunguDanyela, labetalwa ngu-Abigayili waseKhameli;" 
1Chronicles3:2 yesitsatfu bekungu-Absalomu labetalwa nguMakha, indvodzakati yaThalmayi, inkhosi yaseGeshuri; yesine bekungu-Adoniya, labetalwa nguHagithi;" 
1Chronicles3:3 yesihlanu bekunguShefathiya, labetalwa ngu-Abitali; yesitfupha bekunguJithreyamu, labetalwa ngumkakhe Egla." 
1Chronicles3:4 Onkhe lamadvodzana lasitfupha Davide wawatalelwa aseseHebroni, lapho abusela khona iminyaka lesikhombisa netinyanga letisitfupha. Davide wabusela eJerusalema iminyaka lengema-33," 
1Chronicles3:5 watalelwa emadvodzana lamanyenti lapho. Umkakhe Bhatisheba, indvodzakati ya-Amiyeli, wamtalela emadvodzana lamane, lekwakuboShamuwa, naShobabi, naNathani kanye naSolomoni." 
1Chronicles3:6 Abenemadvodzana lamanye lekwakuboJibhari, na-Elishuwa, na-Elifeleti," 
1Chronicles3:7 naNoga, naNefegi, naJafiya," 
1Chronicles3:8 na-Elishama, na-Eliyada kanye na-Elifeleti; abeyimfica asawonkhe." 
1Chronicles3:9 Onkhe lawa bekungemadvodzana aDavide, ngaphandle kwalawa labetalwa ngemaphovela akhe. Thamari abengudzadzewabo." 
1Chronicles3:10 Laba-ke bekuyintalelwane yenkhosi Solomoni: Kusukela kuye kwalandzela Rehobowamu, umsa wakhe, kweta Abiya, umsa wakhe, kweta Asa, umsa wakhe, kweta Jehoshafati, umsa wakhe," 
1Chronicles3:11 kweta Jehoramu, umsa wakhe, kweta Ahaziya, umsa wakhe, kweta Jowashi, umsa wakhe," 
1Chronicles3:12 kweta Amasiya, umsa wakhe, kweta Azariya, umsa wakhe, kweta Jothamu, umsa wakhe," 
1Chronicles3:13 kweta Ahazi, umsa wakhe, kweta Hezekiya, umsa wakhe, kweta Manase, umsa wakhe," 
1Chronicles3:14 kweta Amoni, umsa wakhe, kweta Josaya, umsa wakhe." 
1Chronicles3:15 Emadvodzana aJosaya bekuboJohanani, litubulo, naJehoyakimu, naSedekiya, naShalumi." 
1Chronicles3:16 Labalandzela Jehoyakimu bekunguJehoyakhini, umsa wakhe, naSedekiya." 
1Chronicles3:17 Titukulwane taJehoyakhini lowatfunjelwa eBhabhulona bekuboSalatiyeli, umsa wakhe," 
1Chronicles3:18 naMalkhiramu, naPhedaya, naShenasari, naJekamiya, naHoshama kanye naNedabiya." 
1Chronicles3:19 Emadvodzana lamabili aPhedaya bekuboZerubhabheli naShimeyi. Emadvodzana aZerubhabheli bekuboMeshulamu naHananiya. Dzadzewabo bekunguShelomithi. 
1Chronicles3:20 Lamanye emadvodzana akhe lasihlanu bekuboHashubha, na-Oheli, naBherekhiya, naHasadiya, naJushabi Hesedi." 
1Chronicles3:21 Hananiya abenemadvodzana lamabili lekwakuboPhelatiya naJeshaya. Jeshaya abenguyise waRefaya, labenguyise wa-Arinani, labenguyise wa-Obadiya, Obadiya anguyise waShekhaniya." 
1Chronicles3:22 Shekhaniya abenendvodzana lekwakunguShemaya; emadvodzana aShemaya bekuboHathushi, na-Igali, naBhariya, naNeyariya, naShafati; abesitfupha asawonkhe." 
1Chronicles3:23 Emadvodzana aNeyariya bekubo-Eliyoyenayi, naHizkiya, na-Azrikamu; abematsatfu asawonkhe." 
1Chronicles3:24 Emadvodzana a-Eliyoyenayi bekuboHodaviya, na-Eliyashibi, naPhelaya, na-Akhubi, naJohanani, naDelaya, na-Anani; abesikhombisa asawonkhe." 
1Chronicles4:1 Titukulwane takaJuda bekuboPheresi, naHesroni, naKhami, naHure, naShobali." 
1Chronicles4:2 Shobali abenguyise waReyaya, Reyaya anguyise waJahathi, Jahathi anguyise wabo-Ahumayi naLahadi. Lena-ke bekungimindeni yemaSorathi." 
1Chronicles4:3 Emadvodzana a-Etamu bekuboJezreyeli, na-Ishma, na-Idibashi. Dzadzewabo bekunguHaselelponi." 
1Chronicles4:4 Phenuweli abenguyise waGedori, Ezeri anguyise waHusha. Leti bekutitukulwane taHure, litubulo la-Efratha. Hure abenguyise waBhetlehema." 
1Chronicles4:5 Ashuri, uyise waThekhowa, abenebafati lababili, lekwakuboHela naNara." 
1Chronicles4:6 Nara wamtalela bo-Ahuzami, naHeferi, naThemeni, naHahashtari; kwaba nguleto titukulwane taNara." 
1Chronicles4:7 Hela wamtalela boSerethi, naSohari, na-Ethnani." 
1Chronicles4:8 Khosi abenguyise wa-Anubi, naHasobeba, nemindeni ya-Ahaheli, umsa waHarumu." 
1Chronicles4:9 Jabesi abehlonipheke kakhulu kunabomnakabo emndenini wakabo. Unina abemetse libito watsi nguJabesi, ngobe abetsi: “Ngimtele kabuhlungu.”" 
1Chronicles4:10 Jabesi wakhala kuNkulunkulu wema-Israyeli, watsi: “Ngicela ungibusise ungandzisele live lami! Shangatsi sandla sakho singaba nami, ungiphephise engotini, khona ngitewukhululeka ebuhlungwini.” Nkulunkulu wamupha loko labekucelile." 
1Chronicles4:11 Khelubi, umnakaboShuha, abenguyise waMehiri, Mehiri anguyise wa-Eshtoni." 
1Chronicles4:12 Eshtoni abenguyise waboBhethi Rafa, naPhaseya, naThehina, uyise wa-Iri Nahashi. Lawa bekungemadvodza labehlala eRekha." 
1Chronicles4:13 Khenazi abenemadvodzana lamabili lekwakubo-Othniyeli naSeraya. Emadvodzana a-Othiniyeli bekuboHathathi, naMeyonothayi." 
1Chronicles4:14 Meyonothayi abenguyise wa-Ofra. Seraya abenguyise waJowabe, Jowabe abengumsunguli weGe Harashimu, loko phela kusho kutsi bantfu bakhona babetingcweti." 
1Chronicles4:15 Emadvodzana aKhalebi, umsa waJefune, bekubo-Iru, na-Ela, naNamu. Indvodzana ya-Ela bekunguKhenazi." 
1Chronicles4:16 Emadvodzana aJehaleli bekuboZifi, naZifa, naThiriya, na-Asareli." 
1Chronicles4:17 Emadvodzana a-Ezra bekuboJetheri, naMeredi, na-Eferi kanye naJaloni. Lomunye webafati baMeredi watala boMiriyamu, naShamayi, kanye na-Ishbha, uyise wa-Eshtemowa." 
1Chronicles4:17 Emadvodzana a-Ezra bekuboJetheri, naMeredi, na-Eferi kanye naJaloni. Lomunye webafati baMeredi watala boMiriyamu, naShamayi, kanye na-Ishbha, uyise wa-Eshtemowa." 
1Chronicles4:18 Umkakhe waseJudiya watala boJaredi, uyise waGedori, naHebhere, uyise waSokho, kanye naJekuthiyeli, uyise waZanowa. Laba labanye bekubantfwana baBithiya, indvodzakati yaFaro, leyayingumfati waMeredi." 
1Chronicles4:19 Emadvodzana emkaHodiya, dzadzewaboNahamu, bekunguyise waKheyila, umGami, na-Eshtemowa, um-Makha." 
1Chronicles4:20 Emadvodzana aShimoni bekubo-Amnoni, naRina, naBheni Hanani kanye naThiloni. Titukulwane taka-Ishi bekuboZohethi naBheni Zohethi." 
1Chronicles4:21 Emadvodzana aShela, umsa waJuda, bekubo-Era, uyise waLekha, naLada, uyise waMaresha, nemindeni leyayeluka ilineni eBhethi Ashbeya," 
1Chronicles4:22 naJokimi, nebantfu baseKhozeba, naJowashi, naSarafi, lababebusa eMowabi, naseJashubi Lehemi. Loku kwabhalwa endvulo." 
1Chronicles4:23 Babebabumbi lababehlala eNethayimu naseGedera, basebentela inkhosi." 
1Chronicles4:24 Emadvodzana aSimeyoni bekuboNemuweli, naJamini, naJaribi, naZera kanye naShawula." 
1Chronicles4:25 Umsa waShawula bekunguShalumi, umsa wakhe kunguMibsamu, umsa wakhe kunguMishma." 
1Chronicles4:26 Umsa waMishma bekunguHamuweli, umsa wakhe kunguZakhuri, umsa wakhe kunguShimeyi." 
1Chronicles4:27 Shimeyi abenemadvodzana lali-16 nemadvodzakati lasitfupha, kodvwa bomnakabo babete bantfwana labanyenti; ngako lusendvo lwakabo lonkhe aluzange lwandze lube ngangelusendvo lwakaJuda." 
1Chronicles4:28 Babehlala eBherisheba, naseMolada, naseHasari Shuwali," 
1Chronicles4:29 naseBhala, nase-Esemu, naseTholadi," 
1Chronicles4:30 naseBhethuweli, naseHoma, naseSikilagi," 
1Chronicles4:31 naseBhethi Makhabothi, naseHasari Susimu, naseBhethi Bhiri, naseSharayimu. Lawa kwakungemadolobha abo kwaze kwefika sikhatsi sekubusa kwenkhosi Davide." 
1Chronicles4:32 Imiti leyayitungelete lamadolobha bekuyi-Etamu, ne-Ayini, neRimona, neThokheni, ne-Ashani; emadolobha lasihlanu asawonkhe," 
1Chronicles4:33 nayo yonkhe leyo miti kuze kuyewufika eBhalathi. Leto bekutabelo tabo. Babewugcina nemlandvo weluhlanga lwekutalana kwabo. 
1Chronicles4:34 Meshobabi, naJamleki, naJosha, umsa wa-Amasiya," 
1Chronicles4:35 naJoweli, naJehu, umsa wa-Joshibiya, umsa waSeraya, umsa wa-Asiyeli," 
1Chronicles4:36 kanye na-Eliyoyenayi, naJakoba, naJeshohaya, na-Asaya, na-Adiyeli, naJesimiyeli, naBhenaya," 
1Chronicles4:37 naZiza, umsa waShifi, umsa wa-Aloni, umsa waJedaya, umsa waShimri, umsa waShemaya:" 
1Chronicles4:38 Lawa-ke bekungemabito ebaholi baleto tinsendvo. Imindeni yabo yandza kakhulu," 
1Chronicles4:39 base benabela nasemacentselweni aseGedori, ngasemphumalanga kwesigodzi, solomane bafunana nemadlelo etifuyo tabo." 
1Chronicles4:40 Lapho bakhandza emadlelo labeneluhlata, nelive lalapho lalilikhulu linekuthula futsi lipholile. Bekuke kwahlala emaHhamu kuleyo ndzawo." 
1Chronicles4:41 Bantfu lekwakubhalwe emabito abo befika ngesikhatsi kusabusa Hezekiya, inkhosi yakaJuda. Bahlasela lamaHhamu lapho abehlala khona kanye nemaMehuni labelapho, bawabhubhisa onkhe, njengobe nalamuhla loku kusabonakala nje. Bahlala kuleyo ndzawo yabo, ngobe bekunemadlelo lakahle etifuyo tabo." 
1Chronicles4:42 Labanye bakaSimeyoni lababengema-500 bahlasela eNtsabeni iSeyiri, baholwa nguPhelatiya, naNeyariya, naRefaya, na-Uziyeli, emadvodzana a-Ishi." 
1Chronicles4:43 Babulala leyo misalela yema-Amaleki leyayibalekile, solomane bahlala lapho kuze kube ngulamuhla." 
1Chronicles5:1 Leti-ke titukulwane takaRubeni, litubulo la-Israyeli. Rubeni abelitubulo, kodvwa watsi kube alale nesingani seyise, walahlekelwa ngemalungelo ebutubulo bakhe, ase anikwa emadvodzana aJosefa, umsa wa-Israyeli. Ngako akabange asabalwa emlandvweni weluhlanga lwekutalana kwabo njengekwemalungelo ekutalwa kwakhe." 
1Chronicles5:2 Noko kwase kuba nguJuda lowaba sive lesasinemandla kakhulu, ngiso lesabe sesitala umbusi wato tonkhe tive tema-Israyeli, nome nje emalungelo ebutubulo abenikwe Josefa." 
1Chronicles5:3 Emadvodzana aRubeni, litubulo la-Israyeli, bekuboHanoki, naPhalu, naHesroni, naKhami." 
1Chronicles5:4 Leti bekutitukulwane takaJoweli: umsa waJoweli bekunguShemaya, umsa wakhe kunguGogi, umsa wakhe kunguShimeyi," 
1Chronicles5:5 umsa wakhe kunguMikha, umsa wakhe kunguReyaya, umsa wakhe kunguBhali," 
1Chronicles5:6 umsa wakhe kunguBhera, lowatfunjwa nguThiglathi Phileseri, inkhosi yase-Asiriya; Bhera abengumholi wesive sakaRubeni." 
1Chronicles5:7 Emilandvweni yemindeni yakaRubeni baholi bayo bekuboJeyiyeli sikhulu, naZakhariya," 
1Chronicles5:8 naBela, umsa wa-Azazi, umsa waShema, umsa waJoweli. Bebakhe kusukela e-Aroyeri kuya eNebo naseBhali Meyoni." 
1Chronicles5:9 Ngasemphumalanga bebakhe kusukela emnyeleni welihlane kuze kuyewufika emfuleni iYufrathe, ngobe phela netifuyo tabo tase tandze kakhulu kaGileyadi." 
1Chronicles5:10 Ngesikhatsi sekubusa kwenkhosi Sawula sive sakaRubeni sahlasela bakaHagari, lesabehlula; sase sidla lelive labo lonkhe lelingasemphumalanga nelakaGileyadi." 
1Chronicles5:11 Sive sakaGadi sasihlala edvutane nesakaRubeni, eveni laseBhashani, kuze kuyewufika eSalekha." 
1Chronicles5:12 Joweli waba ngumholi, wesibili kwaba nguShafamu, kwase kulandzela Janayi, naShafati eBhashani." 
1Chronicles5:13 Labanye lekwakungimindeni letihlobo tabo bekuboMikhayeli, naMeshulamu, naSheba, naJorayi, naJakani, naZiya, na-Ebheri; babesikhombisa sebabonkhe." 
1Chronicles5:14 Lawa ngemadvodzana a-Abihayili, umsa waHuri, umsa waJarowa, umsa waGileyadi, umsa waMikhayeli, umsa waJeshishayi, umsa waJado, umsa waBuze." 
1Chronicles5:15 Ahi, umsa wa-Abdiyeli, umsa waGuni, abengumholi wemndeni wakhe." 
1Chronicles5:16 BakaGadi babehlala kaGileyadi, naseBhashani nasetabelweni tayo nakulo lonkhe lelo live lemadlelo aseSharoni, kwaze kwaba ngusemikhawulweni yalo." 
1Chronicles5:17 Yonkhe lemilandvo yeluhlanga lwekutalana kwato yayibhalwe phansi ngesikhatsi sekubusa kwaJothamu, inkhosi yakaJuda, naJerobowamu, inkhosi yaka-Israyeli." 
1Chronicles5:18 Sive sakaRubeni nesakaGadi kanye nencenye yesive sakaManase tatinemadvodza labeti-44 760, labengangenela umbutfo wemphi, imiswahla leyayihloma ngelihawu nangenkemba, ikwati nekusebentisa butjoki, ngobe yayivele iceceshelwe kulwa imphi." 
1Chronicles5:19 Lamadvodza alwa nebakaHagari, nebakaJeturi, nebakaNafishi, nebakaNodabi." 
1Chronicles5:20 Babeka litsemba labo kuNkulunkulu, bathandaza kuye, bacela lusito. Nkulunkulu wayiphendvula imithandazo yabo, wabenta basincoba sive sakaHagari kanye netive letatisitana naso." 
1Chronicles5:21 Batfumba tifuyo tebakaHagari lekwakungemakamela lati-50 000, netimvu letati-250 000, netimbongolo letati-2 000 kanye nebantfu lababeti-100 000." 
1Chronicles5:22 Linyenti labulawa, ngobe lemphi beyiyaNkulunkulu. Lelo live balidla, bahlala kulo kwaze kwaba sikhatsi sekudzingiswa kwabo." 
1Chronicles5:23 Bantfu bencenye yesive sakaManase babebanyenti kakhulu; bona babehlala eveni kusukela eBhashani kuze kuyewufika eBhali Hemoni, lokusho kutsi, eSeniri, naseNtsabeni iHemoni." 
1Chronicles5:24 Baholi balemindeni bekubo-Eferi, na-Ishi, na-Eliyeli, na-Azriyeli, naJeremiya, naHodaviya, naJadiyeli. Babengemachawe labenesibindzi, ladvumile nalabebaholi bemindeni yawo." 
1Chronicles5:25 Kodvwa abazange betsembele kuNkulunkulu waboyisemkhulu, baphinga ngekukhonta labanye bonkulunkulu baletive takulelo live, Nkulunkulu latibhubhisa nakungena tive tema-Israyeli." 
1Chronicles5:26 Ngako Nkulunkulu wema-Israyeli wacunula inhlitiyo yaPhuli, inkhosi yase-Asiriya, lekwakunguThiglathi Phileseri, inkhosi yase-Asiriya, watfumba bakaRubeni, nebakaGadi kanye nencenye yesive sakaManase, wabadzingisa. Wabatsatsa wabayisa eHala, naseHabori, naseHara, nasemfuleni iGozani, lapho basekhona khona ngisho nalamuhla loku." 
1Chronicles6:1 Emadvodzana aLevi bekuboGeshoni, naKhohati, naMerari." 
1Chronicles6:2 Emadvodzana aKhohati bekubo-Amramu, naJisihari, naHebroni kanye na-Uziyeli." 
1Chronicles6:3 Bantfwana ba-Amramu bekubo-Aroni, naMosi kanye naMiriyamu. Emadvodzana a-Aroni bekuboNadabi, na-Abihu, na-Eleyazare kanye na-Ithamari." 
1Chronicles6:4 Eleyazare abenguyise waFinehasi, Finehasi anguyise wa-Abishuwa." 
1Chronicles6:5 Abishuwa abenguyise waBukhi, Bukhi anguyise wa-Uzi." 
1Chronicles6:6 Uzi abenguyise waZerahiya, Zerahiya anguyise waMerayothi." 
1Chronicles6:7 Merayothi abenguyise wa-Amariya, Amariya anguyise wa-Ahitubi."
