Esther5:3 Inkhosi yambuta yatsi: “Kwenteke njani, nkhosikati Esta? Ngitjele kutsi ufunani, utakutfola, nome ngabe kuyincenye yembuso wami.”" 
Esther5:4 Esta waphendvula watsi: “Uma kukuhle enkhosini yami, ngicela kutsi inkhosi ite naHamani lamuhla edzilini lengililungiselela bona.”" 
Esther5:5 Inkhosi yatsi akubitwe Hamani masinyane, kuze batekuya ka-Esta edzilini. Ngako bahamba-ke boHamani nenkhosi baya edzilini ka-Esta." 
Esther5:6 Ngesikhatsi banatsa liwayini inkhosi yaphindza yambuta Esta, yatsi: “Ngabe siyini sikhalo sakho, nkhosikati? Ngitjele kutsi ufunani, utayitfola. Ngitakunika sicelo sakho, ngisho nome ngabe sewucela incenye yembuso wami.”" 
Esther5:7 Esta watsi: “Nasi sicelo sami: 
Esther5:8 Nangabe inkhosi ingaba nemusa kimi ingiphe sicelo sami, ngicela kutsi iphindze ibuye naHamani kusasa kulelinye lidzili lengitawube ngililungisele bona. Ngitayitjela lapho-ke inkhosi kutsi siyini sicelo sami.”" 
Esther5:9 Hamani waphuma kulelo dzili ativa amnandzi, ajabule kakhulu. Kodvwa watsi nakabona Modekhayi emphundvwini, wambona kutsi akamkhotsameli futsi akakhombisi nakancane nje kumhlonipha ngesikhatsi endlula, Hamani watfukutsela watselwa ngemanti." 
Esther5:10 Noko watibamba waya ekhaya lakhe. Wase umema bangani bakhe kutsi bavakashele ekhaya lakhe, wabita nemkakhe Zereshi kutsi naye abe khona." 
Esther5:11 Hamani wabatekela ababalela nebantfwabakhe kutsi banyenti kanganani, abatjela nekutsi inkhosi imkhuphule kanjani yamenta ndvunankhulu, nekutsi yena ubaluleke kanganani kunato tonkhe tindvuna tenkhosi." 
Esther5:12 Wachubeka Hamani wabalandzisa nekutsi ngetulu kwako konkhe yena uhleti nje abemenywe yinkhosikati lenkhulu, Esta; ibentele lidzili bona nenkhosi bobabili. Washo nekusho kutsi nangakusasa futsi baphindze bamenywa, kwamenywa inkhosi naye Hamani kuphela, emkhatsini wato tonkhe tindvuna tenkhosi." 
Esther5:13 Kodvwa nome kunjalo, konkhe loko kuye kwakungasho lutfo inkhani nakasabona leliJuda lelinguModekhayi lisahlala lapha emphundvwini yasendlunkhulu." 
Esther5:14 Ngako umkakhe Zereshi, nabo bonkhe bangani bakhe bakhipha siphakamiso batsi: “Yini ungagawuli sigodvo lesingemamitha langema-22 budze, uvuke ekuseni ucele enkhosini kutsi Modekhayi alengiswe khona; utawutsi nawuya edzilini nenkhosi ube ujabulile.” Leso siphakamiso samjabulisa Hamani, ngako sigodvo sekulengisa Modekhayi salungiswa masinyane." 
Esther6:1 Kulobo busuku abuzange sebehle butfongo enkhosini, ngako yatfumela kutsi akulandvwe emabhuku emilandvo yembuso ifundzelwe." 
Esther6:2 Lendzawo leyafundvwa yayinemlandvo lapho kwakubhalwe kutsi Modekhayi wavumbulula lisu letindvuna letimbili letatigadza iminyango yenkhosi, boBikthani naThereshi." 
Esther6:3 Inkhosi yabuta yatsi: “Modekhayi sambonga ngekumnika mvuzo muni ngalesento lesi?” Letinceku tatsi: “Kute lentelwa kona.” 
Esther6:4 Inkhosi yabuta yatsi: “Kukhona yini lomunye wetindvuna tami lolapha esigodlweni?” Ngaleso sikhatsi Hamani abengena esibuyeni sendlunkhulu ete enkhosini kutewucela kutsi Modekhayi alengiswe entsanjeni leyase ilungiselwe yena. 
Esther6:5 Ngako letinceku taphendvula tatsi: “Hamani ukhona la ngephandle, umele kutawukhuluma nawe.” Inkhosi yatsi: “Mngeniseni.”" 
Esther6:6 Ngako Hamani wangeniswa, inkhosi yakhuluma kuye, yatsi: “Kukhona umuntfu lengifisa kumbonga kakhulu. Wena utsi ngingakukhombisa kanjani loko kumbonga kwami?” Hamani wacabanga watsi: “Konje ngubani nje inkhosi lengafisa kumbonga kakhulu ngaphandle kwami?”" 
Esther6:7 Hamani wayiphendvula watsi: “Lomuntfu inkhosi lefisa kumbonga 
Esther6:8 ayimembese ngengubo yebukhosi leyembatfwa ngiyo, imekhwete ehhashini layo lelifakwe umchele webukhosi." 
Esther6:9 Lesinye setikhulu tayo letetsembekile asimembatsise lowo muntfu inkhosi letsandza kumbonga, bese sihamba embikwalo lelihhashi, lidzabule licotfote ekhatsi nelidolobha. Lesikhulu asihambe simemetela, sitsi: ‘Ase nibuke-ke kutsi inkhosi imentelani lowo muntfu lefisa kumbonga!’ ”" 
Esther6:10 Inkhosi yatsi kuHamani: “Phutfuma, utsatse ingubo yebukhosi nelihhashi njengobe ushito, konkhe loko ukwente kuModekhayi, liJuda. Utamkhandza ahleti emphundvwini yendlunkhulu.”" 
Esther6:11 Ngako Hamani watsatsa lengubo yebukhosi wembatsisa Modekhayi, wamekhweta ehhashini lebukhosi, walihambela embili, ahamba amemetela atsi: “Ase nibuke-ke kutsi inkhosi imentelani umuntfu lefisa kumbonga!”" 
Esther6:12 Emvakwaloko Modekhayi wabuyela emphundvwini yendlunkhulu, kodvwa Hamani wabuyela ekhaya kakhe ajabhe, waze wembonya nebuso bakhe ngenca yekudliwa ngemahloni." 
Esther6:13 Wafike walandzisa umkakhe nebangani bakhe bonkhe lokwase kumehlele. Umkakhe Zereshi nalabangani bakhe bamtjela batsi: “Nangabe Modekhayi aliJuda, wena sewucalile kuwa, futsi ungeke umkhone. Nakanjani utakwehlula.”" 
Esther6:14 Batsi basakhuluma tindvuna tenkhosi tefika setilandze Hamani ngekushesha kutsi aye edzilini, lakhe nenkhosi, lababelentelwe ngu-Esta." 
Esther7:1 Ngako inkhosi naHamani bahamba bobabili baya edzilini la-Esta. 
Esther7:2 Basachubeka nekunatsa ngalelo langa lesibili, inkhosi yaphindze yabuta, yatsi: “Nkhosikati Esta, ufunani? Ngitjele, utakwentelwa; ngisho nome ngabe ufuna incenye yembuso wami.”" 
Esther7:3 Inkhosikati Esta, yaphendvula yatsi: “Nakukuhle enkhosini yami kwemukela sicelo sami, nome ngingesibani, sifiso sami, nkhosi, kutsi mane usindzise imphilo yami, nemphilo yesive sakitsi." 
Esther7:4 Mine nesive sakitsi sitsengisiwe kutsi sibulawe size sife sonkhe siphele. Kube mane bekutsengiswe ngatsi kutsi simane sibe tigcili netigcilikati ngabe ngithulile, ngobe angiboni kutsi loko singaze sikwetfwese inkhosi; kodvwa sitawubhujiswa sonkhe!”" 
Esther7:5 Inkhosi Ahashiveroshi yabuta inkhosikati Esta, yatsi: “Ngubani lowo? Ukuphi yena lowo muntfu lowente leso sento lesinjalo?”" 
Esther7:6 Esta watsi: “Sitsa setfu, umuntfu losenyanyako, nalesisinengiso kuye ngunangu Hamani, lonenhlitiyo lembi!” Hamani wahlahlela inkhosi nenkhosikati lenkhulu emehlo asetfukile, esaba." 
Esther7:7 Inkhosi yasukuma seyitfukutsele igaya tiboti, yashiya lidzili yaphumela ngaphandle esibuyeni sesigodlo, yayawushaywa ngumoya. Hamani wabona kutsi kubi, inkhosi vele itamjezisa ngalesento; wasala endlini, entela kutincengela ku-Esta, kutsi inkhosi ingambulali." 
Esther7:8 Watsi asatilahla phansi nje embikwetinyawo tesihlalo sa-Esta, asatsi usetatincengela, yangena inkhosi seyibuya esibuyeni. Yatsi nayimbona enta njalo, yamemeta yatsi: “Kantsi lendvodza seyitawudlwengula umdlunkhulu wami lapha ekhatsi esigodlweni nasembikwami, ngibuka?” Latsi liphuma nje lelo livi enkhosini, tinceku taphutfuma tambonya buso baHamani." 
Esther7:9 Lomunye wabo, lekwakutsiwa nguHabona, watsi: “Yena lo Hamani phela besalungise nesigodvo lesingemamitha langema-22 ngasendlini yakhe, asilungisele kulengisa Modekhayi lowephula imphilo yenkhosi engotini.” “Lengisani Hamani kuso!” sekusho inkhosi." 
Esther7:10 Ngako Hamani walengiswa kuleso sigodvo bekasigawulele kulengisa Modekhayi. Kutfukutsela kwenkhosi kwabotja. 
Esther8:1 Ngalona lelo langa inkhosi Ahashiveroshi yadla tonkhe timphahla taHamani, sitsa nemhluphi wemaJuda, watinika inkhosikati Esta, tema ngaye. Esta walandzisa inkhosi ngekuhlobana kwabo naModekhayi; ngako kusukela ngalelo langa Modekhayi waba nemvume yekungena endlunkhulu." 
Esther8:2 Inkhosi yakhumula indandatho yayo leneluphawu lwayo, yona leyo labeyinike Hamani, wase uyinika Modekhayi. Esta wanika Modekhayi lilungelo lekuphatsa tonkhe timphahla bekutaHamani." 
Esther8:3 Esta waphindze wayawukhuluma enkhosini; watilahla etinyaweni tayo, akhala. Wayincenga kutsi isale seyiwuhocisa lomkhankhaso lomubi wekubulala onkhe emaJuda, njengobe bekuhlose Hamani, umtukulu wa-Agagi." 
Esther8:4 Inkhosi yamphakamisela indvuku yayo yegolide; ngako-ke Esta wasukuma wakhuluma kuyo, watsi:" 
Esther8:5 “Nakukuhle enkhosini, nangabe itsandza nekunginaka, nayibona kutsi loko kufanele kwentiwe, ngicela ikhiphe umtsetfo wekuncandza kufezwa kwemkhankhaso wekubulala onkhe emaJuda kuto tonkhe tifundza talombuso lobekuhloswe nguHamani, umsa waHamedatha, um-Agagi." 
Esther8:6 Empeleni mine ngingakumela ngikutibe njani, nangabe sive netihlobo tami tibhujiswa tibulawa?”" 
Esther8:7 Inkhosi Ahashiveroshi wakhuluma kuModekhayi, na-Esta akhona, yatsi: “Asubuke la, sengimncumile loHamani labehlose kubhubhisa emaJuda; timphahla takhe sengitetfule etandleni ta-Esta." 
Esther8:8 Incwadzi leneluphawu lwebukhosi ingeke iphikiswe ngumuntfu. Ngako-ke ungawabhalela egameni lami onkhe emaJuda loko lofisa kuwabhalela kona, bese lenkhulumo uyinyatselisa ngeluphawu lwebukhosi.”" 
Esther8:9 Loku kwenteka ngelilanga lema-23, enyangeni yesitsatfu, lebitwa ngekutsi nguSivani. Modekhayi wabita bomabhalane benkhosi wabeka inkhulumo, bona bayibhala phansi. Letincwadzi tamikiswa kumaJuda, nebabusi, netindvuna, netiphatsimandla, nakuto tonkhe tifundza letatili-127, kusukela eNdiya kuze kufike eSudani. Letincwadzi tabhalwa ngelulwimi nangeluhlobo lwekubhala lwaleso naleso sifundza lapho tatiya khona, nakuwo emaJuda ngelulwimi lwawo nangeluhlobo lwekubhala kwawo." 
Esther8:10 Modekhayi watibhala tonkhe letincwadzi egameni lenkhosi Ahashiveroshi, watingcivita ngendandatho yeluphawu lwenkhosi. Kwakhishwa emancusa labegibele emahhashi enkhosi elikhetselo lagijima kakhulukati." 
Esther8:11 Letincwadzi tatichaza kutsi inkhosi seyinike onkhe emaJuda kuwo onkhe emadolobha kutsi abe nelilungelo lekutivikela. Banikwa nelilungelo kutsi bativikele nabahlaselwa titsa nome kukuliphi live lalombuso, balwe naleto titsa, babulale bafati bato nebantfwabato, nakwenteka baticedze tonkhe badle ngisho netimphahla tato." 
Esther8:12 Lesimemetelo sasebukhosini kwaphoceleka kutsi sisebente kuwo wonkhe umbuso wasePheresiya ngalo lelo langa lekubulawa kwemaJuda, lekwakufanele kube mhla tili-13, enyangeni yeli-12, lekutsiwa ngu-Adari." 
Esther8:13 Lesimemetelo sasebukhosini semiswa saba ngumtsetfo lekwakufanele watiwe ngibo bonkhe bantfu kuwo onkhe emave, kuze phela emaJuda atewukwati kutenanela nekutiphindzisela nakahlaselwa titsa tawo ngalelo langa." 
Esther8:14 Tigijimi nemancusa lakhishwa yinkhosi abegibele emahhashi enkhosi lagijima kakhulukati. Lesimemetelo sasebukhosini sasicilelwa samenyetelwa satiwa nangibo bonkhe bantfu baseSusa lekwakuyinhlokodolobha yembuso. 
Esther8:15 Modekhayi waphuma endlunkhulu embetse imijiva yebukhosi lelingangane nalemhlophe, nengubo lebukhwebeletane kanye nemchele lomuhle wegolide. Bonkhe bantfu edolobheni laseSusa bema etitaladini bamemeta ngalokukhulu kujabula." 
Esther8:16 KumaJuda lelo kwaba lilanga nesikhatsi sekutsakasa, nekutfokota, nekujabula, nekudvumisa." 
Esther8:17 Kuwo onkhe emadolobha nemave lapho kwefika khona lesimemetelo sasebukhosini emaJuda ajabula aze aba nelilanga lekubonga, kwaba nemadzili, kwajatjulwa kwaba njeya. Empeleni bantfu labanyenti bavele bagucula iminyango baba ngemaJuda, ngobe phela abesanesitfunti, esatjwa." 
Esther9:1 Lefika-ke lilanga leli-13 enyangeni ya-Adari, inyanga yeli-12. Lelo bekulilanga lapho simemetelo senkhosi bekufanele sifezeke ngalo. Lelo bekulilanga lapho titsa temaJuda betibheke kutsi tiwacedze. Kodvwa lisondvo lagucuka, ngobe emaJuda kwabe sekuba ngawo lancobako, ancoba titsa tawo." 
Esther9:2 EmaJuda abutsana ndzawonye etidzidzini tawo letatisemadolobheni kuto tonkhe tifundza tenkhosi Ahashiveroshi, entela kutsi ativikele kulabo lababengahle bawahlasele. Kwabate umuntfu lowaba nemandla ekuwahlasela, ngobe bonkhe bantfu baletinye tive bese bawesaba kakhulu." 
Esther9:3 Empeleni tonkhe tiphatsimandla, netindvuna, nebabusi betifundza bese babuyele ngakumaJuda, ngobe bese besaba Modekhayi." 
Esther9:4 Phela Modekhayi bese kwatiwa kutsi sewungumuntfu lomkhulu kanganani ebukhosini. Kwase kwatiwa nekutsi uya ngekuya uyakhushulwa. 
Esther9:5 EmaJuda abulala enta lakutsandzako ngetitsa tawo. Atihlasela kamatima ngetikhali, atibulala." 
Esther9:6 ESusa, lekwakunguyona nhlokodolobha, emaJuda abulala emadvodza langema-500." 
Esther9:7 Abulala Phashandatha, naDalfoni, na-Aspatha," 
Esther9:8 naPhoratha, na-Adaliya, na-Aridatha," 
Esther9:9 naPhamashta, na-Arisayi, na-Aridayi, naVayizatha," 
Esther9:10 emadvodzana lalishumi aHamani, umsa waHamedatha, sitsa semaJuda. Noko akazange asibeke sandla sakhe etimphahleni tetitsa tawo kutsi atiphange." 
Esther9:11 Ngalona lelo langa sibalo sebantfu lababebulewe ngemaJuda eSusa sabikelwa inkhosi. 
Esther9:12 Inkhosi yatsi kunkhosikati Esta: “EmaJuda abulele emadvodza langema-500 kanye nemadvodzana aHamani lalishumi, enhlokodolobha iSusa. Ingabe-ke kulawa lamanye emadolobha benteni? Manje ase usho sikhalo sakho; utakwentelwa. Ngitjele kutsi yini lenye loyifunako ngitakwentela.”" 
Esther9:13 Esta waphendvula watsi: “Nakukuhle enkhosini yami, ngicela kutsi emaJuda lasenhlokodolobha iSusa aphindze nakusasa ente njengobe entile lamuhla, bese kutsi tidvumbu temadvodzana lalishumi aHamani, tiphanyekwe etigodvweni.”" 
Esther9:14 Ngako inkhosi yakhipha simemetelo sasebukhosini kutsi loko akwentiwe. Lesimemetelo sasebukhosini sacondziswa eSusa kutsi emadvodzana aHamani alengiswe ngentsambo etigodvweni. 
Esther9:15 EmaJuda labeseSusa aphindza abutsana ndzawonye ngelilanga leli-14, enyangeni ya-Adari, abulala lamanye emadvodza langema-300. Noko akazange atiphange timphahla tawo." 
Esther9:16 Ngaleso sikhatsi nalawa lamanye emaJuda labekuletinye tifundza tenkhosi abebutsene ndzawonye ngemave awo, nawo ativikela ngetikhali; wona abulala bantfu labati-75 000 lababetitsa tawo. Kodvwa noko nawo akazange asibeke sandla etimphahleni tabo, kutiphanga." 
Esther9:17 Loko bakwenta ngelilanga leli-13, enyangeni ya-Adari; kwatsi ngelilanga leli-14 baphumula, batentela lilanga lelidzili lekujabula, nelekwephana tipho." 
Esther9:18 EmaJuda labeseSusa wona lelidzili alenta ngelilanga leli-15 enyangeni ya-Adari, ngobe phela bona titsa tabo batibulala ngelilanga leli-13 nangelilanga leli-14, kwase kutsi ngelilanga leli-15 baphumula; nabo base batentela lilanga lelidzili nelekujabula bephane tipho." 
Esther9:19 Ngiko-nje emaJuda lasahlala emakhaya emaphandleni lilanga leli-14 enyangeni ya-Adari alenta kube lilanga lelidzili lekujabula bephane tipho. 
Esther9:20 Modekhayi watibhala phansi tonkhe leto tintfo, wase utitfumela kuwo onkhe emaJuda kuwo onkhe emave lasePheresiya lasedvute nalakhashane," 
Esther9:21 awatjela kutsi lilanga leli-14 neleli-15 enyangeni ya-Adari babolihlonipha balente kube lilanga lelidzili lekujabula nelekwephana ngalo tipho, yonkhe iminyaka." 
Esther9:22 Lawo ngawo emalanga lapho emaJuda ativikela etitseni tawo. Leyo nyanga kwaba yinyanga leyajikiswa ekubeni yinyanga yelusizi neyengati kubo, yaba yinyanga yenjabulo neyekuphepha kwabo. Batjelwa kutsi bawahloniphe lawo malanga ngekwenta emadzili bephane tipho talokudliwako lomunye kulomunye, ngisho nakulabamphofu." 
Esther9:23 Ngako emaJuda alandzela imiyalo yaModekhayi; lesibhimbi sasale saba ngumkhosi weminyaka yonkhe. 
Esther9:24 Hamani, umsa waHamedatha, situkulwane sa-Agagi, sitsa lesikhulu sesive semaJuda, abente inkatho lekwakutsiwa yiPhurimu, entele kutfola lilanga lekungulona kungabulawa ngalo onkhe emaJuda. Abehlose kuwacedza onkhe." 
Esther9:25 Kodvwa Esta waya enkhosini, inkhosi yakhipha umtsetfo lowawubhalwe phansi, lekwatsi umphumela wawo Hamani nemadvodzana akhe wavuna labekuhlanyelele emaJuda, yena nemadvodzana akhe balengiswa entsanjeni benekelwa live." 
Esther9:26 Ngiko nje lamalanga alamadzili abitwa ngekutsi yiPhurimu, ngenca yalencwadzi leyabhalwa nguModekhayi nangenca yako konkhe lokwawehlela." 
Esther9:27 EmaJuda abe asatentela umtsetfo nelisiko lawo kanye newetitukulwane tawo, naye wonkhe longahle afune kuba liJuda kutsi njalo ngesikhatsi lesifanele iminyaka ngeminyaka lamalanga lamabili ayawuhlonishwa njengekusho kwesimemetelo saModekhayi." 
Esther9:28 Kwavunyelwana kutsi yonkhe imindeni yemaJuda kuto tonkhe titukulwane letitako, kuto tonkhe tifundza, nakuwo onkhe emadolobha, afanele alihloniphe alikhumbule lelo langa lePhurimu, ngayo yonkhe iminyaka letawulandzela." 
Esther9:29 Ngako-ke inkhosikati lenkhulu Esta, indvodzakati ya-Abiyayili, banaModekhayi, babhala incwadzi futsi lenesiciniseko sekutsi naye uyasicindzetela leso simemetelo ngePhurimu lesasikhishwe nguModekhayi ngaphambili." 
Esther9:30 Lencwadzi yayicondziswe kuwo onkhe emaJuda, yase itfunyelwa nakuto tonkhe tifundza letatili-127 embusweni wonkhe wasePheresiya. Yayifisela emaJuda kuthula nenhlalakahle," 
Esther9:31 yatisa emaJuda kanye netitukulwane tawo kutsi awahloniphe lamalanga ePhurimu ngesikhatsi lesifanele, njengaloku bebetayele kuhlonipha imitsetfo yekuhlonipha kuzila netikhatsi tekulila. Lowo mtsetfo waphuma kuModekhayi banenkhosikati lenkhulu Esta." 
Esther9:32 Lomyalo wa-Esta lowagcizelela imitsetfo yePhurimi wawubhalwe encwadzini legocotwako. 
Esther10:1 Bantfu lababeselugwini lwembuso kanye nalabo labebakhe ekhatsi kwelive, inkhosi Ahashiveroshi wabaphocelela kutsi bamsebentele kamatima." 
Esther10:2 Tonkhe tintfo nemisebenti yakhe lemikhulu lemangalisako kanye nekubeka Modekhayi esikhundleni kubhaliwe emilandvweni yemakhosi asePheresiya naseMediya. 
Esther10:3 Modekhayi waba siphatsimandla lesaba lisekela lenkhosi Ahashiveroshi. EmaJuda abemhlonipha amatisa, kunjalo nje naye abesebentela kutsi bantfu besive sakubo netitukulwane tabo tihlale tinekuphepha." 
Job1:1 Eveni lase-Usi kwakunendvodza, libito layo kunguJobe. Lendvodza yayimsulwa, ilungile, futsi imesaba Nkulunkulu, ikubalekela konkhe lokubi." 
Job1:2 Jobe abenemadvodzana lasikhombisa nemadvodzakati lamatsatfu," 
Job1:3 abefuye timvu letatiti-7 000, nemakamela lati-3 000, netinkhabi letiboshelwako letiyinkhulungwane, netimbongolo letinsikati letatingema-500 kanye netisebenti letinyenti kakhulu. Lendvodza yayidvume ngebunjinga lobukhulu, yendlula onkhe emadvodza asemphumalanga." 
Job1:4 Emadvodzana akhe abevamise kwenta emadzili ngemagema emakhaya awo: abeyaye ameme bodzadzewabo labatsatfu kutsi bete batewudla banatse nawo. 
Job1:5 Bekutsi kungendlula lesikhatsi semadzili, bese Jobe utfumela kubantfwabakhe abahlambulule. Abevuka ekuseni ngetingweti abentele bonkhe umnikelo wekushiswa ngekwelinani labo, acabanga atsi: “Mhlawumbe bantfwabami bonile bacalekisa Nkulunkulu etinhlitiyweni tabo.” Lona bekungumkhuba waJobe, labewenta njalo nje." 
Job1:6 Kwatsi ngalelinye lilanga emadvodzana aNkulunkulu atsatsa tindzawo tawo embikwaSimakadze, naSathane watfolakala asemkhatsini wawo." 
Job1:7 Simakadze wabuta Sathane, watsi: “Uphumaphi?” Sathane waphendvula Simakadze, watsi: “Ngiphuma kuyawuhlamahlama emhlabeni lapho bengihambahamba khona ngehla ngenyuka.”" 
Job1:8 Simakadze wabuta Sathane, watsi: “Uyibonile yini inceku yami Jobe? Kute namunye umuntfu longamtfola emhlabeni lofanana naye; umsulwa, ucotfo ngenhlitiyo, ungumuntfu lowesaba Nkulunkulu nalokubalekelako lokubi.”" 
Job1:9 Sathane waphendvula, watsi: “Usho kutsi Jobe abengakukhonta yini, kube abengatfoli lutfo kuwe?" 
Job1:10 Awukambiyeli ngelutsango yini Jobe kanye nemndeni wakhe nako konkhe lanako? Uwubusisile umsebenti wakhe wetandla, waze wamupha ngisho nemihlambi yetifuyo lesetigcwele kulo lonkhe lelive." 
Job1:11 Kodvwa ase welulele sandla sakho kuko konkhe lanako, ubone kutsi angeke yini akwetfuke.”" 
Job1:12 Simakadze wakhuluma kuSathane, watsi: “Kulungile, konkhe lanako kusetandleni takho, kodvwa ungasibeki sandla sakho emtimbeni wakhe.” Ngako Sathane wahamba, wesuka kuSimakadze." 
Job1:13 Ngalelinye lilanga atsi emadvodzana nemadvodzakati aJobe adla lidzili anatsa neliwayini endlini yemnakabo lomkhulu," 
Job1:14 kwefika sigijimi kuJobe, satsi: “Sitsite sisalima ngetinkhabi ensimini, timbongolo tidla lapha eceleni kwato," 
Job1:15 kwefika emaSabi asihlasela, atitfumba. Tinceku takho atibulele tonkhe ngenkemba; ngimi kuphela losindzile, ngase ngiyabaleka ngita lapha kuwe kutekwatisa ngaloko!”" 
Job1:16 Satsi sisakhuluma lesigijimi, kwefika lesinye, satsi: “Umlilo waNkulunkulu wehle esibhakabhakeni washisa tonkhe timvu takho kanye nato tonkhe tinceku takho; ngimi kuphela losindzile, ngase ngiyabaleka ngita lapha kuwe kutekwatisa ngaloko!”" 
Job1:17 Satsi sisakhuluma leso sigijimi, kwefika lesinye, satsi: “EmaKhaledi ente ticheme letintsatfu awatfumba onkhe emakamela akho ahamba nawo. Abulele tonkhe tinceku takho ngenkemba; ngimi kuphela losindzile, ngase ngiyabaleka ngita lapha kuwe kutekwatisa ngaloko!”" 
Job1:18 Naleso satsi sisakhuluma, kwefika lesinye, satsi: “Emadvodzana nemadvodzakati akho abedla lidzili anatsa liwayini endlini yemnakabo lomkhulu," 
Job1:19 kwefika umoya lomkhulu uchamuka ngasehlane, wabhidlita lendlu, onkhe emakona ayo lamane. Ivele yawela etikwabo, bafa bonkhe; ngimi kuphela losindzile, ngase ngiyabaleka ngita lapha kuwe kutekwatisa ngaloko!”" 
Job1:20 Watsi kube akuve loko Jobe, wasukuma waklebhula timphahla takhe, wahhula inhloko yakhe. Wesuka lapho watilahla phansi emhlabatsini wakhotsama," 
Job1:21 watsi: “Ngaphuma esiswini samake ngingcunu, kanjalo futsi ngiyawubuyela ngingcunu. Simakadze uphile, Simakadze utsatsile. Alidvunyiswe libito laSimakadze.”" 
Job1:22 Kuko konkhe loku Jobe akazange one ngekutsi asole Nkulunkulu. 
Job2:1 Kwaphindza futsi kwatsi nangalelinye lilanga emadvodzana aNkulunkulu eta atsatsa tindzawo tawo embikwaSimakadze, naSathane watfolakala asasemkhatsini wawo." 
Job2:2 Simakadze wabuta Sathane, watsi: “Uphumaphi?” Sathane waphendvula Simakadze, watsi: “Ngiphuma kuyawuhlamahlama emhlabeni, lapho bengihambahamba khona ngehla ngenyuka.”" 
Job2:3 Simakadze wabuta Sathane, watsi: “Uyibonile yini inceku yami Jobe? Kute namunye umuntfu longamtfola emhlabeni lofanana naye; umsulwa, ucotfo ngenhlitiyo, ungumuntfu lowesaba Nkulunkulu nalokubalekelako lokubi. Seloku usabambelele ekwetsembekeni kwakhe, nome wena bewungichukulusha ngekutsi ngimbhubhise ngaphandle kwesizatfu.”" 
Job2:4 Sathane waphendvula Simakadze, watsi: “Sikhumba esikhunjeni! Umuntfu angalahlekelwa nguko konkhe lanako ngenca yemphilo yakhe." 
Job2:5 Kodvwa ase welule sandla sakho utsintse inyama yakhe nematsambo akhe, ubone kutsi angeke yini akwetfuke.”" 
Job2:6 Simakadze wakhuluma kuSathane, watsi: “Kulungile phela, usetandleni takho; kodvwa ungambulali.”" 
Job2:7 Ngako Sathane wesuka embikwaSimakadze, wesukela Jobe, wamhlasela ngematfumba labutfukako, kusukela ngaphansi kwelunyawo lwakhe kuze kuyewufika etulu elunweleni lwakhe." 
Job2:8 Jobe watsatsa lucetu lweludzengelo watenwaya ngalo ahleti emlotseni etaleni. 
Job2:9 UmkaJobe wakhuluma kuJobe, watsi: “Namanje solomane usabambelele yini kulokwetsembeka kwakho? Yetfuka loNkulunkulu wakho, ufe lokungenani!”" 
Job2:10 Jobe wamphendvula, watsi: “Wena ukhulumisa kwemfati losilima. Kantsi sesitakwemukela lokuhle kodvwa yini kuNkulunkulu, singasakwemukeli lokubuhlungu nalokubi?” Kuko konkhe loku Jobe akazange one ngekukhuluma kwakhe." 
Job2:11 Kwatsi kube bakuve konkhe loko lobekumehlele Jobe, bangani bakhe labatsatfu bo-Elifazi, umThemani, naBildadi, umShuhi, kanye naSofari, umNama, besuka emakhaya abo bahlangana bacondza kuJobe, bayakumlilela nekumdvudvuta." 
Job2:12 Batsi nabambona basesekhashane, bangete bambona kutsi nguye; bacala bakhala kakhulu, baklebhula imijiva yabo, batitsela ngelutfuli etinhloko tabo." 
Job2:13 Bahlala naye phansi emhlabatsini emalanga lasikhombisa nebusuku bakhona. Kute nome munye lowase wakhuluma lutfo kuye, ngobe babebona buhlungu lobukhulu labekubo." 
Job3:1 Emvakwaloko Jobe wakhuluma acalekisa lilanga latalwa ngalo," 
Job3:2 watsi: 
Job3:3 “Shangatsi lilanga lengatalwa ngalo lingabhubha, lisuswe nebusuku lekwabikwa ngabo kwatsiwa: ‘Kutelwe umfana!’" 
Job3:4 Shangatsi lelo langa lingaba mnyama, shangatsi naNkulunkulu losezulwini angete alinaka, shangatsi nekukhanya kungete kwakhanya kulo." 
Job3:5 Shangatsi bumnyama nelitfunti lekufa kungatfumba lelo langa, shangatsi lingambonywa lifu, shangatsi bumnyama bungasibekela kukhanya kwalo." 
Job3:6 Shangatsi lobo busuku bungabanjwa bumnyama lobukhulu, shangatsi bungete babalwa kanye nalamanye emalanga emnyaka, bungete bafakwa ngisho nakuyinye inyanga." 
Job3:7 Shangatsi lobo busuku bungabate namunye umuntfu lowemitfwa ngabo, nekujabula kungevakali kubo." 
Job3:8 Shangatsi labo labacalekisa emalanga bangacalekisa lelo langa, tingcweti letingavusa Leviyathani." 
Job3:9 Shangatsi tinkhanyeti talo tentsatsakusa tingaba mnyama; shangatsi busuku balo bungemela kukhanya lokungeke kufike, bungaboni ngisho nemisebe yentsatsakusa," 
Job3:10 ngobe abuzange buyivale iminyango yesisu samake lowangitala, kutewufihla inhlupheko emehlweni ami." 
Job3:11 “Kodvwa kwentiwa yini kutsi ngingafi mhlazana ngitalwa? Angifanga ngani mhlazana ngiphuma esiswini? 
Job3:12 Angemukelelani lawo madvolo? Wona lawo mabele angimunyiselani? 
Job3:13 Ngobe manje ngabe ngitilalele ngekuthula; yebo, ngabe ngitilalele ekuphumuleni." 
Job3:14 Ngabe ngitiphumulele nemakhosi netindvuna temhlaba labatakhela tindzawo tabo lesetabhidlika. 
Job3:15 Ngabe ngitiphumulele nebabusi lababenegolide, bagcwalisa tindlu tabo ngesiliva." 
Job3:16 Nome lokungenani-ke angifihlwanga ngani emhlabatsini njengeluswane lolutelwe lufile, ngibe njengeluswane lolungazange selukubone kukhanya kwelilanga?" 
Job3:17 Lapho-ke ngulapho lababi bayekela khona budlova, nalabakhatsatekile lapho bayaphumula." 
Job3:18 Lapho netiboshwa titfola kuthula, atisaliva ngisho neliphimbo lalabacindzetelako." 
Job3:19 Labancane nalabakhulu bakhona lapho, bafanana bonkhe, nesigcili sikhululekile kumphatsi waso." 
Job3:20 “Kukhanya kunikelwani bantfu labaselusizini? Kona kuphila kunikelwani umuntfu lomphefumulo wakhe udzabukile? 
Job3:21 Kunikelwani bantfu labakulangatelelako kufa, kodvwa kungefiki, bakuphenyisise kwendlula umcebo lofihliwe?" 
Job3:22 Kunikelwani bantfu labakujabulelako kufika ethuneni, batsakase nabafinyelela emadlizeni?" 
Job3:23 Unikelwani imphilo umuntfu londlela yakhe ifihlakele, umuntfu lovinjetelwe nguNkulunkulu?" 
Job3:24 Sibibitfwane sesikudla kwami, kububula kwami kugeleta njengemanti." 
Job3:25 Loko bengikwesaba kakhulu sekungehlele, lebengikwesabisa inyoka sekwenteke kimi." 
Job3:26 Angisenakuthula, nakuphola, nakuphumula. Anginakuphumula, ngiphetfwe kukhatsateka kodvwa.”" 
Job4:1 Elifazi, umThemani, waphendvula watsi:" 
Job4:2 “Nangabe umuntfu atimisele kukhuluma nawe, wena utambeketelela yini? Ngubani nje longake athule angakhulumi?" 
Job4:3 Ase ucabange kutsi banyenti kangakanani bantfu bewubafundzisa, nalababutsakatsaka bewubakhutsata." 
Job4:4 Emavi akho abesimisa labakhubatelako, acinise nemadvolo lagedletelako." 
Job4:5 Kodvwa nyalo kuhlupheka sekuhlasele wena, nawe sewujabhile, kuhlupheka sekukusukele, nawe sewuphelelwa ngemandla." 
Job4:6 Kantsi lokukhonta kwakho Nkulunkulu akukudvudvuti ngani? Bona lobucotfo bakho abukuniki ngani litsemba? 
Job4:7 “Ase ucabange naku: Wase wambona yini longenacala abhubha? Ngukuphi lapho labalungile bake babulawa khona? 
Job4:8 Njengobe sengike ngabona kutsi labo labalima bubi bahlanyele kuhlupheka, bavele bavune kona loko." 
Job4:9 Ngekuphefumula kwaNkulunkulu bayabhubha; ngekuvunguta kwentfukutselo yakhe bayaphela. 
Job4:10 Emabhubesi angabhodla ahhonge, noko ematinyo alawo mabhubesi lamakhulu ahhumukile." 
Job4:11 Libhubesi libulawa kweswela kudla, emawundlu elibhubesi abaleke asabalale." 
Job4:12 “Kwanyenyiselwa livi kimi, tindlebe tami takubamba loko lokwakuhletjwa." 
Job4:13 Kwatsi emkhatsini wekuvinjetelwa kwami ngemaphupho ebusuku, ngesikhatsi bantfu behlelwa ngulobukhulu butfongo," 
Job4:14 kwesaba nekutfutfumela kwangigagadlela, kwatfutfumelisa onkhe ematsambo ami." 
Job4:15 Umoya wantjuza wendlula embikwami, kwasikitela tinwele emtimbeni wami." 
Job4:16 Wema; kodvwa angizange ngati kutsi kuyini. Kwema intfo embikwemehlo ami, ngase ngiva liphimbo lelihlebako, litsi:" 
Job4:17 ‘Kungenteka yini lobhubhako alunge kakhulu kunaNkulunkulu? Kungenteka yini umuntfu abe msulwa kakhulu kuneMdali wakhe? 
Job4:18 Nangabe Nkulunkulu angatetsembi tinceku takhe, nangabe tingilosi takhe atibeka licala," 
Job4:19 kakhulu kangakanani-ke labo labahlala etindlini letakhiwe ngeludzaka, letitisekelo tato tiselutfulini, labo labapitjiteka kalula njengemiyiyane." 
Job4:20 Babhujiswa emkhatsini wekusa nekuhwalala, babhubha kokuphela kubete nalokunakako loko." 
Job4:21 Atikadvonswa yini tindophi temathende abo, badzimate bafe bangenakuhlakanipha nje?’ ”" 
Job5:1 “Memeta nawutsandzako, sibone kutsi ngubani lotakuphendvula! Ngubani nje emkhatsini wabo bonkhe labangcwele longajikela ngakuye?" 
Job5:2 Silima siyafa sibulawe tinhlungu tekutfukutsela kwaso, nemona uyababulala labanengcondvo yebuntfwana." 
Job5:3 Mine ngitibonele ngekwami, silima lesibukeka shangatsi sivikelekile, kodvwa sicalekiso sehlela etikwemuti waso masinyane nje." 
Job5:4 Bantfwabaso bakhashane kabi nekuphepha, kute namunye lobemelelako emacaleni asetinkhundleni." 
Job5:5 Sivuno saso sidliwa ngulabalambile, basikhosholote ngisho lesisekhatsi kulamnyama emacobhe. Labomile bahahela umcebo waso kutsi bawufuhlute bawucedze." 
Job5:6 Bulukhuni abumane bumile phansi nje, yebo, nenhlupheko ayivumbukisi kwemakhowe nje." 
Job5:7 Kodvwa umuntfu utalelwe kuhlupheka, njengaloku netinhlase tisuka tiye etulu." 
Job5:8 “Kodvwa kube bekungimi, ngabe ngiyatincengela kuNkulunkulu, ngabe ngibeka yonkhe indzaba yami embikwakhe." 
Job5:9 Yena wenta timangaliso letingeke tichazwe ngumuntfu, ente nemigilingwane lengeke ibalwe ngumuntfu." 
Job5:10 Unisa imvula etikwemhlaba, ehlisele emanti etikwematsafa." 
Job5:11 Uphakamisa labaphansi abayise etulu, labalilako baphakanyiselwe endzaweni lephephile." 
Job5:12 Ucitsa emacebo emacili, kuze labakwenta ngetandla tabo kungaphumeleli." 
Job5:13 Ubamba labahlakaniphile kuwo onkhe emacebo abo, nemachinga alabangemacili uwaphambanisa onkhe." 
Job5:14 Behlelwa bumnyama lobukhasa phansi emini, litsi libalele lise nga, bona bahambe baphumphutsa njengasebusuku." 
Job5:15 Usindzisa labeswele emlonyeni wekufa, abasindzise nasetidladleni talabo labanemandla sebababambile." 
Job5:16 Ngako labamphofu ubanika litsemba, bese kutsi kungetsembeki kuvalwe umlomo." 
Job5:17 “Maye, ubusisiwe umuntfu locondziswa nguNkulunkulu! Ngako ungakwedzeleli kuyalwa nguSomandla." 
Job5:18 Ngobe yena nome angamilisa tilondza, uphindze atipholise, uyalimata aphindze aphilise ngetandla takhe." 
Job5:19 Nome ungehlelwa tehlakalo letisitfupha, uyakukusindzisa kuto tonkhe; nome nguletisikhombisa kute lokuyakukulimata." 
Job5:20 Ngesikhatsi sendlala uyakukusindzisa ekufeni, nasemphini akusindzise enkembeni." 
Job5:21 Uyawuvikeleka ekushayweni ngemagama, ungesabi nome kufika imbhubhiso." 
Job5:22 Uyawuyihleka lusulu indlala nembhubhiso, nayifika ngakuwe; awuyikwesatjiswa tilwane temhlaba." 
Job5:23 Ngobe uyakuba nesivumelwane nematje asematsafeni, netilwane tesiganga tiyawuhlalisana nawe ngekuthula." 
Job5:24 Uyawukwati kutsi likhaya lakho livikelekile, uyawubala kahle tonkhe timphahla takho utikhandze tiphelele." 
Job5:25 Uyawukwati kutsi bantfwabakho bayawuba banyenti, nebatukulu bakho bayawuba ngangetjani besiganga." 
Job5:26 Uyawuya ethuneni ugcwele emandla, wenelisekile ngebudzala njengetitfungo letibutfwa ngesikhatsi sato lesifanele." 
Job5:27 “Sikuphenyisisile-ke loku, sakukhandza kuliciniso lodvwa. Ngako-ke kuve kahle utibute ukusebentisa kuwe.”" 
Job6:1 Jobe waphendvula, watsi:" 
Job6:2 “Kube tinhlungu tami betingafakwa esikalini tikalwe, nalo lonkhe lusizi lwami lubekwe esilinganisweni;" 
Job6:3 ngempela betingaba matima kwendlula sihlabatsi saselwandle, ngako-ke akumangalisi kutsi emavi ami ashube kangaka." 
Job6:4 Imicibisholo yaSomandla ingekhatsi, ingihlabile, umoya wami sewunatse shevu wayo. Tesabiso taNkulunkulu ticondzane nami ngco." 
Job6:5 Imbongolo yesiganga iyakhonya yini nayiseluhlateni? Yona inkhomo iyabhonsa yini nayiseluhlateni? 
Job6:6 Kudla lokudvuma kuyadliwa yini nakute luswayi? Kona nje bukhona yini bunandzi kulokumhlophe kwelicandza? 
Job6:7 Kudla lokungabe kondla umtimba wami kusuke kunginamatsele emphinjeni, nasematfunjini kufike kungigulukunye kwente umdvumacolo." 
Job6:8 “Awu, shangatsi kucela kwami kungevakala, Nkulunkulu amane angiphe loko lengikufunako." 
Job6:9 Kutsi Nkulunkulu amane asale angisila, angihlwitse ngesandla sakhe angijube." 
Job6:10 Ngobe loko ngukona bekunganginika kuphumula nekutfokota kuleminjunju lengapheli yemahlaba, ngekutsi angikawaphiki emavi aLongcwele." 
Job6:11 “Mandlana mani mine lenginawo, kutsi ngisengachubeka ngetsembe? Tsemba lini lengisenalo kutsi ngisengabeketela?" 
Job6:12 Nginemandla elitje yini kantsi mine? Wona lomtimba wami ulitfusi yini? 
Job6:13 Nginawo yini emandla ekutisindzisa ngekwami, njengobe nje sengemukwe konkhe kwami?" 
Job6:14 “Umuntfu losaphelelwa litsemba kufanele akhutsatwe bangani bakhe labetsembekile, nakhona asakufulatsela kwesaba Somandla." 
Job6:15 Kodvwa bomnaketfu bangimbulutela njengetibhobhodla temanti, yebo, njengetibhobhodla temanti letiphuphumako tiphindze tome," 
Job6:16 tibuye tidvungeke tibe mnyama ngekuncibilika kwangcocwane, tigcwale lapho sitfwatfwa sifihlakele khona." 
Job6:17 Kodvwa tiyoma tingete tageleta ebusika, litsi lingashisa tibaleke emivileni yato." 
Job6:18 Tindvwendvwe letibekelele ngaleyo ndlela yato tiyeduka, tilahleke, tize tiphelele ehlane." 
Job6:19 Tindvwendvwe tebaseThema titfungatsana nemanti, netihambi tebaseSheba letitsenga titsengise, tilindzele ngelitsemba." 
Job6:20 Tiyajabha noko, ngobe betetsemba kakhulu, titsi natifika lapho, tijabhe." 
Job6:21 Ningiyenge kanjalo-ke nani, nitsite kube nibone lenhlupheko yami, nase nikhweshela emuva ngenca yekwesaba." 
Job6:22 Ngike ngasho yini ngatsi: ‘Nginikeleleni,’ nome ngatsi: ‘Ngicela ningihlenge’?" 
Job6:23 Ngike ngasho yini ngatsi: ‘Ngikhululeni esandleni sesitsa, ningisindzise etidladleni talabanelunya’?" 
Job6:24 “Ngifundziseni-ke, ngitawubindza, ningikhombise lapho ngone khona." 
Job6:25 Maye, abuhlungu emavi laliciniso! Kodvwa angisita ngani emavi enu ekuhlakanipha?" 
Job6:26 Ngekwenu netama kulungisa loku lengikukhulumako yini? Lamagama emuntfu losaphelelwa litsemba wona niwenta abe ngumoya yini? 
Job6:27 Nitawuze nente inkatho, nentele longenayise, nitsengise ngekuntjintjiselane ngemngani wenu." 
Job6:28 “Kodvwa phela, ase nimane nibe nesihawu, ningibuke nje. Ngingawacala yini mine emanga lapha embikwenu?" 
Job6:29 Ase nicabangisise kabusha, ningangiphatsi ngalokungakafaneli. Ase nicabangisise kahle lendzaba, bucotfo bami sebusebucayini." 
Job6:30 Bukhona yini bubi kuloku lengikushoko? Umlomo wami ungete wabubona yini bubi nabusenhlitiyweni?” 
Job7:1 “Umuntfu ute yini umsebenti lomatima lapha emhlabeni? Khona emalanga akhe akanjengawo yini emuntfu locashiwe? 
Job7:2 Njengesigcili silangatelela ematfunti asentsambama, nanjengemuntfu locashiwe lolindzela ngekulangatelela umholo wakhe," 
Job7:3 kanjalo nami ngabelwe imihla yekuhlupheka kuletinyanga, ngabelwe busuku beminjunju kulamalanga." 
Job7:4 Nangilala phansi, ngiyaye ngicabange ngitsi: ‘Ingabe ngiyawuvuka nini?’ Busuku nabo bunyonyobe kancane, ngibe mine ngijilajileka kudzimate kudzabuke kusa." 
Job7:5 Umtimba wami wembetse timphetfu netincwencwe, sikhumba sami sigatuka cedze kubundvuke bovu etilondzeni tami." 
Job7:6 “Emalanga ami agijima njengembane, efike ekugcineni asangasenalo litsemba." 
Job7:7 Khumbula, mane ukhumbule, Nkulunkulu, kutsi imphilo yami ayisilo lutfo, kodvwa ngumphefumulo nje, emehlo ami akasayiwuphindza akubone kujabula." 
Job7:8 Liso lelingibonako nyalo, alisayiwuphindza lingibone futsi. Uyawungifuna, kodvwa ngiyawube ngingasekho." 
Job7:9 Njengelifu lelinyamalalako ligcina lingasekho, unjalo-ke nemuntfu losaya ethuneni, akaphindzi abuye." 
Job7:10 Ngeke aphindze abuyele endlini yakhe, indzawo yakhe ayisayiwuphindza imati." 
Job7:11 “Ngako ngingeke ngithule, ngitawukhuluma ngikuletinhlungu temoya wami, ngikhonone kulobumunyu bemphefumulo wami." 
Job7:12 Ngilwandle yini mine, nome ngingumkhoma waselwandle yini, kutsi sewungaze uhlale ungigadzile?" 
Job7:13 Nangicabanga ngembhedze wami kutsi utangidvudvuta neluhlaka lwami kutsi lutawupholisa iminjunju," 
Job7:14 wena ngulapho ungesabisa kakhulu khona ngemaphupho akho, ungetfuse ngemibono yakho," 
Job7:15 sengize nginconota kwekhanywa ngimane ngife sekunalomtimba wami lengikuwo. 
Job7:16 Sengiyayeya imphilo yami. Ngingamane ngingete ngaphila iminyaka leminyenti. Ngiyekele ngisale ngedvwa, emalanga ami akasesilo lutfo kimi." 
Job7:17 “Uyini umuntfu kutsi ungadzimate umnakekele kangaka nekutsi ungaze umnake kangaka," 
Job7:18 ngekutsi umvakashele onkhe malanga ekuseni, umvivinye ngawo onkhe ematfuba?" 
Job7:19 Ungeke yini sewumane unginike litfutjana ngike ngehlise liphukuphuku? 
Job7:20 Nangabe ngonile, ngenteni kuwe, wena Mlondvoloti webantfu? Wenteleni kutsi ngibe yinkoyoyo yakho? Wenteleni kutsi ngibe ngumtfwalo kuwe?" 
Job7:21 Awuticoleli ngani tiphambuko tami, utsetselele tono tami? Ngobe mine sengitawulala elutfulini masinyane; maye, utase uphenye sewungifuna mine ngingasekho!”" 
Job8:1 Kwase kuphendvula Bildadi, umShuhi, watsi:" 
Job8:2 “Kutawuze kube ngunini solomane ukhuluma tintfo letinje? Emavi akho atikhatsa nje temoya lohhushako. 
Job8:3 Nkulunkulu uyawuguculela yini umtsetfo wakhe lolungile? Somandla uyayiguculela yini intfo lelungile? 
Job8:4 Kungahle kube bantfwabakho kukhona labakonile kuNkulunkulu, wase ubajezisa ngalokufanele sono sabo." 
Job8:5 Kodvwa wena nawungabuka kuNkulunkulu, utincengele kuSomandla," 
Job8:6 futsi nangabe wena umsulwa ungcwele, ngisho nanyalo angasukuma yena akumele, akubuyisele endzaweni yakho lefanele wena." 
Job8:7 Konkhe loku lokukulahlekele bekuyawuba lite kakhulu, nase kucatsaniswa naloku bewungakunikwa nguNkulunkulu kamuva." 
Job8:8 “Buta titukulwane takucala, uvisise kuto kutsi boyisemkhulu babefundzani," 
Job8:9 ngobe tsine sitelwe itolo loku, kute lesikwatiko, netinsuku tetfu tekuhamba lapha emhlabeni tisitfunti nje." 
Job8:10 Tingete takufundzisa yini tikutjele? Tingete tawakhipha yini emavi laphuma ekuhlakanipheni kwato? 
Job8:11 Sitfombo sephaphira singakhula yini sibe sidze, nasingakamili echaphotini? Umhlanga wona ungakhula yini, nakute emanti?" 
Job8:12 Kutsi kusakhula kahle kungakagawulwa nangumuntfu, bese kusheshe kuyabuna kwendlula ngisho tjani imbala." 
Job8:13 Sinjalo-ke siphetfo sabo bonkhe labafulatsela Nkulunkulu, liphela kanjalo-ke litsemba lemuntfu longakholwa." 
Job8:14 Loko lakwetsembako kulihobosha nje, loko labeke kuko litsemba kunjengendlu yebulembu." 
Job8:15 Utsi nakatsi ubambelela kuko, kuwe kanye naye, nakatsi weyama kuko, akumsimisi." 
Job8:16 Umuntfu lonjalo ufanana nesitjalo lesiniselwa kahle kantsi siselangeni, senabisela imiliba yaso kuyo yonkhe insimi." 
Job8:17 Situngeletela timphandze taso encunjini yematje, setame kufuna indzawo lapho emkhatsini walamatje." 
Job8:18 Sitsi singasishulwa lapha kulamatje, kwawona lamatje, lebeseyeme kuwo, asiphike atsi: ‘Cha, angikwati mine wena.’" 
Job8:19 Ngempela imphilo yaso iyabuna ife, bese kutsi lapho kulomhlabatsi waso kumile lesinye silimo." 
Job8:20 “Ecinisweni Nkulunkulu akamlahli umuntfu lomsulwa, futsi akaticinisi tandla tebantfu labenta bubi." 
Job8:21 Noko umlomo wakho uyakuwugcwalisa ngeluhleko, netindzebe temlomo wakho atigcwalise ngekumemeta ngenjabulo." 
Job8:22 Titsa takho tiyakwembatsiswa ngemahloni. Emakhaya alababi akasayiwubuye abonwe.” 
Job9:1 Wase uyaphendvula Jobe watsi: 
Job9:2 “Empeleni ngiyati kutsi loku kuliciniso. Kodvwa umuntfu loludzaka lolubolako angaba ngulolungile kanjani embikwaNkulunkulu? 
Job9:3 Umuntfu nome abengafisa kuphindzilitana naye, abengeke akhone kuphendvula ngisho munye emibutweni yakhe leyinkhulungwane." 
Job9:4 Kuhlakanipha kwaNkulunkulu kujulile, emandla akhe abanti kakhulu. Ngubani nje lowake wacinisa inhloko kuye, wachubeka waphumelela angulote sici?" 
Job9:5 Ugudlukisa tintsaba nato tingakwati loko, atigubuncelise ngentfukutselo yakhe." 
Job9:6 Unyikanyisa umhlaba netisekelo tawo, tinsika tawo tichachatele." 
Job9:7 Ukhuluma nelilanga kutsi lingakhanyi, lingete laphuma, usibekela kukhanya kwetinkhanyeti." 
Job9:8 Yena yedvwa wendlala emazulu, anyatsele emagagasi elwandle." 
Job9:9 Nguye uMdali weliBhele, neweMtsentse, neweSilimela, newetinkhanyeti taseningizimu." 
Job9:10 Wenta tigemegeme letingaphenyeki, netimangaliso letingeke setibalwe ngumuntfu." 
Job9:11 Nome endlula ngakimi, ngingeke ngimbone, nakendlula ngendlela yami, ngingeke ngimuve." 
Job9:12 Nakukhona lamhlwitsako, ngubani longaba nemandla ekummisa? Ngubani kona longambuta atsi: ‘Wentani?’" 
Job9:13 Nkulunkulu akajiki angatfukutsela, ngisho nemabutfo akaRahabi akhotsama etinyaweni takhe." 
Job9:14 “Mine-ke ngingaphindzilitana kanjani nalonjalo? Ngingawatfolaphi wona emavi ekuncakulisana naye? 
Job9:15 Nome bengingaba msulwa kangaka, bengiyawubate imphendvulo kuye. Lebengingakwenta nje bengingamane ngitincengele kuye, ngilale tibutsa kuMehluleli wami, ngicele umusa wakhe." 
Job9:16 Ngisho nome bengingambita avume ete, angiboni kutsi abengangilalela." 
Job9:17 Abenganginyatsela ngesangcotfo, andzise emanceba ami ngaphandle kwesizatfu." 
Job9:18 Abengeke angivumele ngiphindze ngitfole umphefumulo wami, kodvwa abeyawungifumbela ngekudzabuka nje." 
Job9:19 Nangabe kukhulunywa ngetemandla, unemandla! Nangabe kukhulunywa ngetekulunga, ngubani longahle abhejelane naye?" 
Job9:20 Ngisho nome bengimsulwa, umlomo wami bewungangilahla. Nome ngabe bengingenakusoleka, bewutakutsi nginelicala." 
Job9:21 “Ngisho naloku ngimsulwa nje, ngingenasici, anginandzaba nalomtimba wami. Kwamine ngiyayeya imphilo yami." 
Job9:22 Mine sekuyangifananela nje, ngiko nje ngitsi: ‘Ubhubhisa labalungile nalababi.’" 
Job9:23 Nangabe inhlupheko iletsa kufa ngekushesha, uyabahleka labamsulwa, nabaphelelwa litsemba." 
Job9:24 Live naliniketelwe etandleni tebantfu lababi, emehlo ebehluleli balo uyawaphumphutsekisa. Nakungesiye, ngubani-ke?" 
Job9:25 “Emalanga ami agijima ashiye inyosi, andiza abaleke angasakuboni nakancane nje lokujabulisako." 
Job9:26 Endlula ngelihubo njengemikhumbi yetitfombo tephaphira, nanjengelusweti lusukela kudla kwalo lokuphansi luphatima njengembane." 
Job9:27 Kube ngitsi: ‘Ngitawukhohlwa ngalokukhonona kwami, ngitawujika nasebusweni ngimandzatele,’" 
Job9:28 nanyalo ngisatfutfumela ngako konkhe lokuhlupheka kwami, ngobe ngiyati kutsi Nkulunkulu ngeke asho kutsi ngimsulwa embikwakhe." 
Job9:29 Njengobe vele sengitfolakele nginelicala-ke, ngisahluphekelani, ngihluphekele lite?" 
Job9:30 Ngisho nome bengingatigeza ngensipho, netandla tami ngitigeze ngasota wekugeza," 
Job9:31 Nkulunkulu abetangifaka emgodzini weludzaka lwekungcola, kuze ngisho netimphahla tami tingenyanye." 
Job9:32 “Nkulunkulu akasiye umuntfu njengami kutsi bengingaze ngiphendvulane naye, nekutsi bengingabukana naye buso nebuso enkhundleni." 
Job9:33 Kube mane bekungaba nemlamuli emkhatsini wetfu, kube abengabeka sandla sakhe etikwetfu sobabili," 
Job9:34 umuntfu labengesusa umzaca waNkulunkulu kimi, kuze kwesabisa kwakhe kungabe kusangetfusa." 
Job9:35 Nami-ke bengingakhuluma ngingasamesabi, kodvwa njengobe kunjena nje kimi, ngingeke.”" 
Job10:1 “Seyiyangicansula yona lemphilo yami. Ngako-ke ngitawusola ngenkhululeko, ngikhulume ngiphumisele bumunyu bemphefumulo wami." 
Job10:2 Ngitawutsi kuNkulunkulu: Ungangilahli, kodvwa ngitjele kutsi cala lini longibeka lona." 
Job10:3 Kuyakujabulisa yini wena lokungicindzetela, nekwedzelela umsebenti wetandla takho, ulibale kumamatsekiswa ngemacebo lentiwa ngulababi?" 
Job10:4 Kantsi wena ubuka ngemehlo enyama yini? Kantsi nawe ubuka njengobe kubona umuntfu wemhlaba yini? 
Job10:5 Emalanga akho anjengewemuntfu wemhlaba yini? Yona leminyaka yakho injengeyemuntfu wemhlaba yini," 
Job10:6 kutsi ungalibala kutakululana nemaphutsa ami nje, nekutfungatsana netono tami?" 
Job10:7 Nawe wati kahle nje kutsi anginacala, nekutsi kute nalongahle angisindzise esandleni sakho." 
Job10:8 “Tandla takho tangeluka, tangibumba. Senguwe njalo lotangibhubhisa futsi?" 
Job10:9 Khumbula kutsi nguwe lowangibumba njengelibumba, senguwe njalo lotangibuyisela elutfulini futsi?" 
Job10:10 Akusiwe yini lowangitfulula njengelubisi, wangiphehla njengelibhotela?" 
Job10:11 Akusiwe yini lowangembatsisa ngesikhumba nangetinyama, wangeluka ndzawonye ngematsambo nangemisipha?" 
Job10:12 Wanginika kuphila, wangentela umusa, nangekungilondvolota kwakho welusa umoya wami." 
Job10:13 “Kodvwa loku wakufihla enhlitiyweni yakho, futsi ngiyati kutsi loku kwakusenhlitiyweni yakho kutsi:" 
Job10:14 Kube ngake ngona, ngabe wawungibukile, futsi bewungeke ungiyekele ungangijezisi." 
Job10:15 Nako kimi nangabe ngingulomubi! Nome ngabe anginacala, bengingeke ngiyetfwale inhloko yami, ngobe ngigcwele emahloni, kuhlupheka kwami kuyangicwilisa." 
Job10:16 Nangitsi ngiphakamisa inhloko yami, wena ungihoshobela ungifunise kwelibhubesi, uphindze futsi ungihluphe ngetigemegeme temandla akho lesabekako." 
Job10:17 Uyabandzisa bofakazi labemelana nami, wandzise nentfukutselo yakho kimi, utfumele emabutfo ngemabutfo lemelana nami." 
Job10:18 “Wawungikhiphelani kwasesiswini? Kube ngamane ngafa ngisengakabonwa nangulinye liso. 
Job10:19 Kube ngafane ngangete ngaba khona, nome ngavele ngayiswa emadlizeni." 
Job10:20 Lamalanga ami lambalwa asengakapheli yini? Ase umane ungishiye ngedvwa, kumbe ngingamane sengitfole litfutjana lekujabula," 
Job10:21 ngisengakayi eveni lengingasoze ngabuya kulo, lekulive lelusizi nelebumnyama lobuphatsekako," 
Job10:22 yebo, live lebumnyama lobukhulukati, live lelitfunti lelikhulu nenhlakanhlaka, lapho kukhanya kwakhona kufanana nebumnyama.”" 
Job11:1 Sofari, umNama, waphendvula, watsi:" 
Job11:2 “Onkhe lamavi kufanele angaphendvulwa yini? Lomuntfu lokhuluma kangaka angatsetselelwa yini? 
Job11:3 Lenkhulumo yakho lelite ingabathulisa yini bantfu bangabe basakhuluma? Kufanele ungabe usekhutwa yini wena nawukhuluma emavi ekuphukuta? 
Job11:4 Ukhuluma kuNkulunkulu utsi: ‘Timfundziso tami atinasici, futsi ngimsulwa kuwe.’" 
Job11:5 Maye, ngifisa shangatsi Nkulunkulu angakhuluma, avule umlomo wakhe akuphendvule." 
Job11:6 Shangatsi angembula kuwe timfihlakalo tekuhlakanipha, ngobe kuhlakanipha kweliciniso kukabili. Yati loku: Kutsi Nkulunkulu akakujezisi ngangekona kwakho." 
Job11:7 “Ungakucondza yini kujula kwetimfihlakalo taNkulunkulu? Ungafinyelela yini emikhawulweni yaSomandla? 
Job11:8 Kuphakeme kunemazulu; yini nje longayenta? Kujule kwendlula indzawo yalabafile; yini nje longayati? 
Job11:9 Silinganiso sako sidze kunemhlaba, futsi sibanti kwendlula lwandle." 
Job11:10 “Nangefika lapha akuhhodlele ejele, akubitele ekugwetjweni, ngubani longamelana naye?" 
Job11:11 Ngempela uyabati bantfu labangemacili, kantsi futsi nakabona lokubi, akakutsatseli yini tinyatselo?" 
Job11:12 Indvodza lesilima iyawucala kuba ngulehlakaniphile, mhlazana imbongolo yesiganga itala umuntfu." 
Job11:13 “Noko nawunikela inhlitiyo yakho ngalokuphelele kuye, welulele tandla takho, ukhuleke, utinikele kuye," 
Job11:14 nawulahla sono lesisesandleni sakho, ungavumi nekutsi bubi buhlale ekhaya lakho," 
Job11:15 uyawuhamba ngetigi, ungabi nemahloni, utakuma, usime, ungesabi lutfo." 
Job11:16 Nakanjani, kuhlupheka kwakho utakukhohlwa, ukukhumbule njengemanti lake ageleta embikwakho," 
Job11:17 kuphila kutawukhanya kwendlule imini, bese kutsi bumnyama bufanane nekukhanya kwasekuseni." 
Job11:18 Uyawuhlala uphephile, ngobe kunelitsemba, uyawutsi nawucalata nasemaceleni akho, utfole kuphumula kwakho." 
Job11:19 Uyawucambalala phansi kubete lokwesabisako; labanyenti bayawucela lusito kuwe. 
Job11:20 Kodvwa emehlo alababi ayawukwehluleka kubona, ingabikho ngisho nendlela yekubaleka. Litsemba labo seliyawuba kufa.”" 
Job12:1 Jobe waphendvula watsi: 
Job12:2 “Vele, kuyabonakala kutsi nine nibantfu, kuhlakanipha kuyakufa nani!" 
Job12:3 Kodvwa nami nginengcondvo njengani, kute lenincono ngako kunami. Ngubani nje longatati tonkhe letintfo?" 
Job12:4 Sengiyinhlekisa ngisho nakubangani bami, lite nome Nkulunkulu angiphendvula nangikhala kuye, ngaba yintfo yekuhlekwa nje, lite nome ngilungile futsi ngingenacala." 
Job12:5 Bantfu labahleti kahle abamnaki lohluphekile, yena lowo lobisha ekuhluphekeni." 
Job12:6 Emakhaya etigebengu akaphazanyiswa lutfo, nalabo labacunula Nkulunkulu baphephile, yebo, labo labaphetse nkulunkulu wabo ngetandla tabo." 
Job12:7 “Kodvwa hamba ubute etilwaneni, titakufundzisa, nome ubute tinyoni telizulu, titakutjela." 
Job12:8 Khuluma kuwo umhlaba, utakufundzisa; buta nasetinhlantini taselwandle, titakwatisa." 
Job12:9 Ngukuphi emkhatsini wako konkhe loku lokungati kutsi konkhe loku kwentiwa nguSimakadze? 
Job12:10 Kuphila kwato tonkhe tidalwa kusesandleni sakhe, kanjalo nemiphefumulo yabo bonkhe bantfu bemhlaba." 
Job12:11 Indlebe ayikuva yini lokukhulunywako, njengobe nelulwimi lukunambitsa kudla?" 
Job12:12 Kuhlakanipha akutfolakali yini kulabadzala? Imphilo lendze ayikuletsi yini kucondza? 
Job12:13 “Kuhlakanipha nemandla kwaNkulunkulu, kweluleka nekucondza kwakhe." 
Job12:14 Loko lokubhidlitwe nguye, kute longaphindze akwakhe kabusha, umuntfu lamfake ejele angeke akhululwe ngumuntfu." 
Job12:15 Nakabamba imvula kuba nesomiso, utsi angawayekela lamanti, ente umonakalo." 
Job12:16 Emandla nekuncoba kwaNkulunkulu, umkhohliswa nemkhohlisi, bobabili bakhe." 
Job12:17 Wenta babusi batiphatsise kwetilima, ente behluleli babe tilima." 
Job12:18 Ukhumula emakhosi emajiva awo ebukhosi, awegabise tindophi tekubopha tigcili netiboshwa." 
Job12:19 Wenta baphristi bahambe bate tembatfo, aketule bantfu bebasetikhundleni sikhatsi lesidze." 
Job12:20 Ubindzisa beluleki labetsembekile, esuse inhlakanipho yebaholi." 
Job12:21 Utfululela lihlazo kulabahloniphekile, abalahlise phansi tikhali labanemandla ekulwa." 
Job12:22 Wembula tintfo letijulile tebumnyama, aletse ematfunti lamnyama kakhulu ekukhanyeni." 
Job12:23 Wenta tive tibe tinkhulu, aphindze atibhubhise, wandzisa tive, aphindze atisakate." 
Job12:24 Babusi betive temhlaba ubemuka kuhlakanipha, abayekele bazulazule ehlane bangayiboni indlela," 
Job12:25 badvukute ebumnyameni nekukhanya kungekho, abente badzayitele njengetidzakwa.”" 
Job13:1 “Emehlo ami akubonile konkhe loku, netindlebe tami tikuvile takucondza loku." 
Job13:2 Lenikwatiko nine nami ngiyakwati, anincono ngalutfo kunami." 
Job13:3 Kodvwa mine ngifisa kukhuluma kuSomandla, nekuphikisana naNkulunkulu ngalendzaba yami." 
Job13:4 Noko, nine ningibhoca ngemanga, nonkhe nifanana netinyanga, kantsi anikwati kwelapha!" 
Job13:5 Kube mane nonkhe niyabindza, loko bekungaba kuhlakanipha kini." 
Job13:6 Ase nilalele naku lengitakukhuluma, nive kutsi ngitsini ngemlomo wami." 
Job13:7 Ingabe lobubi nibukhulumela Nkulunkulu yini? Yona lenkhohliso niyikhuluma egameni lakhe yini? 
Job13:8 Netama kumvikela yini? Ningayimelela yini indzaba yaNkulunkulu? 
Job13:9 Kunganihambela kahle yini nakanganihlolisisa? Ningamkhohlisa yini njengobe nikhohlisa bantfu? 
Job13:10 Nakanjani Nkulunkulu utanidalula, nangabe nikhetsana ngasese." 
Job13:11 Inkhatimulo yakhe ingeke yini inesabise? Lulaka lwakhe lungeke yini lwehlele etikwenu? 
Job13:12 Loku lenikukhulumako kungumbhedvo nje, netivikelo tenu titivikelo telibumba nje." 
Job13:13 “Ase nibindze, kukhulume mine, ningiyekele ngehlelwe nome ngayini." 
Job13:14 Ngitifakelani engotini ngekutsatsa imphilo yami ngiyiphatse ngesandla? 
Job13:15 Nome angangibulala, noko ngitakwetsembela kuye. Nakanjani ngitatikhulumela embikwakhe ngetindlela tami." 
Job13:16 Ngempela, loko kungahle kunginike siciniseko semphumelelo yami, ngobe kute umuntfu longamesabi Nkulunkulu longahle asondzele kuye." 
Job13:17 Lalelisisani kahle emavi ami; tindlebe tenu atikutsatse loku lengikushoko. 
Job13:18 Manje njengobe sengiyilungisile indzaba yami, ngiyati kutsi kute lengikonile." 
Job13:19 Ngubani nje longangibeka licala? Nakunjalo, ngitawubindza ngife." 
Job13:20 “Awu, Nkulunkulu, ngicela ungiphe nati tintfo letimbili, khona-ke ngingeke ngibhace embikwakho:" 
Job13:21 Susa sandla sakho kimi, uyekele kungetfusa ngetesabiso takho." 
Job13:22 Ngibite, mine ngitawube sengiyaphendvula, nome-ke angikhulume, wena bese uyaphendvula." 
Job13:23 Tingakhi tiphambuko netono lese ngitentile? Ngikhombise licala lami nesono sami. 
Job13:24 Ubufihlelani buso bakho, ungitsatse njengesitsa sakho?" 
Job13:25 Ungalivisa yini buhlungu licembe leliphephukako? Ungacoshana yini nemakhoba lomile? 
Job13:26 Ungibeka emacala lamatima, ungetfwese emacala etono lengatenta ngisemusha." 
Job13:27 Tinyawo tami utinkinka ngetinketane, uticaphele tonkhe tinyatselo tami lengititsatsako, ngekubeka timphawu entsendzeni yetinyawo tami." 
Job13:28 “Ngako umuntfu uyadleka njengentfo lebolako, nanjengendvwangu ledliwa ngumvunya.”" 
Job14:1 “Umuntfu lotelwe ngumfati unemalangana nje lambalwa ekuphila, nawo agcwele lusizi." 
Job14:2 Ubhahela njengembali, bese uyabuna, akakhonsi, usheshe anyamalale njengesitfunti." 
Job14:3 Ungawabeka yini emehlo akho entfweni lenjengami? Kona ungangiletsa yini embikwakho utengehlulela? 
Job14:4 Ngubani longakhipha lokuhlantekile kulokungakahlanteki? Kute! 
Job14:5 Emalanga ekuphila kwemuntfu asancunywa, nelinani letinyanga tekuphila kwakhe walimisa; kwajutjwa ngisho nemikhawulo yakhe langeke ayengce." 
Job14:6 Ngako ungamnaki, mshiye yedvwana, abale ema-awa onkhe emalanga njengesisebenti lesicashiwe." 
Job14:7 “Nangabe sihlahla sesijutjiwe, likhona litsemba lekutsi singahle siphindze sihlume futsi, kantsi nalawo mahlumela aso angeke abune." 
Job14:8 Timphandze taso tingaguga emhlabatsini nesiphunti saso sife lapha phansi," 
Job14:9 noko ngekuva umswakama wemanti siyahluma, kumile emahlumela njengesihlahla." 
Job14:10 Kodvwa umuntfu uyafa angcwatjwe, kube kuphela kwakhe, kutsi kungaphuma umphefumulo kube kuphela kwakhe." 
Job14:11 Njengobe emanti anyamalala elwandle, nanjengobe nesihlambo semfula siyahamuka some," 
Job14:12 umuntfu ulala kanjalo-ke angabe asavuka, kuyawuze kwendlule emazulu; yebo, umuntfu angeke aphaphame, futsi ngeke avuke ekufeni kwakhe." 
Job14:13 “Ngifisa shangatsi ungangifihla ethuneni, ungibhacise khona kuze kwendlule intfukutselo yakho! Nawungamane nje ungincumele sikhatsi, ungikhumbule!" 
Job14:14 Nangabe umuntfu afa, uyawuphindze aphile yini? Kuwo onkhe emalanga ekusebenta kwami kamatima ngiyakuma kuze kufike kuvuseleleka kwami." 
Job14:15 Uyawungibita, mine ngikuphendvule. Uyawufisa kubona leso sidalwa lesentiwa tandla takho." 
Job14:16 Uyawutibala tonkhe tinyatselo tami lengititsatsako, kodvwa awuyikungibamba umbalo ngenca yetono tami." 
Job14:17 Tiphambuko tami uyawutivalela esikhwameni; sono sami uyawusisibekela. 
Job14:18 “Kodvwa njengentsaba lekhukhulekako ibhidlike, nanjengelidvwala lelisuswa endzaweni yalo," 
Job14:19 nanjengobe emanti agugisa litje, nesihhuhhula semvula sikhukhula umhlaba, kanjalo nelitsemba lemuntfu wena ulibulala, life nya." 
Job14:20 Umuntfu umehlula kube kanye, esweleke, ugucula buso bakhe, bese uyamcosha." 
Job14:21 Nangabe emadvodzana akhe advunyiswa, loko yena akakwati; nangabe ahlaziswa, loko yena akakuboni." 
Job14:22 Uva buhlungu bemtimba wakhe, atikhalele yena yedvwa.”" 
Job15:1 Elifazi, umThemani, waphendvula watsi:" 
Job15:2 “Umuntfu lohlakaniphile angaphendvula yini ngaletimphendvulo letilite, agcwalise sisu sakhe ngemoya loshisako wasemphumalanga?" 
Job15:3 Kute umuntfu lohlakaniphile longakhuluma ngalendlela lelite lokhuluma ngayo nome ativikele ngalamavi laluwangala. 
Job15:4 Kodvwa ukubukela phansi kwesaba Nkulunkulu, uvimbele kuthandaza kuye." 
Job15:5 Ngulesono sakho lelesenta ukhulume kanje; sewukhetse lulwimi lwalabanebucili. 
Job15:6 Awulahlwa ngimi, kodvwa ulahlwa ngumlomo wakho, ulahlwa nguloko lokukhulunywa nguwe lucobo lwakho." 
Job15:7 “Ucabanga kutsi nguwe wedvwa yini umuntfu wekucala lowatalwa? Wena watalwa tingakabikho yini tintsaba? 
Job15:8 Uyalalela yini nangabe Nkulunkulu akhuluma nelibandla lakhe? Ucabanga kutsi kuhlakanipha kuphelela lapha kuwe yini? 
Job15:9 Yini loyatiko lesingayati tsine? Lwati luni lonalo wena lesingenalo tsine? 
Job15:10 Timphunga nalabadzala bangakitsi, yebo, emadvodza lamadzala, kwendlula uyihlo." 
Job15:11 Akukwenelisi yini kudvudvutwa nguNkulunkulu, nemagama lakhulunywe ngebunandzi kuwe?" 
Job15:12 Inhlitiyo yakho ikutfumbeleni kangaka, nemehlo akho aphashateliswa yini," 
Job15:13 kutsi ungaze utfukutselele Nkulunkulu, ukhiphe emagama lamabi kangaka ngemlomo wakho?" 
Job15:14 “Umuntfu abeyini kutsi angaba ngulohlantekile, nome-ke umuntfu lotelwe ngumfati kutsi angaba ngulolungile?" 
Job15:15 Nangabe Nkulunkulu akabetsembi labangcwele bakhe, nangabe ngisho nemazulu akahlanteki emehlweni akhe," 
Job15:16 mncane kangakanani-ke, umuntfu lomubi nalowonakele, nalonatsa bubi njengemanti?" 
Job15:17 “Lalela lapha kimi, ngitakuchazela; ngitakutjela loko lesengikubonile." 
Job15:18 Loko lasebakukhulumile labahlakaniphile labangatange babafihlele kona boyise," 
Job15:19 labo labanikwa lelive kwabate wetive labendlula emkhatsini wabo, ngikutjela kona loko, ngitsi:" 
Job15:20 Imihla yemuntfu lomubi igcwele lusizi netinhlupheko, uphila kanjalo lowo longenasisa yonkhe imihla lanikwe yona yekuphila kwakhe." 
Job15:21 “Tindlebe takhe tigcwele imisindvo lesabisako, ngesikhatsi konkhe kubukeka shangatsi kuhle, umbhubhisi ngulapho amhlasela khona." 
Job15:22 Akakholwa kutsi utawubuyela ebumnyameni. Vele, uyawuphelela enkembeni." 
Job15:23 Uhamba azulazule afunana nekudla. Uyati kutsi lilanga lebumnyama selisondzele. 
Job15:24 Buhlungu nelusizi kuyamtfutfumelisa, kumhlisibete njengenkhosi lese ihlomele kuhlasela," 
Job15:25 ngobe ugoca sibhakela, agocele Nkulunkulu, atiphakamise, achoshele Nkulunkulu," 
Job15:26 ngekwedzelela lokukhulu uhlasela Somandla ngelihawu lelicinile nalelilicinsi. 
Job15:27 Ngobe uhuce buso bakhe ngemafutsa akhe, lukhalo lwakhe lubhubuka imitsebe." 
Job15:28 “Uyawuhlala emadolobheni labhidlikile, etindlini lapho kungasahlali muntfu khona, tindlu lesetidzilike taba ngemahhinsi." 
Job15:29 Angeke asanjinga, nalomcebo wakhe ungeke ukhonse, netimphahla takhe tingeke tandze eveni." 
Job15:30 Angeke abubalekele bumnyama, lilangabi liyakubunisa emahlumela akhe, kuphefumula kwemlomo waNkulunkulu kuyawumtsatsa kumlahle khashane." 
Job15:31 Akangatiyengi ngekwetsemba loko lokulihobosha, ngobe kute layakukutfola ngaloko." 
Job15:32 Kuyawutsi sikhatsi sakhe singakefiki, akhokhelwe ngalokuphelele. Emagala akhe akayiwucwebetela, kodvwa ayawubuna." 
Job15:33 Uyawufanana nemvini lohhohlokelwe ngemagelebisi awo asengakavutfwa, abe njengesihlahla semncumo sihhohlokelwa timbali taso." 
Job15:34 Ngobe sishoshomane lesingenaNkulunkulu siyawuhlala singatseli lutfo, umlilo uyakudla emathende alabo labatsandza imidizo." 
Job15:35 Labo bantfu bemitsa inhlupheko, bese batala bubi. Sisu sabo sitilungiselela njalo emacebo.”" 
Job16:1 Jobe waphendvula, watsi:" 
Job16:2 “Setinyenti kakhulu tintfo letinjalo lengitivile. Nine nonkhe nje nibadvudvuti lababi. 
Job16:3 Kantsi akasanawuphela yini lamavi enu langumoya? Nine nihlushwa yini kangako, kutsi seningalibala kuphikisana nje ngelite?" 
Job16:4 Nami kodvwa empeleni bengingakhuluma kanjalo, kube nine beningimi nami ngingini. Nami bengingakhuluma ngimelane nani ngemavi lamanyenti, ngininikinele inhloko." 
Job16:5 Kodvwa umlomo wami bewunganikhutsata. Indvudvuto lebeyingaphinyiselwa tindzebe temlomo wami beyingaba kuphumula emiphefumulweni yenu. 
Job16:6 “Noko nome ngikhuluma, iminjunju yemahlaba lakimi ayikagobi, kantsi nome bengingatibamba, ngiticinise, ayikapheli." 
Job16:7 Awu! Empeleni, Nkulunkulu, sewungigugisile. Empeleni ubhubhise umndeni wami wonkhe." 
Job16:8 Ungibambile, loko sekube ngubona bufakazi. Nalokuba ngumkhehlekhehle kwami kuya ngekuya kuyandza kumelana nami." 
Job16:9 Ngentfukutselo yakhe Nkulunkulu uyanginwabulula, wehlukanisa sankhala nesiphanga, angibuke ngeliso lelibi." 
Job16:10 Bantfu sebasitakele ngami, nguleyo ndvodza itisholo lekutsandzako ngami, banginhlakaya sihlatsi ngekungicoloshela, sebangakhele luzungu bahlangana ngami." 
Job16:11 Nkulunkulu sewungilahlele kubantfu lababi, wangijikijela etidladleni talabangakalungi." 
Job16:12 Konkhe bekungihambela kahle, kodvwa Nkulunkulu ungibambe ngabhongwane, wangihlantisa konkhe ngekungihlifita, wangenta inkoyoyo yakhe," 
Job16:13 labanemba ngebutjoki bangikake ngala nangala. Ungijijimeta etinsweni angasenasihawu nami. Inyongo yami icitsekela phansi emhlabatsini. 
Job16:14 Ungihlaba emaphindze, angijijimete njengengwazi lehlanyiswa yinzondo." 
Job16:15 “Ngiyatililela, ngembetse tingubo temasaka. Ngihleti lapha elutfulini, ngiyabhuquta njengalosehlulekile." 
Job16:16 Sengikhale ngaze ngabheja ngaba bovu ebusweni. Emehlo ami asavuvuke aze aba naletimnyama tingobho. 
Job16:17 Kodvwa noko tandla tami timsulwa ekulweni, nemkhuleko wami uhlobile." 
Job16:18 “Awu, mhlaba, awusiyigcibedzela ingati yami. Shangatsi kukhala kwami kungete kwathuliswa." 
Job16:19 Kodvwa nanyalo ukhona fakazi wami ezulwini, ummeli wami ukulelisetulu live." 
Job16:20 Umncuseli wami ungumngani wami, ngesikhatsi emehlo ami aphophota tinyembeti kuNkulunkulu," 
Job16:21 uncengela umuntfu kuNkulunkulu, njengemuntfu ancengela umngani wakhe." 
Job16:22 “Sekusele iminyakana nje lembalwa kutsi yendlule, bese nami ngingenela indlela lekuhanjwa ngayo ungaphindzi ubuye ngayo futsi.”" 
Job17:1 “Umoya wami wephukile, emalanga ami ajutjiwe aba mafisha, sengimelwe lithuna." 
Job17:2 Ngempela bahhalatisi bangikakile, emehlo ami afanele ahlalele kubuka lokungichoshela kwabo." 
Job17:3 “Awu, Nkulunkulu! Ngihlawulele! Kodvwa ngubani nje lomunye longangimela?" 
Job17:4 Utivalile tingcondvo tabo, abasangiva nekungiva, ngako ngeke usabaphumelelisa." 
Job17:5 Umuntfu ujabulisa bangani bakhe ngekudla, babe bantfwabakhe bagolela timphungane emlonyeni." 
Job17:6 “Nkulunkulu sewungente inhlekisa kubo bonkhe, ngaba ngumuntfu lokhafulelwa ebusweni." 
Job17:7 Emehlo ami asaze alutfuli ngenca yebuhlungu, bungimi bonkhe bami sebusitfunti nje." 
Job17:8 Bantfu labacotfo sebamangele ngalendzaba yami, labangenacala bavukela laba labangamesabi Nkulunkulu." 
Job17:9 Noko, labangcwele batawubambelela etindleleni tabo, nalabo labatandla tabo tingenacala lalutfo batawuchubeka babe nemandla lamasha." 
Job17:10 “Kodvwa ase nibuye lapha nonkhe, ase netame futsi! Ngingeke ngitfole ngisho namunye lohlakaniphile emkhatsini wenu." 
Job17:11 Emalanga ami asendlulile, tinhloso tami setephukile, kanjalo tifiso tenhlitiyo yami tehlulekile." 
Job17:12 Lamadvodza lawa agucula busuku bube yimini, kutsi ekhatsi nebusuku batsi bona: ‘Sekuyasa.’" 
Job17:13 Kube-ke likhaya lami lebekulitsemba lami lekugcina bekulithuna, kube-ke bengendlele licansi lami ebumnyameni," 
Job17:14 kube bengingatsi kulokubola: ‘Wena ungubabe,’ nasetimphetfwini ngitsi: ‘Wena ungumake,’ nome: ‘Ungudzadzewetfu,’" 
Job17:15 ngabe likuphi litsemba lami? Ngubani nje longalibona litsemba lami? 
Job17:16 Litakwehla yini liye emasangweni ekufa? Sitakwehlela elutfulini kanyekanye yini?” 
Job18:1 Wase uyaphendvula-ke Bildadi, umShuhi, watsi:" 
Job18:2 “Utawuticedza nini letinkhulumo? Ase ubuyise ingcondvo, sitabe sesiyakhuluma-ke." 
Job18:3 Wentiwa yini lokutsi usitsatse njengetinkhomo nje, shangatsi tsine sesitilima takho?" 
Job18:4 Wena ngobe nguwe lotidzabula ube ticucu ngalokutfukutsela kwakho, usho kutsi sekungalahlwa wonkhe lomhlaba ngenca yakho nje wedvwana? Nome-ke usho kutsi sale kusimuka emadvwala asuswe etindzaweni tawo?" 
Job18:5 “Sibane salomubi sicinyiwe, lilangabi lemlilo wakhe alisavutsi." 
Job18:6 Kukhanya kwasekhaya lakhe sekubumnyama; sibane lesiseceleni kwakhe siyacisha. 
Job18:7 Emandla etinyatselo takhe asayancipha; emacebo akhe asamjika phansi. 
Job18:8 Netinyawo takhe setimkhaceke elugibeni, sewubatse uyazubalata luyamtongoletela." 
Job18:9 Lugibe selumbambe ngesitsendze sakhe, sifu simntfonyile akasatsi khwasha." 
Job18:10 Bambophele lifindvo endleleni yakhe leyenile, lugibe lusemkhondvweni wakhe." 
Job18:11 Tesabiso timetfusa ndzawana tonkhe, timhleli etitsendzeni." 
Job18:12 Inhlekelele ilambele yena, inhlekelele ikhamisele yena, nakatsi nje uyawa." 
Job18:13 Itakudla sikhumba sakhe, litubulo lekufa lichobote ematsambo etitfo temtimba wakhe." 
Job18:14 Ukhishiwe ekuvikelekeni kwasekhaya lakhe, washuciswa wamikiswa enkhosini yekufa." 
Job18:15 Ekhaya lakhe sekubusela umlilo, sibabule lesivutsako sisakatwe lapho ahlala khona." 
Job18:16 Timphandze takhe tiyoma lapha ngaphansi kwakhe, nemagala akhe asayabuna lapha ngetulu." 
Job18:17 Kukhunjulwa kwakhe sekuyafiphala kulomhlaba, akasenabito lapha emhlabeni." 
Job18:18 Sewucoshiwe ekukhanyeni wayiswa ebumnyameni, ulahliwe futsi lapha kulomhlaba." 
Job18:19 Akasenabantfwana, nabatukulu sewute emkhatsini webantfu bakubo; kute insali lapho ake wahlala khona." 
Job18:20 Emadvodza asenshonalanga asemangele ngalesehlakalo sakhe; emadvodza asemphumalanga abanjwe kwesaba. 
Job18:21 Ngempela injalo indzawo lapho kuhlala lomubi khona, lena yindzawo lehlala umuntfu longatani naNkulunkulu.”" 
Job19:1 Jobe wase uyaphendvula, watsi:" 
Job19:2 “Nitangivisa buhlungu kuze kube ngunini, solo ningishushumbisa ngemavi labuhlungu?" 
Job19:3 Sengemahlandla lalishumi nyalo solomane ningitsela ngetinhlamba, nite nemahloni ekungetfuka." 
Job19:4 Nangabe kuliciniso phela kutsi ngedukile, lelo phutsa liphutsa lami ngedvwana." 
Job19:5 Nangabe ngempela ningatiphakamisa, nitente ncono kunami, nisebentise lesehlakalo lesingehlele kutsi nimelane nami," 
Job19:6 yatini-ke kutsi nguNkulunkulu longonile, wangigigela ngelugibe lwakhe." 
Job19:7 “Naloku ngikhala: ‘Ngimi lengoniwe!’ Kodvwa angiphendvulwa; naloku ngicela lusito, kute kwetsembeka." 
Job19:8 Utivalile tindlela tami, entela kutsi ngingakhoni kwendlula, wembatsise tindlela tami ngebumnyama." 
Job19:9 Ungembule kuhlonipheka kwami, wesusa umchele wami enhloko yami." 
Job19:10 Ungidladlabula ngala nangala ngize ngingabikho, uzuphuna litsemba lami njengelukhula." 
Job19:11 Lulaka lwakhe luyangivutsela, ungibala kanye netitsa takhe." 
Job19:12 Emabutfo akhe ayashuca atengihlasela, akha tindvundvuma tekungivimbetela, akambe atungeleta likhaya lami." 
Job19:13 “Ungehlukanise nebazalwane bami, bangigucukela, sengehlukene nalabo bengetayelene nabo." 
Job19:14 Tihlobo tami tingishiyile, bangani bami bangikhohliwe." 
Job19:15 Tivakasheli tasekhaya kami setiyangiphika kutsi tiyangati; nesisebenti lesisikati sasekhaya kami sesitsi ngisihambi, sebangitsatsa njengemhambuma." 
Job19:16 Nome ngitsi ngibita sisebenti sami, asisasabeli, nome sengisicela mine, ngisincenga ngemlomo wami." 
Job19:17 Umphefumulo wami sewuyanuka kumfati wami, kubomnaketfu sengiyenyanyeka." 
Job19:18 Ngisho nekwebafanyana lokuncane sekuyangedzelela, nangitsi ngiyachamuka, bachwebana ngami bahleke." 
Job19:19 Bonkhe bangani bami lebengitsi bevakala ekhaleni sebayacansuka ngami; labo labatsandzekako kimi sebangigucukele. 
Job19:20 Sengingumbambo tiyabalwa, ngisindze ngekulambisa." 
Job19:21 “Mane sale ningihawukela, bangani bami, mane sale nihawukela mine, sandla saNkulunkulu singinhlakayile." 
Job19:22 Ningishophelani, nani nilingise Nkulunkulu lolibele kucoshana nami? Anisenakweneliseka yini kani ngalokubola kwesikhumba semtimba wami?" 
Job19:23 “Awu! Kube fane lamagama ami lengiwakhulumako abengabhalwa phansi, kube fane abengabhalwa encwadzini legocotwako," 
Job19:24 kube fane abengacoshwa ngelusungulo emtfofini, nome acoshwe edvwaleni laphakadze naphakadze." 
Job19:25 Kodvwa mine ngiyati kutsi uMhlengi wami uyaphila, nekutsi ekugcineni utakuma etikwalomhlaba." 
Job19:26 Ngisho nome umtimba wami sewubhujisiwe, kodvwa noko emtimbeni wami ngiyawumbona Nkulunkulu." 
Job19:27 Mine cobo lwami ngiyawumbona ngewami emehlo, mine lo, hhayi lomunye. Maye, inhlitiyo yami seyiyamlangatelela!" 
Job19:28 “Naningatsi: ‘Siyawumkhandzelwa ngubani, njengaloku imphandze yayo yonkhe lenhlupheko ikuye?’" 
Job19:29 Kufanele nani nesabe inkemba, ngobe lulaka lwakhe luyakwehlisa sijeziso ngayo inkemba, ngulapho niyawufundza nicondze khona kutsi kukhona kwehlulelwa.”" 
Job20:1 Sofari, umNama, wase uyaphendvula watsi:" 
Job20:2 “Ngihlushwa ngimicabango yami letsi angiphendvule nami, ngobe sengiphatamiseke kakhulu." 
Job20:3 Ngiva emagama layinhlamba kimi, ngiko nje ingcondvo yami seyitsi angitiphendvulele." 
Job20:4 “Empeleni nawe uyati kutsi bekunjani, kwakadzeni nje, kusukela nakubunjwa umuntfu emhlabeni," 
Job20:5 kutsi kujabula kwalababi kwesikhashana nje, nekutfokota kwalabangenaNkulunkulu kuba kwesikhashana nje." 
Job20:6 Nome kuphakama kwalomubi kuze kuphikelele emazulwini nje, nenhloko yakhe itsi ayitsintse emafu," 
Job20:7 uyawubhubha kokuphela njengemangcoliso akhe; labo lababeke bambona bayawubutana, batsi: ‘Uphi?’" 
Job20:8 Njengeliphupho uyandiza angaphindzi atfolakale, anyamalaliswe njengembono wasebusuku." 
Job20:9 Liso lelalike lambona alisayiwuphindze limbone futsi. Indzawo yakhe ingeke iphindze imbone. 
Job20:10 Bantfwabakhe kufanele bahlawule kulabamphofu, tandla takhe kufanele tibuyisele umcebo wakhe." 
Job20:11 Emandla ebusha lagcwele ematsanjeni akhe ayawulala kanye naye elutfulini. 
Job20:12 “Naloku umonakalo unongotela emlonyeni wakhe, nome awufihla ngaphansi kwelulwimi lwakhe nje," 
Job20:13 naloku angeke akumele nje kuwukhiphela ngephandle, alibele kuvalela lomonakalo emlonyeni wakhe," 
Job20:14 kodvwa lokudla kwakhe kutaba munyu esiswini sakhe, kutawugucuka kube sihlungu setinyoka sekungekhatsi ematfunjini akhe." 
Job20:15 Utabukhafula bonkhe lobunjinga labumita, Nkulunkulu utamhlantisa bonkhe lapha esiswini sakhe." 
Job20:16 Utawumunya lesihlungu setinyoka; abulawe ngematinyo elibululu. 
Job20:17 Angeke atfokote ngemifudlana nemifula legeleta luju nelulata. 
Job20:18 Loko lakushikashikanelako uyawukubuyisa konkhe angakadli lutfo lwako. Akasenayidla intalo yako konkhe lokusebenta kwakhe lokungaka lakwentile. 
Job20:19 Ngobe ubacindzetele labamphofu, wabashiya beswele, ubadle netindlu tabo langazange asatakhe." 
Job20:20 “Ngempela akayikuba nako kuphumula kwemphefumulo ekulangateleni kwakhe. Angeke akhone kutisindzisa kwayena ngalomcebo wakhe. 
Job20:21 Sekute nalokuncane lokusele yena langakudla, bunjinga bakhe ngeke buphumelele bume." 
Job20:22 Asesekutamaseni kwakhe lusizi luyawumhlasela, emandla lamakhulu elusizi ayawumehlela." 
Job20:23 Uyawutsi nase agcwalise umkhaba wakhe, Nkulunkulu ehlisele intfukutselo yakhe etikwakhe, ehlisele nemvula yemijijimeto yakhe etikwakhe." 
Job20:24 Nome abalekela silimato sensimbi, umcibisholo welitfusi uyakumhlaba." 
Job20:25 Uyakuwudvoncula emhlane wakhe, kudla kwawo kuphume esibindzini, kwesaba kuyawumehlela." 
Job20:26 Bumnyama lobuphatsekako bumlalele endleleni bufune umcebo wakhe. Umlilo longakavutselwa uyakumshwabudzela umcedze, ukudle konkhe lokusele ekhaya kakhe." 
Job20:27 Emazulu ayawulenekela lilanga licala lakhe, umhlaba nawo uyawumvukela indlwabane." 
Job20:28 Sikhukhula siyakwemukisa likhaya lakhe, emagagasi alitfumbe ngelilanga lelulaka lwaNkulunkulu." 
Job20:29 Sinjalo-ke siphetfo Nkulunkulu lasabele lababi, lifa lelingulona balibekelwa nguNkulunkulu.”" 
Job21:1 Jobe waphendvula, watsi:" 
Job21:2 “Lalelisisani lamavi ami, nimane ningidvudvute ngaloko." 
Job21:3 Ngibeketeleleni nangikhuluma, ngitsi ngingakhuluma, bese niyachubeka nekuphukuta." 
Job21:4 “Kusola kwami kucondzene nemuntfu yini? Kwentiwa yini kutsi ngingakhoni kubeketela? 
Job21:5 Bukani mine nimangale, nibambe wangentasi." 
Job21:6 Nangicabanga ngaloko, ngifikelwa kwesaba, kutfutfumela kubambe umtimba wami." 
Job21:7 Kwentiwa yini kutsi lababi baphile sikhatsi lesidze, bakhule baze baguge, baphindze babe nemandla lamakhulu?" 
Job21:8 Babona bantfwababo baphumelela, babone ngisho nebatukulu babo." 
Job21:9 Emakhaya abo avikelekile, akanako kwesaba. Indvuku yaNkulunkulu ayikho etikwabo." 
Job21:10 Tinkhomati tabo atilatelwa, ngobe tinkunzi tabo tiyatalisa." 
Job21:11 Bakhipha bantfwana babo njengemhlambi. Bantfwana babo bayajabula bagidze. 
Job21:12 Bahlabelela ngekuhambisana nemafahlawane, nemahabhu, batijabulise ngekudlala imintjingozi." 
Job21:13 Timphilo tabo baticitsa ngekunaka umcebo, behlela endzaweni yalabafile ngekuthula." 
Job21:14 Noko bakhuluma kuNkulunkulu, batsi: ‘Ase uyekele tsine! Site sifiso sekwati tindlela takho." 
Job21:15 Ngubani yena loSomandla kutsi singakhonta yena? Yini nje lesingayitfola ngekuthandaza kuye?’ 
Job21:16 Kodvwa umnotfo wabo awukho etandleni tabo, ngako ngiyatecwaya teluleko talababi." 
Job21:17 “Kukangakhi nje sibane salababi sicinywa? Ngukangakhi kona lababi behlelwa sehlakalo? Nkulunkulu uke abajezise ngentfukutselo yini? 
Job21:18 Kukangakhi bafanana netinhlanga emoyeni, babe njengemakhoba lapheshulwa sivunguvungu?" 
Job21:19 Kutsiwa: ‘Nkulunkulu ujezisa bantfwana ngenca yetono letentiwa nguyise.’ Cha! Nkulunkulu akajezise toni cobo lwato, kuze titewukwati kahle." 
Job21:20 Lomubi akatibonele ngemehlo akhe kubhujiswa kwakhe, atinatsele yena lulaka lwaSomandla." 
Job21:21 Ngobe unandzabani nemndeni lawushiya ngemuva, nakufika kuphela kwetinsuku tekuphila kwakhe?" 
Job21:22 “Ukhona yini umuntfu longafundzisa Nkulunkulu lwati? Ngobe yena wehlulela ngisho nalabangetulu kwabo bonkhe. 
Job21:23 Lomunye ufa asacine kahle kakhulu, aphephe waze watinta ngalokuphelele, kantsi futsi ukhululekile," 
Job21:24 umtimba wakhe uphatseke kahle, nematsambo akhe agcwele umnkantja." 
Job21:25 Lomunye ufa anelusizi emphefumulweni, angazange sekativele nome ngabe yini lemnandzi." 
Job21:26 Bobabili balala kanyekanye elutfulini, netimphetfu tibahlasela ngalokufananako bobabili." 
Job21:27 “Ngati kahle kutsi nicabangani, ngisho nemacebo lebeningahle ningone ngawo." 
Job21:28 Nitsi: ‘Iphi-ke manje lendlu yalomuntfu lomkhulu, aphi emathende lapho lababi bebahlala khona?’" 
Job21:29 Nake nababuta yini labatihambi? Anizange niyinake yini imibiko lababuya nayo," 
Job21:30 yekutsi lomubi uyacolelwa ngelilanga lenhlekelele nekutsi uyakhululeka ngelilanga lelulaka? 
Job21:31 Ngubani longasola simo sakhe embikwakhe? Ngubani lomkhokhelako ngaloko lakwentile? 
Job21:32 Uyetfwalwa ayiswe edlizeni, lithuna lakhe lihlala ligadziwe." 
Job21:33 Lenhlabatsi yesigodzi iyanongotela kuye, bonkhe bantfu balandzela yena, sicumbi lesikhulu sihamba embikwakhe." 
Job21:34 “Ngako-ke ningangidvudvuta kanjani ngalenkhulumo yenu lengumbhedvo? Kute nakunye kwetimphendvulo tenu lokusasele ngaphandle kwemacebo odvwa nje.” 
Job22:1 Elifazi, umThemani, waphendvula, watsi:" 
Job22:2 “Umuntfu angaba ngilo yini lusito kuNkulunkulu? Umuntfu lohlakaniphile yena angaba lusito yini kuye? 
Job22:3 Njabulo yini lebeyingatfolwa nguSomandla kube bewulungile? Abetawubuyelwa yini kube tindlela takho betimsulwa? 
Job22:4 Kungenca yekwesaba kwakho Nkulunkulu yini lokutsi akutsetsise, akubeke emacala?" 
Job22:5 Bubi bakho abubukhulu yini? Tono takho tinaso yini siphetfo? 
Job22:6 Wafuna sibambiso kubomnakenu ngendlovu yangena ngaphandle kwesizatfu, wahlubula labamphofu tembatfo tabo, wabashiya bangcunu." 
Job22:7 Labadzangele awuzange ubanatsise emanti, nalabalambile wabema kudla," 
Job22:8 noko wawungumuntfu lonemandla nalonelive, ungumuntfu lohloniphekile lohlala kulo." 
Job22:9 Wahambisa bafelokati yabayaba, wapitjita emandla alabatintsandzane." 
Job22:10 Ngiko nje tonkhe tingibe tikutungeletile, netingoti tikwetfusa kangaka," 
Job22:11 ngiko nje kumnyama kuze utsi ungetiwubona, netikhukhula temfula tikusibekela." 
Job22:12 “Nkulunkulu akahlali yini ekuphakameni kwelizulu? Ase ubuke kutsi tinkhanyeti tiphakeme kangakanani! 
Job22:13 Noko wena utsi: ‘Nkulunkulu watini? Wehlulela akulobumnyama lobunjena yini? 
Job22:14 Emafu lamnyama ayamsibekela, kuze angasiboni asahamba antontomela etulu emazulwini.’" 
Job22:15 Usetawuhamba yini ngalendlela lendzala leyayihamba bantfu lababi? 
Job22:16 Bakhukhuleka, sikhatsi sabo sisengakefiki, netisekelo tabo takhukhuleka." 
Job22:17 Bakhuluma kuNkulunkulu batsi: ‘Ase usiyekele! Somandla angasentani tsine?’ 
Job22:18 Noko bekunguye labegcwalise tindlu tabo ngetintfo letinhle, ngako ngima bucalu neteluleko talababi." 
Job22:19 “Labalungile bajabula, nabakubona kubhujiswa kwabo, labangenacala babaphukuta batsi:" 
Job22:20 ‘Impela titsa tetfu tibhujisiwe, nemlilo umita bunjinga bato.’" 
Job22:21 “Titfobe kuNkulunkulu, ube nekuthula naye, kuphumelela kuyakuta kuwe ngaleyo ndlela." 
Job22:22 Yemukela imfundziso lephuma emlonyeni wakhe, emavi akhe uwabeke enhlitiyweni yakho." 
Job22:23 Nawubuyela kuSomandla, utawusitakala: Nawususa bubi, ububeke khashane nendlu yakho," 
Job22:24 utsatse nalamatje laligugu uwalahle elutfulini, igolide yakho yase-Ofiri uyilahle emadvwaleni asetigodzini," 
Job22:25 Somandla-ke uyakuba yigolide yakho, isiliva yakho yelikhetselo lelisembili." 
Job22:26 Impela, Somandla uyakuba kujabula kwakho, wenyusele buso bakho kuNkulunkulu." 
Job22:27 Uyawuthandaza kuye, naye akuve, bese ugcwalisa tetsembiso takho." 
Job22:28 Konkhe loncuma kutsi ukwente kuyawukwenteka, nekukhanya kukhanye etindleleni takho." 
Job22:29 Kodvwa Nkulunkulu uyabehlisa labo labatigcabhako, amsindzise umuntfu lotitfobako." 
Job22:30 Umuntfu lonelicala uyakumkhulula, amkhulule ngawe, nangabe tandla takho timhlophe.”" 
Job23:1 Jobe waphendvula, watsi:" 
Job23:2 “Nalamuhla loku ngisakhala kakhulu, ngobe sandla saNkulunkulu simatima kimi, lite nome ngibubula." 
Job23:3 Kube mane bengati kutsi ngingamtfola kuphi, kube mane benginemandla ekufika lapho ahlala khona!" 
Job23:4 Bengiyawubeka indzaba yami embikwakhe, umlomo wami utfulule onkhe emavi ekutivikela." 
Job23:5 Bengiyawutfola kutsi utangiphendvula kanjani, ngicabangisise kutsi utawutsini." 
Job23:6 Abetawumelana nami ngemandla akhe lamakhulu yini? Cha, abengeke angibeke licala." 
Job23:7 Abeyawubona naye kutsi umelene nemuntfu lowetsembekile, nakanjani kumehluleli wami bengitawutfolakala ngite licala." 
Job23:8 “Kodvwa nangiya emphumalanga, akekho lapho; nangiya enshonalanga, nalapho angimtfoli." 
Job23:9 Nasebenta enyakatfo, angimboni; nasaya eningizimu, angimfanisi ngisho nekumfanisa." 
Job23:10 Kodvwa yena uyayati indlela lengiyitsatsako; utawutsi angangivivinya, ngiphume sengiyigolide." 
Job23:11 Tinyawo tami tilandzela edvutane netinyatselo takhe. Ngihamba endleleni yakhe, ngingete ngaphambuka." 
Job23:12 Angikesuki emiyalweni yetindzebe takhe. Emavi emlomo wakhe ngiwente aba ligugu kwendlula kudla kwami kwemalanga onkhe. 
Job23:13 “Kodvwa nasancumile yena yedvwa, ngubani longamelana naye? Wenta loko lakutsandzako." 
Job23:14 Ufeza loko lasakuncumile ngami; usenaletinyenti tinhloso letinjalo lasetigcinile. 
Job23:15 Kungako nje ngitfutfumela embikwakhe; nangicabanga ngako konkhe loku, ngiyamesaba." 
Job23:16 Nkulunkulu wente inhlitiyo yami yadzinwa; Somandla ungitfutfumelisile. 
Job23:17 Noko bumnyama abukangibindzisi; yebo, bumnyama lobuphatsekako lobungimbonye buso abukangibindzisi.”" 
Job24:1 “Somandla akatimisi ngani tikhatsi tekwehlulela? Kwentiwa yini kutsi labo labamatiko bangabi nalo lwati ngetikhatsi takhe? 
Job24:2 Bantfu bayatikhweshisa tikhonkhwane teminyele, belusele khona imihlambi yabo yekwebiwa." 
Job24:3 Bacosha imbongolo yentsandzane, batsatse nenkhabi yemfelokati ibe sibambiso." 
Job24:4 Bakhweshisa labeswele endleleni, baphocelele bonkhe labamphofu belive kutsi babhace." 
Job24:5 Njengetimbongolo tesiganga ehlane, labamphofu bayazulazula bafunane nekudla ehlane, kute lenye indzawo lapho bangatfolela bantfwababo khona kudla." 
Job24:6 Babutsa kudla kwetifuyo emahlangeni, bakhwimite etivinini talababi." 
Job24:7 Ngenca yekweswela kwekwembatsa, balala bangcunu busuku bonkhe; kute labangakwembatsa nakumakhata." 
Job24:8 Banetfwa babe manti timvula temagcuma, banamatsele emadvwaleni, ngobe beswele indlu." 
Job24:9 Umntfwana longenayise uyahlutfulwa ebeleni, luswane lwalomphofu lutsatselwe kubhadala sikwelede." 
Job24:10 Ngenca yekweswela kwekwembatsa, bahamba ngcunu, betfwala tinyandza, kodvwa bajinge babulawe yindlala." 
Job24:11 Bafihlita titselo temincumo etibebesini, bahlikihle ngematje ekuhluta liwayini; noko bajinge babulawe koma." 
Job24:12 Kuquma kwalabafako kuvakala edolobheni, nemiphefumulo yalabalimele ikhalela kusitwa. Kodvwa Nkulunkulu kute lambeka licala ngaloko lokubi lokwentiwe." 
Job24:13 “Bakhona labo labamelene nekukhanya, labangatati tindlela tako, nalabangahlali etindleleni tako." 
Job24:14 Kutsi kungahlwa, umbulali avuke, abulale labamphofu nalabeswele; ebusuku uhamba eba, agcekeza tindlu njengelisela." 
Job24:15 Liso lesiphingi licaphela bumnyama, sicabange sitsi: ‘Kute lotangibona,’ sihlala ngekufihla buso baso." 
Job24:16 Nase kumnyama emadvodza agcekeza angene etindlini, kodvwa emini ativalela endlini, akevani nekukhanya."
