Job24:17 Ngobe kubo bonkhe bumnyama lobukhulu ngusekuseni ngeluvivi, batente bangani netesabiso tebumnyama.”" 
Job24:18 “Bantfu labanjalo bangemagwebu lantanta emantini, sabelo sabo sicalekisiwe eveni, khona kutabate loya etivinini." 
Job24:19 Njengobe kushisa nesomiso kuhlwitsa sitfwatfwa lesincibilikile, kanjalo nelithuna liyabahlwitsa labo labonako." 
Job24:20 Sibeletfo siyabakhohlwa, badliwe timphetfu; lababi abasakhunjulwa, kodvwa babhidlika njengesihlahla lesibolile." 
Job24:21 Bagagadlela inyumba lengenamntfwana, nakumfelokati abakhombisi musa." 
Job24:22 Kodvwa Nkulunkulu ngemandla akhe uyabahohobisa labo labanemandla, nome bangahlala batinte, noko abanasiciniseko ngekuphila kwabo." 
Job24:23 Angabenta bativele kuphumula lokuphephile, kodvwa emehlo akhe abuka tindlela tabo." 
Job24:24 Kwesikhashana nje bayaphakanyiswa banotse, emvakwaloko sebayanyamalala, bayatfotjiswa, batsatfwe njengabo bonkhe, basikwe njengesikhwebu eluhlangeni." 
Job24:25 “Nangabe akunjalo, ngubani longasho kutsi nginemanga, anciphise emavi ami awente lite?”" 
Job25:1 Bildadi, umShuhi, waphendvula, watsi:" 
Job25:2 “Ligunya nekwesabeka kwaNkulunkulu losungula kuthula etulu emazulwini. 
Job25:3 Kukhona yini longabala emabutfo akhe? Kukhona yini lokungafiki kuye kukhanya kwakhe? 
Job25:4 Pho, umuntfu angaba ngulolungile kanjani kuNkulunkulu? Umuntfu lotelwe ngumfati angaba ngulohlantekile kanjani?" 
Job25:5 Nangabe ngisho nenyanga ingakhanyi, nangabe ngisho netinkhanyeti tingakahlanteki emehlweni akhe," 
Job25:6 kakhulu kangakanani-ke umuntfu loyimphehla, yebo, indvodzana yemuntfu losibungu nje kuphela!”" 
Job26:1 Jobe waphendvula, watsi:" 
Job26:2 “Maye, wena ulusito kulobutsakatsaka! Maye, wena uwusindzisile lomkhono bewute emandla!" 
Job26:3 Maye, wena umyale wamcondzisa lomuntfu longakahlakaniphi! Maye, ukukhombisile kucondza kwakho!" 
Job26:4 Usitwe ngubani wena kutsi ukhulume lamavi? Wabani lomoya lokhulume ngemlomo wakho? 
Job26:5 “Labafile baselusizini lolukhulu kabi, labo labangaphansi kwemanti nako konkhe lokukuwo." 
Job26:6 Kufa kungcunu embikwaNkulunkulu; imbhubhiso ayikafihleki kuye. 
Job26:7 Wendlala inyakatfo emkhatsini longenalutfo, alengise umhlaba eteni." 
Job26:8 Ugocota emanti emafini akhe, noko lawo manti akavuti kulamafu." 
Job26:9 Inyanga ledvulungene uyayisitsa, endlale lifu lakhe etikwayo." 
Job26:10 Udvweba umnyele wemkhatsi etikwemanti, kutsi kube ngumnyele wekukhanya nebumnyama." 
Job26:11 Tinsika tasezulwini tiyatfutfumela, timangaliswe kutsetsa kwakhe." 
Job26:12 Ngemandla akhe wathulisa lwandle, ngekuhlakanipha kwakhe wagawula Rahabi waba ticucu." 
Job26:13 Ngekuphefumula kwakhe emazulu akhanya, angabi nalutfo; sandla sakhe sayigwaza inyoka lentjuzako." 
Job26:14 Lawa ngemacentselo nje emisebenti yakhe. Maye, lokukhulunywa ngaye sikuva kalufifi! Ngubani nje longakucondza kudvuma kwemandla akhe?”" 
Job27:1 Jobe wachubeka nenkhulumo yakhe, watsi:" 
Job27:2 “Kuphila kwaNkulunkulu, lotsetse lilungelo lami, yena unguSomandla lowente kutsi nginambitse lusizi lwemphefumulo wami," 
Job27:3 yingci kuphila nakusekhona kimi, nemoya waNkulunkulu usesemakhaleni ami," 
Job27:4 tindzebe tami tingeke tikukhulume lokubi, nelulwimi lwami lungeke luwacale emanga." 
Job27:5 Ngingeke ngivume kutsi loko lenikushoko kuliciniso, ngiyawuze ngife ngingakehlukani nebucotfo bami." 
Job27:6 Ngitawunamatsela kulokulunga kwami, futsi ngingeke ngikuvumele kutsi kusuke kimi. Nembeza wami angeke angisole, yingci nangisaphila." 
Job27:7 “Shangatsi titsa tami tingaba njengalababi, nalabaphambene nami babe njengalabangakalungi." 
Job27:8 Ngobe liyini litsemba lalongamesabi Nkulunkulu, nangabe asasusiwe, naNkulunkulu asatsatsa kuphila kwakhe?" 
Job27:9 Nkulunkulu utakuva yini kukhala kwakhe, nasahlaselwa lusizi nenhlupheko?" 
Job27:10 Uyawutijabulisa yini ngaSomandla? Uyawulibita ngaso sonkhe sikhatsi yini libito laNkulunkulu? 
Job27:11 “Ngitanifundzisa ngemandla aNkulunkulu; ngingeke ngitifihle tindlela taSomandla. 
Job27:12 Nani nonkhe matfupha nikubonile loku. Pho, niwukhulumelani lombhedvo?”" 
Job27:13 “Nasi-ke siphetfo semuntfu lomubi lasabelwa nguNkulunkulu; lifa lebacindzeteli labalemukela kuSomandla: 
Job27:14 Nome bantfwabakhe bangaba banyenti, noko bayawuphelela enkembeni, netitukulwane takhe tingeke tibe nekudla lokwenele." 
Job27:15 Sifo siyawuyicotfula insali yakhe, nebafelokati babo bangeke babalilele." 
Job27:16 Nome ngabe ubutsisa ticumbi tesiliva kube shangatsi lutfuli, abutsise tembatfo njengeticumbi telibumba," 
Job27:17 letimphahla letibutsiswa libibi tiyakwembatfwa ngulabalungile, kutsi labangenacala behlukaniselane lesiliva yakhe." 
Job27:18 Indlu layakhako ifanana nendlu yebulembu, yebo, ifanana nelichugwana lelakhiwe ngumlindzi." 
Job27:19 Lowo muntfu ulala anjingile, kodvwa angaphindzi abe njalo, nakavula emehlo akhe akhandze sekute lutfo." 
Job27:20 Kutfutfumela kumgabadzela njengetikhukhula, sivunguvungu simkhukhule sihambe naye ebusuku." 
Job27:21 Umoya wangasemphumalanga uyametfwala uhambe naye; uyamphephula umsuse kuleyo ndzawo yakhe. 
Job27:22 Lomoya utijikijela etikwakhe ungasenamusa kuye, agijime ashiye inyosi abalekela emandla awo." 
Job27:23 Ushaya tandla umhleke lusulu; uyamhhewula umsuse endzaweni yakhe.” 
Job28:1 “Ukhona umgodzi wekutapa isiliva, yebo, ikhona nendzawo lapho kucengisiswa khona igolide." 
Job28:2 Insimbi imbiwa emhlabatsini, nelitfusi lincibilikiswa likhishwe etjeni lalo." 
Job28:3 Umuntfu uyabucedza bumnyama, uphenyisisa aze afinyelele nasetingonini temhlaba, afunana nelitje lensimbi ebumnyameni lobukhulukati." 
Job28:4 Umba umgodzi loshonako, khashane kabi nalapho kuhlala khona bantfu, lapho kungasahambi khona bantfu; khashane kakhulu nebantfu, ulenga khona ajikite." 
Job28:5 Umhlaba, lapho kuphuma khona kudla, uyaguculwa lapha ngaphansi kube shangatsi ngungemlilo;" 
Job28:6 isafire iphuma emadvwaleni awo, nelutfuli lwawo lucuketse tigaca tegolide." 
Job28:7 Kute ngisho nome linye lingce leliwatiko lowo mgudvu lofihlakele, ngisho neliso lalohheya imbala aliwati." 
Job28:8 Tilwane letinkhulu letitigabatisa ngemandla ato atilubeki lunyawo lwato kulowo mgudvu; kute libhubesi lelizulela khona. 
Job28:9 “Umuntfu welula sandla sakhe, abhidlite lidvwala kusuke tinhlase, timphandze tetintsaba tihlale ebaleni." 
Job28:10 Umba imihume emadvwaleni, liso lakhe liwabone onkhe ematje laligugu." 
Job28:11 Uphenyisisa tiyalu tayo yonkhe imifula, avumbulule tintfo letifihlakele atibeke ebaleni." 
Job28:12 “Kodvwa kungaze kutfolakale kuphi kuhlakanipha? Kuhlalaphi kucondzisisa kahle tintfo? 
Job28:13 Umuntfu akabucondzisisi bumcoka bako, akutfolakali eveni lalabaphilako." 
Job28:14 Kujula nako kuyalandvula kutsi: ‘Akukho lapha kimi,’ nelwandle lutsi: ‘Kute lapha kimi.’" 
Job28:15 Kungeke kutsengwe ngisho nangalecengiwe igolide, ngisho nentsengo yako ingete yalinganiswa ngesiliva." 
Job28:16 Ngeke sekutsengwe ngisho nangegolide yase-Ofiri, nangelitje leliligugu i-oniksi nome emasafire." 
Job28:17 Ingeke ilinganiswe ngisho nanegolide nengilazi, futsi ngeke yenaniswe ngisho nangetintfo letiligugu tegolide." 
Job28:18 Angisaphatsi-ke ngekhorali nangelitje ijasiphi. Intsengo yekuhlakanipha iphakeme yendlula emarubi. 
Job28:19 Ngeke kulinganiswe ngisho nanethophazi yaseKushe, kungeke kutsengwe ngisho nangegolide lecengiwe." 
Job28:20 “Kantsi vele kona kuhlakanipha kuvelaphi? Kuhlalaphi kucondza tintfo kahle? 
Job28:21 Kufihlakele emehlweni ayo yonkhe intfo lephilako, kuvalelekile ngisho nasemehlweni etinyoni letindiza etulu emoyeni." 
Job28:22 Imbhubhiso nekufa kutsi: ‘Natsi sive nje emahemuhemu ako lefikile etindlebeni tetfu.’ 
Job28:23 NguNkulunkulu loyicondza kahle indlela leya kuko, futsi nguye yedvwa lowati lapho kuhlala khona kuhlakanipha." 
Job28:24 Ngobe yena ubona ekugcineni kwemhlaba, futsi yena ukubona konkhe lokulapha ngaphansi kwemtfunti welilanga." 
Job28:25 Watsi nakasungula emandla emoya, akala emanti," 
Job28:26 nakashayela imvula umtsetfo, abhola indlela yemibane yekudvuma kwelitulu," 
Job28:27 wabuka kuhlakanipha konkhe, wase uyakudvumisa, wakumisa kwaba njalo, wakuvivinya." 
Job28:28 Wase ukhuluma kumuntfu, watsi: ‘Buka la, kwesaba Nkulunkulu libito lako kuhlakanipha. Kubalekela lokubi loko kukucondza.’ ”" 
Job29:1 Jobe wachubeka nenkhulumo yakhe, watsi:" 
Job29:2 “Maye, ngiyatikhumbula tinsuku tami takucala. Ngikhalela lawa malanga, Nkulunkulu asanginakekela." 
Job29:3 Ngaleso sikhatsi sibane sakhe sasikhanyisa etikwenhloko yami, ngaloko kukhanya kwakhe ngangihamba ekukhanyeni ngisho nasebumnyameni." 
Job29:4 Maye! Leto tikhatsi nami ngisamila, bungani betfu naNkulunkulu busashisa, angibusisa kanye nemuti wami," 
Job29:5 leto tikhatsi Somandla asengakimi, nebantfwabami basesedvute nami," 
Job29:6 lapho indlela yami isacwile elulateni, nelidvwala lisatfululela kimi imifula yemafutsa emncumo!" 
Job29:7 “Ngangitsi nangisondzela ngasemasangweni elidolobha, ngitsi nangitsatsa sikhundla sami enkhundleni yelidolobha," 
Job29:8 emajaha enelele kungibona akhweshele eceleni, bese kutsi imisumphe isukume ime ngetinyawo," 
Job29:9 emadvodza lasembili angete akhuluma ambonye imilomo yawo ngetandla tawo," 
Job29:10 emavi alabahloniphekile athuliswe, tilwimi tabo tinamatsele elwangeni." 
Job29:11 Bonkhe lababengivile babekhuluma kahle ngami, nalabo lababengibonile babengincoma," 
Job29:12 ngobe ngangisindzisa labamphofu lababekhala bacele lusito kimi, netintsandzane letatite boyise lababengatisita." 
Job29:13 Umuntfu abetsi nase afa angibusise, ngangitijabulisa tinhlitiyo tebafelokati, tihlabele." 
Job29:14 Kulunga ngangikwente kwaba yingubo yami yekwembatsa, kungakhetsi muntfu kwakungusona sembatfo sami nesigcoko sami." 
Job29:15 Ngangingemehlo etimphumphutse, netinyawo talabatishosha." 
Job29:16 Nganginguyise walabeswele, ngangiyitsatsela etulu ngiyihlolisise indzaba yalosihambi eveni." 
Job29:17 Ngangiwephula ematinyo alababi, ngisindzise labo lasebababambile ngibahlwitse ematinyweni abo." 
Job29:18 “Ngangicabanga ngitsi: ‘Nami ngiyawufela ekhaya lami, emalanga ami manyenti ngangesihlabatsi saselwandle." 
Job29:19 Timphandze tami titawutfunguluta tize tifike emantini, ematolo alale emagaleni ami busuku bonkhe." 
Job29:20 Inkhatimulo yami iyawuhlala iyinsha njalo kimi, nebutjoki bami buhlale bubusha njalo esandleni sami.’" 
Job29:21 “Bantfu babengilalela ngekungetsemba lokukhulu, bathule balindzele kweluleka kwami." 
Job29:22 Ngangitsi nasengikhulumile, kungaphindzi kukhulume muntfu emvakwami, emavi ami abewela ngebunono etindlebeni tabo." 
Job29:23 Babengilindzela njengemvula, banatse emavi ami njengemvula yasentfwasahlobo." 
Job29:24 Ngangitsi nangimamatseka emehlweni abo, bangete bakukholwa kalula loko, kukhanya kwebuso bami kwakuligugu kubo." 
Job29:25 Kwakungimi labebakhetsela indlela, ngihlala emkhatsini wabo njengesikhulu sabo. Ngangihlala njengenkhosi emkhatsini wemabutfo ayo; nginjengemuntfu longumdvudvuti walabalilako.”" 
Job30:1 “Kodvwa nyalo sebahlekisa ngami, bantfu labancane kunami, boyise babo lengangingabeyisa ngingabavumeli kutsi basite tinja tami ekweluseni timvu tami." 
Job30:2 Ngangingatfolani nje ngemsebenti wetandla tabo, bantfu lababemandla abo esukile kubo?" 
Job30:3 Bondziswe kweswela nesigagadvu sendlala, bahhubhana netimphandze tetihlahla tasehlane, yebo, elugwadvule ebusuku." 
Job30:4 Babehlwatsika titselo letimunyu emahlatsini, kudla kwabo kutimphandze tesihlahla semtsanyelo." 
Job30:5 Bacoshwa kubantfu bakubo, bekhutwa njengemasela." 
Job30:6 Bacindzeteleka kutsi bayewuhlala etihosheni letomile, yebo, etihosheni letomile letingenamanti; bahlale emkhatsini wemadvwala nasemigodzini." 
Job30:7 Babebhonsa ekhatsi emahlatsini njengetimbongolo tesiganga, bahlangane ngetinhloko phasetihlahla," 
Job30:8 luhlobo lwebantfu lababi nalabalihlazo lelingachazeki, bacoshwa bakhishwa eveni." 
Job30:9 “Manje sengiyinhlekisa kumadvodzana abo, sengiyingoma kuwo; ngiyintfo yekudlala." 
Job30:10 Sebayangenyanya, bahambela khashane nami, abasesabi nekungikhafulela ebusweni." 
Job30:11 Njengobe Nkulunkulu sewungente ngaba butsakatsaka, wangenta ngaba sehluleki, bangitfobisa ngibukile." 
Job30:12 Ngesekudla sami sive siyahlasela, babekela tinyawo tami tingibe, bakha emasu ekungibhubhisa." 
Job30:13 Bavimba indlela yami, bayaphumelela ekungibhubhiseni, kantsi kute nalobasitako." 
Job30:14 Batseleka ngato tonkhe tintfunjana tenqaba batengihlasela. Bafohla lapho kubhidlike khona, batseleke ngekhatsi." 
Job30:15 Tesabiso tiyangehlula, kuhlonipheka kwami kususiwe kimi, kwaba shangatsi kupheshulwe ngumoya, kuphepha nenhlalakahle yami kunyamalale njengemafu." 
Job30:16 “Manje kuphila kwami kuyangikhweshela, emalanga eminjunju ayangintfonya." 
Job30:17 Busuku bubhobosa ematsambo ami, emahlaba ami langihhwebhako akanakuphumula." 
Job30:18 Ngemandla akhe lamakhulu Nkulunkulu ugucuka abe njengekwekwembatsa kimi. Ungibopha njengentsamo yengubo yami. 
Job30:19 Ungilahla eludzakeni, sengehliswe ngaze ngaba njengelutfuli nemlotsa." 
Job30:20 “Ngikhala kuwe, Nkulunkulu wami! Kodvwa wena awungiphendvuli. Ngiyasukuma ngime ngetinyawo, kodvwa wena umane ungibuke nje." 
Job30:21 Sewujike waba nelulaka kimi, ngemandla esandla sakho uyangihlasela." 
Job30:22 Uyangihlutfula ungijike ngemuke nemoya, ungiyekele nginhlanhlatse nesivunguvungu." 
Job30:23 Ngiyati kutsi uyawungehlisela phansi kulabafile, endzaweni lemiselwe bonkhe labaphilako." 
Job30:24 “Empeleni umhlaselelani umuntfu lobhujiswako, umuntfu longeke asatisite ngalutfo ngaphandle kwekutincengela umusa kuwe?" 
Job30:25 Angizange ngibakhalele yini bantfu labasenhluphekweni? Umphefumulo wami awuzange ubakhalele yini bantfu labamphofu? 
Job30:26 Kodvwa nangitsi ngifuna lokuhle, kusuke kufike lokubi; nangitsi ngifuna kukhanya, kusuke kuchamuke bumnyama." 
Job30:27 Inhlitiyo yami iyaphitsitela ayinako kuthula, emalanga etinhlupheko amelene nami." 
Job30:28 Ngihamba ngizula ngigcungcile, nginyukubele, ngibe ngingakafuswa lilanga, kute kimi injabulo. Ngiyasukuma emkhambatsini ngikhale, ngicela lusito." 
Job30:29 Sengigucuke ngaba ngumnakabomphungutja, ngaba ngumngani wetahhukulu." 
Job30:30 Sikhumba sami sesigucuke saba mnyama, sacecebuka; umtimba wami uyavutsa ngumkhuhlane." 
Job30:31 Lihabhu lami selilungiselelwe kulila, nemntjingozi wami sewulungiselwe umsindvo wekukhala, yebo, umsindvo wekukhala ngimemete.”" 
Job31:1 “Ngenta sivumelwane nemehlo ami kutsi ngingeke ngiyibuke ngenkhanuko intfombi. 
Job31:2 Ngabe siyini sabelo semuntfu lesiphuma kuNkulunkulu? Siyini sabelo lesilifa leliphuma etulu kuSomandla? 
Job31:3 Akusiyo yini imbhubhiso kulababi, sehlakalo kulabo labenta sono?" 
Job31:4 Akatiboni yini tindlela tami, abale tonkhe tinyatselo tami?" 
Job31:5 “Nangabe ngihamba ngekungetsembeki, nome-ke lunyawo lwami lusheshisile lwajakela emangeni," 
Job31:6 Nkulunkulu akangilinganise ngesilinganiso seliciniso, utabe sewuyatfola kutsi ngimsulwa." 
Job31:7 Nangabe tinyatselo tami tijikile emkhondvweni, nangabe inhlitiyo yami beyidvonswa ngemehlo ami, nome-ke nangabe tandla tami betingcolisiwe," 
Job31:8 nakunjalo-ke, lomunye umuntfu akadle konkhe loko bengikuhlanyele, netilimo tami atizushunwe." 
Job31:9 “Nangabe inhlitiyo yami ike yahungwa ngulomunye umfati, nome-ke ngike ngayawukhukhubala emvakwesivalo samakhelwane," 
Job31:10 nakunjalo-ke, umfati wami akahambe ayewusilela lenye indvodza, alale nalamanye emadvodza." 
Job31:11 Ngobe loko bekungaba lihlazo nendlisamahloni, sono lesifanele sehlulelwe." 
Job31:12 Lowo ngumlilo loshisa kube khona imbhubhiso, ngabe kusizuphunile sivuno sami sonkhe." 
Job31:13 “Nangabe ngingakatiphatsi njengekwemtsetfo tisebenti tami letidvuna naletisikati, natinetikhalo ngami," 
Job31:14 ngitakwenta njani, nangabe Nkulunkulu asabhekana nami ngaloko? Ngitawuphendvula ngitsini, nasengibutwa?" 
Job31:15 Akusiye yini yena lowo lowabumba mine esiswini lona lowabumba tona? Akusiye yini lowaseluka sonkhe etiswini tabomake? 
Job31:16 “Nangabe angikahlangabetani neticelo talabamphofu, nome-ke ngenta emehlo emfelokati aphophota tinyembeti," 
Job31:17 nangabe ngatigodlela mine kudla kwami, ngangete ngahlephulelana nalabatintsandzane," 
Job31:18 kodvwa ngabondla kusukela ebusheni bami, ngaba njengeyise kubo, kusukela ekutalweni kwami ngabondla bafelokati," 
Job31:19 nangabe ngake ngabukelela umuntfu afa, abulawa kweswela kwekwembatsa, nome loweswele nje angenasembatfo," 
Job31:20 inhlitiyo yakhe yangete yangibusisela kumfutfumalisa ngetimfulumane letiphuma etimvini tami," 
Job31:21 nangabe ngake ngaphakamisa sandla sami etikwaloyintsandzane, ngati kahle kutsi mine ngiyalalelwa enkhundleni," 
Job31:22 nakunjalo-ke, umkhono wami awumane uncutfuke lapha elungeni lesiphanga, awujubeke elungeni lesiphanga, ulahleke phansi." 
Job31:23 Ngobe mine ngangiyesaba kakhulu imbhubhiso levela kuNkulunkulu. Nangenca yekwesaba bukhosi bakhe nje, ngangingeke ngiyente intfo lenje." 
Job31:24 “Nangabe bengibeke litsemba lami egolideni, nome ngasho kuyo igolide lecengiwe ngatsi: ‘Wena usivikelo sami,’" 
Job31:25 nangabe ngangijatjuliswa bunjinga bami, umcebo lowawakhiwe tandla tami," 
Job31:26 nangabe nganaka lilanga ekukhanyeni kwalo nome inyeti ekuhambeni kwayo lokumangalisako," 
Job31:27 kangangekutsi inhlitiyo yami yase iyebeka ngikuhloniphe ngekwanga sandla sami," 
Job31:28 nakunjalo-ke, konkhe loko tono lokusafanele tehlulelwe, ngobe ngabe bengingaketsembeki kuNkulunkulu losetulu." 
Job31:29 “Nangabe ngajabulela sitsa sami, nasehlelwa ngulokubi, nome ngagalajela inhlupheko leyasehlela," 
Job31:30 angizange ngiwuvumele umlomo wami kutsi wone ngekutsi ngikhiphe sicalekiso simelane nemphilo yaso. 
Job31:31 Bantfu labasekhaya kami abazange sebasho yini batsi: ‘Ngubani longazange asayidle ayesutse inyama yakaJobe?’ 
Job31:32 Kodvwa kute nasinye sihambi lesake salala ngephandle. ngobe umnyango wami wawuhlala uvulekele tihambi. 
Job31:33 Ngake ngasifihla yini sono sami, njengobe kuhlale kwenta emadvodza, ngake ngalifihla yini licala lami enhlitiyweni yami?" 
Job31:34 Ngempela, angizange ngesabe kutsi bantfu batawutsini, angizange ngibindze nome ngitivalele endlini ngenca yekubesaba labo bantfu." 
Job31:35 “Awu! Kube mane kunemuntfu longangiva! Sengiyakusicilela manje kutivikela kwami. Akangiphendvule phela Somandla. Lowo longibeka licala akalibhale phansi. 
Job31:36 Empeleni bengingaletjatsa, bengingalifaka enhloko njengemchele." 
Job31:37 Bengingamlandzisa ngato tonkhe tinyatselo tami, bengingalingisa umbusi, ngicondzane naye ngco." 
Job31:38 “Nangabe live lami likhala ngami, nayo yonkhe imisedlana yalo imanti tinyembeti," 
Job31:39 nangabe bengidle titselo talo ngaphandle kwekukhokha tindleko talo, nome ngababulalisa ngendlala labo labahlala kulo," 
Job31:40 nakunjalo-ke, akuvumbuke emanyeva kulo esikhundleni sakolo; kuvumbuke lukhula esikhundleni sebhali.” Aphela lapho-ke emavi aJobe." 
Job32:1 Njengobe Jobe abeciniseke kangaka ngebumsulwa bakhe, lamadvodza lamatsatfu ase ayayekela lokulibala kwetama kumphendvula." 
Job32:2 Kodvwa Elihu, umsa waBarakheli, umBuzi, wesive sakaRamu, watfukutselela Jobe kamatima ngekutsi kube nguye lotishoko kutsi umsulwa, kungete kwasho Nkulunkulu." 
Job32:3 Wabatfukutselela labangani baJobe labatsatfu, ngobe babehlulekile kutfola sici kuJobe, kantsi phela bebakadze bamsolile." 
Job32:4 Manje-ke Elihu abesethulile yena kukhuluma naJobe, ngobe bona babebadzala kunaye." 
Job32:5 Kodvwa watsi kube abone kutsi labangani baJobe labatsatfu sebate labangahle bakusho, intfukutselo yakhe yavuka yema ngetinyawo." 
Job32:6 Ngako Elihu, umsa waBarakheli, umBuzi, wakhuluma watsi: “Ngimncane ngeminyaka, nine nibadzala; ngiko nje bengesaba ngingafuni kunitjela loko lengikwatiko mine." 
Job32:7 Ngicabange ngatsi: ‘Kukhula lokufanele kukhulume, iminyaka leminyenti lekufanele ifundzise kuhlakanipha.’" 
Job32:8 Kodvwa umoya lokumuntfu, kuphefumula kwaSomandla, lokunika umuntfu kucondza." 
Job32:9 Akusibo labadzala bodvwa labanekuhlakanipha, futsi akusibo lase bagugile bodvwa labakwatiko lokulungile." 
Job32:10 “Ngako-ke ngitsi: Lalelani kimi; nami futsi ngitanitjela loko lengikwatiko. 
Job32:11 Nginimele ngesikhatsi nisakhuluma, nganilalela nisabeka kubona kwenu ngekuhlakanipha, ngesikhatsi nisaphenya emagama." 
Job32:12 Nami nginilalele ngayo yonkhe ingcondvo yami, kodvwa kute namunye wenu lokhonile kubeka Jobe licala ngalokukhanyako, kute namunye lokhonile kuphendvula emavi akhe." 
Job32:13 Ningasho kutsi: ‘Sikutfolile kuhlakanipha, akube nguNkulunkulu lophikisa Jobe, hhayi umuntfu.’" 
Job32:14 Kodvwa Jobe emavi akhe abengakawacondzisi kimi, ngako-ke ngingeke ngimphendvule ngetinkhulumo tenu." 
Job32:15 “Sebamangele, abasenako labangakusho; sebaphelelwe ngemavi." 
Job32:16 Kufanele ngime yini, njengaloku sebathulile nje, njengaloku sebatfomekile nje nyalo bangasenamphendvulo?" 
Job32:17 Nami ngitawubeka inkhulumo yami; nami ngitawukhuluma loko lengikwatiko. 
Job32:18 Ngobe mine ngigcwele emavi, nemoya longekhatsi kwami uyangicindzetela." 
Job32:19 Lapha ngekhatsi kwami nginjengeliwayini lelivalelwe ebhodleleni, njengetikhumbasikhwama teliwayini lelisha lesetifuna kupumuka." 
Job32:20 Kufanele ngikhulume kuze ngitfole kuhhamuleka, kufanele ngivule umlomo wami ngiphendvule." 
Job32:21 Kute muntfu lengitamkhetsa, futsi kute lengitamyenga ngelite," 
Job32:22 futsi-ke kube bengiyingcweti ekuyenganeni, uMdali wami abetangisusa masinyane emhlabeni.”" 
Job33:1 “Manje-ke, Jobe, lalela nankha emavi ami, kulalele konkhe loku lengitakukhuluma." 
Job33:2 Manje-ke, sengitawucala ngikhulume, emavi ami asaselulwimini lwami." 
Job33:3 Emavi ami ngawo lakhombisa ngalokusebaleni kutsi ngicotfo enhlitiyweni, lulwimi lwami lukhuluma kona cobo loku lengikwatiko." 
Job33:4 Moya waNkulunkulu ungentile. Umphefumulo waSomandla unginika kuphila. 
Job33:5 Ngiphendvule-ke, nawungakhona, tilungiselele kubhekana nami." 
Job33:6 Mine ngifanana nawe embikwaNkulunkulu, nami ngatatjwa ebumbeni." 
Job33:7 Ngako-ke akukadzingeki kutsi ungesabe, sandla sami ngeke sibe matima etikwakho." 
Job33:8 “Nawe ukhulume nami ngikhona, ngive onkhe emavi akho, watsi:" 
Job33:9 ‘Mine ngimsulwa, anginasono; ngihlobile, anginacala." 
Job33:10 Kodvwa Nkulunkulu ungibeka licala, ungitsatsa njengesitsa sakhe." 
Job33:11 Tinyawo tami utitsekeleta ngetinketane, acaphelisise tonkhe tinyatselo tami.’" 
Job33:12 “Kodvwa ngiyakutjela ngitsi: Kuloku uyalahleka, ngobe Nkulunkulu mkhulu kunemuntfu." 
Job33:13 Manje-ke, ukhononelani kuye, ube utsi akawaphendvuli emavi emuntfu?" 
Job33:14 Ngobe Nkulunkulu uyakhuluma nome ngayiphi indlela. Kulesinye sikhatsi kuba ngulomuntfu longacondzi kutsi utsini Nkulunkulu. 
Job33:15 Ukhuluma ngemaphupho nangemibono yasebusuku, bantfu nabalele emacansini abo, badvodla butfongo etingutjeni tabo." 
Job33:16 Angakhuluma nasetindlebeni tabo, abesabise ngetecwayiso takhe." 
Job33:17 Loko ukwentela kutsi ancandze umuntfu ekwenteni tono nasekutishayeni sifuba," 
Job33:18 entela kugcina umphefumulo wakhe ungashoni emgodzini nemphilo yakhe kutsi ingabhubhi ngenkemba," 
Job33:19 nome umuntfu angeviswa buhlungu ecansini lakhe ngemahlaba nangekujabha lokungenamkhawulo kwasematsanjeni," 
Job33:20 kangangekutsi umtimba wakhe ungasakukhanuki nekudla, kunenkhetele inhlitiyo nome abuka kudla lokumnandzi kangakanani," 
Job33:21 umtimba wakhe wondze ube ngumkhehlekhehle, kutsi ematsambo awo labefihlakele bese avela ebaleni." 
Job33:22 Umphefumulo wakhe udvonseleke emgodzini, nemphilo yakhe indvonswe titfunywa tekufa." 
Job33:23 “Kantsi kube bekungaba nengilosi leme ngakuye lengumlamuleli, yinye nje enkhulungwaneni, letabotjela umuntfu kutsi yini lokubi nalokuhle," 
Job33:24 ibe nemusa kuye itsi: ‘Mane umvikele angayi emgodzini. Sengimtfolele inhlawulo,’" 
Job33:25 umtimba wakhe bese uyavuseteleka ube musha njengeweluswane, ubuyiseleke ube musha njengasebusheni bakhe." 
Job33:26 Uyathandaza kuNkulunkulu atfole umusa kuye; ubona buso baNkulunkulu ajabule aze amemete. Nkulunkulu umbuyisela esimeni sakhe sekulunga. 
Job33:27 Uyabe sewuya kubantfu, afike atsi: ‘Ngonile, ngagwegwisa loko lobekulungile, kodvwa angikakutfoli loko lebengikufanele." 
Job33:28 Uwephulile umphefumulo wami kutsi ungayi emgodzini, sengitawuhlala ngijatjuliswa kukhanya.’" 
Job33:29 “Nkulunkulu wenta tonkhe letintfo kumuntfu, kabili nome katsatfu," 
Job33:30 entela kuncandza umphefumulo wakhe ungangeni emgodzini, kuze kukhanya kwemphilo kukhanye emphilweni yakhe." 
Job33:31 Lalela la, Jobe, lalela mine. Thula, ngitabe sengiyakhuluma." 
Job33:32 Nawunako longakusho, ngiphendvule, ukhulume kakhulu, ngobe ngifuna kutsi uhlanguleke kahle." 
Job33:33 Kodvwa nawute lutfo, lalela la kimi, uthule, ngobe mine ngitakufundzisa kuhlakanipha.”" 
Job34:1 Elihu wase uyakhuluma, watsi:" 
Job34:2 “Vanini emavi ami, nine labahlakaniphile; lalelani mine, nine bantfu labafundze bagogodzela." 
Job34:3 Ngobe indlebe iyawavivinya emagama, njengobe nelulwimi lunambitsa kudla." 
Job34:4 Asitibonele nje kwatsine kutsi ngukuphi lokulungile, asifundze kanyekanye sonkhe kutsi yini lenhle." 
Job34:5 “Jobe utsi: ‘Ngimsulwa, kodvwa Nkulunkulu ungima kulunga." 
Job34:6 Naloku ngilunge kangaka, ngitsatfwa njengalonemanga, naloku ngingenacala umcibisholo wakhe uhlaba linceba lelingelapheki.’" 
Job34:7 Jobe kantsi ngumuntfu lonjani, longenayo ngisho inseketse yenhlonipho kuNkulunkulu." 
Job34:8 Uhlanganyela nalabenta lokubi, umdzibimunye nalababi," 
Job34:9 ngobe utsi: ‘Umuntfu akumsiti ngalutfo kwetama kujabulisa Nkulunkulu.’ 
Job34:10 “Ngako lalelani lapha kimi, nine bantfu labanekucondza. Akube khashane naNkulunkulu kuba ngumenti walokubi, kwenta bubi akube khashane naSomandla." 
Job34:11 Umuntfu umkhokhela njengaloku entile, ambuyisele njengalokufanele kutiphatsa kwakhe." 
Job34:12 Kumatima kucabanga kutsi Nkulunkulu angahle ente lokubi, nekutsi Somandla angaphambukisa umtsetfo." 
Job34:13 Ngubani lowambeka lapha emhlabeni kutsi awubuse? Ngubani lowamenta waba ngumphatsi wemhlaba wonkhe? 
Job34:14 Kube bekuyinhloso yakhe kususa umoya wakhe nemphefumulo wakhe," 
Job34:15 bonkhe bantfu bebangafisa kwetimphungane bafe batsi ngco, bonkhe babuyele elutfulini." 
Job34:16 “Nangabe unako kucondza, lalela lapha, lalela loko lengitakusho." 
Job34:17 Umuntfu lotondza umtsetfo angabusa yini? Ungamlahla yini longuSokulunga nalonguSomandla? 
Job34:18 Akusiye yini lolawula emakhosi atsi: ‘Aninamsebenti walutfo,’ nakulabahlonishwako atsi: ‘Nibabi,’" 
Job34:19 longakhetsi ngisho nakuto tikhulu, ngisho nakulabanjingile nalabamphofu, ngobe phela bonkhe bangumsebenti wetandla takhe?" 
Job34:20 Bafa ngekushesha lokukhulu, ekhatsi nebusuku, bantfu bayatfutfumela bafe, labanemandla besuka bangakatsintfwa ngumuntfu ngisho nangesandla sakhe." 
Job34:21 “Emehlo akhe abuka kuhamba kwemuntfu njalo, ubona tonkhe tinyatselo takhe." 
Job34:22 Kute bumnyama lobumnyama kuye, kute nelitfunti lelimnyama, lapho benti balokubi bangabhaca khona." 
Job34:23 Nkulunkulu akadzingi kube solomane aphilikishana nebantfu abavivinya, kutsi bete kuye batekwehlulelwa." 
Job34:24 Ngaphandle nje kwemibuto uvele esuse labanemandla, abeke labanye etikhundleni tabo." 
Job34:25 Ngobe uyakunaka lokwenta kwabo, ubaketula ngebusuku bunye nje kube bayaphela njalo." 
Job34:26 Uyabajezisa ngetento tabo letimbi, akwente ebaleni kubona wonkhe umuntfu," 
Job34:27 ngobe bagucuka ekulandzeleni yena, abanandzaba nanayinye nje yetindlela takhe." 
Job34:28 Babangela kutsi lokukhala kwalabamphofu kufike etindlebeni takhe, wadzimate wakuva kukhala kwalabeswele." 
Job34:29 Kodvwa kube uthulile, ngubani labengamsola? Nakangafihla buso bakhe, ngubani longambona? Noko ubusa etikwemuntfu netive ngalokufananako," 
Job34:30 kuze avimbe longenaNkulunkulu angabusi, angabekeli bantfu tingibe." 
Job34:31 “Ake ngitsi nje umuntfu utsi kuNkulunkulu: ‘Nginelicala, kodvwa ngingeke ngiphindze ngone." 
Job34:32 Ngifundzise loko lengingeke ngikubone, nangabe ngonile, ngingeke ngisaphindza ngone.’" 
Job34:33 Nkulunkulu angakuvuza yini njengekutsandza kwakho, nawala kuphendvuka? Nguwe lokufanele ukhiphe sincumo, akusimi, ngako-ke, ngitjele loko lokwatiko." 
Job34:34 “Emadvodza lanekuhlakanipha ayasho, nemadvodza lanekucondza langivako, atangitjela:" 
Job34:35 ‘Jobe ukhulunyiswa kungabi nalwati, emavi akhe eswela kucondza.’" 
Job34:36 Cabangisisani ngaloku lokukhulunywa nguJobe, ngobe uphendvula njengemuntfu lomubi longenangcondvo," 
Job34:37 wengeta buvukelambuso kulesono sakhe, ushaya tandla tendzelelo lapha emkhatsini wetfu, alibale kutsakuta, abaliselana naNkulunkulu.”" 
Job35:1 Elihu wase uyakhuluma, watsi:" 
Job35:2 “Usho kutsi kambe ngabe loku kulungile? Utsi: ‘Ngiyawuhlangulwa nguNkulunkulu.’ 
Job35:3 Kodvwa uyambuta utsi: ‘Kutangisita ngani mine loko, kona mine ngitfolani ngekuhlala ngingoni?’" 
Job35:4 “Ngitsandza kukuphendvula kuloko, wena nalabangani bakho abakanye nawe." 
Job35:5 Gucukela ngasemazulwini ubuke, bheka ngasemafini wona lasetulu kangaka kuwe." 
Job35:6 Nangabe wona wena, loko kumtsintsa ngani yena? Nangabe tono takho titinyenti, loko kumentani yena?" 
Job35:7 Nangabe ulungile, uletsani kuye, nome-ke utfolani yena esandleni sakho?" 
Job35:8 Bubi bakho buhlupha umuntfu lonjengawe, nekulunga kwakho kutsintsana nebantfu bemhlaba." 
Job35:9 “Bantfu bakhala bumayemaye ngaphansi kwemtfwalo wekucindzetelwa, bancusa kukhululwa kuwo umkhono walabanemandla." 
Job35:10 Kodvwa kute lotsi: ‘Uphi Nkulunkulu, uMdali wami, lowephana ngetingoma ebusuku," 
Job35:11 losifundzisa lokunyenti tsine kunetilwane temhlaba, asente sihlakaniphe kakhulu kunetinyoni letindiza emoyeni?’" 
Job35:12 Akaphendvuli bantfu nabakhala ngenca yekutiphakamisa kwalababi. 
Job35:13 Liciniso, Nkulunkulu akayilaleli imibhedvo yetikhalo tabo. Somandla akatinaki, njengobe tilite nje." 
Job35:14 Kangakanani-ke kutsi angalalela, nawutsi awumboni yena, kutsi nome licala lakho lisembikwakhe, wena kufanele ulindzele yena," 
Job35:15 ngetulu kwaloko, kutsi lulaka lwakhe alujezisani, futsi akanaki lutfo nalolu twi lwalokubi." 
Job35:16 Ngako-ke Jobe ukhuluma umbhedvo wodvwa nje; ulibala kutsakuta lite nje lodvwa, kodvwa abe angenalwati.”" 
Job36:1 Elihu wachubeka watsi: 
Job36:2 “Ngicela ungibeketelele kwesikhashana, ngitakukhombisa kutsi kunyenti lokusengashiwo ekumeleleni Nkulunkulu." 
Job36:3 Lwati lwami ngilulomba khashane kabi, ngitawubonakalisa kutsi Nkulunkulu, uMdali wami, ulungile." 
Job36:4 Cinisekani-ke kutsi emavi ami akasiwo emanga; lapha embikwenu kume umuntfu lohlakaniphe ngempela. 
Job36:5 “Nkulunkulu unemandla, kodvwa akabedzeleli bantfu; unemandla, futsi ucinisekile kulenhloso yakhe." 
Job36:6 Akabagcini lababi baphilile, kodvwa labamphofu uyabanika emalungelo abo." 
Job36:7 Emehlo akhe akawesusi kulabalungile, ubabeka kanye nemakhosi etihlalweni tebukhosi, abaphakamise kokuphela." 
Job36:8 Kodvwa bantfu nababoshwe ngetinketane, batsekeletwe ngetibopho tetinhlupheko," 
Job36:9 uyaye abatjele kutsi yini labayentile, kutsi bone kuye ngemabomu ngekutiphakamisa." 
Job36:10 Ubenta batfobele kwelulekwa, abayale kutsi baphendvuke ekoneni kwabo." 
Job36:11 Nabalalela bamkhonte yena, bayawuphila yonkhe imphilo yabo baphumelela neminyaka yabo beneliseka." 
Job36:12 Kodvwa nabangalaleli, bayawubhubha ngenkemba, bafe bangati nekwati." 
Job36:13 “Labangamesabi Nkulunkulu bafukamela lulaka, ngisho nome asababopha ngetinketane, abakhali bacele lusito." 
Job36:14 Bafa basebasha, bafele emkhatsini wetingwadla letindvuna letisetindlini tekukhontela tithico." 
Job36:15 Kodvwa labo labahluphekako uyabakhulula ekuhluphekeni kwabo, ukhuluma kubo basetinhlungwini tabo." 
Job36:16 “Nkulunkulu ukwephula emihlatsini yekukhatsateka, ukubeka endzaweni lebanti lengenako kubandzeteleka nome kwani, akubeke ekunetsetekeni uvele ngenhloko enaleni, lapho ungakhetsa lokutsandzako khona." 
Job36:17 Kodvwa manje sewetfwele sigwebo, lesifanele lababi, sigwebo nemtsetfocotfo sekukubambile." 
Job36:18 Caphela kutsi kubete lokuhuha ngebunjinga, ungavumi kwedukiswa tinsambansamba temidizo." 
Job36:19 Emandla akho kanye nebunjinga bakho kungakugcina yini ekutseni ungakhatsateki? 
Job36:20 Ungabukhaleli busuku kutsi buyawufika nini, sikhatsi lapho tive tonkhe tiyawubhubha tiphele." 
Job36:21 Caphela ungagucukeli kulokubi, kona lokubonakala shangatsi uyakunconota kunekuhlupheka." 
Job36:22 “Nkulunkulu uphakeme emandleni akhe, ngubani nje lofundzisa njengaye?" 
Job36:23 Ukhona yini lowake watjela Nkulunkulu kutsi kufanele enteni, nome-ke atsi: ‘Wonile’?" 
Job36:24 Khumbula-ke nawe kudvumisa imisebenti yakhe, njengaloku bantfu bahlala bahlabela ngetindvumiso." 
Job36:25 Bonkhe bantfu bemhlaba bakubonile loko, bantfu bakugolotela ngemehlo bakhashane." 
Job36:26 Maye, mkhulu Nkulunkulu! Bukhulu bakhe bungetulu kwekucondza kwetfu. Bunyenti beminyaka yakhe bungetulu kwekubala kwemuntfu." 
Job36:27 “Ukha ematfonsi emanti, acengeke abe yimvula leyehlela emifudlaneni." 
Job36:28 Emafu atfululela emhlabatsini ematfonsi awo, tihlambi tetimvula tehlele etikwebantfwana bebantfu." 
Job36:29 Ngubani nje longacondzisisa kutsi uwendlala kanjani emafu? Udvuma kanjani nje endzaweni yakhe yekuhlala? 
Job36:30 Ase ubuke nje kutsi uyisakata kanjani imibane yakhe emaceleni akhe, nekutsi ukucwilisa kanjani kujula kwetilwandle." 
Job36:31 Nguleyo ndlela-ke labusa ngayo tive, atinike inala yekudla." 
Job36:32 Ugcwalisa tandla takhe ngembane, bese uyawutjela kutsi awubaneke." 
Job36:33 Kudvuma kwakhe ngelitulu kumemetela kuta kwesihhuhhula semvula, ngobe ngisho netinkhomo tiyakumemetela kuta kwalo.”" 
Job37:1 “Ngenca yaloku ngiva shangatsi inhlitiyo yami iyagcumagcuma, isuka endzaweni yayo." 
Job37:2 Lalela! Lalela kudvuma kwelivi lakhe, nalokugedletela lokuphuma emlonyeni wakhe." 
Job37:3 Ujikijela imibane yakhe ngaphansi kwemazulu, ayitfumele emikhawulweni yonkhe yemhlaba." 
Job37:4 Emvakwaloko kuta umsindvo wekudvuma kwakhe, ubhavumula ngelivi lakhe lebukhosi. Liphimbo lakhe lingabhavumula akusali lutfo lunganyakati." 
Job37:5 Liphimbo laNkulunkulu libhavumula ngetindlela letimangalisako. Wenta tintfo letinyenti letinkhulu naletingetulu kwetingcondvo tetfu. 
Job37:6 Utjela ngcocwane atsi: ‘Yehlela emhlabeni,’ nasetihlambini tetimvula atsi: ‘Bani sihhuhhula lesinemandla.’" 
Job37:7 Usuke entela kutsi bonkhe bantfu labentile bayati imisebenti yakhe, umisa bonkhe bantfu emisebentini yabo." 
Job37:8 Tilwane tiyabhaca, tihlale emihumeni yato." 
Job37:9 Sihhushuhhushu sihoshobe siphume emgodzini waso, nelichwa liphume emoyeni lowendlulako." 
Job37:10 Kuphefumula kwaNkulunkulu kukhafula lichwa, kwente emanti abe tibhelekeca temanti lomile." 
Job37:11 Wetfwesa emafu ngemswakama, asakate imibane igcwale kuwo." 
Job37:12 Ngekuyalwa nguye iphitsitela igcwale umhlaba wonkhe jikelele, iphutfuma kwenta loko layitfume kona." 
Job37:13 Wehlisa emafu, khona atewujezisa bantfu, nome atewunisela umhlaba wakhe, akhombise lutsandvo lwakhe." 
Job37:14 “Lalela lapha, Jobe, asewume ucabange kahle ngetimanga taNkulunkulu." 
Job37:15 Uyati yini kutsi Nkulunkulu uwabusa kanjani emafu, nekutsi uyiklazisa kanjani imibane yakhe?" 
Job37:16 Uyawati yini kutsi emafu alenga kanjani eme kahle kangaka emoyeni, angadziliki, leto timangaliso takhe lowo lophelele ngelwati?" 
Job37:17 Wena muntfu loshiswa kwekwembatsa kwakho ngesikhatsi kuhhusha umoya waseningizimu uthulisa live," 
Job37:18 ungahlanganyela yini naye ekwendlaleni kwakhe sibhakabhaka lesicine njengesibuko selitfusi lelincibilikisiwe? 
Job37:19 “Sitjele kutsi sifanele sitsini kuNkulunkulu; tingcondvo tetfu timnyama, site lutfo lesingalusho kuye." 
Job37:20 Kufanele yini kutsi atjelwe kutsi nami ngifuna kukhuluma? Ukhona yini kambe umuntfu longafuna kumitwa eva? 
Job37:21 Kute umuntfu longabukana nelilanga, ebukhatikhatini balo esibhakabhakeni, emvakwekutsi umoya sewusishanyele sonkhe." 
Job37:22 Uchamuka enyakatfo ngebukhatikhati bakhe begolide, Nkulunkulu uta ngebuNkulunkulu bakhe lobesabekako." 
Job37:23 Somandla ungetulu kwemandla etfu, uphakeme ngemandla nangekulunga kwakhe; ngebukhulu bekulunga kwakhe akacindzeteli muntfu." 
Job37:24 Ngako-ke bantfu bayamhlonipha, ngobe akabanaki yini bonkhe labacabanga kutsi bahlakaniphile enhlitiyweni?”" 
Job38:1 Simakadze waphendvula Jobe asesivunguvungwini, watsi:" 
Job38:2 “Ngubani lona lokhinyabeta teluleko tami ngemavi late lwati? 
Job38:3 Bhukula-ke njengendvodza; ngitakubuta, wena ungiphendvule." 
Job38:4 “Bewukuphi wena, nangibeka sisekelo semhlaba? Ngitjele, nawukucondza loko." 
Job38:5 Ngubani labekala bukhulu bawo? Nakanjani ufanele kukwati loko! Ngubani labedvonsa intsambo yekukala nawukalwako? 
Job38:6 Tinsika tawo temiswaphi? Labekwa ngubani litje lekusimisa likona," 
Job38:7 ngesikhatsi tinkhanyeti tentsatsakusa tihlabela kanyekanye, netingilosi tonkhe tihlatjeleliswa kujabula?" 
Job38:8 “Ngubani lowavala emasango ekuvimbela lwandle, naluphuphuma, luphuma esiswini semhlaba," 
Job38:9 ngesikhatsi ngenta emafu aba yingubo yalo ngilugocota ngebumnyama lobukhulukati," 
Job38:10 ngesikhatsi ngimisa iminyele yalo, ngibeka iminyango neticabo talo," 
Job38:11 ngesikhatsi ngitsi: ‘Ungahamba ugcine lapha, ungabe usachubekela embili, emagagasi akho latigcabhako atawugcina lapha’?" 
Job38:12 “Wase wakutfuma yini kusa nome ukhombe intsatsakusa indzawo yayo? 
Job38:13 Wase wayitjela yini intsatsakusa kutsi ichwage lomhlaba, ishukumise lababi lapho babhace khona?" 
Job38:14 Kuphuma kwenhlavu yelilanga kwenta emagcuma netihosha kubonakale njengemitfungo yengubo, kukhanye njengekugcama kweluphawu ebumbeni." 
Job38:15 Kukhanya kwemini kunemandla kulababi, kubavimbela kutsi bangakwenti lokubi." 
Job38:16 “Use waya yini etiyalwini telwandle, nome uhambe ekujuleni kwelwandle?" 
Job38:17 Sewuke wakhonjiswa yini emasango ekufa? Sewuke wawabona yini emasango ematfunti ekufa? 
Job38:18 Ubucondza kahle yini bubanti bemhlaba? Ase ungitjele, nangabe uyakwati konkhe loku." 
Job38:19 “Iphi indlela leya ekhaya lekukhanya? Bona bumnyama uyabati yini kutsi buhlalaphi? 
Job38:20 Ungakumikisa yini etindzaweni tako? Uyatati yini tindlela letiya emakhaya ako? 
Job38:21 Nakanjani ufanele kukwati loko, ngobe wase utelwe! Maye, sewuwadlile emabele bo!" 
Job38:22 “Wase wangena yini etingungwini tangcocwane, nome uke watibona yini tingungu tesangcotfo," 
Job38:23 lengikugcinele tikhatsi letimatima, lekutinsuku tekulwa kanye netemphi?" 
Job38:24 Umbane lona usuke uchamuka ngakuphi, nome-ke umoya wasemphumalanga losakateka nemhlaba wonkhe usuke uchamukaphi?" 
Job38:25 Ngubani lomba imisele yetikhukhula temanti emvula, nalomba indlela yekudvuma kwelitulu," 
Job38:26 kutekunisela live lelingahlalwa ngumuntfu, lihlane kalashameshame," 
Job38:27 nekwenelisa live lelingenalutfo lihlume libe neluhlata? 
Job38:28 Imvula inaye yini uyise? Ngubani nje lotala ematfonsi ematolo? 
Job38:29 Ngcocwane uphuma esiswini sabani? Ngubani lotala sitfwatfwa emazulwini," 
Job38:30 ngesikhatsi emanti asalukhuni njengelitje, nangesikhatsi kujula kwemanti sekulidvwala?" 
Job38:31 “Ungasibophela yini ndzawonye Silimela lesimengetelako? Ungatichacha yini tintsambo teMtsala? 
Job38:32 Ungaticondzisa yini tinkhanyeti kutsi tihambe ngekugcina sikhatsi sato? Ungalikhombisa yini liBhele lelitinkhanyeti kanye netinkhanyeti talo letincane kutsi kufanele kuhambe kushonephi? 
Job38:33 Uyayati yini imitsetfo yasemazulwini? Leyo mitsetfo ungayenta yini kutsi isebente lapha emhlabeni? 
Job38:34 “Ungawamemeta yini emafu, utembese wena ngelibhudlo lemanti?" 
Job38:35 Ungayitfuma yini imibane kutsi ibaneke? Yona ingakuphendvula yini itsi: ‘Naku sesikhona’? 
Job38:36 Ngubani nje lowaphakela inhlitiyo ngekuhlakanipha nome wapha ingcondvo kucondza? 
Job38:37 Ngubani nje lohlakaniphe kangangekutsi angabala emafu? Ngubani longagoboncisa timbita temanti tasemazulwini," 
Job38:38 ngesikhatsi lutfuli luba lukhuni nemagadze emhlaba anamatselana? 
Job38:39 “Ungalitingelela yini libhubesikati kudla? Ungakwesutsisa yini kulamba kwemabhubesi," 
Job38:40 ngesikhatsi abhaca khona emihumeni yawo nome abhace khona etincumatsini? 
Job38:41 Ngubani lonika emahhwabayi kudla, ngesikhatsi emazini awo akhala kuNkulunkulu azula aswele langakudla?”" 
Job39:1 “Uyati yini kutsi timbuti tentsaba titala nini? Uyaye ubukele yini inyamatane nayitalako? 
Job39:2 Uyaye utibale yini tinyanga tato tize titale? Uyasati yini sikhatsi sato sekutala? 
Job39:3 Tiguca phansi titale bantfwabato, kuphele nemihelo yato." 
Job39:4 Emazinyane ato ayacina, akhulele etigangeni, ahambe angaphindzi abuye." 
Job39:5 “Ngubani lowenta imbongolo yesiganga kutsi ihambe ikhululekile? Ngubani lowatfukulula tindilimo tayo? 
Job39:6 Ngayinika lihlane kutsi libe likhaya layo nematsafa eluswayi kutsi abe yindzawo yayo yekuhlala. 
Job39:7 Ayihlushwa ngimisindvo yemadolobha, kantsi futsi kute nemuntfu longayifuya ayisebentise." 
Job39:8 Yehla yenyuka nemagcuma abe lidlelo layo, ifunana neluhlata lonkhe." 
Job39:9 “Inyatsi ingavuma yini kutsi uyisebentise? Ingakutsambela yini kuhlala esibayeni sakho ebusuku? 
Job39:10 Ungayifaka yini emseleni ngematomu? Ingatilima yini leto tigodzi emvakwakho? 
Job39:11 Ungawetsemba yini lamandla ayo lamakhulu? Ungawuyekelela yini umsebenti wakho lomkhulu kuyo? 
Job39:12 Ungetsembela yini kuyo kutsi ingakuletsela sivuno sakho, isibutsisele ndzawonye ebaleni lakho lekubhulela?" 
Job39:13 “Timphiko tenshi tiyaphephetela ngenca yenjabulo. Kodvwa tingeke tilinganiswe netingwabha netinsiba tadvoye. 
Job39:14 Emacandza ayo iwatalela phansi, iwafukamele ngesihlabatsi," 
Job39:15 inganaki kutsi angahle anyatseleke ngetinyawo, nekutsi tilwane tesiganga tingawafohlota." 
Job39:16 Emantjwele ayo iwaphatsa ngelunya, kube shangatsi akasiwo ayo, ayinaki nekutsi yake yahelwa yini ngawo," 
Job39:17 ngobe Nkulunkulu akazange ayiphe kuhlakanipha, nome-ke ayinike ingcondvo levulekile." 
Job39:18 Noko nayivula tinsiba tayo yentela kugijima, ivele ilihleke lusulu lihhashi nemgibeli walo." 
Job39:19 “Lihhashi uyalinika yini emandla alo, nome wembese intsamo yalo ngemdlonga?" 
Job39:20 Uyalenta yini ligcumagcume njengentsetse, ulente likhale ngendlela yekutigcabha lokutfutfumelisako?" 
Job39:21 Lihwaya phansi ngendlela leyesabekako, lijabule emandleni alo, lisukeleke naliya ekuhlaseleni emphini." 
Job39:22 Likuhleka lunya kwesaba, lingesabi lutfo; alikhweshi futsi aliyibalekeli inkemba." 
Job39:23 Umgodla wemicibisholo ukhehletela ecebeni lalo, kukanye nesikhali lesimanyatelako nesikhali lesidze." 
Job39:24 Livukwa lusinga, litsatse emabanga lamakhulu, nakukhala licilongo, kute longakhona kulimisa." 
Job39:25 Litsi licilongo lingakhala, litsi: ‘Nako-ke!’ Imphi liyiva ngeliphunga isesekhashane, liva netindvuna temphi tidla siga." 
Job39:26 “Lokuhlakanipha kwakho kuyamfundzisa yini lohheya kutsi ate akwati kundiza, endlalele timphiko takhe ngaseningizimu?" 
Job39:27 Lona lusweti lundiza ngekutjelwa nguwe yini, luze lwakhe nesidleke salo etulu?" 
Job39:28 Luhlala esiweni ngisho nasebusuku, inqaba yalo kube lufantsa lwelidvwala." 
Job39:29 Nalusuka lapho, luhamba luyewufuna kudla kwalo; emehlo alo avele akubone kusesekhashane." 
Job39:30 Bantfwabalo lubondla ngengati; lapho kunalokubulewe ngakhona, ngulapho lukhona nalo.”" 
Job40:1 Simakadze wakhuluma kuJobe, watsi:" 
Job40:2 “Lona lophikisana naSomandla angamkhombisa yini indlela? Lowo lobeka Nkulunkulu licala akamphendvule!” 
Job40:3 Jobe waphendvula Simakadze, watsi:" 
Job40:4 “Mine angikafanelwa lutfo, pho, ngingaphendvula ngitsini kuwe? Ngibeka sandla sami emlonyeni wami." 
Job40:5 Ngakhuluma kanye, kodvwa angisenamphendvulo, kabili, kodvwa angisenakusho lutfo.”" 
Job40:6 Simakadze wakhuluma kuJobe asesivunguvungwini, watsi:" 
Job40:7 “Bhukula-ke njengendvodza; ngitakubuta, wena utangiphendvula." 
Job40:8 “Ungakukhombisa yini kungalungi kwami? Ungangilahla yini ngelicala mine, khona utetitfola ungenacala wena?" 
Job40:9 Unawo yini umkhono lofanana newaNkulunkulu? Lona liphimbo lakho liyadvuma yini njengelakhe? 
Job40:10 Nakunjalo-ke, tihlobise ngekubabateka nangenkhatimulo, utembatsise ngeludvumo nangebukhosi." 
Job40:11 Khumula sikhahlo sentfukutselo yakho, bukisisa wonkhe umuntfu lotigcabhako, bese umehlisela phansi," 
Job40:12 buka bonkhe bantfu labatigcabhako, bese uyabatfobisa. Pitjita lababi lapho beme khona." 
Job40:13 Bonkhe bangcwabe ndzawonye elutfulini, sitselisa buso babo ethuneni." 
Job40:14 Nami-ke ngitakuvumela kutsi sandla sakho sangesekudla singakusindzisa. 
Job40:15 “Ase ubuke imvubu lengayidala kanye nawe, nekutsi idla tjani njengenkhabi." 
Job40:16 Maye, makhulu emandla ayo lasemilenteni! Yebo, emandla ayo asemisisheni lesetibilinini tayo!" 
Job40:17 Umsila wayo untjikita njengemsedari, netinyama temilente yayo titfungene." 
Job40:18 Ematsambo ayo ayimibhobho yelitfusi, imikhono nemilente yayo injengemigcala yensimbi." 
Job40:19 Ihamba embili etidalweni taNkulunkulu, noko uMdali wayo angabhekana nayo ngenkemba yakhe." 
Job40:20 Emagcuma ayivetela sivuno sawo, tonkhe tilwane tesiganga tidlale edvutane nayo." 
Job40:21 Ilala ngaphansi kwetihlahla temanyeva, ibhace emkhatsini wemihlanga yasechaphotini." 
Job40:22 Tihlahla temanyeva tiyifihla ematfuntini ato, itungeletwe ngemabhabhabhulomu emfula." 
Job40:23 Kuhhulukuhlela kwemanti emfula akuyetfusi, idlalisela ngekuntjweza, lite nome iJordane seyigcwele igola tintsetse." 
Job40:24 Ukhona yini longahle ayibambe ibukile, nome-ke ayetsiye abhobose likhala layo?”" 
Job41:1 “Ungamdvonsa yini Leviyathani ngelidweba? Ungalubopha yini lulwimi lwakhe ngentsambo? 
Job41:2 Ungamfaka yini siwondvo ekhaleni lakhe, nome-ke ungawubhobosa yini umhlatsi wakhe ngelidweba?" 
Job41:3 Angatincengela yini kutsi umentele umusa, nome akuncenge ngekukhuluma kamnandzi?" 
Job41:4 Sivumelwane angasenta yini nawe kutsi umtsatse abe sigcili sakho kokuphela? 
Job41:5 Ungamenta yini kutsi abe silwane lesingumnganakho njengenyoni, nome uhambe umbophe ngentsambo, khona atekujabulisa emantfombatana akho?" 
Job41:6 Labatsenga batsengise bangantjintjiselana yini ngaye? Bona bahwebi bangehlukaniselana yini ngaye? 
Job41:7 Sikhumba sakhe ungasigcwalisa yini ngabondzangumadweba nome-ke inhloko yakhe ngemadweba? 
Job41:8 Nawungake ubeke sandla sakho etikwakhe, ungeke uwukhohlwe umzabalazo wakhe, futsi ungeke ukuphindze ukwente loko." 
Job41:9 “Usuke utiyenga nawungatsi ungenta nome yini ngaye, kumbuka nje kukucedza emandla." 
Job41:10 Kute lonesibindzi sekumchukuluta. Pho, ngubani longakhona kumelana nami?" 
Job41:11 Ngubani-ke lenginelicala kuye lokungafanela kutsi ngilikhokhele? Konkhe lokungaphansi kwemazulu kwami. 
Job41:12 “Ase ngikutekele ngemilente yakhe, emandla akhe kanye nesimo sakhe lesihle." 
Job41:13 Ngubani nje longamkhumula libhantji lakhe langaphandle? Ngubani nje longamfaka ematomu? 
Job41:14 Ngubani longaqunga avule umlomo wakhe, wona lowo logcwele ematinyo akhe lesabekako?" 
Job41:15 Umhlane wakhe unemigca yemahawu lahlanganiswe ndzawonye," 
Job41:16 asondzelene lelinye kulelinye, kuze kungangeni kwasamoya emkhatsini wawo." 
Job41:17 Ahlanganiswa lelinye kulelinye, anamatselane, futsi angeke ehlukaniseke." 
Job41:18 Kutsimula kwakhe kusakata imibane yekukhanya, kantsi emehlo akhe afanana nemisebe yentsatsakusa." 
Job41:19 Ukhafula imililo ngemlomo wakhe, kusakateke tinhlase temlilo." 
Job41:20 Emakhaleni akhe kutfucuka intfutfu, kube shangatsi simoko lesiphuma ebhodweni lelibilako nalisemlilweni wetinhlanga." 
Job41:21 Kuphefumula kwakhe kuvutsela emalahle emlilo abe bovu, kulavuke emalangabi emlonyeni wakhe." 
Job41:22 Emandla ahlala entsanyeni yakhe, tesabiso timhambela embili." 
Job41:23 Imitsebe yakhe ihlangene icinile, futsi ayehlukaniseki." 
Job41:24 Sifuba sakhe silukhuni njengelidvwala, silukhuni njengelitje lekusila." 
Job41:25 Nakaphakama, labanemandla bayatfutfumela, bahlehla nyova yena asengakagadli." 
Job41:26 Inkemba legwaza yena ayenti lutfo kuye, kanjalo nesikhali, nemcibisholo kanye nemkhonto." 
Job41:27 Kuye insimbi ifanana nelutsi lwetjani, litfusi linjengelukhuni lolubolile." 
Job41:28 Imicibisholo ayimenti abaleke, ematje esidubulelo afanana nemakhoba kuye." 
Job41:29 Umshiza kuye ufanana nelutsi loluncane; kukhehleta kwelutsi lwesikhali kuyamhlekisa. 
Job41:30 Lingaphansi lakhe limagebhugebhu njengetindzengelo, kusale umvila lomkhulu eludzakeni lonjengewesihliphi sekubhula emabele." 
Job41:31 Wenta kujula kucubuke njengekubila kwelibhodo, anyakatise lwandle lube nemagwebu njengelibhodo lemafutsa." 
Job41:32 Lapho ahambe khona kusala kunemagwebu, ungaze ucabange kutsi kujula kunetinwele letimhlophe." 
Job41:33 Kute lokulingana naye emhlabeni, usidalwa lesingesabi lutfo." 
Job41:34 Utibukela phansi tonkhe tilwane letitiphakamisako, uyinkhosi yato tonkhe tilwane letinkhulu letitigabatisa ngemandla ato.”" 
Job42:1 Jobe waphendvula Simakadze, watsi:" 
Job42:2 “Ngiyati kutsi wena unemandla ekwenta konkhe, kute muntfu longaphatamisa loko lese uhlose kukwenta." 
Job42:3 Ubute watsi: ‘Ngubani yena lona longati lutfo lokhinyabete teluleko tami?’ Empeleni nami ngikhulume ngetintfo lengingaticondzi, tintfo letimangalisa kakhulu kutsi ngingatati." 
Job42:4 “Wena utsite: ‘Lalela-ke nyalo, ngitawukhuluma; ngitakubuta, wena ungiphendvule.’" 
Job42:5 Tindlebe tami setike teva ngawe, kodvwa nyalo emehlo ami asakubonile." 
Job42:6 Ngako-ke manje sengiyatenyanya, ngiyaphendvuka ngitilahla elutfulini nasemlotseni.”" 
Job42:7 Watsi Simakadze nasakhulume lamavi kuJobe, wagucukela ku-Elifazi, umThemani, watsi: “Wena nalabangani bakho lababili nginitfukutselele, ngobe anikakhulumi lokuhle ngami njengobe Jobe, inceku yami, akhulumile." 
Job42:8 Ngako-ke tsatsani tinkunzi letisikhombisa netihhanca letisikhombisa, nihambe niye kuJobe, inceku yami, nifike ninikele ngato, tibe ngumnikelo wenu wekushiswa. Jobe, inceku yami, utanithandazela, mine-ke ngitawemukela nalomthandazo wakhe nginganiphatsi kamatima njengalokufanele bulima benu. Anikakhulumi lokuhle ngami njengobe Jobe, inceku yami, akhulumile.”" 
Job42:9 Ngako Elifazi, umThemani, naBildadi, umShuhi, naSofari, umNama, benta loko Simakadze abebatjele kona; Simakadze wawemukela umthandazo waJobe." 
Job42:10 Watsi kube Jobe athandazele labangani bakhe, Simakadze wamenta wanjinga futsi; wanjinga ngalokuphindvwe kabili kunakucala." 
Job42:11 Bonkhe bomnakabo, nabodzadzewabo, nabo bonkhe lababemati kucala beta kuye badla naye endlini yakhe. Bamkhalela, bamdvudvuta kuko konkhe loko kuhlupheka Simakadze labekuletse etikwakhe; kwatsi lowo nalowo wamupha luhlavu lwesiliva kanye nendandatho yegolide." 
Job42:12 Simakadze imphilo yaJobe yamuva wayibusisa kakhulu kwengca yakucala. Abenetimvu letiti-14 000, nemakamela lati-6 000, netinkhabi letitinkhulungwane letimbili, netimbongolo letiyinkhulungwane." 
Job42:13 Abenemadvodzana lasikhombisa nemadvodzakati lamatsatfu. 
Job42:14 Libito lendvodzakati yakhe yekucala bekunguJemima, yesibili kunguKhesiya, yesitsatfu kunguKhereni Haphukhi." 
Job42:15 Kulo lonkhe live bekute besifazane lababebahle kwendlula emadvodzakati aJobe; uyise wawabela lifa kanye nebafowabo. 
Job42:16 Emvakwaloko, Jobe waphila iminyaka leli-140; waze wabona bantfwabakhe, nebantfwana bebantfwabakhe, kwaze kwayawufika esitukulwaneni sesine." 
Job42:17 Jobe wafa asamdzala, asakhulile ngeminyaka." 
Psalms1:1 Ubusisiwe umuntfu longatitsatsi teluleko tebedukisi longahlanganyeli emikhubeni yetigangi, longahlali nasemkhambatsini walabaphukuta Nkulunkulu." 
Psalms1:2 Kodvwa kujabula kwakhe kusemtsetfweni waSimakadze, uyacabanga azindle ngawo imini nebusuku." 
Psalms1:3 Unjengesihlahla lesihlanyelwe elusentseni lwemifula, sona sitsela titselo ngesikhatsi sato emacembe aso akabuni. Konkhe lakwentako kuyaphumelela." 
Psalms1:4 Lababi-ke bona abanjalo, banjengemakhoba wona lapheshulwa ngumoya." 
Psalms1:5 Ngako-ke, lababi bangeke bakhone kubhekana nesihlalo sekwehlulela, netoni tingeke tikhone kuma kanye nalabalungile bakhe." 
Psalms1:6 Ngobe Simakadze uyayinakekela indlela yalabalungile, kodvwa indlela yalababi iya ekubhujisweni." 
Psalms2:1 Kwentiwa yini kutsi tive tisuse lutfutfuva? Bantfu-ke bona balivungamelelani lite? 
Psalms2:2 Emakhosi emhlaba asukume phansi ahloma, nebabusi bahlangene bemelana naSimakadze, bemelana neMgcotjwa wakhe batsi:" 
Psalms2:3 “Asidzabule letibopho tabo labasibophe ngato, sitilahle phansi letintsambo lesiboshwe ngato.”" 
Psalms2:4 Losesihlalweni sebukhosi ezulwini ubahleka bulima; yebo, Simakadze ubenta inhlekisa." 
Psalms2:5 Wase ukhuluma kubo ngentfukutselo yakhe, ubakhahla ngelulaka lwakhe, utsi:" 
Psalms2:6 “Ngimi loyibekile inkhosi eSiyoni, inkhosi lengiyikhetsile ngiyibeke eSiyoni, intsaba yami lengcwele.”" 
Psalms2:7 Angimemetele umyalo lowashiwo nguSimakadze kimi, nakatsi: “Wena uyindvodzana yami, lamuhla ngikutele." 
Psalms2:8 Cela kimi, mine ngiyawukunika tive tibe lifa lakho, nemhlaba wonkhe ube yingcebo yakho;" 
Psalms2:9 ubaphahlate ngentfonga yensimbi, ubaphihlite njengeludziwo lwembumbi.”" 
Psalms2:10 Ngako-ke nine makhosi, hlakaniphani; nifundze sifundvo, nine babusi bemhlaba." 
Psalms2:11 Khontani Simakadze ngekwesaba, nijabule ngekutfutfumela." 
Psalms2:12 Khotsamani etinyaweni tendvodzana, ingadzimate initfukutselele, nifele endleleni, ngobe lulaka lwayo luvutsa masinyane. Babusisiwe bonkhe lababalekela kuyo." 
Psalms3:1 Maye, Simakadze, setinyenti titsa tami! Sebanyenti labo labangivukelako." 
Psalms3:2 Banyenti lese bafakana imilomo ngami, batsi: “Nkulunkulu angeke amsindzise.” Cabanga." 
Psalms3:3 Kodvwa-ke wena, Simakadze, ulihawu lami, nebukhosi bami, uyangisimisa, unginike sibindzi sekuncoba." 
Psalms3:4 Ngelivi lami ngikhala kuSimakadze, uyangiphendvula asentsabeni yakhe lengcwele. Cabanga." 
Psalms3:5 Ngicambalele phansi ngatunywa butfongo, ngaphindze ngavuka, ngobe Nkulunkulu uyangicinisa." 
Psalms3:6 Bantfu angibesabi, nome bangaba ngemashumi etinkhulungwane labangivimbetele ndzawo tonkhe." 
Psalms3:7 Vuka Simakadze, ngisindzise, Nkulunkulu wami, ngobe tonkhe titsa tami utihlakaye imihlatsi, wephula nematinyo alababi." 
Psalms3:8 Insindziso ivela kuwe, Simakadze; sibusiso sakho asibesesiveni sakho! Cabanga." 
Psalms4:1 Ngiphendvule nangikhala kuwe, wena Nkulunkulu ukulunga kwami. Ekucindzetelweni kwami uyangikhulula; ngihawukele, ukwemukele kuncenga kwami." 
Psalms4:2 Madvodza! Kuyawuze kube ngunini libito lami linyembenywa? Kuyawuze kube ngunini nitfungatsa lite nilandzelana nemanga? Cabanga. 
Psalms4:3 Kodvwa kufanele nati kutsi Simakadze utehlukanisele lolungile. Simakadze uyangiva nangikhala kuye. 
Psalms4:4 Nanitfukutsele ningoni, cabangisisani nisathulile etinhlitiyweni tenu, nisacambalele emacansini enu. Cabanga." 
Psalms4:5 Nikelani ngemihlatjelo leyemukeleka kuNkulunkulu, bese nibeka litsemba lenu kuSimakadze." 
Psalms4:6 Labanyenti batsi: “Ngubani longasentela tintfo letinhle?” Simakadze, sikhanyisele ngebukhona bakho." 
Psalms4:7 Ungiphe injabulo lenkhulu enhlitiyweni yami, leyengca injabulo lababa nayo nabanenala yemabele neyeliwayini." 
Psalms4:8 Ngitawutilahla phansi, ngilale butfongo ngekuthula, ngobe nguwe wedvwa, Simakadze, longenta ngihlale ngiphephile." 
Psalms5:1 Awu, Simakadze, lalela emavi ami, ubeke indlebe yakho kuwo, ungivele nangibubula kuwe." 
Psalms5:2 Vani livi lekukhala kwami, ungisite, Nkhosi yami naNkulunkulu wami, ngobe ngithandaza kuwe, Simakadze." 
Psalms5:3 Simakadze, nakudzabuka kusa, uyaliva livi lami; nakudzabuka kusa, ngihlela ticelo tami kuwe, bese ngiyema ngilindzela wena." 
Psalms5:4 Ngobe wena, Simakadze, unguNkulunkulu longakutsandzi lokubi, lomubi angeke akhone kuhlala nawe." 
Psalms5:5 Labatigabatisako bashayeka phansi nawubhekisa buso bakho ngakubo. Uyabatondza bonkhe labenta lokubi. 
Psalms5:6 Uyababhubhisa labacala emanga. Simakadze uyamenyanya umbulali, futsi uyamenyanya lonemacebo." 
Psalms5:7 Kepha mine ngiyawungena endlini yakho ngekwengcebo yemusa wakho, ngikukhonte ngenhlonipho yekwesaba ethempelini lakho lelingcwele." 
Psalms5:8 Simakadze, ngihole ngekulunga kwakho, ngobe nginetitsa, condzisa indlela yakho embikwami." 
Psalms5:9 Kute liciniso emlonyeni wato, etinhlitiyweni tato kunekubulala, umphimbo wato ulithuna lelivulekile, lulwimi lwato lunebucili." 
Psalms5:10 Tilahle ngelicala lato, Nkulunkulu, tente tibanjwe nguleto tingibe tato, tidzingise ngenca yetono tato letinyenti, ngobe phela setikuhlubukile." 
Psalms5:11 Kepha abajabule bonkhe lababalekele kuwe, abahlabele ngenjabulo kuze kube phakadze. Babiyele labo labakutsandzako, kuze badvumise libito lakho." 
Psalms5:12 Simakadze, nguwe lobusisa lolungile. Umfukamela ngemusa wakho, kube shangatsi kungelihawu." 
Psalms6:1 Awu, Simakadze, ungangijezisi ngentfukutselo yakho, ungangishayi ngelulaka lwakho." 
Psalms6:2 Ngihawukele, Simakadze, ngobe sengidzangele, sengikhatsele, ngiphilise, Simakadze, ngobe ematsambo ami ayatfutfumela." 
Psalms6:3 Umphefumulo wami utfutfumela kakhulu. Pho, Simakadze, utawuze ungisite nini?" 
Psalms6:4 Buya, Simakadze, ungephule ekufeni, khulula umphefumulo wami, ngobe umusa wakho awupheli." 
Psalms6:5 Kute lokukhumbulako ekufeni. Ngubani lokudvumisako nje ethuneni? 
Psalms6:6 Ngikhatsele kububula kwami, ngimantisa umcamelo wami ebusuku, ngimantise nembhedze wami ngetinyembeti." 
Psalms6:7 Liso lami liyadzikita ngenca yelusizi. Liso lami liyaguga ngenca yekukhaliswa titsa tami. 
Psalms6:8 Khweshani kimi, nonkhe nine benti balokubi, ngobe Simakadze sewukuvile kukhala kwami." 
Psalms6:9 Simakadze sewukuvile kuncusa kwami. Simakadze sewukwemukele kukhuleka kwami. 
Psalms6:10 Tonkhe titsa tami tiyawuhlazeka titfutfumele kakhulu, tidliwe ngemahloni, tibaleke masinyane." 
Psalms7:1 Yebo, Simakadze, Nkulunkulu wami, sengiphephele kuwe, ngisindzise ungiphephise kubo bonkhe labangitingelako," 
Psalms7:2 kuze umphefumulo wami bangawudzabudzabuli njengelibhubesi lelidzabudzabula kubete nalolamulako. 
Psalms7:3 Simakadze, Nkulunkulu wami, nangabe kukhona lokubi etandleni tami," 
Psalms7:4 nangiphindzisele ngalokubi kumnganami, nome ngaphanga sitsa sami ngaphandle kwesono," 
Psalms7:5 nakunjalo-ke: Sitsa sami asingitingele size singibambe, siyigcobagcobe emhlabatsini imphilo yami, ludvumo lwami luphelele elutfulini. Cabanga." 
Psalms7:6 Simakadze! Sukuma ngentfukutselo yakho. Vuka ungimele elulakeni lwetitsa tami. Nkulunkulu wami, vuka ungisite. Nguwe wedvwa lonesehlulelo lesimsulwa." 
Psalms7:7 Inhlangano yetive ayisondzele ikuhace, bese uyayibusa usesihlalweni sakho sebukhosi." 
Psalms7:8 Simakadze akehlulele tive. Simakadze, ngehlulele ngekulunga kwami, uhlole nebucotfo bami." 
Psalms7:9 Ncandza bubi balababi, wakha lolungile, ngobe nguwe Nkulunkulu wekulunga lohlola tingcondvo netinhlitiyo." 
Psalms7:10 Nkulunkulu usihlangu sami, yena usindzisa labacotfo ngenhlitiyo." 
Psalms7:11 Nkulunkulu ungumehluleli lolungile, yena unguNkulunkulu lophambana nebubi onkhe emalanga." 
Psalms7:12 Nangabe umuntfu angaphendvuki, Nkulunkulu ulola inkemba yakhe, antsalele kunemba ngebutjoki bakhe," 
Psalms7:13 ulungisa tikhali takhe letinebutsi, ente imicibisholo yakhe ivutse umlilo." 
Psalms7:14 Asubuke nje kutsi lomubi unemhelo webubi, wemitsa kuganga, atale emanga." 
Psalms7:15 Umba umgodzi wekuhholokoshisela labanye, bese kuhholokoshela yena kulomgodzi lawumbile." 
Psalms7:16 Kuganga kwakhe kubuyela enhloko yakhe, buhlophoyi bakhe behlele ebuntini lakhe." 
Psalms7:17 Simakadze ngiyawumbonga ngekulunga kwakhe, ngihlabelele ngekudvumisa libito laSimakadze Losetikwako Konkhe." 
Psalms8:1 Maye, Simakadze, Nkhosi yetfu! Libito lakho liyababateka emhlabeni wonkhe! Wena ubeke ludvumo lwebukhosi bakho ngetulu kwemazulu." 
Psalms8:2 Indvumiso yemandla akho uyibeke emilonyeni yetinswane neyebantfwana. Loko ukwentele kutibindzisa titsa takho nalabamelene nawe. 
Psalms8:3 Nangibuka etulu esibhakabhakeni sakho ngibona umsebenti wetandla takho, inyanga netinkhanyeti lotimisile, ngitsi:" 
Psalms8:4 “Pho, umuntfu abeyini-ke kutsi ungadzimate umkhumbule; nendvodzana yemuntfu beyiyini-ke kutsi ungadzimate uyinakekele?”" 
Psalms8:5 Noko umente wacishe waba ngangawe, Nkulunkulu, wametfwesa umchele webukhosi neludvumo." 
Psalms8:6 Umenta abuse etikwemisebenti yetandla takho, konkhe wakubeka ngaphansi kwetinyawo takhe:" 
Psalms8:7 tonkhe timvu, netinkhomo tonkhe, yebo, netilwane tesiganga," 
Psalms8:8 tinyoni letindizako, netinhlanti telwandle, nato tonkhe tidalwa taselwandle." 
Psalms8:9 Maye, Simakadze, Nkhosi yetfu, libito lakho liyababateka emhlabeni wonkhe!" 
Psalms9:1 Simakadze, ngiyawukubonga ngenhlitiyo yami yonkhe, ngilandze ngayo yonkhe imisebenti yakho lemangalisako." 
Psalms9:2 Ngiyawujabula ngitfokote kuwe ngidvumise libito lakho, wena Losetikwako Konkhe." 
Psalms9:3 Nakuchamuka wena, titsa tami tiyancandzeka; nawutibuka, tiyawa, tiphele." 
Psalms9:4 Ngobe wena ulimele lilungelo lami nendzaba yami; uhleti esihlalweni sakho sekwehlulela wakhipha sigwebo lesilungile. 
Psalms9:5 Emahedeni uwatsetsisile, lababi wababhubhisa, wesula libito labo phakadze naphakadze." 
Psalms9:6 Sitsa sibhujiswe phakadze naphakadze, emadolobha aso uwabhidlitile, angeke asaphushwa nakuphushwa." 
Psalms9:7 Kodvwa Simakadze uhleti esihlalweni sakhe sebukhosi baphakadze; lesihlalo sakhe sebukhosi usimisele kwehlulela. 
Psalms9:8 Yena uyawukwehlulela umhlaba ngekulunga, nguye futsi loyakwehlulela tive, yebo, uyawutehlulela ngebucotfo, angakhetsi." 
Psalms9:9 Simakadze usiphephelo sebantfu labacindzetelwe. Uyinqaba ngetikhatsi tekweswela. 
Psalms9:10 Labati libito lakho bayawukwetsembela kuwe, ngobe wena, Simakadze, awubafulatseli labakufunako." 
Psalms9:11 Dvumisani Simakadze lohlala eSiyoni! Tjelani tive ngetento takhe! 
Psalms9:12 Yena ungumenaneli kulabacitsa ingati, uyabakhumbula labahluphekile, akakukhohlwa kukhala kwalabasenhluphekweni." 
Psalms9:13 Ngihawukele, Simakadze! Bona kuhlupheka kwami lengikubangelwe titsa tami. Nguwe longephula emasangweni ekufa," 
Psalms9:14 kuze ngilandze ngalo lonkhe ludvumo lwakho emasangweni elidolobha laseSiyoni ngijabulele kungikhulula kwakho. 
Psalms9:15 Emahedeni asahholokoshele emgodzini labewumbile; asabanjwe elugibeni lolwetsiywe ngawo. 
Psalms9:16 Simakadze sewutibonakalisile, wakhipha sigwebo sakhe, lababi babanjwa ngumsebenti wetandla tabo. Cabanga." 
Psalms9:17 Lababi baya ekufeni, yebo, bonkhe labafulatsela Nkulunkulu." 
Psalms9:18 Kodvwa labandzindzako bangeke bakhohlakale phakadze naphakadze; litsemba lalabahluphekako lingeke linyamalale siphelane. 
Psalms9:19 Vuka, Simakadze! Ungavumi kutsi umuntfu akwedzelele, betive abehlulelwe embikwakho!" 
Psalms9:20 Bente bakwesabe, Simakadze, kuze bati kutsi babantfu nje. Cabanga." 
Psalms10:1 Simakadze, umeleni khashane? Utifihleleni ngesikhatsi sisekuhluphekeni?" 
Psalms10:2 Ngekuchosha kwalomubi, lomphofu uyahlupheka. Lomubi akabanjwe elugibeni lalwetsiyile." 
Psalms10:3 Lomubi utigabatisa ngetinkhanuko takhe; uyamtusa lohlazisako, yebo, lomubi wedzelela Nkulunkulu." 
Psalms10:4 Lomubi uyatigabatisa, akanaki lutfo, emicabangweni yakhe yonkhe, utsi: “Kute Nkulunkulu.”" 
Psalms10:5 Lomubi uyaphumelela etindleleni takhe tonkhe ngaso sonkhe sikhatsi. Tehlulelo taNkulunkulu tiphakamele khashane kulomubi, yebo, lomubi uchoshela titsa takhe." 
Psalms10:6 Enhlitiyweni yakhe ucabanga utsi: “Ngingeke nginyakatiswe, ngingeke ngibe nenhlanhla lembi titukulwane ngetitukulwane.”" 
Psalms10:7 Emlonyeni wakhe kugcwele ticalekiso, nemacebo, nencindzetelo; ngaphansi kwelulwimi lwakhe kucambalale kuganga nebubi." 
Psalms10:8 Lomubi uyacatsama abhace etindzaweni letinematfunti emadolobheni, ababulalele ematfuntini labo labate licala, emehlo akhe atse ndlo kulabo langabehlula ngemandla." 
Psalms10:9 Uyalala abhace njengelibhubesi, nalibhacela kubamba inyamatane; ubamba labo labehlulako, ahudvule losihlupheki ngelinetha lakhe." 
Psalms10:10 Lesihlupheki siyaphihlitwa siwele phansi emhlabatsini; ngako lesihlupheki sitikhandza sesisesandleni sakhe lomubi. 
Psalms10:11 Lomubi ucabanga enhlitiyweni yakhe utsi: “Nkulunkulu akanendzaba, akanaki, angeke abuke ngakimi kuze kube phakadze naphakadze.”" 
Psalms10:12 Sukuma, Simakadze! Awu, Nkulunkulu! Phakamisa sandla sakho! Ungamkhohlwa losekuhluphekeni." 
Psalms10:13 Kwentiwa yini kutsi lomubi edzelele wena, Nkulunkulu? Ucabangelani enhlitiyweni yakhe kutsi wena ungeke umjezise?" 
Psalms10:14 Kantsi wena uyabona, ngobe tinhlupheko netinsizi uyakunaka, kuze ukufumbatse ngetandla takho. Lohluphekile utinikela kuwe, ngobe wena ungumsiti wetintsandzane." 
Psalms10:15 Juba sandla salomubi losikhohlakali, jezisa bubi bakhe, kuze kubete lokusalako." 
Psalms10:16 Simakadze uyiNkhosi, phakadze naphakadze, impela emahedeni ayakunyamalala eveni lakhe." 
Psalms10:17 Yebo, Simakadze! Uyativa tifiso talabacotfo, ucinise nenhlitiyo yabo. Indlebe yakho iyabalalela," 
Psalms10:18 kuze tintsandzane nalabacindzetelwe babonelelwe ngekulunga. Kute umuntfu walomhlaba loyawuphindze abe yingoti. 
Psalms11:1 KuSimakadze ngitfole siphephelo. Pho, ngabe ningeluleka njani nanitsi: “Ndizela entsabeni njengenyoni!" 
Psalms11:2 Ase ubuke nje kutsi lababi babhace ebumnyameni lapho bantsala butjoki khona, baciphe imicibisholo yabo kubo, khona batewudubula labacotfo ngenhlitiyo." 
Psalms11:3 Nangabe tisekelo setibhidlitwa, lolungile angenta njani?”" 
Psalms11:4 Simakadze usethempelini lakhe lelingcwele, sihlalo sebukhosi saSimakadze sisezulwini, emehlo akhe ayacaphela, emehlo akhe avivinya bantfu emhlabeni." 
Psalms11:5 Simakadze uyamvivinya lolungile, kodvwa uyamtondza lomubi nalotsandza budlova." 
Psalms11:6 Lababi uyawubehlisela imvula yemalahle lavutsako nesibabule, abajezise ngemoya lohhusha kabuhlungu." 
Psalms11:7 Simakadze ulungile, utsandza tento letinhle, labalungile bayawububona buso bakhe." 
Psalms12:1 Awu, Simakadze, sisindzise! Sekute bantfu labacotfo, ngobe labetsembekile sebanyamalele." 
Psalms12:2 Bantfu bayayengana la emhlabeni, tilimi tabo tisheleliswa ngemanga, inkhulumo yabo imphacambili." 
Psalms12:3 Shangatsi Simakadze angatihhumbula letindzebe letitigabatisa kakhulu, ajube lulwimi loluncemphetako." 
Psalms12:4 Shangatsi Simakadze angabajuba tilwimi laba labakhuluma bachoshe batsi: “Sigabe ngelulwimi lwetfu sitawutikhulumela, iphi leyo nkhosi lengasikhona tsine?”" 
Psalms12:5 Simakadze-ke yena utsi: “Njengobe timphuya setichwagiwe, nanjengobe tihlupheki timpintjekile, ngitakuta ngimephule lowo lofuna lusito, bese ngimbeka endzaweni lengenangoti.”" 
Psalms12:6 Emavi aSimakadze ate sici, endlula isiliva lehlantisisiwe, yahlanjululwa ngemlilo kasikhombisa." 
Psalms12:7 Wena, Simakadze, utasilondvolota usivikele kulababi." 
Psalms12:8 Lababi bayahambahamba; bubi sebaba ligugu kubantfu. 
Psalms13:1 Hhawu, Simakadze! Utangikhohlwa kuze kube ngunini? Utangifihlela buso bakho kuze kube ngunini?" 
Psalms13:2 Kutawuze kube ngunini ngilwa nemicabango yami ngifunana netindlela tekuphumelela? Kutawuze kube ngunini sitsa sami singehlula? 
Psalms13:3 Bheka ngakimi, ungiphendvule, Simakadze, Nkulunkulu wami. Yenta emehlo ami akhanye, ngingaze ngifikelwe butfongo bekufa." 
Psalms13:4 Sitsa sami asingasho kutsi: “Ngimehlule ngamkhipha inkhani,” funa labatitsa tami bajabule, ngobe sebabona kutsi ngiyayendza." 
Psalms13:5 Kepha mine ngetsembele emseni wakho; inhlitiyo yami iyawujabula ngensindziso yakho. 
Psalms13:6 Ngiyakuhlabela, ngikudvumise, Simakadze, ngobe ube muhle kimi." 
Psalms14:1 Silima sikhuluma enhlitiyweni yaso sitsi: “Kute Nkulunkulu la.” Babi, benta emanyala, kute nome munye lowenta lokulungile." 
Psalms14:2 Simakadze utsi asezulwini abe abuka bonkhe bantfu, kuze atewubona kutsi ukhona yini umuntfu lohlakaniphile, nome munye nje, lofuna Nkulunkulu." 
Psalms14:3 Bonkhe bedukile, bonkhe bonakele, kute lowenta lokulungile; kute, kute ngisho nome munye." 
Psalms14:4 Pho, bate yini lwati bonkhe labantfu labenta lokubi? Badla emandla ebantfu bami shangatsi badla sinkhwa, bangathandazi kuSomandla." 
Psalms14:5 Bayawufikelwa kwesaba lokukhulu, ngobe Nkulunkulu ume nalabacotfo." 
Psalms14:6 Ningabagongonyi labacindzetelwe, nibaphatamise etindleleni tabo, kodvwa Simakadze usiphephelo sabo." 
Psalms14:7 Shangatsi ingavela eSiyoni insindziso yesive sema-Israyeli. Mhlazana Nkulunkulu acedza lusizi lwebantfu bakhe, aphindze abahlumelelisa, Jakobe uyawujabula, Israyeli atfokote." 
Psalms15:1 Simakadze! Ngubani longaba nemvume yekungenisa ahlale ethempelini lakho, acabe umuti wakhe entsabeni yakho lengcwele?" 
Psalms15:2 Ngulomuntfu lonetindlela letimsulwa, abe ngumuntfu lowenta lokulungile, akhulume liciniso lelisuka ekujuleni kwenhlitiyo yakhe." 
Psalms15:3 Akahlebi ngelulwimi lwakhe. Akabanyembenyi labanye bantfu, akamhlazisi namakhelwane wakhe." 
Psalms15:4 Akamtsandzi losalahlwe nguNkulunkulu, kodvwa uyabatisa labesaba Simakadze. Wenta sifungo, asigcine, nome sekumatima." 
Psalms15:5 Webolekisa ngemali yakhe angayengeti intalo nase ikhishwa. Akakwemukeli kudizelwa entele kulahla lote licala. Umuntfu lowenta letintfo uyawuhlala atinte kuze kube phakadze. 
Psalms16:1 Ngilondvolote, Nkulunkulu, ngobe ngikhosele kuwe." 
Psalms16:2 KuSimakadze ngitsi: “Wena uyiNkhosi yami. Kute lokuhle lengingaba nako ngaphandle kwakho.” 
Psalms16:3 Kodvwa ngalabangcwele labalapha emhlabeni ngitsi: “Batikhulu letincabile lengijabula ngato.” 
Psalms16:4 Tinkhatsato titakwandziswa kulabo labanikela kubonkulunkulu labanye. Ngingeke ngiyicitse ingati kutsi ibe ngumnikelo kulabanye bonkulunkulu. Ngingeke ngikhuleke kubo. 
Psalms16:5 Simakadze, wena usabelo lesilifa lami, ungipha konkhe lengikudzingako. Likusasa lami lisetandleni takho." 
Psalms16:6 Lifa lelingumhlaba, lengisikelwe wona, liyindzawo lenhle kakhulu." 
Psalms16:7 Ngiyamdvumisa Simakadze lowangeluleka, nanembeza wami uyangiyala ebusuku." 
Psalms16:8 Emehlo ami ayawunamatsela kuSimakadze phakadze naphakadze. Yena ungasesandleni sami sangesekudla, ngiyawuhlala kuye ngitinte." 
Psalms16:9 Ngako-ke inhlitiyo yami iyatfokota, nemoya wami uyajabula, nemtimba wami ulondvolotekile." 
Psalms16:10 Ngobe ungeke uvume kungiyekelela endzaweni yalabafile, nome-ke ungeke umvumele lotsandzekako wakho kutsi abole ethuneni." 
Psalms16:11 Uyawungifundzisa indlela yekuphila. Lapho kukhona khona wena kunekujabula lokuphelele. Esandleni sakho sangesekudla kunekujabula phakadze naphakadze. 
Psalms17:1 Awu, Simakadze, ase ulalele kuncusa kwami lokumsulwa. Beka indlebe yakho emthandazweni wami, lophuma emlonyeni lote inkhohliso." 
Psalms17:2 Kwehlulelwa kwami akuvele kuwe, emehlo akho abuke lokulungile." 
Psalms17:3 Uvivinye inhlitiyo yami, wangivakashela utengihlolisisa ebusuku, kepha awutfolanga lutfo lolubi kimi. Nome ngicabange lokubi, kodvwa umlomo wami awuzange ukhulume lokubi." 
Psalms17:4 Macondzana nemisebenti yebantfu mine ngitigadze ngekulalela livi lakho, ngaticwaya tindlela talabatidlova." 
Psalms17:5 Tinyatselo tami tisemikhondvweni yakho, ngiko nje tinyawo tami tingasheleli." 
Psalms17:6 Ngincusa kuwe, ngobe wena, Nkulunkulu, utangiphendvula; beka indlebe yakho, ulalele emavi ami." 
Psalms17:7 Khombisa ubonakalise umusa wakho lomangalisako. Wena ungumsindzisi walabo labatsi nababaleka etitseni tabo bete kuwe, njengesiphephelo sabo." 
Psalms17:8 Ngilondvolote njengenhlavu yeliso. Ngifihle ngaphansi kwemaphiko akho," 
Psalms17:9 ungivikele kulababi labangihlaselako nasetitseni tami lese tingitungeleta. 
Psalms17:10 Tinhlitiyo tabo atinasihawu, imilomo yabo ikhuluma kutigabatisa kodvwa." 
Psalms17:11 Nome siyaphi bayasihaca, emehlo abo bawabhekise ngakitsi, kutsi basiwise." 
Psalms17:12 Banjengelibhubesi lelifuna kubamba inyamatane; bafana neliwundlwana lelibhubesi lelibhace etindzaweni letisitsele. 
Psalms17:13 Vuka Simakadze! Hlangabeta lomubi umlahle phansi. Sindzisa umphefumulo wami kuye ngenkemba yakho. 
Psalms17:14 Simakadze, ngephule ngesandla sakho etandleni talabagungubele ngetintfo talomhlaba. Bajezise ngekuhlupheka lobabekele kona. Shangatsi kungenela bona kanye nebantfwababo, kwendlulele nakubatukulu bebatukulu babo." 
Psalms17:15 Mine-ke ngiyawububona buso bakho, ngobe ngingulolungile, mhlazana ngivuka ngiyakweneliswa bukhona bakho." 
Psalms18:1 Ngiyakutsandza, Simakadze, wena, longemandla ami." 
Psalms18:2 Simakadze, ulidvwala lami, nenqaba yami, neMkhululi wami. Nkulunkulu wami, ulidvwala lami lengiphephela kulo. Usihlangu sami sekungivikela nemandla ensindziso yami. Yena ungumgedze wami wekubhaca." 
Psalms18:3 Ngikhala kuSimakadze, bese uyangephula etitseni tami. Akadvunyiswe Simakadze!" 
Psalms18:4 Tintsambo tekufa tangitungeleta, tikhukhula tembhubhiso tangigabudzela." 
Psalms18:5 Tintsambo telithuna tatingitsandzele, tingibe tekufa tangitfonya." 
Psalms18:6 Ngakhala kuSimakadze ngisekudzangaleni kwami, ngacela lusito kuNkulunkulu wami. Waliva livi lami asendlini yakhe, kuncusa kwami, nekukhala kwami, nekuthandaza kwami kwangena etindlebeni takhe." 
Psalms18:7 Umhlaba watfutfumela, watamatama, netisekelo tetintsaba tatfutfumela, tatamatama, ngobe Somandla abesatfukutsele." 
Psalms18:8 Emakhala akhe akhafula intfutfu, umlomo wakhe wakheputa umlilo locotfulako kuwo kwakhehleka emalahle labovu." 
Psalms18:9 Wabhobosa emazulu, wehlela phansi. Emafu lamnyama abengaphansi kwetinyawo takhe." 
Psalms18:10 Wagibela likherubhi, wandiza, wantjuza asetikwemaphiko emoya." 
Psalms18:11 Wenta bumnyama baba yingubo yakhe, watungeletwa ngemafu lahlomile, lamnyama." 
Psalms18:12 Ebukhatikhatini bebukhona bakhe kwaphambana imibane, kwavela emafu lamnyama lahlomile, kwehla sangcotfo nemalahle lavutsako." 
Psalms18:13 Simakadze wabhavumula asezulwini. Losetikwako Konkhe walivakalisa livi lakhe, kwehla sangcotfo nemalahle lavutsako." 
Psalms18:14 Wajijimeta ngemicibisholo yakhe, kwasakateka titsa, watigalela ngemibane, watidzidzitelisa, tasiphuka." 
Psalms18:15 Kujula kwetilwandle kwenekeka ebaleni, tisekelo temhlaba tembuleka, ngenca yekutsetsa kwakho, Simakadze, nangenca yekufutsa kwemakhala akho." 
Psalms18:16 Welula ingalo yakhe akulelisetulu, wayehlisela phansi, wangibamba, wangenyula ekujuleni kwemanti." 
Psalms18:17 Wangephula esitseni sami lesinemandla, wangephula nakulabangitondzako, ngobe babenemandla kakhulu kunami." 
Psalms18:18 Bangidvumela ngesikhatsi ngehlelwa sehlakalo, kodvwa Simakadze waba sihlangu sami." 
Psalms18:19 Wangikhiphela endzaweni lebanti; wangephula, ngobe abejabula ngami." 
Psalms18:20 Simakadze wangiphatsa njengekulunga kwami, wangivuza njengebumsulwa betandla tami," 
Psalms18:21 ngobe imiyalo yaSimakadze ngiyigcinile. Angikenti lutfo lolubi; angikamfulatseli Nkulunkulu wami. 
Psalms18:22 Yonkhe imiyalo yaNkulunkulu isembikwami, angikatikhweshisi kimi timiso takhe." 
Psalms18:23 Bengisolo ngite sici embikwakhe, ngitigcinile ngangete ngona." 
Psalms18:24 Ngako-ke Simakadze ungivuze njengekulunga kwami, ngobe uyati kutsi tandla tami timsulwa." 
Psalms18:25 Kulowetsembekile wena utibonakalisa wetsembekile, kulongenacala wena utibonakalisa ucotfo," 
Psalms18:26 kulohlantekile wena utibonakalisa uhlantekile, kodvwa kulosigwegwe wena utibonakalisa ulukhuni." 
Psalms18:27 Wena, losindzisa labatfobekile, uyabatfobisa labatigabatisako." 
Psalms18:28 Nguwe lowokhela sibane sami, Simakadze, Nkulunkulu wami; ugucula bumnyama bami abente bube kukhanya." 
Psalms18:29 Ngawe ngisengayidvungulula imphi; ngaloNkulunkulu wami ngisengagalaja lubondza lwetitsa. 
Psalms18:30 Indlela yaNkulunkulu ilungile, livi laSimakadze letsembekile. Yena usihlangu sabo bonkhe labaphephela kuye." 
Psalms18:31 Kambe nje ngubani longuNkulunkulu, ngaphandle kwaSimakadze? Ngubani lolidvwala, ngaphandle kwaloNkulunkulu wetfu?" 
Psalms18:32 Nguye loNkulunkulu longihlomisa ngemandla, ente indlela yami icondze, ibe msulwa." 
Psalms18:33 Wenta tinyawo tami tibe lula njengetenyamatane, angente ngiphephele ekuphakameni." 
Psalms18:34 Yena wenta tandla tami tifundzele kulwa, kuze imikhono yami yetayele kugoba butjoki belitfusi." 
Psalms18:35 Ungihlomisa ngesihlangu sensindziso yakho. Sandla sakho sangesekudla sangisimisa, utehlisa wena kuze uphakamise mine." 
Psalms18:36 Wentele tinyatselo tami indzawo lebanti kuze emacakala ami angabhinyiliki. 
Psalms18:37 Titsa tami ngaticosha, ngaze ngatikhandza, ngativimbetela, angizange ngincandzeke ngingakaticedzi." 
Psalms18:38 Ngatiphahlata taze tehluleka kuvuka, tawela ngaphansi kwetinyawo tami." 
Psalms18:39 Wangihlomisa ngemandla ekulwa imphi. Titsa tami watitfobisa ngaphansi kwami. 
Psalms18:40 Titsa tami watidvungulula, tabaleka, ngabacedza bonkhe labangitondzako." 
Psalms18:41 Bakhala, bacela lusito, kodvwa kwabate lobasindzisako; bahlaba inyandzaleyo kuSimakadze, kodvwa akazange abaphendvule." 
Psalms18:42 Ngabagaya baba njengelutfuli lolupheshulwa ngumoya, ngabasaphata njengeludzaka lwendlela." 
Psalms18:43 Wangisindzisa embangweni wesive sakitsi, wangibeka ngaba yinhloko yetive. Sive lengingazange sengisati sitangikhotsama." 
Psalms18:44 Betive batsi bangangiva, bangihlonipha masinyane, beta kimi bakhasa." 
Psalms18:45 Bonkhe baphelelwa ngemandla, beta bachachatela baphuma emigedzeni yabo." 
Psalms18:46 Simakadze uyaphila! Alidvunyiswe lidvwala lami! Akaphakanyiswe Nkulunkulu loyinsindziso yami! 
Psalms18:47 UnguNkulunkulu longiphindziselelako, lotsambisa tive ngaphansi kwami." 
Psalms18:48 Wangikhulula etitseni tami, wangiphakamisa ngaba ngetulu kwalabo labamelene nami, wangephula kubantfu belutfutfuva." 
Psalms18:49 Ngako-ke ngiyawukudvumisa wena, Simakadze, emkhatsini wetive, ngikugambute ngetibongelelo teLibito lakho." 
Psalms18:50 Nguwe, Nkhosi, umenti wankhulu, inkhosi yakho uyiphe kuncoba timphi ngetimphi, wentele logcotjiwe wakho umusa wakho longapheli, yebo, Davide netitukulwane takhe, phakadze naphakadze." 
Psalms19:1 Emazulu ababata bukhosi baNkulunkulu, nemkhatsi wembula likhono lakhe." 
Psalms19:2 Lilanga litjela lelililandzelako, nebusuku bulandzisa lobubulandzelako ngalolwati." 
Psalms19:3 Kute inkhulumo, kute nemavi, kute neliphimbo lelivakalako." 
Psalms19:4 Noko-ke liphimbo lako liphumele emhlabeni wonkhe, nemavi ako aphumele emhlabeni wonkhe. Lilanga ulakhele umpheme ngaphansi kwesibhakabhaka." 
Psalms19:5 Lilanga liphuma licatsame njengemyeni, yebo, njengemyeni acwebetela ahlangabeta makoti wakhe; njengemgijimi lotimisele ngemncintiswano." 
Psalms19:6 Liphuma ngale kwemaphetselo elizulu, litungelete lize liyewumbamba unina; kute lokusitsakele ekushiseni kwalo." 
Psalms19:7 Imfundziso yaSimakadze iphelele, ihlumelelisa umphefumulo; bufakazi baSimakadze buliciniso, buyabahlakaniphisa labate lwati." 
Psalms19:8 Imitsetfo yaSimakadze icondzile, ingumtfombo wekujabula kwenhlitiyo. Umyalo waSimakadze umsulwa, uvula emehlo engcondvo." 
Psalms19:9 Kwesaba Simakadze kuhlantekile, kuyawuhlala kukhona naphakadze. Tincumo tetehlulelo taSimakadze tiliciniso, tilunge tonkhe, kantsi atinakusoleka." 
Psalms19:10 Titsandzeka kakhulu kunegolide lecengekile, yebo, kakhulu kunegolide lecengekile, timnandzi kakhulu kuneluju, yebo, kakhulu kunematfonsi eluju." 
Psalms19:11 Impela, inceku yakho iyalwa ngato, lowo lotigcinako unemvuzo lomkhulu." 
Psalms19:12 Ngubani nje longabona tiphosiso takhe? Simakadze, ngikhulule etonweni letifihlekile." 
Psalms19:13 Ngijubele ekwenteni tono ngemabomu, ungativumeli kutsi tingibuse; khona-ke ngiyawuphelela, bese ngibate licala esiphambukweni lesikhulu." 
Psalms19:14 Emavi emlomo wami netizindlo tenhlitiyo yami atemukeleke kuwe, Simakadze, Dvwala lami, neMkhululi wami." 
Psalms20:1 Shangatsi Simakadze angakuphendvula, ngelilanga lekuhlupheka! Shangatsi libito laNkulunkulu waJakobe lingaba siphephelo sakho!" 
Psalms20:2 Akakutfumelele lusito lwasendlini lengcwele akusekele asentsabeni yakhe iSiyoni. 
Psalms20:3 Akayikhumbule yonkhe iminikelo yakho, ayemukele neminikelo yakho yekushiswa. Cabanga." 
Psalms20:4 Akakuphe njengekufisa kwenhlitiyo yakho, afeze tonkhe tinhloso takho." 
Psalms20:5 Asimemete sijabulele kuncoba kwakho, asibetsele sishaye tandla egameni laNkulunkulu wetfu. Shangatsi Simakadze angaphumelelisa tonkhe ticelo takho." 
Psalms20:6 Nyalo sengiyati kutsi Simakadze uyamsindzisa logcotjiwe wakhe, uyawumphendvula asezulwini lakhe lelingcwele, amphendvule ngemandla akhe ekusindzisa, esandla sakhe sangesekudla." 
Psalms20:7 Labanye bantfu bachoshe ngetincola temphi, labanye bachoshe ngemahhashi, kodvwa tsine sigabe ngelibito laSimakadze longuNkulunkulu wetfu." 
Psalms20:8 Labantfu bacimuleka bawe phansi, kepha tsine sima sitsi zica." 
Psalms20:9 Yebo, Simakadze, sindzisa inkhosi, uyiphe kuncoba. Shangatsi Simakadze angasiphendvula, nasikhala kuye." 
Psalms21:1 Yebo, Simakadze, inkhosi iyajabula ngemandla loyiphe wona. Kukhulu kanganani kujabula kwayo, ngekuncoba loyentele kona." 
Psalms21:2 Uyiphe sifiso senhlitiyo yayo, futsi awuyigodlelanga leyayikucela ngemlomo wayo. Cabanga."
