Psalms21:3 Uyihlangabete ngetibusiso letinalokuhle, wayetfwesa enhloko yayo umchele wegolide lecengekile." 
Psalms21:4 Yacela imphilo kuwe, wena wayipha emalanga lamadze phakadze naphakadze." 
Psalms21:5 Tidvumo tayo tinkhulu, ngenca yelusito lwakho, uyinike ludvumo nebukhosi." 
Psalms21:6 Wayenta yabusiseka kakhulu kuze kube phakadze, uyitfokotisa ngenjabulo ebusweni bakho." 
Psalms21:7 Inkhosi yetsembele kuSimakadze, ngenca yesihawu saLosetikwako Konkhe ingeke itanyatanyiswe." 
Psalms21:8 Sandla sakho siyawutibhadzama tonkhe titsa takho; sandla sakho sangesekudla siyawubabhadzama bonkhe labakutondzako. 
Psalms21:9 Mhla kubonakala wena, uyawubashisa babe ngumlilo lowesabekako nalohhumako. Simakadze uyawubacedza ngentfukutselo yakhe, abacotfule ngemlilo." 
Psalms21:10 Uyawubhubhisa intalo yabo emhlabeni, ushabalalise nebantfwababo emkhatsini walabanye bantfu." 
Psalms21:11 Nome bebahlose lokubi ngawe, bacondze kukugangela, kodvwa bangeke baphumelele." 
Psalms21:12 Uyawubenta babaleke, ubadubule ngemicibisholo yakho." 
Psalms21:13 Yebo, Simakadze! Awuphakanyiswe emandleni akho! Tsine siyawuhlabela sidvumise emandla akho." 
Psalms22:1 Nkulunkulu wami! Nkulunkulu wami! Ungishiyeleni? Ukhashane leni nekungisita? Ukhwesheleni emavini ekukhala kwami? 
Psalms22:2 Awu, Nkulunkulu wami! Emini ngiyakhala, kodvwa awungiphendvuli; nasebusuku ngikhale, ngingaphumuli." 
Psalms22:3 Wena ungcwele, indvumiso yema-Israyeli sihlalo sakho sebukhosi." 
Psalms22:4 Bokhokho betsembela kuwe; bakwetsemba, wabakhulula." 
Psalms22:5 Bakhala kuwe, wabasindzisa; bakwetsemba, abazange bajabhiswe." 
Psalms22:6 Kepha mine angisesiye muntfu walutfo, sengaba ngumbungu nje, ngisetfuko sebantfu, nenhlekisa esiveni." 
Psalms22:7 Bonkhe labangibonako bayangiphukuta, badvubula imilomo bancife, banikine netinhloko, batsi:" 
Psalms22:8 “Phela lowo wetsembele kuSimakadze, akamkhulule yena-ke, loSimakadze wakhe; amphephise, ngobe phela usime ngaye.”" 
Psalms22:9 Empeleni nguwe lowangikhipha esiswini samake; wangenta ngetsembela kuwe, kusukela ngisamunya." 
Psalms22:10 Ngetfulwa kuwe kwasekutalweni kwami, waba nguNkulunkulu wami kusukela esiswini samake." 
Psalms22:11 Ungakhweshi kimi, ngobe inhlupheko isedvute nami, kute nalongangisita." 
Psalms22:12 Titsa letinyenti tingitungeletile, tinkunzi letinemandla taseBhashani tingivimbetele." 
Psalms22:13 Tingikhamisele imilomo yato njengemabhubesi labhodla adladlabule. 
Psalms22:14 Ngicitseke njengemanti, emalunga ami onkhe ahhehlulukile, inhlitiyo yami igucuke yaba ngumtfwebeba, yancibilika ngekhatsi kwami." 
Psalms22:15 Emandla ami ome njengeludzengelo, lulwimi lwami lunamatsele elwangeni; wena ungilalisa phansi elutfulini lwekufa." 
Psalms22:16 Yebo-ke, tinja tingihace ndzawo tonkhe, nesicumbi salababi singitungeletile, singibhobose tandla netinyawo." 
Psalms22:17 Sengondze ngingumbambotiyabalwa, bayangigolotela bangihheletele." 
Psalms22:18 Behlukaniselana ngetimphahla tami, bentelane inkatho ngengubo yami." 
Psalms22:19 Kodvwa wena, Simakadze, ungabi khashane nami! Awu, mandla ami, ngiphutfume ungisite." 
Psalms22:20 Sindzisa umphefumulo wami enkembeni, nekuphila kwami lokuligugu ukwephule emlonyeni wetinja." 
Psalms22:21 Ngephule emlonyeni welibhubesi, ungisindzise etimphondvweni tetinyatsi." 
Psalms22:22 Ngiyawulimemetela kubomnaketfu libito lakho ngikudvumise emkhatsini welibandla, ngitsi:" 
Psalms22:23 “Nine lenesaba Simakadze, mdvumiseni! Nani nonkhe madvodzana aJakobe, mtuseni! Nonkhe nine ntalo ya-Israyeli, mhlonipheni!" 
Psalms22:24 Ngobe akedzelelanga akanengwanga yinhlupheko yalohluphekako. Akabufihlanga buso bakhe kuye, wamuva nakakhala, acela lusito kuye.”" 
Psalms22:25 Ungivusela lusinga lwekudvumisa emkhatsini welibandla lelikhulu. Tifungo tami ngiyawutifeza tigcwaliseke embikwabo bonkhe labakwesabako. 
Psalms22:26 Labatitfobako bayawudla besutse, labafuna Simakadze bayawumdvumisa, bahalaliselwe kutsiwe: “Shangatsi ningaphila phakadze naphakadze!”" 
Psalms22:27 Umhlaba wonkhe uyakukhumbula ugucukele kuSimakadze, yonkhe imindeni netive temhlaba tiyawukhotsama embikwakhe," 
Psalms22:28 ngobe bukhosi baSimakadze, nguye lobusa etikwetive." 
Psalms22:29 Yebo, bonkhe labacebile emhlabeni, bayawudla bakhotsame embikwakhe; bonkhe labayakuya phansi elutfulini, bayawuguca embikwakhe bakhonte, yebo, nabo bonkhe labangeke batibambe kutsi bafe." 
Psalms22:30 Titukulwane takusasa titawumkhonta, bantfu bayawusala balandzise ngaSimakadze etitukulwaneni nasetitukulwaneni." 
Psalms22:31 Sive lesiyawutalwa siyawutjelwa kutsi: “Simakadze wasisindzisa sive sakhe.” 
Psalms23:1 Simakadze ngumelusi wami, ngeke ngeswele lutfo." 
Psalms23:2 Ungilalisa emadlelweni laluhlata, angiholele nasemantini ekuphumula." 
Psalms23:3 Uhlumelelisa umphefumulo wami, angiholele nasetindleleni tekulunga, kuze kudvunyiswe libito lakhe." 
Psalms23:4 Nome ngihamba esigodzini lesinelitfunti lekufa, angesabi lutfo lolubi, ngobe wena unami; intfonga yakho neludvondvolo lwakho kuyangivikela." 
Psalms23:5 Ungigcebela litafula embikwami netitsa tami tibuka. Ugcobisa inhloko yami ngemafutsa, indzebe yami iyaphuphuma." 
Psalms23:6 Impela, lokuhle nemusa kuyawungilandzela imihla yonkhe yekuphila kwami. Ngiyawuhlala endlini yaSimakadze kuze kube phakadze." 
Psalms24:1 Umhlaba nako konkhe lokukuwo kwaSimakadze, emave kanye nabo bonkhe labahlala kuwo kwakhe," 
Psalms24:2 ngobe wakusimisa etikwetilwandle, wakusekela ekujuleni kwemanti." 
Psalms24:3 Ngubani loyakwenyuka intsaba yaSimakadze? Ngubani loyakuma endzaweni yakhe lengcwele? 
Psalms24:4 Ngulowo lonetandla letihlantekile nalonenhlitiyo lengenacala longawulibatisi ngelite umphefumulo wakhe, nalongawafungeli emanga." 
Psalms24:5 Simakadze uyawumbusisa, yebo, Nkulunkulu wensindziso uyawumenta abe msulwa." 
Psalms24:6 Ngulesi-ke situkulwane salabo labamfunako, labafuna buso bakho, Nkulunkulu waJakobe. Cabanga." 
Psalms24:7 Nine masango, vulekani! Nani minyango yasemandvulo vulekani nitsi nge, kuze iNkhosi yeludvumo itewungena." 
Psalms24:8 Ngubani leNkhosi yeludvumo? NguSimakadze, lichawe lelinemandla, Simakadze lolichawe lekulwa." 
Psalms24:9 Nine masango, vulekani! Nani minyango yasemandvulo vulekani nitsi nge, kuze iNkhosi yeludvumo itewungena." 
Psalms24:10 Ngubani yona leNkhosi yeludvumo? Nguye Nkulunkulu longuSomandla, nguye loyiNkhosi yeludvumo. Cabanga." 
Psalms25:1 Ngiwuphakamisela kuwe, Simakadze, umphefumulo wami." 
Psalms25:2 Nkulunkulu wami, ngetsembele kuwe, ngisindzise ehlazweni lekwehlulwa. Titsa tami tingatijabulisi ngami." 
Psalms25:3 Yebo, labo labetsembele kuwe kute namunye loyawuhlazeka; kepha bayawuhlazeka labo labakuhlubuka ngelite." 
Psalms25:4 Ngikhombise tindlela takho, Simakadze, ungifundzise imikhondvo yakho." 
Psalms25:5 Ngihambise ecinisweni lakho, ungifundzise, ngobe wena unguNkulunkulu wensindziso yami. Litsemba lami likuwe lonkhe lilanga." 
Psalms25:6 Simakadze, khumbula umusa wakho nelutsandvo lwakho, ngobe kwakuvele kukhona phakadze." 
Psalms25:7 Ungatikhumbuli tono tami, netiphambuko tebusha bami, kodvwa ngikhumbule ngekwemusa wakho, Simakadze, ngikhumbule ngekulunga kwakho." 
Psalms25:8 Simakadze muhle ulungile, ngako-ke ufundzisa toni indlela lekungiyo sibili." 
Psalms25:9 Labatfobekile ubaholela kulokulungile; labatfobekile ubafundzisa indlela yakhe. 
Psalms25:10 Tonkhe tindlela taSimakadze tibubele neliciniso kulabo labagcina sivumelwane sakhe kanye nemiyalo yakhe. 
Psalms25:11 Simakadze, ngenca yelibito lakho ngitsetselele kona kwami, ngobe kukhulu." 
Psalms25:12 Ngubani lowesaba Simakadze? Lowo uyawumfundzisa leyo ndlela, lekhetselwe yena." 
Psalms25:13 Yena lucobo uyawuhlala achume, intalo yakhe iyawudla lifa lemhlaba." 
Psalms25:14 Timfihlakalo takhe, Simakadze, utinika labamesabako, abafundzise kwati sivumelwane sakhe." 
Psalms25:15 Emehlo ami ahlala abheke kuSimakadze, ngobe nguye lokhipha tinyawo tami elugibeni." 
Psalms25:16 Gucukela kimi, Simakadze, ube nemusa kimi, ngobe nginesitunge, ngihluphekile." 
Psalms25:17 Ngiphumute kuletinhlupheko tenhlitiyo yami, ungikhokhe etinhluphekweni tami." 
Psalms25:18 Buka kuhlupheka kwami nekukhandleka kwami, ungitsetselele tonkhe tono tami." 
Psalms25:19 Buka titsa tami, kutsi setinyenti kanganani, tingitondza ngelunya." 
Psalms25:20 Londvolota imphilo yami, ungephule ngingahlazeki, ngobe naku ngikhosele kuwe." 
Psalms25:21 Shangatsi bumsulwa nebucotfo bungangigcina, ngobe litsemba lami likuwe." 
Psalms25:22 Awu, Nkulunkulu! Khulula Israyeli etinhluphekweni takhe tonkhe." 
Psalms26:1 Hhawu, Simakadze! Ngehlulele, utewubona kutsi ngimsulwa. Ngetsembele kuSimakadze ngaphandle kwekungabata." 
Psalms26:2 Simakadze, ngihlole ungivivinye, uhlolisise inhlitiyo yami nengcondvo yami." 
Psalms26:3 Umusa wakho usembikwami njalo, ngihamba ecinisweni lakho." 
Psalms26:4 Angihambisani nebantfu bemanga, futsi anginabudlelwane nebatentisi." 
Psalms26:5 Ngiyayitondza inhlangano yalababi, futsi angihlali nalababi." 
Psalms26:6 Yebo, Simakadze, ngigeza tandla tami, ngingenacala, ngihambahamba ngaselatini lakho," 
Psalms26:7 kuze ngihlabele ingoma yekubonga ngibalise ngato tonkhe timangaliso takho. 
Psalms26:8 Yebo, Simakadze, ngitsandza indlu lohlala kuyo, lapho kuhlala inkhatimulo yakho khona." 
Psalms26:9 Umphefumulo wami ungawulahli kanye netoni, nekuphila kwami ungakulahli kanye nebabulali." 
Psalms26:10 Labantfu benta lokubi njalo, tandla tabo tesekudla tigcwele imidizo." 
Psalms26:11 Kodvwa mine ngihamba ngebucotfo, ngikhulule, ube nemusa kimi." 
Psalms26:12 Lunyawo lwami lume endzaweni lephephile. Simakadze ngiyawumdvumisa emibikwemabandla lamakhulu. 
Psalms27:1 Simakadze usibane sami nensindziso yami. Ngiyakwesaba bani? Simakadze uyinqaba yami yekufihla kuphila kwami. Pho, ngubani lengingamesaba?" 
Psalms27:2 Nangihlaselwa ngulababi betama kungimita bangibulale, ngihlaselwe titsa nalabamelene nami, bayawukhubeka, bawele phansi." 
Psalms27:3 Nome ngingavinjetelwa yimphi, inhlitiyo yami ingeke yesabe; nome titsa tingangihlasela, noko ngiyawuhlala nginelitsemba kuNkulunkulu." 
Psalms27:4 Kunye kuphela lengakucela kuSimakadze, ngiko kodvwa lengikufunako: kutsi ngihlale endlini yaSimakadze onkhe emalanga ekuphila kwami, ngibukisise buhle baSimakadze, ngizindle ngaye ngisethempelini lakhe." 
Psalms27:5 Uyawungibhacisa ngaphansi kweluphahla lwakhe ngelilanga lenhlupheko. Uyawungifihla ethendeni lakhe, angisimise edvwaleni leliphakeme." 
Psalms27:6 Titsa tami letingitungeletile ngiyawutimela ngenhla, nginikele imihlatjelo ngekudvumisa endlini yakhe. Tibongo teNkhosi ngiyawutihlabela ngenjabulo." 
Psalms27:7 Ngive Simakadze, nangikhala kuwe ngelivi lelikhulu, ube nemusa kimi, ungiphendvule." 
Psalms27:8 Wena utsite: “Funani buso bami.” Mine-ke enhlitiyweni yami ngitsi: “Buso bakho, Simakadze, ngiyabufuna.”" 
Psalms27:9 Ungabufihli buso bakho kimi. Ungayincandzi ngentfukutselo inceku yakho, nguwe Somandla, lolusito lwami. Ungangiyekeleli, ungangilahli! Wena unguNkulunkulu wensindziso yami." 
Psalms27:10 Nome bobabe namake bangilahlile, kodvwa wena, Simakadze, utangemukela ungigcine." 
Psalms27:11 Ngifundzise indlela yakho, Simakadze, ungihole endleleni lecondzile ngenca yetitsa tami." 
Psalms27:12 Unganginikeli entsandvweni yalabalwa nami, ngobe bofakazi bemanga bangivukele, baphefumula lusongo nebudlova." 
Psalms27:13 Impela ngiyakholwa nguloku: Buhle baSimakadze ngiyawububona ngisaphila kulomhlaba! 
Psalms27:14 Tsemba kuSimakadze, cina ungadzangali, ube nesibindzi. Yebo, tsemba kuSimakadze." 
Psalms28:1 Ngikhala kuwe, Simakadze, Dvwala lami. Ungabi sihhulu kimi, ngobe nangabe ungangiphendvuli, ngitawufana nalabaya ethuneni." 
Psalms28:2 Lalela livi lekuncusa kwami, nangikhalela kusitwa nguwe, nangisaphakamisela tandla tami endzaweni yakho lengcwelengcwele." 
Psalms28:3 Ungangilahli kanye nalababi, ungangilahli kanye nalabenta lokubi, labakhuluma kuthula nabomakhelwane babo, kantsi etinhlitiyweni tabo bamumetse bubi." 
Psalms28:4 Banike njengekwemisebenti yabo, nanjengekwemisebenti yabo lemibi; baphindzisele ngekwemisebenti yetandla tabo, baphindzisele njengalokubafanele." 
Psalms28:5 Njengobe bangayinaki imisebenti yaSimakadze, nome-ke imisebenti yetandla takhe, ngako-ke utabaphihlita, bangaphindzi babuyele esimeni sabo." 
Psalms28:6 Akabongwe Simakadze, advunyiswe, ngobe ulivile livi lekuncusa kwami." 
Psalms28:7 Simakadze ungemandla ami nesihlangu sami, inhlitiyo yami yetsembele kuye. Wangisita, ngako inhlitiyo yami igcunyagcunyiswa yinjabulo. Ngiyawumbonga ngengoma yami." 
Psalms28:8 Simakadze ungemandla ebantfu bakhe, usiphephelo sekusindzisa logcotjiwe wakhe." 
Psalms28:9 Sindzisa sive sakho, ubusise labo labalifa lakho. Beluse ubetfwale, kuze kube phakadze naphakadze." 
Psalms29:1 Dvumisani Simakadze nine tingilosi telizulu! Simakadze mnikeni bukhosi nemandla! 
Psalms29:2 Libito laSimakadze linikeni bukhosi lobulifanele. Khontani Simakadze ngetembatfo tebungcwele. 
Psalms29:3 Liphimbo laSimakadze lisetikwemanti, Nkulunkulu weludvumo uyadvuma, Simakadze usetikwemanti lamanyenti." 
Psalms29:4 Liphimbo laSimakadze linemandla. Liphimbo laSimakadze linebukhosi. 
Psalms29:5 Liphimbo laSimakadze lifohlota tihlahla temisedari, Simakadze ufohlota imisedari yaseLebanoni." 
Psalms29:6 Wenta lemisedari yaseLebanoni itjakadvule njengelinkhonyane; ente iLebanoni neSiriyoni itjakadvule njengenkhabi lencane yesiganga. 
Psalms29:7 Liphimbo laSimakadze libaneka emalangabi emlilo. 
Psalms29:8 Liphimbo laSimakadze linyakatisa lihlane. Simakadze utfutfumelisa lihlane laseKhadeshi. 
Psalms29:9 Liphimbo laSimakadze litalisa tinyamatane liphundle emahlatsi asale akhanya, nelithempeli lonkhe lidvumisa ngekumemeta ngavi linye, litsi: “Ludvumo!”" 
Psalms29:10 Simakadze usesihlalweni sebukhosi, ubusa zamcolo. Simakadze usesihlalweni sebukhosi, kuze kube phakadze naphakadze." 
Psalms29:11 Simakadze bantfu bakhe uyawubanika emandla! Simakadze, bantfu bakhe uyawubabusisa ngekuthula!" 
Psalms30:1 Ngiyawukudvumisa, Simakadze, ngobe ungenyule ebunzimeni, wala kutsi titsa tami titijabulise ngami." 
Psalms30:2 Yebo, Simakadze, Nkulunkulu wami, ngatikhalela ngicela lusito kuwe, wena wangiphilisa." 
Psalms30:3 Yebo, Simakadze, ungikhiphile endzaweni yalabafile, waphephisa kuphila kwami emkhatsini walababange ekufeni." 
Psalms30:4 Nine labangcwele bakhe, hlabelani nidvumise Simakadze, nibonge libito lakhe lelingcwele." 
Psalms30:5 Ngobe kutfukutsela kwakhe kuba kwesikhashana, kodvwa umusa wakhe uhlala ukhona njalo umuntfu asaphila. Tinyembeti tingaba khona ebusuku, kodvwa ngakusasa ekuseni kube kujabula." 
Psalms30:6 Mine-ke ngisahleti kahle ngatsi: “Ngingeke ngitanyatanyiswe.” 
Psalms30:7 Yebo, Simakadze, wangimisa ngaba njengentsaba lecinile; kodvwa watsi kube ungifulatsele, ngahlaselwa kwesaba." 
Psalms30:8 Ngakhala kuwe, Simakadze, ngancusa eNkhosini ngatsi:" 
Psalms30:9 “Nzuzo yini leyawutfolakala ngekubhujiswa kwami, nangabe sengiye ethuneni? Bantfu lese babuyele elutfulini bangakubonga yini? Bangakhuluma yini ngekwetsembeka kwakho?" 
Psalms30:10 Ngive, Simakadze, ube nemusa kimi. Yebo, Simakadze, bani ngumsiti wami!”" 
Psalms30:11 Ugucule kulila kwami kwaba ngumgidvo, ungikhumule ingubo yenzilo, wangembatsisa ngekungibopha ngenjabulo." 
Psalms30:12 Ngako-ke umphefumulo wami uyawukudvumisa ungabindzi. Yebo, Simakadze, Nkulunkulu wami, ngiyawukudvumisa phakadze naphakadze." 
Psalms31:1 Simakadze wena usiphephelo sami, ungacali ungijabhise, ngephule ngekulunga kwakho." 
Psalms31:2 Sondzeta indlebe yakho, ungephule ngekushesha, bani lidvwala lesiphephelo sami nenqaba yekungisindzisa." 
Psalms31:3 Wena ulidvwala lami nenqaba yami, ngihole ungicondzise ngenca yelibito lakho." 
Psalms31:4 Ngengcise elugibeni labangiciphe ngalo, ngobe wena usiphephelo sami." 
Psalms31:5 Nginikela umoya wami esandleni sakho, ungihlengile wena Simakadze; unguNkulunkulu lowetsembekile." 
Psalms31:6 Ngiyabatondza labakhonta tithico, mine ngetsembele kuSimakadze." 
Psalms31:7 Ngiyakwetsaba ngijabule ngemusa wakho, ngobe wena ukubonile kuhlupheka kwami, watati tinsizi temphefumulo wami." 
Psalms31:8 Awunginikelanga esandleni sesitsa, tinyawo tami utimise endzaweni lebanti." 
Psalms31:9 Bani nemusa kimi, Simakadze, ngobe ngisenhluphekweni, emehlo ami asaphandlwe kuhlupheka, kantsi umphefumulo wami nemtimba wami kukhatsele tinhlupheko." 
Psalms31:10 Kuphila kwami kuphelela elusizini, neminyaka yami iphelela ekubibitsekeni; emandla ami aphelile ngenca yekona kwami, nematsambo ami acindzetelekile." 
Psalms31:11 Sengaba yinhlamba ngenca yalabamelene nami, ikakhulu kubomakhelwane bami; labangatiko sebayangesaba, nangihlangana nabo endleleni bayangibalekela." 
Psalms31:12 Angisakhunjulwa ngumuntfu, ngifana nalofile; senginjengembita lefile yalahlwa etaleni." 
Psalms31:13 Yebo, ngiva labanyenti bayangihleba, ngihlala ngetfuka tanya. Bangakhela emacebo, bahlose kungibulala." 
Psalms31:14 Kodvwa mine ngetsembele kuwe, Simakadze, ngitsi: “Wena unguNkulunkulu wami.”" 
Psalms31:15 Emalanga ekuphila kwami asesandleni sakho, ngephule esandleni setitsa tami nakubo labangitingelako." 
Psalms31:16 Inceku yakho ayibuve bukhona bakho, ngisindzise ngemusa wakho longapheli." 
Psalms31:17 Simakadze, ungangidvumati nangikubita, lababi abadliswe ngemahloni. Abavalwe imilomo baye ekufeni." 
Psalms31:18 Shangatsi imilomo lecala emanga ingabindziswa, ngobe ihlambalata lolungile, ikhulume ngekutigcabha nangekwedzelela." 
Psalms31:19 Maye, kuyaphuphuma kulunga kwakho, lokulunga lokugcinele labo labakwesabako, ukwente kulabo labakhosele kuwe, ukubonakalise embikwebantfu." 
Psalms31:20 Ubafihla ekusitsekeni kwebukhona bakho, baphephe kulabo lababakhela lugibe; ubabhacisa endlini yakho, baphephe etinkhulumeni tembango." 
Psalms31:21 Akadvunyiswe Simakadze, ngobe umusa wakhe lomangalisako uwentile kimi ngesikhatsi bangivimbetela edolobheni." 
Psalms31:22 Ngetfuka ngadzimate ngakhuluma ngatsi: “Sengisusiwe ngacoshwa ebusweni bakho.” Kodvwa wena wakuva kuncusa kwami, nangicela lusito kuwe." 
Psalms31:23 Tsandzani Simakadze, nine nonkhe labangcwele bakhe. Simakadze uyabagcina labetsembele kuye, kodvwa uphindzisela kamatima kulabatatisako." 
Psalms31:24 Cinani, tinhlitiyo tenu tibe nesibindzi, nonkhe nine lenilindzele Simakadze." 
Psalms32:1 Ubusisiwe umuntfu lotsetselelwe tiphambuko takhe, nalotono takhe tisitjekelwe." 
Psalms32:2 Ubusisiwe umuntfu Nkulunkulu langambaleli tiphambuko takhe, lonenhlitiyo lete inkhohliso." 
Psalms32:3 Nangingasivumi sono sami, ngidzangaliswa kutikhalela lilanga lonkhe, kuze kushaye ekhatsi emnkantjeni." 
Psalms32:4 Imini nebusuku sandla sakho sasimatima etikwami, emandla ami oma njengekomisa kwasehlobo. Cabanga." 
Psalms32:5 Ngasivuma kuwe sono sami, angizange ngisifihle siphambuko sami. Ngatsi: “Ngiyawutivuma kuSimakadze tono tami.” Wena walitsetselela licala lesono sami. Cabanga." 
Psalms32:6 Ngako-ke wonkhe longcwele uyawuthandaza kuwe ngesikhatsi usenekutfolakala. Ngempela ngesikhatsi emagagasi etinhlupheko adlondlobala, angeke amkhukhule." 
Psalms32:7 Wena uyindzawo yami yekubhaca, uyangiphephisa ekuhluphekeni ungisingatse ngetingoma tenkhululeko. Cabanga." 
Psalms32:8 Simakadze utsi: “Mine ngiyawukufundzisa ngikukhombise indlela lofanele kuhamba ngayo, ngikweluleke, liso lami lingesuki kuwe." 
Psalms32:9 Ningabi njengelihhashi nome umnyuzi kona lokungenakucondza kudzimate kucondziswe ngematomu.” 
Psalms32:10 Lomubi unekuhlupheka lokunyenti, kodvwa lowo lowetsembele kuSimakadze uhlala alondvolotwe ngumusa wakhe." 
Psalms32:11 Jabulani kuSimakadze, netsabe, nine lenilungile. Nijabule nonkhe nine lenicotfo ngenhlitiyo." 
Psalms33:1 Yetsabani kuSimakadze, nine lenilungile; ingoma yekudvumisa ibafanele labacotfo." 
Psalms33:2 Simakadze mdvumiseni ngetingubhu, nihlabele kuye ngehabhu lenetintsambo letilishumi." 
Psalms33:3 Mhlabeleleni ingoma lensha, niyidlale ngebuciko, nimemete ngekujabula." 
Psalms33:4 Ngobe livi laSimakadze licondzile, konkhe lakwentako kwetsembekile." 
Psalms33:5 Simakadze utsandza kulunga nebumsulwa. Umhlaba ugcwele umusa waSimakadze. 
Psalms33:6 Emazulu entiwa ngelivi laSimakadze, nako konkhe lokukuwo kwentiwa ngemoya wemlomo wakhe." 
Psalms33:7 Emanti elwandle wawabutsela ndzawonye, kwaba shangatsi uwagcwalisa embiteni; wenta titiba netitibakati tetilwandle." 
Psalms33:8 Umhlaba wonkhe awumesabe Simakadze, bonkhe labasemhlabeni abatfutfumele embikwakhe." 
Psalms33:9 Ngobe wakhuluma, kwenteka; wakhalima, kwaba khona lutfo." 
Psalms33:10 Simakadze ucitsa emacebo etive; ushabalalisa imicabango yebantfu. 
Psalms33:11 Emasu aSimakadze ayawuhlala emile kuze kube phakadze; nemicabango yakhe iyawuhlala imile kuto tonkhe titukulwane. 
Psalms33:12 Sibusisiwe leso sive lesiNkulunkulu waso kunguSimakadze, sive latikhetsele sona kutsi sibe lifa lakhe." 
Psalms33:13 Simakadze, asezulwini, uyabuka emhlabeni abone bonkhe bantfu." 
Psalms33:14 Asesesihlalweni sakhe sebukhosi ubukisisa bonkhe labahleti emhlabeni; 
Psalms33:15 nguye lobumba tonkhe tinhlitiyo tabo, abukisise tonkhe tento tabo." 
Psalms33:16 Kute inkhosi lencoba sitsa ngobe inemabutfo lamanyenti, nesichwaga asincobi ngebunyenti bemandla aso." 
Psalms33:17 Lihhashi lemphi lingeke likukhulule; nome lingaba nemandla lamakhulu, lingeke likusindzise." 
Psalms33:18 Empeleni liso laSimakadze likulabo labamesabako, yebo labo labetsemba umusa wakhe," 
Psalms33:19 kutsi atewukhulula umphefumulo wabo ekufeni abaphilise endlaleni. 
Psalms33:20 Umphefumulo wetfu wetsembele kuSimakadze, yena ungumsiti wetfu nelihawu letfu." 
Psalms33:21 Inhlitiyo yetfu ijabula kuye, ngobe setsembele egameni lakhe lelingcwele." 
Psalms33:22 Yebo, Simakadze! Umusa wakho awusembese njengobe setsembele kuwe." 
Psalms34:1 Simakadze ngiyawumbonga ngato tonkhe tikhatsi, ngimdvumise ngemlomo wami ngingakhawuli." 
Psalms34:2 Umphefumulo wami utigabatisa ngaSimakadze, labahluphekako abeve bajabule." 
Psalms34:3 Dvumisani Simakadze kanye nami, siphakamise libito lakhe kanyekanye." 
Psalms34:4 Ngakhuleka kuSimakadze, wangiphendvula, wangikhulula kuko konkhe kwesaba kwami." 
Psalms34:5 Lababheka kuye bayamamatseka, buso babo bungeke budliwe ngemahloni." 
Psalms34:6 Ngangingumuntfu losihlupheki, ngakhala kuSimakadze, wangiva, wangisindzisa kuko konkhe kuhlupheka kwami." 
Psalms34:7 Ingilosi yaSimakadze yakha umtsangala lotungeleta labo labamesabako, ibakhulule, iphindze ibavikele." 
Psalms34:8 Ase ninambitse nibone kutsi Simakadze muhle unemusa! Ubusisiwe lowo lokhosela kuye! 
Psalms34:9 Yesabani Simakadze, nine labangcwele, ngobe abesweli lutfo labamesabako." 
Psalms34:10 Ngisho nemabhongwana emabhubesi ayeswela alambe, kodvwa labo labafuna Simakadze bangeke beswele lutfo loluhle." 
Psalms34:11 Wotani, bantfwabami, ningilalele, ngitanifundzisa kumesaba Simakadze." 
Psalms34:12 Ngubani lotsandza kuphila adzimate adle tinyoni tebantfwabakhe? 
Psalms34:13 Lowo-ke akagcine lulwimi lwakhe ebubini, netindzebe takhe tingakhulumi emanga." 
Psalms34:14 Khwesha kulokubi wente lokuhle; funisisa kuthula, ukubambisise." 
Psalms34:15 Emehlo aSimakadze akesuki kulabalungile, tindlebe takhe atisuki ekukhaleni kwabo." 
Psalms34:16 Buso baSimakadze buphambene nalabenta lokubi, kuze abashabalalise, bangabe basakhunjulwa emhlabeni." 
Psalms34:17 Labalungile nabakhala bacela lusito, Simakadze uyabeva, abakhulule kuto tonkhe tinhlupheko tabo." 
Psalms34:18 Simakadze uhlala asedvute nabo labanetinhlitiyo letephukile uyabasindzisa labanemoya lowephukile. 
Psalms34:19 Lolungile uhlala ajingwe tinhlupheko letinyenti, kodvwa Simakadze umkhulula kuto tonkhe," 
Psalms34:20 alondvolote onkhe ematsambo akhe, kungephuki ngisho nome linye." 
Psalms34:21 Sikhohlakali siyawubulawa ngulokubi, nalabatondza lolungile bayawudliwa licala." 
Psalms34:22 Simakadze uyakuhlenga kuphila kwetinceku takhe, labakhosela kuye bangeke badliwe licala." 
Psalms35:1 Cabana nalabo labacabana nami, ulwe nalabo labalwa nami, Simakadze." 
Psalms35:2 Tsatsa lihawu lelincane nalelikhulu, uphutfume utengisita!" 
Psalms35:3 Hoshula sikhali sakho, uvimbe labo labangicoshako; khuluma emphefumulweni wami, utsi: “Mine ngiyinsindziso yakho!”" 
Psalms35:4 Shangatsi bangajabha, bahlazeke, labo labafuna umphefumulo wami; shangatsi bangahlakateka labo labacondze kungicitsa." 
Psalms35:5 Ababe njengemakhoba wona apheshulwa ngumoya, ingilosi yaSimakadze isabadvungulula." 
Psalms35:6 Indlela yabo ayihlwe, ishelele, ingilosi yaSimakadze isabacosha." 
Psalms35:7 Njengobe bangibekele lugibe ngaphandle kwesono, bangimbela umgodzi lolugibe ngingenacala," 
Psalms35:8 shangatsi bangehlelwa yimbhubhiso ngekutumeka lokukhulu, nelugibe labangetsiye ngalo lubambe bona. Umgodzi lolugibe labangetsiye ngawo uhholokoshisele bona, babhubhe." 
Psalms35:9 Ngako umphefumulo wami uyawujabula kuSimakadze, ujabule nangensindziso yakhe." 
Psalms35:10 Ematsambo onkhe ami ayawutsi: “Yebo, Simakadze, ngubani lofana nawe, wena lokhulula lobutsakatsaka etandleni tesichwaga, ukhulule lobutsakatsaka naloweswele etandleni temcindzeteli?”" 
Psalms35:11 Kuvumbuka bofakazi labanebudlova, bangibuta tintfo lengingatati." 
Psalms35:12 Bangiphindzisela lokuhle ngalokubi, umphefumulo wami bawudzabukisile." 
Psalms35:13 Kantsi nakugula bona, mine ngembatsa inzilo; umphefumulo wami ngawugongonya ngekuzila, noko ngacinisela ekuthandazeni." 
Psalms35:14 Kimi kwafanana nekutsi babangani bami nome bomnaketfu. Ngahamba ngikhala, kwaba shangatsi ngifelwe ngumake, ngadzabuka ngaba nelusizi." 
Psalms35:15 Kodvwa kwatsi nangikhubeka ngiwa, batsakasa, bahlangana ndzawonye; bahlanganela kumelana nami, tinkhubela lengingatati tingihlanganyela tinginyembenye siphelane." 
Psalms35:16 Labantfu bashuca nalabahlambalata Nkulunkulu, bahlose bubi ngami." 
Psalms35:17 Simakadze, kuyawuze kube ngunini ungibukelela? Ngisindzise ebudloveni babo, wephule umphefumulo wami kulamabhubesi!" 
Psalms35:18 Ngiyawubonga ebandleni lelikhulu ngikudvumise nasemkhambatsini lomkhulu webantfu. 
Psalms35:19 Ungativumeli titsa tami, letingicambela emanga, kutsi titijabulise ngami. Ungabavumeli labangitondzela lite kutsi baficelane emehlo ngami, bangente inhlekisa." 
Psalms35:20 Abakhulumi lokumele kuthula, kodvwa bacala tindzaba letingemanga ngebantfu labanekuthula eveni." 
Psalms35:21 Bakhamise imilomo yabo, bakhuluma baphambane nami, batsi: “Hha! Hha! Sikubonile lokukhulu!”" 
Psalms35:22 Nawe, Simakadze, wakubona lokwenteka; ngako-ke phutfuma ungabindzi, ungakhweshi kimi, Simakadze." 
Psalms35:23 Phaphama uvuke, ungiphutfume, Nkulunkulu wami, Nkhosi yami, ngikhulumele ungimele ecaleni lami." 
Psalms35:24 Awu, Simakadze, Nkulunkulu wami, ngehlulele ngekulunga kwakho; ungabavumeli kutsi bangente inhlekisa." 
Psalms35:25 Ungabavumeli bangicoloshele, batsi: “Yehhehhe! Nako-ke lebesikufuna!” Ungabavumeli bakhulume batsi: “Sesimehlulile.”" 
Psalms35:26 Bonkhe labatsakasela kuhlupheka kwami abahlazeke, badliwe ngemahloni, abembatsiswe emahloni nelihlazo labo labangicoloshelako." 
Psalms35:27 Labo labatsakasele kutsi ngimsulwa abamemete ngekujabula batfokote, njalonjalo, batsi: “Akadvunyiswe Simakadze, lojabulela inhlalakahle yenceku yakhe!”" 
Psalms35:28 Ngako lulwimi lwami luyakhuluma, lumemetele ngekulunga kwakho, lukudvumise onkhe emalanga." 
Psalms36:1 Sono siyakhuluma ekujuleni kwenhlitiyo yalomubi. Yebo, lomubi akamesabi Nkulunkulu." 
Psalms36:2 Utiphakamisa kangangekutsi akabuboni nebubi besono sakhe. 
Psalms36:3 Inkhulumo yakhe ikuganga nemacebo; ubuyekele bucotfo bakhe nekwenta lokulungile. 
Psalms36:4 Utsi alele abe akha emachinga ekuganga, sewuhamba ngendlela lembi, akakwenyanyi lokubi aphambane nako." 
Psalms36:5 Simakadze, umusa wakho ufikela amazulwini, kwetsembeka kwakho kufikela emafini." 
Psalms36:6 Kulunga kwakho kunjengetintsaba letinkhulu, tincumo takho tijule njengelwandle. Simakadze, ulondvolota bantfu netilwane." 
Psalms36:7 Yebo, Nkulunkulu, umusa wakho uligugu lelikhulu. Bantfu basemhlabeni bayakhosela emtfuntini wetimphiko takho." 
Psalms36:8 Badla indvodla yekudla, badzimate besutse endlini yakho, ubanatsise emanti emfuleni wakho wentfokoto," 
Psalms36:9 ngobe nguwe umtfombo wekuphila, kukhanya sikubona ekukhanyeni kwakho." 
Psalms36:10 Chubeka nawo lowo musa wakho, kulabo labakwatiko, uchubeke nekulunga kwakho kulabacotfo ngenhlitiyo." 
Psalms36:11 Ungaluvumeli lunyawo lwalotigcabhako kutsi lunginyatsele, nalabangamesabi Nkulunkulu kutsi bangicoshe." 
Psalms36:12 Lababi bawe khona lapho bawiswe phansi, bangeke bavuke." 
Psalms37:1 Ungatihluphi ngalababi, ungahawukeli kulabenta lokubi." 
Psalms37:2 Ngobe phela lababi bayawusheshe bashate njengetjani, babune njengembuya." 
Psalms37:3 Tsemba kuSimakadze, wente lokuhle, uhlale eveni, uve bumnandzi bekudla emadlelweni laluhlata." 
Psalms37:4 Yenta Simakadze abe yinjabulo yakho, yena-ke utakupha lokufiswa yinhlitiyo yakho." 
Psalms37:5 Nikela indlela yakho kuSimakadze, umetsembe, yena-ke uyawukutsatsela tinyatselo." 
Psalms37:6 Kulunga kwakho uyawukwenta kugcame njengekukhanya, nebucotfo bakho bukhanye njengemini." 
Psalms37:7 Thula embikwaSimakadze, umlindzele ngesineke. Ungahawukeli kumuntfu lonotsa ngebucili bakhe." 
Psalms37:8 Tibambe ungatfukutseli, uluyekele lulaka, ungacansuki, ngobe loko kubanga kona." 
Psalms37:9 Benti balokubi batawushabalaliswa; kodvwa labalindzela Simakadze bayakudla lifa lemhlaba. 
Psalms37:10 Emvakwesikhashana benti balokubi bayawunyamalala, uyakutsi uyabafuna bangabe basatfolakala." 
Psalms37:11 Kodvwa labamnene bayawulidla lifa lemhlaba, bahlale kahle, batijabulise ngekuthula lokukhulu." 
Psalms37:12 Lomubi usongela lolungile, amsinekele ematinyo." 
Psalms37:13 Kodvwa Simakadze uyamhleka lona lomubi, ngobe uyabona kutsi sekuyamphelela." 
Psalms37:14 Lababi bahosha inkemba, bantsale imicibisholo ebutjokini, bafuna kucedza labamphofu nalabeswele babulale labo labahamba ngebucotfo." 
Psalms37:15 Kodvwa inkemba yabo iyawugwaza tinhlitiyo tabo, imicibisholo yabo iyakwephuka." 
Psalms37:16 Lokuhle lokuncane lanako lolungile, kuncono kunemcebo wonkhe walababi." 
Psalms37:17 Emandla alababi ayawukwephulwa, kodvwa Simakadze uyabaphasa labalungile." 
Psalms37:18 Simakadze uyawati emalanga alabacotfo, nelifa labo liyawuhlala lilabo phakadze naphakadze." 
Psalms37:19 Bangeke bajabhiswe ngetikhatsi letimatima, bayawuba nenala ngetikhatsi tendlala." 
Psalms37:20 Kodvwa lababi bayawubhubha, netitsa taSimakadze tishabalale njengeluhlata lwemadlelo, bayawunyamalala baphele njengentfutfu." 
Psalms37:21 Lomubi uyeboleka angabuyiseli, kodvwa lolungile unesihawu, ephane." 
Psalms37:22 Lababusiswe nguSimakadze bayawulidla lifa lemhlaba; kodvwa labacalekiswe nguye bayawushabalaliswa. 
Psalms37:23 Tinyatselo temuntfu ticondziswa nguSimakadze. Simakadze uyaticinisa tinyatselo temuntfu lomjabulisako. 
Psalms37:24 Nome awa, angeke ahlale angavuki, ngobe Simakadze ubamba sandla sakhe." 
Psalms37:25 Bengingumntfwana, manje sengimdzala, angizange sengimbone lolungile alahliwe, ngisho nebantfwabakhe abahambi bacela kudla." 
Psalms37:26 Unesihawu lonkhe lilanga, ebolekise, nebantfwana bakhe basibusiso." 
Psalms37:27 Khwesha ebubini, wente lokuhle; uhlale uphila njalonjalo." 
Psalms37:28 Ngobe Simakadze uyakutsandza kwenta tintfo ngendlela lefanele, angeke abayekelele labangcwele bakhe. Labalungile bayawulondvoloteka phakadze naphakadze; kodvwa bantfwana balomubi bayawushabalaliswa." 
Psalms37:29 Labalungile bayawudla lifa lemhlaba, bahlale kulo kuze kube phakadze." 
Psalms37:30 Tindzebe talolungile tikhuluma inhlakanipho, lulwimi lwakhe lukhuluma loko lokufanele." 
Psalms37:31 Umtsetfo waNkulunkulu uhlala usenhlitiyweni yakhe njalo, nekuhamba kwakhe akuphambuki." 
Psalms37:32 Lomubi utingela lolungile, ucondze kutsi ambulale." 
Psalms37:33 Simakadze angeke amyekelele esandleni salomubi, futsi lowo lolungile angeke alahlwe ngelicala, nakehlulelwa." 
Psalms37:34 Tsemba Simakadze, ugcine indlela yakhe, yena uyawukuphakamisa udle lifa lemhlaba ubone kushabalaliswa kwalababi." 
Psalms37:35 Ngake ngabona lomubi asidlova, watenweba njengesihlahla semsedari waseLebanoni." 
Psalms37:36 Wafa, kwaba kunyamalala kwakhe; ngabatse ngiyamfuna wangete watfolakala." 
Psalms37:37 Ubombekisa lolungile, umcaphelisise locotfo, ngobe umuntfu wekuthula unelikusasa lelihle;" 
Psalms37:38 kodvwa lababi bayawubhujiswa nya, nebantfwababo bate likusasa." 
Psalms37:39 Insindziso yalabalungile iphuma kuSimakadze, usiphephelo sabo ngesikhatsi sekuhlupheka." 
Psalms37:40 Simakadze uyabasita abakhulule, ubephula abasindzise kulababi, ngobe babalekela kuye, abe siphephelo sabo." 
Psalms38:1 Awu, Simakadze, ungangikhahli ngentfukutselo yakho, ungangijezisi ngelulaka lwakho." 
Psalms38:2 Imicibisholo yakho ingihlabe yangena, nesandla sakho sehlele etikwami." 
Psalms38:3 Sekute imphilo emtimbeni wami, ngenca yelulaka lwakho; kute ngisho nekuthula ematsanjeni ami, ngenca yesono sami." 
Psalms38:4 Tono tami tingigabhile, ngisesiswa ngumtfwalo wato losindzako." 
Psalms38:5 Tilondza tami tinuka luvundze, tincinca bovu, ngenca yebulima bami," 
Psalms38:6 ngikhonkhobele, ngatfotjiswa kakhulu, ngihamba ngikhala lilanga lonkhe." 
Psalms38:7 Lukhalo lwami lucacamba kakhulu, sekute imphilo emtimbeni wami." 
Psalms38:8 Ngibutsakatsaka, ngidvubuteke kabi, ngiyabubula ngenca yekutfutfumela enhlitiyweni yami." 
Psalms38:9 Nkhosi, kufisa kwami konkhe uyakwati, kububula kwami akukafihleki kuwe." 
Psalms38:10 Inhlitiyo yami iyagcuma, ngiphelelwa ngemandla, emehlo ami asacundzekile, akasaboni." 
Psalms38:11 Bangani bami nebazalwane bami sebangikhweshele, ngenca yemanceba ami; ngisho nebaketfu imbala sebeme lapha khashane." 
Psalms38:12 Bantfu labacondze kungibulala bangetsiye ngetingibe, labacondze kungilimata bakhuluma ngekungicitsa bangibulale, sonkhe sikhatsi bakha emacebo ebubi ngami." 
Psalms38:13 Kodvwa mine, nginjengesihhulu, angiva; nginjengesimungulu, angikhulumi." 
Psalms38:14 Nginjengendvodza lengeva etindlebeni, nalengakwati kutikhulumela." 
Psalms38:15 Mine-ke, Simakadze, ngime ngetsembele kuwe, nguwe, Nkhosi, Nkulunkulu wami lotawuphendvula." 
Psalms38:16 Ngobe enhlitiyweni yami ngitsite: “Bangahle bajabule ngami ekusheleleni kwelunyawo lwami. Shangatsi bangete bacolosha ngami.” 
Psalms38:17 Ngobe sengisezingeni lekuwa, nebuhlungu bami abusuki kimi." 
Psalms38:18 Ngiyalivuma licala lekona kwami, ngidzabukile ngenca yesono sami." 
Psalms38:19 Titsa tami tiphila kahle tinemandla, banyenti nalabangitondza ngaphandle kwesici." 
Psalms38:20 Labo labangiphindzisela lokubi ngalokuhle, batitsa tami, ngobe ngilandzela lokulungile." 
Psalms38:21 Hhawu, Simakadze! Ungangilahli! Nkulunkulu wami, ungakhweshi kimi!" 
Psalms38:22 Phutfuma ungisite, Nkhosi, nsindziso yami!" 
Psalms39:1 Ngacabanga ngatsi: “Ngiyawunakekela tindlela tami, kuze ngingoni ngelulwimi lwami, umlomo wami ngiyakuwufaka sifonyo, yingci nangisesembikwalomubi.”" 
Psalms39:2 Ngaba simungulu, ngabindza, ngangete ngasho lutfo nangalokuhle. Tinhlungu tadlanga." 
Psalms39:3 Inhlitiyo yami yavutsa, yashisa ngekhatsi kwami, ngisacabanga ngizindla ngaloko, kwaphembeka umlilo kimi, ngadzimate ngakhuluma ngatsi:" 
Psalms39:4 “Simakadze, ngatise sigcino sami, ungatise nebungako bekuphila kwami, ncono ngati kutsi ngiyendlula lapha emhlabeni.”" 
Psalms39:5 Imihla yami ingangemphama yesandla. Kuphila kwami kubukeka kulite kuwe. Impela, kuphila kwemuntfu kunjengenkhungu. Cabanga." 
Psalms39:6 Impela, kuphila kwemuntfu kunjengesitfunti. Utihlupha ngelite nje. Ucongelela ingcebo, akabati labatawuyidla." 
Psalms39:7 Manje-ke, Nkhosi, ngisalindzeleni? Litsemba lami likuwe." 
Psalms39:8 Ngikhulule kuto tonkhe tiphambuko tami, ungavumi ngibe yinhlekisa yetilima." 
Psalms39:9 Ngiyawuvala umlomo wami ngingasho lutfo, ngobe kunguwe longente ngahlupheka." 
Psalms39:10 Susa kimi umvimba wakho lobuhlungu, sengifile tidvubule tekushaya kwakho." 
Psalms39:11 Nawekhuta umuntfu, umjezisa ngenca yekona kwakhe, umhlikite njengendvwangu lenhle kakhulu nayidliwa ngumvunya. Impela, kuphila kwemuntfu kunjengenkhungu. Cabanga." 
Psalms39:12 Hhawu, Simakadze! Lalela umkhuleko wami, ubeke indlebe yakho ekuncuseni kwami, ungatitibi tinyembeti tekukhala kwami. Ngobe mine ngingumfokati lokhosele kuwe, ngisihambi njengabokhokho bami bonkhe." 
Psalms39:13 Ngiyekele! Ungabe uloku ungigolotele, ngobe ngifuna kuphindze ngijabule, ngingakahambi emhlabeni." 
Psalms40:1 Lusito lwaNkulunkulu ngalulindzela ngesineke, wavula indlebe yakhe, wakuva kuncusa kwami." 
Psalms40:2 Wangikhipha emgodzini wekufa, wangikhipha eludzakeni lolubishako, wasimisa tinyawo tami etikwelidvwala, wacinisa kuhamba kwami." 
Psalms40:3 Wafaka ingoma lensha emlonyeni wami, ingoma yekudvumisa Nkulunkulu wetfu. Labanyenti bayawubona bamesabe, babeke litsemba labo kuSimakadze." 
Psalms40:4 Ubusisiwe umuntfu lobeke litsemba lakhe kuNkulunkulu, longagucukeli kulabatigabatisako, nakulabo labedukela etithicweni." 
Psalms40:5 Yebo, Simakadze, Nkulunkulu wami, timangaliso losentele tona tinyenti, tingeke tibalwe, wasikhumbula tikhatsi letinyenti. Kute nome munye nje lofana nawe! Kube bengingatilandzisa tonkhe betingeke tibaleke tonkhe." 
Psalms40:6 Awujatjuliswa ngumhlatjelo nemnikelo, kodvwa ujatjuliswa kusebentisa tindlebe longiphe tona. Awuzange sewusho kutsi ufuna umhlatjelo loshiswa samuku, nome umnikelo wekuhlawulela sono." 
Psalms40:7 Ngase ngiphendvula ngitsi: “Naku ngilapha! Emculwini wencwadzi kubhalwe ngami. 
Psalms40:8 Yebo, Nkulunkulu wami, kujabula kwami kusekwenteni intsandvo yakho, imiyalo yakho isenhlitiyweni yami.”" 
Psalms40:9 Kulunga kwakho ngakushumayela kulabanyenti. Angikatibambi tindzebe tami, naloko nguwe lokwatiko, Simakadze." 
Psalms40:10 Kulunga kwakho angikakufihli enhlitiyweni yami. Ngashumayela ngekwetsembeka kwakho nangensindziso yakho. Umusa wakho neliciniso lakho angilifihlanga emikhambatsini. 
Psalms40:11 Hhawu, Simakadze, ungangigodleli sihawu sakho; shangatsi umusa wakho, neliciniso lakho, nekwetsembeka kwakho kungangigcina njalonjalo." 
Psalms40:12 Ngitungeletwe tinhlupheko letinyenti, licala lekona lingigabhe kangangekutsi angisaboni nekubona. Letinhlupheko tinyenti tendlula tinwele tenhloko yami, sengilahlekelwe litsemba." 
Psalms40:13 Akube kuhle kuwe, Simakadze! Ase ungikhulule, Simakadze! Phutfuma ungisite." 
Psalms40:14 Bonkhe bantfu labafuna kungibulala abahlazeke basangane. Bantfu labangifisela lokubi abancandzekiswe bahlazekile. 
Psalms40:15 Abashaywe luvalo ngenca yelihlazo labo, bonkhe labo labasho kimi batsi: “Yehhehhe!”" 
Psalms40:16 Abatfokote bajabule kuwe, bonkhe labakufunako, labatsandza insindziso yakho basho njalo batsi: “Akudvunyiswe Simakadze!”" 
Psalms40:17 Nome ngihlupheka ngimphofu, kepha iNkhosi iyanginakekela. Wena ungumsiti wami nemkhululi wami; Nkulunkulu wami, ungalibali." 
Psalms41:1 Ubusisiwe umuntfu lonakekela lobutsakatsaka, Simakadze uyawumsindzisa ngelilanga lekuhlupheka." 
Psalms41:2 Simakadze uyawumlondvolotela imphilo yakhe; uyawumenta abe ngulonenhlanhla emhlabeni, angeke amnikele entsandvweni yetitsa takhe." 
Psalms41:3 Simakadze uyawumcinisa nakagula, amphilise nakubo bonkhe butsakatsaka bakhe." 
Psalms41:4 Mine-ke ngatsi: “Awu, Simakadze, ngihawukele, ungiphilisele umphefumulo wami, ngobe ngonile kuwe.”" 
Psalms41:5 Titsa tami tikhuluma kabi ngami, titsi: “Kantsi yena uyawufa nini libito lakhe litewuphela?”" 
Psalms41:6 Nakukhona lotengihlola ufike atentise angitsatse ematfoko, kantsi enhlitiyweni yakhe ugaya tiboti ngami, utsi angesuka lapho ayifafate lonkhe live." 
Psalms41:7 Bonkhe labangitondzako bahlebelana ngami, basonge lokubi kakhulu ngami." 
Psalms41:8 Batsi: “Ubanjwe sifo lesesabekako, angeke aphindze avuke.”" 
Psalms41:9 Ngisho nemngani wami lengangimetsemba, nalengangidla esitjeni sinye naye, sewungidlangele ngebunyoka nebumbulu." 
Psalms41:10 Kepha wena, Simakadze, ngihawukele ungiphilise, kuze ngitiphindzisele kubo." 
Psalms41:11 Ngati kahle kamhlophe kutsi wena uyangitsandza, ngobe sitsa sami awukasivumeli kutsi sitigabatise ngekungehlula." 
Psalms41:12 Yebo, ungisimisa ngebucotfo bami ungimise ebukhoneni bakho, phakadze naphakadze." 
Psalms41:13 Akabongwe Simakadze, Nkulunkulu wema-Israyeli, kusukela phakadze kuze kube phakadze. Amen! Yebo, Amen!" 
Psalms42:1 Njengendluzele yomele emanti emfula, kanjalo nemphefumulo wami ulangatelela wena, Nkulunkulu." 
Psalms42:2 Umphefumulo wami womele Nkulunkulu, yena lowo Nkulunkulu lophilako. Ngiyawufika nini ngibonakale embikwaNkulunkulu?" 
Psalms42:3 Tinyembeti tami tikudla kwami busuku nemini, ngobe lilanga lonkhe bantfu bangichwephesha batsi: “Kantsi ushonephi loNkulunkulu wakho?”" 
Psalms42:4 Nangikhumbula emuva, inhlitiyo yami iyabibitseka ngekhatsi kwami. Ngangihamba nesicuku lesikhulu ngisihola embili ngiya endlini yaNkulunkulu sihlabela ngekujabula lokukhulu." 
Psalms42:5 Mphefumulo wami, udzabukeleni? Uvungamelani ngekhatsi kimi? Mani kuNkulunkulu, ngobe ngisetawumdvumisa uMsindzisi wami naNkulunkulu wami." 
Psalms42:6 Umphefumulo wami udzabukile ngekhatsi kwami, ngako-ke ngiyawukukhumbula ngiseseJordane, nasetintsabeni taseHemoni netaseMisari." 
Psalms42:7 Ngiva umsindvo wemanti lageletako, titiba nemabhudlo timemetana todvwana, shangatsi ngigujetelwa ngemagagasi netikhukhula temfula logcwele." 
Psalms42:8 Shangatsi Simakadze angakhombisa umusa wakhe kimi emini, kuze kutsi ebusuku ngihlabele ngimdvumise, ngikhuleke kuNkulunkulu wekuphila kwami." 
Psalms42:9 Ngikhuluma kuNkulunkulu ngitsi: “Dvwala lami, kwentiwa yini kutsi ungikhohlwe? Kungani ngihambe ngilila ngenca yekucindzetelwa sitsa?”" 
Psalms42:10 Shangatsi kufohloteka ematsambo ami titsa natingihheletela lilanga lonkhe, titsi: “Kantsi uphi loNkulunkulu wakho?”" 
Psalms42:11 Mphefumulo wami, udzabukeleni? Uvungamelani ngekhatsi kwami? Mani kuNkulunkulu, ngobe ngisetawumdvumisa uMsindzisi wami naNkulunkulu wami." 
Psalms43:1 Hhawu Nkulunkulu, ngikhulumele ungimele ecaleni lami. Ungephule esiveni lesingamesabi Nkulunkulu, ungikhulule nakumuntfu lonemacebo nalongakalungi!" 
Psalms43:2 Ngobe wena, Nkulunkulu, uyinqaba yami. Ungilahleleni? Kungani ngihambe ngilila ngenca yekucindzetelwa titsa?" 
Psalms43:3 Tfumela kukhanya kwakho neliciniso lakho, kutsi kutengihola. Shangatsi kungangiyisa entsabeni lengcwele lapho kuhlala wena khona." 
Psalms43:4 Ngiyawusondzela elatini laNkulunkulu, kuNkulunkulu longumtfombo wenjabulo yami, ngikudvumise ngehabhu, ngidvumise Nkulunkulu, Nkulunkulu wami." 
Psalms43:5 Mphefumulo wami, udzabukeleni? Uvungamelani ngekhatsi kwami? Mani kuNkulunkulu, ngobe ngisetawumdvumisa uMsindzisi wami naNkulunkulu wami." 
Psalms44:1 Yebo, Nkulunkulu! Sivile ngetindlebe tetfu bokhokho nabasitekela, tintfo lewawutenta ngemalanga abo, ngemalanga asendvulo." 
Psalms44:2 Nguwe lowacitsa tive ngesandla sakho, wahlanyela bokhokho eveni lato; tive watidvungulula, wahlumisa bobabe betfu." 
Psalms44:3 Ngobe live abalichwaganga ngenkemba yabo ngisho nekuncoba abancobanga ngetikhwepha tabo; kodvwa bancoba ngesandla sakho sekudla, nangengalo yakho, nangekukhanya kwebuso bakho, ngobe wena wawubatsandza." 
Psalms44:4 Yebo, Nkulunkulu, wena uyiNkhosi yami, yelekelela bakaJakobe ubente bancobe." 
Psalms44:5 Labaphambene natsi sitawubehlula sibagicite ngawe, labasivukelako sitabapitjita ngelibito lakho." 
Psalms44:6 Angiketsembeli ebutjokini bami, nenkemba yami ayisiyo lengangisindzisa." 
Psalms44:7 Kodvwa wena usisindzisile kulabamelene natsi, wabajabhisa labo labasitondzako." 
Psalms44:8 Sitincoma ngaNkulunkulu lilanga lonkhe, libito lakho siyawulidvumisa phakadze naphakadze. Cabanga." 
Psalms44:9 Noko sewusilahlile wasihlazisa, awusaphumi kanye nemabutfo etfu." 
Psalms44:10 Usicoshise ngetitsa tetfu, nalabamelene natsi bayatitapela nje lapha kitsi." 
Psalms44:11 Usente saba njengetimvu tekuhlatjwa, wasisakatela etiveni tonkhe." 
Psalms44:12 Sive sakho usitsengise ngelinani lelincane, wangete walizuza linani lelikhulu." 
Psalms44:13 Usente saba yinhlekisa kubomakhelwane betfu, wasenta sihhala nakulabo labasihacile." 
Psalms44:14 Usente siga emkhatsini wetive, wasenta saba yintfo yekubukelwa phansi." 
Psalms44:15 Ngihlala ngihlazekile sonkhe sikhatsi, sengize ngidliwa ngemahloni," 
Psalms44:16 ngenca yekutsi ngiva bayangihhalatisa bangetfuke, nangenca yekubona sitsa nemphindziseli wami." 
Psalms44:17 Konkhe loku kusehlele, kodvwa asikakukhohlwa wena, futsi asikasephuli sivumelwane sakho." 
Psalms44:18 Inhlitiyo yetfu ayikakuhlubuki, kantsi netinyawo tetfu atikaphambuki endleleni yakho," 
Psalms44:19 noko usipitjitele ehlane letimpungutja, wasembesa ngelitfunti lekufa." 
Psalms44:20 Kube bese silikhohliwe libito laNkulunkulu wetfu, safuna lusito kulabanye bonkulunkulu," 
Psalms44:21 Nkulunkulu abengeke akwati yini loko? Ngobe yena wati timfihlo tenhlitiyo. 
Psalms44:22 Yebo, ngenca yakho sibulawa lonkhe lilanga, sitsatfwe njengetimvu timele kuhlatjwa." 
Psalms44:23 Hhawu, Simakadze, phaphama! Ulaleleni? Vuka, ungasiyekeleli kokuphela." 
Psalms44:24 Ubufihleleni buso bakho? Ukukhohlweleni kuhlushwa nekucindzetelwa kwetfu? 
Psalms44:25 Sidzicilelwe phansi elutfulini, tisu tetfu tinamatsele emhlabatsini." 
Psalms44:26 Sukuma utewusisita! Sihlenge ngenca yemusa wakho. 
Psalms45:1 Inhlitiyo yami itsintsekile ngalendzaba, ngigeceta nginkentete; ngibalisa ngetibongo enkhosini, lulwimi lwami lunjengelutsi lwekubhala lwalobhala ngebungcweti." 
Psalms45:2 Awusemuhle nekadzeni, uphuma embili, umlomo wakho uphuphuma umusa, ngobe Nkulunkulu ukubusise phakadze naphakadze." 
Psalms45:3 Hhawu, chawe lemachawe, bophela inkemba yakho elukhalweni lwakho, uhlome ngenkhatimulo yakho nangebukhosi bakho." 
Psalms45:4 Yebo, gibela ngebukhosi bakho, uphume imphi, uyewuncoba, umele liciniso, uvikele nekulunga; shangatsi sandla sakho sangesekudla singafundzisa imisebenti yakho lesabekako." 
Psalms45:5 Imicibisholo yakho iyakhalipha, ihlaba inhlitiyo yetitsa tenkhosi, udle netive, utilahle ngaphansi kwakho." 
Psalms45:6 Sihlalo sakho sebukhosi, Nkulunkulu, saphakadze naphakadze, kubusa kwakho kumsulwa, akukhetsi." 
Psalms45:7 Kulunga uyakutsandza, kodvwa uyakutondza lokubi. Ngako-ke, Nkulunkulu, longuNkulunkulu wakho, ukugcobise ngemafutsa enjabulo, wakuphakamisa ngetulu kwebangani bakho." 
Psalms45:8 Tonkhe tingubo takho titselwe ngemakha emure, newenhlaba, newemphepho. Esigodlweni lesihlotjiswe ngekwematinyo endlovu, kuvakala tintsambo letikhala kamnandzi naletitfokotisako." 
Psalms45:9 Emadvodzakati emakhosi asemkhatsini wetintfombi takho telikhetselo; nangesandleni sakho sangesekudla kume indlovukazi levunule tembatfo tegolide yase-Ofiri. 
Psalms45:10 Kuwe-ke, ndvodzakati yami, ngitsi: “Vula indlebe yakho, ulalele naku lengikushoko: Sikhohlwe sive sakini nebakenu." 
Psalms45:11 Lobuhle bakho-ke buyawuyikhanga lenkhosi; uyitfobele, ngobe ingumyeni wakho." 
Psalms45:12 Wena, ndvodzakati yaseThire, tingcunga tiyawutincengela kuwe ngekukuletsela tipho.”" 
Psalms45:13 Kucwebetela kodvwa lokusesigodlweni, inkhosatana yembetse tingubo letelukwe ngegolide." 
Psalms45:14 Imikiswa enkhosini, yembetse bukhatikhati, ihamba netintfombi letitimphekeleteli, letishuca emvakwayo, nato tiya kuyo." 
Psalms45:15 Bamikiswa kuyo ngekujabula nangekutsakasa, nabangena esigodlweni sengwenyama." 
Psalms45:16 Emadvodzana akho, nkhosi, ayawubasetikhundleni taboyise, uyakuwabeka abe tikhulu eveni lonkhe." 
Psalms45:17 Libito lakho ngiyakulenta likhunjulwe titukulwane ngetitukulwane, ngako-ke tive tiyawukubonga kuze kube phakadze naphakadze." 
Psalms46:1 Nkulunkulu siphephelo setfu nemandla etfu, utfolakala alusito ekuhluphekeni." 
Psalms46:2 Ngako-ke kute lesikwesabako: nome kugucuka umhlaba utanyatanyiswe, nome tintsaba tingacwila ekujuleni kwelwandle," 
Psalms46:3 nome lwandle lugubha luhlokoma, nome tintsaba setitanyatanyiswa lulaka lwalo. Cabanga." 
Psalms46:4 Kukhona umfula lonemifudlana lejabulisa labo labasekhaya laNkulunkulu, endlini lengcwele yaLosetikwako Konkhe." 
Psalms46:5 Nkulunkulu uhlala kulelo khaya, lingeke litanyatanyiswe, Nkulunkulu uyawulisita ekuseni entsatsakusa." 
Psalms46:6 Tive tiyavungama, imibuso iyatamatama; uvakalisa livi lakhe, umhlaba uncibilike." 
Psalms46:7 Nkulunkulu Somandla unatsi, Nkulunkulu waJakobe usiphephelo setfu. Cabanga." 
Psalms46:8 Wotani nitewubona imisebenti yaSimakadze, emhlabeni wente tintfo letimangalisako." 
Psalms46:9 Uvimba acedze timphi kutsi tichubeke emhlabeni wonkhe jikelele. Ufohlota butjoki, ephule sikhali, tincola atishise ngemlilo." 
Psalms46:10 Yena utsi: “Yekelani kulwa! Kufanele nati kutsi mine nginguNkulunkulu. Ngengamela tive kanye nemhlaba wonkhe.” 
Psalms46:11 Nkulunkulu Somandla unatsi, Nkulunkulu waJakobe usiphephelo setfu. Cabanga." 
Psalms47:1 Nonkhe nine tive, shayani tandla. Hlokomani, nidvumise Nkulunkulu!" 
Psalms47:2 Ngobe Simakadze, Losetikwako Konkhe uyesabeka, uyiNkhosi lenkhulu etikwemhlaba wonkhe." 
Psalms47:3 Wagoba tive, netinhlanga tasikhotsamela, sahamba etikwato ngetinyawo." 
Psalms47:4 Wasikhetsela live letfu kutsi libe lifa letfu, leliligugu nakuJakobe lotsandvwa nguNkulunkulu. Cabanga." 
Psalms47:5 Nkulunkulu ukhuphuke ngenhlokomo, Simakadze wenyuke nakukhala licilongo." 
Psalms47:6 Dvumisani Nkulunkulu! Dvumisani! Yidvumiseni iNkhosi yetfu! Yidvumiseni! 
Psalms47:7 Ngobe Nkulunkulu uyiNkhosi yemhlaba wonkhe, mdvumiseni ngetihlabelelo." 
Psalms47:8 Nkulunkulu ubusa etikwetive, Nkulunkulu uhleti esihlalweni sakhe lesingcwele sebukhosi." 
Psalms47:9 Tikhulu tetive tibutsene ndzawonye njengesive saNkulunkulu wa-Abrahama, ngobe tihlangu temhlaba taNkulunkulu. Waphakanyiswa, ubabateka kakhulu!" 
Psalms48:1 Simakadze mukhulu, ufanele kubongwa kakhulu, ubongeka ekhaya laNkulunkulu wetfu, lekuyintsaba yakhe lengcwele." 
Psalms48:2 Yinhle ngekuphakama kwayo, ikujabula kwemhlaba wonkhe. INtsaba iSiyoni isemaphetselweni enyakatfo, ilikhaya leNkhosi lenkhulu." 
Psalms48:3 Nkulunkulu usetindlini talo, naye utibonakalisile kutsi uyinqaba yalo sibili." 
Psalms48:4 Emakhosi-ke wona abutsana, ayawuhlasela iNtsaba iSiyoni." 
Psalms48:5 Atsi kube ayibone amangala, ashaywa luvalo, atsi galu yephuka." 
Psalms48:6 Agcwala emanti emadvolweni, efikelwa buhlungu lobukhulu, njengebemfati lobelekako." 
Psalms48:7 Imikhumbi lemikhulu yaseThashishi, wayifohlota ngemoya wemphumalanga." 
Psalms48:8 Njengobe sivile ngemisebenti layentile Nkulunkulu, namanje sesitibonele ekhaya laNkulunkulu Somandla, ekhaya laNkulunkulu wetfu. Lelo khaya Nkulunkulu uyawulakha, alicinise phakadze naphakadze. Cabanga." 
Psalms48:9 Yebo, Nkulunkulu! Siyazindla ngemusa wakho, sisethempelini lakho." 
Psalms48:10 Yebo, Nkulunkulu! Ludvumo lwakho lufana nelibito lakho, luhamba luze lufike emaphetselweni emhlaba. Sandla sakho sangesekudla sigcwele kulunga." 
Psalms48:11 Shangatsi ingajabula iNtsaba iSiyoni! Shangatsi bantfu bakaJuda bangatfokota, ngenca yetehlulelo takho." 
Psalms48:12 Hambani nitungelete iSiyoni, nijikelete nibale imibhoshongo yayo." 
Psalms48:13 Bukisisani tindvonga tayo, nihambahambe etindlini tayo tebukhosi, nize nilandzise netitukulwane letitako" 
Psalms48:14 kutsi loNkulunkulu unguNkulunkulu wetfu phakadze naphakadze; uyawusihola ngisho nasekufeni. 
Psalms49:1 Vanini loku, nonkhe nine tive! Bekani indlebe, nonkhe nine lenakhile emhlabeni." 
Psalms49:2 Lalelani bantfukatana nani tikhulu, nine tinjinga nani timphuya nonkhe!" 
Psalms49:3 Umlomo wami utawukhuluma lwati, imicabango yenhlitiyo yami ibonakalise kucondza." 
Psalms49:4 Ngiyawubeka indlebe yami ngilalele inkhulumo lenenhlakanipho, ngiphenye imfihlakalo ngekudlala lugubhu lwetintsambo." 
Psalms49:5 Pho, ngitakwesabani ngetikhatsi tekuhlupheka, nangabe bubi bebatingeli bami sebungitungeletile," 
Psalms49:6 labatsembele badzimate bachosha ngebunyenti bengcebo yabo? 
Psalms49:7 Impela kute umuntfu longahlenga umnakabo, nome-ke anike Nkulunkulu intsengo yemphilo yakhe." 
Psalms49:8 Ngobe phela kuhlengwa kwemphefumulo wakhe kubita kakhulu, kute intsengo lengakwenela" 
Psalms49:9 kutsi angachubeka aphile kuze kube phakadze, angayi nekuya nje ethuneni." 
Psalms49:10 Yebo, wonkhe umuntfu uyabona kutsi netihlakaniphi tiyafa njengobe tilima netiphukuphuku tifa, tishiye ingcebo yato kutsi idliwe ngulabanye." 
Psalms49:11 Emathuna alikhaya labo phakadze naphakadze; bayawuhlala kuwo siphelane, nome bake baba nemave letsiwa ngemabito abo." 
Psalms49:12 Umuntfu nome angaba netidvumo, angeke ahlale angafi, unjengetilwane letifa kungabi ndzaba talutfo." 
Psalms49:13 Bukani-ke siphetfo salabo labatetsembako, nesebalandzeli babo labavumelana netinkhulumo tabo. Cabanga." 
Psalms49:14 Banjengetimvu letimele kubulawa, babhekene nekufa. Labacotfo bayawubabusa ngemuso, tidvumbu tabo tibole ethuneni, balahlekelwe nangemakhaya abo." 
Psalms49:15 Kodvwa, Nkulunkulu, umphefumulo wami uyakuwuhlenga emandleni ekufa ngobe uyawungemukela. Cabanga." 
Psalms49:16 Ungesabi lutfo, nakanjinga umuntfu, lapho bunjinga bakhe sebandza;" 
Psalms49:17 ngobe nasafa, kute latawuhamba nako, ngisho nebunjinga bakhe imbala." 
Psalms49:18 Nome umuntfu angatidvumisa abuse asaphila, nome bantfu bangamdvumisa ngebuciko bakhe," 
Psalms49:19 utawuhamba aye kubakubo lase bafa, lapho kunebumnyama baphakadze." 
Psalms49:20 Umuntfu loyingcunga kepha abe ate kucondza, naye uyawufa njengetilwane letifa kungabi ndzaba talutfo." 
Psalms50:1 Nkulunkulu wabonkulunkulu unguSimakadze lokhulumako. Umemetela emhlabeni wonkhe, kusukela emphumalanga kuye enshonalanga." 
Psalms50:2 ESiyoni lenebuhle lobuphelele, kulapho Nkulunkulu akhatimula khona." 
Psalms50:3 Nkulunkulu wetfu uyeta, angeke abindze. Embikwakhe kunemlilo locotfulako, utungeletwe sivunguvungu lesesabekako." 
Psalms50:4 Ubita emazulu ngetulu kanye nemhlaba, kutsi atekwehlulela bantfu bakhe, atsi:" 
Psalms50:5 “Baletseni la bonkhe labangcwele bami labenta nami sivumelwane ngemhlatjelo!” 
Psalms50:6 Emazulu amemetela kulunga kwakhe, ngobe Nkulunkulu ungumehluleli. Cabanga." 
Psalms50:7 “Lalelani-ke, sive sami, nginitjele. Ye Israyeli, nginibeka licala! Ngimi Nkulunkulu, longuNkulunkulu wenu." 
Psalms50:8 Anginitsetsiseli imihlatjelo yenu, yebo, umhlatjelo loshiswa wonkhe uhlala usembikwami sonkhe sikhatsi." 
Psalms50:9 Angidzingi kutsatsa tinkunzi emitini yenu, angidzingi ngisho netiphongo etibayeni tenu imbala," 
Psalms50:10 ngobe tonkhe tilwane tesiganga tami, ngisho netinkhomo leteluke emagcumeni latinkhulungwane ngetinkhulungwane," 
Psalms50:11 ngati tonkhe tinyoni tesiganga, konkhe lokuphilako kwesiganga kwami." 
Psalms50:12 “Kube bengilambile, bengingeke nginitjele, ngobe umhlaba nako konkhe lokukuwo kwami." 
Psalms50:13 Kantsi mine ngiyayidla yini inyama yetinkunzi, nome ngiyayinatsa yini ingati yetiphongo?" 
Psalms50:14 Nikela kuNkulunkulu umnikelo wekubonga, ugcine tetsembiso takho kuLosetikwako Konkhe." 
Psalms50:15 Khala kimi ngetikhatsi tekuhlupheka, ngiyawukukhulula, bese uyangidvumisa.”" 
Psalms50:16 Kodvwa kulomubi Nkulunkulu utsi: “Unalungelo lini lekukhuluma ngetimiso tami uphatse sivumelwane sami ngemlomo wakho? 
Psalms50:17 Ngobe wena uyakutondza kuyalwa, emavi ami uwengca ngetulu." 
Psalms50:18 Utsi ungabona lisela, ube ngematse nelulwimi nalo, umdzibi ndzawonye netiphingi." 
Psalms50:19 “Umlomo wakho ulula ekukhulumeni lokubi, lulwimi lwakho lubumba emacebo nenkhohliso." 
Psalms50:20 Uhlala ngekuhleba umnakenu, unyembenye indvodzana yenyoko." 
Psalms50:21 Loko ukwentile, kodvwa mine ngathula; wenta shangatsi mine ngifanana nawe. Kodvwa sengitakwekhuta, ngitawubeka licala emehlweni akho ubuka." 
Psalms50:22 “Caphelani loku nine lenedzelela Nkulunkulu, funa nginiklebhuklebhule, kubete nalongahle aniphephise." 
Psalms50:23 Lowo lonikela umnikelo wekubonga, uyangidvumisa. Utiphendlela indlela, kutsi ngimkhombise insindziso yaNkulunkulu.”" 
Psalms51:1 Ngihawukele, Nkulunkulu, ngekwemusa wakho; yesula tiphambuko tami ngekwesihawu sakho lesikhulu." 
Psalms51:2 Ngigezisise ebubini bami, ngihlambulule esonweni sami." 
Psalms51:3 Ngobe ngiyatati tiphambuko tami, sono sami sisembikwami njalo." 
Psalms51:4 Ngonile kuwe, wena wedvwa, ngente lokunengekako emehlweni akho; ngako kwehlulela kwakho kumsulwa, nekungilahla kwakho ngelicala kulungile." 
Psalms51:5 Empeleni ngatalwa vele ngisesonweni, ngaba soni kusukela make atsatsa sisu." 
Psalms51:6 Ngempela, wena utsandza liciniso lelingekhatsi enhlitiyweni; ngako-ke uyawungifundzisa timfihlakalo tekuhlakanipha kwakho." 
Psalms51:7 Ngihlambulule ngehisophu, ngitewuhlambuluka. Ngigeze ngibe mhlophe kunangcocwane." 
Psalms51:8 Ngigcwalise ngekujabula lokujulile, kuze kutsi ematsambo ami lephukile atfokote." 
Psalms51:9 Fihla buso bakho etonweni tami, wesule bonkhe bubi bami." 
Psalms51:10 Hhawu, Nkulunkulu, dala kimi inhlitiyo lehlantekile, uvuselele kimi umoya wekulunga." 
Psalms51:11 Ungangicoshi ebusweni bakho, ungangemuki Moya wakho Longcwele." 
Psalms51:12 Buyisela kimi kutfokota kwensindziso yakho, ungisimise ngekungipha umoya lovumako," 
Psalms51:13 ngiyawube sengifundzisa lababi tindlela takho, netoni tiyawuphendvuka tibuyele kuwe." 
Psalms51:14 Hhawu, Nkulunkulu, ngikhulule ecaleni lengati, Nkulunkulu wensindziso yami, khona lulwimi lwami luyawuhlabela kulunga kwakho." 
Psalms51:15 Hhawu, Nkhosi, vula tindzebe temlomo wami, kuze ngivakalise ludvumo lwakho." 
Psalms51:16 Ngobe futsi ungeke weneliswe yimihlatjelo, nome bengingakunika yona, ngisho nemhlatjelo wekushiswa wonkhe ungeke ukhone kukujabulisa." 
Psalms51:17 Umhlatjelo lowemukeleka kuNkulunkulu ngumoya lowephukile nenhlitiyo ledzabukile. Nkulunkulu ngeke awubukele phansi. 
Psalms51:18 Yentela iSiyoni lokuhle ngekwemusa wakho, utakhe kabusha tindvonga taseJerusalema." 
Psalms51:19 Khona-ke uyawujabula ngemihlatjelo lengiyo, ngeminikelo leshiswa yonkhe, khona-ke bayawunikela ngetinkunzi elatini lakho." 
Psalms52:1 Wena sichwaga, utigabatiselani ngalokubi? Umusa waNkulunkulu uyawuma kuze kube phakadze." 
Psalms52:2 Lulwimi lwakho lusonga lokubi lunjengensingo lekhaliphako, wena lowenta emacebo." 
Psalms52:3 Utsandza kakhulu bubi kunebuhle utsandze emanga kunekukhuluma liciniso. Cabanga. 
Psalms52:4 Wena utsandza kulimata bantfu ngelulwimi lwakho. 
Psalms52:5 Ngako-ke Nkulunkulu uyawukubhidlita siphelane, uyawukuhudvula akukhiphe ekhaya lakho, akuzuphune eveni lalabaphilako. Cabanga." 
Psalms52:6 Labacotfo bayawukubona batfutfumele, bamhleke lusulu batsi:" 
Psalms52:7 “Ase nibuke, naso phela sichwaga lesingazange simente Nkulunkulu abe yinqaba yaso, kodvwa setsembela ebunyentini bengcebo yaso, sifuna kuba nemandla ngebunyoka baso.”" 
Psalms52:8 Kodvwa-ke mine ngifana nesihlahla lesiluhlata, nemncumo losendlini yaNkulunkulu. Umusa waNkulunkulu lomile ngetsembele kuwo phakadze naphakadze." 
Psalms52:9 Ngiyawukubonga naphakadze ngaloko lokwentile. Ngiyawumemetela libito lakho emkhatsini walabangcwele, ngobe lona lihle." 
Psalms53:1 Silima sikhuluma enhlitiyweni yaso sitsi: “Kute Nkulunkulu la.” Babi, benta emanyala, kute nome munye lowenta lokulungile." 
Psalms53:2 Nkulunkulu utsi asezulwini abe abuka bonkhe bantfu, kuze atewubona kutsi ukhona yini umuntfu lohlakaniphile, nome munye nje, lofuna Nkulunkulu." 
Psalms53:3 Bonkhe bedukile, bonkhe bonakele, kute lowenta lokulungile; kute, kute ngisho nome munye." 
Psalms53:4 Pho, bate yini lwati labantfu labenta lokubi? Badla bantfu bami kube shangatsi badla sinkhwa, bangathandazi nakuNkulunkulu." 
Psalms53:5 Bayawufikelwa kwesaba lokukhulu, besabe ngisho nelite. Ngobe Nkulunkulu uyawasakata ematsambo alabo labakuhlaselako, uyawubahlazisa, ngobe Nkulunkulu wabadvuba wabalahla." 
Psalms53:6 Shangatsi ingavela eSiyoni insindziso yesive saka-Israyeli. Mhlazana Nkulunkulu acedza lusizi lwebantfu bakhe, aphindze abahlumelelisa, Jakobe uyawujabula, Israyeli atfokote." 
Psalms54:1 Nkulunkulu, ngisindzise ngelibito lakho, ngemandla akho ngente ngingabi nacala." 
Psalms54:2 Nkulunkulu, beka indlebe yakho emthandazweni wami, wemukele loko lengikushoko." 
Psalms54:3 Bafokati bangivukele, bayangihlasela, tidlova letinelunya tifuna kungibulala, atinendzaba naNkulunkulu. Cabanga." 
Psalms54:4 Ngempela, Nkulunkulu ungumsiti wami, Simakadze ungumvikeli wemphilo yami." 
Psalms54:5 Uyawungenanela etitseni tami letenta lokubi, ticitse ngekwetsembeka kwakho." 
Psalms54:6 Ngiyawunikela kuwe, Simakadze, umnikelo wesihle, ngidvumise libito lakho ngobe lona lihle." 
Psalms54:7 Ngobe wena ungikhululile kuyo yonkhe inhlupheko yami; titsa tami ngitibuke ngeliso lekuncoba. 
Psalms55:1 Hhawu, Nkulunkulu, beka indlebe, ulalele umthandazo wami, ungakufulatseli kuncusa kwami." 
Psalms55:2 Nginake, ungiphendvule. Imicabango yami iyangihlupha, sengidzimate ngakhatsateka," 
Psalms55:3 ngenca yekuva tinsongo tetitsa nencindzetelo yalababi, ngobe bangiletsele kukhatsateka. Tingiletsele kuhlupheka lokunyenti, tiyangitfukutselela tingibambele emagcubu." 
Psalms55:4 Inhlitiyo yami iyatfutfumela ngekhatsi kwami, sengiseluvalweni lwekufa." 
Psalms55:5 Ngiphetfwe kwesaba nekutfutfumela, neluvalo selungicedze emandla." 
Psalms55:6 Ngase ngitsi: “Kube mane nginetimphiko njengelituba! Ngabe ngindizela le khashane ngiyewuhlala ekuphumuleni. 
Psalms55:7 Yebo, bengitawubaleka ngiye khashane, ngiyewuhlala ehlane. Cabanga." 
Psalms55:8 “Ngabe ngiphutfuma endzawemi yami yekuphepha, ngibe khashane nemoya nesivunguvungu.”" 
Psalms55:9 Hhawu, Simakadze, citsa lusongo lwabo, uphambanise inkhulumo yabo, ngobe ngibona umbango nekuphikisana kulelidolobha." 
Psalms55:10 Lelidolobha kulitungeleta imini nebusuku, kuhambahambe etikwetindvonga talo; bubi nelusizi kubusa ekhatsi kwalo." 
Psalms55:11 Umonakalo ungekhatsi kwalo incindzetelo nebucili akusuki enkhundleni yalo. 
Psalms55:12 Akusiso sitsa sami lesingigalajelako, ngobe kube bekungiso, bengingasibeketelela; akusiye longitondzako longibangisako, ngobe kube bekunguye, bengitambhacela." 
Psalms55:13 Kodvwa nguwe, ntsanga yetfu, lesishuca nawe, nalongumngani wami." 
Psalms55:14 Sasihlalisana kamnandzi nawe sasihamba nawe, nesicumbi, nasiya endlini yaNkulunkulu." 
Psalms55:15 Titsa tami atitunywe kufa, tiye endzaweni yalabafile tisaphila, ngobe bubi busemakhaya nasetinhlitiyweni tabo." 
Psalms55:16 Kodvwa mine ngikhala kuNkulunkulu, Simakadze uyawungisindzisa." 
Psalms55:17 Kusihlwa, nasekuseni, nasemini ngiyatikhalela ngibubule kuye, bese uyaliva livi lami." 
Psalms55:18 Uyawungihlenga, anginike kuthula, angivikele kulemphi lengibhekene nayo, nome babanyenti labalwa nami." 
Psalms55:19 Nkulunkulu utangiva, angiphindzisele kubo, yena lokhona phakadze. Cabanga. Labantfu abaphendvuki, abamesabi ngisho naNkulunkulu." 
Psalms55:20 Lowo mngani-ndzini sewucabana nebangani bakhe, wephula sivumelwane sakhe." 
Psalms55:21 Inkhulumo yakhe ishelelisa kwelibhotela, noko inhlitiyo yakhe ifukamele imphi, emavi akhe atsambe kwengca emafutsa, noko atinkemba letilindzele kugwaza." 
Psalms55:22 Lahlela imitfwalo yakho kuSimakadze, yena uyawukusimisa; angeke avume phakadze naphakadze kutsi lolungile wakhe atanyatanyiswe." 
Psalms55:23 Wena Simakadze nguwe loyawubajikijela phansi, emgodzini wekufa. Bantfu bengati nenkhohliso bangeke baphile, ngisho nencenye yemphilo yabo. Kodvwa mine ngiyakwetsembela kuwe." 
Psalms56:1 Ngihawukele, Nkulunkulu, ngobe bantfu bayangigcobagcoba; onkhe emalanga labamelene nami bayangihlasela." 
Psalms56:2 Titsa tami tingigcobagcoba onkhe emalanga, ngobe labanyenti balwa nami ngekutigabatisa." 
Psalms56:3 Mhlazana ngifikelwa kwesaba ngiyawubeka litsemba lami kuwe. 
Psalms56:4 Ngiyawudvumisa livi laNkulunkulu ngekusitwa nguNkulunkulu, ngetsembele kuNkulunkulu angesabi lutfo. Pho, umuntfu angangentani nje?" 
Psalms56:5 Bahlanekela inkhulumo yami onkhe emalanga, bakha onkhe emacebo lamabi ngami." 
Psalms56:6 Bayabutsana bangilalele emasitseleni, tinyatselo tami baticaphele njengobe bashophene nekuphila kwami." 
Psalms56:7 Bayawuphunyula yini ebubini babo? Dzilita tive ngelulaka lwakho, Nkulunkulu." 
Psalms56:8 Wena ukucaphele kubaleka kwami, yetsa tinyembeti tami egabheni lakho, atikabhalwa yini encwadzini yakho?" 
Psalms56:9 Ngako titsa tami tiyawuncandzeka ngalelo langa lengiyawukhala ngalo kuwe, ngati kahle kamhlophe kutsi Nkulunkulu ungakimi." 
Psalms56:10 Ngidvumisa livi laNkulunkulu, ngidvumise livi laSimakadze." 
Psalms56:11 Ngetsembele kuNkulunkulu, angesabi lutfo. Pho, umuntfu angangentani nje?" 
Psalms56:12 Hhawu, Nkulunkulu, ngibopheleke kuwe ngetetsembiso tami. Ngiyawunikela kuwe iminikelo yekubonga." 
Psalms56:13 Ngobe ungephulile ekufeni, wavikela tinyawo tami kutsi tingawi, kuze ngihambe embikwaNkulunkulu, ngisekukhanyeni kwekuphila." 
Psalms57:1 Ngihawukele, Nkulunkulu, ngihawukele, ngobe wena usiphephelo semphefumulo wami, ngiyawukhosela emtfuntini wemaphiko akho, kuze kwendlule tivunguvungu temashwa." 
Psalms57:2 Ngikhala kuNkulunkulu Losetikwako Konkhe, kuNkulunkulu longifezela tinjongo takhe." 
Psalms57:3 Uyawutfumela asezulwini, angisindzise, ahlazise labo labangigcobagcobako. Cabanga. Nkulunkulu uyawubonakalisa umusa wakhe nekwetsembeka kwakhe." 
Psalms57:4 Ngisemkhatsini wemabhubesi, labantfu labashwabudzelanako. Ematinyo awo atikhali nemicibisholo, tilwimi tawo tinkemba letikhaliphako." 
Psalms57:5 Nkulunkulu, phakama ube ngetulu kwemazulu, inkhatimulo yakho yengamele umhlaba wonkhe." 
Psalms57:6 Tinyatselo tami batibekele lugibe, umphefumulo wami ushone phansi. Bembe umgodzi wekungihholokoshisela endleleni yami, kodvwa sekuhholokoshele bona. Cabanga." 
Psalms57:7 Inhlitiyo yami ime sibindzi, Nkulunkulu, inhlitiyo yami ime sibindzi, ngiyawuhlabela ngibonge ludvumo lwakho." 
Psalms57:8 Vuka, mphefumulo wami, vuka habhu yami, nawe lugubhu lwami. Ngiyawuphaphamisa intsatsakusa." 
Psalms57:9 Ngiyawukubonga emkhatsini wetive, Simakadze, ngikudvumise emkhatsini wetive." 
Psalms57:10 Ngobe umusa wakho mukhulu, ufikela etulu emazulwini, nekwetsembeka kwakho kufikela emafini." 
Psalms57:11 Nkulunkulu, phakama ube ngetulu kwemazulu, inkhatimulo yakho yengamele umhlaba wonkhe." 
Psalms58:1 Kambe ngabe nine baholi nehlulela ngalokulungile yini? Bantfu nibehlulela ngekulunga yini? Anehluleli ngekukhetsa yini? 
Psalms58:2 Ingani etinhlitiyweni tenu niphehla imisebenti lemibi, tandla tenu ticaphele kwenta budlova emhlabeni." 
Psalms58:3 Bantfu lababi batsi batalwa nje, babe bangenela indlela lembi, bacale emanga." 
Psalms58:4 Sihlungu sabo sinjengesihlungu senyoka, banjengaphemphetfwane lovale tindlebe takhe," 
Psalms58:5 entela kungaliva liphimbo lalabenta imilingo, nome-ke sebalumba emalumbo ngekuhlakanipha." 
Psalms58:6 Hhawu, Nkulunkulu, hhohlota ematinyo lasemilonyeni yabo, wephule imihlatsi yelibhubesi, Simakadze." 
Psalms58:7 Abashabalale njengemanti lageletako, abuye ashone phansi esihlabatsini; imicibisholo yabo ayibe tidlindzi nabajijimeta ngayo." 
Psalms58:8 Bente bancibilike baphele njengemnenkhe lohamba unafutela; babe njengemntfwana lotalwe asafile, longazange alibone nelilanga." 
Psalms58:9 Ngekutumeka lokukhulu Nkulunkulu uyawubaphephula bonkhe lababi, ababhubhise, njengelibhodo lelitsi lisandza kubekwa nje etiko, lisengakawuva nalowo mlilo, kufike umoya lomkhulu uphephule letinkhuni, nome tomile nome timanti." 
Psalms58:10 Labalungile bayawujabula nababona kuphindziselwa kwalababi, bayawuklabhuta ngetinyawo tabo engatini yalababi." 
Psalms58:11 Bantfu batabe sebatsi: “Ngempela lolungile uyavuzwa, ngempela ukhona Nkulunkulu lowehlulela emhlabeni.”" 
Psalms59:1 Hhawu, Nkulunkulu wami! Ngephule etitseni tami, ungivikele kulabo labangivukele." 
Psalms59:2 Ngephule kulabo labatigilamkhuba, ungisindzise kubabulali." 
Psalms59:3 Ase ubheke, ngobe bangilalele endleleni bafuna kungibulala, tichwaga titimisele kungihlasela ngaphandle kwesono sami, Simakadze." 
Psalms59:4 Batilungiselela kungibulala ngaphandle kwesono. Vuka, ungihlangabete ngelusito, ungelekelele." 
Psalms59:5 Wena, Simakadze, Nkulunkulu Somandla, unguNkulunkulu waka-Israyeli; vuka-ke utewujezisa tonkhe tive, ungahawukeli ngisho namunye kulaba labangemambuka. Cabanga." 
Psalms59:6 Onkhe emalanga kusihlwa bayaye babuye bashaya umkhulungwane njengetinja, bahambe bazula nalo lonkhe lidolobha." 
Psalms59:7 Nabo phela, babhonsa ngemilomo yabo, emilonyeni yabo kunetinkemba ngobe batsi: “Ngubani losinakile?”" 
Psalms59:8 Kodvwa wena, Simakadze, uyabahleka, tonkhe tive utenta inhlekisa." 
Psalms59:9 Yebo, Mandla ami, ngiyawulindzela wena, ngobe wena, Nkulunkulu, uyinqaba yami." 
Psalms59:10 Nkulunkulu wami, uyawungihlangabeta ngemusa wakho. Nkulunkulu wami, uyawungenta ngibabukele phansi labatitsa tami." 
Psalms59:11 Ungababulali, funa sive sami sikhohlwe; basakate ngemandla akho, ubalahle phansi, Simakadze, sihlangu setfu." 
Psalms59:12 Emavi abo asono semilomo yabo. Ababhajwe ekutigcabheni kwabo, ngobe bayacalekisa, bacale nemanga." 
Psalms59:13 Bacedze ngekutfukutsela kwakho, ubanyamalalise baphele batsi nya, kuze bantfu bati kutsi: Nkulunkulu ubusa kaJakobe nasemikhawulweni yemhlaba. Cabanga." 
Psalms59:14 Bayabuya njalo kusihlwa, bahlabe umkhulungwane njengetinja, bahambe bazula lonkhe lidolobha." 
Psalms59:15 Behla benyuka bafunana nekudla, bahhonge nabangakesutsi." 
Psalms59:16 Kodvwa mine ngiyawuhlabela ngibabate emandla akho, ngetsabele umusa wakho ekuseni, ngobe wena uyinqaba yami, waba siphephelo sami ngesikhatsi sekuhlupheka kwami." 
Psalms59:17 Yebo, Mandla ami, ngiyawuhlabela ngikudvumise, ngobe wena, Nkulunkulu, uyinqaba yami. Nguwe, Nkulunkulu, longiphatsa ngemusa." 
Psalms60:1 Awu, Nkulunkulu, usiyekelele wasilahla, wenta netivikelo tetfu tabhidlitwa, kwaya njengobe usitfukutselele. Buya utesilulamisa." 
Psalms60:2 Utamatamise umhlaba, wawudzabula timfa; tivale letimfa tawo ngobe uyaceka." 
Psalms60:3 Sive sakho usibonise tintfo letimatima, wasinatsisa liwayini sadzakwa, saba ngumhlaba." 
Psalms60:4 Ubanike luphawu labakwesabako, wabenta bacocana ngaphansi kwalo, kuze bavikeleke emicibisholweni yetitsa. Cabanga." 
Psalms60:5 Sisindzise ngesandla sakho sekudla, usiphendvule, kuze labatsandzekako bakho bakhululwe." 
Psalms60:6 Nkulunkulu ukhulume asendzaweni yakhe lengcwele watsi: “Ngiyakwetsaba, ngilehlukanise lakaShekhemu, ngisabe Sigodzi saseSukhothi." 
Psalms60:7 Live laGileyadi lami, nelive laManase lami, Efrayimu usivikelo senhloko yami, Juda uyindvuku yami yebukhosi." 
Psalms60:8 Mowabi ungumgezelo wami, etikwa-Edomu ngijika sicatfulo sami. Nine maFilisti, memetani, ningikhonte.”" 
Psalms60:9 Ngitawumikiswa ngubani kulomuti loyinqaba? Ngitawuholwa ngubani kuya ka-Edomu? 
Psalms60:10 Awu, Nkulunkulu, wena usilahlile. Awu, Nkulunkulu, awusahambi nemabutfo etfu emphi." 
Psalms60:11 Sisite usephule etitseni tetfu, ngobe lusito lwebantfu lulite." 
Psalms60:12 Sitawutincoma ngaNkulunkulu. Nguye lotawugcobagcoba titsa tetfu. 
Psalms61:1 Lalela kukhala kwami, Nkulunkulu, uve umthandazo wami." 
Psalms61:2 Ngikhala kuwe ngikhashane, emajukujukwini emhlaba, ngesikhatsi inhlitiyo yami idzangele. Ngiholele edvwaleni leliphakeme kakhulu kunami." 
Psalms61:3 Ngobe wena usiphephelo sami, uyinqaba lengumbhoshongo locinile wekungivikela esitseni sami." 
Psalms61:4 Ngiyawukhosela endlini yakho kuze kube phakadze! Ngiyawukhosela ngaphansi kwemaphiko akho. Cabanga. 
Psalms61:5 Wena, Nkulunkulu, utivile tetsembiso tami, ngobe nguwe lobanika lifa, labo labalesabako libito lakho." 
Psalms61:6 Yenta inkhosi ikhule ize ikhokhobe, yengeta emalanga ekuphileni kwenkhosi, ime titukulwane ngetitukulwane." 
Psalms61:7 Ebukhoneni bakho, Nkulunkulu, inkhosi ayihlale esihlalweni sebukhosi, ibuse kuze kube phakadze; uyilondvolote ngemusa wakho nangekwetsembeka kwakho." 
Psalms61:8 Ngako libito lakho ngiyawulidvumisa kuze kube phakadze, kuze ngigcwalise tetsembiso tami imihla ngemihla." 
Psalms62:1 Umphefumulo wami utithulele kuNkulunkulu kuphela, insindziso yami ivela kuye." 
Psalms62:2 Nguye yedvwa lolidvwala lami, nensindziso yami, nenqaba yami, ngingeke ngishukunyiswe." 
Psalms62:3 Kuyawuze kube ngunini nidvumela lendvodza nine nonkhe kuze niyibulale? Injengelubondza lolutjekele kuwa, nanjengelutsango loludzilikako." 
Psalms62:4 Bafuna licebo lekumketula esikhundleni sakhe lesiphakeme, batsandza emanga. Ngemilomo yabo bayabusisa, kodvwa etinhlitiyweni tabo bayacalekisa. Cabanga." 
Psalms62:5 Mphefumulo wami, thula kuNkulunkulu, ngobe litsemba lami livela kuye." 
Psalms62:6 Nguye yedvwa lolidvwala lami, nensindziso yami, nenqaba yami, ngingeke ngitanyatanyiswe." 
Psalms62:7 Insindziso yami neludvumo lwami kusetandleni taNkulunkulu. Nkulunkulu usiphephelo sami nelidvwala lami lelicinile. 
Psalms62:8 Nine sive, yetsembelani kuye ngato tonkhe tikhatsi, tfululelani kuye tinhlitiyo tenu, Nkulunkulu usiphephelo setfu. Cabanga." 
Psalms62:9 Bantfukatana bafanana nemoya nje, tikhulu nato tilite lelite. Nome bafakwa esikalini kanyekanye, balula kunemoya." 
Psalms62:10 Ungalibeki litsemba lakho ebudloveni, ningatilulati ngematsemba lalite nekugcekeza, nome ngabe ingcebo iyandza, ningatibeki tinhlitiyo tenu kuyo." 
Psalms62:11 Nkulunkulu ukhulume kanye, ngeva kwaba kubili: kutsi emandla ngakho, Nkulunkulu," 
Psalms62:12 nekutsi umusa wakho, Simakadze. Ngobe wena umuntfu umnika umvuzo njengekwemisebenti yakhe." 
Psalms63:1 Nkulunkulu, wena unguNkulunkulu wami! Ngifuna wena. Umphefumulo wami womele wena, umtimba wami ulambele wena, eveni lelomile naleligagadzekile, live lelite emanti." 
Psalms63:2 Ngikubonile wena endzaweni yakho lengcwele, ngawabona emandla akho nebukhosi bakho." 
Psalms63:3 Ngobe umusa wakho uncono kakhulu kunekuphila; umlomo wami uyawukudvumisa. 
Psalms63:4 Ngako-ke ngiyawukubonga, yingci nangisaphila; ngiyawuphakamisa tandla tami, ngikhuleke kuwe." 
Psalms63:5 Umphefumulo wami uyakwesutsiswa kube shangatsi ngidle emanoni nemnkantja, nemlomo wami ukudvumise ngenjabulo." 
Psalms63:6 Nangilele ngiyakukhumbula; nangicwashile ebusuku ngizindla ngawe," 
Psalms63:7 ngobe wena ube lusito lwami. Ngako-ke ngiyawuhlabela ngenjabulo emtfuntini wemaphiko akho. 
Psalms63:8 Umphefumulo wami unamatsela kuwe, sandla sakho sekudla siyangisimisa." 
Psalms63:9 Kodvwa labafuna kubhubhisa imphilo yami bayawushona phansi ethuneni," 
Psalms63:10 bangenelwe ngetikhali nase ibambene, tidvumbu tabo tibe kudla kwemangce." 
Psalms63:11 Kodvwa inkhosi iyawujabula ngaNkulunkulu, bonkhe labafunga ngawe bayawukudvumisa; kepha imilomo yebacambimanga iyawuvalwa." 
Psalms64:1 Hhawu, Nkulunkulu! Vani livi lami nangikhala, ulondvolote kuphila kwami elusongweni lwetitsa!" 
Psalms64:2 Ngibhacise etinsongweni talababi, eticunjini talabanemsindvo, yebo, ticumbi talabenta lokubi," 
Psalms64:3 labalola lulwimi lwabo lolukhaliphisa kwenkemba, bajijimete ngemavi abo langimicibisholo," 
Psalms64:4 kuze bamdubule longenacala bamdubule ngekumtuma, bangesabi." 
Psalms64:5 Badudana ngekwakha emacebo lamabi; bacebisana ngekubeka tingibe emasitseleni, bacabange batsi: “Ngubani longasibona?”" 
Psalms64:6 Basonga tento letimbi bese batsi: “Silakhe ngebuciko lelicebo letfu.” Ingcondvo nenhlitiyo yemuntfu kujulile! 
Psalms64:7 Kodvwa Nkulunkulu uyawubadubula ngemicibisholo yakhe, abagwaze ngekubatuma lokukhulu." 
Psalms64:8 Lulwimi lwabo luyawubabhubhisa, bonkhe labababonako bayawunikina tinhloko." 
Psalms64:9 Bonkhe bantfu bayawushaywa luvalo bashumayele ngalokwentiwe nguNkulunkulu, bakucondze kahle lasakwentile." 
Psalms64:10 Lolungile uyawujabula ngaSimakadze, akhosele kuye! Bonkhe labacotfo ngenhlitiyo bayawumdvumisa." 
Psalms65:1 Yebo Nkulunkulu, lukufanele ludvumo eSiyoni, tetsembiso tetfu kufanele tigcwaliseke kuwe." 
Psalms65:2 Wena uva imithandazo uyiphendvule; bonkhe bantfu bafanele kuta kuwe 
Psalms65:3 ngenca yetono tabo. Ngesikhatsi tiphambuko tetfu tisehlula nguwe lositsetselelako. 
Psalms65:4 Ubusisiwe umuntfu lokhetfwa nguwe umsondzete kuwe, uyawuhlala endzaweni yakho lengcwele. Siyakwesutsiswa ngalokuhle kwendlu yakho, lithempeli lakho lelingcwele!" 
Psalms65:5 Usiphendvule ngemisebenti lemangalisako, wena Sokulunga; wena unguNkulunkulu wensindziso yetfu. Bonkhe bantfu emhlabeni wonkhe, nangesheya kwetilwandle, betsembele kuwe." 
Psalms65:6 Wena lowamisa tintsaba ngemandla akho, watimisa uvunule emandla." 
Psalms65:7 Ubindzisa kudvuma kwetilwandle, uthulise kugubha nekuhlokoma kwemagagasi, ubindzise siphitsiphitsi lesicokotelisa tive." 
Psalms65:8 Ngako bonkhe bantfu emhlabeni wonkhe bayawutfutfumela ngenca yetibonakaliso takho; tento takho tiletse kujabula lokukhulu, emini nasebusuku, emhlabeni wonkhe jikelele." 
Psalms65:9 Unakekela umhlaba ngekuwupha inala, uwuvundzise kakhulu. Umfula waNkulunkulu ugcwele emanti. Bantfu ubapha emabele. Loku ukwenta kanje:" 
Psalms65:10 Unisa imvula leyenele emasimini, udvubadvube emagadze awo; utsambise umhlabatsi ngemvula, ubusise nalokukhula kuwo." 
Psalms65:11 Uhlobisa umnyaka ngetipho takho, lapho uhambe khona kulandzele inala." 
Psalms65:12 Emadlelo elihlane ahlume luhlata, emagcuma avunule injabulo," 
Psalms65:13 emadlelo embeswe yimihlambi, tifundza tibe bovu tju emabele, timemete kanyekanye ngekuhlabelela ngenjabulo." 
Psalms66:1 Hlokoma, ye mhlaba wonkhe! Dvumisa Nkulunkulu." 
Psalms66:2 Hlabelelani nituse libito lakhe, nidvumise bukhosi bakhe." 
Psalms66:3 Khulumani kuNkulunkulu nitsi: “Maye, imisebenti yakho mikhulu iyesabeka. Titsa takho titawuta kuwe tikhasa ngemadvolo, ngenca yemandla akho lamakhulu." 
Psalms66:4 Bonkhe bantfu bemhlaba bayawukhuleka kuwe bakudvumise; bayawuhlabela badvumise libito lakho.” Cabanga. 
Psalms66:5 Wotani nitewubona lokwentiwe nguNkulunkulu, wente lokwesabekako emkhatsini webantfu." 
Psalms66:6 Lwandle walugucula lwaba ngumhlabatsi lowomile, bokhokho bewela umfula ngetinyawo. Wotani sijabule kuye." 
Psalms66:7 Nguye lobusa ngemandla kuze kube phakadze. Emehlo akhe ahlala alindze tive, labo labanenkhani abangatikhukhumeti. Cabanga." 
Psalms66:8 Mbongeni Nkulunkulu wetfu, nine tive, vakalisani ludvumo lwakhe." 
Psalms66:9 Nguye logcina umphefumulo wetfu uphilile, akativumeli tinyawo tetfu kutsi tishelele." 
Psalms66:10 Wena Nkulunkulu, usivivinyile, usihlambulule ngekusicenga njengekucengwa kwesiliva emlilweni." 
Psalms66:11 Wasiholela kutsi sibanjwe elugibeni, wasetfwesa umtfwalo lomatima." 
Psalms66:12 Wenta kutsi bantfu bagibele etikwetinhloko tetfu, sangena emlilweni nasemantini, wabuye wasikhuphulela enaleni." 
Psalms66:13 Ngiyawungena endlini yakho ngineminikelo yekushiswa; ngigcwalise tetsembiso tami kuwe," 
Psalms66:14 leto lengatikhuluma ngemlomo wami, mhlazana ngisekuhluphekeni." 
Psalms66:15 Ngiyawunikela iminikelo yekushiswa yetifuyo letikhuluphele; nginikele ngelusi lwetincama, nangetinkunzi netiphongo. Cabanga." 
Psalms66:16 Wotani nonkhe nitewuva, nonkhe nine lenesaba Nkulunkulu, ngitanitjela ngako konkhe langentele kona." 
Psalms66:17 Ngakhala kuye ngemlomo wami kudvumisa yena kwakuselulwimini lwami. 
Psalms66:18 Kube bengicondze bubi enhlitiyweni yami, Simakadze abengeke angive." 
Psalms66:19 Ngempela, Nkulunkulu uvile, walilalela livi lemthandazo wami." 
Psalms66:20 Akabongwe Nkulunkulu longazange awulahle umthandazo wami, nalongawugodlanga umusa wakhe kimi." 
Psalms67:1 Shangatsi Nkulunkulu angaba nemusa kitsi, asibusise, akhanyise buso bakhe etikwetfu. Cabanga." 
Psalms67:2 Indlela yakho ayatiwe emhlabeni wonkhe, kwatiwe nensindziso yakho etiveni tonkhe." 
Psalms67:3 Tive atidvumise wena, Nkulunkulu, tonkhe tive atidvumise wena." 
Psalms67:4 Tive atihlabele ngenjabulo, ngobe wehlulela tive ngebucotfo, uhole tonkhe tive temhlaba. Cabanga." 
Psalms67:5 Tive atidvumise wena, Nkulunkulu, tonkhe tive atidvumise wena." 
Psalms67:6 Umhlaba waba nesivuno lesihle senala, Nkulunkulu, longuNkulunkulu wetfu, usibusisile." 
Psalms67:7 Nkulunkulu usibusisile, yonkhe imikhawulo yemhlaba ayesabe yena." 
Psalms68:1 Nkulunkulu nakasukuma, titsa takhe tiyasakateka, labamtondzako babaleke embikwakhe." 
Psalms68:2 Bayaphephuka njengekupheshulwa kwentfutfu, bayancibilika njengemtfwebeba nawuseceleni kwemlilo. Bacitfwa kanjalo-ke lababi embikwaNkulunkulu." 
Psalms68:3 Kepha labalungile bayajabula betsabe embikwaNkulunkulu, bajabula nekujabula." 
Psalms68:4 Hlabelani kuNkulunkulu, nidvumise libito lakhe. Nimlungiselele umgwaco, yena lodzabula ematsafa elugwadvule; nguSimakadze libito lakhe, nihlabele ngenjabulo embikwakhe!" 
Psalms68:5 Nguye uyise wetintsandzane, nemlondvoloti webafelokati, unguNkulunkulu losendzaweni yakhe lengcwele." 
Psalms68:6 Nkulunkulu upha imihambima emakhaya lapho ingahlala khona, lababoshiwe abaholele ekubuseni, kodvwa labaphika inkhani ubahlalisa ehlane." 
Psalms68:7 Nkulunkulu! Ekuphumeni kwakho nawuhola sive sakho, udzabula naso ehlane, Cabanga." 
Psalms68:8 umhlaba watamatama, emazulu antfontsa imvula, embikwaNkulunkulu, entsabeni yaseSinayi, ngesikhatsi kuta wena, Nkulunkulu, Nkulunkulu wema-Israyeli." 
Psalms68:9 Wanisa imvula lenkhulu, Nkulunkulu, wahlumisa live lakho lelase ligagadzekile."
