Psalms68:10 Sive sakho sakha emakhaya aso kulo, ngebuhle bakho, Nkulunkulu, uyabalungisela labeswele." 
Psalms68:11 Simakadze wakhipha umyalo wakhe. Sicumbi lesikhulu salabasikati saphuma salilitela satsi: 
Psalms68:12 “Emakhosi etimphi ayabaleka nekubaleka.” Labasikati emakhaya bebasehlukaniselana imphango," 
Psalms68:13 ngesikhatsi emadvodza asaphumula etibayeni. Imphango bekulituba lelinetimphiko tesiliva, tinsiba tiyigolide lecwebetelako." 
Psalms68:14 Ngesikhatsi Somandla advungulula emakhosi lalikhitsika entsabeni iSalmoni. 
Psalms68:15 Uyintsaba yaSomandla, wena ntsaba yaseBhashani! Uyintsaba leneticongo letinyenti, wena ntsaba yaseBhashani!" 
Psalms68:16 Wena ntsaba leneticongo letinyenti, uyibukelani ngeliso lelibi lemona, lentsaba lekhetfwe nguNkulunkulu, watsandza kutsi ibe likhaya lakhe? Simakadze uyawuhlala kulo kuze kube phakadze." 
Psalms68:17 Tincola taNkulunkulu titinkhulungwane letingemashumi netinkhulungwane ngetinkhulungwane, Simakadze usemkhatsini wato ngebukhosi bakhe lobunjengebungcwele baseSinayi." 
Psalms68:18 Wena, Simakadze, wenyukela entsabeni lendze, watfumba labanyenti labatfunjiwe, wemukele tipho kubantfu, watemukela ngisho nakubo labamelene nawe, kuze uhlale khona wena, Simakadze." 
Psalms68:19 Akadvunyiswe Simakadze, ngobe usitfwalela imitfwalo yetfu onkhe emalanga, nguNkulunkulu loyinsindziso yetfu. Cabanga." 
Psalms68:20 Nkulunkulu, longuNkulunkulu wetfu, unguNkulunkulu wensindziso, emandla ekubalekela kufa ngewaSimakadze iNkhosi." 
Psalms68:21 Empeleni, Nkulunkulu uyawutiphohlota, tinhloko tetitsa takhe, aphihlite netinkhakhayi talabaphikelela etonweni." 
Psalms68:22 Simakadze wakhuluma watsi: “Titsa takho ngiyawutibuyisa naseBhashani, ngibuyise naletisekujuleni kwelwandle," 
Psalms68:23 kuze tinyawo takho tibhocote engatini yetitsa tenu, netinja takho tibe nesabelo ekudleni lengati yetitsa takho.”" 
Psalms68:24 Yebo, Nkulunkulu! Tibonwa ngibo bonkhe letindvwendvwe takho, ticondze endlini lengcwele, tindvwendvwe taNkulunkulu wami, iNkhosi yami." 
Psalms68:25 Tiholwa ngulabahlabelako, emuva kugcine labashaya tingubhu letinetintsambo, emkhatsini wabo kuhamba tintfombi, letishaya bokhencekhence, titsi:" 
Psalms68:26 “Bongani Nkulunkulu emikhambatsini nidvumise Simakadze, nine beluhlanga lwaka-Israyeli.”" 
Psalms68:27 Nango Bhenjamini litfunjana, abahola, tikhulu takaJuda tiyincumbi, nati netikhulu takaZebuloni netakaNaftali." 
Psalms68:28 Veta emandla akho, Nkulunkulu! Sibonise emandla akho, Nkulunkulu, lawo mandla lowawabonakalisa kitsi" 
Psalms68:29 ngesikhatsi usethempelini lakho, eJerusalema, emakhosi atakuletsela tipho takho khona." 
Psalms68:30 Sekhute lesilwane semhlanga, iGibhithe, uwekhute nalomhlambi wetinkunzi losemkhatsini wematfole etive. Bayagcobagcobana, babange imali, basakate leto tive, bajatjuliswe kususa lutfutfuva lwemphi." 
Psalms68:31 Emancusa ayawuvela eGibhithe, naKushe atinikele kuNkulunkulu." 
Psalms68:32 Hlabelani kuNkulunkulu, nine mibuso yemhlaba, hlabelani nidvumise Simakadze. Cabanga." 
Psalms68:33 Simakadze ugibela emazulu, wona lawo mazulu asendvulo. Yena uvakalisa liphimbo lelivi lakhe, lona liliphimbo lelinemandla." 
Psalms68:34 Memetelani emandla aNkulunkulu, bukhosi bakhe bengamele sive saka-Israyeli, nemandla akhe asetulu esibhakabhakeni." 
Psalms68:35 Uyesabeka, Nkulunkulu, endzaweni yakho lengcwele. Nkulunkulu wema-Israyeli, nguwe lonika bantfu emandla nekucina. Akadvunyiswe Nkulunkulu!" 
Psalms69:1 Ngisindzise, Nkulunkulu, ngobe emanti asaze efika entsanyeni." 
Psalms69:2 Ngiyabisha elubishini lweludzaka, kute nalapho ngisima khona ngelunyawo, sengize ngefika la kushona khona kakhulu, tikhukhula setitangisibekela." 
Psalms69:3 Ngidvubuteke kabi ngenca yekukhala kwami, umphimbo wami womile, uyahoshota. Emehlo ami asacundzekile ngenca yekulindzela wena, Nkulunkulu wami." 
Psalms69:4 Banyenti kunetinwele tenhloko yami badlanga ngemandla labafuna kungibulala, labo labangitondza ngelite. Ngiphocelelwani kutsi ngikhishiswe intfo lengingakayebi?" 
Psalms69:5 Yebo, Nkulunkulu, wena uyabati bulima bami, netono tami atikafihleki kuwe." 
Psalms69:6 Shangatsi labo labetsembele kuwe bangete behlelwa ngemahloni bajabhiswe ngenca yami. Hhawu, Simakadze, Nkulunkulu wemabandla, shangatsi labo labafuna wena bangete bahlazeka, badvumale ngenca yami, Nkulunkulu wema-Israyeli." 
Psalms69:7 Ngobe ngetfwele lihlazo ngenca yakho, buso bami sebumbonywe ngemahloni." 
Psalms69:8 Sengingumfokati emkhatsini wabomnaketfu, ngingumchamuki nakubantfwana baketfu." 
Psalms69:9 Ngidliwa kushisekela indlu yakho, tinhlamba talabakwetfukako tehlela etikwami." 
Psalms69:10 Ngakhala emphefumulweni wami, ngazila, kwaba yinhlamba labangetfuka ngayo." 
Psalms69:11 Inzilo yaba sembatfo sami, ngagucuka ngaba yinhlekisa kubo." 
Psalms69:12 Ngiyindzabamlonyeni kulabahlala emasangweni; tidzakwa tihlabela tigiye ngami. 
Psalms69:13 Kodvwa mine lo, umthandazo wami uta kuwe, Simakadze, ngesikhatsi lesifanele, Nkulunkulu; ngiphendvule ngebukhulu bemusa wakho nesetsembiso sakho sekungisindzisa." 
Psalms69:14 Ngitatulule kuloludzaka lengibisha kulo, ngisindzise kulabo labangitondzako, ungimonyule nasesitibeni lesishonako." 
Psalms69:15 Ungativumeli tikhukhula temanti kutsi tingemukise, ungawavumeli emanti kutsi angimite, ungawuvumeli nemgodzi kutsi ungigwinye." 
Psalms69:16 Ngiphendvule, Simakadze, ngobe umusa wakho muhle, gucukela kimi ngemusa wakho lomkhulu." 
Psalms69:17 Ungayifihleli buso bakho inceku yakho, ngobe ngisebunzimeni, phutfuma ungiphendvule." 
Psalms69:18 Sondzela emphefumulweni wami, uwuhlenge, ngephule ngobe titsa tami tinyenti." 
Psalms69:19 Wena uyakwati kucoloshelwa kwami, nekuhlazeka kwami, ngehlelwa ngemahloni; tonkhe titsa tami tisembikwakho." 
Psalms69:20 Kuhlanjalatwa kuwephulile umphefumulo wami, ngadzimate ngaphelelwa nangemandla. Ngacalata ngifuna longangihawukela, kodvwa kwabate lengimbonako. Ngacalata ngifuna nebadvudvuti, nakhona kwabate lengibabonako." 
Psalms69:21 Bangiphakela inyongo esikhundleni sekudla; ekomeni kwami banginatsisa liwayini lelimunyu. 
Psalms69:22 Shangatsi lidzili labo lingaba lugibe kubo, shangatsi inhlalakahle yabo ingaba ngusochaka kubo." 
Psalms69:23 Shangatsi emehlo abo angafiphatwa, bangete babona, netinyonga tabo ticeke siphelane." 
Psalms69:24 Tfululela intfukutselo yakho etikwabo, ubavimbetele ngelulaka lwakho loluvutsako." 
Psalms69:25 Shangatsi imiti yabo ingacitseka, kubete lohlala emathendeni abo." 
Psalms69:26 Ngobe lowo loshaywe nguwe bayamtingela bamhluphe, bakhuluma ngebuhlungu balabo labalinyatwe nguwe," 
Psalms69:27 bengetele sijeziso etikwekona kwabo, ungabavumeli kutsi bangene ekulungeni kwakho." 
Psalms69:28 Abesulwe encwadzini yekuphila, bangabhaliswa ndzawonye nalabalungile." 
Psalms69:29 Kepha mine ngiselusizini lwetinhlungu. Insindziso yakho, Nkulunkulu, ayingilondvolote, ingigcine endzaweni lephakeme." 
Psalms69:30 Libito laNkulunkulu ngiyawulibonga ngemusa, ngimphakamise ngekumbonga." 
Psalms69:31 Loko Simakadze ukutsandza kakhulu kunekunikela ngenkunzana, ngisho nangesibheva senkunzi lenetimphondvo nemasondvo." 
Psalms69:32 Labatfobekile bayawubona bajabule, nine lenifuna Nkulunkulu tinhlitiyo tenu ativuseleleke." 
Psalms69:33 Simakadze uyabeva labamphofu, lababoshiwe bakhe akabadzeli." 
Psalms69:34 Akadvunyiswe lizulu, nemhlaba netilwandle, nako konkhe lokuphila kuko." 
Psalms69:35 Ngobe Nkulunkulu uyawuyisindzisa iSiyoni, akhe kabusha emadolobha akaJuda, bayawuhlala kuleyo ndzawo ibe yabo." 
Psalms69:36 Titukulwane tetinceku takhe tiyawuyidla ibe lifa lato, nalabo labatsandza libito laNkulunkulu bayawuhlala kuyo." 
Psalms70:1 Hhawu, Nkulunkulu! Phutfuma ungikhulule! Hhawu, Simakadze! Phutfuma ungisite!" 
Psalms70:2 Abahlazeke bajabhe labo labafuna kuphila kwami nalabo labafuna kungibulala. Abancandzekiswe bahlazekile labo labangifisela kutsi ngife. 
Psalms70:3 Labo labangicoloshelako batsi: “Walayeka!” Shangatsi bangancandvwa ngemahloni. 
Psalms70:4 Bonkhe labafuna wena abajabule batfokote kuwe! Nalabo labatsandza insindziso yakho abasho njalonjalo batsi: “Mkhulu Nkulunkulu!” 
Psalms70:5 Kodvwa mine ngihluphekile futsi ngeswele, ngiphutfume, Nkulunkulu. Nguwe lolusito lwami nemkhululi wami. Awu, Simakadze, shesha, ungalibali." 
Psalms71:1 Awu, Simakadze! Ngikhosela kuwe, ungavumi ngijabhiswe nakanye." 
Psalms71:2 Ngisindzise ngekulunga kwakho, ungihlenge, beka indlebe yakho ngakimi, ungisindzise." 
Psalms71:3 Bani lidvwala lesiphephelo kimi, lengingaphephela kulo nome nini, wena lowayala kutsi ngisindziswe, ngobe nguwe lidvwala lami nesiphephelo sami." 
Psalms71:4 Awu, Nkulunkulu wami! Ngephule emandleni alomubi, esandleni sesidlova lesite bucotfo, kanye nakumuntfu lonelulaka." 
Psalms71:5 Ngobe nguwe, Simakadze, lolitsemba lami, Simakadze ulitsemba lami, kwasebusheni bami." 
Psalms71:6 Seloku ngatalwa ngeyeme kuwe, nguwe lowangenta ngatalwa, ngiyawukudvumisa ngingakhawuli." 
Psalms71:7 Kulabanyenti ngajika ngaba simanga, kepha wena usiphephelo sami lesicinile." 
Psalms71:8 Umlomo wami uyawugcwala kukubonga, ngimemetele bukhosi bakho imihla ngemihla." 
Psalms71:9 Ungangilahli esikhatsini sebudzala bami, ungangikhohlwa nase ngiphelelwa ngemandla." 
Psalms71:10 Ngobe titsa tami tikhuluma kabi ngami, nalabo labafuna kungibulala bahlangene ngami bayangisongela," 
Psalms71:11 batsi: “Nkulunkulu umlahlile, asimtingele size simbambe, ngobe kute longaphindze amsindzise.”" 
Psalms71:12 Hhawu, Nkulunkulu! Ungakhweshi kimi! Hhawu, Nkulunkulu wami! Phutfuma ungihlenge!" 
Psalms71:13 Shangatsi labo labafuna kuphila kwami bangadliwa ngemahloni babhubhe; shangatsi bangasibekelwa bubi nelihlazo labo labacondze kungilimata. 
Psalms71:14 Kepha mine ngiyawukwetsembela kuwe njalonjalo, ngengete kukudvumisa ekukudvumiseni kwami." 
Psalms71:15 Umlomo wami uyawulandza ngekulunga kwakho, uvakalise insindziso yakho onkhe emalanga, ngobe yinyenti ngehluleka nekuyikala." 
Psalms71:16 Yebo, Simakadze, Nkulunkulu wami, imisebenti yakho lemikhulu ngiyawuyiveta ebaleni, ngibabate kulunga kwakho, wena wedvwa." 
Psalms71:17 Yebo, Nkulunkulu, wangifundzisa kusukela ebusheni bami, kuze kube ngunyalo ngisayimemetela imisebenti yakho lemangalisako." 
Psalms71:18 Nanyalo-ke nome sengigugile sengimphunga, ungangishiyi, Nkulunkulu, kuze ngishumayele ingalo yakho kuso situkulwane, nemandla akho kubo bonkhe labefikako." 
Psalms71:19 Yebo, Nkulunkulu! Kulunga kwakho kukhulu kufikela etulu. Nguwe lowente tintfo letinkhulu. Empeleni, Nkulunkulu, ngubani lofana nawe?" 
Psalms71:20 Nguwe lowentile kutsi ngibone tinsizi letinyenti naletibuhlungu, wangihlumelelisa futsi; wabuye wangimonyula ekujuleni kwemhlaba, wangikhiphela ngetulu kwawo." 
Psalms71:21 Shangatsi ungandzisa bukhulu bami, uphindze ungidvudvute." 
Psalms71:22 Ngiyawuphindze ngikudvumise ngehabhu, ngibonge kwetsembeka kwakho, Nkulunkulu wami, ngihlabele ngekukushayela lugubhu, ngibonge wena Longcwele waka-Israyeli." 
Psalms71:23 Tindzebe temlomo wami tiyawujabula, ngobe ngiyawudvumisa wena, nemphefumulo wami lowuhlengile uyawukudvumisa." 
Psalms71:24 Lulwimi lwami luyawukhuluma ngekulunga kwakho lonkhe lilanga. Ngobe labo bebafuna kungilimata bahlazekile bajabhiswa. 
Psalms72:1 Awu, Nkulunkulu! Nika inkhosi likhono lakho lekwehlulela nekubusa ngebucotfo unike lomntfwanenkhosi kulunga kwakho." 
Psalms72:2 Shangatsi ingehlulela sive sakho ngekulunga, nalabamphofu ibaphatse ngebucotfo." 
Psalms72:3 Tintsaba tiyawuletsa kuthula kubantfu, kanjalo nemagcuma kuchuma kwekulunga." 
Psalms72:4 Shangatsi ingabavikela bantfu labatimphofana, ikhulule labeswele, ipitjite bacindzeteli!" 
Psalms72:5 Shangatsi bangesaba wena, bakwesabe emini kukhanya lilanga, bakwesabe nome sekukhanya inyanga, titukulwane ngetitukulwane." 
Psalms72:6 Shangatsi inkhosi ungayenta ibe njengemvula nayehlela emadlelweni, nanjengemvula nayinisela umhlabatsi." 
Psalms72:7 Shangatsi ngemalanga ayo kungandza kulunga, kwandze nekuthula siphelane." 
Psalms72:8 Shangatsi bukhosi bayo bungagcwala umhlaba, busuke elwandle buye bufike elwandle lolunye; busuke eMfuleni, buze bufike ekugcineni kwemhlaba." 
Psalms72:9 Shangatsi tive letihlala ehlane tingakhotsama embikwayo, netitsa tayo tiyikhotsamele." 
Psalms72:10 Shangatsi emakhosi aseThashishi nasetichingini, angetfula tipho kuyo. Shangatsi emakhosi aseSheba newaseSeba angetfula kuyo imitselo yawo." 
Psalms72:11 Shangatsi onkhe emakhosi angakhotsama kuyo, netive tonkhe tiyikhonte." 
Psalms72:12 Iyamkhulula loyibitako, naloweswele, nalomphofu, nalote umsiti." 
Psalms72:13 Inesihe kulababutsakatsaka nalabeswele, isindzise kuphila kwalabeswele." 
Psalms72:14 Ikhulula kuphila kwalabo labasekubandzetelweni nasebudloveni, ingati yabo iligugu emehlweni ayo." 
Psalms72:15 Shangatsi ingakhula idzimate ikhokhobe, iphiwe negolide yaseSheba. Shangatsi ingathandazelwa njalonjalo, icelelwe tibusiso taNkulunkulu ngato tonkhe tikhatsi." 
Psalms72:16 Shangatsi kungaba nenala emasimini, lenala isibekele ticongo tetintsaba, kube tiphihli, sincane setihlahla taseLebanoni. Shangatsi lamadolobha angagcwala bantfu, babe ngangetjani." 
Psalms72:17 Shangatsi libito layo lingahlala ingunaphakadze, lichubeke latiwe njengelilanga. Tive tonkhe atibusiswe ngayo; tiyawumbita ngekutsi yinkhosi lebusisekile." 
Psalms72:18 Akabongwe Simakadze, Nkulunkulu, nguye longuNkulunkulu wema-Israyeli, nguye yedvwa lowenta timangaliso." 
Psalms72:19 Alibongwe libito lakhe lenkhatimulo, libongwe kuze kube phakadze, shangatsi umhlaba wonkhe ungagcwala inkhatimulo yakhe. Amen! Yebo, Amen!" 
Psalms72:20 Siphetfo semithandazo yaDavide, umsa waJese." 
Psalms73:1 Ngempela, Nkulunkulu ubaphatsa kahle baka-Israyeli nalabo labamsulwa etinhlitiyweni." 
Psalms73:2 Kepha mine, tinyawo tami tacishe taphambuka, kwasala kancane kutsi tinyawo tami tishelele." 
Psalms73:3 Ngobe nganginemona nalabatigcabhako, ngesikhatsi ngibona kuchuma kwalababi." 
Psalms73:4 Abayiva iminjunju yebuhlungu nabafa, nemitimba yabo icinile, itinsakatja." 
Psalms73:5 Tinhlupheko letehlela bantfu bona atisabehleli, abavelelwa ngemashwa njengabo bonkhe bantfu." 
Psalms73:6 Ngako-ke kutigcabha bakwegabe entsanyeni njengeligcebesha. Budlova babembetse njengengubo. 
Psalms73:7 Kukhuluphala kuwakhukhumukisile emehlo abo, imicabango yetinhlitiyo tabo iphuphuma bubi." 
Psalms73:8 Bayaphukuta bakhulume lokubi; bakhuluma incindzetelo ekutiphakamiseni kwabo. 
Psalms73:9 Ngemilomo yabo bahlambalata lizulu. Ngetilimi tabo bagcilata umhlaba. 
Psalms73:10 Ngako-ke sive sakhe sijikela kubo, sibakholwe kuko konkhe labakushoko." 
Psalms73:11 Sitsi: “Nkulunkulu angati kanjani? Kukhona yini lokwatiwa nguLosetikwako Konkhe?” 
Psalms73:12 Lababi-ke banjalo, bakhomba ngalosekhatsi, bandzise ingcebo." 
Psalms73:13 Impela ngiyihlantele lite inhlitiyo yami, ngageza tandla tami njengalote licala." 
Psalms73:14 Ngihlushwa sonkhe sikhatsi, ngitsetsiswe onkhe emalanga." 
Psalms73:15 Kube bengitsite: “Ngitawukhuluma njengabo,” ngabe ngihlubuke sive sakho, Simakadze." 
Psalms73:16 Kodvwa kwatsi nase ngicabanga kutsi lendzaba ngingayiva njani, kwaba matima ngangete ngabona kahle." 
Psalms73:17 Ngaze ngangena endlini lengcwele yaNkulunkulu, lapho ngevisisa khona ngesiphetfo sabo." 
Psalms73:18 Ngempela, wena ubabeka endzaweni leshelelako, ubente bawe babhubhe." 
Psalms73:19 Maye! Bacitfwa ngekucwabita kweliso, bakhukhulwe tinhlupheko letesabekako." 
Psalms73:20 Simakadze, njengekuphela kweliphupho ekuphaphameni, utawulahla titfunti tabo, nawuvuka." 
Psalms73:21 Kwatsi ngesikhatsi umphefumulo wami umunyu ngatsi nangihlabeka enhlitiyweni," 
Psalms73:22 kwakhandzaniseka kutsi angicondzisisi, nginebulima; mine ngaba nebulwane embikwakho." 
Psalms73:23 Noko-ke mine ngihlala nawe onkhe emalanga, ungibambe ngesandla sami sekudla," 
Psalms73:24 uyawungihola ungicondzise ngeteluleko takho, ekugcineni uyawungikhatimulisa ebukhosini." 
Psalms73:25 Ngubani lenginaye ezulwini ngaphandle kwakho? Nanginawe, kute lengikufunako la emhlabeni." 
Psalms73:26 Nome umtimba nemphefumulo wami kwehluleka, kodvwa Nkulunkulu ulidvwala lenhlitiyo yami, nesabelo selifa lami ingunaphakadze." 
Psalms73:27 Ngobe labakhashane nawe bayawubhubha, ubacitsa ubacedze labahlubuka kuwe ngekona." 
Psalms73:28 Kodvwa mine kungilungele kusondzela kuNkulunkulu, Simakadze, iNkhosi, ngimente waba siphephelo sami, kuze ngishumayele ngako konkhe lakwentile." 
Psalms74:1 Awu, Nkulunkulu! Usilahleleni sive sakho siphelane? Intfukutselo yakho ibhunyeleleni timvu telidlelo lakho?" 
Psalms74:2 Khumbula libandla lakho lowatikhetsela lona kwasemandvulweni, walihlenga kutsi libe sive lesilifa lakho. Khumbula iNtsaba iSiyoni, lapho wawuhlala khona." 
Psalms74:3 Yelulela tinyawo takho ekudzilitweni kwaphakadze, sitsa sibhidlite konkhe endlini lengcwele!" 
Psalms74:4 Titsa takho tibhodle endzaweni yekukhontela, temisa tiboniso tato letikhombisa kuncoba." 
Psalms74:5 Tabukeka shangatsi bantfu bayagawula, bageca dukathole welihlatsi ngemazembe." 
Psalms74:6 Titsa setibhidlite ngemazembe nangemigcala konkhe lokubatiwe lokusendzaweni lengcwele. 
Psalms74:7 Indlu yakho lengcwele tiyokhele ngemlilo, tayingcolisa lendzawo yelibito lakho, tayidzilita tacotfula imbokodvo nesisekelo." 
Psalms74:8 Tatsi etinhlitiyweni tato: “Asibacedze nya!” Tishise tonkhe tindzawo, lapho kukhontelwa Nkulunkulu khona." 
Psalms74:9 Tibonakaliso tenkholo yetfu asisatiboni, sekute ngisho nemphrofethi, kute ngisho nalapha emkhatsini wetfu lowatiko kutsi kuyawudzimate kube ngunini." 
Psalms74:10 Awu, Nkulunkulu! Kuyawudzimate kube ngunini sitsa sikuhlambalata? Sitsa sakho sifanele yini kwetfuka libito lakho kuze kube phakadze?" 
Psalms74:11 Usigodlelani sandla sakho sangesekudla? Sikhiphe esifubeni sakho ubacitse. 
Psalms74:12 Noko wena, Nkulunkulu, uyiNkhosi yami kwasemandvulweni; nguwe lowenta insindziso emhlabeni." 
Psalms74:13 Nguwe lowehlukanisa lwandle ngemandla akho, nguwe lowafohlota tilwane letinkhulu taselwandle." 
Psalms74:14 Nguwe lowapitjita tinhloko taLeviyathani, wamenta waba kudla kwetidalwa tasehlane." 
Psalms74:15 Nguwe lowavula tiyalu nemifula emadvwaleni, womisa nemifula legeletako." 
Psalms74:16 Imini yakho, nebusuku bakho, nguwe lowenta kukhanya nelilanga." 
Psalms74:17 Nguwe lowenta yonkhe iminyele yemhlaba, nguwe lowenta lihlobo nebusika." 
Psalms74:18 Khumbula-ke, Simakadze, kutsi sitsa sikwetfukile sikuhlambalatile. Sive lesilibele silihlambalatile libito lakho." 
Psalms74:19 Ungaliyekeleli lijubantsendzele lakho kutsi lidliwe tilwane tesiganga; ungasikhohlwa siphelane sive sakho lesicindzetelwe. 
Psalms74:20 Khumbula sivumelwane lowasenta natsi, ngobe tonkhe tindzawo letinematfunti lapha eveni tigcwele budlova." 
Psalms74:21 Ungavumi kutsi labacindzetelwe bancandzeke bahlazekile; labamphofu nalabeswele abadvumise libito lakho. 
Psalms74:22 Phutfuma, Nkulunkulu, utiphendvulele, ukhumbule labo labalibele, kutsi bakwetfuka imihla nemalanga." 
Psalms74:23 Ungawukhohlwa umsindvo wetitsa takho, nekucokotela kwalabakuvukelako kutsi kuya ngekwandza njalo nje." 
Psalms75:1 Siyakudvumisa, Nkulunkulu, siyakudvumisa, wena usedvutane nasibita libito lakho, sibalise ngemisebenti yakho lemangalisako." 
Psalms75:2 Wena ukhuluma utsi: “Nakufika sikhatsi lesimisiwe sekwehlulelwa, mine ngiyakwehlulela ngebucotfo." 
Psalms75:3 Nome umhlaba sewutanyatanyiswa, kanye nabo bonkhe labahlala kuwo, mine ngisimisa tinsika tawo. Cabanga." 
Psalms75:4 “Kulabatigcabhako ngitsite: ‘Ningatigcabhi!’ Kulababi ngatsi: ‘Ningatiphakamisi! 
Psalms75:5 Ningatiphakamisi nitikhukhumete, ningakhulumi ngekwedzelela!’ ”" 
Psalms75:6 Ngobe kuphakama nekwehla kwemuntfu akuveli emphumalanga nome enshonalanga, akuveli ngisho nasehlane nasetintsabeni;" 
Psalms75:7 kodvwa nguNkulunkulu lowehlulelako, wehlisa lomunye aphakamise lomunye." 
Psalms75:8 Ngobe esandleni saSimakadze kunendzebe, leneliwayini lelibile laze laloya; ulinatsisa bonkhe lababi bemhlaba baliminyele, ngisho nenseketse yalo." 
Psalms75:9 Kepha mine ngiyawujabula kuze kube phakadze, ngidvumise Nkulunkulu waJakobe." 
Psalms75:10 Nkulunkulu utsi: “Ngiyawubehlisa bonkhe lababi, ngiphakamise bonkhe labalungile.”" 
Psalms76:1 Nkulunkulu uyatiwa kaJuda, libito lakhe likhulu ka-Israyeli." 
Psalms76:2 Lithende lakhe liseSalema, nendlu yakhe iseSiyoni." 
Psalms76:3 Ngulapho ephula khona imicibisholo levutsako, sihlangu, inkemba, kanye netikhali temphi. Cabanga." 
Psalms76:4 Maye, kukhanya kwakho kuyakhatimula! Ukhatimula kwendlula tintsaba letivunule kahle." 
Psalms76:5 Emachawe latatisako asaphangwe imphango yawo, adzimate efikelwa butfongo alala siphelane; onkhe ehlulekile kusebentisa tandla tawo." 
Psalms76:6 Ngesikhahlo sakho, Nkulunkulu waJakobe, bagibeli nemahhashi behlelwe butfongo." 
Psalms76:7 Kodvwa uyesabeka, ngubani nje longema embikwakho, nase utfukutsele uvutsa lulaka?" 
Psalms76:8 Usesemazulwini wevakalisa kwehlulela kwakho, umhlaba wesaba, wathula," 
Psalms76:9 mhlazana Nkulunkulu atekwehlulela, kuze asindzise bonkhe labatfobekile bemhlaba. Cabanga." 
Psalms76:10 Ngempela lulaka lwebantfu lwengeta indvumiso yakho, labasindze elulakeni lwakho bayimvunulo yakho." 
Psalms76:11 Yentani tetsembiso netifungo tenu kuSimakadze longuNkulunkulu wenu, nitigcwalise. Bonkhe labasedvute naye abaletse tipho kulowo lofanele kwesatjwa." 
Psalms76:12 Nguye lotfobisa tikhulu, uyesabeka emakhosini emhlaba." 
Psalms77:1 Ngakhala kuNkulunkulu, ngakhala kuye, kuze atengiva." 
Psalms77:2 Nangiselusizini ngifuna Simakadze, nasebusuku ngiphakamisa tandla tami, ngikhuleke ngingadzinwa, umphefumulo wami wale kudvudvuteka." 
Psalms77:3 Ngiyamkhumbula Nkulunkulu bese ngiyabubula; ngiyacabangisisa, bese umoya wami uphelelwa ngemandla. Cabanga." 
Psalms77:4 Nguwe lowenta tinkhophe tami kutsi tingasindvwa butfongo, ngehluleka ngisho nekukhuluma." 
Psalms77:5 Ngicabanga ngemalanga asemandvulo, ngikhumbule iminyaka yakadzenidzeni." 
Psalms77:6 Ngikhumbula kushaya ihabhu yami, ngizindle ngayo enhlitiyweni yami ebusuku, umoya wami ucabangisisa ubute utsi:" 
Psalms77:7 “Kantsi Simakadze utangilahla siphelane yini? Angeke yini aphindze abe nemusa nesihawu? 
Psalms77:8 Umusa wakhe longagucuki sewuphele siphelane yini? Kungabe lesetsembiso sakhe siphelile yini etitukulwaneni ngetitukulwane? 
Psalms77:9 Nkulunkulu sewukhohliwe yini kuba nemusa? Kungabe kutfukutsela kwakhe kumente wagodla bubele bakhe yini?” Cabanga. 
Psalms77:10 Ngibese ngitsi: “Naku lokungihluphako: Sandla sangesekudla saLosetikwako Konkhe sesijikile.” 
Psalms77:11 Yebo, Simakadze, ngitase ngikhumbule imisebenti yaNkulunkulu, yebo, ngikhumbule netimangaliso takho tasendvulo." 
Psalms77:12 Ngitawucabangisisa ngawo wonkhe umsebenti wakho, ngijinge ngicabange ngemisebenti yakho yemandla." 
Psalms77:13 Yebo, Nkulunkulu, indlela yakho ingcwele, ngumuphi nkulunkulu longuSomandla njengaNkulunkulu wetfu?" 
Psalms77:14 UnguNkulunkulu lowenta timanga, lobonakalise emandla akhe emkhatsini wetive." 
Psalms77:15 Wasihlenga ngengalo yakho sive sakho lesasibatukulu baJakobe naJosefa. Cabanga. 
Psalms77:16 Emanti atsi kube abone wena, Nkulunkulu, atfutfumela, netinjolobela telwandle tachachatela." 
Psalms77:17 Emafu atsela imvula, tibhakabhaka tadvuma taklaklabula, kwaklwebha imicibisholo yemibane ndzawana tonkhana." 
Psalms77:18 Siphepho sasinemsindvo wekudvuma, kwaphambana imibane, kwakhanya umhlaba, umhlaba wagidzitela watamatama." 
Psalms77:19 Indlela yakho yadzabula lwandle, umvila wakho uselwandle lolujulile, noko tinyatselo takho tatingabonakali." 
Psalms77:20 Sive sakho wasihola njengetimvu, ngesandla saboMosi na-Aroni." 
Psalms78:1 Hhawu, sive sami! Lalelani imfundziso yami, nibeke indlebe emavini ami." 
Psalms78:2 Ngitawufundzisa ngemifanekiso, ngikhulume imfihlakalo yasemandvulo." 
Psalms78:3 Tindzaba lesake sativa satati, ngekutekelwa bokhokho betfu," 
Psalms78:4 natsi siyawutitekela batukulu betfu, sitjele titukulwane letitako, sitifundzise imisebenti yebukhosi, kanye nemandla aSimakadze, kanye netimangaliso latentile." 
Psalms78:5 Wamisa bufakazi kubakaJakobe, washaya umtsetfo esiveni saka-Israyeli; wayala ngawo bokhokho betfu kutsi bawufundzise bantfwababo," 
Psalms78:6 kuze nesitukulwane lesilandzelako siwati, nebatukulu babo labasetawutalwa, nabo bakhule batjela bantfwababo." 
Psalms78:7 Litsemba labo batawulibeka kuNkulunkulu, kuze bangayikhohlwa imisebenti yaNkulunkulu, kepha bagcine imiyalo yakhe;" 
Psalms78:8 bangenti njengobe kwenta bokhokho lekwakusitukulwane lesinenkhani nalesihlubukako, situkulwane lesite inhlitiyo lenebucotfo, nalesasinemoya longaketsembeki kuSomandla." 
Psalms78:9 Baka-Efrayimu lababehlome butjoki babaleka, mhlazana ibambene ngetihlutfu." 
Psalms78:10 Abasigcinanga sivumelwane saNkulunkulu, bala kuhamba ngemtsetfo wakhe." 
Psalms78:11 Bakhohlwa ngimisebenti layentile netimangaliso takhe labakhombisa tona. 
Psalms78:12 Wenta timangaliso embikwabokhokho babo, endzaweni yaseSowani eveni laseGibhithe." 
Psalms78:13 Wehlukanisa lwandle, wabeweta kulo, wemisa emanti, kwaba shangatsi tindvonga." 
Psalms78:14 Emini abebahola ngelifu, kutsi ebusuku abahole ngemlilo." 
Psalms78:15 Wacheketa emadvwala ehlane, wabanatsisa badzimate bakholwa." 
Psalms78:16 Wamilisa imifula edvwaleni, wageletisa emanti shangatsi ngimifula." 
Psalms78:17 Noko, bachubeka nekumona, bamhlubuka ehlane Losetikwako Konkhe." 
Psalms78:18 Nkulunkulu bamlinga etinhlitiyweni tabo ngekumfuna kudla lababekufisa. 
Psalms78:19 Bakhuluma kabi ngaNkulunkulu batsi: “Nkulunkulu angasondla yini lapha ehlane? 
Psalms78:20 Washaya lidvwala kwageleta emanti, imifula yagcwala, yaphuphuma. Pho, angasipha yini kudla alungiselele sive sakhe inyama?”" 
Psalms78:21 Ngako-ke watsi Simakadze nakuva loko watfukutsela, kwavutsa umlilo wadla bakaJakobe, intfukutselo yakhe yabavutsela bakaJakobe," 
Psalms78:22 ngobe babengakholwa kuNkulunkulu, bangete bawetsemba emandla akhe lasindzisako." 
Psalms78:23 Wabe sewuyala tibhakabhaka etulu, lizulu lavula iminyango," 
Psalms78:24 wanisa imana kutsi bantfu badle, wabapha emabele asezulwini." 
Psalms78:25 Bantfu badla sinkhwa setingilosi, wabanika kudla lokwenele." 
Psalms78:26 Wenta umoya wemphumalanga kutsi uphephetse emazulwini, emandla akhe abuyisa umoya waseningizimu." 
Psalms78:27 Wanisa inyama yaba ngangelutfuli, tinyoni taba ngangetihlabatsi tetilwandle." 
Psalms78:28 Lenyama wayinisa emkhatsini wemathende abo, nasemaceleni kwemathende abo." 
Psalms78:29 Badla bashaya sentfwala, ngobe abebaphe loko babekuhalela." 
Psalms78:30 Kodvwa kwatsi basengakeneliseki ebudlini babo, kudla kusagcwele imilomo yabo," 
Psalms78:31 Nkulunkulu wabavukela ngelulaka, wabulala bonkhe lababenemandla babo, wagicita phansi emajaha aka-Israyeli." 
Psalms78:32 Etikwako konkhe loku bajinge bachubeka nekona kwabo, abazange bakholwe netimangaliso takhe." 
Psalms78:33 Ngako wenta kutsi emalanga abo endlule ashabalale njengemoya, neminyaka yabo yacedvwa tehlakalo." 
Psalms78:34 Ngesikhatsi ababhubhisa babetiletsa kuye, baphendvuke bafunisise Nkulunkulu." 
Psalms78:35 Bakhumbula kutsi Nkulunkulu ulidvwala labo, Nkulunkulu Losetikwako Konkhe ungumhlengi wabo." 
Psalms78:36 Kodvwa babencempheta ngemilomo yabo, bacala emanga kuye ngetilwimi tabo," 
Psalms78:37 inhlitiyo yabo yayingakemi kuye, bangaketsembeki evini lesivumelwane naye." 
Psalms78:38 Kodvwa yena waba nesihawu, watisibekela tono tabo, akazange ababhubhise abacedze. Kanyenti watibamba ekutfukutseleni kwakhe, akaluvusanga lonkhe lulaka lwakhe." 
Psalms78:39 Wakhumbula kutsi batidalwa letabunjwa ngenyama, banjengemoya lotsi hasha, uhambe siphelane." 
Psalms78:40 Kukanyenti kangakanani bamhlubuka ehlane, bamdzabukisa ehlane kalashameshame." 
Psalms78:41 Balinga Nkulunkulu njalonjalo, bacansula Longcwele waka-Israyeli." 
Psalms78:42 Babengayikhumbuli imisebenti yemandla akhe, nelilanga mhlazana abahlenga esitseni," 
Psalms78:43 ngesikhatsi enta tibonakaliso takhe eGibhithe, enta netimangaliso takhe eveni laseSowani." 
Psalms78:44 Imifula yabo wayigucula yaba yingati, ngako behluleka kunatsa kuyo lemifula." 
Psalms78:45 Wabatfumelela emabulo etibawu, tabaluma, kanye neticoco letaba yimbhubhiso leluhlupho." 
Psalms78:46 Watfumela tintsetse, tacedza tilimo tabo, sikhonyane sadla titfukutfuku tabo." 
Psalms78:47 Wavitsita imivini yabo ngesangcotfo, washaya nemikhiwane yabo ngesitfwatfwa." 
Psalms78:48 Wanikela tinkhomo tabo ngesangcotfo, netimvu tabo ngemibane." 
Psalms78:49 Watfukulula intfukutselo yakhe levutsako, lulaka, nentfukutselo, neluhlupho, nesishoshomane setitfunywa temashwa." 
Psalms78:50 Wadedela lulaka lwakhe, wangete walubamba, wangete wawuphephisa umphefumulo wabo ekufeni, kodvwa timphilo tabo watinikela ngetifo letibulalanako." 
Psalms78:51 Wabulala onkhe ematubulo aseGibhithe, lekwakungumgogodla wemphi emathendeni aHhamu." 
Psalms78:52 Kepha wakhipha sive sakhe njengetimvu, wasihola ehlane njengemhlambi wakhe." 
Psalms78:53 Wabahola baphepha bangesabi lutfo, kepha lwandle lwatimbonya titsa tabo." 
Psalms78:54 Wabayisa eveni lakhe lelingcwele, letintsaba, lalitfola ngesandla sakhe sekudla." 
Psalms78:55 Wacosha tive embikwabo, lelive walenta laba lifa labo, lapho imindeni yaka-Israyeli yayingamisa khona emathende ayo." 
Psalms78:56 Noko bamlinga bamhlubuka Nkulunkulu Losetikwako Konkhe, bangete bayigcina imiyalo yakhe." 
Psalms78:57 Benta bucili, bahlubuka, njengabokhokho babo, bajikajika njengesigwegwe sebutjoki." 
Psalms78:58 Bamtfukutselisa ngetindzawo tabo temalati, lapho bakhonta khona tithico tabo letibatiwe, loko kwamenta waba nesikhwele." 
Psalms78:59 Watsi nakuva loko Nkulunkulu, watfukutsela, wabalahla baka-Israyeli." 
Psalms78:60 Wayidzikila indlu yakhe lengcwele leseShilo, lithende labehlala kulo emkhatsini webantfu," 
Psalms78:61 wayekelela titsa, tatfumba libhokisi lesivumelwane lelisiboniso semandla nenkhatimulo yakhe." 
Psalms78:62 Sive sakhe wasinikela enkembeni, walitfukutselela lifa lakhe." 
Psalms78:63 Emajaha abo acotfulwa ngumlilo, tintfombi tabo tandzindza lababengatiteka." 
Psalms78:64 Baphristi babo baba kudla kwenkemba, bafelokati babo abazange babalilele." 
Psalms78:65 Simakadze, Nkulunkulu, wavuka, njengalophaphama ebutfongweni, nanjengesichwaga lebesesehlulwe tjwala." 
Psalms78:66 Watehlula watihlehlisela nyova titsa takhe, watitsela ngelihlazo laphakadze." 
Psalms78:67 Wawufulatsela umndeni wakaJosefa, wangete wasikhetsa sive saka-Efrayimu." 
Psalms78:68 Kepha wakhetsa sive sakaJuda, iNtsaba iSiyoni, labeyitsandza kakhulu." 
Psalms78:69 Wayakha indlu yakhe lengcwele, leyayiphakeme kakhulu njengemhlaba lawusekela, kuze kube phakadze naphakadze." 
Psalms78:70 Wakhetsa Davide, inceku yakhe, wamlandza ekweluseni timvu," 
Psalms78:71 nasekunakekeleni timvukati nemazinyane ato, kutsi atekwelusa bakaJakobe, sive sakhe, yebo, baka-Israyeli labalifa lakhe." 
Psalms78:72 Wabelusa ngebucotfo benhlitiyo, wabahola ngenhlakanipho nangebungcweti besandla sakhe." 
Psalms79:1 Awu, Nkulunkulu! Bahedeni sebangene efeni lakho, bangcolisa lithempeli lakho lelingcwele, bagucula iJerusalema bayenta tindzala." 
Psalms79:2 Banikele tidvumbu tetinceku takho kutsi tibe kudla kwemangce, netidvumbu talabangcwele bakho tibe kudla kwetilwane tesiganga." 
Psalms79:3 Bacitse ingati yetinceku takho, yageleta njengemanti, eJerusalema lonkhe. Kwabate nalongabangcwaba." 
Psalms79:4 Sesijike saba yinhlekisa kubomakhelwane betfu, bayasihaya bahlekisa ngatsi kulabakhelene natsi." 
Psalms79:5 Kuyawuze kube ngunini, Simakadze, lulaka lwakho luvutsa njengemlilo? Lulaka lwakho luyawuvutsa njengemlilo kuze kube ngunini?" 
Psalms79:6 Tfululela lulaka lwakho etikwetive letingakwati wena, nasetikwemibuso lengakhuleki kuwe." 
Psalms79:7 Ngobe sebabashaye babacotfula bakaJakobe, umuti wakhe bawenta sikhotsa." 
Psalms79:8 Ungasibeki licala ngebubi babokhokho betfu, sheshisa usihlangabete ngesihawu sakho, ngobe sesidzangele kakhulu." 
Psalms79:9 Sisite, Nkulunkulu wensindziso yetfu, sisite ngenca yenkhatimulo yelibito lakho, sihlenge usitsetselele tono tetfu, ngenca yelibito lakho lelihloniphekile." 
Psalms79:10 Betive basholani kutsi: “Uphi-ke loNkulunkulu wabo?” Shangatsi kuphindzisela kwakho singakubona kwenteka kulabo labacitse ingati yetinceku takho. 
Psalms79:11 Shangatsi kububula kwetiboshwa kungefika kuwe, bese kutsi ngalamandla akho lamakhulu ubephule labo lababange ekufeni." 
Psalms79:12 Yebo, Simakadze, buyisela esifubeni sabomakhelwane betfu seyiphindvwe kasikhombisa lenhlamba labakuhlambalate ngayo." 
Psalms79:13 Tsine-ke lesisive sakho netimvu telidlelo lakho, siyawudvumisa wena ingunaphakadze, silandzise ngeludvumo lwakho etitukulwaneni nasetitukulwaneni." 
Psalms80:1 Sive, Melusi waka-Israyeli, wena lohola Josefa njengemhlambi wetimvu. Wena lohlala emkhatsini wemakherubhi, bonakala ngekukhatimula kwakho." 
Psalms80:2 Vusa emandla akho embikwa-Efrayimu, naBhenjamini, naManase, ute utewusisita." 
Psalms80:3 Sibuyisele kuwe, Nkulunkulu. Khanyisa buso bakho bumengetele, kuze sisindziswe." 
Psalms80:4 Awu, Simakadze, Nkulunkulu wemabandla! Kutawuze kube ngunini ucansulwa ngimithandazo yesive sakho?" 
Psalms80:5 Wabapha sinkhwa ngetinyembeti, wabanatsisa ngetinyembeti." 
Psalms80:6 Wenta kutsi bomakhelwane betfu basibange, titsa tetfu tisihleke bulima." 
Psalms80:7 Sibuyisele kuwe, Nkulunkulu wemabandla! Khanyisa buso bakho bumengetele, kuze sisindziswe." 
Psalms80:8 Wazuphuna umvini eGibhithe, wacosha tive, wase uwuhlanyela eveni lato." 
Psalms80:9 Wawulungisela umhlaba wekuhlanyela, wakhula, wajula, wenaba, wagcwala live." 
Psalms80:10 Tintsaba tambonywa ngematfunti awo, imisedari yambonywa ngemagala awo," 
Psalms80:11 enabisa emagala awo adzimate efikela elwandle, ahluma adzimate efika eMfuleni." 
Psalms80:12 Pho, wena uludziliteleni lolutsango loluwutungeletile lomvini? Manje bonkhe labendlulako bangateba kalula letitselo tawo." 
Psalms80:13 Tingulube tesiganga tiyawuvukuta, tonkhe tilwane tesiganga tiyawudla." 
Psalms80:14 Awu, Nkulunkulu wemabandla! Phendvuka futsi! Buka phansi usetulu ezulwini, ubone lomvini wakho, uwunakelele," 
Psalms80:15 wona lowo mvini lowawuhlanyela ngesandla sakho sangesekudla, naleligala lotikhulisele lona." 
Psalms80:16 Labawujubile bawushisa ngemlilo, bayawubhujiswa kubhekwa buso bakho." 
Psalms80:17 Kodvwa shangatsi sandla sakho singamlondvolota, lowo longasesandleni sakho sekudla. Ngiyo indvodzana lotikhulisele yona." 
Psalms80:18 Singeke siphindze sikuhlamuke, siphe kuphila siphile, tsine-ke siyawube sesikhuleka egameni lakho." 
Psalms80:19 Sibuyisele kuwe, Nkulunkulu wemabandla! Khanyisa buso bakho bumengetele, kuze sisindziswe." 
Psalms81:1 Hlabelani kuNkulunkulu longemandla etfu, jabulani nidvumise Nkulunkulu waJakobe." 
Psalms81:2 Calani ingoma, nishaye tingubhu, netingitali kanye nemahabhu." 
Psalms81:3 Vutselani impalampala ekwetfwaseni kwenyanga, nangesikhatsi seyidvulungile ngelilanga lemkhosi wetfu." 
Psalms81:4 Ngobe loku kusimiso saka-Israyeli, nemtsetfo waNkulunkulu waJakobe." 
Psalms81:5 Wakwenta kwaba ngumtsetfo kuJosefa, mhlazana ayawukulwa nemaGibhithe. Ngeva livi lengangingalati litsi:" 
Psalms81:6 “Mine ngesusa umtfwalo emahlombe enu, nganiphumuta ekwetfwaleni kwenu titini." 
Psalms81:7 Nangibita nisebunzimeni nganephula, nganiphendvula ngingale kwemafu lahlomile, nganivivinya emitfonjeni yaseMeribha. Cabanga." 
Psalms81:8 “Lalelani, sive sami, nginiyale: Awu, ma-Israyeli! Shangatsi ngabe niyangilalela." 
Psalms81:9 Ningamkhonti lomunye nkulunkulu, ningakhuleki kubonkulunkulu betive." 
Psalms81:10 Ngimi Simakadze longuNkulunkulu wenu, lowanikhuphula eveni laseGibhithe. Khamisisani imilomo yenu, mine-ke ngitanifunta nginesutsise." 
Psalms81:11 “Kepha sive sami asililalelanga livi lami. Israyeli akazange anginake. 
Psalms81:12 Ngako-ke ngabayekelela enkhanini yetinhlitiyo tabo, kuze batihambele ngekutsandza kwabo." 
Psalms81:13 Maye, kube sive sami siyangilalela na-Israyeli ahambe etindleleni tami!" 
Psalms81:14 Titsa tabo bengitatehlula ngekushesha, ngesandla sami bengitawumelana netitsa tabo." 
Psalms81:15 Labangitondzako bebetawuta embikwami, bete bashosha phansi ngemadvolo, kujeziswa kwabo kuhlale ingunaphakadze." 
Psalms81:16 Bengiyawunipha kolo lomnandzi kakhulu, yebo, bengiyawunesutsisa ngeluju lwetinyosi temadvwala.”" 
Psalms82:1 Nkulunkulu ukhuluma emhlanganweni lomkhulu, wehlulela bonkulunkulu utsi:" 
Psalms82:2 “Kutawuze kube ngunini nehlulela ngalokungakalungi nikhetsa tindlubu nishiye tinkhobe? Cabanga. 
Psalms82:3 “Vikelani emalungelo alabamphofu netintsandzane, nimele emalungelo alabacindzetelwe nalabeswele." 
Psalms82:4 Bephuleni labamphofu nalabeswele, nibakhulule esandleni salababi." 
Psalms82:5 “Abati lutfo, abacondzi lutfo, badvukuta ebumnyameni; tonkhe tisekelo temhlaba tiyatanyatanyiswa." 
Psalms82:6 Ngatsi kini: ‘Nibonkulunkulu nine; nonkhe ningemadvodzana aLosetikwako Konkhe.’ 
Psalms82:7 Nome kunjalo, niyakufa njengebantfu bonkhe, niphele njengato tonkhe tikhulu.”" 
Psalms82:8 Vuka-ke, Nkulunkulu, wehlulele umhlaba, ngobe nguwe umnikati wetive tonkhe." 
Psalms83:1 Awu, Nkulunkulu! Ungathuli, utente simungulu. Ungatsalalisi, Nkulunkulu." 
Psalms83:2 Ase ubuke nje, titsa takho tiyaphitsitela, nalabo labakutondzako bayakucoloshela." 
Psalms83:3 Benta sigungu, bahlangane ngebantfu bakho, bafakane imilomo ngalabo labeluswe nguwe." 
Psalms83:4 Batsi: “Wotani sibacotfule bangabe basaba ngiso sive, kuze libito laka-Israyeli lingaphindze likhunjulwe.”" 
Psalms83:5 Bacebisana ngawe nganhlitiyo yinye, bente sivumelwane ngawe." 
Psalms83:6 Kuhlangene bonkhe baka-Edomu labasemathendeni, nebaka-Ishmayeli, nebakaMowabi, nebakaHagari," 
Psalms83:7 nebakaGebali, nebaka-Amoni, nebaka-Amaleki, nemaFilisti, kanye netakhamiti taseThire." 
Psalms83:8 Ngisho nebase-Asiriya bahlangene kanye nabo, babalekeleli bebatukulu baLoti. Cabanga." 
Psalms83:9 Baphatse ngesandla lowaphatsa ngaso emaMidiyani, naSisera, naJabini ngasemfuleni iKhishoni," 
Psalms83:10 labo lababhubha ngasemtini wase-Eni Dori; bawa njengebulongo, babola baze baba ngumcuba." 
Psalms83:11 Emakhosana abo wente abe njengabo-Orebi naZebi, babusi babe njengaboZeba naSalmuna." 
Psalms83:12 Batsi: “Asidle lelive libe lifa letfu, lelive lelingemadlelo aNkulunkulu!”" 
Psalms83:13 Awu, Nkulunkulu wami! Bente babe njengesiwunguwungwana, nanjengemakhoba wona apheshulwa ngumoya." 
Psalms83:14 Njengemlilo ushisa lihlatsi, nanjengemalangabi ababela tintsaba," 
Psalms83:15 nawe badvungulule ngesivunguvungu sakho, ubetfuse ngesiphepho sakho." 
Psalms83:16 Yebo, Simakadze! Tsela buso babo ngelihlazo, badzimate balifune libito lakho." 
Psalms83:17 Shangatsi bangahlazeka baphele emandla kuze kube phakadze, shangatsi bangehluleka babhubhe." 
Psalms83:18 Shangatsi bangati kutsi nguwe wedvwa lolibito lakhe linguSimakadze, nguwe Losetikwako Konkhe, lophakeme abuse umhlaba wonkhe." 
Psalms84:1 Maye, iyatsandzeka indlu yakho! Simakadze wemabandla!" 
Psalms84:2 Umphefumulo wami ulangatelela emagceke akho, inhlitiyo yami nemtimba wami kuhlabela kumemete ngekujabula lokukhulu kuNkulunkulu lophilako." 
Psalms84:3 Ncedze uyayitfola indzawo yesidleke, nenkonjane iyayitfola indzawo yekwakhela indlu yayo, lapho ingachobosela khona emazini ayo. Lendzawo ingasemalatini endlu yakho, Simakadze wemabandla, Nkhosi yami, naNkulunkulu wami." 
Psalms84:4 Babusisiwe labo labahlala endlini yakho, bayawuhlala babonga wena njalo. Cabanga." 
Psalms84:5 Babusisiwe labo bantfu emandla abo lakuwe, labalangatela etinhlitiyweni tabo kutsi bayewukhonta eSiyoni." 
Psalms84:6 Bayawutsi nome bahamba eSigodzini Lesomile, kubo sibe yindzawo lechume tiyalu, netimvula tekucala timbonye tibusiso." 
Psalms84:7 Bayatfutfuka emandleni baye emandleni; Nkulunkulu wabonkulunkulu uyawubonakala eSiyoni. 
Psalms84:8 Hhawu, Simakadze, Nkulunkulu wemabandla, vani, ulalele umthandazo wami, beka indlebe yakho, Nkulunkulu waJakobe! Cabanga." 
Psalms84:9 Nkulunkulu, buka sihlangu setfu, buka, ubone buso balogcotjiwe wakho." 
Psalms84:10 Ngobe lilanga linye etibuyeni tendlu yakho, lincono kunalayinkhulungwane lacitselwe ngaphandle. Ngingamane ngibe ngumlindzi wemnyango wendlu yaNkulunkulu, kunekutsi ngingahlala ngibuse emakhaya alababi." 
Psalms84:11 Ngobe Simakadze, Nkulunkulu ulilanga letfu nesihlangu sekusivikela. Simakadze usipha umusa asente sihlonipheke. Angeke abagodlele lutfo loluhle labo labahamba ngebucotfo embikwakhe." 
Psalms84:12 Yebo, Simakadze wemabandla! Ubusisiwe umuntfu lowetsembele kuwe!" 
Psalms85:1 Awu, Simakadze! Ulitsandzile live lakho, wabuyisela tibusiso taJakobe." 
Psalms85:2 Watsetselela emacala esive sakho, wambombota tonkhe tono tabo. Cabanga." 
Psalms85:3 Waluyekela lulaka lwakho, wabhodla ekutfukutseleni kwakho lokumatima." 
Psalms85:4 Sibuyise, Nkulunkulu wensindziso yetfu! Lahla kucansuka kwakho ngatsi." 
Psalms85:5 Utasitfukutselela kuze kube phakadze yini? Kantsi lulaka lwakho utalwelula titukulwane ngetitukulwane yini? 
Psalms85:6 Ungeke yini usivuselele siphile, kuze kutsi sive sakho sijabule kuwe?" 
Psalms85:7 Simakadze, sivise umusa wakho, usiphe insindziso yakho." 
Psalms85:8 Ase ngilalele loko lokutawukhulunywa nguNkulunkulu Simakadze, ngobe ukhuluma kuthula esiveni sakhe nakulabangcwele bakhe, nabangancandzeki babuyele ebubini." 
Psalms85:9 Ngempela insindziso yakhe isedvute kulabo labamesabako, kuze live letfu libe neludvumo lwakhe," 
Psalms85:10 bese kuhlangabetana umusa neliciniso, kwangane kulunga nekuthula." 
Psalms85:11 Kuyawuhluma liciniso emhlabatsini, kulunga kulungute emhlabeni kusezulwini." 
Psalms85:12 Yebo, Simakadze, uyawusipha lokuhle, live letfu liyawutsela titselo." 
Psalms85:13 Kulunga kuyawuhamba embikwaSimakadze, kuphendle indlela latawuhamba kuyo." 
Psalms86:1 Awu, Simakadze! Beka indlebe yakho, ungiphendvule, ngobe ngiselusizini nginguloweswele." 
Psalms86:2 Londvolota kuphila kwami, ngobe nginamatsele kuwe. Sindzisa inceku yakho lekwetsembako, ngobe wena unguNkulunkulu wami." 
Psalms86:3 Bani nemusa kimi, Nkulunkulu, ngobe ngikhala kuwe lonkhe lilanga." 
Psalms86:4 Tfokotisa umphefumulo wenceku yakho, ngobe umphefumulo wami ngiwuphakamisela kuwe, Simakadze." 
Psalms86:5 Ngobe wena, Nkhosi, ulungile futsi ulungele kutsetselela, umusa wakho uyabaphuphumela labo labakhala kuwe." 
Psalms86:6 Awu, Simakadze! Beka indlebe yakho ekukhulekeni kwami, uve livi lekuncusa kwami." 
Psalms86:7 Ngelilanga lekuhlupheka kwami ngikhala kuwe, ngobe wena uyangiphendvula." 
Psalms86:8 Kubo bonkhe bonkulunkulu kute lofanana nawe, Simakadze; kute nalokufanana nemisebenti yakho." 
Psalms86:9 Tonkhe tive lotentile tiyawuta kuwe, tikhotsame embikwakho, Nkhosi yami, tibabate libito lakho." 
Psalms86:10 Ngobe wena umkhulu, ungumenti wetimangaliso, nguwe wedvwa longuNkulunkulu." 
Psalms86:11 Ngifundzise indlela yakho, Simakadze, ngiyawuhamba ecinisweni lakho; yenta inhlitiyo yami ihlose intfo yinye: kutsi ilesabe libito lakho." 
Psalms86:12 Ngiyawukubonga, Simakadze, Nkulunkulu wami, ngikudvumise ngenhlitiyo yami yonkhe, ngidvumise libito lakho kuze kube phakadze." 
Psalms86:13 Ngobe umusa wakho mkhulu kimi, uwephulile umphefumulo wami ekujuleni kwekufa." 
Psalms86:14 Awu, Nkulunkulu! Tihlangananhloko tingivukele; lesishoshomane setidlova sifuna kungibulala, tona atikwati nekutsi uyini." 
Psalms86:15 Kodvwa wena, Simakadze, unguNkulunkulu lonesihawu, nebubele, nekubeketela, uphuphuma umusa nekwetsembeka." 
Psalms86:16 Gucukela ngakimi, ube nemusa kimi inceku yakho uyiphe emandla akho, usindzise indvodzana yencekukati yakho." 
Psalms86:17 Ngente sibonakaliso sebuhle bakho, kuze labo labangitondzako basibone, badliwe ngemahloni, ngobe wena, Simakadze, uyangisita, ungidvudvute." 
Psalms87:1 Simakadze ubeke likhaya lakhe etikwentsaba lengcwele. 
Psalms87:2 Emasango aseSiyoni uwatsandza kakhulu kunayo yonkhe imiti yakaJakobe. 
Psalms87:3 Maye, kuhle loko lokukhulunywa ngawe, wena khaya laNkulunkulu: Cabanga." 
Psalms87:4 “Ngibala iRahabi neBhabhulona, emkhatsini walabo labangatiko. Yebo, emaFilisti, nebaseThire, nebaseKushe, bonkhe labo bantfu batalelwa eSiyoni.”" 
Psalms87:5 NgeSiyoni kuyawukhulunywa kutsiwe: “Lona nalona batalelwa lapho, ngobe Losetikwako Konkhe uyayicinisa.”" 
Psalms87:6 Simakadze uyawutibhalisa tonkhe tive atsi: “Lesi satalelwa eSiyoni.” Cabanga. 
Psalms87:7 Bahlabeleli nebadlali ngalokufanako batsi: “Yonkhe imitfombo yami ikuwe.” 
Psalms88:1 Simakadze, Nkulunkulu wensindziso yami. Ngikhala kuwe imini nebusuku." 
Psalms88:2 Shangatsi umkhuleko wami ungefikela kuwe, beka indlebe yakho, uve kukhala kwami." 
Psalms88:3 Ngobe umphefumulo wami ugcwele tinsizi, nekuphila kwami sekusondzele ethuneni." 
Psalms88:4 Ngibalwa kanye nalabacondze emgodzini, nginjengendvodza lete emandla." 
Psalms88:5 Sengibalelwa kulabafile njengalababulewe, lese balala emathuneni, bona labo longasabakhumbuli, yebo, lese bancunywa kuwe." 
Psalms88:6 Ungifake emgodzini lojule kunayo yonkhe, etindzaweni letimnyama nasetingungwini." 
Psalms88:7 Lulaka lwakho luyangisindza. Emagagasi akho ayangicindzetela. Cabanga. 
Psalms88:8 Bangani bami ubakhweshisile kimi, wangenta ngaba sinengiso kubo. Ngivalelekile, angikhoni kuphuma." 
Psalms88:9 Liso lami liyafa ngenca yelusizi, ngikhala kuwe, Simakadze, imini nebusuku ngiphakamisa tandla tami, ngikhuleka kuwe." 
Psalms88:10 Labafile uyabentela yini timanga? Bayavuka yini emathuneni bakudvumise? Cabanga. 
Psalms88:11 Umusa wakho kungakhulunywa yini ngawo ethuneni? Kwetsembeka kwakho kungakhulunywa yini ngako ekubhujisweni? 
Psalms88:12 Timangaliso takho tingatiwa yini ebumnyameni? Kulunga kwakho kuyatiwa yini eveni lalabo labangasakhumbuli? 
Psalms88:13 Kodvwa mine, Simakadze, ngikhala kuwe, ngicela lusito, kutsi kusa ube uhlangabetana nemkhuleko wami." 
Psalms88:14 Awu, Simakadze! Ungilahlelani? Ungifihlelelani buso bakho?" 
Psalms88:15 Ngihlupheke kakhulu ngabasengotini yekufa, kwasebusheni bami; ngashaywa luvalo, ngasangana." 
Psalms88:16 Lulaka lwakho loluvutsako lungehlele, kwesabisa kwakho kungicedzile." 
Psalms88:17 Kungitungeleta njengemanti onkhe emalanga, kungitungeleta kanyekanye." 
Psalms88:18 Sihlobo sami nemngani wami ubacoshile, bakhashane nami; bumnyama sebungumngani wami." 
Psalms89:1 Yebo, Simakadze! Ngiyawuhlabela kuze kube phakadze ngemisebenti yemusa wakho. Kwetsembeka kwakho ngiyawukumemetela ngemlomo wami etitukulwaneni nasetitukulwaneni." 
Psalms89:2 Ngobe ngitsite: Umusa wakho utawuma kuze kube phakadze, nekwetsembeka kwakho utakumisa ezulwini." 
Psalms89:3 Wena ukhulume watsi: “Sengente sivumelwane nalokhetsiwe wami, ngafunga kuDavide inceku yami ngatsi:" 
Psalms89:4 ‘Ngiyawumisa intalo yakho phakadze naphakadze, ngikwakhele sihlalo sakho sebukhosi etitukulwaneni ngetitukulwane.’ ” Cabanga." 
Psalms89:5 Yebo, Simakadze! Shangatsi emazulu angadvumisa timanga takho nekwetsembeka kwakho enhlanganweni yalabangcwele!" 
Psalms89:6 Ngubani nje losesibhakabhakeni longalinganiswa nawe, Simakadze? Ngubani nje, emkhatsini wemadvodzana aNkulunkulu, longafananiswa naSimakadze?" 
Psalms89:7 UnguNkulunkulu lowesatjwa emikhandlwini yalabangcwele. Umkhulu, futsi wesabeka ngetulu kwabo bonkhe labakuhacile." 
Psalms89:8 Yebo, Simakadze! Nkulunkulu wemabandla! Ngubani nje lofanana nawe, wena lonemandla, Simakadze? Kwetsembeka kwakho kuyakuhaca." 
Psalms89:9 Nguwe lobusa kutichenya kwelwandle nakaphakama emagagasi alo, wena uyawabindzisa." 
Psalms89:10 Nguwe lowapitjita Rahabi, wambulala. Titsa takho watisakata ngesandla sakho lesinemandla." 
Psalms89:11 Emazulu ngewakho, nemhlaba wakho, umhlaba nako konkhe lokukuwo kwadalwa nguwe." 
Psalms89:12 Inyakatfo neningizimu kwadalwa nguwe. Intsaba iThabhori nentsaba iHemoni kudvumisa libito lakho ngenjabulo. 
Psalms89:13 Unengalo lenemandla, nesandla sakho sinemandla, nesandla sakho sekudla siphakeme." 
Psalms89:14 Kulunga nebucotfo tisekelo tesihlalo sakho sebukhosi, umusa nekwetsembeka kungemavulandlela lahamba embikwakho." 
Psalms89:15 Yebo, Simakadze! Sibusisiwe sive lesati kahle kutsi kuyini kumpompoloza ngenjabulo, sihambe ekukhanyeni kwebuso bakho." 
Psalms89:16 Lesive sijabula njalo nje egameni lakho, siphakanyiswe ngenca yekulunga kwakho." 
Psalms89:17 Ngobe wena uludvumo lwemandla aso, ngekusikhetsa kwakho luphondvo lwemandla etfu luyaphakanyiswa." 
Psalms89:18 Sihlangu setfu sakho, Simakadze, siyinkhosi yetfu lesayinikwa nguLongcwele waka-Israyeli." 
Psalms89:19 Endvulo wase wakhuluma embonweni, kuye lowetsembekile wakho, watsi: “Ngimsitile, ngambeka lolichawe, ngamphakamisa lotsandzekako wami." 
Psalms89:20 Ngimtfolile Davide, inceku yami, sengimgcobe ngemafutsa ami langcwele." 
Psalms89:21 Sandla sami siyawuma naye njalo simcinise, ngempela ingalo yami iyawumcinisa." 
Psalms89:22 Sitsa singeke simphocelele kutsi etfule kuso, nalomubi angeke amhluphe." 
Psalms89:23 Ngiyawupitjita titsa takhe embikwakhe, ngibacitse labo labamtondzako." 
Psalms89:24 Kwetsembeka kwami nemusa wami kuyawuhlala naye; ngelibito lami kuyawuphakanyiswa luphondvo lwakhe. 
Psalms89:25 Ngiyawumenta abuse etikwelwandle nasetikwemifula kanyekanye. 
Psalms89:26 Uyawukhala kimi atsi: ‘Wena unguBabe, unguNkulunkulu wami, nelidvwala lensindziso yami.’" 
Psalms89:27 Ngiyawumenta abe litubulo, abe yinkhosi lephakeme kunemakhosi emhlaba." 
Psalms89:28 Ngiyawumgcinela umusa wami kuze kube phakadze. Sivumelwane sami naye siyawuhlala simile. 
Psalms89:29 Ngiyawumisa intalo yakhe, kuze kube phakadze, nesihlalo sakhe sebukhosi sisime, yingci nakusekhona sibhakabhaka etulu." 
Psalms89:30 “Nangabe bantfwabakhe bawulahla umtsetfo wami, bangahambi ngendlela yetincumo tami," 
Psalms89:31 bedzelela timiso tami, bangayigcini imiyalo yami," 
Psalms89:32 ngiyawube sengibafaka luswati, ngibajezise ngenca yekona kwabo, ngibanike imivimba ngenca yebubi babo." 
Psalms89:33 Kodvwa ngingeke ngiwususe umusa wami kuye, ngingeke futsi ngikuphikise kwetsembeka kwami." 
Psalms89:34 Sivumelwane sami ngingeke ngisephule; nemavi lese ngiwakhulumile ngingeke ngiwagucule. 
Psalms89:35 “Ngifunge kwaba kanye ebungcweleni bami, ngingeke ngiwacale emanga kuDavide." 
Psalms89:36 Intalo yakhe iyawuma kuze kube phakadze, nesihlalo sakhe sebukhosi asiyiwugucuka, siyawuma njengelilanga lelisembikwami." 
Psalms89:37 Uyawumiswa siphelane, njengenyanga, ngobe yona ingufakazi lowetsembekile losemafini.” Cabanga." 
Psalms89:38 Kodvwa manje sewumlahlile wamala, wamtfukutselela logcotjiwe wakho." 
Psalms89:39 Sewusicitsile sivumelwane senceku yakho, umchele wayo uwutsele ngelihlazo, wawudzicela phansi." 
Psalms89:40 Utidzilitele phansi tonkhe tindvonga, tinqaba tasala titindvundvuma." 
Psalms89:41 Bonkhe labendlula ngendlela bayatikhwanyela kuyo. Seyigucuke yaba yinhlekisa kubomakhelwane bayo. 
Psalms89:42 Uyente yancotjwa ngulabamelene nayo, wajabulisa tonkhe titsa tayo." 
Psalms89:43 Nenkemba yayo ayikadli enyameni, wayenta yehluleka ngisho nekubhekana nemphi." 
Psalms89:44 Uyemuke indvuku yebukhosi esandleni sayo, wasidzaceka phansi sihlalo sayo sebukhosi." 
Psalms89:45 Uwafinyetile emalanga ebusha bayo, wayembesa ngemahloni. Cabanga." 
Psalms89:46 Kuyawuze kube ngunini, Simakadze, utifihla siphelane ngingakuboni? Kuyawuze kube ngunini lulaka lwakho luvutsa njengemalangabi emlilo?" 
Psalms89:47 Khumbula-ke kutsi sikhatsi sami singakanani emhlabeni. Bonkhe bantfu lowabadala bendlula njengemoya kulomhlaba. 
Psalms89:48 Ngubani nje umuntfu loyawuphila angafi? Ngubani nje longatigodla yena angayi ethuneni? Cabanga. 
Psalms89:49 Awu, Nkhosi yami! Uphi kantsi umusa wakho lomkhulu lowawubonakalisa endvulo, wenta sifungo ngawo kuDavide ngekwetsembeka kwakho?" 
Psalms89:50 Awu, Nkhosi yami! Khumbula kuphukutwa kwenceku yakho, nekutsi tive tingibhaceka ngetinhlamba." 
Psalms89:51 Awu, Simakadze! Titsa takho tiyayihhalatisa lenkhosi loyigcobile, tiyayilandzela tiyibambe, tiyibhaceke ngetinhlamba." 
Psalms89:52 Simakadze akabongwe nini nanini! Amen! Yebo, Amen!" 
Psalms90:1 Yebo, Simakadze! Wena ube siphephelo setfu etitukulwaneni nasetitukulwaneni." 
Psalms90:2 Ngaphambi kwekudalwa kwetintsaba, yebo, ungakawudali nemhlaba, kusukela phakadze kuze kube phakadze, wena Nkulunkulu ukhona." 
Psalms90:3 Umuntfu umbuyisela elutfulini utsi: “Buyelani nine bantfwana bebantfu nibe lutfuli lenabunjwa ngalo.” 
Psalms90:4 Ngobe inkhulungwane yeminyaka kuwe ingangelilanga linye, injengelilanga layitolo nase lendlulile, yimfishane, ingangemlindvo wasebusuku." 
Psalms90:5 Bantfu ubakhukhula njengesihlambi semanti, baphele njengebutfongo, ekuseni bakhula njengeluhlata:" 
Psalms90:6 nome ekuseni luyahluma luchakaze, kodvwa entsambama luyasikwa lubune." 
Psalms90:7 Intfukutselo yakho isicedza emandla, lulaka lwakho luyasesabisa." 
Psalms90:8 Bubi betfu busembikwakho, tono tetfu letifihlakele tisekukhanyeni kwebuso bakho." 
Psalms90:9 Onkhe emalanga etfu ekuphila endlula ngaphansi kwelulaka lwakho, iminyaka yetfu iyefika ibuye yendlule, sincane sesibibitfwane sesikhashana." 
Psalms90:10 Iminyaka yekuphila kwetfu ingiminyaka lengemashumi lasikhombisa, nangabe sisacinile iba ngiminyaka lengemashumi lasiphohlongo; noko linyenti laleyo minyaka seliphetse kuhlupheka nelusizi. Kuphila kwetfu kwendlula ngekushesha, yebo, siyandiza sihambe." 
Psalms90:11 Ngubani lowati emandla entfukutselo yakho, yebo, nelulaka lwakho, kuze akwesabe ngalokufanele?" 
Psalms90:12 Sifundzise kutsi sikwati kubala emalanga etfu, kuze sibe nenhlitiyo lehlakaniphile." 
Psalms90:13 Buya, Simakadze! Kuyawudzimate kube ngunini solomane usifulatsela? Hawukela tinceku takho." 
Psalms90:14 Senelise ngemusa wakho njalo ekuseni, kuze sijabule sitfokote onkhe emalanga etfu letako." 
Psalms90:15 Siphe emalanga ekujabula, langangemalanga ekusihlupha kwakho; akabe ngangeminyaka yekuhlupheka kwetfu." 
Psalms90:16 Shangatsi tinceku takho tingake tikubone usebenta, nemandla akho ebukhosi abonakale nasetitukulwaneni tato." 
Psalms90:17 Shangatsi lutsandvo lweNkhosi lenguNkulunkulu wetfu, lungabasetikwetfu. Shangatsi ungawubusisa umsebenti wetandla tetfu; yebo, phumelelisa umsebenti wetandla tetfu." 
Psalms91:1 Lowo lohlala ekusitsekeni kuLosetikwako Konkhe ukhosele ekhwapheni laSomandla. 
Psalms91:2 Angasho kuSimakadze atsi: “Wena usiphephelo sami nenqaba yami, unguNkulunkulu wami lengetsembele kuye.”" 
Psalms91:3 Nguye-ke Simakadze lotakwephula elugibeni lwebacuphi, akuvikele nasetifeni letitsatselwanako." 
Psalms91:4 Uyawukusibekela ngetimphiko takhe, uphephele ngaphansi kwemaphiko akhe, kwetsembeka kwakhe kulihawu lekukuvikela." 
Psalms91:5 Awudzingi kwesaba tingoti tasebusuku, nemicibisholo lentjuzako emini," 
Psalms91:6 nengoti lenkhulu levumbuka ebumnyameni, namashayacotfule wesifo lobhubhisako emini." 
Psalms91:7 Labatinkhulungwane bangawa eceleni kwakho, nalabatinkhulungwane letilishumi bawele ngasesandleni sakho sekudla, kodvwa wena usale ungenamyocu." 
Psalms91:8 Uyawubuka nje kuphela ngemehlo akho, ubone kujeziswa kwalababi." 
Psalms91:9 Ngobe wena Simakadze umente waba siphephelo sakho, Losetikwako Konkhe umente inqaba yakho." 
Psalms91:10 Ungeke wehlelwe ngemashwa, nesifo singeke sisondzele ekhaya lakho." 
Psalms91:11 Ngobe Nkulunkulu uyawuyala tingilosi takhe ngawe tikulondvolote ekuhambeni kwakho konkhe. 
Psalms91:12 Tiyawukutsatsa tikwetfwale ngetandla, kuze lunyawo lwakho lungete lwakhutjwa etjeni." 
Psalms91:13 Uyawuhamba etikwemabhubesi netinyoka, ugcobagcobe etikwemawundlu emabhubesi kanye nasetikwetinyoka." 
Psalms91:14 Nkulunkulu yena utsi: “Njengobe naku ubambelele kimi ngelutsandvo, ngitamephula ngimbeke endzaweni lephakeme, ngimvikele ngobe alati libito lami." 
Psalms91:15 Uyawungibita ngiphendvule ngibe naye ekuhluphekeni, ngimuphe kuphepha nekuhlonipheka." 
Psalms91:16 Ngiyawumesutsisa ngebudze bemalanga akhe ngimkhombise emandla ensindziso yami.” 
Psalms92:1 Kuhle kubonga wena, Simakadze, nekuhlabelela egameni lakho, wena Losetikwako Konkhe," 
Psalms92:2 nekuvakalisa umusa wakho ekuseni, nekwetsembeka kwakho ebusuku," 
Psalms92:3 nakushaywa ihabhu lenetintsambo letilishumi, nelugitali, netintsambo telire." 
Psalms92:4 Ngobe nguwe, Simakadze, longente ngatfokota ngaloko lokwentile, imisebenti yetandla takho ingente ngahlabelela ngekujabula." 
Psalms92:5 Maye, mikhulu imisebenti yakho, Simakadze! Imicabango yakho ijule kakhulu." 
Psalms92:6 Sihhundzahhundza singeke sikwati loko, umuntfu losilima angeke acondze" 
Psalms92:7 kutsi nome lababi bangahluma njengetjani, nato tonkhe tigilamkhuba tichuma, noko tiyawubhujiswa phakadze naphakadze." 
Psalms92:8 Kodvwa wena, Simakadze, uphakeme phakadze naphakadze." 
Psalms92:9 Ngobe nato titsa takho, tiyawubhubha; bonkhe lababi bayawusakatwa." 
Psalms92:10 Kodvwa luphondvo lwami uluphakamisile njengeluphondvo lwenkhabi lengumlalandle, ungigcobe ngemafutsa lamasha." 
Psalms92:11 Titsa tami ngitibuke emehlweni, netindlebe tami titivile tinsongo talabo lababi labemelene nami." 
Psalms92:12 Lolungile uhluma njengelisundvu, akhule njengemsedari waseLebanoni." 
Psalms92:13 Labo-ke banjengetihlahla letihlanyelwe endlini yaSimakadze, bachuma etibuyeni taNkulunkulu wetfu." 
Psalms92:14 Ebudzaleni babo bayawuchubeka batsele titselo, bafanane netihlahla letihlala tiluhlata, ngobe tona tihlala ticinile," 
Psalms92:15 kuze kubonakale kutsi Somandla ulungile, yena ulidvwala lami, yena unguSokulunga." 
Psalms93:1 Simakadze uyabusa, wembetse inkhatimulo, Simakadze wembetse, wavunula emandla. Ngempela, umhlaba wonkhe utintile, ungeke utanyatanyiswe." 
Psalms93:2 Sihlalo sakho sebukhosi seloku sema sicinile kwasemandvulweni, wena wawuvele ukhona kwasemaphakadzeni." 
Psalms93:3 Imifula idlondlobele, Simakadze, imifula idlondlobele ngekuhlokoma, imifula idlondlobele ngekudvuma." 
Psalms93:4 Kepha wena, Simakadze, umkhulu kunekudvuma kwemanti lamanyenti, umkhulu kunemagagasi aselwandle." 
Psalms93:5 Bufakazi bakho buciniseke kakhulu, bungcwele buyifanele indlu yakho, phakadze naphakadze, Simakadze." 
Psalms94:1 Yebo, Simakadze, nguwe Nkulunkulu wemphindziselo! Wena unguNkulunkulu wekuphindzisela. Phumela ebaleni ukhanye." 
Psalms94:2 Phakama, Mehluleli wemhlaba, uphindzisele kubemhlaba labatidlako." 
Psalms94:3 Awu, Simakadze! Kuyawuze kube ngunini lababi batikhukhumeta? Kuyawuze kube ngunini lababi bachoshile?" 
Psalms94:4 Kuyawuze kube ngunini lababi batidla bakhuluma kabi bahlambalata? 
Psalms94:5 Simakadze, sive sakho bayasipitjita, balinyatsela phansi lifa lakho." 
Psalms94:6 Babulala bafelokati, netihambi, basontse netintsandzane, ngobe tite boyise." 
Psalms94:7 Batsi: “Simakadze akaboni, Nkulunkulu waJakobe akanaki.”" 
Psalms94:8 Caphelani nine leninenhloko lelukhuni, emkhatsini wesive. Nine tilima, niyawuhlakanipha nini?" 
Psalms94:9 Nguye lowadala indlebe, pho, angehluleka yini kuva? Nguye lowadala liso, pho, angehluleka yini kubona?" 
Psalms94:10 Nguye longumcondzisi wetive, pho, angeke ehlulele yini? Nguye lofundzisa lwati kubo bonkhe bantfu, pho, angabate kanjani lwati?" 
Psalms94:11 Simakadze uyayati imicabango yebantfu, kutsi ifana nemoya lotsi shwi wendlule." 
Psalms94:12 Yebo, Simakadze! Ubusisiwe umuntfu loyalwa nguwe, afundziswe nguwe emtsetfweni wakho," 
Psalms94:13 umuphe kuthula ngesikhatsi sebumatima, kusambiwa umgodzi wekuchilitela lababi." 
Psalms94:14 Ngobe Simakadze angeke asilahle sive sakhe, angeke alishiye lifa lakhe." 
Psalms94:15 Kulunga kuyawuphindze kubuyele ekwehlulelweni, bonkhe labacotfo ngenhlitiyo bayawukulandzela." 
Psalms94:16 Ngubani longangisita kulababi? Ngubani longangiphendvula kulabaphambene nami? 
Psalms94:17 Kube Simakadze abengesilo lusito lwami, ngabe ngasheshe ngafa." 
Psalms94:18 Ngatsi nangifuna kutsi: “Naku sengiwa,” Simakadze wangisekela ngemusa wakhe, ngabuye ngema futsi." 
Psalms94:19 Ngesikhatsi inhlitiyo yami iphitsiteliswa ngimicabango, kudvudvuta kwakho kuyawutfokotisa umphefumulo wami." 
Psalms94:20 Babusi lababi bangaba nenhlanganyelo yini nawe, labo labenta bubi kube shangatsi ngumtsetfo?" 
Psalms94:21 Bakha lisu lekuhlasela labalungile, balahla bantfu labangenacala." 
Psalms94:22 Kodvwa Simakadze uyinqaba yami, Nkulunkulu wami ulidvwala lelisiphephelo sami." 
Psalms94:23 Uyawukwehlisela tono tabo etikwabo, ababhubhise ngenca yebubi babo; Simakadze, Nkulunkulu wetfu, uyawubabhubhisa." 
Psalms95:1 Wotani, sitewuhlabela kuSimakadze, sihlabele ngenjabulo kulo lidvwala lensindziso yetfu!" 
Psalms95:2 Asiye kuye ngekuhlabela, simbonge ngetibongo nangetingoma." 
Psalms95:3 Ngobe Simakadze nguNkulunkulu lomkhulu, unguMbusi lomkhulu lonemandla kunabo bonkhe bonkulunkulu." 
Psalms95:4 Esandleni sakhe kunekujula kwemhlaba, kanye nekuphakama kwetintsaba." 
Psalms95:5 Lwandle lwakhe, ngobe walwenta, nemhlaba lowomile wakhe, ngobe wawubumba ngetandla takhe." 
Psalms95:6 Wotani, sikhuleke, simkhotsamele, asiguce embikwaSimakadze, uMenti wetfu." 
Psalms95:7 Ngobe yena unguNkulunkulu wetfu, tsine sitimvu telidlelo lakhe, nesive lesisetandleni takhe. Lamuhla shangatsi ningalilalela livi lakhe nalitsi:" 
Psalms95:8 “Ningatenti lukhuni tinhlitiyo tenu, njengaseMeribha nanjengamhlazane baseMasa," 
Psalms95:9 lapho bangilinga khona boyihlo, bangivivinya, nome babeyibonile imisebenti yami." 
Psalms95:10 Iminyaka lengemashumi lamane nganengwa nguleso sive, ngadzimate ngatsi: ‘Basive, lesinhlitiyo yaso yedukile, abaticaphelanga tindlela tami.’" 
Psalms95:11 Ngako-ke ngatfukutsela ngadzimate ngafunga ngabo ngatsi: ‘Bangeke bangene ekuphumuleni kwami.’ ” 
Psalms96:1 Hlabelani ingoma lensha kuSimakadze, hlabelani kuSimakadze, mhlaba wonkhe!" 
Psalms96:2 Hlabelani kuSimakadze, nidvumise libito lakhe, memetelani insindziso yakhe imihla ngemihla." 
Psalms96:3 Vakalisani bukhosi bakhe etiveni, nitjele tonkhe tive ngetimanga takhe." 
Psalms96:4 Simakadze mkhulu, ufanele kudvunyiswa kakhulu, ufanele kwesatjwa kunabo bonkhe bonkulunkulu." 
Psalms96:5 Ngobe bonkhe bonkulunkulu betive batithico, kantsi nguSimakadze lowenta emazulu." 
Psalms96:6 Ludvumo nebukhosi kusembikwakhe, emandla nenkhatimulo kusendlini yakhe lengcwele." 
Psalms96:7 Phakamisani Simakadze esikhundleni sakhe, nine mindeni yetive. Nikani Simakadze ludvumo nemandla." 
Psalms96:8 Nikani Simakadze lolufanele ludvumo libito lakhe. Ngenani emabaleni endlu yakhe, niletse kuye umnikelo." 
Psalms96:9 Khotsamani nikhuleke kuSimakadze, nembatse bungcwele, nitfutfumele embikwakhe, mhlaba wonkhe." 
Psalms96:10 Memetelani emkhatsini wetive nitsi: “Simakadze yiNkhosi, uyabusa! Yebo, umhlaba usinyisiwe, ungeke utanyatanyiswe, nguye loyakwehlulela tive ngebucotfo.”" 
Psalms96:11 Jabulani mazulu, tsakasa nawe mhlaba, kubhodle lwandle nako konkhe lokukulo." 
Psalms96:12 Emadlelo, nako konkhe lokukuwo, akujabule, tonkhe tihlahla tesiganga atijabule" 
Psalms96:13 embikwaSimakadze, ngobe uyeta, yebo, uyeta kutakwehlulela umhlaba. Uyakwehlulela umhlaba ngekulunga, yebo, ehlulele tive ngekwetsembeka kwakhe." 
Psalms97:1 Simakadze uyabusa, umhlaba awujabule netichingi tonkhe tijabule." 
Psalms97:2 Emafu lamnyama amtungeletile, kulunga nebucotfo sisekelo lamise kuso sihlalo sakhe sebukhosi." 
Psalms97:3 Embikwakhe kuvutsa umlilo udle titsa ngala nangala. 
Psalms97:4 Imibane yakhe ikhanyisa umhlaba, umhlaba ungayibona lemibono, uyatfutfumela." 
Psalms97:5 Tintsaba tincibilika njengemtfwebeba embikwaSimakadze, yebo, tiyancibilika tiphele embikweNkhosi yemhlaba wonkhe." 
Psalms97:6 Emazulu amemetela kulunga kwakhe, tonkhe tive tibubone bukhosi bakhe." 
Psalms97:7 Bayahlazeka badliwe ngemahloni bonkhe labakhonta tithico, bachoshe ngetithico letingenamsebenti. Bonkhe bonkulunkulu bakhotsama kuSimakadze." 
Psalms97:8 BaseSiyoni bayeva bajabule, yebo, netakhamiti takaJuda tiyatsakasa ngenca yetehlulelo takho, Simakadze." 
Psalms97:9 Ngobe wena, Simakadze, unguLosetikwako Konkhe, ubusa umhlaba wonkhe, uphakeme ngetulu kwabonkulunkulu." 
Psalms97:10 Nine lenitsandza Simakadze, tondzani konkhe lokubi, ngobe uyabelusa labametsembako, abephule etandleni talababi." 
Psalms97:11 Kukhanya kuhlanyelelwa labalungile, nekujabula kuhlanyelelwa labanetinhlitiyo letinhle." 
Psalms97:12 Tfokotani nijabule nine lenilungile, bongani libito lakhe lelingcwele." 
Psalms98:1 Sihlabelelo. Hlabelani ingoma lensha kuSimakadze, ngobe wente tintfo letinkhulu; wancoba ngesandla sakhe sekudla nangengalo yakhe lengcwele." 
Psalms98:2 Simakadze uyente yatiwa insindziso yakhe, kulunga kwakhe ukwembulile emehlweni ebetive." 
Psalms98:3 Uwukhumbulile umusa wakhe nekwetsembeka kwakhe kubaka-Israyeli. Imikhawulo yonkhe yemhlaba iyibonile insindziso yaNkulunkulu. 
Psalms98:4 Hlokomani nidvumise Nkulunkulu, nine bantfu bemhlaba. Mdvumiseni ngengoma yekujabula, nihlabele ngekumdvumisa." 
Psalms98:5 Hlabelani nidvumise Nkulunkulu ngehabhu, hlabelani ngehabhu nangeliphimbo." 
Psalms98:6 Shayani emacilongo nelivenge. Hlokomani embikwaSimakadze iNkhosi. 
Psalms98:7 Akubhodle lwandle, nako konkhe lokukulo. Akubhodle umhlaba nalabahlala kuwo!" 
Psalms98:8 Imifula ayishaye tandla ibetsele. Tintsaba tihlabele kanyekanye ngenjabulo 
Psalms98:9 embikwaSimakadze, ngobe uyeta kutakwehlulela umhlaba ngekulunga, yebo, ehlulele tive ngebucotfo." 
Psalms99:1 Simakadze uyabusa! Tive atitfutfumele! Uhleti etikwemakherubhi. Umhlaba awutfutfumele! 
Psalms99:2 Simakadze mkhulu eSiyoni, uphakeme ngetulu kwetive tonkhe." 
Psalms99:3 Atidvumise tibabate libito lakho, ngobe lona likhulu, futsi liyesabeka, yena ungcwele." 
Psalms99:4 Simakadze, nguwe losimise kulunga kwenkhosi letsandza kubusa ngekungakhetsi muntfu; nguwe lowehlisela lokuhle kuJakobe, waletsa kulunga nebucotfo." 
Psalms99:5 Phakamisani Simakadze, Nkulunkulu wetfu, nikhuleke kuso senabelo setinyawo takhe, yena ungcwele." 
Psalms99:6 BoMosi kanye na-Aroni baba ngulabanye bebaphristi bakhe. Samuweli abengulomunye walabo bebabita libito lakhe. Bakhala kuSimakadze, wabaphendvula." 
Psalms99:7 Wakhuluma kubo asensikeni yelifu, bayigcina imiyalo yakhe kanye netimiso takhe labebanike tona." 
Psalms99:8 Yebo, Simakadze, Nkulunkulu wetfu, wabaphendvula wena, waba nguNkulunkulu lotsetselelako kubo, noko wabajezisa ngenca yetono tabo." 
Psalms99:9 Phakamisani Simakadze, Nkulunkulu wetfu, mkhotsameni nimkhonte kulentsaba yakhe lengcwele. Simakadze, Nkulunkulu wetfu, ungcwele!" 
Psalms100:1 Dvumisani Simakadze ngenjabulo, nine mhlaba wonkhe!" 
Psalms100:2 Khontani Simakadze ngentfokoto! Sondzelani kuye ngekuhlabela kwenjabulo. 
Psalms100:3 Yatini kutsi Simakadze nguNkulunkulu! Sadalwa nguye, asitidalanga, sisive sakhe, netimvu telidlelo lakhe." 
Psalms100:4 Ngenani emasangweni akhe ngekubonga, nasetibuyeni tendlu yakhe ngekumdvumisa. Mbongeni, nidvumise libito lakhe." 
Psalms100:5 Ngobe Simakadze muhle, umusa wakhe uhlala umile kuze kube nguphakadze naphakadze; nekwetsembeka kwakhe kuhlala kumile titukulwane ngetitukulwane." 
Psalms101:1 Ngiyawuhlabela kuwe, Simakadze, ngibonge umusa wakho nebuhle bakho bekungakhetsi bala." 
Psalms101:2 Angicaphelisise kuhamba ngendlela yebucotfo. Uyawuze ufike nini kimi? Ngiyawuhamba ngimsulwa endlini yami. 
Psalms101:3 Ngingeke ngitimisele kwenta lokubi. Ngiyayenyanya imisebenti yalabahlubuka Nkulunkulu, futsi ngingeke ngihambisane nayo." 
Psalms101:4 Inhlitiyo lesigwegwe ayisuke kimi, ngingakwenti lokubi." 
Psalms101:5 Lowo lohleba makhelwane wakhe emasitseleni mine ngiyawumcitsa. Lowo lonemehlo lachoshile nenhlitiyo letigcabhako angihambisani naye. 
Psalms101:6 Ngiyabanconota labo labetsembeke kuNkulunkulu, kulelive, kutsi bangahlala nami. Lowo lohamba ngendlela yebucotfo angaba yinceku yami." 
Psalms101:7 Umuntfu lonemacebo ngeke ngimvumele ahlale endlini yami. Wonkhe umuntfu localemanga ngingeke ngimbeketelele. 
Psalms101:8 Kusa ngekusa, ngiyawubabhubhisa ngibabulale bonkhe lababi eveni, kuze ngibacotfule bonkhe lababi bangabikho ekhaya laSimakadze." 
Psalms102:1 Awu, Simakadze! Vani umthandazo wami. Kukhala kwami akufinyelele kuwe." 
Psalms102:2 Ungabufihli buso bakho kimi, ngesikhatsi sekuhlupheka kwami! Beka indlebe yakho kimi; usheshe ungiphendvule njalo nje nangikhala kuwe." 
Psalms102:3 Emalanga ami endlula njengentfutfu, ematsambo ami ashise njengemlilo." 
Psalms102:4 Inhlitiyo yami ihashukile yabuna njengetjani. Angisadli, nekudla akusangeni, ngobe inhlitiyo yami imnyama." 
Psalms102:5 Sengondze ngingumbambotiyabalwa, ngenca yekububula kwami kakhulu." 
Psalms102:6 Sengifanana nelingce lasehlane, ngifanane nesikhova setindzala." 
Psalms102:7 Ngiyacwasha, butfongo abehli, ngifanana nenyoni ledliwa situnge, lehleti etikwendlu." 
Psalms102:8 Titsa tami tingetfuka onkhe emalanga, laba labangiphukutako bacalekisa betfukane ngelibito lami." 
Psalms102:9 Ngiyakhala, umlotsa sekudla kwami, tinyembeti titfontsela esinatfweni sami," 
Psalms102:10 ngenca yelulaka nekutfukutsela kwakho, ngobe ungisundvutile wangilahla." 
Psalms102:11 Emalanga ami anjengesitfunti sentsambama, ngiyabuna njengetjani." 
Psalms102:12 Kodvwa wena, Simakadze, uyawuba khona kuze kube phakadze. Uyawukhunjulwa titukulwane ngetitukulwane." 
Psalms102:13 Uyawusukuma uhawukele iSiyoni, ngobe sengiso sikhatsi sekuyiphatsa ngemusa, yebo, sikhatsi lesimiselwe loko sesifikile." 
Psalms102:14 Tinceku takho tiyitsandza ngisho nematje ayo; tihawukela lutfuli lwayo. 
Psalms102:15 Tive tiyawulesaba libito laSimakadze, nemakhosi onkhe emhlaba esabe bukhosi bakhe." 
Psalms102:16 Ngobe Simakadze utawube asayakhe kabusha iSiyoni, asabonakele enkhatimulweni yakhe," 
Psalms102:17 anake imikhuleko yalabangenabani, angayibukeli phansi imithandazo yabo." 
Psalms102:18 Loku akubhalwe phansi, kugcinelwe situkulwane lesitako, kuze naleso sive lesiyawuvela naso sidvumise Simakadze." 
Psalms102:19 Ngobe Simakadze wabuka phansi, asendzaweni yakhe lephakeme lengcwele, wabuka emhlabeni asezulwini," 
Psalms102:20 kutsi atewuva kububula kwetiboshwa, atewukhulula labo labagwetjelwe intsambo," 
Psalms102:21 kuze bantfu bavakalise libito laSimakadze eSiyoni, neludvumo lwakhe eJerusalema," 
Psalms102:22 ngesikhatsi sekuhlangene tive ndzawonye, kanye nemibuso kutawukhonta Simakadze." 
Psalms102:23 Wacedza emandla ami ngisesemkhatsini, wafinyeta emalanga ekuphila kwami." 
Psalms102:24 Ngitsi: “Hhawu, Nkulunkulu wami, ungaphangisi ungitsatse ngisakhula. Iminyaka yakho yetitukulwane netitukulwane." 
Psalms102:25 Emandvulo wabeka tisekelo temhlaba, emazulu angumsebenti wetandla takho." 
Psalms102:26 Kuyakwendlula konkhe, wena uhlale unjalo nje, konkhe kuyawuguga njengengubo. Yebo, njengengubo uyawukugucula kusakateke." 
Psalms102:27 Kepha wena seloku unjalo nje, iminyaka yakho ayinasiphetfo." 
Psalms102:28 Bantfwana betinceku takho bayawuhlala baphephile, intalo yabo ihlale isimiswe embikwakho.”" 
Psalms103:1 Mphefumulo wami, dvumisa Simakadze, nako konkhe lokukimi akudvumise libito lakhe lelingcwele!" 
Psalms103:2 Mphefumulo wami, dvumisa Simakadze, ungatikhohlwa tento takhe temusa kimi." 
Psalms103:3 Ungitsetselela lonkhe licala letono tami angelaphe tonkhe tifo tami. 
Psalms103:4 Ungihlenga ngiphephe ekufeni, enhloko yami ungifaka umchele longumusa nesihawu." 
Psalms103:5 Wenelisa kuphila kwami ngalokuhle, kuvuseleleke emandla ebusha bami, ngivuseleleke ngibe njengelusweti." 
Psalms103:6 Bonkhe labacindzetelwe Simakadze ubentela kulunga, angakhetsi muntfu." 
Psalms103:7 Imisebenti yakhe wayenta yatiwa nguMosi, tento takhe tatiwa sive saka-Israyeli." 
Psalms103:8 Simakadze unemusa nesihawu, uyephuta kutfukutsela, andze ngemusa." 
Psalms103:9 Akatsetsi ngaso sonkhe sikhatsi, futsi akahlali atfukutsele kuze kube phakadze." 
Psalms103:10 Akasiphatsi njengalokufanele tono tetfu, futsi akasivuzi njengekwemacala etfu." 
Psalms103:11 Njengobe emazulu aphakeme ngetulu kwemhlaba, unjalo-ke nemusa wakhe kulabamesabako." 
Psalms103:12 Njengobe imphumalanga yehlukene nenshonalanga utikhweshise kangako-ke tono tetfu kitsi. 
Psalms103:13 Njengobe uyise anesihe kubantfwabakhe, ngalokufananako Simakadze unesihe kulabamesabako." 
Psalms103:14 Ngobe uyakwati kubunjwa kwetfu, uyakhumbula kutsi silutfuli nje." 
Psalms103:15 Emalanga emuntfu anjengetjani, uyabhahela njengembali yesiganga." 
Psalms103:16 Ngesikhatsi umoya uphephetsa wendlule etikwayo, kube kuphela kwayo njalo, ingeke iphindze yatiwe kuleyo ndzawo." 
Psalms103:17 Kodvwa umusa waSimakadze ukubo bonkhe labamesabako, futsi uyawuhlala ukubo phakadze naphakadze, nekulunga kwakhe etikwebantfwana bebantfwana," 
Psalms103:18 kubo labagcina sivumelwane sakhe, bakhumbule kwenta imiyalo yakhe." 
Psalms103:19 Simakadze wasimisa ezulwini sihlalo sakhe sebukhosi, konkhe lokukhona kungaphansi kwembuso wakhe." 
Psalms103:20 Dvumisani Simakadze, nine tingilosi takhe, nani machawe lanemandla, nine labenta livi lakhe, nilalele kukhuluma kwelivi lakhe." 
Psalms103:21 Dvumisani Simakadze, nine mabandla akhe nonkhe, nani tikhonti takhe letenta intsandvo yakhe." 
Psalms103:22 Bongani Simakadze, nonkhe nine misebenti yakhe, kuto tonkhe tindzawo embusweni wakhe. Mphefumulo wami, dvumisa Simakadze." 
Psalms104:1 Mphefumulo wami, dvumisa Simakadze! Yebo, Simakadze, Nkulunkulu wami, wena umkhulu kakhulu! Wembetse ludvumo nebukhosi." 
Psalms104:2 Kukhanya kuyingubo lotembese ngayo, weneke emazulu njengekumiswa kwelithende;" 
Psalms104:3 indlu yakho yebukhosi, uyakhe etikwemanti lasetulu. Emafu lamnyama lahlomile ayincola yakho, ugibele emaphiko emoya." 
Psalms104:4 Nguwe lowenta titfunywa takho tibe ngimimoya, wente tinceku takho tibe ngimibane." 
Psalms104:5 Wasimisa umhlaba etikwetisekelo tawo, kuze ungatanyatanyiswa, phakadze naphakadze," 
Psalms104:6 wawembesa ngemanti lamanyenti, njengekwembeswa ngengubo, emanti agcwala adzimate acwilisa tintsaba." 
Psalms104:7 Wawekhuta abaleka, ngekubhonga kwelivi lakho asubatsa ngematubane abaleka," 
Psalms104:8 adzilika etintsabeni ehlela etigodzini, aphutfuma endzaweni lowawuyimisele wona." 
Psalms104:9 Wawabekela iminyele langeke ayengce, angete asabuyela kuyakwembesa umhlaba wonkhe." 
Psalms104:10 Wenta tiyalu tigelete etihosheni, ageletise imifula emkhatsini wetintsaba." 
Psalms104:11 Kunatsa kuyo tonkhe tilwane tesiganga, netimbongolo tesiganga ngulapho tikucima khona koma kwato." 
Psalms104:12 Tinyoni tesiganga takhela ngakuyo, tintjilote emkhatsini wemagala." 
Psalms104:13 Unisela tintsaba ngemvula utihlalele etulu, nemhlaba weneliswe sitselo semsebenti wakho:" 
Psalms104:14 Uhlumisa tjani, kuze kudle imfuyo, uhlumise lokumilako kusitakale bantfu, kuze kuvele kudla emhlabeni," 
Psalms104:15 neliwayini lelijabulisa tinhlitiyo tabo, nemafutsa ekugcobisa buso bakhe buze bucwebetele, nekudla lokuyinsika yemphilo yemuntfu." 
Psalms104:16 Tihlahla taSimakadze tiniselwe ngalokwenele, imisedari yaseLebanoni layihlanyelile," 
Psalms104:17 tinyoni letakhele tidleke tato kuyo, gilonki wakhela etulu emagaleni ato." 
Psalms104:18 Tintsaba letindze tiyinkhundla yemagoga, emadvwala asiphephelo setimbila." 
Psalms104:19 Wenta inyanga kutsi yehlukanise tikhatsi, lilanga liyasati sikhatsi salo sekuya kunina." 
Psalms104:20 Wenta bumnyama bube busuku, bese kweluka tonkhe tilwane temahlatsi." 
Psalms104:21 Emabhubesi ayabhodla atamule, atingele tinyamatane, afuna kudla kwawo kuNkulunkulu." 
Psalms104:22 Naliphumako lilanga ayahoshoba, abange emihumeni yawo, afike alale phansi." 
Psalms104:23 Umuntfu uyaphuma aye emsebentini wakhe, akhandleke kudzimate kushone lilanga." 
Psalms104:24 Awu, Simakadze! Maye, minyenti imisebenti yakho! Yonkhe uyente ngekuhlakanipha; umhlaba ugcwele tidalwa takho." 
Psalms104:25 Naluya lwandle lolukhulu, nalolubanti, loluphetfuka tintfo umuntfu langeke akhone kutibala, tintfo letiphilako letincane naletinkhulu." 
Psalms104:26 Nansiya imikhumbi intjweza kulo nemikhoma lowayenta yatjakadvula kulo. 
Psalms104:27 Tonkhe letidalwa tibheke wena, kutsi utiphe kudla kwato ngesikhatsi lesifanele." 
Psalms104:28 Utipha kudla tidle, nawuvula sandla sakho, teneliswa ngetintfo letinhle." 
Psalms104:29 Nawufihla buso bakho, tiyetfuka, nawutsatsa kuphefumula kwato, tiyafa, tibuyele elutfulini." 
Psalms104:30 Nawutfumela Moya wakho, tiyadaleka, uhlumise kabusha imvelo yemhlaba." 
Psalms104:31 Shangatsi ludvumo lwaSimakadze lungema kuze kube ngunaphakadze. Shangatsi Simakadze angatfokota ngemisebenti yakhe," 
Psalms104:32 yena lotsi nakabuka umhlaba utfutfumele, atsintse tintsaba tibhunye." 
Psalms104:33 Simakadze ngiyawumhlabelela, yingci nangisaphila. Ngiyawudvumisa Nkulunkulu wami, ngisaphila lapha emhlabeni." 
Psalms104:34 Shangatsi kuzindla kwami kungamjabulisa, ngiyawutfokota kuSimakadze." 
Psalms104:35 Shangatsi toni tingasishulwa emhlabeni, lababi bangabe basaphushwa nakuphushwa. Mphefumulo wami, dvumisa Simakadze! Dvumisa Simakadze!" 
Psalms105:1 Bongani Simakadze, nibite libito lakhe, nimemetele tento takhe emkhatsini wetive." 
Psalms105:2 Hlabelani kuye, nimdvumise, nibalise ngetimangaliso takhe tonkhe." 
Psalms105:3 Tibongeni ngelibito lakhe lelingcwele, atijabule tinhlitiyo talabafuna Simakadze." 
Psalms105:4 Funani kwati Simakadze nemandla akhe, nifunisise buso bakhe onkhe emalanga." 
Psalms105:5 Khumbulani timangaliso takhe latentile, nikhumbule tibonakaliso takhe, kanye netehlulelo temlomo wakhe," 
Psalms105:6 nine situkulwane sa-Abrahama, inceku yakhe, nine madvodzana aJakobe, labakhetsiwe bakhe." 
Psalms105:7 Yena Simakadze unguNkulunkulu wetfu, tehlulelo takhe tisemhlabeni wonkhe." 
Psalms105:8 Uyasikhumbula sivumelwane sakhe phakadze naphakadze; livi layala ngalo uyalikhumbula titukulwane ngetitukulwane. 
Psalms105:9 Sivumelwane lasenta na-Abrahama, nesifungo sakhe ku-Isaka," 
Psalms105:10 wasicinisa kuJakobe, saba ngumtsetfo, ku-Israyeli saba sivumelwane saphakadze." 
Psalms105:11 Watsi: “Wena ngiyakupha live laseKhenani leliyawuba sabelo lesilifa lakho.” 
Psalms105:12 Babesembalwa ngesibalo, yebo, babeyingcosana, batihambi kulelo live." 
Psalms105:13 Bazula bandzindza etiveni ngetive, basuka kulomunye umbuso baya kulomunye," 
Psalms105:14 kodvwa akavumelanga muntfu kutsi abahluphe, ngenca yabo wajezisa ngisho emakhosi." 
Psalms105:15 Watsi: “Ningabatsintsi labagcotjiwe bami, ningacali nilimate baphrofethi bami.”" 
Psalms105:16 Watfumela indlala kulelo live, kwaphela kudla, kati walala etiko." 
Psalms105:17 Watfuma indvodza yahamba kucala kunabo, Josefa, lowatsengiswa waba sigcili." 
Psalms105:18 Tinyawo takhe batibopha ngetinketane, naye lucobo lwakhe waboshwa ngetinsimbi," 
Psalms105:19 kwaze kwaba sikhatsi lekwagcwaliseka ngaso livi lakhe, nelivi laSimakadze lamvivinya lamtfola kutsi ucinisile." 
Psalms105:20 Faro, inkhosi, watfumela kutsi akhululwe, yebo, umbusi wetive wamkhulula." 
Psalms105:21 Wamenta waba sikhulu semuti wakhe, waba ngundvunankhulu welive lonkhe," 
Psalms105:22 kuze acondzise tikhulu takhe; nebaholi bakhe wabafundzisa kuhlakanipha. 
Psalms105:23 Israyeli wase uyefika eGibhithe, Jakobe wakhonta eveni lakaHhamu." 
Psalms105:24 Simakadze wasandzisa kakhulu sive sakhe, wasenta sandza saba nemandla kunetitsa taso." 
Psalms105:25 Wayigucula inhlitiyo yebaseGibhithe, kuze itondze bantfu bakhe, babaphatsa ngebucili." 
Psalms105:26 Watfumela Mosi, inceku yakhe, wahamba na-Aroni labekhetfwe nguSimakadze." 
Psalms105:27 Benta tibonakaliso taSimakadze emkhatsini wabo, netimangaliso eveni lakaHhamu." 
Psalms105:28 Watfumela bumnyama, wenta live laba mnyama, kepha bemelana nemavi akhe." 
Psalms105:29 Wagucula emanti abo aba yingati, wabhubhisa tinhlanti tabo." 
Psalms105:30 Live labo lanyakatela tigogodvolo, taphetfuka ngisho nasemakamelweni emakhosi." 
Psalms105:31 Wakhuluma, kwavela emabulo etibawu, kanye netimphungane eveni labo lonkhe." 
Psalms105:32 Wabapha sangcotfo, saba yimvula yabo, kwaklwebha imibane eveni labo lonkhe." 
Psalms105:33 Wavitsita imivini nemakhiwane abo, washaya netihlahla eveni labo." 
Psalms105:34 Wakhuluma, kwavela sikhonyane, kwavela inkhasa lengeke ibaleke," 
Psalms105:35 kwadla yonkhe intfo lemilako eveni, kwacedza sitselo semhlaba emasimini abo." 
Psalms105:36 Wabulala onkhe ematubulo abo eveni, lababetibone ngawo kutsi sebakhulile." 
Psalms105:37 Wase uyabakhipha baka-Israyeli eGibhithe, bahamba sebanesiliva negolide; kute nome munye lowawa emindenini yabo." 
Psalms105:38 EmaGibhithe ajabula ekuphumeni kwabo ngobe abesafile kubesaba. 
Psalms105:39 Wendlala lifu, laba ngumpheme wekubambonya, wabentela umlilo wekubakhanyisela ebusuku." 
Psalms105:40 Bacela, wabapha tigwaca, wabesutsisa ngesinkhwa lesivela ezulwini." 
Psalms105:41 Wavula lidvwala, kwampompota emanti, ageleta ehlane njengemfula." 
Psalms105:42 Ngobe wakhumbula livi lakhe lelingcwele, lalikhuluma ku-Abrahama, inceku yakhe." 
Psalms105:43 Wase ukhipha sive sakhe ngenjabulo, labakhetsiwe bakhe bahamba ngekutfokota." 
Psalms105:44 Wabapha emave ebetive, badla lifa lelititfukutfuku tebetive," 
Psalms105:45 kuze bacaphele timiso takhe, bagcine imitsetfo yakhe. Haleluya, dvumisani Simakadze!"
