Psalms106:1 Haleluya, dvumisani Simakadze! Bongani Simakadze ngobe muhle, nemusa wakhe ume kuze kube phakadze." 
Psalms106:2 Ngubani longalandzisa ngemisebenti lemikhulu yaSimakadze, avakalise lonkhe ludvumo lwakhe?" 
Psalms106:3 Babusisiwe labo labahamba ngebucotfo bente kulunga ngato tonkhe tikhatsi. 
Psalms106:4 Awu, Simakadze, ngikhumbule nawusentela umusa sive sakho, nami ungisindzise kanye naso," 
Psalms106:5 kuze ngibone kuchuma kwalabakhetsiwe bakho, ngitfokote ekujabuleni kwesive sakho, ngitigabise kanye nalabalifa lakho." 
Psalms106:6 Sonile tsine kanye nabokhokho betfu, sente lokubi, sonakele." 
Psalms106:7 Ngesikhatsi bokhokho baseseGibhithe abazange bacaphele timangaliso takho, futsi abazange bakhumbule bunyenti betento takho temusa, kodvwa bakuhlubuka ngaseLwandle Lolubovu." 
Psalms106:8 Noko, Simakadze wabasindzisa, ngenca yelibito lakhe, kuze abonakalise emandla akhe lamakhulu." 
Psalms106:9 Wakhalimela Lwandle Lolubovu, lwasha, wabeweta ekujuleni kwalo, kwaba shangatsi bahamba ehlane." 
Psalms106:10 Ngako wabasindzisa esandleni sesitsa, wabahlenga emandleni esitsa." 
Psalms106:11 Emanti atimbonya titsa tabo, kute ngisho nasinye sato lesasala." 
Psalms106:12 Base bayawakholwa emavi akhe, bahlabela, bamdvumisa." 
Psalms106:13 Kodvwa basheshe bayikhohlwa imisebenti yakhe, abazange basatilindzela teluleko takhe." 
Psalms106:14 Bahamba bashangashanga ehlane, bamlinga Nkulunkulu kalashameshame." 
Psalms106:15 Wabapha leto tintfo bebaticela kuye, kodvwa wabatfumela kufa lokwabacedza." 
Psalms106:16 Basesendleleni baba nemona naMosi kanye na-Aroni, longcwele waSimakadze." 
Psalms106:17 Umhlaba wakhamisa wamita Dathani, wagcibedzela Abiramu nebalandzeli bakhe," 
Psalms106:18 kwalumekeka umlilo ebutfweni labo, lilangabi lashisa lacedza bonkhe lababi." 
Psalms106:19 Babumba sitfombe selitfole eHorebe, bakhotsama kuso sithico lesibunjiwe." 
Psalms106:20 Bamnyembenya lowo abeludvumo lwabo, bakhetsa sitfombe senkhomo ledla tjani." 
Psalms106:21 Bamkhohlwa Nkulunkulu, uMsindzisi wabo, labebentele tintfo letinkhulu eGibhithe," 
Psalms106:22 lekwakuyimisebenti lemangalisako eveni lakaHhamu, netintfo letesabekako ngaseLwandle Lolubovu." 
Psalms106:23 Ngako-ke watsi utababhubhisa, kepha Mosi, lokhetsiwe wakhe, wema emkhatsini, wabalamlela ngekubashweletela kuNkulunkulu, kutsi lulaka lwakhe lungababhubhisi." 
Psalms106:24 Baledzelela live lelihle, abazange balikholwe livi laSimakadze." 
Psalms106:25 Bakhonona basemathendeni abo, abazange balilalele livi laSimakadze." 
Psalms106:26 Ngako-ke waphakamisa sandla sakhe wafunga kubo kutsi uyawubabhubhisa bafele ehlane," 
Psalms106:27 asakate intalo yabo emkhatsini wetive, ayihlakatele emaveni." 
Psalms106:28 Base batihlanganisa nalababekhonta sithico lesasinguBhali wasePheyori, badla lokwakuhlatjelwe labaphansi," 
Psalms106:29 bacunula Simakadze ngetento tabo, kwabhoboka sifo emkhatsini wabo." 
Psalms106:30 Kwase kusukuma Finehasi walamula ngekubulala letephulamtsetfo; lesifo saphela. 
Psalms106:31 Loku kwabalelwa kuye njengekulunga titukulwane ngetitukulwane kuze kube phakadze. 
Psalms106:32 Bacunula Simakadze ngaseticojeni taseMeribha, Mosi wamhambela kabi ngenca yabo," 
Psalms106:33 ngobe baphambana naMoya waNkulunkulu, naMosi waze wakhuluma kubo ngemawala." 
Psalms106:34 Abazange batibhubhise tive, njengobe Simakadze abebayalile;" 
Psalms106:35 kodvwa batihlanganisa nebetive, bafundza kwenta imikhuba yato." 
Psalms106:36 Bakhonta tithico tato, letagucuka taba lugibe kubo." 
Psalms106:37 Banikela ngemadvodzana abo nemadvodzakati abo, kutsi abe yimihlatjelo yemadimoni." 
Psalms106:38 Bacitsa ingati lete licala, ingati yemadvodzana abo nemadvodzakati abo, labawahlabela tithico taseKhenani; ngaloko bangcolisa lonkhe live ngengati." 
Psalms106:39 Batingcolisa ngetintfo lababetenta, bangete betsembeka kuNkulunkulu, bafana netiphingi." 
Psalms106:40 Ngako-ke intfukutselo yaSimakadze yasivutsela sive sakhe, loko lokulifa lakhe kwaba sinengiso kuye." 
Psalms106:41 Wabanikela emandleni ebetive, labo lababatondzako bababusa." 
Psalms106:42 Titsa tabo tabacindzetela, batfotjiswa ngephansi kwesandla sato." 
Psalms106:43 Wabakhulula emahlandla lamanyenti, kepha batimisela kumelana naye, bawiswa phansi ngebubi babo." 
Psalms106:44 Noko walunaka lusizi lwabo, asakuvile kukhala kwabo." 
Psalms106:45 Wabevela, wasikhumbula sivumelwane sakhe, ngenca yemusa wakhe lomkhulu wabuye wabahawukela." 
Psalms106:46 Wenta bonkhe batfumbi babo kutsi babahawukele. 
Psalms106:47 Sisindzise, Simakadze, Nkulunkulu wetfu, sibutse etiveni usicocele ndzawonye, kuze sibonge libito lakho lelingcwele, sigungubale ngeludvumo lwakho." 
Psalms106:48 Akabongwe Simakadze, Nkulunkulu wema-Israyeli, kusukela phakadze kuze kube phakadze! Sive sonkhe asitsi: “Amen!” Haleluya! Dvumisani Simakadze!" 
Psalms107:1 “Dvumisani Simakadze, ngobe yena muhle, nemusa wakhe ume kuze kube phakadze.”" 
Psalms107:2 Labahlengwe nguSimakadze abasho njalo, bona labo labahlengwe emandleni ebacindzeteli babo." 
Psalms107:3 Wababutsa emaveni onkhe emphumalanga nasenshonalanga, enyakatfo naseningizimu." 
Psalms107:4 Labanye bazulazula ehlane, kalashameshame, kepha abazange batfole ngisho nemuti wekungenisa." 
Psalms107:5 Balamba, boma, umphefumulo wabo waphela emandla kubo." 
Psalms107:6 Base bakhala kuSimakadze basesekulolo lusizi lwabo, wabephula kulo." 
Psalms107:7 Wabahola ngendlela lecondzile kutsi bahambe baze befike emtini lababengangenisa kuwo. 
Psalms107:8 Akabongwe Simakadze ngemusa wakhe, ngekwentela bantfu imisebenti lemangalisako:" 
Psalms107:9 Ngobe wenelisa umuntfu lowomile, lolambile umesutsisa ngalokuhle." 
Psalms107:10 Labanye babehleti ebumnyameni nasetfuntini lekufa, baboshwe tinsizi netinketane," 
Psalms107:11 ngobe baphambana nemavi aNkulunkulu, bakwedzelela kuyalwa kwaLosetikwako Konkhe." 
Psalms107:12 Yebo, wabayendzisa ngekudvonsa kamatima, basakateka phansi, kwabate lobasitako." 
Psalms107:13 Base bakhala kuSimakadze basesekulolo lusizi lwabo, wabasindzisa kulo." 
Psalms107:14 Wabakhipha kulobo bumnyama nakulelo tfunti lekufa, wajuba tibopho letatibabophile." 
Psalms107:15 Akabongwe Simakadze ngemusa wakhe, ngekwentela bantfu imisebenti lemangalisako:" 
Psalms107:16 Ngobe wafohla emasango elitfusi, wajuba nemishudvo yetinsimbi." 
Psalms107:17 Labanye baba tilima ngenca yekona nebubi babo behlelwa kuhlupheka. 
Psalms107:18 Tinhlitiyo tabo taba mnyama, behluleka kudla, ngako bondza bacishe bafa." 
Psalms107:19 Base bakhala kuSimakadze basesekulolo lusizi lwabo, wabasindzisa kulo." 
Psalms107:20 Wakhipha umyalo wakhe, wabaphilisa, wabenta bagejwa kufa." 
Psalms107:21 Akabongwe Simakadze ngemusa wakhe, ngekwentela bantfu imisebenti lemangalisako." 
Psalms107:22 Abanikele ngemihlatjelo yekubonga, bamemetele imisebenti yakhe ngenjabulo." 
Psalms107:23 Labanye babehla benyuka ngemikhumbi elwandle, babephila ngekuhweba." 
Psalms107:24 Bayibona imisebenti yaSimakadze, netimangaliso takhe ekujuleni kwalo." 
Psalms107:25 Wakhuluma kwavuka sivunguvungu, sadlondlobalisa emagagasi elwandle." 
Psalms107:26 Abatsatsa abajika etulu, aphindza abagoboncisela ekujuleni, badzimate batfutfumeliswa kwesaba." 
Psalms107:27 Badzayitela, bayendza, njengemuntfu nadzakiwe, lwati lwabo lwefika lapho luphela khona." 
Psalms107:28 Base bakhala kuSimakadze basesekulolo lusizi lwabo, wabakhulula kulo." 
Psalms107:29 Wathulisa kubhenguta kwelwandle, emagagasi alo abindza." 
Psalms107:30 Batfokota ngobe kwase kuba nekuthula, wabaholela esikhumulweni lababecondze kuso." 
Psalms107:31 Akabongwe Simakadze ngemusa wakhe, ngekwentela bantfu imisebenti lemangalisako." 
Psalms107:32 Abamphakamise emkhambatsini wesive, bamdvumise emhlanganweni webaholi." 
Psalms107:33 Imifula wayigucula yaba lihlane, tiyalu toma taba lubhubhushi," 
Psalms107:34 live lelivundzile laba lugagadvu ngenca yebubi betakhamiti talo. 
Psalms107:35 Wagucula lihlane laba ngumena, umhlaba lowomile wamila tiyalu." 
Psalms107:36 Kulapho abeka khona labalambile, bacaba, bakha khona imiti yabo, bahlala batinta." 
Psalms107:37 Balima emasimi, bahlanyela tivini, bavuna sivuno lesikhulu." 
Psalms107:38 Wababusisa, bandza kakhulu, netifuyo tabo tandza kakhulu." 
Psalms107:39 Babuye bancipha baphunguka, ngenca yekucindzetelwa nangekuhlushwa," 
Psalms107:40 watsela kwedzelewa etikwetikhulu, wabazulazulisa ehlane lelite indlela." 
Psalms107:41 Kodvwa waphakamisa labamphofu wabakhipha elusizini, wenta imindeni yaba njengemihlambi yetimvu." 
Psalms107:42 Labacotfo bayakubona loku bajabule, kodvwa bonkhe lababi bayathula." 
Psalms107:43 Lohlakaniphile akacaphele letintfo, bantfu abayicondzisise imisebenti yemusa waSimakadze." 
Psalms108:1 Yebo, Nkulunkulu, ngitimisele ngenhlitiyo yami yonkhe! Ngiyawuhlabela ngidvumise wena, nawe mphefumulo wami, phaphama." 
Psalms108:2 Vukani lugitali nehabhu! Ngikunyakatisa ngivuse intsatsakusa. 
Psalms108:3 Simakadze, ngiyawukubonga emkhatsini webantfu, ngihlabele ngekukudvumisa emkhatsini wetive." 
Psalms108:4 Ngobe umusa wakho mkhulu ungetulu kwemazulu nekwetsembeka kwakho kuze kube ngusemafini. 
Psalms108:5 Phakama, Nkulunkulu, ube ngetulu kwemazulu, ludvumo lwakho luwusibekele umhlaba wonkhe jikelele." 
Psalms108:6 Kuze kukhululwe labo labaligugu lakho, ngisindzise ngesandla sakho sekudla, ngive ungiphendvule." 
Psalms108:7 Nkulunkulu ukhulume endzaweni yakhe lengcwele, watsi: “Ngiyakwetsaba ekuncobeni kwami, ngiyawuyidzabula ngiyabe iShekhemu ngiklaye Sigodzi saseSukhothi." 
Psalms108:8 Wami Gileyadi, wami naManase, Efrayimu usivikelo senhloko yami, Juda yintfonga yami yekubusa." 
Psalms108:9 Mowabi ngumgezelo wami, etikwa-Edomu ngulapho ngijika khona sicatfulo sami, etikweFilistiya ngiyetsaba ngidle siga.”" 
Psalms108:10 Ngubani lotangiyisa kulelidolobha leliyinqaba? Ngiyawuholwa ngubani kuya kulaka-Edomu? 
Psalms108:11 Akusiwe yini Nkulunkulu losilahlile? Awusaphumi netimphi tetfu. 
Psalms108:12 Sisite uselekelele kulomelene natsi, ngobe lusito lwemuntfu lulite." 
Psalms108:13 Nangabe Nkulunkulu eme ngakitsi, sitawuncoba, ngobe nguye loyawugcobagcoba titsa tetfu." 
Psalms109:1 Awu, Nkulunkulu lengimdvumisako, ungathuli ungibukelele." 
Psalms109:2 Ngobe lababi netikhohlakali tinginyundzele, baphambene nami bangicalela emanga." 
Psalms109:3 Bangitungeleta ngemavi enzondo, balwa nami ngaphandle kwesizatfu." 
Psalms109:4 Umusa wami bawubonga ngekungibeka licala, noko mine ngihlala ngikhuleka." 
Psalms109:5 Mine ngabentela lokuhle, bona bangibonga ngalokubi, lutsandvo lwami balwenana ngenzondo." 
Psalms109:6 Bakhuluma batsi: “Akagwetjwe ngumehluleli lomubi, ummangaleli wakhe amelane naye." 
Psalms109:7 Ekwehlulelweni kwakhe akalahlwe licala, umthandazo wakhe awubalwe njengesono." 
Psalms109:8 Shangatsi imihla yekuphila kwakhe ingafinyetwa, lomunye atsatse sikhundla sakhe." 
Psalms109:9 Shangatsi bantfwabakhe bangaba tintsandzane, nemkakhe abe ngumfelokati." 
Psalms109:10 Shangatsi bantfwabakhe bangaba tindzindzi letiphila ngekucela; shangatsi bangakhishwa nakuto letindzala labahlala kuto kwamanje. 
Psalms109:11 Shangatsi konkhe lanako kungadliwa ngumtjelekisi; shangatsi titfukutfuku takhe tingadliwa bafokatana. 
Psalms109:12 Akubete loba nemusa kuye, kubete nalohawukela tintsandzane takhe." 
Psalms109:13 Shangatsi intalelwane yakhe ingaphela nya; libito lakhe lesulwe esitukulwaneni lesitako. 
Psalms109:14 Shangatsi Simakadze angakhumbula bubi baboyise, nesono senina singete sesulwa." 
Psalms109:15 Shangatsi tono tabo tingema embikwaSimakadze njalo. Shangatsi bangete baphindze bakhunjulwe emhlabeni. 
Psalms109:16 “Ngobe lomuntfu akazange akhumbule kwenta umusa, kodvwa labamphofu, nalabandzindzako, nalabanetinhlitiyo letidzabukile wabahlupha kwaze kwabasekufeni kwabo." 
Psalms109:17 Abetsandza kucalekisa. Shangatsi leticalekiso tingehlela etikwakhe; akazange asitsandze sibusiso, shangatsi sibusiso singakhwesha kuye." 
Psalms109:18 Abembatsa ticalekiso njengengubo, tangena etibilinini takhe njengemanti, nasematsanjeni akhe njengemkantja." 
Psalms109:19 Shangatsi tingamembesa njengelijazi, nanjengelibhande latibopha ngalo elukhalweni yonkhe imihla le.”" 
Psalms109:20 Shangatsi Simakadze angangiphindziselela etitseni tami, kulabo labakhuluma kabi ngami." 
Psalms109:21 Kodvwa wena, Nkulunkulu, Nkhosi yami, ngivikele ngenca yelibito lakho, ungephule ngenca yemusa wakho." 
Psalms109:22 Ngobe mine ngisihlupheki nalomphofu, inhlitiyo yami idzabukile." 
Psalms109:23 Ngiyanyamalala kancane kancane, njengesitfunti nase kuhwalala; ngiyavitsitwa njengentsetse." 
Psalms109:24 Emadvolo ami ayaceka ngenca yekuzila kudla, umtimba wami wonkhe uyesabeka." 
Psalms109:25 Ngiyinhlekisa yetitsa tami; nabangibona, banikina tinhloko." 
Psalms109:26 Ngisite, Simakadze, Nkulunkulu wami, ngisindzise ngelutsandvo lwakho lwaphakadze." 
Psalms109:27 Shangatsi bangati kutsi sandla sakho, Simakadze, lesente loku." 
Psalms109:28 Bona bangangicalekisa, kodvwa wena utangibusisa. Shangatsi labangihlaselako bangehluleka, shangatsi mine, nceku yakho, ngingatfokota." 
Psalms109:29 Shangatsi labangimangalelako bangahlazeka, shangatsi emahloni angabambonya njengengubo." 
Psalms109:30 Ngiyawumemeta ngibonge Simakadze, ngimdvumise esicunjini lesikhulu;" 
Psalms109:31 ngobe ume ngesekudla salomphofu kutsi amsindzise kulabamgwebela intsambo. 
Psalms110:1 Simakadze watsi enkhosini yami: “Hlala lapha ngesekudla sami, ngize ngifake titsa takho ngaphansi kwetinyawo takho.”" 
Psalms110:2 Intfonga yebukhosi bakho lobunemandla uyawuyelula wena, Simakadze, useSiyoni, utsi: “Busa wena emkhatsini wetitsa takho.”" 
Psalms110:3 Sive sakho siyawutinikela mhlazana ulwa netitsa takho, emabutfo akho ayawuta kuwe ahlobe ngemvunulo lengcwele, ayawuvela njengematolo asentsatsakusa." 
Psalms110:4 Simakadze wafunga, futsi angeke agucuke, watsi: “Wena ungumphristi loyawuhlala akhona kuze kube phakadze ngekuma kwaMelkhisedeki.”" 
Psalms110:5 Simakadze ungesekudla sakho, uyawuwacitsa onkhe emakhosi, mhlazana asatfukutsele." 
Psalms110:6 Uyakwehlulela tive, kuyawulala lucaca lwetidvumbu, aphihlite onkhe emakhosi emhlaba." 
Psalms110:7 Inkhosi iyawunatsa emfuleni longasendleleni, ngako-ke iyawuphakamisa inhloko yayo." 
Psalms111:1 Haleluya, dvumisani Simakadze! Ngiyawubonga Simakadze ngenhlitiyo yami yonkhe, ngimbonge emihlanganweni yalabacotfo, neyalabangcwele." 
Psalms111:2 Mikhulu imisebenti yaSimakadze! Iphenywa ngibo bonkhe labatfokota ngayo. 
Psalms111:3 Imisebenti yakhe inebukhosi neludvumo, nekulunga kwakhe kume ingunaphakadze." 
Psalms111:4 Wente timangaliso takhe kutsi tikhumbuleke. Simakadze unemusa nebubele. 
Psalms111:5 Ubapha kudla labo labamesabako, sivumelwane sakhe uyasikhumbula phakadze naphakadze." 
Psalms111:6 Sive sakhe usikhombise emandla emisebenti yakhe, wasinika emave aletinye tive." 
Psalms111:7 Imisebenti yetandla takhe yetsembekile, futsi ilungile; yonkhe imitsetfo yakhe yetsembekile." 
Psalms111:8 Ayinawugucuka phakadze naphakadze, yentiwa ngeliciniso nangekulunga." 
Psalms111:9 Sive sakhe wasitfumelela kuhlengwa, wemisa sivumelwane sakhe kuze kube phakadze. Lingcwele liyesabeka libito lakhe." 
Psalms111:10 Kwesaba Nkulunkulu sicalo sekuhlakanipha. Bonkhe labahamba ngemitsetfo yakhe banengcondvo lenhle. Umelwe kudvunyiswa phakadze naphakadze. 
Psalms112:1 Haleluya, dvumisani Simakadze! Ubusisiwe umuntfu lowesaba Simakadze, lotijabulisa ngekugcina imiyalo yakhe." 
Psalms112:2 Intalo yakhe iyawuba nemandla emhlabeni; situkulwane salabacotfo siyakubusiswa. 
Psalms112:3 Ingcebo nemfuyo kusendlini yakhe, kulunga kwakhe kume kuze kube phakadze." 
Psalms112:4 Labacotfo batfola kukhanya ebumnyameni. Simakadze unemusa, nesihe, nekulunga." 
Psalms112:5 Ubusisiwe umuntfu lowephanako, ebolekise ngesihle, lowenta tonkhe tintfo ngekwetsembeka." 
Psalms112:6 Lolungile angeke anyakatiswe; uyawuhlala akhunjulwa phakadze naphakadze. 
Psalms112:7 Imibiko lemibi ayimesabisi, inhlitiyo yakhe icinile, yetsembele kuSimakadze." 
Psalms112:8 Unesibindzi, angeke esabe, aze abone kujabhiswa kwetitsa takhe." 
Psalms112:9 Labamphofu ubapha ngekukhululeka; kulunga kwakhe kuyawuma kuze kube phakadze. Uyawuba nemandla, ahlonipheke." 
Psalms112:10 Lomubi uyawubona loku acanuke, acucudze ematinyo, ahusheke, adzimate aphele. Tinhloso talomubi tiyawushabalala." 
Psalms113:1 Haleluya, dvumisani Simakadze! Dvumisani nine tinceku taSimakadze, dvumisani libito laSimakadze." 
Psalms113:2 Alibongwe libito laSimakadze, manje kuze kube phakadze!" 
Psalms113:3 Kusukela ekuphumeni kwelilanga, lize liyewushona, libito laSimakadze liyabongeka." 
Psalms113:4 Simakadze ungetulu kwato tonkhe tive, nenkhatimulo yakhe idlondlobele ngetulu kwemazulu." 
Psalms113:5 Ngubani nje lofana naSimakadze, Nkulunkulu wetfu, lotsi ahleti ekuphakameni" 
Psalms113:6 agobondzele abuke phansi emazulwini nasemhlabeni? 
Psalms113:7 Uphakamisa luphuya elutfulini, aphakamise loswele etaleni lemlotsa," 
Psalms113:8 amtsatse amhlalise netikhulu, yebo, tikhulu tesive sakhe." 
Psalms113:9 Inyumba uyipha umuti wayo, ayente ijabule ibe ngunina webantfwana. Haleluya, dvumisani Simakadze!" 
Psalms114:1 Mhlazana baka-Israyeli baphuma eGibhithe, mzukwana indlu yakaJakobe iphuma kubantfu labakhuluma lolunye lulwimi," 
Psalms114:2 Juda waba sive lesingcwele saSimakadze, Israyeli waba sive lesibuswa nguye." 
Psalms114:3 Lwandle Lolubovu lwakubona loku lwabaleka, umfula iJordane wema, wangete wageleta." 
Psalms114:4 Tintsaba tatjakadvula njengetimbuti, emagcuma atjekula njengemazinyane etimvu." 
Psalms114:5 Kwenteke njani kuwe, Lwandle Lolubovu, kutsi bewungaze ubaleke? Nawe Jordane, wentiwe yini kuma ungageleti?" 
Psalms114:6 Nine-ke tintsaba, nitjakadvuleleni njengetimbuti? Nani magcuma, nitjekuleleni njengemazinyane etimvu?" 
Psalms114:7 Mhlaba, tfutfumela embikwaSimakadze, yebo, embikwaNkulunkulu waJakobe." 
Psalms114:8 Simakadze ugucula lidvwala libe lichibi lemanti, ancibilikise tiphongotja tetintsaba tibe ngimitfombo yemanti." 
Psalms115:1 Yenta kungabi ngitsi, Simakadze, yenta kungabi ngitsi, kepha akudvunyiswe libito lakho ngenca yemusa wakho nangenca yekwetsembeka kwakho." 
Psalms115:2 Kungani betive batsi: “Sewushonephi loNkulunkulu wabo?” 
Psalms115:3 Phela, Nkulunkulu wetfu usemazulwini, wenta konkhe lakutsandzako." 
Psalms115:4 Kodvwa tithico tebetive tentiwa ngesiliva nangegolide, tingumsebenti wetandla temuntfu." 
Psalms115:5 Tinemilomo, kodvwa atikhulumi, tinemehlo, kodvwa atiboni." 
Psalms115:6 Tinetindlebe, kodvwa ativa, tinemakhala, kodvwa atiliva liphunga." 
Psalms115:7 Tinetandla, kodvwa atiphatsi, tinetinyawo, kodvwa atihambi. Tite nemalakanya emiphinjeni yato." 
Psalms115:8 Laba labatentako bafanana nato, bonkhe labetsembele kuto bafanana nato." 
Psalms115:9 Awu, Israyeli, yetsembelani kuSimakadze. Nguye longumsiti wenu nesihlangu senu!" 
Psalms115:10 Awu, wena ndlu yaka-Aroni, beka litsemba lakho kuSimakadze. Nguye longumsiti wakho nesihlangu sakho!" 
Psalms115:11 Nine lenesaba Simakadze, yetsembelani kuye. Nguye longumsiti wenu nesihlangu senu!" 
Psalms115:12 Simakadze usikhumbulile, utasibusisa; utayibusisa nendlu yaka-Israyeli, ayibusise nendlu yaka-Aroni." 
Psalms115:13 Utababusisa bonkhe labamesabako Simakadze, labancane nalabakhulu." 
Psalms115:14 Shangatsi Simakadze anganandzisela nine kanye nebantfwabenu. 
Psalms115:15 Shangatsi ningabusiswa nguSimakadze, yena lowenta lizulu nemhlaba." 
Psalms115:16 Emazulu ayindzawo yaSimakadze, yena yedvwa, kodvwa umhlaba wawuniketela kubantfu." 
Psalms115:17 Nkulunkulu akadvunyiswa ngulabafile; yebo, akadvunyiswa ngulabo lase bathula emathuneni." 
Psalms115:18 Kodvwa tsine, lesiphilako, siyawumbonga Simakadze, kusukela manje kuze kube phakadze. Haleluya, dvumisani Simakadze." 
Psalms116:1 Ngiyamtsandza Simakadze, ngobe ulivile livi lami nekuncusa kwami." 
Psalms116:2 Ngobe ubekile indlebe yakhe kimi, ngako-ke sengiyawukhuleka kuye imphilo yami yonkhe." 
Psalms116:3 Tingibe tekufa tangitungeleta, iminjunju yekufa yangihlasela, ngabandzetelwa tinhlupheko nelusizi." 
Psalms116:4 Ngase ngibita libito laSimakadze, ngatsi: “Awu, Simakadze, ngiyakuncenga, ngisindzise.”" 
Psalms116:5 Simakadze unemusa nekulunga; Nkulunkulu wetfu unesihe. 
Psalms116:6 Simakadze uyamlondvolota londzindzako; ngangisengotini wangisindzisa. 
Psalms116:7 Mphefumulo wami, ake uphindze uphumule, ngobe Simakadze ukuphetse ngemusa." 
Psalms116:8 Wena, Simakadze, uwephulile umphefumulo wami ekufeni, wephula emehlo ami etinyembetini netinyawo tami ekuweni." 
Psalms116:9 Ngiko nje ngihamba ebukhoneni baSimakadze kulelive lalabaphilako. 
Psalms116:10 Ngachubeka ngakholwa, nome sengitsi: “Maye, ngiphelile tinhlupheko!”" 
Psalms116:11 Ngajabha, ngadzimate ngatsi: “Bonkhe bantfu banemanga!”" 
Psalms116:12 Ngiyawumentelani Simakadze, ngimbonge ngako konkhe lokuhle langentela kona?" 
Psalms116:13 Ngiyawuphakamisa indzebe yensindziso, ngikhuleke kuSimakadze, ngibonga libito lakhe." 
Psalms116:14 Tifungo tami ngiyawutifeza kuSimakadze, embikwabo bonkhe bantfu bakhe." 
Psalms116:15 Kuligugu emehlweni aSimakadze kufa kwalabangcwele bakhe. 
Psalms116:16 Awu, Simakadze! Mine ngiyinceku yakho, indvodzana letalwa yincekukati yakho. Utfukulule tibopho lebengiboshwe ngato." 
Psalms116:17 Ngiyawunikela kuwe ngemhlatjelo wekubonga, ngikhuleke kuSimakadze, ngibonga libito lakhe." 
Psalms116:18 Tifungo tami ngitatifeza kuSimakadze embikwabo bonkhe bantfu bakhe," 
Psalms116:19 ngisetibuyeni tendlu yaSimakadze, ekhatsi nawe, Jerusalema. Haleluya, dvumisani Simakadze!" 
Psalms117:1 Dvumisani Simakadze, nonkhe nine tive! Mbabateni nonkhe nine mindeni!" 
Psalms117:2 Ngobe umusa wakhe mukhulu kitsi, nekwetsembeka kwaSimakadze kume kuze kube phakadze. Haleluya, dvumisani Simakadze!" 
Psalms118:1 Bongani Simakadze, ngobe muhle, umusa wakhe ume kuze kube phakadze." 
Psalms118:2 Baka-Israyeli abavume batsi: “Umusa wakhe ume kuze kube phakadze.” 
Psalms118:3 Bendlu yaka-Aroni abatsi: “Umusa wakhe ume kuze kube phakadze.” 
Psalms118:4 Labo labesaba Simakadze abatsi: “Umusa wakhe ume kuze kube phakadze.” 
Psalms118:5 Ngakhala kuSimakadze ngiselusizini lwami, yena wangiphendvula ngekungikhulula." 
Psalms118:6 Simakadze ungakimi angesabi lutfo. Umuntfu angangentani nje? 
Psalms118:7 Simakadze ungakimi, ungumsiti wami, labangitondzako ngiyawubabuka ngibacoloshele." 
Psalms118:8 Kuncono kuphephela kuSimakadze kunekwetsembela kumuntfu. 
Psalms118:9 Kuncono kuphephela kuSimakadze kunekwetsembela emakhosini. 
Psalms118:10 Tonkhe tive tangivimbetela ndzawo tonkhe, kodvwa ngelibito laSimakadze ngatishaya ngatibhuca." 
Psalms118:11 Tangitungeleta, tangicindzetela ndzawo tonkhe, kodvwa ngelibito laSimakadze ngatishaya ngatibhuca." 
Psalms118:12 Tangibunganyela njengelibulo letinyosi, tasha njengemlilo wemanyeva; kodvwa ngelibito laSimakadze ngatishaya ngatibhuca." 
Psalms118:13 Ngafucwa matima ngacishe ngawa; kodvwa Simakadze wangisita. 
Psalms118:14 Simakadze ungemandla ami nengoma yami, sewuyinsindziso yami." 
Psalms118:15 Kuvakala emaphimbo ekwetsaba laphuma etindlini talabangcwele atsi: “Sandla sekudla saSimakadze sisebenta ngemandla. 
Psalms118:16 Sandla sekudla saSimakadze siphakanyiselwe etulu. Sandla sekudla saSimakadze sisebenta ngemandla.” 
Psalms118:17 Ngingeke ngife, kodvwa ngitawuphila, ngibalise ngemisebenti yaSimakadze." 
Psalms118:18 Simakadze wangishaya kabuhlungu kabi, kodvwa akazange anginikele ekufeni." 
Psalms118:19 Ngivuleleni emasango ekulunga, kuze ngingene ngawo ngibonge Simakadze." 
Psalms118:20 Ngilo leli lisango laSimakadze, labalungile bangena ngalo." 
Psalms118:21 Ngiyawukubonga ngobe ungiphendvulile, waba yinsindziso yami." 
Psalms118:22 Litje lekwakha lelaliwa bakhi, ngobe batsi alinamsebenti, seligucuke laba litje lekusimisa indlu." 
Psalms118:23 Loku kwentiwe nguSimakadze, kuyamangalisa kitsi." 
Psalms118:24 Leli lilanga lelentiwe nguSimakadze, asijabule setsabe kulo." 
Psalms118:25 Awu, Simakadze, sisindzise, siyakuncenga! Awu, Nkhosi, siphumelelise, siyakuncenga!" 
Psalms118:26 Ubusisiwe lotako egameni laSimakadze. Sinibusisa sisendlini yaSimakadze. 
Psalms118:27 Simakadze nguNkulunkulu, wasipha kukhanya, wasikhanyisela. Hlabani lihele leMkhosi, niphatse emacembe ngetandla tenu, nize nifike etimphondvweni telilati." 
Psalms118:28 Wena unguNkulunkulu wami, ngiyakubonga; wena unguNkulunkulu wami, ngiyakudvumisa." 
Psalms118:29 Bongani Simakadze, ngobe muhle, nemusa wakhe ume kuze kube phakadze." 
Psalms119:1 Babusisiwe labo labatindlela tabo timsulwa, labo labahamba ngemitsetfo yaNkulunkulu." 
Psalms119:2 Babusisiwe labo labagcina imiyalo yaSimakadze, bamfunisise ngayo yonkhe inhlitiyo yabo." 
Psalms119:3 Labo-ke abakwenti lokungakalungi, kodvwa bahamba ngetindlela takhe." 
Psalms119:4 Wena, Simakadze, usinike imiyalo yakho, wasiyala kutsi siyitfobele ngenhlonipho." 
Psalms119:5 Shangatsi tindlela tami tingacondza njalo ekutigcineni timiso takho. 
Psalms119:6 Nangingayigcina yonkhe imiyalo yakho, ngingeke ngihlazeke." 
Psalms119:7 Ngiyawukudvumisa ngenhlitiyo lecotfo ngesikhatsi ngifundza tehlulelo takho letilungile. 
Psalms119:8 Timiso takho ngitawutilalela; ungangishiyi nakancane. 
Psalms119:9 Umuntfu lomusha angayigcina kanjani imphilo yakhe ihlantekile? Ngekucaphela kuhamba ngelivi lakho. 
Psalms119:10 Ngikufuna ngayo yonkhe inhlitiyo yami, shangatsi ngingete ngaphambuka emiyalweni yakho." 
Psalms119:11 Livi lakho ngililondvolote enhlitiyweni yami, kuze ngingoni kuwe." 
Psalms119:12 Awubongwe, Simakadze! Ngifundzise timiso takho." 
Psalms119:13 Ngimemetela ngemlomo wami tonkhe tehlulelo takho letiphuma emlonyeni wakho. 
Psalms119:14 Ngijabulela kuhamba ngemiyalo yakho, kunekutsi ngibe nebunjinga bonkhe." 
Psalms119:15 Ngiyawuzindla ngemiyalo yakho, emehlo ami ngingawesusi etindleleni takho." 
Psalms119:16 Ngiyawutfokota ngetimiso takho; ngingeke ngilikhohlwe livi lakho. 
Psalms119:17 Mine, sisebenti sakho, ngicela ungiphatse ngebubele, kuze ngitewuphila ngekunakekela livi lakho." 
Psalms119:18 Vula emehlo ami, kuze ngibone timangaliso letisemtsetfweni wakho." 
Psalms119:19 Ngisihambi lapha emhlabeni, ungangifihleli imiyalo yakho." 
Psalms119:20 Umphefumulo wami sewufile kulangatelela kwati imitsetfo yakho, ngato tonkhe tikhatsi." 
Psalms119:21 Uyabatsetsisa labatidlako; bacalekisiwe labedukile emiyalweni yakho. 
Psalms119:22 Ngikhulule etinhlambeni nasekungedzeleleni kwabo, ngobe imiyalo yakho ngiyigcinile." 
Psalms119:23 Nome emakhosi asahlangene ngami, mine, sikhonti sakho, ngiyawuzindla ngetimiso takho." 
Psalms119:24 Timfundziso takho tikujabula kwami, ngito letibeluleki bami." 
Psalms119:25 Ngilahleke phansi elutfulini. Vuselela kuphila kwami njengekwelivi lakho. 
Psalms119:26 Tonkhe tindlela tami ngateneka kuwe, wena wangiphendvula, ngako-ke ngifundzise timiso takho." 
Psalms119:27 Ngente ngiticondzisise timiso takho, kuze ngikhulume ngetimangaliso takho." 
Psalms119:28 Lusizi selungicedze emandla, ngicinise, njengelivi lakho." 
Psalms119:29 Tindlela temacebo tikhweshise kimi, ungifundzise umtsetfo wakho ngemusa." 
Psalms119:30 Ngitikhetsele indlela yeliciniso. Tehlulelo takho ngitibeke embikwami njalo. 
Psalms119:31 Ngibambelele emiyalweni yakho, Nkulunkulu, ungangijabhisi, ungidlise ngemahloni." 
Psalms119:32 Ngiyawugijima ngendlela yemiyalo yakho, ngobe nguwe lotakwandzisa kucondza kwami." 
Psalms119:33 Ngifundzise, Simakadze, kuhamba ngetimiso takho, khona ngiyawuhamba ngato, kuze kubesekupheleni." 
Psalms119:34 Ngiphe ingcondvo yekwati umtsetfo wakho, kuze ngiwugcine kahle, ngiwulalele ngenhlitiyo yami yonkhe." 
Psalms119:35 Ngiholele endleleni yemiyalo yakho, ngobe lendlela iyinjabulo yami." 
Psalms119:36 Condzisa inhlitiyo yami ekutfobeleni timiso takho, ingalitjatiswa yingcebo." 
Psalms119:37 Fulatselisa emehlo ami ekubukeni tintfo letingenamsebenti; ngiphe kuphila ngekwelivi lakho. 
Psalms119:38 Gcina setsembiso sakho, lowanginika sona, mine nceku yakho. Lesetsembiso salabo labakwesabako." 
Psalms119:39 Ngiphephise ehlazweni lengilesabako, ngobe timiso takho tilungile." 
Psalms119:40 Maye, ngiyatilangatelela timiso takho! Hlumelelisa kuphila kwami ngekulunga kwakho." 
Psalms119:41 Shangatsi ungangiphatsa ngemusa wakho, Simakadze; ungigone ngensindziso yakho njengekwesetsembiso sakho." 
Psalms119:42 Khona-ke ngiyawukwati kubaphendvula labo labangetfukako, ngobe livi lakho ngiyaletsemba." 
Psalms119:43 Ngiphe emandla ekukhuluma liciniso, ngobe litsemba lami ngilibeke etimisweni takho." 
Psalms119:44 Umtsetfo wakho ngiyakuwugcina phakadze naphakadze. 
Psalms119:45 Ngiyawuhamba ngekukhululeka, ngobe ngetamile kuhlonipha imitsetfo yakho." 
Psalms119:46 Imiyalo yakho, Nkulunkulu, ngiyawuyimemetela nasembikwemakhosi, ngingeke ngibe nemahloni ngayo." 
Psalms119:47 Ngiyatfokota ngemiyalo yakho, ngobe ngiyayitsandza." 
Psalms119:48 Imiyalo yakho ngiyayihlonipha ngiyitsandze futsi; ngiyawuhlala ngizindla ngetimiso takho. 
Psalms119:49 Khumbula setsembiso sakho lowasenta kimi, mine nceku yakho, ngobe ngiso lesinginike litsemba." 
Psalms119:50 Indvudvuto yami ekuhluphekeni kwami kutsi setsembiso sakho singinika kuphila. 
Psalms119:51 Labatigcabhako bangihleka bulima; kepha ngingeke ngiphambuke emtsetfweni wakho. 
Psalms119:52 Awu, Simakadze, ngiyayikhumbula imitsetfo yakho yasendvulo, bese ngiyadvudvuteka ngayo." 
Psalms119:53 Nangibona tikhohlakali tephula umtsetfo wakho ngemabomu, ngitfukutsela ngigcwale kokana." 
Psalms119:54 Timiso takho tingumgogodla wetingoma lengitihlabelako, nome kukuphi lapha ngihlala khona." 
Psalms119:55 Ebusuku ngikhumbula libito lakho, Simakadze, ngizindle ngemtsetfo wakho." 
Psalms119:56 Nguloku bengikwenta: Kulalela timiso takho. 
Psalms119:57 Simakadze usabelo lesilifa lami, ngetsembisa kuwagcina emavi akho." 
Psalms119:58 Buso bakho ngibufune ngayo yonkhe inhlitiyo yami. Bani nemusa kimi ngekwesetsembiso sakho. 
Psalms119:59 Nangicabanga ngetindlela tami, ngijikisa tinyatselo tami, ngiticondzise etimisweni takho." 
Psalms119:60 Angicitsi sikhatsi, ngivele ngiphutfume, ngigcine imiyalo yakho." 
Psalms119:61 Nome lababi banginkinka ngetintsambo, ngingeke ngiwukhohlwe umtsetfo wakho." 
Psalms119:62 Ekhatsi nebusuku ngiyavuka ngikubonge, ngobe imitsetfo yakho ilungile." 
Psalms119:63 Ngingumngani wabo bonkhe labakwesabako, labahamba ngetimiso takho." 
Psalms119:64 Simakadze, umhlaba ugcwele umusa wakho; ngifundzise timiso takho." 
Psalms119:65 Yentele lokuhle inceku yakho, Simakadze, kuye ngekwelivi lakho." 
Psalms119:66 Ngifundzise umcondvo lomuhle nekwati, ngobe litsemba lami lisemiyalweni yakho." 
Psalms119:67 Lokwa ngisengakahlupheki ngenca yekushaywa kwami, ngangivamise kweduka, manje sengiyaligcina livi lakho." 
Psalms119:68 Wena umuhle, konkhe lokwentako kuhle, ngifundzise timiso takho." 
Psalms119:69 Labatigabatisako bakhuluma emanga ngami; kodvwa mine, ngitfobela imitsetfo yakho ngenhlitiyo yami yonkhe." 
Psalms119:70 Inhlitiyo yabo ilukhunisa kwelitje, kepha mine ngitfokotiswa ngumtsetfo wakho." 
Psalms119:71 Kwaba kuhle kutsi ngihlushwe kuze ngifundze timiso takho. 
Psalms119:72 Umtsetfo lophuma emlonyeni wakho muhle kunemali yonkhe yemhlaba. 
Psalms119:73 Tandla takho tangidala tangibumba; ngiphe ingcondvo yekufundza imiyalo yakho. 
Psalms119:74 Labesaba wena bayawutsi nabangibona bajabule, ngobe mine ngetsemba livi lakho." 
Psalms119:75 Ngiyati, Nkulunkulu, kutsi tehlulelo takho tilungile, nekutsi ungijezise njengobe kungifanele." 
Psalms119:76 Umusa wakho awube yindvudvuto yami ngekwesetsembiso sakho kimi, mine, nceku yakho." 
Psalms119:77 Shangatsi sihawu sakho singehlela kimi, khona ngiyawuphila, ngobe umtsetfo wakho uyinjabulo yami." 
Psalms119:78 Shangatsi labatigabatisako bangahlazeka, ngobe bangicindzetela ngaphandle kwesizatfu; kepha mine ngiyawuzindla ngetimiso takho." 
Psalms119:79 Shangatsi labakwesabako bangagucukela ngakimi, bona labo labati imitsetfo yakho." 
Psalms119:80 Shangatsi inhlitiyo yami ingagcina timiso takho, kuze ngingehlelwa ngemahloni, ngihlazeke." 
Psalms119:81 Umphefumulo wami ulambele insindziso yakho, litsemba lami ngilibeke evini lakho." 
Psalms119:82 Sengigolotele sekuze kubuhlungu emehlo, solomane ngilindzele setsembiso sakho; solomane ngiyatibuta namanje, ngitsi: “Uyawungidvudvuta nini?”" 
Psalms119:83 Kambe mine ngisewani nje? Sengifanana neludzengelo lolusetaleni, noko imiyalo yakho angikayikhohlwa." 
Psalms119:84 Inceku yakho iyawulindzela kuze kube ngunini? Uyawubehlulela nini laba labangitingelela kungihlupha? 
Psalms119:85 Labatigabatisako bangimbela imigodzi, ngisho bona kanye labaphambene nemtsetfo wakho." 
Psalms119:86 Imiyalo yakho yonkhe yetsembekile. Ngisite, ngobe bantfu bangitingela ngaphandle kwesono." 
Psalms119:87 Bacishe bangibulala, kepha mine angiphambukanga emiyalweni yakho." 
Psalms119:88 Londvolota imphilo yami ngekwemusa wakho, kuze ngigcine timiso takho." 
Psalms119:89 Yebo, Simakadze, livi lakho lime kuze kube phakadze, lime licinile ezulwini." 
Psalms119:90 Kuyawendlula titukulwane netitukulwane, kodvwa kwetsembeka kwakho kungeke kugucuke, wamisa umhlaba, nanyalo usemile." 
Psalms119:91 Seloku kwema mhlazana kumiswa nguwe, ngobe konkhe kufanele kukhonte wena." 
Psalms119:92 Kube umtsetfo wakho bewungesiyo injabulo yami, ngabe sengabhubhela ekuhluphekeni kwami." 
Psalms119:93 Ngingeke ngitikhohlwe timiso takho, ngobe ungiphilise ngato." 
Psalms119:94 Ngingewakho, ngisindzise, Nkulunkulu, ngobe ngifuna kugcina timiso takho." 
Psalms119:95 Lababi bahlose kungibulala, kodvwa mine ngiyawucaphela timiso takho." 
Psalms119:96 Ngifundze kutsi: Yonkhe intfo, nome iyinhle kanganani, inemkhawulo; kodvwa imiyalo yakho ite umkhawulo." 
Psalms119:97 Maye, ngiyawutsandza umtsetfo wakho! Ngizindla ngawo imini yonkhe." 
Psalms119:98 Imiyalo yakho ingenta ngihlakaniphe kwengca titsa tami, ngobe ihlala kimi njalo." 
Psalms119:99 Ngicondza kancono kunabo bonkhe labangifundzisako, ngobe ngihlala ngizindla ngetimiso takho." 
Psalms119:100 Lwati lwami lwendlula lwalabadzala kunami, ngobe ngigcina timiso takho." 
Psalms119:101 Ngiyatincandza tinyawo tami etindleleni letimbi, ngobe ngifuna kugcina livi lakho." 
Psalms119:102 Angikaphambuki emtsetfweni wakho, ngobe nguwe longifundzisile." 
Psalms119:103 Maye, timnandzi tetsembiso takho kimi! Tinongotela kwengca luju lwetinyosi emlonyeni wami." 
Psalms119:104 Ngetimiso takho ngitfola kucondza, ngako-ke ngiyatitondza tindlela temanga." 
Psalms119:105 Livi lakho lisibane etinyaweni tami, likukhanya endleleni yami." 
Psalms119:106 Ngifungile ngafungisisa kutsi ngiyawuyilalela imitsetfo yakho yekulunga. 
Psalms119:107 Simakadze, kuhlupheka kwami kumatima, ngihlumelelise ngelivi lakho." 
Psalms119:108 Simakadze, yemukela iminikelo yami yekukudvumisa, ungifundzise imitsetfo yakho." 
Psalms119:109 Imphilo yami isengotini njalo, noko angiwukhohlwa umtsetfo wakho." 
Psalms119:110 Lababi bangibekele lugibe, kodvwa mine ngingeke ngeduke emtsetfweni wakho." 
Psalms119:111 Timiso takho tilifa lami laphakadze, yebo, tiyinjabulo yenhlitiyo yami." 
Psalms119:112 Inhlitiyo yami ngiyitfobisele kutsi yente timiso takho ngize ngife. 
Psalms119:113 Ngiyabatondza bantfu labamphacambili, kodvwa umtsetfo wakho ngiyawutsandza." 
Psalms119:114 Wena, Nkulunkulu, usiphephelo sami nesihlangu sami, litsemba lami ngilibeke evini lakho." 
Psalms119:115 Sukani kimi, nine lababi, kuze ngigcine imiyalo yaNkulunkulu wami." 
Psalms119:116 Ngisimise ngelivi lakho, kuze ngiphile, ungangijabhisi ngelitsemba lami." 
Psalms119:117 Ngisekele, kuze ngisindziswe, ngiyawubheka timiso takho njalonjalo." 
Psalms119:118 Uyabadzela bonkhe labeduka etimisweni takho, yebo, bucili babo bulite." 
Psalms119:119 Bonkhe lababi bemhlaba ubacitsa njengetibi, kungako ngitsandza timiso takho nje." 
Psalms119:120 Umtimba wami uyatfutfumela ngenca yekwesaba wena, netehlulelo takho ngiyatesaba." 
Psalms119:121 Sengikwentile lokulungile nalokucotfo, ungangiyekeleli kulabangicindzetelako." 
Psalms119:122 Yetsembisa kutsi utayisita inceku yakho, labatigabatisako bangete bangicindzetela." 
Psalms119:123 Emehlo ami asacundzekile, ngifunana nensindziso yakho, nekugcwaliseka kwesetsembiso sakho." 
Psalms119:124 Phatsa inceku yakho ngemusa wakho, ungifundzise timiso takho." 
Psalms119:125 Mine ngiyinceku yakho, ngiphe ingcondvo yekwati timfundziso takho." 
Psalms119:126 Simakadze, sesikhatsi sakho sekutsi utsatse tinyatselo, ngobe umtsetfo wakho uyephulwa." 
Psalms119:127 Imiyalo yakho ngiyitsandza kakhulu, kwendlula igolide, ngisho igolide lecengeke kakhulu." 
Psalms119:128 Ngako-ke tinyatselo tami ngiticondzisa ngato tonkhe timiso takho; ngiyatitondza tindlela letimbi. 
Psalms119:129 Timiso takho tiyamangalisa, ngako ngiyatilalela." 
Psalms119:130 Kwembuleka kwemavi akho kuveta kukhanya, kuletse kuhlakanipha kulabangenakucondza." 
Psalms119:131 Ngimita ematse ngilangatelela kufundza imiyalo yakho. 
Psalms119:132 Ase ugucukele ngakimi, ube nemusa kimi, njengobe wenta kubo bonkhe labakutsandzako." 
Psalms119:133 Condzisa tinyatselo tami evini lakho, angingabuswa ngisho nangulobuncane bubi." 
Psalms119:134 Ngihlenge ekucindzetelweni bantfu, kuze ngitewugcina timiso takho." 
Psalms119:135 Ngikhanyise ngebuso bakho mine, nceku yakho; ungifundzise timiso takho." 
Psalms119:136 Emehlo ami ageleta tinyembeti, ngobe bantfu abawugcini umtsetfo wakho." 
Psalms119:137 Wena, Simakadze, ulungile, nemitsetfo yakho ilungile." 
Psalms119:138 Timiso takho tetsembekile, tetsembeke kakhulukati." 
Psalms119:139 Kushisekela kwami kungicedzile, ngobe titsa tami tiwakhohliwe emavi akho." 
Psalms119:140 Tetsembiso takho tihlanteke ngalokuphelele, nenceku yakho iyatitsandza." 
Psalms119:141 Nome ngimncane, ngedzelelekile, noko angiyikhohlwa imiyalo yakho." 
Psalms119:142 Kulunga kwakho kukulunga kwaphakadze, nemtsetfo wakho uliciniso." 
Psalms119:143 Nome kuhlupheka nelusizi kungehlela, kodvwa imiyalo yakho ikujabula kwami." 
Psalms119:144 Timiso takho tiliciniso phakadze naphakadze; ngifundzise tona ngitewuphila ngato. 
Psalms119:145 Ngikhala kuwe ngayo yonkhe inhlitiyo yami, ngiphendvule, Simakadze; ngiyawutigcina timiso takho." 
Psalms119:146 Ngikhala kuwe ngitsi: “Ngisindzise, khona ngitawugcina umtsetfo wakho.”" 
Psalms119:147 Ngivuka lokwa kuseluvivi, ngicele lusito, litsemba lami libambelele evini lakho." 
Psalms119:148 Ebusuku ngiyacwasha ngingalali, kuze ngizindle ngetetsembiso takho." 
Psalms119:149 Vani livi lami ngemusa wakho; Simakadze, londvolota imphilo yami ngekwehlulela kwakho." 
Psalms119:150 Bayasondzela labo labangitondzako, labanemacebo ebubi, kodvwa bakhashane nemtsetfo wakho." 
Psalms119:151 Kodvwa wena, Simakadze, usedvute nami, nemiyalo yakho iliciniso sibili." 
Psalms119:152 Timiso takho ngatifundza kadzeni, watimisa ingunaphakadze." 
Psalms119:153 Buka kuhlupheka kwami ungikhulule, ngobe angikawukhohlwa umtsetfo wakho." 
Psalms119:154 Mela indzaba yami, ungikhulule, hlumelelisa kuphila kwami njengekwetsembisa kwakho." 
Psalms119:155 Insindziso ikhashane nalababi, ngobe abatifuni timiso takho." 
Psalms119:156 Sihawu sakho sikhulu, Simakadze, hlumelelisa kuphila kwami ngekwehlulela kwakho." 
Psalms119:157 Banyenti labangitingelako nalabamelene nami, kodvwa ngingeke ngikhweshe etimisweni takho." 
Psalms119:158 Nangibuka tihlubuki, ngifikelwa kumangala, ngobe atiyigcini imiyalo yakho." 
Psalms119:159 Nawe, Simakadze, uyatibonela kutsi timiso takho ngititsandza kanganani. Londvolota kuphila kwami ngemusa wakho." 
Psalms119:160 Umgomo welivi lakho liciniso sibili; tonkhe timiso takho letilungile tiyawuma kuze kube phakadze. 
Psalms119:161 Tikhulu tingitingela ngaphandle kwesizatfu, kodvwa livi lakho liyangitfutfumelisa." 
Psalms119:162 Livi lakho ngiyalijabulela, ngijabule njengemuntfu lotfole umcebo." 
Psalms119:163 Emanga ngiyawatondza ngiwenyanye, kodvwa ngitsandza umtsetfo wakho." 
Psalms119:164 Ngiyakudvumisa kasikhombisa ngelilanga ngenca yetehlulelo takho tekulunga. 
Psalms119:165 Bantfu labatsandza umtsetfo wakho banekuthula lokuphelele, kute lokuyawubakhuba endleleni." 
Psalms119:166 Yebo, Simakadze, ngetsemba insindziso yakho, ngiyayenta imiyalo yakho." 
Psalms119:167 Ngigcina timfundziso takho, ngobe ngititsandza ngenhlitiyo yami yonkhe." 
Psalms119:168 Ngigcina timiso takho nemiyalo yakho, ngobe tonkhe tindlela tami tisembikwakho." 
Psalms119:169 Kukhala kwami akufike kuwe, Simakadze, ngiphe kucondza njengekwelivi lakho." 
Psalms119:170 Kuncusa kwami akute kuwe, ungikhulule njengekwelivi lakho." 
Psalms119:171 Ngiyawukudvumisa ngaso sonkhe sikhatsi, ngobe ungifundzisa timiso takho." 
Psalms119:172 Ngiyawuhlabela ngelivi lakho, ngobe imiyalo yakho yonkhe ilungile." 
Psalms119:173 Shangatsi sandla sakho singahlala silungele kungisita, ngobe ngitikhetsele kugcina timiso takho." 
Psalms119:174 Ngomele insindziso yakho, Simakadze, nemtsetfo wakho ukujabula kwami." 
Psalms119:175 Ase ungiphe kuphila, khona ngitewukudvumisa; shangatsi nemiyalo yakho ingangisimisa." 
Psalms119:176 Ngedukile, njengemvu lelahlekile. Ngifune, mine nceku yakho, ngobe imiyalo yakho angikayikhohlwa." 
Psalms120:1 Nangisekuhluphekeni, ngiyakhala kuSimakadze, yena angiphendvule." 
Psalms120:2 Simakadze, ngisindzise kulabangicalela emanga nakubakhohlisi." 
Psalms120:3 Nine labacala emanga, Nkulunkulu uyakwentani kini? Uyawunijezisa kanjani?" 
Psalms120:4 Niyawujeziswa ngemicibisholo lekhaliphako yemphi; nijeziswe nangemlilo wemalahle embondvo. 
Psalms120:5 Maye kimi, lengingumchamuki lapha kaMesheki, ngihlala emathendeni akaKhedari." 
Psalms120:6 Sengihleti kakhulu, kwaze kwengca, emkhatsini walabatondza kuthula." 
Psalms120:7 Mine ngitsandza lucolo nekuthula, kodvwa nangitsi ngiyakhuluma nje, bavuka indlwabane." 
Psalms121:1 Ngiphakamisela emehlo ami etintsabeni; lusito lwami luyawuchamuka kuphi? 
Psalms121:2 Lusito lwami luchamuka kuSimakadze lowenta lizulu nemhlaba. 
Psalms121:3 Angeke avume kutsi lunyawo lwakho lushelele, lowo longumlondvoloti wakho aketeli." 
Psalms121:4 Ngempela lowo longumlondvoloti waka-Israyeli aketeli, akalali." 
Psalms121:5 Simakadze ngumlondvoloti wakho, ungumtfunti wakho esandleni sakho sekudla." 
Psalms121:6 Lilanga lingeke likubhadlise emini nenyanga ebusuku. 
Psalms121:7 Simakadze uyawukuvikela kuko konkhe lokubi, alondvolote imphilo yakho." 
Psalms121:8 Simakadze uyawulondvolota kuphuma kwakho nekungena kwakho, kusukela manje kuze kube phakadze." 
Psalms122:1 Ngajabula ngesikhatsi batsi kimi: “Asambe siye endlini yaSimakadze.” 
Psalms122:2 Sesime emkhatsini wemasango akho, Jerusalema!" 
Psalms122:3 IJerusalema lidolobha lelakheke kahle lavivaniswa. 
Psalms122:4 Ngulapho ikhuphukela khona imindeni yaSimakadze, iyewudvumisa Nkulunkulu, njengobe yena ayala Israyeli." 
Psalms122:5 Ngulapho kuhlala khona tihlalo tebukhosi tekwehlulela, tihlalo tebukhosi tendlu yaDavide." 
Psalms122:6 Thandazelani kutsi kube nekuthula eJerusalema: “Shangatsi bangaphumelela babe nenhlanhla, bantfu labatsandza wena, Jerusalema." 
Psalms122:7 Akube nekuthula ngekhatsi kwetindvonga takho, kube nekuphepha etigodlweni takho.”" 
Psalms122:8 Ngenca yebazalwane bami nebangani bami ngitsi: “Kuthula akwandze ngekhatsi kwakho.” 
Psalms122:9 Ngenca yendlu yaSimakadze, Nkulunkulu wetfu, ngikucelela inchubekelaphambili." 
Psalms123:1 Ngiphakamisela emehlo ami ngakuwe, wena lohleti ebukhosini bakho ezulwini." 
Psalms123:2 Yebo, njengobe inceku yencike enkhosini yayo, nanjengobe umzanyana encike kumphatsi wakhe, natsi-ke sincike kuSimakadze, longuNkulunkulu wetfu, aze abe nesihawu kitsi." 
Psalms123:3 Sihawukele, Simakadze, sihawukele, ngobe sesiphetfwe ngensila, kwaze kwendlula." 
Psalms123:4 Umphefumulo wetfu ukhatsele kakhulu kweyiwa ngulabanjingile, nakwedzelelwa ngulabatigabatisako." 
Psalms124:1 “Kube Simakadze abengekho ngakitsi ngabe siseyini nje?” akasho njalo Israyeli. 
Psalms124:2 “Kube Simakadze abengekho ngakitsi ngesikhatsi bantfu basihlasela," 
Psalms124:3 ngabe basigwinye siva ngekuvutsa kwelulaka lwabo; 
Psalms124:4 emanti ngabe asimbonyile, sikhukhula ngabe sengce natsi," 
Psalms124:5 ngabe tikhukhula tisikhukhulile.” 
Psalms124:6 Akabongwe Simakadze, longazange avume kutsi titsa tetfu tisibulale." 
Psalms124:7 Siphunyule njengenyoni iphunyula elugibeni lwebaciphi. Tingibe utidzabulile, saphunyula." 
Psalms124:8 Lusito lwetfu lusegameni laSimakadze lowente lizulu nemhlaba. 
Psalms125:1 Labo labetsembele kuSimakadze bafanana neNtsaba iSiyoni, lengeke itanyatanyiswe, kodvwa leyawuma kuze kube phakadze." 
Psalms125:2 Njengobe tintsaba tihace iJerusalema, kanjalo Simakadze uhace sive sakhe, kusukela manje kuze kube phakadze." 
Psalms125:3 Umbuso walababi ungeke ubuse eveni lalabalungile, funa nalabalungile bese benta lokubi." 
Psalms125:4 Simakadze, yenta lokuhle kulabo labalungile, bona labo labacotfo ngenhlitiyo." 
Psalms125:5 Kodvwa labaphambukela etindleleni tabo letimagiligombo Simakadze uyawubacosha kanye nalabenta lokubi. Kuthula akube ku-Israyeli! 
Psalms126:1 Kwakungatsi siyabhudza tsine batfunjwa baseSiyoni, ngesikhatsi Nkulunkulu asibuyisela eJerusalema." 
Psalms126:2 Sahleka safa, sahlabela tingoma tenjabulo. Tive letibomakhelwane tatsi: “Nkulunkulu ubentele tintfo letinkhulu.”" 
Psalms126:3 Vele, Nkulunkulu usentele tintfo letinkhulu, sajabula." 
Psalms126:4 Simakadze, sibuyisele eveni lakitsi, njengobe nemvula ibuyisela emanti etihosheni temifula." 
Psalms126:5 Labo labahlanyela ngetinyembeti bayawuvuna ngekujabula. 
Psalms126:6 Bantfu labahamba bakhala betfwele inhlanyelo yekuhlanyela, bayawufika ekhaya bampompoloza ngenjabulo, baphetse tinyandza tesivuno." 
Psalms127:1 Indlu nayingakhiwa nguNkulunkulu, basebentela lite labo labayakhako. Lidolobha nalingagadvwa nguNkulunkulu, basebentela lite labo labaligadzako." 
Psalms127:2 Kulite kini kuvuka ekuseni nephute nekulala, nidle nekudla kwekuhlupheka, ngobe Nkulunkulu uyamupha lotsandzekako wakhe ebusuku aselele." 
Psalms127:3 Bantfwana balifa leliphuma kuSimakadze, basibusiso lesivela kuye." 
Psalms127:4 Bantfwana bebusha banjengemicibisholo lesesandleni selichawe. 
Psalms127:5 Ibusisiwe indvodza, lemgodla wayo ugcwele imicibisholo lenjalo. Bangeke bahlazeke nabamelene netitsa tabo emasangweni ekwehlulela." 
Psalms128:1 Babusiswe labo labesaba Nkulunkulu, labo labahamba ngetindlela takhe." 
Psalms128:2 Uyawudla titfukutfuku takho, ube nenhlanhla nemphumelelo." 
Psalms128:3 Umkakho uyawufanana nemvini lotselako nasahleti endlini yakho, bantfwabakho babe njengemahlumela emncumo nase bahleti etafuleni lakho." 
Psalms128:4 Ibusiswa kanjalo-ke, indvodza leyesaba Nkulunkulu." 
Psalms128:5 Shangatsi Nkulunkulu angakubusisa aseSiyoni, shangatsi ungabona kuchuma kweJerusalema emphilweni yakho yonkhe." 
Psalms128:6 Shangatsi ungaphila uze ukhokhobe, uze ubone nebatukulu bakho. Kuthula akube na-Israyeli." 
Psalms129:1 “Bangihlupha kwasebusheni bami,” akasho njalo Israyeli atsi:" 
Psalms129:2 “Bangihlupha kwasebusheni bami, kodvwa abazange bangehlule." 
Psalms129:3 Balimi babelima emhlane wami, bembe lemikhulu imisele." 
Psalms129:4 Kodvwa Simakadze ulungile, utijubile tindilimo talababi lababengibophe ngato.”" 
Psalms129:5 Shangatsi bonkhe labatondza Siyoni, bangancandvwa bahlazekile." 
Psalms129:6 Shangatsi bangafanana netjani lobumila etikwetindlu, bubune busengakakhuli." 
Psalms129:7 Kute nalobuvunako, abubutse, nome lobetfwala ngetitfungo." 
Psalms129:8 Nalabendlulako abayiwusho ngisho nekutsi: “Shangatsi Simakadze anganibusisa. Sinibusisa ngelibito laSimakadze.” 
Psalms130:1 Nangisekujuleni kwetinhlupheko, ngikhala kuwe, Simakadze." 
Psalms130:2 Vani kukhala kwami, Simakadze, ngive nangicela lusito kuwe." 
Psalms130:3 Kube wena, Simakadze, bewusibalela tono tetfu, ngubani labengaphunyula, angalahlwa?" 
Psalms130:4 Kodvwa wena uyasitsetselela, kuze sitewuhlala ngekukwesaba." 
Psalms130:5 Lusito lwaSimakadze, ngilubheke ngalabovu, umphefumulo wami uyawumlindzela. Ngiyaletsemba livi lakhe." 
Psalms130:6 Umphefumulo wami ubheke Simakadze ngemehlo labovu. Ngimlindzele kwengca bomantjingelane nabalindzele kudzabuka kwekusa, yebo, kwendlula bomantjingelane nabalindzele kudzabuka kwekusa." 
Psalms130:7 Israyeli, yetsembela kuSimakadze, ngobe umusa ukuSimakadze nekukhululwa sibili kukuye." 
Psalms130:8 Nguye lotawuhlenga baka-Israyeli abephule etonweni tabo tonkhe. 
Psalms131:1 Simakadze, inhlitiyo yami ayitigabatisi, nemehlo ami akaphakanyiswa ngumgcabho. Angitilibatisi ngetintfo letibonakala titinkhulu kimi nome letisimangaliso kakhulu kimi." 
Psalms131:2 Umphefumulo wami wenelisekile kuwe; njengemntfwana lolunyulwe kunina, unjalo umphefumulo wami kimi." 
Psalms131:3 Israyeli yetsembela kuSimakadze, kusukela manje kuze kube phakadze." 
Psalms132:1 Yebo, Simakadze, khumbula Davide, kanye nato tonkhe tinhlupheko takhe." 
Psalms132:2 Khumbula tifungo takhe kuSimakadze, netetsembiso latenta kuSomandla waJakobe nakatsi:" 
Psalms132:3 “Ngingeke ngingene endlini yami, nome ngicambalale nasembhedzeni wami," 
Psalms132:4 nemehlo ami ngingeke ngiwanike butfongo, netinkhophe tami kwetela," 
Psalms132:5 ngingakamtfoleli Simakadze indzawo, ngakhe likhaya laSomandla waJakobe.”" 
Psalms132:6 Seva ngelibhokisi lesivumelwane ngesikhatsi siseBhetlehema, salikhandza kulaseJeyarimu." 
Psalms132:7 Asambe siye lapho ahlala khona, siyewukhonta esenabelweni setinyawo takhe." 
Psalms132:8 Phakama, Simakadze, uye endzaweni yakho yekuphumula, wena nelibhokisi lesivumelwane sakho, lelingumfanekiso wemandla akho." 
Psalms132:9 Baphristi bakho abembatse kulunga, labangcwele bakho bahlabele ngekwetsaba." 
Psalms132:10 Ngenca yaDavide, inceku yakho, ungamfulatseli umgcotjwa wakho." 
Psalms132:11 Simakadze wafunga kuDavide, wenta sifungo langeke ajike kuso, watsi: “Lomunye wemadvodzana akho ngiyawumenta abe yinkhosi emvakwakho." 
Psalms132:12 Nangabe bantfwabakho bagcina sivumelwane sami netimiso tami lengiyawubafundzisa tona, nebantfwababo futsi bayawuhlala esihlalweni sakho sebukhosi, kuze kube phakadze.”" 
Psalms132:13 Ngobe Simakadze uyikhetsile iSiyoni, kutsi ibe likhaya lakhe, watsi:" 
Psalms132:14 “Lena yindzawo yami yekuphumula, ngiyawuhlala kuyo phakadze naphakadze; lena yindzawo lengifuna kuyibusa." 
Psalms132:15 Ngiyawuyibusisa ngako konkhe lekudzingako; ngesutsise timphuya tayo ngekudla. 
Psalms132:16 Baphristi bayo ngiyawubembatsisa ngensindziso, labangcwele bayo bahlabele ngekujabula." 
Psalms132:17 Ngiyawuvusa lomunye wetitukulwane taDavide, ngimente abe yinkhosi lenkhulu. Umgcotjwa wami ngimlungiselele sibane, kutsi bukhosi bakhe bukhanye njalo." 
Psalms132:18 Titsa takhe ngiyawutembesa ngelihlazo, kodvwa umbuso wakhe uyawuphumelela uchume.”" 
Psalms133:1 Maye, kuhle kumnandzi kuhlalisana kwebazalwane ngekuvana." 
Psalms133:2 Kuhle kufana nemakha, lanuka kamnandzi, nakatselwe enhloko, ageleta, adzimate ehlela esilevini, yebo, esilevini sa-Aroni atfontsela nasetiphikeni tetingubo takhe." 
Psalms133:3 Kufana nematolo eNtsaba iHemoni, nakehlela eNtsabeni iSiyoni. Kulapho-ke lapho Simakadze ehlisela khona tibusiso takhe, yebo, nekuphila, kuze kube phakadze." 
Psalms134:1 Dvumisani Simakadze, nine nonkhe tinceku taSimakadze, nine lenima nasebusuku endlini yaSimakadze." 
Psalms134:2 Phakamiselani tandla tenu endzaweni lengcwele, nibonge Simakadze." 
Psalms134:3 Shangatsi Simakadze anganibusisa aseSiyoni, yena lowadala lizulu nemhlaba." 
Psalms135:1 Haleluya, dvumisani Simakadze! Dvumisani libito laSimakadze! Mdvumiseni Simakadze, nine tinceku takhe," 
Psalms135:2 nine lenikhonta endlini yaSimakadze nasemabaleni endlu yaNkulunkulu wetfu. 
Psalms135:3 Dvumisani Simakadze, ngobe yena muhle. Hlabelani nidvumise libito lakhe, ngobe yena unelutsandvo." 
Psalms135:4 Ngobe Simakadze utikhetsele Jakobe kutsi abe wakhe, ukhetse Israyeli kutsi abe lifa lakhe." 
Psalms135:5 Ngiyati kutsi mkhulu Simakadze, nekutsi Simakadze wetfu ungetulu kunabo bonkhe bonkulunkulu." 
Psalms135:6 Konkhe Simakadze lakutsandzako uyakwenta emazulwini nasemhlabeni, etilwandle kanye nasekujuleni konkhe." 
Psalms135:7 Nguye lokhuphula tinkhungu emikhawulweni yemhlaba. Wenta imibane ilandzelwe yimvula. Ukhipha imimoya etingosini takhe. 
Psalms135:8 Nguye lowashaya ematubulo aseGibhithe, ebantfu kanye newetilwane." 
Psalms135:9 Watfumela tibonakaliso netimangaliso, emkhatsini wakho, wena Gibhithe, wamelana naFaro kanye netinceku takhe tonkhe." 
Psalms135:10 Washaya tive letinyenti, wabulala emakhosi lanemandla." 
Psalms135:11 Wabulala Sihoni, inkhosi yema-Amori. Wabulala Ogi, inkhosi yaseBhashani, kanye nawo onkhe emakhosi aseKhenani." 
Psalms135:12 Wenta live lawo laba lifa, walenta lifa laka-Israyeli, sive sakhe." 
Psalms135:13 Simakadze, libito lakho lime kuze kube phakadze. Nkhosi, titukulwane ngetitukulwane tiyawuhlala tikukhumbula." 
Psalms135:14 Simakadze uyawubavikela bantfu bakhe, ahawukele tinceku takhe." 
Psalms135:15 Tithico tebetive tiyigolide nesiliva, tingumsebenti wetandla temuntfu." 
Psalms135:16 Tinemilomo, kodvwa atikhulumi, tinemehlo, kodvwa atiboni," 
Psalms135:17 tinetindlebe, kodvwa ativa, atikwati ngisho nekuphefumula imbala." 
Psalms135:18 Labo labatentako bayawufanana nato, nabo bonkhe labetsembele kuto." 
Psalms135:19 Dvumisani Simakadze, nine mndeni waka-Israyeli! Dvumisani Simakadze, nani mndeni waka-Aroni!" 
Psalms135:20 Dvumisani Simakadze, nine mndeni wakaLevi, nani nonkhe, lenesaba Simakadze, mdvumiseni!" 
Psalms135:21 Akabongwe Simakadze eSiyoni, yena lohlala eJerusalema. Akabongwe Simakadze." 
Psalms136:1 Bongani Simakadze, ngobe muhle, ngobe umusa wakhe ume kuze kube phakadze." 
Psalms136:2 Bongani Nkulunkulu wabonkulunkulu, ngobe umusa wakhe ume kuze kube phakadze." 
Psalms136:3 Bongani iNkhosi yemakhosi, ngobe umusa wakhe ume kuze kube phakadze." 
Psalms136:4 Nguye yedvwa lowenta timangaliso letinkhulu, ngobe umusa wakhe ume kuze kube phakadze." 
Psalms136:5 Nguye lowenta emazulu ngekuhlakanipha kwakhe, ngobe umusa wakhe ume kuze kube phakadze." 
Psalms136:6 Nguye lowendlala umhlaba etikwemanti, ngobe umusa wakhe ume kuze kube phakadze." 
Psalms136:7 Wenta tibane letinkhulu, ngobe umusa wakhe ume kuze kube phakadze." 
Psalms136:8 Wenta kutsi lilanga libuse imini, ngobe umusa wakhe ume kuze kube phakadze," 
Psalms136:9 nekutsi inyanga netinkhanyeti kubuse busuku, ngobe umusa wakhe ume kuze kube phakadze." 
Psalms136:10 Nguye lowabhubhisa ematubulo aseGibhithe, ngobe umusa wakhe ume kuze kube phakadze." 
Psalms136:11 Wahola Israyeli wamkhipha emkhatsini wawo, ngobe umusa wakhe ume kuze kube phakadze;" 
Psalms136:12 ngesandla lesinemandla nengalo leyeluliwe, ngobe umusa wakhe ume kuze kube phakadze." 
Psalms136:13 Nguye lowehlukanisa kabili Lwandle Lolubovu, ngobe umusa wakhe ume kuze kube phakadze." 
Psalms136:14 Wewelisa ema-Israyeli ekhatsi nalo, ngobe umusa wakhe ume kuze kube phakadze." 
Psalms136:15 Wacitsa Faro nemphi yakhe ngalo, ngobe umusa wakhe ume kuze kube phakadze." 
Psalms136:16 Nguye lowahola sive sakhe ehlane, ngobe umusa wakhe ume kuze kube phakadze." 
Psalms136:17 Wabhubhisa emakhosi lamakhulu, ngobe umusa wakhe ume kuze kube phakadze." 
Psalms136:18 Wabulala nemakhosi lanemandla, ngobe umusa wakhe ume kuze kube phakadze." 
Psalms136:19 Wabulala Sihoni, inkhosi yema-Amori, ngobe umusa wakhe ume kuze kube phakadze." 
Psalms136:20 Wabulala na-Ogi, inkhosi yase-Bhashani, ngobe umusa wakhe ume kuze kube phakadze." 
Psalms136:21 Wephana ngelive labo laba lifa, ngobe umusa wakhe ume kuze kube phakadze," 
Psalms136:22 laba lifa la-Israyeli, inceku yakhe, ngobe umusa wakhe ume kuze kube phakadze." 
Psalms136:23 Nguye lowasikhumbula ekwehlulekeni kwetfu, ngobe umusa wakhe ume kuze kube phakadze." 
Psalms136:24 Wasikhulula etitseni tetfu, ngobe umusa wakhe ume kuze kube phakadze." 
Psalms136:25 Nguye lowondla bonkhe bantfu netilwane tonkhe, ngobe umusa wakhe ume kuze kube phakadze." 
Psalms136:26 Bongani Nkulunkulu welizulu, ngobe umusa wakhe ume kuze kube phakadze." 
Psalms137:1 Sahlala ngasemifuneli yaseBhabhulona, sakhala khona nasikhumbula iSiyoni." 
Psalms137:2 Saphanyeka emahabhu etfu, etulu eminyetaneni." 
Psalms137:3 Batfumbi betfu batsi asibahlabelele, nebagcilati betfu basiphukuta ngekutsi asihlabele tingoma tekujabula, batsi: “Ase nisihlabelele lenye yetingoma tenu taseSiyoni.”" 
Psalms137:4 Singatihlabela kanjani tingoma taSimakadze sikulelinye live? 
Psalms137:5 Nangingakhohlwa wena Jerusalema, sandla sami sekudla singamane sishwaphane." 
Psalms137:6 Shangatsi nelulwimi lwami lunganamatsela elwangeni lwami, nangingakhohlwa wena, ngingayenti iJerusalema ibe kujabula kwami lokukhulu." 
Psalms137:7 Khumbula, Simakadze, lokwentiwa ngema-Edomu mzukwana kutfunjwa iJerusalema. Khumbula kutsi bakusho kanjani kutsi: “Yibhidliteni! Yibhidliteni iphele nya!”" 
Psalms137:8 Wena Bhabhulona, uyawubhidlitwa. Ubusisiwe umuntfu loyawubuyisela kuwe tento takho lowake watenta kitsi," 
Psalms137:9 loyawubamba tinswane takho atisacate emadvwaleni. 
Psalms138:1 Ngiyakubonga, wena Simakadze, ngayo yonkhe inhlitiyo yami; ngikunika ludvumo embikwabo bonkhe bonkulunkulu." 
Psalms138:2 Ngiyawukhuleka embikwelithempeli lakho lelingcwele, ngibonge libito lakho ngenca yemusa wakho nekwetsembeka kwakho. Ngobe libito lakho nelivi lakho uliphakamisele ngetulu kwako konkhe." 
Psalms138:3 Ngatsi nangikhala kuwe, wangiva wangiphendvula, wanginika sibindzi ngekungicinisa." 
Psalms138:4 Onkhe emakhosi emhlaba ayawukubonga wena, Simakadze, ngobe awevile emavi akho." 
Psalms138:5 Ayawuhlabelela wena, Simakadze, ngobe bukhulu bukhosi baSimakadze." 
Psalms138:6 Nome Simakadze aphakeme kangaka, uyabanakekela labatitfobako; kodvwa labatiphakamisako ubabukela khashane." 
Psalms138:7 Nome sengitungeletwe tinhlupheko, wena, Simakadze, uyayiphephisa imphilo yami, ungivikele elulakeni lwetitsa tami, unginyomule ngesandla sakho sekudla." 
Psalms138:8 Simakadze uyawusifeza kimi setsembiso sakhe; umusa waSimakadze ume kuze kube phakadze. Cedzela lomsebenti wakho lowawusungula, ungawukhohlwa umsebenti wetandla takho." 
Psalms139:1 Simakadze ungihlolisisile, uyangati." 
Psalms139:2 Uyakwati kuhlala kwami nekuvuka kwami, imicabango yami uyati ingakaveli." 
Psalms139:3 Uhlolisisa kuhamba kwami nekulala kwami, uyatati tonkhe tindlela tami." 
Psalms139:4 Livi litsi liselulwimini lwami, wena, Simakadze, ube sewulati ngalokuphelele." 
Psalms139:5 Ungitungeletile ngemuva nangembili, wangivikela ngesandla sakho." 
Psalms139:6 Indlela longati ngayo iyangimangalisa, iphakeme, ngingeke ngifinyelele kuyo." 
Psalms139:7 Ngingayaphi ngisuke kuMoya wakho? Ngingashona kuphi ngibaleke ebusweni bakho? 
Psalms139:8 Nangikhuphukela emazulwini, wena ulapho, nangendlala licansi lami endzaweni yalabafile, wena ulapho." 
Psalms139:9 Nangingandiza ngetimphiko tentsatsakusa, ngiye ngihlale emikhawulweni yelwandle," 
Psalms139:10 nakhona lapho sandla sakho besiyawungihola, sekudla sakho singibambe singicinise." 
Psalms139:11 Nome bengingatsi: “Bumnyama abungisibekele, kukhanya kugucuke kube busuku lobungitungeletile,”" 
Psalms139:12 bumnyama bebungeke bube mnyama kuwe, busuku bebuyawukhanya njengemini, ngobe bumnyama bufanana nekukhanya kuwe." 
Psalms139:13 Ngobe nguwe lowadala imibilini yami, wangeluka esiswini samake." 
Psalms139:14 Ngiyakudvumisa ngobe ngentiwe ngendlela leyesabekako nalemangalisako. Imisebenti yakho iyamangalisa, loko ngikwati kahle kamhlophe." 
Psalms139:15 Ematsambo ami abengakafihlakali kuwe, ngesikhatsi ngibunjwa ekusitsekeni ngelukwa esiswini samake." 
Psalms139:16 Wangibona ngiselihlwili. Onkhe emalanga ami abhalwa encwadzini yakho, ajutjwa, lisengakefiki nalinye lawo." 
Psalms139:17 Imicabango yakho ijulile, Nkulunkulu! Maye, bukhulu bunyenti bayo!" 
Psalms139:18 Nangingayibala, ingaba minyenti kwendlula tinhlavu tesihlabatsi. Nangivuka, wena usenami." 
Psalms139:19 Shangatsi wena, Nkulunkulu, ungababhubhisa lababi. Ngako-ke sukani kimi, nine bantfu bengati." 
Psalms139:20 Bayakuhlambalata, laba labatitsa takho bakhuluma kabi ngelibito lakho." 
Psalms139:21 Simakadze, angibatondzi yini labo labatondza wena? Anginengwa yini ngulabo labakuvukelako?" 
Psalms139:22 Ngibazonda ngenzondo lephelele. Ngibatsatsa njengetitsa tami. 
Psalms139:23 Ngihlolisise, Nkulunkulu, wati inhlitiyo yami! Ngilinge, wati imicabango yami," 
Psalms139:24 ubone kutsi kute yini lokubi ekuhambeni kwami, bese ungiholela endleleni yaphakadze." 
Psalms140:1 Simakadze, ngisindzise kubantfu lababi, ngephule kubantfu labatidlova," 
Psalms140:2 bantfu labahlose lokubi etinhlitiyweni tabo. Onkhe emalanga bacubungula emasu etimphi. 
Psalms140:3 Balola tilimi tabo tibe njengetetinyoka. Sihlungu sato sisemilonyeni yabo. Cabanga. 
Psalms140:4 Simakadze, ngeluse ungivikele emandleni alababi; ngephule kubantfu labatidlova, labahlose kungigila ngiwe." 
Psalms140:5 Bantfu labatigabatisako bangibekele lugibe, bangicuphe ngetintsambo telugibe, bangibophele emafindvo endleleni yami. Cabanga." 
Psalms140:6 Ngatsi kuwe, Simakadze: “Wena unguNkulunkulu wami.” Nkhosi, ngive nangikhalela lusito kuwe." 
Psalms140:7 Awu, Simakadze, Nkulunkulu wami, Msindzisi wami lonemandla, wena uvikela inhloko yami ngesikhatsi semphi." 
Psalms140:8 Simakadze, tifiso talababi ungatiphumelelisi, ungawaphumelelisi emasu abo lamabi, funa batigabatise. Cabanga." 
Psalms140:9 Labo labangitungeletile labatigcabhako bubi labasongela kubenta kimi abehlele kubo. 
Psalms140:10 Shangatsi emalahle labovu lavutsako angatfululelwa etikwabo, bajikijelwe emgodzini loshonako, bangaphindzi baphume." 
Psalms140:11 Shangatsi labo labacambela labanye emanga, bangete baphumelela. Shangatsi bubi bungahlasela tidlova." 
Psalms140:12 Ngiyati kutsi Simakadze uyayimelela indzaba yalohluphekile, awamelele nemalungelo alomphofu." 
Psalms140:13 Impela labalungile bayawubonga libito lakho, labacotfo bayawuhlala ebukhoneni bakho." 
Psalms141:1 Ngikhala kuwe, Simakadze; vani livi lami, nangikhala kuwe." 
Psalms141:2 Shangatsi umthandazo wami ungaba njengemphepho kuwe; nekuphakamisa kwami tandla akube kuwe njengemihlatjelo yakusihlwa. 
Psalms141:3 Simakadze, beka umlindzi emlonyeni wami; ungeluse, ngingakhulumi lutfo ngemawala." 
Psalms141:4 Ngente ngingakutsandzi kwenta lokubi, ngingahlanganyeli nalababi emisebentini yabo lemibi, ngingahlanganyeli nasemadzilini abo." 
Psalms141:5 Ngingamane ngijeziswe ngumuntfu lolungile, loko kungumusa kimi; angamane angitsetsise, loko kungemafutsa enhloko yami, kodvwa umkhuleko wami uphambene netento letimbi talababi." 
Psalms141:6 Mhlazana babusi babo bayawujikijelwa phansi emaweni, ngumzukwana bayawufundza kutsi emavi ami aliciniso." 
Psalms141:7 Njengetinkhuni tijutjwa tiba ticucu, ngalokufananako ematsambo abo ayawusakateka ngasekungeneni kwelithuna." 
Psalms141:8 Awu, Simakadze, Somandla, emehlo ami anamatsele kuwe ngiphephela kuwe, ungangiyekeleli ekufeni." 
Psalms141:9 Ngihlenge elugibeni labangibekele lona, ungigcine kubosochaka balababi." 
Psalms141:10 Lababi ababanjwe tingibe tabo, kodvwa mine ngendlule ngiphephile." 
Psalms142:1 Ngikhala kuSimakadze ngelivi lami. Ngincenga Simakadze ngelivi lami. 
Psalms142:2 Ngititfululela kuye tonkhe tikhalo tami, ngimtjele tonkhe tinhlupheko tami." 
Psalms142:3 Umoya wami nase uphelelwa ngemandla, wena ucaphela tinyatselo tami. Endleleni lapho ngitawuhamba khona bangifihlele lugibe." 
Psalms142:4 Nangicalata eceleni kwami, ngikhandza kutsi kute namunye longangisita, kute longivikelako, kute nalonginakile." 
Psalms142:5 Ngikhala kuwe, Simakadze, ngitsi: “Wena usiphephelo sami, nesabelo sami ngisaphila.”" 
Psalms142:6 Vani kukhala kwami, ngobe ngicindzeteleke kakhulu. Ngephule kulabo labangitingelako, ngobe banemandla kunami." 
Psalms142:7 Ngikhulule kulelijele lengikulo, kuze ngitewubonga libito lakho. Labalungile bayawungihaca, ngobe wena uyawungiphatsa kahle." 
Psalms143:1 Simakadze, vani umkhuleko wami ubeke indlebe yakho ekuncengeni kwami, ungiphendvule njengekwetsembeka kwakho nangekulunga kwakho." 
Psalms143:2 Ungangibeki licala mine, nceku yakho, ngobe kute umuntfu lomsulwa kuwe." 
Psalms143:3 Sitsa siyangitingela, singicindzetela phansi emhlabatsini singivimbetela ebumnyameni njengalabakadze bafa." 
Psalms143:4 Ngako-ke umoya wami udzangele, nenhlitiyo yami iyatfutfumela." 
Psalms143:5 Ngikhumbula emalanga asendvulo. Ngizindla ngemisebenti yakho yonkhe, ngicabange ngato tonkhe tento takho." 
Psalms143:6 Tandla tami ngitiphakamisela kuwe, umphefumulo wami womela wena njengemhlabatsi lowomele imvula. Cabanga." 
Psalms143:7 Sheshisa, Simakadze, ungiphendvule; umoya wami ushona phansi. Ungangifihleli buso bakho, funa ngibe njengalabashona emgodzini." 
Psalms143:8 Ngivise umusa wakho ekuseni nakudzabuka kusa, ngobe litsemba lami lonkhe likuwe. Ngifundzise indlela lekufanele ngihambe ngayo, ngobe umphefumulo wami ngiwuphakamisela kuwe." 
Psalms143:9 Ngikhulule etitseni tami, Simakadze, sengibalekele kuwe ngabhaca." 
Psalms143:10 Ngifundzise kwenta intsandvo yakho, ngobe wena unguNkulunkulu wami. Moya wakho lomuhle akangiholele endleleni lebekile." 
Psalms143:11 Ngenca yelibito lakho, Simakadze, ngigcinele imphilo yami; ngekulunga kwakho ngephule etinhluphekweni." 
Psalms143:12 Bhubhisa tonkhe titsa tami ngekwemusa wakho, ubacedze bonkhe labemelene nami, ngobe mine ngiyinceku yakho." 
Psalms144:1 Akabongwe Simakadze lolidvwala lami, lowente tandla tami tafundzela kuhlasela neminwe yami yafundzela kulwa." 
Psalms144:2 UnguNkulunkulu wami lowetsembekile nenqaba yami lengibalekela kuyo, usiphephelo sami nemkhululi wami, usihlangu sami lengiphephela kuso. Wenta tive tikhotsame kimi." 
Psalms144:3 Awu, Simakadze, uyini umuntfu kutsi ungadzimate umnake? Indvodzana yemuntfu bekuyini kutsi ungadzimate uyikhumbule?" 
Psalms144:4 Umuntfu ufanana nemoya nje; emalanga ekuphila kwakhe afanana nesitfunti lesendlulako. 
Psalms144:5 Khotsamisa emazulu akho, Simakadze, wehle; tsintsa tintsaba tibhunye." 
Psalms144:6 Bashaye ngelitulu ubadvungulule bacibe ngemicibisholo yakho, baphitsitele." 
Psalms144:7 Yelula sandla sakho wena Longetulu, ngikhulule, ungenyule etikhukhuleni temanti lanemandla, ungenyule nasesandleni sebetive," 
Psalms144:8 labamlomo wabo ukhuluma inkhohliso, bafunga bagomele ngesandla sabo sangesekudla bafungele bufakazi lobungemanga." 
Psalms144:9 Ngiyawuhlabela kuwe, Nkulunkulu, ngihlabele ingoma lensha, ngishaye ihabhu lenetintsambo letilishumi." 
Psalms144:10 Nguwe lonika emakhosi kuncoba, uphephise inceku yakho lenguDavide." 
Psalms144:11 Ngisindzise enkembeni lenelunya, ungiphephise esandleni sebafokati labamlomo wabo ukhuluma inkhohliso, nesandla sabo sekudla singesekudla semanga." 
Psalms144:12 Shangatsi emadvodzana etfu angaba njengetitfombo letinhle ebusheni bawo, nemadvodzakati etfu afanane nematje labatiwe, alungiselelwa kwakha tigodlo temakhosi." 
Psalms144:13 Shangatsi tinyango tetfu tingagcwaliswa ngesivuno sekudla lokunhlobonhlobo. Kanjalo netifuyo tetfu shangatsi tingandza, titalane ngetinkhulungwane nangemashumi etinkhulungwane." 
Psalms144:14 Shangatsi tinkhomo tetfu tingawatsela emankhonyane, kubete letiphuntako naletilatelwako, shangatsi kungabate kukhala nekuhlupheka eveni letfu." 
Psalms144:15 Sibusisiwe sive lesinaletibusiso! Sibusisiwe leso sive Nkulunkulu waso lekunguSimakadze! 
Psalms145:1 Ngiyawuphakamisa wena, Nkulunkulu wami neNkhosi yami, ngituse libito lakho phakadze naphakadze." 
Psalms145:2 Ngiyawukubabata onkhe emalanga, ngidvumise libito lakho phakadze naphakadze." 
Psalms145:3 Mkhulu Simakadze, ufanele kudvunyiswa kakhulu, bukhulu bakhe abuphenyisiseki." 
Psalms145:4 Titukulwane ngekwelamana kwato tiyawubikelana ngemisebenti yakho; tiyawumemetela ngemisebenti yakho yemandla. 
Psalms145:5 Tiyawukhuluma ngenkhatimulo yakho, tikhulume ngebukhosi bakho; mine ngiyawuzindla ngemisebenti yakho lemangalisako." 
Psalms145:6 Bantfu bayawubabata bukhulu bemandla akho, nami ngibabate bukhulu bakho." 
Psalms145:7 Bayawubalisa ngeludvumo lwakho, nangebukhulu betento takho letinhle, bahlabele ngekulunga kwakho." 
Psalms145:8 Simakadze unemusa nesihawu, uyephuta kutfukutsela, andze ngemusa." 
Psalms145:9 Simakadze muhle kubo bonkhe, uyayihawukela imisebenti yakhe yonkhe." 
Psalms145:10 Yonkhe indalo netidalwa takho tiyawubonga tidvumise wena, Simakadze, nalabangcwele bonkhe bakudvumise." 
Psalms145:11 Bayawudvumisa ngenkhatimulo yebukhosi bakho, bashumayele ngemandla akho;" 
Psalms145:12 kuze bonkhe bantfu emhlabeni bayati imisebenti yakho yemandla, kanye nenkhatimulo yebukhosi bembuso wakho." 
Psalms145:13 Umbuso wakho ungumbuso lome kuze kube phakadze, lombuso uyawuhlala ukhona, titukulwane ngetitukulwane. Simakadze wetsembekile kuto tonkhe tetsembiso takhe. Unemusa kuyo yonkhe imisebenti yakhe." 
Psalms145:14 Simakadze uyabaphasa bonkhe labawako, abaphakamise bonkhe labatfotjisiwe." 
Psalms145:15 Emehlo endalo yonkhe abheke kuwe, uyipha kudla ngesikhatsi lesifanele." 
Psalms145:16 Uvula sandla sakho, wesutsise tonkhe tifiso talokuphilako." 
Psalms145:17 Simakadze ulungile kuto tonkhe tindlela takhe, unemusa emisebentini yakhe yonkhe." 
Psalms145:18 Simakadze usedvute nabo bonkhe labambitako, bonkhe labambita ngeliciniso." 
Psalms145:19 Wesutsisa kufisa kwabo bonkhe labamesabako, uyabeva nabakhalako, abasindzise." 
Psalms145:20 Simakadze uyabalondvolota bonkhe labamtsandzako, kepha lababi bonkhe uyawubabhubhisa." 
Psalms145:21 Umlomo wami uyawukhuluma ludvumo lwakho, Simakadze, tonkhe tidalwa atibonge libito lakho lelingcwele kuze kube phakadze naphakadze." 
Psalms146:1 Mphefumulo wami, dvumisa Simakadze." 
Psalms146:2 Simakadze ngiyawumdvumisa ngisaphila, ngihlabele kuNkulunkulu wami yonkhe imphilo yami." 
Psalms146:3 Ningetsembeli etikhulwini nakubantfu, kute kubantfu lusito." 
Psalms146:4 Nakuphuma umphefumulo, umuntfu ubuyela emhlabatsini, tinhloso netifiso takhe tiphele ngalelo langa." 
Psalms146:5 Ubusisiwe umuntfu lomsiti wakhe kunguNkulunkulu waJakobe, lolitsemba lakhe likuSimakadze, Nkulunkulu wakhe." 
Psalms146:6 Yena unguMdali wako konkhe: Wadala lizulu, nemhlaba, nelwandle, nako konkhe lokukuko. Ugcina setsembiso sakhe kuze kube phakadze." 
Psalms146:7 Labacindzetelwe yena uyabemelela, abaphe kudla labalambile. Simakadze ukhulula tiboshwa," 
Psalms146:8 Simakadze uvula emehlo etimphumphutse, Simakadze uyabaphakamisa labatfotjisiwe, Simakadze uyabatsandza labalungile." 
Psalms146:9 Simakadze uyabalondvolota bafokati, uyabaphasa bafelokati netintsandzane, kodvwa indlela yalababi uyayibhubhisa." 
Psalms146:10 Simakadze uyawubusa kuze kube phakadze. Nkulunkulu wakho, Siyoni, ubusa kuto tonkhe titukulwane. Haleluya, dvumisani Simakadze." 
Psalms147:1 Haleluya, dvumisani Simakadze! Maye, kuhle kuhlabela kuNkulunkulu wetfu. Kumnandzi, futsi kufanele kutsi advunyiswe!" 
Psalms147:2 Simakadze wakha iJerusalema kabusha, ubutsa labasakatekile baka-Israyeli." 
Psalms147:3 Labanetinhlitiyo letephukile uyabaphilisa, abophe emanceba abo." 
Psalms147:4 Ubala inombolo yetinkhanyeti, atibite tonkhe ngemabito ato." 
Psalms147:5 Mkhulu Simakadze wetfu, nemandla akhe makhulu, kuhlakanipha kwakhe akunakulinganiswa." 
Psalms147:6 Simakadze uyabaphakamisa labatfobekile, kepha lababi ubehlisela phansi." 
Psalms147:7 Hlabelani kuSimakadze ngekubonga; dvumisani Nkulunkulu wetfu ngekushaya ihabhu. 
Psalms147:8 Yena losibekela sibhakabhaka ngemafu, alungisele umhlaba imvula, ahlumise tjani etintsabeni." 
Psalms147:9 Tilwane utipha kudla, afunte emazini emahhwabayi nasalambile." 
Psalms147:10 Simakadze akatfokotiswa ngemandla emahhashi emphi; nemasotja lahlomile lahamba ngetinyawo angeke amjabulise. 
Psalms147:11 Simakadze ujatjuliswa ngulabamesabako nalabetsemba umusa wakhe. 
Psalms147:12 Awu, Jerusalema, dvumisa Simakadze! Awu, Siyoni, dvumisa Nkulunkulu wakho!" 
Psalms147:13 Ngobe nguye locinisa imivalo yemasango akho, abusise bantfu bakho," 
Psalms147:14 ente iminyele yakho ibe nekuthula, anesutsise ngakolweni lomnandzi." 
Psalms147:15 Ukhipha umyalo wakhe uye emhlabeni, livi lakhe ligijima ngalamakhulu ematubane." 
Psalms147:16 Ukhitsikisa lichwa njengeboya betimvu, asakate sitfwatfwa njengemlotsa," 
Psalms147:17 ehlise sangcotfo sakhe njengetinhlavu. Ngubani nje longemelana nemakhata akhe? 
Psalms147:18 Utfumela livi lakhe likuncibilikise, avuse umoya wakhe, emanti agobhote." 
Psalms147:19 Wembula livi lakhe kuJakobe, timiso nemiyalo yakhe ku-Israyeli." 
Psalms147:20 Kute sive lake wenta njalo kuso, kute sive lesake sati timiso takhe. Haleluya, dvumisani Simakadze." 
Psalms148:1 Dvumisani Simakadze nine mazulu laphakeme, nidvumise Simakadze nani lenisezulwini." 
Psalms148:2 Mdvumiseni nine tingilosi takhe, nimdvumise nani nonkhe mabutfo akhe." 
Psalms148:3 Mdvumise wena langa, nawe nyanga, nimdvumise nani nonkhe tinkhanyeti letikhatimulako!" 
Psalms148:4 Mdvumiseni nine mazulu laphakeme, nani manti langetulu kwesibhakabhaka." 
Psalms148:5 Konkhe akudvumise libito laSimakadze, ngobe wakhuluma kwadaleka." 
Psalms148:6 Wakumisa etindzaweni tako phakadze naphakadze, wakushayela umtsetfo longenakweciwa." 
Psalms148:7 Dvumisani Simakadze nine lenisemhlabeni, nani tilwane letesabekako taselwandle, nawe kujula kwelwandle," 
Psalms148:8 nawe mlilo nesangcotfo, nelichwa, netinkhungu, nemoya lonemandla lolalela imiyalo yakhe." 
Psalms148:9 Mdvumiseni nine magcuma netintsaba tonkhe, nimdvumise nani tihlahla tetitselo, nani nonkhe mahlatsi," 
Psalms148:10 nine tilwane tesiganga netekufuywa, nani lenihamba ngesisu, netinyoni letindizako." 
Psalms148:11 Mdvumiseni nine makhosi netive tonkhe, nimdvumise nani tikhulu nebabusi bonkhe bemhlaba," 
Psalms148:12 nani majaha netintfombi, nani labadzala nalabancane." 
Psalms148:13 Bonkhe abadvumise libito laSimakadze, ngobe lakhe kuphela libito leliphakeme; inkhatimulo yakhe ingetulu kwemhlaba nelizulu." 
Psalms148:14 Sive sakhe usivusele insindziso, kuze kudvunyiswe bonkhe labangcwele bakhe, lekusive saka-Israyeli, lesisedvute naye. Haleluya, dvumisani Simakadze!" 
Psalms149:1 Simakadze mhlabeleleni ingoma lensha, nimdvumise ebandleni lalabangcwele." 
Psalms149:2 Israyeli akajabule ngenca yeMdali wakhe, bantfu beSiyoni batfokote ngeNkhosi yabo." 
Psalms149:3 Abadvumise ngekugidza nangesigubhu nangehabhu. 
Psalms149:4 Simakadze uyasijabulela sive sakhe, labatitfobako ubapha umchele wekuncoba." 
Psalms149:5 Labangcwele abahlabele ngebukhosi, bahlabele ngenjabulo bonkhe busuku." 
Psalms149:6 Shangatsi emaphimbo abo angadvumisa Nkulunkulu, netandla tabo tihlome inkemba lekhalipha tinhlangotsi totimbili." 
Psalms149:7 Khona batewuphindzisela kubetive, bajezise nebahedeni," 
Psalms149:8 babophe nemakhosi abo ngemaketane, netikhulu tabo batibophe ngabozankosi," 
Psalms149:9 batewufeza sijeziso sabo njengobe kubhaliwe. Loku kuludvumo lwalabangcwele bakhe bonkhe. Haleluya, dvumisani Simakadze!" 
Psalms150:1 Haleluya, dvumisani Simakadze! Dvumisani Nkulunkulu, endlini yakhe lengcwele! Mdvumiseni emazulwini akhe lanemandla." 
Psalms150:2 Mdvumiseni ngemisebenti yakhe yemandla, nimdvumise ngebukhulu bakhe lobumangalisako." 
Psalms150:3 Mdvumiseni ngekushaya licilongo, nimdvumise ngehabhu nangelugitali." 
Psalms150:4 Mdvumiseni ngetingubhu nangekugidza, nimdvumise ngetintsambo nangefluthi." 
Psalms150:5 Mdvumiseni ngekukhencetisa bokhencekhence, yebo nimdvumise ngekukhencetisa bokhencekhence." 
Psalms150:6 Konkhe lokuphilako akudvumise Simakadze. Haleluya, dvumisani Simakadze!" 
Proverbs1:1 Taga taSolomoni, umsa waDavide, inkhosi yema-Israyeli." 
Proverbs1:2 Letaga tenta umuntfu akwati kuhlakanipha nekwekhuteka, acondzisise inchazelo yemavi lajulile." 
Proverbs1:3 Tifundzisana kuphila ngebucotfo bengcondvo, nekwenta kulunga, nekungakhetsi." 
Proverbs1:4 Tenta losengakaliboni live abe nekuhlakanipha, tifundzise labasha kuba nelwati nekuzitsa." 
Proverbs1:5 Labahlakaniphile batsi bangatilalela kwengeteke lwati lwabo; nalabanengcondvo batsi bangatifundza batente, batfole bungcweti," 
Proverbs1:6 khona batekuvisisa kahle letaga, nemifanekiso, nenchazelo yaletimphicabadzala." 
Proverbs1:7 Kwesaba Simakadze kusicalo selwati, tilima tiyakwedzelela kuhlakanipha nemiyalo." 
Proverbs1:8 Ndvodzana yami, lalela umyalo weyihlo, ungayali imfundziso yenyoko," 
Proverbs1:9 ngobe iyakuba ngumhlobiso lonjengemchele wenhloko yakho, nanjengeligcebesha lentsamo yakho." 
Proverbs1:10 Ndvodzana yami, nangabe toni tikuyenga, ungacali uvume," 
Proverbs1:11 natitsi kuwe: “Kota, sambe sifune lesingahle simbulale; asihambe silalele labangenacala, sibajabhalate ngaphandle kwesono." 
Proverbs1:12 Asibagwinye baphila baye endzaweni yalabafile, njengalabo labangena baye phansi ethuneni." 
Proverbs1:13 Sitawutfola tonkhe tintfo letiligugu, sigcwalise tindlu tetfu ngetimphahla lesitichwagile." 
Proverbs1:14 Kota, utihlanganise natsi; khona sitewuba nesikhwama sinye nawe.”" 
Proverbs1:15 Ndvodzana yami, ungahambisani nebantfu labanje; ungalubeki lunyawo lwakho etindleleni tabo," 
Proverbs1:16 ngobe tinyawo tabo tigijimela lokubi, basheshe bacitse ingati." 
Proverbs1:17 Akusiti lutfo kuvula sochaka, kantsi lenyoni lofuna kuyibamba iyakubuka." 
Proverbs1:18 Kodvwa bantfu labanjalo batetsiyela sifu sekutibulala bona; babhacele kutisontsa bona, batibulale." 
Proverbs1:19 Tinjalo tindlela talabo labatfola ingcebo ngebugelekece; timphilo tabo titsatfwa bugelekece babo. 
Proverbs1:20 Kuhlakanipha kumemeta etitaladini; kumemeta kakhulu nasetimakethe. 
Proverbs1:21 Kumemeta kakhulu nasemahlanganweni emigwaco; kukhulume nasemasangweni emadolobha kutsi: 
Proverbs1:22 “Nine leningati lutfo! Niyawuhlala ningati lutfo kuze kube ngunini? Baphukuti bayawuphukuta kuze kube ngunini? Tona tilima titawutondzana nelwati kuze kube ngunini? 
Proverbs1:23 Ase nilalele kunitsetsisa kwami; imicabango yami ngitayitfululela kini, nginitjele lokusenhlitiyweni yami." 
Proverbs1:24 Njengobe nginimemetile nala kulalela, ngelula sandla sami nala kusibamba," 
Proverbs1:25 nangete nasitsatsa seluleko sami, nala nekutsi nginekhute," 
Proverbs1:26 nami-ke ngitanihleka nase nehlelwe tinhlupheko. Ngitanicoloshela nase nehlelwe sigemegeme," 
Proverbs1:27 nase nifikelwe kutfutfumela lokunjengesiphepho, nesigemegeme lesinjengesihhushuhhushu, nekudzangala kanye nekudzabuka." 
Proverbs1:28 “Bayawube sebayangibita, kodvwa ngingeke ngisabele; batangifunisisa, kodvwa bangeke bangitfole." 
Proverbs1:29 Ngobe batondza lwati, abazange bakhetse kwesaba Simakadze." 
Proverbs1:30 Abazange basitsatse seluleko sami, nekubacondzisa kwami bakwedzelela." 
Proverbs1:31 Ngako-ke batawutfola titselo tetindlela tabo, bacunjiswe ngemacebo abo." 
Proverbs1:32 Labate lwati babulawa kweduka kwabo; tilima tibulawa kweneliseka kwato. 
Proverbs1:33 Kodvwa lowo lolalela mine utawuhlala aphephile, akhululeke, angesabi lutfo lolubi.”" 
Proverbs2:1 Ndvodzana yami, yemukela loku lengikufundzisa kona, uyigcine imiyalo yami." 
Proverbs2:2 Lalela ubambisise kuhlakanipha; inhlitiyo yakho ibe nekucondza. 
Proverbs2:3 Yebo cela lwati, ucele nekucondza;" 
Proverbs2:4 kufunisise njengesiliva, ukumbe njengemcebo lofihliwe." 
Proverbs2:5 Nangabe ukwenta konkhe loko, utawucondzisisa kutsi kuyini kwesaba Simakadze, utfole nekutsi kuyini kwati Nkulunkulu." 
Proverbs2:6 NguSimakadze lowephana ngekuhlakanipha; emlonyeni wakhe kuphuma lwati nekucondza. 
Proverbs2:7 Labacotfo ubabekele kuhlakanipha; ulihawu kulabo labatiphatsa ngekwetsembeka. 
Proverbs2:8 Ugadza tindlela talabo labaphatsa labanye ngekungakhetsi, alindze indlela yalabangcwele bakhe." 
Proverbs2:9 Ngako, wena utakucondza kulunga, nebumsulwa, nebucotfo, ukwati nalokufanele." 
Proverbs2:10 Kuhlakanipha kutawungena enhlitiyweni yakho, nelwati lube yinjabulo emphefumulweni wakho." 
Proverbs2:11 Kucophelela kutakugadza, nekucondzisisa kutakwelusa," 
Proverbs2:12 kukuphephise endleleni yebubi nakubantfu bemanga," 
Proverbs2:13 labalahla tindlela tekulunga bahambe etindleleni tebumnyama," 
Proverbs2:14 labajabula ngekwenta lokubi, bajatjuliswe kwandza kwemacebo," 
Proverbs2:15 labatindlela tabo tigwegwile, nalabahamba ngetindlela tekweduka." 
Proverbs2:16 Kucophelela nekucondzisisa kutakusindzisa kulomsikati loyingwadla, umfati walenye indvodza, lonelulwimi lolushelelako," 
Proverbs2:17 lowala lowo lashade naye ebusheni bakhe, wakhohlwa sivumelwane sakhe kuNkulunkulu wakhe." 
Proverbs2:18 Indlu yakhe ibishela ekufeni, netindlela takhe tigcina endzaweni yalabafile." 
Proverbs2:19 Kuye akuyi lolubuyako; lowo loke wangena kuye akaphindzi futsi abuyele etindleleni tekuphila. 
Proverbs2:20 Ngako kufanele utsatse sibonelo kubantfu labalungile; uhambe etindleleni tekulunga. 
Proverbs2:21 Bantfu labacotfo labatawukwakha kulelive; ngulabetsembekile bodvwa labayawuhlala kulo. 
Proverbs2:22 Kodvwa lababi bayawususwa eveni, nalabanemacebo bayawusishulwa kulo."
