Proverbs3:1 Ndvodzana yami, ungayikhohlwa imfundziso yami, kodvwa inhlitiyo yakho ayigcine imiyalo yami," 
Proverbs3:2 ngobe ngiyo letakunika emalanga neminyaka leminyenti ekuphileni kwakho; ikunike nekuchuma. 
Proverbs3:3 Ungehlukani nenhlonipho nekwetsembeka; kukhungele entsanyeni yakho, ukubhale etibhelekeceni tenhlitiyo yakho." 
Proverbs3:4 Loko kuyawukwenta ube neludvumo loluhle utsandvwe nguNkulunkulu nebantfu. 
Proverbs3:5 Tsemba Simakadze ngayo yonkhe inhlitiyo yakho, ungeyami ekwatini kwakho." 
Proverbs3:6 Matise kuko konkhe lokwentako, yena uyakucondzisa tindlela takho." 
Proverbs3:7 Ungatenti sihlakaniphi, yesaba Simakadze, ukuyekele lokubi." 
Proverbs3:8 Ngiko loko lokuyakwelapha umtimba wakho, kuphilise nematsambo akho." 
Proverbs3:9 Dvumisa Simakadze ngalokuhle lonako nangetitselo tekucala tako konkhe lokulimile," 
Proverbs3:10 netincolobane takho tiyakugcwaliswa ngenala, imiphandza yakho iphuphume liwayini." 
Proverbs3:11 Ndvodzana yami, ungakwedzeleli kucondziswa nguSimakadze, ungadzinwa kutsetsiswa nguye." 
Proverbs3:12 Ngobe Simakadze uyamtsetsisa amcondzise lowo lamtsandzako, njengobe neyise enta endvodzaneni yakhe lajabula ngayo." 
Proverbs3:13 Ubusisiwe umuntfu lotfola kuhlakanipha nalowo lowemukela kucondza. 
Proverbs3:14 Ngobe kuhlakanipha kwendlula isiliva ngekucebisa umuntfu, nenzuzo yako yinkhulu kuneyegolide." 
Proverbs3:15 Kuhlakanipha kuligugu kakhulu, kwengca ematje laligugu; kute lokufisako longakulinganisa nako." 
Proverbs3:16 Imphilo lendze isesandleni sako sekudla, kantsi esandleni sako sesancele kunengcebo neludvumo." 
Proverbs3:17 Tindlela tako kutindlela tekujabula, netindlela tako tonkhe ngetekuthula." 
Proverbs3:18 Kusihlahla sekuphila kulabakuphutfumako; labo labakubamba bakunkonkoshele ngulabo labajabulako. 
Proverbs3:19 Simakadze wasekela umhlaba ngekuhlakanipha, wamisa emazulu endzaweni yawo ngekucondza." 
Proverbs3:20 Ngelwati lwakhe wehlukanisa emanti langaphansi kwemhlaba, nangelwati lwakhe emafu ehlisa imvula." 
Proverbs3:21 Ndvodzana yami, bambelela ekuhlakanipheni nasekuzitseni; ungakuvumeli kusuke kuwe." 
Proverbs3:22 Kuyawuba kuphila emphefumulweni wakho, kube ngumhlobiso entsanyeni yakho." 
Proverbs3:23 Endleleni yakho uyakuhamba ngekuphepha, nelunyawo lwakho lungakhubeki." 
Proverbs3:24 Nawucambalala phansi, ungeke wesabe; nawulala, uyawutfola butfongo lobumnandzi." 
Proverbs3:25 Ungesabi kutunywa yinhlekelele yengoti nekuhlaselwa bantfu lababi; 
Proverbs3:26 ngobe Simakadze uyawuba siphephelo sakho; uyawulondvolota lunyawo lwakho lungabanjwa lugibe. 
Proverbs3:27 Yenta lokuhle kulabo labakudzingako, nangabe unawo emandla ekukwenta." 
Proverbs3:28 Ungasho kumakhelwane wakho utsi: “Hamba, ngitawubuye ngikunike kusasa,” kantsi unako nalamuhla." 
Proverbs3:29 Ungatimiseli ngekwenta lokubi kumakhelwane wakho lohlala ngekukwetsemba. 
Proverbs3:30 Ungaphikisani nemuntfu ngelite angakakukhubi nekukukhuba. 
Proverbs3:31 Ungabi namhawu ngemuntfu losidlova; ungacali ukhetse ngisho nome yinye yetindlela takhe. 
Proverbs3:32 Ngobe umuntfu losidlova usinengiso kuSimakadze, kodvwa labalungile balitsemba lakhe." 
Proverbs3:33 Sicalekiso saSimakadze sisemndenini walomubi, kodvwa indlu yalolungile uyayibusisa." 
Proverbs3:34 Uyabahleka labo labeyisako, kodvwa unemusa kulabatfobekile." 
Proverbs3:35 Labahlakaniphile bayawudvunyiswa, kodvwa tilima tiyawuhlazeka." 
Proverbs4:1 Madvodzana ami, yilaleleni ngekucophelela imiyalo yeyihlo, khona nitawuba nekucondza." 
Proverbs4:2 Ngininika imiyalo lemihle, ningacali niyilahle nje imfundziso yami." 
Proverbs4:3 Ngisengumfanyana wekuphela, kubabe namake," 
Proverbs4:4 babe abengifundzisa atsi: “Shangatsi inhlitiyo yakho ingawabambisisa emavi ami, nemiyalo yami, khona utawuphila." 
Proverbs4:5 Zuza kuhlakanipha uzuze nekuvisisa. Ungakhohlwa, futsi ungesuki emavini emlomo wami." 
Proverbs4:6 Ungakulahli, kuyawukuphephisa; kutsandze, kuyawukugadza." 
Proverbs4:7 Kucala kwekuhlakanipha, naku: Zuza kuhlakanipha, uzuze nekucondza, nome kukubitani." 
Proverbs4:8 Kutuse, kona-ke kuyawukuphakamisa, kugone, kona-ke kuyawukwatisa." 
Proverbs4:9 Kuyawukwetfwesa ludvumo enhloko, kukwetfwese umchele lomuhle.”" 
Proverbs4:10 Ndvodzana yami, lalela wemukele emavi ami, khona iminyaka yekuphila kwakho itakwandza." 
Proverbs4:11 Ngikufundzise indlela yekuhlakanipha, ngakuholela etindleleni tekulunga." 
Proverbs4:12 Nawuhambako, sinyatselo sakho singeke siphatamiseke; nawugijimako, ungeke ukhubeke." 
Proverbs4:13 Bambelela emyalweni ungawuyekeli, uwulondvolote, ngobe uyimphilo yakho." 
Proverbs4:14 Ungalubeki lunyawo lwakho endleleni yalababi, futsi ungahambi endleleni yebantfu lababi." 
Proverbs4:15 Yikhweshele, ungahambi kuyo, yifulatsele uchubeke." 
Proverbs4:16 Bantfu lababi abalali bangakenti lokubi, bayacwasha bangalali nabangakoni muntfu." 
Proverbs4:17 Bubi bukudla kwabo, budlova businatfo sabo." 
Proverbs4:18 Kodvwa indlela yalabalungile ifanana nekukhanya kwentsatsakusa, lokuya ngekuya kuze kube ngusemini." 
Proverbs4:19 Indlela yalababi ifanana nebumnyama, lababi abati nalapho bakhubeka bawe khona." 
Proverbs4:20 Ndvodzana yami, bambisisa emavi ami, ubeke indlebe yakho emavini ami." 
Proverbs4:21 Ungawavumeli kutsi alahleke emehlweni akho, walondvolote enhlitiyweni yakho." 
Proverbs4:22 Lamavi akuphila kulowo lowatfolako, aphilise wonkhe umtimba wakhe." 
Proverbs4:23 Ngetulu kwako konkhe londvolota inhlitiyo yakho ngekunakekela konkhe, ngobe kuyo kugeleta tiyalu tekuphila." 
Proverbs4:24 Yisuse kuwe inkhulumo lesigwegwe, inkhulumo lekhohlisako yikhweshisele khashane nawe." 
Proverbs4:25 Emehlo akho akacondze ngco embili, ubukisise embikwakho." 
Proverbs4:26 Caphelisisa indlela yetinyawo takho, tonkhe-ke tindlela takho tiyawuba nekuciniseka." 
Proverbs4:27 Ungajikeli ngesekudla nome ngesancele, lunyawo lwakho ungalubeki ebubini." 
Proverbs5:1 Ndvodzana yami, lalelisisa kuhlakanipha kwami, ubeke indlebe ekucondzeni kwami." 
Proverbs5:2 Khona-ke uyawukwati kukhetsa lokufanele, netindzebe temlomo wakho tilulondvolote lwati." 
Proverbs5:3 Tindzebe temfati loyingwadla tivuta luju, inkhulumo yakhe ishelela kwengca emafutsa;" 
Proverbs5:4 kodvwa ekugcineni ubaba njengenyongo, akhaliphe njengenkemba lekhalipha nhlangotsi totimbili." 
Proverbs5:5 Tinyawo takhe tehlela ekufeni, tinyatselo takhe tihamba ngendlela leya ethuneni." 
Proverbs5:6 Akahambi ngendlela yekuphila, tindlela takhe tiyazula, akati nekutsi kwentekani." 
Proverbs5:7 Ndvodzana yami, ngilalele, ungesuki emavini emlomo wami." 
Proverbs5:8 Mkhweshele ube khashane naye, ungasondzeli ngisho nasemnyango wendlu yakhe," 
Proverbs5:9 funa ludvumo lwakho lutsatfwe ngulabanye bantfu, nekuphila kwakho kuphelele etandleni talabangenasihe." 
Proverbs5:10 Nebachamuki futsi bangahle batesutsise ngemcebo wakho netitfukutfuku takho tiye endlini yewetive. 
Proverbs5:11 Ekupheleni kwemphilo yakho uyawububula ecansini, sekudleka tinyama nemtimba wakho." 
Proverbs5:12 Uyawudzimate ukhale utsi: “Empeleni nje, mine ngangikutondzelani kuyalwa nekufundziswa? Ingabe ngangikutondzelani kutsetsiswa?" 
Proverbs5:13 Angizange ngibalalele bafundzisi bami lababengifundzisa; nome-ke kube mane ngalalela bacondzisi bami. 
Proverbs5:14 Ngatsi ngetfuka ngabe sengisekhatsi elubishini lwelihlazo ebandleni nakubantfu.” 
Proverbs5:15 Natsa emanti esicobho sakho, emanti lageleta aphuma esiyalwini sakho." 
Proverbs5:16 Kufanele yini imitfombo yakho isakateke igcwale yonkhe indzawo, lemifudlana yemanti imoseke ngekusakateka kuto tonkhe tindlela?" 
Proverbs5:17 Emanti esicobho sakho akabe ngewakho wedvwa, angabi ngemanti etengcamgwaco." 
Proverbs5:18 Shangatsi ungabusiseka umtfombo wakho, ube nenjabulo ngemfati webusha bakho." 
Proverbs5:19 Muhle, uyabukeka njengenhlangu, utsandzeka njengemphala; shangatsi emabele akhe angakwenelisa ngaso sonkhe sikhatsi, shangatsi nelutsandvo lwakhe lungakuhaca." 
Proverbs5:20 Ndvodzana yami, ungavumi kutfunjwa lutsandvo lwemfati loyingwadla. Utsandzelani kugaca libilo lakho kumfati walenye indvodza?" 
Proverbs5:21 Tindlela temuntfu tisemehlweni aSimakadze, tonkhe tindlela umuntfu lahamba ngato uyatigadzisisa." 
Proverbs5:22 Imisebenti yemuntfu lomubi ilugibe, ubanjwa elugibeni lwesono sakhe." 
Proverbs5:23 Uyakufa ngenca yekungatibambi kwakhe; bulima bakhe lobukhulu buyamedukisa. 
Proverbs6:1 Ndvodzana yami, nangabe umelele makhelwane wakho nome-ke umuntfu wetive ngesikwelede lasentako," 
Proverbs6:2 nangabe ungene elugibeni lwesetsembiso sakho, wabanjwa ngemavi akho," 
Proverbs6:3 naku-ke, ndvodzana yami, lofanele kukwenta khona utewukhululeka: Hamba uye kulomuntfu lokubambile umncenge aze akuvele." 
Proverbs6:4 Ungalali, ungavali ngisho nemehlo." 
Proverbs6:5 Tisindzise njengenyamatane ibalekela umtingeli, nanjengenyoni lephunyule esandleni semtingeli." 
Proverbs6:6 Hamba ufundze entfutfwaneni, wena vila-ndzini, kutsi iphila njani, khona utawuhlakanipha." 
Proverbs6:7 Lite tintfutfwane tite sikhulu nome indvuna nome umbusi," 
Proverbs6:8 kodvwa kudla kwato tikubutsa ehlobo tikulondvolote ngesikhatsi sekuvuna. 
Proverbs6:9 Wena vila-ndzini, uyawulala embhedzeni kudzimate kube ngunini?" 
Proverbs6:10 Ukhuluma utsi: “Kulalalala kancane, kwetelatela kancane, kugocagoca tandla kancane, kuphumula kancane.”" 
Proverbs6:11 Kodvwa buphuya butawufika kuwe bukunyonyobele njengelisela, nekweswela kukuhlasele njengesihlupheki." 
Proverbs6:12 Sihlangananhloko nome sihlophoyi sitfunguluta yonkhe indzawo sihamba sicala emanga," 
Proverbs6:13 sifica liso lapha nalapha, sisusa luchuku ngekuhlokolota nangekunyatsela lowa nalowa." 
Proverbs6:14 Sonkhe sikhatsi sakha emachinga ebubi enhlitiyweni yaso, sisuse nelutfutfuva lwekulwa." 
Proverbs6:15 Ngenca yaloku siyakwehlelwa yingoti masinyane sipitjitwe ngaphandle kwesecwayiso, singaphindzi sisindze." 
Proverbs6:16 Tisitfupha tintfo letenyanywa nguSimakadze, empeleni letisikhombisa uphambene nato kakhulu:" 
Proverbs6:17 Ngemehlo latichenyako, nelulwimi lolucala emanga, nembulali walote licala," 
Proverbs6:18 nengcondvo lebumba emacebo ebubi, nemuntfu lotsandza lokubi," 
Proverbs6:19 nafakazi lotfulula emanga, nemuntfu locabanisa bazalwane." 
Proverbs6:20 Ndvodzana yami, gcina umyalo weyihlo, ungayilahli imfundziso yenyoko." 
Proverbs6:21 Kucoboshele enhlitiyweni yakho, ukugace entsanyeni yakho." 
Proverbs6:22 Nawuhamba kuyawukucondzisa, nawulala kukugadze, nawuvukako kukweluleke." 
Proverbs6:23 Ngobe umyalo usibane, imfundziso ikukhanya, kucondziswa ngekutsetsiswa kuyindlela yekuphila." 
Proverbs6:24 Kuyawukuphephisa kumfati lomubi, nasemlonyeni lomnandzi wemfati walenye indvodza." 
Proverbs6:25 Ungacali kumkhanukela buhle bakhe enhlitiyweni yakho, nome-ke akutfumbe ngemashiya akhe." 
Proverbs6:26 Ngobe ingwadla ungayicasha ngemkhama wesinkhwa, kodvwa umgomo wemfati losiphingi kuhliphita nome kutfumba indvodza." 
Proverbs6:27 Ikhona yini indvodza lengetfwala emalahle lavutsako ngetimphahla tayo, tendlule tingashi?" 
Proverbs6:28 Kungenteka yini ihambe etikwemalahle lavutsako, tinyawo tayo tingashi?" 
Proverbs6:29 Kanjalo-ke, nendvodza lelala nemfati walenye indvodza, ingeke ikubalekele kujeziswa." 
Proverbs6:30 Bantfu abalibukeli phansi lisela lelebela kucosha indlala ngobe lilambile," 
Proverbs6:31 kodvwa nangabe libanjwa, kufanele likukhokhe sekuphindvwe kasikhombisa, tonkhe timphahla tendlu yakhe atetfule." 
Proverbs6:32 Lophingako weswela ingcondvo, nangabe aphinga nemfati, utibulala yena." 
Proverbs6:33 Uyakushaywa ahlaziswe njengobe kufanele; lihlazo lakhe lingeke lesulwe. 
Proverbs6:34 Ngobe sikhwele sivusa lulaka lwalendvodza yakhe lephingelwe, nase iphindzisela, ingeke ibe nesihawu." 
Proverbs6:35 Kute nenhlawulo leyawukwenta lendvodza lephingelwe ibuyisane naye, futsi kute kwekuncenga lengamnika kona nome ngabe kukhulu kanganani." 
Proverbs7:1 Ndvodzana yami, ubokhumbula emavi ami, ugcine imiyalo yami engcondvweni yakho." 
Proverbs7:2 Yenta letintfo lengikutjela tona, khona uyawuphila, netimfundziso tami tente tibe ligugu njengemehlo akho," 
Proverbs7:3 utembatse njengendandatho eminweni yakho, uticophe engcondvweni yakho." 
Proverbs7:4 Khuluma ekuhlakanipheni, utsi: “Wena ungudzadzewetfu,” nasekucondzeni ukhulume utsi: “Sihlobo sami.”" 
Proverbs7:5 Ngaloko uyawuphepha kumfati losiphingi, umfati walenye indvodza nalonemavi latobotanako." 
Proverbs7:6 Ngalelinye lilanga ngime ngasefasitelweni lendlu yami, ngabuka phansi emgwacweni." 
Proverbs7:7 Ngabona sicunjana setinsizwa letatingenako kuhlakanipha, emkhatsini wato ngabona lenye leyayingenalwati." 
Proverbs7:8 Yayihamba esitaladini eceleni kwelikona, icondzene nendlu yalomfati yaze yayawungena khona." 
Proverbs7:9 Kwase kucundzeka emehlo entsambama, sekuhwalala, kusihlwa." 
Proverbs7:10 Masinyane lomfati wahlangabeta lensizwa, embatsise kwengwadla, agcwele bucili." 
Proverbs7:11 Ungulalunyawana kantsi uyatatisa, futsi akuvumi kutsi ake atihlalele ekhaya;" 
Proverbs7:12 ngalelinye lilanga usesitaladini, mhlawumbe abesemakethe, ukhanga acotsele kuwo onkhe emakona." 
Proverbs7:13 Wayibamba lensizwa wayanga, wase ukhuluma nayo utsi:" 
Proverbs7:14 “Nginekudla lebekungekwemnikelo wekubonga wekufeza nekugcwalisa tifungo tami. 
Proverbs7:15 Ngiko nje ngite lapha kutekuhlangabeta, ngitele kutewufuna wena, manje-ke sengikutfolile." 
Proverbs7:16 Umbhedze wami ngiwuhlobise ngendvwangu lenhle lenemibalabala, yekwakhiwa eGibhithe." 
Proverbs7:17 Ngiwufake emakha emure, nenhlaba, nesinamoni." 
Proverbs7:18 Ake sitijabulise bonkhe lobusuku, sitenelise ngekulalana;" 
Proverbs7:19 ngobe phela indvodza yami ayikho ekhaya, itsetse luhambo loludze yaya khashane." 
Proverbs7:20 Ihambe nemali lenyenti, kutawuphela cishe emaviki lamabili ingekho.”" 
Proverbs7:21 Ngako wavele wayimelela kutsi iphambukele kuye, wayihuha ngemavi akhe." 
Proverbs7:22 Wavele wayikha etulu, yamlandzela njengenkhabi itawuhlatjwa nanjengenyamatane ingena esihibeni," 
Proverbs7:23 nanjengenyoni icotfota iya esifini. Yayingati kutsi loko itakukhokhela ngemphilo yayo. 
Proverbs7:24 Ngako-ke madvodzana ami, ngilaleleni, nilalelisise loku lesengikushito." 
Proverbs7:25 Ningacali niphambukele kulomfati, ningayi lapho aya ngakhona," 
Proverbs7:26 ngobe sewubulele emadvodza lamanyenti; ungeke uwabale emadvodza lasawacedzile. 
Proverbs7:27 Indlela leya endzaweni yalabafile icala endlini yakhe, yewuke yehlele etindlini tekufa." 
Proverbs8:1 Utsi kambe kuhlakanipha akumemeti yini? Kona kucondza akuliphakamisi yini liphimbo lako? 
Proverbs8:2 Kume embonisweni eceleni kwemgwaco; kume nasemahlanganweni emigwaco. 
Proverbs8:3 Kumemeta kakhulu emasangweni elidolobha nasetimphundvwini temasango kutsi: 
Proverbs8:4 “Bonkhe bantfu abalalele kimi, ngikhuluma kubo bonkhe." 
Proverbs8:5 Yeyi nine leningakakhuli engcondvweni, fundzani nikhule ekuhlakanipheni. Nine lenilibele, buyisani tingcondvo tenu." 
Proverbs8:6 Lalelani kimi, ngobe ngitawukhuluma tintfo letibalulekile; emlonyeni wami kutawuphuma liciniso." 
Proverbs8:7 Yebo, konkhe lengikukhulumako kuliciniso; emavi ebubi ngiyawatondza." 
Proverbs8:8 Konkhe lengikukhulumako kwetsembekile; kute lokugwegwile, kute nalokungemanga." 
Proverbs8:9 Kumuntfu lonekucondza, konkhe kucondzile; kulabanelwati, konkhe kuyakhanya." 
Proverbs8:10 Khetsani imfundziso yami kunesiliva, nikhetse lwati lwami kunegolide lecengiwe." 
Proverbs8:11 “Ngobe kuhlakanipha kuncono kunematje laligugu; kute umcebo longawulinganisa nako. 
Proverbs8:12 Mine lengikuhlakanipha, ngingumnikati webucotfo; lwati nemicabango lemihle kwami." 
Proverbs8:13 Kwesaba Simakadze kukutondza lokubi. Ngiyakutondza kutigcabha, neluchuku, nekutiphatsa dlephu, nebumbulu." 
Proverbs8:14 Kweluleka lokuhle nekwehlulela kahle kwami, kucondza kanye nemandla kwami." 
Proverbs8:15 Emakhosi abusa kahle ngami, nebabusi bashaya umtsetfo ngami." 
Proverbs8:16 Bonkhe lababusa ngekungakhetsi basitwa ngimi, nome ngabe tikhulu nome tindvuna." 
Proverbs8:17 Ngiyabatsandza laba labangitsandzako, nalabo labangifunisisako bayangitfola;" 
Proverbs8:18 batfola ngami ingcebo neludvumo, babutfole ngami bunjinga lobungapheli kanye nekuchuma." 
Proverbs8:19 Labakutfola kimi kuncono kunegolide lecengiwe, sitselo sami sendlula isiliva lecengiwe." 
Proverbs8:20 Ngihamba endleleni yekulunga, yebo, emikhondvweni yebumsulwa." 
Proverbs8:21 Ngibahlobisa ngekuceba labo labangitsandzako, tikhwama tabo batigcwalise ngemali." 
Proverbs8:22 “Simakadze wangidala, ngaba wekucala emisebentini yakhe, ngaba wekucala endalweni yakhe, ngiwasendvulo." 
Proverbs8:23 Ngemiswa phakadze, ekucaleni, umhlaba ungakadalwa." 
Proverbs8:24 Ngatalwa, kusete ngisho nekujula kwetilwandle, kusete tiyalu temanti lageletako." 
Proverbs8:25 Tintsaba tisengakasekelwa etindzaweni tato, nemagcuma asengabibikho, mine ngase ngikhona," 
Proverbs8:26 umhlaba nemave abesengakakwenti, ngisho nelitsantsana lemhlabatsi imbala." 
Proverbs8:27 Ngangikhona mhlazana amisa emazulu, mhlazana abeka umkhatsi ehlukanisa sibhakabhaka netilwandle," 
Proverbs8:28 mhlazana asimisa emafu etulu, acinisa imitfombo yetilwandle," 
Proverbs8:29 mhlazana asika imincele yetilwandle, kuze emanti angalengci livi lakhe, mhlazana abeka tisekelo temhlaba," 
Proverbs8:30 ngangiseceleni kwakhe, njengengcweti yekwakha. Nganginentfokoto lenkhulu onkhe emalanga, ngijabula embikwakhe njalonjalo." 
Proverbs8:31 Ngangidlalisela umhlaba wakhe, ngijabulela bantfu bonkhe." 
Proverbs8:32 “Manje-ke, madvodzana ami, ngilaleleni, babusisiwe labo labagcina imiyalo yami." 
Proverbs8:33 Lalelani imfundziso yami, ningayedzeleli; nitawuhlakanipha." 
Proverbs8:34 Ubusisiwe umuntfu longilalelako, longilindzela onkhe malanga emasangweni ami, logadza etimphundvwini teminyango yami." 
Proverbs8:35 Umuntfu lotfola mine utfola kuphila, utakwemukela kutsandvwa nguSimakadze;" 
Proverbs8:36 kodvwa logeja kungitfola, utilimata yena, bonkhe labangitondzako batsandza kufa.”" 
Proverbs9:1 Kuhlakanipha kwakhe indlu yako, kwayisimisa ngetinsika letisikhombisa." 
Proverbs9:2 Kuhlabile, kwadidiyela liwayini lako, kwadeka litafula lako." 
Proverbs9:3 Kutfumele tincekukati tako kutsi tiphume tiye kuyawumemeta eticongweni telidolobha," 
Proverbs9:4 titsi: “Nine labate lwati, wotani lapha! Nine labate ingcondvo," 
Proverbs9:5 wotani nitewudla kudla kwami, ninatse neliwayini lengilihlanganisile." 
Proverbs9:6 Shiyani bulima benu, khona nitewuphila nihambe ngendlela yekucondza.”" 
Proverbs9:7 Naweluleka sedzeleli, utilandzela inhlamba; nawucondzisa umuntfu lomubi, utawusuke akulimate." 
Proverbs9:8 Ungaseluleki sedzeleli, ngobe sitakutondza; yeluleka lohlakaniphile, yena utakutsandza." 
Proverbs9:9 Nawuyala umuntfu lohlakaniphile, utawusuka ahlakaniphe kakhulu; nawufundzisa umuntfu lolungile, yena usuka engete kulokufundza kwakhe." 
Proverbs9:10 Kwesaba Simakadze kusicalo sekuhlakanipha, nekumati Longcwele kuba nekucondza sibili." 
Proverbs9:11 Mine kuhlakanipha, ngitakwandzisa emalanga akho neminyaka yekuphila kwakho." 
Proverbs9:12 Nawuhlakaniphile, kusitakala wena; kodvwa nangabe usedzeleli, kutawuhlupheka wena." 
Proverbs9:13 Bulima bufanana nemfati lonemsindvo, longalati lihlazo nalongati lutfo," 
Proverbs9:14 lohlala emnyango wendlu yakhe embonisweni yelidolobha," 
Proverbs9:15 amemete emadvodza lendlulako atihambela ngemisebenti yawo, atsi:" 
Proverbs9:16 “Wotani lapha, nine tilima.” Ukhuluma kubo bonkhe labate lwati atsi:" 
Proverbs9:17 “Emanti ekwebiwa amnandzi, nekudla lokudlelwa emasitseleni kwehla esiphundvu.”" 
Proverbs9:18 Lendvodza lasayitfumbile ayati kutsi akuyi lolubuyako lapho, nekutsi labangena kuye basemajukujukwini elithuna." 
Proverbs10:1 Leti-ke taga taSolomoni: Indvodzana lehlakaniphile ijabulisa uyise, kodvwa indvodzana lelibele ikhuba unina." 
Proverbs10:2 Ingcebo letfolakale ngebubi ayikusiti ngalutfo, kodvwa kutiphatsa kahle kukusindzisisa ekufeni." 
Proverbs10:3 Simakadze akavumi kutsi lolungile alambe; kodvwa lababi uyabavimba kutsi bakutfole loko labakufunako. 
Proverbs10:4 Buvila benta umuntfu abe luphuya; kodvwa kukhutsala kwenta umuntfu abe yinjinga. 
Proverbs10:5 Indvodzana lehlakaniphile ngulebutsa kudla emasimini nase kulungile; kodvwa lelalako nakuvunwako iyahlazisana. 
Proverbs10:6 Umuntfu lolungile uphiwa tibusiso letinyenti; kodvwa lomubi ufihla budlova bakhe ngekukhuluma kwakhe lokunyenti. 
Proverbs10:7 Kukhunjulwa kwemuntfu lolungile kuyawuba sibusiso; kodvwa libito lalomubi liyawubhubha. 
Proverbs10:8 Umuntfu lohlakaniphile uyakwemukela kuyalwa; kodvwa lowo lokhulumela futsi uyawukhubeka, awe." 
Proverbs10:9 Umuntfu lowetsembekile uhamba aphephile; kodvwa lokhetsa tindlela letimagiligombo uyawugcina atfolakele. 
Proverbs10:10 Umuntfu loficelana liso lebucili uvisana buhlungu; kodvwa losheshe ekhute lokubi usebentela kuthula. 
Proverbs10:11 Emavi ebantfu labalungile angumtfombo wekuphila; kodvwa lababi bafihla budlova babo ngekukhuluma kwabo lokunyenti. 
Proverbs10:12 Inzondo ibanga kucabana; kodvwa lutsandvo lusibekela tonkhe tono. 
Proverbs10:13 Umuntfu lonengcondvo ukhuluma ngekuhlakanipha; kodvwa longenangcondvo udzinga kushaywa. 
Proverbs10:14 Bantfu labahlakaniphile babutsa lwati, kodvwa silima nasikhuluma njalo nje, sibanga ingoti." 
Proverbs10:15 Umcebo wesicebi uyinqaba yaso; buphuya buletsa ingoti eluphuyeni. 
Proverbs10:16 Umvuzo wekulunga kuphila lokuphuphumako; kodvwa kujeziswa kungumholo walabonako. 
Proverbs10:17 Umuntfu lowemukela kuyalwa uyawuphila; kodvwa lona longakufuni kucondziswa uyakweduka. 
Proverbs10:18 Umuntfu lofihla inzondo yakhe unemanga, nalowo lowandzisa emanga usilima." 
Proverbs10:19 Kukhuluma lokunyenti kubanga kona, ngako umuntfu lohlakaniphile uyawabamba emavi akhe." 
Proverbs10:20 Emavi emuntfu lolungile afanana nesiliva lecengiwe, umcondvo webantfu lababi awunamsebenti." 
Proverbs10:21 Emavi emuntfu lolungile ondla bantfu labanyenti; kodvwa tilima tifa ngenca yekweswela lwati. 
Proverbs10:22 Sibusiso saSimakadze lesenta umuntfu acebe, akengeti kuhlupheka kuso." 
Proverbs10:23 Injabulo yesilima isekwenteni lokubi; kodvwa injabulo yemuntfu lonekucondza isekutfoleni kuhlakanipha. 
Proverbs10:24 Lokwesatjwa ngumuntfu lomubi kuyamehlela; kodvwa lolungile uphiwa loko lakufunako. 
Proverbs10:25 Nase kwendlule sihhushuhhushu, kubate losindzako kulababi; kodvwa lolungile uyawusima phakadze naphakadze." 
Proverbs10:26 Njengeliwayini lelimunyu nalingena ematinyweni, nanjengentfutfu emehlweni, linjalo livila kulabalitfumako." 
Proverbs10:27 Kwesaba Simakadze kwandzisa kuphila kwemuntfu; kodvwa iminyaka yalomubi iyancishiswa. 
Proverbs10:28 Lokujabulisa bantfu labalungile nguloko labakwetsembako; kodvwa litsemba lalababi liyanyamalala. 
Proverbs10:29 Indlela yaSimakadze iyinqaba yalabalungile; kodvwa ikubhubha kulababi. 
Proverbs10:30 Umuntfu lolungile angeke asishulwe; kodvwa lomubi angeke asale eveni. 
Proverbs10:31 Umuntfu lolungile ukhuluma kuhlakanipha; kodvwa lulwimi lwenkhohliso luyawujutjwa. 
Proverbs10:32 Umlomo wemuntfu lolungile ukhuluma lokufanele; kodvwa emavi esikhohlakali ayakhubana. 
Proverbs11:1 Simakadze uyasenyanya sikali lesonakele; kodvwa ujabula ngalabo labasebentisa tikali letisemtsetfweni. 
Proverbs11:2 Kutiphakamisa kulandzelwa lihlazo; kodvwa kuhlakanipha kuhambisana nekutitfoba. 
Proverbs11:3 Kwetsembeka kungumcondzisi walabacotfo; kodvwa bucili buyabacitsa labangaketsembeki. 
Proverbs11:4 Ingcebo ingeke isite lutfo ngelilanga lentfukutselo; kodvwa kutiphatsa kahle kusindzisa umuntfu ekufeni. 
Proverbs11:5 Indlela yebantfu labate kusoleka yentiwa ibe ngulebekile ngekutiphatsa kahle kwabo; kodvwa kuwa kwemuntfu lokhohlakele kusungulwa nguye matfupha. 
Proverbs11:6 Bantfu labacotfo bakhululwa kutiphatsa kahle kwabo; kodvwa labo labangaketsembeki babanjwa lugibe lolubukhali babo. 
Proverbs11:7 Nakufa lokhohlakele, ufa kanye nematsemba akhe, nekwetsembela kwakhe ebunjingeni kuyashabalala." 
Proverbs11:8 Umuntfu lolungile uvikelekile etinhluphekweni; kodvwa umuntfu lomubi tiyamehlela. 
Proverbs11:9 Umuntfu longesabi Nkulunkulu ubulala makhelwane wakhe ngekukhuluma kwakhe; kodvwa bantfu labalungile bavikelwa lwati lwabo. 
Proverbs11:10 Nakuchuma bantfu labalungile, takhamiti telidolobha labo tiyatsakasa; kantsi nakufa lomubi, wonkhe umuntfu uyajabula." 
Proverbs11:11 Nangabe bantfu labacotfo babusisa lidolobha, liba neludvumo; kodvwa nakukhuluma lomubi, liyafa." 
Proverbs11:12 Umuntfu longenangcondvo umbukela phansi makhelwane wakhe; kodvwa umuntfu lohlakaniphile uyalubamba lulwimi lwakhe. 
Proverbs11:13 Ndzabakatibutwa wembula timfihlo; kodvwa umuntfu lowetsembekile uyatilondvolota. 
Proverbs11:14 Sive siyawa ngenca yekweswela kucondziswa; siyawuphepha nangabe sinebeluleki labanyenti. 
Proverbs11:15 Umuntfu angahle angene ekuhluphekeni lokukhulu, nangabe sihambi asentele sibambiso; kodvwa nangabe uyala, kute langakwesaba." 
Proverbs11:16 Umuntfu lomsikati lonemusa utfola ludvumo ngako, kantsi bantfu labanelutfutfuva batfola ludvumo ngemcebo wabo." 
Proverbs11:17 Umuntfu lonemusa kulabanye utisita yena; kodvwa umuntfu lote sihe utilimata yena. 
Proverbs11:18 Umuntfu lomubi utfola inzuzo ngendlela lembi; kodvwa lohlanyela ngebucotfo utfola sivuno lesikhonsako. 
Proverbs11:19 Lotimisele kwenta lokulungile uyawuphila; kodvwa loneluphike lwekwenta lokubi uyakufa. 
Proverbs11:20 Simakadze uyabenyanya bantfu labanenhlitiyo lembi; kodvwa ujatjuliswa ngulabo labangasoleki. 
Proverbs11:21 Kuliciniso kutsi bantfu lababi bayawujeziswa; kodvwa bantfu labalungile bayawusindza. 
Proverbs11:22 Buhle balomsikati lote similo bufanana nendandatho yegolide lesekhaleni lehhontji. 
Proverbs11:23 Tifiso talabalungile tigcina ebuhleni; kodvwa ematsemba alababi agcina ebubini. 
Proverbs11:24 Umuntfu lowephana ngemali yakhe wandzisa umcebo wakhe; lomunye uyemana, asuke agcine asaluphuya." 
Proverbs11:25 Umuntfu lowephanako, lanako kuyandza; lona lonatsisa lowomile naye uyawunatsiswa." 
Proverbs11:26 Bantfu bayamcalekisa umuntfu logodla kudla; kodvwa bamfisele lokuhle lowo lotsengisa ngako. 
Proverbs11:27 Umuntfu lofunana nalokuhle ufunana nemvuzo; kodvwa lofunana nebubi uhlangabetana nabo. 
Proverbs11:28 Umuntfu loncike ebunjingeni bakhe utakuwa; kodvwa lolungile uyawuhluma njengemacembe laluhlata. 
Proverbs11:29 Umuntfu loletsa kuhlupheka ekhaya lakhe ulahlekelwa lifa lakhe. Silima siyakuhlala sisisebenti sesihlakaniphi. 
Proverbs11:30 Sitselo salolungile sisihlahla sekuphila; kodvwa lohlakaniphile uzuza imiphefumulo. 
Proverbs11:31 Umuntfu lolungile utfola loko lokumfanele asesemhlabeni; kakhulu kangakanani-ke umuntfu lomubi nalosoni!

Proverbs12:2 Umuntfu lolungile uyemukeleka kuSimakadze; kodvwa lohlosa lokubi uyamlahla. 
Proverbs12:3 Umuntfu akasimamiswa kwenta bubi; kodvwa lolungile angeke ashukunyiswe. 
Proverbs12:4 Umfati lolungile ungumchele wendvodza yakhe; kodvwa loyihlazisako ufanana nekubola ematsanjeni ayo. 
Proverbs12:5 Emasu alabalungile mahle; kodvwa teluleko talababi tiyedukisana. 
Proverbs12:6 Emavi ebantfu lababi acotsele kucitsa ingati; kodvwa emavi alabalungile ayabakhulula bantfu. 
Proverbs12:7 Bantfu lababi bayaketulwa banyamalale; kodvwa imindeni yalabalungile iyawuhlala imile.

Proverbs12:9 Uncono umuntfu lotitfobako atisebentele kunemuntfu lotsi ucebile kantsi uyalamba. 
Proverbs12:10 Umuntfu lolungile uyatinakekela tifuyo takhe; kodvwa lomubi utiphatsa dlephu. 
Proverbs12:11 Lolima umhlaba wakhe uyawuba nenala yekudla; kodvwa lolibala kulandzelana netintfo letingenamsebenti akanangcondvo. 
Proverbs12:12 Bantfu lababi betama kutiphephisa ngebubi; kodvwa labalungile bayakuma banganyakatiswa. 
Proverbs12:13 Umuntfu ubanjwa tinkhulumo takhe letimbi; kodvwa lolungile uyasindza enhluphekweni. 
Proverbs12:14 Lomunye utfola inzuzo ngekukhuluma kwakhe; kantsi lomunye uyitfola ngekusebentisa tandla takhe. 
Proverbs12:15 Silima sicabanga kutsi konkhe lokwentiwa ngiso kulungile; kodvwa umuntfu lotsatsa teluleko uhlakaniphile. 
Proverbs12:16 Kutfukutsela kwesilima kusheshe kubonakale; kodvwa umuntfu lohlakaniphile uyayitsalalisela inhlamba. 
Proverbs12:17 Fakazi lowetsembekile ukhuluma bufakazi lobuliciniso; kodvwa fakazi lonemanga wandzisa emanga. 
Proverbs12:18 Emavi lakhulumeke ngebudlabha ahlaba njengesikhali; kodvwa emavi lakhulumeke ngekuhlakanipha ayaphilisa. 
Proverbs12:19 Umuntfu lokhuluma liciniso uyakhonsa; kodvwa lokhuluma emanga akakhonsi. 
Proverbs12:20 Inkhohliso isetinhlitiyweni talabo labahlose lokubi; kodvwa labo labasebentela kutsi kube nekuthula bayawujabula. 
Proverbs12:21 Labalungile bayawuhlala baphephile etingotini; kodvwa lababi bayawuhlala basetinhluphekweni. 
Proverbs12:22 Imilomo lecala emanga isinengiso kuSimakadze; kodvwa laba labetsembekile bayinjabulo kuye. 
Proverbs12:23 Umuntfu lohlakaniphile uyalufihla lwati lwakhe; kodvwa tilima tikubeka ebaleni kungati kwato. 
Proverbs12:24 Sandla lesikhutsele emsebentini sigcina siphetse; kodvwa livila ligcina lisigcili. 
Proverbs12:25 Kukhatsateka kuyamondzisa umuntfu; kodvwa livi lemusa limenta ajabule. 
Proverbs12:26 Umuntfu lolungile ungumholi kumakhelwane wakhe; kodvwa lababi bayedukisana. 
Proverbs12:27 Umuntfu lolivila uyalamba; kodvwa lokhutsele ugcina aphumelele. 
Proverbs12:28 Kutiphatsa kahle kwalolungile kuyindlela leya ekuphileni; kodvwa kutiphatsa kabi kuyindlela leya ekufeni.

Proverbs13:4 Umuntfu lolivila ufisa lokunyenti agcine angakatfoli lutfo; kodvwa lokhutsele unikwa lokunyenti. 
Proverbs13:5 Umuntfu lolungile uyawatondza emanga; kodvwa lomubi uletsa lihlazo nemahloni. 
Proverbs13:6 Kulunga kuyamgadza lophila ngendlela lecondzile; kodvwa sono siyabawisa lababi.

Proverbs13:16 Bonkhe bantfu labacotfo benta tintfo ngelwati; kodvwa silima sibubeka ebaleni bulima baso. 
Proverbs13:17 Sitfunywa lesingetsembeki sibanga tinhlupheko; kantsi lincusa leletsembekile liletsa kuphila. 
Proverbs13:18 Umuntfu longayinaki imphatfocotfo uyaphuya ahlazeke; kodvwa umuntfu lowemukela kutsetsiswa uyakuhlonipheka. 
Proverbs13:19 Sifiso lesifezekile siluju emphefumulweni. Lababi abakufuni kwehlukana nebubi.

Proverbs13:21 Lishwa licoshana nesoni; kodvwa imphumelelo ingumvuzo walolungile. 
Proverbs13:22 Lifa lemuntfu lolungile lidliwa titukulwane takhe; kodvwa ingcebo lempongiswa soni igcina ilifa lalabalungile. 
Proverbs13:23 Umhlaba walomphofu ungaba nesivuno lesinyenti; kodvwa bantfu lababi bayamvimbela kutsi awulime. 
Proverbs13:24 Longayifaki luswati indvodzana yakhe usuke ayitondza; kodvwa loyitsandzako uyayicondzisa.

Proverbs14:1 Umfati lohlakaniphile uyawakha umuti wakhe; kepha losilima uwubhidlita ngetakhe tandla. 
Proverbs14:2 Umuntfu lohamba ngebucotfo wesaba Simakadze; kodvwa lotindlela takhe tigwegwile wedzelela Simakadze. 
Proverbs14:3 Ligcabho lesilima livakala enkhulumeni yaso; kodvwa emavi ebantfu labahlakaniphile ayabaphephisa. 
Proverbs14:4 Umuntfu lote tinkhabi uhlala angenalutfo encolobaneni yakhe; kodvwa utawutfola sivuno lesihle nanetinkhabi. 
Proverbs14:5 Fakazi lowetsembekile akawacali emanga; kodvwa fakazi longaketsembeki uphefumula emanga. 
Proverbs14:6 Sedzeleli sifuna kuhlakanipha singakutfoli; kodvwa lwati lutfolakala kalula kumuntfu lonekucondza. 
Proverbs14:7 Sikhweshele silima, ngobe kute lwati lotalutfola kuso." 
Proverbs14:8 Kuhlakanipha kwemuntfu locotfo kumholela endleleni lelungile; kodvwa tilima tedukiswa bulima bato. 
Proverbs14:9 Lababi abanandzaba nome bona; kodvwa bantfu labacotfo bayemukeleka kuNkulunkulu. 
Proverbs14:10 Inhlitiyo yemuntfu buhlungu bayo itetfwalela yona yodvwa, futsi kute longase abe nesabelo ekujabuleni kwayo." 
Proverbs14:11 Imiti yalababi iyawucitseka; kodvwa imiti yalabacotfo iyakuphumelela. 
Proverbs14:12 Kukhona indlela lebonakala iyinhle emehlweni emuntfu; kodvwa siphetfo sayo kufa. 
Proverbs14:13 Umuntfu angahleka nome inhlitiyo yakhe ibuhlungu; emvakweluhleko inhlitiyo isala solomane ilusizi. 
Proverbs14:14 Umuntfu lojikajikako utfola loko lokufanelwe similo sakhe; nemuntfu lolungile naye wemukela umvuzo wemisebenti yakhe. 
Proverbs14:15 Umuntfu lonengcondvo lencane wetsemba yonkhe intfo; kodvwa lohlakaniphile indlela yakhe uyayibukisisa angakacali kuhamba ngayo. 
Proverbs14:16 Umuntfu lohlakaniphile unesineke akubalekele lokubi; kodvwa silima siyahlaphata, sitetsembe kakhulu." 
Proverbs14:17 Umuntfu lonenhlitiyo lencane wenta tintfo letibulima; kodvwa lonesineke uyabeketela. 
Proverbs14:18 Bantfu labanengcondvo lencane bazuza bulima; kodvwa labahlakaniphile banemchele welwati. 
Proverbs14:19 Bantfu lababi bakhotsamela bantfu labalungile, nalabangakalungi bema emasangweni alolungile." 
Proverbs14:20 Luphuya alutsandvwa ngisho nangumakhelwane walo; kodvwa sicebi sitsandvwa bantfu labanyenti. 
Proverbs14:21 Umuntfu lobukela phansi makhelwane wakhe uyona; kodvwa ubusisiwe umuntfu lonemusa kulabamphofu. 
Proverbs14:22 Labo labakha emacebo ebubi abeduki yini? Umusa nekwetsembeka kuyawuba kwalabo labanemacebo lamahle. 
Proverbs14:23 Kuko konkhe kusebenta matima kunemvuzo; kodvwa labo labalibala kukhulumela futsi bahlala beswele.

Proverbs20:3 Umuntfu longakufuni kulwa uzuza ludvumo; silima sihlala ngekususa lutfutfuva singatibambi. 
Proverbs20:4 Livila liyehluleka kulima ngesikhatsi lesifanele, nase kuvunwa lona alibuyi nalutfo etsafeni." 
Proverbs20:5 Tinjongo tenhlitiyo yemuntfu tifanana nekujula kwemanti emtfombo; kodvwa lonekuhlakanipha angatikhipha. 
Proverbs20:6 Banyenti bantfu labatishoko kutsi banelutsandvo sibili; kodvwa ngubani longatfola lowetsembeke ngempela? 
Proverbs20:7 Babusisiwe labo bantfwana labatalwa yindvodza lephila ngebucotfo nangekwetsembeka. 
Proverbs20:8 Inkhosi itsi ingahlala esihlalweni sayo sekwehlulela, ivele imbone zisuka nje lowo lowonile." 
Proverbs20:9 Ngubani longasho atsi: “Inhlitiyo yami ngiyigcine imsulwa, ngihlantiwe esonweni sami”?" 
Proverbs20:10 Tisindvo tebucili netilinganiso tebucili, kokubili, Simakadze uyakwenyanya." 
Proverbs20:11 Ngisho nemntfwana wembula similo sakhe ngendlela latiphetse ngayo; tento takhe tikhombisa kutsi similo sakhe sihle yini nome sibi. 
Proverbs20:12 Simakadze usiphe emehlo ekubona netindlebe tekuva: kokubili kwentiwa nguye. 
Proverbs20:13 Ungalibali kulala, ngobe utawugcina umphofu. Hlala usebenta, khona utawuba nenala yekudla." 
Proverbs20:14 Umtsengi ukhala kumtsengisi atsi: “Idule kakhulu lentfo, ngephulele,” atsi esuka lapho lomtsengi abe atigabatisa ngekutsi umcindzetele waze wamephulela." 
Proverbs20:15 Igolide nematje laligugu lamanyenti ungaba nako; kodvwa umlomo lokhuluma lwati ungetulu kwentsengo yematje laligugu. 
Proverbs20:16 Nangabe sihambi seboleka bese sibambisa ngelijazi laso, litsatse. Lelijazi lisiciniseko kuwe, ngobe ungasati lesihambi." 
Proverbs20:17 Kudla lokutfolakale ngekwebiwa kucala kube njengeluju kulona lokwebile; kodvwa ekugcineni kugcwala umlomo kube shangatsi udla umhlabatsi. 
Proverbs20:18 Yenta tinhloso takho ngekutfola teluleko letilungile; ungacali uhlasele emphini ungenamasu. 
Proverbs20:19 Inhlebo ivumbulula timfihlo; ngako-ke mgweme umuntfu lokhulumela futsi. 
Proverbs20:20 Umuntfu localekisa uyise nome unina siphetfo sakhe siyawufanana nekucima kwesibane ebumnyameni lobuphatsekako. 
Proverbs20:21 Ingcebo letfolakale ngekushesha igcina ingenasibusiso. 
Proverbs20:22 Ungasho kutsi: “Ngitatiphindziselela ngalokubi;” tsembela kuSimakadze, yena utakulungiselela." 
Proverbs20:23 Simakadze uyabenyanya bantfu labasebentisa tikali netisindvo letinebucili. 
Proverbs20:24 Tinyatselo temuntfu ticondziswa nguSimakadze. Pho, umuntfu angayati ngani indlela lahamba ngayo kutsi icondzephi?" 
Proverbs20:25 Ungasheshi wente tetsembiso kuNkulunkulu, bese utisola kamuva." 
Proverbs20:26 Inkhosi lehlakaniphile iyaphenyisisa ize imtfole lowonile, bese imjezisa ngaphandle kwesihe." 
Proverbs20:27 Umoya wemuntfu usibane saSimakadze, uphenyisisa konkhe ngisho nalokujulile kumuntfu." 
Proverbs20:28 Umbuso wenkhosi utawuchubeka ume, nangabe ibusa ngekwetsembeka, nangelutsandvo, nangekungakhetsi." 
Proverbs20:29 Ludvumo lwalabasha ngemandla abo; labadzala bahlonishelwa bumphunga babo. 
Proverbs20:30 Kushaywa kamatima kwenta umuntfu abuyekele bubi bakhe, nekubhanjabulwa kuphilisa lingekhatsi lakhe." 
Proverbs21:1 Inhlitiyo yenkhosi isesandleni saSimakadze, uyicondzisa kalula njengemanti emfula." 
Proverbs21:2 Yonkhe indlela yemuntfu ibonakala iyinhle emehlweni akhe; kodvwa Simakadze wehlulela inhlitiyo. 
Proverbs21:3 Kwenta kulunga nekungakhetsi kumjabulisa kakhulu Simakadze kunekumentela iminikelo yemihlatjelo. 
Proverbs21:4 Kutigabatisa nekutiphakamisa sono, loku luphawu lwalababi." 
Proverbs21:5 Emasu emuntfu lokhutsele amdvonsela ekuphumeleleni; kanjalo nematata aholelana ebumphofini. 
Proverbs21:6 Umcebo lotfolakale ngemacebo ugcina unyamalele; kodvwa lomnikati wawo ugcina afile. 
Proverbs21:7 Lababi abafuni kwenta lokulungile; ngako-ke budlova babo buyababhubhisa. 
Proverbs21:8 Tindlela talababi tigwegwile; kodvwa tento talabalungile timsulwa. 
Proverbs21:9 Kuncono kuhlala wedvwana etaleni kunekuhlala ngekhatsi endlini kanye nemkakho lotsetsela futsi. 
Proverbs21:10 Umuntfu lomubi unebuyanga bekwenta lokubi; akanawo umusa ngisho nakubomakhelwane bakhe. 
Proverbs21:11 Longenalwati ufundza kuhlakanipha, nakabona lesinye silima sijeziswa; lohlakaniphile nakafundziswa, utfola lwati." 
Proverbs21:12 Nkulunkulu, Sokulunga, uyakwati lokwentekako emitini yalababi; yebo, uyababhubhisa lababi." 
Proverbs21:13 Umuntfu longafuni kulalela sikhalo salomphofu, naye angeke aphendvulwe nakakhalela lusito." 
Proverbs21:14 Intfukutselo yemuntfu ungayiphotisa ngekumnika sipho ngasese, nekutfukutsela kwakhe ungakuphotisa ngemdizo wekutfukuswa." 
Proverbs21:15 Bantfu labalungile bayajabula, nangabe tintfo tentiwa ngendlela lengiyo, ngekujezisa lofanele; kodvwa benti balokubi bayatfutfumela." 
Proverbs21:16 Nangabe umuntfu eduka etindleleni tekucondza, usheshe aye kulabafile." 
Proverbs21:17 Umuntfu lotsandza kutijabulisa ugcina asaphuyile; umuntfu lotsandza kutamasa angeke acebe. 
Proverbs21:18 Umuntfu lomubi uyajeziswa, kuze labalungile batewutfola inkhululeko; umuntfu longaketsembeki uyajeziswa, kuze labalungile batewuphepha." 
Proverbs21:19 Kuncono kuhlala wedvwana ehlane, kunekuhlala nemkakho lotsetsako nalotetemako." 
Proverbs21:20 Umuntfu lohlakaniphile utibekela kudla nemafutsa endlini yake; kodvwa silima sidla sicedze konkhe, singatibekeli." 
Proverbs21:21 Umuntfu lowetama kutiphatsa ngekulunga nangekwetsembeka, uyawuphila imphilo lehloniphekile." 
Proverbs21:22 Umuntfu lohlakaniphile angangena emtini lomkhulu nome ulindvwe ngemabutfo, abhidlite inqaba lebeyatiwa ngekutsi ayingeneki futsi ingeke ibhidlitwe." 
Proverbs21:23 Umuntfu lotibambako kuko konkhe lakushoko uyatiphephisa etinhluphekweni. 
Proverbs21:24 Ligama lelitsi “sidvwaladvwala” lisho umuntfu longahloniphi nalotigcabhako, nalongabanaki bantfu." 
Proverbs21:25 Livila litsandza kuhlala nje, ngiko loko lokuyawubanga kufa kwalo, ngobe alisebenti." 
Proverbs21:26 Sonkhe sikhatsi liticabangela lona; kodvwa umuntfu lolungile akaticabangeli yena yedvwa, uyephana." 
Proverbs21:27 Imihlatjelo lenikelwa bantfu lababi isinengiso, ikakhulu nayinikelwe ngetinjongo letimbi." 
Proverbs21:28 Fakazi wemanga uyawubhujiswa; kodvwa fakazi lowetsembekile uyakuma kuze kube phakadze. 
Proverbs21:29 Umuntfu lomubi utiphatsa ngekutentisa; kodvwa lowetsembekile uyatinakekela tindlela takhe. 
Proverbs21:30 Kuhlakanipha kwemuntfu, nekucondza kanye nemyalo longiwo sibili kungeke kukusite, nangabe kucondzene nekumelana naSimakadze." 
Proverbs21:31 Nome bantfu emahhashi abo bangawalungiselela imphi, kodvwa kuncoba kusetandleni taSimakadze." 
Proverbs22:1 Kudvuma ngalokuhle kuncono kunemcebo lomnyenti, kuhlonipheka kuncono kunekuceba." 
Proverbs22:2 Tinjinga netimphuya tifanana ngantfo yinye: Bobabili badalwa nguNkulunkulu. 
Proverbs22:3 Umuntfu lohlakaniphile ingoti uyibona iseta, bese uyayibalekela; kantsi longenangcondvo ucondza ngco kuyo, bese utisola emvakwesikhatsi." 
Proverbs22:4 Titfobe, wesabe Simakadze, yena uyakukuvuza ngemcebo, neludvumo, nekuphila." 
Proverbs22:5 Indlela yemuntfu longaketsembeki igcwele emanyeva netingibe; kodvwa lowo lonakekela imphilo yakhe uyakuyigegela leyo ndlela. 
Proverbs22:6 Khulisa umntfwana ngendlela lekufanele aphile ngayo; kuyakutsi nome asakhulile angesuki kuyo. 
Proverbs22:7 Injinga iba yinkhosi yeluphuya, nemboleki uba sigcili sembolekisi." 
Proverbs22:8 Umuntfu lohlanyela inhlanyelo yebudlova uvuna tingoti nekuhlupheka; kucindzetela kwakhe labanye bantfu kutawuphela. 
Proverbs22:9 Lowephanako naye uyawubusiswa, ngobe kudla kwakhe ukudla netimphuya." 
Proverbs22:10 Cosha sedzeleli kutawuphela kuphikisana, nekulwa kanye nenhlamba." 
Proverbs22:11 Umuntfu lotsandza kuhlanteka kwenhlitiyo nenkhulumo lenemusa uyawuba ngumngani wenkhosi. 
Proverbs22:12 Emehlo aSimakadze alindza lwati; kodvwa uyawacitsa emavi alabacalemanga. 
Proverbs22:13 Livila litsi: “Kunelibhubesi lapha ngaphandle; ngitawutsi ngiyaphuma lingidle.” 
Proverbs22:14 Emavi engwadla afanana nemgodzi lojulile; labo labangaphansi kwelulaka lwaSimakadze bagcumkela kuwo. 
Proverbs22:15 Bulima buboshelwe engcondvweni yemntfwana; kodvwa luswati luyabutsintsitsa bonkhe. 
Proverbs22:16 Lowo locindzetela lomphofu entela kuticebisa, yena nalowo lopha tipho kulabacebile, bobabili bagcina baphuyile." 
Proverbs22:17 Lalelisisa uvisise kahle emavi alabahlakaniphile, ubambisise ngengcondvo lwati lengikuhlephulela lona." 
Proverbs22:18 Utawubusiswa nawuwagcina engcondvweni yakho, ukwati kuwasho ngenhloko ungangabati." 
Proverbs22:19 Ngentela kutsi utewubeka litsemba lakho kuSimakadze; ngiko nje ngikufundzisa lamavi. 
Proverbs22:20 Nankha-ke emavi lahlakaniphile langemashumi lamatsatfu lengikubhalele wona; agcwele lwati nemiyalo lelungile. 
Proverbs22:21 Lamavi atakufundzisa kutsi ukwati kubona liciniso nalikhulunywa. Ngako-ke nawutfunywa kutsi uyekulifuna leliciniso, uyawukwati kubuya nemphendvulo lengiyo sibili." 
Proverbs22:22 Umuntfu loweswele ungamphatsi dlephu ngobe abukeka eswele, nalomphofu ungamdleleli ecaleni;" 
Proverbs22:23 nawenta njalo, Simakadze uyakummelela, atsatse kuphila kwalowo lophetse lomunye dlephu." 
Proverbs22:24 Ungabi ngumngani wemuntfu lonenhlitiyo lencane, ungabi nebudlelwane nemuntfu losheshe acansuke." 
Proverbs22:25 Nawuba ngumngani wakhe, ungahle ufundze imikhuba yakhe, loko kube lugibe emphilweni yakho yonkhe." 
Proverbs22:26 Ungaboba sibambiso nome fakazi wemuntfu, nakenta tikwelede." 
Proverbs22:27 Nakehluleka kukhokha letikwelede, wena utawudliwa ngisho nembhedze wakho." 
Proverbs22:28 Ungayiguculi iminyele leyabekwa bokhokho bakho. 
Proverbs22:29 Use wambona nje umuntfu loyingcweti emsebentini wakhe? Nguye lowo loyawusetjentiswa ngemakhosi, angeke aweswele nemsebenti." 
Proverbs23:1 Nangabe umbusi akumeme kutsi utekudla naye, ubokhumbula kutsi ungubani lowo mmemi wakho." 
Proverbs23:2 Nawulambile, tibambe ungadli." 
Proverbs23:3 Ungakuhawukeli kudla lakunika kona nome kumnandzi kanganani, tibambe; kungahle kube lugibe." 
Proverbs23:4 Caphela ungatibulali ngekucoshana nebunjinga; tsatsa kuhlakanipha nekutibamba. 
Proverbs23:5 Bunjinga buyawunyamalala emehlweni akho ububuka; buyawushesha bundize njengelusweti. 
Proverbs23:6 Ungadli nemuntfu lowemanako; ungakuhaleli nekudla kwakhe nome kungaba mnandzi kanganani. 
Proverbs23:7 Nawukudla lokudla, kuyawukubamba emphinjeni. Ungamuva atsi: “Dlani, unatse,” kantsi inhlitiyo yakhe ayikho lapho." 
Proverbs23:8 Uyawukuhlanta naloko lokuncane lokudlile, ukhandze kutsi ubongele lite." 
Proverbs23:9 Ungasicitsi sikhatsi sakho ngekukhuluma intfo lenengcondvo esilimeni, ngobe singeke siwemukele lamavi akho." 
Proverbs23:10 Ungayisusi iminyele lese yabekwa kadzeni nome-ke udle live letintsandzane. 
Proverbs23:11 UMvikeli wato unemandla, uyakutitsatsela sikhundla emelane nawe." 
Proverbs23:12 Yenta ingcondvo yakho yemukele imiyalo, ulalelisise loko lofundziswa kona." 
Proverbs23:13 Ungesabi kumcondzisa umntfwana; ngobe nawumfaka luswati, angeke afe." 
Proverbs23:14 Kumshaya ngeluswati kuyawusindzisa imphilo yakhe ekufeni. 
Proverbs23:15 Ndvodzana yami, nangabe unekuhlakanipha enhlitiyweni yakho, inhlitiyo yami iyawujabula." 
Proverbs23:16 Ngiyawutfokota enhlitiyweni yami, nangiva ukhuluma emavi ekuhlakanipha." 
Proverbs23:17 Ungahawukeli lutfo etonini, kodvwa yesaba Simakadze ngetikhatsi tonkhe;" 
Proverbs23:18 ngobe likusasa lakho liyawuba nekuciniseka nemphumelelo. 
Proverbs23:19 Ndvodzana yami, lalela; ubolalela, khona utekuhlakanipha. Ingcondvo yakho yibeke endleleni lengiyo sibili." 
Proverbs23:20 Ungabi ngumngani wetidzakwa nome timiti. 
Proverbs23:21 Tidzakwa netimiti tiphetsa ngebuphuya. Nawuphila ngekulala ungasebenti, uyawugcina wembatsa emanikiniki." 
Proverbs23:22 Lalelisisa uyihlo, ngobe nguye lowakutala; ungamedzeleli nenyoko ngobe asagugile." 
Proverbs23:23 Tsenga liciniso ungatsengisi ngalo. Zuza kuhlakanipha, nemiyalo, nekucondza konkhe; ungakhohlwa ngiko." 
Proverbs23:24 Uyise wendvodzana lelungile uyajabula; nangabe indvodzana ihlakaniphile, uyise uyatfokota." 
Proverbs23:25 Yenta uyihlo nenyoko batigcabhe ngawe; yebo, ajabule nenyoko lowakutala." 
Proverbs23:26 Ndvodzana yami, ngilalele utigcine ngekunakekela tindlela tami." 
Proverbs23:27 Tingwadla tingumgodzi lojulile, nemfati losiphingi ulugibe lolubulalako." 
Proverbs23:28 Betsiya emadvodzana ebantfu bawabhacele emasitseleni njengetigebengu, batfumbe emadvodza lamanyenti bawente angasetsembeki." 
Proverbs23:29 Ngubani lotsi: “Maye?” Ngubani lonelusizi? Ngubani lonenkhani? Ngubani lokhononako? Ngubani lonemanceba nemihuzuko ngelite? Ngubani lonemehlo labovu? 
Proverbs23:30 Ngulabo labacitsa sikhatsi lesinyenti ekunatseni liwayini lelidzakanako netjwala. 
Proverbs23:31 Nome liwayini libila, nome lihaza, nome limnandzi lehla ngesiphundvu, kodvwa libalekele." 
Proverbs23:32 Ekugcineni liluma njengenyoka, linhlonhlotse njengesitfozi selibululu." 
Proverbs23:33 Emehlo akho ayawubona tintfo letingekho, emlonyeni wakho kuphume emavi langenamcondvo." 
Proverbs23:34 Liyawukwenta uve shangatsi untanta emagagasini elwandle nome njengemuntfu lolele etsala letintsambo letiboshelwe ensikeni yemkhumbi. 
Proverbs23:35 Utawutsi: “Bangilimatile, kodvwa angikabuva buhlungu; bangishayile, kodvwa angikhumbuli. Nginelibhabhalazi, ngifuna kuyawunatsa futsi.”" 
Proverbs24:1 Ungabi namona nebantfu lababi, futsi ungafisi kutsi babe bangani bakho." 
Proverbs24:2 Etingcondvweni tabo bacabanga budlova, imilomo yabo ikhuluma ngekulimatana." 
Proverbs24:3 Umuti wakhiwa ngekuhlakanipha, usimiswe ngekucondza;" 
Proverbs24:4 ngelwati tindlu tigcwaliswe ngemicebo lemihle lengakavami. 
Proverbs24:5 Umuntfu lohlakaniphile unemandla kakhulu, kwendlula sichwaga; yebo, lonelwati uncono kunalonetikhwepha." 
Proverbs24:6 Ubotsatsa umyalo lohlakaniphile, nawuphuma imphi; kuncoba kusekubeni nebeluleki labalungile labanyenti." 
Proverbs24:7 Kucondza kungetulu kwemandla esilima; nase kukhulunywa ngempela, kute lesingahle sikusho silima." 
Proverbs24:8 Umuntfu lohlose kwenta lokubi uyawuba neludvumo lolubi. 
Proverbs24:9 Tinhloso tesilima tisono, nebantfu bayamtondza umuntfu lowedzelelako." 
Proverbs24:10 Nawukhubatela ngesikhatsi lesibucayi, usuke unemandla lamancane." 
Proverbs24:11 Nawubona bantfu bayawubulawa, ngaphandle kwesizatfu, baphephise;" 
Proverbs24:12 ungasho kutsi: “Bengingakwati-ke loku,” ngobe Nkulunkulu uyati, ehlulele tinhloso takho. Lowo lokwelusako uyakwati loko. Yena uyawuvuza lowo nalowo njengekwemisebenti yakhe." 
Proverbs24:13 Ndvodzana yami, ubodla luju ngobe lumnandzi, nematfonsi etinhlanga tetinyosi ayanongotela." 
Proverbs24:14 Yati futsi kutsi kuhlakanipha kumnandzi; ngobe nawutfole kona, unesiciniseko ngelikusasa lakho, nelitsemba lakho alinawuphelela eteni." 
Proverbs24:15 Ungasilingisi sigelekece ngekunyenyela lolungile kutsi umlimate endlini yakhe, ungayihlaseli ngisho nendzawo lapho ahlala khona;" 
Proverbs24:16 ngobe nome lolungile angawa emahlandla lasikhombisa, noko uyawuvuka; kodvwa lababi bayawubhubha." 
Proverbs24:17 Ungakujabuleli kuwa kwesitsa sakho, inhlitiyo yakho ingatfokoti nasikhubatela;" 
Proverbs24:18 ngobe Simakadze angahle akubone angete ajabula, esuse lulaka lwakhe kuso." 
Proverbs24:19 Ungahlupheki ngebantfu lababi, ungabi namona nabo;" 
Proverbs24:20 ngobe umuntfu lomubi akanalo likusasa lelihle. Bumnyama bodvwa lobummele. 
Proverbs24:21 Ndvodzana yami, ubohlonipha Simakadze nenkhosi yeluhlanga. Ungahambisani nalabamelene naSimakadze nenkhosi," 
Proverbs24:22 ngobe bayawubhubha masinyane. Ngubani nje longati tehlakalo letingehliswa nguSimakadze nenkhosi? 
Proverbs24:23 Nati-ke futsi letinye taga talabahlakaniphile: Kubi nangabe umehluleli ehlulela ngekukhetsa. 
Proverbs24:24 Nangabe akhuluma kulona lolahlwa licala atsi: “Ute licala,” bonkhe bantfu bayakumcalekisa bamtondze;" 
Proverbs24:25 kodvwa behluleli labayawuchuma babusiseke, ngulabo labajezisa labo labafanele kujeziswa." 
Proverbs24:26 Umuntfu lonika imphendvulo leyetsembekile ukhombisa bungani lobungibo sibili. 
Proverbs24:27 Cedzela kucala imisebenti yakho yangaphandle, ulungise emasimi akho, bese wakha indlu yakho." 
Proverbs24:28 Ungabenti bufakazi bekulahla makhelwane wakho ngelicala ngaphandle kwesizatfu, ungamcaleli ngisho nemanga." 
Proverbs24:29 Ungasho nekutsi: “Ngitamenta loko langenta kona! Ngitakwenana njengobe enta kimi!” 
Proverbs24:30 Ngase ngendlula eceleni kwensimi yelivila, bekusivini semuntfu longenangcondvo." 
Proverbs24:31 Kwakunemena wesaphulamshini, nembabatane, nelutsango lwakhona seluwile." 
Proverbs24:32 Ngatsi kube ngikubone loku, ngafundza nasi sifundvo:" 
Proverbs24:33 “Kulalalala kancane nekwetelatela kancane, kanye nekugoca tandla kancane, uphumule;”" 
Proverbs24:34 kodvwa utawutsi usalele, buphuya bukuhlasele njengesigebengu, nekweswela kukuvimbetele njengesifo." 
Proverbs25:1 Leti nguletinye taga taSolomoni letabhalwa bantfu baHezekiya, inkhosi yakaJuda." 
Proverbs25:2 Bukhosi baNkulunkulu bubonakala kuloko lakufihlile; kodvwa bukhosi bemakhosi busekuphenyisiseni tintfo. 
Proverbs25:3 Njengekuphakama kwesibhakabhaka nekujula kwemhlaba, kunjalo kucabanga kwenkhosi, ungeke ukwati." 
Proverbs25:4 Susa kungcola kuyo isiliva, khona lomkhandzi atewukhandza intfo lenhle ngayo;" 
Proverbs25:5 susa beluleki lababi edvute nenkhosi, kuze itewubusa ngekulunga." 
Proverbs25:6 Nawusembikwenkhosi, ungatenti lohlakaniphile nome utibeke esigabeni salabakhulu;" 
Proverbs25:7 ngobe kuncono kwenyuselwa esikhundleni lesiphakeme kunekwehliselwa phansi, bantfu labakhulu bakubuka." 
Proverbs25:8 Ungasheshi uye enkantolo ngaloko lokubonile, ngobe nase kuphele lelicala lomunye wafakaza wakwenta silima, utawube sewentani-ke?" 
Proverbs25:9 Nawunelicala namakhelwane wakho, khulumisana naye nilungisane; ungayibhabati imfihlo yalomunye umuntfu," 
Proverbs25:10 funa lona lokuvile akutsele ngelihlazo, bantfu bangaphindzi bakwetsembe." 
Proverbs25:11 Livi lelikhulunywe ngesikhatsi lesifanele lifanana nemahhabhula egolide labekwe etindishini tesiliva. 
Proverbs25:12 Njengelicici legolide, nanjengemhlobiso loligugu, linjalo livi leseluleko kulolivako alente." 
Proverbs25:13 Sitfunywa lesetsembekile sijabulisa lowo lositfumile, njengemanti lacandzako ehlobo; yebo, sihlumelelisa umoya wenkhosi yaso." 
Proverbs25:14 Njengemoya nemafu late imvula, unjalo umuntfu lotigabatisa ngetipho langatenti." 
Proverbs25:15 Ngekubeketela umbusi angancengeka aze avume, nelulwimi lolumnandzi lungatsambisa ematje." 
Proverbs25:16 Nawutfole luju, ubodla lolo loludzingako; ungaludli kakhulu, ngobe lutakugulisa." 
Proverbs25:17 Ungavamisi kuvakashela makhwelwane wakho, funa adzinwe nguwe bese uyakutondza." 
Proverbs25:18 Umuntfu lofakaza emanga ngamakhelwane wakhe uyingoti njengesicwayi, nome njengenkemba, nome njengesikhali lesikhaliphako." 
Proverbs25:19 Kwetsembela kumuntfu longetsembeki ngesikhatsi lesibucayi kufanana nekwetsemba litinyo lelibolile nome kwetsemba lunyawo lolwenyele. 
Proverbs25:20 Kuhlabelela umuntfu lodzabukile kufanana nekukhumula tingubo takhe kucandza nome nekutsela viniga esilondzeni. 
Proverbs25:21 Nangabe sitsa sakho silambile, siphe kudla sidle; nasomile, siphe emanti sinatse." 
Proverbs25:22 Ngekwenta loko utawube usidlisa ngemahloni, Simakadze utakuvuza." 
Proverbs25:23 Njengobe umoya wasenyakatfo uletsa imvula, kanjalo nenhlebo iletsa kutfukutsela." 
Proverbs25:24 Kuncono kutihlalela wedvwana etaleni kunekuhlala endlini yinye nemfati lotsetsela futsi. 
Proverbs25:25 Tindzaba letimnandzi letiphuma eveni lelikhashane tifanana nemanti lacandzako emphefumulweni lokhatsele. 
Proverbs25:26 Njengemtfombo lodvungekile nome siyalu lesinashevu, unjalo umuntfu lolungile nakatihlanganisa nemuntfu lomubi." 
Proverbs25:27 Bubi bekuhalela ludvumo bufanana nekudla kakhulu luju. 
Proverbs25:28 Umuntfu lowehluleka kutibamba ufanana nelidolobha lelibhidlikelwe tindvonga talo. 
Proverbs26:1 Njengesitfwatfwa ehlobo nome imvula nakuvunwako, kunjalo kudvumisa silima." 
Proverbs26:2 Njengancedze londiza angahlali, nenkonjane lendiza ingahlali, sinjalo sicalekiso; asimehleli umuntfu longakasifaneli." 
Proverbs26:3 Emahhashi ayatalajwa, timbongolo tifakwa ematomu, netilima tiyashaywa." 
Proverbs26:4 Ungasiphendvuli silima ngebulima baso; nawenta njalo, nawe utawuba silima njengaso." 
Proverbs26:5 Phendvula silima njengalokufanele bulima baso, khona sitawubona kutsi asikahlakaniphi njengobe siticabanga." 
Proverbs26:6 Nangabe utfumela umbiko ngesilima, utiletsela inhlupheko, ngobe kufanana nekutsi ujuba tinyawo takho." 
Proverbs26:7 Emavi lahlakaniphile lakhulunywe silima akanamsebenti, afanana nemilente yesishosha." 
Proverbs26:8 Njengekubophela litje esidubulelweni, kunjalo kudvumisa silima." 
Proverbs26:9 Njengesidzakwa nasikhipha linyeva esandleni, anjalo emavi lahlakaniphile nasemlonyeni wesilima." 
Proverbs26:10 Umuntfu locasha silima nome ngubani nje lowendlulako, ufanana nemuntfu lodubula nome ngukuphi nje ngebutjoki alimate konkhe." 
Proverbs26:11 Silima lesenta intfo lembi kuze kube kabili sifanana nenja yona lebuyela iyekudla emahlante ayo. 
Proverbs26:12 Wake wambona kambe umuntfu locabanga kutsi uhlakaniphile? Silima sincono kakhulu kunaye. 
Proverbs26:13 Livila liyatitila litsi: “Ngingeke ngiphume, ngobe kunelibhubesi endleleni!” Liphindze litsi: “Kunelibhubesi emgwacweni.”" 
Proverbs26:14 Njengesivalo sijikajika sibanjwe ngemahhuka, kanjalo nelivila lilala lijilajila embhedzeni walo." 
Proverbs26:15 Livila liyasifaka sandla salo endishini, kodvwa bese lehluleka kusifaka emlonyeni walo." 
Proverbs26:16 Livila liyaye licabange kutsi lihlakaniphe kakhulu kwendlula emadvodza lasikhombisa laphendvula ngekuhlakanipha. 
Proverbs26:17 Umuntfu longena ekucabaneni kwalabanye ufanana nemuntfu lobamba inja lengumkhenkhetse ngemadlebe. 
Proverbs26:18 Njengeluhlanya loludubula nome ngukuphi ngebutjoki," 
Proverbs26:19 uyingoti kanjalo umuntfu loyenga makhelwane abese utsi: “Cha, mine bengidlala.”" 
Proverbs26:20 Ngaphandle kwetinkhuni umlilo uyacima; yebo, nangaphandle kwenhlebo incabano iyaphela." 
Proverbs26:21 Emalahle enta umlilo ukhehleke, tinkhuni tivutsisa umlilo, nemuntfu welutfutfuva ubhedla inkhani." 
Proverbs26:22 Emavi enhlebo afanana nemtsamo wekudla lokumnandzi; ehla kamnandzi afinyelele ngekhatsi kwemuntfu. 
Proverbs26:23 Njengeludziwo loluhucwe ngesiliva, anjalo emavi ekuyengana laphuma emlonyeni lonenhlitiyo lembi." 
Proverbs26:24 Umuntfu lotentisako ukhuluma kamnandzi, kantsi enhlitiyweni yakhe ufihle kuyengana." 
Proverbs26:25 Nome inkhulumo yakhe ingaba mnandzi kanjani, ungakholwa; ngobe ngekhatsi inhlitiyo yakhe igcwele bucili." 
Proverbs26:26 Inzondo yakhe angayimbonya ngemavi ekutentisa, kodvwa bubi bakhe buyawubasebaleni ngalelinye lilanga." 
Proverbs26:27 Nangabe umuntfu emba umgodzi wekwetsiya labanye, kuyakugcumkela yena; nome agicitela labanye ematje, kodvwa ayakugicikela kuye." 
Proverbs26:28 Umuntfu localemanga uyabatondza labo labacalela emanga, nelulwimi lolumphacambili luletsa kufa." 
Proverbs27:1 Ungatigabatisi ngelikusasa lakho, ngobe awati kutsi lilanga ngelilanga likutela nani." 
Proverbs27:2 Ungatidvumisi wena, kodvwa dvunyiswa ngulabanye; dvunyiswa ngulabanye bantfu, hhayi wena." 
Proverbs27:3 Litje limatima, nesihlabatsi siyasindza, ungeke ukwetfwale; kodvwa kucansulwa silima kukwengca konkhe." 
Proverbs27:4 Lulaka lungesabeka nentfukutselo ibe nebudlova; kodvwa kute longakhona kumelana nemona. 
Proverbs27:5 Kuncono uvele umuntfu umtsetsise kukhanye kunekumyekela ungamtsetsisi ngesizatfu sekutsi uyamtsandza. 
Proverbs27:6 Umngani usuke atimisele lokuhle ngawe, nome akulimatile; kodvwa ubocaphela ingoti, nangabe sitsa sakho sikwanga kanyenti." 
Proverbs27:7 Nawesutsi, ngisho nekudla lokumnandzi uyakuchwensa; kodvwa nawulambile, ngisho nekudla lokubi kuba mnandzi." 
Proverbs27:8 Umuntfu loshiya likhaya lakhe ufanana nenyoni lese ilahle sidleke sayo. 
Proverbs27:9 Emakha nemafutsa lanuka kamnandzi ajabulisa inhlitiyo; kodvwa bungani sibili buyawuphakamisa umphefumulo. 
Proverbs27:10 Ungakhohlwa umngani wakho nemngani weyihlo. Nawehlelwa yinhlupheko ungayi kuyawucela lusito kumnakenu; kuncono uye kumakhelwane losedvutane kunekuya kumnakenu lokhashane. 
Proverbs27:11 Ndvodzana yami, hlakanipha, khona ngitewujabula, ngitekwati kuphendvula nome ngabe ngubani longedzelelako." 
Proverbs27:12 Umuntfu lohlakaniphile uyibona iseta ingoti bese uyayibalekela, uyabhaca; kodvwa longakahlakaniphi uyatfusha nje, etfuke asasetikwayo, atisole kamuva." 
Proverbs27:13 Tsatsa sibambiso salofungela sihambi kutsi sitekutsatsa sikwelede; sitsatse sibe sibambiso salesihambi. 
Proverbs27:14 Nangabe umuntfu avusela makhelwane wakhe ngemsindvo ekuseni, kuyawutsatfwa ngekutsi uyacalekiswa." 
Proverbs27:15 Umfati lotsetsela futsi ufanana nekuntfontsa kwemanti latsi ntfo-ntfo-ntfo nalina. 
Proverbs27:16 Kwetama kumthulisa kufanana nekwetama kuvimba umoya nome kwetfwala emafutsa lancibilikile ngesandla. 
Proverbs27:17 Njengensimbi lelola lenye insimbi, kanjalo nebantfu bayahlakaniphisana." 
Proverbs27:18 Umuntfu lohlakulela umkhiwa uyakudla titselo tawo, nalowo lophetse kahle umcashi wakhe uyakwemukela ludvumo." 
Proverbs27:19 Nawutibuka emantini, ubona lingephandle lakho lelibuso bakho; nawutibuka enhlitiyweni, ubona lingekhatsi lakho lelinguwe sibili." 
Proverbs27:20 Njengobe emehlo emuntfu angeke eneliswe, kanjalo lithuna nekufa kungeke kweneliswe." 
Proverbs27:21 Isiliva negolide ihlolwa ngemlilo; kodvwa umuntfu uhlolwa ngeludvumo lalunikwa bantfu. 
Proverbs27:22 Nome silima ungasigaya etjeni lekusila sibe yimphuphu nome inhlama, kodvwa bulima baso ungeke ubukhiphe kuso." 
Proverbs27:23 Nakekela imihlambi yetimvu netinkhomo takho, uyeluse kahle," 
Proverbs27:24 ngobe ingcebo ayihlali siphelane, iyaphunyula; ngisho nekubusa kwemakhosi akuhlali kukhona siphelane." 
Proverbs27:25 Nakusikwe tjani, kwase kuhluma lobusha, lemihlambi ingadla." 
Proverbs27:26 Timvu tiyawukungenisela timphahla tekwembatsa, timbuti tikungenisele imali yekutsenga emasimi." 
Proverbs27:27 Uyawuba nelubisi lwetimbuti lolunyenti lwekutsi utondle wena nebantfwabakho kanye netisebenti takho. 
Proverbs28:1 Bantfu lababi babaleka ngisho nome kute umuntfu lobacoshako; kodvwa lolungile unesibindzi lesinjengeselibhubesi. 
Proverbs28:2 Nakukhona kuvukela umbuso eveni, live liba makhosikhosi; kodvwa nangabe baholi balelo live banekuhlakanipha nekucondza, kuba nekuthula." 
Proverbs28:3 Umholi lomubi lophuyile acindzetele labamphofu ufanana nesikhukhula selitulu leligcoba livungule. 
Proverbs28:4 Labo labephula umtsetfo ngemabomu badvumisa lababi; kodvwa labo labahlonipha umtsetfo baphambana nebantfu lababi. 
Proverbs28:5 Bantfu lababi abacondzi kahle lokulungile kutsi kuyini; kodvwa labo labakhonta Simakadze bakucondzisisa kahle konkhe. 
Proverbs28:6 Kuncono kuba mphofu kodvwa ube wetsembekile, kunekutsi ucebe ube ungaketsembeki." 
Proverbs28:7 Indvodzana lelalela umtsetfo ihlakaniphile; kodvwa lengumngani wetiyingayinga ihlazisa uyise. 
Proverbs28:8 Nangabe umuntfu acetjiswa kwebolekisa ngekubita intalo lenkhulu, ingcebo yakhe itakuya kubantfu labaphatsa kahle timphuya." 
Proverbs28:9 Nangabe umuntfu angafuni kugcina umtsetfo, ngisho nemithandazo yakhe iyenyanyeka kuNkulunkulu." 
Proverbs28:10 Lowo loholela lolungile endleleni lembi kuyawubanjwa yena kulolo lugibe. Lolungile uyawuvuzwa kakhulu. 
Proverbs28:11 Sicebi singacabanga kutsi sihlakaniphile; kodvwa luphuya loluhlakaniphile lwati kancono kutsi liciniso liyini. 
Proverbs28:12 Nangabe labalungile baba baholi, bonkhe bantfu bayajabula; kodvwa nangabe baholi kuba ngulababi, bantfu baphila ngekubhaca." 
Proverbs28:13 Umuntfu lofihla tono takhe angeke aphumelele; kodvwa lotivumako atishiye uyawutfola umusa. 
Proverbs28:14 Ubusisiwe umuntfu lowesaba Simakadze. Lowenta inhlitiyo ibe lukhuni uyawubhujiswa. 
Proverbs28:15 Njengelibhubesi lelibhodlako nelibhele lelihhongako, unjalo umbusi lomubi lobusa bantfu labeswele." 
Proverbs28:16 Umbusi lobusa ngencindzetelo usilima; kodvwa lotondza kutsengeka uyawuphila sikhatsi lesidze. 
Proverbs28:17 Umuntfu nakanelicala lekubulala, myekele abaleke aze afe." 
Proverbs28:18 Umuntfu lophila ngekwetsembeka uyawuphepha; kodvwa lophila imphilo legwegwile uyakuwa. 
Proverbs28:19 Umuntfu lowulimako umhlaba wakhe uhlala anenala; kodvwa lolibala kulandzelana nemisebenti lelite uyakwesutsa bumphofu. 
Proverbs28:20 Umuntfu lowetsembekile uyawuchuma; kodvwa lojaka kuceba uyawutfola sijeziso. 
Proverbs28:21 Kubi kukhetsa bantfu; kodvwa labanye bayona ngekukhetsana ngenca yekudizelwa kancane nje. 
Proverbs28:22 Lifelela litimisela ngekutsi licebe; alati kutsi linyonyobelwa buphuya. 
Proverbs28:23 Loyalako ubongwa kakhulu ekugcineni kunalowo lolutsa lomunye ambonge ngelite. 
Proverbs28:24 Umuntfu lowebela uyise nenina abe atiyenga atsi: “Akusiso sono loko,” ufanana nesigelekece lesisidlova." 
Proverbs28:25 Umuntfu loligovu ususa lutfutfuva; kodvwa lowo lowetsemba Simakadze uyawuchuma. 
Proverbs28:26 Umuntfu lotetsemba yena usilima; kodvwa lohamba ngekuhlakanipha uyawuphepha. 
Proverbs28:27 Umuntfu lopha timphuya angeke eswele; kodvwa lotitsalaliselako uyawutfola ticalekiso letinyenti. 
Proverbs28:28 Nakungena bantfu lababi etikhundleni, bantfu bayabhaca; kodvwa nakuwa lababi, labalungile bayaphumelela bahlale etikhundleni." 
Proverbs29:1 Umuntfu lotsi nakelulekwa acinise inhloko, uyakufohlotwa masinyane." 
Proverbs29:2 Nakungena bantfu labalungile ebuholini, bantfu bayajabula; kodvwa nakubusa bantfu lababi, bantfu bayakhonona." 
Proverbs29:3 Umuntfu lotsandza kuhlakanipha ujabulisa uyise; kodvwa longumngani wetingwadla uhlaphata lifa lakhe. 
Proverbs29:4 Inkhosi lebusa ngekulunga, live layo liba nesizotsa; kodvwa lebeka imali embili ibhubhisa live layo." 
Proverbs29:5 Umuntfu lolutsa makhelwane wakhe ambonge ngelite, utetsiya yena." 
Proverbs29:6 Kunelugibe etentweni letimbi temuntfu, kodvwa lolungile uhamba ajabula." 
Proverbs29:7 Umuntfu lolungile unakekela emalungelo alabamphofu; kodvwa lomubi akanandzaba naloko. 
Proverbs29:8 Tedzeleli letingenandzaba nebantfu, tingesusa lutfutfuva kuwo onkhe emadolobha; kodvwa bantfu labahlakaniphile baletsa kuthula nelucolo." 
Proverbs29:9 Nangabe umuntfu lohlakaniphile amangalela silima, lesilima sisuke sihleke setfuke ngenhlamba." 
Proverbs29:10 Babulali bayamtondza umuntfu lowetsembekile; kodvwa labalungile betama kuphephisa kuphila kwakhe. 
Proverbs29:11 Silima siyabonakalisa nase sitfukutsele; kodvwa lohlakaniphile uyatibamba angatibonakalisi. 
Proverbs29:12 Nangabe umbusi anaka labakhuluma emanga, tonkhe tindvuna takhe tiba nemanga." 
Proverbs29:13 Umcindzeteli nalocindzetelwe bafanana ngantfo yinye, kutsi: Bobabili Nkulunkulu wabapha emehlo ekubona." 
Proverbs29:14 Nangabe inkhosi iwavikela ngekungakhetsi emalungelo ebantfu labamphofu, iyawubusa sikhatsi lesidze." 
Proverbs29:15 Luswati nekuyalwa kunika inhlakanipho; kodvwa umntfwana longashaywa nalongayalwa uhlazisa unina. 
Proverbs29:16 Nangabe bantfu lababi basetikhundleni, bubi buyandza; kodvwa labalungile bayakubona kuwa kwalabo lababi." 
Proverbs29:17 Condzisa indvodzana yakho, khona itakunika kuthula kwemphefumulo. Ingeke ikuhlazise." 
Proverbs29:18 Lapho kute khona kwembulelwa nguNkulunkulu, bantfu bayeduka; kodvwa ubusisiwe umuntfu logcina umtsetfo waNkulunkulu." 
Proverbs29:19 Sisebenti ungeke usicondzise nawutawulibala kukhuluma ngemlomo; ngobe nome singeva, singeke sente." 
Proverbs29:20 Uyamati nje umuntfu lophike kukhuluma angakacabangi? Sincono silima kunaye. 
Proverbs29:21 Nangabe wetayeta sisebenti ngekusinika konkhe lesikufunako, nase sikhulile sitakwemuka konkhe lokukwakho." 
Proverbs29:22 Umuntfu losheshe atfuketsele ususa lutfutfuva; yebo, umuntfu lonenhlitiyo lencane ubanga tono letinyenti." 
Proverbs29:23 Kutigcabha kwemuntfu kumletsela kuwa; kodvwa lotfobekile utfola kuhlonipheka. 
Proverbs29:24 Umngani welisela usitsa sakhe cobo lwakhe. Umehluleli uyakumjezisa nakakhuluma liciniso, kantsi Nkulunkulu uyakumcalekisa nakangalikhulumi." 
Proverbs29:25 Kwesaba bantfu kulugibe; kodvwa lowo lowetsembekile kuSimakadze ulondvolotekile. 
Proverbs29:26 Bantfu labanyenti bafunana nekutsandvwa ngumbusi; kodvwa imphatfo lengakhetsi muntfu itfolakala kuSimakadze kuphela. 
Proverbs29:27 Labalungile bayabatondza lababi; nalababi bayabatondza labalungile. 
Proverbs30:1 Leti-ke taga ta-Aguri, umsa waJakhe waseMasa: “Nkulunkulu ungilahlile, ungilahle mbamba, sengiphelelwe ngemandla!" 
Proverbs30:2 Sengifanana nesilwane, angisesiye umuntfu, ngobe tintfo angisaticondzi njengemuntfu." 
Proverbs30:3 Angikakufundzi kuhlakanipha; angimati naLongcwele. 
Proverbs30:4 “Ngubani lowake waya ezulwini waphindze wabuya? Ngubani lophetse imimoya etandleni takhe? Ngubani logocotele emanti ngengubo yakhe? Ngubani lowamisa yonkhe imikhawulo yemhlaba? Ngubani libito lakhe nelendvodzana yakhe? Ungangitjela nje? 
Proverbs30:5 “Nkulunkulu wetsembekile etetsembisweni takhe. Uyabaphephisa labo labeta kutewukhosela kuye. 
Proverbs30:6 Ungengeti lutfo etetsembisweni takhe. Uma uke wengeta nje, uyakukutsetsisa utfolakale ungumuntfu wemanga.”" 
Proverbs30:7 Ticelo tami timbili, Nkulunkulu, lengicela kutsi ungiphe ngisengakafi:" 
Proverbs30:8 Ngisindzise ekukhulumeni emanga. Buphuya nebunjinga ungangiphi, kodvwa umane ungiphe lengikudzingako." 
Proverbs30:9 Nangingaba nako kube kunyenti, ngingahle ngicabange kutsi wena angisakudzingi, ngidzimate ngitsi: “Ngubani yena loSimakadze?” Nome-ke nangingaba luphuya, ngingahle ngebe, ngaloko ngihlazise Nkulunkulu wami." 
Proverbs30:10 Ungakhulumi kabi ngesisebenti kumphatsi waso; nawenta loko, sitakucalekisa uhlupheke." 
Proverbs30:11 Labanye bantfu bacalekisa boyise, bangabongi ngisho nekubonga kubonina." 
Proverbs30:12 Labanye bantfu bacabanga kutsi bona bahlantekile; kantsi bangcole kakhulu, abakahlantwa." 
Proverbs30:13 Labanye bayatigcabha, bahlala ngekuchukuluta labanye bantfu." 
Proverbs30:14 Labanye bantfu banematinyo latinkemba, nemihlatsi lengimikhwa; yebo, babukhali. Baloshela bamite tonkhe timphuya emhlabeni." 
Proverbs30:15 Simunyangati unemadvodzakati lamabili; emabito awo boNgiphe naNgiphe. Tintsatfu tintfo letingeneliswa, kantsi empeleni tine letingeke tisho titsi: “Sekwenele”:" 
Proverbs30:16 Lithuna, nemfati loyinyumba, nemhlabatsi lowomele imvula, nemlilo longacimeki." 
Proverbs30:17 Liso leliphukuta uyise, ledzelele nenina nasagugile, liyawukhokhwa ngemahhwabayi; yebo, lowo muntfu uyawuba kudla kwemangce." 
Proverbs30:18 Kukhona tintfo letintsatfu letiyimfihlakalo, kantsi empeleni tine lengingaticondzi kahle:" 
Proverbs30:19 Yindlela yelusweti esibhakabhakeni, nendlela yenyoka edvwaleni, nendlela yemkhumbi elwandle, nendlela yelijaha entfombini." 
Proverbs30:20 Lena-ke yindlela yemfati loyingwadla: Udla esule umlomo, bese utsi: “Angikenti lutfo mine lolubi.”" 
Proverbs30:21 Tintsatfu tintfo letitfutfumelisa umhlaba, kantsi empeleni tine umhlaba lowehluleka kutibeketelela:" 
Proverbs30:22 Kubekwa kwesigcili kuba yinkhosi, silima nasishaye inala," 
Proverbs30:23 kushada kwentfombi lebeyenyanywa ngemajaha, nesidzandzane lesisisebenti, nase sengcelele umfati endvodzeni yakhe." 
Proverbs30:24 Lapha emhlabeni kukhona tilwanyakatana letincane, kodvwa tihlakaniphe kakhulu:" 
Proverbs30:25 Tintfutfwane: tibutsakatsaka, kodvwa tikwekhweta ehlobo kudla kwato." 
Proverbs30:26 Timbila: tilwanyakatana letite emandla, noko takha emakhaya ato emadvwaleni." 
Proverbs30:27 Sikhonyane: site inkhosi, noko sihamba ngemaviyo." 
Proverbs30:28 Tibankhwa: ungatibamba ngesandla, kodvwa ungatikhandza ngisho nasetindlini temakhosi." 
Proverbs30:29 Kunetintfo letintsatfu letihamba ngekutigcabha; kodvwa leti letine tihamba ngekutigabatisa: 
Proverbs30:30 Libhubesi: linemandla kunato tonkhe tilwane, futsi alesabi lutfo." 
Proverbs30:31 Lichudze: liyantontomela emkhatsini wetikhukhukati. Siphongo: singumholi wemhlambi wetimbuti. Inkhosi: nayime embikwemabutfo ayo. 
Proverbs30:32 Nangabe wente bulima watiphakamisa nome wacabanga kwenta lokubi, sale sewuyekela." 
Proverbs30:33 Kuphehla lubisi kuveta liphehla. Kushaya likhala kuveta ingati. Kanjalo, nekususa luchuku kuveta kucabana." 
Proverbs31:1 Leti-ke taga taLemuweli, inkhosi yaseMasa, latifundziswa ngunina:" 
Proverbs31:2 “Lalela, ndvodzana yami, ndvodzana yesisu sami! Wena uyimphendvulo yemthandazo wami." 
Proverbs31:3 Emandla akho ungawacitsi kulabasikati; yebo, emandla ekuphila kwakho ungawacitseli kulabo lababhubhisa emakhosi." 
Proverbs31:4 Lalela-ke, Lemuweli: Emakhosi kufanele angalinatsi liwayini nome ngabe yini lokudzakanako." 
Proverbs31:5 Nase banatsa bayayikhohlwa lemitsetfo lebekiwe, bese bakhohlwa emalungelo alabacindzetelwe." 
Proverbs31:6 Tjwala bebantfu labafako kanye nalabo labaselusizini. 
Proverbs31:7 Bayekele banatse batewudzakwa bakhohlwe tinhlupheko tabo, bangalukhumbuli lusizi lwabo." 
Proverbs31:8 “Khuluma ubemelele labo labehluleka kutikhulumela. Vikela emalungelo alabo labangenalusito. 
Proverbs31:9 Khuluma wehlulele kahle. Vikela emalungelo alabeswele nalabamphofu.” 
Proverbs31:10 Ngubani longatfola umfati sibili? Uligugu lelengca onkhe ematje laligugu. 
Proverbs31:11 Indvodza yakhe yetsembele kuye ngenhlitiyo yayo yonkhe, futsi ingeke yeswele lutfo." 
Proverbs31:12 Uyentela lokuhle ngaso sonkhe sikhatsi sekuphila kwakhe, akayenteli lokubi." 
Proverbs31:13 Ukhetsa insontfo lenhle nakotini lokahle, asebente ngetandla letivumako." 
Proverbs31:14 Njengemikhumbi yebahwebi, kudla kwemndeni wakhe ukulandza khashane." 
Proverbs31:15 Uvuka kungakasi alungisele umndeni wakhe kudla, bese wabela tidzandzane takhe imisebenti." 
Proverbs31:16 Utsi angatfola indzawo, ayitsenge ngemali latentele yona ngetandla takhe, bese uyayilima wenta sivini." 
Proverbs31:17 Ukhutsele, uyabhukula afinyete tidvwaba, acinise tandla, asebente." 
Proverbs31:18 Uyacaphelisisa kutsi umsebenti wakhe uyayingenisa yini inzuzo, asebente kuze kube ngusebusuku." 
Proverbs31:19 Uyatitfungela atelukele. 
Proverbs31:20 Unesandla ekusiteni labamphofu, aphe nalabeswele." 
Proverbs31:21 Kukhitsika kwelitulu akumetfusi, ngobe bonkhe bemndeni wakhe banetimphahla letifutfumalako." 
Proverbs31:22 Wenta tembeso temibhedze, embatse timphahla letentiwe ngakotini locolisakele naletibukhwebeletane." 
Proverbs31:23 Indvodza yakhe iyahlonishwa emasangweni, lapho ingulenye yemalunga emsumphe khona." 
Proverbs31:24 Utfunga tingubo ngendvwangu lecolisakele, bese utsengisela bahwebi." 
Proverbs31:25 Wembetse emandla nekuhlonipheka, futsi akesabi lutfo ngelikusasa." 
Proverbs31:26 Ukhuluma kuhlakanipha, lulwimi lwakhe lugcwele teluleko temusa." 
Proverbs31:27 Ucaphelisisa konkhe lokwenteka ekhaya lakhe, akavilaphi." 
Proverbs31:28 Bantfwabakhe bayamhlonipha, nendvodza yakhe futsi iyamdvumisa idzimate itsi:" 
Proverbs31:29 “Banyenti bafati labenta tintfo letinhle, kodvwa wena ubendlula bonkhe.”" 
Proverbs31:30 Buhle buyayengana, nekubukeka kulite; kodvwa umfati lowesaba Simakadze ufanele kudvunyiswa." 
Proverbs31:31 Mbonge ngako konkhe lakwenta ngetandla takhe; umdvumisele imisebenti yakhe layentile ngisho nasemkhatsini webantfu. 
Ecclesiastes1:1 Lawa ngemavi eMshumayeli, umsa waDavide, inkhosi yaseJerusalema:" 
Ecclesiastes1:2 “Lite lelite!” kusho uMshumayeli. “Kulite mbamba! Konkhe kulite.” 
Ecclesiastes1:3 Umuntfu utfolani ngawo wonkhe umshikashika lawusebentelako lapha ngaphansi kwemtfunti welilanga? 
Ecclesiastes1:4 Titukulwane tiyefika, titukulwane tiyendlula, kodvwa umhlaba uyakusala unjalo phakadze naphakadze." 
Ecclesiastes1:5 Lilanga liyaphuma, lilanga liyashona, libuyele endzaweni yalo lapho liphuma khona." 
Ecclesiastes1:6 Umoya uphephetsela ngaseningizimu, bese uyajika ucondza ngasenyakatfo, ushaye situngeletane, ujikeleta lapho uhambe khona." 
Ecclesiastes1:7 Yonkhe imifula ingenisa elwandle, noko lwandle alugcwali, lapho ichamuka ngakhona imifula, iphindze ibuyele khona futsi." 
Ecclesiastes1:8 Tonkhe tintfo tiyadzinana, kute umuntfu longatichaza. Liso alizange leneliswe kubuka, kantsi nendlebe ayigcwali ngekuva." 
Ecclesiastes1:9 Lokwake kwaba khona kuyawuphindze kube khona futsi, lokwase kwentiwa kuyawuphindze kwentiwe futsi; kute intfo lensha, lapha ngaphansi kwemtfunti welilanga." 
Ecclesiastes1:10 Kukhona yini intfo umuntfu langasho ngayo atsi: “Ase nibuke, kusha-ke loku”? Cha, kwase kwaba khona endvulo, kwakukhona sisengakabikho." 
Ecclesiastes1:11 Bantfu bakadzeni abakhunjulwa, nalabo labalandzelako abayiwukhunjulwa ngulabo lababalandzelako." 
Ecclesiastes1:12 Mine, Mshumayeli, ngangiyinkhosi yema-Israyeli eJerusalema." 
Ecclesiastes1:13 Ngatimisela kutsi ngekuhlakanipha ngifundze ngiphenyisise ngako konkhe lokwentiwa emhlabeni. Maye, mkhulu umtfwalo Nkulunkulu lawetfwese bantfu!" 
Ecclesiastes1:14 Ngikubone konkhe lokwentiwako ngaphansi kwemtfunti welilanga; konkhe kulite, kufanana nekucosha umoya." 
Ecclesiastes1:15 Loko lokugwegwile kungeke kucondziseke, loko lokungekho kungeke kubalwe." 
Ecclesiastes1:16 Ngaticabangela ngatsi: “Mine ngikhulile, ngacokelela incumbi yekuhlakanipha, ngabendlula bonkhe labase babusela eJerusalema ngaphambi kwami; sengikubone kakhulu kuhlakanipha kanye nelwati.”" 
Ecclesiastes1:17 Ngatimisela engcondvweni yami kukwati kuhlakanipha, nebuhlanya nebulima, kodvwa ngefika lapho ngibona khona kutsi nako loko kufanana nekucosha umoya." 
Ecclesiastes1:18 Ngobe kuhlakanipha lokukhulu kutala lusizi lolukhulu: Umuntfu utsi angaba nelwati lolukhulu, nekuhlupheka kwakhe kube kukhulu." 
Ecclesiastes2:1 Ngacabanga enhlitiyweni yami, ngatsi: “Ngitatitika ngato tonkhe tinhlobo tenjabulo ngitsi ngiyatijabulisa, ngifuna kubona kutsi yini lenhle.” Kodvwa ngatfola kutsi naloko kulite." 
Ecclesiastes2:2 Ngabona, ngatsi: “Cha, kuhleka kubuhlanya. Yini nje lenhle ngekutijabulisa?”" 
Ecclesiastes2:3 Ngako ngetama kutijabulisa ngeliwayini, ngagona bulima. Kodvwa ingcondvo yami yayidvonswa kuhlakanipha. Ngangifuna kubona kutsi yini lokungukona kufanele kwentiwe bantfu lapha emhlabeni kulamalangana emphilo yabo." 
Ecclesiastes2:4 Ngesukela imisebenti lemikhulu: Ngatakhela tindlu, ngahlanyela tivini." 
Ecclesiastes2:5 Ngahlanyela tingadze, ngakha netindzawo tekuphumula, ngahlanyela tonkhe tinhlobo tetihlahla tetitselo lapha ngekhatsi kuletingadze," 
Ecclesiastes2:6 ngatakhela emadamu ekunisela lamahlatsi etihlahla letikhulako," 
Ecclesiastes2:7 ngatsenga tigcili letidvuna naletisikati, kantsi futsi nganginaleti letatalelwa khona ekhaya kami. Ngetulu kwaloko ngangifuyile, nginemihlambi yetinkhomo, neyetimbuti, neyetimvu, ngendlula bonkhe laba labake bahlala kucala kunami eJerusalema." 
Ecclesiastes2:8 Ngabutsisa ndzawonye isiliva negolide kanye nengcebo yemakhosi neyemave. Ngatibutsela bahlabeli labadvuna nalabasikati nako konkhe umuntfu langahle atijabulise ngako. 
Ecclesiastes2:9 Ngaba mkhulu, ngadvuma kakhulu, kwendlula bonkhe laba labase babusela eJerusalema kucala kunami. Kuko konkhe loko kuhlakanipha kwami kwakuloku kukimi." 
Ecclesiastes2:10 Konkhe emehlo ami labefisa kukubuka, ngangiwanika kona. Angizange ngitibambe ngisho nakukunye kutijabulisa. Ngatijabulisa ngawo wonkhe umsebenti wami; loku kwaba ngumvuzo wami ngawo wonkhe umsebenti wami." 
Ecclesiastes2:11 Ngako ngesuka lapho ngayibukisisa kahle yonkhe imisebenti yetandla tami, wonkhe umshikashika nekukhandleka kwami bekulite, kufanana nekucosha umoya! Kute lokwaba yinzuzo lapha ngaphansi kwemtfunti welilanga." 
Ecclesiastes2:12 Ngabe sengicabangisisa ngekuhlakanipha, nangebuhlanya kanye nangebulima. Yini nje lengentiwa ngulowo lolandzela inkhosi embusweni ngaphandle kwaloko lesekwentiwe?" 
Ecclesiastes2:13 Ngabona kutsi kuhlakanipha kuncono kunebulima, njengobe nekukhanya kuncono kunebumnyama." 
Ecclesiastes2:14 Umuntfu lohlakaniphile uyabona lapho aya khona, kodvwa silima sona sihamba ebumnyameni; noko ngase ngiyabona kutsi bobabili befikelwa siphetfo lesifananako." 
Ecclesiastes2:15 Ngabe sengicabanga enhlitiyweni, ngatsi: “Ngisho nami imbala siphetfo sesilima siyakungifikela. Pho, kungisita ngani kuhlakanipha kwami?” Ngacabanga enhlitiyweni yami, ngatsi: “Nako loko kulite.”" 
Ecclesiastes2:16 Kukhunjulwa kwesihlakaniphi akukwendluli ngalutfo kukhunjulwa kwesilima, ngobe ngekuhamba kwemalanga bobabili bayawukhohlakala. Lohlakaniphile nalosilima bafa kufa kunye!" 
Ecclesiastes2:17 Ngako ngakutondza kuphila, ngobe konkhe lokwentiwako lapha ngaphansi kwemtfunti welilanga kuhlupheka kimi. Konkhe loku kulite, kufanana nekucosha umoya." 
Ecclesiastes2:18 Ngase ngifika lapho ngiwutondza khona wonkhe umshikashika nekukhandleka kwami lengase ngikwentile ngaphansi kwemtfunti welilanga, ngobe titselo tako kufanele ngitishiyele lowo loyakuta emvakwami." 
Ecclesiastes2:19 Empeleni ngubani lowatiko kutsi utawuba sihlakaniphi yini nome utawuba silima? Noko kutawuba nguye lotakwengamela tonkhe titselo temsebenti wami netebungcweti bami lapha ngaphansi kwemtfunti welilanga. Nako loko kulite. 
Ecclesiastes2:20 Ngako inhlitiyo yami yacala kuphelelwa ngemandla kuko konkhe kukhandleka kwami lengikwentile lapha ngaphansi kwemtfunti welilanga. 
Ecclesiastes2:21 Ngobe kunjalo, umuntfu umsebenti wakhe angawenta ngekuhlakanipha, nangelwati kanye nangekucophelela, kodvwa kufanele konkhe loko lokungekwakhe akushiyele umuntfu longakaze wakusebentela. Nako loko kulite nebubi lobukhulu." 
Ecclesiastes2:22 Umuntfu utfolani ngako konkhe kukhandleka kwakhe nekushikaneka kwakhe lakwentako lapha ngaphansi kwemtfunti welilanga? 
Ecclesiastes2:23 Kuto tonkhe tinsuku tekuphila kwakhe, umsebenti wakhe yiminjunju nekuhlupheka; ngisho nasebusuku ingcondvo yakhe ayinako kuphumula. Nako loko kulite." 
Ecclesiastes2:24 Kute lokuncono umuntfu langakwenta ngaphandle kwekutsi adle anatse eneliseke ngemsebenti wakhe. Nako loku futsi ngikubona kuphuma esandleni saNkulunkulu," 
Ecclesiastes2:25 ngobe ngubani longadla ajabule ngaphandle kwakhe? 
Ecclesiastes2:26 Nkulunkulu uphana ngekuhlakanipha, nangelwati kanye nangenjabulo kumuntfu lotfokotisa yena, kodvwa soni usinika umshikashika wekubutsisa nekucongelela bunjinga, kuze kunikwe lowo lotfokotisa Nkulunkulu. Nako loko kulite, kufanana nekucosha umoya." 
Ecclesiastes3:1 Konkhe kunesikhatsi sako, yonkhe intfo leyentekako inesikhatsi sayo lapha emhlabeni:" 
Ecclesiastes3:2 Kunesikhatsi sekutalwa nesikhatsi sekufa, sikhatsi sekuhlanyela nesikhatsi sekusiphula," 
Ecclesiastes3:3 sikhatsi sekubulala nesikhatsi sekuphilisa, sikhatsi sekubhidlita nesikhatsi sekwakha," 
Ecclesiastes3:4 sikhatsi sekukhala nesikhatsi sekuhleka, sikhatsi sekulila nesikhatsi sekugidza," 
Ecclesiastes3:5 sikhatsi sekusakata ematje nesikhatsi sekuwabutsa, sikhatsi sekugona nesikhatsi sekuchilita," 
Ecclesiastes3:6 sikhatsi sekufuna nesikhatsi sekuyekela, sikhatsi sekulondvolota nesikhatsi sekulahla," 
Ecclesiastes3:7 sikhatsi sekudzabula nesikhatsi sekuchibela, sikhatsi sekubindza nesikhatsi sekukhuluma," 
Ecclesiastes3:8 sikhatsi sekutsandza nesikhatsi sekutondza, sikhatsi semphi nesikhatsi sekuthula." 
Ecclesiastes3:9 Umuntfu losebentako ubuyelwa yini ngekukhandleka kwakhe? 
Ecclesiastes3:10 Ngiwubonile umshikashika Nkulunkulu lawunike bantfu kutsi bawente. 
Ecclesiastes3:11 Konkhe ukwente kwalungela sikhatsi sako. Uphindze wabeka liphakadze etinhlitiyweni tebantfu; noko abakhoni kuyicondza imisebenti yaNkulunkulu kusukela ekucaleni kwayo kuze kube ngusekugcineni. 
Ecclesiastes3:12 Ngiyati kutsi kute lokuncono ngaphandle kwekutsi bajabule baphile imphilo lekahle basesemhlabeni. 
Ecclesiastes3:13 Ngetulu kwaloko kutsi umuntfu adle anatse atijabulise ngayo yonkhe imishikashika yakhe kusipho saNkulunkulu.
