Ecclesiastes3:14 Ngiyati kutsi konkhe lokwentiwa nguNkulunkulu kuyakuma phakadze naphakadze; kute lokungengetwa nalokungacetunwa kuko. Konkhe ukwenta ngendlela yekutsi bantfu batfutfumele ebukhoneni bakhe. 
Ecclesiastes3:15 Konkhe lokukhona ngulokwake kwaba khona, naloko lokuyawuba khona sekwake kwaba khona, Nkulunkulu uyakubuyisa loko lekwake kwenteka kutsi kuphindze kwenteke ngesikhatsi sako." 
Ecclesiastes3:16 Ngetulu kwaloko kukhona lokunye lengaphindze ngakubona lapha ngaphansi kwemtfunti welilanga: lapho kwakufanele kusebenta khona umtsetfo, kwasebenta umonakalo; lapho kwakufanele kusebente khona kulunga, kwasebenta umonakalo." 
Ecclesiastes3:17 Ngacabanga enhlitiyweni yami, ngatsi: “Nkulunkulu uyakwehlulela labalungile nalababi, ngobe kutawuba nesikhatsi sako konkhe lokwentiwako, nesikhatsi sawo wonkhe umsebenti.”" 
Ecclesiastes3:18 Ngaphindze ngacabanga ngatsi: “Macondzana nebantfu Nkulunkulu uyaye abavivinye, khona batewubona kutsi bafanana netilwane." 
Ecclesiastes3:19 Ngobe siphetfo semuntfu siyafanana nesiphetfo setilwane; kokubili kumelwe siphetfo lesifananako: Njengobe lokunye kufa, naloku lokunye kuyafa. Konkhe kunemiphefumulo lefananako, umuntfu kute lancono ngako kunesilwane. Ngako konkhe kulite." 
Ecclesiastes3:20 Konkhe kuya endzaweni yinye; konkhe kuphuma elutfulini kuphindze kubuyele elutfulini. 
Ecclesiastes3:21 Ngubani lowatiko kutsi umphefumulo wemuntfu wenyukela etulu yini, nekutsi umphefumulo wesilwane wehlela phansi emhlabatsini?”" 
Ecclesiastes3:22 Ngako ngase ngiyabona kutsi kute lokuncono kumuntfu ngaphandle kwekutsi atijabulise ngemsebenti wakhe lawentako, ngobe phela leso ngusona sabelo sakhe. Empeleni ngubani nje longamvusa kuze atewubona kutsi kutakwentekani nase afile?" 
Ecclesiastes4:1 Ngaphindze ngabuka ngabona konkhe kucindzetelana lokwentiwako lapha ngaphansi kwemtfunti welilanga: Ngabona tinyembeti talabacindzetelwe, bate ngisho nemdvudvuti; emandla abengakubacindzeteli babo, kodvwa labo labacindzetelwe bate ngisho nemdvudvuti." 
Ecclesiastes4:2 Ngakhandza kutsi labafile bayajabula; labo lasebalala bancono kunalaba labaphilako. 
Ecclesiastes4:3 Kodvwa loncono kunabo bonkhe ngulowo losengakatalwa losengakawuboni lomonakalo lowenteka lapha ngaphansi kwemtfunti welilanga. 
Ecclesiastes4:4 Ngabona kutsi wonkhe umshikashika nako konkhe kuphumelela kwemuntfu kusukela ekuhawukeleni kwakhe lutfo kumakhelwane wakhe. Nako loko kulite, kufanana nekucosha umoya." 
Ecclesiastes4:5 Silima sigoca tandla, silambe size sife." 
Ecclesiastes4:6 Kuncono kubamba ngesandla sinye ube nekuthula emoyeni, kunekubamba emabhabha ngemshikashika nekucosha umoya." 
Ecclesiastes4:7 Ngaphindze futsi ngabona lokunye lokulite lapha ngaphansi kwemtfunti welilanga: 
Ecclesiastes4:8 Bekunemuntfu labehleti yedvwana, abengenandvodzana ate nemnakabo. Abeshikaneka siphelane ajinge angeneliseki ngebunjinga bakhe, watibuta watsi: “Empeleni ngikhandlekela bani? Ngitemukelani lokujabula?” Nako loko kulite, umsebenti lolusizi!" 
Ecclesiastes4:9 Babili bancono kunamunye, ngobe batfola umvuzo lomuhle ngemsebenti wabo:" 
Ecclesiastes4:10 Nakuwa lomunye wabo, lomngani wakhe uyamsita amsukumise, kodvwa maye kulowo muntfu loyedvwa, lotsi nakawa angabi naye lotamsita amsukumise." 
Ecclesiastes4:11 Kantsi futsi bantfu nabalele bababili bayafutfumetana; kodvwa umuntfu angatifutfumeta kanjani alele yedvwa? 
Ecclesiastes4:12 Nangabe umuntfu ayedvwa, angehlulwa nakahlaselwa; kantsi nabababili bangativikela. Intsambo lenemicu lemitsatfu ayisheshi idzabuke." 
Ecclesiastes4:13 Uncono umuntfu lomusha lophuyile nalohlakaniphile kunenkhosi lendzala lesilima nalengasatitsatsi teluleko. 
Ecclesiastes4:14 Umuntfu lomusha angaphuma ejele angene esihlalweni sebukhosi, nome abengulotelwe angulomphofu embusweni walenkhosi." 
Ecclesiastes4:15 Ngabona kutsi bonkhe bantfu labake baphila lapha ngaphansi kwemtfunti welilanga balandzela lona lomusha labetsetse sikhundla senkhosi. 
Ecclesiastes4:16 Bangaba banyenti kabi bantfu labangabuswa yinkhosi. Kodvwa itawutsi ingakhotsama, bantfu bangakubongi loko lekwentile. Nako loko kulite, kufanana nekucosha umoya." 
Ecclesiastes5:1 Caphela tinyatselo takho, nawuya endlini yaNkulunkulu. Ngobe kuncono kusondzela nekulalela kunekutsi unikele ngemhlatjelo wetilima, letingati kutsi ngekwenta loko tiyona." 
Ecclesiastes5:2 Ungasheshi ukhulume ngemlomo wakho, ungabi nematata enhlitiyweni yakho kutsi ukhulume nome yini kuNkulunkulu. Nkulunkulu usezulwini, wena usemhlabeni, ngako emavi akho akabe mbalwa." 
Ecclesiastes5:3 Njengobe liphupho likuhlasela nawuneminako leminyenti, kanjalo nenkhulumo yesilima ibonakala ngemavi lamanyenti." 
Ecclesiastes5:4 Nawenta sifungo kuNkulunkulu, ungacali wephute ekusifezeni. Akatijabuleli tilima; sifungo sakho sifeze." 
Ecclesiastes5:5 Kuncono kutsi ungasenti setsembiso kunekutsi usente ungabe usasifeza. 
Ecclesiastes5:6 Ungawuvumeli umlomo wakho kutsi ukuholele esonweni, bese ukhuluma engilosini yaNkulunkulu utsi: “Cha, loko ngikushito ngesiphosiso.” Kudzingeke ngani kutsi Nkulunkulu aze atfukutseliswe ngemavi akho nekutsi yonkhe imisebenti yakho ibe lite kuye?" 
Ecclesiastes5:7 Kwandza kwemaphupho nemavi lamanyenti kulite. Ngako wena yesaba Nkulunkulu. 
Ecclesiastes5:8 Nawubona lophuyile acindzetelwe endzaweni letsite, asemukwe emalungelo akhe nekwehlulelwa ngebucotfo, kungakumangalisi loko. Lowo nalowo lophetse unemuntfu longetulu kwakhe, kantsi nalowo longetulu kwakhe unemuntfu longetulu kwabo bonkhe." 
Ecclesiastes5:9 Inala yemhlaba itfolwa ngibo bonkhe bantfu; ngisho nenkhosi imbala nayo iyabuyelwa nguloko lokutfolakala emhlabatsini. 
Ecclesiastes5:10 Umuntfu lotsandza imali akeneliseki ngayo; nemuntfu lotsandza bunjinga lobukhulu akeneliswa nguloko lakutfolile. Nako loko kulite. 
Ecclesiastes5:11 Ngekwandza kwetimphahla, nalabo labatisebentisako bayandza. Pho, timsita ngani-ke lomnikati ngaphandle kwekutsi atitsaphe ngemehlo?" 
Ecclesiastes5:12 Maye, butfongo besisebenti bumnandzi, lite nome sidle kancane nome sidle sesutsa; kodvwa inala yemuntfu lonjingile ayimniki butfongo." 
Ecclesiastes5:13 Ngibone intfo lembi lelusizi lapha ngaphansi kwemtfunti welilanga: Umcebo lobutselwe ndzawonye bese usuka ulimata umnikati wawo," 
Ecclesiastes5:14 nome-ke lomcebo bese ulahleka ngelishwa lelitsite, nendvodzana yalomnikati ingasatfoli lutfo." 
Ecclesiastes5:15 Umuntfu uphuma angcunu esiswini senina, kanjalo nome asahamba, uyawuhamba angcunu. Kute layawukuphatsa ngesandla sakhe kuko konkhe lakusebentele." 
Ecclesiastes5:16 Nako loko kuyimvisabuhlungu: Kufika kwemuntfu kufanana nekuhamba kwakhe; utfolani-ke umuntfu, nangabe kantsi wonkhe lomshikashika wakhe ungumoya nje?" 
Ecclesiastes5:17 Onkhe emalanga akhe udlela ebumnyameni, ngekukhatsateka lolukhulu, nelusizi, nelulaka." 
Ecclesiastes5:18 Ngase ngiyabona kutsi kuhle kutsi umuntfu adle, anatse, atijabulise ngayo yonkhe imisebenti yakhe layentako lapha ngaphansi kwemtfunti welilanga, atijabulise ngawo onkhe lawo malangana Nkulunkulu lamuphe wona kutsi awaphile ngaphansi kwemtfunti welilanga, ngobe loko kusabelo sakhe," 
Ecclesiastes5:19 ngetulu kwaloko kusipho saNkulunkulu kuye wonkhe umuntfu lamuphe bunjinga, nemcebo, nemandla, kutsi atijabulise ngako, asemukele leso sabelo sakhe, ajabule emsebentini wakhe." 
Ecclesiastes5:20 Ngobe akayikutikhumbula kakhulu tinsuku tekuphila kwakhe, ngobe phela Nkulunkulu umenta ahlale amatasatasa ngekujabula enhlitiyweni yakhe." 
Ecclesiastes6:1 Ngibone lenye intfo lembi lapha ngaphansi kwemtfunti welilanga, futsi ingumtfwalo lomatima kubantfu:" 
Ecclesiastes6:2 Nkulunkulu upha umuntfu ingcebo, netimphahla letinyenti, nekuhlonipheka, kuze kutsi kubete lakweswelako lokufiswa yinhlitiyo yakhe, kodvwa Nkulunkulu angamvumeli kutsi atijabulise ngayo, esikhundleni saloko kube ngumfokati nje lotijabulisa ngayo. Nako loko kulite nemvisabuhlungu lembi." 
Ecclesiastes6:3 Indvodza ingaba nebantfwana labalikhulu, iphile iminyaka leminyenti; kodvwa nome ingaphila sikhatsi lesidze, ingakwati kutijabulisa ngetintfo letinhle tekuphila, bese kutsi ekugcineni ingabe insangcwatjwa nakahle, ngitsi umntfwana lotelwe asafile uncono kakhulu kunayo." 
Ecclesiastes6:4 Kutalwa kwakhe kulite, unyamalala ebumnyameni nelibito lakhe lifihlakale ebumnyameni." 
Ecclesiastes6:5 Nome angazange alibone lilanga, angazange ati nalutfo, kuphumula kwakhe kuncono kunekwaleyo ndvodza," 
Ecclesiastes6:6 lite nome leyo ndvodza ingaphila iminyaka leyinkhulungwane lephindvwe kabili, kodvwa ibe yehluleka kutijabulisa ngalengcebo yayo. Abayi ndzawonye bonkhe yini?" 
Ecclesiastes6:7 Yonkhe imitamo yemuntfu ngeyekutfola kudla, noko lutsandvo lwekudla alweneliseki." 
Ecclesiastes6:8 Umuntfu lohlakaniphile uncono ngani kunemuntfu losilima? Umuntfu lophuyile utfolani ngekwati kutiphatsa kahle embikwebantfu? 
Ecclesiastes6:9 Kuncono kweneliswa nguloko lokubona ngemehlo akho kunekushangashangiswa lutsandvo lwekudla. Nako loko kulite, kufanana nekucosha umoya." 
Ecclesiastes6:10 Konkhe lokukhona sekwetsiwa libito lako, nemvelo yemuntfu iyatiwa. Kute umuntfu longamelana nalonemandla kunaye." 
Ecclesiastes6:11 Ngekwandza kwemavi, kwandza nebute bawo. Kona loko kumbuyiselani nje umuntfu?" 
Ecclesiastes6:12 Empeleni ngubani longahle ati kutsi yini lenhle lefanele umuntfu kulokuphila, nakulamalangana lambalwa nalalite lendlula kuwo njengesitfunti? Ngubani nje longatjela lomunye umuntfu kutsi kutakwentekani lapha ngaphansi kwemtfunti welilanga nangasekho?" 
Ecclesiastes7:1 Libito lelihle lincono kunemakha lamnandzi, nelilanga lekufa lincono kunelekutalwa." 
Ecclesiastes7:2 Kuncono kuya endlini lapho kulilwa khona kunekuya endlini lapho kunelidzili khona, ngobe kufa kusiphetfo sabo bonkhe bantfu; labo labaphilako kufanele bakufake enhlitiyweni yabo loko." 
Ecclesiastes7:3 Lusizi luncono kuneluhleko, ngobe buso lobudzabukile buyayilungela inhlitiyo." 
Ecclesiastes7:4 Inhlitiyo yalabahlakaniphile isendlini yalabalilako, kodvwa inhlitiyo yetilima isendlini yalabatsakasile." 
Ecclesiastes7:5 Kuncono kulalela nawekhutwa ngumuntfu lohlakaniphile kunekunaka kubongelelwa tilima. 
Ecclesiastes7:6 Njengekusasamba kwemanyeva nakasha ngaphansi kwelibhodo, lunjalo-ke neluhleko lwetilima. Nako loko kulite." 
Ecclesiastes7:7 Ngempela, inkhohliso yenta umuntfu lohlakaniphile abe silima; umdizo wonakalisa inhlitiyo nengcondvo." 
Ecclesiastes7:8 Siphetfo sentfo sincono kunesicalo sayo, nekubeketela kuncono kuneligcabho." 
Ecclesiastes7:9 Ungasheshi ucansuke emoyeni wakho, ngobe intfukutselo ihlala esifubeni sesilima." 
Ecclesiastes7:10 Ungabuti utsi: “Kwabangelwa yini kutsi tinsuku takadzeni tibe ncono kunaleti tetfu?” Ngobe akukahlakaniphi kubuta leyo mibuto. 
Ecclesiastes7:11 Kuhlakanipha kuyintfo lenhle njengelifa, kantsi futsi kusita labo labasabona lilanga." 
Ecclesiastes7:12 Kuhlakanipha kuyintfo yekukhosela njengobe nemali kuyintfo yekukhosela, kodvwa buhle belwati kutsi: Kuhlakanipha kuyawulondvolota kuphila kwemnikati wako." 
Ecclesiastes7:13 Cabangisisa ngemisebenti yaNkulunkulu. Ngubani longacondzisa loko lakwenta kwaba sigwegwe? 
Ecclesiastes7:14 Natintfo tihamba kahle, tsakasa; kodvwa natintfo tingahambi kahle, khumbula naku: Nkulunkulu ukuvumela kutsi kwenteke kokubili. Ngako-ke umuntfu angeke akwati kubona lutfo ngelikusasa lakhe." 
Ecclesiastes7:15 Kulokuphila kwami lokulite ngikubone kokubili loku: Umuntfu lolungile ufela ekulungeni kwakhe, nemuntfu lomubi uphila sikhatsi lesidze ebubini bakhe." 
Ecclesiastes7:16 Ungatenti umuntfu lolunge kakhulu, futsi ungabi ngulohlakaniphe kunabo bonkhe; empeleni utibulalelani nje?" 
Ecclesiastes7:17 Ungatenti umuntfu lomubi kakhulu, kantsi futsi ungatenti silima kakhulu; empeleni ufunelani kufa, sikhatsi sakho sekufa singakefiki?" 
Ecclesiastes7:18 Kuhle kutsi ukubambe loku, kodvwa ungakuyekeli-ke lokwa. Umuntfu lowesaba Nkulunkulu uyawuphumelela kuko konkhe." 
Ecclesiastes7:19 Kuhlakanipha kwenta umuntfu munye abe nemandla kakhulu kunebabusi belidolobha labalishumi. 
Ecclesiastes7:20 Kute nome munye umuntfu lolungile emhlabeni lowenta lokuhle kuphela, kubete lakonako." 
Ecclesiastes7:21 Ungawanaki onkhe emavi lakhulunywa bantfu, ungahle uve nesisebenti sakho sikuhlambalata," 
Ecclesiastes7:22 ngobe ngisho nawe wati kahle enhlitiyweni yakho kutsi kukanyenti kangakanani uhlambalata labanye bantfu. 
Ecclesiastes7:23 Konkhe loku ngakuhlolisisa ngekuhlakanipha, ngase ngitsi: “Ngitimisele kuba ngulohlakaniphile,” kodvwa loko bekungetulu kwemandla ami." 
Ecclesiastes7:24 Lokungiko sibili kukhashane kakhulu, kantsi futsi kujule kakhulu, ngubani longakutfola?" 
Ecclesiastes7:25 Ngase ngijikisela ingcondvo yami ekufunisiseni kwati nasekuphenyisiseni kuhlakanipha nekuhleleka kwetintfo, nasekucondzisiseni bulima bebubi kanye nebuhlanya bebulima." 
Ecclesiastes7:26 Ngikhandza lokubaba kakhulu kunekufa: umfati lolugibe nalonenhlitiyo lengusochaka, yebo, umfati lotandla takhe titibopho. Indvodza lejabulisa Nkulunkulu iyawubaleka kuye, kodvwa indvodza lesoni uyakuyibamba." 
Ecclesiastes7:27 UMshumayeli utsi: “Ase ubuke naku lengikutfolile: Kuhlanganisa intfo lencane ngayinye ngayinye kulokunye, kuze ngitfole indzikimba." 
Ecclesiastes7:28 Ngatsi ngisaphenyisisa ngingatfoli lutfo, ngatfola indvodza yinye lecondzile kulayinkhulungwane, kodvwa kwabate ngisho namunye umfati locondzile kubo bonkhe." 
Ecclesiastes7:29 Naku kuphela lengikutfolile: kutsi Nkulunkulu wadala umuntfu, wamenta waba ngulocondzile, kodvwa bantfu besuka bayawufuna emachinga abo lamanyenti.”" 
Ecclesiastes8:1 Ngubani umuntfu lonjengalohlakaniphile? Ngubani lowati inchazelo yetintfo? Inhlakanipho ikhanyisa buso bemuntfu igucule kunyukubala kwebuso bakhe. 
Ecclesiastes8:2 Ngitsi hlonipha umyalo wenkhosi ngenca yesifungo lowasenta kuNkulunkulu. 
Ecclesiastes8:3 Ungasheshi usuke embikwenkhosi. Ungacali futsi ukusukumele lokubi, ngobe itakwenta nome ngabe yini leyikutsandzako." 
Ecclesiastes8:4 Njengobe livi lenkhosi liyabusa, ngubani longasho kuyo atsi: “Yini lena loyentako?”" 
Ecclesiastes8:5 Lohlonipha umyalo wenkhosi, kute lokungamfaka engotini. Umuntfu lohlakaniphile uyati enhlitiyweni yakhe sikhatsi lesilungile nendlela lekahle yekwenta tintfo." 
Ecclesiastes8:6 Ngobe yonkhe indzaba inesikhatsi sayo nendlela yayo, noko lusizi lwemuntfu luhlala lumatima etikwakhe." 
Ecclesiastes8:7 Njengobe kute umuntfu lowati likusasa lakhe kutsi limphatseleni, ngubani nje longasho kutsi yini letakwenteka?" 
Ecclesiastes8:8 Kute umuntfu lonemandla ekubamba umoya, futsi kute nalonemandla ekujikisa lilanga lekufa kwakhe. Njengobe kute umuntfu lokhululekile nakuliwa imphi, kanjalo futsi nebubi bungeke bubakhulule labo lababentako." 
Ecclesiastes8:9 Konkhe loku ngakubona ngisacabangisisa ngako konkhe lokwenteka lapha ngaphansi kwemtfunti welilanga. Sikhona sikhatsi lapho umuntfu usuke atihlisibete etikwalabanye kantsi utilimata yena. 
Ecclesiastes8:10 Ngase ngabona lababi, babengcwatjwa, labo babephuma bangena endzaweni lengcwele babatjatwe badvunyiswe edolobheni lapho bebakwenta khona loko. Nako loko kulite." 
Ecclesiastes8:11 Ngenca yekutsi sigwebo sentfo lembi siyephuta kukhishwa, tinhlitiyo tebantfu setihlosa kwenta bubi ngesibindzi." 
Ecclesiastes8:12 Nome lomubi enta bubi kalikhulu, achubeke aphile sikhatsi lesidze, ngiyati kutsi kuyakubahambela kahle labo labesaba Nkulunkulu, bahloniphe Nkulunkulu." 
Ecclesiastes8:13 Kodvwa kungeke kubahambele kahle lababi, futsi imphilo yabo ingeke yeluleke njengematfunti, ngobe bangamesabi Nkulunkulu." 
Ecclesiastes8:14 Kukhona lokunye lokulite lokwentekako lapha emhlabeni: Kukhona bantfu labalungile labehlelwa nguloko lokufanele kwehlele lababi, kantsi futsi kukhona nalababi labehlelwa nguloko lokufanele kwehlele labalungile. Ngatsi nako loko kulite." 
Ecclesiastes8:15 Ngako mine ngincoma kutsi umuntfu kufanele atijabulise ngekuphila kwakhe, ngobe umuntfu ute lutfo loluhle lapha ngaphansi kwemtfunti welilanga, ngaphandle kwekutsi adle, anatse, atijabulise; ngobe loku kuyawuhlala kukuye kuwo wonkhe umshikashika wekuphila kwakhe, Nkulunkulu lamuphe wona lapha ngaphansi kwemtfunti welilanga." 
Ecclesiastes8:16 Ngatsi nangitimisela engcondvweni yami kufunisisa kwati nekuhlakanipha nekutfolisisa kutsi yini umshikashika lowentiwa ngumuntfu emhlabeni, angalali emini nebusuku," 
Ecclesiastes8:17 ngayibona yonkhe imisebenti yaNkulunkulu kutsi umuntfu angeke ayicondze yonkhe imisebenti leyentiwako lapha ngaphansi kwemtfunti welilanga. Nome umuntfu angatihlupha kangakanani afunisisa, angeke ayicondze; nome lohlakaniphile angatsi yena uyati, angeke ayicondze." 
Ecclesiastes9:1 Ngacabangisisa ngako konkhe loko, ngabona kutsi lolungile nalohlakaniphile nako konkhe labakwentako kusesandleni saNkulunkulu, nome kulutsandvo nome kuyinzondo; kute lowatiko. Konkhe lokusembikwabo kulite." 
Ecclesiastes9:2 Bonkhe banasiphetfo sinye: labalungile nalabangakalungi, labahle nalababi, labahlantekile nalabangcolile, labenta imihlatjelo nalabangayenti. Njengobe kunjalo kumuntfu lolungile, kuyawuba njalo nakulosoni; nanjengobe kunjalo kulabo labenta tifungo, kutawuba njalo nakulabo labesaba kutenta." 
Ecclesiastes9:3 Naku lokubi kuko lokwentekako lapha ngaphansi kwemtfunti welilanga: Bonkhe behlelwa siphetfo lesifananako. Ngetulu kwaloko tinhlitiyo tebantfu tigcwele bubi, kantsi kunebuhlanya etinhlitiyweni tabo basaphila, emvakwaloko bangena ekufeni." 
Ecclesiastes9:4 Kodvwa kulowo losabalelwa kulabaphilako litsemba lisekhona; khumbula kutsi inja lephilako incono kunelibhubesi lelifile. 
Ecclesiastes9:5 Liciniso, labaphilako bayati kutsi batakufa, kodvwa labafile abati lutfo; sebate umvuzo, abasakhunjulwa ngisho nekukhunjulwa." 
Ecclesiastes9:6 Kubo lutsandvo, nenzondo, nemona sekwaphela, bangeke baphindze babe nesabelo kuko konkhe lokwentiwako lapha emhlabeni." 
Ecclesiastes9:7 Hamba udle kudla kwakho ngenjabulo, unatse liwayini lakho ngenhlitiyo lejabulako, ngobe Nkulunkulu uyakuvumela kuloku lokwenta nyalo." 
Ecclesiastes9:8 Tembatfo takho atihlale timhlophe, nenhloko yakho ihlale igcotjiswe ngemafutsa enjabulo." 
Ecclesiastes9:9 Tijabulise ngekuphila nemfati wakho lomtsandzako, kuto tonkhe tinsuku letendlula ngekushesha, Nkulunkulu lakuphe tona lapha ngaphansi kwemtfunti welilanga. Ngobe phela loko sabelo sakho ekuphileni kwakho nasekukhandlekeni kwakho lapha ngaphansi kwemtfunti welilanga." 
Ecclesiastes9:10 Wonkhe umsebenti losetandleni takho wente ngemandla akho onkhe, ngobe ethuneni lapho uya khona, kute kusebenta, nekucabanga, nelwati kanye nekuhlakanipha." 
Ecclesiastes9:11 Kukhona lokunye lengikubonile lapha ngaphansi kwemtfunti welilanga: Ematubane lamakhulu akusiwo lenta umuntfu aphumelele emncintiswaneni, nemandla akusiwo lenta uncobe ekulweni, kantsi nekudla akutfolwa ngulabahlakaniphile bodvwa, nebunjinga abusibo balabakhaliphe ngengcondvo kuphela, nemphumelelo ayisiyo yalabanelikhono; kodvwa sikhatsi nematfuba kubehlela bonkhe." 
Ecclesiastes9:12 Ngetulu kwaloko kute umuntfu lowatiko kutsi sikhatsi sakhe siyawufika nini: Njengenhlanti ibanjwa enetheni, nenyoni igcotjwa sifu, kanjalo nebantfu babanjwa kufikelwa tikhatsi letimbi bangakaticapheli." 
Ecclesiastes9:13 Ngiphindze ngabona lokunye futsi lapha ngaphansi kwemtfunti welilanga, lekwaba sibonelo lesikhulu sekuhlakanipha kimi." 
Ecclesiastes9:14 Bekunelidolobha lelincane lelalinebantfu labambalwa kulo. Kwefika lenkhulu inkhosi lenemandla itekulihlasela, yalivimbetela, yakha takhiwo tekulihlasela lelidolobha." 
Ecclesiastes9:15 Kwakukhona indvodza lemphofu kulelo dolobha leyayinekuhlakanipha; yona yodvwa nje ngekuhlakanipha kwayo yalisindzisa lelidolobha. Kodvwa kwabate namunye lowakhumbula lutfo ngaleyo ndvodza. 
Ecclesiastes9:16 Ngako enhlitiyweni yami ngatsi: “Kuhlakanipha kuncono kunetikhwepha.” Kodvwa lokuhlakanipha kwalomuntfu lomphofu kwatsatselwa phansi, nemavi akhe akazange anakwe ngumuntfu." 
Ecclesiastes9:17 Umuntfu lohlakaniphile lokhuluma inhlitiyo yakhe ngalelipholile kuncono alalelwe kakhulu kunekulalela umphatsi lolibala kumemeta, anika imiyalo etilimeni." 
Ecclesiastes9:18 Kuhlakanipha kuncono kunetikhali temphi, kodvwa soni lesisodvwa sibhubhisa lokuhle lokukhulu, lokwentiwe kahle." 
Ecclesiastes10:1 Njengobe timphungane letifile tenta emakha abe neliphunga lelibi, kanjalo nebulima lobuncane nje benta kuhlakanipha neludvumo kulahlekelwe simo sako." 
Ecclesiastes10:2 Inhlitiyo yalohlakaniphile ibheke ekulungeni, kodvwa yesilima ibuke ebubini." 
Ecclesiastes10:3 Nome sihamba emgwacweni, silima asikhombisi ingcondvo, sihambe sikhombisa bonkhe bantfu kutsi singiso." 
Ecclesiastes10:4 Nangabe intfukutselo yembusi ikuvukela, ungawushiyi umsebenti wakho. Kutfobeka kulungisa emaphutsa lamakhulu." 
Ecclesiastes10:5 Kukhona bubi lengibubonile lapha ngaphansi kwemtfunti welilanga, sono lesentiwa ngumbusi:" 
Ecclesiastes10:6 Tilima tifakwa etikhundleni letiphakeme, kutsi labakhulu nalabanjingile bafakwe kuletiphansi." 
Ecclesiastes10:7 Ngibone tigcili tigibele emahhashi, kwatsi bantfu labakhulu bahamba phansi ngetinyawo njengetigcili." 
Ecclesiastes10:8 Umuntfu lomba umgodzi angahle awele kuwo. Umuntfu lobhidlita lubondza angahle alunywe yinyoka. 
Ecclesiastes10:9 Umuntfu lomba ematje enkwali angahle alinyatwe ngiwo; lowo locheketa tingodvo angahle alinyatwe ngito. 
Ecclesiastes10:10 Nangabe lizembe lisidlindzi lingakacali lalolwa, umuntfu kudzingeka asebentise emandla lamakhulu; kodvwa likhono liletsa imphumelelo." 
Ecclesiastes10:11 Nangabe inyoka iluma ingakatfotjiswa, kute inzuzo kulowo mwungi wayo." 
Ecclesiastes10:12 Emavi laphuma emlonyeni wemuntfu lohlakaniphile amentela ludvumo, kodvwa silima sidliwa tindzebe taso." 
Ecclesiastes10:13 Ekucaleni emavi aso abulima, kutsi ekugcineni abe kwedzelela nebuhlanya;" 
Ecclesiastes10:14 silima siba nemavi lamanyenti. Kodvwa ekugcineni kubate lowatiko kutsi yini letako. Ngubani nje longamtjela kutsi kutakwentekani emvakwakhe? 
Ecclesiastes10:15 Silima sitigugisa sona ngemisebenti yaso size sife, ngobe asiyati nendlela leya edolobheni." 
Ecclesiastes10:16 Nako kuwe wena live, nangabe sigcili sesigucuke saba yinkhosi yakho, kantsi nebantfwabenkhosi belive lakini badla lidzili ekuseni." 
Ecclesiastes10:17 Libusisiwe live, nangabe inkhosi yalo yatalwa ingulehlakaniphile, nebantfwabenkhosi balo badla ngesikhatsi lesingiso, labadlela emandla, hhayi kudzakwa." 
Ecclesiastes10:18 Nangabe umnikati wendlu avilapha, luphahla lwendlu yakhe luyahhibika; kantsi futsi nakayingileka nje, indlu yakhe igcina seyingenela." 
Ecclesiastes10:19 Lidzili lentelwa injabulo, neliwayini lenta kutsi kutsakaswe; kodvwa imali iyimphendvulo yako konkhe." 
Ecclesiastes10:20 Ungakhulumi kabi ngenkhosi, ngisho nangekucabanga kwakho, nangalonjingile ekamelweni lakho, ngobe inyoni yemoya ingahle iwetfwale emavi akho, nesitfunywa lesinemaphiko singahle sisho kutsi utsiteni." 
Ecclesiastes11:1 Jika sinkhwa sakho emantini, ngobe utawuphindze usitfole emvakwemalanga lamanyenti." 
Ecclesiastes11:2 Yaba timphahla takho tekutsengiswa kulabasikhombisa, yebo, kulabasiphohlongo, ngobe awati kutsi yini lengahle yehlele umhlaba." 
Ecclesiastes11:3 Nangabe emafu agcwele imvula, lemvula ayitfululela etikwemhlaba. Nangabe sihlahla siwe sabheka ngaseningizimu nome ngasenyakatfo, siyawulala ngaleyo ndlela lesiwe ngayo." 
Ecclesiastes11:4 Lowo lonaka umoya angeke aze ahlanyele; nalowo lolindzela emafu emvula angeke aze avune. 
Ecclesiastes11:5 Njengobe ungati kutsi umoya uvelaphi, nekutsi kwenteka kanjani kutsi umfati lotetfwele abe nemtimba lonemoya lophilako esiswini sakhe, kanjalo ungeke wati kutsi Nkulunkulu uMdali wako konkhe, usebenta kanjani." 
Ecclesiastes11:6 Ekuseni hlanyela inhlanyelo yakho, ungayekeli kusebenta lize liyewushona, ngobe awuyati lenguyona itawuphumelela, kutsi ngulena yini nome nguleyo, nome totimbili tiyawuphumelela kahle ngalokufananako." 
Ecclesiastes11:7 Kukhanya kwelilanga kumnandzi, nekubonakala kwenhlavu yelilanga kuyawajabulisa emehlo." 
Ecclesiastes11:8 Nangabe umuntfu aphiwe iminyaka leminyenti yekuphila emhlabeni, akatijabulise ngayo yonkhe, kodvwa noko akakhumbule kutsi ayeta emalanga lamanyenti ebumnyama. Konkhe lokutako kuyawuba lite lelite." 
Ecclesiastes11:9 Jabula jaha, ebusheni bakho, inhlitiyo yakho ayikujabulise ngemalanga ebusha bakho. Landzela tindlela tenhlitiyo yakho nako konkhe lokubonwa ngemehlo akho; kodvwa ukhumbule kutsi Nkulunkulu uyawukwehlulela ngako konkhe lokwentile." 
Ecclesiastes11:10 Ngako-ke cosha kungeneliseki engcondvweni yakho, utsintsitse tinhlupheko emtimbeni wakho, ngobe busha nekucala kwemphilo kulite nje." 
Ecclesiastes12:1 Khumbula uMdali wakho etinsukwini tebusha bakho, tinsuku tekuhlupheka tisengakefiki, neminyaka isengakasondzeli lapho uyawusho ngayo utsi: “Kuphila angisakujabuleli.”" 
Ecclesiastes12:2 Mkhumbule yena, lilanga, nekukhanya, nenyanga netinkhanyeti kusengakafiphali, nemafu asengakabuyeli emvakwemvula." 
Ecclesiastes12:3 Ngaleso sikhatsi balindzi bendlu bayawutfutfumela, nemadvodza lanemandla ayawutfotfobala, lapho basili bayakuyekela kusila, ngobe nalabo basili bayawube sebambalwa; nalabo labalunguta ngemafasitelo bangabe basahlola;" 
Ecclesiastes12:4 ngesikhatsi neminyango lephumela esitaladini seyivalekile, nemsindvo wesigayo sewushabalala; ngesikhatsi bantfu bavuswa kuntjilota kwenyoni, nalokuhlabelela kwato sekuvakala kancane," 
Ecclesiastes12:5 ngesikhatsi bantfu besaba konkhe lokuphakeme, kanye netingoti tasetitaladini, ngesikhatsi tihlahla te-alimondi setichakaza, nentsetse itotoba endleleni yayo, nenkhabunkhabu iphela. Umuntfu uya ekhaya lakhe laphakadze, labalilako bazulazula etitaladini." 
Ecclesiastes12:6 Mkhumbule yena, intsambo yakho yesiliva isengakadzabuki, nesitja segolide sisengakaphahlaki, imbita yemanti isengakaphahlaki ngasemtfonjeni wemanti, nelisondvo lingakephukeli ngasemtfonjeni." 
Ecclesiastes12:7 Mkhumbule yena, lutfuli lusengakabuyeli emhlabatsini, lapho lwatsatfwa khona, nemoya usengakabuyeli kuNkulunkulu lowawuniketa." 
Ecclesiastes12:8 UMshumayeli utsi: “Lite lelite, konkhe kulite.”" 
Ecclesiastes12:9 Wachubeka kanjalo-ke uMshumayeli afundzisa bantfu ngekuhlakanipha kwakhe konkhe lakwatiko naye. Abecabangisisa aphenyisise, aphindze atihlelise kahle taga letinyenti engcondvweni yakhe," 
Ecclesiastes12:10 bese uphenyisisa kutsi angatimisa kanjani. Abewahlela kahle emavi akhe kuze abe mnandzi, kodvwa loko lakubhala kwakuliciniso lodvwa." 
Ecclesiastes12:11 Taga tebantfu labahlakaniphile tinemavi lakhalipha njengentjumentju yemelusi, nanjengetipikili letishayelwe tacina, tinjalo taga natihlanganiswe ndzawonye, ngobe bavela kumelusi munye." 
Ecclesiastes12:12 Ndvodzana yami, caphela kungabikho lokwengetekako. Kubhalwa kwetincwadzi kungeke kuphele, kantsi nekufundza kakhulu kuyawudzinisa umtimba." 
Ecclesiastes12:13 Konkhe sekuvakele. Nasi-ke siphetfo sendzaba: Yesaba Nkulunkulu, ugcine imiyalo yakhe, kute lokunye lokungetulu kwaloko lokudzingekako kumuntfu." 
Ecclesiastes12:14 Ngobe Nkulunkulu uyakuyehlulela yonkhe imisebenti lesiyentile, ngisho nalokufihlakele lesikwentako, nome kuhle nome kubi." 
SongOfSongs1:1 Ingoma yetingoma yaSolomoni. 
SongOfSongs1:2 Akangicabuze ngekwanga kwemlomo wakhe, ngobe lutsandvo lwakho lumnandzi, kwendlula liwayini." 
SongOfSongs1:3 Liyajabulisa liphunga lemakha akho; libito lakho linjengemakha latfululwako. Nguko nje tintfombi tikutsandza kangaka! 
SongOfSongs1:4 Ngitsatse ngihambe nawe, asisheshise! Inkhosi ayingingenise esigodlweni sayo. Siyajabula sikutsakasele; sitaludvumisa lutsandvo lwakho, siludvumise kwendlula liwayini. Kufanele kutsi bakutsandze." 
SongOfSongs1:5 Ngiluhlata, kodvwa ngiyatsandzeka, awu, madvodzakati aseJerusalema, ngiluhlata njengemathende aseKhedari; yebo, njengetindvwangu temathende aSolomoni." 
SongOfSongs1:6 Ningangibukisisi ngobe ngiluhlata, ngobe ngifuswe lilanga. Emadvodzana amake angitfukutselela, angenta ngalindza tivini, sakami sivini ngasiyekelela." 
SongOfSongs1:7 Ngitjele-ke, wena lengikutsandzako, ngukuphi lapho udlisa khona umhlambi wakho, nalapho tihlabulela khona timvu takho emini. Kudzingeke ngani kutsi ngifanane nemfati longaphansi kweveyili, ngehle ngenyuka ngasemihlambini yebangani bakho?" 
SongOfSongs1:8 Nangabe awati, wena mfati lomuhle kakhulu, landzela etinyatselweni temhlambi wetimvu, uyewudlisa khona emazinyane etimbuti ngasemathendeni ebelusi." 
SongOfSongs1:9 Sitsandvwa sami, ngitakufananisa nelihhashi lelisikati leliboshelwe kulenye yetincola taFaro." 
SongOfSongs1:10 Tihlatsi takho timomondziya nje nase tinemacici, nentsamo yakho nase yegatjiswe ingcibo." 
SongOfSongs1:11 Sitakwentela emacici egolide lahlotjiswe ngesiliva. 
SongOfSongs1:12 Kwatsi inkhosi isesetafuleni layo, emakha ami ayitsela ngeliphunga lelimnandzi." 
SongOfSongs1:13 Longitsandzako unjengemgodla wemakha emure kimi, lolele emkhatsini wemabele ami." 
SongOfSongs1:14 Lotsandzekako wami, usicheke setimbali tehena kimi, letivela etivinini tase-Eni Gedi." 
SongOfSongs1:15 Maye, umuhle, sitsandvwa sami bo! Awu, maye, mahle emehlo akho! Kimi angematuba." 
SongOfSongs1:16 Maye, umuhle, sitsandvwa sami bo! Awu, maye, kona uyakhanga! Yebo, nembhedze wetfu utsite klaba!" 
SongOfSongs1:17 Emakabha endlu yetfu angimisedari; imishayo yetfu ingimisayiphuresi. 
SongOfSongs2:1 Ngiyimbali yaseSharoni, umnduze wetigodzi." 
SongOfSongs2:2 Njengemnduze emkhatsini wemanyeva, unjalo lotsandzekako wami emkhatsini wetintfombi." 
SongOfSongs2:3 Njengesihlahla semahhabhula emkhatsini wetihlahla telihlatsi, unjalo lotsandzekako wami emkhatsini wemajaha. Ngiyakujabulela kuhlala emtfuntini wakhe, nesitselo sakhe siyanongotela, nangisinambitsa." 
SongOfSongs2:4 Ungitsetse wangiyisa endlini yelidzili, luphawu lwakhe kimi bekulutsandvo." 
SongOfSongs2:5 Ngiciniseni ngemagelebisi lomisiwe, ningihlumelelise ngemahhabhula, ngobe ngiyafa lutsandvo." 
SongOfSongs2:6 Umkhono wakhe wangesancele ungumcamelo wenhloko yami, nemkhono wakhe wangesekudla uyangigona." 
SongOfSongs2:7 Ngiyaniyala, madvodzakati aseJerusalema, ngetimphala nangetinyamatane letinsikati tesiganga, ngitsi: Ningaluvusi lutsandvo, futsi ningalunyakatisi, luze lutivukele lona." 
SongOfSongs2:8 Lalela, nasi sitsandvwa sami! Bukela, nanguya eta angcabisha engca etintsabeni, agiya etikwemagcuma." 
SongOfSongs2:9 Longitsandzako unjengemphala nanjengelitfole lemgankla. Bukela! Nango phela aseme emvakwelubondza lwakitsi, uhlola ngemafasitelo, alungute ngetikhala telutsango." 
SongOfSongs2:10 Longitsandzako wakhuluma kimi, watsi: “Sukuma, sitsandvwa sami, lotsandzekako wami, wota sambe." 
SongOfSongs2:11 Buka la, busika sebendlulile, timvula setendlulile, atisekho." 
SongOfSongs2:12 Timbali setiyamila emhlabeni, sekufike sikhatsi sekuhlabela, nekububula kwematuba sekuvakele kulelive letfu." 
SongOfSongs2:13 Sihlahla semkhiwa sesitsela titselo taso tekucala, nemivini lebhahelako itsela liphunga layo lelimnandzi. Sukuma sambe, sitsandvwa sami, sitsandvwa sami lesihle, asambe nawe.”" 
SongOfSongs2:14 Tuba lami lelisemifantfwini yemadvwala, etindzaweni tekubhaca emaceleni etintsaba, ngikhombise buso bakho, ungivise neliphimbo lakho; ngobe liphimbo lakho liyanongotela, nebuso bakho buyatsandzeka." 
SongOfSongs2:15 Sibambeleni timphungutja, timphungutja letincane, ngobe ngito letibhubhisa tivini, yebo, tivini tetfu letibhahelako." 
SongOfSongs2:16 Longitsandzako wami ngedvwa; nami ngiwakhe yedvwa, udlisa umhlambi wakhe emkhatsini weminduze." 
SongOfSongs2:17 Kuze kudzabuke kusa, kubaleke titfunti, buya, wena longitsandzako, bani njengemphala nanjengemgankla losemncane nawusemagcumeni langemahhelekehle." 
SongOfSongs3:1 Onkhe emalanga ebusuku, nangilele embhedzeni wami, bengimfuna lowo lotsandvwa yinhlitiyo yami; ngamfuna, kodvwa angizange ngimtfole." 
SongOfSongs3:2 Ngitawuvuka-ke nyalo, ngiyewuyaluka nasedolobheni, etitaladini talo nasetinkhundleni talo. Ngiyawuphenya lowo lotsandvwa yinhlitiyo yami. Ngako ngamfunisisa, kodvwa angimtfolanga." 
SongOfSongs3:3 Balindzi basebusuku bangitfola ngesikhatsi bajikeleta ekhatsi edolobheni. Ngatsi kubo: “Nimbonile yini lotsandvwa yinhlitiyo yami?” 
SongOfSongs3:4 Ngatsi nje ngitsi shelele kubo, ngase ngiyamtfola lotsandvwa yinhlitiyo yami. Ngamgaca ngemikhono ngamnkonkoshela, ngangabe ngisamyekela, ngaze ngayawumngenisa endlini ketfu, endlini yalowo lowangetfwala." 
SongOfSongs3:5 Ngiyaniyala, madvodzakati aseJerusalema, ngetimphala nangetinyamatane letinsikati tesiganga, ngitsi: Ningaluvusi lutsandvo, futsi ningalunyakatisi, luze lutivukele lona." 
SongOfSongs3:6 Ngubani loya lokhuphuka achamuka ehlane, lofanana nensika yentfutfu, lotsaphuka emakha emure newemphepho leyakhiwe ngato tonkhe tinongo temhwebi?" 
SongOfSongs3:7 Bukela! Sihlalo saSolomoni lesetfwalwako, sisingatfwe tingwazi letingema-60, emadvodza lahlonipheke kakhulu ka-Israyeli," 
SongOfSongs3:8 onkhe ahlome ngetinkemba, onkhe bokadzebona etimphini, nguleyo ifake inkemba yayo engculwini, ilungele kulwa nalokwesabisanako kwasebusuku." 
SongOfSongs3:9 Inkhosi Solomoni yatakhela leso sihlalo: Yasakha ngetingodvo taseLebanoni. 
SongOfSongs3:10 Tinsika taso watakha ngesiliva, kwatsi liphansi laso walenta ngegolide. Sihlalo sona sentiwa ngalokubukhwebeletane; lonkhe lingekhatsi laso lakhiwa ngebunono, lakhiwa ngetintfombi taseJerusalema." 
SongOfSongs3:11 Phumani, nine madvodzakati aseSiyoni, nitewubukela inkhosi Solomoni, nasafake umchele wakhe, umchele lawetfweswa ngunina ngelilanga lagidzisa ngalo umfati, mhlazana inhlitiyo yakhe ijabulile." 
SongOfSongs4:1 Maye, umuhle, sitsandvwa sami! Maye, umuhle bo! Emehlo akho ngaphansi kweveyili yakho afanana nematuba. Tinwele takho tifanana nemhlambi wetimbuti, yebo, wetimbuti natehla eNtsabeni iGileyadi." 
SongOfSongs4:2 Ematinyo akho afanana nemhlambi wetimvu letisandza kuhhulwa, natikhuphuka ekugezweni. Nguleyo ihamba naleyo leliphahla kanye nayo, kute nayinye lehamba ngayodvwa." 
SongOfSongs4:3 Tindzebe temlomo wakho tinjengetincotfo letiboshiwe letibovu, umlomo wakho uyatsandzeka. Tinhlafuno takho ngaphansi kweveyili yakho tinjengetincetu temahananandza." 
SongOfSongs4:4 Intsamo yakho injengembhoshongo waDavide, lowakhiwe ngemihlobiso, uyindingilizi, kuwo kulenga emahawu layinkhulungwane, onkhe angemahawu etingwazi tasemphini." 
SongOfSongs4:5 Emabele akho lamabili anjengemazinyane lamabili, yebo, njengemazinyane langemaphahla emphala, ladla emkhatsini weminduze." 
SongOfSongs4:6 Kudzimate kudzabuke kusa, titfunti tibaleka, ngiyawukhuphukela entsabeni yemure nasegcumeni lemphepho." 
SongOfSongs4:7 Umuhle wonkhe, sitsandvwa sami; kute nalesincane sici kuwe." 
SongOfSongs4:8 Wota nami sisuke eLebanoni, makoti wami, wota sambe nawe lapha eLebanoni. Yehla esicongweni sase-Amana, esicongweni saseSeniri, ingcongwane yeHemoni, sisuke emhumeni wemabhubesi, nakuso sidleke sekudlalela tingwe." 
SongOfSongs4:9 Uyitfumbile inhlitiyo yami, dzadzewetfu, makoti wami. Uyitfumbile inhlitiyo yami ngekungikha kanye nje ngemehlo akho, ngelucu lunye nje lwengcibe yentsamo yakho." 
SongOfSongs4:10 Maye, lumnandzi bo lutsandvo lwakho, dzadzewetfu, makoti wami. Lujabulisa kangakanani-ke lutsandvo lwakho kuneliwayini, neliphunga lemakha akho limnandzi kunelesinongo!" 
SongOfSongs4:11 Tindzebe temlomo wakho tintfontsa kunongotela lokunjengekweluju lwetinyosi, makoti wami. Lubisi neluju kungaphansi kwelulwimi lwakho. Kutsaphuka kwemakha etingubo takho kunjengalokwa kwaseLebanoni." 
SongOfSongs4:12 Utungeletwe ngelutsango njengengadze, dzadzewetfu, makoti wami. Usiyalu lesakhelwe lutsango, umtfombo lobekwe luphawu." 
SongOfSongs4:13 Tilimo takho tilihlatsi lemahananandza lanetitselo telikhetselo, nehena, nenadi," 
SongOfSongs4:14 inadi nesafroni, ikalamu nesinamoni, nayo yonkhe inhlobo yesihlahla semphepho, nesemure, nesenhlaba, nato tonkhe tinandzisi leticolisakele." 
SongOfSongs4:15 Ngingumtfombo wasengadzeni, siyalu semanti lagobhotako, lageleta ehla esuka eLebanoni." 
SongOfSongs4:16 Vuka, moya wasenyakatfo, ute nawe, moya waseningizimu! Hhusha etikwengadze yami, kuze kutsaphuka kwemakha ayo kwandze kabanti. Longitsandzako akete engadzeni yakhe atewunambitsa titselo tayo telikhetselo." 
SongOfSongs5:1 Sengifikile engadzeni yami, dzadzewetfu, mntfwanaketfu, ngibutse imure yami nemakha ami. Ngiludlile luhlanga lwami lwetinyosi neluju; sengilinatsile liwayini lami nelubisi lwami. Dlanini, bomngami, ninatse; natsisisani lutsandvo, nine titsandzani." 
SongOfSongs5:2 Ngalala, kodvwa inhlitiyo yami ayizange seyibutsi cutfu butfongo. Lalela! Longitsandzako uyanconcotsa, utsi: “Ngivulele, dzadzewetfu, sitsandvwa sami, tuba lami, wena longenasici wami. Inhloko yami seyinetfwe ngematolo, tinwele tami tinemswakama wasebusuku.”" 
SongOfSongs5:3 Ngiwukhumulile umjiva wami, ngiphindze ngiwembatse yini? Ngitigezile tinyawo tami, ngiphindze ngitingcolise yini?" 
SongOfSongs5:4 Longitsandzako wami wase ufaka sandla sakhe esikhaleni semnyango, inhlitiyo yami yase icala kumhawukela." 
SongOfSongs5:5 Ngase ngiyavuka ngayawuvulela longitsandzako wami; sandla sami sasintfontsa imure, tingalo tami tigeleta imure, lapha etibambeni tesivalo." 
SongOfSongs5:6 Ngamvulela longitsandzako wami, kodvwa longitsandzako wami abesahambile, angasekho. Inhlitiyo yami yayiphumele kuye ngesikhatsi akhuluma. Ngamfuna, kodvwa angizange ngimtfole. Ngambita, kodvwa akazange asabele." 
SongOfSongs5:7 Balindzi basebusuku bangitfola ngesikhatsi bajikeleta ekhatsi edolobheni. Bangidzindza ngendvuku, bangilimata; bangemuka lijazi lami, labo balindzi betibondza!" 
SongOfSongs5:8 Ngiyaniyala, madvodzakati aseJerusalema, nanimtfola longitsandzako, nitamtjela kutsini? Nibomtjela kutsi ngiyafa lutsandvo." 
SongOfSongs5:9 Unjani yena lona lotsandzekako wakho, uncono yini kunalabanye, wena lomuhle kunabo bonkhe besifazane? Kantsi lomkhwenyane wakho muhle kwendlula bonkhe yini, lokwekutsi ungaze usitjele kanjalo?" 
SongOfSongs5:10 Longitsandzako wami uyakhanga ngelibala; uyabonakala ngisho nome sebahlangene baba tinkhulungwane letilishumi. 
SongOfSongs5:11 Inhloko yakhe iyigolide lecengiwe cobo; tinwele takhe tiyakhephuka njengemagagasi, kantsi timnyama njengelihhwabayi." 
SongOfSongs5:12 Emehlo akhe anjengematuba langasemitfonjeni yemanti, agezwe ngelubisi, ahleti ngasemfuleni." 
SongOfSongs5:13 Tihlatsi takhe tinjengemibhedze yetitfombo tetinandzisi letitsaphukisa liphunga lato. Tindzebe temlomo wakhe tinjengeminduze lentfontsa emakha emure. 
SongOfSongs5:14 Imikhono yakhe injengemigcala yegolide lokufakwe kuyo ematje laligugu. Umtimba wakhe ushelela njengematinyo endlovu, uhlotjiswe ngemasafire." 
SongOfSongs5:15 Imilente yakhe ifanana netinsika letibatwe ngelitje lelimhlophe, letibekwe etisekelweni tegolide lecengekile. Lutsi lwemtimba wakhe lufanana neLebanoni, likhetselo lemisedari yayo." 
SongOfSongs5:16 Umlomo wakhe ukunongotela cobo lwako; yena empeleni muhle ngalokuphelele. Lowo-ke ngulongitsandzako wami, ungumngani wami, nine madvodzakati aseJerusalema." 
SongOfSongs6:1 Uyephi lolokutsandzako wakho, wena lomuhle kunabo bonkhe besifazane? Ujikele ngakuyiphi indlela lona lokutsandzako wakho, khona sitekufunisa yena?" 
SongOfSongs6:2 Longitsandzako wami wehlele engadzeni yakhe, emibhedzeni yetitfombo tetinandzisi, kuyekwelusa umhlambi wakhe etingadzeni kanye nekubutsa iminduze." 
SongOfSongs6:3 Mine ngiwalongitsandzako wami, yedvwa; nalongitsandzako wami, ungewami ngedvwa, welusa umhlambi wakhe emkhatsini weminduze." 
SongOfSongs6:4 Umuhle, sitsandvwa sami, unjengeThisa, umuhle njengeJerusalema, uhlonipheke njengemabutfo laphetse imijekwa yawo." 
SongOfSongs6:5 Susa emehlo akho kimi, ayangisindza. Tinwele takho tinjengemhlambi wetimbuti natewuka tehla eGileyadi." 
SongOfSongs6:6 Ematinyo akho anjengemhlambi wetimvu natikhuphuka tiphuma ekugezweni. Nguleyo naleyo ihamba naleliphahla kanye nayo, kute nayinye lehamba ngayodvwa." 
SongOfSongs6:7 Tinhlafuno takho ngaphansi kweveyili yakho tinjengetincetu temahananandza. 
SongOfSongs6:8 Kungaba nemakhosikati langema-60, nemaphovela langema-80, netintfombi letingenakubalwa," 
SongOfSongs6:9 kodvwa lituba lami, lowakheke kahle wami, yena wehluke yedvwa ngebuhle, uyindvodzakati leyodvwa kunina, ligcabi lalowo lowalitala. Tintfombi tatsi natimbona, tambita tatsi ungulobusisiwe; emakhosikati nemaphovela amdvumisa." 
SongOfSongs6:10 Ngubani lona lochamuka njengekusa lomuhle njengenyeti, akhanye njengelilanga, atsatse emehlo njengetinkhanyeti ekushulunganeni kwato?" 
SongOfSongs6:11 Ngehlela entansi ensimini yemantongomane, kuyawubuka kuhluma lokusha esigodzini, ngiyewubuka kutsi imivini seyidvumbile yini nemahananandza kutsi abesabhahela yini." 
SongOfSongs6:12 Ngatsi ngingakacapheli, kulangatela kwami kwangibeka emkhatsini wetincola tebukhosi tebantfu bami." 
SongOfSongs6:13 Buya, buya, wena ntfombi yaseShulami; buya, buya, khona sitekubuka! Nitayibukelani intfombi yaseShulami, igidza emkhatsini wemabutfo lamabili?" 
SongOfSongs7:1 Maye, tinhle tinyawo takho kuleto tincabule tato, awu, ndvodzakati yemntfwanenkhosi! Ematsanga akho atindingilizi njengemachuzu, umsebenti wesandla sachwephesha." 
SongOfSongs7:2 Inkhaba yakho isiyingiliti injengenkomishi lengenasibambo lengahlali ingenalo liwayini leliphiswe kahle. Sisu sakho siyindvundvuma yakolo letungeletwe ngiminduze. 
SongOfSongs7:3 Emabele akho anjengemazinyane lamabili, yebo, emaphahla emphala." 
SongOfSongs7:4 Intsamo yakho injengembhoshongo lowakhiwe ngematinyo endlovu. Emehlo akho angemachibi aseHeshboni ngasesangweni laseBhathi Rabhimu. Likhala lakho linjengembhoshongo waseLebanoni lobuke ngaseDamaseko. 
SongOfSongs7:5 Inhloko yakho iyakuchelisa njengeNtsaba iKhameli. Tinwele takho tinjengendvwangu lebukhwebeletane yebukhosi, inkhosi ibanjwe njengesigcili, ikhangwa ngimichino yato." 
SongOfSongs7:6 Maye, umuhle, kantsi futsi uyajabulisa, awu, sitsandvwa, ngebuhle bakho!" 
SongOfSongs7:7 Lutsi lwemtimba wakho lunjengesihlahla selisundvu, nemabele akho anjengetitfungo tetitselo." 
SongOfSongs7:8 Ngatsi: “Ngitasekhwela lesihlahla selisundvu, ngitatikha titselo taso.” Shangatsi emabele akho angaba njengetikhehle temavini, kutsaphuka kwemakha ekuphefumula kwakho kube njengemahhabhula," 
SongOfSongs7:9 nemlomo wakho ube njengeliwayini lelendlula tonkhe tinhlobo. Shangatsi liwayini lingacondza ngco kulongitsandzako wami, lishelele kamnandzi etindzebeni takhe temlomo nasematinyweni akhe." 
SongOfSongs7:10 Mine ngiwalongitsandzako, naye uyangilangatelela." 
SongOfSongs7:11 Wota, wena longitsandzako, sambe siye esigangeni, busuku asibucitsele emitini." 
SongOfSongs7:12 Asivuke ekuseni siye etivinini siyewubona kutsi tihlahla temivini atikadvumbi yini, nekutsi imidvumba yato seyichakazile yini, nekutsi emahananandza asabhahele yini wona, ngulapho-ke ngitakunikela khona lutsandvo lwami." 
SongOfSongs7:13 Emamandraki asatsaphuka emakha awo, nangasemnyango wetfu kunabo bonkhe bunandzi, lobusha nalobudzala, lengisolo ngabulondvolotela wena, sitsandvwa sami." 
SongOfSongs8:1 Kube mane bewungumnaketfu lowamunya bele linye nami kumake! Lapho-ke kube bengingakukhandza ungaphandle, bengitawuvele ngikucabuze, bekuyawubate ngisho namunye labeyakungedzelela." 
SongOfSongs8:2 Bengitakuhola ngikumikise endlini ketfu, lapho bewutangifundzisa khona. Bengiyakukunika liwayini lelivangiwe kutsi ulinatse, emanti lamnandzi emahananandza ami." 
SongOfSongs8:3 Umkhono wakhe wangesancele ungumcamelo wenhloko yami, nemkhono wakhe wangesekudla uyangigona." 
SongOfSongs8:4 Ngiyaniyala, madvodzakati aseJerusalema, ngitsi: Ningaluvusi lutsandvo, futsi ningalunyakatisi, luze lutivukele lona." 
SongOfSongs8:5 Ngubani lona lochamuka ehlane eyeme kulamtsandzako? Ngakuvusa ngaphansi kwesihlahla semahhabhula; ngulapho-ke lapho unyoko akwemitsela khona, ngulapho-ke lona labephetfwe ngumhelo, akubelekela khona." 
SongOfSongs8:6 Ngibeke njengeluphawu etikwenhlitiyo yakho, yebo, njengeluphawu emkhonweni wakho; ngobe lutsandvo lunemandla njengekufa, sikhwele salo asitfobiseki, sinjengelithuna. Lushisa njengemlilo lovutsako, yebo, njengelilangabi lelinemandla." 
SongOfSongs8:7 Emanti lamanyenti ngeke alucime lutsandvo, nemifula ingeke ilukhukhule. Nome ngabe umuntfu abenganikela ngawo wonkhe umcebo wasekhaya lakhe kuze atewutsenga lutsandvo, loko bekuyawuba yinhlekisa yodvwa nje." 
SongOfSongs8:8 Sinadzadzewetfu lomncane, usengakaphumi ngisho nemabele. Siyakwenta njani ngalodzadzewetfu, nangabe kukhona lofuna kumenta umkakhe?" 
SongOfSongs8:9 Nangabe yena alubondza, etikwakhe sitakwakha imibhoshongo yesiliva; nangabe yena asivalo, sitamvalela ngemicabo yemisedari." 
SongOfSongs8:10 Ngilubondza, emabele ami anjengemibhoshongo. Ngako-ke emehlweni akhe sengibe ngumuntfu loletsa kweneliseka." 
SongOfSongs8:11 Solomoni abenensimi yemivini eBhali Hamoni; wase ucashisa lesivini sakhe kubacashi. Kwakufanele kube ngulowo nalowo aletse loko lokusitselo saso, kube tinhlavu tesiliva letiyinkhulungwane." 
SongOfSongs8:12 Kodvwa lesi sivini sami, ngimi lengingephana ngaso; awu, Solomoni, letinhlavu takho letiyinkhulungwane, kantsi tinhlavu letingema-200 talabo labanakekela titselo taso." 
SongOfSongs8:13 Wena lohlala etingadzeni uhlale nebangani labakusingatsile, ngivise liphimbo lakho!" 
SongOfSongs8:14 Phumela ebaleni, wena longitsandzako, bani njengemgankla, nome-ke njengelizinyane lenyamatane, etintsabeni letigcwele emakha." 
Isaiah1:1 Lona ngumbono lowabonwa ngu-Isaya, umsa wa-Amose, ngebakaJuda nangebaseJerusalema ngesikhatsi kusabusa bo-Uziya, naJothamu, na-Ahazi, naHezekiya, emakhosi akaJuda." 
Isaiah1:1 Lona ngumbono lowabonwa ngu-Isaya, umsa wa-Amose, ngebakaJuda nangebaseJerusalema ngesikhatsi kusabusa bo-Uziya, naJothamu, na-Ahazi, naHezekiya, emakhosi akaJuda." 
Isaiah1:2 Lalelani, nine mazulu! Lalela nawe, mhlaba! Ngobe Simakadze sewukhulume, watsi: “Bantfwabami ngibondlile ngabakhulisa, kodvwa sebangihlamukile." 
Isaiah1:3 Inkhabi iyamati umniyo, nembongolo sibaya semniyo, kodvwa Israyeli akati lutfo, sive sami asicondzi.”" 
Isaiah1:4 Awu, sive lesonako, bantfu labasindvwa kona, nine ntalelwane yalabenta lokubi, bantfwana labasimilo sabo sonakele. Simakadze sebamshiyile; bamhlubukile Longcwele waka-Israyeli, bagucuka bamfulatsela." 
Isaiah1:5 Kona nisashayelwani nje? Nisachubekelani nekuhlubuka? Inhloko yenu yonkhe ilimele, nenhlitiyo yenu yonkhe ishayiwe." 
Isaiah1:6 Kusukela elutwaneni lwelunyawo lwenu kuze kuyewufika enhloko yenu, kute nakunye lokukahle, kugcwele emanceba, nemihuzuko, netilondza letikhamisile, lekungazange kugezwe nome kuboshwe kubuye kugcotjiswe ngemafutsa." 
Isaiah1:7 Live lenu selilihlane, emadolobha enu asashiswe ngemlilo; bachamuki batsatsa sivuno semasimi enu embikwenu nibuka. Live lenu selilihlane, labhujiswa ngabo." 
Isaiah1:8 INdvodzakati yaseSiyoni seyisele njengendlu yekukhosela esivinini, nanjengelichugwana ensimini yemajoti, yebo, njengelidolobha lelivinjetelwe." 
Isaiah1:9 Kube Simakadze longuSomandla akasishiyelanga insali, ngabe sesifanana neSodoma, yebo, ngabe sesifanana neGomora." 
Isaiah1:10 Lalelani livi laSimakadze, nine babusi baseSodoma; lalelani imfundziso yaNkulunkulu wetfu, nine bantfu baseGomora!" 
Isaiah1:11 Simakadze utsi: “Lemihlatjelo yenu leminyenti iyini lapha kimi? Sengesutsi ngiminikelo yekushiswa yetihhanca neyemanoni etifuyo letikhuluphalisiwe, futsi angijatjuliswa yingati yetinkunzi, neyemazinyane etimvu neyetiphongo." 
Isaiah1:12 Nisuke nicelwe ngubani kutsi ningiletsele leminikelo, nanitengikhonta? Ngubani lonicele kutsi nitekudzidzitela lapha ethempelini?" 
Isaiah1:13 Khawulani kuletsa iminikelo lengasho lutfo! Imphepho yenu isinengiso kimi. Imikhosi yenu yekwetfwasa kwenyanga, nemaSabatha, nemihlangano yenu yekukhonta, ngingeke ngiyibeketelele lemihlangano yenu lemibi." 
Isaiah1:14 Emadzili enu ekwetfwasa kwenyanga nalawo madzili leniwenta ngetikhatsi tawo umphefumulo wami uyawatondza. Asangumtfwalo kimi; sengidziniwe kuwetfwala. 
Isaiah1:15 Naniphakamisa tandla tenu niteneka, nithandaza, ngiyakuwafihla emehlo ami kini; nome senenta imithandazo leminyenti kangakanani, ngingeke ngiyilalele. Tandla tenu tigcwele ingati;" 
Isaiah1:16 gezani, nibe ngulabahlantekile. Susani tento tenu letimbi embikwami! Yekelani kwenta lokubi," 
Isaiah1:17 nifundze kwenta lokulungile! Funani umtsetfocotfo, nikhutsate labacindzetelwe. Vikelani labo labate boyise, niyimele indzaba yemfelokati.”" 
Isaiah1:18 Simakadze utsi: “Wotani manje sitewubonisana. Nome tono tenu tibovu njengengati, titawuba mhlophe njengangcocwane, nome tibovu tju, titawuba mhlophe njengeboya bemvu." 
Isaiah1:19 Nangabe nivuma futsi nilalela, niyawudla sivuno lesihle kakhulu selive;" 
Isaiah1:20 kodvwa nanicinisa tinhloko nihlubuka, nitawudliwa yinkemba.” Umlomo waSimakadze sewukukhulumile loko." 
Isaiah1:21 Ase nibuke kutsi lelidolobha lebeletsembekile seligucuke laba yingwadla kanjani! Lona lake lagcwala umtsetfocotfo, belilikhaya lekulunga, kodvwa manje seligcwele babulali!" 
Isaiah1:22 Isiliva yenu seyigucuke yaba ngemanyela, liwayini lenu selidvungwe ngemanti." 
Isaiah1:23 Babusi benu babahlubuki, babangani bemasela; bonkhe batsandza imidizo, balandzelana netipho. Ababavikeli labo labate boyise; ngisho nendzaba yemfelokati abayinaki." 
Isaiah1:24 Ngako-ke iNkhosi Simakadze lenguSomandla, lowo longuMnikati Wemandla waka-Israyeli utsi: “Awu, ngitake ngiphumule etitseni tami, ngitiphindzisele kulabangitondzako." 
Isaiah1:25 Ngitawugucula sandla sami, ngimelane nani, ngitawacengisisa onkhe emanyela enu, ngisuse konkhe kungcola kwenu." 
Isaiah1:26 Ngitawubuyisela tikhulu tenu tifanane naleto beninato ekucaleni, ngibuyisele beluleki benu, bafanane nalabo beninabo ekucaleni. Emvakwaloko nitawubitwa ngekutsi: Lidolobha Lekulunga, Lidolobha Leletsembekile.”" 
Isaiah1:27 ISiyoni itawuhlengwa ngekwemtsetfocotfo, labatisolako bahlengwe ngekulunga." 
Isaiah1:28 Kodvwa bahlubuki netoni bayawufohlotwa bonkhe kanyekanye, nalabo labalahla Simakadze bayawubhubha." 
Isaiah1:29 “Niyakudliwa ngemahloni ngenca yema-okhi latithico, lese nitijabulise ngawo; niyawuhlazeka ngenca yetingadze tekukhontela tithico, lese nitikhetsile." 
Isaiah1:30 Niyawufanana nesihlahla se-okhi lesinemacembe labunako, nibe njengengadze lete emanti." 
Isaiah1:31 Emadvodza lanemandla ayawuba timbhaca, umsebenti wawo ufanane nenhlase: kokubili kuyawusha ndzawonye, kubete longawucisha lowo mlilo.”" 
Isaiah2:1 Leli livi lelefika ku-Isaya, umsa wa-Amose, mayelana nesive sakaJuda nesaseJerusalema:" 
Isaiah2:1 Leli livi lelefika ku-Isaya, umsa wa-Amose, mayelana nesive sakaJuda nesaseJerusalema:" 
Isaiah2:2 Ngemalanga ekugcina intsaba yelithempeli laSimakadze iyawucina, ibe ngulephakeme kwendlula tonkhe tintsaba; iyawuphakanyiswa ibe ngetulu kwemagcuma, tonkhe tive tiyawubekelela tiye kuyo tingasakhawuli." 
Isaiah2:3 Bantfu labanyenti bayawufika batsi: “Wotani, senyukele entsabeni yaSimakadze, endlini yaNkulunkulu waJakobe. Utasifundzisa tindlela takhe, khona sitewuhamba emikhondvweni yakhe.” Ngobe umtsetfo uyawuphuma eSiyoni, livi laSimakadze liphume eJerusalema." 
Isaiah2:4 Uyakwehlulela emkhatsini wetive, acatulule imibango yetive letinyenti. Tona-ke tiyawukhandza tinkemba tato, titente tibe ngemakhuba, tikhali tato tibe tikelo tekutsena tihlahla. Sive singeke sihlasele lesinye ngenkemba, futsi tive tingeke tisaceceshelwa kulwa imphi." 
Isaiah2:5 Kota, wenandlu yakaJakobe, sitewuhamba ekukhanyeni kwaSimakadze." 
Isaiah2:6 Ubalahlile bantfu bakho, indlu yakaJakobe, ngobe sebagcwele bungoma basemphumalanga; bagcwele nekuphengula njengemaFilisti, bamdzibimunye nemahedeni." 
Isaiah2:7 Live labo ligcwele isiliva negolide; ingcebo yabo ayinasiphetfo. Live labo ligcwele emahhashi; tincola temphi tinyenti kakhulu. 
Isaiah2:8 Live labo ligcwele tithico; bakhotsamela umsebenti wetandla tabo, loko lokwentiwe ngemino yabo." 
Isaiah2:9 Ngako umuntfu utakwehliswa neluntfu lonkhe lutfotjiswe, ungabatsetseleli." 
Isaiah2:10 Hambani niyewungena emadvwaleni, nibhace elutfulini, nibalekele kwesabeka kwaSimakadze nebumengemenge bebukhosi bakhe!" 
Isaiah2:11 Emehlo ebantfu labatikhukhumetako ayawutfotjiswa, kutsi kutigcabha kwebantfu kwehliswe; Simakadze yena yedvwa uyawuphakanyiswa ngalelo langa." 
Isaiah2:12 Simakadze longuSomandla umise lilanga, ulibekele bonkhe labatigcabhako nalabatiphakamisako, nako konkhe lokuphakanyisiwe, kuze kutfotjiswe;" 
Isaiah2:13 lilanga lelibekelwe yonkhe imisedari yaseLebanoni, lephakeme naletiphakamisako, futsi libekelwe onkhe ema-okhi aseBhashani;" 
Isaiah2:14 lilanga lelimiselwe tonkhe tintsaba letiphakeme, futsi limiselwe onkhe emagcuma laphakeme;" 
Isaiah2:15 lilanga lelibekelwe yonkhe imibhoshongo lephakeme, futsi libekelwe tonkhe tibondza letitinqaba;" 
Isaiah2:16 lilanga lelimiselwe yonkhe imikhumbi yekuhweba, libekelwe yonkhe imikhumbi lemikhulu letfwele imicebo nemagugu." 
Isaiah2:17 Kutiphakamisa kwebantfu kuyakwehliselwa phansi, nekutigcabha kwebantfu kutfotjiswe; Simakadze yena yedvwa uyawuphakanyiswa ngalelo langa," 
Isaiah2:18 netithico tiyawunyamalala tiphele nya. 
Isaiah2:19 Bantfu bayawubalekela emigedzeni yasemadvwaleni, nasemigodzini lesemhlabatsini, babalekele kwesabeka kwaSimakadze nebumengemenge bebukhosi bakhe, nakasukumela kunyakatisa umhlaba." 
Isaiah2:20 Ngalelo langa bantfu bayawulahla tithico tabo emagundvwaneni nasemalulwaneni; yebo, tithico tabo tesiliva kanye netithico tabo tegolide, lababetentele kutikhonta." 
Isaiah2:21 Bayawubalekela emihumeni lesemadvwaleni kanye naseticongweni tetihhehle, babalekela kwesabeka kwaSimakadze nebumengemenge bebukhosi bakhe, nakasukumela kunyakatisa umhlaba." 
Isaiah2:22 Yekelani kwetsembela kubantfu, emakhaleni abo kunekuphefumula nje. Empeleni bayini nje?" 
Isaiah3:1 Buka-ke nyalo, iNkhosi Simakadze lenguSomandla seyitawususa eJerusalema nakaJuda lokungenako nako konkhe lokubasekelako: konkhe kudla lokungenako nawo onkhe emanti langenako," 
Isaiah3:2 lichawe nelisotja, umehluleli nemphrofethi, sangoma nemholi," 
Isaiah3:3 indvuna yema-50 nendvodza lenesikhundla, umeluleki nengcweti lenelikhono, kanye nemtsakatsi lohlakaniphile." 
Isaiah3:4 Ngiyakwenta bafana babe tindvuna tabo; bayawuphatfwa bantfwana nje. 
Isaiah3:5 Bantfu bayawucindzetelana, umuntfu acindzetele lomunye, makhelwane acindzetele makhelwane. Labasha bayawuvukela labadzala, bantfu phaca bavukele lababaphetse." 
Isaiah3:6 Lomunye uyawubamba umnakabo emtini weyise, atsi: “Wena unelijazi, bani ngumholi wetfu; busa etikwanansi imfuhlululu!”" 
Isaiah3:7 Kodvwa ngalelo langa uyawukhala atsi: “Ngeke ngibe ngumphilisi! Ngite kudla nekwekwembatsa endlini yami; ungangenti umholi wesive.” 
Isaiah3:8 IJerusalema iyayendza, Juda uyawa; emavi abo kanye netento tabo kuphambene naSimakadze, bedzelela nebukhosi bakhe." 
Isaiah3:9 Kukhetsa kwabo buso ekwehluleleni kubufakazi lobumelene nabo; bashengetisa ngesono sabo njengeSodoma, abasifihli nakancane. Maye kubo! Batiletsele inhlekelele etikwabo." 
Isaiah3:10 Tjelani labalungile kutsi kutabahambela kahle, ngobe bayawudla titselo tetento tabo." 
Isaiah3:11 Maye kulababi! Inhlekelele isetikwabo! Kuyawuphindziselwa kubo njengekwenta kwetandla tabo. 
Isaiah3:12 Awu, sive sami, nicindzetelwa bantfwana, bafati babusa etikwenu. Awu, sive sami, labo baholi benu bayanedukisa; banikhipha endleleni, lenifanele nihambe ngayo." 
Isaiah3:13 Simakadze utilungiselele kutsetsa emacala; uyasukuma atekwehlulela sive. 
Isaiah3:14 Simakadze ungena ekwehluleleni, wehlulela labadzala nebaholi besive sakhe, utsi: “Ngini lenicedze sivini sami, imphango leniyitsetse kulabamphofu igcwele etindlini tenu." 
Isaiah3:15 Nisho kutsini ngalokupitjita sive sami, nigaye buso balabamphofu?” kusho iNkhosi, Simakadze longuSomandla." 
Isaiah3:16 Simakadze utsi: “Bafati baseSiyoni bayatigcabha; bahamba belule tintsamo, bacwashacwashata ngemehlo abo, nabahambako, bashayela etulu, emacakaleni abo kukhehleta imihlobiso labayigabile." 
Isaiah3:17 Ngako-ke Simakadze utawuveta tilondza etinhloko tebafati baseSiyoni; Simakadze utawucotfula tinhloko tabo, tibe timphandla.”" 
Isaiah3:18 Ngalelo langa Simakadze uyawubemuka lemihlobiso yabo: emabhengela, nemibhodze leticebedvu kanye nemagcebesha asentsanyeni," 
Isaiah3:19 nemacici, nemasongo, netimvakazi," 
Isaiah3:20 nemaduku enhloko, netigcoko, nebuhlalu basemacakaleni, nemijijimba, nemabhodlela emakha, nabomdvonseni," 
Isaiah3:21 netindandatho tetimphawu, netindandatho tasemakhaleni," 
Isaiah3:22 nemijiva lemihle, netiphika, nemajazi, netipatji," 
Isaiah3:23 netibuko, netingubo telineni lecolisakele, nemishuculo kanye nematjalo." 
Isaiah3:24 Esikhundleni sekunuka kwemakha, kutawunuka luboti; esikhundleni semijijimba kube tintsambo, esikhundleni setinwele letentiwe kahle kutawuba nemphandla; esikhundleni setembatfo letinhle kutawuba ngemasaka; esikhundleni sebuhle kutawuba nesishadza." 
Isaiah3:25 Emadvodza akho ayawubulawa ngenkemba, tihlabani takho tifele emphini." 
Isaiah3:26 Emasango aseSiyoni ayawukhala alile, lidolobha selisiganga, yebo, bantfu balo batawuhlala phantsi emhlabatsini." 
Isaiah4:1 Ngalelo langa labasikati labasikhombisa bayawuhlanganyela indvodza yinye, batsi kuyo: “Sitatidlela kudla kwetfu siphindze sitembatsise; intfo nje, sicela kutsi simane sibitwe ngawe. Susa lelihlazo letfu!”" 
Isaiah4:2 Ngalelo langa Ligala laSimakadze liyawuba lihle likhatimule, netitselo talelo live tiyawuba ludvumo nebuhle betinsali taka-Israyeli." 
Isaiah4:3 Labo labashiyiwe eSiyoni, labasasele eJerusalema, bayawubitwa ngekutsi ngulabangcwele, bonkhe labo labayawube babhaliswe nalabaphila eJerusalema." 
Isaiah4:4 Simakadze uyawukugeza kungcola kwalabasikati baseSiyoni; uyawuhlanta emacabhacabha engati aseJerusalema ngemoya wekwehlulela nangemoya wemlilo. 
Isaiah4:5 Ngako Simakadze uyawudala lifu emini, intfutfu nelilangabi lemlilo ebusuku, lisibekele iNtsaba yonkhe iSiyoni nabo bonkhe labahlanganela kuyo; etikwayo yonkhe lenkhatimulo kuyawuba nempheme." 
Isaiah4:6 Uyawuba sivikelo nemtfunti emini nakushisa lilanga, kube yindzawo yekuphephela neyekukhosela esivunguvungwini nasemvuleni." 
Isaiah5:1 Ngitawuhlabelela lowo lengimtsandzako ingoma ngesivini sakhe, ngitsi: Lowo lengimtsandzako abenesivini egcumeni lelivundzile." 
Isaiah5:2 Wasimba wesusa onkhe ematje kuso, wahlanyela kuso imivini yelikhetselo. Wakha umbhoshongo wekulindza ekhatsi kuso, wacopha nesikhamo seliwayini edvwaleni. Abetsembe kutsi sitawutsela emagelebisi lamahle, kodvwa satsela emagelebisi esiganga lamunyu." 
Isaiah5:3 “Nine lenihlala eJerusalema, nani madvodza akaJuda, yehlulelani emkhatsini wami nesivini sami." 
Isaiah5:4 Bekufanele ngenteni lokunye kulesivini sami, ngetulu kwaloku lese ngikwentile? Pho, kwentiwe yini kutsi nangifuna emagelebisi lamahle kuso, sona sitsele emagelebisi esiganga lamunyu?" 
Isaiah5:5 Manje-ke senginitjela kutsi ngitakwentani kulesivini sami: Ngitawususa lolutsango lwaso, lesivini sibhujiswe, ngitawuhhihlita nalolubondza lwaso, sinyatselwe phansi." 
Isaiah5:6 Ngitawusenta sibe siganga lesingenalutfo, nemvini longatsenwa, nemhlaba waso awuyikulinywa. Kuyawukwena tinchachabutane nemanyeva. Ngitawuyala nemafu kutsi anganisi imvula kuso.”" 
Isaiah5:7 Phela, sivini saSimakadze longuSomandla yindlu yaka-Israyeli, kantsi sive sakaJuda sona sititfombo tekujabula kwakhe. Abebheke umtsetfocotfo, kodvwa wakhandza kucitfwa kwengati, wabheka kulunga, kodvwa weva kukhala kwelusizi." 
Isaiah5:8 Maye kini nine lenengeta indlu kulenye indlu, nengete insimi kulenye insimi, kuze kubete nesikhadlana nje lesisalako, bese nihlala nodvwana eveni." 
Isaiah5:9 Simakadze longuSomandla ufunge etindlebeni tami, watsi: “Impela tindlu letinyenti titawuba tindzala, netindlu letinkhulu naletinhle tisale tingenamuntfu." 
Isaiah5:10 Sivini lesingalinywa tinkhabi letimbili ngemalanga lalishumi siyawuba nesivuno lesilibhasikidi linye nje lemagelebisi, nelisaka lenhlanyelo liyawuba nesivuno lesiyimbita yinye kuphela.”" 
Isaiah5:11 Maye kulabo labavuka ekuseni ngeluvivi bagijimele etinatfweni letidzakanako, batihlalele kuze kube ngusebusuku kakhulu, badzimate behlulwe nguleliwayini labo." 
Isaiah5:12 Banemahabhu nemalire emadzilini abo, nemafahlawane nemintjingozi kanye neliwayini, kodvwa abatinaki tento taSimakadze, abayiboni imisebenti yetandla takhe." 
Isaiah5:13 Ngako-ke lesive sami sitawutfunjwa ngenca yekubate kucondza, emadvodza aso lanetikhundla atakuwa abulawe yindlala, tincumbi taso tiyawuhashulwa komela emanti." 
Isaiah5:14 Ngako-ke lithuna selandzise kakhulu kukhanuka kwalo kudla, selivule umlomo walo ngalokwengcile; bahlonishwa baso bayakwehlela khona kanye nabo bonkhe bantfu baso nabo bonkhe labajabulako babanga umsindvo lomkhulu." 
Isaiah5:15 Ngako umuntfu uyakwehliselwa phansi, neluntfu lonkhe lutfotjiswe; nemehlo alabanekutigcabha ayawutfotjiswa." 
Isaiah5:16 Kodvwa Simakadze longuSomandla utawuphakanyiswa ngekwehlulela kwakhe lokumsulwa. Nkulunkulu longcwele utabubonakalisa bungcwele bakhe ngekulunga kwakhe. 
Isaiah5:17 Timvu tiyakudla kube shangatsi ngusemadlelweni ato; emazinyane etimvu ayakudla emkhatsini wetindzala talabanjingile. 
Isaiah5:18 Maye kulabo labahudvula sono ngetintsambo temacebo, badvonse bubi kube shangatsi kungetintsambo tetincola," 
Isaiah5:19 maye kulabo labatsi: “Nkulunkulu akasheshise, akaphangise umsebenti wakhe, khona sitewubona. Longcwele waka-Israyeli akakwente masinyane loko latimisele kukwenta, khona sitekwati.”" 
Isaiah5:20 Maye kulabo labatsi lokubi kuhle, nalokuhle batsi kubi, lababeka bumnyama bube kukhanya, babeke kukhanya kube bumnyama, lababeka lokubabako kube ngulokunongotelako, babeke lokunongotelako kube ngulokubabako." 
Isaiah5:21 Maye kulabo labatibona bahlakaniphile emehlweni abo, batibone bona kutsi bahlakaniphile." 
Isaiah5:22 Maye kulabo labangemachawe ekunatseni liwayini, nakulabo labangemachawe ekudidiyeleni sinatfo lesinemandla," 
Isaiah5:23 labemukela umdizo, khona batawukhulula labo labanelicala, kuze babalahle ngelicala labo labate licala." 
Isaiah5:24 Ngako-ke, njengobe lulwimi lwemlilo lukhotsa tibi, nanjengobe tjani lobomile bushona phansi, nabushiswa ngemalangabi, kanjalo timphandze tabo tiyawubola, netimbali tabo tiphephuke njengelutfuli; ngobe bawalile umtsetfo waSimakadze longuSomandla, bedzelela livi laLongcwele waka-Israyeli." 
Isaiah5:25 Ngako-ke intfukutselo yaSimakadze yasivutsela sive sakhe; waphakamisa sandla sakhe wabashaya wabalahla phansi, tintsaba tatamatama. Tidvumbu tabo taba njengemfuhlululu etitaladini. Noko ngako konkhe loku lulaka lwakhe alukagucuki, sandla sakhe sisephakeme." 
Isaiah5:26 Tive letikhashane uyakutiphakamisela siboniso, ashaye impembe atibite khona emaphetselweni emhlaba. Ngekushesha lokukhulu tiyakuta." 
Isaiah5:27 Kute lodziniwe, kute lokhubatelako, kute lowetelako nome lolalako, kute lonelibhande lelicekako elukhalweni, kute lonencabule lenemchilo lodzabukile;" 
Isaiah5:28 imicibisholo yabo iyakhalipha, bonkhe butjoki babo sebugotjiwe, tinselo temahhashi abo tilukhuni njengematje, emasondvo etincola tabo temphi afanana nesiwunguwungwana semoya." 
Isaiah5:29 Kubhodla kwabo kufanana nekwemabhubesi, yebo, babhodla njengemabhubesi lamancane, atsi ahhonga abe abamba imphango yawo, ayetfwale ahambe nayo kubete longayisindzisa." 
Isaiah5:30 Ngalelo langa bayawubhodla etikwa-Israyeli njengekubhodla kwelwandle. Umuntfu uyawutsi nakabuka live, abone bumnyama lobesabekako; ngisho nekukhanya imbala emafu ayawukwenta kube bumnyama." 
Isaiah6:1 Kwatsi ngemnyaka wekufa kwenkhosi Uziya, ngabona Simakadze ahleti esihlalweni sakhe sebukhosi, naso lesisetulu futsi siphakeme, umsila wesembatfo sakhe ugcwalise lonkhe lithempeli." 
Isaiah6:2 Ngetulu kwakhe kwakunemaserafi amkhonta, ngulelo nalelo lalinetimphiko letisitfupha: ngetimphiko letimbili atimbonya buso bawo, ngaletimbili atimbonya tinyawo tawo, bese kutsi ngaleti letimbili abe andiza." 
Isaiah6:3 Abememetana odvwana, ngulelo nalelo litsi: “Ungcwele, ungcwele, ungcwele, Simakadze longuSomandla! Umhlaba wonkhe ugcwele bukhosi bakhe.”" 
Isaiah6:4 Ngemsindvo wemaphimbo alamaserafi tinsika teminyango kanye netisekelo tayo kwatfutfumela, nelithempeli lagcwala umusi wentfutfu." 
Isaiah6:5 Ngase ngitsi: “Maye kimi, mine ngiphelile! Ngobe ngingumuntfu lotindzebe temlomo wakhe tingcolile, futsi ngihlala emkhatsini webantfu labatindzebe tabo tingcolile. Emehlo ami ayibonile iNkhosi, Simakadze longuSomandla.”" 
Isaiah6:6 Kepha lelinye lemaserafi landiza leta kimi, liphetse lilahle lelivutsako esandleni salo, lelalilitsetse ngeludlawu elatini." 
Isaiah6:7 Lafike latsintsa umlomo wami ngalo, latsi: “Buka la, loku sekutsintse umlomo wakho, ngako licala lakho selesuliwe, nesono sakho sesihlawulelwe.”" 
Isaiah6:8 Ngase ngiva livi laSimakadze litsi: “Ngitawutfuma bani? Ngubani lotasiyela?” Ngase ngitsi: “Nangu mine, tfuma mine!”" 
Isaiah6:9 Watsi: “Hamba utjele lesive utsi: “ ‘Lalelani njalo, kodvwa ningeva; bukani njalo, kodvwa ningaboni.’" 
Isaiah6:10 Yenta inhlitiyo yalabantfu ibe ndzindzima, netindlebe tabo tibe butfuntfu ekuveni, uvale nemehlo abo, bangahle babone ngemehlo abo, beve ngetindlebe tabo, bacondzisise ngetinhlitiyo tabo, bagucuke, bese bayaphiliswa.”" 
Isaiah6:11 Ngase ngitsi: “Awu! Simakadze, kutawuze kube ngunini?” Wangiphendvula watsi: “Kuyawuze kubhujiswe emadolobha, kubete bantfu labahlala kuwo; tindlu tize tibe tindzala, nemasimi abhujiswe aze onakale," 
Isaiah6:12 naSimakadze aze abasakatele khashane bantfu, live lisale lingasenalutfo selikhohlakele." 
Isaiah6:13 Nome ngabe kusekhona kwelishumi lokusasele kulo live, nako futsi kuyawulahlwa kungabi namsebenti. Kodvwa-ke njengobe umtherebinte nem-okhi kushiya tiphunti nakugawuliwe, kanjalo nenhlanyelo lengcwele iyawuba siphunti eveni.”" 
Isaiah7:1 Kwatsi ngesikhatsi Ahazi, umsa waJothamu, umsa wa-Uziya, ayinkhosi yakaJuda, boResini, inkhosi yaseSiriya, naPhekha, umsa waRemaliya, inkhosi yaka-Israyeli, bashuca bayawulwa neJerusalema, kodvwa noko abazange bayehlule." 
Isaiah7:2 Indlu yakaDavide yatjelwa kwatsiwa: “ISiriya itihlanganise nelaka-Efrayimu.” Ngako tinhlitiyo tabo-Ahazi kanye netebantfu bakhe tesaba tatfutfumela njengetihlahla telihlatsi, natinyakatiswa ngumoya." 
Isaiah7:3 Simakadze wakhuluma ku-Isaya, watsi: “Phuma wena nemsa wakho Sheyari Jashubi niyewuhlangabeta Ahazi ngasemseleni wesitiba lesisenhla, emgwacweni loya eNsimini yeMgezi Wetingubo." 
Isaiah7:4 Ubosho kuye utsi: ‘Caphela, uthule, ume sibindzi, ungaphelelwa ngemandla ngenca yaletiphintana letibili taletikhuni letishuncako, nangekuvutsa kwelulaka lwaResini nemaSiriya akhe nelwemsa waRemaliya." 
Isaiah7:5 Siriya, na-Efrayimu, nemsa waRemaliya bakwakhela luzungu, batsi:" 
Isaiah7:6 “Asikhuphuke siyewuvimbetela lakaJuda silidzabule ekhatsi, sitehlukanisele lona, bese sibeka umsa waThabheyali kutsi abe yinkhosi etikwalo.”" 
Isaiah7:7 Kodvwa naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, itsi: “ ‘Kungeke kwenteke, futsi kungeke kuphumelele." 
Isaiah7:8 Ngobe inhloko yaseSiriya yiDamaseko, nenhloko yeDamaseko nguResini kuphela. Kusengakapheli iminyaka lengema-65, baka-Efrayimu bayawube sebahlakateke kakhulu, sebangasesiso sive." 
Isaiah7:9 Inhloko yaka-Efrayimu yiSamariya, nenhloko yeSamariya ngumsa waRemaliya kuphela. Naningakemi nacina ekukholweni kwenu, ningeke nisema nicinile.’ ”" 
Isaiah7:10 Simakadze wabuye wakhuluma ku-Ahazi, watsi:" 
Isaiah7:11 “Ticelele sibonakaliso kuSimakadze Nkulunkulu wakho, nome sibe ngulesisekujuleni nome-ke lesiphakeme njengelizulu.”" 
Isaiah7:12 Kodvwa Ahazi watsi: “Ngingeke ngisicele. Ngingeke ngivivinye Simakadze.” 
Isaiah7:13 Isaya wase utsi: “Lalela lapha, wenandlu yakaDavide! Kuyini kini lokube solomane nihluphana netinhlitiyo tebantfu? Nyalo senifuna nekuhlupha Nkulunkulu wami yini kantsi?" 
Isaiah7:14 Ngako-ke, Nkulunkulu, yena cobo lwakhe, utawuninika sibonakaliso: Intfombi iyawukhulelwa itale indvodzana, yetsiwe libito kutsiwe ngu-Imanyuweli." 
Isaiah7:15 Iyakudla tikhihli temasi netinyosi idzimate ikwati kwala lokubi ikhetse lokuhle. 
Isaiah7:16 Kodvwa kuyawutsi lomfana asengakakwati kwala lokubi akhetse lokuhle, lelo live lalamakhosi lamabili lowesabako, liyawube selingasenalutfo." 
Isaiah7:17 Simakadze uyawuletsa kuwe nasetikwesive sakini, nasetikwendlu yeyihlo, sikhatsi lesingazange sesibe khona kusukela baka-Efrayimu bahlephuka kubakaJuda; uyawuletsa inkhosi yase-Asiriya.”" 
Isaiah7:18 Ngalelo langa Simakadze uyawushaya inkwela abite timphungane letingasemifuleni yaseGibhithe kanye netinyosi taseveni lase-Asiriya. 
Isaiah7:19 Tiyawubuya tonkhe titewubutsana etihosheni letehlelako kanye nasemifantfwini yemadvwala, nasetikwato tonkhe tihlahla temanyeva nasetimbotjeni tonkhe temanti." 
Isaiah7:20 Ngalelo langa Simakadze uyawusebentisa insingo lecashwe ngesheya kweMfula, inkhosi yase-Asiriya, kutsi itewuhhula ngayo tinhloko tenu, kanye netiboya letisemilenteni yenu, isuse netilevu tenu." 
Isaiah7:21 Ngalelo langa indvodza iyawufuya litfokati linye netimbuti letimbili. 
Isaiah7:22 Ngenca yekutsi tiyawube tehlisa kakhulu, iyawuba netikhihli temasi letinyenti tekutondla. Bonkhe labayawube basele kulelo live bayawudla tikhihli temasi kanye netinyosi." 
Isaiah7:23 Ngalelo langa kuto tonkhe tindzawo lapho kwakunenkhulungwane yemivini leyayingabita tinhlavu letiyinkhulungwane tesiliva, sekuyakwena kube netitfwetfwe nemanyeva." 
Isaiah7:24 Emadvodza ayakuya lapho aphetse butjoki bawo nemicibisholo yawo, ngobe lelo live liyawube selene ngetitfwetfwe nangemanyeva." 
Isaiah7:25 Mayelana nato tonkhe tintsatjana letake talinywa ngemakhuba etandla, ningeke nisaya kuto, ngenca yekwesaba titfwetfwe nemanyeva; setiyawuba tindzawo lapho kudla khona imihlambi yetinkhomo, kugcobagcobe khona netimvu." 
Isaiah8:1 Simakadze wakhuluma kimi, watsi: “Tsatsa incwadzi lenkhulu legocotwako ubhale kuyo ngelutsi lolwetayelekile, utsi: Maheri Shalali Hashi Bazi." 
Isaiah8:2 Ngiyawubita Uriya, umphristi, naZakhariya, umsa waJeberekhiya, bangimele njengabofakazi bami labetsembekile.”" 
Isaiah8:3 Ngabe sengiya kumphrofethikati, wase uyakhulelwa, watala indvodzana. Simakadze wakhuluma kimi, watsi: “Metse libito utsi nguMaheri Shalali Hashi Bazi." 
Isaiah8:4 Kwatsi lomfanyana asengakakwati nakahle kutsi ‘Babe’ nome ‘Make’, umcebo waseDamaseko nemphango yaseSamariya kuyawube sekutfunjwa yinkhosi yase-Asiriya.”" 
Isaiah8:5 Simakadze wakhuluma kimi futsi, watsi:" 
Isaiah8:6 “Njengobe lesive siwalile emanti aseShilowa lehla kamnandzi, sajabulela Resini nendvodzana yaRemaliya," 
Isaiah8:7 ngako-ke Simakadze sewutakwehlisela etikwaso sikhukhula semanti lanemandla emfula iYufrathe, yinkhosi yase-Asiriya nabo bonkhe bukhosi bayo. Lomfula uyawugcwala uphuphume kuyo yonkhe imifula yakhona, netihoshana takhona, ugole tintsetse," 
Isaiah8:8 uze utseleke kulakaJuda uligumbucele lonkhe, ulikhukhule uze uyewukhawula entsanyeni. Ngetimphiko tawo uyawulimbonya bubanti balo lonkhe lelo live lakho, awu Imanyuweli!”" 
Isaiah8:9 Hlabani inyandzaleyo, nine tive, nitfutfumele! Lalelani, nine nonkhe mave lakhashane. Tilungiseleleni kulwa imphi, nesabe! Tilungiseleleni kulwa imphi, nehlulwe!" 
Isaiah8:10 Takheleni emasu enu, kodvwa atakwehlulekiswa; yentani emachinga enu, kodvwa ngeke aphumelele; ngobe Nkulunkulu unatsi." 
Isaiah8:11 Simakadze wakhuluma kimi ngesandla sakhe lesinemandla, angecwayisa kutsi ngingatilandzeli tindlela talesive, watsi:" 
Isaiah8:12 “Ningabosho kutsi luzungu, konkhe loku labakushoko labantfu kutsi luzungu, ningakwesabi loko labakwesabako; futsi ningabi naluvalo ngako." 
Isaiah8:13 Simakadze longuSomandla, nguye lekufanele nimati ngekutsi ungcwele. Nguye lekufanele nimesabe nimhloniphe. Nguye lekumele nitfutfumele ngaye." 
Isaiah8:14 Nguye loyawuba siphephelo senu; kodvwa kuto totimbili tindlu tema-Israyeli uyawuba litje leliyawukhuba bantfu nelidvwala leliyawubenta bawe. Kubantfu baseJerusalema uyawuba lugibe nasochaka. 
Isaiah8:15 “Labanyenti babo bayawukhubatela; bayakuwa bephuke nekwephuka, bayakwetsiywa baze babanjwe.”" 
Isaiah8:16 Bophisisa lobufakazi, uvalele umtsetfo wami emkhatsini webafundzi bami." 
Isaiah8:17 Ngitawulindzela Simakadze lofihla buso bakhe kuyo indlu yakaJakobe. Ngiyawubeka litsemba lami kuye. 
Isaiah8:18 Ngilapha mine kanye nalabo bantfwana Simakadze langiphe bona. Sitibonakaliso netimangaliso taSimakadze longuSomandla, esiveni sema-Israyeli, yena lohlala eNtsabeni iSiyoni." 
Isaiah8:19 Bantfu batanitjela kutsi: “Yanini etangomeni nakulababhulako, labo labahlebako banhhinklile.” Batsi: “Sive akukafaneli yini kutsi sibute kuNkulunkulu waso?” Indlela ifunelwani kulabafile egameni lalabaphilako?" 
Isaiah8:20 Buyelani kuwo umtsetfo waNkulunkulu nasebufakazini bakhe! Nabangakhulumi njengekwalelivi, abayiwuba nako kukhanya kwekusa." 
Isaiah8:21 Bayawukwehla benyuka eveni bajabhile futsi balambile, ngesikhatsi sebahwaywe yindlala, bayawuvutsa ngelulaka, babuke etulu, bacalekise inkhosi yabo kanye naNkulunkulu wabo." 
Isaiah8:22 Bayawube sebabuka phansi emhlabatsini babone inhlupheko yodvwa nebumnyama nelitfunti lelesabekako, nabo bayawulahlelwa ebumnyameni lobesabekako." 
Isaiah9:1 Noko kungeke kusaba nelitfunti kulabo labebahluphekile. Kadzeni walitfobisa live lakaZebuloni nelive lakaNaftali, kodvwa ngesikhatsi lesitako uyakuliphakamisa live laseGalile lebetive, endleleni leya elwandle, ngesheya kweJordane." 
Isaiah9:2 Bantfu labahamba ebumnyameni bakubonile kukhanya lokukhulu; kulabo labahlala eveni lelitfunti lekufa kukhanya sekuchamukile. 
Isaiah9:3 Sewusandzisile sive, wandzisa nekujabula kwaso; siyajabula embikwakho njengebantfu bajatjuliswa sivuno, nanjengebantfu nabajatjuliswa kwaba imphango." 
Isaiah9:4 Ngobe njengasemihleni yekwehlulwa kwakaMidiyani, ulifohlotile lelijoko belingumtfwalo kubo, nemgcala losindzako lobewusemahlombe abo, nendvuku yemcindzeteli wabo." 
Isaiah9:5 Tonkhe ticatfulo temasotja labetisebentisa emphini, nato tonkhe tembatfo tawo letibhucabhucwe engatini titawushiswa, tibe kudla kwemlilo." 
Isaiah9:6 Ngobe tsine sitalelwe umntfwana, siphiwe indvodzana. Umbuso uyawubasemahlombe akhe. Uyawutsiwa nguMeluleki Lomangalisako, nguNkulunkulu Lonemandla, nguBabe Waphakadze, yiNkhosi Yekuthula." 
Isaiah9:7 Umbuso wakhe uyawukhula, kuthula nenhlalakahle kungeke kuphele. Uyawubusa esihlalweni sebukhosi saDavide, nasembusweni wakhe. Uyakuwumisa awusekele ngekwemtsetfocotfo nangekulunga, kusukela kuleso sikhatsi kuze kube nguphakadze naphakadze. Inshisekelo yaSimakadze longuSomandla iyawukwenta loko." 
Isaiah9:8 Simakadze utfume livi kuyewumelana nebakaJakobe, liyakwehlela ku-Israyeli." 
Isaiah9:9 Bonkhe bantfu bayakulati, baka-Efrayimu kanye nalabakhile eSamariya, labakhuluma bachoshe, basho nangekutigabatisa kwenhlitiyo, batsi:" 
Isaiah9:10 “Titini tidzilikele phansi, kodvwa tsine sitakwakha kabusha ngematje labatwe kahle. Tihlahla temakhiwa tigawuliwe, kodvwa tsine sitatenana ngetihlahla temisedari.”" 
Isaiah9:11 Kodvwa Simakadze ubacinisele titsa takaResini kutsi tikwati kubhekana nabo, wahlohla titsa tabo." 
Isaiah9:12 EmaSiriya ngasemphumalanga nemaFilisti ngasenshonalanga, asakhamisele kushwabudzela ema-Israyeli. Noko ngako konkhe loku lulaka lwakhe alukagucuki; sandla sakhe sisephakeme." 
Isaiah9:13 Kodvwa bantfu abakaphendvukeli kuye lowo lowabashaya, futsi abakamfunisisi Simakadze longuSomandla." 
Isaiah9:14 Ngako Simakadze uyawujuba ka-Israyeli inhloko nemsila kokubili, ligala lelisundvu nemhlanga kokubili, ngalanga linye." 
Isaiah9:15 Labadzala nemadvodza langimisumphe ngubona bayinhloko. Baphrofethi labafundzisa emanga bona bangumsila. 
Isaiah9:16 Labo labahola lesive bayasedukisa, nalabo labaholwako bayalahlekiswa." 
Isaiah9:17 Ngako-ke Simakadze ngeke ajabule ngemajaha abo, futsi ngeke abadzabukele labo labangenaboyise kanye nebafelokati, ngobe bonkhe abanaNkulunkulu, futsi babi, bonkhe bakhuluma emanyala. Noko ngako konkhe loku, lulaka lwakhe alukagucuki, sandla sakhe sisephakeme." 
Isaiah9:18 Ngempela bubi buvutsa njengemlilo; budla bucotfule tinchachabutane nemanyeva, bulumeka emahlatsi etihlahla ngemalangabi, kutsi titewushunca tibheke etulu ngaletikhulu tikhatsa tentfutfu." 
Isaiah9:19 Ngelulaka lwaSimakadze longuSomandla live liyawugagadzeka, nebantfu bayawuba tinkhuni temlilo; kute loyawuphephisa umnakabo." 
Isaiah9:20 Ngesekudla bayawushwabudzela, kodvwa bachubeke balambe; ngesancele bayawudla, kodvwa bangeke besutse. Ngulowo nalowo uyakutondla ngenyama yentalelwane yakakhe;" 
Isaiah9:21 bakaManase bayawutondla ngebaka-Efrayimu, nebaka-Efrayimu batondle ngebakaManase, bonkhe bayawugucukela bakaJuda. Noko ngako konkhe loku, lulaka lwakhe alukagucuki, sandla sakhe sisephakeme." 
Isaiah10:1 Maye kulabo labashaya imitsetfo lengakalungi, kulabo labashaya imitsetfo yekucindzetela," 
Isaiah10:2 bentele kwemuka labamphofu emalungelo abo, badlelele bantfu bami labacindzetelekile emalungelo abo emtsetfocotfo, batsatse imphango kubafelokati, badlelele labangenaboyise." 
Isaiah10:3 Niyakwenta njani ngelilanga lekwehlulelwa, ngesikhatsi sehlakalo sichamuka khashane? Niyawubalekela kubani nicele lusito? Niyakuwushiya nabani lomcebo wenu?" 
Isaiah10:4 Kute leningakwenta ngaphandle kwekushosha phansi kanye nalabatfunjwako, nome niwele phansi emkhatsini walababulewe. Noko ngako konkhe loku, lulaka lwakhe alukagucuki, nesandla sakhe sisephakeme." 
Isaiah10:5 “Maye kulo lase-Asiriya, indvuku yelulaka lwami, lelisandla salo sifumbetse sagila selulaka lwami." 
Isaiah10:6 Ngilitfumela esiveni lesingenaNkulunkulu, ngilikhiphele kubantfu labangitfukutselisako, kutsi lihlutfule imphango, litsatse lokuphangiwe, nekutsi libagcobagcobe phansi njengeludzaka lwendlela." 
Isaiah10:7 Kodvwa loko akusiko lebekuhloswe yinkhosi yase-Asiriya, akusiko lebekusengcondvweni yayo. Inhloso yayo kubhubhisa, nekucedza tive letinyenti." 
Isaiah10:8 Itsi: ‘Akusito tonkhe yini tindvuna tami lesetingemakhosi? 
Isaiah10:9 IKhalno ayikafanani yini neKhakhemishi? IHamathi ayifanani yini ne-Aphadi? ISamariya yona ayifanani yini neDamaseko? 
Isaiah10:10 Njengobe sandla sami sayibamba imibuso yetithico, imibuso leyayimifanekiso yayo yayendlula leya yaseJerusalema neyaseSamariya," 
Isaiah10:11 ngingeke yini ngimelane nayo iJerusalema kanye netithico tayo, njengaloku ngemelana nayo iSamariya netithico tayo?’ ”" 
Isaiah10:12 Simakadze nase acedzile yonkhe imisebenti yakhe lemelene nentsaba iSiyoni neJerusalema, uyakutsi: “Ngiyakuyijezisa inkhosi yase-Asiriya ngenca yeligcabho layo langemabomu lelisenhlitiyweni yayo nangenca yekutiphakamisa kwayo lokusemehlweni ayo." 
Isaiah10:13 Ngobe itsi: “ ‘Ngemandla esandla sami ngikwentile loku, nangekuhlakanipha kwami, ngobe nginako kucondza. Ngayisusa iminyele yetive, ngayiphanga imicebo yato. Njengalonemandla ngabawisa labakhe khona." 
Isaiah10:14 Njengalofinyelela esidlekeni senyoni, kanjalo sandla sami safinyelela kuyo imicebo yetive; njengobe bantfu babutsa emacandza lashiyiwe, kanjalo nami ngawabutsa onkhe emave, kute nalinye lelake labhengutisa luphiko nome lavula umlomo lantjilota.’ ”" 
Isaiah10:15 Lizembe liyatiphakamisa yini lona, libe ngetulu kwalowo lolijikitisako? Lona lisaha liyamhhongela yini lolisebentisako? Kube shangatsi umzaca bewungamjikitisa lowo lowuphetse nome sagila singamjikitisa lowo longesiso sigodvo!" 
Isaiah10:16 Ngako-ke, iNkhosi Simakadze lenguSomandla iyawutfumela sifo lesondzisanako kulabo labanemandla base-Asiriya; ngephansi kwalokutikhukhumeta kwabo kuyakokheleka umlilo, yebo, umlilo lofanana nemalangabi lavutsako." 
Isaiah10:17 Kukhanya kwa-Israyeli kuyawuba ngumlilo, Longcwele wakhe abe lilangabi. Ngelilanga linye uyawuvutsa, udle emanyeva akhe netitfwetfwe takhe." 
Isaiah10:18 Uyawucedza buhle bemahlatsi akhe, nemasimi akhe lavundzile, kuphele umtimba nemphefumulo, kube njengekuphela kwemuntfu logulako." 
Isaiah10:19 Nemisalela yetihlahla telihlatsi lakhe iyawuba mbalwa kangangekutsi ngisho nemntfwana angatibhala phansi. 
Isaiah10:20 Ngalelo langa insali yaka-Israyeli, ngisho labo labasasele bendlu yakaJakobe, bangeke basetsembela kuye lowo lowabashaya balahleka phansi; kodvwa bayakwetsembela ngeliciniso kuSimakadze, Longcwele waka-Israyeli." 
Isaiah10:21 Insali iyawubuyela emuva, insali yakaJakobe iyawubuyela kuSomandla longuNkulunkulu." 
Isaiah10:22 Nome sive sakho, wena Israyeli, singaba sinyenti ngangesihlabatsi saselugwini lwelwandle, kuyawubuyela insali kuphela. Imbhubhiso ikhishwe, iphuphume ngekulunga." 
Isaiah10:23 INkhosi Simakadze lenguSomandla nguye loyawuchuba lembhubhiso lekhishiwe kulo lonkhe live. 
Isaiah10:24 Ngako-ke naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi, Simakadze lenguSomandla, itsi: “Awu, sive sami lesihlala eSiyoni, ningawesabi ema-Asiriya wona lanishaya ngendvuku aniphakamisele sagila, njengobe kwakwenta baseGibhithe." 
Isaiah10:25 Masinyane intfukutselo yami kini itawuncamuka. Intfukutselo yami seyiyawumelana nema-Asiriya, iwabhubhise.”"
