Isaiah10:26 Simakadze longuSomandla uyakuwashaya ngesiswebhu, njengamzukwana ashaya emaMidiyani edvwaleni lase-Orebi, uyawuphakamisa indvuku yakhe ngetulu kwemanti, njengobe enta eGibhithe." 
Isaiah10:27 Ngalelo langa umtfwalo wema-Asiriya uyawususwa emahlombe enu, nelijoko lawo lisuswe entsanyeni yenu; lijoko litakwephulwa njengobe senikhuluphele kangaka nje." 
Isaiah10:28 Ema-Asiriya angena e-Aya, adzabula eMigroni, alondvolota imphahla yawo eMikmashi." 
Isaiah10:29 Angena emsahweni atsi: “Sitawumisa busuku bunye eGeba.” IRama iyatfutfumela, iGibeya yakaSawula iyabaleka." 
Isaiah10:30 Khala, Ndvodzakati yaseGalimu! Lalela, nawe Layisha! Nine base-Anathothi labahluphekile." 
Isaiah10:31 IMadmena iyabaleka; baseGebimu bagijimela kubhaca. 
Isaiah10:32 Lamuhla nje ema-Asiriya ayawumisa eNobi; ayawujikitisa tibhakela tawo entsabeni yeNdvodzakati yaseSiyoni, egcumeni laseJerusalema." 
Isaiah10:33 Bukani la, iNkhosi Simakadze lenguSomandla iyawujuba emagala ngemandla lamakhulu. Tihlahla letiphakeme tiyawugawulwa, leto letidze tiyawuwiswa phansi." 
Isaiah10:34 Uyawugawula tihlahla telihlatsi ngelizembe; iLebanoni iyakuwa embikwakhe Lonemandla Onkhe. 
Isaiah11:1 Kuyawuhluma lihlumela esiphuntini sakaJese; ligala lelimila etimphandzeni takhe liyawutsela titselo. 
Isaiah11:2 Moya waSimakadze uyawubasetikwakhe, Moya wekuhlakanipha newekucondza, Moya wekweluleka newemandla, Moya welwati newekwesaba Simakadze," 
Isaiah11:3 uyawutijabulisa ekwesabeni Simakadze. Angeke ehlulele ngalakubona ngemehlo akhe, nome ente sincumo ngalakuve ngetindlebe takhe;" 
Isaiah11:4 kodvwa labeswele uyawubehlulela ngekwemtsetfocotfo, labamphofu belive abehlulele ngekungakhetsi. Uyawushaya umhlaba ngendvuku yemlomo wakhe; ngekuphefumula kwemlomo wakhe uyawubulala lababi." 
Isaiah11:5 Kulunga kuyawuba libhande lakhe, kwetsembeka kube ngumbhenso welukhalo lwakhe." 
Isaiah11:6 Imphisi iyawuhlalisana nelizinyane lemvu, ingwe iyawulala ndzawonye nembuti; linkhonyane, nelibhubesi lelincane, nenkhomo lekhuluphele kuyawuhlala ndzawonye; konkhe kuyakweluswa ngumntfwana lomncane." 
Isaiah11:7 Inkhomati iyakudla dlelo linye nelibhele, emankhonyane ako acambalale ndzawonye, libhubesi lidle tjani njengenkhabi." 
Isaiah11:8 Luswane luyawudlala ngasemgodzini wemfeti, kutsi nemntfwana lomncane afake sandla sakhe emgodzini welibululu." 
Isaiah11:9 Kungeke kulimate futsi kungeke kubulale nome ngangukuphi entsabeni yami lengcwele, ngobe umhlaba uyawugcwala kwati Simakadze, njengobe nemanti agcwalisa lwandle." 
Isaiah11:10 Ngalelo langa iMphandze yaJese iyakuma ibe siboniso kubetive, tive tiyawuhlangana kuyo, indzawo yayo yekuphumula ibe neludvumo." 
Isaiah11:11 Ngalelo langa Simakadze uyakwelula sandla sakhe kwesibili atibutsele imisalela yesive sakhe leyawube isasele e-Asiriya, naseGibhithe Lengentansi, neGibhithe Lengenhla, naseKushe, nase-Elamu, naseBhabhulona, naseHamathi, nasemaveni langaselwandle." 
Isaiah11:12 Uyakuphakamisela tive siboniso, abutse batfunjwa baka-Israyeli; uyawuhlanganisa bantfu bakaJuda labasakatekele emagumbini omane emhlaba." 
Isaiah11:13 Umona wa-Efrayimu uyawunyamalala, titsa takaJuda ticedvwe nya; Efrayimu angeke aphindze abe nemona ngaJuda, naJuda angeke aphindze abe nebutsa ku-Efrayimu." 
Isaiah11:14 Bayawukwehla emaceleni aseFilistiya bawahlasele enshonalanga, bobabili bayawuphanga bantfu labahlala emphumalanga. Bayawulidla live laka-Edomu nelakaMowabi, babuse etikwema-Amoni." 
Isaiah11:15 Simakadze uyakomisa sihlenge selwandle lwaseGibhithe; uyakwelula sandla sakhe lesinemandla etikweYufrathe, ayihamule ngemoya loshisako. Lomfula uyakuwehlukanisa ekhatsi, ube ngimifula lesikhombisa, khona bantfu batekwewela bafake tincabule." 
Isaiah11:16 Kuyawuba nemgwaco lomkhulu wemisalela yesive sakhe leyawube isele e-Asiriya, njengobe wawukhona nakubaka-Israyeli ngesikhatsi baphuma eGibhithe." 
Isaiah12:1 Ngalelo langa uyakutsi: “Ngiyakudvumisa, wena Simakadze, lite nome bewungitfukutselele, kodvwa kutfukutsela kwakho akusekho, esikhundleni saloko sewungidvudvutile." 
Isaiah12:2 Impela, Nkulunkulu uyinsindziso yami; ngiyakumetsemba ngingesabi, Simakadze, Simakadze ungemandla ami nengoma yami; nguye loyinsindziso yami.”" 
Isaiah12:3 Ngekujabula niyawukha emanti emitfonjeni yensindziso. 
Isaiah12:4 Ngalelo langa niyawutsi: “Bongani Simakadze, nibite Libito lakhe; yatisani tive ngaloko lakwentile, nimemetele kutsi Libito lakhe liphakeme." 
Isaiah12:5 Hlabelani kuSimakadze, ngobe wente tintfo letincomekako; loku akwatiwe emhlabeni wonkhe." 
Isaiah12:6 Memetani kakhulu, nihlabele ngenjabulo, nine bantfu baseSiyoni, ngobe mkhulu lowo Longcwele waka-Israyeli losemkhatsini wenu.”" 
Isaiah13:1 Leli livi lesembulo ngeBhabhulona, lelefika ku-Isaya, umsa wa-Amose, ngembono:" 
Isaiah13:1 Leli livi lesembulo ngeBhabhulona, lelefika ku-Isaya, umsa wa-Amose, ngembono:" 
Isaiah13:2 “Phakamisani siboniso semphi, nisiphakamisele esicongweni sentsaba. Memetani kakhulu, nibakhwebe, khona batewuncandzeka babuye, bangene emasangweni alabaphakeme." 
Isaiah13:3 Labangcwele bami ngibatfumile, ngiwabitile emachawe ami lanemandla kutsi ayewufeza sigwebo sentfukutselo yami, wona lawo lajabulela kungincobela." 
Isaiah13:4 “Lalelani, umsindvo etintsabeni, ufanana nalowentiwa sicumbi sebantfu! Lalelani, sidvumo emkhatsini wemibuso! Unjengetiphitsiphitsi tetive! Simakadze longuSomandla uvivisa emabutfo kutsi aphume ayekulwa imphi." 
Isaiah13:5 Baphuma emaveni lakhashane, lasekugcineni kwemazulu, nguye Simakadze netikhali telulaka lwakhe, utewubhubhisa wonkhe umhlaba." 
Isaiah13:6 “Lilani, ngobe lilanga laSimakadze selisondzele, litawufika liyimbhubhiso levela kuSomandla." 
Isaiah13:7 Ngenca yaloko, tonkhe tandla tiyawujikita, inhlitiyo yabo bonkhe bantfu iphelelwe ngemandla," 
Isaiah13:8 kutfutfumela kubabambe, tinhlungu nekucacamba kubantfonye, bajilajileke njengemfati aphetfwe ngumhelo. Bayawubukana ngekumangala, buso babo buvutse emalangabi." 
Isaiah13:9 Bukani, lilanga laSimakadze liyasondzela, lilanga lelinelulaka, nentfukutselo, nelulaka lolwesabekako; litekwenta live libe lihlane, libuye libhubhise netoni letikulo." 
Isaiah13:10 Umtsentse welizulu kanye nato tonkhe tinkhanyeti ngemabutfo ato kungeke kukuvete kukhanya kwako. Lilanga leliphumako litakwentiwa libe mnyama, ngisho nenyanga iyakwehluleka kukhanyisa." 
Isaiah13:11 “Umhlaba ngiyakuwujezisa ngenca yebubi bawo, ngijezise nalababi ngenca yetono tabo. Ngiyakulicedza ligcabho lalabo labatigcabhako, ngikutfobise kutigcabha kwalabo labanelunya." 
Isaiah13:12 Umuntfu ngiyakumenta asweleke kakhulu kunegolide lecengekile, ngimente abe yindlala kunegolide yase-Ofiri, lengatfolakali kalula." 
Isaiah13:13 Ngako-ke emazulu ngiyakuwenta atfutfumele, nemhlaba utanyatanyiswe usuke endzaweni yawo, ngenca yelulaka lwaSimakadze longuSomandla, ngalelo langa lentfukutselo yakhe levutsako." 
Isaiah13:14 “Njengenyamatane letingelwako, nanjengetimvu letingenamelusi, ngulowo nalowo uyawubalekela esiveni sakubo, ngulowo nalowo abalekele eveni lakubo." 
Isaiah13:15 Lowo loyawutfunjwa uyawugwazwa; bonkhe labayawubanjwa bayawudliwa yinkemba. 
Isaiah13:16 Tinswane tabo tiyawuphahlatwa tibe ticucu embikwabo babuka, tindlu tabo tiyawuphangwa, nebafati babo badlwengulwe." 
Isaiah13:17 “Bukani la, ngiyawuvusa emaMede kutsi abahlasele, bantfu labangatsengeki ngesiliva nalabangeke balingwe ngegolide." 
Isaiah13:18 Ngebutjoki babo lobugobile bayawudubula emajaha, abanamusa ngetinswane, futsi bate nesihawu ngebantfwana." 
Isaiah13:19 IBhabhulona ligugu lemibuso, ibuhle beligcabho lemaBhabhulona, Nkulunkulu uyakuyiketula iwe njengeSodoma neGomora." 
Isaiah13:20 Kungeke kuphindze kuhlale muntfu kuyo, kute loyawuphindze ahlale kuyo titukulwane ngetitukulwane; kute um-Arabu loyawumisa lithende lakhe lapho, kute nemelusi loyawuphumulisa imihlambi yakhe kuyo." 
Isaiah13:21 Kodvwa tilwane tasehlane tiyawulala khona, timphungutja tiyawugcwala etindlini takhona, tikhova tiyawuhlala khona, netimbuti tesiganga tiyawutjakadvula khona." 
Isaiah13:22 Timphisi tiyawushaya umkhulungwane kuleto tinqaba tayo, kanjalo netimphungutja etigodlweni tayo. Sikhatsi sayo sesisondzele, nemalanga ayo angeke andziswe.”" 
Isaiah14:1 Simakadze utawubonakalisa sihawu sakhe kuJakobe, utawuphindza futsi akhetse ema-Israyeli, awabuyisele eveni lawo. Betive batawutihlanganisa nawo, batihlanganise nendlu yaJakobe." 
Isaiah14:2 Tive tiyakuwatsatsa tiwamikise endzaweni yawo. Lababendlu yaka-Israyeli bayawutsatsa betive, babasebentise njengetigcili tabo letidvuna naletisikati eveni laSimakadze. Batfumbi babo bayawubenta batfunjwa babo, babuse etikwebacindzeteli babo." 
Isaiah14:3 Kuyawutsi ngalelo langa Simakadze layawukuphumuta ngalo, wena Israyeli, ekuhluphekeni kwakho, nasekukhatsatekeni, nasebugcilini lobunesihluku," 
Isaiah14:4 uhlabele siga uphukute inkhosi yaseBhabhulona utsi: “Ase nibuke kuphela kwemcindzeteli! Intfukutselo yakhe seyifike ekugcineni! 
Isaiah14:5 Simakadze uyephulile indvuku yalababi, yebo, uyephulile indvuku yebabusi," 
Isaiah14:6 labahlasele tive ngelulaka, batigadla ngaphandle kwesihe, batigcobagcoba phansi ngentfukutselo, baphekehla lutfutfuva bahlasela." 
Isaiah14:7 Manje, njengobe umhlaba wonkhe usaphumulile unekuthula, sebayakhululeka bahlabele." 
Isaiah14:8 Ngisho tipheshula nemisedari yaseLebanoni nayo seyijabula ngawe, Bhabhulona, itsi: ‘Manje, njengaloku sewalaliswa phansi, sekute ngisho namunye umgawuli lotasijuba.’" 
Isaiah14:9 “Indzawo yalabafile ngaphansi nayo iyanyakata itsakasele kutsi ikuhlangabete nawuta kuyo. Lendzawo ivusa umoya walasebalala kutsi itekuvusela bonkhe labo bebabaholi emhlabeni, ibente basukume etihlalweni tabo tebukhosi bonkhe nalababengemakhosi etive." 
Isaiah14:10 “Bonkhe bayawuphendvula batsi kuwe: ‘Nawe sewubutsakatsaka njengatsi, nawe sewufanana natsi.’" 
Isaiah14:11 Bonkhe bukhatikhati bakho nekuhlabela kwemahabhu akho sekwehliselwe phansi endzaweni yalabafile; timphetfu setilicansi lakho, netibungu setisembatfo sakho." 
Isaiah14:12 “Maye, lokuwa kwakho ezulwini! Awu, nkhwekhweti yekusa! Ndvodzana yentsatsakusa! Ugeciwe walahlwa phansi, wena lowake walalisa tive lunja!" 
Isaiah14:13 Ukhulume enhlitiyweni yakho watsi: ‘Ngiyakwenyukela etulu ezulwini. Ngiyawuphakamisa sihlalo sami sebukhosi, sibe ngetulu kwetinkhanyeti taNkulunkulu. Ngiyawuhlala esihlalweni sebukhosi etikwentsaba yenhlanganiso yabonkulunkulu, esicongweni sentsaba lengcwele." 
Isaiah14:14 Ngiyakwenyukela ngetulu kweticongo temafu. Ngiyawutenta ngifanane naNkulunkulu Losetikwako Konkhe.’ 
Isaiah14:15 Kodvwa sewehliselwe phansi endzaweni yalabafile, emajukujukwini emgodzi." 
Isaiah14:16 “Labo labakubonako bayakugolotela bakucaphele, batsi: ‘Utsi lomuntfu ngabe nguye mbamba lona lowake wadvungutelisa umhlaba, wanyakatisa nemibuso?" 
Isaiah14:17 Utsi ngabe nguye lowenta umhlaba lihlane, wabhidlita emadolobha awo, longazange atikhulule tiboshwa takhe kutsi tihambe tibuyele emakhaya ato?’" 
Isaiah14:18 Onkhe emakhosi etive angcwatjwe ngeludvumo, nguleyo naleyo ethuneni layo." 
Isaiah14:19 Kodvwa wena ulahliwe wangete wangcwatjwa, walahlwa njengeligala lelaliwe, walala encunjini yetidvumbu tebantfu, lababulewe ngenkemba, lese bewukele phansi emgodzini wematje. Njengesidvumbu lesinyatselwa phansi ngetinyawo," 
Isaiah14:20 ungeke usangcwatjwa kanye nalamanye emakhosi, ngobe ulibhubhisile live lakho, wabulala bantfu bakini. “Situkulwane semuntfu lomubi ngeke kuphindze kukhulunywe ngaso." 
Isaiah14:21 Ngenca yetono taboyisemkhulu tilungiseleleni kubulala emadvodzana akhe. Akukafaneli avuke adle lelive njengelifa, bese akha emadolobha yonkhe indzawo.”" 
Isaiah14:22 Simakadze longuSomandla utsi: “Ngiyawusukuma ngilwe nabo, ngiyawubhubhisa iBhabhulona, ngiyishiye ite libito nemisalela, ingenabantfwana natitukulwane,” usho njalo Simakadze." 
Isaiah14:23 “Ngiyawuyenta ibe yindzawo yetikhova, kube yindzawo lelichaphoti. Ngiyawuyishanyela ngemshanyelo wembhubhiso,” usho njalo Simakadze longuSomandla." 
Isaiah14:24 Simakadze longuSomandla ufungile, watsi: “Impela, loku sengikuhlelile, futsi nakanjani kutakwenteka; njengobe sengikuhlosile nje, nakanjani kungeke kugucuke." 
Isaiah14:25 Ema-Asiriya ngitakuwapitjita eveni lami, ngiwagcobagcobele etintsabeni tami. Lelijoko lawo belibekwe etikwesive sami litawususwa etikwaso; nalomtfwalo besetfweswe wona utakwetfulwa ususwe etikwaso." 
Isaiah14:26 “Loku-ke kuluhlelo lwami lolucondzene nemhlaba wonkhe jikelele, loku-ke kusandla sami leselulelwe etikwetive tonkhe, ngitehlulele.”" 
Isaiah14:27 Ngobe Simakadze longuSomandla sewutimisele ngaloko, ngubani nje longamvimbela kuloko? Sandla sakhe selulekile, ngubani nje longasijikisa?" 
Isaiah14:28 Leli livi lesembulo lelefika ngemnyaka wekufa kwenkhosi Ahazi, latsi:" 
Isaiah14:29 “Ningajabuli, nine nonkhe maFilisti, ngobe nitsi lendvuku leyanishaya seyephukile; nanjengobe lokumila kusuka emphandzeni bese kutsela titselo, kanjalo nasenyokeni kuyawuvela libululu lelinesihlungu kabi." 
Isaiah14:30 Timbhukudvu tetimphuya tiyawutfola emadlelo, kutsi labeswele bacambalale phansi baphephile. Kodvwa titukulwane tenu, maFilisti, ngiyakutibhubhisa ngendlala lenkhulu leyawuhhela ngisho nemisalela." 
Isaiah14:31 “Awu, sango, lila! Awu, dolobha, hhewula! Ttutfumela, wena Filistiya! Ngobe emabutfo emphi lenemandla ayeta, aphuma ngasenyakatfo; ate ngisho nome linye lisotja leliligwala." 
Isaiah14:32 “Sitawuphendvula sitsini kuletitfunywa letiphuma kulesive? Sitawusho, sitsi: Simakadze sewuyakhile yatinta iSiyoni, ngulapho sive sakhe lebesihlushwa sitawuphephela khona.”" 
Isaiah15:1 Leli livi lesembulo lelimacondzana neMowabi: Ngebusuku lekwabhujiswa ngabo i-Ari, live lonkhe lakaMowabi laphela laba tindzala. Ngebusuku lekwabhujiswa ngabo iKhiri, live lonkhe lakaMowabi lasala selitindzala." 
Isaiah15:2 IDiboni seyenyukele ethempelini, endzaweni lephakeme yekukhontela, kuyawukhala. Sive sakaMowabi sikhalela iNebo neMedeba. Tonkhe tinhloko tihhuliwe, tonkhe tilevu tihhuliwe." 
Isaiah15:3 Etitaladini bembetse emasaka, bakhala etikwetindlu, bakhale nasetinkhundleni, etihlatsini tabo kugeleta tinyembeti." 
Isaiah15:4 Bantfu baseHeshboni nebase-Eleyale bayakhala, emaphimbo esililo sabo evakala khashane, ngisho naseJahasi. Ngako-ke nemabutfo emphi akaMowabi lahlomile ayakhala, tinhlitiyo tawo tiyatfutfumela." 
Isaiah15:5 Inhlitiyo yami ikhalela Mowabi, bantfu bakhe babaleka kuye bacondza eSowari, labanye bacondza e-Eglathi Shelishiya. Benyuka bahamba bakhala baya eLuhithi, bahamba ngemgwaco baya eHoronayimu, bakhaliswa kubhujiswa kwabo." 
Isaiah15:6 Emanti aseNimrimu omile, netjani bubunile; lokumilako sekuphele konkhe, sekute lokuluhlata lokusasele." 
Isaiah15:7 Ngako leyo ngcebo yabo bese bayitfolile bayibutsisa ndzawonye, bayetfwala, bahamba nayo; bayawushona ngale kwemfudlana wemabhabhabhulomu." 
Isaiah15:8 Kulila kwabo kuhaza ngesheya kwemnyele wakaMowabi. Kukhala kwabo kuvakala e-Eglayimu, kulila kwabo kuvakale eBheri Elimu." 
Isaiah15:9 Emanti aseDiboni agcwele ingati, kodvwa iDiboni ngisetayengetela; yebo, libhubesi kulabo lababaleka kaMowabi, nakulabo labangimisalela kulelo live!" 
Isaiah16:1 Tfumelani emazinyane etimvu lesuka eSela, ngasehlane, aye entsabeni yeNdvodzakati yaseSiyoni, abe setfulo enkhosini yelive." 
Isaiah16:2 Njengetinyoni letizulazulako nangabe tikhishwa etidlekeni, bayawuba njalo-ke nebafati bakaMowabi ematubukweni ase-Anoni." 
Isaiah16:3 Batsi kubakaJuda: “Sinikeni seluleko, nisentele sincumo. Nisisibekele ngesitfunti senu sibe njengebusuku emini, kala bha. Fihlani labo lababalekile, ningatsengisi ngalababalekele kini." 
Isaiah16:4 Hlalani nabo lababaleke kulakaMowabi, nibe sivikelo sabo kumbulali.” Umcindzeteli utawuphela, bese iyema imbhubhiso; umuntfu welutfutfuva utawunyamalala eveni;" 
Isaiah16:5 bese sihlalo sebukhosi sima ngelutsandvo; nangekwetsembeka kuyawuhlala umuntfu kuso, umuntfu loyawuvela endlini yakaDavide, umehluleli loyakwehlulela ngekungakhetsi, ayisheshisise indlela yekulunga." 
Isaiah16:6 Sivile ngekutiphakamisa kwebakaMowabi, nangekuchosha kwabo lokukhulu nekutigcabha kwabo, nangekutigabatisa kwabo, nekucolosha kwabo; noko kutishaya sifuba kwabo kulite." 
Isaiah16:7 Ngako-ke emaMowabi ayawutikhalela; ayawulila ndzawonye ngelakaMowabi. Lilani nidzabuke ngenca yemakhekhe emagelebisi lomisiwe langasatfolakali eKhiri Heresi. 
Isaiah16:8 Emasimi aseHeshboni ayabuna, nemivini yaseSibima iyoma. Babusi betive babehlulwa liwayini lemivini yelikhetselo. Yebo, imivini leyake yenabela naseJaseri, yadzimate yefika nasehlane, yenaba yaze yayawufika naselwandle." 
Isaiah16:9 Ngako ngiyakhala, njengobe kukhala iJaseri, ngikhalela imivini yaseSibima. Awu! Heshboni, nawe Eleyale, nginenye etinyembetini! Kumemeta kwenjabulo ngetitselo tenu lesetivutsiwe kuthulisiwe, kwabindziswa nenjabulo ngetivuno tenu." 
Isaiah16:10 Injabulo nekutsakasa kususiwe emahlatsini etitselo lahlanyelwe; kute namunye losahlabela amemete etivinini, sekute losahluta liwayini ematjeni ekulihluta, ngobe ngikucedzile kumemeta." 
Isaiah16:11 Inhlitiyo yami ililela iMowabi, ikhala njengelihabhu, lingekhatsi lami lilila ngeKhiri Heresi." 
Isaiah16:12 Ngesikhatsi bakaMowabi babonakala endzaweni yabo lephakeme bavele batigugise bona nje; ngesikhatsi bayewukhuleka kuletithico tabo, abasasitakali ngalutfo." 
Isaiah16:13 Leli livi Simakadze lasavele alikhulumile macondzana nebakaMowabi. 
Isaiah16:14 Kodvwa nyalo Simakadze utsi: “Njengesisebenti lesenta sivumelwane seminyaka lemitsatfu nemcashi waso, balisisa kahle emalanga, ngobe ekugcineni kwaleso sikhatsi ludvumo lwakaMowabi luyawuba lihlazo, nalabo labayawube basele bayawuba mbalwa kakhulu futsi nabo bawombile.”" 
Isaiah17:1 Livi lesembulo lelimacondzana neDamaseko: “Buka la, iDamaseko ingeke isaba lidolobha, kodvwa seyitawuba yindvundvuma nje yetindzala." 
Isaiah17:2 Emadolobha ase-Siriya atawushiywa abe ngemadlelo emihlambi yetimvu netimbuti, lapho iyawulala khona sekute nalotayesabisa." 
Isaiah17:3 Lidolobha leliyinqaba liyawunyamalala kulaka-Efrayimu, kuphele nebukhosi bendlunkhulu yaseDamaseko. Insali yaseSiriya iyawuba njengebukhosi baka-Israyeli,” kusho Simakadze longuSomandla." 
Isaiah17:4 “Ngalelo langa bukhosi bakaJakobe buyawunyamalala; nemitsebe lebhubuka emtimbeni wakhe iyawuhusheka iphele. 
Isaiah17:5 Kuyawuba njengemvuni nakageca tinhlanga letimile, avuna tibhuluja ngetandla takhe, kube njengemuntfu lobutsa lokuwa nakavunako eSigodzini semaRefa." 
Isaiah17:6 Noko letinye tibhuluja tiyawusala, njenganakuphundlwa sihlahla semncumo, bese kusala titselo temncumo letibili nome letitsatfu emagaleni lasetulu esicongweni sesihlahla, kusale lamane nome lasihlanu emagaleni latsele kakhulu,” kusho Simakadze longuNkulunkulu wema-Israyeli." 
Isaiah17:7 Ngalelo langa bantfu bayawubuka kuMdali wabo, bajikise emehlo abo bawabhekise kuye Longcwele waka-Israyeli." 
Isaiah17:8 Bangeke basabuka emalatini, lekungimisebenti yetandla tabo, futsi bangeke basatihlupha ngekunaka tinsika ta-Ashera nemalati emphepho labentiwa ngimino yabo." 
Isaiah17:9 Ngalelo langa emadolobha abo latinqaba, lababewashiyiswe ngema-Israyeli, ayawufanana netindzawo lesetishiyelwe tinchachabutane nemitfuma. Onkhe ayawubate bantfu." 
Isaiah17:10 Umkhohliwe Nkulunkulu uMsindzisi wakho; awukalikhumbuli lidvwala lelisiphephelo sakho. Ngako-ke nome ungahlanyelela tithico takho titfombo letinhle kakhulu, uhlanyele tivini letiphuma kulamanye emave," 
Isaiah17:11 nome ngalelo langa lotihlanyela ngalo uvele utente tikhule, kutsi ekuseni nawutihlanyela utente tihlume, noko sivuno sato siyawufanana nelite ngelilanga lesifo neletinhlungu letingelapheki." 
Isaiah17:12 Awu, ngekuhlokoma kwetive letinyenti, tihlokoma njengekuhlokoma kwelwandle! Awu, kuhokoma kwemsindvo webetive, tihokoma njengekuhlokoma kwemanti lamanyenti!" 
Isaiah17:13 Naloku tive tihokoma njengekuhokoma kwemabhudlo emanti, Nkulunkulu nakabatsetsisa, babaleka baye khashane, bapheshulwe emoyeni njengemakhoba, nakaphephuka etulu emagcumeni, nanjengelukhula loluzushuniwe, nalukhukhulwa sihhuhhula semoya." 
Isaiah17:14 Kutsi kungahlwa, bahlanyele budlova! Kutsi kusa, babe bangasekho! Lesi sabelo salabo labaphanga tsine, likoyi lalabo labasiphangako." 
Isaiah18:1 Maye kuwe wena live leligubhutisa timphiko, lingesheya kwemifula yaseSudani," 
Isaiah18:2 lelitfumela titfunywa ngelwandle, tintante ngetikebhe temhlanga etikwemanti, ngitsi: “Hambani masinyane, mancusa lanematubane, nibuyele esiveni sakini lesibantfu baso babadze, kantsi banesikhumba semtimba lesibusheleleti, sive lesesatjwa kuyo yonkhe indzawo, sive lesineluchweba nelulwimi lolungatiwa, sive lesilive laso lehlukaniswe ngimifula." 
Isaiah18:3 “Nonkhe nine tive temhlaba, nine lenihlala kulomhlaba, nakuphakanyiswa siboniso semphi entsabeni, nibobuka, nakukhala licilongo, nilalelisise." 
Isaiah18:4 Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze kimi: ‘Ngitawuhlala nje ngithule, ngibuke nje ngisendzaweni yami yekuhlala, nakuphakama sivuvu ekushiseni kwelilanga, yebo, sivuvu sematolo lakhuntsisa sivuno.’" 
Isaiah18:5 Ngobe, kusengakavunwa, nase kuhhohloke tishakato, netimbali setiba titselo lesetivutsiwe temagelebisi, uyawujuba emahlumela ngesikelo sekutsena tihlahla, awalalise phansi, esuse lemiliba leyenabako." 
Isaiah18:6 Iyawusala yonkhe etulu etintsabeni, idliwe tinyoni tetintsaba netilwane tesiganga. Tinyoni tiyawutondla ngayo lihlobo lonkhe, netilwane tesiganga busika bonkhe.”" 
Isaiah18:7 Ngaleso sikhatsi tipho tiyakwetfulwa kuSimakadze longuSomandla, letiphuma esiveni lesibantfu baso babadze, kantsi banesikhumba semtimba lesibusheleleti, sive lesesatjwa kuyo yonkhe indzawo, sive lesineluchweba nelulwimi lolungatiwa, sive lesilive laso lehlukaniswe ngimifula. Letipho tiyawumikiswa entsabeni iSiyoni, indzawo yeLibito laSimakadze longuSomandla." 
Isaiah19:1 Livi lesembulo lelimacondzana nelive laseGibhithe: Buka la, Simakadze ugibela lifu leligijima kakhulu, ubange kulaseGibhithe. Tithico taseGibhithe tiyawutfutfumela embikwakhe, netinhlitiyo tebantfu baseGibhithe tiyancibilika ngekhatsi kwabo." 
Isaiah19:2 “Ngitawuchukuluta umGibhithe avukele umGibhithe, umnakabo uyakulwa nemnakabo, makhelwane acabane namakhelwane, lidolobha lihlasele lidolobha, umbuso uvukele umbuso." 
Isaiah19:3 EmaGibhithe ayawuphelelwa ngemandla; emasu awo ngiyawuwacedza atsi nya. Ayawuya etithicweni ayewuphengula, aze ayewufuna labaphansi, netangoma, nalababhulako." 
Isaiah19:4 BaseGibhithe ngitabanikela etandleni tenkhosi lenemandla nalenelulaka. Bayawubuswa yinkhosi leyesabekako,” kusho iNkhosi Simakadze lenguSomandla." 
Isaiah19:5 Emanti emfula iNayili ayakusha ome, nekujula kwemfula kuyawukoma; yebo, kuyawusala kusebaleni." 
Isaiah19:6 Imisele yemanti iyawunuka luvundze, yebo, imifula yonkhe yaseGibhithe iyawubotja yome. Umhlanga nelikhwane kuyawubuna," 
Isaiah19:7 yebo, nayo yonkhe intfo lehlumako eceleni kwemfula lomkhulu iNayili, ekungeneleni kwawo elwandle. Tonkhe tivandze letihlanyelwe ngasemfuleni iNayili tiyawuhamuka tome, tingaphindzi tibonwe." 
Isaiah19:8 Badwebi betinhlanti bayawukhala, balile, bonkhe labajika emahhuka abo emfuleni iNayili, labo labajika emanetha abo emantini, yebo, bayawujabha baphelelwe ngemandla." 
Isaiah19:9 Labo bafati labankwefa imitiya yelineni bayawujabha, bephotseli labeluka ilineni lemhlophe bayawuphelelwa litsemba." 
Isaiah19:10 EmaGibhithe latfungako ayawuphela emandla, nabo bonkhe labahola ngelilanga bayawudzabuka etinhlitiyweni." 
Isaiah19:11 Tiphatsimandla taseSowani atisilo lutfo, kuphela nje, titibhungayeti; beluleki labahlakaniphile bakaFaro beluleka ngeteluleko letingenangcondvo. Ungasho kanjani kuFaro utsi: “Ngingulomunye walabahlakaniphile, intalo yemakhosi akadzeni”?" 
Isaiah19:12 Aphi nyalo emadvodza akho lahlakaniphile? Akakukhombise, akwatise loko, Nkulunkulu longuSomandla lasahlose kukwenta ngeGibhithe." 
Isaiah19:13 Tiphatsimandla taseSowani setitibhungayeti, baholi baseMemfisi sebakhohlisiwe; imisumphe yebantfu bakhona seyedukise lonkhe live laseGibhithe." 
Isaiah19:14 Simakadze sewutfululele kubo umoya wekudzidzeka; benta iGibhithe iyendze kuko konkhe leyikwentako, iyendze njengesidzakwa emahlanteni aso." 
Isaiah19:15 Kute lokungabe kusentiwa yiGibhithe, inhloko nome umsila, ligala lelisundvu nome umhlanga." 
Isaiah19:16 Ngalelo langa baseGibhithe bayawuba njengebafati. Bayawutfutfumela ngenca yekwesaba ingalo yaSimakadze longuSomandla leyawube iphakanyiselwe kumelana nabo. 
Isaiah19:17 Live lakaJuda liyawutsela kwesaba kubantfu baseGibhithe; bonkhe labayakuva nje kuphatfwa lelibito laJuda, bayakwetfuka, ngenca yaloko Simakadze longuSomandla losahlose kukwenta kubo." 
Isaiah19:18 Ngalelo langa emadolobha lasihlanu aseGibhithe ayawukhuluma siHebheru, lulwimi lwaseKhenani, ente sifungo kuSimakadze longuSomandla. Lelinye lawo kuyawutsiwa liDolobha Lembhubhiso." 
Isaiah19:19 Ngalelo langa kuyawuba nelilati laSimakadze ekhatsi eveni laseGibhithe, nensika lesikhumbuto saSimakadze eminyeleni yaseGibhithe." 
Isaiah19:20 Kuyawuba tibonakaliso letikhumbuta ngaSimakadze longuSomandla eveni laseGibhithe. Nase bakhala kuSimakadze ngenca yebacindzeteli babo, uyawubatfumelela umsindzisi nemvikeli, yena loyawufike abephule." 
Isaiah19:21 Ngako Simakadze uyakwenta kutsi emaGibhithe amati; ngalelo langa bayawumhlonipha Simakadze. Bayawumkhonta ngemihlatjelo nangeminikelo yalokutinhlavu, bayakwenta tetsembiso kuSimakadze, futsi bayawutigcina." 
Isaiah19:22 Simakadze uyawushaya iGibhithe ngesifo lesibulalanako; uyawubashaya ngaso, aphindze abaphilise. Bayawuphendvukela kuSimakadze, naye uyawukuva kuncusa kwabo, bese uyabaphilisa." 
Isaiah19:23 Ngalelo langa kuyawuba nemgwaco losuka eGibhithe uye e-Asiriya. Base-Asiriya bayakuya eGibhithe, nebaseGibhithe bayakuya e-Asiriya. Bantfu baseGibhithe nebase-Asiriya bayakukhonta ndzawonye." 
Isaiah19:24 Ngalelo langa Israyeli uyawuba ngewesitsatfu kanye neGibhithe ne-Asiriya, kube sibusiso emhlabeni." 
Isaiah19:25 Simakadze longuSomandla uyawubabusisa, atsi: “Ayibusiswe iGibhithe, sive sami, ne-Asiriya lengumsebenti wetandla tami, na-Israyeli lolifa lami.”" 
Isaiah20:1 Ngemnyaka indvuna lenkhulu yemphi, leyayitfunywe nguSagoni, inkhosi yase-Asiriya, yefikela e-Ashdodi, yayihlasela, yayitfumba," 
Isaiah20:2 ngaleso sikhatsi Simakadze wakhuluma nga-Isaya, umsa wa-Amose. Wakhuluma kuye, watsi: “Khumula lamasaka emtimbeni wakho, naletincabule lapha etinyaweni takho.” Wakwenta loko Isaya, wahamba asangcunu, angakafaki lutfo nasetinyaweni." 
Isaiah20:2 ngaleso sikhatsi Simakadze wakhuluma nga-Isaya, umsa wa-Amose. Wakhuluma kuye, watsi: “Khumula lamasaka emtimbeni wakho, naletincabule lapha etinyaweni takho.” Wakwenta loko Isaya, wahamba asangcunu, angakafaki lutfo nasetinyaweni." 
Isaiah20:3 Simakadze wase utsi: “Njengobe inceku yami, Isaya, beyihamba ngcunu ingakafaki lutfo nasetinyaweni iminyaka lemitsatfu, lokusibonakaliso nemhlolo kwalokutawuvelela iGibhithe neSudani," 
Isaiah20:4 kanjalo inkhosi yase-Asiriya iyawuhola baseGibhithe nebaseSudani labatfunjwe bangcunu, bangakafaki lutfo nasetinyaweni, labancane nalabadzala, bayawushwebheta ngetibunu tabo tisebaleni, kube lihlazo laseGibhithe." 
Isaiah20:5 Labo lababetsemba iSudani, batigabatisa ngeGibhithe, bayawukwesaba, batseleke ngelihlazo." 
Isaiah20:6 Ngalelo langa bantfu labahlala kulolugu bayawutsi: ‘Ase nibuke kutsi sekwentekeni kulabantfu lebesetsembele kubo, labo lesabalekela kubo sayawucela lusito nekukhululwa enkhosini yase-Asiriya! Pho-ke, sesitawuphunyula kanjani?’ ”" 
Isaiah21:1 Leli livi lesembulo lelimacondzana neBhabhulona, lihlane lelingaselwandle: Njengetiwunguwungwana tihhusha tendlula eveni laseningizimu, kanjalo umhlaseli uchamuka ngasehlane, eveni lelesabekako." 
Isaiah21:2 Ngikhonjiswe umbono lowesabekako: Bantfu labangemambuka bayatsengisana, baphangi batsatsa imphango. Hlaselani, nine ma-Elamu! Vimbetelani, nani maMede! “Ngitakucedza konkhe loko kububula lobekubangwa baseBhabhulona.”" 
Isaiah21:3 Nginelusizi ngalombono lengiwubonile, buhlungu bungibambile, njengemhelo ufikela umfati nasatawubeleka. Kuyangetfusa loko lengikuvako, ngiyamangala ngaloko lengikubona ngemehlo ami." 
Isaiah21:4 Inhlitiyo yami iyaphatamiseka, kwesaba kuyangitfutfumelisa; kuhlwa lebengiloku ngikufisa sekujike kwaba sesabiso kimi." 
Isaiah21:5 Bendlala ematafula, bendlale emacansi, bayadla, banatse! Bese kuphuma simemetelo sitsi: “Sukumani, nine tindvuna! Gcobisani emahawu enu!”" 
Isaiah21:6 Naku-ke lokushiwo nguSimakadze kimi, utsi: “Hamba ubeke umlindzi, umtjele akubikele ngako konkhe lakubonako." 
Isaiah21:7 Nakabona tincola temphi letiboshelwe, letinemahhashi laboshelwe ngamabili, nebagibeli betimbongolo bagibele, nome bagibeli bemakamela basetulu, akahlale acaphele ngesineke lesikhulu.”" 
Isaiah21:8 Lomlindzi wamemeta watsi: “Lilanga ngelilanga, nkhosi yami, ngima etulu embhoshongweni wekulindza, busuku ngebusuku ngihlala ngisemsebentini wami." 
Isaiah21:9 Asubuke nje, naku kuta umuntfu ugibele incola yakhe yemphi, lenemahhashi laboshelwe ngamabili. Lomuntfu waphendvula watsi: ‘IBhabhulona seyiwile, iwile! Tonkhe titfombe tetithico tayo setibhidlikele phansi emhlabatsini!’ ”" 
Isaiah21:10 Awu, sive sami, senipitjitelwe phansi ebaleni lekubhulela kolo, ngiyanitjela loko lengikuvile kuSimakadze longuSomandla, kuNkulunkulu wema-Israyeli." 
Isaiah21:11 Leli livi lesembulo lelimacondzana neDuma lelitsi: Kukhona longimemetako kaSeyiri, utsi: “Mlindzi, sekusele kangakanani kutsi kuse? Mlindzi, sekusele kangakanani kutsi kuse?”" 
Isaiah21:12 Umlindzi uyaphendvula, utsi: “Kuyeta kusa, kodvwa kusesebusuku. Nanifuna kubuta, butani, nibophindze nibuye futsi.”" 
Isaiah21:13 Leli livi lesembulo lelimacondzana ne-Arabiya lelitsi: Nine ludvwendvwe lwemakamela akaDedani, nine lenimisa emavungwini ase-Arabiya," 
Isaiah21:14 baletseleni emanti laba lasebomile; nine lenihlala eThema, baletseleni kudla laba lababalekile." 
Isaiah21:15 Babalekela tinkemba, yebo, tinkemba letiphakanyisiwe, nebutjoki lobucishiwe, nekushisa kwemphi." 
Isaiah21:16 Naku-ke lokushiwo nguSimakadze kimi, utsi: “Njengesisebenti lesenta sivumelwane semnyaka munye nemcashi waso, balisisa kahle emalanga, ngobe ekugcineni kwawo lonkhe ludvumo lwakaKhedari lutawuphela." 
Isaiah21:17 Imisalela yemadvodza lanemba ngebutjoki, langemachawe akaKhedari itawuba mbalwa.” Simakadze longuNkulunkulu wa-Israyeli sewukhulumile." 
Isaiah22:1 Leli livi lesembulo lelimacondzana neSigodzi Sembono lelitsi: Kwentiwa yini kutsi bonkhe bantfu bakho bakhwele baye etulu etingcongwaneni tetindlu? 
Isaiah22:2 Awu dolobha leligcwele siyaluyalu! Awu dolobha lemsindvo nekujabula! Bantfu bakho labafile abakabulawa yinkemba, futsi abafelanga emphini." 
Isaiah22:3 Bonkhe baholi bakho babaleke kanyekanye; batfunjwe bangakalwi nekulwa ngebutjoki. Nonkhe nine lenibanjiwe naboshwa kanyekanye, nivele nabaleka, nome sitsa besisekhashane." 
Isaiah22:4 Ngako-ke ngatsi: “Sukani lapha kimi, ase ngikhale kabuhlungu. Ningacali netame kungidvudvuta ngekubhujiswa kwesive sakitsi.”" 
Isaiah22:5 INkhosi Simakadze lenguSomandla ibeke lilanga lesiyaluyalu, lekugcotjwagcotjwa nelekudzidzeka eSigodzini Sembono, lilanga lekuhhihlitwa kwetibondza, lilanga lekutikhalela etintsabeni." 
Isaiah22:6 Elamu utsatsa umgodla wemicibisholo, utseleka nebagibeli bakhe betincola kanye nemahhashi; emadvodza aseKhiri agwabula emahawu." 
Isaiah22:7 Tihosha tenu telikhetselo tigcwele tincola temphi, nebagibeli bemahhashi babekwe emasangweni elidolobha;" 
Isaiah22:8 Juda sewemukwe tonkhe tivikelo takhe. Ngaleso sikhatsi nahlola tikhali taseNdlini Yelihlatsi. 
Isaiah22:9 Nabona kutsi Lidolobha laDavide linetindzawo letinyenti letibhidlikile; navimbela emanti ema eSitibeni Lesingentansi. 
Isaiah22:10 Nabala tindlu taseJerusalema, nabhidlita tindlu letinye nentela kucinisa lubondza." 
Isaiah22:11 Nakha lidamu emkhatsini wetindvonga letimbili, lidamu lekugcina emanti eSitiba Lesidzala, kodvwa anizange nibuke kuLowo lowakwenta nome nimnake Lowo lowakuhlela endvulo." 
Isaiah22:12 INkhosi Simakadze lenguSomandla yanibita ngalelo langa kutsi nitewukhala nilile, kutsi nitewuhhula tinwele tenu, nembatse emasaka." 
Isaiah22:13 Kodvwa bukani, kuyajatjulwa kubuswe, kuhlatjwa tinkhomo netimvu, yebo, kudliwa inyama, kunatfwe liwayini! Nitsi: “Asidle, sinatse, ngobe kusasa sitakufa!”" 
Isaiah22:14 Simakadze longuSomandla ukwembulile loku kimi, ngakuva: “Niyawuze nife solomane lesono singakahlawulelwa”, isho njalo iNkhosi Simakadze lenguSomandla." 
Isaiah22:15 Naku-ke lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze lenguSomandla, itsi: “Hamba, uye endvuneni, kuShebna lophetse sigodlo, ufike utsi:" 
Isaiah22:16 Wentani lapha, kona ngubani lokunike lemvume yekumba lithuna lakho lapha, nekukapuluta lithuna lakho lapha etulu ngekucota indzawo yakho yekuphumula lapha edvwaleni?" 
Isaiah22:17 “Caphela-ke, Simakadze sewutakuntfonya akujikijele khashane, awu, wena ndvodza lenemandla." 
Isaiah22:18 Utakugicita kamatima njengebhola, akujikijele eveni lelikhulu. Ngulapho-ke uyawufela khona, lapho tincola takho letinhle tiyawusala khona, wena hlazo lendlu yenkhosi yakho!" 
Isaiah22:19 Ngiyawukwehlisa esikhundleni sakho, ususwe esikhundleni sakho,” kusho Simakadze." 
Isaiah22:20 “Ngalelo langa ngiyawubita inceku yami, Eliyakimu, umsa waHilkiya." 
Isaiah22:21 Ngiyakumembatsisa ngemjiva wakho, ngimbophe ngelibhande lakho; emandla nemagunya akho ngiwanike yena. Uyawuba nguyise walabo labahlala eJerusalema nakubendlu yakaJuda." 
Isaiah22:22 Ngiyawubeka sikhiya sendlu yakaDavide emahlombe akhe; lakuvulako kute loyawukuvala, nalakuvalako kute loyawukuvula." 
Isaiah22:23 Ngiyakumbetsela njengesipikili esikhundleni sakhe, yena uyawuba njengesihlalo seludvumo emndenini weyise." 
Isaiah22:24 Kuleso sipikili kuyawuphanyekwa sonkhe sisindvo semndeni weyise, titukulwane takhe nemiliba yakhe, ngisho tonkhe titja letincane takhona, kusukela etindishini kuye emajekeni.”" 
Isaiah22:25 Simakadze longuSomandla uyakhuluma utsi: “Ngalelo langa lesipikili besiyawushayelwa sishone sisime, siyawuphuma siwe, bese kutsi lomtfwalo bewuphanyekwe kuso udzilikele phansi emhlabatsini.” Simakadze ukhulumile." 
Isaiah23:1 Leli livi lesembulo lelimacondzana neThire lelitsi: Lilani, nine mikhumbi yaseThashishi, ngobe iThire seyibhujisiwe, yasala ite indlu nome sikhumulo. Nivile ngalombiko ngesikhatsi nibuya eSiphrosi." 
Isaiah23:2 Bindzani, nine sive sesichingi, nani bahwebi baseSidoni, nine leseninjingiswe bashayeli bemikhumbi." 
Isaiah23:3 Sivuno salokutinhlavu sesigodzi semfula iNayili sefika ngelwandle, saba sivuno saseThire; kwatsi ngaso iThire yatsengiselana netive." 
Isaiah23:4 Bani nemahloni, wena Sidoni, bani nemahloni, nawe nqaba yaselwandle, ngobe lwandle selukhulumile lwatsi: “Angikaze ngibe nemhelo, kantsi futsi angikaze ngitale umntfwana. Angizange ngikhulise emadvodzana, nemadvodzakati futsi angizange ngiwakhulise.”" 
Isaiah23:5 Nakufika tindzaba eGibhithe, bayawuba nelusizi lolukhulu, nabeva umbiko lophuma eThire." 
Isaiah23:6 Yewelani, niye eThashishi, lilani, nine sive sasesichingini." 
Isaiah23:7 Kungabe leli lidolobha lenu yini, lenake najabula nitigcabha ngalo, lelasungulwa kadzenidzeni, nalelibantfu balo bake bahamba ngetinyawo tabo bayawucaba emaveni lakhashane?" 
Isaiah23:8 Ngubani lowahlela lokulwa neThire, lidolobha lebukhosi, lelibahwebi balo batikhulu, nebatsengisi balo bahlonishwa emhlabeni wonkhe?" 
Isaiah23:9 NguSimakadze longuSomandla lokuhlelile kutsi entele phansi ligcabho labo bonkhe bukhatikhati, nekutsi atfobise bonkhe labadvumile emhlabeni." 
Isaiah23:10 Limani live lenu, nine baseThashishi, njengabaseNayili. Sikhumulo singeke siphindze sibe yindzawo yekutsenga nekutsengisa." 
Isaiah23:11 Simakadze welule sandla sakhe wasiphakamisela etikwelwandle, wenta imibuso yalo yatfutfumela, wayala namacondzana nelaseFenisiya, kutsi tinqaba tayo atibhujiswe." 
Isaiah23:12 Ukhulumile watsi: “Ungeke uphindze utijabulise, wena Ndvodzakati yaseSidoni, sewupitjitiwe! Sukumani newelele eSiphrosi, nakhona lapho ngeke nikutfole kuphumula.”" 
Isaiah23:13 Bukani live lemaBhabhulona, lesive lese silite nyalo! Ema-Asiriya lelive asalente laba yindzawo yetilwane telihlane. Akhe imibhoshongo yekuvimbetela, ahlubula tinqaba talo, taba tindzala." 
Isaiah23:14 Lilani, nine mikhumbi yaseThashishi, inqaba yenu seyibhujisiwe!" 
Isaiah23:15 Ngaleso sikhatsi iThire iyawukhohlakala iminyaka lengema-70, sikhatsi lesingangekuphila kwenkhosi. Kodvwa ekupheleni kwaleminyaka lengema-70, iThire iyawuba njengengwadla kulengoma letsi:" 
Isaiah23:16 “Manje, wena ngwadla asakukhohliwe emadvodza, tsatsa ilire yakho, uyewuzula edolobheni! Dlala tingoma letinyenti kakhulu ngelihabhu, khona emadvodza atekukhumbula.”" 
Isaiah23:17 Ekupheleni kweminyaka lengama-70, Simakadze utayihambela iThire. Itawubuyela emsebentini wayo webugwadla, yonkhe imibuso yemhlaba itawugwadla nayo." 
Isaiah23:18 Noko inzuzo yayo nemali yayo leyitfolako ingeke ibutsiswe ndzawonye, kodvwa iyakwehlukaniselwa Simakadze. Iyakwabelwa labo labakhonta Simakadze, babe nekudla lokunyenti netimphahla letinhle." 
Isaiah24:1 Bukani la, Simakadze utawubhubhisa umhlaba, awente ube lihlane. Umhlaba utawenta ubhidlike, asakate bonkhe labahlala kuwo." 
Isaiah24:2 Bonkhe bantfu bayawuhlupheka ngalokufananako: Umphristi njengebantfu, umcashi njengesisebenti, inkhosikati njengencekukati, umtsengisi njengemtsengi, umbolekisi njengemboleki, umkweledisi njengemkweledi." 
Isaiah24:3 Umhlaba utawubhidlitwa ube lite, uphangwe nekuphangwa. Simakadze ulikhulumile lelivi." 
Isaiah24:4 Umhlaba uyoma ubune, live lonkhe liyahhohhobala libune, labaphakeme bemhlaba nabo bayahhohhobala." 
Isaiah24:5 Umhlaba ungcoliswe bantfu bawo. Umtsetfo waNkulunkulu abawulalelanga, bephule imiyalo, bephula sivumelwane saphakadze." 
Isaiah24:6 Ngako-ke sicalekiso siyawushwabudzela umhlaba, bantfu bawo kufanele baletfwale licala labo. Ngako-ke labahlala emhlabeni bayashiswa, kusale babe mbalwa kakhulu." 
Isaiah24:7 Liwayini lelisha liyoma, nemvini uyabuna; bonkhe labatijabulisako bayabubula." 
Isaiah24:8 Kutsakasa kwemafahlawane sekubindzisiwe, nemsindvo walabatijabulisako sewuthulisiwe, lihabhu lekutjakadvula selibindzile." 
Isaiah24:9 Liwayini abasalinatsi ngengoma, tjwala sebuyababa kubanatsi babo." 
Isaiah24:10 Lidolobha lelibhidlitiwe, selisele lilihlane; onkhe emasango asavaliwe, akusangeni muntfu." 
Isaiah24:11 Etitaladini bakhalela liwayini; konkhe kujabula sekugucuke kwaba lusizi, konkhe kutsakasa sekudzingisiwe emhlabeni." 
Isaiah24:12 Lidolobha selisele litindzala, emasango alo abhidlitwe aba ticucu." 
Isaiah24:13 Kuyawuba njalo emhlabeni, nakuto tonkhe tive kube njengesihlahla semncumo nasivitsitiwe, nanjengaloko lokusele nakuvunwa emagelebisi." 
Isaiah24:14 Bantfu baphakamisa emaphimbo abo, bamemeta ngenjabulo; kusukela ngasenshonalanga badvumisa bukhosi baSimakadze." 
Isaiah24:15 Ngako-ke nine basemphumalanga, nikani Simakadze ludvumo, niphakamise Libito laSimakadze, longuNkulunkulu wema-Israyeli, nimphakamise etichingini taselwandle." 
Isaiah24:16 Siva kuhlabela kuchamuka emikhawulweni yemhlaba, kutsi: “Ludvumo kuLolungile!” Kodvwa mine ngatsi: “Ngiyahusheka! Ngiyahusheka! Maye kimi! Labenta luzungu bachubeka ngeluzungu! Luzungu lwekutsengisa labanye bantfu!”" 
Isaiah24:17 Kwesabisa, nemgodzi kanye nelugibe kulindzele nine, yebo, nine bantfu bemhlaba." 
Isaiah24:18 Lowo lobalekela umsindvo wekwesabisa, uyakuhholokoshela emgodzini; lowo loyawukhuphuka kulomgodzi, uyawubanjwa lugibe. Tivalo temanti emazulwini tivuliwe, tisekelo temhlaba tiyanyikatiswa." 
Isaiah24:19 Umhlaba wephukile, umhlaba uchekeke ekhatsi, umhlaba unyakatiswa kakhulu." 
Isaiah24:20 Umhlaba uyadzayitela njengesidzakwa, ujikita njengesidleke senyoni emoyeni. Umhlaba usindvwa kakhulu licala lawo lekuhlubuka, sewuze uyawa, futsi ungeke uphindze usukume." 
Isaiah24:21 Ngalelo langa Simakadze uyawujezisa tiphatsimandla tasemazulwini etulu, nemakhosi asemhlabeni phansi." 
Isaiah24:22 Bayawubutselwa ndzawonye njengetiboshwa letiboshelwe ekhulukuthu, bayawuvalelwa ejele, bajeziswe emvakwemalanga lamanyenti." 
Isaiah24:23 Inyanga iyawufiphala, lilanga lidliwe ngemahloni; ngobe Simakadze longuSomandla uyawubusa eNtsabeni yaseSiyoni naseJerusalema, yebo, abuse ngeludvumo embikwebaholi bayo." 
Isaiah25:1 Awu, Simakadze, wena unguNkulunkulu wami, ngiyakukuphakamisa, ngilidvumise Libito lakho, ngobe ngekwetsembeka kwakho lokuphelele wente tintfo letimangalisako, tintfo letahlelwa endvulo." 
Isaiah25:2 Lidolobha ulente laba yindvundvuma yemfuhlululu, yebo, lidolobha lelibiyelwe laba tindzala; siphephelo sebetive sangabe sisaba ngilo lidolobha, lingeke liphindze lakhiwe kabusha." 
Isaiah25:3 Ngako-ke tive letinemandla tiyawukudvumisa, emadolobha etive letinelunya ayawukuhlonipha." 
Isaiah25:4 Bewusiphephelo salabamphofu, siphephelo salabeswele elusizini lwabo, siphephelo sekuvikela etivunguvungwini, nemtfunti ekushiseni kwelilanga. Ngobe kuphefumula kwalabanelunya kufanana nesivunguvungu lesitimukula elubondzeni;" 
Isaiah25:5 kunjengekushisa kwelihlane. Wena ubindzisa lutfutfuva lwebetive; njengekushisa nakuphotiswa litfunti lelifu, ibindziswa kanjalo-ke ingoma yalabanelunya." 
Isaiah25:6 Kulentsaba Simakadze longuSomandla utakwentela bantfu bonkhe lidzili lalokukhuluphele, lelimnandzi, yebo, lidzili leliwayini lelidzala lakadzeni, inyama lenhle kakhulu, netinhlobo letimnandzi teliwayini." 
Isaiah25:7 Kulentsaba uyawususa simbonyo lesisibekele tonkhe tive, nalendvwangu lembonye tonkhe tive," 
Isaiah25:8 amite kufa phakadze naphakadze. Somandla longuSimakadze uyawukwesula tinyembeti kubo bonkhe buso; uyawususa lihlazo lesive sakhe emhlabeni wonkhe. Simakadze sewukhulumile. 
Isaiah25:9 Ngalelo langa bayakutsi: “Ngempela, lona nguNkulunkulu wetfu, besetsembela kuye, naye wasisindzisa. Lona nguSimakadze lebesetsembele kuye; asijabule sitfokote ngensindziso yakhe.”" 
Isaiah25:10 Emandla aSimakadze ayakuyengama lentsaba, kodvwa Mowabi utawunyatselwa phansi ngetinyawo, njengetibi natigcotjwagcotjwa emcubeni." 
Isaiah25:11 Bayawukweneka tandla tabo ekhatsi kuwo njengemuntfu lohlambako nakeneka tandla takhe. Nkulunkulu uyakulidzilita ligcabo labo, abubukele phansi bucwepheshe betandla tabo." 
Isaiah25:12 Uyakudzilitela phansi tibondza takaMowabi letiphakeme naletitinqaba, atihhihlitele phansi; uyakutihhihlitela phansi elutfulini." 
Isaiah26:1 Ngalelo langa kuyawuhlatjelelwa ingoma kaJuda, letsi: “Sinelidolobha lelicinile; Nkulunkulu usentela insindziso ngetibondza talo netinqaba talo.”" 
Isaiah26:2 Vulani emasango, kuze sitewungena sive lesilungile, sive lesigcina kukholwa." 
Isaiah26:3 Wena Simakadze, lowo lotimiselako ngawe uyamlondvolota, umuphe kuthula nenhlalakahle, ngobe abeke litsemba lakhe kuwe." 
Isaiah26:4 Yetsembelani kuSimakadze kuze kube phakadze, ngobe Simakadze nguSimakadze loLidvwala laphakadze." 
Isaiah26:5 Uyabatfobisa labo labahlala ekuphakameni, ulalisa phansi lidolobha leliphakeme, alente lilingane nemhlabatsi, alilahle phansi elutfulini." 
Isaiah26:6 Ulenta linyatselwe phansi ngetinyawo, yebo, ngetinyawo talabacindzetelwe, ngetinyatselo talabamphofu." 
Isaiah26:7 Indlela yalolungile ibekile. Awu, wena Locondzile, wenta indlela yalolungile icondze." 
Isaiah26:8 Yebo, Simakadze, sihamba endleleni yemitsetfo yakho, silindzela wena; Libito lakho neludvumo lwakho ngutona tifiso tetinhlitiyo tetfu." 
Isaiah26:9 Umphefumulo wami ulangatelela wena ebusuku; ekuseni umoya wami ulangatelela wena. Ngesikhatsi tehlulelo takho tehlela etikwemhlaba, tive temhlaba tifundza kulunga." 
Isaiah26:10 Naloku umusa sewuphiwe lababi, bona solo abakufundzi kulunga; ngisho naseveni lebucotfo bachubeka benta lokubi, bangabunaki bukhosi baSimakadze." 
Isaiah26:11 Simakadze, sandla sakho siphakamele etulu, kodvwa noko abasiboni. Bente babone inshisekelo yakho ngesive sakho, batewudliwa ngemahloni. Akutsi umlilo lowugcinele titsa takho udle bona ubacedze." 
Isaiah26:12 Simakadze, wena usentela kuthula, konkhe loku lesiphumelele kukwenta, sikwentelwe nguwe." 
Isaiah26:13 Awu, Simakadze, Nkulunkulu wetfu, lamanye emakhosi langasiye wena abusile etikwetfu; kodvwa Libito lakho, ngilo lodvwa lesilihloniphako." 
Isaiah26:14 Nyalo asafile lawo makhosi, akasaphili, lowo moya wawo lowanyamalala awube usaphindza uvuke. Wawajezisa wawabhubhisa, wesula konkhe kukhunjulwa kwawo." 
Isaiah26:15 Simakadze, usikhulisile sive, yebo, wena usandzisile sive. Utizuzele wena ludvumo. Uyinwebile yonkhe iminyele yelive." 
Isaiah26:16 Simakadze, beta kuwe ekudzabukeni kwabo, ngesikhatsi ubajezisa babehluleka ngisho nekuhebeta umkhuleko." 
Isaiah26:17 Njengemfati lokhulelwe nasatawubeleka, uyajilajileka, akhale ngenca yemihelo, natsi sasinjalo ebukhoneni bakho, awu, Simakadze!" 
Isaiah26:18 Sasikhulelwe, sajilajileka ngetinhlungu, kodvwa sesuka satala umoya. Asikayiletsi insindziso emhlabeni; asikatitali tive letisemhlabeni." 
Isaiah26:19 Kodvwa labafile bakho bayawuphila; imitimba yabo iyawuvuka. Nine lenihleti elutfulini lwemhlaba, vukani nimemete ngenjabulo. Ematolo akho anjengematolo asekuseni laphilisako, umhlaba uyawubakhipha labafile bawo." 
Isaiah26:20 Balekani, sive sami, ngenani etindlini tenu, nitivalele ngekhatsi. Tifihleni ngekhatsi kwesikhashana, kuze kwendlule lulaka lwakhe." 
Isaiah26:21 Bukani, Simakadze uphumela ngephandle kwendzawo yakhe yekuhlala, utewujezisa tive temhlaba ngenca yetono tato. Umhlaba utawuveta ebaleni yonkhe ingati leyacitsekela kuwo, lababulewe kuwo ungeke usabafihla." 
Isaiah27:1 Ngalelo langa Simakadze uyawujezisa ngenkemba yakhe leyesabekako, lenkhulu nalenemandla lamakhulu, uyawujezisa Leviyathani, inyoka lenyelelako, yebo, Leviyathani, inyoka letibutsako; yena uyawubulala silo saselwandle." 
Isaiah27:2 Ngalelo langa: “Hlabelani ngesivini lesitselako. 
Isaiah27:3 Mine, longuSimakadze, ngiyaselusa, ngisinisela njalo nje, ngiselusa imini nebusuku, kuze kutsi kubete muntfu losonako." 
Isaiah27:4 Angikatfukutseli. Kube mane bekunetinchachabutane nemanyeva langisukelako! Bengitawushuca ngiyekuwahlasela emphini; bengitawahloseka onkhe ngemlilo. 
Isaiah27:5 Nome-ke wona abaleke atewubhaca kimi, akabuyisane nami, yebo, akabuyisane nami.”" 
Isaiah27:6 Ngemalanga letako, Jakobe uyawumila timphandze asime, Israyeli uyawuhluma achakaze timbali, agcwalise umhlaba wonkhe ngetitselo." 
Isaiah27:7 Kungabe kambe, Simakadze umgadlile, njengaloku agadla labo labamgadlako? Ngabe kambe sewubulewe yini njengekubulawa kwalabo lababulala yena?" 
Isaiah27:8 Kulwa kwakhe nebaseJerusalema kugcina ngekutsi abadvungulule baye ekutfunjweni, abakhiphe ngesikhahlo sakhe njengekuhhusha kwemoya wasemphumalanga." 
Isaiah27:9 Ngaloku-ke licala lakaJakobe liyawube selihlawulelwe, loku kuyawuba sitselo lesiphelele sekwesulwa kwesono sakhe: Ngesikhatsi enta onkhe emalati ematje, kutsi abe njengematje emcakaco, aphushuke abe timvutfu, kute nayinye insika ya-Ashera nome lilati lemphepho leliyawusala limile." 
Isaiah27:10 Lidolobha leliyinqaba lisala lite muntfu, sabelo lesishiyiwe sisale sinjengelihlane, lapho sekuyabe kudla khona ematfole, alale khona ahlabule, aphundle emagala akhona aze abe mhlophe." 
Isaiah27:11 Kuyawutsi emagala akhona nasomile, ephulwe, kufike bafati bawatfote, bayekuwabasa. Ngobe lesi sive lesingeva emadlebeni, ngako, uMenti waso akasenamunyu ngaso, uMdali waso akasenasihawu ngaso." 
Isaiah27:12 Ngalelo langa Simakadze uyawubabhula kusukela emfuleni iYufrathe kuze kuyewufika emfuleni waseGibhithe, nine-ke ma-Israyeli, niyawubutfwa ngamunye ngamunye." 
Isaiah27:13 Ngalelo langa kuyawukhala licilongo lelikhulu. Labo lababelahlekile bedukela e-Asiriya, nalabo lababetfunjelwe eGibhithe bayakuta batewukhonta Simakadze entsabeni lengcwele, eJerusalema." 
Isaiah28:1 Maye kulowo mchele letitigabatisa ngawo tidzakwa taka-Efrayimu, nakuleyo mbali lebunako, bukhatikhati bebuhle bakhe lobumiswe enhloko yesigodzi lesivundzile; maye kulelo dolobha, ligcabho lalabo lasebalaliswa phansi liwayini!" 
Isaiah28:2 Buka la, Simakadze unaye lonemandla nalocinile. Njengesangcotfo nesivunguvungu lesibhubhisako, nanjengemvula lekhukhulako, nesihhuhhula semanti, uyakulisacata phansi emhlabatsini ngemandla lamakhulu." 
Isaiah28:3 Lowo mchele letitigabatisa ngawo tidzakwa taka-Efrayimu, uyawugcotjwagcotjwa phansi ngetinyawo." 
Isaiah28:4 Leyo mbali lebunako, bukhatikhati bebuhle bakhe lobumiswe enhloko yesigodzi lesivundzile, iyawuba njengelikhiwa lelivutfwe kungakavunwa, lekutsi lowo nje lolibone kucala alikhe ngesandla sakhe, alifake emlonyeni, alimite masinyane." 
Isaiah28:5 Ngalelo langa Simakadze longuSomandla uyawuba ngumchele webukhosi, umchele lomuhle wensali yesive sakhe." 
Isaiah28:6 Uyawuba ngumoya wemtsetfocotfo kulowo lohlalela kwehlulela, abe sisusa semandla kulabo labajikisa imphi esangweni." 
Isaiah28:7 Nabo labo bayayendza ngenca yeliwayini, babhadzatele ngenca yetjwala, baphristi nebaphrofethi bayayendza ngenca yetjwala, basangene ingcondvo ngenca yeliwayini, badzayiteliswa tjwala, bayayendza nababona imibono, bayakhubatela nabakhipha tincumo." 
Isaiah28:8 Onkhe ematafula agcwele emahlante, kute ngisho lesincane sikhadlana lesingakangcoli." 
Isaiah28:9 “Ngubani yena lona lowetama kumfundzisa, uwuchazela bani wona lombiko wakhe? Kubantfwana labesusiwe yini elubisini lwabo, labo labavele balunyulwa nje emabeleni abonina?" 
Isaiah28:10 Uyahhema utsi: Savu lasavu, savu lasavu, khavu lakhavu, khavu lakhavu, ziyere shamu, ziyere shamu.”" 
Isaiah28:11 Kulungile-ke, ngetindzebe temlomo wekuchamuka nangetilimi letingatiwa Nkulunkulu uyawukhuluma kulesive," 
Isaiah28:12 lakhuluma kuso watsi: “Lena yindzawo yekuphumula, labakhatsele abaphumule kuyo,” nekutsi: “Lena yindzawo yekucambalala,” kodvwa bangeke balalele." 
Isaiah28:13 Ngako-ke livi laSimakadze kubo liyawuba kutsi: “Savu lasavu, savu lasavu, khavu lakhavu, khavu lakhavu, ziyere shamu, ziyere shamu,” kuze batewuhamba baze bawe ngetiphundvu, balimale babanjwe, bese bayatfunjwa." 
Isaiah28:14 Ngako-ke vanini livi laSimakadze, nine tedzeleli lenibusa lesive eJerusalema." 
Isaiah28:15 Niyatigabatisa nitsi: “Sesente sivumelwane nekufa, sente sivumelwane nelithuna. Ngesikhatsi sivunguvungu lesishisako siphephula sendlula kitsi, singeke sisitsintse tsine, ngobe sente emanga aba siphephelo setfu, sente emacebo aba yindzawo yetfu yekubhaca.”" 
Isaiah28:16 Ngako-ke naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, utsi: “Buka la, ngibeka litje eSiyoni, litje lelihloliwe, litje leliligugu lekusimisa indlu, lelisisekelo lesetsembekile sendlu; lowo lowetsembele kimi ngeke ajabhe." 
Isaiah28:17 Ngitakwenta kwehlulela ngekwemtsetfocotfo kube ngumugca wekulinganisa, nekulunga kube ngumugca wekucondzisa, sangcotfo siyawuhlwitsa lesiphephelo senu lesingemanga, nesikhukhula semanti siyakwemukisa lendzawo yenu yekubhaca." 
Isaiah28:18 Sivumelwane senu lenisente nekufa siyakwentiwa sibe lite; sivumelwane senu lenisente nelithuna singeke sime. Kuyawutsi sivunguvungu sekushisa nasiphephula sendlula kini, sinishaye sinilahle phansi." 
Isaiah28:19 Njalo nje nasifika nome nini, siyakwendlula nani sinitfumbe kusa ngekusa, busuku nemini.” Kuvakala kwalomlayeto kuyawuletsa kwesaba nekutfutfumela kuphela nje." 
Isaiah28:20 Umbhedze mfishane kakhulu kutsi ungenaba kuwo, netingubo tingumntjuntju kakhulu kutsi umuntfu angatishumphetela ngato." 
Isaiah28:21 Simakadze utawuvuka, njengobe wake wenta eNtsabeni yasePherasimu, lulaka lwakhe luyakumvuselela njengaseSigodzini saseGibeyoni, kutsi ente umsebenti wakhe, yebo, umsebenti wakhe lomangalisako kutsi aphelelisele umsebenti wakhe, yebo, umsebenti wakhe longaketayeleki." 
Isaiah28:22 Nyalo-ke yekelani lokuphukuta kwenu, nakungenjalo, tinketane tenu titakuba matima, iNkhosi Simakadze lenguSomandla ingitjelile ngembhubhiso leseyimiselwe live lonkhe." 
Isaiah28:23 Lalelani, nive livi lami; linakekeleni, nive kutsi ngitsini." 
Isaiah28:24 Umlimi nakalima atawuhlanyela, uyaye alibale kulima yini? Vele, ulibala kugucula yini ahhalige umhlaba wakhe?" 
Isaiah28:25 Nase awulime kahle umhlabatsi wakhe wawuhlanganisa waba kahle, uyaye angabe asayihlanyela yini inhlanyelo yakhe yetinandzisi, asakate nekhumini yakhe? Akahlanyeli kolo yini endzaweni yakhe, nebhali ensimini yayo, nemabele ensimini yawo?" 
Isaiah28:26 Nkulunkulu wakhe uyamtjela amfundzise indlela lelungile. 
Isaiah28:27 Ikhumini ayibhulwa ngesihliphi, kanjalo nekhumini lemnyama ayibhulwa ngekuhambisa inkalishi etikwayo; kodvwa ikhumini ibhulwa ngesibhulo, kutsi ikhumini lemnyama ibhulwe ngendvuku." 
Isaiah28:28 Lokutinhlavu kufanele kusilwe kutekwentiwa sinkhwa; ngako-ke akulitjalwa kukubhula siphelane. Nome achuba emasondvo enkalishi yakhe yekubhula etikwako, emahhashi akhe akakusili." 
Isaiah28:29 Konkhe loku kuphuma kuSimakadze longuSomandla, lomangalisako ekwelulekeni kwakhe, nalobabatekako ngenhlakanipho yakhe." 
Isaiah29:1 Maye kuwe, Ariyeli, Ariyeli, lidolobha lapho kwafike kwangenisa Davide khona! Yengetani umnyaka ngemnyaka, vumelani umjikeleto wemadzili enu uchubeke." 
Isaiah29:2 Noko ngiyakuvimbetela i-Ariyeli, iyawukhala ilile kimi, iyawuba njengelilati lemlilo." 
Isaiah29:3 Ngiyawumisa emabutfo ami akutungelete. Ngiyawukutungeleta ngemibhoshongo, ngimise tindvonga tekukuvimbetela." 
Isaiah29:4 Uyawukhuluma sewulele phansi sengikwehlisile; inkhulumo yakho kuyawuba kuvungama nje kwaselutfulini. Liphimbo lakho liyawuvakala njengelesipoko emhlabatsini; livi lakho liyawuvumbuka livela elutfulini. 
Isaiah29:5 Kodvwa titsa takho letinyenti titawuba njengelutfuli lwemhlabatsi, leticumbi tebantfu labanelunya tiyawuba njengemakhoba lapheshulwa ngumoya. Ngekushesha, ngekuphatima kweliso" 
Isaiah29:6 Simakadze longuSomandla uyakuta ngekudvuma nangekutamatama kwemhlaba, nangemsindvo lomkhulu, nangesikhukhula semoya nesihhushuhhushu, nangemalangabi emlilo lodlako." 
Isaiah29:7 Ngako lemilalandle yato tonkhe tive lelwa ne-Ariyeli naleyihlaselako kanye netinqaba tayo, iyivimbetele, iyawuba njengeliphupho, nanjengembono ebusuku." 
Isaiah29:8 Njengemuntfu losabulewe yindlala nakabhudza adla, kodvwa utsi navuka ekuseni akhandze indlala imphetse, nanjengemuntfu nakomile abhudze anatsa, kodvwa atsi navuka ekuseni atikhandze afile koma, kuyawuba njalo-ke nangalemilalandle yato tonkhe tive letilwa neNtsaba yaseSiyoni." 
Isaiah29:9 Yetfukani nimangale, banini timphumphutse nibe ngulabangenamehlo, dzakwani, kodvwa hhayi ngenca yeliwayini, yendzani, kodvwa ningayendziswa tjwala." 
Isaiah29:10 Simakadze wehlisele etikwenu butfongo lobukhulu: Uwavalile emehlo enu, baphrofethi, utimbonyile tinhloko tenu, baboniswa." 
Isaiah29:11 Kini wonkhe nje lombono awusilo lutfo, ngaphandle kwemagama nje lavalelwe encwadzini legocotwako. Naninika lomunye, lokwatiko kufundza, lencwadzi legocotwako, nitsi: “Fundza naku, tsine,” uyawuphendvula atsi: “Ngingeke ngikhone, ivaliwe yananyatsiselwa.”" 
Isaiah29:12 Nome-ke naninganika lomunye longakwati kufundza lencwadzi legocotwako, nitsi: “Fundza naku, tsine,” angaphendvula atsi: “Angikwati kufundza.”" 
Isaiah29:13 Simakadze utsi: “Labantfu basondzela kimi ngemilomo yabo, bangihlonipha ngetindzebe temilomo yabo kuphela; kodvwa tinhlitiyo tabo tikhashane kabi nami. Kungikhonta kwabo kukwenta nje leyo mitsetfo lefundziswa bantfu." 
Isaiah29:14 Ngako-ke ngisetawuphindze ngibamangalise labantfu ngetigigaba etikwetigigaba. Inhlakanipho yetihlakaniphi tabo itawuphela, kukhalipha kwemcondvo kwalabanengcondvo lekhaliphile kutawuphela.”" 
Isaiah29:15 Maye kulabo labaya ematfunjini emhlaba, bayewufihla emasu abo, bawafihlele Simakadze, labentela imisebenti yabo ebumnyameni, bacabange batsi: “Ngubani nje losibonako? Ngubani loyawukwati?”" 
Isaiah29:16 Niguculela tintfo, liphansi libheke etulu, nente shangatsi ngumbumbi longuyena afanana nelibumba! Loko lokwentiwe, kungasho yini kulomenti wako kutsi: “Akazange asangente mine”? Ludziwo lungasho yini kumbumbi walo kutsi: “Akati lutfo loyo”?" 
Isaiah29:17 ILebanoni ingete yaguculwa yini ngesikhashana lesincane nje ibe yinsimi levundzile, nensimi levundzile ibonakale seyinjengelihlatsi?" 
Isaiah29:18 Ngalelo langa tihhulu tiyakuva emavi alencwadzi legocotwako; ekhatsi ebumnyameni kahlongasibi emehlo etimphumphutse ayawubona. 
Isaiah29:19 Labatfobekile bayawubuye bajabule ngaSimakadze; labeswele bayawujabula ngaLongcwele waka-Israyeli. 
Isaiah29:20 Labanelunya bayawunyamalala, baphukuti bayawuphela, bonkhe labaneliso lengulube bayawuncanyulwa," 
Isaiah29:21 labo labenta umuntfu adliwe licala ngeligama linye nje, bambekele lugibe lowo lotsetsa emacala enkhundleni, ngebufakazi bemanga baphambukise umtsetfocotfo, badlelele longenacala." 
Isaiah29:22 Ngako-ke naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze lowahlenga Abrahama, macondzana nendlu yakaJakobe Simakadze utsi: “Jakobe akasayikuba nemahloni; nebuso babo abusayikuphaphatseka." 
Isaiah29:23 Nababona emkhatsini wabo bantfwababo, umsebenti wetandla tami, bayawuligcina lingcwele Libito lami; bayawubuhlonipha bungcwele baLongcwele wakaJakobe, bamangale ngaNkulunkulu wema-Israyeli." 
Isaiah29:24 Labo labanhlanhlatselako emoyeni bayawuba nelwati, labo labakhononako bayakwetsabela kufundziswa.”" 
Isaiah30:1 Simakadze utsi: “Maye kulabo bantfwana labanenkhani, nakulabo labakha emasu langesiwo ami, nakulabo labenta sivumelwane kungesiko ngaMoya wami, bengete sono esonweni," 
Isaiah30:2 labo labehlela entasi eGibhithe babe bangakaceli kimi, labafunana nelusito kuFaro kutsi abavikele, nesitfunti saseGibhithe sekuphephela." 
Isaiah30:3 Kodvwa siphephelo saFaro siyakunijabhisa, sitfunti saseGibhithe siyakunitsela ngelihlazo." 
Isaiah30:4 Nome banetiphatsimandla eSowani netigijimi tabo tefika eHanesi," 
Isaiah30:5 bonkhe bantfu bayawuba nemahloni ngenca yebantfu labangenamsebenti kubo, nalabangasiti ngalutfo nalabangaletsi lutfo ngaphandle kwenjabhiso nendlisamahloni.”" 
Isaiah30:6 Livi lesembulo lelimacondzana netilwane taseNegevu: Emancusa adzabula eveni lebulukhuni nenjabhiso, live lemabhubesi lamadvuna nalamasikati, lemabululu kanye netinyoka letindizako, ayalidzabula etfwala imicebo yawo ngetimbongolo, neminotfo yawo ngemalundza emakamela, aya kuleso sive lesingenanzuzo," 
Isaiah30:7 kuyo iGibhithe lengenalusito lwalutfo. Ngako-ke ngiyibita ngekutsi nguRahabi, uMenti Welite." 
Isaiah30:8 Hamba nyalo uyekubabhalela esibhelekeceni, kucophe encwadzini legocotwako, kuze kutsi ngemalanga letako kube bufakazi baphakadze." 
Isaiah30:9 Babantfu labahlubukako, bantfwana labanemanga, nalabangafuni kulalela imiyalo yaSimakadze." 
Isaiah30:10 Bakhuluma kubaboniswa batsi: “Sale ningabe nisayibona imibono,” nakubaphrofethi batsi: “Sale ningabe nisasitjela tembulo talokungiko. Sitjeleni tintfo letikitalakitanako, phrofethani emanga." 
Isaiah30:11 Yishiyeni lendlela, nisuke kulomkhondvo, niyekele nalokumelana natsi ngaLongcwele waka-Israyeli!”" 
Isaiah30:12 Ngako-ke naku lokushiwo nguLongcwele waka-Israyeli, utsi: “Ngobe niwalile lomlayeto, netsembela kumcindzeteli, natesekela ngekuyengwa," 
Isaiah30:13 lesono lesi siyawuba ngangelubondza loluphakeme kini, loseluklatuka ekhatsi selugobana, lona lolusuke selutawuhhibika masinyane." 
Isaiah30:14 Lutawucetuka tincetu njengeludziwo loluphihlitwe ngelunya, kangangekutsi emkhatsini wetincetu talo ungeke sewutfole ngisho neludzengelo lwekubutsa emalahle etiko, nome nje lwekukhelela emanti emgodzini.”" 
Isaiah30:15 Naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, Longcwele waka-Israyeli, utsi: “Ekuphendvukeni nasekuphumuleni ngulapho kunensindziso yenu khona; ekuthuleni nasekwetsembeni ngulapho kunemandla enu khona; kodvwa ningeke nitsandze lutfo lwako." 
Isaiah30:16 Natsi nine: ‘Cha, tsine sitawubaleka ngemahhashi.’ Ngako-ke nitawubaleka! Nine natsi: ‘Sitawugibela emahhashini lagijimisa kwembane.’ Ngako-ke laba labanicoshako nabo bayawugijimisa kwembane!" 
Isaiah30:17 Inkhulungwane iyawubaleka icoshwe kwetfuswa ngumunye nje, ngekusonga kwalabasihlanu niyawubhedvuka nonkhe nibaleke, nize nisale seninjengesibhonga lesisiboniso lesisele esicongweni sentsaba, nanjengendvwangu lephakanyiswe egcumeni.”" 
Isaiah30:18 Noko Simakadze ulangatelela kangaka kutsi abe nemusa kini. Uyaphakama kutsi anihawukele, ngobe Simakadze nguNkulunkulu lowehlulela ngemtsetfocotfo. Babusisiwe bonkhe labalindzela yena." 
Isaiah30:19 Awu, bantfu baseSiyoni, nine lenihlala eJerusalema, anisayikubuye nilile. Maye, uyawuba nemusa kini, nanikhala kuye nicela lusito! Uyakwenelela kuva nje, bese uyaniphendvula." 
Isaiah30:20 Naloku Simakadze anipha sinkhwa sekuhlupheka nje, nemanti etinhlungu, bafundzisi benu abasayikufihlakala, seniyakubabona ngemehlo enu enyama." 
Isaiah30:21 Nome nijikela ngesekudla nome ngesancele, tindlebe tenu tiyakuva livi emvakwenu litsi: “Nansi indlela, hambani ngayo.”" 
Isaiah30:22 Niyawube seniyatedzelela letithico tenu letembeswe ngesiliva, naletitfombe tenu letimbonywe ngegolide, niyakutilahla khashane, kube shangatsi tidvwedvwe letingcolile, nitsi kuto: “Sukani la.”" 
Isaiah30:23 Utawubuye anitfumelele imvula ngenca yenhlanyelo yenu leseniyihlanyele phansi emhlabatsini, kudla lokuphuma emhlabatsini kutawunona, futsi kube kunyenti. Ngalelo langa tinkhomo tenu tiyawukudla emadlelweni labanti nalaluhlata." 
Isaiah30:24 Tinkhabi netimbongolo letiwusebentako lomhlaba tiyakudla lifolishi neluhlata lolwendlalwe ngetimfologo nangemafosholo. 
Isaiah30:25 Ngalelo langa lekuhlaba lokukhulu, ngesikhatsi nakuwa imibhoshongo, imifudlana yemanti iyawugobhota kuto tonkhe tintsaba letiphakeme, nakuwo onkhe emagcuma lamadze." 
Isaiah30:26 Inyanga iyawukhanya njengelilanga, nekukhanya kwelilanga kuyawuphindvwa kasikhombisa, ngangekukhanya kwemalanga lagcwele lasikhombisa, ngesikhatsi Simakadze nakabopha emanceba esive sakhe, elapha tilondza letavetwa nguye." 
Isaiah30:27 Bukani, Libito laSimakadze lichamuka khashane, lita nelulaka loluvutsako nangelifu lelimnyama lentfutfu, tindzebe temlomo wakhe tigcwele lulaka, nelulwimi lwakhe lungumlilo lodlako." 
Isaiah30:28 Kuphefumula kwakhe kunjengesikhukhula semanti lesigeletako, nasikhuphuka size sifike ngasentsanyeni. Unyakatisa tive esisefeni sakhe sembhubhiso; ubeka emihlatsini yebantfu litomu lekubaholela ekwedukeni." 
Isaiah30:29 Niyawuhlabela njengalobo busuku lenenta ngabo lidzili lelingcwele, tinhlitiyo tenu tiyawujabula njengesikhatsi bantfu bakhuphuka ngemintjingo, bakhuphukela eNtsabeni yaSimakadze, eDvwaleni lema-Israyeli." 
Isaiah30:30 Simakadze uyakwenta bantfu kutsi babuve bukhosi belivi lakhe, uyawubabonisa kwehla kwemkhono wakhe ngentfukutselo lekhephukako nangemlilo lodlako, nangekucheketeka kwemafu, nangekudvuma, nangesangcotfo." 
Isaiah30:31 Livi laSimakadze liyawuphihlita i-Asiriya, ngendvuku yakhe yebukhosi uyakuyishaya ayilahle phansi." 
Isaiah30:32 Kuyawutsi njalo indvuku yaSimakadze nayehlela e-Asiriya, ngisho loluswati lwakhe lwekujezisa, kuyawuhambisana nekushaywa kwemafahlawane nemahabhu, asalwa nabo emphini ngengalo yakhe lematima." 
Isaiah30:33 IThofethi seyalungiswa kadzeni, yentiwa yalungela inkhosi. Umgodzi wayo wemlilo sewagujwa waba banti wabuye washona, kwatfotwa netinkhuni letinyenti temlilo; kuphefumula kwaSimakadze lokugeleta njengemfula wesibabule lesivutsako kuyakuyilumeka ivutse." 
Isaiah31:1 Maye kulabo labaya eGibhithe bayewucela khona lusito, labetsembela emahhashini, betsembele nasebunyentini betincola tabo temphi, nasemandleni lamakhulu ebagibeli babo bemahhashi, kodvwa bangabuki kuLongcwele waka-Israyeli, nome-ke bafune lusito kuSimakadze." 
Isaiah31:2 Noko naye uhlakaniphile, futsi angayehlisa inhlekelele, emavi akhe akaphindzi awabuyise. Uyawusukuma amelane nendlu yalababi, emelane nalabo labasita labenta lokubi." 
Isaiah31:3 Kodvwa baseGibhithe bantfu nje, abasiye Nkulunkulu, nemahhashi abo ayinyama nje, akasiwo umoya. Simakadze utsi nakaphakamisa sandla sakhe, kutsi lowo lositako akhubatele, nalowo lositwako yena awe, babhubhe bonkhe kanyekanye." 
Isaiah31:4 Naku-ke lokushiwo nguSimakadze kimi, utsi: “Njengobe libhubesi lihhonga, libhubesi lelikhulu, nalibambe inyamatane yalo, ngisho nome sekuhlatjwa umkhosi kubitwa belusi labanyenti kutsi batekulwa nalo, aletfuswa kumemeta kwabo, futsi aliphatanyiswa ngulomsindvo wabo, kanjalo-ke naSimakadze longuSomandla uyakwehlela esicongcweni seNtsaba iSiyoni kutsi atekulwa imphi." 
Isaiah31:5 Njengenyoni lendizela etikwesidleke sayo, Simakadze longuSomandla uyakuvikela iJerusalema; uyakuyivikela abuye ayisindzise, uyakwendlula kuyo, ayilamulele.”" 
Isaiah31:6 Buyelani kuNkulunkulu, nine ma-Israyeli, nine lesenimhlubuke kangaka." 
Isaiah31:7 Ngobe ngalelo langa ngulowo nalowo wenu uyakutilahla tithico tesiliva netegolide lenitente ngetandla tenu letigcwele kona. 
Isaiah31:8 “Ema-Asiriya ayawubhujiswa ngenkemba, inkemba lengesiyo yendvodza, inkemba lengesiyo yebantfu lababhubhako, itawagwinya. Ayakuyibalekela lenkemba, nemajaha awo ayawusetjentiswa kamatima." 
Isaiah31:9 Inqaba yawo iyawudzilika ngenca yekwesaba, netindvuna tawo tiyawutfutfumela kakhulu ekubonakaleni kwesiboniso semphi,” usho Simakadze, lomlilo wakhe useSiyoni, nembutfuma yakhe yemlilo iseJerusalema." 
Isaiah32:1 Buka la, inkhosi iyawubusa ngekulunga, nebabusi bayawubusa ngekwemtsetfocotfo." 
Isaiah32:2 Ngulowo nalowo wabo uyawufanana nesiphephelo emoyeni, abe ngumkhoselisi kuso sivunguvungu, abe njengemifula yemanti ehlane, afanane nelitfunti lelidvwala lelikhulu eveni lelomele emanti." 
Isaiah32:3 Emehlo alabo lababonako angeke asavaleka, netindlebe talabo labevako setiyawulalela." 
Isaiah32:4 Ingcondvo yalabanematata iyawukwati ibuye icondze, nelulwimi lolungingitako luyawusheshisa kukhuluma kahle nangalokuvakalako." 
Isaiah32:5 Silima singeke siphindze sibitwe ngekutsi ngumhlonishwa, yebo, nasidlani angeke ahlonishwe kakhulu." 
Isaiah32:6 Ngobe silima sikhuluma bulima, ingcondvo yaso ishikaneka ngalokubi, siphila ngekungamesabi Nkulunkulu, sisakate emanga ngaSimakadze; lolambile simshiya angenalutfo, kutsi nalowomile singamniki emanti." 
Isaiah32:7 Emasu asidlani mabi, wakha emacebo ebubi ekubhubhisa labamphofu ngemanga, ngisho nome sikhalo saloweswele sicotfo." 
Isaiah32:8 Kodvwa umuntfu locotfo wakha emasu lacotfo; imisebenti yakhe lehloniphekile imente eme. 
Isaiah32:9 Nine bafati labakhibikile, sukumani nilalele kimi, nine madvodzakati lenitivela niphephile, lalelani naku lengitakusho!" 
Isaiah32:10 Ngesikhatsi nje lesingetudlwana kwemnyaka nine lenitiva niphephile nitawutfutfumela; sivuno semagelebisi siyawuba sibi, kutawubate nesivuno setitselo." 
Isaiah32:11 Tfutfumelani, nine bafati labakhibikile; yesabani, nine madvodzakati lenitivela niphephile! Khumulani kwekwembatsa kwenu. Vunulani emasaka etinkhalo tenu." 
Isaiah32:12 Yetfwalani tandla enhloko, ngenca yemasimi lamahle, nangenca yetitselo tenu letinhle temivini," 
Isaiah32:13 nangenca yelive lesive sami, live lelene emanyeva netinchachabutane, yebo, lilelani tonkhe tindlu tekutijabulisa kanye nalelidolobha lekutijabulisa." 
Isaiah32:14 Inqaba iyawusala yodvwa, lidolobha lemsindvo lisale likhala libhungane, indlu leyinqaba kanye nembhoshongo kuyawuba lihlane lelingenalutfo phakadze naphakadze, kube kujabula kwetimbongolo nelidlelo lemihlambi," 
Isaiah32:15 aze Moya wasezulwini atfululelwe etikwetfu, bese kutsi lihlane libe yinsimi levundzile, nensimi levundzile ifanane nelihlatsi." 
Isaiah32:16 Umtsetfocotfo uyawuhlala ehlane, kulunga kuhlale ensimini levundzile." 
Isaiah32:17 Sitselo sekulunga siyawuba kuthula nenhlalakahle, umphumela wekulunga uyawuba kuphumula nekulondvoloteka phakadze naphakadze." 
Isaiah32:18 Sive sami siyawuhlala etindzaweni tekuthula, emakhaya laphephile, etindzaweni tekuphumula letite lokuphatamisako." 
Isaiah32:19 Nome sangcotfo singalivitsita lihlatsi, nelidolobha silibhidlite liphele nya," 
Isaiah32:20 maye, nine niyawubusiswa, nihlanyele inhlanyelo yenu eceleni kwayo yonkhe imifula, nikhulule tinkhabi tenu netimbongolo tenu, tidle ngekutsandza." 
Isaiah33:1 Maye kuwe, wena mbhubhisi, wena losengakabhujiswa! Maye kuwe, wena lolimbuka, wena losengakatsengiswa! Nawuyekela kubhubhisa, uyakubhujiswa nawe. Nawuyekela kutsengisa bantfu, uyakutsengiswa nawe." 
Isaiah33:2 Awu Simakadze, bani nemusa kitsi; tsine silangatelela wena. Bani ngemandla etfu njalo nje ekuseni, nensindziso yetfu ngesikhatsi selusizi." 
Isaiah33:3 Ngekubhavumula kweliphimbo lakho, tive tiyabaleka; nawuphakama wena, tive tiyasakateka." 
Isaiah33:4 Imphango yenu, nine tive, iyavunwa, kube shangatsi kucatsama inkhasa yesikhonyane; emadvodza ayayibunganyela, yebo, njengelibulo lesikhonyane." 
Isaiah33:5 Simakadze uphakeme, ngobe uhlala endzaweni lephakeme, utawugcwalisa iSiyoni ngekwehlulela ngemtsetfocotfo nangekulunga." 
Isaiah33:6 Utawuba sisekelo sakho lesingusonasona ngawo onkhe emalanga akho, abe lifa lakho lensindziso, nelekuhlakanipha, nelwati. Kwesaba Simakadze kungumcebo wakhe." 
Isaiah33:7 Buka la, emadvodza akubo lanesibindzi akhala kakhulu ngephandle; emancusa ekuthula akhala kabuhlungu." 
Isaiah33:8 Imigwaco lemikhulu idvutjiwe, kute tihambi letikuleyo migwaco. Sivumelwane sephuliwe, bofakazi baso bayedzelelwa, kute namunye lohlonishwako." 
Isaiah33:9 Live liyalila ligedvuke, iLebanoni ihlazekile, iyabuna; iSharoni ifanana nelihlane i-Arabha, iBhashani neKhameli kuhhohlota emacembe ayo." 
Isaiah33:10 Simakadze utsi: “Nyalo sengitawusukuma, nyalo sengitawuphakanyiswa, nyalo sengitakwenyuselwa etulu." 
Isaiah33:11 Nemitsa emakhoba, nitale tibi; kuphefumula kwenu kungumlilo lonicotfulako." 
Isaiah33:12 Tive tiyakushiswa kube shangatsi ngumcakaco; njengetihlahla temanyeva letigawuliwe, tiyawulunyekwa ngemlilo.”" 
Isaiah33:13 Nine lenikhashane, lalelani loku lengikwentile; nine lenisedvute, vumani emandla ami!" 
Isaiah33:14 Toni taseSiyoni tiyatfutfumela, kutfutfumela kubabambile labangamesabi Nkulunkulu: “Ngubani emkhatsini wetfu longahlala nemlilo locotfulako? Ngubani emkhatsini wetfu longahlala nekuvutsa kwaphakadze?”" 
Isaiah33:15 Ngulowo lohamba ngekulunga, akhulume lokungiko, lowo lowala inzuzo yekucindzetela, logodla sandla sakhe singayemukeli imidizo, avale tindlebe takhe kulababopha luzungu, avale emehlo akhe ekubukeni lokubi." 
Isaiah33:16 Ngulowo-ke umuntfu lotawuhlala ekuphakameni, losiphephelo sakhe kutawuba yinqaba yemadvwala. Uyakunikwa sinkhwa sakhe, angawesweli emanti ekunatsa." 
Isaiah33:17 Emehlo akho ayakuyibona inkhosi ebuhleni bayo, abuke nelive lelingematsafa lamahle." 
Isaiah33:18 Emicabangweni yakho uyakuzindla ngekwesatjiswa kwakucala: “Iphi lendvuna lenkhulu? Uphi lona abetsatsa imitselo? Iphi yona lendvuna lebeyibala imibhoshongo?” 
Isaiah33:19 Ungeke uphindze usibone lesive lesinebudlova, labo bantfu belulwimi lolungatiwa kahle, labalulwimi lwabo lungatiwa futsi lungevakali." 
Isaiah33:20 Buka iSiyoni, lidolobha lemadzili etfu; emehlo akho ayakuyibona iJerusalema, indzawo yekuhlala lenekuthula, nelithende lelingeke lisuswe; tikhonkhwane talo tingeke tisishulwe, kungeke kudzabuke ngisho nayinye yetindophi talo." 
Isaiah33:21 Lapho-ke Simakadze uyawuba nguLonemandla wetfu. Kuyawufanana nendzawo lenemifula lebanti nemifudlana. Kute sikebhe lesinetigwedlo lesiyawuhamba kuyo, kute ngisho nemkhumbi lonemandla lotawuntjweza kuyo." 
Isaiah33:22 Ngobe Simakadze ngumehluleli wetfu; Simakadze nguyena sishayamtsetfo setfu, Simakadze yinkhosi yetfu, nguye lotasisindzisa." 
Isaiah33:23 Tindophi takho tekubopha liseyili setiyaceka: Insika yemkhumbi ayikaboshwa yacina, liseyili alikendlaleki. Imphango lenyenti itakwehlukaniswa, ngisho nalochutako uyakuyitfola imphango." 
Isaiah33:24 Kute lohlala eSiyoni loyakutsi: “Ngiyagula,” netono talabo labahlala khona tiyawutsetselelwa." 
Isaiah34:1 Sondzelani, nine tive, nitewulalela; lalelisisani, nine tive! Umhlaba awuve, nako konkhe lokukuwo, umhlaba, nako konkhe lokuphuma kuwo!" 
Isaiah34:2 Simakadze utitfukutselele tonkhe tive; intfukutselo yakhe isetikwawo onkhe emabutfo ato. Uyakuwabhubhisa onkhe awacedze, awanikele kutsi agwazwe." 
Isaiah34:3 Lababulewe bawo bayawulahlwa ngephandle, tidvumbu tawo tiyawunuka luboti; tintsaba tiyawucwila engatini yawo." 
Isaiah34:4 Tonkhe tinkhanyeti tasemazulwini tiyawuncibilika, nesibhakabhaka sigocotwe njengencwadzi legocotwako; tonkhe letinkhanyeti tasesibhakabhakeni tiyakuwa njengemacembe lomile lahhohloka esihlahleni semvini, nanjengemakhiwa lasabunile nakahhohloka esihlahleni semkhiwa." 
Isaiah34:5 Inkemba yami seyinatse yenela emazulwini, bukani, yehla ngekwehlulela, yehlela kulaka-Edomu, sive lengitasibhubhisa ngisicedze." 
Isaiah34:6 Inkemba yaSimakadze icwiliswa engatini, inemanoni yonkhe indzawo, igcwele ingati yemazinyane etimvu, nengati yetimbuti, nemanoni lesuka etinsweni tetihhanca. Ngobe Simakadze unemhlatjelo eBhosra nekuhlaba lokukhulu kulaka-Edomu." 
Isaiah34:7 Tinkhabi tesiganga tiyakuwa nabo, tinkunzana kanye netinkunzi letinkhulu. Live labo liyawucwila engatini, nelutfuli luyawuba manti emanoni." 
Isaiah34:8 Ngobe Simakadze unelilanga lekuphindzisela, umnyaka wekubuyisela ngenca yendzaba yaseSiyoni." 
Isaiah34:9 Imifudlana yaka-Edomu iyawuba litiyela, lutfuli lwakhona lube sibabule lesivutsako, live labo libe litiyela lelivutsako." 
Isaiah34:10 Singeke sicinywe ebusuku nasemini, intfutfu yaso iyawubhunya phakadze naphakadze, kusukela etitukulwaneni kuye etitukulwaneni live liyawuhlala lilihlane, kute namunye loyawuphindza adzabule ekhatsi kulo." 
Isaiah34:11 Sahhukulu sasehlane nesahhukulu lesikhalako kuyawuyitsatsa lendzawo ibe yako. Sahhukulu lesikhulu nelihhwabayi kuyawukwakhela tidleke tako khona lapho. Nkulunkulu uyakuselula etikwelive laka-Edomu silinganiso sesiphitsiphitsi, yebo, nekwekulinganisa lokuyincitsakalo." 
Isaiah34:12 Babusi balo kuyawubate labayawukubita batsi bukhosi, bonkhe baholi balo bayawunyamalala." 
Isaiah34:13 Emanyeva ayakwehlula tigodlo talo, emanyeva netinchachabutane kunyatsele tinqaba talo. Kuyawuba yindzawo yekujangaza timphungutja, nelikhaya letahhukulu." 
Isaiah34:14 Tilwane tesiganga tiyawuhlangana netimphisi, netimbuti tesiganga timemetane todvwana, netilwane tasebusuku tiyawulala lapho, tititfolele khona indzawo yekuphumula." 
Isaiah34:15 Sahhukulu siyakwakha sidleke saso lapho, sitalele emacandza, siwachobosele khona lapho, sifukamele emazini aso, ngaphansi kwemtfunti wetimphiko taso; ngisho nabolohheya bayawuhlangana lapho, ngulowo ahambe nesingani sakhe." 
Isaiah34:16 Ase nibuke encwadzini legocotwako yaSimakadze nifundze. Kute nakunye kwaloku lokuyawusilela, kute lokuyakweswela singani sako. Ngobe ngumlomo wakhe lona lokhiphe lomyalo, naMoya wakhe uyawukubutsela ndzawonye." 
Isaiah34:17 Ukunika tabelo tako ngenkatho, sandla sakhe siyakwabela live njengekwesilinganiso, seliyawuba lako kokuphela, kuhlale khona situkulwane ngesitukulwane." 
Isaiah35:1 Lihlane nelive lelihamukile kuyawujabula, lugwadvule luyawujabula luchakaze timbali." 
Isaiah35:2 Njengembali luyawuchakaza lube lusha; luyawutfokota kakhulu, lumemete ngenjabulo. Ludvumo lweLebanoni luyawunikwa lona, yebo, luyawunikwa ludvumo lweKhameli nelweSharoni; bantfu bayawubona bukhosi baSimakadze, nebukhatikhati baNkulunkulu wetfu." 
Isaiah35:3 Cinisani tandla letibutsakatsaka, nikhutsate emadvolo lacekako." 
Isaiah35:4 Khulumani kulabanetinhlitiyo letesabako nitsi: “Cinani, ningesabi, Nkulunkulu wenu uyeta, uyawufika nekuphindzisela nekujezisa kwakhe, utawufika atenisindzisa.”" 
Isaiah35:5 Emehlo etimphumphutse ayawuvuleka, netindlebe tetihhulu tiyawuva." 
Isaiah35:6 Labachutako bayawusuka emagonso njengenyamatane, nelulwimi lwesimungulu luyawumemeta ngenjabulo. Emanti ayawugeleta ehlane, kube nemifudlana elugwadvule." 
Isaiah35:7 Sihlabatsi lesishisako siyawuba sitiba, umhlabatsi lowomile uphetfuke tiyalu. Nalapho kwake kwahlala timphungutja khona, kuyawumila tjani nemhlanga, kanye nemhlanga iphaphira." 
Isaiah35:8 Kuyawuba khona umgwaco lomkhulu lapho, uyawubitwa ngekutsi Yindlela Yebungcwele. Labangcolile ngeke bahambe ngawo, uyakuba walabo labahamba ngawo lomgwaco, tilima letikhohlakele ngeke tihambahambe ngawo." 
Isaiah35:9 Kuyawubate libhubesi lapho, kute ngisho nesilwane lesinelulaka, lesiyawutfolakala kuwo. Kodvwa ngulabahlengiwe bodvwa labayawuhamba kulowo mgwaco," 
Isaiah35:10 labahlengiwe baSimakadze bayawubuya. Bayawungena eSiyoni ngekuhlabela, nangekujabula kwaphakadze lokuyawuba ngumchele etinhloko tabo. Bayawuhamba ngekutfokota nangekujabula, lusizi nekububula kuyawubaleka." 
Isaiah36:1 Ngemnyaka weli-14 wekubusa kwenkhosi Hezekiya, kwesuka Senaheribi, inkhosi yase-Asiriya, wahlasela onkhe emadolobha latinqaba akaJuda, wawatfumba." 
Isaiah36:2 Inkhosi yase-Asiriya yase itfumela indvuna yayo lenkhulu yemphi kanye nalelikhulu libutfo lemphi lelesuka eLakhishi, laya enkhosini Hezekiya eJerusalema. Kwatsi lendvuna lenkhulu yemphi nayima ngasemseleni wesitiba lesisenhla, emgwacweni loya eNsimini yeMgezi Wetingubo," 
Isaiah36:3 kwaphuma bo-Eliyakimu, umsa waHilkiya, indvuna yesigodlo, naShebna labengumabhalane, naJowa, umsa wa-Asafa, umbhalisi, baya kuyo." 
Isaiah36:4 Indvuna lenkhulu yemphi yafike yakhuluma kubo, yatsi: “Tjelani Hezekiya, nitsi: “ ‘Naku lokushiwo yinkhosi lenkhulu yase-Asiriya, itsi: Ulibeke kubani litsemba lakho?" 
Isaiah36:5 Utsi unemasu nemabutfo emphi lanemandla, kodvwa ukhuluma lite nje. Ngubani lona lowetsembele kuye, lokwenta kutsi ngaye ungivukele?" 
Isaiah36:6 Buka la, nyalo wetsembele eGibhithe, kulolubhatu lwendvuku yemhlanga, lolugwaza sandla semuntfu lumlimate, nakatsi ubambelela kulo! Unjalo-ke Faro, inkhosi yaseGibhithe, kubo bonkhe labetsembela kuye." 
Isaiah36:7 Nangabe utsi kimi: “Setsembele kuSimakadze Nkulunkulu wetfu,” akusiye yini lona Hezekiya ladzilita tindzawo takhe letiphakeme tekukhontela nemalati akhe, atsi kubakaJuda nebaseJerusalema: “Kufanele nikhonte embikwanali lilati leliseJerusalema”?" 
Isaiah36:8 “ ‘Buya-ke nyalo, wente sivumelwane nemphatsi wami, inkhosi yase-Asiriya: Ngitakunika emahhashi lati-2 000, nawungaba nebantfu labangawagibela." 
Isaiah36:9 Ungayeyisa yini yona yinye nje kuto tonkhe tindvuna letincane temphatsi wami, nome ngabe wetsembele eGibhithe ngetincola temphi kanye nebagibeli bemahhashi?" 
Isaiah36:10 Ngetulu kwaloko nje, kantsi lapha ngitele kutawuhlasela nekubhubhisa lelive ngaphandle kwaSimakadze yini? Simakadze nguye cobo lwakhe longitjele kutsi angishuce ngite kulelive ngitelibhubhisa.’ ”" 
Isaiah36:11 Bo-Eliyakimu, naShebna, naJowa bakhuluma kulendvuna lenkhulu, batsi: “Sicela umane ukhulume ngesiSiriya etincekwini takho, ngobe ngulona lulwimi lesiluvako. Ungakhulumi natsi ngesiHebheru kuva bonkhe labantfu labalapha etulu elubondzeni.”" 
Isaiah36:12 Kodvwa lendvuna lenkhulu yemphi yaphendvula, yatsi: “Kantsi inkhosi yami beyingitfume kini nalenkhosi yenu nodvwa yini kutsi ngitewukhuluma lamagama? Beyingakangitfumi yini nakubo labantfu labalapha etulu elubondzeni, nabo labanjengani, labatawudla emangcoliso abo, baphindze banatse nemichamo yabo?”" 
Isaiah36:13 Lendvuna lenkhulu yemphi yase iyasukuma yamemeta ngesiHebheru, yatsi: “Lalelani emavi enkhosi lenkhulu, inkhosi yase-Asiriya!" 
Isaiah36:14 Naku lokushiwo yinkhosi, itsi: ‘Ningacali niyengwe nguHezekiya. Angeke akhone kunikhulula!" 
Isaiah36:15 Ningavumi kutsi Hezekiya aniyenge netsembele kuSimakadze, nakatsi: “Simakadze utasephula ngempela, lelidolobha lingeke linikelwe esandleni senkhosi yase-Asiriya.” ’" 
Isaiah36:16 “Inkhosi yase-Asiriya itsi: ‘Ningamlaleli Hezekiya, yentani sivumelwane nami, niphume nite kimi, nguleyo naleyo ndvodza-ke iyawube seyitidlela kahle esivinini sayo, nasemkhiwaneni wayo, inatse nemanti laphuma emtfonjeni wayo," 
Isaiah36:17 ngize ngifike nginitsatse nginimikise eveni lelifanana nelenu, live lelinalokutinhlavu, nalelineliwayini lelisha, live lesinkhwa neletivini.’" 
Isaiah36:18 “Ningavumi kutsi Hezekiya anedukise, nakatsi: ‘Simakadze utasikhulula.’ Ukhona yini nkulunkulu wanome ngusiphi sive lowake wakhulula live lakhe esandleni senkhosi yase-Asiriya?" 
Isaiah36:19 Baphi nje bonkulunkulu baseHamathi, nebase-Aphadi? Baphi bonkulunkulu baseSefavayimu? Bayisindzisile yini iSamariya esandleni sami?" 
Isaiah36:20 Ngumuphi kubo bonkhe labonkulunkulu balamave lowake wakhona kusindzisa live lakhe esandleni sami? Simakadze-ke yena angayisindzisa kanjani iJerusalema esandleni sami?” 
Isaiah36:21 Kodvwa labantfu babindza nje bambuka bangete basho lutfo, ngobe inkhosi yayibadvonse ngendlebe yatsi: “Ningacali nimphendvule.”" 
Isaiah36:22 Bo-Eliyakimu, umsa waHilkiya, labeyindvuna yesigodlo, naShebna, labengumabhalane, kanye naJowa, umsa wa-Asafa, labengulobhalisako, bahamba bayawubikela Hezekiya sebadzabule tingubo tabo, bafike bamtjela konkhe lokwakushiwo yindvuna lenkhulu yemphi yase-Asiriya." 
Isaiah37:1 Hezekiya, inkhosi, watsi kube akuve loko, wadzabula tingubo takhe wembatsa emasaka, wahamba wangena ethempelini laSimakadze."
