Isaiah59:15 Liciniso alisatfolakali ndzawo. Bonkhe lababalekela bubi batingelwa njengetinyamatane. Simakadze wabuka wangete wajabula, ngenca yekutsi sekute kulandzela umtsetfocotfo." 
Isaiah59:16 Wabona kutsi kute muntfu, wamangala kakhulu ngekutsi kute namunye lomela kulunga, ngako ingalo yakhe yalwela insindziso yakhe, nekulunga kwakhe kwamsimamisa." 
Isaiah59:17 Wembatsa kulunga njengesivikelo sakhe sesifuba, nesigcoko sensindziso enhloko yakhe. Wembatsa tingubo tekukhipha sibhongobhongo, watishumphetela ngenshisekelo njengesembatfo." 
Isaiah59:18 Uyawubabuyisela njengaloko labakwentile: lulaka etitseni takhe, nekujeziswa kulabamelana naye. Tichingi uyawutikhokhela njengekwetento tato." 
Isaiah59:19 Kusukela enshonalanga kuye lapho kuphuma ngakhona lilanga, bantfu bayawulesaba Libito laSimakadze, bahloniphe bukhosi bakhe. Ngobe uyawufika njengesikhukhula semfula lokhukhulwa kuphefumula kwaSimakadze." 
Isaiah59:20 “Umhlengi uyawufika eSiyoni kulabo bakaJakobe labaphendvukako etonweni tabo,” kusho Simakadze." 
Isaiah59:21 Simakadze utsi: “Mine-ke, nasi sivumelwane sami nabo, Moya wami losetikwakho nemavi ami lengiwafake emlonyeni wakho, ngeke esuke emlonyeni wakho, ngisho nasemlonyeni webantfwabakho, kanye nasemlonyeni wetitukulwane takho, kusukela kulesikhatsi kuze kube nguphakadze,” kusho Simakadze." 
Isaiah60:1 “Vuka, Jerusalema, ukhanye njengelilanga, ngobe kukhanya kwakho kufikile. Inkhatimulo yaSimakadze iphumela etikwakho." 
Isaiah60:2 Buka la, bumnyama buyawusibekela umhlaba, nebumnyama lobumatima busetikwetive, kodvwa Simakadze uyaphuma etikwakho, nenkhatimulo yakhe ibonakala etikwakho." 
Isaiah60:3 Tive tiyawusondzela ekukhanyeni kwakho nemakhosi ete ebukhatikhatini bekusa kwakho. 
Isaiah60:4 “Phakamisa emehlo akho, ucalate ubone: Bahlangane bonkhe bete kuwe, emadvodzana akho aphuma khashane, emadvodzakati akho wona etfwelwe ngemkhono." 
Isaiah60:5 Utawube sewuyabuka umoyitele, inhlitiyo yakho iyawugcumagcuma, inetsetele ngenca yekujabula. Imicebo leselwandle iyawuletfwa kuwe, bunjinga betive buyawuta kuwe." 
Isaiah60:6 Imihlambi yemakamela iyawugcwala eveni lakho, emakamela lamancane akaMidiyani newase-Efa. Bonkhe baseSheba bayawuta, betfwele igolide nemphepho, bamemetela ludvumo lwaSimakadze." 
Isaiah60:7 Yonkhe imihlambi yaseKhedari iyawubutsanela kuwe, tihhanca takaNebayothi tiyawukukhonta, tibe ngiminikelo leyemukeleka elatini lami, ngiyawulihlobisa lithempeli leludvumo lwami." 
Isaiah60:8 “Bobani laba labandiza etulu njengemafu, nanjengematuba aya etidlekeni tawo?" 
Isaiah60:9 Nayi imikhumbi yetichingi icondza kimi, kuhamba embili imikhumbi yaseThashishi, iletse emadvodzana akho laphuma khashane labuya nesiliva negolide yawo, atewudvumisa Simakadze Nkulunkulu wakho, longuLongcwele waka-Israyeli, ngobe ukwetfwese inkhatimulo." 
Isaiah60:10 “Betive bayawutivusa tibondza takho, emakhosi abo ayawuhlehla kuwe. Noko ngakushaya ngenca yekutfukutsela, ngebubele bami ngiyawukuhawukela." 
Isaiah60:11 Emasango akho ayawuhlala avulekile, ngeke aze avalwe, busuku nemini, kuze emadvodza aniletsele lemicebo yetive, emakhosi ato achutjwe atiboshwa." 
Isaiah60:12 Ngobe sive nome umbuso longayiwuhlehla kuwe, uyakufa wona, uyawubhubha uphele." 
Isaiah60:13 “Tihlahla telikhetselo taseLebanoni tiyakuta kuwe, sipheshula, nemferi, nemsayipuresi konkhe kanyekanye, kutewuhlobisa indzawo yami lengcwele. Ngiyakuyikhatimulisa indzawo yetinyawo tami." 
Isaiah60:14 Emadvodzana ebacindzeteli bakho ayawuta kuwe akhotsama, bonkhe laba labakwedzelelako bayawukhotsama etinyaweni takho, bayawukubita batsi uLidolobha laSimakadze, Siyoni waLongcwele waka-Israyeli." 
Isaiah60:15 “Noko uke walahlwa, watondvwa, kungekho muntfu lowendlula kuwe, ngiyawukwenta ligcabho laphakadze, nenjabulo yato tonkhe titukulwane." 
Isaiah60:16 Uyawunatsa lubisi lwetive, umunyiswe emabeleni ebukhosi. Uyawube sewuyati-ke kutsi mine, Simakadze, nginguMsindzisi wakho, nekutsi Somandla wakaJakobe unguMhlengi wakho." 
Isaiah60:17 Ngiyawukuletsela igolide esikhundleni selitfusi, nesiliva esikhundleni sensimbi. Esikhundleni selukhuni ngiyawukuletsela litfusi, nensimbi esikhundleni sematje. Kuthula ngiyawukwenta kube ngumbusi wakho, kulunga ngikwente kube ngumholi wakho." 
Isaiah60:18 Akuseyiwuba nekulwa eveni lakho, kuyawubate incitsakalo nembhubhiso emikhawulweni yelive lakho. Kodvwa uyawubita tibondza takho ngekutsi yiNsindziso, nemasango akho ngekutsi Ludvumo." 
Isaiah60:19 Lilanga aliseyikuba kukhanya kwakho emini, ngisho nekukhanya kwenyeti kungeke kusakukhanyisela wena, ngobe Simakadze uyawuba kukhanya kwakho kwaphakadze, Nkulunkulu wakho abe ludvumo lwakho." 
Isaiah60:20 Lilanga lakho alisayiwuphindza lishone, nenyanga yakho ayisayiwuphindza ifiphale. Simakadze uyawuba kukhanya kwaphakadze kuwe, emalanga akho ekudzabuka ayawuphela." 
Isaiah60:21 Lapho-ke bonkhe bantfu bakho bayawuba ngulabalungile, bayawuba banikati belive kokuphela. Bangimiliba lengiyihlanyele, umsebenti wetandla tami, wekubonakalisa inkhatimulo yami." 
Isaiah60:22 Lomncane wenu uyawuba yinkhulungwane, lophansi kakhulu abe sive lesinemandla. NginguSimakadze, ngesikhatsi sako ngiyawukwenta loko ngekushesha lokukhulu.”" 
Isaiah61:1 Moya weNkhosi Simakadze ukimi, ngobe Simakadze ungigcobile, kutsi ngishumayele tindzaba letimnandzi kulabamphofu. Ungitfume kutsi ngitewubopha labo labatinhlitiyo tabo tidzabukile. Ungitfume kutawumemetela kukhululwa kulabatfunjiwe, nekukhululwa kulababoshiwe." 
Isaiah61:2 Ungitfume kutsi ngitewumemetela umnyaka wemusa waSimakadze, nelilanga lekuphindzisela kwaNkulunkulu wetfu, nelekudvudvuta bonkhe labalilako," 
Isaiah61:3 labakhala eSiyoni babonelelwe, banikwe umchele webuhle esikhundleni semlotsa, banikwe nemafutsa enjabulo esikhundleni sesililo, banikwe ingubo yekudvumisa esikhundleni semoya lodzabukile. Bayawubitwa ngekutsi batihlahla tekulunga, letihlanyelwe nguSimakadze, kuze kubonakaliswe inkhatimulo yakhe." 
Isaiah61:4 Bayawutakha kabusha tindzala takadzeni, bativusetele tindzawo letabhidlitwa kadzenidzeni; bayawuvusa kabusha emadolobha lahhihlitwa, labhidlitwa etitukulwaneni tasendvulo." 
Isaiah61:5 Betive bayakwelusa imihlambi yenu, bachamuki bayawulima emasimini enu nasetivinini tenu." 
Isaiah61:6 Nine niyawubitwa ngekutsi nibaphristi baSimakadze, niyakwetsiwa emabito, kutsiwe nitikhonti taNkulunkulu wetfu. Niyawudla imfuyo yetive ngetive, nangebunjinga bato niyawutigabatisa." 
Isaiah61:7 Esikhundleni selihlazo lenu, nine bantfu bami, niyawuphiwa ngalokuphindziwe; esikhundleni sekuhlazeka niyawujabula efeni lenu; ngako niyawudla lifa ngalokuphindziwe eveni lenu, kujabula kwaphakadze kuyawuba kwenu." 
Isaiah61:8 “Ngobe mine, Simakadze, ngiyakutsandza kwehlulela ngebucotfo. Ngiyakutondza kudlelela nekona, bantfu bami ngiyawubakhokhela njengekwetsembeka kwami, ngente sivumelwane saphakadze naphakadze nabo." 
Isaiah61:9 Titukulwane tabo tiyakwatiwa emkhatsini wetive, nentalelwane yabo emkhatsini wetive. Bonkhe labababonako bayawuvuma kutsi basive lesibusiswe nguSimakadze.”" 
Isaiah61:10 Ngiyajabula kakhulu ngaSimakadze; umphefumulo wami uyajabula ngaNkulunkulu wami. Ngobe ungembatsise ngetingubo tensindziso, wangihlobisa ngemjiva wekulunga, njengemyeni ahlobisa inhloko yakhe njengemphristi, nanjengamakoti lotihlobise ngebuhlalu bakhe." 
Isaiah61:11 Ngobe njengaloku nemhlaba uhlumisa emahlumela, nengadze ihlumisa inhlanyelo ikhule, kanjalo-ke neNkhosi Simakadze iyawuhlumisa kulunga neludvumo, kuhlume embikwato tonkhe tive." 
Isaiah62:1 Ngenca yeSiyoni nje, ngingeke ngibindze, ngenca yeJerusalema ngingete ngathula, kuze kulunga kwayo kukhanye njengekusa, nensindziso yayo ibe njengesidlwane lesivutsako." 
Isaiah62:2 Tive tiyawukubona kulunga kwakho, nawo onkhe emakhosi abone emandla akho. Uyawubitwa ngelibito lelisha leliyawubekwa ngumlomo waSimakadze." 
Isaiah62:3 Uyawuba ngumchele wenkhatimulo esandleni saSimakadze, umchele webukhosi esandleni saNkulunkulu wakho." 
Isaiah62:4 Abasayiwukubita ngekutsi unguLahliwe, nome betse live lakini batsi nguShiywayedvwa. Kodvwa uyawubitwa ngekutsi unguHefsiba, nelive lakini kutsiwe yiBhewula, ngobe Simakadze uyawujabula ngawe, nelive lakini liyakwendza kuye." 
Isaiah62:5 Njengelijaha nalishada nentfombi, kanjalo-ke nemadvodzana akho ayawushada nawe; njengemyeni nakajabula ngamakoti wakhe, kanjalo-ke naNkulunkulu wakho uyawujabula ngawe." 
Isaiah62:6 Ngibeke balindzi etibondzeni takho, Jerusalema, bangeke bathule imini nebusuku. Nine lenibita Simakadze, ningatiniki kuphumula," 
Isaiah62:7 naye ningamniketi kuphumula, adzimate ayakhe kabusha iJerusalema, ayente ibe ludvumo emhlabeni." 
Isaiah62:8 Simakadze ufunge ngesandla sakhe sekudla nangemkhono wakhe lonemandla, watsi: “Angisayiwuphindza ngephane ngekudla kwakho kutsi kube kudla kwetitsa takho, nebetive abasayiwuphindze balinatse liwayini lelisha lolishikashikanele kangaka." 
Isaiah62:9 Kodvwa labo labakuvunako bayawukudla badvumise Simakadze, nalabo lababutsa emagelebisi, liwayini bayawulinatsela etibuyeni tendlu yami lengcwele.”" 
Isaiah62:10 Phumani, phumani emasangweni! Lungiselelani bantfu umgwaco! Yakhani, yakhani umgwaco lomkhulu! Susani ematje. Phakamiselani tive siboniso sekuncoba, titesibona." 
Isaiah62:11 Lalelani la: Simakadze sewente simemetelo lesiya emikhawulweni yonkhe yemhlaba, lesitsi: “Tjela iNdvodzakati yaseSiyoni, utsi: ‘Buka, nanguya uMsindzisi wakho uyeta! Bukela, umvuzo wakhe ukuye, nenkhokhelo yakhe ihamba embikwakhe.’ ”" 
Isaiah62:12 Bayawubitwa ngekutsi Sive Lesingcwele, Labahlengiwe baSimakadze. Wena uyawubitwa ngekutsi unguLofuniwe, Lidolobha Lelingakalahlwa." 
Isaiah63:1 Ngubani lona lochamuka ka-Edomu, lobuya eBhosra, lonetingubo letibhocwe ngalokubovu njengengati? Ngubani yena lona, lowembetse umjiva webukhosi lokhatimulako, lohamba acanase ngebukhulu bemandla akhe? “Ngimi, lengikhuluma ngekulunga, lonemandla ekusindzisa.”" 
Isaiah63:2 Tentiwa yini tingubo takho kutsi tibe bovu njengetemuntfu lobekahluta emagelebisi? 
Isaiah63:3 “Nginyatsele sikhamo seliwayini ngingedvwa; kuto tonkhe tive kute namunye labekanye nami. Ngibagcobagcobile ngentfukutselo yami, ngabapitjita ngelulaka lwami. Ingati yabo yasaphatela tembatfo tami; ngatingcolisa tonkhe timphahla tami." 
Isaiah63:4 Ngobe lilanga lekuphindzisela belisenhlitiyweni yami; nemnyaka wekuhlenga labangebami sewufikile. 
Isaiah63:5 Ngabuka, kodvwa kwabate namunye labengasita. Ngamangala kakhulu kutsi kubete lowelekelelako, ngako umkhono wami wangentela insindziso yami, nelulaka lwami lwangisekela." 
Isaiah63:6 Ngagcobagcoba tive ngentfukutselo yami; ngelulaka lwami ngatenta tadzakwa, ngatfululela ingati yato emhlabatsini.”" 
Isaiah63:7 Ngiyawukhuluma ngebukhulu bemusa waSimakadze, ngibonge tento takhe lekufanele advunyiselwe tona, ngidvumise konkhe loko Simakadze lasentele kona, yebo, tintfo letinyenti letinhle latentele indlu yaka-Israyeli, ngesihawu sakhe nangemusa wakhe lomkhulukati." 
Isaiah63:8 Watsi: “Ngempela, basive sami, emadvodzana langeke angiyenge;” ngaloko-ke waba nguMsindzisi wabo." 
Isaiah63:9 Kuko konkhe kukhatsateka kwabo naye abekhatsatekile, ingilosi yebukhona bakhe yabasindzisa, ngelutsandvo lwakhe nangemusa wakhe wabahlenga. Wabatsatsa wabetfwala kuwo onkhe emalanga akadzeni." 
Isaiah63:10 Noko, bamhlubuka, badzabukisa Moya wakhe Longcwele. Ngako-ke wagucuka waba sitsa sabo, yena cobo lwakhe walwa nabo." 
Isaiah63:11 Sive sakhe sase siyawakhumbula emalanga akadzeni, emalanga aboMosi kanye nesive sakhe, batsi: “Uphi lowa lowabeweta lwandle lolubovu bona kanye nebelusi bemhlambi wetimvu takhe? Uphi lowa lowafaka Moya wakhe Longcwele emkhatsini wabo," 
Isaiah63:12 lowatfumela umkhono wakhe lonemandla lamangalisako, kutsi ube ngasesandleni saMose sekudla, lowehlukanisa emanti embikwabo, aze atakhele yena Libito lelineludvumo lwaphakadze?" 
Isaiah63:13 “Uphi lowa lowabahola badzabula ekujuleni kwelwandle?” Njengelihhashi eveni lelibekile, abazange sebakhubatele." 
Isaiah63:14 Njengetinkhomo letehlela ematsafeni, banikwa kuphumula ngaMoya waSimakadze. Wasihola kanjalo-ke sive sakho, watakhela wena Libito lelinebukhosi." 
Isaiah63:15 Buka phansi usezulwini lakho, ubone, usesihlalweni sakho sebukhosi lesingcwele. Kuphi kushisekela kwakho nemandla akho? Kunakekela kwakho nesihawu sakho kugodliwe kitsi." 
Isaiah63:16 Kodvwa wena unguBabe wetfu, nome nje Abrahama angasati tsine, na-Israyeli angasemukeli tsine, kodwva wena, Simakadze, unguBabe wetfu, uMhlengi wetfu; kwasemandvulo lelo Libito lakho." 
Isaiah63:17 Awu Simakadze, usivumelelani kutsi seduke etindleleni takho, utenteleni kutsi tibe lukhuni tinhlitiyo tetfu, kuze singetikuhlonipha wena? Mane ubuye ngenca yetinceku takho, tive letilifa lakho." 
Isaiah63:18 Kwaba sikhashana nje sive sakho saba tindlalifa tendzawo yakho lengcwele, kodvwa nyalo titsa tetfu setiyinyatsele phansi indlu yakho lengcwele." 
Isaiah63:19 Tsine sibakho kusukela kadzenidzeni; kodvwa shangatsi wena awukabusi etikwetfu, asikaze sabitwa ngeLibito lakho." 
Isaiah64:1 Awu, shangatsi ungadzabula emazulu, wehlele phansi. Shangatsi tintsaba tingatfutfumela embikwakho!" 
Isaiah64:2 Shangatsi kungafanana nemlilo nawulumekela tinsaba, ushisise emanti aze abile! Yehla, utekwenta kutsi titsa takho tilati Libito lakho, wente netive titfutfumele embikwakho!" 
Isaiah64:3 Ngobe watsi nawenta tintfo letesabekako lesasingazange sitilindzele, wehla, tintsaba tatfutfumela embikwakho." 
Isaiah64:4 Kusukela kadzenidzeni kute lowase weva, kute nendlebe leyase yeva, kute liso lelase labona lomunye Nkulunkulu ngaphandle kwakho, lomelela labo labalindzele yena." 
Isaiah64:5 Uyabasita labo labajabulela kwenta lokulungile, labatikhumbulako tindlela takho. Kodvwa tsine sachubeka sona, wena wasitfukutselela. Kepha siyawusindziswa kanjani?" 
Isaiah64:6 Sonkhe sesifanana nebantfu labangcolile, nato tonkhe tento tetfu letinhle setifanana netidvwedvwe letingcolile. Sonkhe siyabuna njengelicembe, njengemoya tono tetfu tiyasiphephula." 
Isaiah64:7 Kute namunye lobita Libito lakho, nome lotimisela kubambelela kuwe, ngobe ubufihlile buso bakho kitsi, wasicedza ngenca yetono tetfu." 
Isaiah64:8 Noko, wena Simakadze, unguBabe wetfu. Tsine silibumba, wena ungumbumbi, sonkhe singumsebenti wetandla takho." 
Isaiah64:9 Awu Simakadze, ungatfukutseli kwekwengca, ungatikhumbuli tono tetfu phakadze naphakadze. Awu, siyakuncusa, sibuke, ngobe sonkhe sibantfu bakho." 
Isaiah64:10 Emadolobha akho langcwele asalihlane, ngisho neSiyoni imbala seyilihlane, iJerusalema iyincitsakalo." 
Isaiah64:11 Lithempeli letfu lelingcwele nalelikhatimulako, lapho bobabemkhulu bebakukhonta khona, selishiswe ngemlilo, nako konkhe lebekuligugu kitsi sekuyimfuhlululu nje." 
Isaiah64:12 Awu, Simakadze, emvakwako konkhe loku utawuchubeka yini utibambe? Wena utawuthula nje, usijezise ngalokungetulu kwemandla etfu?" 
Isaiah65:1 Simakadze utsi: “Ngatembula kulabo lababengazange bangicele, ngatfolwa ngulabo lababengazange sebangifune. Esiveni lesingazange silibite Libito lami, ngatsi: ‘Ngilapha, ngilapha.’" 
Isaiah65:2 Lonkhe lilanga ngelule tandla tami kubantfu labanenhloko lelukhuni, labahamba etindleleni letimbi, bacoshana nemicabango yabo," 
Isaiah65:3 bantfu labachubeka nekungicunula njalo nje embikwami ngibuka, banikele ngemihlatjelo etivandzini, batfuncise nemphepho emalatini etitini," 
Isaiah65:4 labahlala emkhatsini wemadliza, bacitse busuku babo emilindzelweni leyimfihlo, badle inyama yetingulube, nemabhodo abo aphatse bubendze benyama lengcolile ngekwemtsetfo," 
Isaiah65:5 bese batsi: ‘Suka, ungasondzeli kimi, ngobe ngingcwele kakhulu kunawe!’ Bantfu labanjalo bayintfutfu emakhaleni ami, umlilo lohlala uvutsa lilanga lonkhe." 
Isaiah65:6 “Buka la, kuhlala kubhaliwe embikwami, kutsi: Ngingeke ngibindze, kodvwa ngitakukhokhela ngalokugcwele, ngitakukhokhela ematsangeni abo," 
Isaiah65:7 yebo, tono tabo netono taboyise,” kusho Simakadze. “Njengobe bashisa imihlatjelo etintsabeni, bangihlambalata emagcumeni, ngiyawukala umvuzo wabo ngiwehlisele ematsangeni abo ngalokuphelele, ngenca yetono tabo takadzeni.”" 
Isaiah65:8 Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: “Njengobe kutfolakala luju lwemagelebisi esikhehleni semagelebisi, bantfu batsi: ‘Ungasibulali, kusekhona lokuhle kuso,’ ngitakwenta kanjalo nami ngenca yetinceku tami; ngingeke ngitibhubhise tonkhe." 
Isaiah65:9 Ngiyawuveta titukulwane kuJakobe, nakuJuda labo labayawuba tindlalifa tetintsaba tami; sive sami lesikhetsiwe siyawutidla, tinceku tami tiyawuhlala lapho." 
Isaiah65:10 ISharoni iyawuba lidlelo lemihlambi yetimvu netimbuti, kutsi Sigodzi sase-Akhori sibe yindzawo yekuphumula imihlambi yetinkhomo, yebantfu bami labangifunako." 
Isaiah65:11 “Kodvwa nine lenilahla Simakadze, nikhohlwe intsaba yami lengcwele, nine lenendlala litafula nendlalele sithico lesinguNhlanhla, nigcwalise tindziwo ngeliwayini lelididiyelwe, nitigcwalisele sithico lesinguSimiselo," 
Isaiah65:12 ngiyawunimisela inkemba, nonkhe niyawukhotsamela kuhlatjwa, ngobe nganibita, kodvwa anizange nisabele, ngakhuluma, kodvwa anizange nilalele. Nenta lokubi emehlweni ami, nakhetsa loko lokungangijabulisi.”" 
Isaiah65:13 Ngako-ke naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, itsi: “Tinceku tami tiyawudla, kodvwa nine niyawulamba; tinceku tami tiyawunatsa, kodvwa nine niyawukoma; tinceku tami tiyawujabula, kodvwa nine niyawuhlazeka, nijabhe." 
Isaiah65:14 Tinceku tami tiyawuhlabela ngenca yekujabula lokuphuma etinhlitiyweni tato; kodvwa nine niyawukhala ngenca yekudzabuka kwetinhlitiyo, nilile ngenca yekudzabuka kwemoya." 
Isaiah65:15 Libito lenu niyawulishiya kulabakhetsiwe bami libe sicalekiso: iNkhosi Simakadze iyawunibulala. Kodvwa tinceku tayo iyawutinika lelinye libito. 
Isaiah65:16 Lowo loncenga sibusiso eveni uyawutibusisa ngaNkulunkulu lowetsembekile; lowo lowenta sifungo eveni uyawufunga ngaNkulunkulu lowetsembekile. Ngobe tinhlupheko letendlulile tiyawukhohlakala, tifihlakale emehlweni ami.”" 
Isaiah65:17 “Buka la, ngiyawudala emazulu lamasha nemhlaba lomusha. Tintfo takadzeni tingeke tikhunjulwe, futsi tingeke tisabuya nasengcondvweni." 
Isaiah65:18 Kodvwa jabulani nitfokote phakadze naphakadze ngaloko lengiyawukudala, ngobe iJerusalema ngiyawuyidala ibe yintfokoto, nebantfu bayo babe yinjabulo." 
Isaiah65:19 Ngiyawutfokota ngeJerusalema, ngijabule ngebantfu bami, umsindvo wekulila newekukhala awuyiwuphindza uvakale kuyo." 
Isaiah65:20 “Kungeke kuphindze kube nemntfwana kuyo loyawuphila emalangana lambalwa, nome kube nelichegu lelingeke likhule lize likhokhobe. Umuntfu loyakufa aneminyaka lelikhulu ngebudzala uyawutsatfwa ngekutsi abesemusha, lowo longayiwufika eminyakeni lelikhulu budzala uyawutsatfwa ngekutsi ucalekisiwe." 
Isaiah65:21 Bantfu bayakwakha tindlu, bahlale kuto, bayawuhlanyela tivini, badle titselo tato." 
Isaiah65:22 Bangeke baphindze bakhe tindlu, bese kuhlala labanye bantfu kuto, nome bahlanyele, bese kudla labanye. Ngobe njengemalanga esihlahla ayawuba njalo-ke nemalanga ebantfu bami. Labakhetsiwe bami bayawutijabulisa sikhatsi lesidze ngemisebenti yetandla tabo." 
Isaiah65:23 Bangeke bashikanekele lite nome batale bantfwana labayawudliwa sehlakalo; ngobe bayawuba sive lesibusiswe nguSimakadze, bona kanye netitukulwane tabo." 
Isaiah65:24 Bayawutsi bangakangibiti, ngisabele, bayawutsi basakhuluma, ngive." 
Isaiah65:25 Imphisi nelizinyane lemvu kuyawudla edlelweni linye, nelibhubesi liyawudla tjani njengenkhomo, kodvwa lutfuli luyawuba kudla kwenyoka. Kute lokuyawulimata nalokuyawuba yingoti kuyo yonkhe intsaba yami lengcwele,” kusho Simakadze." 
Isaiah66:1 Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: “Lizulu lisihlalo sami sebukhosi, umhlaba usenabelo setinyawo tami. Iphi-ke lendlu leningangakhela yona? Itawuba kuphi-ke indzawo yami yekuphumula?" 
Isaiah66:2 Tonkhe letintfo atikentiwa sandla sami yini, kuze kutsi tibe khona?” kusho Simakadze. “Ngulowo-ke mine lengimatisako, lowo lotfobekile nalodzabukile emoyeni, nalolitfutfumelelako livi lami." 
Isaiah66:3 Batikhetsele tindlela tabo: Lowo lonikela ngemhlatjelo wenkunzi ufanana nemuntfu lobulala indvodza, nalowo lonikela ngelizinyane lemvu ufanana nemuntfu lowephula intsamo yenja. Lowo lowenta umnikelo walokutinhlavu ufanana nemuntfu lonikela ngengati yengulube, nalowo lotfuncisa imphepho yesikhumbuto ufanana nemuntfu lokhonta sithico. Imiphefumulo yabo iyatijabulisa kuleto tinengiso tabo." 
Isaiah66:4 Ngako-ke nami ngiyawukhetsa kubaphatsa ngesandla lesicinile, ngehlisele etikwabo loko labakwesabako. Ngobe ngatsi nangimemeta, kwabate losabelako; ngatsi nangikhuluma, kwabate lolalelako. Benta lokubi emehlweni ami, bakhetsa loko lokungangijabulisi.”" 
Isaiah66:5 Vanini livi laSimakadze, nine lenitfutfumeliswa livi lakhe, utsi: “Bomnakenu labanitondzako banikhiphe inyumbazana ngenca yeLibito lami, batsite: ‘Akadvunyiswe Simakadze, kuze sitewubona injabulo yenu!’ Noko bayawutseleka ngelihlazo." 
Isaiah66:6 Vanini umsindvo losedolobheni, nive nemsindvo losethempelini! Ungumsindvo waSimakadze atiphindzisela etitseni takhe ngenca yetento tato." 
Isaiah66:7 “Umfati uyabeleka yini angakahelwa? Angayitala yini indvodzana angakaze wahlaselwa ngiminjunju? 
Isaiah66:8 Ngubani lowase weva ngentfo lefanana naleyo? Ngubani lowase watibona tintfo letinjengaleto? Live lingatalwa yini ngalanga linye? Sona sive sake savela yini ngesikhashana nje? Noko iSiyoni itsite ingakaphatfwa ngumhelo yatala bantfwana bayo.” 
Isaiah66:9 Simakadze utsi: “Ngiyasiletsa yini mine sikhatsi sekubeleka ngingabe ngisakufikisa kubeleka? Ngiyasivala yini sinye nase ngifikise ekubelekeni?” kusho Nkulunkulu wakho. 
Isaiah66:10 “Tfokotani kanye neJerusalema, niyitsakasele, nonkhe nine leniyitsandzako, jabulani nayo kakhulu, nonkhe nine leniyililelako." 
Isaiah66:11 Ngobe niyawumunya kuyo, neneliswe ngemabele ayo ladvudvutako; niyawunatsa neneliseke, nitijabulise ngenala yayo lenkhulu.”" 
Isaiah66:12 Ngobe naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: “IJerusalema ngiyakuyiletsela kuthula lokuyawugobhota njengemfula, bunjinga betive bute kuyo njengemfula longenelako. Niyawumunya kuyo, netfwalwe ngumkhono wayo, nidlaliselwe emadvolweni ayo." 
Isaiah66:13 Njengemfati nakadvudvuta umntfwanakhe, nami ngiyawunidvudvuta kanjalo, nginidvudvutele eJerusalema.”" 
Isaiah66:14 Niyawutsi nanikubona loku, inhlitiyo yenu ijabule, niyawuhluma njengetjani; sandla saSimakadze siyawukwatiwa etincekwini takhe, atitfukutselele titsa takhe." 
Isaiah66:15 Bukani la, Simakadze uta ngemlilo, netincola takhe temphi tifanana nesiwunguwungwana; uyawukwehlisa intfukutselo yakhe ngalokwesabekako, nekutsetsa kwakhe kute ngemalangabi emlilo." 
Isaiah66:16 Ngobe uyakwehlulela bonkhe bantfu ngemlilo nangenkemba; labo lababulewe nguSimakadze bayawuba banyenti. 
Isaiah66:17 “Labo labatihlambululako, batingcwelisele kungena etivandzini, balandzela lowo losemkhatsini walabo labadla inyama yetingulube, nemagundvwane kanye naletinye tintfo letinengekako, bayawuphelela lapho kanyekanye,” kusho Simakadze." 
Isaiah66:18 “Mine-ke, ngenca yetento tabo nangemicabango yabo, sekusondzele kutsi ngite ngibutsele ndzawonye tonkhe tive netilwimi, khona tiyakuta tibone bukhosi bami." 
Isaiah66:19 “Ngiyawubeka sibonakaliso emkhatsini wabo, bese ngitfumela labanye balabo labaphephile etiveni: eThashishi, nakumaLibhiya, nemaLudi, labadvume ngekuba banembi ngebutjoki, naseThubhali, naseGrisi, nasetichingini letikhashane letingazange setive ngeludvumo lwami nome tibone bukhosi bami. Bayawumemetela bukhosi bami kubetive." 
Isaiah66:20 Bayawuletsa bonkhe bomnakenu, babakhipha kuto tonkhe tive, babayise entsabeni yami lengcwele eJerusalema, babe ngumnikelo kuSimakadze. Bayawubetfwala ngemahhashi, nangetincola temphi, nangetinkalishi, nangeminyuzi, nangemakamela,” kusho Simakadze. “Bayawuta nabo njengema-Israyeli nakaletsa iminikelo yawo yalokutinhlavu ngetitja letihlantekile ngekwemtsetfo, ateyetfula ethempelini laSimakadze." 
Isaiah66:21 Ngiyawukhetsa labanye emkhatsini wabo ngibente babe baphristi nemaLevi,” kusho Simakadze." 
Isaiah66:22 Simakadze utsi: “Njengobe emazulu lamasha nemhlaba lomusha lengikudalako kuyawuhlala kukhona embikwami, kanjalo libito lakho netitukulwane takho tiyawuhlala tikhona." 
Isaiah66:23 Kusukela ekwetfwaseni kwenyanga kuye kulelandzelako, nekusukela kulelinye liSabatha kuye kulelinye, bonkhe bantfu bayakuta bakhotsame embikwami,” kusho Simakadze." 
Isaiah66:24 “Bayawuphumela ngephandle babuke tidvumbu talabo labangihlubukile; imphetfu lebadlako ngeke ife, kanjalo nemlilo lobashisako ungeke ucinywe, bayakwenyanyeka kubo bonkhe bantfu.”" 
Jeremiah1:1 Emavi aJeremiya, umsa waHilkiya, lomunye webaphristi base-Anathothi, eveni lakaBhenjamini." 
Jeremiah1:2 Livi laSimakadze lefika kuye emnyakeni weli-13 wekubusa kwaJosaya, umsa wa-Amoni, inkhosi yakaJuda;" 
Jeremiah1:3 labuye lefika futsi ngesikhatsi sekubusa kwaJehoyakimu, umsa waJosaya, inkhosi yakaJuda, kwaze kwaba yinyanga yesihlanu emnyakeni weli-11 wekubusa kwaSedekiya, umsa waJosaya, inkhosi yakaJuda, ngesikhatsi sekutfunjwa kwebantfu baseJerusalema." 
Jeremiah1:4 Livi laSimakadze lefika kimi, latsi:" 
Jeremiah1:5 “Ngisengakakubumbi esitalweni senyoko ngakwati, watsi usengakatalwa, ngavele ngakwehlukanisela; ngakubeka kutsi ube ngumphrofethi etiveni.”" 
Jeremiah1:6 Mine ngaphendvula ngatsi: “Awu, Nkhosi Simakadze, mine angikwati kukhuluma; ngisengumntfwana.”" 
Jeremiah1:7 Kodvwa Simakadze wakhuluma kimi, watsi: “Ungasho kutsi, ‘ngisengumntfwana.’ Kufanele uhambe uye kubo bonkhe bantfu lengikutfuma kubo, ufike usho loko lengikutfuma kona." 
Jeremiah1:8 Ungabesabi, ngobe mine nginawe, futsi ngiyawukuphephisa,” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah1:9 Simakadze wase welula sandla sakhe watsintsa umlomo wami, watsi kimi: “Manje-ke, sengifake emavi ami emlonyeni wakho." 
Jeremiah1:10 Buka la, lamuhla ngikubeka etikwetive nasetikwemibuso kutsi usiphule ubuye uhhihlite; ubhidlite ubuye uketule, nekutsi wakhe ubuye uhlanyele.”" 
Jeremiah1:11 Livi laSimakadze lefika kimi, latsi: “Jeremiya, ubonani?” Mine ngaphendvula ngatsi: “Ngibona ligala lesihlahla se-alimondi.”" 
Jeremiah1:12 Simakadze wakhuluma kimi, watsi: “Ubone kahle impela, ngobe ngicaphele kona kutsi livi lami ligcwaliseke.”" 
Jeremiah1:13 Livi laSimakadze laphindza lefika kimi, latsi: “Ubonani?” Mine ngaphendvula ngatsi: “Ngibona libhodo lelibilako, litjekile lafulatsela inyakatfo.”" 
Jeremiah1:14 Simakadze wakhuluma kimi, watsi: “Kusukela ngasenyakatfo kutawutfululwa inhlekelele, itseleke kubo bonkhe labahlala kulelive." 
Jeremiah1:15 Sekusedvutane kutsi ngibite tonkhe tive temibuso yangasenyakatfo,” kusho Simakadze. “Emakhosi ato ayakuta, atewumisa tihlalo tawo tebukhosi ekungeneni kwemasango aseJerusalema. Ayakuta ahlasele lonkhe lubondza loluyitungeletile kanye nawo onkhe emadolobha akaJuda." 
Jeremiah1:16 Ngiyawukhipha tigwebo tami esiveni sami ngenca yabo bonkhe bubi baso: ngekungifulatsela kwaso, ngekutfuncisa imphepho kulabanye bonkulunkulu, nangekukhonta loko lokwentiwe tandla tabo." 
Jeremiah1:17 “Tilungiselele! Sukuma ukhulume kubo konkhe loko lengikutfume kona. Ungabesabi, ngobe ngingahle ngikwetfuse lapha embikwabo." 
Jeremiah1:18 Lamuhla ngikwente waba lidolobha leliyinqaba, waba yinsika yensimbi nelubondza lwelitfusi kutsi utewumelana nalo lonkhe live; umelane nemakhosi akaJuda, netiphatsimandla takhona, nebaphristi bakhona kanye nesive sonkhe sakulelo live." 
Jeremiah1:19 Bayakulwa nawe, kodvwa bangeke bakwehlule, ngobe mine nginawe, futsi ngiyawukwelekelela,” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah2:1 Livi laSimakadze lefika kimi, latsi:" 
Jeremiah2:2 “Hamba uyewumemetela eJerusalema, ukhulume beva utsi: Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: “ ‘Ngiyakukhumbula kutinikela kwakho ebusheni bakho, kutsi wawungitsandza kanjani usengumakoti, wangilandzela kulo lonkhe lihlane, eveni lelalingakahlanyelwa lutfo." 
Jeremiah2:3 Israyeli abengcwele kuSimakadze, tilinga tesivuno sakhe; bonkhe labamshwabudzela babekwa licala, inhlekelele yehlela etikwabo,’ ” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah2:4 Vanini livi laSimakadze, ninendlu yakaJakobe, nonkhe nine bantfu belusendvo lwendlu yaka-Israyeli." 
Jeremiah2:5 Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: “Cala lini boyihlo labalitfola kimi, kutsi bangaze baphambuke kangaka kimi? Balandzela tithico letingenamsebenti, nabo sebagucuka baba lite." 
Jeremiah2:6 Abazange babute, batsi: ‘Uphi Simakadze lowasikhipha eGibhithe, wasihola sadzabula lihlane lelingenalutfo, sadzabula live lelinetingagadvu nemigedze, live lesomiso nebumnyama, live lelingahanjwa ngumuntfu nalelingahlalwa ngumunfu?’" 
Jeremiah2:7 Nganiletsa eveni lelivundzile kutsi nitewudla titselo talo kanye nesivuno salo lesinonile, kodvwa nefika nalingcolisa live lami, nenta lifa lami laba ngulelinengekako." 
Jeremiah2:8 Baphristi abazange babute, batsi: ‘Uphi Simakadze?’ Labo labafundzisa ngemtsetfo abazange bangati, nebaholi bangivukela. Baphrofethi baphrofetha ngaBhali, balandzela tithico letingenamsebenti.”" 
Jeremiah2:9 “Ngako-ke ngiyaphindza nginibeka emacala,” kusho Simakadze. “Yebo, nebantfwana bebantfwabenu ngiyawubabeka emacala." 
Jeremiah2:10 Yewelelani ngesheya niye elugwini lwaseKhithimu nibuke, tfumelani eKhedari nibukisise kahle, nibone kutsi yake yaba khona yini intfo lefanana nale:" 
Jeremiah2:11 Sive sake santjintjiselana yini ngabonkulunkulu baso? Yebo kona abasibo bonkulunkulu balutfo. Kodvwa sive sami sintjintjise ngenkhatimulo yaNkulunkulu waso, sakhonta tithico letingenamsebenti." 
Jeremiah2:12 Awu mazulu, tfutfumelani nimangale ngaloku! Yetfukani ngekwetfuka lokukhulu,” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah2:13 “Sive sami sente tono letimbili: Singishiyile mine, mtfombo wemanti ekuphila, satimbela ticojana taso emadvwaleni, ticojana letinetimbobo letingeke tiwemise emanti.”" 
Jeremiah2:14 “Kungabe Israyeli uyinceku yini nome usigcili sekutalwa? Kepha, kwentiwe yini kutsi abe yimphango?" 
Jeremiah2:15 Emabhubesi abhodlile, amhhongela. Live lakhe alente laba lihlane lelingenalutfo, emadolobha akhe ashisiwe, asala akhala libhungane." 
Jeremiah2:16 Kanjalo futsi nebantfu baseMemfisi nebaseThaphanesi bahhumbule lukhakhayi lwenhloko yakho. 
Jeremiah2:17 Ngabe anikatiletseli nine yini loku, ngalokutsi nishiye Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu ngesikhatsi asanihola kahle endleleni?" 
Jeremiah2:18 Manje niyelani eGibhithe kuyawunatsa emanti aseShihori? Kona niyeleni e-Asiriya kuyawunatsa emanti alowo Mfula? 
Jeremiah2:19 Bubi benu butanijezisa, nekuhlubuka kwenu kutanitsetsisa. Cabangani-ke nibukisise kahle kutsi kubi kangakanani nekutsi kunibabela kangakanani, nanishiya Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu, ningangesabi mine,” kusho Simakadze, Simakadze longuSomandla." 
Jeremiah2:20 “Lijoko lakho walephula, lokwa kadzeni, watidzabula tibopho takho, watsi: ‘Ngingeke ngikukhonte!’ Ngempela, kuwo onkhe emagcuma laphakeme nangaphansi kwato tonkhe tihlahla letendlala emagala ato, walala phansi, walala njengengwababane." 
Jeremiah2:21 Bengikuhlanyele njengemvini welikhetselo, weluhlobo lolucinile nalolwetsembekile. Pho, ungigucukele kanjani lokutsi bese uba ngumvini lokhohlakele longewesiganga?" 
Jeremiah2:22 Nome utigezisa ngasota usebentisa nensipho lenyenti, noko lelo chashata lelilicala lakho solomane limile embikwami,” kusho iNkhosi Simakadze." 
Jeremiah2:23 “Ungasho kanjani-ke utsi: ‘Angikangcoliswa, angikabalandzeli boBhali’? Ase ubuke kutsi watiphatsa njani esihosheni, cabangisisa ngaloko lokwentile. Ulikamela lelisikati leligijima kakhulu, leligijima lapha nalapha," 
Jeremiah2:24 unjengembongolo yesiganga, leyetayele lihlane, lehosha umoya nase ikhanuka, ngubani nje longayivimbela nase ifuna kwekhwelwa? Tonkhe tinkunzi tetimbongolo letiyicoshako atikafaneli kutsi titikhatsate, ngesikhatsi sekwekhwelwa titayitfola." 
Jeremiah2:25 Ungagijimi kuze kudzabuke ticatfulo takho nemphimbo wakho uze wome. Kodvwa wena watsi: ‘Akusiti lutfo! Ngiyatitsandza tithico tebetive, futsi tona ngitatilandzela.’ ”" 
Jeremiah2:26 “Njengobe lisela lihlazeka nase libanjiwe, kanjalo nendlu yaka-Israyeli ihlazekile, bona, nemakhosi abo, netindvuna tabo, nebaphristi babo kanye nebaphrofethi babo." 
Jeremiah2:27 Bakhuluma elugodvweni batsi: ‘Wena ungubabe wami,’ nasetjeni bakhulume batsi: ‘Wena wangitala.’ Bangifulatsele, bafihla buso babo kimi, kodvwa batsi nase bahluphekile bese batsi: ‘Kota utesisindzisa!’" 
Jeremiah2:28 Baphi kantsi labonkulunkulu benu lenatentela bona? Abete phela, nangabe banganisindzisa nanisekuhluphekeni! Maye Juda, ninabonkulunkulu labanyenti ngangemadolobha enu." 
Jeremiah2:29 “Ningibekelani emacala? Nine nonkhe ningihlubukile,” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah2:30 “Ngajezisa bantfu bakini, kodvwa akukanisiti, abakaphendvuki nasekujezisweni kwabo. Inkemba yenu ishwabudzele baphrofethi benu, njengelibhubesi lelifukutsako." 
Jeremiah2:31 “Nine balesitukulwane, zindlani ngelivi laSimakadze lelitsi: Mine bengilihlane yini ku-Israyeli, nome-ke live lebumnyama lobukhulu? Sive sami sisholani kutsi: ‘Sikhululekile kutsi singajangaza, singeke siphindze site kuwe’?" 
Jeremiah2:32 Intfombi iyabukhohlwa yini buhlalu bayo lobuligugu, nome makoti imihlobiso yakhe nakashada? Noko sive sami singikhohlwe emalanga lamanyenti langeke abalwe." 
Jeremiah2:33 Maye, unemasu ekucoshaneni nelutsandvo! Ngisho nebesifazane labangcole kabi bangafundza tindlela takho." 
Jeremiah2:34 Etingutjeni takho tekugcoka emadvodza atfola umnyombo wekuphila kwalabamphofu labangenacala, nome ungazange ubabambe bagcekeza. Noko ngetulu kwako konkhe loku," 
Jeremiah2:35 wena utsi: ‘Angati lutfo; akangitfukutseleli.’ Kodvwa mine ngitakwehlulela, ngobe utsi: ‘Angikoni lutfo.’" 
Jeremiah2:36 Utiguculelani kangaka tindlela takho? IGibhithe itakujabhisa, njengaloku wake wajabhiswa yi-Asiriya." 
Jeremiah2:37 Nawe utawusuka kuleyo ndzawo, utawusuka ujabhile, ngobe Simakadze sewubalahlile labo bewukadze ubetsemba, bangeke bakusite ngalutfo.”" 
Jeremiah3:1 “Nangabe indvodza ilahla umkayo, bese lomfati wendza kulenye indvodza, lendvodza ingabuyela yini kulomfati? Utsi kepha lelive lingete langcola lonkhe? Kodvwa utiphatsise kwengwababane ngekuphinga nemadvodza lamanyenti; manje sewungabuyela njani kimi?” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah3:2 “Phakamisela emehlo akho etulu eticongweni letingenalutfo, ubone. Ikhona yini indzawo lapho bangazange sebakulale khona? Njengalondzindzako ehlane, wahlala eceleni kwemgwaco ulindzele tiphingi. Ulingcolisile lelive ngebugwadla bakho nangekukhohlakala kwakho." 
Jeremiah3:3 Ngako-ke imvula yabanjwa langete lana, kwabate nembodlisamahlanga. Noko waba nelibunti lelomile lebugwababane, wangete wadliwa nangemahloni ngaloko." 
Jeremiah3:4 Akusiwe yini lotsandza kungibita ngekutsi: ‘Babe wami, mngani wami kwasebusheni bami?" 
Jeremiah3:5 Utangitfukutselela kokuphela yini? Lulaka lwakho lutawuchubeka kuze kube phakadze yini?’ Ukhuluma kanjalo-ke, kodvwa ube wenta konkhe lokubi longakwenta.”" 
Jeremiah3:6 Ngesikhatsi kusabusa inkhosi Josaya, Simakadze wakhuluma kimi, watsi: “Ukubonile yini lokwentiwe ngu-Israyeli longaketsembeki? “Wenyukele etulu kuwo onkhe emagcuma laphakeme, waya nangaphansi kwato tonkhe tihlahla letendlala emagala ato, waphingela khona lapho." 
Jeremiah3:7 Bengicabanga ngitsi emvakwekwenta konkhe loko, nakanjani utawubuyela kimi, kodvwa akakwenti loko, ngisho nadzadzewabo longaketsembeki, Juda, ukubonile loko." 
Jeremiah3:8 Ngamnika Israyeli longaketsembeki sitifiketi sesehlukaniso, ngamcosha ngenca yako konkhe loko kuphinga kwakhe. Noko ngakubona loko kungetsembeki kwadzadzewabo longuJuda kutsi akesabi; naye waphindze waphuma wayawuphinga." 
Jeremiah3:9 Njengobe bugwadla ba-Israyeli abusho lutfo kuye, walingcolisa live, waphinga netithico letingematje naletitigodvo." 
Jeremiah3:10 Ngetulu kwako konkhe loko, dzadzewabo longetsembeki, Juda, akazange abuyele kimi ngayo yonkhe inhlitiyo yakhe, kodvwa kwaba ngekutentisa nje,” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah3:11 Simakadze wakhuluma kimi, watsi: “Israyeli longaketsembeki ulunge kakhulu kunaJuda longaketsembeki." 
Jeremiah3:12 Hamba, umemetele lombiko ngasenyakatfo utsi: “ ‘Buya Israyeli longaketsembeki,’ kusho Simakadze. ‘Ngingeke ngisaphindza ngikuswacele, ngobe nginemusa,’ kusho Simakadze. ‘Ngingeke ngisakutfukutselela siphelane." 
Jeremiah3:13 Intfo-nje, vuma licala lakho lekutsi umhlubukile Simakadze Nkulunkulu wakho, usakate kutsandza kwakho kubonkulunkulu betive ngaphansi kwato tonkhe tihlahla letendlala emagala ato, wangete wangilalela mine,’ ” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah3:14 “Buyani, nine bantfu labangaketsembeki,” kusho Simakadze, “ngobe mine ngiyindvodza yenu. Ngiyawukhetsa munye wenu kuwo onkhe emadolobha enu, ngikhetse babili kuto tonkhe tinsendvo tenu, bese nginimikisa eSiyoni." 
Jeremiah3:15 “Ngiyawube sengininika belusi benhlitiyo yami, labayakunihola ngelwati nangekucondza." 
Jeremiah3:16 Ngalawo malanga nase nandzile naba banyenti kakhulu eveni,” kusho Simakadze, “bantfu bangeke basasho batsi: ‘Libhokisi lesivumelwane saSimakadze.’ Kungeke kusangena ngisho nasetingcondvweni tabo, futsi kungeke kukhunjulwe kugejeke, futsi kungeke kuphindze kwenteke." 
Jeremiah3:17 Ngalawo malanga iJerusalema bayawuyibita ngekutsi Sihlalo Sebukhosi SaSimakadze, tonkhe tive tiyawubutsana eJerusalema, tiyewuhlonipha Libito laSimakadze. Bangeke basayilandzela inkhani yetinhlitiyo tabo letimbi." 
Jeremiah3:18 Kulawo malanga indlu yakaJuda iyawutihlanganisa nendlu yaka-Israyeli, bete kanyekanye baphuma eveni lelingasenyakatfo, batewungena eveni lengalipha boyisemkhulu kutsi libe lifa labo.”" 
Jeremiah3:19 “Mine cobo lwami, ngatsi: ‘Bengingajabula kanjani kuniphatsisa kwemadvodzana ami, ngininike live lelifanelekile kakhulu, lifa lelihle kakhulu kwendlula tonkhe letinye tive.’ Bengicabanga ngitsi nitangibita, nitsi kimi: ‘Babe,’ ningajiki ekulandzeleni mine." 
Jeremiah3:20 Kodvwa njengemfati longaketsembeki endvodzeni yakhe, kanjalo, wenandlu yaka-Israyeli, awuketsembeki kimi,” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah3:21 Kuvakala sililo etindzaweni letiphakeme letingamili lutfo, yebo, kukhala nekuncenga kwesive saka-Israyeli, ngobe siphambukise tindlela taso, samkhohlwa Simakadze Nkulunkulu waso." 
Jeremiah3:22 “Ncandzekani sive lesingaketsembeki, ngiyawunelapha kulokuhlubuka kwenu.” “Yebo, siyakuta kuwe, ngobe wena unguSimakadze Nkulunkulu wetfu." 
Jeremiah3:23 Impela, kukhonta kwetfu tithico, yebo, kuyaluka emagcumeni nasetintsabeni kutiyenga nje. Impela insindziso yaka-Israyeli ikuSimakadze Nkulunkulu wetfu." 
Jeremiah3:24 Kusukela ebusheni betfu bonkulunkulu labangemahlazo badle titselo tetitfukutfuku tabokhokho betfu, lekungimihlambi yabo yetimvu neyetimbuti nemihlambi yabo yetinkhomo, yebo, emadvodzana abo nemadvodzakati abo." 
Jeremiah3:25 Asilale phansi ngenca yelihlazo letfu, sidliwe ngemahloni. Sonile kuSimakadze Nkulunkulu wetfu, yebo, tsine kanye nabobabe betfu; kusukela ebusheni betfu kuze kube ngulamuhla, asikamlaleli Simakadze Nkulunkulu wetfu.”" 
Jeremiah4:1 “Awu, Israyeli, nawungamane uphendvuke nje, ubuye kimi,” kusho Simakadze. “Nawungesusa letithico takho letitinengiso, lapha embikwami, ungabe usanhlanhlatseka," 
Jeremiah4:2 nawungafunga futsi kimi ngekweliciniso nangekulunga, utsi: ‘Ngifunga kuphila kwaSimakadze,’ tive-ke tiyawubusiswa ngaye tidvumise kuye futsi.”" 
Jeremiah4:3 Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze emadvodzeni akaJuda newaseJerusalema, utsi: “Limani umhlaba wenu longakalinywa, ningahlanyeli nje ekhatsi emanyeveni." 
Jeremiah4:4 Tisokeni nine kuSimakadze, sokani tinhlitiyo tenu, nitinikele kuye ngalokuphelele, nine madvodza akaJuda nesive saseJerusalema. Ngaphandle kwaloko lulaka lwami lutawucitseka luvutse njengemlilo ngenca yebubi lenibentile, luvutse, kubete nalongalucisha.”" 
Jeremiah4:5 “Memetelani kaJuda nibatjele nebaseJerusalema, nitsi: “ ‘Shayani licilongo kulo lonkhe live!’ Memetani kakhulu nitsi: ‘Butsanani ndzawonye! Asibalekeni siye emadolobheni labiyelwe.’" 
Jeremiah4:6 Hlabani inyandzaleyo kuyiwe eSiyoni! Balekani nitewusindza, ningephutisi. Ngobe ngiletsa inhlekelele lechamuka ngasenyakatfo, yebo, imbhubhiso leyesabekako.”" 
Jeremiah4:7 Libhubesi liphumile emhumeni walo; umbhubhisi wetive sewuphumele ngephandle. Selisukile endzaweni yalo, litewuphundla lelive lenu. Emadolobha enu atawuba tindzala, abete bantfu labahlala kuwo." 
Jeremiah4:8 Ngako yembatsani emasaka, khalani, nilile, ngobe intfukutselo leyesabekako yaSimakadze ayikesuki kitsi." 
Jeremiah4:9 Simakadze utsi: “Ngalelo langa, inkhosi netindvuna bayawuphelelwa ngemandla, baphristi bayawukwesaba, nebaphrofethi bayawutfutfumela.”" 
Jeremiah4:10 Ngakhuluma ngatsi: “Yebo, Nkhosi Simakadze, maye, usiyengile lesive kanye nebantfu baseJerusalema, watsi: ‘Niyawuba nekuthula,’ kwabe kungulapho inkemba isemiphinjeni yetfu.”" 
Jeremiah4:11 Ngalelo langa lesive kanye nebantfu baseJerusalema bayawutjelwa kutsiwe: “Umoya loshisako lochamuka etindzaweni letiphakeme tasehlane uhhusha ucondze kulesive sami, kodvwa hhayi kutewuhlunga nome kutewuhlambulula;" 
Jeremiah4:12 yebo, umoya lonemandla kakhulu kunaloko uphuma kimi. Manje sengimemetela sigwebo sami kubo.”" 
Jeremiah4:13 Bukelani, usondzela ukhephuka njengemafu, tincola takhe temphi tiyayalutela njengesiwunguwungwana, emahhashi akhe agijima kwendlula tinsweti." 
Jeremiah4:14 Maye kitsi, ngobe sibhujisiwe. Maye Jerusalema, geza bubi lobusenhlitiyweni yakho, khona utewusindziswa. Uyawuyifukamela kuze kube ngunini lemicabango yakho lemibi?" 
Jeremiah4:15 Liphimbo liyamemetela lichamuka kaDani, limemetela inhlekelele lesuka emagcumeni aka-Efrayimu." 
Jeremiah4:16 “Khulumani loku etiveni, nikumemetele eJerusalema, nitsi: ‘Imphi letewuvimbetela iphuma eveni lelikhashane, isuse umsindvo wekuhlaba inyandzaleyo, kutsi kuhlaselwe emadolobha akaJuda." 
Jeremiah4:17 Akaka wena Jerusalema, njengemadvodza lagadze insimi, ngobe ungihlubukile,’ ” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah4:18 “Kutiphatsa kwakho netento takho, nguko lokwehlisele loku etikwakho. Lesi sijeziso sakho. Maye, kubuhlungu bo! Maye, kuyayihlaba inhlitiyo bo!”" 
Jeremiah4:19 Maye, tinhlungu tami, tinhlungu tami! Ngiyashumpha etinhlungwini tami. Maye, kuqaqamba kwenhlitiyo yami! Inhlitiyo yami iyaqaqamba ngekhatsi kwami, ngehluleka nekubindzisa. Ngobe ngikuvile kukhala kwelicilongo, ngikuvile kuhlatjwa kwemkhosi wemphi." 
Jeremiah4:20 Inhlekelele ilandzela inhlekelele, live lonkhe lisele litindzala. Ngekucwabita kweliso emathende ami asabhidlitiwe, yebo, umkhukhu wami ngesikhashana nje." 
Jeremiah4:21 Sekuyawuze kube ngunini solomane ngibuka lesiboniso semphi, ngilalele umsindvo welicilongo?" 
Jeremiah4:22 “Bantfu bami batilima, abangati. Babantfwana labangenangcondvo, abanako nekucondza. Babochwephesha ekwenteni lokubi, abakwati kwenta lokuhle.”" 
Jeremiah4:23 Ngabuka umhlaba, wawungenasimo, ungenalutfo; ngabuka nasemazulwini, kukhanya kwawo kwase kunyamalele." 
Jeremiah4:24 Ngabuka tintsaba, nato tatinyikanyika, onkhe emagcuma abeyendza." 
Jeremiah4:25 Ngatsi ngiyabuka, ngakhandza kute muntfu, tonkhe tinyoni tesibhakabhaka tase tindizile, tabaleka." 
Jeremiah4:26 Ngatsi ngiyabuka, ngakhandza lelive lelalivundzile selilihlane, onkhe emadolobha alo abesatindzala embikwaSimakadze, embikwentfukutselo yakhe leyesabekako." 
Jeremiah4:27 Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: “Live lonkhe litawuphundleka, noko ngingeke ngilibhubhise liphele nya." 
Jeremiah4:28 Ngako-ke umhlaba utawulila, nemazulu ngetulu agucuke abe mnyama, ngobe sengikhulumile, futsi ngingeke ngibuye ngigucuke, sengincumile, futsi ngingeke ngijike.”" 
Jeremiah4:29 Kutsi nakuvakala umsindvo webagibeli bemahhashi nalabanemba ngebutjoki, onkhe emadolobha abaleke. Labanye bantfu babaleka bayewubhaca emahlatsini, labanye bekhwela etulu emadvwaleni. Onkhe emadolobha asele akhala libhungane, kute namunye lohlala kuwo." 
Jeremiah4:30 Wentani wena lobhidlitiwe? Utembatsiselani ngaletibovu klebhu wegabe nebuhlalu begolide? Emehlo akho uwagcobiseleni ngapende? Utihlobisela lite. Emashende akho ayakwedzelela, afuna kukubulala." 
Jeremiah4:31 Ngiva kukhala lokunjengekwemfati lophetfwe ngumhelo, kuquma lokunjengekwalowo lobeleka litubulo lakhe, kukhala kweNdvodzakati yaseSiyoni, lephefumulela etulu, leyelula tandla tayo itsi: “Maye, ngiyacaleka, kuphila kwami kunikelwe etandleni tebabulali.”" 
Jeremiah5:1 “Yehlani nenyuka etitaladini taseJerusalema, calatani ndzawo tonkhe nicabange kahle, phenyisisani tonkhe tinkhundla tayo. Naningakhandza nome munye nje umuntfu lowenta tintfo ngekwetsembeka, afune liciniso, ngitalitsetselela lelidolobha." 
Jeremiah5:2 Nome bakhuluma batsi: ‘Ngifunga kuphila kwaSimakadze,’ noko basafunga emanga.”" 
Jeremiah5:3 Awu Simakadze, emehlo akho akafuni lona yini liciniso? Wabashaya, kodvwa abazange babuve buhlungu, wabapitjita, kodvwa bakwala kucondziswa. Benta buso babo baba lukhuni kunelitje, bala kuphendvuka." 
Jeremiah5:4 Ngacabanga ngatsi: “Laba ngulabamphofu bodvwa, batilima, ngobe abayati indlela yaSimakadze, imiyalo lefunwa nguNkulunkulu wabo, kubo." 
Jeremiah5:5 Ngako ngiyakuya kubaholi, ngikhulume kubo, ngempela, bayayati indlela yaSimakadze, imiyalo lefunwa nguNkulunkulu wabo, kubo.” Kodvwa nabo futsi nganhlitiyonye balephula lijoko, batidzabula netibopho." 
Jeremiah5:6 Ngako-ke batawuhlaselwa libhubesi leliphuma ehlatsini, batawuphangwa yimphisi lephuma ehlane, ingwe itawubalalela endleleni edvutane nemadolobha abo; itemdzabudzabula abe ticucu nome ngubani lotsi uyaphuma, ngobe kuhlubuka kwabo kukhulu, nekweduka kwabo kunyenti." 
Jeremiah5:7 “Kufanele ngani kutsi nginitsetselele? Bantfwabenu bangishiyile mine, bafunga ngemabito abonkulunkulu labangesibo bonkulunkulu. Ngabanika konkhe lababekweswele, noko bachubeka nekuphinga, babutsana etindlini tetingwadla." 
Jeremiah5:8 Bondleke kahle, batinkunzi temahhashi lanenkhanuko, nguleyo ikhalela umfati walenye indvodza." 
Jeremiah5:9 Akukafaneli yini kutsi ngibajezise ngaloko?” kusho Simakadze. “Akukafaneli yini ngitenanele mine kulesive lesifanana nalesi? 
Jeremiah5:10 “Dzabula tivini taso utone, kodvwa ungatibhubhisi tiphele titsi nya. Waphundle emagala ato, ngobe labantfu abasibo baSimakadze." 
Jeremiah5:11 Indlu yaka-Israyeli nendlu yakaJuda betingaketsembeki nakancane nje kimi,” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah5:12 Bacale emanga ngaSimakadze batsi: “Kute latakwenta! Kute lokubi lokutasehlela, singeke siyibone inkemba nome indlala." 
Jeremiah5:13 Baphrofethi bangumoya nje, kute nelivi kubo; ngako akwenteke kubo loko labakushoko.”" 
Jeremiah5:14 Ngako naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze Nkulunkulu longuSomandla, utsi: “Njengobe bantfu bakhulume lamavi, emavi ami ngitawenta abe ngumlilo emlonyeni wakho, labantfu babe tinkhuni letitawudliwa ngiwo." 
Jeremiah5:15 Yebo, wenandlu yaka-Israyeli,” kusho Simakadze, “ngitawuletsa sive lesikhashane sitekulwa nani, sive sasendvulo lesicinile, sive lesikhuluma lulwimi leningalwati, yebo, lesikhuluma lulwimi leningaluva." 
Jeremiah5:16 Imigodla yaso injengelithuna lelivulekile, bonkhe bangemachawe lanemandla." 
Jeremiah5:17 Bayawushwabudzela sivuno senu nekudla kwenu, bashwabudzele emadvodzana nemadvodzakati enu, bashwabudzele imihlambi yenu yetimvu neyetinkhomo, bashwabudzele emavini enu nemikhiwa yenu. Lamadolobha enu labiyelwe lenetsembele kuwo batawabhubhisa ngenkemba.”" 
Jeremiah5:18 Simakadze utsi: “Noko ngisho nakulawo malanga ngingeke nginibhubhise nginicedze. 
Jeremiah5:19 Bantfu nabakubuta, Jeremiya, batsi: ‘Simakadze ukwenteleni konkhe loku kitsi?’ uyawubatjela utsi: ‘Njengobe ningishiyile mine nakhonta labanye bonkulunkulu betive eveni lenu, ngako manje seniyawukhonta betive eveni lekungesilo lenu.’ ”" 
Jeremiah5:20 “Memetelani loku endlini yaJakobe, nikumemetele nakaJuda nitsi:" 
Jeremiah5:21 Lalelani naku, nine bantfu labatilima nalabangenangcondvo, labatsi banemehlo kodvwa babe bangaboni, labatsi banetindlebe kodvwa babe bangeva:" 
Jeremiah5:22 Kufanele ningangesabi yini mine?” kusho Simakadze. “Akufanele yini nitfutfumele ebukhoneni bami? Ngenta sihlabatsi saba ngumnyele welwandle, umtsangala waphakadze lolungeke luwengce. Emagagasi angakhephuka, kodvwa angeke aphumelele, angabhodla, kodvwa angeke awengce." 
Jeremiah5:23 Kodvwa labantfu banenkhani netinhlitiyo letihlubukako, bakhweshele eceleni bahamba." 
Jeremiah5:24 Abatekhuti bona batsi: ‘Asesabe Simakadze Nkulunkulu wetfu, lowehlisa timvula tasekwindla netasentfwasahlobo, ngesikhatsi lesifanele; losinika siciniseko ngekutsi sikhatsi sekuvuna sitawufika.’" 
Jeremiah5:25 Konkhe loku kuvinjwe kona kwenu, tono tenu tinemuke lokuhle." 
Jeremiah5:26 “Emkhatsini wesive sami kukhona emadvodza lamabi labahlala bagadzile njengebantfu labetsiya tinyoni, nanjengalabo lababekela bantfu tingibe tekubabamba." 
Jeremiah5:27 Tindlu tabo tigcwele emacebo njengetindlu tetinyoni letigcwele tinyoni; sebaze banjinga baba nemandla," 
Jeremiah5:28 sebakhuluphele baze bamanyatela. Tento tabo letimbi atinamkhawulo, ababameleli labo labate boyise kutsi bangalahlwa licala, abawalweli nemalungelo alabamphofu.”" 
Jeremiah5:29 Simakadze utsi: “Akukafaneli yini kutsi ngibajezise ngaloku? Akukafaneli yini kutsi ngitenanele kulesive lesinje? 
Jeremiah5:30 “Kwenteke intfo lembi naleshacisako eveni: 
Jeremiah5:31 Baphrofethi baphrofetha emanga, baphristi baphetse ngeligunya labo, nebantfu bami bakutsandza ngaleyo ndlela. Kodvwa nitakwenta njani ekupheleni?”" 
Jeremiah6:1 “Balekani niyewubhaca, sive sakaBhenjamini! Sukani eJerusalema nibaleke! Shayani impalampala eThekhowa! Phakamisani siboniso semlilo eBhethi Hakheremu! Ngobe kulunguta inhlekelele, ichamuka ngasenyakatfo, yebo, imbhubhiso lenkhulu." 
Jeremiah6:2 Ngiyawuyibhubhisa iNdvodzakati yaseSiyoni, lenhle kangaka naleyincelencele kangaka." 
Jeremiah6:3 Iyawusukelwa belusi kanye nemihlambi yabo balwe nayo, bayawumisa emathende abo bayitungelete, ngulowo nalowo anakekele indzima yakakhe.”" 
Jeremiah6:4 Batsi: “Tilungiseleleni imphi yekubhekana nayo! Sukumani nihlasele kusesemini! Kodvwa bukani, kukhanya kwelilanga sekuyafiphala, nematfunti akusihlwa semadze." 
Jeremiah6:5 Ngako-ke sukumani, asihlasele ebusuku, sibhubhise tinqaba tayo!”" 
Jeremiah6:6 Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, utsi: “Gawulani tihlahla, nibutsise tindvundvuma tekuvimbetela iJerusalema. Lelidolobha kufanele lijeziswe; ligcwele incindzetelo." 
Jeremiah6:7 Njengemtfombo umpompota emanti awo, nalo liwukhafula kanjalo-ke umonakalo walo. Budlwangudlwangu nembhubhiso kuhokoma kulo, kugula kwalo nemanceba alo asembikwami njalo." 
Jeremiah6:8 Tsatsa seluleko, wena Jerusalema, nome-ke ngitakufulatsela nawungasitsatsi, live lakho ngilente lisale lilihlane, khona kutebate umuntfu lohlala kulo.”" 
Jeremiah6:9 Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, utsi: “Abakhukhute insali yaka-Israyeli, bayikhwimite njengemvini; phindza wendlulise sandla sakho etikwemagala, ulingise umuntfu lovuna emagelebisi.”" 
Jeremiah6:10 Ngubani nje lengingakhuluma kuye ngimecwayise? Ngubani lotangilalela? Tindlebe tabo tivalekile, kuze bangetikuva. Livi laSimakadze lisikhubekiso kubo, abajabuli ngalo." 
Jeremiah6:11 Kodvwa mine ngigcwele lulaka lwaSimakadze, futsi ngingeke ngisalubeketelela lukimi. Simakadze wase utsi kimi: “Lutfululele kubantfwana labasetitaladini, nasemajaheni labutsene ndzawonye; bonkhe bafati nemadvodza abo bayawubhajwa kulo, kanye nalabadzala labo lasebahanjelwe ngiminyaka." 
Jeremiah6:12 Tindlu tabo tiyawunikwa labanye, konkhe kanye nemasimi abo nebafati babo, nangiphindza ngelula sandla sami kulabo labahlala kulelo live,” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah6:13 “Kusukela kulomncane kakhulu kuye kulomkhulu kakhulu, bonkhe babogubhela kwesabo; baphrofethi nebaphristi bayafanana, bonkhe bayayengana." 
Jeremiah6:14 Babopha emanceba ebantfu bami kube shangatsi yintfo nje lengenamsebenti, babe batsi: ‘Kuthula, kuthula,’ kube kantsi kute nalokuthula." 
Jeremiah6:15 Kantsi banawo yini emahloni ngemanyala abo labawentako? Cha, bate nalamancane nje emahloni, abakwati ngisho nekukhophota. Ngako batakuwela kulabawile, bayawukwehliselwa phansi nangibajezisa,” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah6:16 Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: “Manini emahlanganweni etindlela, nibuke, butani tindlela takadzeni, butani kutsi nguyiphi indlela lelungile, bese nihamba ngayo, niyawutfola kuphumula kwemiphefumulo yenu. Kodvwa nine natsi: ‘Singeke sihambe ngayo.’" 
Jeremiah6:17 Ngabeka balindzi etikwenu, ngatsi: ‘Lalelani kukhala kwempalampala,’ kodvwa nine natsi: ‘Ngeke sikulalele.’" 
Jeremiah6:18 Ngako lalelani, nine tive. Caphelisisani, nani bofakazi, kutsi kuyakwenteka njani kubo." 
Jeremiah6:19 Awu mhlaba, vani! Ngitakwehlisela inhlekelele kulesive, sitselo semacebo abo, ngobe abakawalaleli emavi ami, bawala nemtsetfo wami." 
Jeremiah6:20 Nginandzabani mine nemphepho yaseSheba, nome-ke nemakha ekhalamusi lanongotelako laphuma eveni lelikhashane? Iminikelo yenu yekushiswa ayikemukeleki kimi, nemihlatjelo yenu ayingijabulisi.”" 
Jeremiah6:21 Ngako-ke naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: “Ngiyawubeka emavimbandlela embikwalesive. Boyise kanye nemadvodzana bayawukhutjwa kuwo, bomakhelwane kanye nebangani bayawubhubha.”" 
Jeremiah6:22 Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: “Buka, kuta imphi, lechamuka eveni langasenyakatfo, sive lesikhulu sichukulutiwe, sisukela emikhawulweni yemhlaba." 
Jeremiah6:23 Bahlome ngebutjoki nangesikhali; banelulaka, abanamusa. Bevakala njengelwandle loludvumako, nabagijima ngemahhashi abo; beta njengebantfu labavivele imphi, batewuhlasela wena, awu, Ndvodzakati yaseSiyoni.”" 
Jeremiah6:24 Siyivile imibiko ngabo, saphela emandla, imikhono yetfu iyalenga nje kitsi, sibanjwe kudzabuka nekwesaba lokukhulu, tinhlungu letifanana netemfati lobelekako." 
Jeremiah6:25 Ningaphumeli emasimini, nome-ke nihambe emigwacweni, ngobe sitsa siphetse inkemba, kuyesabeka yonkhe indzawo." 
Jeremiah6:26 Awu, sive sami, yembatsani emasaka, nitiphucaphuce emlotseni; lilani ngekudzabuka lokukhulu, kube shangatsi kwendvodzana lekukuphela kwayo, ngobe umbhubhisi uyakusitselekela ngekushesha lokukhulu." 
Jeremiah6:27 “Ngikwente waba ngumhloli wetinsimbi, nebantfu bami bayinsimbi, khona utewucaphela utivivinye tindlela tabo." 
Jeremiah6:28 Bonkhe babonhloko ayivutfwa, nebahlubuki, bahambe bahlambalata. Balukhuni balitfusi nensimbi, bonakele bonkhe ngetento tabo letimbi." 
Jeremiah6:29 Umfutfo uyafutseka kuyesabisa, kutsi utewushisa umtfofu ngemlilo, kodvwa kucengisiselwa lite nje, ngobe laba lababi abakhishwa." 
Jeremiah6:30 Babitwa ngekutsi bayisiliva lelahlwako, ngobe mine Simakadze ngibalahlile.”" 
Jeremiah7:1 Leli livi laSimakadze lelefika kuJeremiya, latsi:" 
Jeremiah7:2 “Mani esangweni lendlu yaSimakadze; ushumayele umemetele nankha emavi: “ ‘Vanini livi laSimakadze, nonkhe nine sive sakaJuda leningena kulamasango kuyawukhonta Simakadze." 
Jeremiah7:3 Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, Nkulunkulu wema-Israyeli, utsi: Guculani tindlela tenu kanye netento tenu tilunge, khona ngiyawunivumela kutsi nihlale kulendzawo." 
Jeremiah7:4 Ningawetsembi lamagama langemanga nitsi: “Leli lithempeli laSimakadze, lithempeli laSimakadze, lithempeli laSimakadze!”" 
Jeremiah7:5 Nanitigucula ngempela tindlela tenu netento tenu, niphatsane ngekwemtsetfocotfo," 
Jeremiah7:6 naningabacindzeteli labo bekuhamba, nalabangenaboyise, nebafelokati, ningayicitsi nengati lengenacala kulendzawo, ningabalandzeli labanye bonkulunkulu kutsi nitilimate nine," 
Jeremiah7:7 mine-ke ngiyawunenta nihlale kulendzawo, eveni lengalipha boyihlomkhulu kutsi libe labo phakadze naphakadze." 
Jeremiah7:8 Kodvwa bukani la, nine netsembele emavini langemanga nalangenamsebenti." 
Jeremiah7:9 “ ‘Nisetakweba yini, nibulale, niphinge, nifungele emanga, nitfuncise imphepho kuBhali, nilandzele labanye bonkulunkulu leningazange senibati," 
Jeremiah7:10 bese niyeta nitewuma lapha embikwami kulendlu leneLibito lami, nitsi: “Siphephile,” kambe niphephele kutsi nente tonkhe letintfo letisinengiso?" 
Jeremiah7:11 Kungabe lendlu, leneLibito lami, seyigucuke yaba ngumhume wabosidlani yini lapha kini? Kodvwa bengisolomane ngibuka! Kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah7:12 “ ‘Hambani nyalo niye endzaweni leseShilo, lapho ngacala khona kwenta indzawo yekubeka Libito lami, nibone kutsi ngentani kuyo ngenca yebubi besive sami, ema-Israyeli." 
Jeremiah7:13 Ngesikhatsi nenta tonkhe letintfo, bengikhuluma kini njalonjalo ngaletintfo, kodvwa anikangilaleli; nginibitile, kodvwa anikasabeli, kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah7:14 Ngako-ke loko lengakwenta eShilo, ngisetakwenta nanyalo kulendlu lebitwa ngeLibito lami, lelithempeli lenetsembele kulo, nendzawo lengayipha nine kanye naboyihlomkhulu." 
Jeremiah7:15 Ngitanikhipha lapha ebukhoneni bami nginilahle, njengaloku ngenta kubomnakenu, sonkhe sive saka-Efrayimu.’ ”" 
Jeremiah7:16 “Ngako-ke, wena Jeremiya, ungabathandazeli labantfu, futsi ungabancuseli, ungabancengeli; ungangincengi nami, ngobe ngingeke ngikuve." 
Jeremiah7:17 Awuboni yini kutsi bentani kulamadolobha akaJuda, nasetitaladini taseJerusalema?" 
Jeremiah7:18 Bantfwana batfota tinkhuni, emadvodza alumekela imililo, bafati badovana nenhlama, babhaka emakhekhe eNdlovukazi yeliZulu. Batfulula iminikelo yetinatfo kulabanye bonkulunkulu bentela kuchukuluta lulaka lwami." 
Jeremiah7:19 Kodvwa ngimi yini lona labamchukulutako? kusho Simakadze. Abatilimati bona yini, batitsele bona ngelihlazo?" 
Jeremiah7:20 “Ngako-ke naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, itsi: Intfukutselo yami kanye nelulaka lwami kutawutfululelwa etikwalendzawo, etikwebantfu netinkhomo, etikwetihlahla tesiganga kanye nasetikwetitselo temhlaba, lutawuvutsa lungaphindzi lucimeke." 
Jeremiah7:21 “Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, Nkulunkulu wema-Israyeli, utsi: Chubekani, yengetani leminikelo yenu yekushiswa kulena leminye imihlatjelo yenu, nijinge nitidlele kwanine lenyama!" 
Jeremiah7:22 Ngobe ngesikhatsi ngikhipha boyihlomkhulu eGibhithe, ngikhuluma kubo, angizange ngibanike imiyalo ngeminikelo yekushiswa nangemihlatjelo," 
Jeremiah7:23 kodvwa ngabanika umyalo lotsi: Ngilaleleni, mine-ke ngiyawuba nguNkulunkulu wenu, nine nibe sive sami. Hambani ngato tonkhe tindlela tami lenginiyale ngato, kuze kunihambele kahle." 
Jeremiah7:24 Kodvwa abazange balalele, futsi abanakanga nekunaka; esikhundleni saloko balandzela kutsambekela kwenkhani yetinhlitiyo tabo letimbi. Babuyela emuva, bangete baya embili." 
Jeremiah7:25 Kusukela ngesikhatsi lekwaphuma ngaso boyihlomkhulu eveni laseGibhithe, kuze kube ngunyalo, benginitfumelela tinceku tami baphrofethi lilanga ngelilanga njalo nje." 
Jeremiah7:26 Kodvwa abazange bangilalele, abanginakanga nekunginaka. Bacinisa tinhloko tabo, benta tono letinyenti kakhulu kunaletentiwa boyisemkhulu." 
Jeremiah7:27 “Nawubatjela konkhe loku, bangeke bakulalele; nawubabita, bangeke basabele." 
Jeremiah7:28 Ngako-ke tsani kubo: ‘Lesi sive lesingamlalelanga Simakadze Nkulunkulu waso, futsi asiphendvukanga nasicondziswa. Liciniso seliphelile; linyamalele emilonyeni yabo." 
Jeremiah7:29 Hhulani tinwele tenu, nine bantfu baseJerusalema, nitilahle, nilile sililo emagcumeni laphakeme, ngobe Simakadze usilahlile, wasishiya lesitukulwane lesingaphansi kwelulaka lwakhe.’ ”" 
Jeremiah7:30 “ ‘Sive sakaJuda sente bubi emehlweni ami, kusho Simakadze. Bagcumeke tithico tabo letitinengiso endlini lebitwa ngeLibito lami, bayingcolisa." 
Jeremiah7:31 Bakhe tindzawo letiphakeme taseThofethi eSigodzini sakaBheni Hinomu kutsi bayewushisa emadvodzana nemadvodzakati abo emlilweni, intfo lengingazange ngibayale ngayo, futsi lengazange ingene nasengcondvweni yami." 
Jeremiah7:32 Ngako-ke caphelani, ayeta emalanga, kusho Simakadze, lapho bantfu bangasayikuyibita ngekutsi yiThofethi nome batsi Sigodzi sakaBheni Hinomu, kodvwa bayawutsi Sigodzi Sekuhlatjwa, ngobe bayawungcwaba labafile eThofethi, kuze kubete indzawo." 
Jeremiah7:33 Tidvumbu talabo bantfu tiyawuba kudla kwetinyoni tasemoyeni nekwetilwane tesiganga; kuyawubate nalokuyatetfusa, aticoshe." 
Jeremiah7:34 Ngiyawucedza imisindvo yekujabula neyekutsakasa, ngicedze neliphimbo lemyeni nelamakoti emadolobheni akaJuda nasetitaladini taseJerusalema, ngobe lelive liyawusala likhala libhungane.’ ”" 
Jeremiah8:1 “ ‘Simakadze utsi: Ngaleto tikhatsi, ematsambo emakhosi newetindvuna takaJuda, nematsambo ebaphristi newebaphrofethi, nematsambo ebantfu baseJerusalema ayawususwa emadlizeni abo." 
Jeremiah8:2 Ayawukwenekwa elangeni, nasenyangeni, nakuto tonkhe tinkhanyeti tasemazulwini lababekutsandzile, bakusebentela, bakulandzela, bakufuna, bakukhotsamela. Akayiwubutfwa futsi akayiwungcwatjwa, kodvwa ayawuba njengemfucuta yetibi lelahlwe emhlabatsini." 
Jeremiah8:3 Yonkhe indzawo lapho ngiyakuyicoshela khona lensali yalesive lesibi iyawucolela kufa kunekuphila, kusho Simakadze longuSomandla.’ ”" 
Jeremiah8:4 “Khuluma kubo utsi: ‘Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: “ ‘Bantfu nabawa, bayaye bangabe basavuka yini? Umuntfu nakahlubuka, uyaye angabe asabuya yini?" 
Jeremiah8:5 Bahlubukeleni kepha labantfu? IJerusalema yentiwa yini lokuhlubuka njalo nje? Banamatsela ekuyengweni, bala kubuya." 
Jeremiah8:6 Ngibalalele kahle hle, kodvwa abakhulumi lokulungile. Kute namunye lophendvukako ebubini bakhe, atibute, atsi: “Ngenteni kantsi?” Ngulowo nalowo utihambela ngendlela yakhe njengelihhashi nalihlasela ekulweni." 
Jeremiah8:7 Ngisho nagilonki esibhakabhakeni uyatati tikhatsi takhe letimisiwe, nelituba, nenkonjane, nadvoye, kuyatigcina tikhatsi tako tekuhamba, kodvwa sive sami asitati timiso taSimakadze." 
Jeremiah8:8 “ ‘Ningasho kanjani kutsi: “Sihlakaniphile tsine, ngobe sinemtsetfo waSimakadze,” ibe kantsi lutsi lwemanga lwebabhali lukucobele phansi lokungemanga?" 
Jeremiah8:9 Labahlakaniphile bayawuhlazeka; bayawujabhiswa, babhajwe elugibeni. Njengobe balilahlile livi laSimakadze nje, banakuphi-ke kuhlakanipha?" 
Jeremiah8:10 Ngako-ke bafati babo ngibanikela kulamanye emadvodza, nemasimi abo ngiwanike labanye bantfu, kutsi abe ngewabo. Kusukela kulomncane kakhulu kuye kulomkhulu kakhulu, bonkhe babogubhela kwesabo. Baphrofethi nebaphristi bayafanana, bonkhe bayayengana." 
Jeremiah8:11 Babopha emanceba ebantfu bami, kube shangatsi yintfo nje lengenamsebenti, babe batsi: “Kuthula, kuthula,” kube kantsi kute nalokuthula." 
Jeremiah8:12 Kantsi banawo yini emahloni ngalamanyala abo labawentako? Cha, bate nalamancane nje emahloni; abakwati ngisho nekukhophota. Ngako bayakuwela kulabawile, bayakwehliselwa phansi, nabajeziswako, kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah8:13 “ ‘Simakadze utsi: Ngiyawususa sivuno sabo, kuyawubate emagelebisi emvinini. Kuyawubate emakhiwa esihlahleni semkhiwa, nemacembe aso ayawubuna. Loko lengabanika kona kuyawutsatfwa kubo.’ ”" 
Jeremiah8:14 “Sihlaleleni kantsi lapha? Butsanani ndzawonye! Asibalekeni siye emadolobheni labiyelwe, siyewufela khona! Ngobe Simakadze Nkulunkulu wetfu sewusimisele kutsi sibhubhe, wasinika emanti lanashevu kutsi siwanatse, ngobe sonile kuye." 
Jeremiah8:15 Besetsembe kuthula, kodvwa kute lokuhle lokufikile, besetsembe sikhatsi sekuphiliswa, kwefika lokwesabisako kodvwa nje." 
Jeremiah8:16 Kuthimula kwemahhashi etitsa kuyevakala kuvela kulakaDani, kukhala kwetinjomane tabo kutfutfumelisa lonkhe live. Tifikele kutawushwabudzela live nako konkhe lokukulo, lidolobha kanye nabo bonkhe labahlala kulo.”" 
Jeremiah8:17 “Buka-ke, ngitawutfumela tinyoka letinesihlungu lesibi emkhatsini wenu, tindlondlo letingeke titsetjulwe ngumuntfu titewuniluma,” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah8:18 Kute likhambi kulolusizi lwami, inhlitiyo yami iselusizini." 
Jeremiah8:19 Lalelani kukhala kwesive sami, sikhala eveni lelikhashane kakhulu, sitsi: “Simakadze akekho yini eSiyoni? Kungabe iNkhosi yayo ayikho yini lapho?” “Bangitfukutseliseleni ngaletitfombe tabo, ngaletithico tabo tebetive letingenamsebenti?”" 
Jeremiah8:20 “Kuvuna sekwendlulile, lihlobo seliphelile, kodvwa tsine asikasindziswa.”" 
Jeremiah8:21 Njengobe bantfu bami bayabhujiswa, nami ngiyabhujiswa; ngiyalila, nekwesaba kuyangintfonya." 
Jeremiah8:22 Sekute yini ibhalisamu kulakaGileyadi? Sekute yini inyanga lapho? Kepha sekute leni kuphiliswa kwemanceba ebantfu bami? 
Jeremiah9:1 Kube mane inhloko yami beyisiyalu semanti nemehlo ami abe ngumtfombo wetinyembeti, bengitawukhala busuku nemini, ngenca yekubulawa ngesihluku kwesive sami!" 
Jeremiah9:2 Kube mane benginendzawo yekuphumulela tihambi ehlane, lapho bengingashiya khona sive sami, ngisuke kuso, ngobe bonkhe batiphingi, sicumbi sebantfu labangaketsembeki." 
Jeremiah9:3 “Balola tilwimi tabo njengebutjoki, bentele kudubula emanga. Abaphumeleli ngalo liciniso eveni. Besuka esonweni baye esonweni, abanginaki nekunginaka,” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah9:4 “Caphelani bangani benu; ningabetsembi banakenu. Ngobe bonkhe bomnakenu banemanga, nabo bonkhe bangani bayayengana." 
Jeremiah9:5 Umngani uyenga bangani, kute namunye lokhuluma liciniso. Bafundzise tilwimi tabo kukhuluma emanga; bayatiphuphisa bona ngekwenta sono." 
Jeremiah9:6 Wena uhlala emkhatsini wemanga odvwa, ngalamanga abo bayala kungemukela,” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah9:7 Ngako-ke naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, utsi: “Buka la, ngitabavivinya ngibacolisise, ngobe yini lenye lengingayenta macondzana nesono sebantfu bami?" 
Jeremiah9:8 Lulwimi lwabo lungumcibisholo lobulalanako, lukhuluma emanga odvwana. Ngulowo nalowo uncempheta ngalo kumakhelwane wakhe, kantsi ngenhlitiyo umbekela lugibe." 
Jeremiah9:9 Ngingete ngabajezisa yini ngaloku?” kusho Simakadze. “Ngingete ngatiphindziselela yini mine esiveni lesifanana nalesi?” 
Jeremiah9:10 Ngiyawukhala ngililele tintsaba, ngikhihlite sililo ngenca yemadlelo asehlane. Alahliwe omile akasahanjwa ngumuntfu, nekubhonsa kwetinkhomo akusevakali. Tinyoni tasemoyeni setibalekile, netilwane tihambile." 
Jeremiah9:11 “IJerusalema ngitayenta indvundvuma yematje, ngiyente umgedze wetimphungutja. Emadolobha akaJuda ngiyakuwenta abe tindzala, kuze kubete muntfu lohlala kuwo.”" 
Jeremiah9:12 Ngubani umuntfu lohlakaniphile kangangekutsi angakucondza loku? Ngubani lofundziswe nguSimakadze kutsi angakuchaza loku? Lelive lentiwe leni laba tindzala njengelihlane lokutsi kubete muntfu lowendlula ekhatsi kulo? 
Jeremiah9:13 Simakadze watsi: “Kungenca yekutsi bawufulatsele umtsetfo wami lengababekela wona; abakangilaleli, kantsi futsi abakawulandzeli umtsetfo wami." 
Jeremiah9:14 Esikhundleni saloko, balandzele inkhani yetinhlitiyo tabo, balandzela boBhali, njengemfundziso yaboyise.”" 
Jeremiah9:15 Ngako-ke, naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, Nkulunkulu wema-Israyeli, utsi: “Buka la, labantfu ngitabadlisa kudla lokubabako, ngibanatsise emanti lanashevu." 
Jeremiah9:16 Ngiyawubasakatela emkhatsini wetive labangazange sebatati, bona kanye naboyise, ngiyawubacosha ngenkemba ngize ngibacedze.”" 
Jeremiah9:17 Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, utsi: “Caphelani-ke manje! Bitani bafati besililo kutsi bete; ngibiteleni labo labahlakaniphile babo." 
Jeremiah9:18 Abefike masinyane, batesikhihlela sililo, emehlo etfu adzimate aphophote tinyembeti; kugobhote imifula yemanti etinkhopheni tetfu." 
Jeremiah9:19 Umsindvo wesililo sewuvakele uvela eSiyoni, utsi: ‘Maye, likhulu bo lihlazo letfu! Sekufanele silishiye lelive letfu, ngobe tindlu tetfu setiyimfuhlululu.’ ”" 
Jeremiah9:20 Awu, nine labasikati, vanini livi laSimakadze. Vulani tindlebe tenu kuwo emavi laphuma emlonyeni wakhe. Fundzisani emadvodzakati enu kukhihla sililo, fundzisani ngulowo nalowo kulila." 
Jeremiah9:21 Kufa sekufohle emafasitelo etfu kwangena ngekhatsi, kwadzimate kwangena nasetinqabeni tetfu, kwancamula bantfwana lapha etindleleni, nemajaha ancamuka etinkhundleni." 
Jeremiah9:22 Tsani: “Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: “ ‘Tidvumbu temadvodza tiyawulala lunja ematsafeni njengetibi, kube shangatsi ngemabele lajutjiwe, asala ngemvakwalovunako, yebo, emabele lasala ate lowabutsako emvakwalovunako.’ ”" 
Jeremiah9:23 Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: “Lohlakaniphile akangatigabatisi ngekuhlakanipha kwakhe, kanjalo nemuntfu lonemandla akangatigabatisi ngemandla akhe, kanjalo futsi nemuntfu lonjingile angatigabatisi ngebunjinga bakhe." 
Jeremiah9:24 Kodvwa lowo lotigabatisako akatigabatise ngaloku: Kwekutsi uyangicondza, futsi uyangati mine, kutsi nginguSimakadze lophatsana ngemusa, ehlulele ngekwemtsetfocotfo, abuse nangekulunga emhlabeni, ngobe ngiyajabula-ke kuloko,” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah9:25 Simakadze umemetela utsi: “Lalela ngikutjele! Ayeta emalanga, lapho ngiyawujezisa bonkhe labasoke enyameni kuphela," 
Jeremiah9:26 baseGibhithe, nebakaJuda, nebaka-Edomu, nebaka-Amoni, nebakaMowabi, nabo bonkhe labahlala ehlane etindzaweni letikhashane. Ngobe tonkhe leto tive empeleni atikasoki, ngisho nayo yonkhe indlu yaka-Israyeli ayikasoki enhlitiyweni.”" 
Jeremiah10:1 Vanini lokushiwo nguSimakadze kini, ninendlu yaka-Israyeli." 
Jeremiah10:2 Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: “Ningatifundzi tindlela tebetive nome-ke netfuswe tibonakaliso letisesibhakabhakeni, nome ngabe tive tiyatfutfumela ngato." 
Jeremiah10:3 Ngobe emasiko etive akanamsebenti, bajuba sihlahla ehlatsini, bese kutsi umbati usibata ngelishizolo lakhe," 
Jeremiah10:4 bakuhlobise ngesiliva nangegolide, bakutsekeletele ngehhamela nangetipikili, kuze kungetiwuntengetela." 
Jeremiah10:5 Njengemlindzansimi esivandzini semajoti, letithico tabo atikwati kukhuluma, kudzingeka tize tetfwalwe, ngobe atikwati kutihambela. Ningatesabi, tingeke tinente lutfo lolubi, kantsi futsi kute naloluhle letingalwenta.”" 
Jeremiah10:6 Awu, Simakadze umkhulu, kute lonjengawe; nemandla eLibito lakho makhulu kakhulu." 
Jeremiah10:7 Ngubani longete akuhlonipha wena, awu, wena Nkhosi yetive? Lolu ludvumo lolufanele wena. Kute namunye lofanana nawe, kuto tonkhe tihlakaniphi tetive, nakuyo yonkhe imibuso yato." 
Jeremiah10:8 Tonkhe atinangcondvo tetfwele bulima, tifundziswa tithico letingenamsebenti tetigodvo." 
Jeremiah10:9 Isiliva legcotjiwe iyaletfwa isuka eThashishi, negolide legcotjiwe isuka e-Ufazi. Loko lokubatwe ngumbati nangumbumbi wetegolide, kubese kwembatsiswa letiluhlata njengesibhakabhaka naletibukhwebeletane, konkhe kwakhiwe tingcweti." 
Jeremiah10:10 Kodvwa Simakadze nguyena Nkulunkulu sibili, unguNkulunkulu lophilako, iNkhosi yaphakadze. Nakatfukutsele yena, kutfutfumela umhlaba, tive atikhoni kumelana nelulaka lwakhe." 
Jeremiah10:11 “Batjele naku: ‘Labonkulunkulu labangazange sebalibumbe lizulu nemhlaba, batawubhubha baphele emhlabeni, ngisho nangaphansi kwemazulu.’ ”" 
Jeremiah10:12 Kodvwa Nkulunkulu wawudala umhlaba ngemandla akhe lamakhulu; wesekela umhlaba ngekuhlakanipha kwakhe, weneka emazulu ngekucondza kwakhe." 
Jeremiah10:13 Utsi nakabhavumula, emanti asemazulwini advume; ukhuphula emafu emikhawulweni yemhlaba. Utfumela imibane kanye nemvula, akhiphe umoya lohhushako etingungwini takhe." 
Jeremiah10:14 Bonkhe abanangcondvo, futsi abanalwati, bonkhe babumbi betegolide bahlazekile ngetithico tabo. Titfombe tabo tiyinkhohliso, atinamphefumulo." 
Jeremiah10:15 Atinamsebenti walutfo, tintfo nje tekuhlekisa, kuyawutsi nakufika kwehlulelwa kwato, tibhubhe." 
Jeremiah10:16 Lowo Losabelo sakaJakobe akafanani naleti, ngobe yena unguMenti wato tonkhe tintfo, wamenta na-Israyeli, sive lesilifa lakhe, nguSimakadze Somandla libito lakhe." 
Jeremiah10:17 Butsani timphahla tenu titewusuka kulelive, nine lenihlala nivinjetelwe yimphi." 
Jeremiah10:18 Ngobe naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: “Ngalesikhatsi ngiyawubadzacata labo labakhile kulelive. Ngiyawubacindzetela ngenjabhiso lembi, kuze bakuve bonkhe.”" 
Jeremiah10:19 Maye kimi ngenca yekulimala kwami! Silondza sami aselapheki! Noko ngatitjela, ngatsi: “Lesi sifo sami, kufanele ngisibeketelele.”" 
Jeremiah10:20 Lithende lami libhidlitiwe; tonkhe tindophi talo tidzabukile. Emadvodzana ami esukile kimi, akasekho; kute namunye losasele nyalo, kute longangimisela lelithende lami, nome-ke angimisele lelidlangala lami." 
Jeremiah10:21 Belusi abanangcondvo, abambuti naSimakadze; ngako abaphumeleli, nayo yonkhe imihlambi yabo isakatekile." 
Jeremiah10:22 Lalelani! Livi lembiko liyasondzela, siphitsiphitsi lesikhulu, lesivela eveni langasenyakatfo! Utakwenta emadolobha akaJuda asale akhala libhungane, angumgedze wetimphungutja." 
Jeremiah10:23 Awu, Simakadze, ngiyati kutsi kute umuntfu lotiphatsele yena imphilo yakhe. Akusiko kwemuntfu kutsi aticondzisele yena tinyatselo takhe." 
Jeremiah10:24 Awu, Simakadze, ngicondzise, loko ukwente ngemtsetfocotfo wakho kuphela, kungabi ngekwelulaka lwakho, funa ungehlise ngidzimate ngibe lite." 
Jeremiah10:25 Tfululela lulaka lwakho etikwetive letingakwemukeli wena, etikwetive letingalibiti Libito lakho. Ngobe Jakobe timudle tamshwabudzela, timudle taze tamshwabudzela, tabhubhisa live lakhe lekutalwa." 
Jeremiah11:1 Leli livi lelefika kuJeremiya liphuma kuSimakadze, litsi:" 
Jeremiah11:2 “Lalela timiso talesivumelwane utikhulume esiveni sakaJuda nakulabo labahlala eJerusalema. 
Jeremiah11:3 Batjele kutsi: Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze Nkulunkulu waka-Israyeli, utsi: ‘Ucalekisiwe umuntfu longalaleli timiso talesivumelwane," 
Jeremiah11:4 timiso lengayala ngato bokhokho benu mhlazane ngibakhipha eGibhithe, embawuleni yemlilo loncibilikisa insimbi.’ Ngatsi: ‘Lalelani mine, nente konkhe lenginiyala ngako, khona niyawuba sive sami, nami ngibe nguNkulunkulu wenu." 
Jeremiah11:5 Mine ngiyawube ngifeza sifungo lengasenta kubokhokho benu, kutsi ngibanike live leligcwele lubisi neluju lwetinyosi,’ lekulive lenu lamuhla.” Ngaphendvula ngatsi: “Amen, Simakadze.”" 
Jeremiah11:6 Simakadze wakhuluma kimi, watsi: “Wamemetele onkhe lamavi emadolobheni akaJuda nasetitaladini taseJerusalema, utsi: ‘Lalelani timiso talesivumelwane, nitilandzele." 
Jeremiah11:7 Kusukela ngesikhatsi lengakhipha ngaso bokhokho benu eGibhithe kuze kube ngulamuhla, ngangibayala njalo nje, ngitsi: Ngilaleleni." 
Jeremiah11:8 Kodvwa abazange bangilalele, abazange sebanginake nekunginaka, esikhundleni saloko bonkhe balandzela inkhani yetinhlitiyo tabo letimbi. Ngako ngehlisela etikwabo tonkhe ticalekiso talesivumelwane lengangibayale ngaso kutsi basilandzele kodvwa labangazange basigcina.’ ”" 
Jeremiah11:9 Ngako Simakadze wakhuluma kimi, watsi: “Kukhona luzungu emkhatsini wesive sakaJuda nakulabo labahlala eJerusalema." 
Jeremiah11:10 Babuyela etonweni tabokhokho babo, labala kulalela emavi ami. Balandzele labanye bonkulunkulu, bakhonta bona. Indlu yaka-Israyeli nendlu yakaJuda, totimbili tisephulile sivumelwane lengasenta nabokhokho bato." 
Jeremiah11:11 Ngako-ke naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: ‘Ngiyakwehlisela etikwabo inhlekelele labangeke bakhone kuyibalekela. Nome bangakhala bacele lusito kimi, ngingeke ngibalalele." 
Jeremiah11:12 Emadolobha akaJuda kanye nebantfu baseJerusalema bayawuhamba bayewukhala kubonkulunkulu labatfuncisa kubo imphepho, kodvwa bangeke babasite nakancane nje nase behlelwa ngulenhlekelele." 
Jeremiah11:13 Ninabonkulunkulu labanyenti labangangalamadolobha enu, nine maJuda; nalamalati leniwamisele kutfuncisa imphepho kuwo, niyitfuncisele sithico lesilihlazo lesinguBhali, manyenti angangetitaladi taseJerusalema.’" 
Jeremiah11:14 “Wena-ke Jeremiya, ungabathandazeli labantfu, ungabaceleli, futsi ungabancuseli, ngobe ngingeke ngilalele nase bangibita ngesikhatsi selusizi lwabo." 
Jeremiah11:15 “Lotsandzekako wami wentani ethempelini lami, ngesikhatsi enta emacebo akhe ebubi nalabanyenti? Inyama lenikelwe ingasijikisa yini sijeziso sakho? Nase wenta bubi bakho uyajabula.”" 
Jeremiah11:16 Simakadze wakubita ngekutsi wena usihlahla semncumo lesikhula kahle, lesitsela titselo letihle impela. Kodvwa ngekubhodla kwesivunguvungu lesinemandla uyakusilumeka ngemlilo, emagala aso ayakwephuka." 
Jeremiah11:17 Simakadze Somandla lowakuhlanyela, sewukumisele inhlekelele, ngobe indlu yaka-Israyeli nendlu yakaJuda tente lokubi tangicunula, ngatfukutsela ngekutfuncisa kwato imphepho kuBhali." 
Jeremiah11:18 Njengobe Simakadze alwembula luzungu lwabo kimi, ngabe sengiyalwati, ngobe ngaleso sikhatsi wangibonisa kutsi bentani." 
Jeremiah11:19 Bengifanana nelizinyane lemvu lelitfobile liyewuhlatjwa; ngangingati kutsi kantsi bese bente lisu lekungenta silo sengubo, batsi: “Asisibhubhise lesihlahla kanye netitselo taso, asimkhweshise eveni lalabaphilako, kuze libito lakhe lingaphindzi likhunjulwe.”" 
Jeremiah11:20 Kodvwa, awu, Simakadze Somandla, wena lowehlulela ngekulunga, uvivinye inhlitiyo nengcondvo, ngicela kubona wena utikhiphela sibhongo kubo, ngobe mine ngitinikele kuwe ngatilahla ematsambo." 
Jeremiah11:21 Ngako-ke naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze ngemadvodza ase-Anathothi lafunana nemphilo yami, atsi: “Ungaphrofethi ngelibito laSimakadze, funa sikubulale ngetandla tetfu,”" 
Jeremiah11:22 ngako-ke naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, utsi: “Ngitabajezisa. Emajaha abo atawubulawa ngenkemba, emadvodzana nemadvodzakati abo abulawe yindlala." 
Jeremiah11:23 Kute ngisho lencane insali leyawusala kubo, ngobe ngiyakwehlisela inhlekelele etikwemadvodza ase-Anathothi ngemnyaka wekujeziswa kwawo.”" 
Jeremiah12:1 Yebo Simakadze, wena uhlala ungcwele, nangiletsa indzaba embikwakho. Noko ngifuna kukhuluma nawe macondzana nekwehlulela kwakho. Kwentiwa yini kutsi indlela yalomubi iphumelele? Kwentiwa yini kutsi labangaketsembeki bahlale kahle bakhululekile?" 
Jeremiah12:2 Ubahlanyele, bamila; bayakhula batsele titselo. Sonkhe sikhatsi uhlala usetindzebeni temilomo yabo, kodvwa ukhashane netinhlitiyo tabo." 
Jeremiah12:3 Noko uyangati mine, Simakadze; uyangibona, uvivinye imicabango yami ngawe. Bahudvule phansi njengetimvu tiyawuhlatjwa! Babeke eceleni, ubabekele lilanga lekuhlatjwa!" 
Jeremiah12:4 Kuyawudzimate kube ngunini solomane live lihleti ligagadzekile, netjani bawo onkhe emasimi bubunile? Njengobe labo labahlala kulo bakhohlakele, tilwane netinyoni sekubhubhe kwaphela. Ngetulu kwaloko bantfu batsi: “Angeke akubone loko lokwenteka kitsi.”" 
Jeremiah12:5 “Nangabe uke wancintisana nemadvodza ngekugijima ngetinyawo bakushiya bakuhlolela, ungancintisana kanjani nemahhashi? Nawukhubatela eveni leliphephile, ungalunga kanjani emahlatsini langaseJordane?" 
Jeremiah12:6 Bomnakenu nemndeni wakenu nabo futsi bakutsengisile, baphakamisa sililo lesikhulu kakhulu ngekutsi abakufuni. Ungabetsembi nome bakhuluma kahle kuwe.”" 
Jeremiah12:7 “Ngiyakuyilahla indlu yami, ngilishiye lifa lami; ngiyawunikela lowo lengimtsandzako etandleni tetitsa takhe." 
Jeremiah12:8 Lifa lami selifanana nelibhubesi lasehlatsini kimi. Liyangihhongela; ngako ngiyalenyanya. 
Jeremiah12:9 Lifa lami alifanani yini kimi nenyoni yekuhlasela lengemabhadvubhadvu letungeletwa nguletinye tinyoni tekuhlasela? Hambani niyewubutsa tonkhe tilwane tesiganga, nitiletse titewudla." 
Jeremiah12:10 Belusi labanyenti bayawubhubhisa sivini sami, bagcobagcobe insimi yami. Batayigucula insimi yami lenhle, bayente umhlaba losigagadvu." 
Jeremiah12:11 Itakwentiwa ibe sigagadvu lesilahliwe, yebo, lesihangukile nalesisikhotsa embikwami. Yebo, lonkhe live litawuba sikhotsa, ngobe kute lonakile." 
Jeremiah12:12 Etikwawo onkhe emadvundvu latingagadvu babhubhisi bayawunyakatela, ngobe inkemba yaSimakadze iyawubadla bantfu, kusukela ngala kwelive kuye ngale kwalo, kute namunye loyawusindza." 
Jeremiah12:13 Bayawuhlanyela kolo, kodvwa bavune emanyeva; bayawutikhandla, kodvwa bangazuzi lutfo ngako. Ngako yetfwalani lihlazo ngesivuno senu, ngenca yentfukutselo leyesabekako yaSimakadze.”" 
Jeremiah12:14 Naku-ke lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: “Bonkhe labomakhelwane bami labakhohlakele labatsatsa ngendlovuyangena lifa lami lengalipha sive sami, ema-Israyeli, ngitabazuphuna kulamave abo, ngiphindze ngizuphune nendlu yakaJuda emkhatsini wabo." 
Jeremiah12:15 Kodvwa ngitawutsi ngingabazuphuna, ngiphindze ngibe nesihawu kubo ngibuyisele ngulowo nalowo eveni lakhe lekulifa lakhe." 
Jeremiah12:16 Nangabe bafundze kahle tindlela tebantfu bami base bafunga ngeLibito lami, batsi: ‘Ngifunga kuphila kwaSimakadze,’ njengaloku bake bafundzisa bantfu bami kutsi bafunge ngaBhali, bayawube sebayahlaliswa emkhatsini wesive sami." 
Jeremiah12:17 Kodvwa nangabe nome ngusiphi nje sive singalaleli, ngiyawusizuphuna sonkhe ngisibhubhise,” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah13:1 Naku lokwashiwo nguSimakadze kimi, watsi: “Hamba uyewutsenga libhande lelineni ulivunule elukhalweni lwakho, kodvwa lingawatsintsi emanti.”" 
Jeremiah13:2 Ngako ngavele ngatsenga libhande, njengobe Simakadze abeshito, ngabe sengilivunula elukhalweni." 
Jeremiah13:3 Livi laSimakadze lase liyefika kimi kwesibili, latsi:" 
Jeremiah13:4 “Tsatsa lelibhande lolitsengile lolivunule elukhalweni lwakho uhambe nyalo uye eYufrathe, ufike ulifihle khona elufantfwini lwemadvwala.”" 
Jeremiah13:5 Ngako ngahamba ngafike ngalifihla eYufrathe, njengobe Simakadze abengitjelile." 
Jeremiah13:6 Emvakwemalanga lamanyenti Simakadze wakhuluma kimi, watsi: “Hamba-ke manje uye eYufrathe, ufike utsatse lelibhande lengakutjela kutsi uyekulifihla khona.”"
