Jeremiah13:7 Ngako ngahamba ngaya eYufrathe, ngafike ngemba lelibhande ngalitsatsa kulendzawo lapho bengilifihle khona, kodvwa manje lase libhudluke kakhulu selingenamsebenti." 
Jeremiah13:8 Livi laSimakadze lase liyefika kimi, latsi:" 
Jeremiah13:9 “Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: ‘Ngalokufananako ngitalibhidlita ligcabho lakaJuda kanye neligcabho lelikhulu laseJerusalema." 
Jeremiah13:10 Labantfu lababi labalako kulalela emavi ami balandzele inkhani yetinhlitiyo tabo, balandzele labanye bonkulunkulu kutsi batewubasebentela babakhonte, bayawufanana nalelibhande, bangabi namsebenti walutfo ngalokuphelele!" 
Jeremiah13:11 Ngobe njengobe libhande livunulwa elukhalweni lwendvodza, kanjalo indlu yonkhe yaka-Israyeli kanye neyakaJuda ngitibophele kimi,’ kusho Simakadze, ‘kutsi babe sive sami lengitakwatiwa ngaso, ngibatjatwe ngaso ngidvunyiswe ngaso. Kodvwa abakangilaleli.’ ”" 
Jeremiah13:12 “Khuluma kubo utsi: ‘Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze Nkulunkulu wema-Israyeli, utsi: Leso naleso sikhumbasikhwama kufanele sigcwaliswe ngeliwayini.’ Nabakhuluma kuwe, batsi: ‘Asati yini tsine kutsi leso naleso sikhumbasikhwama kufanele sigcwaliswe ngeliwayini?’" 
Jeremiah13:13 ubobatjela, utsi: ‘Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: Bonkhe labahlala lapha eveni ngitawubagcwalisa ngekudzakwa, kanye nemakhosi lahlala esihlalweni sebukhosi saDavide, nebaphristi, nebaphrofethi, nabo bonkhe labahlala eJerusalema." 
Jeremiah13:14 Ngitabashayanisa lomunye kulomunye, boyise nemadvodzana ngalokufananako, kusho Simakadze. Ngingeke ngisivumele sihe nome sihawu nome luvelo kutsi kungivimbele ngingababhubhisi.’ ”" 
Jeremiah13:15 Vanini, nilalelisise, ningatigabatisi, ngobe Simakadze sewukhulumile." 
Jeremiah13:16 Mnikeni ludvumo Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu, asengakabuletsi bumnyama, tinyawo tenu tisengakakhubateli emagcumeni lahwalalisako. Netsembele ekukhanyeni, kodvwa utakugucula, akwente kube bumnyama lobuphatsekako, yebo, akwente kube lusizi lolujulile." 
Jeremiah13:17 Kodvwa naningalaleli, ngiyawukhala emasitseleni ngenca yeligcabho lenu. Emehlo ami ayawukhala kabuhlungu kabi agobhote tinyembeti, ngobe umhlambi waSimakadze uyawube utfunjiwe." 
Jeremiah13:18 Khuluma enkhosini nasendlovukazini, utsi: “Yehlani etihlalweni tenu tebukhosi, ngobe lemichele yenu lemanyatelako itawudzilika lapha etinhloko tenu.”" 
Jeremiah13:19 Emadolobha aseNegevu ayawuvalwa, futsi kuyawubate loyakuwavula. Juda wonkhe uyawutfunjwa, ayiswe ekudzingisweni, atsatfwe wonkhe." 
Jeremiah13:20 Phakamisani emehlo enu nibone labo labaphuma enyakatfo. Uphi lomhlambi lebewubekwe etandleni tenu, timvu lebenitigabatisa ngato?" 
Jeremiah13:21 Uyawutsini-ke ngesikhatsi Simakadze asabeka etikwakho labo lebewubetayeta kutsi babe bangani bakho? Buhlungu bungeke yini bukubambise kwemfati nakabeleka? 
Jeremiah13:22 Nawutibuta utsi: “Loku kwentekeleni kimi?” phela kungenca yetono takho letinyenti, lokutsi tidvwaba takho tidzatjulwe, nemtimba wakho uphatseke kabi." 
Jeremiah13:23 UmTopiya angasigucula yini sikhumba sakhe nome ingwe emabala ayo? Nani ningeke nikwente lokuhle, ngobe senetayele kwenta lokubi." 
Jeremiah13:24 “Ngitanisakata njengemakhoba wona lapheshulwa ngumoya wasehlane. 
Jeremiah13:25 Loku ngulokusabelo sakho, sabelo lese ngikumisele sona, ngobe sewungikhohliwe, wetsemba bonkulunkulu,” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah13:26 “Ngitawugwabula tidvwaba takho tibuye ebusweni, khona kutewubonakala bungcunu bakho:" 
Jeremiah13:27 konkhe kuphinga kwakho, nako konkhe kushangashangiswa kwakho yinkhanuko, nebugwadla bakho lobulihlazo! Ngitibonile tento takho letisinengiso emagcumeni nasetikhotseni. Awu, nako kuwe, Jerusalema! Uyawuhlala ungcolile kuze kube ngunini?”" 
Jeremiah14:1 Leli livi laSimakadze kuJeremiya macondzana nesomiso, utsi:" 
Jeremiah14:2 “Juda uyalila, emadolobha akhe ayajanqula akhalela live, yebo, kukhala kuqubuka eJerusalema." 
Jeremiah14:3 Bahlonishwa batfumela tisebenti tabo kutsi tiyewubakhelela emanti; tiya etitibeni temanti kodvwa tikhandze kute emanti. Tibuya netimbita tato temanti tingenalutfo, tijabhile futsi tiphelelwe litsemba." 
Jeremiah14:4 Umhlabatsi sewugatukile, ngobe kute imvula eveni: Balimi bayajabha, bambonye buso babo." 
Jeremiah14:5 Ngisho nenyamatane esikhotseni ilahla lizinyane layo lelisandza kutalwa, ngobe kute luhlata." 
Jeremiah14:6 Timbongolo tesiganga tima emadvundvwini lagagadzekile etintsaba tikhefutele njengetimphungutja; atisaboni nasemehlweni ngenca yekweswela luhlata.” 
Jeremiah14:7 Nome tono tetfu tisilahla ngelicala, awu Simakadze, mane wente lutfo ngenca yeLibito lakho. Ngobe kuhlubuka kwetfu kukhulu, sonile kuwe." 
Jeremiah14:8 Awu, Tsemba la-Israyeli, Msindzisi wakhe ngetikhatsi telusizi, wentelani kuba njengemfokati eveni, nanjengesihambi lesihlala busuku bunye nje?" 
Jeremiah14:9 Wentelani kufanana nemuntfu lomangele, ube njengelisotja lelite emandla ekusindzisa? Awu Simakadze, wena usemkhatsini wetfu, tsine sibitwa ngeLibito lakho, ungasilahli!" 
Jeremiah14:10 Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze ngalesive, utsi: “Bakutsandza kakhulu kuzulazula; abatibambi tinyawo tabo. Ngako Simakadze akabemukeli, nyalo sewutabukhumbula nebubi babo, abajezisele tono tabo.”" 
Jeremiah14:11 Ngako Simakadze wakhuluma kimi, watsi: “Ungakuthandazeli kuphumelela kwalabantfu." 
Jeremiah14:12 Nome bangazila, ngingeke ngikulalele kukhala kwabo; nome banganikela ngeminikelo yekushiswa nangeminikelo yalokutinhlavu, ngingeke ngibemukele. Esikhundleni saloko ngitababhubhisa ngenkemba, nangendlala, nangesifo lesibulalanako.”" 
Jeremiah14:13 Kodvwa ngatsi: “Awu Nkhosi Simakadze, baphrofethi balibala kubatjela, batsi: ‘Ningeke niyibone inkemba nome nihlushwe yindlala. Impela, ngiyakuninika kuthula lokungeke kuphele kulendzawo.’ ”" 
Jeremiah14:14 Simakadze wakhuluma kimi, watsi: “Baphrofethi baphrofetha emanga ngelibito lami. Angikabatfumi, futsi angikabatjeli, kantsi futsi angikakhulumi kubo. Baphrofetha kini imibono lengemanga, babhule, bakhonte tithico, bashumayele nenkhohliso yetingcondvo tabo." 
Jeremiah14:15 Ngako-ke, naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze ngalabaphrofethi labaphrofetha ngelibito lami, utsi: Angizange sengibatfume, noko batsi: ‘Kute inkemba nome indlala letalitsinta lelive.’ Bona labo baphrofethi bayawubhubha ngenkemba nangendlala." 
Jeremiah14:16 Labantfu labaphrofetha kubo bayawulahlelwa etitaladini taseJerusalema ngenca yendlala nenkemba. Kuyawubate namunye loyawubangcwaba, bona kanye nebafati babo, nemadvodzana nemadvodzakati abo. Ngiyawutfululela kubo inhlekelele lebafanele." 
Jeremiah14:17 “Khuluma lamavi kubo utsi: “ ‘Emehlo ami akagobhote tinyembeti busuku nemini, angakhawuli; ngobe indvodzakati yami leyintfombi sibili, sive sami, igwazwe linceba lelibi, yalinyatwa kakhulu." 
Jeremiah14:18 Nangingena eveni, ngibona labo lababulewe ngenkemba; nangingena edolobheni, ngibona umonakalo lobangwe yindlala. Umphrofethi nemphristi bahambe kanyekanye, baya eveni labangalati.’ ”" 
Jeremiah14:19 Sewumlahle kokuphela yini Juda? Umbukela phansi yini Siyoni? Usishayelani sive singete sakhona kuphiliswa nje? Sasetsemba kutsi kutawuba nekuthula nenhlalakahle, kodvwa kute nakunye lokuhle lokusehlele. Setsemba sikhatsi sekuphiliswa, kodvwa kwaba nekutfutfumela kuphela." 
Jeremiah14:20 Awu Simakadze, siyabuvuma bubi betfu kanye nelicala labobabe betfu; impela sonile kuwe." 
Jeremiah14:21 Ngenca yeLibito lakho ungasibukeli phansi, ungasenteli phansi sihlalo sakho sebukhosi bakho lobukhulu. Khumbula sivumelwane sakho lowasenta natsi, ungasephuli." 
Jeremiah14:22 Sikhona yini sona sinye setithico tebetive letingenamsebenti lesiletsa imvula? Tona tibhakabhaka ngekwato tiyatehlisa yini tihlambi temvula? Cha, nguwe, lowenta loko, Simakadze Nkulunkulu wetfu. Ngako-ke litsemba letfu likuwe, ngobe nguwe lowenta konkhe loku." 
Jeremiah15:1 Simakadze wakhuluma kimi, watsi: “Ngisho nome boMosi naSamuweli bebangema embikwami, inhlitiyo yami beyingeke iye kulesive. Bacoshe! Abesuke lapha embikwami!" 
Jeremiah15:2 Nabakubuta, batsi: ‘Sitawuyaphi?’ batjele utsi: ‘Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: “ ‘Labo labamiselwe kufa, ekufeni; labo labamiselwe inkemba, enkembeni, labo labamiselwe indlala, endlaleni, labo labamiselwe kutfunjwa, ekutfunjweni.’ ”" 
Jeremiah15:3 Simakadze utsi: “Ngiyawutfumela tinhlobo letine tebabhubhisi labatakulwa nabo: inkemba yekubulala, netinja tekuhudvulela khashane, netinyoni tasemoyeni, netilwane tesiganga tekushwabudzela nekubhubhisa." 
Jeremiah15:4 Ngiyakubenta benyanyeke kuyo yonkhe imibuso yemhlaba ngenca yaloko lokwentiwa eJerusalema nguManase, umsa waHezekiya, inkhosi yakaJuda." 
Jeremiah15:5 “Awu Jerusalema, ngubani lotakuhawukela? Ngubani lotakulilela? Ngubani loyakuma akubute kutsi unjani?”" 
Jeremiah15:6 Simakadze utsi: “Ungilahlile mine. Ulibele kuchubeka nekuhlubuka. Ngako ngitawubeka tandla tami etikwakho, ngikubhubhise, ngingeke ngisaba nesihe kuwe." 
Jeremiah15:7 Ngiyakubahlunga ngemfologo yekuhlenga ngasemasangweni emadolobha elive. Ngitawuletsa sifo nembhubhiso esiveni sami, ngobe abakatiguculi tindlela tabo." 
Jeremiah15:8 Ngiyakwenta bafelokati babo babe banyenti kwendlula sihlabatsi saselwandle. Emini ngiyawuletsa umbhubhisi loyawucondzana nabonina bemajaha, ngekushesha ngibehlisele buhlungu nekutfutfumela." 
Jeremiah15:9 Unina webantfwana labasikhombisa uyawucaleka, aphefumule kwekugcina. Lilanga liyawumshonela emini, uyawutseleka ngelihlazo, adliwe ngemahloni. Ngiyawubulala insali yesive sami ngenkemba embikwetitsa tayo,” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah15:10 Maye, make lowangitala, wangiletsa emhlabeni, indvodza, umhlaba wonkhe lowetama kumelana nayo! Angikebolekisi kantsi futsi angikeboleki, noko wonkhe umuntfu uyangicalekisa." 
Jeremiah15:11 Simakadze watsi: “Impela ngiyawukukhululela injongo lenhle, impela ngiyawukwenta titsa takho titincengele kuwe, ngetikhatsi tenhlekelele nangetikhatsi tenjabhiso." 
Jeremiah15:12 “Umuntfu angayephula yini insimbi, insimbi lephuma enyakatfo, nome litfusi?”" 
Jeremiah15:13 “Bunjinga bakho nengcebo yakho ngitayinikela ibe yimphango lengabiti lutfo ngenca yato tonkhe tono takho kulo lonkhe live lakho. 
Jeremiah15:14 Ngiyawukugcilata ngetitsa takho, eveni longalati, ngobe lulaka lwami luyawulumeka umlilo loyawuvutsa umelane nani.”" 
Jeremiah15:15 Awu Simakadze, uyacondza, ngikhumbule unginakekele. Ngiphindziselele kubahluphi bami. Uyakwati kubeketela, ungangilahleli khashane, yati kutsi ngisolwa kangakanani ngenca yakho." 
Jeremiah15:16 Emavi akho atsi nakefika kimi, ngawadla, aba yinjabulo yami nentfokoto yenhlitiyo yami, ngobe ngibitwa ngeLibito lakho, awu, Simakadze Nkulunkulu longuSomandla." 
Jeremiah15:17 Angizange sengihlale emkhambatsini webatsandzi bemadzili, angizange sengitijabulise kanye nabo. Ngahlala ngedvwana, ngobe sandla sakho sasisetikwami, wawungigcwalise ngentfukutselo enhlityweni." 
Jeremiah15:18 Kwentiwa yini kutsi iminjunju yami ingapheli, nelinceba lami libe libibitseka, futsi lingelapheki? Vele, kimi utawuba njengemfula lolite yini nanjengemtfombo lote emanti?" 
Jeremiah15:19 Ngako-ke naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: “Nawuphendvuka, ngiyawukubutsa, khona utekungikhonta; nawukhuluma emavi lafanelekile, hhayi emavi langenamsebenti, uyawuba lincusa lami. Labantfu abagucukele kuwe, kodvwa wena ungagucukeli kubo." 
Jeremiah15:20 Ngiyawukwenta ube lubondza kulesive, yebo, lubondza lwelitfusi lolucinile: bayakulwa nawe kodvwa bangeke bakwehlule, ngobe nginawe kutsi ngikwephule ngibuye ngikusindzise,” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah15:21 “Ngiyawukusindzisa etandleni talababi, ngikuhlenge ekubanjweni ngulabanelulaka.”" 
Jeremiah16:1 Livi laSimakadze lase liyefika kimi, latsi:" 
Jeremiah16:2 “Awuyikutitsatsela umfati, futsi awuyikuwatala emadvodzana nemadvodzakati kulendzawo.”" 
Jeremiah16:3 Ngobe naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze ngemadvodzana nangemadvodzakati latalelwa kulelive, nangebafati lababonina nangemadvodza laboyise, utsi:" 
Jeremiah16:4 “Bayawukufa babulawe sifo lesibulalanako. Abayiwulilelwa, futsi bangeke bangcwatjwe, kodvwa bayawuba njengemfucuta nje lelahlwe phansi. Bayawubhubha ngenkemba nangendlala, netidvumbu tabo tiyawuba kudla kwetinyoni tasemoyeni kanye nekwetilwane tesiganga.”" 
Jeremiah16:5 Ngobe naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: “Ungangeni endlini lapho kunekudla kwemngcwabo, ungayi khona kuyawukhala, nome ukhombise kuvelana nabo, ngobe sengisisusile sibusiso sami, nelutsandvo lwami kanye neluvelo lwami kulabantfu,” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah16:6 “Labaphakeme nalabaphansi bayawufela kulelive. Bangeke bangcwatjwe, futsi abayiwukhalelwa, futsi kute labayawubazilela nalabayawuhhula ngenca yabo." 
Jeremiah16:7 Kute naloyawuphekela labo labafukeme kuze batewudvudvuteka, ngisho nalonguyise nome longunina, kute naloyawubanika sinatfo sekubadvudvuta." 
Jeremiah16:8 “Ungangeni nasendlini lapho kunelidzili khona, uhlale phansi nabo, udle nabo, unatse nabo." 
Jeremiah16:9 Ngobe naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, Nkulunkulu wema-Israyeli, utsi: ‘Ngiyakwehlisela siphetfo, embikwemehlo enu nasemihleni yenu, siphetfo semisindvo yekujabula neyentfokoto, liphimbo lamakoti nelemyeni kulendzawo.’" 
Jeremiah16:10 “Nawubatjela tonkhe letintfo labantfu bese bayakubuta batsi: ‘Simakadze uwukhipheleni lomtsetfo lomelana natsi kangaka wesehlakalo lesikhulu kangaka? Soneni? Sono sini lesisentile kuSimakadze Nkulunkulu wetfu?’ 
Jeremiah16:11 Ubobe sewuyabatjela utsi: ‘Kungobe boyihlo bangilahla balandzela labanye bonkulunkulu, babasebentela, babakhonta. Bangifulatsela mine, bangete bawugcina umtsetfo wami, kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah16:12 Kodvwa nine senitiphetse kabi kakhulu kwendlula boyihlo. Bukani nje kutsi ngulowo nalowo wenu uyilandzela kanjani inkhani yenhlitiyo yakhe lembi, esikhundleni sekutsi ahloniphe mine." 
Jeremiah16:13 Ngako-ke ngitanikhipha kulelive, nginiyise eveni leningazange senilati, nine kanye naboyihlo; lapho-ke niyawufike nikhonte labanye bonkulunkulu busuku nemini, ngobe angisayikuniphatsa ngesihe.’ ”" 
Jeremiah16:14 Simakadze utsi: “Noko, ayeta emalanga, lapho bantfu bangaseyikutsi: ‘Ngifunga kuphila kwaSimakadze, lowakhipha ema-Israyeli eveni laseGibhithe,’" 
Jeremiah16:15 kodvwa bayakutsi: ‘Ngifunga kuphila kwaSimakadze, lowakhipha ema-Israyeli eveni lasenyakatfo, nakuwo onkhe emave lapho abebacoshele khona.’ Ngobe ngiyakubabuyisela kulelo live lengalinika boyisemkhulu.”" 
Jeremiah16:16 “Kodvwa nyalo sengitawutfumela badwebi babe banyenti, futsi batababamba baka-Israyeli. Emvakwaloko ngitawutfumela batingeli babe banyenti, batawubatingela yonkhe indzawo, ngisho nasetintsabeni, nasemagcumeni, nasemifantfwini yemadvwala,” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah16:17 “Emehlo ami asetikwato tonkhe tindlela tabo, atikafihlakali kimi, nesono sabo asikasitsakali emehlweni ami." 
Jeremiah16:18 Ngitabaphindzisela ngalokuphindziwe ngenca yetono tabo nangebubi babo, ngobe balingcolisile live lami ngetinhlobonhlobo tetitfombe tabo letingenamphefumulo, bagcwalisa lifa lami ngetithico tabo letinengekako.”" 
Jeremiah16:19 Awu Simakadze, mandla ami nesiphephelo sami, nqaba yami ngesikhatsi sekuhlupheka, tive tiyakuta kuwe tisuka emikhawulweni yonkhe yemhlaba, titsi: “Bobabe betfu babengenalutfo ngaphandle kwabonkulunkulu labalite, tithico letingenamsebenti letingazange setibentele lutfo loluhle." 
Jeremiah16:20 Umuntfu angatentela yini bonkulunkulu bakhe? Yebo, kodvwa abasibo bonkulunkulu!”" 
Jeremiah16:21 “Ngako-ke ngitabafundzisa, yebo, kulesikhatsi ngitabafundzisa emandla ami, yebo, emandla ami lamakhulu. Batawube sebayati-ke kutsi mine nginguSimakadze libito lami.”" 
Jeremiah17:1 “Sono saJuda sicoshwe ngelutsi lwensimbi, sabhalwa ngesihloko sedayimane etibhebheni tetinhlitiyo tabo nasetimphondvweni temalati abo." 
Jeremiah17:2 Ngisho nebantfwababo bakhumbula emalati abo netinsika tabo-Ashera, eceleni kwetihlahla letendlala emagala ato, nasemagcumeni laphakeme," 
Jeremiah17:3 nasetintsabeni tesiganga. Bunjinga benu nayo yonkhe imicebo yenu ngiyakuyisaphata njengemphango, kanye netindzawo tenu letiphakeme, ngenca yetono kulo lonkhe live lenu." 
Jeremiah17:4 Ngenca yemacala enu niyawulahlekelwa lifa lenganinika lona. Ngitanigcilata ngetitsa tenu eveni leningalati, ngobe niluchukulutile lulaka lwami, futsi lutanivutsela phakadze naphakadze.”" 
Jeremiah17:5 Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: “Ucalekisiwe umuntfu lowetsembela kumuntfu, umuntfu lowencike emandleni alomunye umuntfu, nalonhlitiyo yakhe imfulatsela Simakadze." 
Jeremiah17:6 Uyawufanana nesihlahla eveni lelingenalutfo; angeke ayibone imphumelelo nayitako. Uyawulibala kuhlala emacwatseni etindzawo tasehlane, eveni lelimunyu, lapho kukhala libhungane khona." 
Jeremiah17:7 “Kodvwa ubusisiwe umuntfu lowetsembela kuSimakadze, lotsemba lakhe linguSimakadze." 
Jeremiah17:8 Uyawufanana nesihlahla lesihlanyelwe ngasemfuleni wemanti, lesenabisela timphandze taso ngasemfuleni. Asesabi nakuta kushisa, emacembe aso ahlala aluhlata. Asihlupheki nangemnyaka wesomiso, asihlali singatseli titselo taso.”" 
Jeremiah17:9 Inhlitiyo iyayengana ngetulu kwato tonkhe tintfo, futsi yonakele ngalokwengcile. Ngubani nje longayicondza?" 
Jeremiah17:10 “Mine Simakadze ngiphenya inhlitiyo, ngihlolisise nengcondvo, kuze ngimvuze umuntfu njengekwekutiphatsa kwakhe nanjengekwemisebenti yakhe.”" 
Jeremiah17:11 Njengentsendzele lechobosele emacandza lengakawataleli, unjalo umuntfu lotfola bunjinga ngetindlela letingakalungi. Kuyawutsi nakasekhatsi nekhatsi nemphilo yakhe bumhlamuke, ekugcineni abonakale asasilima." 
Jeremiah17:12 Sihlalo lesicwebetelako sebukhosi lesaphakanyiswa kusukela ekucaleni, yindzawo yetfu lengcwele." 
Jeremiah17:13 Awu, Simakadze, tsemba lema-Israyeli, bonkhe labakushiyako bayawuhlazeka. Labo labakufulatselako bayawubhalwa elutfulini, ngobe bamshiyile Simakadze, umtfombo wemanti laphilako." 
Jeremiah17:14 Awu, Simakadze, ngelaphe, ngitawuphila, ngephule, ngitawusindziswa, ngobe nguwe lengimdvumisako." 
Jeremiah17:15 Balibala kungibuta batsi: “Liphi livi laSimakadze? Aligcwaliseke-ke nyalo!” 
Jeremiah17:16 Angikakubalekeli kuba ngumelusi wakho, uyati kutsi angikalilangateleli lilanga lekuphelelwa litsemba. Loko lokwendlula etindzebeni temlomo wami kusebaleni emehlweni akho." 
Jeremiah17:17 Ungabi silwane kimi, ngobe usiphephelo sami ngelilanga lesehlakalo." 
Jeremiah17:18 Bahluphi bami abatseleke ngelihlazo, kodvwa mine ungikhweshise ehlazweni, abesatjiswe bona, kodvwa mine ngingesatjiswa. Yehlisela etikwabo lilanga lenhlekelele, babhubhise ngembhubhiso lephindvwe kabili." 
Jeremiah17:19 Naku lokwashiwo nguSimakadze kimi, watsi: “Hamba ume esangweni lalabantfu, lapho emakhosi akaJuda aphuma angena khona, ume nakuwo onkhe emasango aseJerusalema." 
Jeremiah17:20 Batjele, utsi: ‘Vanini livi laSimakadze, nine makhosi akaJuda, nani nonkhe bantfu bakaJuda, nani nonkhe lenihlala eJerusalema, leniphuma ningena kulamasango." 
Jeremiah17:21 Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: Caphelani ningawetfwali umtfwalo ngeliSabatha, nome niwungenise emasangweni aseJerusalema." 
Jeremiah17:22 Ningayetfwali imitfwalo niphume nayo etindlini tenu, nome-ke nente leminye nje imisebenti ngeliSabatha, kodvwa gcinani lilanga leliSabatha libe ngcwele, njengaloku ngayala boyihlomkhulu." 
Jeremiah17:23 Noko abazange bangilalele, abanginakanga nekunginaka; baba nenkhani, bangete bangilalela, futsi abazange baphendvuke nome sebajeziswa." 
Jeremiah17:24 “ ‘Simakadze utsi: Kodvwa nanicaphela ningilalele ningete nangenisa imitfwalo emasangweni alelidolobha nakuliSabatha, kodvwa nigcine liSabatha lingcwele, ngekungenti namunye umsebenti ngalelo langa," 
Jeremiah17:25 ngako-ke emakhosi lahlala esihlalweni sebukhosi saDavide, ayawungena ngemasango alelidolobha akanye netindvuna tawo. Wona kanye netindvuna tawo ayawuta agibele tincola temphi kanye nemahhashi, baphekeletelwa bantfu bakaJuda nalabo labahlala eJerusalema; lelidolobha seliyawuhlala linebantfu phakadze naphakadze." 
Jeremiah17:26 Bantfu bayawuchamuka emadolobheni akaJuda, kanye nasetabelweni letitungelete iJerusalema, naseveni lakaBhenjamini, nasemaceleni angasenshonalanga, naseveni letintsaba, naseNegevu, beta baletsa iminikelo yekushiswa nemihlatjelo, neminikelo yalokutinhlavu, nemphepho kanye neminikelo yekubonga endlini yaSimakadze." 
Jeremiah17:27 Kodvwa naningangilaleli mine, kutsi nigcine liSabatha lami lingcwele ngekutsi ningetfwali nalomncane umtfwalo ngesikhatsi nisangena emasangweni aseJerusalema ngeliSabatha, ngako ngiyawube sengilumeka umlilo longacimeki emasangweni aseJerusalema, loyawudla netinqaba tayo.’ ”" 
Jeremiah18:1 Leli livi lelefika kuJeremiya liphuma kuSimakadze, litsi:" 
Jeremiah18:2 “Yehlela endlini yembumbi, ngulapho-ke lapho ngitakunikela khona umlayeto wami.”" 
Jeremiah18:3 Ngako-ke ngehlela endlini yembumbi, ngamkhandza enta umsebenti wakhe esondvweni." 
Jeremiah18:4 Kodvwa imbita labeyibumba ngelibumba yonakala etandleni takhe, ngako lombumbi wase ubumba lenye inhlobo yembita, kwaya ngekubona kwemehlo akhe kutsi ufuna ibe njani." 
Jeremiah18:5 Livi laSimakadze lase liyefika kimi, latsi:" 
Jeremiah18:6 “Awu, wenandlu yaka-Israyeli, ngingete ngenta yini kini njengaloku kwenta lombumbi?” kusho Simakadze. “Njengelibumba etandleni tembumbi, ninjalo nani esandleni sami, ninendlu yaka-Israyeli." 
Jeremiah18:7 Nome ngangusiphi sikhatsi nangimemetela kutsi sive nome umbuso utawuzushunwa, ubhidlitwe uze ubhubhe," 
Jeremiah18:8 nangabe futsi leso sive lengisecwayisile siphendvuka ebubini baso, ngiyawube sengiyasiyekela, ngingabe ngisasehlisela leso sehlakalo lebesengisilungisele sona." 
Jeremiah18:9 Futsi-ke nangabe ngalesinye sikhatsi sengimemetela kutsi sive nome umbuso utakwakhiwa usime kahle," 
Jeremiah18:10 nase sibuye senta bubi emehlweni ami, sangete sangilalela mine, ngiyawube sengiyasiyekela ngingabe ngisasentela loko lokuhle lebesengikulungisele sona." 
Jeremiah18:11 “Manje-ke khuluma kulabantfu bakaJuda nakulabo labakhile eJerusalema, utsi: ‘Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: Bukani la, ngilungiselela kunehlisela inhlekelele, nginibumbele luzungu. Ngako-ke phendvukani etindleleni tenu letimbi, ngulowo nalowo wenu aphendvuke, nitigucule tindlela tenu netento tenu.’" 
Jeremiah18:12 Kodvwa bayawuphendvula batsi: ‘Akunamsebenti. Sitatichubekela ngemasu etfu, ngulowo nalowo wetfu utatichubekela ngenkhani yenhlitiyo yakhe lembi.’ ”" 
Jeremiah18:13 Ngako-ke naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: “Butani kuletinye tive nitsi: ‘Ngubani lowake weva ngentfo lenje?’ Intfo leyesabeka kakhulu yentiwe yiNtfombi lengu-Israyeli." 
Jeremiah18:14 Sitfwatfwa saseLebanoni sake sanyamalala yini emawukeleni ayo langemadvwala? Emanti awo lapholile, latiyalu tawo tikhashane, ake ema yini angete ageleta?" 
Jeremiah18:15 Noko sive sami singilahlile mine; satfuncisa imphepho etithicweni letingenamsebenti, letabakhubatelisa etindleleni tabo nasemikhondvweni yakadzeni. Tabahambisa ngetindlela letijubako nangemigwaco lengakakhiwa kahle." 
Jeremiah18:16 Live labo liyawusala likhala libhungane, libe yintfo yekuba yinhlekisa; bonkhe labendlulako bayawumangala banikine tinhloko." 
Jeremiah18:17 Njengemoya wasemphumalanga, ngiyawubasakata embikwetitsa tabo; ngiyawubafulatsela, ngingabheki ngakubo, ngelilanga lesehlakalo sabo.”" 
Jeremiah18:18 Batsi: “Wotani sente lisu ngaJeremiya, ngobe imfundziso yemtsetfo lefundziswa baphristi ngeke ize iphele, naleteluleko tetihlakaniphi, nalelivi leliphuma kubaphrofethi. Ngako buyani simhlasele ngemagama etfu, singayinaki yonkhe lentfo layishoko.”" 
Jeremiah18:19 Awu Simakadze, ngiyacela ungilalele! Vani kutsi batsini, bahluphi bami!" 
Jeremiah18:20 Kufanele yini kutsi lokuhle kukhokhelwe ngalokubi? Noko bangimbele umgodzi. Khumbula kutsi ngema embikwakho ngabancengela kuwe kutsi ngincandze lulaka lwakho kubo. 
Jeremiah18:21 Ngako-ke nikela bantfwababo endlaleni, banikele emandleni enkemba. Yenta bafati babo bemukwe bantfwababo babe bafelokati, emadvodza abo akabulawe ngesifo lesibulalanako, emajaha abo ajutjwe ngenkemba emphini." 
Jeremiah18:22 Akuvakale kukhala emakhaya abo, ngesikhatsi nawutfumela bahlaseli kubo, ngobe bangimbele umgodzi wekungigcumukisela, bangibekele tingibe tekungigila." 
Jeremiah18:23 Awu Simakadze, kodvwa wena uyawati onkhe lamasu abo labafuna kungibulala ngawo. Ungawatsetseleli lamacala abo, futsi-ke ungacali utesule leto tono tabo embikwakho. Abaketulwe embikwakho, bavukele ngesikhatsi sentfukutselo yakho." 
Jeremiah19:1 Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: “Hamba uyewutsenga ludziwo lapha kumbumbi. Tsatsa labanye balabadzala kanye nebebaphristi," 
Jeremiah19:2 uphumele eSigodzini sakaBheni Hinomu, lesisekungeneni kweLisango leLudzengelo. Ufike lapho umemetele nangu umlayeto lengikutjela wona," 
Jeremiah19:3 utsi: ‘Vanini nali livi laSimakadze, nine makhosi akaJuda, nani bantfu baseJerusalema. Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, Nkulunkulu wesive sema-Israyeli, utsi: Lalelani! Ngitakwehlisela inhlekelele kulendzawo letakwenta kutsi tonkhe tindlebe letiyakuva ngayo tilume." 
Jeremiah19:4 Ngobe bangishiyile mine, benta lendzawo yaba yabonkulunkulu betive, bashise imihlatjelo kuyo kubonkulunkulu labangabati, bona kanye naboyisemkhulu, ngisho nemakhosi akaJuda, bagcwalise lendzawo ngengati lengenacala." 
Jeremiah19:5 Bakhe tindzawo letiphakeme tekukhontela boBhali, bentela kushisa emadvodzana abo emlilweni abe ngiminikelo kuBhali, intfo lengingazange sengibayale ngayo futsi lengingazange sengiyisho, nalengazange seyifike nasengcondvweni yami." 
Jeremiah19:6 Ngako-ke caphelani, ayeta emalanga lapho bantfu bangasayikuyibita khona lendzawo ngekutsi yiThofethi nome batsi Sigodzi sakaBheni Hinomu, kodvwa sebayawutsi Sigodzi Sekuhlatjwa, kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah19:7 “ ‘Emacebo akaJuda ngiyakuwahhihlitela kulendzawo kanye newaseJerusalema. Ngiyawubenta bawe ngenkemba embikwetitsa tabo, ngetandla talabo labatfungatsana netimphilo tabo, ngiyawunika tidvumbu tabo tibe kudla kwetinyoni tasemoyeni kanye nekwetilwane tesiganga." 
Jeremiah19:8 Ngiyawulibhidlita lelidolobha, ngilente libe yintfo yekuhlekisa; bonkhe labendlulako bayawumangala kakhulu, bahleke lusulu ngenca yemanceba alo." 
Jeremiah19:9 Ngiyawubenta badle inyama yemadvodzana abo neyemadvodzakati abo, badle ngulowo nalowo inyama yemnakabo, ngenca yencindzetelo yekuvinjetelwa lokuyabe kwentiwa titsa letitfungatsana netimphilo tabo.’" 
Jeremiah19:10 “Bese-ke ubhidlita loludziwo embikwalabo lotabe uhamba nabo bakubukile," 
Jeremiah19:11 utsi kubo: ‘Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, utsi: Ngitasibhidlita lesive kanye nalelidolobha njengaloludziwo lwalombumbi lolubhidlitiwe, futsi lolungasayiwuphindze luvusetelwe kabusha. Bayawungcwaba labafile babo eThofethi, bagcwale kuze kubete nendzawo yekubembela." 
Jeremiah19:12 Nako-ke lengitakwenta kulendzawo nakulabo labahlala kuyo, kusho Simakadze: Lelidolobha ngitalenta lifanane neThofethi." 
Jeremiah19:13 Emakhaya laseJerusalema nalawo emakhosi akaJuda, ayawungcola njengalendzawo, iThofethi, yebo, tonkhe tindlu lapho batfuncisele khona imphepho eluphahleni, batfuncisela emabutfo etinkhanyeti tasemazulwini, batfulula iminikelo yetinatfo kulabanye bonkulunkulu!’ ”" 
Jeremiah19:14 Jeremiya wase uyancandzeka esuka eThofethi, lapho abetfunywe khona nguSimakadze kutsi ayewuphrofetha, wema esibuyeni selithempeli laSimakadze wakhuluma kubantfu watsi:" 
Jeremiah19:15 “Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, Nkulunkulu wema-Israyeli, utsi: ‘Lalelani! Ngitatehlisela kulelidolobha nakuto tonkhe tabelo talo, tonkhe tehlakalo lengitimemetelele ngabo, kumelana nabo, ngobe babe nenkhani, bangete bawalalela emavi ami.’ ”" 
Jeremiah20:1 Kwatsi umphristi Phashuri, umsa wa-Imeri, indvuna lenkhulu yasethempelini laSimakadze, nakeva Jeremiya aphrofetha ngaletintfo," 
Jeremiah20:2 watsi akushaywe Jeremiya, umphrofethi, abanjwe afakwe esitokisini lesingaseSangweni LakaBhenjamini Lelisetulu lelalisethempelini laSimakadze." 
Jeremiah20:3 Kwatsi ngakusasa nase Phashuri akhulule Jeremiya esitokisini, Jeremiya watsi kuPhashuri: “Libito lakho kuSimakadze akusesiye Phashuri, kodvwa sewunguMagori Misabibi." 
Jeremiah20:4 Ngobe nguloko lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: ‘Ngitakwenta ube sesabiso ngisho nakuwe cobo lwakho nakubo bonkhe bangani bakho; uyakubabona ngewakho emehlo bawa ngenkemba babulawa titsa tabo. Ngiyawuniketela wonkhe Juda enkhosini yaseBhabhulona, leyawubetfwala iye nabo eBhabhulona nome ibabulale ngenkemba." 
Jeremiah20:5 Ngiyawubunikela bonkhe bunjinga balelidolobha etitseni tabo, sonkhe sivuno salo, konkhe kwalo lokuligugu, nayo yonkhe ingcebo yemakhosi akaJuda. Bayakuyitsatsa bahambe nayo ibe yimphango yabo, bayetfwale baye nayo eBhabhulona." 
Jeremiah20:6 Wena-ke Phashuri, nabo bonkhe basekhaya kakho, niyawutfunjelwa eBhabhulona. Niyawufike nifele khona lapho, ningcwatjwe khona, wena kanye nabo bonkhe labangani bakho lophrofethe kubo emanga.’ ”" 
Jeremiah20:7 Awu Simakadze, wangiyenga, nami ngayengeka, wangehlula ngemandla, waphumelela. Nyalo sengiyinhlekisa kubantfu lonkhe lilanga, bonkhe bantfu bayangiphukuta." 
Jeremiah20:8 Njalo nje nangikhuluma, ngikhala ngimemetela kulwa nembhubhiso. Ngako livi laSimakadze selingitsele ngenhlamba nenhlekisa lonkhe lilanga." 
Jeremiah20:9 Kodvwa nangitsi: “Ngingeke ngisambita, futsi ngeke ngisakhuluma egameni lakhe,” livi lakhe lisenhlitiyweni yami lishisa njengemlilo lovalelwe ematsanjeni ami. Sengidziniwe kulibandzetela ngekhatsi kimi, ngempela angisakhoni." 
Jeremiah20:10 Ngiva bayahebeta labanyenti batsi: “Sesabiso yonkhe indzawo! Mcebe! Asimcebe!” Bonkhe bangani bami balindzele mine kutsi ngishelele, batsi: “Mhlawumbe utawuyengeka; khona sitawube sesiyamehlula, sitiphindzisele kuye.”" 
Jeremiah20:11 Kodvwa Simakadze ume ngakimi njengelichawe lemphi lelinemandla; ngako-ke bahluphi bami bayawukhubatela, ngeke baphumelele. Batakwehluleka batseleke ngalelikhulu lihlazo, badliwe ngemahloni langayiwuphindze akhohlakale." 
Jeremiah20:12 Awu Simakadze, longuSomandla, wena lohlola lolungile, uphenye inhlitiyo nengcondvo, angikubone kuphindzisela kwakho kubo, ngobe indzaba yami sengiyiniketele kuwe." 
Jeremiah20:13 Hlabelani kuSimakadze! Mnikeni ludvumo Simakadze! Uyatephula timphilo talabeswele, yebo, ubasindzisa etandleni talababi." 
Jeremiah20:14 Alicalekiswe lilanga lengatalwa ngalo! Lilanga langibeleka ngalo make alingabi ngulelibusisiwe! 
Jeremiah20:15 Akacalekiswe umuntfu lowabikela babe, lowamjabulisa kakhulu nakatsi: “Utalelwe umntfwana, ngumfana!”" 
Jeremiah20:16 Lowo muntfu akafanane nemadolobha labhidlitwa nguSimakadze angasenasihawu nawo. Akeve sililo ekuseni, nenhlabamkhosi emini." 
Jeremiah20:17 Ngobe akazange angibulalele esiswini, ente make wami kube ngulona thuna lami, sinye sakhe senwebeka phakadze." 
Jeremiah20:18 Ngangiphumelani vele esiswini? Ngaphumela kubona inhlupheko nelusizi, nekucedzela emalanga ami ehlazweni yini?" 
Jeremiah21:1 Livi laSimakadze lefika kuJeremiya ngesikhatsi inkhosi Sedekiya itfumela kuye boPhashuri, umsa waMalkhiya, nemphristi Zefaniya, umsa waMaseya. Bafike batsi:" 
Jeremiah21:2 “Ase usibutele nyalo kuSimakadze, ngobe naku Nebukhadnezari, inkhosi yaseBhabhulona, sewuyasihlasela. Mhlawumbe Simakadze utawusentela timanga njengasetikhatsini takadzeni, khona Nebukhadnezari atawusiyekela.”" 
Jeremiah21:3 Kodvwa Jeremiya wabaphendvula, watsi: “Tjelani Sedekiya, nitsi:" 
Jeremiah21:4 ‘Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, Nkulunkulu wema-Israyeli, utsi: Sengitanijikela ngilwe nani ngetikhali temphi letisetandleni tenu, lenitisebentisako ekulweni nenkhosi yaseBhabhulona kanye nemaBhabhulona lanivimbetele langephandle kwelubondza. Ngitatihlanganisa ndzawonye ngekhatsi kwalelidolobha." 
Jeremiah21:5 Mine matfupha ngiyakulwa nani ngesandla leselulekile, nangengalo lenemandla, nangentfukutselo, nangesikhahlo, nangelulaka lolukhulu." 
Jeremiah21:6 Ngiyawushaya labo labahlala kulelidolobha, emadvodza netilwane, bayakufa babulawe sifo lesibulalanako." 
Jeremiah21:7 Simakadze utsi: Emvakwaloko Sedekiya, inkhosi yakaJuda, netindvuna tayo, nebantfu balelidolobha labayawusindza kulesifo lesibulalanako, nenkemba, nendlala, ngiyakubanikela kuNebukhadnezari, inkhosi yaseBhabhulona, nasetitseni tabo letifunana nemphilo yabo. Uyawubabulala ngenkemba, angabi naso nakancane nje sihawu, nesihe kanye neluvela.’ ”" 
Jeremiah21:8 Simakadze wakhuluma kuJeremiya, watsi: “Tjela sive, utsi: ‘Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: Buka la, ngibeka embikwakho indlela yekuphila neyekufa." 
Jeremiah21:9 Ngulowo nalowo loyawusala kulelidolobha uyakufa ngenkemba, nangendlala, nangesifo lesibulalanako. Kodvwa ngulowo nalowo lophuma atinikele kulamaBhabhulona lanivimbetele, uyawuphila; uyawusindzisa kuphila kwakhe." 
Jeremiah21:10 Ngitimisele kwenta lokubi kulelidolobha, hhayi lokuhle, kusho Simakadze. Liyawuniketelwa etandleni tenkhosi yaseBhabhulona, ilibhubhise ngemlilo.’ ”" 
Jeremiah21:11 “Ngetulu kwaloko, khuluma kulendlu yenkhosi yakaJuda, utsi: ‘Vanini livi laSimakadze," 
Jeremiah21:12 awu, wenandlu yakaDavide, naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: “ ‘Sebentisani umtsetfocotfo njalo nje ekuseni; nimephule esandleni semcindzeteli lowo lodlelelwe; ngaphandle kwaloko intfukutselo yami itawuvuka ivutse njengemlilo ngenca yebubi lenibentile, yebo, ivutse kubete nalongayicima." 
Jeremiah21:13 Ngiphambene nawe, Jerusalema, wena lohlala ngetulu kwalesihosha entsabeni lengemadvwala, kusho Simakadze. Nine lenikhulumako, nitsi: “Ngubani nje longasihlasela? Ngubani longangena kulenqaba yetfu?”" 
Jeremiah21:14 Ngitanijezisa njengobe nifanelwe tento tenu. Emahlatsi enu ngitawokhela ngemlilo lotawucotfula konkhe lokusedvute nani, kusho Simakadze.’ ”" 
Jeremiah22:1 Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: “Yehla uye esigodlweni senkhosi yakaJuda ukhulume khona nali livi, utsi:" 
Jeremiah22:2 ‘Vani livi laSimakadze, wena nkhosi yakaJuda, wena lohlala esihlalweni saDavide sebukhosi, wena, netindvuna takho, nebantfu bakho labangena kulamasango." 
Jeremiah22:3 Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: Yentani loko lokucotfo nalokulungile. Nimephule esandleni semcindzeteli wakhe lowo lodlelelwe. Ningakwenti lokubi nome nimphatse ngebudlova lowo losihambi nalongenayise, nemfelokati, futsi ningayicitsi ingati yemuntfu longenacala kulendzawo." 
Jeremiah22:4 Nangabe ninakekele kuyenta lemiyalo, lawo makhosi lahlala esihlalweni sebukhosi saDavide ayawungena kulamasango alesigodlo, agibele tincola temphi nemahhashi, aphekeletelwa tindvuna tawo nebantfu bawo." 
Jeremiah22:5 Kodvwa nangabe aniyihloniphi lemiyalo, ngifunga ngami kutsi lesigodlo sitawuba tindzala, kusho Simakadze.’ ”" 
Jeremiah22:6 Ngobe naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze ngesigodlo senkhosi yakaJuda, utsi: “Nome ufanana neGileyadi kimi, ufanana nesicongo saseLebanoni, impela ngiyakukwenta ufanane nelihlane, ufanane nemadolobha langahlalwa ngumuntfu." 
Jeremiah22:7 Ngiyawutfumela babhubhisi batekulwa nawe, lowo nalowo ngetikhali takhe, bayakuwageca lamakabha akho lamahle emsedari bawalahle emlilweni." 
Jeremiah22:8 “Bantfu labaphuma etiveni letinyenti bayawukwendlula eceleni kwalelidolobha babutane batsi: ‘Simakadze uyenteleni intfo lenjena kulelidolobha lelikhulu kangaka?’ 
Jeremiah22:9 Imphendvulo yabo iyawutsi: ‘Kungobe basilahla sivumelwane saSimakadze Nkulunkulu wabo, bakhonta labanye bonkulunkulu, basebentela bonkulunkulu labanye.’ ”" 
Jeremiah22:10 Ningayikhaleli lenkhosi lefile, ningakulileli futsi nekulahlekelwa ngiyo, lokungenani, mkhaleleni kakhulu lowo lotfunjiwe, ngobe angeke aphindze abuye futsi, angeke aphindze alibone live lakhe latalelwa kulo." 
Jeremiah22:11 Ngobe naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze ngaShalumi, umsa waJosaya, lowalandzela uyise waba yinkhosi yakaJuda, kodvwa losahambile lapha kulendzawo, utsi: “Angeke aphindze abuye." 
Jeremiah22:12 Uyawufela kuleyo ndzawo lapho bamtfumbele khona; angeke aphindze alibone futsi lelive lakhe.” 
Jeremiah22:13 “Nako kulowo lowakha sigodlo sakhe, asakhe ngebubi, lowakha emakamelo akhe lasetulu ngebuhumusha, lowenta takhamiti takhe tisebentele lite, angatikhokheli ngekusebenta kwato." 
Jeremiah22:14 Nako kulowo lokhuluma atsi: ‘Ngitatakhela sigodlo lesikhulu lesitawuba nemakamelo lamakhulu lasetulu.’ Ngako utentela emafasitelo lamakhulu kuso asembese ngemsedari, asihlobise nangalokubovu." 
Jeremiah22:15 “Kukwenta inkhosi yini kuba nemisedari leminyenti? Uyihlo akazange abe nekudla nekwekunatsa yini? Wenta loko lokulungile nalokucotfo, ngako konkhe kwamhambela kahle." 
Jeremiah22:16 Wammelela lophuyile naloweswele, ngako konkhe kwamhambela kahle. Loko akusho kona yini kwati mine?” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah22:17 “Kodvwa emehlo akho nenhlitiyo yakho uwabeke enzuzweni lembi, ekucitseni ingati yalongenacala, yebo, nasencindzetelweni nasekudizeni.”" 
Jeremiah22:18 Ngako-ke naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze ngaJehoyakimu, umsa waJosaya, inkhosi yakaJuda, utsi: “Bangeke bamlilele, batsi: ‘Awu, mnaketfu! Awu, dzadzewetfu!’ Bangeke bamlilele, batsi: ‘Awu, nkhosi yami! Awu, buhle bakhe!’" 
Jeremiah22:19 Uyawungcatjwa njengembongolo, ahudvulwe alahlwe le khashane, ngephandle kwemasango aseJerusalema.”" 
Jeremiah22:20 “Yenyuka uye eLebanoni, umemete, liphimbo lakho alivakale eBhashani, khala use-Abarimu, ngobe bonkhe bangani bakho bapitjitiwe." 
Jeremiah22:21 Ngakwecwayisa ngesikhatsi usativela uphephile, kodvwa wena watsi: ‘Ngingeke ngilalele!’ Lena bekunguyona ndlela yakho kusukela kwasebusheni bakho, awuzange ungilalele." 
Jeremiah22:22 Umoya uyawubaphephula bonkhe belusi bakho, nebangani bakho bayawutfunjwa. Uyawuba nemahloni uhlazeke ngenca yabo bonkhe bubi bakho." 
Jeremiah22:23 Wena lohlala ‘eLebanoni,’ lotitfukuse etindlini temisedari, maye uyawufa kuquma kanjani nase wehlelwa tinhlungu, tinhlungu letifanana netemhelo wemfati nakabeleka!”" 
Jeremiah22:24 Simakadze utsi: “Kuphila kwami, ngisho nawe Jehoyakhini, msa waJehoyakimu, inkhosi yakaJuda, bewuyindandatho yeluphawu esandleni sami sekudla, nanyalo ngisengakudvonsa ngikususe." 
Jeremiah22:25 Ngitakwetfula kulabo labafuna kuphila kwakho, kulabo lobesabako, kuNebukhadnezari, inkhosi yaseBhabhulona, nakumaBhabhulona." 
Jeremiah22:26 Wena nenyoko lowakutala ngitanikhukhulela kulelinye live, lapho ningatalelwanga khona nobabili, ngulapho niyawufela khona." 
Jeremiah22:27 Ningeke niphindze nibuye kulelive lenifisa kubuyela kulo.” 
Jeremiah22:28 Lendvodza lenguJehoyakhini iyedzeleleka yini, ilibhodo lelephukile yini, nome iyintfo lengafunwa ngumuntfu yini? Pho, yena nebantfwabakhe batawukhukhulelwani bakhishwe, bese balahlelwa eveni labangalati?" 
Jeremiah22:29 Awu live, live, live, vani livi laSimakadze!" 
Jeremiah22:30 Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: “Bhalisa lendvodza njengalete umntfwana, indvodza lengeke ichume emphilweni yayo, ngobe kute lokutalwa ngiyo lokuyawuchuma, kute loyawuhlala esihlalweni sebukhosi saDavide nome aphindze abuse kaJuda.”" 
Jeremiah23:1 Simakadze utsi: “Naku kulabo belusi lababulala basakate timvu telidlelo lami!” 
Jeremiah23:2 Ngako-ke naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, longuNkulunkulu wema-Israyeli, kubelusi labelusa bantfu bami, utsi: “Njengobe senisakate lomhlambi wami nawuyisa le khashane, nangete nawunakekela, ngitanehlisela sijeziso, ngaloko lokubi lenikwentile,” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah23:3 “Mine matfupha ngiyawutibutsela lensali yemhlambi wami emaveni onkhe, lapho ngiwusakatele khona, ngiwubuyisele edlelweni lawo, lapho uyawukwandza khona, ukhule wandze ngesibalo." 
Jeremiah23:4 Ngiyawubeka etikwawo belusi labayakuwunakekela, ungeke uphindze wesabe nome wetfuswe lutfo, futsi kute nayinye leyawulahleka,” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah23:5 Simakadze utsi: “Ayeta emalanga, lapho ngiyawukuvusela khona Davide Ligala lelilungile, iNkhosi leyawubusa ngekuhlakanipha, yente lokucotfo nalokulungile eveni." 
Jeremiah23:6 Ngalawo malanga ayo Juda uyawusindziswa, na-Israyeli uyawuhlala aphephile. Leli libito lakhe layawubitwa ngalo, kutsiwe: Simakadze Kulunga Kwetfu.”" 
Jeremiah23:7 Simakadze utsi: “Ngako-ke ayeta emalanga, lapho bantfu bangeyikube basasho khona, batsi: ‘Kuphila kwaSimakadze, lowakhipha ema-Israyeli eGibhithe,’" 
Jeremiah23:8 kodvwa bayawutsi: ‘Kuphila kwaSimakadze, lowakhipha titukulwane taka-Israyeli eveni lelingasenyakatfo nakuwo onkhe emave lapho abeticoshele khona,’ tiyawube setihlala eveni lato.”" 
Jeremiah23:9 Macondzana nebaphrofethi: Inhlitiyo yami yephukile ngekhatsi kwami; onkhe ematsambo ami ayatfutfumela. Ngifanana nemuntfu lodzakiwe, yebo, umuntfu lowehlulwe liwayini, ngenca yaSimakadze nemavi akhe langcwele." 
Jeremiah23:10 Live ligcwele tiphingi; ngenca yesicalekiso live ligagadzekile, nemadlelo asehlane asahangukile. Baphrofethi balandzela bubi, basebentise ligunya labo ngalokungekho emtsetfweni." 
Jeremiah23:11 “Umphrofethi kanye nemphristi, bobabili, abakholwa kuNkulunkulu, ngisho nasethempelini ngitfola bubi babo,” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah23:12 “Ngako-ke indlela yabo itawushelela, bayawutfunjelwa ebumnyameni, lapho bayawuwela khona. Ngiyakwehlisela inhlekelele etikwabo ngemnyaka labayawujeziswa ngawo,” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah23:13 “Emkhatsini webaphrofethi baseSamariya ngayibona lentfo leyenyanyekako: Babephrofetha egameni laBhali, bedukisa bantfu bami ema-Israyeli." 
Jeremiah23:14 Emkhatsini webaphrofethi baseJerusalema ngabona intfo leyesabekako: Benta buphingi, baphile imphilo lengemanga. Bacinisa tandla talabenta lokubi, kuze kutsi kubete ngisho namunye lophendvukako ebubini bakhe. Bonkhe bafanana neSodoma kimi, bantfu baseJerusalema bafanana neGomora.”" 
Jeremiah23:15 Ngako-ke naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze Somandla macondzana nebaphrofethi, utsi: “Ngiyawubenta badle kudla lokubabako banatse nemanti lanashevu, ngobe kusukela kubaphrofethi baseJerusalema kungamesabi Nkulunkulu sekwandze nalo lonkhe live.”" 
Jeremiah23:16 Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze Somandla, utsi: “Ningakulaleli lokuphrofethwa baphrofethi kini, banigcwalisa ngematsemba langemanga. Bakhuluma imibono yetingcondvo tabo, hhayi lokuphuma emlonyeni waSimakadze." 
Jeremiah23:17 Bachubeka bakhulume kulabangedzelelako batsi: ‘Simakadze utsi: Nitawuba nekuthula.’ Kubo bonkhe labalandzela inkhani yetinhlitiyo tabo, batsi: ‘Kute lokubi lokutanehlela.’" 
Jeremiah23:18 “Kodvwa ngubani emkhatsini wabo loke wema ebandleni laSimakadze kutsi abone nome eve livi lakhe? Ngubani lolalele weva livi lakhe? 
Jeremiah23:19 Buka la, sivunguvungu saSimakadze sitawubhamuka ngelulaka lwakhe, siwunguwungwana lesihhushako sehlele etinhloko talababi." 
Jeremiah23:20 Intfukutselo yaSimakadze ingeke incandzeke, aze akufeze loko lokujongwe yinhlitiyo yakhe. Kulawo malanga letako niyawukucondzisisa kahle loko." 
Jeremiah23:21 Angizange sengibatfume labaphrofethi, noko bagijime nemilayeto yabo; angizange sengikhulume kubo, noko sebaphrofethile." 
Jeremiah23:22 Kodvwa kube bebeme ebandleni lami, ngabe bamemetele emavi ami kubantfu bami, futsi ngabe babancandzile etindleleni tabo letimbi kanye nasetentweni tabo letikhohlakele.”" 
Jeremiah23:23 Simakadze utsi: “Kantsi mine nginguNkulunkulu losedvute kuphela yini? Angisiye yini futsi Nkulunkulu lokhashane? 
Jeremiah23:24 Ukhona yini longabhaca etindzaweni letisitsele, entele kutsi ngingamboni?” kusho Simakadze. “Angikaligcwalisi yini lizulu nemhlaba?” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah23:25 “Ngikuvile loko lokushiwo baphrofethi, nabaphrofetha emanga egameni lami. Batsi: ‘Ngiphuphile! Ngiphuphile!’" 
Jeremiah23:26 Loku kutawuchubeka kuze kube ngunini etinhlitiyweni talabaphrofethi labacala emanga, labaphrofetha inkhohliso yetingcondvo tabo?" 
Jeremiah23:27 Bacabanga kutsi lamaphupho labatjelana wona atakwenta labantfu bami balikhohlwe Libito lami, njengobe naboyise balikhohlwa Libito lami ngekukhonta Bhali." 
Jeremiah23:28 Umphrofethi loneliphupho akakhulume liphupho lakhe, kodvwa lowo lonelivi lami akakhulume lona ngekwetsembeka. Ngobe empeleni emakhoba ayini nje kukolo?” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah23:29 “Livi lami alinjengawo yini umlilo? Kona alinjengaso yini sandvo, sona lesibhidlita lidvwala libe ticucu?” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah23:30 Simakadze utsi: “Ngako-ke, ngiphambene nebaphrofethi labebelana emavi lekutsiwa akhulunywe ngimi.”" 
Jeremiah23:31 Simakadze utsi: “Yebo, ngimelene nebaphrofethi labajikitisa tilwimi tabo babe bakhuluma batsi: ‘Simakadze uyakhuluma.’" 
Jeremiah23:32 Impela ngimelene nalabo labaphrofetha emaphupho langemanga,” kusho Simakadze. “Bayabalandzisa bedukise bantfu bami ngemanga abo ebudlabha; noko angikabatfumi, futsi angikababeki. Labantfu ababasiti ngalutfo ngisho nangalokuncane nje,” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah23:33 “Nangabe labantfu nome umphrofethi nome umphristi akubuta atsi: ‘Sitsini siphrofetho saSimakadze?’ ubobaphendvula utsi: ‘Siphi siphrofetho? Ngitanilahla, kusho Simakadze.’" 
Jeremiah23:34 Nangabe umphrofethi nome umphristi nome ngubani atisholo atsi: ‘Nasi siphrofetho saSimakadze,’ lowo muntfu ngiyakumjezisa kanye nemndeni wakhe." 
Jeremiah23:35 Naku nine nonkhe lenivame kukusho ngulowo nalowo kumngani wakhe nome esihlotjeni sakhe, nitsi: ‘Itsini imphendvulo yaSimakadze?’ nome: ‘Simakadze ukhulume watsini?’" 
Jeremiah23:36 Kodvwa ningacali nisisho ‘siphrofetho saSimakadze’ futsi, ngobe emavi alowo nalowo muntfu aba sembulo sakhe, ngaloko nibese niyawaguculela emavi aNkulunkulu lophilako, Simakadze Somandla, Nkulunkulu wetfu." 
Jeremiah23:37 Naku lenivame kukusho kumphrofethi, nitsi: ‘Itsini imphendvulo yaSimakadze kuwe?’ nome: ‘Simakadze ukhulumeni?’" 
Jeremiah23:38 Nome ningasho nitsi: ‘Lesi sembulo saSimakadze,’ naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze: Nasebentisa emavi latsi: ‘Lesi sembulo saSimakadze,’ lite nome nganitjela kutsi ningasho nitsi: ‘Lesi sembulo saSimakadze.’" 
Jeremiah23:39 Ngako-ke ngitanikhohlwa ngempela nginisuse ebukhoneni bami, nine kanye nalelo dolobha lenganipha lona, nine kanye naboyihlo benu." 
Jeremiah23:40 Ngitakwehlisela etikwenu lihlazo laphakadze, yebo lihlazo laphakadze lelingeke likhohlakale.”" 
Jeremiah24:1 Emvakwekutsi Jehoyakhini, umsa waJehoyakimu, inkhosi yakaJuda, netindvuna, nebakhandzi betinsimbi kanye nebabati labatingcweti kaJuda sebatfunjiwe eJerusalema bayiswa eBhabhulona nguNebukhadnezari, inkhosi yaseBhabhulona, Simakadze wangibonisa titja letimbili temakhiwa tibekwe embikwelithempeli laSimakadze." 
Jeremiah24:2 Lesinye saletitja sasinemakhiwa lamahle kakhulu, afanana nalasheshe avutfwa. Lesinye sasinemakhiwa lamabi kakhulu, amabi kangangekutsi abengeke adleke." 
Jeremiah24:3 Simakadze wangibuta watsi: “Ye Jeremiya, ubonani?” Mine ngaphendvula ngatsi: “Ngibona emakhiwa. Lawa lamahle, mahle kakhulu, kodvwa lawa lamabi, mabi kangangekutsi angeke adleke.”" 
Jeremiah24:4 Livi laSimakadze lefika kimi, latsi:" 
Jeremiah24:5 “Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, Nkulunkulu wema-Israyeli, utsi: ‘Njengalamakhiwa lamahle, labatfunjiwe bakaJuda ngibabuka kanjalo nabo, labo lengabesusa kulendzawo ngabatfumela eveni lemaBhabhulona." 
Jeremiah24:6 Emehlo ami ayawubelusa kube lusito kubo, ngiyawuphindze ngibabuyise kulelive. Ngiyawubakha ngingababhidliti; yebo, ngiyawubahlanyela ngingabazuphuni." 
Jeremiah24:7 Ngiyawubapha inhlitiyo yekwati mine kutsi mine nginguSimakadze. Bayawuba bantfu bami, mine ngibe nguNkulunkulu wabo, ngobe bayawuphendvukela kimi ngayo yonkhe inhlitiyo yabo." 
Jeremiah24:8 “ ‘Kodvwa njengalamakhiwa lamabi langadleki ngiyakwenta njalo kuSedekiya, inkhosi yakaJuda, netindvuna takhe, nensali yaseJerusalema, nome basele lapha kulelive nome bahlala eGibhithe,’ kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah24:9 ‘Ngiyawubenta babe sinengiso nesikhubekiso kuyo yonkhe imibuso yemhlaba, babe lihlazo nesiga, babe yintfo yekuhlekisa nesicalekiso, nome ngukuphi lapho ngibadzingisele khona." 
Jeremiah24:10 Ngiyawubatfumelela inkemba, nendlala kanye nesifo lesibulalanako lokuyawubehlela baze babhujiswe kulelive lengalinika bona naboyisemkhulu.’ ”" 
Jeremiah25:1 Livi lefika kuJeremiya macondzana nabo bonkhe bantfu bakaJuda emnyakeni wesine wekubusa kwaJehoyakimu, umsa waJosaya, inkhosi yakaJuda, lekwakungumnyaka wekucala wekubusa kwaNebukhadnezari, inkhosi yaseBhabhulona." 
Jeremiah25:2 Ngako Jeremiya, umphrofethi, wakhuluma kubo bonkhe bantfu bakaJuda nakubo bonkhe lababehlala eJerusalema, watsi:" 
Jeremiah25:3 Iminyaka lengema-23, kusukela emnyakeni weli-13 wekubusa kwaJosaya, umsa wa-Amoni, inkhosi yakaJuda, kuze kube ngulamuhla, livi laSimakadze belifika kimi, nami ngilikhulume kini emaphindzephindze, kodvwa anizange senilalele." 
Jeremiah25:4 Lite nome Simakadze asanitfumelele tonkhe tinceku takhe baphrofethi emaphindzephindze, anikalaleli, futsi aninakanga nekunaka." 
Jeremiah25:5 Batsi: “Gucukani nyalo, ngulowo nalowo kini, niyiyekele imihambo yenu lemibi kanye netento tenu letimbi, khona nitewuhlala kulelive Simakadze lanipha lona nine naboyihlomkhulu phakadze naphakadze." 
Jeremiah25:6 Ningabalandzeli labanye bonkulunkulu kutsi nibasebentele nikhonte bona. Ningacali ningicunule ngize ngitfukutsele ngaloko lenikwente ngetandla tenu. Khona-ke ngingeke nginilimate.” 
Jeremiah25:7 Simakadze utsi: “Kodvwa anizange ningilalele, seningicunule ngaloko lokwentiwe tandla tenu, natiletsela kulinyatwa etikwenu.”" 
Jeremiah25:8 Ngako-ke Simakadze Somandla utsi: “Njengobe ningakawalaleli emavi ami," 
Jeremiah25:9 ngitawubita tonkhe tive tangasenyakatfo kanye nenceku yami Nebukhadnezari, inkhosi yaseBhabhulona, ngibaletse batekulwa nalelive kanye netakhamiti talo nato tonkhe tive letibomakhelwane,” kusho Simakadze. “Ngiyawubabhubhisa ngibacedze nya, ngibente intfo yekwesabisa, nenhlekisa, nencitsakalo yaphakadze." 
Jeremiah25:10 Imisindvo yekujabula nekutfokota ngiyawuyisusa kubo, ngisuse nemaphimbo abomakoti nemyeni, nemsindvo wematje ekusila kanye nekukhanya kwesibane." 
Jeremiah25:11 Lonkhe live liyawusala lilihlane lelikhala libhungane, naletive tiyawukhonta inkhosi yaseBhabhulona iminyaka lengema-70." 
Jeremiah25:12 “Kodvwa kuyawutsi kungaphela leminyaka lengema-70, bese ngijezisa inkhosi yaseBhabhulona nesive sayo, nelive lemaBhabhulona, ngenca yelicala labo, bese lelive lawo ngilenta liba lihlane phakadze naphakadze,” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah25:13 “Lelive ngiyawuliletsela tonkhe letintfo lengikhulume ngato letimelene nalo, ngilehlisele konkhe lokubhalwe kulencwadzi kwaphrofethwa nguJeremiya ngato tonkhe letive." 
Jeremiah25:14 Bona matfupha bayawugcilatwa tive letinyenti nangemakhosi lamakhulu. Ngiyawubakhokhela ngaloko lokubafanele ngetento tabo nangemsebenti wetandla tabo.” 
Jeremiah25:15 Naku-ke lokwashiwo nguSimakadze Nkulunkulu wema-Israyeli kimi, watsi: “Tsatsa lapha esandleni sami nansi inkomishi legcwele liwayini lentfukutselo yami, bese unatsisa tonkhe letive lengikutfumela kuto kutsi tilinatse." 
Jeremiah25:16 Titawutsi tingalinatsa, bese tiyadzayitela, tihlanye, ngenca yenkemba lengitayitfumela emkhatsini wato.”" 
Jeremiah25:17 Ngako ngatsatsa lenkomishi esandleni saSimakadze nganatsisa tonkhe letive Simakadze labengitfumele kuto: 
Jeremiah25:18 IJerusalema nemadolobha akaJuda, emakhosi netindvuna tawo, kubenta kutsi babe yincitsakalo, nentfo yekwesabisa neyekuhlekisa, nesicalekiso, njengobe banjalo nalamuhla;" 
Jeremiah25:19 Faro, inkhosi yaseGibhithe, netinceku takhe, netiphatsimandla takhe kanye nabo bonkhe bantfu bakhe," 
Jeremiah25:20 nabo bonkhe bantfu betive labalapho; onkhe emakhosi ase-Usi; onkhe emakhosi emaFilisti e-Ashkeloni, nase-Gaza, nase-Ekroni, nebantfu labasele e-Ashdodi;" 
Jeremiah25:21 bonkhe baka-Edomu, nebakaMowabi, nebaka-Amoni;" 
Jeremiah25:22 onkhe emakhosi aseThire naseSidoni; emakhosi langaselugwini ngesheya kwelwandle; 
Jeremiah25:23 iDedani, neThema, neBuze, nabo bonkhe labasetindzaweni letikhashane;" 
Jeremiah25:24 onkhe emakhosi ase-Arabiya kanye nawo onkhe emakhosi ebantfu betive labahlala ehlane; 
Jeremiah25:25 nawo onkhe emakhosi aseZimri, newase-Elamu, newaseMediya;" 
Jeremiah25:26 nawo onkhe emakhosi asenyakatfo, edvutane nakhashane, lenye emvakwalenye, nayo yonkhe imibuso lesebusweni bemhlaba. Kuyawutsi emvakwabo bonkhe inkhosi yaseSheshaki nayo iyawulinatsa." 
Jeremiah25:27 “Uyawubatjela-ke utsi: ‘Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze Somandla, longuNkulunkulu wema-Israyeli, utsi: Natsani, nidzakwe, nihlante, bese niyawa ningaphindzi nivuke, ngenca yenkemba lengitayitfumela emkhatsini wenu.’" 
Jeremiah25:28 Kodvwa nangabe bayala kutsatsa lenkomishi esandleni sakho banatse, batjele utsi: ‘Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze Somandla, utsi: Kufanele niyinatse!" 
Jeremiah25:29 Bukani, sengiyacala kwehlisela inhlekelele kulelidolobha lelineLibito lami, ngempela kungenteka yini kutsi nihlale ningajeziswa? Ningeke nihlale ningajeziswa, ngobe sengibita inkemba etikwabo bonkhe labahlala emhlabeni, kusho Simakadze Somandla.’" 
Jeremiah25:30 “Nyalo-ke phrofetha kubo onkhe lamavi lamelana nabo, utsi: “ ‘Simakadze uyawubhavumula asetulu, livi lakhe uyawuliphakamisa asendzaweni yakhe lengcwele, uyawubhavumula ngemandla emelane nelive lakhe. Uyawumemeta njengalabahluta emagelebisi, amemete emelane nabo bonkhe labahlala emhlabeni." 
Jeremiah25:31 Sidvumo siyawuhokoma sivakale nasemikhawulweni yemhlaba, ngobe Simakadze tive uyawutibeka emacala, uyakwehlulela bonkhe bantfu, lababi abalalise phansi ngenkemba,’ ” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah25:32 Naku-ke lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, utsi: “Bukani! Inhlekelele yandza tive ngetive, kukhuphuka sivunguvungu lesinemandla emikhawulweni yonkhe yemhlaba.”" 
Jeremiah25:33 Ngaleso sikhatsi labo labayawube sebabulewe nguSimakadze bayawugcwala yonkhe indzawo, kusukela ngala kwemhlaba kuye ngale kwawo. Bangeke balilelwe, futsi bangeke babutfwe nome bangcwatjwe, kodvwa bayawufanana netibi letisakateke phansi emhlabatsini." 
Jeremiah25:34 Khalani nilile, nine belusi; gicikani elutfulini, nine baholi bemhlambi. Ngobe sikhatsi sekuhlatjwa kwenu sesifikile, niyakuwa niphihlike njengeludziwo loluhle." 
Jeremiah25:35 Kute lapho belusi bayawubalekela khona, nebaholi bemhlambi abayiwuba naso siphephelo." 
Jeremiah25:36 Lalelani kukhala kwebelusi nekulila kwebaholi bemhlambi, ngobe Simakadze ubhidlita lidlelo labo." 
Jeremiah25:37 Tibaya tekuthula tiyawubhujiswa ngenca yentfukutselo leyesabekako yaSimakadze. 
Jeremiah25:38 Njengelibhubesi umelusi uyawuphuma ashiye umhume wakhe, live labo liyawusala likhala libhungane ngenca yenkemba yemcindzeteli, nangenca yelulaka lolwesabekako lwaSimakadze." 
Jeremiah26:1 Kwatsi nje ekucaleni kwekubusa kwaJehoyakimu, umsa waJosaya, inkhosi yakaJuda, kwefika livi livela kuSimakadze, litsi:" 
Jeremiah26:2 “Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: Mani esibuyeni selithempeli laSimakadze, ukhulume kubo bonkhe bantfu basemadolobheni akaJuda labayaye bete batewukhontela lapha ethempelini laSimakadze. Batjele konkhe lengikutfume kona, ungashiyi nalinye livi." 
Jeremiah26:3 Mhlawumbe bayawulalela, kube ngulowo nalowo aphendvuke endleleni yakhe lembi. Ngiyawube sengiyagucuka ngingabe ngisabehlisela lenhlekelele lebese ngitilungiselele kuyehlisela kubo ngenca yebubi lababentile." 
Jeremiah26:4 Khuluma kubo utsi: ‘Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: Naningalaleli kimi nilandzele umtsetfo wami lengiwubeke embikwenu," 
Jeremiah26:5 futsi naningawalaleli emavi etinceku tami, baphrofethi, lengititfumele kini emaphindzephindze, nine solomane ningalaleli," 
Jeremiah26:6 lendlu-ke ngitabe sengiyenta ifanane neShilo, nalelidolobha seliyawuba yintfo yekucalekisa emkhatsini wato tonkhe tive temhlaba.’ ”" 
Jeremiah26:7 Baphristi, nebaphrofethi kanye nabo bonkhe bantfu bamuva Jeremiya, nakakhuluma lamavi basekhatsi ethempelini laSimakadze." 
Jeremiah26:8 Kodvwa watsi acedza nje Jeremiya kubatjela bonkhe labantfu onkhe emavi labewatfunywe nguSimakadze kutsi atebatjela wona, kwesuka baphristi, nebaphrofethi kanye nabo bonkhe bantfu bambamba batsi kuye: “Ufanele ufe!" 
Jeremiah26:9 Uphrofethelani egameni laSimakadze kutsi lelithempeli litawufanana neShilo, nalelidolobha litawusala selikhala libhungane, kungasahlali muntfu kulo?” Bonkhe bantfu babunganyela Jeremiya bamkaka ekhatsi endlini yaSimakadze." 
Jeremiah26:10 Kwatsi tiphatsimandla takaJuda nativa ngalesento, tesuka esigodlweni taphikelela khona ethempelini laSimakadze, tefike tahlala phansi etindzaweni tato, ekungeneni kweLisango Lelisha lelithempeli laSimakadze." 
Jeremiah26:11 Baphristi nebaphrofethi base bakhuluma kuletiphatsimandla nakubo bonkhe bantfu, batsi: “Lomuntfu kufanele agwetjwe intsambo, ngobe uphrofethe lokumelana nalelidolobha. Nani nitivele ngetenu tindlebe!”" 
Jeremiah26:12 Jeremiya wase ukhuluma kuto tonkhe letiphatsimandla nakubo bonkhe labantfu, watsi: “Simakadze ungitfumile kutsi ngitewuphrofetha ngalendlu nangalelidolobha tonkhe letintfo lesenitivile." 
Jeremiah26:13 Manje-ke, guculani tindlela tenu tekuphila netento tenu nilalele Simakadze Nkulunkulu wenu. Simakadze-ke utawube sewuyagucuka angabe asanehlisela lenhlekelele labesayishito kini." 
Jeremiah26:14 Macondzana nami-ke, mine ngisetandleni tenu; yentani kimi nome ngabe yini lenikubona kukuhle nekutsi kulungile." 
Jeremiah26:15 Noko kufanele nati nekwati, nikhumbule kutsi nangabe ningibulala, niyakwehlisela licala lengati lengenacala etikwenu, nasetikwalelidolobha, nasetikwalabo labahlala kulo, ngobe ecinisweni, nguSimakadze longitfume kini kutawukhuluma onkhe lamavi etindlebeni tenu niva.”" 
Jeremiah26:16 Ngako letiphatsimandla nabo bonkhe bantfu bakhuluma kubaphristi nakubaphrofethi, batsi: “Lomuntfu akukafaneli kutsi agwetjwe intsambo! Ukhulume kitsi egameni laSimakadze Nkulunkulu wetfu.”" 
Jeremiah26:17 Labanye balabadzala belive beta ngembili bakhuluma kuwo wonkhe umhlangano webantfu, batsi:" 
Jeremiah26:18 “Mikha waseMoreshethi waphrofetha ngetikhatsi taboHezekiya, inkhosi yakaJuda. Watjela bonkhe bantfu bakaJuda watsi: ‘Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, utsi: “ ‘ISiyoni iyawulinywa njengensimi. IJerusalema iyawuba yincumbi yencintsakalo, intsaba yelithempeli ibe yindvundvuma lehlume lihlatsi letinchachabutane.’" 
Jeremiah26:19 “Kungabe kambe Hezekiya, inkhosi yakaJuda, yena nome-ke lomunye nje wakaJuda wambulala yini? Hezekiya akazange yini esabe Simakadze wafuna sihawu saSimakadze? Akazange agucuke yini yena Simakadze kwekutsi angabe asasehlisa lesehlakalo labesasishito kubo? Tsine nje sesitakwehlisela sehlakalo lesibi etikwetfu!”" 
Jeremiah26:20 Manje-ke, bekukhona na-Uriya, umsa waShemaya, waseKhiriyathi Jeyarimu, abengulomunye webantfu labaphrofetha egameni laSimakadze; waphrofetha ngalelidolobha nangalelive njengawo onkhe lamavi aJeremiya." 
Jeremiah26:21 Kwatsi inkhosi Jehoyakimu nato tonkhe tindvuna takhe netiphatsimandla takhe nativa lamavi a-Uriya, inkhosi yahlosa kumbulala. Kodvwa Uriya weva ngaloko, wase ubalekela eGibhithe ngenca yekwesaba." 
Jeremiah26:22 Noko inkhosi, Jehoyakimu, yatfumela Elnathani, umsa wa-Akbori, eGibhithe, aphekeletelwa ngulamanye emadvodza." 
Jeremiah26:23 Bamkhipha Uriya eGibhithe, bammikisa enkhosini Jehoyakimu, lowafike watsi akagalelwe ngenkemba, wafa, sidvumbu sakhe salahlwa emadlizeni ebantfukatana." 
Jeremiah26:24 Kodvwa Ahikamu, umsa waShafani, wema ngakuJeremiya, ngako wangabe asaniketelwa kubantfu kutsi abulawe." 
Jeremiah27:1 Kwatsi nje ekucaleni kwekubusa kwaSedekiya, umsa waJosaya, inkhosi yakaJuda, kwefika nali livi kuJeremiya livela kuSimakadze, litsi:" 
Jeremiah27:2 Naku lokwashiwo nguSimakadze kimi, watsi: “Yenta emajoko ngetitilobho nemicabo, lelinye lawo ulibeke entsanyeni yakho," 
Jeremiah27:3 bese utfumela lawa lamanye kanye nelivi enkhosini yaka-Edomu, neyakaMowabi, neyaka-Amoni, neyaseThire, neyaseSidoni ngemancusa lefike eJerusalema kuSedekiya, inkhosi yakaJuda." 
Jeremiah27:4 Wanike imilayeto yebaphatsi bawo, utsi: ‘Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, Nkulunkulu wema-Israyeli, utsi: “Tjelani baphatsi benu naku:" 
Jeremiah27:5 Ngemandla ami lamakhulu nangengalo yami leyelulekile, ngadala umhlaba kanye nebantfu labahlala kuwo kanye netilwane letikuwo, futsi ngiwunika nome ngubani lengimtsandzako." 
Jeremiah27:6 Manje-ke ngitawunikela onkhe lamave enu encekwini yami Nebukhadnezari, inkhosi yaseBhabhulona; ngitakwenta ngisho netilwane tesiganga kutsi timtfobele." 
Jeremiah27:7 Tive tonkhe tiyawumkhonta, nendvodzana yakhe kanye nemtukulu wakhe, kuze kube sikhatsi lapho live lakhe liwa khona, tive letinyenti nemakhosi lamakhulu amehlule." 
Jeremiah27:8 “ ‘ “Noko nome ngabe ngusiphi sive nome-ke ngumuphi umbuso longayiwukhonta Nebukhadnezari, inkhosi yaseBhabhulona, ungagobisi inhloko yawo ejokweni lakhe, ngiyawusijezisa leso sive ngenkemba, nangendlala, nangesifo lesibulalanako, ngize ngisibhubhise ngesandla sakhe, kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah27:9 Ngako-ke ningabalaleli baphrofethi benu, nebaphenguli benu, nebahumushi benu bemaphupho, netangoma, nalababhulako labanitjela batsi: ‘Ningeke niyikhonte inkhosi yaseBhabhulona.’" 
Jeremiah27:10 Baphrofetha emanga kini, khona nitewususwa emaveni enu niyiswe khashane nawo; ngitanicosha eveni lenu, niyawuphela." 
Jeremiah27:11 Kodvwa nangabe sive, nome ngusiphi, siyawukhotsamisa inhloko yaso ngaphansi kwelijoko lenkhosi yaseBhabhulona, simkhotsamele, leso sive ngiyawusenta sihlale eveni laso, sililime siphile kulo, kusho Simakadze.” ’ ”" 
Jeremiah27:12 NaSedekiya, inkhosi yakaJuda, ngamniketa umlayeto lofanana nawona lona, ngatsi: “Khotsamisani tinhloko tenu ngaphansi kwelijoko lenkhosi yaseBhabhulona, khontani yona kanye nebantfu bayo, nitewuphila." 
Jeremiah27:13 Uyawufelani wena kanye nebantfu bakho ngenkemba, nangendlala, nangesifo lesibulalanako, Simakadze layale ngako nome ngusiphi sive lesingayiwuyikhonta inkhosi yaseBhabhulona?" 
Jeremiah27:14 Ningawalaleli emavi ebaphrofethi labatsi kini: ‘Ningeke niyikhonte inkhosi yaseBhabhulona,’ ngobe baphrofetha emanga." 
Jeremiah27:15 ‘Angikabatfumi, baphrofetha emanga egameni lami,’ kusho Simakadze. ‘Ngako-ke ngitanicosha eveni lenu, niyawuze niphele, nine kanye nebaphrofethi labaphrofetha kini.’ ”" 
Jeremiah27:16 Ngabe sengikhuluma kubaphristi nakubo bonkhe labantfu, ngatsi: “Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: ‘Ningabalaleli baphrofethi labatsi: “Masinyane nje khona nyalo tintfo tasethempelini laSimakadze tiyawubuyiswa tisuka eBhabhulona.” Baphrofetha emanga kini." 
Jeremiah27:17 Ningabalaleli. Khontani inkhosi yaseBhabhulona, nitawuphila. Lelidolobha lingaba yincitsakalo leni?" 
Jeremiah27:18 Nangabe babaphrofethi futsi banelivi laSimakadze, abakhulumisane naSimakadze longuSomandla, bancenge kutsi letimphahla letisasele ethempelini laSimakadze, nasesigodlweni senkhosi yakaJuda, naseJerusalema, tingatsatfwa tiyiswe eBhabhulona.’" 
Jeremiah27:19 Ngobe ngunaku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla mayelana netinsika, nanelwandle lolwakhelwe, netincodlana, naletinye nje-ke timphahla letisasele kulelidolobha," 
Jeremiah27:20 langatitsatsanga Nebukhadnezari, inkhosi yaseBhabhulona, ngesikhatsi atfumba Jehoyakhini, umsa waJehoyakimu, inkhosi yakaJuda, ayiyisa ekudzingisweni, ayisusa eJerusalema ayiyisa eBhabhulona kanye nabo bonkhe labahloniphekile bakaJuda nebaseJerusalema." 
Jeremiah27:21 Yebo, nguloko lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, Nkulunkulu wema-Israyeli, mayelana naletimphahla letatisasele ethempelini laSimakadze, nasesigodlweni senkhosi yakaJuda, naseJerusalema, utsi:" 
Jeremiah27:22 ‘Tiyawutsatfwa tiyiswe eBhabhulona, lapho tiyawuhlala khona, kuze kube ngulelo langa lengiyawufika ngalo ngitilandze. Ngiyawube sengiyatitsatsa-ke ngitibuyisele kulendzawo yato,’ kusho Simakadze.”" 
Jeremiah28:1 Ngenyanga yesihlanu kuwo lowo mnyaka, umnyaka wesine, ekucaleni nje kwekubusa kwaSedekiya, inkhosi yakaJuda, umphrofethi Hananiya, umsa wa-Azuri, waseGibeyoni, wakhuluma kimi asendlini yaSimakadze embikwebaphristi kanye nabo bonkhe bantfu, watsi:" 
Jeremiah28:2 “Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, Nkulunkulu wema-Israyeli, utsi: ‘Ngiyakulephula lijoko lenkhosi yaseBhabhulona." 
Jeremiah28:3 Ingakapheli nje iminyaka lemibili ngiyawutibuyisa kulendzawo tonkhe timphahla tasendlini yaSimakadze letatsatfwa nguNebukhadnezari, inkhosi yaseBhabhulona, latisusa lapha watiyisa eBhabhulona." 
Jeremiah28:4 Ngitawubuyisa futsi kulendzawo naJehoyakhini, umsa waJehoyakimu, inkhosi yakaJuda, nabo bonkhe labatfunjwa kaJuda bayiswa eBhabhulona, ngobe ngitakulephula lijoko lenkhosi yaseBhabhulona,’ kusho Simakadze.”" 
Jeremiah28:5 Ngako umphrofethi Jeremiya wase uphendvula lomphrofethi Hananiya embikwebaphristi nabo bonkhe bantfu lababemile endlini yaSimakadze. 
Jeremiah28:6 Watsi: “Amen! Shangatsi Simakadze angenta njalo! Shangatsi Simakadze angawagcwalisa lawo mavi lowaphrofethe ngekubuyisa letimphahla tasendlini yaSimakadze nabo bonkhe labatfunjwa besuswa eBhabhulona baletfwa kulendzawo. 
Jeremiah28:7 Noko lalela naku lengitakusho kuwe nakubo bonkhe labantfu niva: 
Jeremiah28:8 Kusukela etikhatsini takucala, baphrofethi labangembili kwetfu, bake baphrofetha ngemphi, nangesehlakalo, nangesifo lesibulalanako, bamelana nemave lamanyenti nanemibuso lemikhulu." 
Jeremiah28:9 Kodvwa umphrofethi lophrofetha kuthula nguye loyawulalelwa, anakwe njengemuntfu longuyena atfunywe nguSimakadze ngempela, kuphela nje nangabe lesiphrofetho sakhe sigcwaliseka.”" 
Jeremiah28:10 Ngako umphrofethi Hananiya wesusa lelijoko entsanyeni yemphrofethi Jeremiya, walephula," 
Jeremiah28:11 wakhuluma embikwabo bonkhe bantfu watsi: “Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: ‘Ngiyakulephula kanjalo-ke lijoko laNebukhadnezari, inkhosi yaseBhabhulona, ngilisuse etintsanyeni tetive tonkhe temhlaba ingakapheli iminyaka lemibili.’ ” Emvakwaloko-ke umphrofethi Jeremiya wachubeka wahamba indlela yakhe." 
Jeremiah28:12 Kwatsi sikhashana nje emvakwekube umphrofethi Hananiya asalephulile lijoko lelalisentsanyeni yemphrofethi Jeremiya, kwefika livi laSimakadze kuJeremiya, latsi:" 
Jeremiah28:13 “Hamba utjele Hananiya, utsi: ‘Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: Wena wephule lijoko lesigodvo, kodvwa esikhundleni salo wena uyawutfola lijoko lensimbi." 
Jeremiah28:14 Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, Nkulunkulu wema-Israyeli, utsi: Ngitawubeka lijoko lensimbi entsanyeni yaletive kuze titewukhonta Nebukhadnezari, inkhosi yaseBhabhulona, futsi tiyawuhlehla kuye. Futsi ngitamnika abuse ngisho netilwane tesiganga.’ ”" 
Jeremiah28:15 Ngako umphrofethi Jeremiya wase ukhuluma kuHananiya, umphrofethi, watsi: “Lalela lapha, Hananiya! Wena awukatfunywa nguSimakadze, kodvwa lesive ulibele kusenta setsembe emanga akho." 
Jeremiah28:16 Ngako-ke naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: ‘Sekusondzele kutsi ngikukhweshise emhlabeni. Kuwo nje lomnyaka lona utakufa, ngobe ushumayele kuhlubuka Simakadze.’ ”" 
Jeremiah28:17 Kwatsi ngenyanga yesikhombisa kuwo lowo mnyaka, Hananiya, umphrofethi, wafa." 
Jeremiah29:1 Lena yincwadzi leyabhalwa ngumphrofethi Jeremiya, wayitfumela isuka eJerusalema iya kumisalela leyayisasele yalabadzala kulabo labebatfunjiwe, nakubaphristi, nakubaphrofethi, nakubo bonkhe bantfu lababetfunjwe nguNebukhadnezari, abesusa eJerusalema wabayisa eBhabhulona." 
Jeremiah29:2 Lapha kwakusemuva kwenkhosi Jehoyakhini, nendlovukazi, nebatsenwa, nebaholi bakaJuda nebaseJerusalema, nebakhandzi betinsimbi kanye nebabati labatingcweti sebatfunjiwe bayiswa ekudzingisweni besuswa eJerusalema." 
Jeremiah29:3 Lencwadzi Jeremiya wayiphatsisa bo-Elasa, umsa waShafani, naGemariya, umsa waHilkiya, lababetfunywe nguSedekiya, inkhosi yakaJuda, kuNebukhadnezari, inkhosi yaseBhabhulona. Lencwadzi yayitsi:" 
Jeremiah29:4 “Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, Nkulunkulu wema-Israyeli, kubo bonkhe labo lengabatfumba ngabesusa eJerusalema baya eBhabhulona, utsi:" 
Jeremiah29:5 ‘Yakhani tindlu nitinte; hlanyelani tivandze nidle loko letikutselako. 
Jeremiah29:6 Tsatsani bafati nitale emadvodzana nemadvodzakati, nitsatsele emadvodzana enu bafati, nendzise nemadvodzakati enu, kuze kutsi nabo batewuba nemadvodzana nemadvodzakati. Talanani nandze nangesibalo lapho, ninganciphi." 
Jeremiah29:7 Funani futsi kuthula nekuphumelela kulelo dolobha lenganitfumbela kulo kutsi niyewudzingiswa. Likhulekeleni kuSimakadze, ngobe naliphumelela, nani niyawuphumelela.’" 
Jeremiah29:8 Yebo, nguloko lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, Nkulunkulu wema-Israyeli, utsi: ‘Ningavumi kuyengwa baphrofethi nalabaphengulako labasemkhatsini wenu. Ningalaleli lamaphupho lenibakhutsata kutsi babe nawo." 
Jeremiah29:9 Baphrofetha emanga kini egameni lami. Angikabatfumi mine,’ kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah29:10 “Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: ‘Naseyiphelile iminyaka lengema-70 yeBhabhulona, ngitawufika kini ngitewugcwalisa setsembiso sami semusa kutsi nginibuyise kulendzawo." 
Jeremiah29:11 Ngobe ngiyawati emasu lenginawo ngani, yebo, emasu ekuniphumelelisa, hhayi ekunilimata, emasu ekuninika litsemba nelikusasa." 
Jeremiah29:12 Niyawube seniyangibita-ke nite nitewuthandaza kimi, mine ngiyawuniva." 
Jeremiah29:13 Niyakungifuna ningitfole, naningifunisisa ngayo yonkhe inhlitiyo yenu." 
Jeremiah29:14 Ngiyawutfolwa ngini nginibuyise ekutfunjweni kwenu,’ kusho Simakadze. ‘Ngiyawunibutsa kuto tonkhe tive netindzawo, lapho benginicoshele khona,’ kusho Simakadze. ‘Ngiyawunilandza nginibuyisele kuyo lendzawo lapho nganitsatsa khona naya ekudzingisweni.’" 
Jeremiah29:15 “Ningasho nitsi: ‘Simakadze usivusele baphrofethi lapha eBhabhulona.’ 
Jeremiah29:16 Kodvwa naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze ngenkhosi lehlala esihlalweni sebukhosi saDavide nangabo bonkhe bantfu labasasele kulelidolobha, bantfu belive lenu labangahambanga kanye nani kuya ekudzingisweni," 
Jeremiah29:17 yebo, naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, utsi: ‘Ngiyawutfumela inkemba, nendlala, nesifo lesibulalanako kutsi kuyewumelana nabo, ngiyawubenta babe njengemakhiwa labune adzimate abola lokwekutsi kute nalongawadla." 
Jeremiah29:18 Ngiyawubagijimisa ngenkemba, nangendlala, nangesifo lesibulalanako, ngibente banengeke kuyo yonkhe imibuso yasemhlabeni, babe yintfo yesicalekiso nesesabiso, intfo yekuhlekisa nelihlazo emkhatsini wato tonkhe tive, lapho ngibayisa khona.’" 
Jeremiah29:19 Simakadze utsi: ‘Ngobe abakawalaleli emavi ami, emavi lengangibatfumelela wona njalonjalo ngetinceku tami baphrofethi; nani nine batfunjwa, nani anikangilaleli,’ kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah29:20 “Ngako-ke vanini livi laSimakadze, nonkhe nine labatfunjiwe, lengabacosha eJerusalema ngabayisa eBhabhulona." 
Jeremiah29:21 Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, Nkulunkulu wema-Israyeli, mayelana na-Ahabi, umsa waKholaya, nangaSedekiya, umsa waMaseya, labaphrofetha emanga kini egameni lami, utsi: ‘Ngitawubanikela kuNebukhadnezari, inkhosi yaseBhabhulona, yena uyawufike ababulale embikwemehlo enu nibuka." 
Jeremiah29:22 Ngenca yabo, bonkhe labatfunjiwe labesuka kaJuda labaseBhabhulona bayawusebentisa lesicalekiso, batsi: “Simakadze akakulingise boSedekiya na-Ahabi labashiswa yinkhosi yaseBhabhulona ngemlilo.”" 
Jeremiah29:23 Ngobe babente intfo lesinengiso kabi ka-Israyeli, baphinga nebafati babomakhelwane babo, bakhuluma emanga ngeLibito lami, lengangingazange sengibatfume kutsi bakwente. Ngiyakwati loko futsi ngingufakazi wako,’ kusho Simakadze.”" 
Jeremiah29:24 Ubofike utjele Shemaya waseNehelamu, utsi:" 
Jeremiah29:25 “Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, Nkulunkulu wema-Israyeli, utsi: Utfumele tincwadzi ngelibito lakho kubo bonkhe bantfu baseJerusalema, nakuZefaniya, umsa waMaseya, umphristi, nakubo bonkhe labanye baphristi. Watjela Zefaniya watsi:" 
Jeremiah29:26 ‘Simakadze sewubeke wena kutsi ube ngumphristi esikhundleni saJehoyada, kutsi wengamele indlu yaSimakadze; kufanele-ke kutsi bonkhe bantfu labahlanyako batente shangatsi bayaphrofetha, ubafake esitokisini ubabophe tintsamo ngetinketane." 
Jeremiah29:27 Kepha manje awukamkhalimeli ngani loJeremiya wase-Anathothi, lotishaya shangatsi nguyena mphrofethi lapho emkhatsini wenu?" 
Jeremiah29:28 Usitfumelele nangu umlayeto lapha eBhabhulona lotsi: Kusetawuba sikhatsi lesidze. Ngako-ke yakhani tindlu nihlale nitinte; hlanyelani tivandze, nidle sivuno sato.’ ”" 
Jeremiah29:29 Ngempela Zefaniya, umphristi, wafike wafundzela umphrofethi Jeremiya lencwadzi." 
Jeremiah29:30 Kwase kufika livi laSimakadze kuJeremiya, latsi:" 
Jeremiah29:31 “Tfumela lomlayeto kubo bonkhe labatfunjiwe, utsi: ‘Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze ngaShemaya waseNehelamu, utsi: Ngenca yekutsi Shemaya sewuphrofethile kini, nome abengakatfunywa ngimi nje, wanidvonsela ekutseni netsembe emanga," 
Jeremiah29:32 naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze utsi: Ngempela, ngitamjezisa Shemaya waseNehelamu kanye nesitukulwane sakhe. Kute namunye loyawusala kulabantfu laba, futsi akayiwubona nakunye kwetintfo letinhle lengiyawutentela bantfu bami, ngobe yena ushumayele kuhlubuka mine, kusho Simakadze.’ ”" 
Jeremiah30:1 Leli livi laSimakadze lelefika kuJeremiya, litsi:" 
Jeremiah30:2 “Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, Nkulunkulu wema-Israyeli, utsi: ‘Bhala encwadzini onkhe emavi lengiwakhulume kuwe.’" 
Jeremiah30:3 Simakadze utsi: ‘Ayeta emalanga, lapho ngiyawulandza khona sive sami saka-Israyeli nesakaJuda ekutfunjweni ngibabuyisele eveni lengalipha boyisemkhulu kutsi libe ngelabo,’ kusho Simakadze.”" 
Jeremiah30:4 Lawa-ke ngemavi lakhulunywa nguSimakadze macondzana nema-Israyeli kanye nemaJuda: 
Jeremiah30:5 “Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: “ ‘Kuvakala kukhala kwekwesaba, kwekwetfuka, hhayi kwekuthula." 
Jeremiah30:6 Butani nibone: Umuntfu lomdvuna wake wamtala yini umntfwana? Manje-ke kwenteka kanjani lokutsi ngibone onkhe emadvodza lanemandla abambe tisu njengemfati nakaphetfwe ngumhelo, onkhe anebuso lobugcungce kwekufa?" 
Jeremiah30:7 Maye, liyesabeka lelo langa, kute leliyawuse libe njengalo. Kuyawuba sikhatsi senhlupheko kaJakobe, kodvwa uyawusindziswa kuso." 
Jeremiah30:8 “ ‘Ngalelo langa ngiyawulephula lijoko etintsanyeni tabo, ngitidzabule tibopho tabo; betive abaseyiwubagcilata,’ kusho Simakadze longuSomandla." 
Jeremiah30:9 ‘Esikhundleni saloko sebayawukhonta Simakadze longuNkulunkulu wabo, naDavide, inkhosi yabo, lengiyawubavusela yena." 
Jeremiah30:10 “ ‘Ngako-ke ungesabi, wena Jakobe, nceku yami, ungapheli emandla, wena Israyeli,’ kusho Simakadze. ‘Ngempela ngiyawukusindzisa eveni lelikhashane, netitukulwane takho eveni lekutfunjwa kwato. Jakobe usetawubuye abe nekuthula kanye nekuvikeleka, kute namunye loyawubuye amesabise." 
Jeremiah30:11 Nginawe, futsi ngiyawukusindzisa. Noko ngiyatibhubhisa ngiticedze tonkhe letinye tive, lebengikusakatele kuto, kodvwa wena ngingeke ngikubhubhise ngikucedze. Ngiyawukujezisa ngikucondzise noko ngekwehlulela ngebucotfo bemtsetfo, ngingeke ngikuyekele uhambe nje ungasashaywa nawonile,’ kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah30:12 “Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: “ ‘Linceba lakho alelapheki, yebo, silondza sakho sesingale kwekuphola." 
Jeremiah30:13 Sekute namunye longakuncengela kulelicala lakho, sekute nelikhambi lalesilondza sakho, kute longakwelapha." 
Jeremiah30:14 Bonkhe bangani bakho sebakukhohliwe, abasanaki lutfo lwakho. Ngikushaye njengesitsa, ngakujezisa njengalonelulaka, ngobe licala lakho lilikhulu kakhulu, netono takho titinyenti." 
Jeremiah30:15 Manje, ukhalelani ngalelinceba lakho, ngalobuhlungu bakho lobungenakwelapheka? Ngenca yelicala lakho lelikhulu netono takho letinyenti, ngikwentile loku kuwe." 
Jeremiah30:16 “ ‘Kodvwa bonkhe labakushwabudzelako bayawushwabudzelwa nabo. Tonkhe titsa takho tiyawuyiswa ekutfunjweni. Labo labakuphangako nabo bayawuphangwa. Bonkhe labenta wena imphango, nami ngiyawubenta baphangwe." 
Jeremiah30:17 Kodvwa wena ngiyawukubuyisela emphilweni, ngiphilise emanceba akho, nome ubitwa ngekutsi ungulolahliwe, iSiyoni lenganakwa ngumuntfu,’ kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah30:18 “Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: “ ‘Ngiyawubuyisela inhlanhla emathendeni akaJakobe, ngibe neluvelo emakhaya akhe; lidolobha liyakwakhiwa kabusha etindzaleni talo, nesigodlo siyawuma kabusha endzaweni yaso lefanele." 
Jeremiah30:19 Kuyawuvela kubo tingoma tekubonga nemsindvo wekujabula. Ngiyawubandzisa ngebunyenti bangete bancishiswa; ngiyawubenta bahlonipheke, futsi bangeke bedzeleleke." 
Jeremiah30:20 Bantfwana babo bayawuba njengasetikhatsini takadzenidzeni, libandla labo liyawuma litinte embikwami, ngibajezise bonkhe lababacindzetelako." 
Jeremiah30:21 Umholi wabo kuyawuba ngulomunye wesive sabo; umbusi wabo uyawuvela emkhatsini wabo. Ngiyakumsondzeta, naye uyawuvele asondzele kimi, ngobe vele ngubani lowake watinikela yena, abesedvute nami?’ kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah30:22 “ ‘Ngako-ke nine niyawuba sive sami, mine ngibe nguNkulunkulu wenu.’ ”" 
Jeremiah30:23 Buka la, sivunguvungu saSimakadze sitawubhamuka ngelulaka lwakhe, sivunguvungu lesivunguta sehlele etikwetinhloko talababi." 
Jeremiah30:24 Lulaka lolwesabekako lwaSimakadze lungeke luncandzeke, aze asiphumelelise ngalokuphelele sifiso lesisenhlitiyweni yakhe. Loku niyawukucondza kahle ngemalanga letako." 
Jeremiah31:1 Simakadze utsi: “Ngaleso sikhatsi ngiyawuba nguNkulunkulu wato tonkhe tinsendvo taka-Israyeli, tona tiyawuba sive sami.”" 
Jeremiah31:2 Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: “Sive lesisindze enkembeni siyawuzuza umusa ehlane; ngiyawuta ngitewuletsa kuphumula ka-Israyeli.”" 
Jeremiah31:3 Simakadze wabonakala kitsi kadzeni, watsi: “Ngikutsandze ngelutsandvo lwaphakadze, futsi ngisachubeka nekukunakekela ngemusa." 
Jeremiah31:4 Ngitawuphindze ngikwakhe kabusha, futsi utakwakheka wena Ntfombi lengu-Israyeli. Uyawuphindze utsatse emafahlawane akho, uphumele ngephandle, uyewugidza nalabajabulako." 
Jeremiah31:5 Uyawuphindze futsi uhlanyele tivini emagcumeni aseSamariya; balimi bayawutihlanyela, bajabule ngetitselo tato." 
Jeremiah31:6 Kuyawuba khona lilanga lapho balindzi bayawumemeta emagcumeni aka-Efrayimu, batsi: ‘Wotani, sikhuphukele eSiyoni kuSimakadze longuNkulunkulu wetfu.’ ”" 
Jeremiah31:7 Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: “Hlabelani ngenjabulo kuJakobe; memetelani kulesive lesikhulu kunato tonkhe. Vakalisani kumdvumisa kwenu, nitsi: ‘Awu Simakadze, sindzisa sive sakho, imisalela yaka-Israyeli!’" 
Jeremiah31:8 Buka la, ngiyawubabuyisa besuka eveni lasenyakatfo, ngibagcogce emikhawulweni yonkhe yemhlaba. Emkhatsini wabo kuyawuba netimphumphutse kanye netinchute, bafati labakhulelwe kanye nalasebaphetfwe ngumhelo; kuyawubuya sicumbi lesikhulu." 
Jeremiah31:9 Bayawuta bakhala; bayawuthandaza ngisababuyisela emuva. Ngiyawubaholela ngasemifuleni yemanti endleleni lebekile, lapho bangeyiwukhubatela khona, ngobe mine nginguyise wa-Israyeli, Efrayimu uyindvodzana yami yematubulo." 
Jeremiah31:10 “Vanini livi laSimakadze, nine tive; limemeteleni etichingini letikhashane, nitsi: ‘Lowo lowasakata Israyeli uyawumbutsa futsi, uyakwelusa umhlambi wakhe njengemelusi.’" 
Jeremiah31:11 Ngobe Simakadze uyawubahlenga bakaJakobe, abakhulule esandleni salabo labanemandla kunabo." 
Jeremiah31:12 Bayawufika bamemete ngenjabulo eticongweni tentsaba yaseSiyoni; bayawutfokota ngekwephana kwaSimakadze: lokusatinhlavu, neliwayini lelisha, nemafutsa, nemazinyane emihlambi yetimvu netimbuti, nemankhonyane emihlambi yetinkhomo. Bayawufanana nengadze leniselwa kahle, bangeke baphindze babe lusizi." 
Jeremiah31:13 Tintfombi tiyawugidza tijabule, kanjalo futsi nemajaha nalabadzala. Ngiyawugucula kulila kwabo kube kujabula, ngibanike indvudvuto nekujabula esikhundleni selusizi." 
Jeremiah31:14 Baphristi ngiyawubesutsisa ngenala, sive sami ngisigcwalise ngekwephana kwami,” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah31:15 Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: “Kuvakala livi lekukhala eRama, yebo, livi lekulila nekukhala lokukhulu, Rakheli akhalela bantfwabakhe angasavumi nekudvudvutwa, ngobe bantfwabakhe bebangasekho.”" 
Jeremiah31:16 Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: “Bamba livi lakho, ungakhali, ubambe tinyembeti emehlweni akho, ngobe umsebenti wakho uyawunikwa umvuzo. Bayawubuya eveni lesitsa,” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah31:17 “Ngako likhona litsemba ngelikusasa lakho. Bantfwabakho bayawubuyela eveni labo,” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah31:18 “Impela ngikuvile kububula kwa-Efrayimu, kutsi: “ ‘Wangicondzisa njengelitfole lelisichomoketi, futsi vele sengifundzisekile. Ngibuyisele, ngitawubuyela, ngobe wena unguSimakadze longuNkulunkulu wami." 
Jeremiah31:19 Emvakwekweduka kwami ngaphendvuka; emvakwekucondza kwami ngatisola. Ngadliwa ngemahloni, ngatfotjiswa, ngobe ngetfwele lihlazo lebusha bami.’" 
Jeremiah31:20 Efrayimu akasiyo yini indvodzana yami letsandzekako, umntfwana lengijabulako ngaye? Nome ngivamise kukhuluma ngimelane naye, kodvwa noko ngisamkhumbula. Ngako-ke inhlitiyo yami iyamlangatelela; nginesihawu lesikhulu ngaye,” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah31:21 “Beka timphawu temgwaco; umise tinsika letitikhombandlela. Wunake umgwaco lomkhulu, yebo, umgwaco lohamba ngawo. Ncandzeka, Ntfombi lengu-Israyeli, buyela emadolobheni akho." 
Jeremiah31:22 Uyawuzulazula kuze kube ngunini, awu, ndvodzakati lengaketsembeki? Simakadze uyawudala intfo lensha emhlabeni, umfati uyakuyivikela indvodza.”"
