Jeremiah31:23 Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, Nkulunkulu wema-Israyeli, utsi: “Ngiyawutsi nangibabuyisa ekutfunjweni, bantfu labaseveni lakaJuda nasemadolobheni akhona bayawuphindze basebentise nankha emagama batsi: ‘Simakadze akakubusise, awu wenandlu yekulunga, awu wena ntsaba lengcwele.’" 
Jeremiah31:24 Bantfu bayawuhlala ndzawonye kaJuda nakuwo onkhe emadolobha akhona, balimi nalabo labahambe bakhotsisa imihlambi yabo yetimvu netimbuti." 
Jeremiah31:25 Ngiyawubahlumelelisa labo lasebadzangele, ngicinise labo labaphelelwa ngemandla.”" 
Jeremiah31:26 Loku kwangenta ngavuka ngacalata ndzawo tonkhe. Butfongo bami bebumnandzi kimi. 
Jeremiah31:27 Simakadze utsi: “Emalanga ayeta, lapho ngiyawuhlanyela khona indlu yaka-Israyeli nendlu yakaJuda ngentalelwane yebantfu neyetilwane." 
Jeremiah31:28 Njengobe ngangibalindzile kutsi ngibazuphune, ngibadladlabule, ngibaketule, ngibabhubhise, ngibaletsele inhlekelele, kanjalo ngiyawubalindza kuze ngibakhe ngibahlanyele,” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah31:29 “Ngalawo malanga bantfu bangeke basasho batsi: “ ‘Bobabe badle emagelebisi lamunyu, nematinyo ebantfwana asayashelela.’" 
Jeremiah31:30 “Esikhundleni saloko ngulowo nalowo muntfu uyakufa ngenca yesono sakhe. Wonkhe lodla emagelebisi lamunyu ematinyo akhe ayawushelela.” 
Jeremiah31:31 Simakadze utsi: “Sikhatsi siyeta, lapho ngiyawukwenta khona sivumelwane lesisha nendlu yaka-Israyeli neyakaJuda." 
Jeremiah31:32 Lesivumelwane singeke sifanane naleso lengasenta naboyisemkhulu ngesikhatsi ngibabamba ngesandla ngibahola ngibakhipha eGibhithe, ngobe basephula sivumelwane sami, nome ngangiyindvodza kubo,” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah31:33 Simakadze utsi: “Ngulesi sivumelwane lengiyakusenta nendlu yaka-Israyeli emvakwaleso sikhatsi: Ngiyawufaka umtsetfo wami etingcondvweni tabo, ngiwubhale etinhlitiyweni tabo. Ngiyawuba nguNkulunkulu wabo, bona babe bantfu bami." 
Jeremiah31:34 Sekuyawubate umuntfu loyawufundzisa makhelwane wakhe, nome indvodza ifundzise umnakabo, itsi: ‘Yati Simakadze,’ ngobe bonkhe sebayawungati kusukela kulomncane kuye kulomkhulu,” kusho Simakadze. “Ngobe ngiyawubatsetselela bubi babo, tono tabo ngingasaphindzi ngitikhumbule.”" 
Jeremiah31:35 Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, lowo lowabeka lilanga kutsi likhanyise emini, wamisa inyanga netinkhanyeti kutsi tibokhanyisa ebusuku, lowo lotamatisa lwandle kuze emagagasi alo abhodle, nguSimakadze longuSomandla libito lakhe, utsi:" 
Jeremiah31:36 “Kuphela nangabe letimiso tinganyamalala embikwami, titukulwane taka-Israyeli tiyawunyamalala phakadze naphakadze, tingabe tisaba sive embikwami,” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah31:37 Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: “Kuphela nje nangabe emazulu lasetulu angalinganiswa, netisekelo temhlaba letingaphansi tiphenywe, nami-ke ngulapho ngiyawusilahla sonkhe situkulwane saka-Israyeli, ngenca yako konkhe labakwentile,” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah31:38 Simakadze utsi: “Emalanga ayeta lapho khona ngiyakwakhelwa kabusha lelidolobha kusukela eMbhoshongweni waHananeli kuye eSangweni Lelikona. 
Jeremiah31:39 Intsambo yekulinganisa iyakweluleka kusukela lapho kuye entsabeni iGarebi, isuke lapho ijikele ngaseGowa." 
Jeremiah31:40 Sonkhe leso sigodzi lapho kulahlwa khona tidvumbu nemlotsa, nato tonkhe tibebesi kuye emfudlaneni iKhidroni, kuze kuyewufika ekoneni leLisango Lelihhashi ngasemphumalanga, kuyawuba ngcwele kuSimakadze. Lelidolobha lingeke liphindze lizuphunwe nome libhidlitwe.”" 
Jeremiah32:1 Leli livi lelefika kuJeremiya liphuma kuSimakadze emnyakeni welishumi wekubusa kwaSedekiya, inkhosi yakaJuda, lekwakungumnyaka weli-18 wekubusa kwaNebukhadnezari." 
Jeremiah32:2 Imphi yenkhosi yaseBhabhulona yase ivimbetele iJerusalema, Jeremiya umphrofethi abevalelwe esibuyeni sabogadzi, esigodlweni senkhosi yakaJuda." 
Jeremiah32:3 Sedekiya, inkhosi yakaJuda, yayimvalele lapho, yatsi: “Uphrofethelani ngalendlela lophrofetha ngayo? Utsi: ‘Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: Lelidolobha sengitalinikela enkhosini yaseBhabhulona letawulitfumba." 
Jeremiah32:4 Sedekiya, inkhosi yakaJuda, ngeke aphunyule etandleni temaBhabhulona, yena nakanjani utawunikelwa enkhosini yaseBhabhulona. Uyawukhuluma nayo umlomo nemlomo, ayibone ngewakhe emehlo." 
Jeremiah32:5 Iyawutsatsa Sedekiya imyise eBhabhulona, lapho ayawuhlala khona ngize ngimcondzise, kusho Simakadze. Nanilwa nemaBhabhulona ngeke niphumelele.’ ”" 
Jeremiah32:6 Jeremiya wakhuluma watsi: “Livi laSimakadze lefika kimi, latsi:" 
Jeremiah32:7 Hanameli, umnakenu, umsa waShalumi, utawuta kuwe afike atsi: ‘Tsenga insimi yami e-Anathothi, njengobe usihlobo sami lesisedvutane kakhulu nje, kulilungelo lakho nemsebenti wakho kutsi uyitsenge.’" 
Jeremiah32:8 “Ngako-ke, njengobe Simakadze abeshito, umzala wami Hanameli weta kimi esibuyeni sabogadzi, watsi: ‘Tsenga insimi yami e-Anathothi, eveni lakaBhenjamini. Njengobe kulilungelo lakho kutsi uyihlenge ibe yakho, titsengele yona.’ “Ngavele ngati kutsi leli bekulivi laSimakadze;" 
Jeremiah32:9 ngako ngayitsenga lensimi e-Anathothi kulomzala wami, Hanameli, ngase ngimkalela isiliva lengemagremu langema-200, ngamnika." 
Jeremiah32:10 Lencwadzi yesivumelwane ngayisayina, ngayivala ngeluphawu, ngafakazelwa, ngase ngikala lesiliva etikalini." 
Jeremiah32:11 Ngatsatsa lencwadzi yekutsenga, incwadzi leyayivalwe ngeluphawu inayo yonkhe iminantiso nemininingwane yekutsenga kanye nencwadzi leyayingakangcivitwa." 
Jeremiah32:12 Ngakunika Bharuki, umsa waNeriya, umsa waMahaseya, embikwemzala wami Hanameli nabofakazi lababesayine lencwadzi, nasembikwawo onkhe emaJuda labehleti esibuyeni sabogadzi." 
Jeremiah32:13 “Embikwabo nganika Bharuki nansi imiyalo, ngatsi:" 
Jeremiah32:14 ‘Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze Nkulunkulu wema-Israyeli, utsi: Tsatsa letincwadzi tesivumelwane totimbili, lena lengcivitiwe nalengakangcivitwa, lekungemakhophi alencwadzi yekutsenga, utifake ejekeni lelibumba, khona titewuhlala sikhatsi lesidze." 
Jeremiah32:15 Ngobe naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, Nkulunkulu wema-Israyeli, utsi: Tindlu, nemasimi kanye netivini kuyawuphindze kutsengwe kulelive.’ ”" 
Jeremiah32:16 “Emvakwekutsi lencwadzisivumelwane yekutsenga sengiyinike Bharuki, umsa waNeriya, ngathandaza kuSimakadze, ngatsi:" 
Jeremiah32:17 “Awu, Nkhosi Simakadze, wena wenta emazulu nemhlaba ngemandla akho lamakhulu nangengalo yakho leyelulekile. Kute lokulukhuni kakhulu kuwe." 
Jeremiah32:18 Ubaphatsa ngelutsandvo labatinkhulungwane, kodvwa wehlisele sijeziso ngetono taboyise ematsangeni ebantfwababo emvakwabo. Awu Nkulunkulu, wena lomkhulu nalonemandla, lolibito lakhe kunguSimakadze longuSomandla," 
Jeremiah32:19 imigomo yakho mikhulu, yebo, nemisebenti yakho inemandla. Emehlo akho avulekile kuto tonkhe tindlela tebantfu; ngulowo nalowo umnika umvuzo wakhe ngangekutiphatsa kwakhe nangalokufanele imisebenti yakhe." 
Jeremiah32:20 Wenta tibonakaliso letimangalisako netimanga eGibhithe, uchubeke nato kwaze kwaba ngulamuhla, lapha ka-Israyeli nakubo bonkhe bantfu bemhlaba, waze watfola ludvumo nekwatiwa lokusekwakho nanyalo." 
Jeremiah32:21 Wakhipha sive sakho ema-Israyeli eveni laseGibhithe ngetibonakaliso nangetimangaliso ngesandla sakho lesinemandla nangengalo yakho leyelulekile, nangekutfutfumelisa lokukhulu." 
Jeremiah32:22 Wabanika lelive lewawufunge kutsi utalinika bokhokho babo, live leligcwele luju lwetinyosi nelubisi." 
Jeremiah32:23 Beta kulo bafike bangena balidla lelive; kodvwa abazange bakulalele wena nome bawulandzele umtsetfo wakho. Abazange bakwente loko wawubayale ngako kutsi bakwente. Ngako wase wehlisela etikwabo yonkhe lenhlekelele. 
Jeremiah32:24 “Buka-ke kutsi takhiwe njani tindvundvuma tekuvimbetela lelidolobha lize litfunjwe. Ngenca yenkemba, nendlala kanye nesifo lesibulalanako lelidolobha selitawunikelwa etandleni temaBhabhulona lalihlaselako. Loko lowakusho sekwentekile, njengobe ubona nje." 
Jeremiah32:25 Nome lelidolobha selitawunikelwa kumaBhabhulona, kodvwa wena Nkhosi Simakadze, utsi kimi: ‘Tsenga lensimi ngesiliva, wente lesivumelwane saloko sibe nebufakazi.’ ”" 
Jeremiah32:26 Livi laSimakadze lefika kuJeremiya, latsi:" 
Jeremiah32:27 “Mine nginguSimakadze, Nkulunkulu wabo bonkhe bantfu. Kukhona yini lokungehlulako mine?" 
Jeremiah32:28 Ngako-ke naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: Lelidolobha sengitalinikela etandleni temaBhabhulona nakuNebukhadnezari, inkhosi yaseBhabhulona, labatalitfumba." 
Jeremiah32:29 LamaBhabhulona lahlasela lelidolobha atawungena alilumeke ngemlilo. Atalishisa alicedze, kanye naletindlu lapho kuhlala khona labantfu labangitfukutselisa ngekutfuncisa imphepho etikweluphahla kuBhali kanye nangekutfululela iminikelo yetinatfo kulabanye bonkulunkulu." 
Jeremiah32:30 “Bantfu baka-Israyeli nebakaJuda kute labakwentile ngaphandle kwekwenta lokubi embikwami, kusukela ebusheni babo. Yebo, sive saka-Israyeli kute lesikwentile ngaphandle kwekungicunula ngaloko labakwente ngetandla tabo, kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah32:31 Kusukela mhlazana lakhiwa kuze kube ngunyalo lelidolobha lingitfukutselise langicunula kangangekutsi kufanele ngilisuse embikwami. 
Jeremiah32:32 Bantfu baka-Israyeli nebakaJuda bangicunula ngabo bonkhe bubi lababentile: bona kanye nemakhosi abo, netindvuna tabo, nebaphristi babo, nebaphrofethi babo, nemadvodza akaJuda kanye nabo bonkhe baseJerusalema." 
Jeremiah32:33 Bangifulatsela bangete bangibuka, lite nome ngangibafundzisa njalonjalo, abazange balalele, futsi abazange bakunake nekukunaka kujezisa kwami." 
Jeremiah32:34 Bemisa tithico tabo letinengekako endlini leneLibito lami bayingcolisa. 
Jeremiah32:35 Bakhela Bhali tindzawo letiphakeme eSigodzini sakaBheni Hinomu bentela kutsi bente umhlatjelo ngemadvodzana nemadvodzakati abo kuMoloki, noko angizange sengibayale kutsi bakwente, futsi bengingazange sengikucabange nasengcondvweni yami kutsi bangayenta intfo lesinengiso kangaka ngaloko bonise sive sakaJuda.”" 
Jeremiah32:36 “Lenikushoko ngalelidolobha nine kutsi: ‘Lelidolobha litawunikwa inkhosi yaseBhabhulona, ngenkemba, nangendlala kanye nangesifo lesibulalanako,’ kodvwa naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze Nkulunkulu wema-Israyeli, utsi:" 
Jeremiah32:37 Ngempela ngiyakubabutsa kuwo onkhe emave, lapho ngangibasakatela khona ngekutfukutsela kwami lokukhulu nangelulaka lwami lolwesabekako. Ngiyawubabuyisela kuyo lendzawo, ngibente bahlale kuyo bavikelekile." 
Jeremiah32:38 Bayawuba bantfu bami, mine ngibe nguNkulunkulu wabo." 
Jeremiah32:39 Ngiyawubanika inhlitiyo yebunye nekwenta intfo yinye, khona batewuhlala bangesaba mine, loko kube lusito kubo nakubantfwababo emvakwabo." 
Jeremiah32:40 Ngiyakwenta nabo sivumelwane saphakadze: Ngingeke ngiyekele kwenta lokuhle kubo, nabo ngibafake umoya wekungesaba, khona bangeyiwuphindze bahlubuke kimi." 
Jeremiah32:41 Ngiyawujabula kubentela lokuhle, ngempela ngiyawubahlanyela kulelive ngayo yonkhe inhlitiyo yami nangawo wonkhe umphefumulo wami." 
Jeremiah32:42 “Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: Njengobe lesive ngisehlisele yonkhe lenhlekelele lenkhulu kangaka, kanjalo futsi ngiyawusinika konkhe kuphumelela kahle nekunotsa lengisetsembise kona." 
Jeremiah32:43 Emasimi ayawuphindze atsengwe abe manyenti kulendzawo lenisho ngayo nitsi: ‘Lendzawo ilihlane, ayinabantfu natilwane, ngobe seyinikelwe etandleni temaBhabhulona.’" 
Jeremiah32:44 Emasimi ayawutsengwa ngesiliva, netincwadzisivumelwane tekutsenga tiyawusayinwa, tivalwe ngeluphawu, tibuye tifakazelwe eveni lakaBhenjamini, nasemakhaya lakhelene neJerusalema, nasemadolobheni akaJuda, nasemadolobheni laseveni letintsaba nasemaceleni etintsaba ngasenshonalanga, nasemadolobheni aseNegevu, ngobe ngiyawutibuyisela kubo tibusiso tabo, kusho Simakadze.”" 
Jeremiah33:1 Kwatsi ngesikhatsi Jeremiya asevalelwe esibuyeni sabogadzi, livi laSimakadze laphindze lefika kuye kwesibili, latsi:" 
Jeremiah33:2 “Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, yena lowadala umhlaba, Simakadze lowawubumba wawusimisa, nguSimakadze libito lakhe, utsi:" 
Jeremiah33:3 ‘Ngibite, ngitakuphendvula ngikutjele tintfo letinkhulu naletingaphenyeki, wena longatati.’" 
Jeremiah33:4 Ngobe naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, Nkulunkulu wema-Israyeli, ngetindlu talelidolobha netigodlo temakhosi akaJuda letihhihlitelwe phansi kuze titewusetjentiswa ekukhuphuleni umtsangala wekutivikela kuletivimbetelo nakuyo inkemba" 
Jeremiah33:5 nabalwa nemaBhabhulona, utsi: ‘Tiyawugcwala tidvumbu temadvodza lengitawabulala ngentfukutselo nangelulaka lwami. Ngiyawulifihlela buso bami elidolobha ngenca yabo bonkhe bubi balo." 
Jeremiah33:6 “ ‘Noko, lelidolobha ngiyawuliletsela kuphila nekuphiliswa. Labantfu bami ngiyawubaphilisa, ngibente bativele banekuthula nekuphepha lokuphuphumako." 
Jeremiah33:7 Ngiyawubuyisa bakaJuda nema-Israyeli ekutfunjweni, ngibuye ngibakhe kabusha babe njengaloku babenjalo kucala." 
Jeremiah33:8 Ngiyawubahlanta kuso sonkhe sono labasente kimi, ngibuye ngibatsetselele tonkhe tono tekungihlubuka kwabo." 
Jeremiah33:9 Ngako lelidolobha liyawungiletsela ludvumo, nekujabula, netibongo kanye nekuhlonishwa kuto tonkhe tive temhlaba letiyakuva ngato tonkhe letintfo letinhle lengilentela tona, futsi tiyawumangala titfutfumele ngalobunyenti bemnotfo lophuphumako lengilinika kona.’" 
Jeremiah33:10 “Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: ‘Ngalendzawo nitsi: “Lendzawo ilihlane lelingenalutfo, ayinabantfu nome tilwane.” Noko emadolobheni akaJuda nasetitaladini taseJerusalema letibhidlitiwe letingasahlalwa bantfu nome tilwane, kuyawuphindze kuvakale" 
Jeremiah33:11 imisindvo yenjabulo neyentfokoto, nemaphimbo abomakoti nemyeni, kanye nemaphimbo alabo labaletsa iminikelo yekubonga endlini yaSimakadze, batsi: “ ‘ “Bongani Simakadze longuSomandla, ngobe Simakadze ulungile; umusa wakhe ume kuze kube phakadze.” Ngobe ngiyakutibuyisela tibusiso talelive tibe njengobe tatinjalo kucala,’ kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah33:12 “Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, utsi: ‘Kulendzawo lelihlane lelingenabantfu netilwane, nakuwo onkhe emadolobha ayo kuyawuphindze kube nemadlelo, lapho iyawuphumulela khona imihlambi yetimvu neyetimbuti tebelusi." 
Jeremiah33:13 Emadolobheni elive letintsaba, newasemahlandzeni ngasenshonalanga neNegevu, newaseveni lakaBhenjamini, nasemitini letungelete iJerusalema, nasemadolobheni akaJuda imihlambi yetimvu neyetimbuti iyawuphindze yendlule ngaphansi kwesandla salowo lotibalako,’ kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah33:14 “Simakadze utsi: ‘Ayeta emalanga, lapho ngiyawusifeza khona setsembiso semusa lengasenta kuyo indlu yaka-Israyeli kanye nendlu yakaJuda." 
Jeremiah33:15 “ ‘Kulawo malanga nangaleso sikhatsi ngiyawuhlumisa Ligala Lelilungile leliyawuhluma elusendvweni lwendlu yakaDavide. Uyakwenta lokubucotfo bemtsetfo nalokulungile eveni. 
Jeremiah33:16 Kulawo malanga Juda uyawusindziswa, neJerusalema ihlale iphephile. Lelo-ke libito lalo leliyawubitwa ngalo: Simakadze Kulunga Kwetfu.’" 
Jeremiah33:17 “Ngobe naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: ‘Davide ngeke eswele indvodza leyawuhlala esihlalweni sebukhosi sendlu yaka-Israyeli," 
Jeremiah33:18 ngisho nebaphristi imbala labangemaLevi, bangeke beswele indvodza letakuma embikwami njalonjalo kutekwenta iminikelo yalokutinhlavu, kanye nekwetfula imihlatjelo.’ ”" 
Jeremiah33:19 Livi laSimakadze lefika kuJeremiya, latsi:" 
Jeremiah33:20 “Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: ‘Naningephula sivumelwane sami nelilanga, nesivumelwane sami nebusuku, kuze kutsi lilanga nebusuku kungabe kusasebenta ngesikhatsi sako," 
Jeremiah33:21 ngako sivumelwane sami naDavide, inceku yami, kanye nesivumelwane sami nemaLevi labaphristi labakhonta embikwami, naso-ke siyakwephulwa, naDavide ngeke abe asaba nesitukulwane lesitawubusa esihlalweni sakhe sebukhosi." 
Jeremiah33:22 Ngiyakwenta titukulwane taDavide, inceku yami, nemaLevi lakhonta embikwami tibe tinyenti tibe ngangetinkhanyeti tesibhakabhaka, tidzimate tingabaleki njengesihlabatsi saselusentseni lwaselwandle.’ ”" 
Jeremiah33:23 Livi laSimakadze lefika kuJeremiya, latsi:" 
Jeremiah33:24 “Awukanaki yini kutsi labantfu batsi: ‘Simakadze uyilahlile lemibuso lemibili layikhetsa’? Ngako bababukela phansi labantfu bami, ababatsatsi ngekutsi nabo basive." 
Jeremiah33:25 Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: ‘Kube bengingakasimisi sivumelwane sami nelilanga, nebusuku, ngingakamisi nemitsetfo yelizulu nemhlaba," 
Jeremiah33:26 bengitakutilahla titukulwane taJakobe netaDavide, inceku yami, futsi bengingayikuyikhetsa lenye yemadvodzana akhe kutsi ibuse etikwetitukulwane ta-Abrahama, na-Isaka, naJakobe. Ngobe ngiyawubuyisela tibusiso tabo, ngibe nesihawu kubo.’ ”" 
Jeremiah34:1 Kwatsi ngesikhatsi Nebukhadnezari, inkhosi yaseBhabhulona, nawo onkhe emabutfo akhe, nayo yonkhe imibuso yakhe, netive tonkhe letatingaphansi kwakhe tisalwa neJerusalema nawo onkhe emadolobha layitungeletile, kwefika livi kuJeremiya liphuma kuSimakadze, latsi:" 
Jeremiah34:2 “Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, Nkulunkulu wema-Israyeli, utsi: Hamba uye kuSedekiya, inkhosi yakaJuda, ufike umtjele utsi: ‘Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: Lelidolobha sengitalinikela enkhosini yaseBhabhulona, futsi italibhubhisa ngemlilo." 
Jeremiah34:3 Ngeke uphunyule esandleni sakhe nase akubambile, kodvwa nakanjani utawutfunjwa unikelwe esandleni sakhe. Inkhosi yaseBhabhulona utayibona ngemehlo akho, futsi itawukhuluma nawe buso nebuso. Wena utakuya eBhabhulona." 
Jeremiah34:4 “ ‘Noko vani setsembiso saSimakadze, wena Sedekiya, nkhosi yakaJuda. Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze macondzana nawe, utsi: Ungeke ubulawe ngenkemba," 
Jeremiah34:5 uyakufa ngekuthula. Njengobe bantfu benta umngcwabo wemlilo, bahlonipha boyihlo, emakhosi akucala lakwendvulela, kanjalo nawe bayawukwentela umlilo bakuhloniphe balile, batsi: “Maye! Awu, nkhosi!” Mine matfupha ngenta nasi setsembiso, kusho Simakadze.’ ”" 
Jeremiah34:6 Ngako Jeremiya, umphrofethi, konkhe loku wakutjela Sedekiya, inkhosi yakaJuda, eJerusalema," 
Jeremiah34:7 ngesikhatsi emabutfo enkhosi yaseBhabhulona alwa neJerusalema kanye nalamanye emadolobha akaJuda labesabambelele angakehlulwa, iLakhishi ne-Azekha. Lawa bekungiwo odvwana emadolobha labebiyelwe labesele kaJuda." 
Jeremiah34:8 Livi laSimakadze lefika kuJeremiya emvakwekutsi inkhosi Sedekiya seyente sivumelwane nabo bonkhe bantfu baseJerusalema kutewumemetela inkhululeko yetigcili. 
Jeremiah34:9 Bonkhe bantfu kwakufanele bakhulule tigcili tabo letingemaHebheru, bonkhe labadvuna nalabasikati; bekufanele kubete namunye losagcilate umnakabo longumJuda." 
Jeremiah34:10 Ngako tonkhe tindvuna nebantfu labangena kulesivumelwane bavumelana kutsi batatikhulula tigcili tabo letidvuna naletisikati, bangabe basabagcilata. Bavumelana, base bayatikhulula letigcili." 
Jeremiah34:11 Kodvwa emvakwaloko bajikisa tingcondvo tabo, baphindze batibuyisa tigcili tabo lababetikhululile batigcilata futsi." 
Jeremiah34:12 Livi laSimakadze lase liyefika kuJeremiya, latsi:" 
Jeremiah34:13 “Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze Nkulunkulu wema-Israyeli, utsi: Ngenta sivumelwane nabokhokho benu ngesikhatsi ngibakhipha eGibhithe, eveni lebugcili. Ngatsi:" 
Jeremiah34:14 ‘Njalo nje ngemnyaka wesikhombisa ngulowo nalowo wenu kufanele akhulule sigcili sakhe lesingumHebheru lotitsengise yena. Nasakusebentele iminyaka lesitfupha, kufanele umkhulule.’ Noko boyihlo abazange bangilalele, futsi abanginakanga nekunginaka." 
Jeremiah34:15 Khona nyalo nje nike naphendvuka nenta lokuhle emehlweni ami, kwaba ngulowo nalowo wenu wamemetela inkhululeko kubantfu bakubo. Nidzimate nenta ngisho nesivumelwane embikwami nisendlini leneLibito lami." 
Jeremiah34:16 Kodvwa manje senijikile nahlambalata Libito lami; ngulowo nalowo wenu sewubuyise letigcili letidvuna naletisikati lebese nitikhululile kutsi tihambe tiye lapho titsandza khona. Seniticindzetele kutsi tiphindze tibe tigcili tenu futsi! 
Jeremiah34:17 “Ngako-ke, naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: Anikangilaleli; anikayimemeteli inkhululeko yebantfu bakini. Ngako manje sengimemetela ‘inkhululeko’ yenu, kusho Simakadze, ‘inkhululeko’ yekubulawa ngenkemba, nangesifo lesibulalanako kanye nangendlala. Ngiyawunenta nenyanyeke kuyo yonkhe imibuso yemhlaba." 
Jeremiah34:18 Lamadvodza lephule sivumelwane sami angete atigcwalisa timiso tesivumelwane lasente embikwami, ngiyakuwaphatsa njengalelinkhonyane lalihlahlela ekhatsi laba tincetu letimbili ase ahamba emkhatsini waletincetu acinisa lesivumelwane." 
Jeremiah34:19 Baholi bakaJuda nebaseJerusalema, nebatsenwa, nebaphristi kanye nabo bonkhe bantfu belive labebahamba emkhatsini waletincetu talelinkhonyane," 
Jeremiah34:20 ngiyawubanikela etitseni tabo, letifuna timphilo tabo. Tidvumbu tabo tiyawuba kudla kwetinyoni telizulu nekwetilwane tesiganga." 
Jeremiah34:21 “Sedekiya, inkhosi yakaJuda, kanye netindvuna takhe ngiyawubanikela etitseni tabo letifunana netimphilo tabo, ebutfweni lenkhosi yaseBhabhulona leseyisukile kini." 
Jeremiah34:22 Simakadze utsi: Ngiyawukhipha umlayeto ngibabuyise kulelidolobha. Bayakulwa nalo, balitfumbe bese bayalishisa. Emadolobha akaJuda ngiyakuwenta abe tindzala, kuze kusale kukhala libhungane kuwo.”" 
Jeremiah35:1 Leli livi leleta kuJeremiya liphuma kuSimakadze ngesikhatsi kusabusa Jehoyakimu, umsa waJosaya, inkhosi yakaJuda, litsi:" 
Jeremiah35:2 “Hamba uye emndenini wemaRekhabi, ubameme kutsi bete kulelinye lemakamelo lasemhlubulweni wendlu yaSimakadze, ubanike liwayini kutsi banatse.”" 
Jeremiah35:3 Ngako ngahamba ngayawulandza Jazaniya, umsa waJeremiya, umsa waHabasiniya, nabomnakabo, nawo onkhe emadvodzana akhe, wonkhe umndeni wemaRekhabi." 
Jeremiah35:4 Ngabangenisa endlini yaSimakadze, ekamelweni lemadvodzana aHanana, umsa wa-Igdaliya, umuntfu waNkulunkulu. Laliseceleni kwelikamelo letindvuna, lelalingetulu kwaleli laMaseya, umsa waShalumi, labengumahlalesangweni." 
Jeremiah35:5 Ngase ngibeka titja letatigcwele liwayini nalamanye emakomishi embikwemadvodza emndeni wemaRekhabi, ngakhuluma kuwo ngatsi: “Ase ninatse nali liwayini.”" 
Jeremiah35:6 Kodvwa baphendvula batsi: “Asilinatsi liwayini, ngobe khokho wetfu Jonadabi, umsa waRekhabi, wasinika lowo myalo watsi: ‘Nine netitukulwane tenu ningacali nilinatse liwayini.’" 
Jeremiah35:7 Waphindze watsi futsi: ‘Ningacali nakhe tindlu, nihlanyele inhlanyelo nome tivini. Ningacali nibe nako ngisho nome kunye kwaletintfo, kodvwa kufanele nihlale emathendeni ngato tonkhe tikhatsi. Ngenca yaloko niyawuphila sikhatsi lesidze kulelo live, lapho niyimihambima khona.’" 
Jeremiah35:8 Sikwentile konkhe khokho wetfu, Jonadabi, umsa waRekhabi, lasiyala ngako. Tsine, nabomnaketfu, nemadvodzana etfu, nemadvodzakati etfu asizange sesilinatse liwayini," 
Jeremiah35:9 nome sakhe tindlu tekuhlala, kantsi futsi asizange sibe netivini, nemasimi nome tivuno." 
Jeremiah35:10 Seloku sihlala emathendeni; sakuhlonipha ngalokuphelele konkhe khokho wetfu Jonadabi lasiyala ngako kutsi sikwente. 
Jeremiah35:11 Kodvwa kwatsi Nebukhadnezari, inkhosi yaseBhabhulona, navimbetela lelive, satsi: ‘Wotani, kufanele sihambe siye eJerusalema sitewubalekela emabutfo emaBhabhulona newema-Aramu.’ Nguko nje silapha eJerusalema.”" 
Jeremiah35:12 Livi laSimakadze lase lifika kuJeremiya, latsi:" 
Jeremiah35:13 “Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, Nkulunkulu wema-Israyeli, utsi: Hamba uyewutjela bantfu bakaJuda nebaseJerusalema, utsi: Simakadze utsi: ‘Ningeke yini nifundze sifundvo nilalele emavi ami?" 
Jeremiah35:14 Jonadabi, umsa waRekhabi, wayala emadvodzana akhe kutsi angalinatsi liwayini, lowo myalo awugcinile. Kuze kube ngulamuhla akalinatsi liwayini, ngobe ahlonipha umyalo wakhokho wawo. Kodvwa mine sengikhulume kini emaphindzephindze, kodvwa nine anikangilaleli." 
Jeremiah35:15 Ngatfumela kini tonkhe tinceku tami baphrofethi emaphindzephindze. Babetsi: “Ngulowo nalowo kini kufanele atiyekele tindlela takhe letimbi, nijikise imihambo yenu. Ningacali nilandzele labanye bonkulunkulu kutsi nibakhonte. Nanenta njalo-ke, niyawuhlala kulelive lengalipha nine naboyihlo.” Kodvwa anikanginaki, futsi anikangilaleli." 
Jeremiah35:16 Titukulwane taJonadabi, umsa waRekhabi, tona tiwentile lomyalo letanikwa wona ngukhokho wato, kodvwa labantfu abakangilaleli mine.’" 
Jeremiah35:17 “Ngako-ke, naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze Nkulunkulu longuSomandla, Nkulunkulu wema-Israyeli, utsi: ‘Lalelani! Ngitakwehlisela etikwaJuda nasetikwabo bonkhe labahlala eJerusalema yonkhe inhlekelele lengitsite itawubehlela. Ngakhuluma kubo, kodvwa abazange bangilalele; ngababita, kodvwa abazange basabele.’ ”" 
Jeremiah35:18 Ngako Jeremiya wakhuluma kulomndeni wemaRekhabi, watsi: “Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, Nkulunkulu wema-Israyeli, utsi: ‘Niwulalele nawenta umyalo wakhokho wenu Jonadabi, nenta konkhe lanitjela kona kutsi nibokwenta.’" 
Jeremiah35:19 Ngako-ke, naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, Nkulunkulu wema-Israyeli, utsi: ‘Jonadabi, umsa waRekhabi, ngeke eswele umuntfu lotawukhonta mine.’ ”" 
Jeremiah36:1 Ngemnyaka wesine waJehoyakimu, umsa waJosaya, inkhosi yakaJuda, kwefika nali livi kuJeremiya livela kuSimakadze, litsi:" 
Jeremiah36:2 “Tsatsa incwadzi legocotwako ubhale kuyo onkhe emavi lengiwakhulumile kuwe mayelana na-Israyeli naJuda kanye nato tonkhe letinye tive, kusukela esikhatsini lengacala ngaso kukhuluma kuwe, ekubuseni kwenkhosi Josaya, kuze kube ngunyalo." 
Jeremiah36:3 Mhlawumbe bantfu bakaJuda nabeva ngato tonkhe letigameko lengase ngitimisele kubashaya ngato, ngulowo nalowo kubo uyawuphendvuka endleleni yakhe lembi, ngako-ke ngiyawube sengiyabatsetselela ebubini babo nasetonweni tabo.”" 
Jeremiah36:4 Ngako Jeremiya wase ubita Bharuki, umsa waNeriya; kwatsi ngesikhatsi Jeremiya amtjela onkhe emavi labewatjelwe nguSimakadze, Bharuki wabe sewuyawabhala phansi encwadzini legocotwako." 
Jeremiah36:5 Jeremiya wase utjela Bharuki watsi: “Ngivalelwe; angikwati kuyawungena ethempelini laSimakadze. 
Jeremiah36:6 Ngako-ke uboya endlini yaSimakadze, mhlazana kuzilwe kudla, ufike ufundzele bantfu onkhe lamavi aSimakadze lowabhale kulencwadzi, njengobe uwatjeliwe. Wafundze embikwabo bonkhe bantfu bakaJuda labetile, baphuma emadolobheni abo." 
Jeremiah36:7 Mhlawumbe bayawutincengela embikwaSimakadze, ngulowo nalowo aphendvuke endleleni yakhe lembi, ngobe lulaka nentfukutselo lasayibekile Simakadze kumelana nalabantfu yinkhulu kakhulu.”" 
Jeremiah36:8 Bharuki, umsa waNeriya, wenta konkhe loko labekutjelwe ngumphrofethi Jeremiya kutsi akwente; wavele wafundza lamavi aSimakadze kuleyo ncwadzi asethempelini laSimakadze." 
Jeremiah36:9 Kwatsi ngenyanga yemfica yemnyaka wesihlanu waJehoyakimu, umsa waJosaya, inkhosi yakaJuda, kwamenyetelwa sikhatsi sekuzila kudla embikwaSimakadze kubo bonkhe baseJerusalema nabo bonkhe lababephuma emadolobheni akaJuda." 
Jeremiah36:10 Kwatsi Bharuki asekamelweni laGemariya, umsa waShafani, labengumabhalane, lelalisesibuyeni lesisetulu ekungeneni kweLisango Lelisha lasethempelini, wabafundzela bonkhe bantfu lababesethempelini laSimakadze emavi emphrofethi Jeremiya, awafundza kulencwadzi legocotwako." 
Jeremiah36:11 Kwatsi Mikhaya, umsa waGemariya, umsa waShafani, nakeva onkhe lamavi aSimakadze lakulencwadzi legocotwako," 
Jeremiah36:12 wehlela ekamelweni lamabhalane esigodlweni senkhosi, lapho kwakuhleti khona onkhe emalunga abandlancane: bo-Elishama, labengumabhalane, naDelaya, umsa waShemaya, na-Elnathani, umsa wa-Akbori, naGemariya, umsa waShafani, naSedekiya, umsa waHananiya, kanye nato tonkhe letinye tiphatsimandla." 
Jeremiah36:13 Kwatsi emvakwekube Mikhaya asabatjele konkhe labekuve ngaBharuki akufundzela bantfu kulencwadzi legocotwako," 
Jeremiah36:14 tonkhe tiphatsimandla tatfumela Jehudi, umsa waNethaniya, umsa waShelemiya, umsa waKushi, kutsi ayewutjela Bharuki atsi: “Wota lapha naleyo ncwadzi lebewufundza kuyo, ufundzela bantfu.” Ngako Bharuki, umsa waNeriya, waya kubo nalencwadzi legocotwako, ayiphetse ngesandla." 
Jeremiah36:15 Batsi kuye: “Sicela uhlale lapha phansi, usifundzele yona natsi.” Ngako Bharuki wabafundzela yona." 
Jeremiah36:16 Batsi nabaweva onkhe lamavi, babukana bodvwana betfukile, bakhuluma kuBharuki batsi: “Kufanele siwabikele inkhosi onkhe lamavi.”" 
Jeremiah36:17 Base babuta Bharuki batsi: “Asewusho, kwenteke kanjani kutsi ubhale konkhe loku? Ukutjelwe nguJeremiya yini?”" 
Jeremiah36:18 Bharuki wabaphendvula watsi: “Yebo, ungitjele onkhe lamavi ngemlomo, mine ngawabhala phansi ngenki kulencwadzi legocotwako.”" 
Jeremiah36:19 Letiphatsimandla tase titjela Bharuki, tatsi: “Wena naJeremiya, hambani niyewubhaca. Akubete namunye umuntfu lowatiko kutsi nikuphi.”" 
Jeremiah36:20 Batsi nase babeke lencwadzi legocotwako ekamelweni la-Elishama labengumabhalane, base baya enkhosini esibuyeni, bafike bayibikela konkhe." 
Jeremiah36:21 Inkhosi yatfumela Jehudi kutsi ayewulandza lencwadzi legocotwako. Jehudi wabuya nayo ekamelweni la-Elishama labengumabhalane, wayifundzela inkhosi kanye netiphatsimandla tayo tonkhe letatiyisingatsile." 
Jeremiah36:22 Kwase kuyinyanga yemfica, inkhosi yayihleti endlini yayo yasebusika yotsa imbawula yemlilo leyayisembikwayo." 
Jeremiah36:23 Kwakutsi njalo nje Jehudi nase afundze tinhlu letintsatfu nome letine talencwadzi legocotwako, inkhosi itijube ngemukhwa webabhali, itijike kulembawula yemlilo, yaze yaphelela yonkhe lencwadzi legocotwako ishiswa emlilweni." 
Jeremiah36:24 Inkhosi kanye nabo bonkhe lababeyisingatsile, labaweva onkhe lawo mavi, abazange sebakhombise nalokuncane nje kwesaba, futsi abatihluphanga ngekudzabula tingubo tabo ngekutisola." 
Jeremiah36:25 Kwala nome bo-Elnathani, naDelaya, naGemariya sebayincenga inkhosi kutsi ingayishisi lencwadzi legocotwako, ayizange seyifune nekuva kutsi batsini." 
Jeremiah36:26 Esikhundleni saloko, inkhosi yatfumela boJerameli, umntfwanenkhosi, naSeraya, umsa wa-Azriyeli, naShelemiya, umsa wa-Abdeyeli, kutsi bayewubopha boBharuki, umbhali, naJeremiya, umphrofethi, kodvwa Simakadze abesabafihlile." 
Jeremiah36:27 Emvakwekube inkhosi seyishise lencwadzi legocotwako leyayetfwele lamavi labebhalwe nguBharuki atjelwa nguJeremiya, kwefika livi laSimakadze kuJeremiya, latsi:" 
Jeremiah36:28 “Tsatsa lenye incwadzi legocotwako ubhale kuyo onkhe emavi labekulencwadzi yakucala legocotwako, leyashiswa nguJehoyakimu, inkhosi yakaJuda." 
Jeremiah36:29 Umtjele futsi Jehoyakimu, inkhosi yakaJuda, utsi: ‘Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: Ushise lencwadzi legocotwako watsi: “Ubhaleleni kuyo kutsi inkhosi yaseBhabhulona ngempela iyawuta itewubhubhisa lelive, icotfule imbokodvo nesisekelo?”" 
Jeremiah36:30 Ngako-ke, naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze ngaJehoyakimu, inkhosi yakaJuda, utsi: Iyakubate muntfu wakayo loyawuhlala esihlalweni saDavide sebukhosi; sidvumbu sayo siyawulahlwa ngephandle, sitfoswe lilanga emini, sicandziswe sitfwatfwa ebusuku." 
Jeremiah36:31 Ngiyawumjezisa yena kanye nebantfwana bakhe, kanye netinceku takhe letimsingatsile ngenca yebubi babo; ngiyakwehlisela etikwabo kanye nakubo bonkhe labakhile eJerusalema nakubantfu bakaJuda tonkhe tigameko lengitikhulumile ngemelana nabo, ngobe abakangilaleli.’ ”" 
Jeremiah36:32 Ngako Jeremiya wabuye watsatsa lenye incwadzi legocotwako wayiniketa umbhali Bharuki, umsa waNeriya; watsi Jeremiya nakakhulumako, Bharuki wabe abhala kuyo onkhe emavi alencwadzi legocotwako leyashiswa nguJehoyakimu, inkhosi yakaJuda, emlilweni. Manyenti futsi lamanye emavi lafananako lengetelwa kuwo." 
Jeremiah37:1 Sedekiya, umsa waJosaya, wabekwa waba yinkhosi yakaJuda, abekwa nguNebukhadnezari, inkhosi yaseBhabhulona; wabusa esikhundleni saJehoyakhini, umsa waJehoyakimu." 
Jeremiah37:2 Yena netinceku takhe letatimsingatsile kanye nebantfu nje belive abazange sebawanake emavi labekhulunywe nguSimakadze ngemphrofethi Jeremiya. 
Jeremiah37:3 Noko Sedekiya, inkhosi, watfumela Jukhali, umsa waShelemiya, kanye nemphristi Zefaniya, umsa waMaseya, kuJeremiya, umphrofethi, nemlayeto lotsi: “Siyakucela kutsi umane usithandazele kuSimakadze Nkulunkulu wetfu.”" 
Jeremiah37:4 Jeremiya abesakhululekile kutsi angangena aphume emkhatsini webantfu, ngobe abesengakafakwa ejele." 
Jeremiah37:5 Imphi yaFaro yase ishuce yaphuma eGibhithe, kwatsi baseBhabhulona labebavimbetela iJerusalema nabeva umbiko ngaloko, base bayayiyekela iJerusalema." 
Jeremiah37:6 Livi laSimakadze lase liyefika kuJeremiya, umphrofethi, litsi:" 
Jeremiah37:7 “Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, Nkulunkulu wema-Israyeli, utsi: Tjelani inkhosi yakaJuda lenitfume kutsi nitewubuta kimi nitsi: ‘Emabutfo aFaro, labeshucele kutanelekelela, atawuncandzeka abuyele eveni lawo, eGibhithe." 
Jeremiah37:8 BaseBhabhulona-ke batabe sebayabuya batewuhlasela lelidolobha, balitfumbe, bese balilumeka ngemlilo lishe liphele.’" 
Jeremiah37:9 “Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: Ningatiyengi nicabange nitsi: ‘BaseBhabhulona ngempela batawuyekela.’ Bangeke!" 
Jeremiah37:10 Ngisho nome benitayeyisa yonkhe imphi yebaseBhabhulona lenihlaselako, kusale kuphela nje tinkhubela temadvodza lapha emathendeni awo, betitawuphuma titelishisa lelidolobha.”" 
Jeremiah37:11 Kwatsi imphi yaseBhabhulona nase incandzekile yashiya iJerusalema ngenca yemabutfo akaFaro," 
Jeremiah37:12 naJeremiya wase uyalishiya lelidolobha waya eveni lakaBhenjamini kutsi ayewutfola naye sabelo sakhe selifa emkhatsini wesive sakhona. 
Jeremiah37:13 Kodvwa watsi nakefika eSangweni lakaBhenjamini, umphatsi wabogadzi, libito lakhe lekwakunguJiriya, umsa waShelemiya, umsa waHananiya, wambopha watsi kuye: “Uhlubukela kubaseBhabhulona!”" 
Jeremiah37:14 Jeremiya watsi: “Akusilo liciniso lelo, angihlubukeli kuya kubaseBhabhulona.” Kodvwa Jiriya akazange amlalele, esikhundleni saloko wabopha Jeremiya, wase ummikisa kuto tiphatsimandla." 
Jeremiah37:15 Tamtfukutselela Jeremiya, tatsi akashaywe; tase tiyambopha tamfaka endlini kaJonathani, labengumabhalane, ngobe yayentiwe lijele." 
Jeremiah37:16 Jeremiya wafakwa emgodzini welijele, lapho agcinwa khona sikhatsi lesidze." 
Jeremiah37:17 Inkhosi Sedekiya wase uyatfumela kutsi akalandvwe aletfwe kuye esigodlweni, lapho wafike wambuta ngasense, watsi: “Likhona yini livi lelivela kuSimakadze?” Jeremiya waphendvula watsi: “Yebo, likhona, litsi: Wena utawuniketelwa enkhosini yaseBhabhulona.”" 
Jeremiah37:18 Jeremiya wakhuluma enkhosini Sedekiya, watsi: “Cala lini lengilentile kuwe, nome-ke etindvuneni takho, nome kulesive lokwekutsi ningaze ningivalele ejele?" 
Jeremiah37:19 Baphi labaphrofethi benu labaniphrofethela batsi: ‘Inkhosi yaseBhabhulona ingeke ikuhlasele, nalelive ingeke ilente lutfo’?" 
Jeremiah37:20 Kodvwa-ke nyalo, nkhosi yami, inkhosi, mane ungilalele. Angiletse sikhalo sami kuwe: Mane ungete wangibuyisela endlini yakaJonathani longumabhalane, ngobe ngitawufela khona lapho.”" 
Jeremiah37:21 Inkhosi Sedekiya yase ikhipha umyalo kutsi Jeremiya akabekwe esibuyeni sabogadzi anikwe sinkhwa lesibuya esitaladini sebabhaki onkhe emalanga, size siphele sonkhe sinkhwa edolobheni. Ngako Jeremiya wahlala esibuyeni sabogadzi." 
Jeremiah38:1 BoShefathiya, umsa waMathani, naGedaliya, umsa waPhashuri, naJukhali, umsa waShelemiya, naPhashuri, umsa waMalkhiya, beva ngaloko Jeremiya labebatjele kona bonkhe bantfu ngesikhatsi atsi:" 
Jeremiah38:2 “Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: ‘Wonkhe lohlala kulelidolobha uyakufa ngenkemba, nome ngendlala, nome ngesifo lesibulalanako, kodvwa wonkhe lohambako aye kumaBhabhulona, uyawuphila. Uyawuphepha nekuphila kwakhe; uyawuphila.’" 
Jeremiah38:3 Naku futsi lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: ‘Ngempela, lelidolobha liyawunikwa emabutfo enkhosi yaseBhabhulona layakulitfumba.’ ”" 
Jeremiah38:4 Tiphatsimandla takhuluma enkhosini, tatsi: “Lomuntfu kufanele abulawe. Utsela emanti emadvolweni emasotja lasele kulelidoloba, nakuwabo bonkhe bantfu, ngaletintfo latishoko kubo. Lomuntfu akacondzi lokuhle ngalabantfu, kodvwa ubafisela lokubi.”" 
Jeremiah38:5 Inkhosi Sedekiya yaphendvula yatsi: “Usetandleni tenu, inkhosi ingeke yente lutfo lolungamelana nani.”" 
Jeremiah38:6 Ngako batsatsa Jeremiya bamfaka emgodzini wakaMalkhiya, umntfwanenkhosi, lowawusekhatsi esibuyeni sabogadzi. Jeremiya bamehlisa ngetindophi, bamehlisela emgodzini, noko wawute emanti lapha kuwo, kwakuneludzaka nje. Jeremiya watika kuloludzaka." 
Jeremiah38:7 Kodvwa Ebedi Meleki, umKushe, labengumtsenwa esigodlweni senkhosi, weva kutsi Jeremiya sebamfake kulomgodzi. Kwatsi inkhosi isehleti eSangweni lakaBhenjamini," 
Jeremiah38:8 Ebedi Meleki waphuma esigodlweni waya kuyo watsi: 
Jeremiah38:9 “Nkhosi yami, inkhosi, labantfu bente sento lesibi kabi kuJeremiya, umphrofethi. Sebamfake emgodzini lapho atawubulawa yindlala adzimate afe, ngobe sekute sinkhwa lapha edolobheni.”" 
Jeremiah38:10 Inkhosi yase ikhipha Ebedi Meleki, umKushe, yamtfuma, yatsi: “Tsatsa emadvodza langema-30 lapha, nihambe nawo niyewukhipha Jeremiya, umphrofethi, lena emgodzini nyalo, asengakafi.”" 
Jeremiah38:11 Ngako Ebedi Meleki watsatsa emadvodza wahamba nawo, bangena endlini leyayingaphansi kwendlu yengcebo yasesigodlweni senkhosi. Watsatsa emanikiniki netidvwedvwe, wakwehlisa netindophi taya kuJeremiya emgodzini." 
Jeremiah38:12 Ebedi Meleki, umKushe, wakhuluma kuJeremiya watsi: “Faka nankho emanikiniki netidvwedvwe emakhwapheni akho, khona ungetiwuhhudlwa nguletindophi.” Jeremiya wenta njalo," 
Jeremiah38:13 base bamdvonsa ngaletindophi bamkhiphela ngephandle kwalomgodzi. Jeremiya wahlala esibuyeni sabogadzi. 
Jeremiah38:14 Inkhosi Sedekiya yase itsi akulandvwe Jeremiya, umphrofethi, yatsi akaletfwe esangweni lesitsatfu lelithempeli laSimakadze, yatsi kuJeremiya: “Ngitawubuta lutfo. Ungafihli lutfo kimi.”" 
Jeremiah38:15 Jeremiya watsi kuSedekiya: “Nangikuphendvula, ungeke yini ungibulale? Ngisho nome ngikweluleka, ngeke ungilalele mine.”" 
Jeremiah38:16 Kodvwa inkhosi Sedekiya yafunga lesifungo ngasense kuJeremiya, yatsi: “Ngifunga kuphila kwaSimakadze, lowasinika umphefumulo, ngingeke ngikubulale, futsi ngingeke ngikunikele nakulabo labatingela imphilo yakho.”" 
Jeremiah38:17 Ngako Jeremiya wakhuluma kuSedekiya, watsi: “Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze Nkulunkulu longuSomandla, Nkulunkulu wema-Israyeli, utsi: ‘Nawuphakamisa tandla kuto tiphatsimandla tenkhosi yaseBhabhulona, utitfobe, imphilo yakho iyawuphepha, nalelidolobha lingeke lishiswe; wena nemndeni wakho niyawuphila." 
Jeremiah38:18 Kodvwa nawungeke ukhotsame kuto tiphatsimandla tenkhosi yaseBhabhulona, lelidolobha litawunikelwa etandleni temaBhabhulona, futsi bayakulishisa, nawe cobo lwakho ungeke uphunyule esandleni sabo.’ ”" 
Jeremiah38:19 Inkhosi Sedekiya yakhuluma kuJeremiya, yatsi: “Ngiyawesaba lamaJuda lasahlubuke aya kumaBhabhulona, ngobe encenye laba baseBhabhulona bangahle banginikele kuwo, afike angiphatse kabi.”" 
Jeremiah38:20 Jeremiya wayiphendvula watsi: “Bangeke bakunikele. Lalela Simakadze, ngekwenta loku lengikutjele kona. Khona-ke kutabe sekukuhambela kahle konkhe, imphilo yakho iphunyule ekufeni." 
Jeremiah38:21 Kodvwa nawala kuphakamisa tandla, naku Simakadze lakwembulile kimi kutsi:" 
Jeremiah38:22 Onkhe lamakhosikati lasele esigodlweni senkhosi yakaJuda, atawukhishwa ayiswe kuto tiphatsimandla tenkhosi yaseBhabhulona. Lamakhosikati ayawukhuluma kuwe, atsi: “ ‘Bakwedukisa baze bakwehlula, labo bangani bakho lobetsembako. Tinyawo takho titike ekhatsi eludzakeni; bangani bakho bakulahlile.’" 
Jeremiah38:23 “Onkhe emakhosikati akho nebantfwabakho bayawuyiswa kubaseBhabhulona, nawe cobo lwakho ngeke uphunyule etandleni tabo, kodvwa uyawubanjwa yinkhosi yaseBhabhulona, nalelidolobha liyawubhujiswa ngemlilo.”" 
Jeremiah38:24 Sedekiya wakhuluma kuJeremiya, watsi: “Ungatjeli muntfu ngalengcoco yetfu; ngaphandle kwaloko utakufa." 
Jeremiah38:25 Natingeva letiphatsimandla kutsi bengicoca nawe, tite kuwe tifike titsi: ‘Sitjele kutsi utsiteni enkhosini, nekutsi inkhosi itsiteni kuwe, ungasifihleli, ngaphandle kwaloko siyawukubulala,’" 
Jeremiah38:26 ubobe sewutitjela utsi: ‘Bengitincengela enkhosini kutsi imane ingangibuyiseli endlini kaJonathani kuyawufela khona.’ ” 
Jeremiah38:27 Tonkhe letiphatsimandla teta kuJeremiya tatawumbuta, watitjela konkhe loko labekutjelwe yinkhosi kutsi akusho. Ngako tangabe tisasho lutfo kuye, ngobe kute namunye labeyivile lengcoco yakhe nenkhosi." 
Jeremiah38:28 Jeremiya wahlala esibuyeni sabogadzi, kwaze kwaba lilanga leyatfunjwa ngalo iJerusalema." 
Jeremiah39:1 IJerusalema yatfunjwa kanjena-ke: Ngemnyaka wemfica wekubusa kwaSedekiya, inkhosi yakaJuda, ngenyanga yelishumi, Nebukhadnezari, inkhosi yaseBhabhulona, washuca wayawuhlasela iJerusalema, washuca nayo yonkhe imphi yakhe wayivimbetela." 
Jeremiah39:2 Kwatsi ngelilanga lemfica enyangeni yesine ngemnyaka welishumi nanye waSedekiya, batifohla tibondza telidolobha bangena." 
Jeremiah39:3 Tonkhe tiphatsimandla tenkhosi yaseBhabhulona tase tiyangena tatsatsa tindzawo tato eSangweni Lelisekhatsi Nendzawo: boNegali Sareseri waseSamgari, naNebo Sasekhimi, labengumphatsi wetindvuna, naNegali Sareseri labesiphatsimandla lesikhulu, kanye nato tonkhe letinye tiphatsimandla tenkhosi yaseBhabhulona." 
Jeremiah39:4 Kwatsi Sedekiya, inkhosi yakaJuda, nawo onkhe emabutfo nakatibona letiphatsimandla, babaleka; baphuma kulelidolobha ebusuku, babaleka ngendlela yengadze yenkhosi, ngelisango lelisemkhatsini wetibondza letimbili, babhekisa emabombo kuyo i-Arabha." 
Jeremiah39:5 Kodvwa lamabutfo aseBhabhulona abacosha, akhandza Sedekiya etsafeni laseJerikho. Ambamba ammikisa kuNebukhadnezari, inkhosi yaseBhabhulona, labeseRibla, eveni laseHamathi, lapho akhipha khona sigwebo sakhe kuye." 
Jeremiah39:6 Kwatsi khona lapho eRibla inkhosi yaseBhabhulona yabulala emadvodzana aSedekiya embikwemehlo akhe abukile, yabulala nabo bonkhe labahloniphekile bakaJuda." 
Jeremiah39:7 Wase ukupuluta emehlo aSedekiya, wambopha ngetinketane telitfusi kuze amyise eBhabhulona." 
Jeremiah39:8 BaseBhabhulona basilumeka ngemlilo sigodlo senkhosi kanye netindlu tebantfu; babhidlita netibondza taseJerusalema. 
Jeremiah39:9 Nebuzaradani, indvuna yabomahlalesangweni benkhosi, watfumba bantfu lababesele edolobheni kanye nalabanye nje bantfu labebasele, wabayisa eBhabhulona kanye nalabo labahlubuke baya kuye." 
Jeremiah39:10 Kodvwa Nebuzaradani, indvuna yabomahlalesangweni benkhosi, washiya eveni lakaJuda labanye balabo labamphofu lababengenalutfo, kwatsi ngaleso sikhatsi wabanika tivini nemasimi." 
Jeremiah39:11 Nebukhadnezari, inkhosi yaseBhabhulona, abesanike Nebuzaradani, indvuna yabomahlalesangweni, umyalo ngaJeremiya, watsi:" 
Jeremiah39:12 “Ubomtsatsa, umnakekele kahle, ungamenti lutfo, kodvwa umentele konkhe lakucelako.”" 
Jeremiah39:13 Ngako Nebuzaradani, indvuna yabomahlalesangweni, naNebushazbani, indvuna lenkhulu yesigodlo, naNegali Sareseri, labesiphatsimandla lesikhulu, kanye nato tonkhe letinye tiphatsimandla tenkhosi yaseBhabhulona" 
Jeremiah39:14 tatfumela umyalo wekutsi Jeremiya akakhishwe esibuyeni sabogadzi. Base bammikisa kuGedaliya, umsa wa-Ahikamu, umsa waShafani, kutsi amtsatse ambuyisele ekhaya lakhe. Ngako wahlala nebantfu bakubo." 
Jeremiah39:15 Ngesikhatsi Jeremiya asevalelwe lapha esibuyeni sabogadzi, kwefika livi laSimakadze kuye, latsi:" 
Jeremiah39:16 “Hamba utjele Ebedi Meleki, umKushe, utsi: ‘Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, Nkulunkulu wema-Israyeli, utsi: Sengitawugcwalisa emavi ami lamelana nalelidolobha ngitakuwagcwalisa ngesigameko, hhayi ngalokuhle. Ngaleso sikhatsi ayawugcwaliseka embikwemehlo akho." 
Jeremiah39:17 Kodvwa ngiyakukwephula wena ngalelo langa, ngeke uniketelwe etandleni talabo lobesabako, kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah39:18 Ngiyawukusindzisa, ngeke ufe ngenkemba, kodvwa wena uyawuphunyula nemphilo yakho, ngobe wena wetsembele kimi, kusho Simakadze.’ ”" 
Jeremiah40:1 Kwefika livi laSimakadze kuJeremiya emvakwekube Nebuzaradani, indvuna yabomahlalesangweni, asamkhululile eRama. Abemkhandze Jeremiya aboshwe ngetinketane emkhatsini wabo bonkhe batfunjwa lababephuma eJerusalema nakaJuda, batfunjwa bayiswa eBhabhulona." 
Jeremiah40:2 Kwatsi lendvuna yabomahlalesangweni nayimtfola Jeremiya, yakhuluma kuye, yatsi: “Simakadze longuNkulunkulu wakho wakhipha livi kutsi lendzawo yehlelwe ngulesigemegeme." 
Jeremiah40:3 Manje Simakadze sewusehlisile vele, sewente njengaloku abevele ashito kutsi utakwenta. Konkhe loku kwentiwe kutsi nine bantfu none kuSimakadze, nangete namlalela." 
Jeremiah40:4 Kodvwa lamuhla sengiyakukhulula kuletinketane letisetandleni takho. Wota sambe nawe siye eBhabhulona, nawutsandza, ngitakunakekela. Kodvwa nawungafuni, ungeti. Buka la, lonkhe lelive lisembikwakho, yani lapho utsandza kuya khona.”" 
Jeremiah40:5 Noko, Jeremiya angakagucuki kutsi ahambe, Nebuzaradani wengeta watsi: “Buyela emuva kaGedaliya, umsa wa-Ahikamu, umsa waShafani, lobekwe yinkhosi yaseBhabhulona etikwemadolobha akaJuda, uyewuhlala naye kanye nebantfu, nome-ke uye nome ngukuphi lapho utsandza kuya khona.” Ngako indvuna yabomahlalesangweni yamnika umphako nesipho, yase iyamyekela, wahamba." 
Jeremiah40:6 Ngako Jeremiya wahamba waya kaGedaliya, umsa wa-Ahikamu, eMispa, wahlala naye asemkhatsini webantfu lababesele eveni." 
Jeremiah40:7 Kwatsi kube tonkhe tindvuna temphi kanye nemadvodza ato labesasele etigangeni, beve kutsi inkhosi yaseBhabhulona yase ibeke Gedaliya, umsa wa-Ahikamu, kutsi abe ngumbusi welive, wambeka nekutsi engamele emadvodza, nebafati, nebantfwana lababemphofu kakhulu kulelo live lababengakatfunjwa bayiswa eBhabhulona," 
Jeremiah40:8 befika kaGedaliya eMispa, bo-Ishmayeli, umsa waNethaniya, naJohanani kanye naJonathani, emadvodzana aKhareya, naSeraya, umsa waThanhumethi, nemadvodzana a-Efayi waseNethofa, naJazaniya, indvodzana yemMakha, nemadvodza abo." 
Jeremiah40:9 Gedaliya, umsa wa-Ahikamu, umsa waShafani, wafunga kubo nakulamadvodza abo, watsi: “Ningesabi kukhonta emaBhabhulona. Yakhani lapha eveni nihlehle enkhosini yaseBhabhulona, kutabe sekunihambela kahle-ke." 
Jeremiah40:10 Mine-ke ngitawuhlala eMispa kutsi ngitewumelela nine kumaBhabhulona labeta lapha kitsi; kodvwa nine nitawuvuna liwayini, netitselo tasehlobo kanye nemafutsa, nikufake etitjeni tenu tekulondvolota, nihlale kulamadolobha leseniwatsetse.”" 
Jeremiah40:11 Kwatsi onkhe emaJuda labekaMowabi, naka-Amoni, naka-Edomu, nakuwo onkhe lamanye emave, nakeva kutsi inkhosi yaseBhabhulona ishiye imisalela kaJuda, yase ibeka Gedaliya, umsa wa-Ahikamu, umsa waShafani, kutsi abe ngumbusi wabo," 
Jeremiah40:12 onkhe abuyela eveni lakaJuda, kuGedaliya eMispa, esuka kuwo onkhe emave lapho abesakateleke khona. Afike avuna lesikhulu sivuno seliwayini nesetitselo tasehlobo." 
Jeremiah40:13 Johanani, umsa waKhareya, kanye nato tonkhe tindvuna temphi letatisesetigangeni, teta kuGedaliya eMispa" 
Jeremiah40:14 tatsi kuye: “Awati yini kutsi Bhalisi, inkhosi yema-Amoni, utfumele Ishmayeli, umsa waNethaniya, kutsi atekubulala?” Kodvwa Gedaliya, umsa wa-Ahikamu, akazange abakholwe." 
Jeremiah40:15 Ngako Johanani, umsa waKhareya, wakhuluma kuGedaliya ngasense eMispa, watsi: “Ngivumele ngiyewubulala Ishmayeli, umsa waNethaniya, kute namunye loyawukwati ngaloko. Kudzingeke ngani kutsi abulale wena, ente onkhe lamaJuda lasabutsene lapha kuwe asakateke, nensali yakaJuda iphele?”" 
Jeremiah40:16 Kodvwa Gedaliya, umsa wa-Ahikamu, wakhuluma kuJohanani, umsa waKhareya, watsi: “Ungacali wente intfo lenjalo! Loku lokushoko nga-Ishmayeli akusilo nani liciniso.”" 
Jeremiah41:1 Ngenyanga yesikhombisa, Ishmayeli, umsa waNethaniya, umsa wa-Elishama, labewendlu yasebukhosini, kantsi futsi abengulomunye wetindvuna tenkhosi, wefika nemadvodza lalishumi kuGedaliya, umsa wa-Ahikamu, eMispa. Batsi basadla ndzawonye lapho," 
Jeremiah41:2 Ishmayeli, umsa waNethaniya, kanye nalamadvodza lalishumi labenawo asukuma akhipha tinkemba tawo abulala Gedaliya, umsa wa-Ahikamu, umsa waShafani. Gedaliya abebekwe yinkhosi yaseBhabhulona, kutsi abe ngumbusi welive." 
Jeremiah41:3 Ishmayeli wachubeka wabulala onkhe emaJuda labenaGedaliya eMispa kanye nemadvodza emphi yemaBhabhulona labelapho. 
Jeremiah41:4 Ngakusasa, kusengakatiwa nekutsi Gedaliya ubulewe," 
Jeremiah41:5 kwefika emadvodza langema-80 aphuma eShekhemu, naseShilo, naseSamariya. Abehhule tilevu tawo, aklebhule timphahla tawo, atisika emitimbeni yawo, etfwele iminikelo yalokutinhlavu nenhlaka atewukunikela endlini yaSimakadze." 
Jeremiah41:6 Ishmayeli, umsa waNethaniya, waphuma eMispa kuyakuwahlangabeta, ahamba akhala; nasahlangane nawo, wafike watsi kuwo: “Wotani kuGedaliya, umsa wa-Ahikamu.”" 
Jeremiah41:7 Atsi kube angene ngekhatsi edolobheni, Ishmayeli, umsa waNethaniya, nalabehamba nabo wawabulala, tidvumbu tawo watijikijela emgodzini wemanti." 
Jeremiah41:8 Kodvwa kwaba khona emkhatsini wawo emadvodza lalishumi lacela Ishmayeli, atsi: “Sicela kutsi mane ungasibulali! Siphetse kolo nebhali, nemafutsa kanye neluju lwetinyosi lesikufihle lena esikhotseni.” Ngako wabayekela, wangete wababulala kanye nalaba labanye." 
Jeremiah41:9 Lomgodzi lapho alahla khona tonkhe letidvumbu talamadvodza labesawabulele kanye naGedaliya, bekungiwo lowo mgodzi lomkhulu lowawentiwe yinkhosi Asa, nakativikela ekuhlaselweni nguBhasha, inkhosi yaka-Israyeli. Nguwo-ke Ishmayeli, umsa waNethaniya, lawugcwalisa ngaletidvumbu." 
Jeremiah41:10 Ishmayeli wabe sewutfumba bonkhe labantfu lababeseMispa, emakhosatana kanye nabo bonkhe labanye lababesele lapho, Nebuzaradani, indvuna yabomahlalesangweni labebeke Gedaliya, umsa wa-Ahikamu, kutsi abe ngumbusi wabo. Ishmayeli, umsa waNethaniya, wabatfumba, washuca nabo wacondza ngesheya eveni laka-Amoni." 
Jeremiah41:11 Watsi kube Johanani, umsa waKhareya, netindvuna tonkhe temabutfo letatinaye beve ngayo yonkhe lenhlekelele leyase yentiwe ngu-Ishmayeli, umsa waNethaniya," 
Jeremiah41:12 bahlomisa onkhe emadvodza abo, bahamba bayawuhlasela Ishmayeli, umsa waNethaniya; bamkhandza ngasesitibeni lesikhulu eGibeyoni." 
Jeremiah41:13 Batsi kube bonkhe bantfu lababena-Ishmayeli babone Johanani, umsa waKhareya, nebaholi balemphi banaye, bajabula." 
Jeremiah41:14 Bonkhe lababetfunjwe ngu-Ishmayeli eMispa bancandzeka baya kuJohanani, umsa waKhareya." 
Jeremiah41:15 Kodvwa Ishmayeli, umsa waNethaniya, kanye nalamadvodza akakhe lasiphohlongo babalekela Johanani, bacondza ngesheya eveni lema-Amoni." 
Jeremiah41:16 Johanani, umsa waKhareya, kanye nato tonkhe tindvuna temphi letatinaye bahola yonkhe imisalela leyayiphuma eMispa lababeyemuke Ishmayeli, umsa waNethaniya, emvakwekubulala kwakhe Gedaliya, umsa wa-Ahikamu: emasotja, nebafati, nebantfwana, nebatsenwa, Johanani labebuye nabo eGibeyoni." 
Jeremiah41:17 Bachubeka, baze bayakuma eGeruthi Khimhamu lengaseceleni kweBhetlehema bacondze eGibhithe," 
Jeremiah41:18 babalekela emaBhabhulona. Babewesaba, ngobe Ishmayeli, umsa waNethaniya, abesabulele Gedaliya, umsa wa-Ahikamu, labesabekwe yinkhosi yaseBhabhulona kutsi abe ngumbusi welive." 
Jeremiah42:1 Kwatsi bonkhe baholi bemabutfo kanye naJohanani, umsa waKhareya, na-Azariya, umsa waHoshaya, beta nebantfu bato tonkhe tigaba," 
Jeremiah42:2 bafika kuJeremiya, umphrofethi, batsi: “Sicela ulalele nasi sicelo setfu, bese uthandazela yonkhe lensali kuSimakadze longuNkulunkulu wakho. Njengobe ubona nje, nome sake saba banyenti, kodvwa nyalo sesisele simbalwa." 
Jeremiah42:3 Thandaza ucele kuSimakadze Nkulunkulu wakho kutsi asitjele kutsi sesitakuya kuphi nekutsi kufanele senteni.” 
Jeremiah42:4 Jeremiya, umphrofethi, wabaphendvula, watsi: “Senginivile, ngempela ngitawuthandaza kuSimakadze Nkulunkulu wenu, njengobe nicelile. Ngitanitjela konkhe Simakadze lakushoko, futsi kute lengitanigodlela kona.”" 
Jeremiah42:5 Ngako base bakhuluma kuJeremiya, batsi: “Shangatsi Simakadze angaba ngufakazi loneliciniso nalowetsembekile lotawuphambana natsi, nasingakwenti ngendlela lengiyo konkhe Simakadze longuNkulunkulu wakho lakutfume kona kutsi usitjele." 
Jeremiah42:6 Nome ngabe kuvumelana natsi nome kuyasilahla, sitamlalela Simakadze, Nkulunkulu wetfu, lesikutfuma kuye, kuze kusihambele kahle, ngobe sitamlalela Simakadze longuNkulunkulu wetfu.”" 
Jeremiah42:7 Emvakwemalanga lalishumi livi laSimakadze lefika kuJeremiya. 
Jeremiah42:8 Ngako wabita wahlanganisa Johanani, umsa waKhareya, nato tonkhe tindvuna temabutfo letatinaye kanye nabo bonkhe bantfu kusukela kulomncane kuye kulomkhulu." 
Jeremiah42:9 Wakhuluma kubo, watsi: “Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuNkulunkulu wema-Israyeli lebeningitfume kuye kutsi ngiyekwetfula sicelo senu, utsi:" 
Jeremiah42:10 ‘Nanihlala kulelive, ngitawunakha nginganibhidliti; ngiyawunihlanyela nginganizuphuni, ngobe ngidzabuke kabi ngalenhlekelele lengiyehlisele etikwenu." 
Jeremiah42:11 Ningayesabi inkhosi yaseBhabhulona leseniyesaba nyalo. Simakadze utsi: Ningayesabi, ngobe nginani, futsi ngitanisindzisa nginikhulule etandleni tayo." 
Jeremiah42:12 Ngitaniphatsa ngesihawu, kuze kutsi nayo itewuba nesihawu kini, bese inibuyisela eveni lenu.’" 
Jeremiah42:13 “Noko nine nanitsi: ‘Tsine singeke sihlale kulelive,’ ngaloko ningamlaleli Simakadze longuNkulunkulu wenu," 
Jeremiah42:14 nome nitsi: ‘Cha, sitawuhamba siyewuhlala eGibhithe, lapho singetiwuyibona khona imphi, nome sive kukhala kwempalampala, nome silambele sinkhwa,’" 
Jeremiah42:15 ngako vanini livi laSimakadze, nine nsali yakaJuda. Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, Nkulunkulu wema-Israyeli, utsi: ‘Nanitimisele kuhamba niye eGibhithe, bese vele niyaya nekutsi niyewuhlala khona," 
Jeremiah42:16 inkemba leniyesabako itanikhandza khona lapho, nalendlala leniyesabako itanilandzela ize iyenikhandza eGibhithe, lapho nitawufike nifele khona." 
Jeremiah42:17 Ngempela, bonkhe labo labatimisele kuya eGibhithe bafike bayewuhlala khona, bayawubulawa ngenkemba, nangendlala, nangesifo lesibulalanako; kute nome munye wabo loyawusindza nome aphunyule kulenhlekelele lengitayehlisela etikwabo.’" 
Jeremiah42:18 “Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, Nkulunkulu wema-Israyeli, utsi: ‘Njengobe intfukutselo yami nelulaka lwami sekutfululelwe kulabo labebahlala eJerusalema, kanjalo lulaka lwami lutawutfululelwa etikwenu, naniya eGibhithe. Niyawuba yintfo yekucalekisa neyekwesabisa, nibe yintfo yekwetfuka nelihlazo; ningeke niphindze niyibone lendzawo.’" 
Jeremiah42:19 “Awu, nsali yakaJuda, Simakadze sewunitjelile watsi: ‘Ningayi eGibhithe.’ Kufanele nati kahle kutsi: Lamuhla ngiyanecwayisa" 
Jeremiah42:20 kutsi nenta siphosiso lesesabekako ngesikhatsi ningitfuma kuSimakadze longuNkulunkulu wenu, natsi: ‘Sithandazele kuSimakadze wetfu; sitjele konkhe lakushoko, sitakwenta.’" 
Jeremiah42:21 Lamuhla senginitjelile, kodvwa seloku anikamlaleli Simakadze longuNkulunkulu wenu kuko konkhe langitfume kona kutsi nginitjele." 
Jeremiah42:22 Ngako nyalo, yatini nekwati kutsi: Nitakufa ngenkemba, nangendlala, nangesifo lesibulalanako kuyo leyo ndzawo lapho nifuna kuyawuhlala khona.”" 
Jeremiah43:1 Watsi kube Jeremiya acedze kutjela bantfu onkhe lamavi aSimakadze longuNkulunkulu wabo, konkhe Simakadze labemtfume kutsi abatjele," 
Jeremiah43:2 Azariya, umsa waHoshaya, naJohanani, umsa waKhareya, nawo onkhe emadvodza labetibeka embili akhuluma kuJeremiya, atsi: “Unemanga! Simakadze longuNkulunkulu wetfu akakutfumi kutsi utewutsi: ‘Kufanele ningayi eGibhithe kuyawuhlala khona.’" 
Jeremiah43:3 Kodvwa Bharuki, umsa waNeriya, ukufake umoya wekuphambana natsi kutsi asinikele esandleni semaBhabhulona, khona atesibulala nome asitfumbele eBhabhulona.”" 
Jeremiah43:4 Ngako Johanani, umsa waKhareya, kanye nato tonkhe tindvuna temabutfo nebantfu bonkhe abawulalelanga umyalo waSimakadze kutsi bahlale eveni lakaJuda." 
Jeremiah43:5 Esikhundleni saloko, Johanani, umsa waKhareya, nato tonkhe tindvuna temabutfo tayihola embili yonkhe imisalela yakaJuda leyayibuyele kuhlala eveni lakaJuda, isuka etiveni tonkhe lapho yayisakateleke khona." 
Jeremiah43:6 Tayihola embili yonkhe: emadvodza, nebafati, nebantfwana, nemadvodzakati enkhosi, Nebuzaradani, indvuna yabomahlalesangweni, abewashiye naGedaliya, umsa wa-Ahikamu, umsa waShafani, tahamba naboJeremiya, umphrofethi, naBharuki, umsa waNeriya." 
Jeremiah43:7 Ngako bangena eGibhithe ngekungamlaleli Simakadze, baze bayawufika eThaphanesi." 
Jeremiah43:8 Livi laSimakadze lefika kuJeremiya aseThaphanesi, latsi:" 
Jeremiah43:9 “Akatsi emaJuda asakubuka, wena bese utsatsa ematje lamakhulu uhambe nawo uwagcibedzele kulo libumba lendlela yesitini lesemphundvwini yesigodlo saFaro eThaphanesi." 
Jeremiah43:10 Ubobe sewukhuluma kuwo utsi: ‘Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, Nkulunkulu wema-Israyeli, utsi: Ngitawutfumela inceku yami Nebukhadnezari, inkhosi yaseBhabhulona, ngiyawumisa sihlalo sakhe sebukhosi etikwalamatje lengiwagcibedzele lapha. Uyakwendlala umpheme wakhe webukhosi etikwawo." 
Jeremiah43:11 Uyawuta ahlasele iGibhithe, abaletsele kufa labo labemiselwe kufa, aletsele nekutfunjwa kulabo labamiselwe kutfunjwa, nenkemba kulabo labemiselwe inkemba." 
Jeremiah43:12 Uyakokhela umlilo emathempelini abonkulunkulu baseGibhithe; uyawubashisa abetfwale ahambe nabo batitfunjwa; live laseGibhithe uyawulihlantisisa, njengemelusi ahlantisisa lijazi lakhe kuze atsintsitse tonkhe tintfwala talo, aphume eGibithe angenamyocu." 
Jeremiah43:13 Lapho ethempelini lelilanga eGibhithe uyawubhidlita tinsika lekutsiwa tingcwele, ashise emathempeli abonkulunkulu baseGibhithe.’ ”" 
Jeremiah44:1 Leli livi lelefika kuJeremiya macondzana nawo onkhe emaJuda labehlala eGibhithe Lengentansi, eMigdoli, naseThaphanesi, naseMemfisi, naseGibhithe Lengenhla, litsi:" 
Jeremiah44:2 “Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, Nkulunkulu wema-Israyeli, utsi: Nayibona lenhlekelele lenkhulu lengayehlisela etikweJerusalema nasetikwawo onkhe emadolobha akaJuda. Lamuhla asahleti atindzala, kute muntfu lohlala kuwo," 
Jeremiah44:3 ngenca yebubi lobentiwe ngulabo bantfu. Bangicunula, ngabatfukutselela ngekutfuncisa kwabo imphepho nangekukhonta labanye bonkulunkulu labangazange babati bona kanye nani naboyihlo." 
Jeremiah44:4 Nganitfumelela tinceku tami baphrofethi emaphindzephindze letatitsi: ‘Ningayenti lentfo lesinengiso kimi.’ 
Jeremiah44:5 Kodvwa anizange ningilalele nome ninginake; anizange nigucuke nibushiye bubi nibo, nome nikuyekele kutfuncisa imphepho kulabanye bonkulunkulu." 
Jeremiah44:6 Ngako-ke, intfukutselo yami leyesabekako yatfululwa; yawavutsela lamadolobha akaJuda kanye netitaladi taseJerusalema, ngatenta taba tindzala letasala tikhala libhungane, njengobe kunjalo nalamuhla." 
Jeremiah44:7 “Nyalo-ke, naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, Nkulunkulu wema-Israyeli, utsi: Niyehliselelani lenhlekelele lenkhulu kangaka etikwenu ngekubesusa laba bakaJuda emadvodza, nebafati, nebantfwana kanye netinswane, kuze nisale senite insali?" 
Jeremiah44:8 Ningicunulelani ningitfukutselise ngaloko lokwentiwe tandla tenu, nangekutfuncisa imphepho kulabanye bonkulunkulu baseGibhithe, lapho nitewuhlala khona? Nitatibhubhisa nine, nitente nibe yintfo yekucalekisa nelihlazo etiveni tonkhe temhlaba." 
Jeremiah44:9 Senibukhohliwe yini lobubi lobentiwa boyihlo, nemakhosi akaJuda nemakhosikati awo kanye nebubi lobentiwa ngini nebafati benu eveni lakaJuda nasetitaladini taseJerusalema?" 
Jeremiah44:10 Kuze kube ngulamuhla basengakatitfobi nome bakhombise inhlonipho, futsi abakaze bawulandzele umtsetfo wami netimiso tami lengatimisa embikwenu naboyihlo." 
Jeremiah44:11 “Ngako-ke naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, Nkulunkulu wema-Israyeli, utsi: Ngitimisele kwehlisela inhlekelele etikwenu nekubhubhisa Juda wonkhe." 
Jeremiah44:12 Ngitayisusa insali yakaJuda leyayitimisele kuyawuhlala eGibhithe; bonkhe bayawubhubhela khona eGibhithe; bayawubulawa ngenkemba, nome babulawe yindlala. Kusukela kulomncane kakhulu kuye kulomkhulu kakhulu, bayawubulawa ngenkemba nome babulawe yindlala. Bayawuba yintfo yekucalekisa neyekwesabisa, babe yintfo yekwetfuka nelihlazo." 
Jeremiah44:13 Labo labahlala eGibhithe ngiyawubajezisa ngenkemba, nangendlala, nangesifo lesibulalanako, njengobe neJerusalema ngayijezisa." 
Jeremiah44:14 Kute namunye wensali yakaJuda lowayawuhlala eGibhithe loyawuphunyula nome loyawusala bese uyancandzeka ubuyela eveni lakaJuda, lapho afisa kubuyela khona ayewuhlala. Kute nome munye loyawuncandzeka ngaphandle kwalabo labambalwa labayawubaleka.”" 
Jeremiah44:15 Kwabe sekutsi onkhe emadvodza labati kutsi bomkawo batfuncisa imphepho kulabanye bonkulunkulu, akanye nabo bonkhe bafati bebalapho, yonkhe lenhlangano lenkhulu, ngisho bonkhe bantfu lababehlala eGibhithe Lengentansi naLengenhla, bakhuluma kuJeremiya batsi:" 
Jeremiah44:16 “Singeke sililalele lelivi lolikhulume kitsi ngelibito laSimakadze. 
Jeremiah44:17 Nakanjani sitawukwenta konkhe lesitsite sitakwenta: Sitawutfuncisela imphepho kuyo iNkhosikati yeLizulu, sitfululele iminikelo yesinatfo kuyo, njengobe tsine nabobabe, nemakhosi etfu, netiphatsimandla tetfu tatenta emadolobheni akaJuda nasetitaladini taseJerusalema. Ngaleso sikhatsi sasinekudla lokunyenti kakhulu, sime kahle, singahlushwa lutfo." 
Jeremiah44:18 Kodvwa seloku sayekela kutfuncisa imphepho kuyo iNkhosikati yeLizulu sayekela nekutfululela iminikelo yesinatfo kuyo, asisenalutfo, futsi solo siyabhubha siyaphela ngenkemba nangendlala.”" 
Jeremiah44:19 Bafati nabo bachubeka batsi: “Satsi nasitfuncisa imphepho kuyo iNkhosikati yeLizulu sitfululela neminikelo yesinatfo kuyo, emadvodza etfu akazange ati yini kutsi sasenta emakhekhe labefanana nesitfombe sayo sayitfululela neminikelo yesinatfo?”" 
Jeremiah44:20 Jeremiya wabe sewukhuluma kubo bonkhe bantfu, emadvodza nebafati lababemphendvula, watsi:" 
Jeremiah44:21 “Simakadze akayikhumbulanga yini wayicabanga imphepho leyayitfunciswa emadolobheni akaJuda nasetitaladini taseJerusalema, itfunciswa ngini naboyihlo nemakhosi enu, netiphatsimandla tenu, kanye nebantfu balelive?" 
Jeremiah44:22 Watsi Simakadze nasehlulekile kubeketelela tento tenu tebubi naletintfo letisinengiso lenanitentile, live lenu laba yintfo yekucalekisa nendzawo lelihlane lelite bantfu, njengobe linjalo lamuhla." 
Jeremiah44:23 Njengobe nitfuncise imphepho, nona kuSimakadze, nangete namlalela nome nilandzele umtsetfo wakhe, netimiso takhe, netecwayiso takhe, lenhlekelele seyehlele etikwenu, njengobe nibona nje lamuhla.”" 
Jeremiah44:24 Ngako Jeremiya wakhuluma kubo bonkhe bantfu kanye nebafati, watsi: “Vanini livi laSimakadze, nonkhe nine bantfu bakaJuda leniseGibhithe." 
Jeremiah44:25 Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, Nkulunkulu wema-Israyeli, utsi: Nine nabomkenu nikhombise ngetento tenu loko lenakwetsembisa nanitsi: ‘Nakanjani, sitatifeza tifungo lesatenta sitayitfuncisa imphepho sitsele neminikelo yesinatfo eNkhosikatini yeLizulu.’ “Chubekani-ke, nikwente loko lenakwetsembisa! Gcinani tifungo tenu!" 
Jeremiah44:26 Kodvwa vanini livi laSimakadze, nonkhe nine maJuda lenihlala eGibhithe: Simakadze utsi: ‘Ngifunga ngeLibito lami lelikhulu kutsi ngingeke ngiphindze ngimvumele nome munye nje umuntfu wakaJuda emkhatsini wenu kutsi afunge ngeLibito lami atsi: “Ngifunga kuphila kweNkhosi Simakadze.”" 
Jeremiah44:27 Ngobe sengibabekele lokubi, hhayi lokuhle; emaJuda laseGibhithe ayawubhubha ngenkemba nangendlala, aze abhujiswe onkhe." 
Jeremiah44:28 Labo labayawubalekela inkemba babuyele eveni lakaJuda besuke eGibhithe, bayawuba mbalwa kakhulu. Kuyawutsi-ke yonkhe insali yakaJuda leyeta kutawuhlala eGibhithe iyawukwati kutsi labani livi leliyawuma, lingagucuki, lami nome labo." 
Jeremiah44:29 “ ‘Loku kuyawuba sibonakaliso kini kutsi ngiyawunijezisa kulendzawo, khona nitewukwati kutsi kusonga kwami ngani nakanjani kuyakuma kungagucuki,’ kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah44:30 Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: ‘Faro Hofra, inkhosi yaseGibhithe, ngitamnikela esandleni setitsa takhe letifunana nemphilo yakhe, njengobe naSedekiya, inkhosi yakaJuda, ngamnikela kuNebukhadnezari, inkhosi yaseBhabhulona, sitsa lesasifunana nemphilo yakhe.’ ”" 
Jeremiah45:1 Naku Jeremiya, umphrofethi, lakutjela Bharuki, umsa waNeriya, ngemnyaka wesine wekubusa kwaJehoyakimu, umsa waJosaya, inkhosi yakaJuda, emvakwekutsi Bharuki asabhale encwadzini legocotwako emavi Jeremiya labemtjele wona, watsi:" 
Jeremiah45:2 “Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze Nkulunkulu wema-Israyeli, ukhuluma kuwe Bharuki, utsi:" 
Jeremiah45:3 Watsi kimi: ‘Nako kimi! Simakadze sewengete iminjunju etinhlungwini tami, sengiphelile ngenca yekububula kwami, angisatfoli nekuphumula.’ ”" 
Jeremiah45:4 Simakadze watsi: “Khuluma kuye, utsi: ‘Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: Loko lesengikwakhile ngiyawukuketula, ngikuzuphune naloko bengikuhlanyelile eveni lonkhe." 
Jeremiah45:5 Pho, ungatifunela yini wena tintfo letinkhulu? Ungatifuni. Ngobe ngiyakwehlisela inhlekelele etikwabo bonkhe bantfu, kodvwa wena nome ngukuphi lapho uya khona, ngiyawukwenta uphunyule kanye nemphilo yakho, kusho Simakadze.’ ”" 
Jeremiah46:1 Leli livi laSimakadze lelefika kuJeremiya, umphrofethi, macondzana netive:" 
Jeremiah46:2 Macondzana neGibhithe: Lona ngumlayeto macondzana nemphi yaFaro Nekho, inkhosi yaseGibhithe, leyehlulwa eKhakhemishi ngasemfuleni iYufrathe, yehlulwa nguNebukhadnezari, inkhosi yaseBhabhulona, ngemnyaka wesine wekubusa kwaJehoyakimu, umsa waJosaya, inkhosi yakaJuda, utsi:" 
Jeremiah46:3 “Lungisani emahawu enu, yebo, lamancane nalamakhulu, niphume nishuce niye emphini!" 
Jeremiah46:4 Bophelani emahhashi enu, nigibele, nine bagibeli bemahhashi! Manini ngetigaba tenu teticheme, nifake netimphantitje tenu etinhloko! Lolani tikhali tenu, nigcoke nemajazi ensimbi enu emphi!" 
Jeremiah46:5 Kodvwa ngabe ngibonani? Bayesaba, bayakhwesha, emabutfo abo ayehlulwa. Bagijima bashiya inyosi, bayabaleka, abasabuki ngisho nasemuva, futsi sekunekwesabeka neluvalo yonkhe indzawo,” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah46:6 “Labanematubane bangeke bakhone kubaleka, nalabanemandla bangeke baphunyule. Bayakhubatela bawe, enyakatfo, ngasemfuleni iYufrathe." 
Jeremiah46:7 “Ngubani lona lokhuphuka njengemfula iNayili, anjengemifula lenemanti lagubhutelako?" 
Jeremiah46:8 IGibhithe ikhuphuka njengeNayili, injengemifula lenemanti lagubhutelako. Itsi: ‘Ngitawuvumbuka ngigcibedzele umhlaba; ngitawubhubhisa emadolobha kanye nebantfu labahlala kuwo.’" 
Jeremiah46:9 Awu, subatsani, mahhashi! Nani bagibeli betincola, tigijimiseni, kube shangatsi senitinhlanya! Hlaselani, nani tingwazi: Nine madvodza aseKushe newasePhuthi, lenibambe emahawu, nani madvodza aseLidiya lajijimeta ngebutjoki." 
Jeremiah46:10 Kodvwa lelo langa ngilo lilanga laSimakadze, Simakadze longuSomandla, lilanga lemphindziselo, lekutiphindzisela etitseni takhe. Inkemba itawudla idzimate yesutse, idzimate ikucedze ngekudla ingati koma kwayo. Ngobe Simakadze, Simakadze longuSomandla, utawunikela ngemhlatjelo eveni lasenyakatfo, ngasemfuleni iYufrathe." 
Jeremiah46:11 “Khuphukela kaGileyadi uyewutfola ibhalisamu, awu, wena ntfombi, Ndvodzakati yaseGibhithe. Kodvwa wandzisa imitsi yakho yekwelapha, wayandzisa mahhala. Yeka, solo awelapheki." 
Jeremiah46:12 Tive tiyawuva ngelihlazo lakho, kukhala kwakho kuyawugcwalisa wonkhe umhlaba. Ingwazi lenye iyawugilwa ngulenye, tikhubatele tiwe tonkhe kanyekanye.”" 
Jeremiah46:13 Lona ngumlayeto Simakadze lawutjela Jeremiya, umphrofethi, ngekuta kwaNebukhadnezari, inkhosi yaseBhabhulona, kutawuhlasela iGibhithe, watsi:" 
Jeremiah46:14 “Memetelani loku eGibhithe, nikwatise futsi naseMigdoli; kumemeteleni futsi naseMemfisi kanye naseThaphanesi, nitsi: ‘Manini ngetigaba tenu nilungele, ngobe inkemba iyawudla labo labanitungeletile.’" 
Jeremiah46:15 Emabutfo ayawulaliselwani lunja? Bangeke beme, ngobe Simakadze uyawubadvudvula abalahle phansi." 
Jeremiah46:16 Bayawukhubatela njalo nje; bawe lomunye etikwalomunye. Bayawutsi: ‘Vukani, sibuyele emuva kubantfu bakitsi nasemaveni etfu, sibaleke kulenkemba yemcindzeteli.’" 
Jeremiah46:17 Lapho bayawubabata batsi: ‘Faro, inkhosi yaseGibhithe, ungumsindvo nje lomkhulu, ulilahlile litfuba lakhe.’" 
Jeremiah46:18 “Ngifunga kuphila kwami,” kusho iNkhosi, lelibito layo kunguSimakadze longuSomandla, “kuyawufika lowo lonemandla njengeThabori emkhatsini wetintsaba, nanjengeKhameli ngaselwandle." 
Jeremiah46:19 Butsani timphahla tenu tekudzingiswa, nine lenihlala eGibhithe, ngobe iMemfisi iyawusala yodvwa isale ingemabolela langasahlali muntfu." 
Jeremiah46:20 “IGibhithe ilitfokati lelihle kakhulu, kodvwa siyeta sibawu lesitayihlasela, sita sichamuka enyakatfo." 
Jeremiah46:21 Emabutfo ayo lacashiwe anjengematfole londleke kahle eGibhithe. Nawo futsi atawuncandzeka abaleke kanyekanye, angeke ayimele lemphi, ngobe lilanga lawo lesehlakalo sawo seliwehlele, sikhatsi sawo sekutsi ajeziswe." 
Jeremiah46:22 IGibhithe iyawuntjweza ihashate njengenyoka lebalekako ngesikhatsi sitsa sisondzela ngemandla; bayawubhekana nayo ngemazembe, njengebantfu bajuba tihlahla." 
Jeremiah46:23 Bayawucobela phansi lihlatsi layo, naloku lihlangene kangaka nje. Banyenti bendlula libulo lesikhonyane, abanawubalwa ngumuntfu,” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah46:24 “INdvodzakati yaseGibhithe iyawuhlazeka, inikelwe kubantfu basenyakatfo.”" 
Jeremiah46:25 Simakadze Somandla, Nkulunkulu wema-Israyeli, utsi: “Sengitamjezisa Amoni, sithico saseThebesi, naFaro, neGibhithe kanye netithico tayo, nemakhosi ayo, nabo bonkhe labo labetsembele kuFaro." 
Jeremiah46:26 Ngitabanikela kulabo labafuna timphilo tabo, nakuNebukhadnezari, inkhosi yaseBhabhulona, kanye netindvuna tayo. Noko emvakwaloko, iGibhithe iyawuphindza ibe nebantfu njengasetikhatsini takadzeni,” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah46:27 “Ungesabi, wena Jakobe, nceku yami; ungajabhi, wena Israyeli. Ngempela, ngitakusindzisa usendzaweni lekhashane, netitukulwane takho eveni lato lekutfunjwa. Jakobe uyawuphindze abe nekuthula nekuvikeleka, futsi kute namunye loyawumetfusa." 
Jeremiah46:28 Ungesabi, wena Jakobe, nceku yami, ngobe nginawe,” kusho Simakadze. “Noko, nome ngitibhubhisa ngiticedza tonkhe tive, lapho ngikucoshele khona, wena angiyiwukubhubhisa ngikucedze. Ngiyawukujezisa nje kuphela, nako loko ngikwente ngalokufanele umtsetfo, ngobe ngingeke ngikuyekele nje ngingakushayi.”" 
Jeremiah47:1 Leli livi laSimakadze lelefika kuJeremiya umphrofethi, macondzana nemaFilisti, Faro asengakayihlaseli iGaza, litsi:" 
Jeremiah47:2 Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: “Buka kutsi aqubuka kanjani emanti ngasenyakatfo, atakuba sikhukhula lesikhulu. Atawukhukhula lelive kanye nako konkhe lokukulo, emadolobha kanye nebantfu labahlala kuwo. Bantfu bayawukhala bumayemaye, bonkhe labahlala kulelive bayawulila," 
Jeremiah47:3 nabeva umsindvo wetinselo temahhashi akhe, nebukhehlekhehle betincola takhe temphi, nemsindvo wemasondvo ato. Boyise bangeke baphendvuke babasite bantfwababo, ngobe tandla tabo tiyawulenga." 
Jeremiah47:4 Ngobe lilanga lona selifikile lekubhubhisa onkhe emaFilisti, nekubhubhisa nekucedza bonkhe labayinsali lababengasita iThire neSidoni. Simakadze sewutawabhubhisa emaFilisti, imisalela yalabo labaphuma eKhrethe." 
Jeremiah47:5 IGaza iyawuhhula inhloko yayo ilile, i-Ashkeloni yona iyawuvalwa umlomo, ibhubhe. Awu, nsali yasetsafeni, niyawutikhipha umkhuphulwane kuze kube ngunini?" 
Jeremiah47:6 “Nikhala nitsi: ‘Awu, nkemba yaSimakadze, uyawudzimate uphumule nini? Buyela emgodleni wakho; sale uma ubindzise.’" 
Jeremiah47:7 Kodvwa ingaphumula kanjani, nangabe Simakadze akhiphe umyalo kuyo kutsi ihlasele i-Ashkeloni nelusentse lwelwandle?”" 
Jeremiah48:1 Macondzana neMowabi: Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, Nkulunkulu wema-Israyeli, utsi: “Maye kuyo iNebo, ngobe itawubhidlitwa. IKhiriyathayimu iyawuhlazeka itfunjwe, inqaba iyawuhlazeka ihhihlitelwe phansi." 
Jeremiah48:2 IMowabi ayisayiwuphindza idvunyiswe; eHeshboni emadvodza ayawuyakhela emasu ekuyiwisa atsi: ‘Buyani sitewusicedza lesive, singaphindzi sibe sive.’ Nawe futsi wena Madmeni, uyawubindziswa, uyawuvalwa umlomo, uyawube ucoshwa yinkemba." 
Jeremiah48:3 Lalelani kukhala lokuvela eHoronayimu, kukhala kwemonakalo lomkhulu nekwembhubhiso." 
Jeremiah48:4 IMowabi iyawubhidlitwa, tinswane tiyawukhala kabuhlungu." 
Jeremiah48:5 Bayakwenyuka ngendlela leya eLuhithi bahambe bakhihlita sililo lesibuhlungu; emgwacweni lobheke entansi eHoronayimu kuvakala kukhala kamunyu ngenca yalembhubhiso. 
Jeremiah48:6 Balekani niphephise imphilo yenu, banini njengesihlahla lesisehlane." 
Jeremiah48:7 Njengobe netsembele etentweni tenu nasebunjingeni benu, nani niyawutsatfwa niyiswe ekutfunjweni, naKhemoshi, sithico senu, uyawuyiswa ekudzingisweni kanye nebaphristi bakhe netindvuna takhe." 
Jeremiah48:8 Umbhubhisi uyawusukela onkhe emadolobha, kute nalinye lidolobha leliyawuphunyula. Sigodzi siyawuhhihlitwa nelitsafa libhujiswe, ngobe Simakadze sewukhulumile." 
Jeremiah48:9 Fakani luswayi kaMowabi, ngobe uyawuba yincitsakalo, emadolobha akhona ayawusala akhala libhungane, sekute muntfu longahlala kuwo." 
Jeremiah48:10 “Akacalekiswe umuntfu loyeketsisako ekwenteni umsebenti waSimakadze! Akacalekiswe umuntfu lokhweshisa inkemba yakhe ekucitseni ingati! 
Jeremiah48:11 “Mowabi abesaphumulile kusukela kwasebusheni bakhe, njengeliwayini lelisele emashiceni, lingakatfululwa kuloludziwo lafakwa kulolwa; akakayi ekudzingisweni. Ngako usanambitseka njengobe abenjalo, neliphunga lakhe alikagucuki.”" 
Jeremiah48:12 Simakadze utsi: “Kodvwa ayeta emalanga, lapho ngiyawutfumela emadvodza latfululanako etindziweni, naye ayakumcitsa, ayawutfulula tindziwo takhe abhidlite letimbita takhe phansi." 
Jeremiah48:13 Ngako Mowabi uyawuba nemahloni ngaKhemoshi, sithico sakhe, njengobe nendlu yaka-Israyeli yaba nemahloni nase betsembela eBetheli." 
Jeremiah48:14 “Ningasho kanjani kutsi: ‘Sitingwazi tsine, emadvodza labokadzebona bemphi’?" 
Jeremiah48:15 Mowabi uyawubhujiswa, nemadolobha akhe ayawuvinjetelwa, emajaha akhona elikhetselo lamahle ayakwehliselwa ekuhlatjweni abulawe, kusho iNkhosi, lelibito layo kunguSimakadze longuSomandla." 
Jeremiah48:16 Kuwa kwaMowabi sekusedvute, sigameko sakhe sesitawufika masinyane." 
Jeremiah48:17 Mdvudvuteni nine nonkhe labahlala edvute naye, nonkhe nine lenati ludvumo lwakhe, tsanini: ‘Yephuke njani lendvuku lenemandla kangaka; yephuke kanjani lendvuku yebukhosi!’" 
Jeremiah48:18 “Yehlani ekubabatekeni kwenu nihlale emhlabatsini logagadzekile, awu, nine takhamiti taseDiboni, ngobe lowo lobhubhisa Mowabi utanisukela nani, atewubhidlita emadolobha enu labiyelwe." 
Jeremiah48:19 Manini emigwacweni nibukele, nine lenihlala e-Aroyeri. Butani kulamadvodza lasubatsako nakulabafati lababalekako nitsi: ‘Kwenteke njani?’" 
Jeremiah48:20 IMowabi seyitseleke ngelihlazo, ngobe seyihhihlitiwe. Lilani nikhale kakhulu! Memetelani ngase-Anoni kutsi iMowabi seyibhujisiwe." 
Jeremiah48:21 Sijeziso sehlele emadolobha lasetsafeni: iHoloni, neJahasi, neMefathi," 
Jeremiah48:22 neDiboni, neNebo, neBhethi Diblathayimu," 
Jeremiah48:23 neKhiriyathayimu, neBhethi Gamuli, neBhethi Meyoni," 
Jeremiah48:24 neKheriyothi, neBhosra, nawo onkhe emadolobha akaMowabi lasedvute nakhashane." 
Jeremiah48:25 Luphondvo lwaMowabi lujubekile, luganyuliwe, nemkhono wakhe uganyuliwe,” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah48:26 “Mdzakiseni, ngobe wedzelele Simakadze. Mowabi akabhucute emahlanteni akhe, akabe yintfo yekuhlekisa." 
Jeremiah48:27 Israyeli abengasiyo yini intfo yakho yekuhlekisa? Abebanjwe emkhatsini wemasela yini kwekutsi ungaze unikine inhloko uhlekise ngaye njalo nje, nawuphatsa libito lakhe?" 
Jeremiah48:28 Shiyani emadolobha enu niyewuhlala emkhatsini wemadvwala, nine lenihlala kaMowabi. Lingisani lituba, lona lakha sidleke salo ekungeneni kwemgedze." 
Jeremiah48:29 Sivile ngekutigabatisa kwaMowabi, kutigcabha kwakhe lokukhulu, nangelicholo lakhe, ligcabho lakhe, nekutiphakamisa kanye nekutikhukhumeta kwenhlitiyo yakhe." 
Jeremiah48:30 Ngiyakwati kuchosha kwakhe, kodvwa kulite, nekutishaya sifuba kwakhe akumsiti ngalutfo, konkhe lakwentako kulite,” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah48:31 Ngako-ke ngiyamkhalela Mowabi, ngililela bonkhe bakaMowabi. Ngiyawakhalela emadvodza aseKhiri Heresi." 
Jeremiah48:32 Nginikhalela kwendlula kuyikhalela kwami iJazeri, awu, nine tivini taseSibima. Emagala enu endlaleka aze efika elwandle, enaba aze efika elwandle lwakaJazeri. Umbhubhisi sewutselekele titselo tenu, nemagelebisi enu lavutsiwe." 
Jeremiah48:33 Kutsakasa nenjabulo sekusukile emahlatsini etitselo nasemasimini akaMowabi. Ngikumisile kugeleta kweliwayini ematjeni ekuhlutela, kute nalosawagcobagcoba ngekumemeta kwenjabulo. Nome-ke kukhona lokumemeta, kodvwa akusiko kwenjabulo." 
Jeremiah48:34 “Umsindvo wekukhala kwabo uyenyuka usuka eHeshboni uye e-Eleyale naseJahasi, kusukela eSowari kuze kuyewufika eHoronayimu nase-Eglathi Shelishiya, ngobe ngisho nemanti aseNimrimu asomile." 
Jeremiah48:35 Ngiyawubacedza kaMowabi labo labashisa iminikelo etindzaweni letiphakeme, batfuncise nemphepho etithicweni tabo,” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah48:36 “Ngako inhlitiyo yami ikhala njengemntjingozi, ikhalela iMowabi, intjilota njengemntjingozi ngenca yemadvodza aseKhiri Heresi. Umcebo labewutfola awusekho." 
Jeremiah48:37 Tonkhe tinhloko tawo titimphandla, nato tonkhe tilevu tihhuliwe, tonkhe tandla tijutjiwe, nato tonkhe tinkhalo tembeswe emasaka." 
Jeremiah48:38 Kulo lonkhe luphahla lwakaMowabi nasetinkhundleni tesive kute lokunye ngaphandle kwesililo, ngobe sengiyephulile iMowabi njengeludziwo lolungafunwa ngumuntfu,” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah48:39 “Maye kufabaka kwayo! Maye, bayalila bo! Hhawu, kushwebheta kwaMowabi sekuyindlisamahloni kuyo; Mowabi sewugucuke waba yintfo yekuhlekisa, waba yintfo nje yekwesabisa kubo bonkhe labakhelene naye.”" 
Jeremiah48:40 Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: “Bukani lusweti luntjweza lwehla, lwendlala emaphiko alo etikweMowabi." 
Jeremiah48:41 Emadolobha atawutfunjwa, kudliwe netinqaba tawo. Ngalelo langa tinhlitiyo tetihlabani takaMowabi tiyawufanana nenhlitiyo yemfati nasaphetfwe ngumhelo." 
Jeremiah48:42 Mowabi uyawubhujiswa angabe asaba sive, ngobe wedzelela Simakadze." 
Jeremiah48:43 Sesabiso, nemgodzi, nelugibe kunihlalele, awu, nine bantfu bakaMowabi,” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah48:44 “Wonkhe lobalekela sesabiso uyawuhholokoshela emgodzini. Wonkhe lokhuphukako emgodzini uyawubhajwa elugibeni; ngobe ngiyawehlisela etikwaMowabi umnyaka wakhe wesijeziso,” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah48:45 “Esitfuntini saseHeshboni lababalekako bayema nje bangasitakali, ngobe kubhedvuke umlilo eHeshboni, lilangabi lelikhulu ligqamuke ekhatsi eSihoni, lashisa emabunti akaMowabi, netinkhakhayi talabatigabatisako babange umsindvo." 
Jeremiah48:46 Maye kuwe, wena Mowabi! Bantfu bakaKhemoshi babhujisiwe; emadvodzana akakho adzingisiwe, nemadvodzakati akho ayiswa ekutfunjweni." 
Jeremiah48:47 “Noko ngiyawubuyisela tibusiso takaMowabi ngemalanga letako,” kusho Simakadze. Kuphelela lapha-ke kwehlulelwa kwaMowabi." 
Jeremiah49:1 Macondzana nema-Amoni: Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: “Israyeli akanamadvodzana yini? Ute yini tindlalifa? Kepha kwentiwa yini kutsi Moloki atsatse Gadi amente wakhe? Kwentiwa yini kutsi bantfu bakhe bahlale emadolobheni akhe?”" 
Jeremiah49:2 Simakadze utsi: “Kodvwa ayeta emalanga, lapho ngiyakwenta kutsi kuhlatjwe umkhosi, ngimelane neRabha yema-Amoni; iyawuba yindvundvuma yemadzibikelo, netabelo tayo letiyitungeletile tiyawulunyekwa ngemlilo. Israyeli-ke uyawubadvungulula labo labamkhipha ngendlovuyangena,” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah49:3 “Khala, wena Heshboni, ngobe i-Ayi ibhujisiwe! Khalani nimemete, nine lenihlala eRabha! Yembatsani emasaka nilile, gijimani lapha nalapha ekhatsi emitsangaleni, ngobe Moloki utawuyiswa ekudzingisweni, yena kanye nebaphristi bakhe netiphatsimandla takhe." 
Jeremiah49:4 Nitishayelani tifuba ngenca yetigodzi tenu, nitigabatise ngetigodzi tenu letitselako? Awu, ndvodzakati lengaketsembeki, wetsembela ebunjingeni bakho utsi: ‘Ngubani lotangihlasela?’" 
Jeremiah49:5 Ngitakwehlisela sesabiso etikwakho sichamuke kubo bonkhe lababomakhelwane bakho, nonkhe niyawudvungululwa nicoshwe, kute loyawubutsa lababalekile,” kusho Simakadze, Simakadze longuSomandla." 
Jeremiah49:6 “Noko emvakwaloko ngiyawutibuyisela tibusiso tase-Amoni,” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah49:7 Macondzana ne-Edomu: Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, utsi: “Sekwabate yini kuhlakanipha eThemani? Setaphela yini teluleko kulabahlakaniphile? Kuhlakanipha kwabo sekwabola yini?" 
Jeremiah49:8 Jikani nibaleke, bhacani emigedzeni leshonako, nine lenihlala eDedani, ngobe ngiyakwehlisela inhlekelele ka-Esawu, ngesikhatsi nangimjezisa." 
Jeremiah49:9 Kube bavuni bemagelebisi bebangefika lapha kini, bebangete banishiyela yini lambadlwana? Kube emasela abengefika ebusuku, abengete akweba yini loko lakutsandzako kuphela?" 
Jeremiah49:10 Kodvwa Esawu yena ngitamhlubula abe ngcunu, ngitatigwabula tindzawo lapho abhace khona, kuze angetutifihla ndzawo. Bantfwabakhe, netihlobo nabomakhelwane bakhe bayawubhubha, angeke aphindze abe khona." 
Jeremiah49:11 Shiya tintsandzane takho, ngitativikela timphilo tato, nebafelokati bakho nabo bangetsembela kimi.”"
