Jeremiah49:12 Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: “Nangabe labo labangakafaneli kunatsa kulendzebe, kumelwe bayinatse, kudzingeke ngani-ke kutsi wena ungajeziswa? Ungeke uhlale ungajeziswa, kufanele nawe uyinatse." 
Jeremiah49:13 Ngitifunga mine, kutsi iBhosra iyawubhidlitwa ibe yintfo yekwesabisa, intfo yelihlazo, neyekucalekisa, nawo onkhe emadolobha ayo ayawuba ngemadzibikelo aphakadze,” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah49:14 Ngive umlayeto lovela kuSimakadze. Kwatfunyelwa emancusa etiveni atewutsi: “Hlanganani niteyihlasela! Sukumelani imphi!” 
Jeremiah49:15 “Nyalo-ke, sengitawukwenta ube ngulomncane emkhatsini wetive, wedzeleleke emkhatsini webantfu." 
Jeremiah49:16 Lokwesabeka kwakho nekukhukhumala kwenhlitiyo yakho kukuyengile, wena lohlala ekhatsi emifantfwini yemadvwala, wena lohlala eticongweni teligcuma. Nome wakha sidleke sakho lapha etulu njengelusweti, kodvwa ngiyawukwehlisela phansi,” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah49:17 “I-Edomu itawuba sesabiso; bonkhe labendlula ngendlela bayawumangala bahleke bulima ngenca yawo onkhe emanceba ayo. 
Jeremiah49:18 Njengobe neSodoma neGomora yagumbucelwa kanye nemadolobha labeyitungeletile, kanjalo nakuyo i-Edomu kuyawubate lohlala kuyo, kute muntfu loyakwakha kuyo,” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah49:19 “Njengelibhubesi nalichamuka emahlatsini aseJordane liya eveni lelinemadlelo laluhlata, ngiyawubatuma base-Edomu, ngibacoshe eveni labo. Ngubani lokhetsiwe, lengiyawumbekela loku? Ngubani lonjengami? Kona nje ngubani longangicela insayeya? Ngumuphi umelusi longamelana nami?" 
Jeremiah49:20 Ngako-ke, vanini losekulungiswe nguSimakadze engcondvweni yakhe nge-Edomu, loko lasatimisele kukwenta kulabo labahlala eThemani: Ematfole emhlambi ayawuhudvulwa, uyakuwabhubhisa awacedze emadlelo abo ngenca yabo." 
Jeremiah49:21 Ngemsindvo wekuwa kwabo umhlaba uyawutfutfumela; kukhala kwabo kuyawuvakala kuklaza naseLwandle Lolubovu. 
Jeremiah49:22 Njengelusweti lwendlele timphiko talo uyawujubalata antjweze ehlele etikweBhosra. Ngalelo langa tinhlitiyo tetingwazi taka-Edomu tiyawuba njengenhlitiyo yemfati, nakaphetfwe ngumhelo.”" 
Jeremiah49:23 Macondzana neDamaseko: “IHamathi ne-Aphadi kujabhile, ngobe kuve tindzaba letimbi. Kuphelelwe tinhlitiyo, kugubhutele njengemagagasi elwandle." 
Jeremiah49:24 IDamaseko seyibutsakatsaka, seyigucukele kubaleka, nekutfutfumela kuyibambile, kudzabuka kwenhlitiyo neminjunju kuyibambile, iminjunju lenjengeyemfati, nakaphetfwe ngumhelo." 
Jeremiah49:25 Lelidolobha lelineludvumo lolungaka alikayekelwa ngani, lelidolobha lami lapho ngitijabulisa khona?" 
Jeremiah49:26 Ngempela, emajaha akhona ayakuwela etitaladini talo; onkhe emabutfo alo ayawuvalwa umlomo, abhujiswe ngalelo langa,” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah49:27 “Ngiyawulumeka umlilo etibondzeni taseDamaseko; umlilo uyawudla tinqaba taBheni Hadahi.” 
Jeremiah49:28 Macondzana neKhedari nemibuso yaseHasori, leyahlaselwa nguNebukhadnezari, inkhosi yaseBhabhulona: Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: “Sukumani nihlasele iKhedari, nibhubhise bantfu basemphumalanga." 
Jeremiah49:29 Emathende abo kanye nemihlambi yabo kuyawutsatfwa, nemadlangala abo ayakwetfwalwa atfunjwe nato tonkhe timphahla tabo nemakamela abo. Bantfu bayawumemeta kubo, batsi: ‘Tesabekiso yonkhe indzawo.’" 
Jeremiah49:30 “Phangisani nibaleke! Bhacani emigedzeni leshonako, nine lenihlala eHasori,” kusho Simakadze. “Nebukhadnezari, inkhosi yaseBhabhulona, seyinakhele lisu; sewubophe luzungu ngani,” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah49:31 “Sukumani nihlasele lesive lesikhibikile, lesihleti ngesibindzi, sive lesingenamasango lacinile, ngisho nemicabo. Bantfu baso bahlala ngabodvwa,” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah49:32 “Emakamela abo atsi atawuba yimphango, nemihlambi yabo lemikhulu itawuba yimphango. Ngiyawubasakatela emoyeni labo labasemaveni lakhashane, ngiyawubehlisela tigemegeme letivela ndzawo tonkhe,” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah49:33 “IHasori kuyawuba yindzawo lehlushwa timphungutja, indzawo leyawusala ikhala libhungane kuze kube nguphakadze. Kute muntfu loseyawubuye ahlale kuyo, yebo, kute loyawukwakha kuyo.”" 
Jeremiah49:34 Leli livi laSimakadze lelafika kuJeremiya, umphrofethi, macondzana ne-Elamu, ekucaleni nje kwekubusa kwaSedekiya, inkhosi yakaJuda:" 
Jeremiah49:35 Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, utsi: “Buka la, butjoki ba-Elamu ngitabephula, yebo, sisekelo semandla abo." 
Jeremiah49:36 Ngiyawutfumela imimoya lemine e-Elamu, imimoya lesuka emagumbini lamane emazulu. Ngiyawubasakatela emimoyeni lemine, kuyawubate sive, lapho kungayikuba khona base-Elamu labacoshiwe." 
Jeremiah49:37 Ngiyakwenta i-Elamu kutsi iphele emandla embikwetitsa tayo, emehlweni alabo labatfungatsa timphilo tayo. Ngiyakwehlisela sigemegeme etikwabo, yebo, ngisho nekutfukutsela kwami lokwesabekako,” kusho Simakadze. “Ngiyawubacosha ngenkemba, ngidzimate ngibabhubhise ngibacedze." 
Jeremiah49:38 Ngiyawumisa sihlalo sami sebukhosi e-Elamu, ngibhubhise inkhosi yayo netiphatsimandla tayo,” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah49:39 “Noko, ngiyawuphindze ngitibuyisele tibusiso tase-Elamu, ngemalanga letako,” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah50:1 Leli livi Simakadze lalikhuluma ngemlomo waJeremiya, umphrofethi, macondzana neBhabhulona nangelive lemaBhabhulona, litsi:" 
Jeremiah50:2 “Memetelani nikhulume emkhatsini webetive, phakamisani siboniso semphi, nimemetele, ningafihli lutfo, kodvwa tsanini: ‘IBhabhulona itawutfunjwa, Bheli utawuhlazeka, Maduki yena agcwale kwesaba. Titfombe tayo tiyawuhlazeka netithico tayo tigcwale kwesaba.’" 
Jeremiah50:3 Sive lesichamuka enyakatfo siyawuyihlasela, live layo silishiye lingenalutfo. Kute muntfu loyawuhlala kulo, bantfu netilwane kuyawulibalekela.”" 
Jeremiah50:4 Simakadze utsi: “Kulawo malanga, nangaleso sikhatsi, bantfu baka-Israyeli nebantfu bakaJuda bayawuhamba kanyekanye, bonkhe bayawukhala tinyembeti sebahamba bafunana naSimakadze Nkulunkulu wabo." 
Jeremiah50:5 Bayawubuta indlela leya eSiyoni, emabombo abo bawabhekise khona. Bayawuta batetibophela bona kuSimakadze ngesivumelwane saphakadze lesingeke siphindze sikhohlakale." 
Jeremiah50:6 “Bantfu bami babetimvu letilahlekile, belusi bato batedukisile, batenta tasabalala etulu etintsabeni. Babezulazula etikwetintsaba nemagcuma, baze bayikhohlwa nendzawo yabo, lapho baphumula khona." 
Jeremiah50:7 Bonkhe lababatfola babadla, titsa tabo tatsi: ‘Site tsine licala, ngobe bona kuSimakadze labelidlelo labo sibili, Simakadze, litsemba laboyisemkhulu.’" 
Jeremiah50:8 “Balekani niphume eBhabhulona; lishiyeni lelive lemaBhabhulona, nibe njengetiphongo letihola umhlambi." 
Jeremiah50:9 Ngobe ngiyawuchukuluta letive letinemandla ngitiletse titewusukela iBhabhulona tiyihlasele, tichamuka emaveni angasenyakatfo, tiyawutihlela kahle ize itfunjwe. Imicibisholo yato ifanana neyetingcweti tetihlabani letingabuyeli emuva tilengisa tandla." 
Jeremiah50:10 Live lemaBhabhulona liyawuphangwa, bonkhe labaliphangako bayakwesutsa,” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah50:11 “Njengobe nijabula futsi nitsakase, nine leniphanga lifa lami, njengobe niyatjakadvula njengesitfokati nasibhula kolo, ninhinhile njengetinkunzi temahhashi," 
Jeremiah50:12 unyoko iBhabhulona uyawutseleka ngemahloni, lowo lowanitala uyawuhlazeka. Uyawuba ngulomncane emkhatsini wetive, abe lihlane, indzawo lelugwadvule." 
Jeremiah50:13 Ngenca yentfukutselo yaSimakadze angeke asahlalwa bantfu, kodvwa sewuyawusala ayedvwa. Bonkhe labendlula eBhabhulona bayakwetfuka bafe, bahleke lusulu, ngenca yawo onkhe emanceba ayo." 
Jeremiah50:14 “Manini ngemumo, nitungelete iBhabhulona, nonkhe nine lenijijimeta ngemicibisholo. Yijijimeteni, kungasali namunye umcibisholo, ngobe yonile kuSimakadze." 
Jeremiah50:15 Hlabani umkhosi kuyo yonkhe indzawo! Iphakamisa tandla, imibhoshongo yayo iyawa, tibondza tayo tihhihlitelwa phansi. Njengobe loku kukuphindzisela kwaSimakadze, yikhipheleni sibhongo, yentani kuyo njengobe nayo yentile kulabanye." 
Jeremiah50:16 Susani umhlanyeli eBhabhulona nemvuni lobambe lisikela lakhe ngesikhatsi sekuvuna. Ngenca yenkemba yemcindzeteli, akube ngulowo nalowo abuyele kubakubo, ngulowo nalowo akabalekele eveni lakubo.”" 
Jeremiah50:17 “Israyeli unjengemhlambi wetimvu letisakatekile ticoshwe ngemabhubesi. Lekucala lelamudla kwaba yinkhosi yase-Asiriya; lekugcina lelabhoba ematsambo akhe, kwaba nguNebukhadnezari, inkhosi yaseBhabhulona.”" 
Jeremiah50:18 Ngako-ke, naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, Nkulunkulu wema-Israyeli, utsi: “Ngitayijezisa inkhosi yaseBhabhulona nelive layo, njengobe ngajezisa inkhosi yase-Asiriya." 
Jeremiah50:19 Kodvwa Israyeli ngitambuyisela emuva edlelweni lakhe, uyawuklaba eKhameli naseBhashani. Kukhanuka kudla kwakhe kuyakweneliseka etintsabeni taka-Efrayimu nakaGileyadi." 
Jeremiah50:20 Kulawo malanga, nangaleso sikhatsi, kuyawuphenywa ngelicala laka-Israyeli, kodvwa aliyiwutfolakala, kuphenywe nangetono takaJuda, kodvwa kute nasinye lesiyawutfolakala, ngobe ngiyakuyitsetselela insali lengayishiya,” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah50:21 “Hlasela live laseMerathayimu nalabo labahlala ePhekodi. Bacoshe, ubabulale, ubabhubhise ubacedze. Wente konkhe lengikuyale ngako,” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah50:22 “Kukhona umsindvo wemphi eveni, umsindvo wembhubhiso lenkhulu!" 
Jeremiah50:23 Maye, kubhidlitwa nekuhhohloka kwesandvo sawo wonkhe umhlaba! Maye, icitsiwe iBhabhulona emkhatsini wetive!" 
Jeremiah50:24 Ngakubekela lugibe, wena Bhabhulona, wavele wabhajwa ungakati ngalo, watfolakala, wabanjwa, ngobe wemelana naSimakadze." 
Jeremiah50:25 Simakadze ugwabule umphandza wakhe wetikhali, wakhipha tikhali telulaka lwakhe, ngobe iNkhosi Simakadze lenguSomandla inemsebenti letawenta eveni lebantfu baseBhabhulona." 
Jeremiah50:26 Lelive lisukeleni nilihlasele, nisuka emikhawulweni yalo. Gwabulani tingungu talo, nilimpongise njengetindvundvuma talokutinhlavu. Libhubhiseni nilicedze, ningalishiyeli nalencane insali." 
Jeremiah50:27 Bulalani tonkhe tinkunzi talo letisetincane: Tehliseleni ekuhlatjweni. Maye kubo! Ngobe lilanga selifikile, sikhatsi sabo sekutsi bajeziswe." 
Jeremiah50:28 Lalelani lababalekako nebakhoseli labesuka eBhabhulona, bamemetela baseSiyoni kutsi Simakadze Nkulunkulu wetfu utiphindziselele kanjani, atiphindziselela ngenca yelithempeli lakhe." 
Jeremiah50:29 “Butsani banembi bamelane neBhabhulona, bonkhe labakwati kujijimeta ngebutjoki, niyitungelete yonkhe, kubete lophunyulako. Yikhokheleni njengetento tayo; yentani kuyo njengobe nayo yenta. Ngobe yedzelele Simakadze, longuLongcwele waka-Israyeli." 
Jeremiah50:30 Ngako-ke emajaha ayo ayawufela etitaladini tayo, onkhe emabutfo ayo ayawubhujiswa ngalelo langa,” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah50:31 “Buka la, ngimelene nawe, live lemaBhabhulona, awu, wena lotiphakamisako, ngobe lilanga lakho selifikile, sikhatsi sakho sekutsi ujeziswe,” kusho iNkhosi Simakadze lenguSomandla." 
Jeremiah50:32 “Lotiphakamisako utawukhubatela awe, kute namunye lotamsita amsukumise; ngiyawulumeka umlilo emadolobheni akhe, umlilo loyawudla bonkhe labakhelene naye.”" 
Jeremiah50:33 Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, utsi: “Bantfu baka-Israyeli bacindzetelekile, kanye nebantfu bakaJuda futsi. Bonkhe batfumbi babo babankonkoshele, bayala kubayekela bahambe." 
Jeremiah50:34 Noko uMhlengi wabo unemandla; nguSimakadze Somandla libito lakhe. Uyakumela indzaba yabo ngemandla, kuze atewuletsa kuphumula eveni labo, kodvwa kungabi nakuthula kulabo labahlala eBhabhulona." 
Jeremiah50:35 “Kulengela inkemba etikwemaBhabhulona! Ilengela etikwalabo labakhile eBhabhulona, nasetikwetiphatsimandla takhona netihlakaniphi tayo!” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah50:36 “Kulengela inkemba etikwebaphrofethi bayo bemanga, bayawuba tilima. Inkemba ilengela etikwemabutfo ayo, agcwale kwesaba." 
Jeremiah50:37 Inkemba ilengela etikwemahhashi ayo nasetikwetincola takhona temphi, nasetikwato tonkhe tihambi etigabeni tato! Bayawuba njengebafati. Inkemba ilengela etikwemcebo weBhabhulona! Bayawuphangwa." 
Jeremiah50:38 Kulengela somiso etikwemanti ayo! Ayawukoma, ngobe kulive letithico, bantfu balo bahlanyiswa kwesaba leto tithico." 
Jeremiah50:39 “Ngako-ke tidalwa tasehlane netimphisi kuyawuhlala khona lapho, nesahhukulu siyakwakhela khona. Akusayiwuphindze kwakhe muntfu, nome ahlale khona, titukulwane ngetitukulwane." 
Jeremiah50:40 Njengobe Simakadze agumbucela iSodoma neGomora kanye nemadolobha labomakhelwane bayo, kanjalo sekuyawubate namunye lohlala lapho, kute muntfu loyakwakha kuyo,” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah50:41 “Bukela, kuchamuka imphi enyakatfo; sive lesikhulu nemakhosi lamanyenti achukulutiwe emikhawulweni yemhlaba." 
Jeremiah50:42 Bahlome ngebutjoki nangetikhali; bavutsa lulaka, abanamusa. Bevakala njengekudvuma kwelwandle sebagibele emahhashini abo; beta ngeticheme temabutfo emphi, bete kutawuhlasela wena, Ndvodzakati yaseBhabhulona." 
Jeremiah50:43 Inkhosi yaseBhabhulona ive imibiko ngabo, nyalo imikhono yayo seyiyalenga nje, kucacamba kwenhlitiyo sekuyibambile, iminjunju lenjengeyemfati nakaphetfwe ngumhelo." 
Jeremiah50:44 Njengelibhubesi nalichamuka emahlatsini aseJordane liya eveni lelinemadlelo laluhlata, ngiyawubatuma baseBhabhulona, ngibacoshe eveni labo. Ngubani lokhetsiwe, lengiyawumbekela loku? Ngubani lonjengami? Kona nje ngubani longangicela insayeya? Ngumuphi umelusi longamelana nami?”" 
Jeremiah50:45 Ngako-ke, vanini losekulungiswe nguSimakadze engcondvweni yakhe ngeBhabhulona, loko lasatimisele kukwenta kulabo labahlala eBhabhulona: Ematfole emhlambi ayawuhudvulwa, uyakuwabhubhisa awacedze emadlelo abo ngenca yabo." 
Jeremiah50:46 Umhlaba uyawutfutfumela ngemsindvo wekutfunjwa kweBhabhulona; kukhala kwayo kuyawuhokoma emkhatsini wetive. 
Jeremiah51:1 Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: “Buka la, ngiyawuvusa umoya wembhubhisi usukele iBhabhulona kanye nebantfu baseLebu Khamayi." 
Jeremiah51:2 Ngiyawutfumela tihambi eBhabhulona kutsi titeyihlunga tibhubhise nelive layo. Tiyawumelana nayo ndzawo tonkhe, ngelilanga lenhlekelele yayo." 
Jeremiah51:3 Umnembi waseBhabhulona akangacibisheli ngebutjoki bakhe, futsi angahlomi ngetikhali takhe. Ungabashiyi labasha bayo, yibhubhise uyicedze imphi yayo yonkhe." 
Jeremiah51:4 Bayakuwela phansi bagwaziwe eveni lemaBhabhulona, balimele bamancebanceba etitaladini talo." 
Jeremiah51:5 Ngobe baka-Israyeli nebakaJuda abakashiywa nguNkulunkulu wabo, Simakadze longuSomandla, noko live lemaBhabhulona liphuphuma ngemacala kuLongcwele waka-Israyeli." 
Jeremiah51:6 “Phumani nibaleke eBhabhulona! Phephisani timphilo tenu! Ningabhujiswa ngenca yetono tayo. Sesikhatsi sekuphindzisela kwaSimakadze; utayikhokhela ngaloko lokuyifanele. 
Jeremiah51:7 IBhabhulona bekuyindzebe yegolide esandleni saSimakadze; yadzakisa wonkhe umhlaba. Tive tanatsa liwayini layo, ngako manje setiyahlanya." 
Jeremiah51:8 Ngalokutumako iBhabhulona iyakuwa ibhidlitwe. Yilileleni bo! Yitfoleleni ibhalisamu yekwelapha leminjunju yayo; mhlawumbe ingelapheka. 
Jeremiah51:9 “ ‘Ngabe sesiyiphilisile iBhabhulona, kodvwa ayelapheki, asiyishiye, ngulowo nalowo aye eveni lakubo, ngobe kwehlulelwa kwayo kufikela esibhakabhakeni." 
Jeremiah51:10 “ ‘Simakadze usivikele. Wotani siyewukhuluma eSiyoni kutsi Simakadze Nkulunkulu wetfu usenteleni.’ 
Jeremiah51:11 “Lolani imicibisholo, nitsatse emahawu! Simakadze uchukulute emakhosi aseMediya, ngobe injongo yakhe kubhubhisa iBhabhulona. Simakadze utawutiphindzisela, akhiphe sibhongo ngenca yelithempeli lakhe." 
Jeremiah51:12 Phakamisani siboniso semphi, ngasetibondzeni taseBhabhulona! Cinisani bogadzi, nimise kahle balindzi, kulalela titsa endleleni! Simakadze utayiphumelelisa injongo yakhe, utakukwenta loko labekukhuluma kubantfu baseBhabhulona." 
Jeremiah51:13 Wena lohlala ngasemantini lamanyenti futsi lonjingile ngemcebo, siphetfo sakho sesifikile, sikhatsi sakho sekutsi uncanyulwe.”" 
Jeremiah51:14 Simakadze longuSomandla utifunge yena, watsi: “Ngiyawukugcwalisa ngemadvodza, kube shangatsi ngemabulo etintsetse, bayawumemeta ngelivi lelikhulu bahalalise ngawe.”" 
Jeremiah51:15 “Umhlaba wawenta ngemandla akhe, wawusekela ngekuhlakanipha kwakhe, wendlala emazulu ngekucondza kwakhe." 
Jeremiah51:16 Nakabhavumula yena, emanti asemazulwini ayabhodla, ukhuphula emafu emikhawulweni yonkhe yemhlaba. Utfumela umbane nemvula, akhiphe umoya etingungwini takhe." 
Jeremiah51:17 “Wonkhe umuntfu akanangcondvo, futsi akanalwati; wonkhe umbumbi wetegolide unemahloni ngetithico takhe. Titfombe takhe tiyinkhohliso nje, atinamphefumulo." 
Jeremiah51:18 Atinamsebenti walutfo, tintfo nje tekuhlekisa. Tiyawuphela mhlazana kufika kwehlulelwa kwato." 
Jeremiah51:19 Lowo Losabelo sakaJakobe akafanani naleti, ngobe yena unguMenti wato tonkhe tintfo, ngisho newesive lesilifa lakhe. Libito lakhe nguSimakadze longuSomandla." 
Jeremiah51:20 “Ulizembe lami lemphi, nesikhali sami semphi, ngawe ngiphihlita tive, ngawe ngibhubhise imibuso." 
Jeremiah51:21 Ngawe ngiphihlita lihhashi nemgibeli walo, ngawe ngiphihlita incola yemphi nemshayeli wayo." 
Jeremiah51:22 Ngawe ngiphihlita umfati nendvodza, ngawe ngiphihlita emakhehla nalabasebancane, ngawe ngiphihlita lijaha nentfombi," 
Jeremiah51:23 ngawe ngiphihlita umelusi nemhlambi wakhe wetimvu, ngawe ngiphihlita umlimi netinkhabi takhe, ngawe ngiphihlita babusi netiphatsimandla.”" 
Jeremiah51:24 “Embikwemehlo enu ngiyawutiphindzisela kuyo iBhabhulona, nakubo bonkhe labahlala eveni lemaBhabhulona ngako konkhe labona ngako eSiyoni,” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah51:25 “Ngimelene nawe, wena ntsaba lebhubhisako, wena lobhubhisa umhlaba wonkhe,” kusho Simakadze. “Ngiyakwelula sandla sami silwe nawe, ngikugicite ngikwehlise eticongweni, ngikwente ube yintsaba leshisiwe." 
Jeremiah51:26 Kute lidvwala leliyawutsatfwa kuwe liyekwentiwa sisekelo sendlu, kute nome litje leliyakwentiwa sisekelo, ngobe sewuyawusala kukhala libhungane phakadze naphakadze,” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah51:27 “Phakamisani emhlabeni siboniso semphi! Shayani impalampala emkhatsini wetive! Lungisani tive, nitilungiselele kulwa neBhabhulona. Butsani lemibuso, niyisukele niyihlasele: nibite i-Ararathi, neMini kanye ne-Ashkenazi. Bekani indvuna yemphi, nimelane neBhabhulona. Tfumelani emahhashi lanjengemabulo esikhonyane." 
Jeremiah51:28 Lungisani tive nitilungiselele kulwa nayo, emakhosi aseMediya, nebabusi bawo, netiphatsimandla tawo tonkhe, kanye nemave onkhe letiwabusako." 
Jeremiah51:29 Live liyatfutfumela ligidzitele, ngobe injongo yaSimakadze ngeBhabhulona imile, kutsi abhubhise live laseBhabhulona, kuze kutsi kubete namunye longahlala kulo." 
Jeremiah51:30 Emabutfo aseBhabhulona aseyekele kulwa, asahleti nje etinqabeni tawo. Emandla awo asaphelile, asanjengebafati. Tindzawo tayo tekuhlala setilunyekwe ngemlilo; imicabo yemasango ayo seyephuliwe." 
Jeremiah51:31 Sigijimi lesinye silandzela lesinye, nesitfunywa silandzela lesinye sitfunywa kuyawubikela inkhosi yaseBhabhulona kutsi lonkhe lidolobha layo selitfunjiwe." 
Jeremiah51:32 Ematubuko avinjiwe, imihlanga ishiswe ngemlilo, emasotja atfutfumela.”" 
Jeremiah51:33 Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, Nkulunkulu wema-Israyeli, utsi: “INdvodzakati yaseBhabhulona injengendzawo yekubhulela kolo ngesikhatsi nayigcotjwagcotjwa, sikhatsi sekuyivuna iBhabhulona sitawufika masinyane.”" 
Jeremiah51:34 “Usidlile Nebukhadnezari, inkhosi yaseBhabhulona, wasicedza, wasenta saba ludziwo lolungenalutfo. Njenganyokangwenya usigwinyile, wagcwalisa sisu sakhe ngebumnandzi betfu, wabuya wasihlanta." 
Jeremiah51:35 Shangatsi lobudlwangudlwangu lobentiwe enyameni yetfu bungabasetikweBhabhulona,” kusho takhamiti taseSiyoni. “Shangatsi ingati yetfu ingabasetikwalabo labatakhamiti eveni lemaBhabhulona,” kusho iJerusalema." 
Jeremiah51:36 Ngako-ke, naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: “Buka la, ngiyakuyivikela indzaba yakho, ngikubuyiselele; ngiyakomisa lwandle lwelive lemaBhabhulona ngente imitfombo yalo yome." 
Jeremiah51:37 IBhabhulona iyawuba yindvundvuma yematje, kube ngumgedze wetimphungutja, sesabiso nentfo yekuphukutwa, yebo, indzawo lengahlalwa ngumuntfu." 
Jeremiah51:38 Bantfu bakhona bonkhe babhodla njengemabhubesi lasemancane, bayahhonga njengemankhonyane emabhubesi." 
Jeremiah51:39 Kodvwa bayawutsi nase bavutsa, ngibentele lidzili labo, ngibadzakise, kuze batewumemeta ngenjabulo, bese balala kokuphela bangaphindzi bavuke,” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah51:40 “Ngiyawubehlisela phansi bayiswe ekuhlatjweni njengemazinyane nanjengetihhanca netiphongo.” 
Jeremiah51:41 “Maye, iyawutfunjwa iSheshaki bo! Yona lebeyiludvumo lwemhlaba wonkhe itawubanjwa. Maye, iyawuba sesabiso iBhabhulona emkhatsini wetive!" 
Jeremiah51:42 Lwandle luyawukhuphukela etikweBhabhulona, emagagasi alo ladvumako ayawuyisibekela." 
Jeremiah51:43 Emadolobha ayo ayawusala akhala libhungane, ibe live lelomile nalelilihlane, live lapho kungahlali muntfu khona, lapho kungahambi muntfu khona." 
Jeremiah51:44 Ngiyakumjezisa Bheli eBhabhulona, ngimente akuhlantele phansi konkhe loko lakumitile. Tive atisayikubekelela tiye kuye, nelubondza lwaseBhabhulona luyakuwa." 
Jeremiah51:45 “Phumani kuyo, sive sami! Balekisani timphilo tenu! Balekelani intfukutselo leyesabekako yaSimakadze." 
Jeremiah51:46 Ningajabhi, futsi ningesabi, nakuvakala emahemuhemu eveni. Lenye indzaba itawufika lonyaka, lenye ifike nyakenye, emahemuhemu ebudlwangudlwangu eveni, newembusi lovukela umbusi." 
Jeremiah51:47 Ngobe ngempela sikhatsi siyawufika, lapho ngiyawujezisa khona tithico taseBhabhulona. Live layo lonkhe liyawuhlazeka, nabo bonkhe labagwaziwe bakhona bayawulala lucaca ekhatsi kuyo." 
Jeremiah51:48 Ngulapho-ke lizulu nemhlaba nako konkhe lokukuko kuyawumemeta ngenjabulo ngeBhabhulona, ngobe kuyawuchamuka babhubhisi ngasenyakatfo bateyihlasela,” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah51:49 “IBhabhulona kufanele iwe ngenca yema-Israyeli labulewe, njengaloko labo lababulewe emhlabeni wonkhe bawa ngenca yeBhabhulona.”" 
Jeremiah51:50 “Nine leniphunyulile enkembeni, hambani ningabe nisalibala! Khumbulani Simakadze, niseveni lelikhashane, nicabange ngeJerusalema.”" 
Jeremiah51:51 “Sihlazekile, ngobe setfukiwe, lihlazo lisimbonye buso betfu, ngobe bantfu bekuhamba bangenile etindzaweni letingcwele tendlu yaSimakadze.”" 
Jeremiah51:52 “Kodvwa ayeta emalanga, lapho ngiyawujezisa khona tithico tayo, kulo lonkhe live layo labalimele bayawububula,” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah51:53 “Ngisho nome iBhabhulona ingefikela esibhakabhakeni icinise tonkhe tinqaba tayo letiphakeme, ngiyawutfumela babhubhisi bayisukele,” kusho Simakadze." 
Jeremiah51:54 “Umsindvo wekukhala uchamuka eBhabhulona, umsindvo wekubhubhisa lokukhulu uchamuka eveni lemaBhabhulona." 
Jeremiah51:55 Simakadze uyakuyibhubhisa iBhabhulona, uyawuvala imilomo yemisindvo yayo. Emagagasi etitsa ayawugubha njengemanti lamakhulu, kudvuma kwemavi ato kuyawuvakala kuhlokoma." 
Jeremiah51:56 Umbhubhisi uyawufika emelane neBhabhulona, emabutfo ayo ayawutfunjwa, nebutjoki bawo buyakwephulwa. Ngobe Simakadze unguNkulunkulu wemivuzo, uyawukhokhela ngalokuphelele." 
Jeremiah51:57 Ngiyawudzakisa tindvuna tayo kanye nalabahlakaniphile bayo, nebabusi bayo, netiphatsimandla tayo, kanye nemabutfo ayo nawo. Bayawulala kokuphela bangaphindzi bavuke,” kusho iNkhosi, lelibito layo kunguSimakadze longuSomandla." 
Jeremiah51:58 Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, utsi: “Lubondza lolulicinsi lwaseBhabhulona luyakwendlaleka phansi, nemasango ayo laphakeme alunyekwe ngemlilo, bantfu batikhatsate ngelite, umshikashika wetive ungemafutsa nje ekubasela emalangabi.”" 
Jeremiah51:59 Lona ngumlayeto Jeremiya umphrofethi lawutjela Seraya, umsa waNeriya, umsa waMahaseya, ngesikhatsi aya eBhabhulona, ahamba naSedekiya, inkhosi yakaJuda, ngemnyaka wesine wekubusa kwakhe. Seraya abeyindvuna yekulungisa tindzawo tekuphumula neyekwaba kudla netimphahla temabutfo emphi." 
Jeremiah51:60 Jeremiya abebhale encwadzini legocotwako ngato tonkhe tigemegeme letatitakwehlela iBhabhulona, konkhe loko lokwakubhaliwe macondzana neBhabhulona." 
Jeremiah51:61 Wakhuluma kuSeraya, watsi: “Nawufika eBhabhulona, ubocaphela kutsi uyawafundza onkhe lamavi kakhulu." 
Jeremiah51:62 Bese utsi: ‘Awu, Simakadze, utsite utakuyibhubhisa lendzawo, kangangekutsi kute umuntfu nome silwane lesiyawuhlala kuyo, seyiyawusala ikhala libhungane phakadze naphakadze.’" 
Jeremiah51:63 Ubotsi ungacedza kufundza lencwadzi legocotwako, ubophele litje kuyo, bese uyijika emfuleni iYufrathe," 
Jeremiah51:64 bese utsi: ‘Iyawucwila kanjalo-ke iBhabhulona, ingasayiwuphindza ivuke, ngenca yesigemegeme lengiyawusehlisela kuyo. Nebantfu bakhona bayakuwa.’ ” Emavi aJeremiya aphelela lapha-ke." 
Jeremiah52:1 Sedekiya abeneminyaka lengema-21 budzala nakabekwa kuba yinkhosi, wabusela eJerusalema iminyaka leli-11. Libito lenina bekunguHamutali, indvodzakati yaJeremiya, waseLibna." 
Jeremiah52:2 Wenta lokubi emehlweni aSimakadze, njengobe naJehoyakimu abentile." 
Jeremiah52:3 Kwabangelwa yintfukutselo yaSimakadze lokutsi kwenteke loku eJerusalema nakaJuda, kwaze kwatsi ekugcineni wabasusa ebukhoneni bakhe. Sedekiya wase uyayivukela inkhosi yaseBhabhulona." 
Jeremiah52:4 Kwatsi ngemnyaka wemfica wekubusa kwaSedekiya, ngelilanga lelishumi, enyangeni yelishumi, Nebukhadnezari, inkhosi yaseBhabhulona, washuca wayawuhlasela iJerusalema kanye nawo onkhe emabutfo ayo. Bemisa ngephandle kwelidolobha, bakha tivimbetelo letatilitungeleta lonkhe." 
Jeremiah52:5 Lelidolobha lahlala livinjetelwe kwaze kwaba ngumnyaka weli-11 wekubusa kwenkhosi Sedekiya. 
Jeremiah52:6 Kwatsi ngelilanga lemfica lenyanga yesine, indlala lapha edolobheni yase imatima kangangekutsi kwase kute nekudla kwalabantfu labebangakudla." 
Jeremiah52:7 Lubondza-ke lwalelidolobha lwase luyafohlwa, imphi yonkhe yesuka yabaleka. Besuka edolobheni ebusuku, baphuma ngelisango lelisemkhatsini wetibondza letimbili letiseceleni kwengadze yenkhosi, lite nome emaBhabhulona abelitungeletile lelidolobha. Babaleka babhekisa emabombo ngase-Arabha," 
Jeremiah52:8 kodvwa emabutfo aseBhabhulona acosha inkhosi Sedekiya, aze ayikhandza etsafeni laseJerikho. Onkhe emasotja aSedekiya esuswa kuye asakatwa," 
Jeremiah52:9 yena wabe sewuyatfunjwa. Watfunjwa wayiswa enkhosini yaseBhabhulona eRibla, eveni laseHamathi, lapho yefike yakhipha sigwebo sayo kuye." 
Jeremiah52:10 Khona lapho eRibla inkhosi yaseBhabhulona ngulapho yabulalela khona emadvodzana aSedekiya embikwemehlo akhe, abukile, yaphindze futsi yabulalela khona tonkhe tindvuna takaJuda." 
Jeremiah52:11 Yase ikupuluta emehlo aSedekiya, yambopha ngetinketane telitfusi, yamtsatsa yamyisa eBhabhulona lapho yefika yamvalela ejele kwaze kwaba lilanga lakhe lekufa." 
Jeremiah52:12 Kwatsi elangeni lelishumi lenyanga yesihlanu ngemnyaka weli-19 wekubusa kwaNebukhadnezari, inkhosi yaseBhabhulona, Nebuzaradani, indvuna yabomahlalesangweni leyayikhonta inkhosi yaseBhabhulona, yefika eJerusalema." 
Jeremiah52:13 Walumeka umlilo ethempelini laSimakadze nasesigodlweni senkhosi, nakuto tonkhe tindlu taseJerusalema; tonkhe letatibalulekile watishisa." 
Jeremiah52:14 Yonkhe-ke imphi yaseBhabhulona, leyayingaphansi kwendvuna yemphi yabomahlalesangweni, yabhidlita tonkhe tibondza letatitungeleta iJerusalema." 
Jeremiah52:15 Nebuzaradani indvuna yabomahlalesangweni, watfumba labanye balababemphofu kakhulu nalabo labebasasele edolobheni, kanye nalabebasele betingcweti, nalabo lababehlubuke baya enkhosini yaseBhabhulona, wabayisa ekutfunjweni." 
Jeremiah52:16 Kodvwa Nebuzaradani wabashiya labanye labebamphofu kakhulu balelo live, kuze batewulima tivini nemasimi." 
Jeremiah52:17 BaseBhabhulona bafohlota tinsika telitfusi, netincodlana, kanye nelibhavu lelitfusi, lokwakusethempelini laSimakadze, betfwala lonkhe litfusi baya nalo eBhabhulona." 
Jeremiah52:18 Batsatsa ngisho nemabhodo, nemafosholo, netijubantsambo, netitja tekunyenyeta, netingwembe, nato tonkhe tintfo telitfusi letatisetjentiswa enkhonzweni yelithempeli." 
Jeremiah52:19 Indvuna yabomahlalesangweni yatsatsa imigezelo, netitja tekushisela imphepho, netitja tekunyenyeta, nemabhodo, netintsi tetibane, netingwembe, netitja teminikelo yetinatfo, nako konkhe lokwakwentiwe ngegolide lecengekile nome ngesiliva lecengekile." 
Jeremiah52:20 Litfusi laletinsika letimbili, nalelibhavu kanye naletinkunzi letatili-12 letatingaphansi kwalo, naletincodlana letatakhiwe yinkhosi Solomoni, atakhele lithempeli laSimakadze, kwakungetulu kwekukalwa." 
Jeremiah52:21 Iyinye yaletinsika yayingemamitha labengaba siphohlongo kuphakama, nemamitha labengaba sihlanu nesigamu kuyitungeleta, yayingimino lemine bucinsi, ingumhume lapha ekhatsi." 
Jeremiah52:22 Lengcongwane yaletinsika iyinye yayingaba ngemamitha lamabili nesigamu kuphakama, yayihlotjiswe ngesiviliya nangemahananandza elitfusi layitungeletile. Nalena lenye insika nalamahananandza yayifanana nayo yekucala." 
Jeremiah52:23 Kwakunemahananandza langema-96 ngakulolunye luhlangotsi, asawonkhe emahananandza labengetulu kwalesiviliya lesitungeletile abelikhulu." 
Jeremiah52:24 Indvuna yabomahlalesangweni yatfumba boSeraya, umPhristi Lomkhulu, naZefaniya, umphristi longaphansi kwakhe ngesikhundla, kanye nebagcini beminyango labatsatfu." 
Jeremiah52:25 Kulabo lababesesedolobheni watsatsa indvuna leyayiphetse emadvodza emphi. Watsatsa nebeluleki benkhosi lababesikhombisa namabhalane wendvuna yekubutsekisa bantfu balelove, kanye nemadvodza labengema-60 labetfolakele edolobheni." 
Jeremiah52:26 Nebuzaradani, indvuna yabomahlalesangweni, wabatsatsa bonkhe wayawubetfula enkhosini yaseBhabhulona, eRibla." 
Jeremiah52:27 Lapho eRibla, eveni laseHamathi, inkhosi yafike yababulalela khona. Ngako Juda waya ekutfunjweni, khashane nelive lakhe." 
Jeremiah52:28 Leli-ke linani lebantfu labatfunjwa nguNebukhadnezari wabayisa ekudzingisweni: Ngemnyaka wesikhombisa kwaba ngemaJuda lati-3 023; 
Jeremiah52:29 ngemyaka waNebukhadnezari weli-18 kwaba bantfu labangema-832 lababephuma eJerusalema. 
Jeremiah52:30 Ngemnyaka wakhe wema-23 kwaba ngemaJuda langema-745 layiswa nguNebuzaradani, indvuna yabomahlalesangweni, ekudzingisweni. Sebabonkhe kwakubantfu labati-4 600." 
Jeremiah52:31 Ngemnyaka wema-37 wekudzingiswa kwaJehoyakhini, inkhosi yakaJuda, ngemnyaka lapho Evili Merodaki abekwa khona waba yinkhosi yaseBhabhulona, wakhulula Jehoyakhini, inkhosi yakaJuda, wamkhipha ejele mhla ingema-25 enyangeni yeli-12." 
Jeremiah52:32 Wakhuluma kahle naye, wabe sewumnika sihlalo lesihloniphekile, lesingetulu kwelamanye emakhosi labenaye lapha eBhabhulona." 
Jeremiah52:33 Ngako Jehoyakhini wababeka eceleni labomfengeni bakhe basejele, kusukela ngalelo langa abedla etafuleni lenkhosi njalo nje, imphilo yakhe yonkhe." 
Jeremiah52:34 Onkhe emalanga inkhosi yaseBhabhulona yayinika Jehoyakhini imbasha nalokunye lekwakusabelo sakhe lesimile semihla ngemihla, yingci nasaphila, kwadzimate kwaba lilanga lakhe lekufa." 
Lamentations1:1 Maye! laze lasala likhala libhungane lidolobha, yebo, lidolobha lelake lanyakatela bantfu! Awu! laze lafanana nemfelokati, lidolobha lelake ladvuma emkhatsini wetive! IJerusalema leyake yaba yindlovukazi emkhatsini wemave, nyalo seyigucuke yaba sigcili." 
Lamentations1:2 Ebusuku likhala kabuhlungu, tihlatsi talo tigeleta tinyembeti. Kute namunye longalidvudvuta, kubo bonkhe labalitsandzako. Bonkhe bangani balo balihlamukile, sebagucuke baba titsa talo." 
Lamentations1:3 Emvakwekushaywa nekukhandleka kamatima, Juda sewuyiswe ekutfunjweni. Sewuhlala emkhatsini wetive, akayitfoli indzawo yekuphumula. Bonkhe labacoshana naye sebamkhandzile, bamkhandza asekhatsi elusizini." 
Lamentations1:4 Imigwaco leya eSiyoni iyalila, ngobe sekwabate namunye lota emikhosini yayo lemisiwe. Onkhe emasango ayo asasala anesitunge, baphristi bayo bayabubula, emantfombatana ayo ayadzabuka, isebuhlungwini lobumatima kakhulu." 
Lamentations1:5 Titsa tayo setigucuke taba baphatsi bayo; titsa tayo tikhibikile. Simakadze sewehlisele kuyo kudzabuka ngenca yetono tayo letinyenti. Bantfwabayo bayiswa ekutfunjweni, sebatigcili kuto titsa tayo." 
Lamentations1:6 Bonkhe lobucwebecwebe sebunyamalele kuyo iNdvodzakati yaseSiyoni. Babusi bayo bafanana netinyamatane letilambako; letibaleka ngekutayiya, natibalekela batingeli bato." 
Lamentations1:7 Ngemalanga ekushaywa nekundzindza kwayo iJerusalema iwakhumbula onkhe emagugu ayo labengewayo ngemalanga akadzeni. Ngaleto tikhatsi bantfu bayo nabawela etandleni tetitsa, kwabate namunye labengayilamlela. Titsa tayo tayibuka, tayihleka bulima nayibhidlika." 
Lamentations1:8 IJerusalema yone kakhulu, ngaloko seyisinengiso. Bonkhe lababeyihlonipha sebayayedzelela, ngobe sebabubonile bungcunu bayo; yona cobo lwayo iyabubula ifulatsele." 
Lamentations1:9 Kungcola kwayo kunamatsele etidvwabeni tayo; ayizange ilinakekele likusasa layo. Kuwa kwayo kwakumangalisa, kwabate labengayidvudvuta. “Awu Simakadze, buka kushaywa kwami, ngobe sitsa siyangehlula.”" 
Lamentations1:10 Sitsa sabeka tandla taso kuyo yonkhe imicebo yayo; iJerusalema yabona betive bangena ethempelini layo, labo lowabalela kutsi bangene ebandleni lakho." 
Lamentations1:11 Bonkhe bantfu bayo bayabubula ngesikhatsi bafunana kudla bantjintjisa imicebo yabo ngenca yekudla, batsi bentele kutsi batiphilise. “Awu Simakadze, buka unake, ngobe ngibukelwa phansi.”" 
Lamentations1:12 “Akusho lutfo yini kini, nonkhe nine lenendlula ngendlela? Calatani ndzawo tonkhe nibone. Kukhona yini kuhlupheka lokufanana nekwami kuhlupheka lokwehliselwa kimi, kuhlupheka Simakadze langishaya ngako ngelilanga lekutfukutsela kwakhe lokwesabekako?" 
Lamentations1:13 “Watfumela umlilo asetulu, wawehlisela phansi ematsanjeni ami. Webekela tinyawo tami linetha, wangincandzekisa. Wangenta ngaba ngulolahliwe, ngacaleka lilanga lonkhe." 
Lamentations1:14 “Tono tami taboshwa ngesandla sakhe taba lijoko. Watephotsela yena watihlanganisa, setikhuphukele entsanyeni yami, naSimakadze uwesusile emandla ami. Unginiketele kulabo lengingeke ngikhone kumelana nabo." 
Lamentations1:15 “Simakadze uwalahlile onkhe emabutfo lengisemkhatsini wawo, sewuhlomise imphi letewumelana nami kutsi itewuhlifita onkhe emajaha akami. Simakadze uyihlifitile iNtfombi yakaJuda njengemagelebisi etjeni lekuhlutela liwayini." 
Lamentations1:16 “Nguloko lokungenta ngilile, nemehlo ami aphophota tinyembeti. Kute namunye losedvutane longidvudvutako, kute namunye longabuyisa umoya wami. Bantfwabami bahlutjuliwe, ngobe sitsa singehlulile.”" 
Lamentations1:17 ISiyoni yelula tandla tayo, kodvwa kute namunye longayidvudvuta. Simakadze ushaye umtsetfo ngaJakobe kutsi bomakhelwane bakhe babe titsa takhe. IJerusalema seyigucuke yaba yintfo lesinengiso emkhatsini wabo." 
Lamentations1:18 “Simakadze ulungile, noko ngayihlubuka imitsetfo yakhe. Lalelani, nonkhe nine tive, bukani kuhlupheka kwami. Emajaha akami netintfombi takami sebatfunjiwe." 
Lamentations1:19 “Ngabamemeta labo labangakimi, kodvwa bona bangihlamuka. Baphristi bami, nebaholi bami babhubhela edolobheni, ngesikhatsi balibele kuchwandza kudla batsi betama kutiphilisa." 
Lamentations1:20 “Awu Simakadze, buka nje kutsi ngihlupheke kangakanani! Ngisemalahleni lapha ngekhatsi, inhlitiyo yami ikhatsatekile, ngobe bengingulelikhulu lihlubuka. Ngephandle, inkemba iyabulala; ngekhatsi ekhaya, kunekufa kodvwa." 
Lamentations1:21 “Bantfu bakuvile kububula kwami, kodvwa kute namunye longidvudvutako. Tonkhe titsa tami tivile ngekuhlupheka kwami. Tiyajabula ngaloko lokwentile. Mane sale uliletsa lelilanga lowalimemetela, kuze nabo batewuba njengami." 
Lamentations1:22 “Kodvwa konkhe kungalungi kwabo akute embikwakho, nabo ubaphatse njengaloku wentile kimi, ngenca yato tonkhe tono tami. Kububula kwami kunyenti, nenhlitiyo yami iyacaleka.”" 
Lamentations2:1 Maye! Simakadze uyimbonye kanjani iNdvodzakati yaseSiyoni ngelifu lentfukutselo yakhe! Ubudzaceke phansi bukhosi baka-Israyeli, busuka ezulwini buya emhlabeni. Akazange asikhumbule senabelo setinyawo takhe ngelilanga lentfukutselo yakhe." 
Lamentations2:2 Simakadze ushwabudzele onkhe emakhaya akaJakobe, ngaphandle kwekuwahawukela. Ngelulaka lwakhe udladlabule tinqaba teNdvodzakati yakaJuda. Uwehlisele phansi emhlabatsini ngelihlazo umbuso wayo kanye netikhulu tayo." 
Lamentations2:3 Ngentfukutselo leyesabekako uncamule tonkhe timphondvo taka-Israyeli. Usifinyetile sandla sakhe sekudla ngesikhatsi kuchamuka sitsa. Ushise Jakobe, kwaba shangatsi kulavutela emalangabi emlilo, yebo, umlilo lodla ucotfule konkhe lokusedvutane nawo." 
Lamentations2:4 Ujijimete umcibisholo wakhe njengesitsa, sandla sakhe sangesekudla silungele kulwa. Njengesitsa ujube bonkhe labebajabulisa emehlweni; watfulula lulaka lwakhe njengemlilo etikwelithende leNdvodzakati yaseSiyoni." 
Lamentations2:5 Simakadze unjengesitsa; umgwinyile Israyeli. Ugwinye tonkhe tigodlo takhe, wabhubhisa tinqaba takhe. Wandzise kulila nekukhala kabuhlungu kuyo iNdvodzakati yakaJuda." 
Lamentations2:6 Indzawo yakhe yekuhlala uyicitse njengelidlangala lasensimini, uyibhubhisile indzawo yakhe yekuhlangana. Simakadze wente iSiyoni yawakhohlwa emadzili ayo lemisiwe, nemaSabatha ayo. Ngentfukutselo yakhe ukudvube kokubili: inkhosi yayo nemphristi wayo." 
Lamentations2:7 Simakadze ulilahlile lilati lakhe, wayishiya indzawo yakhe lengcwele. Unikele tibondza tetigodlo taseSiyoni etitseni; tamemeta kakhulu ekhatsi endlini yaSimakadze, kwaze kwaba shangatsi ngungelilanga lelidzili lelamiswa." 
Lamentations2:8 Simakadze watimisela kudzilitela phansi lubondza lolutungelete iNdvodzakati yaseSiyoni. Welula intsambo yekukala, wangete wasincandza sandla sakhe ekubhubhiseni. Wenta tibondza tekuvikela, netindvonga kwakhala, konkhe kwaguga kanyekanye." 
Lamentations2:9 Emasango ayo ashone emhlabatsini; imicabo yayo wayifohlota wayibhubhisa. Inkhosi yayo netikhulu tayo tahlakatwa tayiswa etiveni, umtsetfo sekwabate, Nebaphrofethi bayo abasayitfoli imibono levela kuSimakadze." 
Lamentations2:10 Babusi beNdvodzakati yaseSiyoni bahlala phansi bathule, batsele lutfuli etinhloko tabo, bembatse emasaka. Emantfombatana aseJerusalema atfobile, abhekisa tinhloko tawo phansi." 
Lamentations2:11 Emehlo ami aluvitsi ngenca yekukhala. Ngiyasha ngiyabhadla emphefumulweni wami, inhlitiyo yami itfululeleke phansi emhlabatsini, ngobe bantfu bakitsi babhujisiwe, bantfwana netinswane kuyacaleka etitaladini telidolobha." 
Lamentations2:12 Bakhuluma kubonina batsi: “Kuphi kudla neliwayini?” ngesikhatsi nabacaleka njengemadvodza lagwaziwe etitaladini telidolobha, ngesikhatsi imiphefumulo yabo iphuma ihamba, basetandleni tabonina." 
Lamentations2:13 Ngingatsini nje ngawe? Ngingakufananisa nani nje, wena Ndvodzakati yaseJerusalema? Yini nje lengingakulinganisa nayo, kuze ngikudvudvute, wena Ntfombi yaseSiyoni? Linceba lakho lishona njengelwandle. Ngubani longakwelapha?" 
Lamentations2:14 Imibono yebaphrofethi bakho yayingemanga, futsi ingenamsebenti. Baphrofethi bakho abazange batibeke ebaleni tono takho, kuze uvikeleke kuloko kugcilateka. Letembulo labakunika tona tatitemanga netekwedukisa." 
Lamentations2:15 Bonkhe labo labendlula ngakuwe bashaya tandla tabo ngawe. Bayancifa, banikine tinhloko ngayo iNdvodzakati yaseJerusalema, batsi: “Kungabe kambe ngilo leli lelidolobha lelalibitwa ngekutsi kuphelela kwebuhle, nenjabulo yemhlaba wonkhe?”" 
Lamentations2:16 Tonkhe titsa takho tikukhamisela imilomo lemikhulu. Tiyancifa tigugudze imihlatsi titsi: “Lidolobha sesilimitile. Leli lilanga lebesivele sililindzele, besihlalele kubona lona.”" 
Lamentations2:17 Simakadze wente loko labesakumisile; ulifezile livi lakhe lalimemetela kadzeni. Sewubhidlitile, wangete waba nesihawu, wente sitsa sakucoloshela, uluphakamisile luphondvo lwetitsa takho." 
Lamentations2:18 Tinhlitiyo tebantfu tikhala kuSimakadze. Awu, wena lubondza lweNdvodzakati yaseSiyoni, tinyembeti takho atigobhote njengemfula busuku nemini, ungatiniki kuphumula, emehlo akho angaphumuli." 
Lamentations2:19 Vuka ukhale kusengusebusuku, ngesikhatsi balindzi bangena emsebentini wabo, utfulule inhlitiyo yakho njengemanti ebukhoneni baSimakadze. Phakamisela tandla takho kuye ngenca yetimphilo tebantfwana bakho lasebacaleka ngenca yendlala, ekucaleni nasekupheleni kwato tonkhe titaladi." 
Lamentations2:20 “Buka, Simakadze, unakisise. Ngubani nje lowake wamphatsa ngalendlela? Kufanele yini bafati badle batukulu babo, bantfwana lababongile babakhulisa? Baphrofethi nebaphristi kufanele yini babulawe bafele endlini lengcwele yaSimakadze?" 
Lamentations2:21 “Labasha nalabadzala kulale lunja kanyekanye elutfulini lwetitaladi; emajaha ami netintfombi tami kuwe ngelusiko lwenkemba. Ubabhubhisile ngelilanga lentfukutselo yakho; ubabulale ngenkemba ungenasihawu nabo. 
Lamentations2:22 “Wabutsisa tesabiso tami ndzawo tonkhe, kwaba shangatsi umemela bantfu edzilini. Ngelilanga lentfukutselo yaSimakadze kute namunye lowaphunyula nalowasindza. Titsa tami tibashaye tabacotfula labo lengangibongile ngabanakekela.”" 
Lamentations3:1 Mine ngingumuntfu lokubonile kuhlupheka ngendvuku yelulaka lwaSimakadze. 
Lamentations3:2 Ungicoshile, wangenta ngahamba ngetinyawo, ngahamba ebumnyameni kungesiko ekukhanyeni." 
Lamentations3:3 Ngempela, sandla sakhe usiguculele ngakimi, simelana nami njalo nje, onkhe emalanga." 
Lamentations3:4 Usigugisile sikhumba sami nenyama yami, ematsambo ami uwafohlotile." 
Lamentations3:5 Ungivimbetele, wangitungeleta ngalokubabako nangekuhlupheka lokukhulu." 
Lamentations3:6 Ungihlalise ebumnyameni, nginjengalabo lasebalala kadzeni emadlizeni." 
Lamentations3:7 Ungibiyele ngetindvonga, ngako angikhoni kuphunyula ngibaleke. Ungibophe ngetinketane letimatima." 
Lamentations3:8 Ngisho nome sengimemeta, ngikhalela kusitwa, uyivalela ngaphandle imikhuleko yami." 
Lamentations3:9 Indlela yami uyivale ngetinguzanguza tematje; wagwegwisa indlela yami, yaba matombetombe." 
Lamentations3:10 Njengelibhele lelibhacele inyamatane, nanjengelibhubesi lelitifihlile," 
Lamentations3:11 ungihudvule endleleni, wangisitila, wangishiya ngingenamsiti." 
Lamentations3:12 Ujijimete umcibisholo wakhe, wangenta ngaba yinkoyoyo yemicibisholo yakhe." 
Lamentations3:13 Ugwaze inhlitiyo yami ngemicibisholo yasengculwini yakhe. 
Lamentations3:14 Ngagucuka ngaba yintfo yekuhlekisa kubo bonkhe bantfu, bahlabela tingoma ngami bangihaya lonkhe lilanga." 
Lamentations3:15 Ungesutsise ngemitsi lebabako, wangigcwalisa ngenyongo." 
Lamentations3:16 Ematinyo ami uwagamule ngelukhetse, wangigcobagcoba elutfulini." 
Lamentations3:17 Ngidlelelwe kuthula, ngadzimate ngakhohlwa nekutsi kuyini kuphumelela." 
Lamentations3:18 Nguko ngitsi: “Bukhosi bami buhambile kanye nako konkhe lebengetsembele ngako kuSimakadze.” 
Lamentations3:19 Ngikhumbula kushaywa kwami kanye nekundzindza kwami, loko kubaba kanye nenyongo." 
Lamentations3:20 Ngikukhumbula kahle, umphefumulo wami uphansi, udzabukile ngekhatsi kwami." 
Lamentations3:21 Yebo, noko ngiyakubuyisa engcondvweni, ngako nginelitsemba:" 
Lamentations3:22 Ngenca yelutsandvo lolukhulu lwaSimakadze asikadliwa sacedvwa, ngobe sihawu sakhe singeke siphele." 
Lamentations3:23 Sisha onkhe emalanga ekuseni, kwetsembeka kwakho kukhulu." 
Lamentations3:24 Ngiyatitjela ngitsi: “Simakadze usabelo sami, ngako ngitawulindzela yena.”" 
Lamentations3:25 Simakadze ulungile kulaba lababeke litsemba labo kuye, kulaba labamfunisisako." 
Lamentations3:26 Kuhle kuyilindzela ngekuthula nangekubeketela insindziso yaSimakadze. 
Lamentations3:27 Kuhle kumuntfu kutsi etfwale lijoko ngesikhatsi asesemusha. 
Lamentations3:28 Akahlale yedvwa athule, ngobe nguSimakadze lona lometfwese lona." 
Lamentations3:29 Akembele buso bakhe elutfulini, mhlawumbe kusengaba khona litsemba." 
Lamentations3:30 Akaniketele sihlatsi sakhe kulowo longamshaya ngemphama, atseleke ngemahloni nangelihlazo." 
Lamentations3:31 Ngobe Simakadze bantfu akabalahli kokuphela. 
Lamentations3:32 Nome akuletsa kudzabuka, kodvwa uyawubuye ahawukele, lukhulu kangako-ke lutsandvo lwakhe." 
Lamentations3:33 Ngobe bantfu akabahluphi ngobe atsandza kubevisa buhlungu nome-ke kubadzabukisa. 
Lamentations3:34 Kuhlifita ngetinyawo tonkhe tiboshwa eveni," 
Lamentations3:35 nekudlelela umuntfu emalungelo akhe embikwaSimakadze Longetulu Kwako Konkhe," 
Lamentations3:36 nekudlelela umuntfu lilungelo lakhe lekwehlulelwa ngebucotfo bemtsetfo, kungabe Simakadze angeke yini atibone tintfo letinjengaleto?" 
Lamentations3:37 Ngubani longakhuluma, ente kwenteke, nangabe Simakadze angakakumiseli kutsi kube njalo?" 
Lamentations3:38 Akuphumi lokuhle nalokubi yini emlonyeni wakhe, Longetulu Kwako Konkhe?" 
Lamentations3:39 Umuntfu nje lophilako ukhononelani, nakajeziswa ngenca yetono takhe?" 
Lamentations3:40 Asihlolisise tindlela tetfu sitivivinye, bese sibuyela kuSimakadze." 
Lamentations3:41 Asiphakamisele tinhlitiyo tetfu kanye netandla tetfu etulu, sitiphakamisele kuNkulunkulu, sitsi:" 
Lamentations3:42 “Sonile sahlubuka, awukatsetseleli." 
Lamentations3:43 “Utimbonye ngelulaka, wasisukela wasicosha, wabulala ngaphandle kwesihawu." 
Lamentations3:44 Utimbonye ngelifu, kuze kutebate umthandazo longefika kuwe." 
Lamentations3:45 Usente emagwebu netilahlwa emkhatsini wetive tonkhe. 
Lamentations3:46 “Tonkhe titsa tetfu setisikhamisele imilomo lemikhulu. 
Lamentations3:47 Sehlelwe kwesaba neluvalo, nemigodzi, kubhujiswa, nekucitfwa.”" 
Lamentations3:48 Imifula yetinyembeti iyageleta isuka emehlweni ami, ngobe bantfu bami babhujisiwe." 
Lamentations3:49 Emehlo ami ayawugobhota angemi, angabi nako kuphumula," 
Lamentations3:50 adzimate Simakadze abuke phansi asezulwini kutsi abone. 
Lamentations3:51 Loku lengikubonako kuletsa lusizi emphefumulweni wami, ngenca yabo bonkhe besifazane basedolobheni lami." 
Lamentations3:52 Labo lababetitsa tami ngaphandle kwesizatfu babengitingela njengenyoni. 
Lamentations3:53 Betama kucedzela imphilo yami emgodzini, bangijikijela ngematje," 
Lamentations3:54 emanti ayisibekela inhloko yami, ngacabanga ngatsi akusesingakanani ngincanyulwe." 
Lamentations3:55 Ngalibita Libito lakho, Simakadze, ekujuleni kwemgodzi lohlokomako." 
Lamentations3:56 Wakuva kuncusa kwami: “Ungativali tindlebe takho ekukhaleni kwami; ngicela kuphunyutwa.” 
Lamentations3:57 Wasondzela kimi nangikubita, watsi: “Ungesabi.”" 
Lamentations3:58 Awu Simakadze, wayimela indzaba yami, wayihlenga imphilo yami." 
Lamentations3:59 Awu Simakadze, nawe ukubonile lokubi lokwentiwe kimi. Phumelelisa indzaba yami!" 
Lamentations3:60 Ukubonile kujula kwemphindziselo yabo, onkhe emacebo labangibophele wona ngasense." 
Lamentations3:61 Awu Simakadze, utivile tinhlamba tabo, onkhe emacebo abo labangimisele wona," 
Lamentations3:62 loko titsa tami letikuhlebako, tingumtela ngami lonkhe lilanga." 
Lamentations3:63 Tibuke! Natihleti nome timile, tiyangihaya nangetingoma tato." 
Lamentations3:64 Awu Simakadze, buyisela kuto loko lokufanele tandla tato." 
Lamentations3:65 Mbonya tinhlitiyo tato ngendvwangu, shangatsi sicalekiso sakho singaba setikwato!" 
Lamentations3:66 Ticoshe ngentfukutselo yakho, utibhubhise, tingaphindzi tibe khona ngaphansi kwemazulu aSimakadze." 
Lamentations4:1 Yeka legolide leseyilahlekelwe bucwebecwebe bayo, igolide lebeyicolisakele seyigucuke yafiphala. Ematje laligugu endlu lengcwele asasakateleke emaphetselweni ato tonkhe titaladi." 
Lamentations4:2 Maye, emadvodzana labalulekile aseSiyoni, noko nawo ake alingana negolide lecengekile, njengaloku nyalo asatsatfwa njengetindziwo telibumba nje, umsebenti wetandla tencondzi yetekubumba ngelibumba!" 
Lamentations4:3 Ngisho netimphungutja tiyayikhipha imibele yato timunyise emazinyane ato, kodvwa bantfu bami sebagucuke bangabi nanhlitiyo, baba njengetinshi tasehlane." 
Lamentations4:4 Ngenca yekoma, lulwimi lwalabamunyako lunamatsela elwangeni; bantfwana bacela kudla, kodvwa kubete lobapha kona." 
Lamentations4:5 Labo labake badla kahle batamasa, nyalo sebangimizulane netindzindzi etitaladini. Labo lababekhuliswa ngaletibukhwebeletane, nyalo sebalala emataleni etincunjini temlotsa." 
Lamentations4:6 Sijeziso sebantfu bami sikhulu kunesalabo baseSodoma, lababhujiswa ngemzuzwana munye, kwabate nasinye sandla lesabelekelela." 
Lamentations4:7 Tikhulu tabo taticwebetela kwendlula sitfwatfwa, timhlophe kwendlula lubisi. Imitimba yato yayibovu yendlula emarubi, kubonakala kwato kwakunjengekwemasafire." 
Lamentations4:8 Kodvwa nyalo setimnyama kwengca umsiti, atatiwa ngisho nasetitaladini. Sikhumba sato sesishwaphene sanamatsela ematsanjeni ato, sesome saba njengelukhuni." 
Lamentations4:9 Labo lababulawa ngenkemba bancono kunalabo labafa babulawa yindlala; badvutjutwe yindlala, baze baguga baphela ngenca yekweswela kudla emasimini." 
Lamentations4:10 Bafati labanesihawu badzimate bapheka bantfwababo ngetabo tandla, bagucuka baba kudla kwabo ngesikhatsi bantfu bakitsi babhujiswa." 
Lamentations4:11 Simakadze ulufeze ngalokuphelele lulaka lwakhe, uyitfululile intfukutselo yakhe levutsako. ESiyoni uphembe umlilo lowadla tisekelo tayo." 
Lamentations4:12 Kute emakhosi emhlaba, ngisho nasinye sive lesisemhlabeni, lesake sakukholwa kutsi titsa nalabaphambene nayo bangangena emasangweni aseJerusalema." 
Lamentations4:13 Kodvwa kwenteka ngenca yetono tebaphrofethi bayo, nangetiphambuko tebaphristi bayo, labacitsa ingati yalabamsulwa ekhatsi kuyo." 
Lamentations4:14 Nyalo baphrofethi nebaphristi sebadvukuta etitaladini njengemadvodza latimphumphutse. Tingubo tabo setishone ingati, tadzimate tangcola lokwekutsi sekute namunye lofisa nekutitsintsa ngesandla tembatfo tabo." 
Lamentations4:15 Bantfu bayabacosha, batsi: “Hambani la! Sukani la! Ningcolile! Khweshani! Khweshani! Ningasitsintsi!” Ngesikhatsi baphrofethi nebaphristi babaleka bayewuzulazula, bantfu betive ngetive batsi: “Bangeke basachubeka nekuhlala lapha!”" 
Lamentations4:16 Simakadze cobo lwakhe ubasakatile, akasabelusi. Baphristi abasahlonishwa, nalabadzala abasaphatfwa ngemusa." 
Lamentations4:17 Ngetulu kwaloko, emehlo etfu adzimate akhatsala solomane agolotele lusito lungaveli, sabukisisa emibhoshongweni yetfu, silindzele sive lesasingeke sisisindzise." 
Lamentations4:18 Emadvodza asibekela lugibe kuto tonkhe tinyatselo tetfu, ngaloko asikhonanga kuhamba etitaladini tetfu, kuphela kwetfu kwakusedvute, nemalanga etfu abesabaliwe, ngobe kuphela kwetfu kwase kufikile." 
Lamentations4:19 Batingeli betfu babegijima kwendlula lusweti lwasesibhakabhakeni; basigijimisa etintsabeni, basibhacela ehlane." 
Lamentations4:20 Logcotjiwe waSimakadze, lokunguyena angimitsambo yekuphila kwetfu, wabhajwa etingibeni tabo. Besicabanga kutsi siyawukhosela ngaphansi kwematfunti akhe, siphile emkhatsini wetive ngetive." 
Lamentations4:21 Awu, Ndvodzakati yase-Edomu, jabula utsakase, wena lohlala eveni lase-Usi. Kodvwa nakuwe itakwendluliselwa lendzebe, uyawudzakwa uhlutjulwe ube ngcunu." 
Lamentations4:22 Awu, Ndvodzakati yaseSiyoni, kujeziswa kwakho kutawuphela; Simakadze angeke aselule sikhatsi sekudzingiswa kwakho. Kodvwa, awu, wena Ndvodzakati yase-Edomu, uyawujeziswa ngenca yesono sakho, abubeke ebaleni bubi bakho." 
Lamentations5:1 Awu Simakadze! Khumbula kutsi kwentekeni kitsi. Buka ulibone lihlazo letfu. 
Lamentations5:2 Lifa letfu selijikisiwe lanikwa bafokati, nemakhaya etfu anikwa bachamuki." 
Lamentations5:3 Sesigucuke saba tintsandzane, sabate nabobabe, nabomake sebabafelokati." 
Lamentations5:4 Emanti lesiwanatsako kufanele siwatsenge, netinkhuni sititfola ngemali kuphela." 
Lamentations5:5 Labo labasicoshako basihleti emsileni, sikhatsele sidziniwe, asikutfoli kuphumula." 
Lamentations5:6 Satinikela kubaseGibhithe nakubase-Asiriya, kuze sitfole kudla lokwenele." 
Lamentations5:7 Bobabemkhulu labona sebafa, tsine sesetfwele licala labo." 
Lamentations5:8 Tigcili tibusa etikwetfu, kute namunye longasikhulula etandleni tato." 
Lamentations5:9 Kudla kwetfu sikutfola ngekutidzela ematsambo ngenca yenkemba lesehlane. 
Lamentations5:10 Sikhumba setfu sishisa njengelitiko, siyavevetela ngenca yekulamba." 
Lamentations5:11 Bafati badlwenguliwe eSiyoni, netintfombi tadlundlulutwa emadolobheni akaJuda." 
Lamentations5:12 Tikhulu tilengiswe ngetandla tato; labadzala bangete bahlonishwa. 
Lamentations5:13 Emajaha ayaphishaneka etigayweni, bafana bayadzayitela ngaphansi kwetinyandza tetinkhuni." 
Lamentations5:14 Baholi besukile emasangweni elidolobha, emajaha asewuyekele umculo wawo." 
Lamentations5:15 Injabulo iphelile etinhlitiyweni tetfu; kugidza kwetfu kwenjabulo sekugucuke kwaba sililo. 
Lamentations5:16 Umchele udzilikile etinhloko tetfu. Maye kitsi! Ngobe sonile. 
Lamentations5:17 Ngenca yako konkhe loku tinhlitiyo tetfu tidzabukile, nangenca yato tonkhe letintfo emehlo etfu ayadvumba," 
Lamentations5:18 ngobe intsaba iSiyoni seyisele ikhala libhungane, timphungutja tiyajangaza kuyo." 
Lamentations5:19 Awu, wena Simakadze, uyabusa kuze kube phakadze. Sihlalo sakho sebukhosi sihlala sicinile titukulwane ngetitukulwane." 
Lamentations5:20 Usikhohlwelani njalo nje? Usilahleleni sikhatsi lesidze kangaka? 
Lamentations5:21 Awu! Simakadze, sibuyisele kuwe, kuze natsi sitewubuyela kuwe; sivusetele emalanga etfu abe njengemalanga asendvulo." 
Lamentations5:22 Nome sewusilahle kokuphela yini? Sekute yini siphetfo ekutfukutseleni kwakho? 
Ezekiel1:1 Ngemnyaka wema-30, enyangeni yesine, ngelilanga lesihlanu, ngangisesemkhatsini walababetfunjiwe, ngasemfuleni iKhebari, kwavuleka emazulu, ngabona imibono yaNkulunkulu." 
Ezekiel1:2 Kwatsi mhlazana tisihlanu enyangeni, ngemnyaka wesihlanu inkhosi Jehoyakhini yatfunjwa," 
Ezekiel1:3 kwefika livi laSimakadze kumphristi Hezekeli, umsa waBuzi, ngasemfuleni iKhebari eveni lemaBhabhulona. Ngulapho-ke lapho sandla saSimakadze sasisetikwakhe khona." 
Ezekiel1:4 Ngabuka, ngabona sivunguvungu sichamuka ngasenyakatfo, bekulifu lelikhulukati linebumanyamanya bembane, lalitungeletwe kukhanya lokumengetelako. Ekhatsi enkhabeni yalomlilo kwakukhona lokwakufanana nelitfusi lelimanyatelako," 
Ezekiel1:5 ekhatsi kulowo mlilo kukhona lokwakufanana netidalwa letine letiphilako. Tatibonakala tinesimo semuntfu," 
Ezekiel1:6 kodvwa nguleso naleso sasinebuso lobune netimphiko letine. 
Ezekiel1:7 Tatinemilente lecondzile; tinyawo tato tatifanana netelitfole timanyatela njengelitfusi lelilolongiwe. 
Ezekiel1:8 Ngaphansi kwetimphiko tato kulemihlubulo yato lemine tatinetandla temuntfu. Totine tatinebuso netimphiko," 
Ezekiel1:9 letimphiko tato tatitsintsana. Nguleso naleso sidalwa sasihamba sicondze embili; tatingagucuki ngesikhatsi natihamba. 
Ezekiel1:10 Buso bato babubukeka kanje: Nguleso naleso kuletidalwa letine sasinebuso bemuntfu, ngesekudla kwaso sinebuso belibhubesi, ngesancele sinebuso benkhomo, ngemuva sinebuso belusweti." 
Ezekiel1:11 Babunjalo-ke buso bato. Timphiko tato tatendlalekele etulu; sisinye sasinetimphiko letinye letimbili, lunye luphiko lutsintsana neluphiko lwalesinye sidalwa ngala nangale, bese kutsi leti letinye timphiko letimbili tembese umtimba waso." 
Ezekiel1:12 Nguleso naleso sasihamba sicondze embili. Njalo nje lapho kuya khona Moya, nato tatiya khona; tatingagucuki ekuhambeni kwato." 
Ezekiel1:13 Simo saletidalwa letiphilako sasifanana nemalahle lavutsako emlilo nome tinjengetidlwane. Umlilo wawehla wenyuka lapha emkhatsini waletidalwa. Lomlilo wawumanyatela, kuphuma umbane kuwo." 
Ezekiel1:14 Letidalwa tatigijima tiye emuva nasembili, njengekubaneka kwembane." 
Ezekiel1:15 Ngatsi ngisabuka kuletidalwa letiphilako, ngabona lisondvo emhlabatsini emhlubulweni waleso naleso sidalwa lesinebuso lobune." 
Ezekiel1:16 Kubonakala nekwakhiwa kwalamasondvo kwakume kanje: Abemanyatela njengekhrisolithe, onkhe omane abefanana. Ngulelo nalelo sondvo lalibukeka lakheke njengelisondvo leligabance kulelinye lisondvo." 
Ezekiel1:17 Njengobe abehamba nje abengahamba acondze kunome nguyiphi indzawo kuleti letine, lapho letidalwa tatibheke ngakhona; lamasondvo abengagucuki, nakuhamba letidalwa." 
Ezekiel1:18 Emarimu alamasondvo abephakeme esabeka, omane abegcwele emehlo yonkhe indzawo." 
Ezekiel1:19 Kwakutsi letidalwa letiphilako natihamba, nalamasondvo lasemihlubulweni yato ahambe; tatitsi natiphakama emhlabatsini letidalwa letiphilako, nalamasondvo nawo aphakame." 
Ezekiel1:20 Nome ngukuphi lapho Moya abengaya khona naletidalwa tatiya khona, nalamasondvo abeyaye aphakame kanye nato, ngobe lomoya waletidalwa letiphilako wawukulamasondvo." 
Ezekiel1:21 Tatitsi natihamba letidalwa, nawo ahambe; natima letidalwa, nalamasondvo eme, atsi dvu; titsi letidalwa natiphakama emhlabatsini, nalamasondvo aphakame kanye nato, ngobe umoya waletidalwa letiphilako wawukulamasondvo." 
Ezekiel1:22 Lokwakwendlaleke ngetulu kwetinhloko taletidalwa kwakuyintfo leyayifanana nemkhatsi, kucwebetela njengangcocwane, futsi kwesabeka." 
Ezekiel1:23 Ngaphansi kwalomkhatsi timphiko tato tatendlalekele kuyawutsintsana todvwana, nguleso naleso sasinetimphiko letimbili letatembese umtimba waso." 
Ezekiel1:24 Tatitsi natihamba letidalwa, ngive umsindvo wetimphiko tato unjengekudvuma kwemanti lagijimako, nanjengeliphimbo laSomandla, nanjengemdvumo wemphi. Tatitsi natima, tehlise timphiko tato." 
Ezekiel1:25 Kwase kufika livi liphuma ngetulu kwalomkhatsi lowawusetikwetinhloko tato, ngesikhatsi tima, timphiko tato setehlile." 
Ezekiel1:26 Ngetulu kwalomkhatsi lowawusetikwetinhloko tato bekunentfo leyayifanana nesihlalo sebukhosi lesakhiwe ngesafire, ngetulu kwalesihlalo sebukhosi kwakunentfo leyayinesimo lesasifanana nesemuntfu." 
Ezekiel1:27 Ngabona kutsi kusukela kuloko lokwakubonakala shangatsi kulukhalo lwakhe kuya ngenhla kwalo abefanana nelitfusi lelimanyatelako, kube shangatsi ligcwele umlilo, bese kutsi kusuka elukhalweni kuye phansi abefanana nemlilo. Abetungeletwe kukhanya lokumanyatelako." 
Ezekiel1:28 Lokukhanya kwakumtungeletile njengemushi wenkosazana ubonakala emafini, ngelilanga lekuna kwemvula. Loku bekukubonakala lokwakubonakalisa bukhosi baSimakadze. Ngatsi kube ngikubone konkhe loku, ngawa ngibhekise buso bami phansi, ngase ngiva livi lalokhulumako." 
Ezekiel2:1 Wakhuluma kimi, watsi: “Ndvodzana yemuntfu, sukuma ume ngetinyawo takho, ngitawukhuluma nawe.”" 
Ezekiel2:2 Watsi asakhuluma, Moya wangena kimi wangisukumisa, ngema ngetinyawo tami, ngamuva akhuluma kimi." 
Ezekiel2:3 Watsi: “Ndvodzana yemuntfu, ngikutfumela kuma-Israyeli, esiveni lesihlubukako nalesingihlubukile; bona naboyise solomane bayangihlubuka kuze kube ngulamuhla." 
Ezekiel2:4 Lesive lengikutfumela kuso sinenkhani nenhloko lelukhuni. Khuluma kuso, utsi: ‘Naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze.’" 
Ezekiel2:5 Nome bayakulalela nome abakulaleli, ngobe phela bayindlu lenenkhani, kodvwa bayawukwati kutsi bekunemphrofethi emkhatsini wabo." 
Ezekiel2:6 Wena-ke, ndvodzana yemuntfu, ungabesabi ngisho nemavi abo. Ungesabi ngisho nome tinchachabutane nemanyeva sekukutungeletile, yebo, nome sewuhlala emkhatsini wabofecela. Ungakwesabi loko labakushoko, futsi ungesatjiswa ngibo, lite nome bayindlu yekuhlubuka nje." 
Ezekiel2:7 Kufanele wena ukhulume emavi ami kubo, nome bayakulalela nome abakulaleli, ngobe banenkhani." 
Ezekiel2:8 Kodvwa wena, ndvodzana yemuntfu, lalela loko lengikushoko kuwe. Ungahlubuki njengalendlu lehlubukako; vula umlomo wakho udle loko lengikunika kona.”" 
Ezekiel2:9 Ngase ngiyabuka, ngabona sandla selulelwe ngakimi. Ekhatsi kuso kwakunencwadzi legocotwako," 
Ezekiel2:10 layisombulula embikwami. Ngala nangale kwayo kwakubhalwe emavi ekulila, newekukhala kanye newelusizi." 
Ezekiel3:1 Wakhuluma kimi, watsi: “Ndvodzana yemuntfu, dlani loko lokusembikwakho, dlani lencwadzi legocotwako; bese uyahamba uyawukhuluma kuyo indlu yaka-Israyeli.”" 
Ezekiel3:2 Ngako ngavula umlomo wami, wanginika lencwadzi legocotwako kutsi ngiyidle." 
Ezekiel3:3 Wase ukhuluma kimi, utsi: “Ndvodzana yemuntfu, dlani lencwadzi legocotwako lengikunika yona, ugcwalise sisu sakho ngayo.” Ngako ngayidla, ngayiva inongotela njengeluju emlonyeni wami." 
Ezekiel3:4 Wakhuluma kimi, watsi: “Ndvodzana yemuntfu, hamba nyalo uye kuyo indlu yaka-Israyeli, ufike ukhulume emavi ami kuyo." 
Ezekiel3:5 Awutfunyelwa kubantfu labanelulwimi lolungacondzakali nalolulukhuni, kodvwa utfunyelwa kuyo indlu yaka-Israyeli," 
Ezekiel3:6 hhayi etiveni letinyenti letinelulwimi lolungacondzakali nalolulukhuni, naletikhuluma emavi longeke uwacondze. Nembala kube bengikutfumele kuto, betitakulalela." 
Ezekiel3:7 Kodvwa indlu yaka-Israyeli ayikatimiseli kukulalela, ngobe ayikatimiseli nekulalela mine, ngobe yonkhe indlu yaka-Israyeli inenhloko lelukhuni nenhlitiyo lelitje." 
Ezekiel3:8 Kodvwa wena ngitakwenta ungabatsambeli futsi ube lukhuni njengabo. 
Ezekiel3:9 Ngiyakwenta libunti lakho libe lukhuni njengelitje lelilukhuni kakhulu, libe lukhuni kwendlula litje lemlilo. Ungabesabi futsi ungetfuswa ngibo, lite nome bayindlu lehlubukako nje.”" 
Ezekiel3:10 Wakhuluma kimi, watsi: “Ndvodzana yemuntfu, lalelisisa, bese uyawatsatsa onkhe lamavi lengiwakhuluma kuwe uwafake enhlitiyweni yakho." 
Ezekiel3:11 Hamba nyalo uye kubantfu bakini labatfunjiwe, ufike ukhulume kubo, utsi: ‘Naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze,’ nome bayakulalela nome abakulaleli.”" 
Ezekiel3:12 Moya wase uyangiphakamisa, ngeva emvakwami livi lemsindvo lomkhulu lodvumako, litsi: “Bukhosi baSimakadze abudvunyiswe endzaweni yakhe yekuhlala!”" 
Ezekiel3:13 Ngeva umsindvo wekutsintsana kwetimphiko tetidalwa letiphilako, nemsindvo wemasondvo lasemihlubulweni yato, lowawudvuma kakhulu njengekutamatama kwemhlaba." 
Ezekiel3:14 Moya wangiphakamisela etulu wangisusa, ngahamba ngibuhlungu, umoya wami umunyu; ngobe sandla lesimatima saSimakadze sasisetikwami." 
Ezekiel3:15 Ngefika kulabatfunjiwe lababehlala eTheli Abibi ngasemfuleni iKhebari. Ngefika lapho bebahlala khona, ngahlala emkhatsini wabo emalanga lasikhombisa, ngimangele." 
Ezekiel3:16 Ekupheleni kwemalanga lasikhombisa livi laSimakadze lefika kimi, latsi:" 
Ezekiel3:17 “Ndvodzana yemuntfu, sengikubeke kutsi ube ngumlindzi wendlu yaka-Israyeli; ngako-ke vani livi lengilikhulumako, ubanike secwayiso lesiphuma kimi." 
Ezekiel3:18 Nangikhuluma kumuntfu lomubi, ngitsi: ‘Nakanjani utakufa,’ wena-ke ungete wamecwayisa nome ukhulume kuye kutsi atiyekele tindlela takhe letimbi, khona utewusindzisa imphilo yakhe, lowo muntfu lomubi uyakufa ngenca yesono sakhe; mine-ke ingati yakhe ngiyakuyibita esandleni sakho." 
Ezekiel3:19 Kodvwa nangabe wena uyamecwayisa umuntfu lomubi, yena ajinge achubeke nebubi bakhe nome etindleleni takhe letimbi, uyakufa ngenca yesono sakhe, kodvwa wena uyawube utisindzisile." 
Ezekiel3:20 “Kantsi futsi, nangabe umuntfu lolungile ajika ekulungeni kwakhe ente lokubi, bese ngibeka intfo letamgila embikwakhe, yena uyakufa. Njengobe wena ungakamecwayisi, yena uyakufa ngenca yesono sakhe. Konkhe lokulungile lakwentile kungeke kukhunjulwe; mine-ke ingati yakhe ngiyakuyibita esandleni sakho." 
Ezekiel3:21 Kodvwa nangabe wena umecwayisa umuntfu lolungile kutsi angoni, avele angete ona, impela uyawuphila yena, ngobe asitsetse leso secwayiso, nawe uyawube utisindzisile.”" 
Ezekiel3:22 Sandla saSimakadze sasisetikwami lapho, wakhuluma kimi, watsi: “Sukuma, uhambe uye etsafeni, ngitawakhuluma nawe lapho.”" 
Ezekiel3:23 Ngako ngasukuma, ngahamba ngaya etsafeni. Inkhatimulo yaSimakadze yayime khona lapho, ifanana nenkhatimulo lengangiyibone ngasemfuleni iKhebari, ngakhotsama ngibhekise buso bami phansi." 
Ezekiel3:24 Moya wase ungena kimi, wangisukumisa, ngema ngetinyawo. Wakhuluma kimi, watsi: “Hamba uyewutivalela endlini yakho." 
Ezekiel3:25 Wena-ke, ndvodzana yemuntfu, batakubopha ngetindophi; utawuboshwa, kuze ungetiwukhona kuphumela ngephandle uye kubantfu." 
Ezekiel3:26 Lulwimi lwakho ngitalunamatsisela elwangeni lwakho, khona utewubindza ungakwati kubakhalima, nome bayindlu lehlubukako nje." 
Ezekiel3:27 Kodvwa mine nangikhuluma nawe, ngitawuvula umlomo wakho, futsi utabatjela utsi: ‘Naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze.’ Lowo loyakuva akeve, nalowo longafuni akale; ngobe bayindlu lehlubukako.”" 
Ezekiel4:1 “Manje-ke, ndvodzana yemuntfu, tsatsa sibhelekeca selibumba, usibeke embikwakho, bese udvweba lidolobha laseJerusalema kuso." 
Ezekiel4:2 Ubobe sewenta siboniso sekuvinjetelwa kwalo: Yakha tindvonga tekuvimbetela, wakhe lutsango lwekulivimbetela, umise tinkambu eceleni kwalo, bese ufaka imigcala yekulibhidlita ilitungelete," 
Ezekiel4:3 ubobe sewutsatsa lipani lensimbi ulibeke libe njengelubondza lwensimbi emkhatsini wakho nalelidolobha, bese uyagucuka uyalibuka. Liyawube selivimbetelekile, futsi uyawulivimbetela. Loku kuyawuba sibonakaliso kuyo indlu yaka-Israyeli." 
Ezekiel4:4 “Ubobe sewulala ngemhlubulo wakho wangesancele, ubeke sono sendlu yaka-Israyeli etikwakho. Kufanele usetfwale lesono sabo emalanga langangalawo ekulala kwakho ngalowo mhlubulo." 
Ezekiel4:5 Ngikumisele emalanga langangeminyaka yekona kwabo. Ngako kutawuphela emalanga langema-390 wetfwele sono sendlu yaka-Israyeli. 
Ezekiel4:6 “Utawutsi ungakucedza loku, uphindze ulale phansi futsi, ngemhlubulo wakho wangesekudla, wetfwale sono sendlu yakaJuda. Ngikumisele emalanga langema-40, lilanga lilinye limele umnyaka munye." 
Ezekiel4:7 Gucula buso bakho ububhekise ngasekuvinjetelweni kweJerusalema, nangemkhono lohlutjuliwe phrofetha umelane nabo." 
Ezekiel4:8 Wena ngitakubopha ngetindophi, kuze ungetiwukhona kugucuka kulomhlubulo uye kulomunye, uze ucedze lawo malanga ekuvimbetela kwakho." 
Ezekiel4:9 “Tsatsa kolo nebhali, emabhontjisi netinhlumaya, nemabele nesipileti, ukufake esitjeni sekuphatsa, bese utentela sinkhwa. Kufanele udle sona kulamalanga langema-390 lotawulala ngawo ngemhlubulo wakho." 
Ezekiel4:10 Kala kudla lokungemagremu langema-230 lekufanele ukudle njalo nje ngelilanga, ukudle ngetikhatsi letimisiwe." 
Ezekiel4:11 Ubophindze futsi ukale tinkomishi letimbili letinkhulu temanti lekufanele uwanatse ngetikhatsi letimisiwe. 
Ezekiel4:12 Lokudla ubokudla njenganawudla licebelengwane lebhali; ubokupheka embikwebantfu babuka, lomlilo uwubase ngemigodvo yebantfu leyomile.”" 
Ezekiel4:13 Simakadze watsi: “Ngalendlela bantfu baka-Israyeli bayakudla kudla lokungcolile emkhatsini wetive, lapho ngiyawubacoshela khona.”" 
Ezekiel4:14 Mine ngaphendvula ngatsi: “Cha, Nkhosi Simakadze! Mine angizange sengitingcolise. Kusukela kwasebusheni bami kuze kube ngunyalo angizange sengiyidle ingcuba nome inyama yesilwane lesibulewe tilwane tesiganga. Akuzange sekungene nyama lengcolile ngekwemtsetfo kulomlomo wami.”" 
Ezekiel4:15 Wakhuluma watsi: “Kulungile. Ngitakuvumela kutsi usebentise emalongo etinkhomo esikhundleni sewemuntfu ekuphekeni lesinkhwa sakho.” 
Ezekiel4:16 Wachubeka watsi kimi: “Ndvodzana yemuntfu, ngitawunciphisa kutfolakala kwekudla lapha eJerusalema. Bantfu bayawudla kudla kwekwemukeliswa bancenekile, banatse nemanti ekwemukeliswa bakhatsatekile," 
Ezekiel4:17 ngobe kudla nemanti kuyawube kweswelekile. Bayawumangala nababonana, bayawukondza babe tingodvo ngenca yesono sabo.”" 
Ezekiel5:1 “Nyalo-ke, wena ndvodzana yemuntfu, tsatsa inkemba lekhaliphako, uyisebentise njengensingo yemhhuli, uhhule inhloko nesilevu sakho. Ubobe sewutsatsa tikali, wehlukanise letinwele takho katsatfu." 
Ezekiel5:2 Ngesikhatsi nakuphelela emalanga ekuvinjetelwa, shisa incenye yesitsatfu yaletinwele ngemlilo ekhatsi edolobheni. Tsatsa lenye incenye yesitsatfu uyisakate ngenkemba yonkhe indzawo edolobheni. Lencenye lenye yesitsatfu uyisakatele emoyeni. Ngobe ngitabacosha ngenkemba." 
Ezekiel5:3 Kodvwa ubotsatsa imicu lembalwa yaletinwele uyitfukuse emificitweni yalengubo yakho. 
Ezekiel5:4 Ubophindze futsi utsatse imicu yato lembalwa uyijike emlilweni uyishise. Umlilo uyawukwandza kusukela lapho, uyigcwalise yonkhe indlu yaka-Israyeli." 
Ezekiel5:5 “Naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, itsi: Lena yiJerusalema, lengiyimise emkhatsini wetive, nemave ayitungelete yonkhe indzawo." 
Ezekiel5:6 Noko ngebubi bayo iyihlubukile imitsetfo yami netimiso tami, kwendlula tive nemave layitungeletile. Iyilahlile imitsetfo yami, yangete yatilandzela netimiso tami." 
Ezekiel5:7 “Ngako-ke naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, itsi: Nine nibe ngemahlongandlebe kakhulu kwendlula letive letinitungeletile, nangete natilandzela timiso tami kanye nemitsetfo yami. Empeleni lizinga lekuphila kwenu alikefiki ngisho nakuleli letive letinitungeletile." 
Ezekiel5:8 “Ngako-ke naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, itsi: Mine, matfupha, ngimelene nawe, Jerusalema, futsi ngiyawukushaya ngesijeziso embikwato letive tibukile." 
Ezekiel5:9 Ngenca yato tonkhe letithico takho letisinengiso, ngiyakwenta kuwe loko lengingazange sengikwente ngaphambili, futsi ngingeke ngiphindze ngikwente." 
Ezekiel5:10 Ngako-ke ngekhatsi kwakho boyise bayawudla bantfwababo, nebantfwana badle boyise. Ngitakushaya ngesijeziso, ngisakate yonkhe insali yakho emimoyeni." 
Ezekiel5:11 Ngako-ke ngifunga kuphila kwami, kusho iNkhosi Simakadze, njengobe ungcolise indzawo yami lengcwele ngato tonkhe letitfombe takho letingemanyala nangetento takho letinengekako, ngitakususa lokukubonelela kwami kuwe; ngingeke ngisakubuka ngesihawu nome ngikuphephise." 
Ezekiel5:12 Incenye yesitsatfu yebantfu bakho, Jerusalema, itakufa ngesifo lesibulalanako, nome ibhujiswe yindlala ngekhatsi kwakho; incenye yesitsatfu itakufa ngenkemba ngaphandle kwetibondza takho; kutsi lenye incenye yesitsatfu isakateleke emimoyeni, ngiyicoshe ngenkemba leyeluliwe." 
Ezekiel5:13 “Intfukutselo yami-ke iyakube seyiyaphela, nelulaka lwami kubo lubohle, ngikhipheleke sibhongo. Ngiyawutsi nase ngilukhiphele kubo lulaka lwami, bayawukwati kutsi mine Simakadze sengikhulumile ngenshisekelo yami." 
Ezekiel5:14 “Ngiyawukwenta ube yincitsakalo nelihlazo emkhatsini wetive letibomakhelwane bakho, embikwabo bonkhe bantfu labendlulako." 
Ezekiel5:15 Uyawuba lihlazo, nesihhala, nesecwayiso, nentfo leyesabisako kuletive letikutungeletile, nase ngikwehlulela ngentfukutselo, nangelulaka, nangekutsetsisa lokubuhlungu. Mine, Simakadze, sengikhulumile." 
Ezekiel5:16 Nanginidubula ngemicibisholo yami lenashevu nalebhubhisako ngendlala, ngiyawudubulela kutsi nginibhubhise. Ngiyakunehlisela indlala etikwendlala, nekudla lokuta kini ngikuncamule." 
Ezekiel5:17 Ngiyawutfumela indlala netilwane tesiganga letiyawumelana nani, futsi tiyawunishiya nite bantfwana. Tifo letibulalanako nekucitseka kwengati kuyawunikhukhula, ngiyawunihlasela ngenkemba leyawumelana nani. Mine, Simakadze, sengikhulumile.”" 
Ezekiel6:1 Livi laSimakadze lefika kimi, latsi:" 
Ezekiel6:2 “Ndvodzana yemuntfu, buka ngasetintsabeni taka-Israyeli, phrofetha kuto, utsi:" 
Ezekiel6:3 ‘Awu, tintsaba taka-Israyeli, lalelani livi leNkhosi Simakadze. Naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze kini, nine tintsaba nemagcuma, nani mifudlana netihosha, itsi: Sekusedvutane kutsi ngehlisele inkemba etikwenu, futsi ngitatibhubhisa letindzawo tenu letiphakeme tekukhontela tithico." 
Ezekiel6:4 Emalati enu atawubhidlitwa, nemalati enu emphepho atawuphihlitwa, ngitawubulala bantfu benu embikwetithico tenu." 
Ezekiel6:5 Ngitakwendlala tidvumbu tebantfu baka-Israyeli embikwetithico tabo, ngisakate ematsambo enu atungelete lamalati enu." 
Ezekiel6:6 Nome ngukuphi lapho nihlala khona, emadolobha enu ayawudzilitelwa phansi, asale atindzala, netindzawo letiphakeme tibhidlitwe, kuze emalati enu asale angemabolela, tithico tenu tiyawuphihlitwa tibe tindvundvuma, nemalati enu emphepho adzilitelwe phansi, naloko lenikubumbile kwesulwe kungabikho." 
Ezekiel6:7 Bantfu bakini bayawubulawa bawele phansi emkhatsini wenu, kuze nati kutsi mine nginguSimakadze." 
Ezekiel6:8 “ ‘Kodvwa ngitawushiya insali, ngobe labanye benu bayawuphunyula enkembeni ngesikhatsi nisakatekele emaveni ngemave, nasetiveni." 
Ezekiel6:9 Kuyawutsi-ke etiveni lapho bebatfunjelwe khona, labo labaphunyulile bangikhumbule, kutsi ngeva buhlungu kanjani ngalokungihlubuka kwabo ngetinhlitiyo tabo, bakhonta labanye bonkulunkulu, besuka kimi, ngeva buhlungu nangemehlo abo labukeka akhanuka tithico tabo. Bayawutenyanya kwabona ngalobubi labayawube babentile, nangato tonkhe tintfo tabo letinengekako labatentako." 
Ezekiel6:10 Ngulapho-ke bayakungati kahle kutsi mine nginguSimakadze. Akusho kutsi ngangimane ngikhuluma nje, nangitsi ngitakwehlisela letigemegeme etikwabo." 
Ezekiel6:11 “ ‘Naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, itsi: Yetfwalani tandla etinhloko, nishaye ngetinyawo phansi nikhale, nimemete, nitsi: “Maye!” ngenca yato tonkhe letento letimbi tendlu yaka-Israyeli; nyalo sebatawubulawa ngenkemba, nangendlala, nangesifo lesibulalanako." 
Ezekiel6:12 Lowo lokhashane kakhulu uyawubulawa sifo lesibulalanako, lowo losedvutane abulawe ngenkemba, kutsi lowo lophunyulile wasala, abulawe yindlala. Ngiyakulufeza kanjalo-ke lulaka lwami etikwabo." 
Ezekiel6:13 Ngulapho-ke bayawungati kahle kutsi mine nginguSimakadze, bantfu babo nase balele lunja emkhatsini wetithico tabo, batungelete emalati abo kuwo onkhe emagcuma laphakeme, nakuto tonkhe ticongo tetintsaba, nangaphansi kwato tonkhe tihlahla letendlala emagala ato, nangaphansi kwawo onkhe ema-okhi lanemacembe lacebetelako, tindzawo lapho bebentela khona iminikelo yemphepho lenuka kamnandzi kuto tonkhe tithico tabo." 
Ezekiel6:14 Ngiyakwelula sandla sami etikwabo, ngente lelive labo lisale likhala libhungane, kusukela ehlane kuze kuyewufika eDibla, kuyo yonkhe indzawo lapho bahlala khona. Ngulapho-ke bayawukwati khona kutsi mine nginguSimakadze.’ ”" 
Ezekiel7:1 Livi laSimakadze lefika kimi, latsi:" 
Ezekiel7:2 “Ndvodzana yemuntfu, naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, eveni laka-Israyeli, itsi: Kuphela! Kuphela sekufikile emagumbini omane elive." 
Ezekiel7:3 Siphetfo nyalo sesifikile kuwe, ngiyawutfululela lulaka lwami etikwakho. Ngiyakukwehlulela njengekutiphatsa kwakho, ngikukhokhele ngangekwetento takho tonkhe letinengekako." 
Ezekiel7:4 Angiyikukubuka ngesihawu, nome ngikushiye, ngempela ngiyakukubuyisela njengekutiphatsa kwakho nangaletinengiso letisemkhatsini wenu. Ngulapho-ke niyawukwati khona kutsi mine nginguSimakadze." 
Ezekiel7:5 “Naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, itsi: Sigemegeme! Sigemegeme lekungazange sekuvakale ngaso siyeta." 
Ezekiel7:6 Kuphela sekufikile! Kuphela sekufikile! Sekufikile kulwa nawe. Sekufikile! 
Ezekiel7:7 Kubhujiswa sekufikile kuwe, wena lohlala eveni. Sikhatsi sesifikile, lilanga selisondzele, kunekwesaba, hhayi kujabula etikwetintsaba." 
Ezekiel7:8 Sengitawutfululela lulaka lwami etikwakho, ngifeze intfukutselo yami kuwe; ngitakwehlulela njengekutiphatsa kwakho, ngikukhokhele ngangekwetento takho tonkhe letinengekako." 
Ezekiel7:9 Ngingeke ngikubuke ngesihawu nome ngikushiye, ngitakukhokhela njengekutiphatsa kwakho nangaletinengiso letisemkhatsini wenu. Khona-ke utawube sewuyati kutsi mine Simakadze ngimi lona logalela ngalendvuku." 
Ezekiel7:10 “Lilanga selilapha! Selifikile! Imbhubhiso seyehlile, indvuku seyihlumile, kutidla kwachakaza!" 
Ezekiel7:11 Budlwangudlwangu sebukhule baba yindvuku yekujezisa bubi, kute namunye loyawusala angajeziswa kulabo bantfu, kute namunye kuleso sicumbi, kute lokuyawusala ebunjingeni nasebukhosini babo." 
Ezekiel7:12 “Sikhatsi sesifikile, lilanga selikhona. Lowo lotsengako akangajabuli, nalowo lotsengisako angadzabuki, ngobe lulaka lusetikwaso sonkhe lesicumbi." 
Ezekiel7:13 Umtsengisi angeke aphindze abuyelwe ngaloko lakutsengisile, yingci nabasaphila bobabili, ngobe umbono macondzana naso sonkhe lesicumbi ngeke usahlehliselwa nyovana. Ngenca yetono tabo, kute namunye wabo loyawuphephisa kuphila kwakhe." 
Ezekiel7:14 Nome bakhalisa licilongo, batilungiselele ngako konkhe, kute namunye loyakuya emphini, ngobe lulaka lwami lusetikwalesicumbi sonkhe.”" 
Ezekiel7:15 “Ngephandle yinkemba, ngekhatsi sifo lesibulalanako nendlala; labo labasemaphandleni bayakufa ngenkemba, nalabo labasedolobheni bayawudliwa yindlala nesifo lesibulalanako." 
Ezekiel7:16 Bonkhe labasele labaphunyulile bayawubasetintsabeni babubule njengematuba asetihosheni, ngulowo ngenca yetono takhe." 
Ezekiel7:17 Tonkhe tandla tiyawube ticeka, nemadvolo onkhe ayawugedletela." 
Ezekiel7:18 Bayawukwembatsa emasaka, bagcokiswe lusizi. Buso babo bonkhe buyakwembatsa emahloni, netinhloko tabo bonkhe tiyawuhhulwa." 
Ezekiel7:19 Bayawulahla isiliva yabo etitaladini, negolide yabo iyawuba yintfo lengcolile lengenamsebenti. Isiliva negolide yabo ingeke ikhone kubasindzisa ngelilanga lelulaka lwaSimakadze. Ingeke ikwesutsise kulamba kwabo, futsi bangeke batigcwalise tisu tabo ngayo, ngobe ngiyo lebente bakhubatela baze bangena esonweni." 
Ezekiel7:20 Babetigabatisa ngetimvunulo tabo nangekwekugaba kwabo lokuhle lababekusebentisa ekubumbeni kwabo letithico tabo letisinengiso, netitfombe letingenamsebenti. Ngako-ke ngiyawutigucula ngitente tingcole tingabi namsebenti." 
Ezekiel7:21 Ngiyawukunikela konkhe kube yimphango yebetive nentfo lephangwe ngulababi bemhlaba, futsi bayawukungcolisa." 
Ezekiel7:22 Ngiyawubafulatsela, nabo bayawuyonakalisa lendzawo yami leligugu kangaka; bosidlani bayawungena ngekhatsi kuyo bayingcolise." 
Ezekiel7:23 “Lungisani tinketane, ngobe lelive ligcwele kugobhota kwengati, nelidolobha ligcwele budlwangudlwangu." 
Ezekiel7:24 Ngiyawuletsa tive letimbi kakhulu kutsi titewutsatsa tindlu tabo; ngiyawukucedza kutigabatisa kwalabanemandla, netindzawo tabo lekutsiwa tingcwele tiyawungcoliswa." 
Ezekiel7:25 Nakufika kwesabisa, bayawukufuna kuthula, kodvwa abayiwukutfola." 
Ezekiel7:26 Kuyawufika sigemegeme etikwesigemegeme, nemahemuhemu etikwemahemuhemu. Bayakwetama kutfola sembulo kumphrofethi; kulahleke nemfundziso yemtsetfo kumphristi, kuphele neteluleko talabadzala." 
Ezekiel7:27 Inkhosi iyawulila, sikhulu sembatse kujabha, netandla tebantfu eveni tiyawuchachatela. Ngiyawubaphatsa njengalokufanele kutiphatsa kwabo, ngibehlulele njengekwemitsetfo yabo. Ngulapho-ke bayawungati khona kutsi mine nginguSimakadze.”" 
Ezekiel8:1 Ngemnyaka wesitfupha, enyangeni yesitfupha, ngelilanga lesihlanu, ngisahleti endlini yami ngikanye nebaholi bakaJuda bahleti embikwami, sandla seNkhosi Simakadze sehlela etikwami khona lapho." 
Ezekiel8:2 Ngabuka, ngabona intfo lenesimo semuntfu. Kusukela lapho lokwakungatsi kulukhalo lwakhe kuya phansi kwakunjengemlilo, kusukela elukhalweni lwakhe kuya etulu abebonakala shangatsi umanyatela njengekucwebetela kwelitfusi lelivutsako." 
Ezekiel8:3 Welula loko lokwakungatsi kusandla, wangibamba ngesihlutfu. Moya wangiphakamisela emkhatsini wemhlaba nelizulu: Wangitsatsa embonweni waNkulunkulu, wangitsatsa saya eJerusalema, ekungeneni kwelisango langasenyakatfo lesibuya lesisekhatsi nekhatsi, lapho kwakume khona lesithico lesibanga intfukutselo lenkhulu." 
Ezekiel8:4 Lokubukhosi baNkulunkulu wema-Israyeli kwakulapho embikwami, njengasembonweni lengawubona etsafeni." 
Ezekiel8:5 Wase uyakhuluma kimi, utsi: “Ndvodzana yemuntfu, buka ngasenyakatfo.” Ngako ngabuka, ngasenyakatfo ekungeneni kwelisango lelilati, ngabona lesithico lesibanga intfukutselo." 
Ezekiel8:6 Wase utsi kimi: “Ndvodzana yemuntfu, uyabona yini kutsi bentani, letintfo letinengeka kangaka letentiwa yindlu yaka-Israyeli lapha, tintfo letitangicoshela khashane kakhulu nendzawo yami lengcwele? Kodvwa usetawubona letinye tintfo letinengeka kakhulu kunaleti.”" 
Ezekiel8:7 Wase ungiyisa ekungeneni kwesibuya. Ngabuka, ngabona imbobo elubondzeni." 
Ezekiel8:8 Watsi kimi: “Ndvodzana yemuntfu, manje-ke gubha lapha elubondzeni;” ngako ngase ngigubha elubondzeni, ngabona umnyango lapho." 
Ezekiel8:9 Watsi kimi: “Ngena ngekhatsi utewubona letintfo letimbi naletinengekako labatentako lapha.” 
Ezekiel8:10 Ngako ngangena ngekhatsi ngabuka, ngabona kudvwetjwe tonkhe letibondza yonkhe inhlobo yetintfo letinwabutelako, netilwane letinengekako, nato tonkhe tithico tendlu yaka-Israyeli." 
Ezekiel8:11 Embikwato bekume baholi bendlu yaka-Israyeli labangema-70, naJazaniya, umsa waShafani, abeme emkhatsini wabo. Ngulowo abephetse sitja sekutfuncisa esandleni sakhe, kwakutsaphuka lifu lemphepho lenyuka." 
Ezekiel8:12 Watsi kimi: “Ndvodzana yemuntfu, ubonile kambe kutsi bentani baholi bendlu yaka-Israyeli lapha entimeni, nguloyo endvumbeni yesithico sakhe? Batsi: ‘Simakadze akasiboni. Simakadze sewulishiyile lelive.’ ”" 
Ezekiel8:13 Waphindza futsi watsi kimi: “Utawubabona benta letinye tintfo letinengeka kakhulu kunaloku.” 
Ezekiel8:14 Wase ungiyisa ekungeneni kwelisango lelingasenyakatfo lendlu yaSimakadze, ngabona bafati bahleti phansi lapho, balilela Thamuzi." 
Ezekiel8:15 Watsi kimi: “Uyakubona loku, ndvodzana yemuntfu? Usetawubona letinye futsi tintfo letinengeka kakhulu kunaloku.”" 
Ezekiel8:16 Wase ungiyisa esibuyeni lesisekhatsi nekhatsi endlini yaSimakadze, lapho ekungeneni kwelithempeli, emkhatsini wemhubhe nelilati, kwakunemadvodza langema-25. Imihlane yawo ibheke ngasethempelini laSimakadze, buso bawo bubheke ngasemphumalanga, babekhotsamela lilanga ngasemphumalanga."
