Ezekiel24:25 “Wena-ke, ndvodzana yemuntfu, ngalelilanga lengiyawutsatsa ngalo inqaba yabo, kujabula kwabo neludvumo lwabo, injabulo yemehlo abo, nesifiso senhlitiyo yabo, kanye nemadvodzana nemadvodzakati abo," 
Ezekiel24:26 ngalelo langa umkhoseli uyawuta kuwe atekutjela letindzaba. 
Ezekiel24:27 Ngaleso sikhatsi umlomo wakho uyawuvuleka; uyawukhuluma naye ungasabindzi. Ngako uyawuba sibonakaliso kubo, futsi-ke bayawukwati kutsi mine nginguSimakadze.”" 
Ezekiel25:1 Livi laSimakadze lefika kimi, latsi:" 
Ezekiel25:2 “Ndvodzana yemuntfu, bhekisa buso bakho ngakuma-Amoni, uphrofethe umelane nawo." 
Ezekiel25:3 Khuluma kuwo utsi: ‘Vanini livi leNkhosi Simakadze. Naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, itsi: Ngobe nakhuluma natsi: “Hha” kuyo indzawo yami lengcwele ngesikhatsi ingcoliswa, nakulo live laka-Israyeli nalicitfwa, nakubo bantfu bakaJuda nabatfunjwa," 
Ezekiel25:4 ngako-ke ngiyawunikela ngani kuso sive sasemphumalanga kutsi nibe lifa laso; labo bantfu bayakumisa tinkambu tabo, bemise emathende abo emkhatsini wenu; bayawukudla titselo tenu, banatse nelubisi lwenu." 
Ezekiel25:5 Ngiyakuyigucula iRabha ibe lidlelo lemakamela, kutsi i-Amoni ngiyente ibe yindzawo yekuphumulela timvu. Ngulapho-ke niyawungati khona kutsi mine nginguSimakadze." 
Ezekiel25:6 Ngobe naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, itsi: Njengobe ushaye tandla takho wagidza ngetinyawo takho, wajabula ngabo bonkhe bubi benhlitiyo yakho umelene nelive laka-Israyeli," 
Ezekiel25:7 ngako-ke ngiyakwelula sandla sami ngimelane nawe, ngikunikele kutsi ube yimphango yetive. Ngiyawukkususa etiveni, ngikutsanyele emaveni. Ngiyawukubhubhisa. Ngulapho-ke uyawungati khona kutsi mine nginguSimakadze.’ ”" 
Ezekiel25:8 “Naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, itsi: ‘Njengobe boMowabi naSeyiri batsi: “Ase nibuke indlu yakaJuda seyigucuke yafanana nato tonkhe letinye tive,”" 
Ezekiel25:9 ngako-ke umhlubulo welakaMowabi ngitawembula usale ungenamadolobha, kusukela emadolobheni alo langasemnyeleni, iBhethi Jeshimothi, neBhali Meyoni kanye neKhiriyathayimu, lokungemagugu alelo live." 
Ezekiel25:10 IMowabi kanye nema-Amoni ngitabanikela esiveni lesisemphumalanga kutsi babe lifa laso, kuze kutsi ema-Amoni angaphindzi akhunjulwe emkhatsini wetive;" 
Ezekiel25:11 iMowabi yona ngiyakuyishaya ngesijeziso. Ngulapho-ke bayakungati khona kutsi mine nginguSimakadze.’ ” 
Ezekiel25:12 “Naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, itsi: ‘Njengobe Edomu wakhiphela sibhongo endlini yakaJuda waba nelicala kakhulu ngekwenta njalo," 
Ezekiel25:13 ngako-ke, naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, itsi: Ngiyakwelula sandla sami ngimelane na-Edomu, ngibulale bantfu bakhe netilwane takhe. Ngiyakumenta abe lihlane, kusukela eThemani kuze kuyewufika eDedani bayawubulawa ngenkemba." 
Ezekiel25:14 Ngiyawukhiphela sibhongo etikwa-Edomu ngesandla sesive sami ema-Israyeli, i-Edomu bayakuyiphatsa ngendlela lefanele intfukutselo yami nelulaka lwami; bayakuyati imphindziselo yami, kusho iNkhosi Simakadze.’ ”" 
Ezekiel25:15 “Naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, itsi: ‘Njengobe emaFilisti enta imphindziselo, akhipha sibhongo ngebubi lobusetinhlitiyweni tawo, nangenzondo yakadzeni leyayicondze kubhubhisa Juda," 
Ezekiel25:16 ngako-ke, naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, itsi: Sekusedvute kutsi ngelule sandla sami ngimelane nemaFilisti, ngitawacedza emaKherethi, ngiwabhubhise lawo lasesele kugudla lwandle." 
Ezekiel25:17 Ngiyakwehlisela imphindziselo lenkhulu etikwawo, ngiwajezise ngelulaka lwami. Ngulapho-ke bayawungati khona kutsi mine nginguSimakadze, nase ngehlisela imphindziselo etikwawo.’ ”" 
Ezekiel26:1 Ngemnyaka weli-11, ngelilanga lekucala lenyanga, kwefika livi laSimakadze kimi, latsi:" 
Ezekiel26:2 “Ndvodzana yemuntfu, njengobe iThire seyikhulume ngeJerusalema, yatsi: ‘Hha! Lisango lebetive selephukile, netivalo talo setigedvukele kimi, njengaloku seyibhidlikile iJerusalema, mine Thire sengitawuphumelela.’" 
Ezekiel26:3 Ngako-ke naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, itsi: Ngimelana nawe, wena Thire, futsi ngitakuvusela tive letinyenti tikuhlasele, njengelwandle nalugubha emagagasi alo." 
Ezekiel26:4 Tiyawubhidlita tibondza taseThire, tihhihlite nemibhoshongo yayo, ngiyawukhekhebula yonkhe imfuhlululu yayo, ngiyente ibe lidvwala lelingenalutfo." 
Ezekiel26:5 Lena ekhatsi nelwandle iyawuba yindzawo yekweneka emanetha ekudweba, ngobe sengikhulumile, kusho iNkhosi Simakadze. Iyawuba yimphango yetive ngetive," 
Ezekiel26:6 netabelo tayo letingaselwandle eveni layo tiyawuklabelwa ngenkemba. Ngulapho-ke bayawungati khona kutsi mine nginguSimakadze. 
Ezekiel26:7 “Ngobe naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, itsi: Ngiyawuvusela iThire Nebukhadnezari, inkhosi yaseBhabhulona, avela ngasenyakatfo ayinkhosi yemakhosi lenemahhashi, netincola temphi, nebagibeli bemahhashi, nemphi lenkhulu." 
Ezekiel26:8 Uyawuklabela tabelo tenu eveni lenu ngenkemba; uyawukwakha tinqaba tekuvimbetela nine, akhe lutsango lwekuvimbetela luze lufike elubondzeni lwenu, anihlasele ngekuphakamisa emahawu, alwe nani." 
Ezekiel26:9 Uyawucondzisa imijijimeto yakhe yemigcalakati yekubhidlita ngasetibondzeni takho, ashaye abhidlite imibhoshongo yakho ngetilimato takhe." 
Ezekiel26:10 Emahhashi akhe ayawuba manyenti kangangekutsi lutfuli lalususako luyawunimbonya. Tibondza takho tiyawudledletela ngenca yemsindvo wemahhashi emphi, netinkalishi, netincola temphi, ngesikhatsi angena emasangweni akho njengebantfu nabangena edolobheni lelitibondza talo tifohliwe." 
Ezekiel26:11 Tinselo temahhashi akhe tiyawugcobagcoba tonkhe titaladi takho, uyawubulala bantfu bakho ngenkemba, netinsika takho leticinile tiyawulahleka phansi." 
Ezekiel26:12 Bayawuphanga bunjinga bakho, batfumbe netimphahla takho letitsengwa titsengiswe, bayawubhidlitela phansi tibondza takho, bahhihlite tindlu takho letinhle, balahle ematje akho, netingodvo leticinile, nayo yonkhe imfuhlululu elwandle." 
Ezekiel26:13 Ngiyakuticedza tonkhe tingoma takho letinemsindvo; nemculo wemahabhu akho awusayiwuphindza uvakale. 
Ezekiel26:14 Ngiyawukwenta ube lidvwala lelingenalutfo, uyawuba yindzawo yekweneka emanetha ekudweba. Awusayiwuphindza wakhiwe kabusha, ngobe mine Simakadze sengikhulumile, kusho iNkhosi Simakadze." 
Ezekiel26:15 “Naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze kuyo iThire, itsi: Akayiwutfutfumela yini emave langaselwandle ngenca yemsindvo wekuwa kwakho, ngesikhatsi labanemanceba babubula bakhala nase babulawa ngenkemba kuwe, Thire?" 
Ezekiel26:16 Lapho-ke bonkhe labakhulu bemave langaselwandle bayawukwehlela phansi, besuka etihlalweni tabo tebukhosi, babeke eceleni imijiva yabo, bakhumule tembatfo tabo letihlotjisiwe. Bayawuhlala phansi emhlabatsini bembetse kwesaba, batfutfumela ngato tonkhe tikhatsi, bamangaliswe nguwe." 
Ezekiel26:17 Bayawube sebadzindza sililo macondzana nawe, batsi: “ ‘Awu, dolobha lelidvume kangaka, ubhujiswe kanjani, bewugcwele emadvodza aselwandle! Wawungemandla etikwetilwandle, wena kanye nebantfu labahlala kuwe; wagcwalisa ngekwesaba bonkhe lababehlala lapho." 
Ezekiel26:18 Manje asayatfutfumela emave langaselwandle ngelilanga lekuwa kwakho; tichingi taselwandle tiyesaba ngekubhubha kwakho.’ 
Ezekiel26:19 “Naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, itsi: Nangikwenta lidolobha lese likhala libhungane njengemadolobha langasahlalwa bantfu, nangesikhatsi ngikhuphula tisekelo telwandle ngitibeke ngetulu kwakho nemanti alo akusibekela," 
Ezekiel26:20 ngulapho-ke ngiyawukwehlisa nawe kanye nalabo labehlela phansi emgodzini, kubantfu basemandvulo. Ngiyawukuhlalisa endzaweni lengaphansi kwemhlaba, njengasetindzaleni takadzeni kanye nalabo labehlela phansi emgodzini, futsi ngeke ubuye nome utewutsatsa indzawo yakho eveni lalabaphilako." 
Ezekiel26:21 Ngiyawukufikisa esiphetfweni lesesabekako, futsi ngeke uphindze ube khona. Uyawufunwa, ungete watfolakala, kusho iNkhosi Simakadze.”" 
Ezekiel27:1 Kwefika livi laSimakadze kimi, latsi:" 
Ezekiel27:2 “Ndvodzana yemuntfu, dzindza sililo macondzana neThire." 
Ezekiel27:3 Khuluma kuyo iThire, lengasesangweni lelibheke ngaselwandle, ingumhwebi webantfu basemaveni lagudla lwandle, utsi: ‘Naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, itsi: “ ‘Awu, Thire, ukhuluma utsi: “Ngimuhle ngiphelele.”" 
Ezekiel27:4 Indzawo yakho yekubusa yayisetilwandle letijulile; bakhi bakho benta buhle bakho baphelela, waba ngumkhumbi lomuhle." 
Ezekiel27:5 Benta tonkhe tigodvo takho tetipheshula taseSeniri, balandza umsedari eLebanoni kutsi batekwakhela insika ngawo." 
Ezekiel27:6 Ngema-okhi aseBhashani bakwentela emaphini ekugwedla. Ngetigodvo temsayipuresi lesuka elusentseni lwaseSiphrosi benta indzawo yakho yekuhambahamba emkhunjini, yahlotjiswa ngematinyo etindlovu." 
Ezekiel27:7 Ilineni lecolisakele nalehlotjisiwe yaseGibhithe kwakungulona seyili lakho lelalisebenta njengesiboniso sakho; emathende akho abentiwe ngalokuluhlata njengesibhakabhaka nangalokubukhwebeletane lokuphuma etichingini tase-Elisha. 
Ezekiel27:8 Emadvodza aseSidoni newase-Avadi bekunguwona madvodza ekugwedla umkhumbi wakho; emadvodza akho labetingcweti, wena Thire, abekhwele emkhunjini angematilosi akho." 
Ezekiel27:9 Bongcongcoshe betingcweti taseGebali babekhwele emkhunjini babakhi bemikhumbi labahlalele kuvala timbobo. Yonkhe imikhumbi yaselwandle nebagibeli bayo beta nabo, batewutsengiselana nawe." 
Ezekiel27:10 “ ‘Emadvodza asePheresiya, newaseLidiya, newasePhuthi abengemasotja emphini yakho. Agaca emahawu awo netimphantitje tawo kuwe, akuletsela ludvumo nekwatiwa." 
Ezekiel27:11 Emadvodza ase-Avadi newaseHeleki abesetibondzeni takho yonkhe indzawo; emadvodza aseGamadi abesemibhoshongweni yakho. Agaca emahawu awo etikwetibondza takho, befikisa buhle bakho ekupheleleni." 
Ezekiel27:12 “ ‘IThashishi yatsengiselana nawe ngenca yebunyenti bebunjinga bakho betimphahla; babeshintjiselana nawe ngesiliva, nangensimbi, nangemfimfi, nangemtfofu, ngetimphahla takho." 
Ezekiel27:13 “ ‘BaseGrisi, nebaseThubhali kanye nebaseMesheki babetsenga timpahla takho; babeshintjiselana nawe ngetigcili nangetintfo telitfusi ngetimphahla takho." 
Ezekiel27:14 “ ‘Emadvodza aseBhethi Togama ashintjiselana nawe ngemahhashi emisebenti, newemphi nangeminyuzi ngetimphahla takho." 
Ezekiel27:15 “ ‘Emadvodza aseDedani atsengiselana nawe, nemave lamanyenti langaselwandle abekutsengisela kakhulu; abuyisela kuwe ematinyo etindlovu netigodvo letimnyama temsimbithi." 
Ezekiel27:16 “ ‘Base-Aramu babetsengiselana nawe ngenca yebunyenti bemikhitsito yakho, babekutsengisela timphahla takho ngematje laligugu laluhlata, nangetindvwangu letibukhwebeletane, naletihlotjisiwe, nangelineni lecolisakele, nangekhorali, nangemarubhi." 
Ezekiel27:17 “ ‘Bahwebi bakaJuda nebaka-Israyeli babetsengiselana nawe; babekutsengisela timphahla takho ngakolo labephuma eMinithi, nangabojece, nangeluju lwetinyosi, nangemafutsa, nangebhalisamu." 
Ezekiel27:18 “ ‘BaseDamaseko nabo babekutsengisela kakhulu ngemikhitsito yakho nangebunjinga bakho lobukhulu betinhlobonhlobo tetimphahla letitsengiswako, bona-ke babekutsengisela tona ngeliwayini laseHelboni nangensontfo yaseSahari." 
Ezekiel27:19 “ ‘BakaDani nemaGriki ase-Uzali babetsenga timphahla takho ngensimbi lebunjiwe, nangetinandzisi ikhasiya nekhalamusi." 
Ezekiel27:20 “ ‘BaseDedanki bona babetsengiselana nawe ngetingubo tetihlalo temahhashi. 
Ezekiel27:21 “ ‘Base-Arabiya nabo bonkhe labakhulu baseKhedari bekunguwona makhasimende akho lamakhulu, bona-ke babetsengiselana nawe ngemazinyane etimvu, nangetihhanca tetimvu kanye netimbuti." 
Ezekiel27:22 “ ‘Bahwebi baseSheba nebaseRama babetsengiselana nawe; ngetimphahla takho tekutsengiswa babekunika tinhlobonhlobo tetinongo leticolisakele, netematje laligugu, negolide." 
Ezekiel27:23 “ ‘BaseHarani, nebaseKhane, nebase-Edeni kanye nebahwebi baseSheba, nebase-Asiriya, nebaseKhilmadi nabo babetsengiselana nawe." 
Ezekiel27:24 Emakethe yakho babetsengiselana nawe ngekwekwembatsa lokuhle, nangetindvwangu letiluhlata njengesibhakabhaka, nangetintfo letihlotjisiwe, nangematjalo langemabhadvubhadvu, nangetimvakazi letephotfwe kahle tase tifinywa lifindvo lelihle nalelicinile." 
Ezekiel27:25 “ ‘Imikhumbi yaseThashishi nguyona yetfwala timphahla takho letitsengiswako. Wena wetfwele uyasesa imitfwalo lematima ekhatsi nekhatsi elwandle. 
Ezekiel27:26 Bagwedli bakho bemikhumbi bakuvakashisa etilwandle letijulile. Kodvwa umoya wasemphumalanga uyawukucoba ube timvutfu ekhatsi emajukujukwini elwandle. 
Ezekiel27:27 Bunjinga bakho, netimphahla takho tekutsengiswa, nematilosi akho, nebashayei bakho bemikhumbi, nebalungisi bemikhumbi, nebahwebi bakho, nawo onkhe emasotja akho, nabo bonkhe labanye labasemikhunjini bayawushona phansi ekhatsi emajukujukwini elwandle, mhlazana kubhidlika umkhumbi wakho." 
Ezekiel27:28 Emave langaselwandle ayawutfutfumela, ngesikhatsi sekukhala kwematilosi akho." 
Ezekiel27:29 Bonkhe labasebentisa emaphini ekugwedla imikhumbi bayakuyishiya imikhumbi yabo. Ematilosi nabo bonkhe bashayeli bemikhumbi bayakuma elusentseni lwelwandle. 
Ezekiel27:30 “ ‘Bayawuphakamisa emavi abo bakhale kabuhlungu ngenca yakho. Bayawutsela lutfuli etinhloko tabo batigicite emlotseni. 
Ezekiel27:31 Bayawuhhula tinhloko tabo ngenca yakho, bembatse emasaka. Bayawukukhalela tinyembeti ngemiphefumulo ledzabukile nangekulila lokumunyu." 
Ezekiel27:32 Bayawukhihla lesikhulu sililo ngesikhatsi babubula bakhala ngenca yakho, batsi: “Ngubani nje lowake wathuliswa njengeThire, letungeletwe lwandle?”" 
Ezekiel27:33 Ngesikhatsi timphahla takho tekutsengiswa tisatfunyelwa elwandle, kwakusitakala tive letinyenti; ngebunjinga bakho lobunyenti nangetimphahla takho tekutsengiswa wawanjingisa emakhosi emhlaba." 
Ezekiel27:34 Manje sewucitfwe lwandle, lwakufaka emajukujukwini emanti; timphahla takho letitsengiswako nabo bonkhe lonabo sekushone kanye nawe phansi ekujuleni." 
Ezekiel27:35 Bonkhe labahlala emaveni langaselwandle bayamangala ngawe; emakhosi abo ayatfutfumela ngenca yeluvalo, nebuso bawo sebuhhwabile ngenca yekwesaba." 
Ezekiel27:36 Bahwebi emkhatsini wetive bayekhuta bababate ngenca yakho; sewufike ekwephetseni lokwetfusanako, futsi ungeke uphindze ube khona.’ ”" 
Ezekiel28:1 Kwefika livi laSimakadze kimi, latsi:" 
Ezekiel28:2 “Ndvodzana yemuntfu, shano kumbusi waseThire, utsi: ‘Naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, itsi: “ ‘Ukhuluma ngekutigcabha enhlitiyweni yakho, utsi: “Mine ngingunkulunkulu; ngihlala esihlalweni sebukhosi sankulunkulu ekhatsi nekhatsi elwandle.” Kodvwa ungumuntfu, awusiye nkulunkulu, nome nje uticabanga kutsi uhlakaniphe njengankulunkulu." 
Ezekiel28:3 Uhlakaniphile yini kunaDanyela? Kute yini imfihlo lengakakhanyi kuwe? 
Ezekiel28:4 Ngekuhlakanipha kwakho nangekucondza kwakho utibutsele wena bunjinga, netindvundvuma tegolide netesiliva etingungwini takho tengcebo." 
Ezekiel28:5 Ngebuchwephesha bakho ekutsengiseni ubandzisile bunjinga bakho; nangenca yebunjinga bakho inhlitiyo yakho seyikhukhumukiswe ngumgcabho. 
Ezekiel28:6 “ ‘Ngako-ke naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, itsi: “ ‘Njengobe uticabanga kutsi uhlakaniphile, uhlakaniphe njengankulunkulu," 
Ezekiel28:7 ngako-ke ngitawuvusa tive tikuhlasele, tive letinelulaka nelunya kakhulu, tiyawukhokha tinkemba tato titibhekise ngasebuhleni bakho nangasekuhlakanipheni kwakho, tigwaze bukhatikhati beludvumo lwakho." 
Ezekiel28:8 Bayawukwehlisela phansi emgodzini, uyawufa kabuhlungu ekhatsi nekhatsi kwetilwandle." 
Ezekiel28:9 Uyawube usasho yini kutsi: “Ngingunkulunkulu mine” ebukhoneni balabo labakubulalako? Noko uyawuba ngumuntfu nje, hhayi nkulunkulu, etandleni talabo labayawube bakubulala." 
Ezekiel28:10 Uyawufa kufa kweligwala etandleni tebachamuki. Sengikhulumile, kusho iNkhosi Simakadze.’ ”" 
Ezekiel28:11 Kwefika livi laSimakadze kimi, latsi:" 
Ezekiel28:12 “Ndvodzana yemuntfu, dzindza sililo ngenkhosi yaseThire, utsi kuyo: ‘Naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, itsi: “ ‘Wena bewusibonelo sekuphelela, ugcwele kuhlakanipha, futsi uphelele ngebuhle." 
Ezekiel28:13 Wawuse-Edeni, sivandze saNkulunkulu. Wawuhlotjiswe ngawo onkhe ematje laligugu: ngemarubhi, nangemathophazi, nangema-emeraldi, nangemakhrisolithe, nangema-oniksi, nangemajasiphi, nangemasafire, nangemathekhosi, nangemabherili. Kwekuhlanganisa lamatje akho laligugu nekwekuwanamatsisela kwakwentiwe ngegolide. Kwalungiswa kahle konkhe loko ngelilanga lowadalwa ngalo." 
Ezekiel28:14 Wagcotjwa waba likherubhi lelingumelusi, ngobe ngakugcobela kona loko. Wawusentsabeni lengcwele yaNkulunkulu; wawuhambahamba emkhatsini wematje emlilo." 
Ezekiel28:15 Wawungasoleki etindleleni takho kusukela ngelilanga lowadalwa ngalo, kwadzimate kwaba ngumhlazana bubi butfolakala kuwe." 
Ezekiel28:16 Ngekutsengisa kwakho lokunyenti wagcwala budlova, wase uyona. Ngako ngakulahla ngobe ungcolile ngekwemtsetfo, ngakususa entsabeni yaNkulunkulu, ngakucosha, awu, kherubhi lelalingumelusi, wesuka emkhatsini wematje emlilo." 
Ezekiel28:17 Inhlitiyo yakho yakhukhumuka ngenca yebuhle bakho, wona buhlakaniphi bakho ngenca yekucwebetela kwakho. Ngako ngase ngikulahlela emhlabeni, ngakwenta inhlekisa embikwemakhosi." 
Ezekiel28:18 Utingcolisile tindzawo takho letingcwele ngetono takho letinyenti nangekungetsembeki kwakho ekutsengiseni kwakho. Ngako ngase ngenta kutsi kuphume umlilo kuwe, waphuma wadla wena, ngakwehlisa waba ngumlotsa emhlabatsini, embikwabo bonkhe lababekubukile." 
Ezekiel28:19 Tonkhe tive letatikwati, timangele ngawe; ngobe sewufike ekugcineni lokubi, futsi ngeke uphindze ube khona.’ ”" 
Ezekiel28:20 Kwefika livi laSimakadze kimi, latsi:" 
Ezekiel28:21 “Ndvodzana yemuntfu, bhekisa buso bakho ngaseSidoni; uphrofethe umelane nayoy," 
Ezekiel28:22 utsi: ‘Naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, itsi: “ ‘Awu, Sidoni, ngiyemelana nawe, futsi ngitawutibutsela ludvumo ngawe. Bayawukwati kutsi mine nginguSimakadze, nangehlisela sijeziso etikwakho, ngitikhombise mine ngingcwele ekhatsi kuwe." 
Ezekiel28:23 Ngiyawutfumela sifo lesibulalanako etikwakho, ngigeletise ingati etitaladini takho. Labahlatjiwe bayawusacatekela ekhatsi kuwe, inkemba iyawukuhlasela macala onkhe. Ngulapho-ke bayawukwati khona kutsi mine nginguSimakadze.’ ”" 
Ezekiel28:24 “ ‘Bantfu baka-Israyeli abaseyikuba nabo bomakhelwane labanetinhlitiyo letedzelelako, labangemanyeva lanesitfozi nalacijile. Ngulapho-ke bayawukwati khona kutsi mine ngiyiNkhosi Simakadze." 
Ezekiel28:25 “ ‘Naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, itsi: Nangibutsa sive saka-Israyeli etiveni, lapho besihlakatelwe khona, ngiyawutibonakalisa ngingcwele emkhatsini waso embikwetive. Siyawube sesihlala eveni lelingelaso, lengaliniketa inceku yami Jakobe." 
Ezekiel28:26 Siyawuhlala lapho siphephile, sakhe tindlu, sihlanyele emasimi emagelebisi; sona siyawuhlala siphephile, nase ngehlisela sijeziso kubo bonkhe bomakhelwane baso labasidlela umona. Ngulapho-ke bayawukwati khona kutsi mine nginguSimakadze Nkulunkulu wabo.’ ”" 
Ezekiel29:1 Ngemnyaka welishumi, enyangeni yelishumi, ngelilanga leli-12, kwefika livi laSimakadze kimi, latsi:" 
Ezekiel29:2 “Ndvodzana yemuntfu, bhekisa buso bakho ngakuFaro, inkhosi yaseGibhithe, uphrofethe umelane nayo kanye nayo yonkhe iGibhithe." 
Ezekiel29:3 Khuluma kuyo utsi: ‘Naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, itsi: “ ‘Ngimelene nawe, Faro, nkhosi yaseGibhithe, wena nyokangwenya lenkhulu, wena locambalele emkhatsini wemifudlana yakho. Ukhuluma utsi: “INayili yami, ngatakhela yona mine.”" 
Ezekiel29:4 Kodvwa ngiyawufaka emadweba emihlatsini yakho, ngente tinhlanti temifula yakho tinamatsele etincwencweni takho. Ngiyawukukhipha emkhatsini wemifudlana yakho, ngikukhiphe nato tonkhe tinhlanti letinamatsele etincwencweni letisemtimbeni wakho." 
Ezekiel29:5 Ngiyawukulahla ehlane wena kanye nato tonkhe tinhlanti temifula yakho. Uyakuwela ebaleni kalashameshame, ungaphindzi ubutfwe nome ugcogcwe. Ngiyawukwenta ube kudla kwetilwane tesiganga nekwetinyoni tasemoyeni." 
Ezekiel29:6 “ ‘Ngulapho-ke bonkhe labahlala eGibhithe bayawukwati khona kutsi mine nginguSimakadze. “ ‘Bewuyindvuku yemhlanga kuyo indlu yaka-Israyeli. 
Ezekiel29:7 Batsi nabakubamba ngetandla tabo, wavavabuka ekhatsi, wadzabula emahlombe abo avuleka; batsi beyama kuwe, wephuka, imihlane yabo yashumphuka." 
Ezekiel29:8 “ ‘Ngako-ke naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, itsi: Ngiyawutfumela inkemba imelane nawe, ngibulale bantfu bakakho netifuyo tabo." 
Ezekiel29:9 IGibhithe iyawuba lihlane lelingenamsebenti walutfo. Ngulapho-ke bayawukwati khona kutsi mine nginguSimakadze. “ ‘Njengobe watsi: “INayili ngeyami, ngayenta,”" 
Ezekiel29:10 ngako-ke ngiyemelana nawe kanye nemifula yakho, live laseGibhithe ngiyawulenta libe yimfuhlululu, lisale likhala libhungane, kusukela eMigdoli kuye e-Aswani, kuze kuyewufika emnyeleni waseKushe." 
Ezekiel29:11 Kute lunyawo lwemuntfu nome lwesilwane loluyawunyatsela kulo. Kute loyawuhlala kulo kuze kuphele iminyaka lengema-40. 
Ezekiel29:12 Live laseGibhithe ngiyawulenta libe lihlane kunawo onkhe emave lagagadzekile, nemadolobha alo ayawusala angenabantfu iminyaka lengema-40 emkhatsini wemadolobha labhidlitiwe. Ngiyawubahlakata baseGibhithe ngibayise etiveni, ngibasakatele emaveni ngemave." 
Ezekiel29:13 “ ‘Noko naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, itsi: Ekupheleni kweminyaka lengema-40 ngiyawubabutsa baseGibhithe etiveni ngetive, lapho bebahlakatekele khona." 
Ezekiel29:14 Ngiyawubabuyisa ekutfunjweni, ngibabuyisele ePhathrosi, live labokhokho babo. Lapho-ke bayawuba ngumbuso lotfobekile." 
Ezekiel29:15 Kuyawuba ngumbuso lotfobe kunayo yonkhe leminye, futsi ngeke uphindze utiphakamise ngetulu kwaletinye tive. Ngiyakuwenta ube butsakatsaka kakhulu kangangekutsi ungasaphindzi ubuse etikwetive." 
Ezekiel29:16 IGibhithe ingeke isaba ngumtfombo wemandla esibindzi kubantfu baka-Israyeli, kodvwa iyawuba sikhumbuto sesono sabo, nabajikela kuyo bacela lusito. Ngulapho-ke bayawukwati khona kutsi mine ngiyiNkhosi Simakadze.’ ”" 
Ezekiel29:17 Kwefika livi laSimakadze kimi ngemnyaka wema-27, enyangeni yekucala, ngelilanga lekucala, latsi:" 
Ezekiel29:18 “Ndvodzana yemuntfu, Nebukhadnezari, inkhosi yaseBhabhulona, washucisa emabutfo akhe kamatima wahlasela iThire; tonkhe tinhloko tasingwa taba tincacadvu, nawo onkhe emahlombe abo aba nesikofu. Noko yena kanye nemabutfo akhe abazange babuyelwe lutfo ngalomkhankhaso labawenta ngekuhlasela iThire." 
Ezekiel29:19 Ngako-ke naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, itsi: Ngitawunikela iGibhithe kuNebukhadnezari, inkhosi yaseBhabhulona, uyawutfumba umcebo wayo. Uyawuphanga atfumbe ingcebo yalelive kube yinkhokhelo yemabutfo akhe." 
Ezekiel29:20 Ngimnike iGibhithe, yaba yinkhokhelo yekukhandleka kwakhe, ngobe yena nemabutfo akhe bakwentela mine, kusho iNkhosi Simakadze." 
Ezekiel29:21 “Ngalelo langa ngiyawukhulisa luphondvo lwendlu yaka-Israyeli, futsi ngiyawukuvumela, wena Hezekeli, kutsi ubuye uvule umlomo wakho emkhatsini wabo. Ngulapho-ke bayawukwati khona kutsi mine nginguSimakadze.”" 
Ezekiel30:1 Kwefika livi laSimakadze kimi, latsi:" 
Ezekiel30:2 “Ndvodzana yemuntfu, phrofetha, utsi: ‘Naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, itsi: “ ‘Lilani nitsi: “Maye ngalelo langa!”" 
Ezekiel30:3 Ngobe lilanga selisedvute, lilanga laSimakadze selisondzele, lilanga lemafu, sikhatsi sekubhubha kwetive." 
Ezekiel30:4 Inkemba iyawubefikela baseGibhithe, nebuhlungu benhlitiyo buyawubehlela baseKushe. Ngesikhatsi lasebagwaziwe bawa eGibhithe, umcebo wayo uyawutfunjwa, netisekelo tayo tiyawucheketwa ekhatsi." 
Ezekiel30:5 “ ‘Tonkhe tihlabani letaticashiwe: taseKushe netasePhuthi, netaseLidiya, netakuyo yonkhe i-Arabiya, netaseLibhiya kanye nebantfu belive lesivumelwane sami nabo bayakuwa ngenkemba kanye nebaseGibhithe." 
Ezekiel30:6 “ ‘Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: “ ‘Labo labalekelelana nebaseGibhithe, bayakuwa, nemandla ayo letigabatisa ngawo ayawukwehluleka. Bayakuwela ekhatsi kuyo ngenkemba, kusukela eMigdoli kuye e-Aswani, kusho iNkhosi Simakadze." 
Ezekiel30:7 Ngulapho-ke bayawuba lihlane emkhatsini wemave langemahlane. Emadolobha abo ayawubasemkhatsini wemadolobha lasabhidlitiwe. 
Ezekiel30:8 Ngulapho-ke bayawukwati khona kutsi mine nginguSimakadze, nangilumeka umlilo eGibhithe nabo bonkhe labasitana nayo bayawupitjitwa." 
Ezekiel30:9 “ ‘Ngalelo langa kuyawuphuma titfunywa kimi, tiphume ngemikhumbi tiyekwesabisa baseKushe, kuze baphelelwe kutamasa kwabo. Bayakwehlelwa kwesaba lokukhulu, mhlazana baseGibhithe behlelwa sehlakalo, ngobe ngempela siyawufika." 
Ezekiel30:10 “ ‘Naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, itsi: “ ‘Ngiyawuticedza leticumbi taseGibhithe, ngitibulale ngesandla saNebukhadnezari, inkhosi yaseBhabhulona." 
Ezekiel30:11 Yena nemphi yakhe, bantfu labanelunya lolukhulu etiveni tonkhe, bayawuletfwa batewubhubhisa live. Bayawukhokha tinkemba tabo batibhekise eGibhithe, bagcwalise live ngetidvumbu talabagwaziwe." 
Ezekiel30:12 Ngiyakomisa imifudlana yaseNayili, ngitsengise live kubantfu lababi; ngetandla tebachamuki live ngiyawulibhubhisa nako konkhe lokukulo. Mine Simakadze sengikhulumile." 
Ezekiel30:13 “ ‘Naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, itsi: “ ‘Ngiyawutibhubhisa tithico, ngiticedze tonkhe titfombe eMemfisi. Akusayikuba nambusi eGibhithe, futsi ngiyawusakata kwesaba kulo lonkhe live." 
Ezekiel30:14 IPhathrosi ngiyakuyenta ibe lihlane, iSoyani ngiyilumeke ngemlilo, iThebesi ngiyehlisele sijeziso." 
Ezekiel30:15 Ngiyawutfululela lulaka lwami etikwePhelusiyumi, lekunguyona nqaba yaseGibhithe, futsi ngincamule ticumbi tebantfu baseThebesi." 
Ezekiel30:16 Ngiyawulumeka umlilo eGibhithe; iPhelusiyumi iyawujilajileka ngenca yebuhlungu. IThebesi iyawuhlaselwa ifohlwe; iMemfisi iyawukhukhulwa. 
Ezekiel30:17 Emajaha aseHeliyopholisi newaseBubastisi ayakuwa ngenkemba, nemadolobha cobo lwawo ayawutfunjwa." 
Ezekiel30:18 Lilanga liyawuba bumnyama eThaphanesi, mhlazana ngigamula lijoko laseGibhithe; lapho-ke emandla ayo letigabatisa ngawo ayawuphela. Iyawusibekelwa ngemafu, netabelo tayo tiyawutfunjwa." 
Ezekiel30:19 Ngako ngiyakwehlisela sijeziso eGibhithe, futsi bayawukwati kutsi mine nginguSimakadze.’ ”" 
Ezekiel30:20 Ngemnyaka weli-11, enyangeni yekucala, ngelilanga lesikhombisa, livi laSimakadze lefika kimi, latsi:" 
Ezekiel30:21 “Ndvodzana yemuntfu, ngiwephulile umkhono waFaro, inkhosi yaseGibhithe. Bewungakaboshelwa kutsi uphiliswe, futsi ungakasinyiswa nangetindvuku kuze ucine ngalokwenele kutsi ubambe inkemba." 
Ezekiel30:22 Ngako-ke naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, itsi: Ngimelene naFaro, inkhosi yaseGibhithe. Ngiyakuyephula yomibili imikhono yakhe, wona lona losengakephuki kanye nalona losewephukile, ngidzilite inkemba esandleni sakhe." 
Ezekiel30:23 BaseGibhithe ngiyawubasakatela etiveni ngetive, ngibasakatele emaveni ngemave." 
Ezekiel30:24 Ngiyakuyicinisa imikhono yenkhosi yaseBhabhulona, ngifake inkemba yami esandleni sayo, kodvwa yona imikhono yaFaro ngiyakuyigamula. Uyawububula embikwenkhosi yaseBhabhulona njengemuntfu phaca logwaziwe." 
Ezekiel30:25 Ngiyakuyicinisa imikhono yenkhosi yaseBhabhulona, kodvwa imikhono yaFaro iyawulenga ijikite. Ngulapho-ke bayawukwati khona kutsi mine nginguSimakadze, mzukwana ngibambisa inkhosi yaseBhabhulona inkemba yami ngesandla sayo, iyijikitisele bona baseGibhithe." 
Ezekiel30:26 BaseGibhithe ngiyakubahlakatela, etiveni ngetive, ngibasakatele emaveni ngemave. Ngulapho-ke bayawukwati khona kutsi mine nginguSimakadze.”" 
Ezekiel31:1 Ngemnyaka weli-11, enyangeni yesitsatfu, ngelilanga lekucala, livi laSimakadze lefika kimi, latsi:" 
Ezekiel31:2 “Ndvodzana yemuntfu, khuluma kuFaro, inkhosi yaseGibhithe, nakuletihlwele takhe temabutfo, utsi: “ ‘Ngubani nje longalinganiswa nawe ngekuhlonipheka?" 
Ezekiel31:3 Cabanga nge-Asiriya, leyake yaba ngumsedari waseLebanoni, lewawunemagala lamahle wengamele lihlatsi; waphakamela etulu kakhulu, sihloko sawo sasingetulu kwemacembe lahlangene." 
Ezekiel31:4 Emanti awunisela, tiyalu letijulile tawukhulisa, waba mudze; imifudlana yato yayigeleta ngala nangala kwawo, emanti ageleta ngemisele yawo ayawunisela tonkhe tihlahla tesiganga." 
Ezekiel31:5 Ngako wakhula waya etulu, wengca tonkhe tihlahla tesiganga; emagala awo lamakhulu andza, yebo, emagala akhula aba madze, enaba ngenca yekutfola emanti lamanyenti." 
Ezekiel31:6 Tonkhe tinyoni tasemoyeni takhela tidleke tato emagaleni awo lamakhulu, netilwane tonkhe tesiganga tatalela ngaphansi kwemagala awo; tive tonkhe letikhulu tahlala ngaphansi kwemtfunti wawo." 
Ezekiel31:7 Bewuhlonipheka ngebuhle bawo, nemagala awo lamakhulu lenebe, ngobe timphandze tawo tatishone phansi, taya lapho kunemanti lamanyenti khona." 
Ezekiel31:8 Imisedari leyayisengadzeni yaNkulunkulu ayizange ikhone kulinganiswa nawo, ngisho netihlahla tetipheshula tatingeke tilingane nemagala awo lamakhulu, ngisho netihlahla tepleni tatingeke tilinganiswe nemagala awo, kute sihlahla engadzeni yaNkulunkulu lebesingalinganiswa nebuhle bawo." 
Ezekiel31:9 Ngawenta waba muhle ngemagala lamanyenti, wahawukelwa ngito tonkhe tihlahla tase-Edeni ensimini yaNkulunkulu." 
Ezekiel31:10 “ ‘Ngako-ke naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, itsi: Njengobe wawuphakeme, wengamele onkhe emacembe lahlangene, nanjengobe bewutigcabha ngalobudze bawo," 
Ezekiel31:11 ngawuniketela etandleni tembusi wetive, kuze kutsi yena atewuphatsa ngaleyo ndlela yebubi bawo. Ngawukhweshisela eceleni," 
Ezekiel31:12 kwase kutsi tive tangaphandle letinelunya kakhulu tawujuba, tase tiyawushiya. Emagala awo lamakhulu awela etintsabeni nasetigodzini tonkhe; emagala awo asala phansi ephukile kuto tonkhe tihosha telive. Tonkhe tive temhlaba taphuma ngaphansi kwemtfunti wawo, tawushiya." 
Ezekiel31:13 Tonkhe tinyoni tasemoyeni tahlala etikwalesihlahla lesiwile, nato tonkhe tilwane tesiganga tabasemkhatsini walamagala awo." 
Ezekiel31:14 Ngako-ke kute letinye tihlahla letingasemantini letiyawuphakama tiye etulu ngekutigcabha, tiphakamisele tihloko tato tengamele emacembe lahlangene. Kute letinye tihlahla letiniselwa kahle letiyawuke tikhule tibe tidze ngangaleso sihlahla; tonkhe timiselwe kufa, tiye ngaphansi kwemhlaba, emkhatsini webantfu lababhubhako, kanye nalabo labehlela emgodzini." 
Ezekiel31:15 “ ‘Naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, itsi: Ngalelo langa lomsedari lowehliselwa ngalo ethuneni ngambonya tiyalu letingaphansi kwemhlaba ngekuwulilela; ngavimbela imifudlana yato, kwatsi lamanti ato lamanyenti ema, angete ageleta. Ngenca yawo iLebanoni ngayembatsisa lusizi, kwatsi tonkhe tihlahla tesiganga tabuna." 
Ezekiel31:16 Tive ngatitfutfumelisa ngemsindvo wekuwa kwawo ngesikhatsi ngiwehlisela ethuneni kanye nalabo labehlela emgodzini. Ngako tonkhe tihlahla tase-Edeni, telikhetselo naletinhle kakhulu taseLebanoni, tonkhe tihlahla letatiniselwa kahle, tadvudvuteka emhlabeni longaphansi." 
Ezekiel31:17 Labo labebahlala emtfuntini wawo, tihlobo tawo emkhatsini wetive, nabo behlela nawo ethuneni, bahlangana nalabo lababulewe ngenkemba." 
Ezekiel31:18 “ ‘Ngutiphi taletihlahla tase-Edeni letingalinganiswa nawe ngebukhatikhati nangekuhlonipheka? Noko nawe, futsi, utakwehliswa kanye naletihlahla tase-Edeni niye emhlabeni longaphansi; uyawulala emkhatsini walabebangakasokwa, kanye nalababebulewe ngenkemba. “ ‘Lona nguFaro nato tonkhe tihlwele takhe temabutfo, kusho iNkhosi Simakadze.’ ”" 
Ezekiel32:1 Ngemnyaka weli-12, enyangeni yeli-12, ngelilanga lekucala, livi laSimakadze lefika kimi, latsi:" 
Ezekiel32:2 “Ndvodzana yemuntfu, lila, ulilele Faro, inkhosi yaseGibhithe, utsi: “ ‘Ufanana nelibhubesi emkhatsini wetive; ufanana nanyokangwenya etilwandle, ushaya lidamu emifudlaneni yakho, uphehle emanti ngetinyawo takho, udvunge lemifudlana." 
Ezekiel32:3 “ ‘Naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, itsi: “ ‘Ngesicumbi lesikhulu sebantfu ngiyawuphonsa linetha lami etikwakho, bayawukuhudvulela ngaphandle ngelinetha lami." 
Ezekiel32:4 Ngiyawukulahla emhlabatsini, ngikujikijele esigangeni. Ngiyawukwenta tonkhe tinyoni telizulu takhele etikwakho, bese kutsi tonkhe tilwane temhlaba tikudle tikushwabudzele." 
Ezekiel32:5 Ngiyakwembesa tintsaba ngetidvumbu takho letibolako, ngigcwalise tihosha ngenseketse yakho." 
Ezekiel32:6 Live ngiyakulenya engatini yakho legeletako yonkhe indlela kuya etintsabeni, kutsi tigodzi tigcwaliswe ngenyama yakho." 
Ezekiel32:7 Nase ngikucisha, ngiyakuwasibekela emazulu, ngente tinkhanyeti tawo tibe mnyama. Lilanga ngiyakulimbonya ngelifu, nenyanga ingakukhiphi kukhanya kwayo." 
Ezekiel32:8 Tonkhe tikhanyisi leticwebetelako emazulwini ngiyawutenta tibe mnyama etikwakho; ngiyakwehlisela bumnyama etikwelive lakho, kusho iNkhosi Simakadze." 
Ezekiel32:9 “ ‘Ngiyawutihlupha tinhlitiyo tetive letinyenti, nase ngiletsa imbhubhiso yakho emkhatsini wetive, yebo, emaveni longazange sewuwati." 
Ezekiel32:10 Tive letinyenti ngiyawutenta titfutfumele ngawe, nemakhosi ato ayawushaciswa kwesaba ngenca yakho, nase ngijikitisa inkemba yami embikwawo. Ngelilanga lekuwa kwakho ngulowo nalowo uyawutfutfumela ngekuphila kwakhe kuyo yonkhe imizuzwana yalelo langa." 
Ezekiel32:11 “ ‘Ngobe naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, itsi: “ ‘Inkemba yenkhosi yaseBhabhulona iyawuta itewukuhlasela." 
Ezekiel32:12 Ticumbi tebantfu bakho ngiyawutilahla phansi ngetinkemba temachawe lanemandla, yebo, emachawe lanelunya kwendlula tonkhe tive. Umgcabho waseGibhithe ayakuwuphihlita, kutsi tonkhe ticumbi tebantfu bayo tiketulwe." 
Ezekiel32:13 Ngiyakutibhubhisa tonkhe tinkhomo tayo eceleni kwemanti lamanyenti, langaseyiwuphindze anyakatiswe lunyawo lwemuntfu, nome advungwe tinselo tetinkhomo." 
Ezekiel32:14 Emanti ayo ngiyakuwenta aphindze ahlobe, nemifudlana yayo igelete njengemafutsa, kusho iNkhosi Simakadze." 
Ezekiel32:15 Ngiyawutsi nase ngenta iGibhithe ibe lihlane, live ngilihlubule konkhe lelinako, nase ngibashaya bonkhe labaphilako lapho, ngulapho-ke bayawukwati khona kutsi mine nginguSimakadze.’" 
Ezekiel32:16 “Lesi sililo labayakuyihlabelela sona. Emadvodzakati etive ayakusihlabela; ngobe ayawulilela iGibhithe neticumbi tayo, kusho iNkhosi Simakadze.”" 
Ezekiel32:17 Ngemnyaka weli-12, ngelilanga leli-15 lenyanga yekucala, livi laSimakadze lefika kimi, latsi:" 
Ezekiel32:18 “Ndvodzana yemuntfu, lilela ticumbi tebantfu baseGibhithe, bese ubehlisela emhlabeni longaphansi, yona kanye nemadvodzakati etive letinemandla kanye nalabo labehlela emgodzini." 
Ezekiel32:19 Khuluma kubo utsi: ‘Nine nitsandvwe kwendlula labanye yini? Yehlani niyewulaliswa emkhatsini walabangakasoki.’ 
Ezekiel32:20 Bayawukuwa emkhatsini walabo lababulewe ngenkemba. Inkemba seyikhokhiwe; iGibhithe ayihudvulwe kanye nato tonkhe leto ticumbi tayo tebantfu. 
Ezekiel32:21 Tingwazi letatinemandla kanye nalabebasitana neGibhithe, bemukela emaGibhithe eveni lalabafile. Bememeta batsi: ‘Labangakasoki sebehlile, sebalele lapha, sebabulewe ngenkemba!’" 
Ezekiel32:22 “I-Asiriya ikhona lapho kanye nayo yonkhe imphi yayo; itungeletwe ngemathuna abo bonkhe lababulewe bayo, bonkhe labo lababulewe ngenkemba." 
Ezekiel32:23 Emathuna abo asekujuleni kwemgodzi, nemphi yayo ilala itungelete lithuna layo. Bonkhe labo lababange kutfutfumela eveni lalabaphilako bagwaziwe, balahlwa phansi ngenkemba." 
Ezekiel32:24 “I-Elamu ilapho, kanye nato tonkhe ticumbi tebantfu bayo labatungelete lithuna layo. Bonkhe bagwaziwe, balahlwa phansi ngenkemba. Bonkhe labo lababange kutfutfumela eveni lalabaphilako behla bangakasoki baya ngaphansi kwemhlaba. Betfwele lihlazo labo kanye nalabo labehlela emgodzini." 
Ezekiel32:25 I-Elamu yendlalelwe umbhedze emkhatsini walabagwaziwe, kanye nato tonkhe ticumbi tebantfu bayo letitungelete lithuna layo. Bonkhe abakasokwa, babulewe ngenkemba. Njengobe kutfutfumelisa kwabo sekwandze nelive lonkhe lalabaphilako, betfwele lihlazo labo kanye nalabo labehlela emgodzini; balaliswe emkhatsini walabagwaziwe." 
Ezekiel32:26 “BoMesheki naThubali balapho, bakanye nato tonkhe ticumbi tebantfu babo letitungelete emathuna abo. Bonkhe abakasokwa, babulewe ngenkemba ngobe babange kutfutfumela eveni lalabaphilako." 
Ezekiel32:27 Abalali yini kanye nalamabutfo langakasokwa lasabulewe, lehlele phansi ethuneni kanye netikhali tawo temphi, latinkemba tawo tabekwa ngaphansi kwetinhloko tawo? Sijeziso ngetono tawo sahlala ematsanjeni awo, lite nome kwesatjwa kwalamabutfo kwase kulisibekele lelive lalabaphilako." 
Ezekiel32:28 “Awu Faro, nawe futsi utakwephulwa ulale emkhatsini walabangakasoki, labo lababulewe ngenkemba." 
Ezekiel32:29 “I-Edomu ilapho, emakhosi ayo nato tonkhe tiphatsimandla tayo; nome babenemandla, noko balaliswe kanye nalababulewe ngenkemba nalabo labangakasokwa, kanye nalabo labehlela emgodzini." 
Ezekiel32:30 “Tonkhe tiphatsimandla tasenyakatfo nabo bonkhe baseSidoni balapho; behlela phansi kanye nalabagwaziwe bahlazekile, lite nome kwase kunekwesaba lokwase kubangwe ngemandla abo. Balele bangakasokwa kanye nalabo lababulewe ngenkemba, betfwala lihlazo labo kanye nalabo labehlela emgodzini." 
Ezekiel32:31 “Faro, yena kanye nayo yonkhe imphi yakhe, utawubabona, bese uyadvudvuteka ngenca yato tonkhe leticumbi tebantfu bakhe letabulawa ngenkemba, kusho iNkhosi Simakadze." 
Ezekiel32:32 Lite nome ngamenta wabanga kutfutfumela eveni lalabaphilako, kodvwa Faro nato tonkhe ticumbi tebantfu bakhe bayawulaliswa emkhatsini walabangakasoki, nalabo lababulewe ngenkemba, kusho iNkhosi Simakadze.”" 
Ezekiel33:1 Livi laSimakadze lefika kimi, latsi:" 
Ezekiel33:2 “Ndvodzana yemuntfu, khuluma kubantfu bakini, utsi: ‘Nase ngiletsa inkemba ngimelana nelive lelitsite nebantfu balo, bese bakhetsa indvodza ibe yinye emkhatsini wabo bayente ibe ngumlindzi wabo," 
Ezekiel33:3 lotawutsi nakabona inkemba ita itekumelana nelive, bese ushaya impalampala ecwayise bonkhe bantfu," 
Ezekiel33:4 nangabe lomunye ayiva lempalampala kodvwa angasinaki lesecwayiso, inkemba ize ifike imbulale, ingati yakhe iyawubasenhloko yakhe." 
Ezekiel33:5 Njengobe abeyivile impalampala nayikhala, kodvwa wangete wasinaka lesecwayiso, ingati yakhe iyawubasetikwakhe. Kube abesinakile lesecwayiso, abetawusindzisa kuphila kwakhe." 
Ezekiel33:6 Kodvwa nangabe lomlindzi abona inkemba ita, angayishayi impalampala kwecwayisa bantfu, bese kuta inkemba idle munye wabo, lowo muntfu uyawususwa ngenca yesono sakhe, kodvwa ingati yalowo muntfu ngiyawuyibita kulowo mlindzi.’" 
Ezekiel33:7 “Ndvodzana yemuntfu, sengikubeke kutsi ube ngumlindzi wendlu yaka-Israyeli; ngako-ke vani livi lengilikhuluma kuwe, ubanike secwayiso lesiphuma kimi." 
Ezekiel33:8 Nangikhuluma kumuntfu lomubi, ngitsi: ‘Awu wena muntfu lomubi, ngempela utakufa,’ wena-ke ungabe usakukhuluma loko kuye kutsi atiyekele tindlela takhe letimbi, lowo muntfu lomubi uyakufa ngenca yesono sakhe, mine-ke ngiyakuyibita kuwe ingati yakhe." 
Ezekiel33:9 Kodvwa nangabe wena umecwayisa lomuntfu lomubi kutsi atiyekele tindlela takhe letimbi, yena angete atiyekela, lowo muntfu uyakufa ngenca yesono sakhe, kodvwa wena uyawube utisindzisile.”" 
Ezekiel33:10 “Ndvodzana yemuntfu, khuluma kuyo indlu yaka-Israyeli, utsi: ‘Naku lenikushoko nitsi: “Tikhubekiso tetfu netono tetfu kusidvonsela phansi, natsi sesiyahusheka ngenca yato. Manje-ke sitawuphila kanjani?” ’" 
Ezekiel33:11 Khuluma kubo utsi: ‘Ngifunga kuphila kwami, kusho iNkhosi Simakadze, angikujabuleli kufa kwalomubi, kodvwa ngitsandza kutsi agucuke etindleleni takhe letimbi aphile. Gucukani! Gucukani etindleleni tenu letimbi! Ningafelani, ninendlu yaka-Israyeli?’" 
Ezekiel33:12 “Ngako-ke, ndvodzana yemuntfu, khuluma kulabantfu bakini, utsi: ‘Kulunga kwemuntfu lolungile kungeke kumsindzise nangabe aphambuka, nebubi bemuntfu lomubi bungeke bumente awe, nangabe agucuka kubo. Umuntfu lolungile, nangabe ona, angeke avunyelwe kutsi aphile ngenca yekulunga kwakhe kwakucala.’" 
Ezekiel33:13 Nangabe ngitjela lolungile kutsi ngempela utawuphila, kodvwa yena bese wetsembela kuloko kulunga kwakhe, ente lokubi, kute nome sinye kuletento takhe letinhle latente kucala lesiyawukhunjulwa; uyakufa ngenca yaloko lokubi lakwentile." 
Ezekiel33:14 Nangabe ngikhuluma kumuntfu lomubi, ngitsi: ‘Ngempela utakufa,’ kodvwa bese uyaphendvuka esonweni sakhe, ente loko lokucotfo nalokulungile," 
Ezekiel33:15 nangabe abuyisela loko lakutsatsa njengesibambiso seseboleko, abuyisele naloko lakweba, alandzele timiso tekuphila, angakwenti lokubi, ngempela uyawuphila; angeke afe." 
Ezekiel33:16 Kute nome sinye sono kuleto latentile lesiyawukhunjulwa simelane naye. Wente lokucotfo nalokulungile; ngempela uyawuphila. 
Ezekiel33:17 “Noko bantfu bakini batsi: ‘Indlela yaSimakadze ayikalungi.’ Kodvwa yindlela yabo lena lengakalungi. 
Ezekiel33:18 Nangabe umuntfu lolungile agucuka ekulungeni kwakhe ente lokubi, loko uyawukufela." 
Ezekiel33:19 Kantsi nangabe umuntfu lomubi agucuka ebubini bakhe ente lokucotfo nalokulungile, uyawuphila ngekwenta loko." 
Ezekiel33:20 Noko, wenandlu yaka-Israyeli, utsi: ‘Indlela yaSimakadze ayikalungi.’ Kodvwa ngulowo nalowo wenu ngiyakumehlulela ngekwetindlela takhe.”" 
Ezekiel33:21 Ngemnyaka weli-12 wekutfunjwa kwetfu, enyangeni yelishumi, ngelilanga lesihlanu, indvodza leyayibaleke eJerusalema yeta kimi, yefika yatsi: “Lidolobha seliwile!”" 
Ezekiel33:22 Ngayitolo kusihlwa lendvodza isengakefiki, sandla saSimakadze sasisetikwami, wavula umlomo wami ekuseni lendvodza isengakefiki. Ngako umlomo wami wavuleka, ngangabe ngisabindza." 
Ezekiel33:23 Livi laSimakadze lase liyefika kimi, latsi:" 
Ezekiel33:24 “Ndvodzana yemuntfu, bantfu labahlala kulawo madzibikelo eveni laka-Israyeli, batsi: ‘Abrahama bekunguye yedvwa, noko lonkhe lelive belilakhe. Kodvwa tsine sibanyenti; nakanjani lelive linikwe tsine kutsi libe letfu.’" 
Ezekiel33:25 “Ngako-ke khuluma kubo, utsi: ‘Naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, itsi: Njengobe senidla inyama lenengati, nibuke tithico tenu, nicitse ingati, kufanele yini kutsi lelive libe lenu?" 
Ezekiel33:26 Netsembele enkembeni yenu, nente tintfo letinengekako, ngulowo nalowo wenu ungcolisa umkamakhelwane wakhe. Kufanele yini kutsi lelive libe lenu?’" 
Ezekiel33:27 “Khuluma kubo, utsi: ‘Naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, itsi: Ngifunga kuphila kwami, labo labasemadzilikelweni bayawubulawa ngenkemba, labo labasemaphandleni ngiyawubanikela etilwaneni tesiganga kutsi tibashwabudzele, kutsi labo labasetinqabeni nasemigedzeni babulawe sifo lesibulalanako." 
Ezekiel33:28 Live ngiyawulenta libe lihlane lelingenalutfo, nemandla abo labebatigcabha ngawo ayakuphela atsi nya, tintsaba taka-Israyeli tiyakuba sikhotsa, kangangekutsi kubete nalowengca kuto." 
Ezekiel33:29 Ngulapho-ke bayawukwati khona kutsi mine nginguSimakadze, nase ngente lelive laba lihlane lelingenalutfo ngenca yato tonkhe letintfo letinengekako labatentile.’ ”" 
Ezekiel33:30 “Wena-ke, ndvodzana yemuntfu, bantfu bakini bakhuluma ngawe ngasetindvongeni nangaseminyango yetindlu, bakafana imilomo ngawe, batsi: ‘Wotani nitekuva livi leliphuma kuSimakadze.’" 
Ezekiel33:31 Bantfu bami beta kuwe, njengobe bavame kwenta, bahlale embikwakho balalele emavi akho, kodvwa abawenti. Ngemilomo yabo bakhuluma kutsi batinikele, kodvwa tinhlitiyo tabo tibukhali, tifuna inzuzo lembi." 
Ezekiel33:32 Yebo, kubo awusilutfo, ufanana nemuntfu lohlabela tingoma telutsandvo ngeliphimbo lelimnandzi, adlale nemntjingozi kamnandzi, ngobe emavi akho bayaweva, kodvwa bangawenti." 
Ezekiel33:33 “Kuyawutsi konkhe loku nase kwenteka, ngobe vele kutakwenteka, ngulapho-ke bayawukwati khona kutsi umphrofethi abesemkhatsini wabo.”" 
Ezekiel34:1 Livi laSimakadze lefika kimi, latsi:" 
Ezekiel34:2 “Ndvodzana yemuntfu, phrofetha umelane nebelusi baka-Israyeli; phrofetha ukhulume kubo, utsi: ‘Naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, itsi: Nako kubelusi baka-Israyeli labatinakekela bona kuphela! Belusi akukafaneli yini kutsi banakekele umhlambi?" 
Ezekiel34:3 Nidla lihongo, nitembatsise ngetimphahla tensontfo, nitihlabele tifuyo telikhetselo, kodvwa aniwunakekeli umhlambi." 
Ezekiel34:4 Anikaticinisi letibutsakatsaka naletigulako, anikatelaphi nabopha nemanceba aletilimele. Letedukile anikatifuni natibuyisa, nangete natifuna naletilahlekile. Nitibuse ngelunya, natiphatsa ngesihluku." 
Ezekiel34:5 Ngako timvu tavele tasakateka, ngobe bekute umelusi, tatsi kube tisakateke, tagucuka taba kudla kwato tonkhe tilwane tesiganga." 
Ezekiel34:6 Timvu tami tazulazula kuto tonkhe tintsaba nakuwo onkhe emagcuma laphakeme. Tasakateka kuwo wonkhe umhlaba, kwabate lotifunako nalotelusako." 
Ezekiel34:7 “ ‘Ngako-ke, nine belusi, vanini livi laSimakadze, lelitsi:" 
Ezekiel34:8 Ngifunga kuphila kwami, kusho iNkhosi Simakadze, njengobe umhlambi wami weswele umelusi, waze waphangwa wagucuka waba kudla kwato tonkhe tilwane tesiganga, nanjengobe belusi bami bangazange bawufune umhlambi wami, kodvwa batinakekela bona kakhulu kunekunakekela umhlambi wami," 
Ezekiel34:9 ngako-ke, awu, belusi, vanini livi laSimakadze, lelitsi:" 
Ezekiel34:10 Naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, itsi: Ngimelene nalabelusi, futsi ngiyawubabeka licala ngalomhlambi wami. Ngiyawubesusa ekweluseni lomhlambi, khona labelusi bangetiwuchubeka nekutondla bona. Ngiyawutephula timvu tami emilonyeni yabo, futsi tingeke tiphindze tibe kudla kwabo.’ ”" 
Ezekiel34:11 “ ‘Ngobe naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, itsi: Mine ngekwami ngitatifunela letimvu tami, ngitelusele." 
Ezekiel34:12 Njengemelusi nakeluse umhlambi wetimvu takhe losakatekile, nakanato, kanjalo nami ngiyawutelusela timvu tami. Ngiyawutephula kuto tonkhe tindzawo lapho tisakatelwe khona ngalelo langa lemafu nelebumnyama." 
Ezekiel34:13 Ngiyawutikhipha emkhatsini wetive, ngitibutse emaveni, bese ngitibuyisela eveni lato. Ngiyakutelusela etintsabeni taka-Israyeli, ngasemifuleni, nasetindzaweni tonkhe letakhiwe eveni." 
Ezekiel34:14 Ngiyawutelusela edlelweni lelihle, netintsaba letiphakeme taka-Israyeli tiyawuba ngemadlelo ato. Lapho-ke tiyawulala phansi edlelweni lelihle, ngulapho tiyawuklaba khona edlelweni lelineluhlata, etintsabeni taka-Israyeli." 
Ezekiel34:15 Mine ngekwami ngiyawukwelusa timvu tami ngitilalise phansi, kusho iNkhosi Simakadze." 
Ezekiel34:16 Ngiyakutifuna letilahlekile, naletedukile ngitibuyise. Letilimele ngiyawutibopha emanceba, ngiticinise emadvolo letibutsakatsaka, kodvwa letesulekile naleticinile ngiyawutibhubhisa. Ngiyakwelusa umhlambi ngemtsetfocotfo." 
Ezekiel34:17 “ ‘Wena-ke, mhlambi wami, naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, itsi: Ngiyawukwehlulela emkhatsini wemvu nemvu nasemkhatsini wetihhanca netiphongo." 
Ezekiel34:18 Akukeneli yini kini kutsi niklabe edlelweni lelihle? Futsi kufanele yini kutsi nigcobagcobe lencenye yelidlelo ngetinyawo tenu? Akukeneli yini kini kunatsa lamanti lahlobile? Kufanele yini kutsi niwadvunge ngetinyawo tenu lamanti? 
Ezekiel34:19 Lomhlambi wami kufanele yini udle loko lese nikugcobagcobile, uphindze unatse loko lese kudvungwe tinyawo tenu?" 
Ezekiel34:20 “ ‘Ngako-ke naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze kubo, itsi: Bukani la, mine matfupha ngitakwehlulela emkhatsini wetimvu letikhuluphele netimvu letondzile." 
Ezekiel34:21 Njengobe nitifuca ngemhlubulo nangelihlombe, nitigcubule ngetimphondvo tenu tonkhe timvu letibutsakatsaka, nize niticoshe tihambe," 
Ezekiel34:22 mine-ke ngitawusindzisa umhlambi wami, ungeke uphindze uphangwe. Ngiyakwehlulela emkhatsini wemvu nemvu." 
Ezekiel34:23 Ngiyawubeka etikwato umelusi abe munye, inceku yami Davide, yena uyawutinakekela; uyakuba ngumelusi wato, atinakekele." 
Ezekiel34:24 Mine Simakadze ngiyawuba nguNkulunkulu wato, nenceku yami Davide abe yinkhosi emkhatsini wato. Mine, Simakadze, sengikhulumile." 
Ezekiel34:25 “ ‘Ngiyakwenta sivumelwane sekuthula nato kutsi tilwane tesiganga ngitisuse eveni, khona timvu tami titewuhlala ehlane tilale emahlatsini tiphephile." 
Ezekiel34:26 Ngiyawubusisa tona kanye netindzawo letitungelete ligcuma lami. Ngiyakwehlisa timvula ngesikhatsi sato; kuyawuba netimvula tesibusiso. 
Ezekiel34:27 Tihlahla tesiganga tiyawutsela titselo tato, nemhlaba umilise tilimo tawo; bantfu bayawuhlala baphephile eveni labo. Bayawukwati kutsi mine nginguSimakadze, nase ngephula lijoko labo lensimbi, ngibephula etandleni talabo lababagcilatile." 
Ezekiel34:28 Bangeke baphiindze baphangwe tive, netilwane tesiganga futsi tingeke tiphindze tibashwabudzele. Bayawuhlala baphephile, kute futsi loyawubesabisa." 
Ezekiel34:29 Ngiyawubalungiselela live lelatiwa ngetilimo talo, bangeke baphindze babe kudla kwendlala kulelo live, nome babe yintfo yekwedzelelwa tive." 
Ezekiel34:30 Ngulapho-ke bayawukwati khona kutsi mine Simakadze longuNkulunkulu wabo nginabo, nekuktsi bona labayindlu yaka-Israyeli, basive sami, kusho iNkhosi Simakadze." 
Ezekiel34:31 “ ‘Nine, timvu tami, timvu telidlelo lami, nisive sami, mine nginguNkulunkulu wenu, kusho iNkhosi Simakadze.’ ”" 
Ezekiel35:1 Livi laSimakadze lefika kimi, latsi:" 
Ezekiel35:2 “Ndvodzana yemuntfu, bhekisa buso bakho ngaseveni letintsaba i-Edomu, phrofetha, umelane nayo," 
Ezekiel35:3 utsi: ‘Naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, itsi: Ngimelene nawe, Edomu, live letintsaba, ngiyakwelula sandla sami ngimelane nawe, ngikwente ube lihlane lelingenalutfo." 
Ezekiel35:4 Emadolobha akho ngiyakuwagucula abe ngemadzibikelo, live lakho libe lihlane. Ngulapho-ke uyawukwati khona kutsi mine nginguSimakadze." 
Ezekiel35:5 “ ‘Njengobe wafukamela butsa bakadzeni, wanikela ema-Israyeli enkembeni ngesikhatsi senhlekelele yawo, ngesikhatsi sesijeziso sawo sekuphela, ehlulelwa ngenca yalokubi kwawo," 
Ezekiel35:6 ngako-ke, ngifunga kuphila kwami, ngiyawukunikela ekucitfweni kwengati yakho, futsi kuyawukucosha ngemuva, kusho iNkhosi Simakadze. Njengobe ungazange sewukutondze kucitsa ingati, kucitsa ingati kuyawukucosha ngemuva." 
Ezekiel35:7 Live laka-Edomu letintsaba ngiyawulenta libe lihlane lelingenalutfo, ngincamule bonkhe labaphuma bangene kulo." 
Ezekiel35:8 Tintsaba takho ngiyawutigcwalisa ngalabo labagwaziwe; yebo, labo lababulewe ngenkemba bayakuwa etikwemagcuma akho, nasetihosheni takho, nakuyo yonkhe imifudlana yakho." 
Ezekiel35:9 Ngiyawukwenta ube lihlane phakadze; emadolobha akho angeke abe nebantfu. Ngulapho-ke uyawukwati khona kutsi mine nginguSimakadze. 
Ezekiel35:10 “ ‘Njengobe ukhulume watsi: “Letive letimbili nalamave lamabili kutawuba kwetfu, futsi siyawukutsatsa kube kwetfu,” lite nome mine Simakadze bengikhona lapho," 
Ezekiel35:11 ngako-ke, ngifunga kuphila kwami, ngiyawukuphatsa ngentfukutselo nangemona lowakubonakalisa kubaka-Israyeli ngekubatondza kwakho, nami ngiyawutenta ngatiwe emkhatsini wabo, nangikwehlulela, kusho iNkhosi Simakadze." 
Ezekiel35:12 Ngulapho-ke uyawukwati khona kutsi mine Simakadze ngitivile tonkhe letintfo tekwedzelela letimbi lotikhulume ngetintsaba taka-Israyeli. Watsi: “Tentiwe taba lihlane, taniketwa tsine kutsi sitishwabudzele.”" 
Ezekiel35:13 Wangichoshela, wakhuluma kabi ngami ngaphandle kwekutibamba, ngakuva loko." 
Ezekiel35:14 Naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, itsi: Kuyawutsi umhlaba wonkhe usajabula, wena ngikwente ube lihlane." 
Ezekiel35:15 Njengobe wajabula ngesikhatsi lifa lendlu yaka-Israyeli liba lihlane, nami-ke ngiyawukuphatsa kanjalo. Uyawuba lihlane, wena live letintsaba taseSeyiri, yebo, wena nalo lonkhe laka-Edomu. Ngulapho-ke bayawukwati khona kutsi mine nginguSimakadze.’ ”" 
Ezekiel36:1 “Ndvodzana yemuntfu, phrofetha kuto tintsaba taka-Israyeli, utsi: ‘Awu nine, tintsaba taka-Israyeli, vanini livi laSimakadze." 
Ezekiel36:2 Naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, itsi: Sitsa sakhuluma ngani, satsi: “Hha! Ticongo takadzeni setilifa letfu.” ’" 
Ezekiel36:3 Ngako-ke phrofetha, utsi: ‘Naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, itsi: Ngenca yekutsi banona kangaka banicosha yonkhe indzawo, naze naba lifa lato tonkhe letinye tive, nentfo yekuhlekisa neyekucashatwa bantfu," 
Ezekiel36:4 ngako-ke vanini livi leNkhosi Simakadze, nine tintsaba taka-Israyeli: Naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, kuto tintsaba nemagcuma, nasemifudlaneni, nasetihosheni, nakuto tindzawo letidzilitiwe, nakumadolobha lasala akhala libhungane, laphangwa laphukutwa ngito tonkhe tive letisele letinitungeletile." 
Ezekiel36:5 “ ‘Naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, itsi: Ngentfukutselo yami levutsako ngikhulume ngemelana nato tonkhe tive letisele, kanye nalo lonkhe laka-Edomu, ngobe batsatsa live lami balenta labo ngekujabula, nangenhlitiyo lembi, bentela kuphanga emadlelo alo.’" 
Ezekiel36:6 “Ngako-ke phrofetha macondzana nelive laka-Israyeli, ukhulume kuto tintsaba nemagcuma, nasemifudlaneni netihosha, utsi: ‘Naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, itsi: Ngikhuluma ngelulaka lwami nangesikhwele sami, ngobe senive buhlungu bekwedzelelwa tive." 
Ezekiel36:7 Ngako-ke naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, itsi: Ngifunga ngekuphakamisa sandla sami, ngitsi, tive lenakhelene nato tiyawuva buhlungu bekwedzelelwa." 
Ezekiel36:8 “ ‘Kodvwa nine, tintsaba taka-Israyeli, niyawuhluma emagala, nitselele sive sami ema-Israyeli titselo tenu, ngobe siyawubuya ekhaya masinyane." 
Ezekiel36:9 Ngobe ngihluphekile ngani, futsi ngiyawunibuka ngeluvelo, niyawulinywa nihlanyelwe," 
Ezekiel36:10 ngibuye ngandzise sibalo sebantfu kini, yebo yonkhe indlu yaka-Israyeli. Emadolobha ayawuphindze ahlalwe bantfu, netindzawo letibhidlitiwe takhiwe kabusha." 
Ezekiel36:11 Ngiyakwandzisa sibalo sebantfu nesetilwane kini, yebo, kuyawutalana kwandze. Ngiyawuhlalisa bantfu kini njengaloku kwakwenteka kucala, ngibuye nginente niphumelele ninjinge kakhulu kunakucala. Ngulapho-ke niyawukwati khona kutsi mine nginguSimakadze." 
Ezekiel36:12 Ngiyawukwenta bantfu, lekusive sami ema-Israyeli, kutsi bahambe etikwenu. Nine seniyawuba babo, nibe lifa labo; aniseyiwuphindze nibemuke bantfwababo." 
Ezekiel36:13 “ ‘Naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, itsi: Ngenca yekutsi bantfu bakhuluma kuwe, live laka-Israyeli, batsi: “Udla bantfu, udlelele sive sakho bantfwabaso,”" 
Ezekiel36:14 ngako-ke awusayikudla bantfu nome wente sive sakho singabi nabantfwana, kusho iNkhosi Simakadze." 
Ezekiel36:15 Angisayikwenta uphindze uve kuchukulutwa tive, futsi awusayikubuva buhlungu bekuhlekwa betive nome uwise sive sakho, kusho iNkhosi Simakadze.’ ”" 
Ezekiel36:16 Livi laSimakadze laphindze lefika kimi, latsi:" 
Ezekiel36:17 “Ndvodzana yemuntfu, ngesikhatsi sive sema-Israyeli sisahlala eveni laso, salingcolisa ngekutiphatsa kabi kwaso nangetento taso. Kutiphatsa kwaso emehlweni ami kwakufanana nekungcola kwemfati kwanyangatonkhe." 
Ezekiel36:18 Ngako ngatfululela lulaka lwami etikwabo, ngobe bese bacitse ingati kulelo live, nangobe bese balingcolise ngaletithico tabo." 
Ezekiel36:19 Ngabahlakatela emkhatsini wetive, basakateka emaveni ngemave; ngabehlulela ngangekwekutiphatsa kwabo, nangangekwenta kwabo." 
Ezekiel36:20 Yonkhe indzawo lapho baya khona etiveni balihlambalata Libito lami lelingcwele, ngobe kwakukhulunywa ngabo kutsiwe: ‘Lesi sive saSimakadze, kodvwa noko kwakufanele balishiye live lakhe.’" 
Ezekiel36:21 Ngaphatseka kabi ngeLibito lami lelingcwele, lelahlanjalatwa yindlu yaka-Israyeli emkhatsini wetive, lapho bebaye khona." 
Ezekiel36:22 “Ngako-ke khuluma kuyo indlu yaka-Israyeli, utsi: ‘Naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, itsi: Akusiko ngenca yakho, wenandlu yaka-Israyeli, lokutsi ngitatenta letintfo, kodvwa kungenca yeLibito lami lelingcwele lewulihlambalatile emkhatsini wetive lapho wawuhlanhlatseke waya khona." 
Ezekiel36:23 Ngitawukhombisa bungcwele beLibito lami lelikhulu, lebeselihlanjalatwe emkhatsini wetive, Libito lenilihlambalate emkhatsini wato. Ngulapho-ke tive tiyawukwati khona kutsi mine nginguSimakadze, nase ngitibonakalisa ngani kutsi mine ngingcwele, embikwemehlo ato, kusho iNkhosi Simakadze." 
Ezekiel36:24 “ ‘Ngobe ngiyawunikhipha emkhatsini wetive, ngiyawunibutsa kuwo onkhe emave, nginibuyisele eveni lelingelenu." 
Ezekiel36:25 Ngiyawunifafata ngemanti lahlobile, bese niyahlanteka; ngiyawunihlanta kuko konkhe kungcola kwenu nakuto tonkhe tithico tenu." 
Ezekiel36:26 Ngiyawuninika inhlitiyo lensha, ngifake umoya lomusha ekhatsi kini; ngiyawuyikhipha inhlitiyo lelitje kini, ngininike inhlitiyo yenyama." 
Ezekiel36:27 Ngiyawufaka Moya wami kini, nginente nilandzele timiso tami, nicaphele kugcina imitsetfo yami." 
Ezekiel36:28 Niyawuhlala eveni lengalipha boyihlomkhulu, niyawuba sive sami, mine ngibe nguNkulunkulu wenu." 
Ezekiel36:29 Ngiyawuniphephisa kuko konkhe kungcola kwenu. Ngiyawubita lokutinhlavu, ngikwandzise kube kunyenti, ngingayehliseli kini indlala." 
Ezekiel36:30 Nigyakwandzisa titselo tetihlahla, netivuno temasimi, kuze ningetiwutseleka ngelihlazo emkhatsini wetive ngenca yendlala." 
Ezekiel36:31 Lapho-ke niyawutikhumbula tindlela tenu letimbi netento tenu letinengekako, niyawutenyanya ngenca yetono tenu nangetento tenu letinengekako." 
Ezekiel36:32 Ngifuna nati kutsi loko angikwenti ngenca yenu. Banini nemahloni nihlazeke ngenca yekutiphatsa kwenu kabi, ninendlu yaka-Israyeli, kusho iNkhosi Simakadze." 
Ezekiel36:33 “ ‘Naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, itsi: Mzukwana nginihlanta kuto tonkhe tono tenu, ngiyakuwatintisa kabusha emadolobha enu, netindzawo tenu lebetibhidlitiwe tiyakwakhiwa kabusha." 
Ezekiel36:34 Live lelase likhala libhungane liyawulinywa esikhundleni sekutsi lisale liliihlane lelingenalutfo emehlweni abo bonkhe labengca kulo. 
Ezekiel36:35 Bayawutsi: “Lelive belilihlane lelingenalutfo selihlume laba njengensimi yase-Edeni; emadolobha labesasele atindzala, sekukhala libhungane kuwo, asabhujisiwe, nyalo asabiyelwe futsi asahlalwa bantfu.”" 
Ezekiel36:36 Lapho-ke tive leniyawube nakhelene nato letiyawube tisasele tiyawukwati kutsi mine Simakadze, ngikwakhe kabusha loko lokwase kubhujisiwe, ngabuye ngahlumisa loko lokwase kulihlane. Mine Simakadze sengikhulumile, futsi ngitawukwenta.’" 
Ezekiel36:37 “Naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, itsi: Nangaloku ngiyawulalela kukhala kwendlu yaka-Israyeli, ngibentele naku: Ngiyawukwenta sive sabo sandze sibe ngangetimvu," 
Ezekiel36:38 babe banyenti ngangemihlambi yeminikelo eJerusalema, ngetikhatsi temikhosi yakhona lemisiwe. Kanjalo-ke kulamadolobha labebhidlitiwe kuyawunyakatela bantfu. Ngulapho-ke bayawukwati khona kutsi mine nginguSimakadze.”" 
Ezekiel37:1 Sandla saSimakadze sasisetikwami, wangikhiphela ngaphandle ngaMoya waSimakadze, wangimisa ekhatsi nendzawo esigodzini. Lesigodzi sasigcwele ematsambo." 
Ezekiel37:2 Wangihola angiyisa enhla nentasi emkhatsini walamatsambo. Ngabona kutsi sonkhe lesigodzi sasigcwele ematsambo lapha phansi, lamatsambo futsi abome nkhwa." 
Ezekiel37:3 Wangibuta watsi: “Ndvodzana yemuntfu, lamatsambo angaphila yini?” Ngatsi mine: “Awu, Nkhosi, Simakadze, nguwe wedvwa lowatiko.”" 
Ezekiel37:4 Wase utsi kimi: “Phrofetha kulamatsambo, utsi kuwo: ‘Nine matsambo lomile, vanini livi laSimakadze!" 
Ezekiel37:5 Naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze kulamatsambo, itsi: Ngitakwenta umphefumulo ungene kini, nitabe seniyaphila." 
Ezekiel37:6 Ngitawuhlumisa imisipha kini, ngente inyama imile kini, nginembese ngesikhumba, ngitawufaka umphefumulo kini, nitawube seniyaphila. Ngulapho-ke niyawukwati khona kutsi mine nginguSimakadze.’ ”" 
Ezekiel37:7 Ngako ngaphrofetha njengobe ngangiyaliwe. Ngatsi ngisaphrofetha, kwaba nemsindvo, kwakhala bukhehlekhehle, ematsambo ahlangana, litsambo laya etsanjeni." 
Ezekiel37:8 Ngatsi ngiyabuka, kwavela kuwo imisipha nenyama, ngabona sikhumba siwembesa, kodvwa kwakute umphefumulo kuwo." 
Ezekiel37:9 Wakhuluma kimi, watsi: “Phrofetha emphefumulweni, phrofetha, ndvodzana yemuntfu, ukhulume kuwo, utsi: ‘Naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, itsi: Wena mphefumulo, chamuka emimoyeni yomine, uphefumulele kulaba lababulewe, khona batewuphila.’ ”" 
Ezekiel37:10 Ngako ngaphrofetha njengaloku abengiyalile, umphefumulo wangena kuwo, ase ayaphila, asukuma ema ngetinyawo, kwakuyimphi lenkhulu kakhulu." 
Ezekiel37:11 Wase utsi kimi: “Ndvodzana yemuntfu, lamatsambo lawa, angiyo yonkhe indlu yaka-Israyeli. Batsi: ‘Ematsambo etfu omile, nelitsemba letfu liphelile; sincanyuliwe saphela nya.’" 
Ezekiel37:12 Ngako-ke phrofetha, utsi kubo: ‘Naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, itsi: Awu, sive sami, ngitawugwabula emadliza enu, nginikhiphe kuwo; ngiyawunibuyisela eveni lenu laka-Israyeli." 
Ezekiel37:13 Ngulapho-ke niyawukwati khona, nine bantfu bami, kutsi mine nginguSimakadze, mhlazane ngivula emathuna enu nginikhipha kuwo." 
Ezekiel37:14 Ngiyawufaka Moya wami kini, bese niyaphila, ngiyawunihlalisa eveni lenu. Lapho-ke niyawube seniyati kutsi mine Simakadze sengikhulumile, futsi sengikwentile, kusho Simakadze.’ ”" 
Ezekiel37:15 Livi laSimakadze lefika kimi, latsi:" 
Ezekiel37:16 “Ndvodzana yemuntfu, tsatsa umzaca ubhale kuwo, utsi: ‘LongewakaJuda nema-Israyeli latihlanganise naye.’ Bese utsatsa lomunye futsi umzaca ubhale kuwo, utsi: ‘Longewaka-Efrayimu, nalongewakaJosefa nabo bonkhe bendlu yaka-Israyeli labatihlanganise naye.’" 
Ezekiel37:17 Yihlanganise ndzawonye, uyente ibe ngumzaca munye, khona itewuba yintfo yinye esandleni sakho." 
Ezekiel37:18 “Nabakubuta bantfu bakini, batsi: ‘Ungete wasitjela yini kutsi usho kutsini ngaloku?’" 
Ezekiel37:19 ubobatjela kutsi mine, iNkhosi Simakadze, ngitawutsatsa lomzaca lomelele baka-Israyeli ngiwubeke kanyekanye nalona lomelele bakaJuda. Ngalemizaca lemibili ngitakwenta umzaca ube munye lengitawuphatsa ngesandla sami." 
Ezekiel37:20 “Bamba ngesandla sakho lemizaca yomibili lobhale kuyo, wentele kutsi bantfu bayibone," 
Ezekiel37:21 bese-ke uyabatjela kutsi: ‘Naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, itsi: Ngitawubutsa sonkhe sive sami saka-Israyeli kuto tonkhe tive lapho sahlakatekela khona, ngisibutsele ndzawonye ngize ngisibuyisele eveni lelingelaso." 
Ezekiel37:22 Ngiyawubenta babe sive sinye kulelo live, etintsabeni taka-Israyeli. Kuyawuba nenkhosi yinye leyawubabusa bonkhe, futsi abasayiwuphindze babe tive letimbili letehlukene nome behlukane babe ngimibuso lemibili." 
Ezekiel37:23 Abasayikutingcolisa bona ngetithico tabo nangetitfombe letinengekako, nanganome ngusiphi setono tabo, ngobe ngiyawubasindzisa kuto tonkhe tono tabo tekuhlubuka, ngibageze. Bayakuba bantfu bami, mine ngibe nguNkulunkulu wabo." 
Ezekiel37:24 “ ‘Inceku yami, Davide, iyawuba yinkhosi yabo, futsi bonkhe bayawuba nemelusi munye. Bayawulandzela imitsetfo yami, bacaphele kugcina timiso tami." 
Ezekiel37:25 Bayawuhlala eveni lengalipha inceku yami Jakobe, live lapho kwakuhlala khona boyihlomkhulu. Bona kanye nebantfwababo, kanye nebantfwana bebantfwababo, bayawuhlala lapho phakadze naphakadze; naDavide, inceku yami, uyawuba yinkhosi yabo phakadze naphakadze." 
Ezekiel37:26 Ngiyawukwenta sivumelwane sekuthula nabo, siyawuba sivumelwane saphakadze. Ngiyawubahlalisa kahle batinte, ngibente bandze, ngibeke indzawo yami lengcwele emkhatsini wabo phakadze naphakadze." 
Ezekiel37:27 Indzawo yami yekuhlala iyawuba kubo; mine ngiyawuba nguNkulunkulu wabo, bona babe bantfu bami." 
Ezekiel37:28 Ngulapho-ke tive tiyawukwati khona kutsi mine Simakadze ngenta Israyeli kutsi abe ngcwele, ngesikhatsi indzawo yami lengcwele iyawuba kubo phakadze naphakadze.’ ”" 
Ezekiel38:1 Livi laSimakadze lefika kimi, latsi:" 
Ezekiel38:2 “Ndvodzana yemuntfu, bhekisa buso bakho ngakuGogi waseveni lakaMagogi, indvuna lenkhulu yesive sakaMesheki nakaThubali. Phrofetha kuye," 
Ezekiel38:3 utsi: ‘Naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, itsi: Ngimelene nawe, wena Gogi, ndvuna lenkhulu yakaMesheki nakaThubali." 
Ezekiel38:4 Ngitakushayisa situngeletane, ngifake emadweba emihlatsini yakho, ngikukhiphe kanye nayo yonkhe imphi yakho, emahhashi akho, nebagibeli bakho bemahhashi labahlome baphelela, nelucucaba lwebantfu labahlome ngisho nangemahawu lamakhulu nalamancane, bonkhe bamengetelisa tinkemba tabo." 
Ezekiel38:5 IPheresiya, neKushe, nePhuthi iyawuba kanye nabo, bonkhe banemahawu netimphantitje," 
Ezekiel38:6 kanye neGomeri inawo onkhe emabutfo ayo, neBhethi Togama lengasekugcineni kwasenyakatfo nawo onkhe emabutfo akhona; tive letinyenti tikanye nawe." 
Ezekiel38:7 “ ‘Caphela, tilungiselele, wena kanye nalolucucaba lwebantfu lababutsene lapha kuwe, ubahole." 
Ezekiel38:8 Emvakwemalanga lamanyenti utawubitelwa embutfweni. Kuleminyaka letako utawuhlasela live leselibuyiswe emphini, lelibantfu balo babutfwa etiveni letinyenti, bayiswa etintsabeni taka-Israyeli letase tikhala libhungane kadzenidzeni. Bakhishwe etiveni ngetive, kodvwa nyalo bonkhe sebahlala bavikelekile." 
Ezekiel38:9 Wena kanye nawo onkhe emabutfo akho netive letinyenti letinawe niyawukhuphuka, nishulungane njengesihhuhhula semoya, niyawuba njengelifu lelimbonya live." 
Ezekiel38:10 “ ‘Naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, itsi: Ngalelo langa kuyawufika imizindlo engcondvweni yakho, uyawukwakha lisu lelibi." 
Ezekiel38:11 Uyakutsi: “Ngitawungenela live lelitabelo talo tingakabiyelwa, ngiyawuhlasela sive lesinekuthula, sive lesingakacapheli lutfo, bonkhe bahlala ebaleni bangakavikeleki, abanamasango namicabo." 
Ezekiel38:12 Ngiyawubaphanga, ngibemuke timphahla, bese ngijikisela sandla sami kuletindzawo lebetidzilitiwe lesetakhiwe kabusha, nakulabantfu lababutfwe etiveni ngetive, sive lesesifuye kakhulu, kantsi sinetimphahla letinyenti futsi, bantfu labahlala enkhabeni yelive.”" 
Ezekiel38:13 BaseSheba, nebaseDedani, nebahwebi baseThashishi nebakuyo yonkhe imiti yayo bayawutsi kuwe: “Utewuphanga yini? Lolucucaba lwakho ulubutsele kutasemuka timphahla yini, wetfwale isiliva kanye negolide, utsatse tifuyo netimphahla, utsatse nemphango lenyenti?” ’" 
Ezekiel38:14 “Ngako-ke, ndvodzana yemuntfu, phrofetha utsi kuGogi: ‘Naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, itsi: Ngalelo langa, mzukwana sive sami, ema-Israyeli, sesihlala sivikelekile, awuyiwukubona yini?" 
Ezekiel38:15 Uyawuchamuka endzaweni yakho lesenyakatfo lekhashane, wena netive letinyenti letikanye nawe, bonkhe bagibele emahhashi, inyakanyaka yemabutfo, imphi lenemandla kakhulu." 
Ezekiel38:16 Uyawushuca usukele sive sami, ema-Israyeli, njengelifu lelisibekela live. Kulamalanga letako wena, Gogi, ngitakuyisa eveni lami, kuze tive titewungati mine nase ngitibonakalisa bungcwele bami ngawe tibukile." 
Ezekiel38:17 “ ‘Naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, itsi: Akusiwe yini lona lengakhuluma ngaye ngemalanga akadzeni ngetinceku tami baphrofethi baka-Israyeli? Ngaleso sikhatsi baphrofetha iminyakanyaka kutsi ngitawutfumela wena uyewumelana nabo.’ ”" 
Ezekiel38:18 “ ‘Naku-ke lokuyakwenteka ngalelo langa: Mzukwana Gogi ahlasela live laka-Israyeli, intfukutselo yami leshisako iyawuvuka, kusho iNkhosi Simakadze." 
Ezekiel38:19 Ngenshisekelo yami nangelulaka lwami loluvutsako, ngiyasho ngitsi: Ngalelo langa kuyawuba nalokukhulu kutamatama kwemhlaba eveni laka-Israyeli." 
Ezekiel38:20 Tinhlanti taselwandle, netinyoni tasemoyeni, netilwane tesiganga, nato tonkhe tilwanyakatana letinwabutelako emhlabatsini, nabo bonkhe bantfu labasebusweni bemhlaba, kuyawutfutfumela ebukhoneni bami. Tintsaba tiyawugumbuceleka, emawa ahhihlikele phansi, nato tonkhe tindvonga tiyawudzilikela emhlabatsini." 
Ezekiel38:21 Ngiyawumbitela inkemba Gogi, imelane naye kuto tonkhe tintsaba tami. Inkemba yalowo nalowo muntfu iyawumelana nemnakabo, kusho iNkhosi Simakadze." 
Ezekiel38:22 Ngiyawukhipha sigwebo sesifo lesibulalanako nesekucitseka kwengati; ngiyakwehlisela sihhuhhula semvula lenesangcotfo nesibabule lesivutsako etikwakhe nasetikwemabutfo akhe, nasetikwetive letinyenti letikanye naye." 
Ezekiel38:23 Ngiyawubukhombisa kanjalo-ke bukhulu bami nebungcwele bami, ngiyawutenta kutsi ngatiwe emehlweni etive letinyenti. Ngulapho-ke bayawungati khona kutsi mine nginguSimakadze.’ ”" 
Ezekiel39:1 “Ndvodzana yemuntfu, phrofetha umelane naGogi, utsi: ‘Naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, itsi: Ngimelene nawe Gogi, wena ndvuna lenkhulu yakaMesheki nakaThubali." 
Ezekiel39:2 Ngitakushayisa situngeletane ngikuhudvule. Ngiyawukususa enyakatfo lekhashane, ngikuyise kuyawumelana netintsaba taka-Israyeli." 
Ezekiel39:3 Ngiyawube-ke sengivitsita butjoki bakho esandleni sakho sangesancele, ngiyilahle phansi imicibisholo yakho lesesandleni sakho sangesekudla." 
Ezekiel39:4 Uyakuwa etintsabeni taka-Israyeli, wena kanye nawo onkhe emabutfo akho netive letikanye nawe. Ngiyawukwenta ube kudla kuto tonkhe tinhlobonhlobo tetinyoni letidla letinye tilwane, nasetilwaneni tesiganga." 
Ezekiel39:5 Uyawuwela phansi esigangeni kalashameshame, ngobe sengikhulumile, kusho iNkhosi Simakadze." 
Ezekiel39:6 Ngiyawutfumela umlilo kuMagogi, nakulabo labahlala bavikelekile emaveni lagudla lwandle, bayawukwati kutsi mine nginguSimakadze." 
Ezekiel39:7 “ ‘Libito lami lelingcwele ngiyawulenta latiwe emkhatsini wesive sami, ema-Israyeli. Yebo, Libito lami lelingcwele ngingeke ngisaliyekela lihlanjalatwe, netive tiyawukwati kutsi mine nginguSimakadze, Longcwele ka-Israyeli." 
Ezekiel39:8 Kuyeta! Nome kanjani kutakwenteka! Kusho iNkhosi Simakadze. Leli ngilo lilanga lengakhuluma ngalo. 
Ezekiel39:9 “ ‘Labo-ke labahlala emadolobheni aka-Israyeli bayawuphuma bayewubutsa tikhali lebetilahlwe ngemabutfo akho batewutibasa. Bayawubasa emahawu lamakhulu nalamancane, nebutjoki, nemicibisholo, netizeze, netikhali. Kuyawuba ngiminyaka lesikhombisa basebentisa tona ekubaseni umlilo." 
Ezekiel39:10 Abasayiwudzinga kutsi bayewutfota tinkhuni etigangeni, nome batikabhe emahlatsini, ngobe bayawusebentisa letikhali ekubaseni umlilo. Bayawuphanga labo labebaphangile, babemuke timphahla labo lababebemuke timphahla tabo, kusho iNkhosi Simakadze.’ ”" 
Ezekiel39:11 “ ‘Ngalelo langa ngiyawuniketa Gogi indzawo yekungcwatjwa ka-Israyeli, esigodzini salabo labahamba besuka emphumalanga babheke ngaselwandle. Lendzawo iyawuvimba indlela yetihambi, ngobe Gogi kanye nalo lonkhe lolucucaba lwakhe bayawungcwatjwa lapho. Ngako-ke seyiyawubitwa ngekutsi sigodzi sakaHamona Gogi." 
Ezekiel39:12 “ ‘Kuyawudzimate kuphele tinyanga letisikhombisa solomane indlu yaka-Israyeli ibangcwaba, kuze kuhlanteke lelive." 
Ezekiel39:13 Bonkhe bantfu belive bayawubangcwaba, futsi lelo langa lengiyawukhatimuliswa ngalo kuyawuba lilanga leliyawuba yincophamlandvo kubo, kusho iNkhosi Simakadze." 
Ezekiel39:14 “ ‘Kuyawukhetfwa emadvodza latsite kutsi ehle enyuke nalo lonkhe live ahambe angcwaba tonkhe tidvumbu latitfola tidzindzibele eveni, entele kuhlanta live. Kuyawutsi ekupheleni kwaletinyanga letisikhombisa acale kuphenya." 
Ezekiel39:15 Kuyawutsi ekuhambeni kwabo eveni lonkhe, ngulowo atsi nakakhandza litsambo lemuntfu afinye lifindvo eceleni kwalo, kuze kufike laba labangcwabako, balitsatse bayelingcwaba esigodzini sakaHamona Gogi." 
Ezekiel39:16 Lidolobha lekutsiwa yiHamona liyawuba khona lapho. Bayawulihlanta kanjalo-ke live.’ 
Ezekiel39:17 “Ndvodzana yemuntfu, naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, itsi: Bita tonkhe tinhlobo tetinyoni, nato tonkhe tilwane tesiganga, utsi: ‘Butsanani ndzawonye nonkhe nisuka kuyo yonkhe indzawo, nite edzilini lenginilungiselele lona, umhlatjelo lomkhulu etintsabeni taka-Israyeli. Lapho-ke niyawufike niniphite inyama, nibuye nehlise ngengati." 
Ezekiel39:18 Niyawudla inyama yemadvodza lanemandla, ninatse ingati yebabusi bemhlaba, kube shangatsi bekutimvu nemazinyane, timbuti netinkunzi, konkhe kutilwane letikhuluphalisiwe taseBhashani." 
Ezekiel39:19 Kulo lelidzili lenginilungisela lona, niyakudla emanoni nize ninafune, ninatse ingati nize nidzakwe." 
Ezekiel39:20 Edzilini lami niyawudla nize nidzabuke tisu yinyama yemahhashi neyebagibeli bawo, neyetingwazi letinemandla neyayo yonkhe inhlobo yetihlabani,’ kusho iNkhosi Simakadze.”" 
Ezekiel39:21 “Ngiyawubonakalisa bukhosi bami emkhatsini wetive, tonkhe tive tiyawusibona sijeziso sami kuto nesandla sami lengisibeka etikwato." 
Ezekiel39:22 Kusukela ngalelo langa kuye embili indlu yaka-Israyeli iyawungati kutsi mine nginguSimakadze Nkulunkulu wayo. 
Ezekiel39:23 Netive titakwati kutsi sive saka-Israyeli saya ekutfunjweni ngenca yetono taso, ngobe babengaketsembeki kimi. Ngako ngase ngiyabufihla buso bami kubo, ngabaniketa etandleni tetitsa tabo. Bonkhe bafa ngenkemba." 
Ezekiel39:24 Ngabaphatsa njengalokungcola kwabo, nanjengekona kwabo, ngabufihla buso bami kubo." 
Ezekiel39:25 “Ngako-ke naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, itsi: Manje sengitambuyisa Jakobe ekutfunjweni, ngibe nesihawu kubo bonkhe bantfu baka-Israyeli, ngiyawulishisekela Libito lami lelingcwele." 
Ezekiel39:26 Bayakulikhohlwa lihlazo labo nako konkhe kungetsembeki kwabo labakwenta kimi, ngesikhatsi basahleti eveni labo bavikelekile, kute namunye labengabesabisa." 
Ezekiel39:27 Nase ngibabuyisile etiveni sengibabutsile emaveni etitsa tabo, ngiyawubonakalisa bungcwele bami ngabo, emehlweni ato tonkhe tive." 
Ezekiel39:28 Lapho-ke bayawube sebayati kutsi mine nginguSimakadze longuNkulunkulu wabo, ngobe nome ngabayisa ekutfunjweni emkhatsini wetive, ngiyawuphindze ngibabutsisele eveni lelingelabo, ngingashiyi namunye ngemuva." 
Ezekiel39:29 Angisayikubufihla buso bami kubo, ngobe ngiyawutfululela Moya wami kuyo indlu yaka-Israyeli, kusho iNkhosi Simakadze.”" 
Ezekiel40:1 Kwatsi ngemnyaka wema-25 sitfunjiwe, ekucaleni nje kwemnyaka, tilishumi enyangeni, ngemnyaka weli-14 emvakwekuwa kweJerusalema, ngalona lelo langa nje sandla saSimakadze sasisetikwami, wangitsatsa wangiyisa khona." 
Ezekiel40:2 Emibonweni yaNkulunkulu wangitsatsa wangiyisa eveni laka-Israyeli, wafike wangimisa entsabeni lephakeme kakhulu, lekwatsi ngaseningizimu kwayo kwakunetindlu letatibukeka shangatsi ngulelikhulu lidolobha." 
Ezekiel40:3 Wangiyisa khona, ngafike ngabona indvodza leyayibukeka njengelitfusi; yayime esangweni inelucotfo lwelineni nendvuku yekulinganisa esandleni sayo." 
Ezekiel40:4 Lendvodza yakhuluma kimi, yatsi: “Ndvodzana yemuntfu, buka ngemehlo akho uve ngetindlebe takho, ulalelisise konkhe lengitakukukhombisa kona, ngobe nguloko lokungukona ukuletselwe lapha. Tjela indlu yaka-Israyeli konkhe loku lokubonako.”" 
Ezekiel40:5 Ngabona lubondza lolutungelete yonkhe lendzawo yelithempeli. Budze balendvuku yekulinganisa leyayisesandleni salendvodza babungemamitha labengaba matsatfu, wakala lolubondza. Lwalungemamitha labengaba matsatfu kuphakama, nemamitha labengaba matsatfu bucinsi balo." 
Ezekiel40:6 Wase uya ngasendlini yelisango lelibheke ngasemphumalanga. Wakhuphuka titebhisi talo, wase ukala lobubanti bemphundvu yelisango, babungemamitha labengaba matsatfu." 
Ezekiel40:7 Ngale kwemphundvu yelisango kwakunemhubhe lowawunemakamelo abogadzi lamatsatfu ngala nangala kwawo, likamelo lilinye lalisikwele lesimacala angemamitha labengaba matsatfu lilinye, letibondza letisemkhatsini wawo tatingemamitha labengaba mabili nesigamu bucinsi bato. Ngale kwalamakamelo abogadzi, kwakunalenye imphundvu yelisango leyayingemamitha labengaba matsatfu bubanti leyayingena emhubheni lowawubukene nelithempeli." 
Ezekiel40:8 Wase ukala umhubhe welisango; 
Ezekiel40:9 wawungemamitha labengaba mane bubanti, tibondza tawo tatingaba limitha linye bucinsi. Lomhubhe walendlu yelisango wawubukene nelithempeli." 
Ezekiel40:10 Ngekhatsi kwalendlu yelisango langasemphumalanga kwakunemakamelo lamatsatfu luhlangotsi lulunye, omatsatfu abelingana ngebukhulu, naletibondza kuwo onkhe emacala awo tatilingana." 
Ezekiel40:11 Lendvodza yase ilinganisa bubanti basekungeneni kwalelisango; babungemamitha labengaba sihlanu, bese kutsi budze bonkhe balo bube ngemamitha labengaba sitfupha nesigamu." 
Ezekiel40:12 Embikwalelo nalelo kamelo labogadzi kwakunelubondza lolufishatane lolwalungaba sigamu selimitha kuphakama, nesigamu selimitha bucinsi balo, lamakamelo abesikwele lesingemamitha labengaba matsatfu." 
Ezekiel40:13 Lendvodza yase ilinganisa bubanti balendlu yelisango, kusuka etulu elubondzeni lolungemuva kwelikamelo linye kuya etulu elubondzeni lolungemuva lwalelinye likamelo lelicondzene nalo lelimshiya ngaloya kwemhubhe wangekhatsi; yatfola kutsi babungemamitha labengaba li-12 nesigamu." 
Ezekiel40:14 Lendvodza yakala kugudla lingembili letibonza, letiphume taphondla kutungeleta lingekhatsi lendlu yelisango, kwakungemamitha labengaba ngema-30. Lesilinganiso sasifikela kulomhubhe lowawubukene nesibuya." 
Ezekiel40:15 Sebubonkhe budze balendlu yelisango kusukela elubondzeni lolungephandle ngasekungeneni kwalelisango kuya ekugcineni kwalomhubhe wekugcina, babungemamitha labengaba ngema-25." 
Ezekiel40:16 Bekunemafasitelo lamancane kulolubondza lolungephandle lwalamakamelo abogadzi nakuleti letatisemkhatsini walamakamelo kanye nakulomhubhe yonkhe indzawo. Bekunetihlahla temasundvu letaticoshwe kuletibondza letingekhatsi letatibheke kulomhubhe wangekhatsi. 
Ezekiel40:17 Lendvodza yase ingimikisa esibuyeni lesasingephandle. Nalapho ngafike ngabona emakamelo nesiyilo lesasakhiwe kuso sonkhe lesibuya kusitungeleta; kwakunemakamelo langema-30 kulesibuya, embikwawo kwakunelibala lelaliyilwe ngematje." 
Ezekiel40:18 Lesiyilo sasiseceleni kwaletindlu temasango, bubanti baso babulingene nebudze baletindlu temasango. Lesi kwakusiyilo lesasingentansi." 
Ezekiel40:19 Kwakunendlu yelisango leyayingenhla iphumela kuso sibuya sangekhatsi. Lendvodza yase ilinganisa budze kusukela ekugcineni kwalendlu yelisango kuya ekungeneni kwalena lenye, kwakungemamitha labengaba ngema-50." 
Ezekiel40:20 Lendvodza yase ilinganisa budze nebubanti bendlu yelisango langasenyakatfo leyayiphumela esibuyeni lesingephandle. 
Ezekiel40:21 Emakamelo ayo abogadzi, omatsatfu ngalapha nangalapha kwemhube wangekhatsi, netibondza letatisemkhatsini wawo, kanye nalomhubhe lobukene nesibuya, konkhe bekulingana nekwelisango langasemphumalanga. Sebubonkhe budze balendlu yelisango babungemamitha labengaba ngema-25, nebubanti bayo bungemamitha labengaba li-12 nesigamu." 
Ezekiel40:22 Umhubhe wayo lobukene nesibuya, nemafasitelo ayo, netihlahla temasundvu letaticoshwe kuyo, konkhe kwakufanana tjika nalokwa kwendlu yelisango langasemphumalanga. Lapha titebhisi letisikhombisa tatikhuphukela emnyango walelisango, lomhubhe wayo wawusekugcineni, ubuke lesibuya." 
Ezekiel40:23 Mshiya ngaloya kwalesibuya, kusuka kulendlu yelisango langasenyakatfo kwakunalenye indlu yelisango leyayiphumela kulesibuya sangekhatsi, njengasemphumalanga. Lendvodza yase ikala budze emkhatsini waletindlu temasango omabili, yakhandza kutsi bungemamitha labengaba ngema-50." 
Ezekiel40:24 Lendvodza yase ingiyisa ngaseluhlangotsini lwangaseningizimu, nalapho sabona lenye indlu yelisango. Yakala tibondza tayo nemhubhe wayo lobukene nesibuya, konkhe kwakufanana tjika naloku lokunye." 
Ezekiel40:25 Lendlu yelisango, nemhubhe wayo, kwakunemafasitelo yonkhe indzawo, njengakuleta letinye. Sebubonkhe budze balendlu yelisango babungemamitha labengaba ngema-25, bubanti bayo bungemamitha labengaba li-12 nesigamu." 
Ezekiel40:26 Kwakunetitebhisi letisikhombisa letatikhuphukela kuyo, umhubhe wakhona nawo wawusekugcineni ubuke kulesibuya. Nakhona kwakunetihlahla temasundvu letaticoshwe kuletibondza letatibheke kulomhubhe wangekhatsi." 
Ezekiel40:27 Nakhona lapha kwakunendlu yelisango leyayiphumela kulesibuya sangekhatsi. Lendvodza yase ikala budze kusuka kulelisango kuya kulelisango langaphandle ngaseningizimu, yakhandza kutsi bungemamitha labengaba ngema-50." 
Ezekiel40:28 Lendvodza yangitsatsa yangidzabulisa indlu yelisango langaseningizimu, yaya nami kulesibuya sangekhatsi. Yayikala lendlu yelisango, yakhandza kutsi iyafanana naleti letinye letatikulolubondza lwangephandle." 
Ezekiel40:29 Emakamelo ayo abogadzi, netibondza tayo tangekhatsi kanye nalomhubhe wayo kwakulingana nekwaleti letinye. Lendlu yelisango nalomhubhe wayo kwakunemafasitelo yonkhe indzawo. Yayingemamitha labengaba ngema-25 budze, nemamitha labengaba li-12 nesigamu bubanti." 
Ezekiel40:30 Imihubhe yaletindlu temasango letatitungeleta sibuya sangekhatsi yayingemamitha labengaba li-12 nesigamu budze, nemamitha labengaba mabili nesigamu bubanti." 
Ezekiel40:31 Umhubhe walendlu yelisango langaseningizimu wawukulesibuya sangephandle; tihlahla temasundvu taticoshwe kuletibondza tayo tangekhatsi. Kwakunetitebhisi letisiphohlongo letatikhuphukela ekungeneni kwelisango. 
Ezekiel40:32 Lendvodza yangidzabulisa indlu yalelisango langasemphumalanga, yangingenisa esibuyeni sangekhatsi. Yayikala lendlu yelisango, yakhandza kutsi ilingana tjika naleti letinye." 
Ezekiel40:33 Emakamelo ayo abogadzi netibondza tayo tangekhatsi kanye nalomhubhe wayo kwakulingana ncamashi nekwaleti letinye. Lendlu yelisango nalomhubhe wayo kwakunemafasitelo yonkhe indzawo. Sebubonkhe budze bayo babungemamitha labengaba ngema-25, nebubanti bayo babungemamitha labengaba li-12 nesigamu." 
Ezekiel40:34 Lomhubhe wayo wawubheke esibuyeni sangephandle. Kwakucoshwe tihlahla temasundvu kuletibondza tayo tangekhatsi emaceleni omabili. Kwakunetitebhisi letisiphohlongo letatikhuphukela ekungeneni kwelisango. 
Ezekiel40:35 Lendvodza yase ingiyisa endlini yelisango langasenyakatfo. Yayikala, yakhandza kutsi ilingana tjika naleti letinye." 
Ezekiel40:36 Njengato nayo yayinemakamelo abogadzi, netibondza tangekhatsi, nemhubhe lobukene nesibuya, nemafasitelo yonkhe indzawo. Sebubonkhe budze bayo babungemamitha labengaba ngema-25, nebubanti bayo babungemamitha labengaba li-12 nesigamu."
