Daniel6:12 Ngako ahamba aya enkhosini, afike akhuluma kuyo ngalesimemetelo sayo sebukhosi, atsi: “Awuzange yini ukhiphe umtsetfosimemetelo kutsi kulamalanga langema-30 letako umuntfu lothandaza kunome ngumuphi nkulunkulu nome umuntfu ngaphandle kwakho, nkhosi, utawujikijelwa emgodzini wemabhubesi?” Inkhosi yaphendvula, yatsi: “Lesimemetelo simile njengekwemitsetfo yemaMede nemaPheresiya, lengeke iguculwe ngumuntfu.”" 
Daniel6:13 Base bakhuluma enkhosini, batsi: “Danyela, longulomunye webatfunjwa bakaJuda, akakunaki wena, nkhosi, nalesimemetelo sakho lowasibhala phansi akasishayi mkhuba. Usathandaza katsatfu ngelilanga.”" 
Daniel6:14 Inkhosi yatsi kube ikuve loko, yakhatsateka kakhulu, yetama konkhe lokwakusemandleni ayo kutsi imsindzise Danyela kwadzimate kwashona lilanga." 
Daniel6:15 Lamadvodza abutsana aba sicumbi aya enkhosini, afike atsi: “Khumbula, Silosikhulu, kutsi ngekwemtsetfo wemaMede nemaPheresiya kute simemetelo nome umtsetfo lokhishwa yinkhosi longabuye uguculwe ngumuntfu.”" 
Daniel6:16 Ngako inkhosi yatfumela livi, kwalandvwa Danyela, wajikijelwa emgodzini wemabhubesi. Inkhosi yakhuluma kuDanyela, yatsi: “Shangatsi Nkulunkulu wakho, lomkhonta njalonjalo, angakulamlela!”" 
Daniel6:17 Kwaletfwa litje, labekwa emnyango walomgodzi wemabhubesi, inkhosi yalivalisisa ngekubeka luphawu ngendandatho yayo kanye nangetindandatho tetiphatsimandla tayo, kuze kutsi loko lokuncunyiwe ngaDanyela kungaguculwa." 
Daniel6:18 Inkhosi yase iyancandzeka ibuyela esigodlweni sayo, busuku bonkhe yayihleti ingadli lutfo, akuzange kuletfwe ngisho nentfo yekuyijabulisa embikwayo. Ayizange ilale." 
Daniel6:19 Kwatsi nakudzabuka kusa, inkhosi yavuka yaphutfuma emgodzini wemabhubesi." 
Daniel6:20 Yatsi kube ifike edvute nemgodzi wemabhubesi, yamemeta Danyela ngeliphimbo lelidzabukile, yatsi: “Danyela, nceku yaNkulukulu lophilako, loNkulunkulu wakho, lomkhonta njalonjalo, ukhonile yini kukulamlela emabhubesini?”" 
Daniel6:21 Danyela waphendvula watsi: “Lunwele loludze, nkhosi!" 
Daniel6:22 Nkulunkulu wami utfumele ingilosi yakhe, lefike yavala imilomo yemabhubesi. Akangilimati, ngobe ngitfolakele ngite licala emehlweni akhe, kantsi nakuwe, nkhosi, kute lengikonile.”" 
Daniel6:23 Inkhosi yajabula kakhulu, yatfumela kutsi kuyewukhishwa Danyela emgodzini wemabhubesi. Danyela watsi nasakhishwe emgodzini wemabhubesi, kwangete kwatfolakala ngisho nemyocu emtimbeni wakhe, ngobe abemetsembile Nkulunkulu wakhe." 
Daniel6:24 Inkhosi yakhipha umyalo, kwaletfwa kuyo onkhe lamadvodza labebeke Danyela licala ngekumcalela emanga, ajikijelwa emgodzini wemabhubesi, wona, nabomkawo, kanye nebantfwabawo. Emabhubesi atseleka etikwabo, abadzabudzabula abacedza bangakefiki ngisho nasesiyilweni salomgodzi wemabhubesi, ababhasha ngisho nematsambo abo." 
Daniel6:25 Inkhosi Dariyusi yabhalela bonkhe bantfu, netive, nebantfu bato tonkhe tilwimi emhlabeni wonkhe jikelele, yatsi: “Nginifisela inchubekela embili!" 
Daniel6:26 “Ngikhipha umtsetfosimemetelo kutsi kuyo yonkhe indzawo lelapha embusweni wami bantfu kufanele bamesabe babuye bamhloniphe Nkulunkulu waDanyela. “Ngobe unguNkulunkulu lophilako, futsi uyawuhlala akhona phakadze naphakadze; umbuso wakhe ungeke ubhujiswe, yebo, umbuso wakhe ungeke uphele." 
Daniel6:27 Uyalamulelana abuye asindzise; wenta tibonakaliso netimangaliso emazulwini kanye nasemhlabeni. Ulamulele Danyela emandleni emabhubesi.” 
Daniel6:28 Ngako Danyela waphumelela ngesikhatsi sekubusa kwaDariyusi nangesikhatsi sekubusa kwaKhuresi, umPheresiya." 
Daniel7:1 Kwatsi ngemnyaka wekucala waBhelshasari, inkhosi yaseBhabhulona, Danyela wabhudza liphupho, kwendlula imibono engcondvweni yakhe aselele embhedzeni wakhe ngalobo busuku. Walibhala phansi leliphupho alandzisa lobekucuketfwe ngilo leliphupho." 
Daniel7:2 Danyela watsi: “Embonweni wami ebusuku, ngabona embikwami kwakunemimoya yomine yasezulwini, ivumbuka elwandle lolukhulu." 
Daniel7:3 Kwakhuphuka letikhulu tilo letine, nguleso sehlukile kulesinye, taphuma elwandle." 
Daniel7:4 “Sekucala sasinjengelibhubesi, futsi sasinetimphiko telusweti: Ngabukisisa, taze timphiko taso tahleshulwa, lesilo saphakanyiswa emhlabatsini kuze sime ngetinyawo taso letimbili njengemuntfu, sase sinikwa inhlitiyo yemuntfu." 
Daniel7:5 “Ngatsi ngisabukile, naku embikwami sekume lesinye silo sesibili, sona-ke sasinjengelibhele. Saphakanyiswa ngalomunye wemihlubulo yaso, sasinetimbambo letintsatfu emlonyeni waso emkhatsini wematinyo aso, satjelwa kwatsiwa: ‘Vuka, udle, wesutse inyama.’" 
Daniel7:6 “Emvakwaloko, ngatsi ngiyabuka, ngabona embikwami lesinye futsi silo, sona-ke sasifanana nengwe. Lapha emhlane waso sasinetimphiko letine letinjengetenyoni. Lesilo sasinetinhloko letine, sanikwa emandla ekubusa." 
Daniel7:7 “Emvakwaloko, embonweni wami ebusuku ngabuka, ngabona embikwami lesinye futsi silo sesine, sasesabeka, setfusana kakhulu futsi sinemandla lamakhulu. Sasinetimbabela tematinyo ensimbi, sasikufihlita sikushwabudzele loko lesikubambile sigcobagcobe loku lokwakusele kwako ngetinselo taso. Sasehlukile kuto tonkhe leta takucala tilo, futsi sasinetimphondvo letilishumi." 
Daniel7:8 “Ngatsi ngisacabanga ngaletimphondvo, ngase ngibona sekunalolunye luphondvo embikwami, luluncane, lolwamila nje emkhatsini wato; kwatsi letintsatfu taleta tekucala timphondvo tazuphuneka embikwalo. Lolu-ke luphonjwana lwase lunemehlo lanjengewemuntfu, nemlomo lowawukhuluma ngekutigabatisa.”" 
Daniel7:9 “Ngatsi ngisabukile, tihlalo tebukhosi tabekwa ngabolonina, Lophila Phakadze Naphakadze wahlala kusakhe. Tembatfo takhe tatimhlophe njengangcocwane; tinwele tenhloko yakhe tatimhlophe njengeboya betimvu. Sihlalo sakhe sebukhosi sasivutsa emalangabi, nemasondvo aso onkhe abelavuka emalangabi." 
Daniel7:10 Kwakugeleta umfula wemlilo, siyalu sawo sicubuka embikwakhe. Tinkhulungwane tetinkhulungwane tatimsingatsile. Tinkhulungwane letilishumi tiphindvwe katinkhulungwane letilishumi tatime embikwakhe. Behluleli bahlala phansi. Tincwadzi tavulwa." 
Daniel7:11 “Ngachubeka ngabukisisa ngenca yekuhlokoma kwemavi ekutigabatisa lakhulunywa luphondvo. Ngangibukisisile saze sahlatjwa lesilo, umtimba waso wabhujiswa, wajikwa emlilweni lovutsa emalangabi." 
Daniel7:12 Nato leti letinye tilo temukwa emandla ato ekubusa, kodvwa tavunyelwa kuphila sikhashana." 
Daniel7:13 “Embonweni wami wasebusuku, ngabona embikwami kwakume umuntfu labenjengendvodzana yemuntfu, abehla ngemafu asezulwini. Wasondzela kuloLophila Phakadze Naphakadze, waholeleka ebukhoneni bakhe." 
Daniel7:14 Wanikwa emandla ekubusa, nenkhatimulo, nebukhosi. Bonkhe bantfu, netive, nebantfu bato tonkhe tilwimi bakhotsama kuye bamkhonta. Kubusa kwakhe kukubusa kwaphakadze naphakadze lokungasoze kwaphela, nembuso wakhe ngulowo longasoze wacitfwa.”" 
Daniel7:15 “Mine Danyela ngakhatsateka emoyeni wami, nalemibono leyendlula engcondvweni yami yangiphatamisa emphefumulweni." 
Daniel7:16 Ngasondzela ngakulomunye walabo lababeme lapho, ngambuta liciniso lako konkhe loku. “Ngako wase uyangitjela, wangichazela kahle nekutsi kusho kutsini konkhe loku:" 
Daniel7:17 ‘Letilo letine tingimibuso lemine leyawuba khona emhlabeni. 
Daniel7:18 Kodvwa labangcwele balowo Longetulu Kwako Konkhe bayawunikwa umbuso loyawuba ngewabo phakadze naphakadze, yebo, waphakadze naphakadze.’" 
Daniel7:19 “Ngase ngifuna kutfolisisa kahle ngalesilokati sesine kutsi sasisho kutsini, ngobe sona sasehlukile kuto tonkhe leti letinye, sesabeka kakhulu ngalamatinyo aso etinsimbi, netidladla telitfusi, silo lesasikufihlita sikushwabudzele loko lesikubambile, sigcobagcobe loko lokwakusele kwako ngetinselo taso." 
Daniel7:20 Ngabuta futsi nangaletimphondvo letatilishumi letatisenhloko yaso, nangalolu lolunye luphonjwana lolwase luyamila, lapho kwatsi letintsatfu takucala tase tiyahhohloka embikwalo, loluphondvo lwalunemehlo nemlomo lowawukhuluma ngekutigabatisa kantsi lwalubukeka lwengama leti letinye." 
Daniel7:21 Kwatsi ngisabuka, loluphondvo lwaphekehla imphi yekutsi kuliwe nalabangcwele, futsi lwabehlula," 
Daniel7:22 kwadzimate kwefika loLophila Phakadze Naphakadze, wakhipha sigwebo avikela labangcwele bakhe Longetulu Kwako Konkhe, kwase kufika sikhatsi lapho batsatsa khona umbuso waba ngewabo." 
Daniel7:23 “Wase utsi: ‘Lesilo sesine ngumbuso wesine loyawuvela emhlabeni. Uyawukwehluka kuyo yonkhe leminye imibuso, futsi uyawushwabudzela wonkhe umhlaba, uwugcobagcobe phansi uwufihlite." 
Daniel7:24 Letimphondvo letilishumi ngemakhosi lalishumi layawuvela kulombuso. Emvakwawo kuyawuvela lenye inkhosi leyakwehluka kulawa lamanye akucala; iyawutfobisa emakhosi lamatsatfu. 
Daniel7:25 Iyawukhuluma ihlambalate Longetulu Kwako Konkhe, icindzetele labangcwele bakhe, yetame kugucula tikhatsi temikhosi lemisiwe nemitsetfo. Labangcwele bayawunikelwa kuyo kube sikhashana, netikhatsi, nencenye yesikhatsi." 
Daniel7:26 “ ‘Kodvwa behluleli bayawuhlala, lenkhosi iyakwemukwa emandla ayo ekubusa, icitfwe kokuphela." 
Daniel7:27 Lapho-ke kubusa, nemandla, nebukhulu bemibuso yonkhe lengaphansi kwelizulu, kuyawunikelwa etandleni talabangcwele, sive saLongetulu Kwako Konkhe. Umbuso wakhe kuyawuba ngumbuso waphakadze naphakadze, bonkhe babusi bayawukhotsama kuye bamkhonte, bamlalele.’" 
Daniel7:28 “Loku-ke kuphela kwendzaba yonkhe. Mine Danyela, ngakhatsateka kakhulu ngimicabango yami, buso bami baze baphaphatseka, kodvwa lendzaba yaba sifuba sami ngedvwa.”" 
Daniel8:1 Ngemnyaka wesitsatfu wekubusa kwenkhosi Bhelshasari, mine Danyela ngabona umbono, ngemvakwalowo lowase ubonakele kimi." 
Daniel8:2 Embonweni wami ngatibona mine ngisenqabeni yaseSusa esifundzeni sase-Elamu; kulombono ngangiseceleni kwemfula, i-Ulayi." 
Daniel8:3 Ngatsi ngiphakamisa emehlo, ngabona embikwami kunesihhanca sinetimphondvo letimbili, sime eceleni kwalomfula, letimphondvo tatitindze. Lolunye lwaletimphondvo lwaluludze kunalolu lolunye, kodvwa lwamila kamuva." 
Daniel8:4 Ngasibuka lesihhanca sisahlasela sibheke ngasenshonalanga, nangasenyakatfo, nangaseningizimu. Kute ngisho nasinye silwane lesasingemelana naso, kute nalokwakungalanyulelwa emandleni aso, sasijangaza nje senta lesikutsandzako, saze saba sikhulu kakhulu." 
Daniel8:5 Ngatsi ngisacabanga ngaloku, kwachamuka siphongo sineluphondvo lolugcamile emkhatsini wemehlo aso, sachamuka ngasenshonalanga sadzabula wonkhe umhlaba, sagijima singakaze sawutsintsa umhlabatsi." 
Daniel8:6 Sasondzela ngakulesihhanca lesinetimphondvo letimbili lengangisibone sime eceleni kwemfula, sasukela lesihhanca sasishishimeta ngelulaka lolumatima kabi." 
Daniel8:7 Ngasibona sihlasela lesihhanca kabuhlungu kabi, sagadla lesihhanca safohlota letimphondvo taso letimbili. Lesihhanca sona sasingenamandla ekutivikela kulesiphongo, lesiphongo sasihlaba sasijika phansi, sasigcobagcoba ngemasondvo aso, kwabate ngisho namunye labengasilamlela lesihhanca emandleni alesiphongo." 
Daniel8:8 Lesiphongo satikhukhumukisa saba sikhulu kakhulu, kodvwa kwatsi lapho sesinemandla, lwephuka loluphondvo lwaso lolukhulu, kwatsi esikhundleni salo kwamila timphondvo letine letigcamile, takhula taya etulu emimoyeni yomine yelizulu." 
Daniel8:9 Kwatsi kulolunye lwato kwamila lolunye luphondvo, lolwacala luluncane, kodvwa lwakhula ngemandla kuya ngaseningizimu, nangasemphumalanga, nangaseveni lelihle." 
Daniel8:10 Lwakhula lwadzimate lwefikela nasemabutfweni lasemazulwini, lwajikijela phansi emhlabeni letinye tetinkhanyeti, lwatigcobagcoba." 
Daniel8:11 Lwatikhulisa lona kutsi lube lukhulu lube ngangembusi walamabutfo, lwasusa imihlatjelo yemalanga onkhe kuye, nendzawo yakhe lengcwele yehliselwa phansi." 
Daniel8:12 Ngenca yebuphekula, libandla lalabangcwele nemihlatjelo yemalanga onkhe kwaniketelwa kulo. Lwachubeka lwaba nemphumelelo kuko konkhe lolwalukwenta, liciniso lase lidzicelwa phansi emhlabatsini." 
Daniel8:13 Ngase ngiva longcwele akhuluma, nalomunye longcwele wakhuluma kuye, watsi: “Kutawutsatsa sikhatsi lesidze kangakanani kuze kugcwaliseke lombono, umbono lomacondzana nemihlatjelo yemalanga onkhe nalobuphekula lobubanga incitsakalo, namacondzana nekunikelwa kwendzawo lengcwele nekwelibutfo lasezulwini lelitawugcotjwagcotjwa ngetinyawo?”" 
Daniel8:14 Watsi kimi: “Kuyawutsatsa tikhatsi tekuhlwa netekusa letiti-2 300. Ngulapho-ke lithempeli liyawuhlanjululwa kabusha khona.” 
Daniel8:15 Ngatsi mine Danyela ngisabukisisa umbono, ngetama kuwuvisisa kahle, ngabona sekume embikwami lokwakunjengemuntfu ngesimo." 
Daniel8:16 Ngeva livi lemuntfu lichamuka ngase-Ulayi limemeta litsi: “Gabriyeli, tjela lomuntfu inchazelo yalombono.”" 
Daniel8:17 Watsi asasondzela kulendzawo lapho ngangime khona, ngesaba kakhulu ngawa phansi ngebuso. Watsi kimi: “Ndvodzana yemuntfu, visisa kahle kutsi lombono umacondzana nesikhatsi sekugcina.”" 
Daniel8:18 Watsi asakhuluma nami, ngabe sengikulobukhulu butfongo, buso bami bubheke phansi. Wase uyangitsintsa ngesandla, wangisukumisa, ngema ngetinyawo tami." 
Daniel8:19 Watsi: “Ngitakutjela kutsi kutakwentekani kamuva, ngesikhatsi selulaka, ngobe lombono umacondzana nesikhatsi sekugcina lesimisiwe." 
Daniel8:20 Lesihhanca losibonile lesinetimphondvo letimbili, simele emakhosi aseMediya newasePheresiya." 
Daniel8:21 Lesiyephuyephu sesiphongo siyinkhosi yaseGrisi, naloluphondvo lolukhulukati lolusemkhatsini wemehlo aso, yinkhosi yekucala." 
Daniel8:22 Letimphondvo letine letamila esikhundleni salolwa lolwephulwa, timele imibuso lemine leyawuvela kuleso sive, kodvwa ingeke ibe nemandla lafananako." 
Daniel8:23 “Kuyawutsi ngasekupheleni kwekubusa kwayo, lapho buphekula sebubunyenti ngalokuphelele, kuyawuvela inkhosi lenebuso lobulukhuni, inkhosi yemanga yekwakha emacebo." 
Daniel8:24 Iyawuba nemandla kakhulu, kodvwa hhayi ngekwemandla ayo. Iyawukwenta umonakalo lowesabekako, iphumelele kuko konkhe leyikwentako. Iyawubhubhisa emadvodza lanemandla lamakhulu nesive lesingcwele." 
Daniel8:25 Iyawuphumelelisa lokungemanga, ititsatse ngekutsi yona ingulongetulu. Bayawutsi nasebativela kutsi bavikelekile, ibabhubhise linyenti labo, imelane nembusi webaphatsi. Noko yona iyawubhujiswa, kodvwa hhayi ngemandla ebantfu." 
Daniel8:26 “Lombono wemihlatjelo yasebusuku neyasekuseni lowukhonjisiwe uliciniso, kodvwa uwugcine usifuba sakho, ngobe wona umacondzana netikhatsi tekugcina.”" 
Daniel8:27 Mine Danyela ngaphela emandla, ngalala ngigula emalanga lamanyenti. Ngase ngiyavuka ngachubeka nemsebenti wenkhosi. Ngangimangaliswe ngulombono, futsi wawungetulu kwengcondvo yemuntfu." 
Daniel9:1 Ngemnyaka wekucala waDariyusi, umsa wa-Ahashiveroshi, umMede ngekutalwa, lowabekwa waba yinkhosi etikwembuso waseBhabhulona," 
Daniel9:2 ngemnyaka wakhe wekucala abekiwe, mine Danyela ngafundza ngeva kahle emiBhalweni njengekwelivi laSimakadze kuJeremiya, umphrofethi, kutsi kubhidlitwa kweJerusalema kuyawutsatsa iminyaka lengema-70, lapho iyawusala khona ikhala libhungane." 
Daniel9:3 Ngako ngagucukela kuSimakadze longuNkulunkulu ngamncenga ngemthandazo nangekuncusa ngizila kudla, ngembatse emasaka, ngatitsela ngemlotsa." 
Daniel9:4 Ngathandaza kuSimakadze Nkulunkulu wami ngivuma tono ngitsi: “Awu Simakadze, wena unguNkulunkulu lomkhulu nalowesabekako, logcina sivumelwane sakhe nelutsandvo kubo bonkhe labamtsandzako bente imiyalo yakhe," 
Daniel9:5 sonile kuwe senta lokubi. Besibabi kakhulu, futsi sakuvukela; siphambukile sashiya imiyalo yakho nemitsetfo yakho." 
Daniel9:6 Asikatilaleli tinceku takho baphrofethi, lababekhuluma egameni lakho, kuwo emakhosi etfu, nakubabusi betfu, nakubobabemkhulu, nakubo bonkhe bantfu belive." 
Daniel9:7 “Simakadze, wena ulungile, kodvwa lamuhla nje sesitseleke ngelihlazo, bantfu bakaJuda netakhamiti taseJerusalema, nawo onkhe ema-Israyeli, yebo, labasedvute nalabakhashane kuwo onkhe emave, lapho usisakatele khona ngenca yekungetsembeki kwetfu kuwe." 
Daniel9:8 Awu Simakadze, tsine nemakhosi etfu, nebabusi betfu, nabobabemkhulu, sitseleke ngelihlazo nendlisamahloni, ngobe sonile kuwe." 
Daniel9:9 Simakadze Nkulunkulu wetfu unemusa nekutsetselela, nome nje sihlubukile kuye;" 
Daniel9:10 asikalilaleli livi laSimakadze Nkulunkulu wetfu, futsi asikayigcini imitsetfo lasinika yona ngetinceku takhe baphrofethi." 
Daniel9:11 Wonkhe Israyeli uwephulile umtsetfo wakho, weduka wala kulalela livi lakho. “Ngako-ke ticalekiso letibhalwe emtsetfweni waMosi, inceku yaNkulunkulu, setitfululelwe etikwetfu ngenca yekona kwetfu kuwe." 
Daniel9:12 Uwagcwalisile emavi akho lowawakhuluma ngatsi nangebabusi betfu, uwagcwalise ngekwehlisela inhlekelele lenkhulu etikwetfu. Kute nakunye lokwake kwenteka ngaphansi kwelizulu lokunjengaloku lokwenteke kuyo iJerusalema." 
Daniel9:13 Njengobe kubhaliwe emtsetfweni waMosi, yonkhe lenhlekelele yehlele etikwetfu, kodvwa tsine sisengakabufunisisi buso baSimakadze Nkulunkulu wetfu, ngekutsi siphendvuke etonweni tetfu, sinakekele ngekucophelela liciniso lakho." 
Daniel9:14 Simakadze akazange angabate kwehlisela lenhlekelele etikwetfu, ngobe Simakadze Nkulunkulu wetfu ulungile kuko konkhe lakwentako; noko tsine asikalilaleli livi lakhe." 
Daniel9:15 “Manje-ke, awu Simakadze, Nkulunkulu wetfu, wena lowakhipha sive sakho eveni laseGibhithe, ngesandla sakho lesinemandla, wena watakhela Libito lelihle, lelema kwadzimate kwaba ngulamuhla, sonile sente lokubi." 
Daniel9:16 Awu Simakadze, ngako konkhe kulunga kwakho mane ugucule intfukutselo yakho nelulaka lwakho kuyo iJerusalema, lidolobha lakho, leliyintsaba yakho lengcwele. Tono tetfu nekona kwabobabe sekwente iJerusalema nesive sakho kwaba lihlazo kubo bonkhe labakhelene natsi." 
Daniel9:17 “Manje-ke Nkulunkulu wetfu, vani umthandazo nekuncusa kwenceku yakho. Ngenca yakho nje, Simakadze, mane ubuke ngesihawu lithempeli lakho lese libhidlitiwe." 
Daniel9:18 Awu Nkulunkulu wami, mane ubeke indlebe, uve, vula emehlo akho ubone kubhidlitwa kwetfu nekwelidolobha lelibitwa ngeLibito lakho. Asiletsi kuncusa kwetfu kuwe, ngobe tsine silungile, kodvwa kungenca yemusa wakho lomkhulu." 
Daniel9:19 Awu Simakadze, lalela! Awu Simakadze, tsetselela! Awu Simakadze, vani, wente! Awu, Nkulunkulu wami, ngenca yakho mane ungete wabina, ngobe lidolobha lakho nesive sakho kubitwa ngeLibito lakho.”" 
Daniel9:20 Ngatsi ngisakhuluma ngithandaza, ngivuma tono tami netono tesive sema-Israyeli akitsi, ngiletsa kuncusa kwami kuSimakadze Nkulunkulu wami ngentsaba yakhe lengcwele," 
Daniel9:21 ngatsi ngisesemthandazweni, kwefika Gabriyeli, leyo ndvodza lengangiyibone embonweni wakucala, wefika kimi njengembane, ngesikhatsi semnikelo wakusihlwa." 
Daniel9:22 Wangitjela watsi: “Danyela, nyalo sengitele kutekukhutsata kutsi ubone futsi ucondzisise." 
Daniel9:23 Watsi nje ucala kuthandaza, wanikwa imphendvulo, lengitekutjela yona, ngobe utsandzekile. Ngako visisa lelivi, uwucondzisise lombono:" 
Daniel9:24 “Tikhatsi letingema-70 timiselwe bantfu bakini, nelidolobha lakini kutsi bayekele kona nekwephula imitsetfo, bacedze tono, bahlawulele bubi, bangenise kulunga kwaphakadze, kuciniselwe umbono netiphrofetho, kugcotjwe lowo Longcwelengcwele." 
Daniel9:25 “Yati loku ukucondzisise: Kusukela ekumisweni kwesimiso sekutsi kubuye kuvuswe kabusha iJerusalema yakhiwe, kuze kufike umbusi Logcotjiwe, kuyawuba netikhatsi letisikhombisa netikhatsi letingema-62. Iyakwakhiwa kabusha netitaladi tayo, kumbiwe nemsele wayo, kodvwa kuyawube sekutikhatsi tenhlupheko." 
Daniel9:26 Emvakwetikhatsi letingema-62, Logcotjiwe uyawuncanyulwa, akayiwuba nalutfo. Bantfu bembusi lomunye loyawufika, bayawulibhubhisa lelidolobha kanye nelithempeli. Siphetfo siyawufika njengesihhuhhula semvula. Kuyawuchubeka kulwa kuze kube ngusekugcineni, kuyawube kwehle incitsakalo." 
Daniel9:27 Lombusi uyawuvumela sivumelwane nalabanyenti ngesikhatsi sinye, kodvwa ekhatsi naleso sikhatsi uyawucedza umhlatjelo nemnikelo. Uyawubeka sinengisoncitsakalo esicongweni selithempeli, kuze sitfululelwe kuye siphetfo lesimisiwe.”" 
Daniel10:1 Ngemnyaka wesitsatfu waKhuresi, inkhosi yasePheresiya, kwefika umbono kuDanyela, labebitwa ngekutsi nguBhelteshasari. Emavi awo abeliciniso, futsi abemacondzana nekulwa lokukhulu. Kuwacondzisisa kahle kwakhe kweta ngembono." 
Daniel10:2 Ngaleso sikhatsi, mine Danyela, ngalila emaviki aze aba matsatfu." 
Daniel10:3 Ngangingadli kudla kwelikhetselo, nome inyama; kute nelitfonsi leliwayini lelake latsintsa umlomo wami; angigcobisanga ngisho nakancane, kwadzimate kwaphela lawo maviki lamatsatfu." 
Daniel10:4 Kwatsi ngelilanga lema-24 enyangeni yekucala, ngiseme elusentseni lwemfula lomkhulu iThigrisi," 
Daniel10:5 ngatsi ngiyabuka, ngabona embikwami kume umuntfu embetse telineni, atibophe ngelibhande legolide lecengekile elukhalo." 
Daniel10:6 Umtimba wakhe wawufanana nelitje lekhrisolithe, buso bakhe bunjengembane, emehlo akhe anjengetidlwane letivutsa emalangabi, imikhono yakhe nemilente yakhe imengetela njengelitfusi lelilongiwe, livi lakhe lalinjengemsindvo wesicumbi." 
Daniel10:7 Mine Danyela, kwaba ngimi ngedvwa lengawubona lombono; lamadvodza labekanye nami akazange awubone, kodvwa efikelwa ngulokukhulu kwesaba nekutfutfumela, aze abaleka ayawutifihla." 
Daniel10:8 Ngako ngatikhandza sengisele ngedvwa ngigolotele lombono lomkhulu kangaka ngingenamandla, buso bami bagwala baba bovu tju, ngaba yingici." 
Daniel10:9 Ngase ngimuva uyakhuluma, ngatsi ngisemlalele, ngatikhandza ngikulobukhulu butfongo, ngase ngilele, buso bami buse mbo phansi." 
Daniel10:10 Kwaba khona sandla lesingitsintsako, ngatfutfumela, kwachachatela emadvolo netandla." 
Daniel10:11 Watsi: “Danyela, wena lotsandzekile, caphelisisa lamavi lesengitakutjela wona, sukuma ume, ngobe nyalo ngitfunyelwe kuwe.” Watsi kube asho njalo kimi, ngasukuma ngichachatela." 
Daniel10:12 Wachubeka watsi: “Ungesabi, Danyela. Kusukela ngelilanga lekucala, mzukwana utimisela engcondvweni yakho kutsi ufuna kucondza kahle nekutitfoba embikwaNkulunkulu, emavi akho evakala kahle onkhe, mine sengitele kutawuletsa imphendvulo yawo." 
Daniel10:13 Kodvwa ingilosi yembuso wasePheresiya, yangivimbela kwadzimate kwaphela emalanga langema-21, kwaze kwefika Mikhayeli, lomunye wetingilosi letitikhulu, atengelekelela, ngobe bengishiywe lapho ngedvwa nemakhosi asePheresiya." 
Daniel10:14 Manje-ke sengitele kutakuchazela kutsi kutakwentekani kubantfu bakini ngemalanga letako, ngobe lombono umayelana netikhatsi letiseta.”" 
Daniel10:15 Watsi asasho njalo kimi, ngakhotsama, buso bami bubheke phansi ngingasakhoni ngisho nekukhuluma." 
Daniel10:16 Kwaba khona lonjengemuntfu lowatsintsa tindzebe temlomo wami, ngase ngiyakhuluma; ngakhuluma kulowo labeme embikwami, ngatsi: “Ngehlulwa kwesaba ngenca yalombono, nkhosi yami, angisenamandla." 
Daniel10:17 Kungenteka kanjani kutsi mine, nceku yakho, ngikhulume nawe, nkhosi. Emandla ami asangishiyile, sengehluleka ngisho nekuphefumula.”" 
Daniel10:18 Waphindza futsi lona labenjengemuntfu wangitsintsa, wanginika emandla." 
Daniel10:19 Watsi: “Ungesabi, wena ndvodza letsandzeke kakhulu. Kuthula! Cina manje, ube nesibindzi.” Watsi kube akhuluma nami, ngacina lidvolo, ngatsi: “Khuluma, nkhosi yami, ngobe naku sewungicinise emandla.”" 
Daniel10:20 Ngako watsi: “Uyati yini kutsi ngiteleni lapha kuwe? Masinyane ngitawuncandzeka kuze ngitekulwa nengilosi yasePheresiya, ngitawutsi ngisuka nje kuyo, kufike ingilosi yaseGrisi," 
Daniel10:21 kodvwa ngitawucala ngikutjele kutsi kubhalweni encwadzini yeliciniso. Kute namunye longelekelelako kutsi emelane nato, ngaphandle kwaMikhayeli, inkhosi yenu." 
Daniel11:1 “Ngemnyaka wekucala wekubusa kwaDariyusi umMede, mine-ke ngasukuma, ngema ngakuye ngamvikela.”" 
Daniel11:2 “Manje-ke, sengikutjela liciniso: Kusetawuvela lamanye emakhosi lamatsatfu ePheresiya, bese kuba yesine leyawunjinga kakhulu kunawo onkhe lalamanye. Kuyawutsi nase iwatfolile emandla ngebunjinga bayo, bese ivusa wonkhe umhlaba kutsi akuvukelwe iGrisi." 
Daniel11:3 Lapho-ke kuyawuvela inkhosi lenemandla, leyawubusa ngemandla ayo lamakhulu, ihlamahlame njengekutsandza kwayo." 
Daniel11:4 Iyawutsi nase ivele, umbuso wayo bese uyehlukaniswa ubhekiswe emimoyeni yomine yasezulwini. Ngeke wendlulele etitukulwaneni tayo, futsi ngeke ube nalamandla leyayiwasebentisa, ngobe lombuso wayo uyawusishulwa unikwe labanye." 
Daniel11:5 “Inkhosi yaseningizimu iyawuba nemandla, kodvwa lomunye webakhuteli bayo bemphi, uyawuba nemandla langetulu kwalawa ayo, futsi uyawubusa lombuso wayo ngemandla lamakhulu." 
Daniel11:6 Kuyawutsi emvakweminyaka bese bayahlangana basitane. Kuyawusuka indvodzakati yenkhosi yaseningizimu iyekwendza enkhosini yasenyakatfo kuze kwakheke buhlobo. Kodvwa angeke iwagcine emandla ayo, futsi-ke nenkhosi nemandla ayo angeke eme. Ngalawo malanga kuyawunikelwa ngalenkhosikati kanye nawo wonkhe lomtsimba lowawuyichubile, nemntfwana nendvodza yayo." 
Daniel11:7 “Kuyawuvela lomunye entalelwaneni yakabo loyawutsatsa sikhundla sayo. Uyawuhlasela emabutfo enkhosi yasenyakatfo, angene nasenqabeni yayo; uyawulwa nabo abehlule." 
Daniel11:8 Uyawutfumba bonkulunkulu babo, netitfombe tabo tetinsimbi, netimphahla tabo letingemagugu tesiliva netegolide, atetfwale aye nato eGibhithe. Kuyawuba sikhatsi lesidze ayiyekele inkhosi yasenyakatfo atimele yedvwa." 
Daniel11:9 Inkhosi yasenyakatfo iyawusuka ihlasele live lenkhosi yaseningizimu, kodvwa iyawubuyela eveni layo ilengise tandla." 
Daniel11:10 Emadvodzana ayo ayawutilungiselela imphi, abutse emabutfo lamanyenti, lomunye wawo nemphi yakhe bayawukhukhula kungatsi sihhuhhula semvula, ayidvudvule imphi, badzimate bahlasele nenqaba yenkhosi yaseningizimu." 
Daniel11:11 “Inkhosi yaseningizimu iyawube seyishuca nayo ngemfutfo lomkhulu iyekulwa nenkhosi yasenyakatfo leyawubutsa lenkhulu imphi, kodvwa iyakwehlulwa." 
Daniel11:12 Kuyawutsi imphi nase itfunjiwe, inkhosi yaseningizimu ikhukhumuke ngeligcabho, ibulale tinkhulungwane ngetinkhulungwane, noko ngeke ihlale ingungcongcoshe." 
Daniel11:13 Ngobe inkhosi yasenyakatfo iyawubutsa lamanye futsi emabutfo emphi, layawuba manyenti kakhulu kunalawa akucala; kuyawutsi emvakweminyaka leminyenti, bese ishuca nalenkhulu imphi lehlome yaphelela." 
Daniel11:14 “Ngaleto tikhatsi labanyenti bayawusukela inkhosi yaseningizimu. Nasemkhatsini wenu kuyawuvuka bantfu labanelutfutfuva, kube kugcwaliseka kwembono, kodvwa bangeke baphumelele." 
Daniel11:15 Inkhosi yasenyakatfo iyawuta itekwakha lutsango lwekuvimbetela, ivimbetele idle lidolobha leliyinqaba. Emabutfo aseningizimu ayawubate emandla lenele ekutivikela, ngisho neticheme tawo telikhetselo atiyiwuba nawo emandla ekuma." 
Daniel11:16 Umhlaseli uyawujangaza alihlamahlame ngekutsandza kwakhe, kute loyawukhona kumelana naye. Uyawukwakha atinte eveni lelihle, abe nemandla ekulibhubhisa." 
Daniel11:17 Uyawutimisela kuta ngemandla embuso wakhe wonkhe atihlanganise nenkhosi yaseningizimu, amendzisele nenkhosatana, khona atewuketula kahle lombuso wayo, kodvwa lawo masu akhe angeke aphumelele futsi ngeke amsite." 
Daniel11:18 Uyawujikisa ingcondvo yakhe ayibhekise emaveni lagudla tilwandle atsatse lamanyenti awo, kodvwa umkhuteli wemphi uyawucedza kutigabatisa kwakhe, akugucule lokutigabatisa kwakhe abuyisele lihlazo kuye." 
Daniel11:19 Emvakwaloko uyawujikela ngasetinqabeni taseveni lakhe, kodvwa uyawukhubatela awe, angasayiwuphindza abonwe." 
Daniel11:20 “Lowo loyawutsatsa sikhundla emvakwakhe uyawukhipha umtselisi, kuze akwati kugcina lomcebo wasebukhosini umile. Naye futsi uyawubhujiswa kungakapheli minyaka mingaki, noko hhayi ngentfukutselo nome emphini.”" 
Daniel11:21 “Uyawulandzelwa ngumfokatana nje longazange asanikwe ludvumo lwebukhosi. Uyawufika ngesikhatsi bantfu bawo bativela bavikelekile, atsatse umbuso ngemacebo." 
Daniel11:22 Sikhukhula semphi lenkhulu siyawukhukhuleka sisuswe embikwakhe; kokubili, imphi kanye nesikhulu sesivumelwane, kuyawubhujiswa." 
Daniel11:23 Kuyawutsi nase bente sivumelwane naye, bese uyakhohlisa, uyawukhula abe nemandla, kantsi nje unesive lesinebantfu labambalwa." 
Daniel11:24 Kuyawutsi emave lanjingile nase ativela kutsi avikelekile, awahlasele, futsi uyakwenta loko ngisho naboyise labangazange sebakwente bona kanye naboyisemkhulu. Uyawukwaba imphango, netimphahla kanye nemcebo emkhatsini webalandzeli bakhe. Uyawukwakha luzungu lwekuketula tinqaba, noko kube kwesikhashana nje." 
Daniel11:25 “Uyawuvusa emandla akhe ngemphi yakhe lenkhulu, atikhutsate kubhekana nenkhosi yaseningizimu. Inkhosi yaseningizimu iyakulwa kulwa lokukhulu inemphi lenkhulu nalenemandla kakhulu, kodvwa ngeke ikhone kuma ngenca yemacebo layawube entelwe yona." 
Daniel11:26 Labo labadla kanye nenkhosi bayakwetama kuyibhubhisa, imphi yayo iyawukhukhuleka, labanyenti bayawufela emphini." 
Daniel11:27 Lawo makhosi lamabili layawube tinhlitiyo tawo ticondze bubi, ayawuhlala etafuleni linye ayengane odvwa, kodvwa loko kungasiti lutfo, ngobe siphetfo sona siyawuhlale sifike ngesikhatsi saso lesibekiwe." 
Daniel11:28 Inkhosi yasenyakatfo iyawujika ibuyele eveni layo seyinjinge kakhulu. Kodvwa inhlitiyo yayo iyawube imelene nesivumelwane lesingcwele. Iyawusitsatsela tinyatselo, bese ibuyela emuva eveni layo." 
Daniel11:29 “Kuyawutsi ngesikhatsi lesimisiwe, iphindze ihlasele laseningizimu futsi, kodvwa ngaleso sikhatsi umphumela uyawukwehluka kulowo wakucala." 
Daniel11:30 Imikhumbi yemave angasenshonalanga lagudla lwandle iyawumelana nayo, bese iyajabha. Iyawube seyiyagucuka bese itfukutselela sivumelwane lesingcwele. Iyawubuya ivelane nalabo labafulatsela sivumelwane lesingcwele." 
Daniel11:31 “Emabutfo ayo lahlomile ayawuvuka angcolise inqaba yelithempeli, acedze imihlatjelo yemalanga onkhe. Bese-ke emisa sinengiso lesingusona sibanga incitsakalo." 
Daniel11:32 Ngekuyenga nangemavi ekuwunga inkhosi iyakonakalisa labo labephule sivumelwane, kodvwa noko bantfu labamati kahle Nkulunkulu wabo bayawumelana nayo bacinile." 
Daniel11:33 “Labo labahlakaniphile bayawufundzisa labanyenti, noko kube kwesikhashana solo bawa ngenkemba, nome bashiswe, nome batfunjwe, nome baphangwe." 
Daniel11:34 Bayawutsi nabawa, batfole lusito loluncane, labanyenti labatentisako bayawutihlanganisa nabo." 
Daniel11:35 Labanye balabahlakaniphile bayawukhubatela, kuze bahlanjululwe ngekucengwa, bangcweliswe, bentiwe bangabi nasici kuze kube sikhatsi sesiphetfo, ngobe sona siyawufika ngesikhatsi lesimisiwe.”" 
Daniel11:36 “Inkhosi yasenyakatfo iyawukwenta njengekutsandza kwayo. Iyawutikhukhumeta, itibongelele yona, itibeke ngetulu kwato tonkhe tithico, ikhulume tintfo letingazange tikhulunywe ngumuntfu ngaNkulunkulu wabonkulunkulu. Iyawuphumelela kudzimate kuphelele sikhatsi selulaka, ngobe loko lokuhlosiwe kufanele kwenteke." 
Daniel11:37 Ayiyiwubanaka bonkulunkulu baboyise nome lowo lotsandvwa ngulabasikati, futsi ingeke inake nome ngumuphi nkulunkulu, kodvwa iyawutigabatisa yona itibeke ngetulu kwabo bonkhe." 
Daniel11:38 Esikhundleni sabo iyawuhlonipha nkulunkulu wetinqaba, nkulunkulu labangazange bamati boyise, iyawumhlonipha ngegolide nangesiliva, nangematje laligugu, nangetipho letidulile." 
Daniel11:39 Iyawuhlasela tinqaba leticine kakhulu, isitwa ngulonkulunkulu, iyawubadvumisa kakhulu labo labamvumako. Iyawubabeka babe babusi etikwetive letinyenti, yabe live libe ngumvuzo wabo." 
Daniel11:40 “Ngesikhatsi sekugcina, inkhosi yaseningizimu iyawuhlaselana nayo emphini, kodvwa inkhosi yasenyakatfo iyawuyidvumela iyekulwa nayo ngetincola temphi nangemasotja lagibele emahhashi emphi, nangalelikhulu lifu lemikhumbi yemphi. Iyawungenela emave lamanyenti, iwakhukhule kube shangatsi ngungesihhuhhula semvula." 
Daniel11:41 Iyawubuye ingenele nelive lelihle. Emave lamanyenti ayakuwa, kodvwa bo-Edomu neMowabi, kanye nebaholi baka-Amoni bayawukhululwa esandleni sayo." 
Daniel11:42 Iyakwandzisa kubusa kwayo etikwemave lamanyenti; neGibhithe ngeke idzabule. 
Daniel11:43 Iyawuba nemandla ekulawula umcebo wegolide newesiliva, netimphahla tonkhe taseGibhithe letidule kakhulu, itfobise baseLibiya nebaseKushe." 
Daniel11:44 Kodvwa imibiko levela emphumalanga nasenyakatfo iyakuyetfusa, bese itihlelela kuphuma nemphi lenkhulu, iyewubhubhisa labanyenti bangaphindzi babe khona." 
Daniel11:45 Iyawumisa emathende ayo ebukhosi emkhatsini wetilwandle entsabeni lenhle nalengcwele. Noko iyawufika esiphetfweni sayo, futsi kute namunye loyawuyilamulela.”" 
Daniel12:1 “Ngaleso sikhatsi Mikhayeli, ingilosi lenkhulu lengumvikeli wesive sakini, uyawuvela. Kuyawuba sikhatsi sekuhlupheka lokukhulu, lesingazange sesibe khona, seloku kwacala kuba netive kuze kube nguleso sikhatsi. Kodvwa ngaleso sikhatsi, bonkhe bantfu bakini lekwatfolakala emabito abo abhaliwe encwadzini yaNkulunkulu, bayawukhululwa." 
Daniel12:2 Ticumbi ngeticumbi lesetalala elutfulini lwemhlaba tiyawuvuka, labanye bavukele ekuphileni kwaphakadze, labanye ehlazweni nasekwedzelelekeni kwaphakadze." 
Daniel12:3 Labo labahlakaniphile bayawucwebetela njengekumanyatela kwemazulu, nalabo labaholele labanye ekulungeni, bakhanye njengetinkhanyeti kuze kube nguphakadze naphakadze." 
Daniel12:4 Kodvwa wena Danyela, wavalele uze uwashicilele lamavi alencwadzi legocotwako, kuze kube nguleso sikhatsi sekugcina. Labanyenti bayawukwehla benyuka bafuna kwati kutsi kwentekani.”" 
Daniel12:5 Mine Danyela, ngase ngiyabuka, ngabona embikwami sekume labanye lababili, lomunye eme ngala elusentseni lwemfula, lomunye eme ngesheya kwemfula malungana naye." 
Daniel12:6 Lomunye wabo wakhuluma kulona labembetse telineni, labesetikwalamanti alomfula, watsi: “Kuyawuze kube ngunini, solomane tingakagcwaliseki tonkhe letintfo letimangalisa kangaka?”" 
Daniel12:7 Lomuntfu labegcoke telineni, labesetikwalamanti emfula, waphakamisa sandla sakhe sekudla nesancele, watibhekisa ezulwini, ngamuva afunga ngaye lophila phakadze atsi: “Kuyawuba ngiminyaka lemitsatfu nesigamu. Nakuphelela kuhlushwa kwebantfwana baNkulunkulu, tonkhe letintfo tiyawube setentekile.”" 
Daniel12:8 Ngakuva loko labekukhuluma, kodvwa angizange ngikucondze kutsi kusho kutsini. Ngako ngabuta ngatsi: “Awu nkhosi yami, uyawuba yini umphumela wako konkhe loko?”" 
Daniel12:9 Wangiphendvula watsi: “Hamba ngendlela yakho, Danyela, ngobe lamavi asavalelwe ashicilelwa, kuyawudzimate kube sikhatsi sekugcina." 
Daniel12:10 Labanyenti bayawuhlanjululwa babe msulwa, bacengisiswe kahle bangabi nasici, kodvwa lababi bayawuchubeka babe babi kakhulu. Kute namunye walababi loyawukuvisisa, kodvwa laba labahlakaniphile bayawukuvisisa kahle." 
Daniel12:11 “Kusukela ngesikhatsi lekwasuswa ngaso umhlatjelo wemalanga onkhe, kwemiswa sinengiso lesibanga incitsakalo kuyawutsatsa emalanga layi-1 290." 
Daniel12:12 Ubusisiwe lowo loyawulindza aze efike ekugcineni kwalamalanga layi-1 335. 
Daniel12:13 “Kodvwa wena Danyela, hamba endleleni yakho kuze kube ngusekugcineni. Uyawuphumula, kuyawutsi ekupheleni kwemalanga, uvuke utekwemukeliswa sabelo sakho lekulifa lakho.”" 
Hosea1:1 Livi laSimakadze lelefika kuHoseya, umsa waBheri, ngesikhatsi sekubusa kwemakhosi bo-Uziya, naJothamu, na-Ahazi, naHezekiya, emakhosi akaJuda, nakubusa inkhosi Jerobowamu, umsa waJehoyashi, inkhosi yaka-Israyeli:" 
Hosea1:2 Watsi kube Simakadze acale kukhuluma naHoseya, Simakadze wakhuluma kuye, watsi: “Hamba utsatse umfati loyingwadla lonebantfwana labatelwe ngebugwadla, ngobe live linelicala lebugwadla lobesabekako, selisukile kuSimakadze.”" 
Hosea1:3 Ngako-ke Hoseya watsatsa Gomeri, indvodzakati yaDiblayimu; watetfwala, wamtalela indvodzana." 
Hosea1:4 Simakadze wakhuluma kuHoseya, watsi: “Metse libito utsi nguJezreyeli, ngobe ngekushesha nje ngitayijezisa indlu yakaJehu ngenca yekubulawa kwebantfu eJezreyeli, futsi ngitawucedza umbuso waka-Israyeli." 
Hosea1:5 Ngalelo langa ngitabephula butjoki baka-Israyeli, ngicedze emabutfo alo eSigodzini saseJezreyeli.”" 
Hosea1:6 Gomeri waphindze futsi watetfwala, watala indvodzakati, Simakadze wabe sewukhuluma kuHoseya, watsi: “Metse libito utsi nguLo Ruhama, ngobe angiseyiwuphindze ngiyihawukele indlu yaka-Israyeli, lokwekutsi ngingaze vele ngibatsetselele." 
Hosea1:7 Noko ngiyakuyihawukela indlu yakaJuda; ngiyakubasindzisa, kodvwa hhayi ngebutjoki, nangenkemba, nangemphi, nangemahhashi, nangebagibeli bemahhashi, kodvwa ngiyakubasindzisa mine, Simakadze longuNkulunkulu wabo.”" 
Hosea1:8 Watsi kube alumule Lo Ruhama, Gomeri watala lenye indvodzana." 
Hosea1:9 Simakadze wase utsi: “Lendvodzana yetse libito utsi nguLo Ami, ngobe anisiso sive sami, nami futsi angisiye Nkulunkulu wenu.”" 
Hosea1:10 “Noko ema-Israyeli ayawuba manyenti ngangesihlabatsi saselugwini lwelwandle, lesingeke sikalwe nome sibalwe. Endzaweni lapho kwakukhulunywa khona kubo kwatsiwa: ‘Nine anisiso sive sami,’ bayawubitwa ngekutsi: ‘Ngemadvodzana aNkulunkulu lophilako.’" 
Hosea1:11 Bantfu bakaJuda nebantfu baka-Israyeli bayawuphindze bahlanganiswe, bese babeka umholi wabo abe munye, bahlume eveni labo, ngobe liyawuba likhulu lelo langa lakaJezreyeli." 
Hosea2:1 “Khulumani kubomnakenu nitsi: ‘Bantfu bakitsi,’ kubodzadzewenu nitsi: ‘Labatsandzekako bami.’ ”" 
Hosea2:2 “Yekhutani make wenu, mekhuteni, ngobe akasesiye umkami, nami angisesiyo indvodza yakhe. Ase akususe lokubukeka kwebugwadla ebusweni bakhe, nalokungetsembeki lokusemkhatsini wemabele akhe." 
Hosea2:3 Ngaphandle kwaloko ngitamhlubula abe ngcunu, ngimente abe ngcunu njengamhlazane atalwa; ngitawumenta abe njengelihlane, ngimgucule abe live leligagadzekile, afe ngekoma." 
Hosea2:4 Ngingeke ngibahawukele labantfwana bakhe, ngobe babantfwana bebugwadla." 
Hosea2:5 Unina abengaketsembeki, wabemitsa ngekwelihlazo, watsi: ‘Ngitawulandzela emashende ami, labo labangipha kudla kwami nemanti ami, insontfo yami, nelineni yami, emafutsa ami kanye nesinatfo sami.’" 
Hosea2:6 Ngako-ke ngiyakuyivimba indlela yakhe, ngiyivale ngemahlahla emanyeva; ngiyawumvimbetela, kuze angasayitfoli nendlela." 
Hosea2:7 Uyawucoshana nemashende akhe, kodvwa ngeke awakhandze; uyakuwafuna, kodvwa angeke awatfole. Uyawube sewutsi: ‘Ngitawuncandzeka ngibuyele endvodzeni yami yakucala, ngobe ngaleso sikhatsi bekukuhle kakhulu kimi kunanyalo.’" 
Hosea2:8 Usengakatsandzi kuvuma kutsi kwakungimi lona lowamnika kudla lokutinhlavu, neliwayini lelisha, nemafutsa, lowatfululela kuye isiliva negolide, lababekusebentisa kuBhali." 
Hosea2:9 “Ngako-ke ngiyawutsatsa lamabele ami nase avutsiwe kanye naleliwayini lami lelisha nase lilungile. Ngiyakumemuka lensontfo yami nalelineni yami, lebeyimiselwe kutsi imbonye bungcunu bakhe." 
Hosea2:10 Ngako nyalo sengitabungcunula lobubheva bakhe, embikwemashende akhe abuka; kute lotamephula lapha etandleni tami." 
Hosea2:11 Ngitayicedza yonkhe lemikhosi yakhe: emadzili akhe eminyaka newekwetfwasa kwenyanga, newemaSabatha akhe, nawo onkhe emadzili akhe lamisiwe." 
Hosea2:12 Ngiyawuhliphita imivini yakhe nemikhwa yakhe, latsi: ‘Lena yinkhokhelo yami lenginikwe ngemashende ami;’ ngiyawukwenta kube lihlatsi leliminyene, tilwane tesiganga tikushwabudzele." 
Hosea2:13 Ngiyawumjezisa ngenca yalawo malanga lashisa ngawo imphepho kuboBhali, wativunulisa ngetindandatho nangemihlobiso yakhe lemihle, walandzelana nemashende akhe, kodvwa mine wangikhohlwa,” kusho Simakadze." 
Hosea2:14 “Ngako-ke manje ngitamhhungula, ngimholele ehlane, ngikhulume naye kamnandzi." 
Hosea2:15 Ngulapho-ke ngitambuyisela khona tivini takhe, ngente Sigodzi sase-Akhori sibe ngumnyango welitsemba. Ngulapho-ke lapho ayawuhlabela khona njengasemalangeni akhe ebusha, nanjengalelo langa laphuma ngalo eGibhithe." 
Hosea2:16 “Ngalelo langa uyawungibita utsi: ‘Ndvodza yami,’ ungeke uphindze ungibite utsi: ‘Bhali wami,’ ” kusho Simakadze." 
Hosea2:17 “Emabito aboBhali ngiyakuwesusa emlonyweni wakhe; nemabito abo angeke asacelelwa lusito. 
Hosea2:18 Ngalelo langa baka-Israyeli ngiyawubentela sivumelwane netilwane tesiganga netinyoni temoya kanye netidalwa letinwabutela phansi emhlabatsini. Butjoki, nenkemba, nemphi ngiyawukususa eveni, kuze kutsi bonkhe batewulala phansi baphephile." 
Hosea2:19 Ngiyawukwendzisela kimi kuze kube phakadze naphakadze; ngiyawukwendzisa ngekulunga, nangekwemtsetfo, nangekwelutsandvo, nangesihawu." 
Hosea2:20 Ngiyawukwendzisa ngekwetsembeka, uyakumhlonipha Simakadze." 
Hosea2:21 “Ngalelo langa ngiyawuphendvula,” kusho Simakadze, “ngiyawuphendvula emazulu, nawo ayawuphendvula umhlaba;" 
Hosea2:22 nemhlaba uyawuphendvula ngalokutinhlavu, nangeliwayini lelisha, nangemafutsa, nako kuyawuphendvula iJezreyeli." 
Hosea2:23 Ngiyakutihlanyelela yena eveni; ngiyakulubonakalisa lutsandvo lwami kulowo lebengimbita ngekutsi: ‘Akusiye lotsandzekako wami.’ Ngiyawukhuluma kulabo lekwakutsiwa: ‘Abasiso sive sami,’ ngitsi: ‘Nine nisive sami,’ nabo bayawutsi: ‘Wena unguNkulunkulu wetfu.’ ”" 
Hosea3:1 Simakadze wakhuluma kimi watsi: “Hamba, uphindze umtsandze umkakho, lite nome asatsandvwe ngulomunye futsi, ayingwadla. Mtsandze wena njengobe Simakadze atsandza ema-Israyeli, kwala nome sebagucukele kulabanye bonkulunkulu, batsandza emacebelengwane emagelebisi lomisiwe.”" 
Hosea3:2 Ngako ngamtsenga ngesiliva lengemagremu lali-170 nangemakhilogremu langaba likhulu ebhali. 
Hosea3:3 Ngase ngiyamtjela lomkami, ngatsi: “Wena kufanele uhlale nami emalanga lamanyenti; akukafaneli lokutsi ube yingwadla nome wetayelane nalenye indvodza, nami ngitawuhlala nawe.”" 
Hosea3:4 Ngako ema-Israyeli asetawuhlala emalanga lamanyenti angenambusi, angenankhosi, angenamhlatjelo nome ematje langcwele, angenasidziya sebaphristi nome sithico." 
Hosea3:5 Emvakwaloko ema-Israyeli ayawuphendvuka afune Simakadze, Nkulunkulu wawo, naDavide, inkhosi yawo. Bayawubuyela batitfobe kuSimakadze nakuto tibusiso taSimakadze ngemalanga ekugcina." 
Hosea4:1 Vanini livi laSimakadze, nine ma-Israyeli, ngobe Simakadze usenelicala latanibeka lona, nine lenihlala kulelive, utsi: “Kute kwetsembeka, kute lutsandvo, kute kuphakamisa Nkulunkulu eveni." 
Hosea4:2 Lokukhona ticalekiso kuphela, nekucala emanga, nekugwazana, nekweba kanye nebuphingi; bephula tonkhe tikhonkhwane teminyele letibekiwe; kucitsa ingati kulandzela kucitfwa kwengati." 
Hosea4:3 Ngenca yaloku live liyalila, nabo bonkhe labahlala kulo bayahusheka; tilwane tesiganga netinyoni tasemoyeni kanye netinhlanti taselwandle kuyafa.”" 
Hosea4:4 “Kodvwa akubete umuntfu lobeka licala, akubete muntfu lobeka lomunye licala, ngobe mine ngibeka umphristi licala." 
Hosea4:5 Nikhubateka emini nasebusuku, nebaphrofethi bakhubateka kanye nani, nine baphristi. Ngako ngitambhubhisa unyoko," 
Hosea4:6 bantfu bami bayabhujiswa ngenca yekweswela lwati. “Njengobe nikulahlile kwati mine, nami-ke sengiyanilahla kutsi ningete naba baphristi bami; njengobe niwutsalalisele umtsetfo waNkulunkulu wenu, nami-ke ngiyawubatsalalisela bantfwabenu." 
Hosea4:7 Ngekwandza kwebaphristi kanjalo kwandza nekona kwabo kimi, ngitakwenanisa ngebukhosi babo batselwe lihlazo." 
Hosea4:8 Batondla ngetono tebantfu bami, bajatjuliswe bubi babo." 
Hosea4:9 Kuyawuba nje: Bantfu bayawufanana nebaphristi. Ngiyawubajezisa bobabili ngetindlela tabo, ngibakhokhele ngaloko lokubi labakwentile.”" 
Hosea4:10 “Bayakudla tabelo tabo temihlatjelo, kodvwa bangeke besutse; bayawungenela bugwadla, kodvwa bangandzi, ngobe bamshiyile Simakadze," 
Hosea4:11 batinikela ebugwadleni, nasewayinini lelisha nalelidzala, lokususa kucondza" 
Hosea4:12 kwebantfu bami. Indlela bayibuta etithicweni tetigodvo, baphendvulwe yindvuku yelugodvo. Umoya webugwadla uyabedukisa; abaketsembeki kuNkulunkulu wabo." 
Hosea4:13 Banikela imihlatjelo eticongweni tetintsaba, bashise iminikelo emagcumeni, ngaphansi kwema-okhi, nangaphansi kwemabhabhabhulomu nematherebinte, lapho kunemtfunti lomnandzi khona. Ngako-ke emadvodzakati enu agucukela ebugwadleni, nabomalukatane benu baphinga." 
Hosea4:14 “Ngingeke ngiwajezise emadvodzakati enu nase angenela bugwadla, nabomalukatane benu ngingeke ngibajezise nase baphinga, ngobe ngiwo lamadvodza, ngisho labaphristi cobo lwabo, labesukelana naletingwababane, bente umhlatjelo netingwababane tasethempelini. Sive lesingenakucondza siyawubhubha!" 
Hosea4:15 “Awu Israyeli, nome sewuphinga kangaka nje, ningamenti Juda abe nelicala naye. “Ningayi eGilgali; ningayi eBhethi Aveni. Ningafungi futsi nitsi: ‘Kuphila kwaSimakadze!’" 
Hosea4:16 Ema-Israyeli anenkhani, anjengesitfokati lesinenkhani. Pho, Simakadze angabelusa kanjani njengemazinyane etimvu lasedlelweni?" 
Hosea4:17 Efrayimu utihlanganise netithico; myekeleni khona lapho! 
Hosea4:18 Nome ngabe tinatfo tabo setiphelile, bayachubeka nebugwadla babo; baholi babo batitsandza kakhulu tindlela tabo telihlazo." 
Hosea4:19 Siwunguwungwana siyawubakhukhula sibalahle khashane, nemihlatjelo yabo iyawubatsela ngelihlazo.”" 
Hosea5:1 “Lalelani lapha, nine baphristi! Nakisisani, nine ma-Israyeli! Lalelani, ninendlu yebukhosi! Lesehlulelo simelene nani: Nibe lugibe eMispa, naba linetha lelendlalelwe eThabori." 
Hosea5:2 Tihlubuki tingumgodzi wekubulala. Tonkhe ngiyakuticondzisa ngemphatfocotfo. 
Hosea5:3 Ngati konkhe nga-Efrayimu; Israyeli akafihlakali kimi. Efrayimu, wena sewugucukele ebugwadleni, Israyeli sewonakele.”" 
Hosea5:4 “Tento tabo atibavumeli kutsi babuyele kuNkulunkulu wabo. Umoya webugwadla usetinhlitiyweni tabo, abamhloniphi Simakadze." 
Hosea5:5 Kutigcabha kwema-Israyeli kubufakazi lobumelene nawo; ema-Israyeli, ngisho na-Efrayimu, bayakhubateka esonweni sabo; ngisho naJuda ukhubateka kanye nabo." 
Hosea5:6 Nabahamba nemihlambi yabo yetimvu netimbuti kanye nemihlambi yetinkhomo kuyawufuna Simakadze, bangeke bamtfole; sewutisusile kubo." 
Hosea5:7 Abaketsembeki kuSimakadze; batala emavezandlebe. Manje emadzili abo ekwetfwasa kwenyanga atawubamita bona kanye nemasimi abo.” 
Hosea5:8 “Khalisani impalampala eGibeya, nishaye licilongo eRama. Hlabani inyandzaleyo eBhethi Aveni, nitsi: Awu, Bhenjamini, basemvakwakho." 
Hosea5:9 Efrayimu utakwentiwa abe yincitsakalo ngelilanga lekwehlulelwa. Emkhatsini wetive tema-Israyeli ngimemetela lokungiko. 
Hosea5:10 Baholi bakaJuda bafanana nalabo labakhweshisa ematje emnyele. Ngiyawulutfululela kubo lulaka lwami njengetikhukhula temanti. 
Hosea5:11 Efrayimu ucindzetelekile wagcotjwagcotjwa ngekwehlulelwa, ngobe utimisele kulandzela tithico." 
Hosea5:12 Ngifanana nemvunya ku-Efrayimu, ngibe njengekubola esiveni sakaJuda." 
Hosea5:13 “Watsi kube Efrayimu abone kugula kwakhe, naJuda abone emanceba akhe, Efrayimu wase ugucukela e-Asiriya, watfumela enkhosini lenkhulu kuyawucela lusito. Kodvwa iyehluleka kunelapha, iyehluleka kupholisa emanceba enu." 
Hosea5:14 Ngobe ngiyawuba njengelibhubesi ku-Efrayimu, ngifanane nelibhubesi lelikhulu kuJuda. Ngiyawubadzabudzabula babe ticucu, ngisuke lapho ngibashiye. Ngiyawubetfwala ngibesuse, kubete nalobalamulelako." 
Hosea5:15 Ngiyawube sengibuyela endzaweni yami, baze balivume licala labo. Bayawufuna buso bami; baseselusizini lwabo bayawungifunisisa.”" 
Hosea6:1 “Wotani, asibuyele kuSimakadze. Sewusidzabule saba ticucu, kodvwa uyawusiphilisa; usilimatile, kodvwa uyakuwabopha emanceba etfu." 
Hosea6:2 Emvakwemalanga lamabili utasiphilisa, ngelilanga lesitsatfu utasivusa, khona sitewuphila ebukhoneni bakhe." 
Hosea6:3 Asimhloniphe Simakadze, sitimisele nekumnaka. Impela, njengobe kucinisekile kutsi lilanga liphuma ekuseni, kanjalo naye uyachamuka ete kitsi njengetimvula tasebusika, nanjengetimvula tasentfwasahlobo letinisela umhlaba.”" 
Hosea6:4 “Ngingentani ngawe, Efrayimu? Ngingentani ngawe, Juda? Lutsandvo lwenu lufanana nenkhungu yasekuseni, lunjengematolo asekuseni lanyamalalako." 
Hosea6:5 Ngako-ke nganishaya nganijuba ticucu ngemavi ebaphrofethi bami, nganibulala ngemavi emlomo wami; tehlulelo tami timanyata njengembane etikwenu, tinehlele nome nini." 
Hosea6:6 Ngobe ngifuna sihawu, hhayi umhlatjelo, ngifuna nekumati Nkulunkulu kuneminikelo yekushiswa." 
Hosea6:7 Njenga-Adamu, sebasephulile sivumelwane, abaketsembeki kimi." 
Hosea6:8 IGileyadi ilidolobha lalabakhohlakele, linindvwe tinyatselo letinengati." 
Hosea6:9 Njengobe bosidlani balalela umuntfu endleleni, tenta njalo neticumbi tebaphristi; tiyabulalana kulomgwaco loya eShekhemu, tente budlova lobulihlazo." 
Hosea6:10 Ngibone intfo leyesabekako endlini yaka-Israyeli: Efrayimu utinikele ebugwadleni na-Israyeli sewaba ngulongcolile. 
Hosea6:11 “Nawe-ke, Juda, ulungiselwe kuvunwa. “Nase ngifuna kubuyisela inhlalakahle kubantfu bami," 
Hosea7:1 nase ngifuna kuphilisa Israyeli, tono ta-Efrayimu tibekwa ebaleni, nemacala eSamariya ayembulwa. Benta emacebo, emasela agcekeze tindlu, tigebengu tibamba inkunzi etitaladini;" 
Hosea7:2 kodvwa ababoni kutsi ngitikhumbula tonkhe tento tabo letimbi. Tono tabo tiyabagabudzela, tisembikwami ngaso sonkhe sikhatsi.”" 
Hosea7:3 “Bajabulisa inkhosi ngebubi babo, bajabulise nebabusi ngemanga abo." 
Hosea7:4 Bonkhe batiphingi, bashisa njengelihhavu lona lelimlilo walo lophekako akadzingi kuwukhwetela, kusukela ekubhuceni inhlama ize ikhukhumuke." 
Hosea7:5 Ngelilanga lemkhosi wenkhosi yetfu babusi badzakwa liwayini, yona yaselulela baphukuti sandla." 
Hosea7:6 “Tinhlitiyo tabo tinjengelihhavu, babhekana nayo ngekuvumelana ngemacebo. Intfukutselo yabo ibobotseka busuku bonkhe; bese kutsi ekuseni ivutse njengemalangabi emlilo." 
Hosea7:7 Bonkhe bashisa njengelihhavu, bashwabudzela babusi babo. Onkhe emakhosi abo ayawa, kute namunye emkhatsini wabo locela lusito kimi.”" 
Hosea7:8 “Efrayimu utihlanganisa netive, Efrayimu ulicebelengwane lelipatalele, lelingakaguculwa." 
Hosea7:9 Betive bamunya emandla akhe, kodvwa yena akakuboni loko. Timvu setiyacatsatela enhloko yakhe, kodvwa yena akakunaki loko." 
Hosea7:10 Kutigcabha kwa-Israyeli kubufakazi lobumelene naye, kodvwa etikwako konkhe loko akabuyeli kuSimakadze Nkulunkulu wakhe, nome-ke amfune." 
Hosea7:11 “Efrayimu ufanana nelituba, usheshe ayengeke, akanangcondvo. Bacela lusito eGibhithe, baze babalekele e-Asiriya!" 
Hosea7:12 Batawutsi nababaleka, ngijikijele linetha lami etikwabo. Ngiyawubadvonsela phansi njengetinyoni tasemoyeni. Nangibeva bancwabelana ndzawonye, ngiyawubabamba." 
Hosea7:13 Maye kubo! Ngobe besukile kimi! Imbhubhiso kubo! Ngobe bangihlubukile bemelana nami! Ngifisa kangaka kubahlenga, kodvwa bakhuluma emanga ngami." 
Hosea7:14 Abakhali kimi ngalokusuka etinhlitiyweni tabo, kodvwa balila emibhedzeni yabo. Babutsana ndzawonye babutsanele emabele neliwayini lelisha, kodvwa bangifulatsele mine." 
Hosea7:15 Ngabacecesha, ngabacinisa, kodvwa bangakhela luzungu lwebubi." 
Hosea7:16 Abagucukeli kuLongetulu Kwako Konkhe; bafanana nebutjoki lobungakacini. Baholi babo bayawubulawa ngenkemba ngenca yemagama abo langenanhlonipho. Ngenca yaloko bayawuba luhleko nelihlazo eveni laseGibhithe.” 
Hosea8:1 “Beka licilongo etindzebeni takho temlomo! Lusweti lusetikwendlu yaSimakadze, ngobe sive sisephulile sivumelwane sami, sawuhlubuka nemtsetfo wami." 
Hosea8:2 Israyeli ukhala kimi, utsi: ‘Awu Nkulunkulu wetfu, siyakuhlonipha.’" 
Hosea8:3 Kodvwa Israyeli ukulahlile loko lokungukona kukuhle, ngako-ke sitsa sitamcosha." 
Hosea8:4 Batibekela emakhosi bangakancutfulisi kimi, batikhetsela babusi bangakabonwa ngimi. Ngesiliva yabo nangegolide yabo batentela tithico letitababhubhisa bona." 
Hosea8:5 Awu, Samariya, silahle lesithico sakho selitfole! Intfukutselo yami iyanivutsela, kuyawudzimate kube ngunini solomane nehluleka kuba ngulabamsulwa?" 
Hosea8:6 Lesithico siphuma ka-Israyeli! Lelitfole lentiwe ngumuntfu loyingcweti kutekubata, alisiye Nkulunkulu. Litakwephulwa libe ticucu, lelo tfole laseSamariya." 
Hosea8:7 “Bahlanyela umoya bavune siwunguwungwana. Luhlanga alunaso sishakato; lungeke lusivete sivuno. Kube belungatsela tinhlavu, betive bebangaluphanga." 
Hosea8:8 Israyeli umitiwe, manje sewusemkhatsini wetive njengentfo lengenamsebenti." 
Hosea8:9 Ngobe sebakhuphukele e-Asiriya kuyawufuna lusito njengembongolo yesiganga lezulazula yodvwana. Efrayimu sewutitsengise yena emashendeni akhe. 
Hosea8:10 Nome sebatitsengise bona kubetive, nyalo sengitababutsela ndzawonye. Batawucala bondze ngaphansi kwencindzetelo yenkhosi yase-Asiriya." 
Hosea8:11 “Lite nome Efrayimu akhe emalati lamanyenti eminikelo yesono, lamalati asagucuke aba ngemalati ekwenta tono." 
Hosea8:12 Ngababhalela tintfo letinyenti temtsetfo wami, kodvwa loko bakutsatsa njengentfo lengesiyo yabo." 
Hosea8:13 Banikela ngemihlatjelo lenikwe mine, bese badla lenyama, kodvwa Simakadze akajabuli ngayo. Manje sewutabukhumbula bubi babo, abajezisele tono tabo: Bayawubuyela eGibhithe." 
Hosea8:14 Israyeli sewumkhohliwe uMenti wakhe, wakha tigodlo; Juda sewubiyele emadolobha lamanyenti. Kodvwa ngitawutfumela umlilo etikwalamadolobha abo, loyawushisa letinqaba tabo uticedze.”" 
Hosea9:1 Awu, Israyeli, ungajabuli; ungatsakasi njengaletinye tive. Ngobe nine aniketsembeki kuNkulunkulu wenu. Nitsandza inkhokhelo yebugwadla bekukhonta tithico; nifuna kukhokhelwa kuwo onkhe emabala ekubhulela kolo." 
Hosea9:2 Emabala ekubhulela kolo nematje ekuhluta liwayini ngeke abondle bantfu; liwayini lelisha bangeke balitfole. 
Hosea9:3 Bangeke basale eveni laSimakadze; Efrayimu uyawubuyela eGibhithe, adle kudla lokungcolile e-Asiriya." 
Hosea9:4 Bangeke bayitfululele kuSimakadze iminikelo yeliwayini, kantsi nemihlatjelo yabo ingeke imjabulise. Imihlatjelo lenjalo kubo iyawufanana nesinkhwa salabalilako; bonkhe labayidlako bayawungcola ngekwemtsetfo. Lokudla kuyawuba kwabo; kungeke kungeniswe ethempelini laSimakadze." 
Hosea9:5 Niyakwente njani ngelilanga lemadzili enu lamisiwe, ngemalanga emadzili aSimakadze?" 
Hosea9:6 Ngisho nome bangaphunyula ekubhujisweni, iGibhithe iyawubabutsela ndzawonye, iMemfisi ibangcwabe. Emagugu abo esiliva ayawumbonywa ngumena wetinchachabutane, nemanyeva ayawumbonya emathende abo." 
Hosea9:7 Emalanga esijeziso ayeta, yebo emalanga emphindziselo asasondzele, Israyeli kufanele akwati loko. Njengobe tono tenu titinyenti kangaka nebutsa benu bubukhulu kangaka, umphrofethi sewutsatfwa njengesilima, umuntfu wesembulo atsatfwe njengeluhlanya." 
Hosea9:8 Umphrofethi utfunyelwe nguNkulunkulu kutsi abe ngumlindzi wa-Efrayimu, noko tingibe timele umphrofethi kuto tonkhe tindlela takhe, nebutsa busendlini yaNkulunkulu wakhe." 
Hosea9:9 Bonakele ngalokujulile njengasetikhatsini taseGibeya. Nkulunkulu uyawubukhumbula bubi babo, abajezisele tono tabo." 
Hosea9:10 “Ngesikhatsi nangitfola Israyeli, bekungatsi ngitfola emagelebisi elugwadvule; ngesikhatsi ngibona boyihlo, bekungatsi ngibona titselo tekucala esihlahleni semakhiwa. Kodvwa kwatsi nabefika eBhali Pheyori, batehlukanisela leso sithico lesilihlazo, nabo baze benyanyeka njengalentfo bebayitsandza." 
Hosea9:11 Bukhulu ba-Efrayimu buyawundiza bemuke njengenyoni, kubete kutalwa kwebantfwana, kubete kutetfwala, kubete ngisho nekubamba sisu." 
Hosea9:12 Nome ngabe bakhulisa bantfwana babo, ngiyawubemuka bona kungasali muntfu. Maye kubo, mhlazane ngibafulatsela." 
Hosea9:13 Efrayimu ngimbonile, njengeThire, ahlanyelwe endzaweni lenhle. Kodvwa Efrayimu uyawukhipha bantfwana bakhe, abayise kumbulali.”" 
Hosea9:14 Simakadze, banike! Kodvwa utabanikani? Banike titalo letingabambi, ubanike nemabele late lubisi." 
Hosea9:15 “Ngenca yabo bonkhe baseGilgali ngabazonda khona lapho. Ngenca yetono tabo labatentile, ngitabacosha lapha endlini yami. Ngingeke ngiphindze ngibatsandze; bonkhe baholi babo bayangihlubuka." 
Hosea9:16 Efrayimu uhushekile, imphandze yakhe ibunile, akasatseli titselo. Ngisho nome bangatala bantfwana, ngiyakuyibulala leyo mbewu yabo labayitsandzako.”" 
Hosea9:17 Nkulunkulu wami uyawubala, ngobe abakamlaleli yena; bayawuba ngimizulane emkhatsini wetive." 
Hosea10:1 Israyeli abengumvini lowenabako watitselela yena titselo. Satsi sitselo sakhe sisandza, wakha emalati lamanye; latsi live lakhe lisatfutfuka, wahlobisa ematje akhe lakhontwako." 
Hosea10:2 Inhlitiyo yabo iyakhohlisana, manje sekufanele baletfwale licala labo. Simakadze utawephula emalati abo, abhidlite nalamatje abo lakhontwako." 
Hosea10:3 Bayawube sebayakhuluma batsi: “Asinayo inkhosi, ngobe asizange simhloniphe Simakadze. Kodvwa nome ngabe besinayo inkhosi, beyitasentela ini?”" 
Hosea10:4 Benta tetsembiso letinyenti, bafungele emanga, bente netivumelwane. Ngako kwehlulela emacala kuyahluma njengencatsavane lenebutsi emiseleni yemasimi lalinyiwe." 
Hosea10:5 Bantfu labahlala eSamariya bayalesabela, lelitfole lelisithico saseBhethi Aveni. Bantfu balo bayawulililela, kanjalo nebaphristi balo labalikhontako, labo lababetsakasele inkhatimulo yalo yegolide, bayawulililela ngobe itsatfwe kubo yayiswa ekutfunjweni." 
Hosea10:6 Nalo lelitfole liyakwetfwalwa liyiswe e-Asiriya, liyewuba setfulo enkhosini lenkhulu. Efrayimu uyawuhlazeka; Israyeli uyawuba nemahloni ngetithico takhe tetigodvo." 
Hosea10:7 ISamariya nenkhosi yayo kuyawuphephuka njengelusaba lwemuka etikwemanti emfula. 
Hosea10:8 Tindzawo letiphakeme tebubi tiyawubhujiswa, leso sono sa-Israyeli. Emanyeva nemitfuma kuyawukhula kumbonye emalati abo. Bayawube sebakhuluma etintsabeni batsi: “Simbonyeni!” nasemagcumeni batsi: “Dzilikelani etikwetfu!”" 
Hosea10:9 “Kusukela ngesikhatsi saseGibeya, awu Israyeli, seloku niyona, futsi seloku nisachubeka niyona.” Imphi ingeke ibakhandze yini lababi eGibeya?" 
Hosea10:10 Ngitimisele kutsi ngitabajezisa; tive titawubutsana timelane nabo, tibabophe ngenca yetono tabo letinyenti." 
Hosea10:11 “Efrayimu ulitfokati leliceceshiwe, lelikutsandzako kubhula emabele; ngako ngiyawubeka lijoko entsanyeni yakhe lenhle. Ngiyawubopha Efrayimu, Juda kufanele alime, Jakobe advube umhlabatsi." 
Hosea10:12 Ngake ngatsi: ‘Tihlanyeleleni kulunga, nivune titselo temusa longapheli, bese nilima ingcatfo; ngobe sesikhatsi sekufuna Simakadze, adzimate efike ehlisele imvula yekulunga etikwenu.’" 
Hosea10:13 Kodvwa senihlanyele bubi, navuna bubi, nadla sitselo senkhohlakalo. “Ngobe nisuke netsembela kuwenu emandla nasemabutfweni enu lamanyenti," 
Hosea10:14 kudvuma kwemphi kuyawusuka kumelane nebantfu benu, khona kutewutsi tonkhe tinqaba tenu tibhidlitwe, njengobe Shalmani abhidlita iBhethi Abeli ngelilanga lemphi, mhlazana bomake baphihlitwa phansi emhlabatsini kanye nebantfwababo." 
Hosea10:15 Awu, Betheli, kuyakwenteka kona loko-ke nakuwe, ngobe bubi bakho bukhulu. Kuyawutsi kusa ngalelo langa, inkhosi yaka-Israyeli iyawube seyibhujiswe yaphela.”" 
Hosea11:1 “Ngesikhatsi Israyeli asengumntfwana, ngamtsandza, indvodzana yami ngayibita, ngayikhipha eGibhithe." 
Hosea11:2 Kodvwa ngatsi ngisachubeka kubita Israyeli, nabo bachubeka bakhwesha kimi. Banikela imihlatjelo kuboBhali, batfuncisela titfombe imphepho." 
Hosea11:3 Ngimi lowacatfulisa Efrayimu, ngamtsatsa ngambamba ngemikhono; kodvwa akazange akunake kutsi ngimi lowamphilisa." 
Hosea11:4 Ngabadvonsa ngetintsambo temusa webuntfu, ngetibopho telutsandvo; ngaphakamisa lijoko entsanyeni yabo, ngagobondzelela kubo, ngabafunta." 
Hosea11:5 “Bangeke yini babuyele eGibhithe, yona i-Asiriya ingeke yini ibuse etikwabo, njengobe naku bayala kuphendvuka?" 
Hosea11:6 Kuyawuba bumanyamanya betinkemba emadolobheni abo, tiyawubhidlita imicabo yetinsimbi yemasango abo, tiwacedze emacebo abo." 
Hosea11:7 Bantfu bami batimisele kusuka kimi. Ngisho nome sebangambita Longetulu Kwako Konkhe, angeke abaphakamise ngisho nangayiphi indlela." 
Hosea11:8 “Ngingakuyekelela kanjani, wena Efrayimu? Ngingakulahla kanjani, wena Israyeli? Ngingakuphatsa kanjani njenga-Adma? Ngingakwenta kanjani ufanane naSeboyimu? Inhlitiyo yami iguculiwe ngekhatsi kwami; sonkhe sihawu sami sivuselelekile." 
Hosea11:9 Ngingeke ngiyisebentise intfukutselo yami leyesabekako, futsi ngingeke ngiphindze ngimbhubhise Efrayimu. Ngobe mine nginguNkulunkulu, angisiye umuntfu, nginguLongcwele losemkhatsini wenu. Ngingeke ngifike ngelulaka." 
Hosea11:10 Bayawulandzela Simakadze; uyawubhodla njengelibhubesi. Nakabhodla, bantfwabakhe bayawuta batfutfumela, bachamuka ngasenshonalanga." 
Hosea11:11 Bayawuta batfutfumela njengetinyoni tiphuma eGibhithe, nanjengematuba aphuma e-Asiriya. Ngiyawubahlalisa emakhaya abo,” kusho Simakadze." 
Hosea11:12 Efrayimu ungitungelete ngemanga, indlu yaka-Israyeli yangitungeleta ngenkhohliso. Juda naye usichomoketi lesimelene naNkulunkulu, yebo, umelene naLongcwele lowetsembekile." 
Hosea12:1 Efrayimu utondla ngemoya, ucoshana nemoya wasemphumalanga lonkhe lilanga, wandzise emanga nebudlova. Wakha sivumelwane ne-Asiriya, atfumele emafutsa emncumo eGibhithe." 
Hosea12:2 Simakadze ubeka Juda licala, utawujezisa Jakobe njengekwetindlela takhe, amkhokhele ngangekwemisebenti yakhe." 
Hosea12:3 Esiswini wabamba sitsendze semnakabo; asangumuntfu lomdzala walwa naNkulunkulu. 
Hosea12:4 Walwa nengilosi, wayehlula. Wakhala ancenga sibusiso sakhe, wakhandzana naye eBetheli, wakhuluma naye khona lapho," 
Hosea12:5 Simakadze Nkulunkulu longuSomandla, nguSimakadze Libito lakhe ladvume ngalo." 
Hosea12:6 Kodvwa wena kufanele ubuyele kuNkulunkulu wakho, umtsandze, ulalele imitsetfo yakhe, wente intsandvo yakhe, ulindzele Nkulunkulu wakho ngaso sonkhe sikhatsi." 
Hosea12:7 Umhwebi usebentisa tikalo letingaketsembeki; uyakutsandza kukhwabanisa timali. 
Hosea12:8 Efrayimu uyatigabatisa, utsi: “Nginjinge kakhulu; senginemfuyo lenyenti. Ngalobunjinga bami bonkhe bangeke bakutfole lokubi nome sono kimi.”" 
Hosea12:9 “Mine nginguSimakadze Nkulunkulu wakho, lowakukhipha eGibhithe; ngiyawuphindze ngikwente uhlale emathendeni, njengasetikhatsini temadzili akho lemisiwe." 
Hosea12:10 Ngakhuluma kubaphrofethi, ngabanika imibono leminyenti, ngakhuluma imifanekiso ngabo.”" 
Hosea12:11 Gileyadi ukhohlakele yini? Bantfu bakhe akusibantfu balutfo! Bayayenta imihlatjelo yetinkunzi eGilgali, ngako-ke emalati abo ayawufanana netincumbi tematje lasensimini lelinyiwe." 
Hosea12:12 Jakobe wabalekela eveni lase-Aramu; Israyeli wasebentela kutfola umfati, ngekwelusa timvu." 
Hosea12:13 Simakadze wasebentisa umphrofethi kuze abuyise Israyeli amkhiphe eGibhithe, wamnakekela ngesandla semphrofethi." 
Hosea12:14 Kodvwa Efrayimu sewucunule Simakadze kakhulu, wadzimate watfukutsela; Simakadze wakhe uyawumetfwesa licala lakhe lekucitsa ingati, amkhokhise ngaloko kumhlazisa kwakhe." 
Hosea13:1 Abetsi Efrayimu nakakhuluma, kutfutfumele emadvodza; abephakanyisiwe ka-Israyeli. Kodvwa waba nelicala lekukhonta Bhali, wafa." 
Hosea13:2 Manje bachubeka nako kona; batentela tithico ngesiliva yabo, titfombe letakhiwe ngekuhlakanipha lokukhulu. Konkhe kungumsebenti wencondzi yetekubata. “Benta imihlatjelo ngebantfu bange letithico letimise kwematfole.”" 
Hosea13:3 Ngako-ke bayawufanana nenkhungu yasekuseni, babe njengematolo asekuseni lanyamalalako, bafanane nemakhoba laphephuka ebaleni lekubhula, babe njengentfutfu lephuma ngelifasitelo ibaleke." 
Hosea13:4 “Kodvwa mine nginguSimakadze longuNkulunkulu wakho, lowakukhipha eGibhithe. Animati lomunye Nkulunkulu ngaphandle kwami; kute uMsindzisi ngaphandle kwami." 
Hosea13:5 Ngakunakekela usesehlane, eveni lelinekushisa lokuvutsako." 
Hosea13:6 Ngatsi nangibondla emadlelweni lamahle, besutsa; batsi kube besutse, base bayatigabatisa, base bayangikhohlwa." 
Hosea13:7 Ngako ngiyakuta kubo senginjengelibhubesi, njengengwe ngiyawubalalela endleleni." 
Hosea13:8 Njengelibhele nalemukwe bantfwabalo, ngiyawubesukela ngibadladlabule. Njengelibhubesi ngiyawubashwabudzela, silwane sesiganga siyawubadzabudzabula." 
Hosea13:9 “Awu, Israyeli, ngiyawukubhubhisa ngobe umelene nami, uphambene nemsiti wakho." 
Hosea13:10 Iphi inkhosi yakho, kuze itewukusindzisa? Tiphi tikhulu takho kuwo onkhe lamadolobha akho lowakhuluma ngato, watsi: ‘Nginike inkhosi netikhulu’?" 
Hosea13:11 Ngako ngekutfukutsela kwami nganinika inkhosi, nangelulaka lwami ngaphindze ngayisusa." 
Hosea13:12 Licala la-Efrayimu lilondvolotiwe, tono takhe tibhalwe phansi." 
Hosea13:13 Imihelo yemfati nasatawubeleka iyamfikela, kodvwa ungumntfwana lote kuhlakanipha; kutsi nakufika sikhatsi sakhe, angete eta ngasemnyango wesibeletfo." 
Hosea13:14 “Ngiyawubahlawulela yini emandleni elithuna ngibahlenge ekufeni? Ye Kufa, tiphi tifo takho letibulalanako? Ye Thuna, kuphi kubhubhisa kwakho? “Ngiyawubate sihawu." 
Hosea13:15 Ngisho nome angahluma njengembali emkhatsini wetinhlanga, umoya waSimakadze, wangasemphumalanga, uyakuta, uhhusha uchamuka ngasehlane, umtfombo waka-Efrayimu uyawuphelelwa ngemanti, nesicobho sakhe some. Likamelo lakhe lekulondvolota liyawuphangwa tonkhe tintfo talo letingemagugu." 
Hosea13:16 Bantfu baseSamariya kufanele batitfwalele licala labo, ngobe bamhlubukile Nkulunkulu wabo. Bayawubulawa ngenkemba; tinswane tabo tiyawusacatwa phansi emhlabatsini, labakhulelwe babo bahhujutwe tisu.”" 
Hosea14:1 Awu, ma-Israyeli, buyani, nibuyele kuSimakadze Nkulunkulu wenu. Tono tenu ngito letiniwisile." 
Hosea14:2 Tsatsani emavi nibuyele nawo kuSimakadze. Thandazani kuye, nitsi: “Sitsetselele tonkhe tono tetfu, usemukele ngemusa, khona sitewunikela ngetitselo temilomo yetfu." 
Hosea14:3 I-Asiriya ngeke isisindzise; singeke siwagibele emahhashi emphi. Singeke siphindze sisho futsi, sitsi: ‘Bonkulunkulu betfu’ kuloko lokwakhiwa tandla tetfu, ngobe kuwe wena wedvwa tintsandzane letite boyise titfola sihawu.”" 
Hosea14:4 “Ngiyawukuphilisa kunhlanhlatsela kwabo, ngibatsandze ngekukhululeka, ngobe intfukutselo yami seyisukile kubo." 
Hosea14:5 Ngiyawufanana nematolo ku-Israyeli; uyawuchakaza njengembali. Njengemsedari waseLebanoni uyawutishonisa phansi timphandze takhe; 
Hosea14:6 emahlumela akhe ayawukhula. Bukhatikhati bakhe bube njengesihlahla semncumo, emakha akhe afanane nemsedari waseLebanoni." 
Hosea14:7 Bantfu bayawuphindze bahlale emtfuntini wakhe. Bayawuhluma njengetinhlavu. Bayawuchakaza njengesihlahla semvini, neludvumo lwabo luyawufanana neliwayini laseLebanoni." 
Hosea14:8 Awu, Efrayimu, ngisenandzabani netithico? Ngiyawukuphendvula, ngikunakekele. Ngifanana nesihlahla lesiluhlata sesipheshula; kutsela kahle kwakho kuphuma kimi.”" 
Hosea14:9 Ngubani lohlakaniphile? Uyawutibona letintfo. Ngubani lokwati kubona tintfo letifihlakele? Utaticondza kahle letintfo. Tindlela taSimakadze tilungile, labalungile bahamba ngato, kodvwa labahlubukako bayakhubeka kuto." 
Joel1:1 Livi laSimakadze lefika kuJoweli, umsa waPhethuweli, latsi:" 
Joel1:2 Lalelani naku, nine baholi, nani nonkhe lenihlala kulelive. Kwase kwenteka yini loku ngetikhatsi tenu nome ngetikhatsi taboyihlomkhulu?" 
Joel1:3 Loku kutjeleni bantfwabenu, nebantfwabenu bakutjele bantfwababo, nebantfwababo bakutjele situkulwane lesilandzelako," 
Joel1:4 kutsi loko lokwasala nyakana welifu lesikhonyane sekudliwe tibotfo naloko lokusele kuletibotfo sekudliwe sigegedlana, naloko lokusele kulesigegedlana, sekudliwe tinkumbi." 
Joel1:5 Phaphamani, nine tidzakwa, nikhale! Lilani nonkhe nine banatsi beliwayini, lilani ngenca yaleliwayini lelisha, ngobe selisusiwe emilonyeni yenu." 
Joel1:6 Sive sihlasele live lami, sive lesinemandla nalesingenakubalwa; sinematinyo lanjengewelibhubesi lelidvuna netingcovela tematinyo letinjengewelibhubesi lelisikati." 
Joel1:7 Lesive sibhubhise imivini yami, safohlota imikhiwa yami. Sebule emagcolo ayo, sawalahla le khashane, sashiya emagala ato amhlophe." 
Joel1:8 Lilani njengentfombi leyembetse emasaka, iwavunulele umyeni wayo webusha." 
Joel1:9 Iminikelo yalokutinhlavu neyetinatfo seyiyekelwe endlini yaSimakadze. Baphristi sebayakhala, labo labakhonta embikwaSimakadze." 
Joel1:10 Emasimi asonakele, nemhlaba sewomile, ngobe nesivuno sibhujisiwe, neliwayini lelisha sekwabate, nemafutsa akasatfolakali." 
Joel1:11 Jabhani, nine balimi, lilani, nine lenilima tivini. Dzabukelani kolo kanye nebhali, ngobe sivuno sensimi sibhujisiwe." 
Joel1:12 Umvini sewomile, nemkhiwa sewubunile kanjalo nemahananandza, nemasundvu, nesihlahla semahhabhula kanye nato tonkhe tihlahla tensimi setomile. Ngempela kujabula kweluntfu sekuphelile." 
Joel1:13 Yembatsani emasaka, nine baphristi, nilile. Khalani, nine lenikhonta elatini. Wotani nitekwembatsa emasaka busuku bonkhe, nine lenikhonta embikwaNkulunkulu wami, ngobe umnikelo walokutinhlavu kanye nemnikelo wetinatfo sebakugodlile, akuseti endlini yaNkulunkulu wenu." 
Joel1:14 Memetelani kuzila lokungcwele, nimemetele umhlangano longcwele, butsani baholi kanye nabo bonkhe labahlala kulelive, nibabitele endlini yaSimakadze Nkulunkulu wenu, nikhale kuSimakadze." 
Joel1:15 Maye, lilanga lelesabekako! Ngobe lilanga laSimakadze lisedvute, lilanga Somandla layawuletsa ngalo imbhubhiso." 
Joel1:16 Kudla akukapheli yini embikwetfu? Kujabula nekutfokota akukakhawuli yini endlini yaNkulunkulu wetfu? 
Joel1:17 Inhlanyelo seyiyabuna ngaphansi kwemagadze ayo. Tingungumakamelo setiyimfuhlululu, kanjalo netingungu setibhidlikile, ngobe naloku lokutinhlavu sekomile." 
Joel1:18 Maye, tinkhomo tiyabhonsa! Imihlambi ihlakatekile, ngobe ayinalo lidlelo, ngisho nemihlambi yetimvu iyahlupheka." 
Joel1:19 Awu, Simakadze, ngikhala kuwe, ngobe umlilo sewukhotse onkhe emadlelo, nemalangabi asashise tonkhe tihlahla tesiganga." 
Joel1:20 Ngisho netilwane tesiganga tikhalela wena, imifula yemanti seyomile, nemlilo sewuwakhotse onkhe lamadlelo." 
Joel2:1 Vutselani licilongo eSiyoni, nilikhalise entsabeni yami lengcwele. Bonkhe labahlala eveni abatfutfumele, ngobe lilanga laSimakadze liyeta, yebo, selisondzele." 
Joel2:2 Lelo lilanga lebumnyama nesigayegaye, lilanga lemafu nebumnyama lobukhulu. Njengekusa nakwendlaleka etintsabeni kunjalo nekuta kwemphi lenkhulu nalenemandla, lengazange seyibe khona nasendvulo, futsi ingeke iphindze ibe khona nome ngunini." 
Joel2:3 Embikwaleso sive ngumlilo lokhotsako, emvakwaso lilangabi lelilavukako. Embikwaso live lifanana nensimi yase-Edeni, emvakwaso lilihlane lelingenalutfo. Kute lokusalako lapho sihambe khona." 
Joel2:4 Sibonakala sifanana nemahhashi, siholobha njengemahhashi emphi lagitjelwe." 
Joel2:5 Ngemsindvo waso lofanana netincola temphi sigalaja ticongo tetintsaba; sisasamba njengemlilo nawushisa tibi, sihleleke njengemphi lenemandla levivela kuhlasela." 
Joel2:6 Kubonakala kwaso kutfutfumelisa tive, kwente bonkhe buso buphaphatseke." 
Joel2:7 Sihlasela njengemabutfo sicance tindvonga njengemasotja. Sonkhe sihamba silandzelane ngemigca, singaphambuki endleleni yaso." 
Joel2:8 Asivimbelani sodvwana endleleni, leso naleso sihamba sicondze embili. Sitseleka sifolokohlele emkhatsini wemabutfo ngaphandle kwekutsi sehlukane ekhatsi." 
Joel2:9 Sitselekela lidolobha, sigijime etikwelubondza. Sikhwela singene etindlini, njengemasela singene ngemafasitelo." 
Joel2:10 Embikwaso umhlaba uyatamatama, kutsi sibhakabhaka sitfutfumele, lilanga nenyanga kube mnyama, kutsi tinkhanyeti tingabe tisakhanya." 
Joel2:11 Simakadze uyabhavumula embikwalemphi yakhe. Emabutfo akhe manyenti ngalokungabaleki; banemandla labo labalalela umyalo wakhe. Lilanga laSimakadze likhulu, liyesabeka. Ngubani nje longemelana nalo?" 
Joel2:12 Simakadze uyakhuluma utsi: “Namanje phendvukani, nibuye kimi ngenhlitiyo yenu yonkhe, ngekuzila, nangekukhala kanye nangekulila.”" 
Joel2:13 Dzabulani tinhlitiyo tenu, hhayi tembatfo tenu. Buyelani kuSimakadze Nkulunkulu wenu, ngobe unemusa nesihawu, uyephuta kutfukutsela, unelutsandvo loluphuphumako, atsambe, angete ayehlisa inhlekelele." 
Joel2:14 Ngubani lowatiko? Mhlawumbe angaba nesihawu, ashiye sibusiso, bese kuba ngiminikelo yalokutinhlavu neyetinatfo yaSimakadze Nkulunkulu wenu." 
Joel2:15 Vutselani licilongo eSiyoni, nimemetele kuzila lokungcwele, nibite umhlangano longcwele." 
Joel2:16 Hlanganisani sive sibe ndzawonye, niwungcwelise lowo mhlangano; hlanganisani baholi, nihlanganise nebantfwana, yebo, ngisho nalabamunyako imbala. Umkhwenyane akashiye indlu yakhe, namakoti ashiye indlu yakhe." 
Joel2:17 Baphristi labakhonta embikwaSimakadze abakhale emkhatsini wemhubhe welithempeli nelilati. Yebo, abakhale batsi: “Awu, Simakadze, hawukela sive sakho, ungavumi kutsi lifa lakho lelingitsi libe yinhlekisa nentfo yekweyiswa tive. Asikho nesidzingo sekutsi letive tingaze titsi: ‘Uphi loNkulunkulu wabo?’ ”" 
Joel2:18 Simakadze utawuba nenshisekelo ngelive lakhe, asihawukele sive sakhe." 
Joel2:19 Simakadze utawuphendvula atsi kubo: “Nginipha sivuno salokutinhlavu, liwayini lelisha kanye nemafutsa, lokwenele kutsi kunganesutsisa; ngingeke ngiphindze nginente nibe yinhlekisa etiveni." 
Joel2:20 “Imphi yesitsa sangasenyakatfo ngitayicosha isuke kini, ngiyivimbetele eveni lelilihlane. Lingembili layo licondze elwandle lwangasemphumalanga, lingemuva layo licondze elwandle lwangasenshonalanga. Luboti lwayo luyawuphakama, nekunuka kwayo kwenyuke.” Ngempela wente tintfo letinkhulu." 
Joel2:21 Ungesabi, wena live, jabula utfokote. Ngempela Simakadze wente tintfo letinkhulu." 
Joel2:22 Ningesabi, nani tilwane tesiganga, ngobe emadlelo asaneluhlata, tihlahla titsela titselo tato, umkhiwa nemvini nako kutsela titselo tako." 
Joel2:23 Jabulani, nine sive saseSiyoni, tfokotani kuSimakadze Nkulunkulu wenu, ngobe sewuniphe umfundzisi wekulunga. Unitfumela imvula lenyenti, imvula yasekwindla neyasentfwasahlobo njengakucala." 
Joel2:24 Tindzawo tekubhulela emabele titawugcwala tivuno talokutinhlavu; imiphandza itawugcwala iphuphume ngeliwayini lelisha nangemafutsa. 
Joel2:25 “Ngitanikhokhela kuloko lokudliwe sikhonyane ngaleyo minyaka, loko lokwadliwa tibotfo nesigegedlana, nelifu letinkumbi, imphi yami lengayitfumela emkhatsini wenu." 
Joel2:26 Nitawuba nenala, nidle nize nesutse, nitalidvumisa Libito laSimakadze Nkulunkulu wenu, lowente timangaliso emkhatsini wenu. Sive sami singeke siphindze sihlazeke." 
Joel2:27 Niyawube seniyati kutsi ngika-Israyeli, nekutsi nginguSimakadze Nkulunkulu wenu, nekutsi futsi kute lomunye ngaphandle kwami. Sive sami singeke siphindze sihlazeke.”" 
Joel2:28 “Emvakwaloko ngiyawutfulula Moya wami etikwabo bonkhe bantfu. Emadvodzana nemadvodzakati enu ayawuphrofetha, emakhehla enu ayawuphupha emaphupho, nemajaha enu ayawubona imibono." 
Joel2:29 Yebo, kulawo malanga ngiyawutfululela Moya wami etincekwini nasetincekukatini tami." 
Joel2:30 Ngiyakwenta timangaliso emazulwini nasemhlabeni: ingati, nemlilo, nekushunca kwentfutfu." 
Joel2:31 Lilanga liyawuba mnyama, inyanga ibe bovu njengengati, lingakefiki lilanga lelikhulu nalelesabekako laSimakadze." 
Joel2:32 Bonkhe labayakulibita Libito laSimakadze bayawusindziswa, ngobe entsabeni iSiyoni naseJerusalema, kuyawuba nenkhululeko, njengobe Simakadze asashito emkhatsini waleyo nsali lebitwa nguSimakadze.”" 
Joel3:1 “Kulawo malanga nakuleso sikhatsi nasengibuyisela tibusiso kulakaJuda naseJerusalema," 
Joel3:2 ngiyawubutsa tonkhe tive ngitehlisele eSigodzini sakaJehoshafati. Lapho-ke ngulapho ngiyawutehlulela khona ngenca yelifa lami, sive sami saka-Israyeli, ngobe tasakata sive sami, tasifaka kuto tonkhe tive, talidzabudzabula live lami." 
Joel3:3 Sive sami tehlukaniselana ngaso ngenkatho, tatsengisa ngebafana, kuze titewukhokhela tingwadla; tatsengisa ngemantfombatana, kuze kutsi titewutsenga liwayini tinatse." 
Joel3:4 “Pho, yini leniphambane ngayo nami, nine Thire neSidoni kanye nani nonkhe nine tifundza taseFilistiya? Kungabe nikhokha sibhongobhongo ngalengikwentile yini? Nangabe nikhokha sibhongobhongo, ngekushesha nangekuphatima kweliso, ngitawubuyisela etikwetinhloko tenu loko lenikwentile." 
Joel3:5 Ngobe nitsetse isiliva yami negolide yami nakwetfwala konkhe lokungemagugu nemcebo wami lomkhulu nayawukufaka emathempelini enu. 
Joel3:6 Natsengisa bantfu bakaJuda nebaseJerusalema kumaGriki, nentela kutsi batewuba khashane nemikhawulo yelive labo." 
Joel3:7 “Bukani la, ngitabavusa kuleto tindzawo lenibatsengise kuto, ngitawubuyisela etikwetinhloko tenu loko lenikwentile." 
Joel3:8 Ngiyawutsengisa emadvodzana nemadvodzakati enu esiveni sakaJuda, bese sibatsengisa esiveni sakaSheba, sive lesikhashane kakhulu.” Simakadze sewukhulumile." 
Joel3:9 “Memetelani naku etiveni: “ ‘Tilungiseleleni imphi! Vusani emabutfo! Emasotja akasondzele atewuhlasela. 
Joel3:10 Fulani emakhuba enu abe tinkemba, netikelo tekutsena tihlahla nitente tibe tikhali. Ngisho nalobutsakatsaka akatsi: “Nginemandla!”" 
Joel3:11 Sheshisani nite, nonkhe nine tive, tindzawo tonkhe, nihlanganele lapho.’ ” Awu, Simakadze, yehlisa emabutfo akho!" 
Joel3:12 “Tive ativuswe tehlele eSigodzini sakaJehoshafati, ngobe lapho ngulapho ngitawuhlala khona ngitekwehlulela tonkhe tive letikuleyo ndzawo." 
Joel3:13 Faka lisikela usike, ngobe sekufanele kuvunwe. Wota, ugcobagcobe emagelebisi, ngobe litje lekuhlutela seligcwele, nemiphandza seyigcwele iyaphuphuma, bunjalo-ke nebubi babo!”" 
Joel3:14 Ticumbi ngeticumbi esigodzini sekwehlulela! Ngobe lilanga laSimakadze selisondzele esigodzini sekwehlulela! 
Joel3:15 Lilanga nenyanga kutaba mnyama, netinkhanyeti tingabe tisakhanya." 
Joel3:16 Simakadze utawubhodla aseSiyoni, abhavumule eJerusalema, umhlaba nesibhakabhaka kutfutfumele. Kodvwa Simakadze utawuba siphephelo esiveni sakhe, abe yinqaba yesive saka-Israyeli." 
Joel3:17 “Niyawube seniyati-ke kutsi: Mine, Simakadze, Nkulunkulu wenu, ngihlala eSiyoni, intsaba yami lengcwele. IJerusalema iyawuba ngcwele, kute betive labayawuphindze bayihlasele." 
Joel3:18 “Ngalelo langa tintsaba tiyawuntfontsa liwayini lelisha, kutsi emagcuma agelete lubisi, tihosha takaJuda tigijime emanti. Umtfombo uyawugeleta uphume endlini yaSimakadze unisele Sigodzi Semigamba." 
Joel3:19 Kodvwa iGibhithe iyawuphundleka ibe lihlane, i-Edomu ibe lihlane lelingenalutfo, ngenca yebudlova lobentiwe esiveni sakaJuda, eveni labacitsa kulo ingati lengenacala." 
Joel3:20 Live lakaJuda liyawuhlala lakhelwe bantfu phakadze naphakadze, kanjalo neJerusalema iyawuhlala inebantfu titukulwane ngetitukulwane." 
Joel3:21 Licala labo lengati, lengisengakalitsetseleli ngiyawulitsetselela.” Simakadze uhlala eSiyoni!" 
Amos1:1 Lawa ngemavi a-Amose, lomunye webantfu lababefuye timvu eThekhowa, ngaloko lakuboniswa lokumacondzana nema-Israyeli iminyaka lemibili umhlaba ungakatamatami, ngesikhatsi Uziya ayinkhosi yakaJuda, Jerobowamu, umsa waJehoyashi, ayinkhosi yaka-Israyeli." 
Amos1:2 Amose wakhuluma watsi: “Simakadze uyabhodla eSiyoni, yebo, Simakadze uyabhavumula aseJerusalema, emadlelo ebelusi ayoma, nesicongo sentsaba iKhameli siyabuna.”" 
Amos1:3 Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: “Bantfu baseDamaseko bone kwaze kwengca, ngaleso sizatfu ngingeke ngihlale ngingabajezisi. Baphatse sive sakaGileyadi ngensila nakabuhlungu, basihhudlisa phansi njengetihliphi nanjengetihhudlo." 
Amos1:4 Ngako ngitakwehlisela umlilo endlini yakaHazayeli, lotawushisa ucotfule leto tigodlo takaBheni Hadadi." 
Amos1:5 Ngitawubhidlita emasango aseDamaseko, ngibhubhise inkhosi leseSigodzini sase-Aveni, nalowo lophetse indvuku yebukhosi eBhethi Edeni. Sive semaSiriya sitawutfunjelwa eKhiri,” kusho Simakadze." 
Amos1:6 Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: “Bantfu baseGaza bone kwaze kwengca, ngaleso sizatfu ngingeke ngihlale ngingabajezisi. Batfumba yonkhe imindeni yesive bayitsengisa ka-Edomu." 
Amos1:7 Ngako-ke ngitakwehlisela umlilo etikwetibondza taseGaza, lotawucotfula tonkhe tigodlo tayo." 
Amos1:8 Ngitayibhubhisa inkhosi yase-Ashdodi nalowo lophetse indvuku yebukhosi e-Ashkeloni. Ngitayivukela i-Ekroni, ngiwabhubhise onkhe emaFilisti kungasali namunye,” kusho iNkhosi Simakadze." 
Amos1:9 Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: “Bantfu baseThire bone kwaze kwengca, ngaleso sizatfu ngingeke ngihlale ngingabajezisi. Batfumba yonkhe imindeni yesive bayitsengisa ka-Edomu, bangete basigcina sivumelwane sebuhlobo lesasentiwe." 
Amos1:10 Ngako-ke ngitakwehlisela umlilo etikwetindvonga taseThire lotawucotfula tigodlo tayo.” 
Amos1:11 Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: “Bantfu baka-Edomu bone kwaze kwengca, ngaleso sizatfu ngingeke ngihlale ngingabajezisi. Bacosha bomnakabo ngenkemba balahla sihawu, intfukutselo yabo yabhebhetseka kokuphela, yebo, nekutfukutsela kwabo kwakungasekhuteki." 
Amos1:12 Ngako-ke ngitakwehlisela umlilo etikwaThemani lotawucotfula tigodlo taseBhosra.” 
Amos1:13 Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: “Bantfu baka-Amoni bone kwaze kwengca, ngaleso sizatfu ngingeke ngihlale ngingabajezisi. Ema-Amoni abahlinze beva bafati labatetfwele bakaGileyadi, kuze atekwandzisa iminyele yawo." 
Amos1:14 Ngako-ke ngitawulumeka umlilo etikwetibondza taseRabha lotawucotfula tonkhe tigodlo tayo emkhatsini webumayemaye bekukhala ngelilanga lekulwa imphi, nasemkhatsini wemimoya lenemandla, ngelilanga lesivunguvungu." 
Amos1:15 Inkhosi yabo iyawudzingiswa kanye nato tonkhe tikhulu tayo,” kusho Simakadze." 
Amos2:1 Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: “Bantfu bakaMowabi bone kwaze kwengca, ngaleso sizatfu ngingeke ngihlale ngingabajezisi. Bashise ematsambo enkhosi yaka-Edomu, adzimate aba njengemcakaco." 
Amos2:2 Ngako-ke ngitakwehlisela umlilo etikwaMowabi, lotawucotfula tigodlo taseKheriyothi. Bantfu bakaMowabi bayawufela emsindvweni lomkhulu wemphi ngesikhatsi nakuliwa imphi, emkhatsini wekukhala bumayemaye bemabutfo kanye nasekukhaleni kwelicilongo." 
Amos2:3 Ngitawubhubhisa umbusi wakaMowabi kanye nato tonkhe tikhulu takhe,” kusho Simakadze."
