Amos2:4 Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: “Bantfu bakaJuda bone kwaze kwengca, ngaleso sizatfu ngingeke ngihlale ngingabajezisi. Bawulahlile umtsetfo waSimakadze, bangete batigcina timiso takhe, bedukiswe tithico, lekutithico letatikhontwa boyisemkhulu." 
Amos2:5 Ngako-ke ngitakwehlisela umlilo etikwaJuda lotawushisa ucotfule tigodlo taseJerusalema.” 
Amos2:6 Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: “Bantfu baka-Israyeli bone kwaze kwengca, ngaleso sizatfu ngingeke ngihlale ngingabajezisi. Labalungile babatsengisa ngesiliva, bese kutsi labeswele babatsengise ngetincabule letimbili." 
Amos2:7 Bagcobagcoba tinhloko talabamphofu kube shangatsi bagcobagcoba lutfuli lwemhlaba, bese kutsi labacindzetelwe bangababoneleli. Indvodza nemsa wayo balala nentfombatana yinye, ngaloko bahlazise Libito lami lelingcwele." 
Amos2:8 Bacambalala phansi eceleni kwalelo nalelo lati ngetingubo tesibambiso. Endlini yaNkulunkulu wabo banatsa liwayini lalabahlawulisiwe. 
Amos2:9 “Kepha mine ngawabhubhisa ema-Amori embikwenu, nome abemadze njengemisedari acine njengema-okhi. Ngabhubhisa netitselo tawo ngetulu netimphandze tawo ngaphansi." 
Amos2:10 “Mine futsi nganikhipha eGibhithe, nganihola iminyaka lengema-40 ehlane, ngentela kuninika live lema-Amori." 
Amos2:11 Ngaphindza nganivusela baphrofethi emkhatsini wemadvodzana enu kanye nebaNaziri emkhatsini wemajaha enu. Akusilo liciniso yini lelo, sive sema-Israyeli?” kusho Simakadze." 
Amos2:12 “Kodvwa nine nanatsisa baNaziri liwayini, nalela baphrofethi bami kutsi baphrofethe." 
Amos2:13 “Manje-ke, ngitanipitjita njengekupitjita kwencola nayetfwele umtfwalo lomkhulu walokutinhlavu." 
Amos2:14 Nalabagijima ngematubane bangeke baphunyule, nalabanemandla bangeke bakhone kuwagcogca emandla abo, kanjalo nelichawe lingeke liyisindzise imphilo yalo." 
Amos2:15 Loyingcweti ekudubuleni ngebutjoki angeke akhone kucina, lisotja lelihamba phansi ngetinyawo lingeke libaleke, kanjalo nemgibeli welihhashi angeke akhone kusindzisa imphilo yakhe." 
Amos2:16 Ngisho nemachawe lanesibindzi kakhulu ayawubaleka angcunu ngalelo langa,” kusho Simakadze." 
Amos3:1 Lalelani nankha emavi lashiwo nguSimakadze ngani, anisola nine, sive sema-Israyeli, umelana nawo wonkhe umndeni lawukhipha eGibhithe, utsi:" 
Amos3:2 “Ngini kuphela lenginikhetsile emkhatsini wato tonkhe tive temhlaba; ngako-ke ngitanijezisa ngenca yato tonkhe tono tenu.” 
Amos3:3 Bantfu lababili bangahambisana yini kanyekanye bangakavumelani? 
Amos3:4 Libhubesi liyabhodla yini ehlatsini, lingakabambi inyamatane? Libhubesi lelincane lona lingahhonga yini endzaweni yalo, lingakabambi lutfo?" 
Amos3:5 Inyoni iyawela yini elugibeni loluphansi emhlabatsini, kungekho leyetsiywe ngako? Sochaka umane atisukele yini phansi, azube kungekho lutfo lolumtsintsile?" 
Amos3:6 Nakukhala impalampala edolobheni, abatfutfumeli yini bantfu? Inhlekelele iyalehlela yini lidolobha, ingakatfunyelwa nguSimakadze?" 
Amos3:7 Ngempela iNkhosi Simakadze kute lekwentako ingakayembuli inhloso yayo etincekwini tayo, baphrofethi." 
Amos3:8 Nakubhodla libhubesi, ngubani longahlala angesabi? INkhosi Simakadze seyikhulumile, ngubani longahlala angaphrofethi?" 
Amos3:9 Memetelani etigodlweni tase-Ashdodi nasetigodlweni taseGibhithe, nitsi: “Butsanani ndzawonye etintsabeni taseSamariya; bonani umsindvo lomkhulu losemkhatsini wayo kanye nekucindzetelwa lokukuyo.”" 
Amos3:10 Simakadze utsi: “Abati kutsi bangakwenta njani lokulungile, labo lababutsise budlova nemphango etigodlweni tabo.”" 
Amos3:11 Ngaleso sizatfu naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, itsi: “Sitsa siyakulitungeleta live, sibhidlite tonkhe tinqaba tenu, siphange netigodlo tenu.”" 
Amos3:12 Naku-ke lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: “Njengemelusi asindzisa emlonyeni welibhubesi imilente lemibili yekugcina nome sicu sendlebe yelizinyane, ayakuhlwitfwa kanjalo nema-Israyeli lambalwa, lawo lasahlala eSamariya, emaphetselweni emibhedze yawo, lasahlala acuphele etihlalweni tawo tekuphumula.”" 
Amos3:13 INkhosi Simakadze, Nkulunkulu longuSomandla, utsi: “Vanini naku, niyidvonse ngendlebe indlu yakaJakobe." 
Amos3:14 “Mhlazana ngijezisa ema-Israyeli ngenca yetono tawo, ngiyawubhidlita emalati aseBetheli, netimphondvo telilati tiyawujutjwa tilahleke phansi." 
Amos3:15 Ngiyawubhidlita indlu yasebusika kanye nendlu yasehlobo, tindlu letihlotjiswe ngematinyo etindlovu tiyawubhidlitwa, kanjalo netindlu letibukekako tiyawuhhihlitwa,” kusho Simakadze." 
Amos4:1 Lalelani nali livi, nine bafati basentsabeni yaseSamariya, leniphila kahle, nitamase njengetinkhomati taseBhashani, nine lenicindzetela labamphofu, nifihlite labeswele, niphocelele emadvodza enu kutsi aninike tjwala!" 
Amos4:2 INkhosi Simakadze ifungile ngebungcwele bayo, yatsi: “Lalelani la: Siyeta sikhatsi lapho niyawutsatfwa khona ngemadweba, ngisho nebekugcina benu bayawutsatfwa ngemahhuka ekudweba tinhlanti." 
Amos4:3 Nitawuhudvulwa lapho ngamunye nikhishwe ngetikhala letiselubondzeni, nilahlelwe ngephandle eHemoni,” kusho Simakadze." 
Amos4:4 Simakadze utsi: “Sive saka-Israyeli, hambani niye eBetheli, indzawo lengcwele, niyekona, nichubeke niye eGilgali, nandzise khona tono tenu, njengobe nitsandza kwenta. Onkhe emalanga ekuseni niletse imihlatjelo yenu, bese kutsi kanye ngeminyaka lemitsatfu niletse kwelishumi kwenu." 
Amos4:5 Shisani sinkhwa senu lesinemvubelo kube ngumnikelo wekubonga, tigabatiseni ngeminikelo yenu yesihle. Gungubalani ngayo, nine ma-Israyeli, ngobe nguko loko lenitsandza kukwenta." 
Amos4:6 “Ngimi lenganinika tisu letingenalutfo kuwo onkhe emadolobha enu, nekwesweleka kwesinkhwa emakhaya enu onkhe; kodvwa anikabuyeli kimi,” kusho Simakadze." 
Amos4:7 “Ngaphindze ngabamba imvula, sekusele tinyanga letintsatfu nje kutsi kuvunwe; ngatfumela imvula kulelinye lidolobha, kodvwa ngayibamba kulelinye. Lenye insimi yatfola imvula, lenye yangete yayitfola imvula yaze yoma." 
Amos4:8 Bantfu badzayitela besuka kulelinye lidolobha baya kulelinye, bafunana nemanti, kodvwa abazange bawatfole lenele kutsi banganatsa baze bakholwe; noko anikabuyeli kimi,” kusho Simakadze." 
Amos4:9 “Sekukanyenti ngishaya tingadze tenu netivini tenu, ngatishaya ngemswenya nangasicencane. Sikhonyane sashaya sacotfula emakhiwa enu netihlahla tenu temincumo, kwaphela kwatsi nya, noko anikabuyeli kimi,” kusho Simakadze." 
Amos4:10 “Nginitfumela tishayo njengaloku ngenta naseGibhithe. Emajaha enu ngawabulala ngenkemba, kanye nemahhashi enu latfunjiwe. Emakhala enu ngawagcwalisa ngeluboti etinkanjini tenu; noko anikabuyeli kimi,” kusho Simakadze." 
Amos4:11 “Labanye benu ngababhubhisa njengaloku ngabhubhisa iSodoma neGomora. Nanifanana nendvuku leshako, lehlwitfwe emlilweni; noko anikabuyeli kimi,” kusho Simakadze." 
Amos4:12 “Ngako-ke, ma-Israyeli, ngitanijezisa; futsi njengobe ngitakwenta njalo nje, tilungiseleleni kubhekana naNkulunkulu wenu, nine ma-Israyeli!”" 
Amos4:13 Ngako-ke lalelani! Yena lowo lobumba tintsaba, adale umoya, embule imicabango yakhe kumuntfu, yena lowo logucula intsatsakusa, ayente bumnyama, anyatsele tindzawo letiphakeme temhlaba, nguSimakadze Nkulunkulu longuSomandla libito lakhe." 
Amos5:1 Lalelani nali livi, ninendlu yaka-Israyeli. Lesililo ngisenta ngenca yenu:" 
Amos5:2 “Iwile iNtfombi yaka-Israyeli, ingeke iphindze ivuke futsi, ayinakwa ngumuntfu eveni layo, kantsi futsi kute longayivusa ime.”" 
Amos5:3 Ngobe naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi Simakadze, itsi: “Lidolobha laka-Israyeli lebelinemasotja layinkhulungwane laphuma ayawuhlasela litawugcina linemasotja lalikhulu, kutsi lidolobha lebelinemasotja lalikhulu ligcine selinemasotja lalishumi.”" 
Amos5:4 Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze kuyo indlu yaka-Israyeli, utsi: “Ngifuneni, nitewuphila." 
Amos5:5 Ningangifuni eBetheli, ningayi naseGilgali, ningayi ngisho naseBherisheba. Ngobe iGilgali ngempela itawudzingiswa, kutsi iBetheli incishiswe ize ibe lite.”" 
Amos5:6 Funanai Simakadze, nitewuphila, ngobe nakungenjalo, utawuhlasela lendlu yakaJosefa njengemlilo. Lomlilo utawukhotsisisa, iBetheli imeswele lotawucisha lowo mlilo." 
Amos5:7 Nine lenigucule imphatfocotfo nayenta yababa, kulunga nakudzaceka phansi emhlabatsini!" 
Amos5:8 Simakadze lowenta tinkhanyeti, wadala Silimela neMtsentse. Nguye logucula bumnyama abente intsatsakusa, ente imini ibe busuku. Ubita emanti aselwandle, awatsele ebusweni bemhlaba, nguSimakadze libito lakhe." 
Amos5:9 Umanyatisa imbhubhiso kulabanemandla, abhidlite lidolobha leliyinqaba." 
Amos5:10 Nine bantfu niyamtondza umuntfu lomelana nebubi benu, nimedzelele umuntfu lokhuluma liciniso lodvwa enkhundleni." 
Amos5:11 Nigcobagcoba labamphofu nibacindzetele kutsi baninike kudla. Ngako-ke, nome nakhe tindlu letinkhulu tematje, ningeke nihlale kuto; nome nihlanyele tivini letikhulu, ningeke nilinatse liwayini lato." 
Amos5:12 Ngobe ngiyati kutsi mangaki emacala enu nekutsi tono tenu tikhulu kangakanani. Niyabacindzetela labalungile, nitsatse imidizo, nemuke labamphofu emalungelo abo etinkhundleni." 
Amos5:13 Ngako-ke umuntfu locaphelako uyabindza etikhatsini letinje, ngobe tikhatsi timbi." 
Amos5:14 Funani lokuhle, hhayi lokubi, khona nitewuphila. Khona-ke Simakadze Nkulunkulu longuSomandla uyawuba nani, njengobe nani nisho kutsi unani." 
Amos5:15 Tondzani lokubi nitsandze lokulungile, etinkhundleni yehlulelani ngekungakhetsi. Mhlawumbe Simakadze Nkulunkulu longuSomandla angaba nesihawu kuyo insali yakaJosefa." 
Amos5:16 Ngako-ke naku lokushiwo yiNkhosi, Nkulunkulu longuSomandla, Simakadze, itsi: “Kuyawuba khona kudzindza sililo kuto tonkhe titaladi, nekukhala kabuhlungu kuto tonkhe tinkhundla. Kutawubitwa balimi kutsi nabo balile, kubitwe nalabati tililo kutsi bakhale." 
Amos5:17 Kuyawuba khona kudzindza sililo kuto tonkhe tivini, ngobe ngiyakwendlula emkhatsini wenu nginijezise.”" 
Amos5:18 Nako kini nine lenifisa lilanga laSimakadze! Nilifiselani lilanga laSimakadze? Lelo langa liyawuba bumnyama, lingabi kukhanya." 
Amos5:19 Kuyawuba shangatsi ngumuntfu lobalekele libhubesi, wase utitsela etikwelibhele; kube shangatsi ngumuntfu longene endlini yakhe wabeka tandla takhe elubondzeni, kusuke inyoka imlume." 
Amos5:20 Lilanga laSimakadze lingeke yini libe bumnyama lingabi kukhanya, kube bumnyama lobukhulu kubete ngisho nemushi nje wekukhanya?" 
Amos5:21 Simakadze utsi: “Ngiyawatondza, futsi ngiwabukela phansi lamadzili enu enkholo; ngiyehluleka kuyemukela leyo mihlangano yenu." 
Amos5:22 Ngisho nome ningangiletsela imihlatjelo yekushiswa kanye neminikelo yalokutinhlavu, ngingeke ngiyemukele. Ngisho nome ningaletsa iminikelo yebudlelwane yelikhetselo, ngingeke ngiyinake." 
Amos5:23 Sukani lapha nalemisindvo yenu yekuhlabela! Ngingeke ngikulalele loko kuhlabela kwenu ngemahabhu. 
Amos5:24 Kodvwa kwenta tintfo ngekungakhetsi akube yintfo legeleta njengemfula, kulunga kube yintfo legeleta njengemfula longashi." 
Amos5:25 “Nake nangiletsela yini imihlatjelo neminikelo kuleminyaka lengema-40 ehlane, ninendlu yaka-Israyeli?" 
Amos5:26 Niphakamise tithico tenu: Sakhuthi, inkhosi yenu, naKhewani, nkulunkulu wenu loyinkhanyeti, ngako-ke nitakwetfwala leto titfombe tenu lenitentele tona," 
Amos5:27 ngitanenta nitfunjelwe ngesheya kweDamaseko,” usho njalo-ke Simakadze, lolibito lakhe linguNkulunkulu longuSomandla." 
Amos6:1 Maye kini, nine labanetsetekile eSiyoni, nakini nine labativela bavikelekile entsabeni yaseSamariya! Maye nakini, nine madvodza lagcamile esiveni lesikhulu nalesisekucala etiveni tonkhe, nine labeta kini baka-Israyeli!" 
Amos6:2 Kutsiwa: “Hambani niye eKhalne, niye kuyibuka. Nibosuka lapho nicondze eHamathi lenkhulu, nisuke lapho nehlele eGathi yaseFilistiya! Nine nincono yini kunaleyo mibuso? Live labo lalilikhulu yini kunelenu?”" 
Amos6:3 Nikhweshisela eceleni lilanga lelibi, bese nisondzeta edvutane umbuso lowesabisako." 
Amos6:4 Nilala emibhedzeni lehlotjiswe ngematinyo etindlovu, nicambalale etihlalweni tenu tekuphumula, nititika ngenyama yemawundlu elikhetselo nangeyematfokati lakhuluphalisiwe." 
Amos6:5 Nanihlabela, nigubhutelisa emahabhu enu, nitakhele nine imintjingozi yemculo njengaDavide." 
Amos6:6 Ninatsa liwayini ngetitja letigcwele, nitigcobise ngemafutsa lanuka kamnandzi, kodvwa anidzabuki ngekucitfwa kwaJosefa." 
Amos6:7 Ngako-ke nitawuba kanye nebekucala kulabayawudzingiswa. Lokutamasa kwenu ngemadzili, nicambalale kamnandzi, kutawuphela." 
Amos6:8 INkhosi Simakadze itifungile. Simakadze Nkulunkulu longuSomandla utsi: “Ngiyakwenyanya kutigcabha kwaJakobe, tiyanginenga naletinqaba takhe. Ngitaliyekelela lelo dolobha, nako konkhe lokukulo.”" 
Amos6:9 Nangabe kusele emadvodza lalishumi endlini yinye, nawo futsi atakufa." 
Amos6:10 Nangabe sihlobo lesifanele kushisa leto tidvumbu sifika sitetikhipha kuleyondlu, leso sihlobo nasibuta lona losabhacile, sitsi: “Usekhona yini lomunye losasele kanye nawe?” yena lolomunye aphendvule atsi: “Kute,” leso sihlobo siyawuphendvula sitsi: “Shi, thulani, kufanele sicaphele singaliphatsi Libito laSimakadze.”" 
Amos6:11 Ngobe Simakadze ubeke umyalo, lendlu lenkhulu itawubhidlitwa, iphihlitwe ibe ticucu, kutsi nalena lencane ibe ticucu." 
Amos6:12 Emahhashi ayagijima yini emadvwaleni latihhehle? Umuntfu angalima yini khona lapho ngetinkhabi? Kodvwa nine senijikise umtsetfocotfo, nawenta waba butsi, netitselo tekulunga natenta tababa," 
Amos6:13 nine lenijabulela kwehlulwa kweLo Dabari bese nitsi: “Asiyitsatsanga yini iKhanayimu ngemandla etfu?” 
Amos6:14 Kodvwa Simakadze Nkulunkulu longuSomandla uyakhuluma utsi: “Ngiyawuchukuluta sive, sinivukele, ninendlu yaka-Israyeli. Leso sive siyawunicindzetela yonkhe indlela kusukela eLebo Hamathi kuze kuyewufika esigodzini sase-Arabha.”" 
Amos7:1 Naku-ke iNkhosi Simakadze lengibonise kona: Ngiyibone yenta lifu lesikhonyane ngesikhatsi nakuphela kuvunwa kwemabele enkhosi, nakucala kuhluma kwesibili." 
Amos7:2 Satsi kube sikudle konkhe lokuluhlata eveni, ngakhala kakhulu ngatsi: “Nkhosi Simakadze, cola! Jakobe angasindza kanjani? Mncane kakhulu!”" 
Amos7:3 Simakadze wase uyayekela, watsi: “Loko kungeke kusenteka.”" 
Amos7:4 Naku-ke iNkhosi Simakadze lengibonise kona: INkhosi Simakadze beyisabita kwehlulela kwemlilo, lomlilo womisa lwandle lolungaphansi kwemhlaba, waze lomlilo wacala kudla live." 
Amos7:5 Ngase ngiyakhala ngitsi: “Nkhosi Simakadze, ngiyakuncenga, mane ume; Jakobe angasindza kanjani? Mncane kakhulu!”" 
Amos7:6 Ngako Simakadze wase uyayekela, watsi: “Naloku kungeke kusenteka nako.”" 
Amos7:7 Naku-ke Simakadze langibonise kona: Simakadze abeme eceleni kwelubondza lolwalwakhiwe lwalinganiswa kahle ngesilinganiso, abephetse silinganiso esandleni sakhe." 
Amos7:8 Simakadze wangibuta watsi: “Ubonani, ye Amose?” Ngatsi: “Silinganiso.” Simakadze watsi: “Buka la! Ngibeka silinganiso kubantfu bami ema-Israyeli; ngingeke ngisabacolela." 
Amos7:9 “Tindzawo letiphakeme taka-Isaka tekukhontela tithico tiyawubhujiswa, netindlu taka-Israyeli tekukhontela bonkulunkulu tiyawubhidlitwa. Ngenkemba yami ngiyawuvukela indlu yakaJerobowamu.”" 
Amos7:10 Amasiya, umphristi waseBetheli, watfumela sigijimi kuJerobowamu, inkhosi yaka-Israyeli, watsi: “Amose wakha luzungu ngawe embusweni waka-Israyeli. Live lingeke liwamele onkhe lamavi akhe." 
Amos7:11 Ngobe naku lokushiwo nguAmose, utsi: “ ‘Jerobowamu utakufa ngenkemba, ema-Israyeli wona ngempela atawudzingiswa, esuswe eveni lawo lekutalwa.’ ”" 
Amos7:12 Amasiya wakhuluma ku-Amose, watsi: “Phuma, wena mboniswa. Buyela eveni lakaJuda. Hamba uyewuhlala khona usebentele kudla kwakho khona, uphrofethe khona." 
Amos7:13 Ungaphindzi uphrofethe lapha eBetheli, ngobe lena yindzawo lekutsiwa ingcwele yenkhosi, nelithempeli lembuso.”" 
Amos7:14 Amose waphendvula Amasiya, watsi: “Angizange sengibe ngumphrofethi mine, ngisho nekuba ngumsa wemphrofethi nje. Kodvwa bengingumelusi nje, nanyalo ngisengumlimi wetihlahla temakhiwa." 
Amos7:15 Kodvwa Simakadze wangitsatsa ekweluseni kwami timvu, watsi kimi: ‘Hamba uyewuphrofetha esiveni sami, ema-Israyeli.’" 
Amos7:16 Manje-ke vani livi laSimakadze. Wena watsi: “ ‘Ungaphrofethi lokumelene na-Israyeli. uyekele nekushumayela umelane nendlu ya-Isaka.’ 
Amos7:17 “Ngako-ke naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze: “ ‘Umfati wakho uyawuba yingwadla yelidolobha; emadvodzana nemadvodzakati akho ayakufa ngenkemba. Emasimi akho atawulinganiswa, abelwe labanye; wena utakufa, ufele eveni lemahedeni. Israyeli, vele, yena utawutfunjwa, esuswe eveni lakhe lekutalwa.’ ”" 
Amos8:1 Naku-ke iNkhosi Simakadze lengibonise kona: Ngabona libhasikidi letitselo letivutsiwe. 
Amos8:2 Simakadze wase uyangibuta utsi: “Ubonani, ye Amose?” Ngamphendvula ngatsi: “Ngibona libhasikidi lelinetitselo letivutsiwe.” Simakadze wase ukhuluma kimi utsi: “Sikhatsi sesive sami saka-Israyeli sesiphelile, ngingeke ngisasicolela.”" 
Amos8:3 INkhosi Simakadze itsi: “Ngalelo langa, tingoma letihlatjelwa ethempelini tiyawujika tibe tekudzindza sililo. Kuyawuba nebunikilili betidvumbu letijikijelwe yonkhe indzawo. Kuyawuthula kutsi gudvu!”" 
Amos8:4 Lalelani lapha, nine lenigcobagcoba labeswele nibuye nicedze bonkhe labamphofu balelive," 
Amos8:5 nikhuluma nitsi: “Ingabe umkhosi longcwele wekwetfwasa kwenyanga uyakwendlula nini, khona sitewutsengisa ngesivuno salokutinhlavu, neliSabatha litawuphela nini, khona sitewutsengisa ngakolo?” Ngaloko nentela kunciphisa tikali nenyuse intsengo, nitewuganga ngekusebentisa tikali letingekho emtsetfweni," 
Amos8:6 nitsenge labamphofu ngesiliva, nalabeswele ngetincabule letimbili, ngisho naloku lokushanyelwe phansi esibuyeni sekubhula nikubite imali." 
Amos8:7 Simakadze loludvumo lwaka-Israyeli utifunge yena, watsi: “Ngingeke ngikukhohlwe nakunye kwalabakwentile." 
Amos8:8 Live lingeke yini litfutfumele ngaloku, nabo bonkhe labahlala kulo bangeke yini balile? Lonkhe live liyawukhukhumuka njengeNayili, liyawutanyatanyiswa, bese liyabotja njengalomfula waseGibhithe.”" 
Amos8:9 INkhosi Simakadze itsi: “Ngalelo langa ngiyakwenta lilanga lishone emini, ngente umhlaba ube mnyama emini kala bha." 
Amos8:10 Emadzili enu enkholo ngiyakuwagucula abe sililo, nako konkhe kuhlabela kwenu kube kukhala. Ngiyawunenta nonkhe nembatse emasaka, nihhule tinhloko tenu. Leso sikhatsi ngiyawusenta sifanane nesekulilela indvodzana letelwe yodvwa kabo. Lelo langa liyawugcina kabuhlungu kakhulu.”" 
Amos8:11 INkhosi Simakadze itsi: “Lalelani la, ayeta emalanga lapho ngiyawutfumela khona indlala kulo lonkhe live, kungabi yindlala yekufuna kudla neyekomela emanti, kodvwa kube yindlala yekufuna livi laSimakadze." 
Amos8:12 Bantfu bayawuyendza kusukela elwandle kuye kulolunye, bazulazule kusukela enyakatfo kuye emphumalanga, bafunana nelivi laSimakadze; kodvwa bangeke balitfole." 
Amos8:13 “Ngalelo langa tintfombi letinhle nemajaha lanemandla bayawucaleka ngenca yekoma. 
Amos8:14 Labo labafunga ngetithico taseSamariya nome batsi: ‘Ngekuphila kwankulunkulu wakho, Dani,’ nome: ‘Ngekuphila kwankulunkulu wakho, Bherisheba,’ bayakuwa phansi, bangaphindzi bavuke.”" 
Amos9:1 Ngabona Simakadze eme ngaselatini, watsi: “Shaya tihloko tetinsika, kuze tenabelo teminyango titewunyikanyika. Juba tihloko tetinsika utehlisele etinhloko tabo bonkhe bantfu; labo labasele ngiyawubabulala ngenkemba. Kute namunye loyawubaleka; yebo, kute loyawuphunyula." 
Amos9:2 Nome bangemba bashone phansi ekujuleni kwelithuna, nakhona lapho sandla sami siyawubakhipha. Nome bangekhwela benyukele etulu emazulwini, nakhona lapho ngiyawubehlisela phansi." 
Amos9:3 Nome bangatifihla esicongweni sentsaba iKhameli, nakhona lapho ngiyawubatingela ngize ngibabambe. Nome bangangibhacela ekujuleni kwelwandle, nakhona lapho ngiyawutfumela inyoka ibalume." 
Amos9:4 Nome bangatfunjwa titsa tabo, nakhona lapho ngiyawuyala inkemba kutsi ibabulale. Emehlo ami ngiyakuwanamatselisa kubo, kube kubi kubo, kungabi kuhle.”" 
Amos9:5 INkhosi Simakadze lenguSomandla, yona letsintsa umhlaba bese uyancibilika, kutsi bonkhe labahlala kuwo balile, live lonkhe likhukhumuke njengeNayili, liphindze libotje njengalomfula waseGibhithe," 
Amos9:6 ngiyo leyakha sigodlo sayo lesiphakeme emazulwini, sisekelo sayo isimbele emhlabatsini, yona lememeta emanti aselwandle bese iwacitsela etikwebuso bemhlaba, libito layo nguSimakadze." 
Amos9:7 “Nine, ma-Israyeli, anifanani yini kimi nemaKushe?” kusho Simakadze. “Angizange ngimkhiphe yini Israyeli eGibhithe, nemaFilisti eKhaftori ngakhipha nemaSiriya eKhiri?”" 
Amos9:8 Naku-ke lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: “Ngempela emehlo eNkhosi Simakadze asetikwawo wonkhe lowo mbuso lowonako. Ngiyakuwubhubhisa ungabikho ebusweni bemhlaba, noko ngingeke ngiyibhubhise yonkhe indlu yakaJakobe." 
Amos9:9 “Ngako ngiyawukhipha umyalo, nginyakatise indlu yaka-Israyeli emkhatsini wato tonkhe tive, njengemabele nakanyakatiswa ngesisefo, kodvwa kute ngisho nayinye inhlavu leyakuwela emhlabatsini." 
Amos9:10 Tonkhe toni letisemkhatsini wesive sami, tiyakufa ngenkemba; labo labakhuluma batsi: ‘Inhlekelele ingeke isehlele nome isikhandze.’ ”" 
Amos9:11 “Ngalelo langa ngiyakulivusa kabusha lithende laDavide leliwile. Ngiyakutakha kabusha tindzawo talo letephukile, ngiwakhe kabusha emadzibikelo alo, ngiphindze ngilakhe libe nguloku lelake laba nguko," 
Amos9:12 khona batekudla lifa lensali yaka-Edomu kanye nelato tonkhe tive letibitwa ngeLibito lami,” usho njalo Simakadze, lotawutenta tonkhe letintfo." 
Amos9:13 Naku-ke lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: “Ayeta emalanga, lapho bavuni bayakwengcelelwa ngulabalimako, nalabahlanyelako bengcelelwe ngulabahluta liwayini. Liwayini lelisha liyawuntfontsa etintsabeni, ligelete kuwo onkhe emagcuma." 
Amos9:14 Ngiyawusilandza sibuye sive sami ema-Israyeli lebesitfunjiwe, siyakuwakha kabusha emadolobha aso langemadzibikelo, bese sihlala kuwo. Siyawuhlanyela tivini, sinatse liwayini lato; siyawukwakha tingadze, sidle titselo tato." 
Amos9:15 Ngiyakuhlanyela ema-Israyeli eveni lawo, angaphindzi futsi asishulwe kulelo live lengiwaphe lona,” usho njalo-ke Simakadze Nkulunkulu wakho." 
Obadiah1:1 Umbono wa-Obadiya: Loku ngulokwakhulunywa yiNkhosi Simakadze ngesive saka-Edomu: Sivile livi leliphuma kuSimakadze. Utfumele lincusa lakhe etiveni, watsi: “Sukumani, sambe siyekulwa na-Edomu.”" 
Obadiah1:2 Simakadze ukhuluma ku-Edomu, utsi: “Ngitakwenta ube ngulomncane emkhatsini wetive, ngikwente wedzeleleke kakhulu." 
Obadiah1:3 Kutigcabha kwenhlitiyo yakho kukwedukisile, wena uhlala endlunkhulu yakho lesemifantwini yemadvwala. Umuti wakho usetulu etintsabeni. Wena utitjela utsi: ‘Ngubani nje longangehlisela phansi?’" 
Obadiah1:4 Nome likhaya lakho ungalakha etulu, njengelusweti, nome ungalakha emkhatsini wetinkhanyeti, mine ngiyawukudzilitela phansi." 
Obadiah1:5 “Kube bewungagcekezelwa ngemasela nome-ke ungenelwe tigelekece ebusuku, betingeke tatitapela ngekufuna kwato yini? Kube bavuni bemagelebisi bebete kuwe bebangete bawachulula kusale abe mbalwa yini? Kodvwa titsa tiyakunicitsa niphele nya." 
Obadiah1:6 Nine titukulwane ta-Esawu, umcebo wenu lebewufihliwe sewuphangiwe." 
Obadiah1:7 Bonkhe labo bewubambisene nabo bakukhohlisile, batakuhlehlisela emnyeleni welive lakho. Bantfu benihletisene nabo ngekuthula nyalo sebakwehlulile. Bangani bakho bewudla nabo sebakwetsiyele lugibe, badzimate bakhuluma bodvwa ngawe, batsi: ‘Kuphi-ke lokuhlakanipha kwakhe?’ ”" 
Obadiah1:8 Simakadze ukhuluma utsi: “Mhlazana ngijezisa Edomu ngiyewubhubhisa netati takhe ngicedze konkhe kuhlakanipha kwakhe etintsabeni taka-Esawu. 
Obadiah1:9 Emabutfo akho, Themani, ayakutfutfumela, bonkhe bantfu labaseveni letintsaba, lekulive laka-Edomu, bayakubulawa.”" 
Obadiah1:10 “Ngenca yebudlova bakho lobente kubomnakenu, titukulwane taJakobe, uyakwembeswa ngelihlazo, ubhujiswe ingunaphakadze." 
Obadiah1:11 Mhlazane ume untontomele ngesikhatsi bafokati batfumba umcebo wakhe, nebetive bangena emasangweni akhe, benta inkatho ngeJerusalema, nawe kwakungatsi umdvumo munye nabo." 
Obadiah1:12 Bekungakafaneli umbukele phansi umnakenu, nakavelelwe ngulokubi. Bewungakafaneli utsakase nangabe bakaJuda behlelwa yimbhubhiso. Yebo, bewungakafaneli kubacoloshela namzukwane behlelwa yinhlupheko." 
Obadiah1:13 Bewungakafaneli kungena emasangweni ebantfu bami ngesikhatsi behlelwa sigemegeme. Bewungakafaneli kubabukela phansi bantfu bami ngelilanga lekuhlupheka kwabo. Bewungakafaneli kuwuphanga umcebo webantfu bami. 
Obadiah1:14 Bewungakafaneli kuma emahlanganweni emigwaco khona utebabamba labo labaphunyulile. Bewungakafaneli kunikela ngensali yabo ngelilanga lekuhlupheka kwabo.” 
Obadiah1:15 “Lilanga laSimakadze lekwehlulela tonkhe tive selisondzele. Njengobe wentile nawe Edomu kuyakwentiwa njalo nakuwe; tento takho tiyawuphindziselwa kuwe. 
Obadiah1:16 Njengobe nawe wanatsa indzebe yekujezisa kwami entsabeni yami lengcwele, netive tonkhe tiyawuyinatsa khona siphelane; tiyawunatsa, tinatse kuze kube shangatsi atizange setibe khona.”" 
Obadiah1:17 “Kodvwa eNtsabeni iSiyoni kuyawuba nenkhululeko; kuyawuba yindzawo lengcwele. Umndeni wakaJakobe uyawulidla lelive lekulifa lawo. 
Obadiah1:18 Umndeni wakaJakobe uyawuba ngumlilo, umndeni wakaJosefa ube lilangabi. Umndeni waka-Esawu uyawuba tibi, bayakuwokhela ngemlilo bawushise uze uphele. Kuyawubate insali emndenini waka-Esawu. Mine, Simakadze, sengishito.”" 
Obadiah1:19 Sive lesichamuka eNegevu siyawuhlala eveni letintsaba lekungela-Edomu. Sive lesisuka emaceleni etintsaba siyawulitfumba live lemaFilisti. Yebo, ema-Israyeli ayawulitsatsa live laka-Efrayimu nelaseSamariya. BakaBhenjamini bona bayawutsatsa lakaGileyadi." 
Obadiah1:20 Lama-Israyeli ladzingisiwe, laseKhenani, ayawulidla lelo live, lize liyekuma ngeSarefathi. Labadzingisiwe bekusuka eJerusalema, labaseSefaradi kwanyalo, bayakuwadla emadolobha aseNegevu." 
Obadiah1:21 Emachawe aseJerusalema ayawuyincoba iNtsaba iSiyoni alibuse lelive laka-Edomu. Lowo mbuso uyakwenganyelwa nguSimakadze. 
Jonah1:1 Ngalelinye lilanga livi laSimakadze lefika kuJona, umsa wa-Amithayi, latsi:" 
Jonah1:2 “Hamba uye eNineve, lidolobha lelikhulukati, ufike umemetele kubantfu balo utsi bubi babo sebenyukele kimi.”" 
Jonah1:3 Kepha Jona wesuka wacondza eThashishi. Wehlela eJopha, lapho afike wakhokha imali yekwekhwela, wagibela umkhumbi, waya eThashishi, abalekela Simakadze." 
Jonah1:4 Kodvwa Simakadze watfumela umoya lomkhulu elwandle, kwaba nesivunguvungu lesikhulu kangangekutsi umkhumbi wabasengotini yekwephuka." 
Jonah1:5 Onkhe ematilosi efikelwa kwesaba lokukhulu, kwaba ngulelo nalelo lakhala kunkulunkulu walo. Batijika elwandle timphahla letatisemkhunjini, batsi betama kuwuphungula umkhumbi. Kepha Jona abewukele ngaphansi ekhatsi nemkhumbi, akulobukhulu butfongo." 
Jonah1:6 Indvuna yemkhumbi yakhandzanisa Jona alele, yafike yatsi: “Wentani la? Uleleleni? Vuka uthandaze kuNkulunkulu wakho! Mhlawumbe yena utasivela asisindzise singabhubhi!”" 
Jonah1:7 Ematilosi emkhumbi akhuluma odvwana, atsi: “Wotani, sitekwenta inkatho sibone kutsi ngubani lona losidvonsele lomkhokha.” Ngako-ke base benta inkatho; inkatho yadla Jona." 
Jonah1:8 Base bayambuta batsi: “Ngubani yena lona losibangele yonkhe lenhlupheko? Utekwentani la? Ungewekukleza kuphi wena? Usive sini?” 
Jonah1:9 Wabaphendvula watsi: “NgingumHebheru; ngikhonta Simakadze, Nkulunkulu welizulu, lowadala umhlaba nelwandle.”" 
Jonah1:10 Lamadvodza esaba kakhulukati, adzimate atsi kuye: “Yini-ke lena lose uyentile?” Phela lamadvodza abesati kutsi ubalekela Nkulunkulu, ngobe Jona abesawatjelile." 
Jonah1:11 Sivunguvungu sachubeka sahhusha ngemandla, aze lamatilosi atsi: “Sitakwenta njani-ke ngawe, kuze lesivunguvungu sibindze?”" 
Jonah1:12 Jona wabaphendvula watsi: “Ngitsatseni ningijikijele elwandle, sitawube sesiyabindza lesivunguvungu; ngobe vele ngiyati kutsi ngimi lona lonidvonsele lomkhokha wesivunguvungu.”" 
Jonah1:13 Esikhundleni saloko, lamatilosi etama kuwugwedla ngemandla awo onkhe lomkhumbi kutsi ubuyele elugwini, kodvwa ehluleka, ngobe lwandle lwachubeka lwahhusha kakhulu kunakucala." 
Jonah1:14 Ngako base bakhala kuSimakadze, batsi: “Awu, Simakadze waJona, siyakuncenga, ungasibhubhisi ngenca yalomuntfu! Ungalibeki etikwetfu licala lengati lengenacala! Nguwe, Simakadze waJona, lowente konkhe loku!”" 
Jonah1:15 Ngako-ke base batsatsa Jona, bamjikijela elwandle, lwase luyathula lutsi nya." 
Jonah1:16 Loko kwenta lamatilosi esabe Simakadze kakhulu kangangekutsi adzimate amentela umhlatjelo; etsembisa nekumkhonta. 
Jonah1:17 Simakadze wahlinzeka Jona ngenhlanti lenkhulu, leyafike yammita. Jona wahlala esiswini sayo emalanga lamatsatfu nebusuku lobutsatfu." 
Jonah2:1 Asesekhatsi esiswini senhlanti Jona wathandaza kuSimakadze longuNkulunkulu wakhe, watsi:" 
Jonah2:2 “Ekuhluphekeni kwami ngakhala kuwe, Simakadze, wangiphendvula; ngamemeta ngisematfunjini emhlaba, ngicela lusito, wena waliva livi lami." 
Jonah2:3 Wangijikijela ekujuleni, enhlitiyweni yetilwandle, emanti angitungeleta; onkhe emagagasi nemanti endlula etikwami." 
Jonah2:4 Ngase ngitsi: ‘Sengicoshiwe emehlweni akho; noko, ngiyawuphindze ngibuke lithempeli lakho lelingcwele.’" 
Jonah2:5 Emanti angimbonya, angihisha; kujula kwangitungeleta, tindzembuluka tangitsandzela enhloko." 
Jonah2:6 Ngehlela emajukujukwini emhlaba, live lelimasango alo ahlala akhiyiwe kuze kube phakadze; kodvwa imphilo yami wayenyula emgodzini, Simakadze, Nkulunkulu wami." 
Jonah2:7 Ngesikhatsi umphefumulo wami uphelelwa ngemandla ngakukhumbula wena, Simakadze. Umthandazo wami wafinyelela kuwe, ethempelini lakho lelingcwele." 
Jonah2:8 Labo labakhonta bonkulunkulu labalite bamshiyile Nkulunkulu sibili lophatsana ngemusa. 
Jonah2:9 Kepha mine ngiyawuhlabela kuwe ngelivi lekubonga, nginikele ngemihlatjelo; loko lengikufungele ngiyawukufeza. Insindziso ivela kuSimakadze.”" 
Jonah2:10 Simakadze wakhuluma enhlantini, yase ihlantela Jona elugwini, emhlabatsini lowomile." 
Jonah3:1 Livi laSimakadze laphindze lefika kuJona kwesibili, latsi:" 
Jonah3:2 “Hamba, uye eNineve, kulelidolobha lelikhulu, ufike umemetele lesimemetelo lengikunike sona.”" 
Jonah3:3 Ngako-ke wahamba Jona waya eNineve, njengekusho kwelivi laSimakadze. INineve lena kwakulidolobha lelikhulukati; bekungatsatsa emalanga lamatsatfu kutsi umuntfu alihambe lonkhe." 
Jonah3:4 Jona walingenela lelidolobha, wahamba lilanga lonkhe. Wase uyacala uyamemetela utsi: “Sekusele emalanga langemashumi lamane kutsi iNineve ibhujiswe!”" 
Jonah3:5 Bantfu baseNineve balikholwa lelivi laNkulunkulu. Ngako base bamemetela kutsi bonkhe bantfu abazile, kusukela kulomkhulu kuze kube ngukulomncane, bembatse emasaka, bakhombise kutsi baphendvukile." 
Jonah3:6 Letindzaba tatsi natifika enkhosini yaseNineve, yasukuma esihlalweni sayo sebukhosi, yakhumula ingubo yayo yebukhosi, yatembonya ngendvwangu yemasaka, yahlala phansi emlotseni." 
Jonah3:7 Yakhipha simemetelo kuyo yonkhe iNineve, yatsi: “Inkhosi netiphatsimandla tayo itsi: ‘Akubete lodlako nalonambitsa lutfo nome lonatsa emanti: Umuntfu nome silwane, umhlambi wetinkhomo nome timvu ungadli unganatsi." 
Jonah3:8 Kodvwa bantfu netilwane akumbonywe ngetindvwangu temasaka kukhalwe kuNkulunkulu. Wonkhe umuntfu akaphendvuke endleleni yakhe lembi nasebudloveni lobusetandleni takhe. 
Jonah3:9 Ngobe ngubani nje lowatiko, mhlawumbe Nkulunkulu angatisola ayiyekele lentfukutselo yakhe leyesabekako, kuze singabhubhi?’ ”" 
Jonah3:10 Watsi kube Nkulunkulu abone loko labasebakwentile, kutsi batishiye tindlela tabo letimbi, watisola ngalokubi labeshito kutsi utabehlisela kona. Akazange abajezise." 
Jonah4:1 Kwamkhuba kakhulu loko Jona, ngako watfukutsela kakhulu." 
Jonah4:2 Wathandaza kuSimakadze watsi: “Awu, Simakadze! Akusiko yini loku lengakusho ngiseseveni lakitsi kutsi kutakwenteka? Ngiko ngabaleka ngaya eThashishi; ngobe ngangati kutsi wena unguNkulunkulu lonemusa nesihawu, uyephuta kutfukutsela, unelutsandvo loluphuphumako, uyatisola ngekutfumela lokubi." 
Jonah4:3 Ngako-ke Simakadze, ngiyakuncenga kutsi ukususe kuphila kwami kimi; ngobe kuncono kimi kutsi ngife kunekutsi ngiphile.”" 
Jonah4:4 Simakadze wamphendvula watsi: “Unalungelo lini lekutfukutsela?” 
Jonah4:5 Jona waphuma kulelidolobha wayawuhlala ngasemphumalanga yalo, watentela lidlangala lapho. Wahlala emtfuntini ngaphansi kwalo, kute atewubona lokwase kutakwenteka kulelidolobha laseNineve." 
Jonah4:6 Simakadze Nkulunkulu wamilisa umhlafutfo, wawukhulisa etikwaJona kutsi umentele umtfunti, kuze kuphele kutfukutsela kwakhe; Jona wamjabulisa lomhlafutfo." 
Jonah4:7 Ngakusasa nakudzabuka kusa, Nkulunkulu walungisa imphehla, yawuphehla lomhlafutfo, wabuna." 
Jonah4:8 Nakuphuma lilanga, Nkulunkulu walungisa umoya loshisako wasemphumalanga; lilanga lashaya enhloko yaJona, wadzimate waba nesiyeti, wafisa kufa; wase utsi: “Kuncono ngimane ngife kunekutsi ngiphile.”" 
Jonah4:9 Kodvwa Nkulunkulu watsi kuJona: “Unalungelo lini lekutfukutselela lomhlafutfo?” Yena-ke watsi: “Ngenta kahle kutsi ngitfukutsele; ngitfukutsele kutsi angife ngitsi saka!” 
Jonah4:10 Simakadze watsi: “Wena uyawuhawukela umhlafutfo longakawujulukeli nome longakawukhulisi, lomile ebusuku bunye, waphindze wafa ebusuku lobulandzelako." 
Jonah4:11 Pho, mine bengingeke ngiyihawukele yini iNineve, lelidolobha lelikhulu kangaka, lapho kukhona bantfu labangakwati kwehlukanisa sandla sabo sekudla nesancele, labati-120 000, kanye netinkhomo letinyenti kangaka?”" 
Micah1:1 Ngesikhatsi kaJuda kusabusa boJothamu, na-Ahazi, naHezekiya Simakadze watfuma Mikha waseMoreshethi. Simakadze wembulela Mikha nati tintfo ngeSamariya neJerusalema:" 
Micah1:2 Lalelani naku, nine tive nonkhe: nilalele nani mhlaba wonkhe! INkhosi Simakadze iyakunilahla ngelicala. Lalelani! Ukhuluma asethempelini lakhe." 
Micah1:3 Simakadze usuka endzaweni yakhe lengcwele; utakwehla ahambe eticongweni tetintsaba. 
Micah1:4 Letintsaba titawuncibilika ngaphansi kwetinyawo takhe; yebo, tincibilike njengemafutsa nakafakwa emlilweni. Tiyawugeletela etigodzini nasetihosheni; yebo, tigelete njengemanti ahhuhluleka aphuma eticongweni temagcuma." 
Micah1:5 Konkhe loku kuyakwenteka, ngobe Israyeli onile wahlubuka kuNkulunkulu. Empeleni nje ngubani lekufanele asoleke ngenca yekuhlubuka kwa-Israyeli? Vele, yiSamariya. Ngubani lonelicala lekukhonta tithico kaJuda? Vele, yiJerusalema matfupha." 
Micah1:6 Ngako Simakadze utsi: “ISamariya ngitayenta ibe tindzala tesikhotsa, kube yindzawo yekuhlanyela umvini. Tindlu letitindzala ngiyakutitfulula tigeletele etigodzini, kutsi tisekelo telidolobha ngitihlubule tibesebaleni." 
Micah1:7 Tonkhe tithico talo letiligugu ngiyakutifohlota tibe ticucu, nako konkhe lokunikwe tingwadla telithempeli kubhujiswe ngemlilo, bese kutsi tonkhe tithico letibatiwe kube libibi lesiganga. Konkhe loku iSamariya ikucokelele ngemali leyitfole ngebugwadla bayo ethempelini, ngako titsa tayo titakwetfwala tikuyise lapho kuyawubhadala bugwadla khona.”" 
Micah1:8 Mikha wase utsi: “Ngenca yaloko ngitawukhala ngilile kuze ngikhombise kudzabuka kwami, ngitawuhamba ngcunu ngingafaki ngisho neticatfulo, ngishaye umkhulungwane njengenja, ngikhale njengesahhukulu, ngikekele njengenshi." 
Micah1:9 Emanceba ekushaywa nguSimakadze, ashaya iSamariya, angeke elapheke; yebo, naJuda utakwehlelwa ngulawo manceba. Kubhujiswa sekusemasangweni eJerusalema, lapho kuhlala khona bantfu bami.”" 
Micah1:10 Titsa tetfu taseGathi ungatitjeli ngekwehlulwa kwetfu, ungatikhombisi kukhala kwakho. Bantfu, baseBhethi Leyafra, khombisani kudzabuka kwenu ngekutsi nitigicite phansi elutfulini." 
Micah1:11 Nine takhamiti taseShafiri, tidzingiseni nihlazekile, ningcunu. Takhamiti taseSanani tesaba kuphuma edolobheni lato. Nawuva takhamiti taseBethi Eseli tilila, uyawuvele ubone kutsi kute siphephelo lapho." 
Micah1:12 Takhamiti taseMarothi timele kusitakala kwato ngekulangatelela lokukhulu, ngobe Simakadze usondzete sigemegeme emasangweni aseJerusalema." 
Micah1:13 Nine lenihlala eLakhishi, bophelani emahhashi enu etincoleni, ngobe ngini lenaholela iSiyoni esonweni, tono ta-Israyeli takhandzakala kini." 
Micah1:14 Ngako, nine takhamiti takaJuda, yehlukanani nelidoloba iMoreshethi Gathi. Kute lusito lolutawutfolwa ngemakhosi aka-Israyeli edolobheni lase-Akzibi." 
Micah1:15 Nine-ke takhamiti taseMaresha, Simakadze utaninikela etandleni tesitsa lesitawutfumba lelidolobha lenu. Baholi labahloniphekile baka-Israyeli bayawubhaca emihumeni yase-Adulamu." 
Micah1:16 Takhamiti takaJuda, hhulani tinwele tenu, nililele bantfwabenu lenibatsandzako. Singani tinhloko tenu tibe tincacadvu njengemphandla, ngobe bantfwabenu batawutfunjwa." 
Micah2:1 Maye kulabo labacabanga imicabango lemibi, labo labatsi balele babe bangakalali bacabanga emasu ekwenta bubi! Kutsi kungasa bakwente loko bebakuhlosile, ngobe banemandla ekukwenta loko." 
Micah2:2 Nabafuna emasimi, bavele bawatsatse ngendlovuyangena; nabafuna tindlu, bavele batidle. Kute namunye lonemndeni lovikelekile, nome lonelutfo loluphephile." 
Micah2:3 Ngako Simakadze utsi: “Ngitanehlisela sehlakalo, futsi kuyawubate loyawuphepha kuso. Niyawutikhandza senisekhatsi elubishini, lapho ningaseyiwuhamba ngekutigabatisa lokungaka." 
Micah2:4 Mhlazana kufika leso sikhatsi, tive tiyawubekiselana ngalendzaba yenu yesehlakalo, tiyawuhlabela ingoma ngelusizi lwesehlakalo lesiyawube sinehlele, titsi: ‘Sibhujisiwe sacedvwa, Simakadze ulitsetse live letfu, walinika labo labasitfumbile.’ ”" 
Micah2:5 Ngako-ke nasesifikile sikhatsi sekutsi live libuyiselwe esiveni saNkulunkulu, kute namunye wenu loyawuba nesabelo kulo." 
Micah2:6 Lesive saphrofetha kimi, satsi: “Ungasiphrofethi, ungasishumayeli ngaloko. Nkulunkulu angeke asihlazise." 
Micah2:7 Ucabanga kutsi sive saka-Israyeli singaphansi kwesicalekiso yini? Kungabe Nkulunkulu sewulahlekelwe kubeketela kwakhe yini? Angayenta kambe intfo lenje? “Akakhulumi kahle yini kulabo labenta lokuhle?” 
Micah2:8 Simakadze waphendvula watsi: “Itolo loku sive sami sisukume phansi njengesitsa. Nihlubula tembatfo letinhle tebunjinga kulabo labendlulako, banganaki njengemabutfo labuya emphini." 
Micah2:9 Nicosha bafati besive sami emakhaya abo labawatsandzako, nemuke nebantfwababo tibusiso tami taphakadze." 
Micah2:10 Sukumani nihambe, lena akusiyo indzawo lapho ningabalekela khona, ngobe ingcolile; lendzawo itawubhujiswa ngelulaka lolukhulu." 
Micah2:11 Lesive sifuna luhlobo lwebaphrofethi labaphrofetha emanga nenkhohliso, batsi: ‘Ngiphrofetha kutsi liwayini netjwala kuyawuba ngimifula yenu yekunatsa.’" 
Micah2:12 “Kodvwa ngiyakunibutsela ndzawonye, nonkhe nine sive saka-Israyeli lenisasele. Ngiyawunibutsela nonkhe ndzawonye njengetimvu tibuyela esibayeni sato; nanjengelidlelo leligcwele timvu, live lenu lisetawubuye ligcwale bantfu labanyenti.”" 
Micah2:13 Nkulunkulu uyawubavulela indlela yabo, abuye abahole abakhiphe ekutfunjweni kwabo. Bayawufohla, baphume emasangweni elidolobha bahambe bakhululekile. INkhosi yabo, Simakadze cobo lwakhe, uyawubahambela embili abakhiphe." 
Micah3:1 Lalelani, nine baholi baka-Israyeli! Bekufanele ngabe ninakekela kutsi esiveni sakini konkhe kwentiwe ngendlela lefanele;" 
Micah3:2 kodvwa esikhundleni saloko nitondza kulunga, nitsandze lokubi. Nihlinza bantfu bami, nihlube inyama yabo ematsanjeni abo." 
Micah3:3 Nidla inyama yemitimba yesive sami, nihlube inyama yaso ematsanjeni aso nihlahlele ematsambo aso, nicobe inyama yemitimba yabo njengenyama icotjelwa kufakwa ebhodweni." 
Micah3:4 Siyeta sikhatsi lapho nitawukhala khona kuSimakadze, kodvwa angeke aniphendvule. Angeke ayilalele imithandazo yenu, ngobe nente lokubi kuye." 
Micah3:5 Sive sami sedukiswa baphrofethi labetsembisa kuthula kulabo lababapha imali, kantsi labo labangabadizeli babetsembisa babasongele ngemphi. Kulabo baphrofethi Simakadze utsi:" 
Micah3:6 “Baphrofethi, sekusele kancane kuniphelele; yebo, selinishonele lilanga. Njengobe naku nedukisa sive sami, ningeke niphindze nibe netiphrofetho temibono, futsi ningeke nikwati kukubona lokutako kusengakefiki.”" 
Micah3:7 Labo lababona lokutako kusengakefiki bayawuhlazeka bative badliwa ngemahloni ngenca yekwehluleka kwabo. Bayawujabha, ngobe Nkulunkulu angasabaphendvuli." 
Micah3:8 Kepha mine, Simakadze ungigcwalisa ngaMoya nangemandla akhe, anginike luvelo lwekwenta tintfo ngekulunga, anginike nesibindzi sekutjela Israyeli lapho one khona nekutsi tono takhe ngutiphi." 
Micah3:9 Lalelani la kimi, nine babusi baka-Israyeli, nine lenitondza kuvikela lokulungile bese niguculela lokuhle kube kubi." 
Micah3:10 Nine nakha iJerusalema, likhaya laNkulunkulu, etikwesisekelo sekubulala kanye nekwenta tintfo ngekungalungi." 
Micah3:11 Babusi balamadolobha bawabusa ngekudizelwa, kanjalo nebaphristi bayatsengwa kuze bachaze bahumushe nemtsetfo, nebaphrofethi imibono netembulo tabo batichaza ngekudizelwa; noko basajinge bachoshe ngekutsi Simakadze unabo, batsi: “Kute lokutasehlela, ngobe Simakadze unatsi.”" 
Micah3:12 Ngako-ke ngenca yenu, iSiyoni iyawulinywa njengensimi, iJerusalema iyakuba yincumbi yencitsakalo, intsaba yelithempeli ibe lihlatsi." 
Micah4:1 Ngemalanga ekugcina intsaba yelithempeli laSimakadze iyawucina, ibe ngulephakeme kwendlula tonkhe tintsaba; iyawuphakanyiswa ibe ngetulu kwemagcuma, tive letinyenti tiyawubekelela tiye kuyo tingasakhawuli." 
Micah4:2 Tive letinyenti tiyawufika titsi: “Wotani, senyukele entsabeni yaSimakadze, endlini yaNkulunkulu waJakobe. Utasifundzisa tindlela takhe, khona sitewuhamba emikhondvweni yakhe. Ngobe umtsetfo uyawuphuma eSiyoni, livi laSimakadze liphume eJerusalema.”" 
Micah4:3 Uyakwehlulela emkhatsini wetive, acatulule imibango yetive letinemandla, edvute nakhashane. Tona-ke tiyawukhandza tinkemba tato, titente tibe ngemakhuba, tikhali tato tibe tikelo tekutsena tihlala. Sive singeke sihlasele lesinye ngenkemba, futsi tive tingeke tisaceceshelwa kulwa imphi." 
Micah4:4 Bonkhe bantfu bayawuhlala ngekuthula ngulowo nalowo esivinini sakhe nasemikhiweni yakhe, kubete lobesabisako. Loku kwetsenjiswe nguSimakadze, longuSomandla." 
Micah4:5 Tonkhe tive tikhonta tihloniphe bonkulunkulu bato, kodvwa tsine siyawukhonta Simakadze Nkulunkulu wetfu phakadze naphakadze." 
Micah4:6 Simakadze utsi: “Sikhatsi siyeta, mhlazane ngiyawubutsela ndzawonye sive lengasijezisa, bona labo lababuva buhlungu ekutfunjweni." 
Micah4:7 Bantfu balesive batishosha kantsi bakhashane nemakhaya abo, kodvwa ngiyawukwenta sicalo lesisha ngensali yabo, babe sive lesinemandla. Ngiyawuba yiNkhosi yabo eSiyoni kuze kube phakadze naphakadze.”" 
Micah4:8 Nawe Jerusalema, njengobe bewuyinqaba yekulondvolota umhlambi wakho, wena ntsaba yaseSiyoni uyawuphindza futsi ube yinhlokodolobha yalowo mbuso, lowawuvele ungiyo." 
Micah4:9 Nikhalelani kakhulu kangaka? Yini nikhale nijilajile njengemfati aphetfwe ngumhelo? Kungobe anisenayo yini inkhosi, nebaholi benu sebafile yini?" 
Micah4:10 Shumpani nibubule, bantfu baseJerusalema, nilingise umfati aphetfwe ngumhelo nasatawubeleka, ngobe nyalo senitawuphuma ekhaya niyewuhlala etigangeni. Nitakuya eBhabhulona; noko lapho niyawusindziswa, Simakadze uyakunephula etitseni tenu." 
Micah4:11 Tive letinyenti setibutsanele kuhlasela nine. Titsi: “IJerusalema imelwe kutsi ibhujiswe. Sitawubona tibondza taseSiyoni setibhidlitiwe!” 
Micah4:12 Kodvwa letive atati kutsi yini lesengcondvweni yaSimakadze. Atiwacondzi emasu akhe, futsi atiboni nekutsi tibutselwe ndzawonye, khona titewujeziswa kahle, tibhujiswe njengekubhulwa kwemabele labutselwe ndzawonye, abutsaniselwa kubhulwa." 
Micah4:13 Simakadze utsi: “Sive saseJerusalema, hambani nijezise titsa tenu, nitibhule njengemabele! Ngiyakunenta nibe nemandla njengenkunzi lenetimphondvo letiyinsimbi ibe nemasondvo elitfusi. Niyawucotfula tive letinyenti, bese kutsi umcebo letatiwutfole ngendluzula niwuletse kimi, mine Simakadze, iNkhosi yemhlaba wonkhe.”" 
Micah5:1 Bantfu baseJerusalema, butsanani ndzawonye! Sesivinjetelwe! Sebahlasela umholi waka-Israyeli!" 
Micah5:2 Simakadze utsi: “Betlehema Efratha, nome ungulomunye wemiti lemincane yakaJuda, kodvwa ngiyawuveta kuwe umbusi loyawubusa sive saka-Israyeli. Lusendvo lwakhe luyawusukela kulolo lwaluvele lukhona kwasekucaleni.”" 
Micah5:3 Ngako Simakadze lesive sakhe uyawusiyekelela etitseni taso, kuze kufike sikhatsi sekutalwa kwendvodzana. Kuyawutsi bonkhe bakubo, labayawube basakatekile batfumbeka, bahlanganiselwe ndzawonye babe sive sinye." 
Micah5:4 Nakefika lowo mbusi, uyawubelusa ngemandla aSimakadze, yebo, uyawubaphatsa ngebukhosi baSimakadze longuNkulunkulu wakhe. Sive sakhe siyawuphila ngekuphepha, ngobe bantfu bemhlaba bayawumatisa badvumise bukhulu bakhe." 
Micah5:5 Uyawuba kuthula kwaso. Ngesikhatsi ema-Asiriya avimbetela live letfu afohla tinqaba tetfu, tsine, ma-Israyeli, siyawutfumela baholi betfu labanemandla kakhulu bayekulwa nawo." 
Micah5:6 Bayakuyehlula bayincobe i-Asiriya, lekulive laNimrodi; yebo, bayakuyibusa ngemkhonto. Ngalendlela siyakuphephiswa kuma-Asiriya, nakahlasela live letfu." 
Micah5:7 Ema-Israyeli layawusindza ayawufanana nematolo lahlumelelisako latfunyelwe nguSimakadze etiveni letinyenti, afanane nemvula lenetsa lokumilako. Ayawuncika kuNkulunkulu, hhayi kumuntfu." 
Micah5:8 Insali yema-Israyeli iyakubasemkhatsini wetive letinyenti, ifanane nelibhubesi lelitingela ehlatsini noma edlelweni: Lisuka lingene emkhatsini wetimvu, litisukele litidzabudzabule ticucwana, litsemba lato lekusindza lingabikho." 
Micah5:9 Israyeli, titsa takho uyakutiphakamisela sandla utincobe, bonkhe labakutondzako bayawubhujiswa." 
Micah5:10 Simakadze utsi: “Ngaleso sikhatsi ngiyakubulala emahhashi akho, ngibhubhise tincola nemahhashi ato." 
Micah5:11 Ngiyawubhubhisa emadolobha elive lakho, ngidzilite tonkhe tinqaba takho." 
Micah5:12 Ngiyakuyicitsa yonkhe imilingo yakho loyisebentisako, ngikushiye ute netangoma." 
Micah5:13 Ngiyawubhidlita tithico takho kanye netinsika tato tematje langcwele. Ungeke uphindze utikhonte letintfo letibatwe nguwe matfupha. 
Micah5:14 Ngiyawudzephuna tonkhe tinsika tesithicokati lesingu-Ashera eveni lakho, ngibhidlite emadolobha akho." 
Micah5:15 Ngekutfukutsela kwami lokukhulu ngiyakutenanela etiveni tonkhe letingazange tingilalele.” 
Micah6:1 Lalelani kutsi Simakadze umbeka cala lini Israyeli: “Sukuma, Simakadze, usho licala lombeka lona Israyeli. Tintsaba nemagcuma akakuve kutsi utsini, akabe bofakazi." 
Micah6:2 Nine tintsaba, nani tisekelo taphakadze temhlaba lalelani licala lelibekwa nguSimakadze! Simakadze ubeka sive sakhe licala. Utsi sive sakhe, lesingu-Israyeli, sinelicala.”" 
Micah6:3 Simakadze utsi: “Sive sami, ngenteni kini? Nginetfwese mtfwalo muni? Ngiphendvuleni." 
Micah6:4 Nganikhipha eGibhithe; nganikhipha ebugcilini, ngatfumela boMosi na-Aroni, naMiriyamu kutsi banihole." 
Micah6:5 Sive sami, khumbulani inkhosi Bhalaki waseMowabi kutsi abefuna kwentani kini; nikhumbule nekutsi Bhalamu, umsa waBheyori, wamphendvula kanjani. Khumbulani konkhe lokwanehlela endleleni nisuka emathendeni aseShithimu niya eGilgali. Khumbulani yonkhe imisebenti yaSimakadze, khona-ke nitabe seniyabona kutsi ngatihlupha kanganani kuze nginisindzise.”" 
Micah6:6 Ngiyawuletsani mine kuSimakadze, Nkulunkulu wemazulu, nangitemkhonta? Ngiyawuletsa emazinyane lamnyaka munye abe ngumnikelo wekushiswa kuye yini?" 
Micah6:7 Kungabe Simakadze uyawujabula yini, nangimletsela tinkhulungwane tetimvu nome imifula lengancamuki yemafutsa emncumo? Ngifanele yini kunikela kuye ngelitubulo lami, lekusitselo semtimba wami, kutsi libe yinhlawulo yetono tami?" 
Micah6:8 Cha, Simakadze usitjelile lokungukona kukuhle. Lakufunako kitsi ngunaku: Ufuna sente kulunga, siphatsane ngemusa, siphilele Nkulunkulu ngentfobeko." 
Micah6:9 Kuhlakanipha kumesaba Simakadze. Uyamemeta edolobheni utsi: “Lalelani nine bantfu lenibutsana edolobheni! 
Micah6:10 Etindlini talababi kugcwele umcebo labawutfola ngebubi. Basebentisa tikali ngebucili, lekunguyonantfo lengiyitondzako." 
Micah6:11 “Ngingabatsetselela kanjani bantfu labasebentisa tikali ngebucili netisindvo letiphambene nemtsetfo? 
Micah6:12 “Bantfu bakini labatinjinga baphanga laba labamphofu, nani nonkhe ningulabacalemanga nalabakhohlisanako." 
Micah6:13 Manje sengicalile kunigulisa nginibhubhise ngenca yekona kwenu. 
Micah6:14 Niyawudla kudla, kodvwa ningesutsi; empeleni, niyawuchubeka nilambe. Niyawutibekela tivuno, kodvwa aniyiwukhona konga. Konkhe lenikongako ngiyawukucedza ngemphi." 
Micah6:15 “Niyawuhlanyela, kodvwa aniyiwuvuna. Niyawuhluta emafutsa etitselweni tawo, kodvwa aniyikuwasebentisa. Niyawuphisa liwayini, kodvwa ningalinatsi." 
Micah6:16 Loko kuyakwenteka, ngobe nilandzele imikhuba lemibi yenkhosi Omri nendvodzana yakhe Ahabi. Nichubeke nalandzela imitsetfo yabo, ngaloko-ke ngiyawunibhubhisa; bonkhe bantfu bayawunibukela phansi. Bantfu yonkhe indzawo bayawunedzelela ngendzelelo.”" 
Micah7:1 Kute litsemba! Mine ngifanana nemuntfu lolambile lotfole tihlahla tite titselo nemagelebisi kute emvinini. Onkhe emagelebisi kanye nemakhiwa lamnandzi bawakhe bawacedza. 
Micah7:2 Kute nome munye umuntfu lowetsembekile losasele eveni, kute losetsembekile kuNkulunkulu. Wonkhe umuntfu ufunana nematfuba ekubulala. Wonkhe umuntfu utingelana newakubo." 
Micah7:3 Bonkhe batingcweti ekwenteni lokubi. Tiphatsimandla nebehluleli bacela kudizelwa. Umuntfu lomkhulu uvele atjele labantfu loko lakufunako, bese babopha lisu." 
Micah7:4 Ngisho labancono babo nalabetsembeke kakhulu kunabo bonkhe abanamsebenti, bafana nelukhula. Selifikile lilanga lapho Nkulunkulu ayakujezisa bantfu, njengobe vele abebacwayisile ngebalindzi bakhe lababaphrofethi. Kwamanje sebadzidzekile." 
Micah7:5 Ungamkholwa makhelwane wakho, nome-ke ungametsembi umnganakho. Uwabale emavi akho lowakhulumako, ngisho nakumkakho lomtsandzako imbala." 
Micah7:6 Kuletikhatsi emadvodzana aphatsa boyise njengetilima, nemadvodzakati aphindzilitana nabonina, bese kutsi bomakoti baphambane naboninatala; yebo, titsa temuntfu bantfu bemndeni wakhe." 
Micah7:7 Kodvwa mine ngitakwetsembela kuSimakadze, ngilindzele Nkulunkulu ngesibindzi, ngobe nguye lotangiphephisa. Nkulunkulu wami utangiva." 
Micah7:8 Titsa tetfu kute letingasicoloshela ngako. Nome sesiwile, sitawuvuka futsi. Nome sesisebumnyameni kwanyalo, kodvwa Simakadze utawuba kukhanya kwetfu." 
Micah7:9 Sonile kuSimakadze, ngako nyalo kufanele kutfukutsela kwakhe sikubeketelele kwesikhashana. Kodvwa ekugcineni uyawusivikela, acondzise loko lokubi lokwentiwe kitsi. Uyawusiletsa asifake ekukhanyeni; yebo, siyawuphila, simbone asisindzisa." 
Micah7:10 Titsa tetfu tiyawutsi tingakubona loko tidliwe ngemahloni; tona leto titsa letake taba liphela endlebeni ngekusibuta titsi: “Uphi loSimakadze longuNkulunkulu wenu?” Siyawutibona setehluliwe tapitjitwa phansi, sincane seludzaka lwendlela." 
Micah7:11 Nine bantfu baseJerusalema siyeta sikhatsi sekwakha kabusha tibondza telidolobha. Ngaleso sikhatsi live lakini liyawukwandziswa. 
Micah7:12 Bantfu bakini bayawubuya, baphuma yonkhe indzawo; e-Asiriya emphumalanga, eGibhithe eningizimu, etifundzeni teYufrathe, nasetilwandle letikhashane, nasetintsabeni letikhashane." 
Micah7:13 Umhlaba uyawuba lugwadvule ngenca yebubi balabo bantfu labahlala kuwo. 
Micah7:14 Simakadze, bani ngumelusi wesive sakho losikhetsile. Nome bantfu bakho bahlala babodvwa ehlane, kodvwa batungeletwe live lelivundzile. Abasukume batondle emadlelweni laneluhlata lolunyenti, eBhashani nakaGileyadi, njengobe babenta kadzenidzeni." 
Micah7:15 Sentele timangaliso, Simakadze, njengobe wenta emalangeni ekusikhipha kwakho eGibhithe." 
Micah7:16 Tive tiyawukubona loku, bese tiyagongonyeka, ngobe beticabanga kutsi tinemandla onkhe. Tiyawuvala imilomo yato, timbonye netindlebe tato ngenca yekujabha." 
Micah7:17 Tiyawuhuma phansi elutfulini njengetinyoka; tiyawuphuma etinqabeni tato titfutfumela ngenca yekwesaba. Ngekwesaba tiyawugucukela kuSimakadze longuNkulunkulu wetfu. 
Micah7:18 Kute nkulunkulu lofana nawe, Simakadze; wena utsetselela tono tensali yakho lesele ekubhujisweni. Awuhlali utfukutsele siphelane, kodvwa ujabulela kusikhombisa umusa wakho." 
Micah7:19 Uyawuphindze ube nemusa futsi kitsi. Tono tetfu utatigcobagcoba ngetinyawo utigcumukisele tishone ekujuleni kwelwandle! 
Micah7:20 Kwetsembeka nemusa wakho utakukhombisa sive sakho lekutitukulwane ta-Abrahama naJakobe, njengobe wetsembisa ngekufunga kubokhokho betfu endvulo." 
Nahum1:1 Leli livi lesembulo macondzana neNineve, yincwadzi yembono waNahume wase-Elkhoshi." 
Nahum1:2 Simakadze nguNkulunkulu lonesikhwele nalophindziselako. Simakadze uyabuyisela, futsi ugcwele intfukutselo. Simakadze uyatiphindziselela etitseni takhe, ehlisele njalo lulaka lwakhe kulabo labemelene naye." 
Nahum1:3 Simakadze akasheshi atfukutsele, kodvwa unemandla lamakhulu. Simakadze angeke ahlale angabajezisi labanelicala. Indlela yakhe isesiwunguwungwini nasesivunguvungwini; emafu alutfuli lwetinyawo takhe." 
Nahum1:4 Wekhuta lwandle, kome emanti alo; womisa yonkhe imifula yemanti. Tikhotsa taseBhashani tiyoma, iNtsaba iKhameli ihamuke, timbali taseLebanoni tibune." 
Nahum1:5 Tintsaba tiyatfutfumela embikwakhe, nemagcuma ancibilike aphele. Umhlaba nalabahlala kuwo kuyatfutfumela, nakuchamuka yena." 
Nahum1:6 Ngubani nje longamelana nentfukutselo yakhe? Ngubani longabhekana nelulaka lwakhe lolwesabeka kangaka? Nakacitsa intfukutselo yakhe lenjengemlilo, emadvwala agayeka phansi abe tincetu embikwakhe." 
Nahum1:7 Simakadze ulungile, usiphephelo ngetikhatsi tekuhlupheka. Uyabanakekela labo labakhosela kuye." 
Nahum1:8 Ngesikhukhula lesinemandla baseNineve labaphambene naye uyawubacedza, abacoshe baye ebumnyameni." 
Nahum1:9 Onkhe emacebo labamakhela wona labamelene naSimakadze uyawacedza. Kute labaphindze bamvukele. 
Nahum1:10 Bayawugigeleka bona emanyeveni, nasekudzakweni liwayini labo. Bayawushwabudzeleka njengemahlanga lomisiwe." 
Nahum1:11 Kuwe, Nineve, kuphume umuntfu loceba emacebo lamabi ngaSimakadze, umuntfu longumsunguli walokubi." 
Nahum1:12 Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: “Nome ema-Asiriya anemandla futsi amanyenti, ayakubhujiswa aphele. Nome senginihluphe nganishaya kangaka, nine maJuda, ngingeke ngisachubeka nekunihlupha." 
Nahum1:13 Nyalo sengitawuncamula lijoko labo lelisentsanyeni yenu, ngidzabule naletinketane tabo letinibophile.”" 
Nahum1:14 Simakadze sewukhiphe umyalo mayelana nawe, Nineve, lotsi: “Awusayikuba natitukulwane letiyawumisa libito lakho. Ngitawutibhubhisa tonkhe titfombe takho netithico takho letisemathempelini abonkulunkulu bakho. Ngitanilungiselela emathuna, ngobe nibabi kakhulu!”" 
Nahum1:15 Bukani lapha etikwetintsaba, tinyawo talowo loniletsela tindzaba letimnandzi, lowo lomemetela kuthula. Gubhani imikhosi yenu, nine maJuda, nigcwalise tifungo tenu. Sekute lababi labayakunihlasela. Bayawubhubha bonkhe baphele." 
Nahum2:1 Nasi sitsa sikuhlasela, Nineve! Lindzani tinqaba, nicaphele imigwaco; tilungiseleleni. Bambanani ngemandla enu!" 
Nahum2:2 Simakadze utawubuyisela ludvumo lwakaJakobe njengeludvumo lwaka-Israyeli, nome nje babhubhisi sebabacekele phansi babhubhisa netihlahla tabo temagelebisi." 
Nahum2:3 Emahawu emabutfo etitsa abovu, emabutfo avunule lokubovu ngalobutopele, tinsimbi letisetincoleni temphi tiyamanyatela ngelilanga lekulungiswa kwato; tikhali tawo tiyamengetela." 
Nahum2:4 Tincola tawo temphi tijubalata etitaladini, tehla tiyenyuka nelidolobha. Tifanana netidlwane letivutsako, tigijime, tiklwebhe njengembane." 
Nahum2:5 Kuhlanganiswa emabutfo aseNineve elikhetselo. Noko ayakhubatela endleleni yawo. Agijima aye elubondzeni lwelidolobha, tivikelo tiyemiswa." 
Nahum2:6 Emasango emifula ayavuleka, sigodlo siyabhidlika." 
Nahum2:7 Kushaywa umtsetfo wekutsi lelidolobha alidzingiswe lisuswe lapha. Emantfombatana akhona latigcili adzindza sililo; adzindza sililo atikhalela. 
Nahum2:8 Njengesitiba semanti, injalo neNineve; bantfu bayo bayabaleka kuyo, banjengemanti lageleta esuka esitibeni sawo. Bamemeta batsi: “Manini! Manini!” Kodvwa kute ngisho namunye lobanakako." 
Nahum2:9 Phangani isiliva! Phangani igolide! Imphango yinyenti kakhulu, nengcebo isuke kuyo yonkhe imigodzi yayo." 
Nahum2:10 INineve seyiyabhujiswa, iphangiwe, ihlutjuliwe. Tinhlitiyo tiyancibilika, emadvolo ayaceka, imitimba iyatfutfumela, bonkhe buso buyaphaphatseka." 
Nahum2:11 Seliphi-ke nyalo lelidolobha lebelingumhume wemabhubesi, indzawo lapho abebondlela khona bantfwabawo, lapho emabhubesi lamadvuna nalamasikati abeshangashanga khona, nebantfwabawo awakhulisela khona, angesabi lutfo?" 
Nahum2:12 Libhubesi litingele tinyamatane, letenele kondla bantfwabalo kanye nemkalo, ligcwalise sikhundla salo ngetinyamatane, lihlohle nemgodzi walo ngalelikutingele." 
Nahum2:13 Simakadze longuSomandla utsi: “Mine ngiphambene nawe, Nineve. Tincola takho temphi ngitatishisa tibe yintfutfu, inkemba itawudla emazinyane akho elibhubesi, anginakushiyela nyamatane emhlabeni. Emavi etitfunywa takho angeke aphindze evakale.”" 
Nahum3:1 Maye kulo lidolobha lengati leligcwele emacebo, naleligcwele imphango, nalelingabesweli bantfu lekubahlupha." 
Nahum3:2 Ase nilalele kubhoma kwesiswebhu, nebuklekekleke bemasondvo, nebugidzigidzi bemahhashi, nebunsegensege betincola temphi." 
Nahum3:3 Bagibeli bemahhashi bayajijimeta, kumanya tinkemba, tikhali bumengemenge. Imphi yatfolana etulu, kwadzindzibala tindvundvuma tetidvumbu letingeke tibalwe nekubalwa; bantfu bagijima etikwato, tiyabagila." 
Nahum3:4 Konkhe loku kuye ngebunyenti benkhanuko yengwadla lebukekako, umhhunguli wabo bonkhe butsi, ingwababane leyagcilata tive ngebugwadla bayo netive tonkhe ngebutsi bayo." 
Nahum3:5 Simakadze longuSomandla utsi: “Mine ngiphambene nawe, ngitawuphakamisa tidvwaba takho tibheke etulu. Tonkhe tive temhlaba ngitatikhombisa bungcunu bakho, nemibuso yemhlaba ngiyikhombise lihlazo lakho." 
Nahum3:6 Ngiyawukujikijela ngemanyala, ngikuphatse dlephu, ngikwente ube yinhlekisa." 
Nahum3:7 Bonkhe labakubonako bayawukubalekela, batsi: ‘INineve seyiwile, sengusemaboleleni, ingabe itawukhalelwa ngubani?’ Ngingamtfolaphi umuntfu longahle akudvudvute?”" 
Nahum3:8 Wena Nineve, uncono yini kuneThebesi, lekuyindlunkhulu yaseGibhithe, letungeletwe ngemanti? Lawo manti bekulubondza lwayo." 
Nahum3:9 IKushe neGibhithe bekungemandla ayo lamakhulu; iPhuthi neLibhiya, bangani bayo." 
Nahum3:10 Noko, yatfunjwa yesuswa eveni layo, yadzingiswa. Bantfwabayo labancane bashaywa baphihlitwa kuwo onkhe emakona etitaladi, baholi bayo bashayelwa inkatho; bonkhe bahlonishwa bayo baboshwa ngetinketane." 
Nahum3:11 Nawe-ke, Nineve, utawudzakwa, uhambe uyekubhaca, ufune kukhoseliswa titsa." 
Nahum3:12 Tonkhe tinqaba takho tinjengemikhiwa lenemakhiwa ayo ekucala lasavutsiwe; nangabe inyakatiswa, lamakhiwa adzilikela emlonyeni walowo lowadlako." 
Nahum3:13 Ase ubheke emasotja akho! Onkhe abafati nje. Emasango elive lakho, avulekele titsa takho kabanti, umlilo uyishise yonkhe imicabo yawo." 
Nahum3:14 Khani lamanti utilungiselele kuvinjetelwa, ucinise tinqaba takho. Tsatsa inhlabatsi ubhuce ludzaka, utilungiselele, ufolome sitini." 
Nahum3:15 Umlilo utakudlela khona lapho, nenkemba itakudla ikucedze, njengetintsetse tidla tjani, nawe umlilo utakudla ukucedze, wandze njengesikhonyane." 
Nahum3:16 Bahwebi bakho ubandzise baba banyenti, bendlula tinkhanyeti tesibhakabhaka. Kodvwa nyalo balingise tintsetse ngekutsi bahluphulute live, bese bayabaleka." 
Nahum3:17 Balindzi bakho bafanana nesikhonyane, netindvuna takho tinjengelibulo lesikhonyane lesihlala elubondzeni nakumakhata, kodvwa kutsi nakuphuma lilanga, sindize siye le khashane, singatiwa lapho sikhona." 
Nahum3:18 Awu, mbusi wase-Asiriya, belusi bakho bayetela, kantsi netakhamiti takho letihloniphekile setilele kokuphela. Bantfu bakho basakateke bagcwala tintsaba, kute nalongahle abagcogce babuye ekhaya." 
Nahum3:19 Kute lokungelapha lesilondza sakho, lelinceba lakho linengati yekufa. Bonkhe labo labeva letindzaba takho bagidza batibetsele. Utsi ukhona nje lowase waphunyula wasindza kulolunya lwakho lolungenamkhawulo?" 
Habakkuk1:1 Leli livi lelembulelwa Habakhuki, umphrofethi." 
Habakkuk1:2 Awu, Simakadze, kuyawudzimate kube ngunini solo ngikhala ngicela lusito, kodvwa wena solomane ungalaleli? Kuyawudzimate kube ngunini ngimemeta ngikhala kuwe ngitsi: “Budlwangudlwangu!” kodvwa wena ungasindzisi?" 
Habakkuk1:3 Wentelani kutsi ngibone bubi lobungaka? Ukubeketelelani kuhlushwa kwalabacindzetelekile? Imbhubhiso nebudlwangudlwangu busembikwami njalo; kukhona kulwa nekubanga lokunyenti. 
Habakkuk1:4 Ngako-ke umtsetfo sewuchwale waze waba butsakatsaka, akusehlulelwa ngebucotfo. Lababi behlula labalungile, kuze kutsi bucotfo bemtsetfo buphanjukiswe." 
Habakkuk1:5 “Bukani tive letinye, nicaphelisise, nimangale nife. Ngobe ngitakwenta intfo emalangeni enu, intfo leningasoze nayikholwa, nome beningatjelwa." 
Habakkuk1:6 Ngobe bukani-ke, ngivusa baseBhabhulona, leso sive lesingenamusa, nalesiphulukundlelako, lesidzabula wonkhe umhlaba sitewuphanga tindzawo tekuhlala letingasito taso." 
Habakkuk1:7 Basive lesesatjwako nalesitfutfunyelelwako, bona bangumtsetfo wabo cobo lwabo, batibabatela bona ludvumo lwabo." 
Habakkuk1:8 “Emahhashi abo agijima kwendlula tingwe, esabeka kwendlula timphisi ebusuku. Emasotja abo lagibela emahhashi agijima ashiye inyosi. Bagibeli babo bemahhashi bachamuka khashane. Bandiza njengelusweti naluhlwitsa kudla." 
Habakkuk1:9 “Bonkhe beta basahlose kulwa nekubhubhisa. Emabutfo abo agijima ashulungane njengemoya waselugwadvule, abutse batfunjwa njengesihlabatsi." 
Habakkuk1:10 BaseBhabhulona basive lesiphukuta emakhosi, sihlekise ngebabusi. Siwahleka onkhe emadolobha latinqaba; sakha lutsango lwemhlabatsi lwekuvimbetela, siwahlasele siwadle." 
Habakkuk1:11 Bese sishulungana sendlulele embili njengemoya, emadvodza lanemacala, lamandla awo angunkulunkulu wawo.”" 
Habakkuk1:12 Awu, Simakadze, awusiye yini wena wasendvulo? Nkulunkulu wami, wena Longcwele wami, singeke sife. Awu, Simakadze, ubeke bona baseBhabhulona kutsi behlisele kitsi sijeziso. Awu, dvwala letfu, umise bona kutsi batewusishaya." 
Habakkuk1:13 Emehlo akho ahlanteke kakhulu kutsi angabuka bubi; ungeke ukubeketelele kuhlushwa kwalabacindzetelwe. Manje-ke ubabeketelelani laba labambulutako? Ubindzeleni ngesikhatsi lababi bamita labo labalunge kwengca bona? 
Habakkuk1:14 Bantfu ubaphatselani njengetinhlanti taselwandle, babe njengetilwanyakatana letinwabutelako letingenambusi?" 
Habakkuk1:15 BaseBhabhulona babadvonsa bonkhe ngemadweba, bababamba ngemanetha abo, bababutsele ndzawonye, enetheni labo lekuhudvula; bajabula ngaloko, futsi batsakasa." 
Habakkuk1:16 Ngako-ke benta umhlatjelo emanetheni abo ekuhudvula, bashisele imphepho emanetheni abo ekuhudvula, ngobe ngalamanetha abo badla ngaloludzala, batijabulise ngekudla kudla lokukhetsekile." 
Habakkuk1:17 Kungabe batawuchubeka yini, batfulule emanetha abo, babhubhise tive ngelunya?" 
Habakkuk2:1 Ngitawuma embonisweni yami ngibuke, ngitimise kahle etingosini tami, ngitawubukisisa kahle ngitewubona kutsi Nkulunkulu utawutsini kimi, nekutsi ngitawuphendvula ngitsini ngalokukhonona." 
Habakkuk2:2 Simakadze wase uyaphendvula, watsi: “Bhala phansi lesembulo, usibhale sicace kuletibhelekeca, kuze kutsi kufundzeke kahle." 
Habakkuk2:3 Ngobe lesembulo silindzele sikhatsi lesimisiwe; sikhuluma ngesiphetfo lesiphutfumako, futsi ngeke sibonakale singemanga. Nome sephutisa nje, silindzele, sona sitawufika nome kanjani, futsi ngeke sephute." 
Habakkuk2:4 “Nasi sembulo: Lotiphakamisako angeke aphephe, kodvwa lolungile uyawuphila ngekukholwa kwakhe.”" 
Habakkuk2:5 Yebo, liwayini liyamyenga, ungumuntfu lotigcabhako, futsi akasenakuphumula. Njengobe ungugubhela kusakhe njengelidliza nanjengekufa akaze eneliseke, utibutsela kuye tonkhe tive, atfumbe bonkhe bantfu, babe bakhe." 
Habakkuk2:6 “Abayikumchukuluta bonkhe yini ngemagama ekumeya, bahlekise ngaye batsi: ‘Maye kulowo lompongisa timphahla letebiwe, atinjingise ngekweba! Loku kutawuchubeka kuze kube ngunini?’" 
Habakkuk2:7 Labo lobakweledako abayiwuvuka masinyane yini? Abayiwuvuka bakwesabise yini? Lapho-ke uyawuba yimphango yabo. 
Habakkuk2:8 Njengobe uphange tive letinyenti, letive letisele tiyawukuphanga nawe. Ngobe ucitse ingati yebantfu, wabhubhisa emave nemadolobha kanye nabo bonkhe labebahlala kuwo." 
Habakkuk2:9 “Maye kulowo lowakha likhaya lakhe ngenzuzo lengakalungi, atakhele sidleke sakhe etulu ekuphakameni, kuze atewuphunyula etidladleni tembhubhiso." 
Habakkuk2:10 Wakhe luzungu lwekubhubhisa tive letinyenti, wahlazisa indlu yakho; walahlekelwa nakuphila kwakho." 
Habakkuk2:11 Ematje elubondza ayawukhala ngetento takho, nemishayo yeluphahla iyawuklaza ivumelane nawo." 
Habakkuk2:12 “Maye kulowo lowakha lidolobha ngekucitsa ingati, emise lidolobha ngebugebengu!" 
Habakkuk2:13 Kungabe kambe Simakadze longuSomandla akakumisi yini engcondvweni yakhe kutsi kushikashikeka kwebantfu kungemafutsa nje ekubhebhetela umlilo, nekutsi tive tishikashikeke, titikhandlekele lite?" 
Habakkuk2:14 Ngobe umhlaba uyawugcwala kwati bukhosi baSimakadze, njengaloku emanti asibekela lwandle." 
Habakkuk2:15 “Maye kulowo muntfu lonatsisa bomakhelwane bakhe tjwala, abutfululele kuso sikhumbasikhwama, banatse baze badzakwe, entele kutsi atewubukela imitimba yabo nase bangcunu." 
Habakkuk2:16 Wena uyawudliwa ngemahloni esikhundleni sekudvunyiswa. Manje-ke selitfuba lakakho! Natsa nawe, ungcunuleke! Lendzebe lesuka esandleni saSimakadze sangasekudla seyijikela ngakuwe, nelihlazo liyawumbonya ludvumo lwakho." 
Habakkuk2:17 Lobudlova lobente kuyo iLebanoni buyawukwehlula, nekubhubhisa kwakho tilwane kuyawukwesabisa. Ngobe ucitse ingati yebantfu, wabhubhisa emave nemadolobha kanye nabo bonkhe labebahlala kuwo." 
Habakkuk2:18 “Sinamsebenti muni sithico, njengaloku sibatwe ngumuntfu nje? Yebo, sisitani sitfombe lesifundzisa emanga? Ngobe lowo losibatako wetsembela emsebentini wetandla takhe, wakha tithico letingeke tize tikhulume." 
Habakkuk2:19 Nako kulowo muntfu losho esigodvweni atsi: ‘Phila!’ nome etjeni lelingenamphilo atsi: ‘Vuka!’ Lingasinika yini seluleko? Lembeswe ngegolide nangesiliva, kute umphefumulo kulo." 
Habakkuk2:20 “Kodvwa Simakadze usethempelini lakhe lelingcwele. Umhlaba wonkhe awuthule embikwakhe.” 
Habakkuk3:1 Umthandazo waHabakhuki, umphrofethi, ngeShigiyonothi." 
Habakkuk3:2 Awu Simakadze, ngivile ngeludvumo lwakho; ngimangaliswa tento takho, wena Simakadze. Phindza utivusetele nangalamalanga etfu, tente tatiwe nangaletikhatsi tetfu. Elulakeni lwakho khumbula umusa." 
Habakkuk3:3 Nkulunkulu uchamuka eThemani, Longcwele wesuka eNtsabeni iPharani. Cabanga. Inkhatimulo yakhe isibekela emazulu, ludvumo lwakhe lugcwalisa umhlaba." 
Habakkuk3:4 Kucwebetela kwakhe kunjengekuphuma kwelilanga; kubaneka imisebe etandleni takhe, lapho kufihlakele khona emandla akhe." 
Habakkuk3:5 Sishayo sihamba embikwakhe, mashayacotfule wesifo ulandzela etinyatselweni takhe." 
Habakkuk3:6 Nakema, kunyikanyika umhlaba, nakabuka, kutfutfumela tive. Tintsaba takudzala tiyahhihlika, nemagcuma akadzenidzeni ayagocana. Tindlela takhe taphakadze naphakadze." 
Habakkuk3:7 Ngabona emathende aseKushani aselusizini, nemakhaya akaMidiyani ayatfutfumela." 
Habakkuk3:8 Awu, Simakadze, kungabe bewuyitfukutselele yini imifula? Kungabe lulaka lwakho belumelene nemifudlana yini? Walutfukutselela yini lwandle ngesikhatsi ugibele emahhashi akho, netincola takho tekuncoba?" 
Habakkuk3:9 Wagwabula butjoki bakho, wabita imicibisholo leminyenti. Cabanga. Wadzabula umhlaba ngemifula," 
Habakkuk3:10 tintsaba takubona tatfutfumela. Kwendlula tikhukhula temanti, kujula kwabhodla, kwaphakamisela emagagasi ako etulu." 
Habakkuk3:11 Lilanga nenyanga kwema emazulwini ngekumanyatela kwemicibisholo yakho legijimako nangekubaneka kwekumanyatela kwesikhali sakho. 
Habakkuk3:12 Ngelulaka wahambahamba wadzabula umhlaba, ngentfukutselo wagcobagcoba tive." 
Habakkuk3:13 Waphumela kutawukhulula bantfu bakho, nekutawusindzisa logcotjiwe wakho. Wambhubhisa umholi waseveni lalababi, wabahlubula kusukela etinweleni tenhloko kuye etintwaneni tetinyawo. Cabanga." 
Habakkuk3:14 Wamhlaba ngesakhe sikhali enhloko, ngesikhatsi emabutfo akhe aphutfuma aphuma atsi atesihlakata, asivutela tince shangatsi asatawudla labamphofu lababebhacile." 
Habakkuk3:15 Wagcobagcoba lwandle ngetinselo temahhashi akho, abhodla emanti lamakhulu." 
Habakkuk3:16 Ngeva, nenhlitiyo yami yabhakuta, netindzebe temlomo wami tavevetela ngalomsindvo, kubola kwakhasabela ematsanjeni ami, imilente yami yachachatela. Noko ngiyakulilindzela ngekubeketela lilanga lesehlakalo leliyawusifikela sive lesisihlasele." 
Habakkuk3:17 Nome sihlahla semkhiwa singahlumi, nemagelebisi kute esihlahleni semvini, nome umncumo ungatseli, nemasimi angasatitseli tivuno, nome sekute timvu esibayeni, netinkhomo sekute esibayeni," 
Habakkuk3:18 noko ngitawujabula ngaSimakadze, ngijabulele Nkulunkulu, uMsindzisi wami." 
Habakkuk3:19 Simakadze loyiNkhosi ungemandla ami; wenta tinyawo tami tibe njengetenyamatane, ungenta ngihambe ngiphephile etindzaweni letiphakeme. Lemhlabelisi wetemiculo. Elugujini lwami lolunetintsambo." 
Zephaniah1:1 Livi laSimakadze lelefika kuZefaniya, umsa waKushi, umsa waGedaliya, umsa wa-Amariya, umsa waHezekiya, ngesikhatsi sekubusa kwaJosaya, umsa wa-Amoni, inkhosi yakaJuda, latsi:" 
Zephaniah1:2 “Ngiyawutsanyela ngisuse konkhe, ngikususe ebusweni bemhlaba,” kusho Simakadze." 
Zephaniah1:3 “Ngiyawutsanyela bonkhe bantfu netilwane; ngiyawutsanyela tinyoni tasemoyeni kanye netinhlanti taselwandle. Lababi ngiyakubacedza kanye nato tonkhe tikhubekiso, nase ngisusa bonkhe bantfu ebusweni bemhlaba,” kusho Simakadze." 
Zephaniah1:4 “Ngiyakwelula sandla sami ngimelane naJuda, ngimelane nabo bonkhe labahlala eJerusalema. Yonkhe imisalela yaBhali ngiyakuyisusa kulendzawo: Emabito emahedeni nebaphristi labakhonta tithico," 
Zephaniah1:5 nalabo labakhotsama etulu etingcongwaneni tetindlu bakhonte tinkhanyeti telizulu, nalabo labakhotsama bafunge batsi batakwetsembeka kuSimakadze baphindze bafunge nangaMoloki" 
Zephaniah1:6 nalabo lase bancandzekile bakuyekela kulandzela Simakadze bangete bamfuna Simakadze bangabuti nekubuta kuye. 
Zephaniah1:7 “Thula embikweNkhosi Simakadze, ngobe lilanga laSimakadze selisondzele. Simakadze sewulungise umhlatjelo; ubehlukanisile labo labamemile." 
Zephaniah1:8 Ngelilanga lemhlatjelo waSimakadze ngiyawujezisa tikhulu, netiphatsimandla, nabo bonkhe labo labembetse tingubo tebetive." 
Zephaniah1:9 Ngalelo langa ngiyawubajezisa bonkhe labo labagwema kunyatsela emnyango, besaba tithico, labagcwalisa lithempeli labonkulunkulu babo ngebudlova nangenkhohliso.”" 
Zephaniah1:10 Simakadze utsi: “Ngalelo langa kuyawuvela kukhala eSangweni Lenhlanti, kuvele kulila eNcenyeni Lensha yelidolobha, nekuphihlika lokukhulu lokuphuma emagcumeni." 
Zephaniah1:11 Hhewulani, nine lenihlala esigodzini semakethe, bonkhe batsengisi benu batawucitfwa baphele, bonkhe labatsenga batsengise ngesiliva bayawubhujiswa." 
Zephaniah1:12 “Ngaleso sikhatsi ngiyakuyiphenya ngetibane iJerusalema, ngijezise labo labatesutsisako, labafanana neliwayini lelisele emashiceni alo, bacabange batsi: ‘Simakadze angeke ente lutfo, loluhle nome lolubi.’" 
Zephaniah1:13 Ingcebo yabo iyawuphangwa, netindlu tabo tibhidlitwe. Bayawukwakha tindlu, kodvwa bangahlali kuto; bayawuhlanyela tivini, kodvwa bangalinatsi liwayini lato.”" 
Zephaniah1:14 “Lilanga lelikhulu laSimakadze selisondzele, yebo, lisedvute, futsi lita ngekushesha. Lalelani! Kukhala kwangalelo langa laSimakadze kuyawuba munyu, sekuhhewula libutfo lapho." 
Zephaniah1:15 Lelo langa kuyawuba lilanga lelulaka, lilanga lelusizi nebuhlungu, lilanga lenhlupheko nembhubhiso, lilanga lebumnyama nelitfunti, lilanga lemafu nebumnyama lobukhulu," 
Zephaniah1:16 lilanga lelicilongo nelekuhlaba inyandzaleyo yekumelana nemadolobha latinqaba neyekumelana nemibhoshongo yemakona. 
Zephaniah1:17 “Ngiyakwehlisela lusizi ebantfwini bahambe njengetimphumphutse, ngobe bonile kuSimakadze. Ingati yabo iyawutfululwa njengelutfuli, nematfumbu abo atfululwe njengebulongo.”" 
Zephaniah1:18 Isiliva yabo negolide yabo kungeke kubasindzise ngelilanga lelulaka lwaSimakadze. Emlilweni wesikhwele sakhe umhlaba wonkhe uyawushiswa, ngobe uyakwenta siphetfo lesisheshisako sabo bonkhe labahlala emhlabeni." 
Zephaniah2:1 Buyani ndzawonye, nihlangane ndzawonye, nine sive lesilihlazo," 
Zephaniah2:2 sikhatsi lesibekiwe sisengakefiki nisengakapheshulwa njengemakhoba, lusengakehleli etikwenu lulaka lwaSimakadze lolwesabekako, lisengakefiki lilanga lelulaka lwaSimakadze etikwenu." 
Zephaniah2:3 Funani Simakadze, nonkhe nine lenitfobekile belive, nine lenenta loko latsi kwenteni. Funani kulunga, nifune kutfobeka, mhlawumbe ningahle nivikeleke ngelilanga lentfukutselo yaSimakadze." 
Zephaniah2:4 IGaza iyawushiywa yodvwa, ne-Ashkeloni iyawusala itindzala. Emini i-Ashdodi iyawucitfwa, kutsi i-Ekroni isishulwe." 
Zephaniah2:5 Nako kini lenihlala ngaselwandle, nine sive semaKherethi. Livi laSimakadze limelene nani, awu Khenani, live lemaFilisti. “Ngiyawunibhubhisa nonkhe, kute namunye loyawusala.”" 
Zephaniah2:6 Live lelingaselwandle, lapho kuhlala khona emaKherethi, liyawuba yindzawo yebelusi netibaya tetimvu." 
Zephaniah2:7 Liyawuba lemisalela yendlu yakaJuda, ngulapho-ke lapho bayawutfola khona emadlelo. Kusihlwa bayawulala phansi etindlini tase-Ashkeloni. Simakadze Nkulunkulu wabo uyawubanakekela; uyawubuyisela kubo tinhlanhla tabo." 
Zephaniah2:8 “Ngitivile tinhlamba tebakaMowabi netibhinco tema-Amoni, labetfuka ngato sive sami basongela nelive laso." 
Zephaniah2:9 Ngako-ke, kuphila kwami,” kusho Simakadze Somandla, longuNkulunkulu wema-Israyeli, “impela Mowabi uyawuba njengeSodoma, nema-Amoni abe njengeGomora, indzawo yelukhula nemigodzi yeluswayi, live lelilihlane phakadze naphakadze. Insali yesive sami iyawubaphanga; besive sami labayawusala bayawulidla live labo.”" 
Zephaniah2:10 Nguloku bakaMowabi nema-Amoni labayawukutfola kube ngumvuzo wekutigcabha kwabo, ngenca yekwetfuka nekuphukuta kwabo sive saSimakadze longuSomandla." 
Zephaniah2:11 Simakadze uyakwesabeka kubo, nase abhubhisa bonkhe bonkulunkulu balelo live. Tive letikulo lonkhe lusentse lwelwandle tiyakumkhonta, nguleso naleso sive eveni laso." 
Zephaniah2:12 “Nani futsi, maKushe, niyawubulawa ngenkemba yami.”" 
Zephaniah2:13 Simakadze uyakwelula sandla sakhe amelane nenyakatfo, abhubhise i-Asiriya, iNineve ayishiye ilihlane, yome njengelugwadvule." 
Zephaniah2:14 Imihlambi yetimvu neyetimbuti kanye nemihlambi yetinkhomo iyawulala phansi khona lapho, tilwane netidalwa talo lonkhe luhlobo. Sikhova selihlane nesikhova lesiklabalazako kuyawuhlala etihlokweni tetinsika tayo ebusuku. Kukhala kwato kuyakwenta kutsi umsindvo wekuhokoma uphume ngemafasitelo, imfuhlululu iyawubaseminyango, tinsika temsedari tiyawubekeka ebaleni." 
Zephaniah2:15 Leli lidolobha lelinganaki lutfo, lelaliphila liphephile. Latikhulumela lona, latsi: “Ngimi ngimi, kute futsi lelinye ngaphandle kwami.” Maye, imbhubhiso lese lingiyo, seliyindzawo yekubutsanela tilwane tesiganga! Bonkhe labendlula ngakulo bayalishalatelela, balihheletele ngetandla tabo." 
Zephaniah3:1 Nako kulelo dolobha lebacindzeteli, labahlubukako nalabangcolile!" 
Zephaniah3:2 Alihloniphi muntfu, alivumi kucondziswa. Aletsembeli kuSimakadze. alisondzeli kuNkulunkulu walo." 
Zephaniah3:3 Tiphatsimandla talo tingemabhubesi labhodlako, tikhulu talo titimphisi takusihlwa, letingashiyi lutfo lwangakusasa ekuseni." 
Zephaniah3:4 Baphrofethi balo bayatigcabha; bangemadvodza labotulujane. Baphristi balo bahlazisa indzawo lengcwele, bephule umtsetfo waNkulunkulu." 
Zephaniah3:5 Simakadze ulungile ekhatsi kwalelidolobha; akenti lutfo lolungakalungi. Kusa ngekusa bantfu bakhe ubaphatsa ngekungakhetsi, kulelo nakulelo langa lelisha akayekeli kwehlulela ngebucotfo, noko labangakalungi abalati lihlazo." 
Zephaniah3:6 “Tive ngiticedzile, tinqaba tato tibhidlitiwe. Titaladi tato ngitishiye tikhala libhungane, kute namunye lowendlula ngato. Emadolobha ato abhujisiwe; kute namunye lotawusala kulo, kute namunye." 
Zephaniah3:7 Ngakhuluma kulelidolobha, ngatsi: ‘Impela, uyawungesaba uvume kucondziswa!’ Lendzawo yalo-ke ingeke icitfwe, kantsi netijeziso tami tonkhe tingeke tehliselwe etikwalo. Kodvwa babesolo banenshisekelo yekukwenta ngebubi konkhe labakwentako.”" 
Zephaniah3:8 Simakadze utsi: “Ngako-ke ngimeleni, ngalelo langa ngiyawuma ngifakaze. Ngincume kuhlanganisa tive, ngibutsele ndzawonye imibuso, bese ngitfululela lulaka lwami etikwato, yonkhe intfukutselo yami leyesabekako. Umhlaba wonkhe uyawubhujiswa ngemlilo wekukhweleta kwentfukutselo yami." 
Zephaniah3:9 “Tindzebe tetive ngiyawube sengiyatihlambulula-ke, kuze kutsi bonkhe lababite libito laSimakadze, bacela lusito kuye, bamkhonte bahlangene lihlombe ngelihlombe." 
Zephaniah3:10 “Kusukela ngesheya kwemifula yaseKushe tikhonti tami, bantfu bami labasakatekile, bayawungiletsela iminikelo." 
Zephaniah3:11 Ngalelo langa ungeke udliwe ngemahloni ngako konkhe lokubi lokwentile kimi, ngobe kulelidolobha ngiyawubesusa labo labajabula ngeligcabho labo. Ungeke uphindze utigcabhe etikwaleligcuma lami lelingcwele." 
Zephaniah3:12 Kodvwa ngiyawushiya ekhatsi kuwe labamnene nalabatfobekile, labetsembele kulo libito laSimakadze." 
Zephaniah3:13 “Imisalela yaka-Israyeli ingeke ikwente lokubi; ingeke iwakhulume emanga, nenkhohlakalo ingeke itfolakale emilonyeni yayo. Lemisalela iyakudla, icambalale phansi, kute futsi umuntfu loyakuyesabisa.”" 
Zephaniah3:14 Hlabela, Ndvodzakati yaseSiyoni; memeta kakhulu, wena Israyeli! Jabula utfokote ngayo yonkhe inhlitiyo yakho, Ndvodzakati yaseJerusalema!" 
Zephaniah3:15 Simakadze usisusile sijeziso sakho, watincandzekisa netitsa takho. Simakadze, iNkhosi yaka-Israyeli, inawe; ungeke uphindze wesabe nome nguyiphi ingoti." 
Zephaniah3:16 Ngalelo langa bayawusho kuyo iJerusalema, batsi: “Ungesabi, Siyoni, netandla takho ungatiyeketsisi." 
Zephaniah3:17 Simakadze Nkulunkulu wakho unawe, unemandla ekusindzisa. Uyawukujabulela kakhulu wena, uyawukupha kuthula ngelutsandvo lwakhe; uyawukujabulela ngekuhlabela.”" 
Zephaniah3:18 “Tinsizi temadzili labekiwe ngiyakutisusa kuwe; tingumtfwalo nelihlazo kuwe. 
Zephaniah3:19 Ngaleso sikhatsi ngiyawubajezisa bonkhe labo lababekucindzetela; labachutako ngiyawubaphephisa, ngibabutse bonkhe labo labebasakatiwe. Ngiyawubadvumisa ngibatisise emhlabeni wonkhe lapho bebahlazeke khona." 
Zephaniah3:20 Ngaleso sikhatsi ngiyawunibutsa; ngaleso sikhatsi ngiyawunibuyisela ekhaya. Ngiyawuninika kuhlonipheka neludvumo emkhatsini wato tonkhe tive temhlaba, nase nginibuyisela tinhlanhla tenu embikwemehlo enu nibuka,” kusho Simakadze." 
Haggai1:1 Ngemnyaka wesibili wekubusa kwenkhosi Dariyusi ngelilanga lekucala lenyanga yesitfupha, livi laSimakadze lefika ngaHagayi, umphrofethi, kuZerubhabheli, umsa waSheyaltiyeli, umbusi wakaJuda, nakuJeshuwa, umsa waJehosadaki, umPhristi Lomkhulu, latsi:" 
Haggai1:2 “Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, utsi: Labantfu batsi: ‘Sikhatsi asikefiki sekutsi kwakhiwe kabusha indlu yaSimakadze.’ ”" 
Haggai1:3 Livi laSimakadze lase liyefika ngemphrofethi Hagayi, latsi:" 
Haggai1:4 “Ngabe kambe ngiso yini lesi sikhatsi sekutsi nihlale etindlini letihlotjiswe kahle kakhulu, kube kantsi indlu yaSimakadze yona ibukeka itindzala nje?”" 
Haggai1:5 Manje-ke, naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, utsi: “Cabangisisani ngetindlela tenu." 
Haggai1:6 Nihlanyele kakhulu, navuna kuncane. Niyadla, anesutsi; niyanatsa, kodvwa anikholwa. Niyembatsa, kodvwa anifutfumali. Niyahola imali yenu, niyifake esipatjini lesinetimbobo.”" 
Haggai1:7 Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, utsi: “Cabangisisani ngetindlela tenu." 
Haggai1:8 Khuphukelani etintsabeni niyewugawula khona tingodvo nitekwakha lendlu, kuze nami ngitewutijabulisa kuyo, ngidvunyiswe,” kusho Simakadze." 
Haggai1:9 “Benilindzele sivuno lesikhulu, kodvwa navuna kuncane. Loko lenikubuyise ekhaya ngikuphuphutsile, kwahamba. Leni?” kusho Simakadze longuSomandla. “Ngenca yendlu yami lesolomane ihleti itindzala, ngalesikhatsi lapho kungulowo nalowo wenu aphishaneke ngeyakhe indlu." 
Haggai1:10 Ngako-ke ngenca yenu emazulu ayigodlile imvula, nemhlaba wagodla sivuno sawo." 
Haggai1:11 Ngehlisela somiso emasimini, nasetintsabeni, nasetikwalokutinhlavu, nakulo liwayini lelisha, nakuwo emafutsa, nakuko konkhe lokuvetwa ngumhlaba, etikwebantfu nemihlambi, nasetikwemisebenti yonkhe yetandla tenu.”" 
Haggai1:12 Ngako-ke boZerubhabheli, umsa waSheyaltiyeli, naJeshuwa, umsa waJehosadaki, umPhristi Lomkhulu, nayo yonkhe insali yesive yalilalela livi laSimakadze Nkulunkulu wabo nemavi emphrofethi Hagayi, ngobe Simakadze longuNkulunkulu wabo abemtfumile. Bantfu base badvumisa Simakadze." 
Haggai1:13 Hagayi, sitfunywa saSimakadze, wetfula nasi simemetelo saSimakadze kubantfu, watsi: “Nginani, kusho Simakadze.”"
