Haggai1:14 Ngako Simakadze wavuselela umoya waZerubhabheli, umsa waSheyaltiyeli, umbusi wakaJuda, nemoya waJeshuwa, umsa waJehosadaki, umPhristi Lomkhulu, nemoya wayo yonkhe insali yesive. Beta bafike bacala kusebenta, bakha indlu yaSimakadze longuSomandla Nkulunkulu wabo," 
Haggai1:15 ngelilanga lema-24 lenyanga yesitfupha ngemnyaka wesibili wekubusa kwenkhosi Dariyusi. 
Haggai2:1 Ngelilanga lema-21 lenyanga yesikhombisa ngalowo mnyaka, livi laSimakadze lefika ngemphrofethi Hagayi, latsi:" 
Haggai2:2 “Khuluma kuZerubhabheli, umsa waSheyaltiyeli, umbusi wakaJuda, nakuJeshuwa, umsa waJehosadaki, umPhristi Lomkhulu, nakuyo insali yesive, utsi:" 
Haggai2:3 ‘Ngubani losesele kini lowake wayibona lendlu isenenkhatimulo yayo yakucala? Seyibukeka njani kini nyalo? Kini ayisafanani nje nelite? 
Haggai2:4 Kodvwa-ke nyalo cinani, wena Zerubhabheli, nawe Jeshuwa, msa waJehosadaki, umPhristi Lomkhulu. Cinani nonkhe nine bantfu balelive,’ kusho Simakadze, ‘sebentani, ngobe mine nginani,’ kusho Simakadze longuSomandla." 
Haggai2:5 ‘Nguko loku lengenta ngako sivumelwane nani, mhlazane niphuma eGibhithe. Moya wami usahlala emkhatsini wenu. Ningesabi.’" 
Haggai2:6 “Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, utsi: ‘Kusetakuba sikhashana lesincane futsi ngibuye ngiwanyakatise emazulu, nemhlaba, nelwandle, nelive lelomile." 
Haggai2:7 Ngitawunyakatisa tonkhe tive, nako konkhe lokulangatelelwa tive tonkhe kutawufika, ngitawugcwalisa lendlu ngenkhatimulo,’ kusho Simakadze longuSomandla." 
Haggai2:8 ‘Isiliva yami, negolide ngeyami,’ kusho Simakadze longuSomandla." 
Haggai2:9 ‘Inkhatimulo yalendlu lena itawuba yinkhulu kakhulu kunenkhatimulo yendlu yakucala,’ kusho Simakadze longuSomandla. ‘Futsi kulendzawo ngiyawuletsa kuthula,’ kusho Simakadze longuSomandla.”" 
Haggai2:10 Ngelilanga lema-24 lenyanga yemfica, ngemnyaka wesibili wekubusa kwaDariyusi, livi laSimakadze lefika kumphrofethi Hagayi, latsi:" 
Haggai2:11 “Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, utsi: ‘Buta kubaphristi kutsi umtsetfo utsini:" 
Haggai2:12 Nangabe umuntfu aphetse inyama leyehlukaniselwe Nkulunkulu ishumphetelwe engutjeni yakhe, bese kutsi lomphetfo wakhe utsintse sinkhwa, nome sitjulo, nome liwayini, nome emafutsa, nome lokunye nje kudla, kuyaye bese kuba ngulokwehlukaniselwe Nkulunkulu yini?’ ” Baphristi baphendvula, batsi: “Cha.”" 
Haggai2:13 Hagayi wabe sewutsi: “Nangabe umuntfu etfuke wangcoliswa kutsintsana nesidvumbu, bese utsintsa lokunye kwaletintfo, kuyaye bese kuba ngulokungcolile yini ngekwemtsetfo?” Baphristi baphendvula, batsi: “Yebo, kuyaye bese kuba ngulokungcolile.”" 
Haggai2:14 Hagayi wabe sewutsi: “ ‘Ngako-ke banjalo nalabantfu, sinjalo nalesive lesisembikwami. Konkhe labakwentako, nako konkhe labakunikelako lapho kungcolile,’ kusho Simakadze.”" 
Haggai2:15 “ ‘Manje-ke, cabangisisani kahle ngaloku kusukela lamuhla kuye embili, bukisisani kutsi tintfo tatinjani kucala, kungakabekwa litje lelinye etikwalelinye ethempelini laSimakadze." 
Haggai2:16 Nakufika nome ngubani endvundvumeni yalokutinhlavu lokutilinganiso letingema-20, tatilishumi kuphela. Nangabe ngunome ngubani aye emphongolweni weliwayini atsi uyewukha tilinganiso letingema-50, betingema-20 kuphela." 
Haggai2:17 Ngashaya yonkhe imisebenti yetandla tenu ngesikhutsa, nangekuhanguka, nangesangcotfo, noko nine anizange nigucukele kimi,’ kusho Simakadze." 
Haggai2:18 ‘Kusukela lamuhla, ngisho kusukela ngelilanga lema-24 lenyanga yemfica, cabangisisani kahle. Kusukela ngelilanga lesabekwa ngalo sisekelo sendlu yaSimakadze, cabangisisani kahle:" 
Haggai2:19 Isekhona yini inhlanyelo lesasele emiphandzeni? Kudzimate kube ngunyalo umvini, nesihlahla semkhiwa, nesemahananandza, nesemncumo akukaze kwatsela titselo. “ ‘Kodvwa kusukela kulelilanga lalamuhla sengiyakunibusisa.’ ”" 
Haggai2:20 Livi laSimakadze lefika kuHagayi, umphrofethi, kwesibili ngelilanga lema-24 laleyo nyanga, latsi:" 
Haggai2:21 “Tjela Zerubhabheli, umbusi wakaJuda, kutsi ngitawunyakatisa emazulu nemhlaba." 
Haggai2:22 Ngitawuketula tihlalo tebukhosi ngibhidlite emandla emibuso yebetive. Ngitawuketula tincola temphi kanye nebashayeli bato, emahhashi kanye nebagibeli bawo bayawuwela phansi, ngulowo ngenkemba yemnakabo." 
Haggai2:23 “ ‘Ngalelo langa,’ kusho Simakadze longuSomandla, ‘ngiyawukutsatsa wena, nceku yami Zerubhabheli, msa waSheyaltiyeli,’ kusho Simakadze, ‘ngikwente ube yindandatho yami yeluphawu, ngobe ngikukhetsile,’ kusho Simakadze longuSomandla.”" 
Zechariah1:1 Ngenyanga yesiphohlongo emnyakeni wesibili wekubusa kwaDariyusi, livi laSimakadze lefika kumphrofethi Zakhariya, umsa waBherekhiya, umsa wa-Ido, latsi:" 
Zechariah1:2 “Simakadze wabatfukutselela kakhulu bokhokho benu. 
Zechariah1:3 Ngako-ke tjela bantfu, utsi: Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, utsi: ‘Buyelani kimi,’ kusho Simakadze longuSomandla, ‘nami ngitawubuyela kini,’ kusho Simakadze longuSomandla." 
Zechariah1:4 Ningafanani nabokhokho benu, lekwatsi baphrofethi bakucala nabakhuluma kubo, batsi: Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, utsi: ‘Phendvukani etindleleni tenu letimbi nakulokubi lenikwentako.’ Kodvwa abazange bangilalele, futsi abanginakanga nekunginaka, kusho Simakadze." 
Zechariah1:5 Baphi labokhokho benu nyalo? Labaphrofethi benu bona baphila kuze kube nguphakadze yini? 
Zechariah1:6 Kodvwa lamavi ami netimiso tami, lengabayala ngako ngemlomo webaphrofethi, tinceku tami, akuzange kufike yini etindlebeni taboyihlomkhulu? Base bayaphendvuka batsi: ‘Simakadze longuSomandla wente kitsi loko lobekusifanele ngekwetindlela tetfu nangalesikwentako, njengobe abesatimisele kukwenta.’ ”" 
Zechariah1:7 Ngelilanga lema-24 enyangeni yeli-11, lenguShebathi, emnyakeni wesibili wekubusa kwaDariyusi, livi laSimakadze lefika kumphrofethi Zakhariya, umsa waBherekhiya, umsa wa-Ido." 
Zechariah1:8 Kwatsi ebusuku ngaba nembono, kwatsi embikwami ngabona indvodza leyayigibele lihhashi lelibovu! Yayime emkhatsini wetihlahla temibomvana, emfudlaneni. Emvakwayo bekunemahhashi labovu, nalabubendze, nalamhlophe." 
Zechariah1:9 Ngabuta ngatsi: “Nkhosi yami, bayini laba?” Bekunengilosi lebeyikhuluma nami, yaphendvula, yatsi: “Ngitakubonisa kutsi bayini.”" 
Zechariah1:10 Kwase kutsi lendvodza leyayime emkhatsini wetihlahla temibomvana yachaza, yatsi: “Bangulabo lababetfunywa nguSimakadze kutsi baye emhlabeni wonkhe.”" 
Zechariah1:11 Babika engilosini yaSimakadze leyayime emkhatsini wemibomvana, batsi: “Sesihambe emhlabeni wonkhe, sakhandza kutsi umhlaba wonkhe uphumulile, futsi unekuthula.”" 
Zechariah1:12 Ingilosi yaSimakadze yatsi: “Simakadze Somandla, kuyawuze kube ngunini solomane sihawu sakho usigodlele iJerusalema nemadolobha akaJuda, lowawuwatfukutselele kuleminyaka lengema-70?”" 
Zechariah1:13 Ngako Simakadze wakhuluma emavi lamnandzi ekudvudvuta kulengilosi leyayikhuluma nami. 
Zechariah1:14 Lengilosi leyayikhuluma kimi, yatsi: “Memetela lelivi, utsi: Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, utsi: ‘Nginenshisekelo lenkhulu ngeJerusalema neSiyoni." 
Zechariah1:15 Bengingakatfukutseli kangaka, kodvwa tive letitibona kutsi tiphephile setengete kulenhlekelele, tangitfukutselisa kakhulu.’" 
Zechariah1:16 “Ngako-ke, naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: ‘Ngiyawubuyela ngesihawu eJerusalema, ngulapho kuyawukwakhiwa khona kabusha indlu yami. Intsambo yekukala iyakwelulelwa etikweJerusalema, yakhiwe kabusha,’ kusho Simakadze longuSomandla." 
Zechariah1:17 “Chubeka umemetele utsi: Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze Somandla, utsi: ‘Emadolobha ami ayawuphindze aphuphume ngemnotfo, Simakadze aphindze ayidvudvute iSiyoni, akhetse iJerusalema.’ ”" 
Zechariah1:18 Ngase ngiphakamisa emehlo ami ngabuka, ngabona embikwami kunetimphondvo letine." 
Zechariah1:19 Ngabe sengibuta lengilosi leyayikhuluma nami, ngatsi: “Kuyini loku?” Yangiphendvula, yatsi: “Leti timphondvo letasakata Juda, na-Israyeli kanye neJerusalema.”" 
Zechariah1:20 Simakadze wabe sewungibonisa tincondzi letine kutekubata. 
Zechariah1:21 Ngabuta ngatsi: “Batekwentani laba lapha?” Yangiphendvula, yatsi: “Leti timphondvo letasakata Juda kuze kubete namunye lophakamisa inhloko yakhe, kodvwa letincondzi titele kutekwetfusa babusi betive nekutijika phansi letimphondvo tetive letatiphakamise timphondvo tato temelana nelive lakaJuda kutewusakata bantfu bakaJuda.”" 
Zechariah2:1 Ngase ngiphakamisa emehlo ami ngabuka, ngabona embikwami kume indvodza leyayiphetse intsambo yekukala esandleni sayo." 
Zechariah2:2 Ngayibuta, ngatsi: “Uyaphi?” Yangiphendvula, yatsi: “Ngiyawukala iJerusalema, ngitewutfola kutsi ibanti kangakanani nekutsi yindze kangakanani.”" 
Zechariah2:3 Lengilosi leyayikhuluma kimi yesuka yahamba, kwefika lenye ingilosi iteyihlangabeta," 
Zechariah2:4 yafike kuyo yatsi: “Gijima uyewutjela lelijaha, utsi: ‘IJerusalema itawuba lidolobha lelite tibondza ngenca yebunyenti bebantfu labahlala kuyo nangenca yemfuyo lenyenti lengekhatsi kwayo." 
Zechariah2:5 Mine matfupha ngiyawuba lubondza lwemlilo loluyitungeleta luyivikele, ngibe yinkhatimulo yayo ngekhatsi kwayo,’ kusho Simakadze.”" 
Zechariah2:6 “Balekani! Balekani! Sukani eveni lasenyakatfo,” kusho Simakadze, “ngobe nginisakatele emimoyeni yomine yelizulu,” kusho Simakadze." 
Zechariah2:7 “Awu Siyoni! Balekani! Phunyulani, nine lenihlala eBhabhulona!”" 
Zechariah2:8 Ngobe naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, longitfumile wangipha emandla kutsi ngimelane netive letiniphangile, ngobe umuntfu lotsintsa nine utsintsa inhlavu yeliso laSimakadze." 
Zechariah2:9 Utsi: “Impela ngiyawuphakamisa sandla sami ngimelane nato, khona titewuba yimphango yetigcili tato. Ngulapho-ke niyawukwati khona kutsi nguSimakadze longuSomandla longitfumile." 
Zechariah2:10 “Hlabela ujabule, wena Ndvodzakati yaseSiyoni. Ngobe ngiyeta, futsi ngiyawuhlala emkhatsini wenu,” kusho Simakadze." 
Zechariah2:11 “Tive letinyenti tiyawutihlanganisa naSimakadze ngalelo langa, tibe sive sami. Ngiyawuhlala emkhatsini wenu, nani niyawukwati-ke kutsi Simakadze longuSomandla ungitfume kini." 
Zechariah2:12 Simakadze uyakudla lifa lelinguJuda libe sabelo sakhe eveni lelingcwele, aphindze akhetse iJerusalema." 
Zechariah2:13 “Thulani embikwaSimakadze, nonkhe nine bantfu bemhlaba, ngobe sewuvukile waphuma endzaweni yakhe lengcwele.”" 
Zechariah3:1 Simakadze wabe sewungibonisa Jeshuwa, umPhristi Lomkhulu, eme embikwengilosi yaSimakadze, naSathane eme ngasesandleni sakhe sekudla atekummangalela." 
Zechariah3:2 Simakadze wakhuluma kuSathane, watsi: “Simakadze uyakwekhuta wena Sathane! Simakadze, lokhetse iJerusalema, uyakukwekhuta! Lendvodza ayisiso sikhuni lesivutsako yini lesephulwe emlilweni?”" 
Zechariah3:3 Jeshuwa abembetse tembatfo letingcolile ngesikhatsi aseme embikwalengilosi. 
Zechariah3:4 Lengilosi yakhuluma kulabasiti lababeme embikwayo, yatsi: “Mkhumuleni letimphahla takhe letingcolile.” Yakhuluma kuJeshuwa, yatsi: “Ase ubuke, sono sakho sengisisusile, futsi ngitakwembatsisa imijiva lehlantekile lemihle kakhulu.”" 
Zechariah3:5 Ngase ngitsi: “Mshuculiseni ngemshuculo lohlobile.” Ngako bamshuculisa ngemshuculo lohlobile enhloko yakhe, bamembatsisa, ngesikhatsi ingilosi yaSimakadze isemile eceleni kwakhe." 
Zechariah3:6 Ingilosi yaSimakadze yetsembisa Jeshuwa, yatsi:" 
Zechariah3:7 “Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, utsi: ‘Nawutawuhamba etindleleni tami ugcine nemiyalo yami, indlu yami-ke uyakuyibusa uphatse netibuya telithempeli lami; mine ngiyawukunika indzawo emkhatsini waletingilosi letime lapha." 
Zechariah3:8 “ ‘Lalela, wena mPhristi Lomkhulu Jeshuwa, kanye nalabo bangani bakho labahleti embikwakho, labangemadvodza lasibonakaliso setintfo letitako: Ngitawuletsa inceku yami, Ligala." 
Zechariah3:9 Buka, litje lengilimise embikwaJeshuwa. Kunemehlo lasikhombisa kulelitje linye, mine ngitawucopha umbhalo kulo, nesono salelive ngiyawusisusa ngalanga linye,’ kusho Simakadze longuSomandla." 
Zechariah3:10 “ ‘Ngalelo langa ngulowo nalowo wenu uyawumema makhelwane wakhe kutsi atewuhlala ngekuthula ngaphansi kwemvini nemkhiwa wakhe,’ kusho Simakadze longuSomandla.”" 
Zechariah4:1 Lengilosi leyayikhulume nami yabuya, yangivusa, njengemuntfu nakavuswa ebutfongweni." 
Zechariah4:2 Yangibuta, yatsi: “Ubonani?” Ngaphendvula, ngatsi: “Ngibona lutsi lwetibane luyigolide lonkhe, lunesitja lesinemafutsa ngetulu, netibane letisikhombisa kulo, netimbobo letisikhombisa tetintsambo tetibane talo." 
Zechariah4:3 Futsi ngibona netihlahla letimbili temncumo eceleni kwalo, lesinye ngesekudla kwaso lesitja, lesinye ngesancele saso lesitsha.”" 
Zechariah4:4 Ngayibuta lengilosi leyakhuluma nami, ngatsi: “Kuyini loku, nkhosi yami?”" 
Zechariah4:5 Yangiphendvula yatsi: “Awati yini kantsi kutsi loku kuyini?” Ngaphendvula, ngatsi: “Cha, nkhosi yami.”" 
Zechariah4:6 Ngako yakhuluma kimi, yatsi: “Leli livi laSimakadze leliya kuZerubhabheli, litsi: ‘Akuyi ngetikhwepha nangemandla, kodvwa kuya ngaMoya wami,’ kusho Simakadze longuSomandla." 
Zechariah4:7 “Uyini wena, wena ntsaba lenemandla? EmbikwaZerubhabheli uyawuba litsafa lelibekile. Yena-ke uyawubeka litje lekwephetsa lithempeli, kumenyetwe kutsiwe: ‘Nkulunkulu akalibusise! Nkulunkulu akalibusise!’ ”" 
Zechariah4:8 Livi laSimakadze lase liyefika kimi, latsi:" 
Zechariah4:9 “Tandla taZerubhabheli tibeke sisekelo salelithempeli; netandla takhe futsi titalicedza. Nine-ke niyawube seniyati kutsi Simakadze longuSomandla ungitfume kini. 
Zechariah4:10 “Ngubani lowedzelela lilanga letintfo letincane? Emadvodza ayawujabula nakabona intsambo yekucondzisa isesandleni saZerubhabheli. “Lamehlo lasikhombisa ngewaSimakadze, azulazula emhlabeni wonkhe, jikelele.”" 
Zechariah4:11 Ngabe sengibuta lengilosi, ngatsi: “Iyini lemincumo lemibili lengasekudla nangesancele kwalolutsi lwetibane?”" 
Zechariah4:12 Ngaphindze ngayibuta futsi, ngatsi: “Ayini lamagala lamabili emncumo emaceleni aletimbobo letimbili tegolide letitfulula emafutsa egolide?”" 
Zechariah4:13 Yangiphendvula, yatsi: “Awati yini kantsi kutsi loku kuyini?” Ngaphendvula, ngatsi: “Cha, nkhosi yami.”" 
Zechariah4:14 Ngako yatsi: “Laba ngulababili labagcotjelwe kutsi bakhonte Simakadze wemhlaba wonkhe.” 
Zechariah5:1 Ngaphindza ngaphakamisa emehlo ami ngabuka, ngabona embikwami kundiza incwadzi legocotwako!" 
Zechariah5:2 Lengilosi yangibuta, yatsi: “Ubonani?” Ngaphendvula, ngatsi: “Ngibona kundiza incwadzi legocotwako, ingemamitha langaba yimfica budze, nemamitha langaba mane nesigamu bubanti.”" 
Zechariah5:3 Yakhuluma kimi, yatsi: “Lesi sicalekiso lesiphumela kuwo wonkhe umhlaba; ngobe macondzana naloko lesikushoko nganhlanye kwalencwadzi, onkhe emasela ayawucitfwa eveni, kantsi ngaloko lesikushoko ngala nganhlanye kwayo, bonkhe labafungela emanga bayawucoshwa." 
Zechariah5:4 Simakadze longuSomandla utsi: ‘Ngiyawutfumela lesicalekiso, siyewungena endlini yelisela nasendlini yalowo lofungela emanga ngeLibito lami. Siyawuhlala lapha endlini yakhe siyibhubhise kanye netigodvo nematje ayo.’ ”" 
Zechariah5:5 Lengilosi leyayikhuluma nami yasondzela kimi, yafike yatsi: “Phakamisa emehlo akho ubone kutsi kuyini loku lokuvelako.”" 
Zechariah5:6 Ngabuta, ngatsi: “Kuyini?” Yangiphendvula, yatsi: “Libhasikidi lekukala.” Yaphindze yachubeka yatsi: “Loku bubi bebantfu kuwo wonkhe umhlaba.”" 
Zechariah5:7 Kwase kutsi simbonyo salo lesasentiwe ngemtfofu saphakanyiswa: ekhatsi kwalelo bhasikidi bekuhleti umfati! 
Zechariah5:8 Yakhuluma yatsi: “Lobu bubi,” yabe seyimfucela ekhatsi ebhasikidini, yacindzetela lesimbonyo salo semtfofu emlonyeni walelibhasikidi, walimbonya ngaso." 
Zechariah5:9 Ngase ngiphakamisa emehlo ami ngabuka, ngabona embikwami kunebafati lababili bandiza emoyeni ngetimphiko tabo. Letimphiko tabo tatifanana netadvoye, base baphakamisa lelibhasikidi, laze labasemkhatsini welizulu nemhlaba." 
Zechariah5:10 Ngabuta lengilosi leyayikhuluma nami, ngatsi: “Baliyisaphi lelibhasikidi?”" 
Zechariah5:11 Yangiphendvula, yatsi: “Baliyisa eveni laseBhabhulona, bayakulakhela indlu khona. Itakutsi nase ilungile lendlu, bese balibeka khona lapho endzaweni yalo.”" 
Zechariah6:1 Ngatsi ngiphakamisa emehlo njalo ngiyabuka, ngabona kuchamuka tincola letine, tiphuma emkhatsini wetintsaba letimbili, tintsaba telitfusi!" 
Zechariah6:2 Incola yekucala yayinemahhashi labovu, yesibili inemahhashi lamnyama," 
Zechariah6:3 yesitsatfu inemahhashi lamhlophe, yesine yayinemahhashi lamabalabala, onkhe anemandla, kutinjomane sibili." 
Zechariah6:4 Ngabuta lengilosi leyayikhuluma nami, ngatsi: “Nkhosi, lamahhashi naletincola kusho kutsini?”" 
Zechariah6:5 Lengilosi yangiphendvula, yatsi: “Lena ngimimoya yomine yasezulwini, iyaphuma ekumeni embikwaSimakadze wemhlaba wonkhe." 
Zechariah6:6 Lencola ledvonswa ngemahhashi lamnyama iya eveni langasenyakatfo, lena ledvonswa ngemahhashi lamhlophe icondze ngasenshonalanga, bese kutsi lena ledvonswa ngemahhashi lamabalabala ibheka ngaseningizimu.”" 
Zechariah6:7 Kwatsi nakuphuma lawa lamabalabala, tinjomane letatinemandla kakhulu, atimisela kuwuhlamahlama wonkhe umhlaba. Ingilosi yatsi: “Phumani, niwuhlamahlame wonkhe umhlaba!” Ngako ase ayaphuma awuhlamahlama wonkhe umhlaba." 
Zechariah6:8 Ingilosi yabe seyiyangimemeta, yatsi kimi: “Ase ubuke, lawa lacondze ngaseveni langasenyakatfo asatawubeka Moya wami phansi abe nekuthula eveni lasenyakatfo.”" 
Zechariah6:9 Livi laSimakadze lefika kimi, latsi:" 
Zechariah6:10 “Tsatsa isiliva negolide kulabatfunjiwe boHeldayi, naThobiya, naJedaya, lababefike baphuma eBhabhulona. Hamba ngalona lelo langa uye endlini yakaJosaya, umsa waZefaniya." 
Zechariah6:11 Ubotsatsa lesiliva negolide, wakhe ngayo umchele, bese uwubeka enhloko yemPhristi Lomkhulu, Jeshuwa, umsa waJosadaki." 
Zechariah6:12 Ufike umtjele kutsi naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, utsi: ‘Nangu umuntfu lolibito lakhe nguLigala, futsi uyawuhluma akhule endzaweni yakhe, akhe lithempeli laSimakadze." 
Zechariah6:13 Nguye-ke longuyena loyawukwakha lithempeli laSimakadze. Uyawukwembatsiswa bukhosi, futsi uyawuhlala esihlalweni sakhe sebukhosi abuse. Uyawuba ngumphristi esihlalweni sakhe sebukhosi. Futsi-ke kuyawuba nekuvana emkhatsini walababili.’" 
Zechariah6:14 Lomchele uyawubasethempelini laSimakadze ube sikhumbuto ngabo boHeldayi, naThobiya, naJedaya, naHeni, umsa waZefaniya." 
Zechariah6:15 “Labo labakhashane kakhulu bayakuta batewusita ngekwelekelela ekwakheni lithempeli laSimakadze; ngulapho-ke niyawukwati khona kutsi Simakadze longuSomandla ungitfumele kini. Loku kuyawukwenteka, nanimhlonipha nimlalela Simakadze longuNkulunkulu wenu.”" 
Zechariah7:1 Ngemnyaka wesine wekubusa kwenkhosi Dariyusi, kwefika livi laSimakadze kuZakhariya ngelilanga lesine enyangeni yemfica, inyanga yaKhislevu." 
Zechariah7:2 Bantfu baseBetheli bebatfumele boShareseri, naRegemi Meleki kanye nemancusa abo kutsi bayewuncenga Simakadze" 
Zechariah7:3 ngekutsi babute baphristi basendlini yaSimakadze longuSomandla kanye nebaphrofethi, batsi: “Ngilile yini ngizile nekudla ngenyanga yesihlanu, njengaloku bengivele ngenta kuleminyaka leminyenti leyendlulile?”" 
Zechariah7:4 Livi laSimakadze longuSomandla lase liyefika kimi, latsi:" 
Zechariah7:5 “Buta kubo bonkhe bantfu bakulelive nakubaphristi babo, utsi: ‘Ngalesikhatsi nizila kudla nilila ngenyanga yesihlanu neyesikhombisa kuleminyaka lengema-70 leyendlulile, benivele nizilela mine yini?" 
Zechariah7:6 Kona ngesikhatsi nidla ninatsa, anitenteli nine yini lawo madzili?" 
Zechariah7:7 Akusiwo yini emavi aSimakadze lawo lamenyetelwa ngebaphrofethi bakucala, ngesikhatsi iJerusalema kanye nemadolobha layitungeletile asephumulile, aphumelela lapho khona kwaze kwatinta iNegevu nelihlanze langasenshonalanga?’ ”" 
Zechariah7:8 Livi laSimakadze laphindze lefika futsi kuZakhariya, latsi:" 
Zechariah7:9 “Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, utsi: ‘Yehlulelani ngekwemtsetfocotfo, niphatsane ngemusa nangeluvelo kulowo nakulowo." 
Zechariah7:10 Ningabacindzeteli bafelokati, netintsandzane, nemihambima kanye nalabamphofu. Etinhlitiyweni tenu ningafiselani lokubi lomunye nalomunye.’" 
Zechariah7:11 “Kodvwa bala kulalela, bavuka inkhani bafulatsela, bavala tindlebe tabo." 
Zechariah7:12 Benta tinhlitiyo tabo taba lukhuni njengelitje, bangete bawulalela umtsetfo, bangawalaleli nemavi lakhulunywa nguSimakadze longuSomandla, lawatfumela ngaMoya wakhe ngebaphrofethi bakadzeni. Ngako-ke Simakadze longuSomandla watfukutsela kakhulu." 
Zechariah7:13 “Simakadze longuSomandla utsi: ‘Ngatsi nangibabita bangete balalela ngekusabela, ngako-ke nabo nabamemeta, angizange ngibalalele." 
Zechariah7:14 Ngabasakata ngesiwunguwungwana, ngabasa kuto tonkhe tive, lapho bafike baba tihambi khona. Live lasala likhala libhungane emvakwabo, kangangekutsi kute muntfu labengaphuma angene kulo. Balenta kanjalo-ke lelive lelalijabulile kutsi libe ngusehlane kahlongasibi.’ ”" 
Zechariah8:1 Livi laSimakadze longuSomandla laphindze futsi lefika kimi, latsi:" 
Zechariah8:2 “Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, utsi: ‘Nginenshisekelo kakhulu ngeSiyoni. Ngiyasha ngenca yesikhwele ngayo.’ ”" 
Zechariah8:3 Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze, utsi: “Ngiyawubuyela eSiyoni, ngihlale eJerusalema. Lapho-ke iJerusalema sekuyawutsiwa Lidolobha Lekwetsembeka, nentsaba yaSimakadze longuSomandla iyawubitwa ngekutsi yiNtsaba Lengcwele.”" 
Zechariah8:4 Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, utsi: “Emachegu kanye netalukati, bayawuphindze bahlale etitaladini taseJerusalema, nguloyo aneludvondvolo esandleni sakhe ngobe asakhulile." 
Zechariah8:5 Titaladi telidolobha tiyawuphitsitela bafana nemantfombatana labayawube badlala khona.” 
Zechariah8:6 Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, utsi: “Nangabe kubonakale kusimangaliso kulensali yalabantfu ngaleso sikhatsi, kodvwa ingabe nakimi kuyawuba simangaliso yini?” kusho Simakadze longuSomandla." 
Zechariah8:7 Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, utsi: “Ngiyawubasindzisa bantfu bami eveni langasemphumalanga nakulo langasenshonalanga." 
Zechariah8:8 Ngiyawubabuyisa batewuhlala eJerusalema; bayawuba bantfu bami, nami ngibe nguNkulunkulu wabo ngekwetsembeka nangekulunga.”" 
Zechariah8:9 Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, utsi: “Nine leniwevako nyalo lamavi labekhulunywa baphrofethi lababekhona ngesikhatsi kubekwa tisekelo tendlu yaSimakadze longuSomandla, cinisani tandla tenu kuze litekwakhiwa lelithempeli." 
Zechariah8:10 Ngaphambili kwalawo malanga kwakute inkhokhelo yebantfu nome yetilwane. Kute namunye labengaphuma angene ngenca yesitsa sakhe, ngobe ngagucula wonkhe umuntfu kutsi emelane namakhelwane wakhe." 
Zechariah8:11 Kodvwa nyalo ngingeke ngisayiphatsa lensali yalabantfu njengaloku ngake ngakwenta ngemalanga akucala,” kusho Simakadze longuSomandla." 
Zechariah8:12 “Inhlanyelo seyiyawukhula kahle, sivini siyawutsela titselo taso, umhlaba uyawuveta sivuno sawo, nemazulu ayakwehlisa ematolo awo. Tonkhe letintfo ngiyawutipha insali yalesive tibe lifa laso." 
Zechariah8:13 Njengobe beniyintfo yesicalekiso emkhatsini wetive, awu nine bakaJuda nani ma-Israyeli, ngiyakunisindzisa kanjalo-ke, niyawuba sibusiso. Ningesabi, kodvwa cinani emadvolo.”" 
Zechariah8:14 Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, utsi: “Njengaloku ngatimisela kwehlisela inhlekelele etikwenu ngingasagucuki ngesikhatsi bangitfukutselisa boyihlo,” kusho Simakadze longuSomandla," 
Zechariah8:15 “kanjalo-ke nyalo sengitimisele kwenta lokuhle futsi kuyo iJerusalema naJuda. Ningesabi. 
Zechariah8:16 Nati tintfo lokufanele nitente nine: Khulumani liciniso lomunye kulomunye, emasangweni enu nikhiphe sigwebo lesiliciniso nalesiveta kuthula." 
Zechariah8:17 Ningambopheli luzungu makhelwane, futsi ningabokutsandza kufungela emanga. Ngiyakwenyanya konkhe loko,” kusho Simakadze." 
Zechariah8:18 Livi laSimakadze longuSomandla laphindze lefika kimi, latsi:" 
Zechariah8:19 “Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, utsi: ‘Lokuzila kudla kwenyanga yesine, neyesihlanu, neyesikhombisa, neyelishumi sekuyawuba ngemalanga enjabulo, nekutsakasa, nemadzili ekutijabulisa akaJuda. Ngako-ke litsandzeni liciniso nekuthula.’ ”" 
Zechariah8:20 Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, utsi: “Tive letinyenti nalabahlala emadolobheni lamanyenti basetawuta;" 
Zechariah8:21 labahlala kulelinye lidolobha bayakuya kulelinye batsi: ‘Asambeni ngekushesha siyewuncenga kuSimakadze, sifunisise Simakadze longuSomandla. Mine ngekwami ngiyahamba.’" 
Zechariah8:22 Tive letinyenti netive letinemandla tiyawuta eJerusalema titewufunisisa Simakadze longuSomandla, timncenge.”" 
Zechariah8:23 Naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, utsi: “Ngalawo malanga emadvodza lalishumi lasuka kuto tonkhe tilwimi netive ayawunkonkoshela umJuda munye ngemphetfo wesembatfo sakhe, atsi: ‘Asihambisane nani, ngobe sivile kutsi Nkulunkulu unani.’ ”" 
Zechariah9:1 Livi lesembulo: Livi laSimakadze limelene nelive lakaHadraki; nayo iDamaseko iyawuba yindzawo yekuhlala kwalelivi, ngobe emehlo aSimakadze asetikwabo bonkhe bantfu nakuto tonkhe tive tema-Israyeli," 
Zechariah9:2 nasetikweHamathi futsi lengumnyele wabo, nasetikweThire kanye neSidoni, nome bona bahlakaniphe kakhulu." 
Zechariah9:3 IThire yona seyitakhele inqaba; seyicokelele isiliva kwaba shangatsi lutfuli, negolide njengeludzaka lwasesitaladini." 
Zechariah9:4 Kodvwa Simakadze uyawutsatsa lowo mcebo wayo, abhubhise emandla ayo elwandle, futsi iyawudliwa ngumlilo." 
Zechariah9:5 I-Ashkeloni iyawukubona loko, yesabe; iGaza iyawujilajileka ngenca yeminjunju, kanye ne-Ekroni futsi, ngobe litsemba layo liyawubuna liphele. IGaza iyawulahlekelwa yinkhosi yayo, ne-Ashkeloni iyawushiywa itindzala." 
Zechariah9:6 Bachamuki bayawuhlala e-Ashdodi, mine ngiyawucedza kutigabatisa kwemaFilisti." 
Zechariah9:7 Ngiyawukhipha inyama leyingati emilonyeni yabo, ngivungule kudla lekutinengiso lebekunikelwe etithicweni lokusasele emkhatsini wematinyo abo. Labo labayawube basele sebayawuba baNkulunkulu wetfu babe baholi kaJuda, i-Ekroni iyawuba njengemaJebhusi." 
Zechariah9:8 Kodvwa ngiyakuyivikela indlu yami, ngimelane nanome nguyiphi imphi lengahle yendlule kuyo. Bacindzeteli abasayiwuphindze basibuse sive sami, ngobe nyalo sengiyaselusa ngemehlo ami." 
Zechariah9:9 Jabula kakhulu, Ndvodzakati yaseSiyoni! Memeta ngekujabula, Ndvodzakati yaseJerusalema! Ase ubuke, inkhosi yakho ita kuwe, ilungile, futsi iphetse insindziso, ita itfobekile, igibele embongolweni, etikwelitfole lembongolo, inkhonyane yembongolo." 
Zechariah9:10 Ngiyawutisusa tincola temphi ka-Efrayimu, nemahhashi emphi ngiwesuse eJerusalema, nebutjoki bemphi buyakwephulwa. Inkhosi iyawumemetela kuthula etiveni. Kubusa kwayo kuyakwandza, kusuke elwandle kuyewugcina ngelwandle, kusuke eMfuleni kuyewugcina emikhawulweni yemhlaba." 
Zechariah9:11 Kodvwa nine, ngenca yengati yesivumelwane sami nani, ngiyawutikhulula tiboshwa takini emgodzini lote emanti." 
Zechariah9:12 Buyelani enqabeni yenu, nine tiboshwa lese ninelitsemba, ngisho nanyalo solo ngiyamemetela, ngitsi ngitanibuyisela ngalokuphindziwe." 
Zechariah9:13 Juda ngiyawumgoba njengobe ngigoba butjoki bami, ngibugcwalise nga-Efrayimu, kutsi abe ngumcibisholo wami. Awu Siyoni, ngiyawukuvusela emadvodzana akho emelane nemadvodzana akho, Grisi, sive sami ngisente inkemba yelichawe." 
Zechariah9:14 Simakadze uyawube sewuyabonakala kubo, umcibisholo wakhe uyawugijima njengembane. INkhosi Simakadze iyawushaya impalampala, iyawushuca ngetivunguvungu taseningizimu," 
Zechariah9:15 Simakadze longuSomandla uyakubavikela bantfu bakhe. Bayawubhubhisa bancobe ngematje etilingi. Bayawunatsa ingati babhodle kube shangatsi ngungeliwayini; bayawucitsa ingati yetitsa tabo iphuphume njengesitja lesisetjentiswa ekunyenyeteni emakona aselatini. 
Zechariah9:16 Simakadze Nkulunkulu wabo uyawubasindzisa ngalelo langa njengemhlambi webantfu bakhe. Bayawumanyatela eveni lakhe njengematje laligugu lacwebetelako kuwo umchele. 
Zechariah9:17 Maye, live lakhe liyawuba lihle bo! Futsi liyawubukeka lilihle kakhulu. Lokutinhlavu kuyawukwenta tinsizwa tiphumelele, neliwayini lelisha lente emantfombatane ondleke." 
Zechariah10:1 Celani imvula kuSimakadze nakungusentfwasahlobo; nguSimakadze lowenta emafu lanemvula, nguye lowehlisela tihlambi temvula kubantfwana bebantfu, aphe netitselo tesiganga kubo bonkhe bantfu." 
Zechariah10:2 Tithico tikhuluma lokuyinkhohliso, labaphengulako babona imibono yemanga, bakhuluma emaphupho langesilo liciniso. Badvudvutana mahhala nje ngelite. Ngako-ke bantfu bazulazula njengetimvu, bacindzetelekile ngekweswela umelusi." 
Zechariah10:3 Simakadze utsi: “Intfukutselo yami ivutsela belusi, futsi ngitabajezisa baholi; ngobe Simakadze longuSomandla uyawutinakekela timvu takhe, indlu yakaJuda, abente bafanane nelihhashi lelilichalachala emphini." 
Zechariah10:4 KaJuda kuyawuvela litje lesisekelo, kuye kuyawuphuma sikhonkhwane sekusimisa lithende, nebutjoki basemphini, kuvele kuye bonkhe babusi." 
Zechariah10:5 Nasebahlangene bayawuba njengemadvodza lanemandla lamakhulu, abhocota ludzaka etitaladini nakuliwa imphi. Bayawukulwa bancobe, ngobe Simakadze unabo, bayawuncoba bagibeli bemahhashi." 
Zechariah10:6 “Ngiyakuyicinisa indlu yakaJuda, ngiyisindzise indlu yakaJosefa. Ngiyakubabuyisela, ngobe nginesihawu ngabo. Bayakuba shangatsi angizange sengibalahle, ngobe mine nginguSimakadze Nkulunkulu wabo, futsi ngiyawubaphendvula." 
Zechariah10:7 Baka-Efrayimu bayawuba njengemadvodza lanemandla kakhulu, tinhlitiyo tabo tiyawutfokota kube shangatsi ngungeliwayini. Bantfwababo bayawukubona bajabule. Tinhlitiyo tabo tiyawujabula ngaSimakadze." 
Zechariah10:8 “Ngiyawubakhweba ngibabutse bangene. Ngempela ngiyawubahlenga; bayawuba banyenti njengakucala. 
Zechariah10:9 Noko ngibasakatela kuletinye tive, kodvwa kuwo lawo mave lakhashane bayakungikhumbula. Bona kanye nebantfwababo bayawuphila, baphindze babuye." 
Zechariah10:10 Ngiyawubabuyisa besuke kulaseGibhithe, ngibabutse kulase-Asiriya. Ngiyawubayisa kaGileyadi naseLebanoni, lapho bayakweswela nendzawo yekuhlala." 
Zechariah10:11 Bayakwendlula elwandle lwetinhlupheko, lwandle loludlondlobele luyawubindziswa, nako konkhe kujula kweNayili kuyawukoma. Kutigcabha kwase-Asiriya kuyawudzilitwa, nendvuku yebukhosi yaseGibhithe iyawunyamalala." 
Zechariah10:12 Baka-Israyeli ngiyawubacinisa kuSimakadze, nabo bayawuhamba kulo Libito lakhe,” kusho Simakadze." 
Zechariah11:1 Awu, Lebanoni, vula iminyango yakho, kuze umlilo utekuyishwabudzela lemisedari yakho!" 
Zechariah11:2 Awu, sihlahla sesipheshula, khala, ngobe umsedari sewuwile; tihlahla letikhulu letinesitfunti setibhujisiwe! Lilani, ma-okhi aseBhashani; lihlatsi lebelenile seligecwe lonkhe!" 
Zechariah11:3 Lalelani kulila kwebelusi betimvu, emadlelo abo laluhlata asabhujisiwe. Lalelani kubhodla kwemabhubesi; lomenakati welihlatsi laseJordane ubhujisiwe." 
Zechariah11:4 Naku lokukhulunywa nguSimakadze Nkulunkulu wami, utsi: “Yelusa timvu letimiselwe kuhlatjwa." 
Zechariah11:5 Batsengi bato bayatihlaba bangete bajeziswa. Labo labatitsengisako, batsi: ‘Akadvunyiswe Simakadze, sesinjingile!’ Ngisho nebelusi bato abanasihawu nato." 
Zechariah11:6 “Ngobe ngingeke ngisaba nesihawu kubantfu balelive,” kusho Simakadze. “Ngiyawunikela ngulowo nalowo esandleni samakhelwane wakhe nesenkhosi yakhe. Bayakulicindzetela live, nami futsi ngingeke ngibephule etandleni tabo.”" 
Zechariah11:7 Labo lababetsengiselana ngetimvu base bayangicasha; ngayelusa lemihlambi leyase imiselwe kuhlatjwa. Ngase ngitsatsa tindvuku letimbili, lenye ngayetsa libito ngatsi nguMusa, nalenye ngatsi nguNhlanganiso, ngabe sengiyawelusa-ke lomhlambi." 
Zechariah11:8 Nganyanga yinye ngesusa labelusi labatsatfu. Umhlambi wangenyanya, nami ngadzinwa nguwo," 
Zechariah11:9 ngatsi kuwo: “Ngingeke ngisanelusa. Leto letifako atife, naleto letibhubhako atibhujiswe. Leto letisele atidlane todvwana, nguleyo inyama yalenye.”" 
Zechariah11:10 Ngase ngitsatsa indvuku yami lenguMusa, ngayephula, ngephula sivumelwane lengase ngisente kanye nato tonkhe tive." 
Zechariah11:11 Sacitfwa ngalelo langa, ngako labantfu labatsenga letimvu nalabo labatsengisa ngato babengibukile sebati kutsi lelo bekulivi laSimakadze." 
Zechariah11:12 Ngabatjela laba labatsengiselana ngetimvu, ngatsi: “Nangabe nibona kuncono kakhulu loko, ngiholeleni; kodvwa nangabe anikuboni loko, lowo mholo wugcineni.” Ngako bangiholela tinhlavu letingema-30 tesiliva." 
Zechariah11:13 Simakadze wakhuluma kimi, watsi: “Yijikijele kumbumbi,” lentsengo lenkhulu labangitsengisa ngayo. Ngase ngitsatsa letinhlavu letingema-30 tesiliva ngatijikijela kumbumbi endlini yaSimakadze." 
Zechariah11:14 Ngase ngephula lendvuku yami yesibili leyayinguNhlanganiso, ngephula buhlobo emkhatsini waJuda na-Israyeli." 
Zechariah11:15 Simakadze wase ukhuluma kimi, watsi: “Phindza futsi utsatse tikhali temelusi, kodvwa nyalo utsatse talosilima." 
Zechariah11:16 Ngobe ngiyawuvusa umelusi etikwalelive longeke atinakekele timvu letilahlekile, longeke atifune letincane, longeke atiphilise letilimele, nalongeke atibonelele ondle leticinile naletikhuluphele, kodvwa uyawudla inyama yetimvu telikhetselo abhoncule tinselo tato." 
Zechariah11:17 “Maye kumelusi longasiti lutfo, loshiya umhlambi! Shangatsi inkemba ingashaya umkhono wakhe neliso lakhe langesekudla! Shangatsi umkhono wakhe ungashwaphana, neliso lakhe langesekudla livaleke ngci!”" 
Zechariah12:1 Livi lesembulo: Leli livi laSimakadze nga-Israyeli. Simakadze, lowendlale emazulu, lobeke tisekelo temhlaba, nalowabumba umoya wemuntfu ekhatsi kuye, utsi:" 
Zechariah12:2 “IJerusalema ngitayenta ibe yindzebe leyenta tonkhe tive letiyitungeletile tidzayitele. Emadolobha akaJuda atawuvinjetelwa kanye neJerusalema. 
Zechariah12:3 Ngalelo langa, mhlazane tonkhe tive temhlaba tibutsene ndzawonye kutawumelana nayo, iJerusalema ngiyakuyenta ibe lidvwala lelisindzako kuto tonkhe tive. Bonkhe labetama kulisundvuta bayakutilimata bona." 
Zechariah12:4 Ngalelo langa onkhe emahhashi ngiyakuwashaya ngeluvalo, bagibeli bawo bona ngibashaye ngekuhlanya,” kusho Simakadze. “Liso lami liyawubasetikwendlu yakaJuda liyeluse, kodvwa onkhe emahhashi ebetive ngiyakuwaphumphutsekisa." 
Zechariah12:5 Baholi bakaJuda bayakutsi etinhlitiyweni tabo: ‘Bantfu baseJerusalema bacinile, ngobe Simakadze longuSomandla unguNkulunkulu wabo.’" 
Zechariah12:6 “Ngalelo langa baholi bakaJuda ngiyawubenta bafanane nelibhodo lemlilo encunjini yetigodvo, bafanane nesidlwane lesivutsa emalangabi esitfungweni. Bayawucotfula ngesekudla nangesancele tonkhe tive letibatungeletile, kodvwa iJerusalema iyawusala seloku injalo nje endzaweni yayo." 
Zechariah12:7 “Simakadze uyawusindzisa emakhaya akaJuda kucala, kuze kutsi ludvumo lwendlu yaDavide kanye nelwetakhamiti taseJerusalema lungabi lukhulu kunelwakaJuda." 
Zechariah12:8 Ngalelo langa Simakadze uyawubavikela labo labahlala eJerusalema, kuze kutsi lababutsakatsaka kakhulu emkhatsini wabo babe njengaDavide, bese kutsi indlu yaDavide yona ifanane naNkulunkulu, ibe njengengilosi yaSimakadze lehamba embikwabo." 
Zechariah12:9 Ngalelo langa ngiyawuphuma ngiyewubhubhisa tonkhe tive letihlasela iJerusalema.” 
Zechariah12:10 “Ngiyawutfululela etikwendlu yakaDavide nasetikwabo bonkhe labahlala eJerusalema Moya wemusa newekuncusa. Bayakumbuka lowo lebamgwaza, bese bayamlilela njenganakulilelwa umntfwana lotelwe waba yedvwa kabo, bamdzabukele kakhulu, njengemuntfu nakadzabukela indvodzana yematubulo." 
Zechariah12:11 Ngalelo langa kulila kwaseJerusalema kuyakuba kukhulu, kube njengekulila kwaHadadi Rimoni etsafeni laseMegido." 
Zechariah12:12 Live liyawulila, lolo nalolo lusendvo ngekwalo, nebafati balo balile ngekwabo; lusendvo lwendlu yakaDavide nebafati balo, lusendvo lwendlu yakaNathani nebafati balo," 
Zechariah12:13 lusendvo lwendlu yakaLevi nebafati balo," 
Zechariah12:14 nabo bonkhe balolo nalolo lusendvo ngekwalo nebafati balo ngekwabo.” 
Zechariah13:1 “Ngalelo langa umtfombo uyawuvulekela indlu yakaDavide kanye nalabo labahlala eJerusalema, kutsi utewubahlanta esonweni nasekungcoleni." 
Zechariah13:2 “Ngalelo langa ngiyakuwadzingisa emabito etithico kulelive, futsi tingeke tiphindze tikhunjulwe. Baphrofethi nemoya wekungahlanteki kokubili, ngiyawukususa eveni,” kusho Simakadze longuSomandla." 
Zechariah13:3 “Nangabe kukhona losachubeka nekuphrofetha, uyise nenina, labamtalako, bayakutsi kuye: ‘Wena kufanele ufe, ngobe ukhulume emanga egameni laSimakadze;’ nasaphrofetha, batali bakhe bayawumgwaza." 
Zechariah13:4 “Ngalelo langa ngulowo nalowo mphrofethi uyawuba nemahloni ngembono wakhe. Angeke aphindze ayembatse ingubo yeboya yebuphrofethi kuze atekukhohlisa. 
Zechariah13:5 Uyakutsi: ‘Angisiye umphrofethi, ngingumlimi; kusukela ebusheni bami seloku ngisebentana nemhlaba.’" 
Zechariah13:6 Nangabe abutwa ngumuntfu, atsi: ‘Pho, lamanceba lasemtimbeni wakho ngewani?’ uyawuphendvula atsi: ‘Lamanceba ngawatfola endlini yebangani bami.’ ”" 
Zechariah13:7 “Awu nkemba, vuka umelane nemelusi wami, umelane nemuntfu longumngani wami,” kusho Simakadze longuSomandla. “Shaya umelusi umbulale, timvu tiyawuhlakateka. Ngiyawugucula sandla sami etikwaletincane, ngimelane nato.”" 
Zechariah13:8 Simakadze utsi: “Eveni lonkhe tincenye letimbili kulokutsatfu kuyawushaywa kubhujiswe; noko incenye yesitsatfu iyawusala kulo. 
Zechariah13:9 Lencenye yesitsatfu ngiyakuyimikisa emlilweni, ngibacenge njengesiliva, ngibahlolisise njengegolide. Bayakulibita Libito lami, bese mine ngiyabaphendvula; ngiyawutsi: ‘Bona babantfu bami;’ nabo batsi: ‘Simakadze nguNkulunkulu wetfu.’ ”" 
Zechariah14:1 Lilanga laSimakadze liyeta, lapho iyakwehlukaniswa khona embikwemehlo enu imphango letsatfwe kini." 
Zechariah14:2 Ngiyakubutsela tonkhe tive eJerusalema kutekulwa nayo; lelidolobha liyawutfunjwa, tindlu tiphangwe, nebesifazane badlwengulwe. Incenye yebantfu balelidolobha iyawutfunjwa, kodvwa laba labanye bantfu labayawube basele bangeke basuswe kulelidolobha." 
Zechariah14:3 Simakadze uyawuphuma ayekulwa naleto tive, njengobe avama kulwa ngelilanga lemphi." 
Zechariah14:4 Ngalelo langa tinyawo takhe tiyakuma etikweNtsaba Yemincumo, ngasemphumalanga kweJerusalema, bese kutsi leNtsaba Yemincumo ichekeke ekhatsi kusukela ngasemphumalanga kuye ngasenshonalanga, kwakheke sigodzi lesikhulu, incenye yalentsaba iyawukhweshela ngasenyakatfo, kutsi incenye lenye ikhweshele ngaseningizimu." 
Zechariah14:5 Niyawubalekela ngasesigodzini sentsaba yami, ngobe lesigodzi siyawufikela e-Aseli. Yebo, niyawubaleka njengamhlazane nibalekela kutamatama kwemhlaba ngesikhatsi sa-Uziya, inkhosi yakaJuda. Simakadze-ke longuNkulunkulu wami uyawube sewuyefika kanye nabo bonkhe labangcwele bakhe." 
Zechariah14:6 Ngalelo langa kuyawubate kukhanya, nekucandza, nesitfwatfwa." 
Zechariah14:7 Kuyakuba lilanga leliyincophamlandvo, leliyawubate imini nebusuku, lilanga lelatiwa nguSimakadze. Kuyawutsi nakutakuhlwa, kuvele kukhanya." 
Zechariah14:8 Ngalelo langa emanti laphilako ayawugeleta aphuma eJerusalema, incenye yawo igeletele elwandle lolungasemphumalanga, kutsi incenye yawo igeletele elwandle lolungasenshonalanga, busika nehlobo." 
Zechariah14:9 Simakadze uyawuba yinkhosi emhlabeni wonkhe. Ngalelo langa kuyawuba naSimakadze munye, Libito lakhe kube Libito lakhe kuphela." 
Zechariah14:10 Lonkhe live, kusukela eGeba kuye eRimoni, eningizimu neJerusalema, liyawufanana ne-Arabha. Kodvwa iJerusalema iyawuphakanyiswa ihlale isendzaweni yayo, kusukela eSangweni lakaBhenjamini kuye endzaweni yeliSango Lekucala, eSangweni Lasekoneni, nekusukela eMbhoshongweni waHananeli kuye ematjeni enkhosi ekuhluta liwayini." 
Zechariah14:11 Iyakuhlalwa bantfu; ingeke iphindze ibhujiswe. IJerusalema iyawulamuleleka. 
Zechariah14:12 Lesi-ke sishayo Simakadze layawushaya ngaso tonkhe tive letalwa neJerusalema: Umtimba wabo uyawubola baseme ngetinyawo tabo, emehlo abo ayawubola etingojeni tawo, netilwimi tabo tiyawubola emilonyeni yabo." 
Zechariah14:13 Ngalelo langa bantfu bayawushaywa nguSimakadze ngekutfutfumela lokukhulu. Ngulowo nalowo uyawubamba sandla salomunye bahlaselane bodvwana. 
Zechariah14:14 NaJuda uyakulwa amelane neJerusalema. Ingcebo yato tonkhe tive letakhelene nayo iyawubutsiselwa ndzawonye, kube tincumbi letinkhulu tegolide, netesiliva kanye netetimphahla tekwembatsa." 
Zechariah14:15 Sishayo lesifanana naso siyawushaya emahhashi neminyuzi, nemakamela, netimbongolo, kanye nato tonkhe tilwane kuleto tinkambu." 
Zechariah14:16 Kuyawutsi bonkhe labayawube basele etiveni tonkhe lebetihlasela iJerusalema benyuke iminyaka ngeminyaka kuyawukhonta iNkhosi, Simakadze longuSomandla, nekugubha uMkhosi Wemadlangala." 
Zechariah14:17 Nangabe letinye tive temhlaba tingayi eJerusalema kuyawukhonta iNkhosi, Simakadze longuSomandla, tiyawubate imvula." 
Zechariah14:18 Nangabe emaGibhithe akenyuki kuyawuhlanganyela, nawo ayawubate imvula. Simakadze uyakwehlisela etikwabo leso sishayo lashaya ngaso tive letingenyuki kuyewugubha uMkhosi Wemadlangala." 
Zechariah14:19 Lesi kuyakuba sijeziso seGibhithe nesijeziso setive tonkhe letingenyuki kuyewugubha uMkhosi Wemadlangala. 
Zechariah14:20 Ngalelo langa umbhalo lotsi “kwehlukaniselwe simakadze” uyawucoshwa ngisho nasetinsimbini letincencetsa tisematomini emahhashi; nemabhodo ekupheka endlini yaSimakadze ayawufanana netindishi letingcwele letisembikwelilati. 
Zechariah14:21 Onkhe emabhodo aseJerusalema newakaJuda ayakwehlukaniselwa Simakadze longuSomandla, kutsi bonkhe labetako kutakwenta umhlatjelo batsatse lamanye alamabhodo bapheke ngawo. Ngalelo langa sewuyawubate umtsengisi endlini yaSimakadze longuSomandla." 
Malachi1:1 Sembulo: Livi laSimakadze lelefika kuma-Israyeli ngemphrofethi Malakhi. 
Malachi1:2 Simakadze utsi: “Nginitsandzile. Kodvwa nine niyabuta nitsi: ‘Usitsandze kanjani?’ ” Simakadze utsi: “Esawu bekungesiye yini umnakaboJakobe? Noko ngase ngimtsandzile Jakobe," 
Malachi1:3 kodvwa Esawu ngamtondza. Ngagucula tintsaba takhe taba lugwadvule, lifa lakhe ngalishiyela timphungutja tasehlane.”" 
Malachi1:4 Edomu angasho atsi: “Nome sipitjitiwe, kodvwa sitawutakha kabusha letindzala.” Kodvwa naku lokushiwo nguSimakadze longuSomandla, utsi: “Bangakha, kodvwa ngitawuphindze ngibhidlite. Bayawubitwa ngekutsi Live Lenkhohlakalo, sive lesihlala njalo singaphansi kwelulaka lwaSimakadze." 
Malachi1:5 Niyawukubona nine ngemehlo enu, bese nitsi: ‘Mukhulu Simakadze, kuze kwendlulele nangesheya kweminyele yaka-Israyeli!’ ”" 
Malachi1:6 Simakadze Somandla utsi: “Indvodzana ihlonipha uyise, kantsi nesisebenti sihlonipha inkhosi yaso. Nangabe nginguyihlo, aningihloniphi leni? Nangabe ngiyinkhosi, aningihloniphi ngani? Ngini nine baphristi, lenedzelela Libito lami. “Kodvwa niyabuta nitsi: ‘Siledzelele kanjani Libito lakho?’" 
Malachi1:7 “Nibeke kudla lokungcolile ngekwemtsetfo etikwelilati lami. “Kodvwa niyabuta nitsi: ‘Sikungcolise kanjani?’ “Ngekutsi nitsi litafula laSimakadze liyenyanyeka. 
Malachi1:8 Naniletsa tifuyo letitindlobho kutsi titewuba ngumhlatjelo, kulungile yini loko? Nanenta umhlatjelo ngesifuyo lesichutako nome lesigulako, kulungile yini loko? Yetamani kunikela ngato kumbusi wenu! Anganijabulela yini? Anganemukela yini?” kusho Simakadze longuSomandla." 
Malachi1:9 Nitsi: “Ncusani kuNkulunkulu kutsi atewuba nemusa kitsi.” “Ngaleminikelo lenjena lephuma etandleni tenu utanemukela yini?” kusho Simakadze longuSomandla. 
Malachi1:10 “Awu, shangatsi lomunye wenu angavala iminyango yelithempeli, kuze ningetikuyokhela imililo lengenamsebenti elatini lami! Angijabuli ngani, futsi ngingeke ngiwemukele umnikelo lophuma etandleni tenu,” kusho Simakadze longuSomandla." 
Malachi1:11 “Libito lami liyawuba likhulu etiveni kusukela ekuphumeni kwelilanga kuze kube ngusekushoneni kwalo. Kuyo yonkhe indzawo imphepho neminikelo lehlantekile iyawuletfwa kulo Libito lami, ngobe Libito lami liyawuba likhulu etiveni,” kusho Simakadze longuSomandla." 
Malachi1:12 “Kodvwa nine niyalihlambalata ngekukhuluma ngelitafula laSimakadze nitsi: ‘Lingcolile,’ nangekudla kwalo, nitsi: ‘Kuyenyanyeka!’" 
Malachi1:13 Niphindze nitsi: ‘Maye, ngumtfwalo!’ bese nikumfumfutsa ngaphandle kwenhlonipho,” kusho Simakadze longuSomandla. “Naniletsa tifuyo letitsetfwe ngebudlova nome letichutako, nome letigulako nitinikele tibe ngumhlatjelo, kufanele ngitemukele yini kuleto tandla tenu?” kusho Simakadze." 
Malachi1:14 “Ucalekisiwe umuntfu lotsi anesifuyo lesemukelekako lesidvuna emhlambini wakhe, afunge kutsi utawunikela ngaso, kodvwa bese uyesuka lapho unikela kuSimakadze ngalesinye lesinesici. Ngobe mine ngiyinkhosi lenkhulu, neLibito lami liyesatjwa etiveni tonkhe,” kusho Simakadze longuSomandla." 
Malachi2:1 “Manje-ke, lomyalo ucondzene nani, nine baphristi:" 
Malachi2:2 Naningalaleli, futsi naningatimiseli ngenhlitiyo yenu kutsi nihloniphe Libito lami, ngitanitfumelela sicalekiso, netibusiso tenu ngiticalekise. Yebo, vele sengiticalekisile, ngobe anikatimiseli enhlitiyweni yenu kutsi ningihloniphe,” kusho Simakadze longuSomandla." 
Malachi2:3 “Ngenca yenu, ngiyakutekhuta titukulwane tenu; ngiyakuwendlala ebusweni benu lamatfumbu emihlatjelo yenu yemadzili, nani niyawususwa kanye nawo." 
Malachi2:4 Nitawukwati-ke kutsi nginitfumelele lesecwayiso, khona kutawutsi sivumelwane sami naLevi sichubeke,” kusho Simakadze longuSomandla." 
Malachi2:5 “Sivumelwane sami naye bekusivumelwane sekuphila nekuthula, nguloko lengamnika kona, kutsi angihloniphe, futsi wavele wangihlonipha wema ekulesabeni Libito lami." 
Malachi2:6 Sifundziso lesiliciniso sasisemlonyeni wakhe, kute inkhohliso leyatfolakala etindzebeni temlomo wakhe. Wahamba nami ngekuthula nangebucotfo, wakhipha labanyenti esonweni." 
Malachi2:7 “Ngobe tindzebe temlomo wemphristi kufanele tilondvolote lwati, emlonyeni wakhe kufanele bantfu bafune sifundziso semtsetfo wami, ngobe phela yena usitfunywa saSimakadze longuSomandla." 
Malachi2:8 Kodvwa nine senisukile kuleyo ndlela, kwatsi ngalemfundziso yenu nakhubatelisa bantfu labanyenti, bawa; nisephulile sivumelwane sami naLevi,” kusho Simakadze longuSomandla." 
Malachi2:9 “Ngako-ke mine senginente nedzeleleka natfotjiswa embikwabo bonkhe bantfu, ngobe anikatilandzeli tindlela tami, kodvwa nine niyaye nikhetse bantfu nanisebentisa umtsetfo.”" 
Malachi2:10 AsinaBabe munye sonkhe yini? Asidalwanga nguNkulunkulu munye yini? Pho, sisihlambalatelani lesivumelwane sabokhokho betfu ngekungetsembeki kwetfu lomunye kulomunye?" 
Malachi2:11 Juda abengaketsembeki. Intfo lesinengiso seyentiwe ka-Israyeli naseJerusalema: Juda sewungcolise indzawo lengcwele letsandvwa nguSimakadze, emadvodza akaJuda ateka bafati labakhonta sithico sebetive." 
Malachi2:12 Umuntfu lowenta loko, nome ngabe ngubani, shangatsi Simakadze angamsusa emathendeni akaJakobe, lite nome ngabe uyayiletsa iminikelo kuSimakadze longuSomandla." 
Malachi2:13 Lokunye lenikwentako naku: Nilitsela ngetinyembeti lilati laSimakadze. Niyalila nikhale ngobe angasayinaki iminikelo yenu, nome angasayemukeli ngekujabula etandleni tenu." 
Malachi2:14 Niyabuta nitsi: “Leni?” Kungobe Simakadze abengufakazi emkhatsini wakho nemfati webusha bakho, ngobe awuketsembeki kuye, nome yena usengumkakho, umfati wesivumelwane semshado." 
Malachi2:15 Simakadze akabenti baba munye yini? Enyameni nasemoyeni bakhe. Bamunye leni? Ngobe abefuna bantfwana labesaba Nkulunkulu. Ngako tilindze wena emoyeni wakho, wetsembeke kumfati webusha bakho." 
Malachi2:16 Simakadze Nkulunkulu wema-Israyeli utsi: “Ngiyakutondza kwehlukana kwalabashadile, kantsi futsi ngiyayenyanya indvodza levimbanisa ngebudlova njengesembatfo,” kusho Simakadze. Ngako ticaphele wena emoyeni wakho, ungabi ngulongaketsembeki." 
Malachi2:17 Senimkhatsatile Simakadze ngemavi enu. Niyabuta nitsi: “Simkhatsate ngani?” Nimkhatsate ngekukhuluma nitsi: “Bonkhe labenta lokubi bahle emehlweni aSimakadze, futsi uyajabula ngabo,” nome: “Uphi loNkulunkulu wema-Israyeli lowehlulela ngebucotfo?”" 
Malachi3:1 “Bukani la, ngiyawutfumela sitfunywa sami, lesiyawulungisa indlela embikwami. Masinyane loSimakadze lenimfunako uyakuta ethempelini lakhe. Yebo, sitfunywa sesivumelwane lenisifisako siyawufika,” kusho Simakadze longuSomandla." 
Malachi3:2 Kodvwa ngubani nje longamelana nelilanga lekufika kwakhe? Ngubani longema ekubonakaleni kwakhe? Ngobe uyawufanana nemlilo wemcengi nome nensipho yemgezi. 
Malachi3:3 Uyawuhlala njengemcengi nanjengemhlanti wesiliva; uyawuhlanta emaLevi awacenge njengegolide nesiliva. Simakadze uyawuba nemadvodza layawuletsa iminikelo ngekulunga," 
Malachi3:4 neminikelo yakaJuda neyaseJerusalema iyawuphindze yemukeleke kuSimakadze, njengasemalangeni akadzeni, eminyakeni yasemandvulo." 
Malachi3:5 “Ngako, ngiyawusondzela kini kutakwehlulela. Ngiyawushesha kutsi ngifakaze ngimelane netangoma, netiphingi, nabofakazi bemanga, ngimelane nalabo labadlelela tisebenti emaholo ato, labo labacindzetela bafelokati netintsandzane, bemuke betive emalungelo abo, kodvwa bangangesabi mine,” kusho Simakadze longuSomandla." 
Malachi3:6 “Mine, Simakadze, angigucuki. Ngako nani titukulwane taJakobe, anikabhujiswa." 
Malachi3:7 Kusukela esikhatsini sabokhokho benu nisukile etimisweni tami, nangete natigcina. Buyelani kimi, nami ngiyawubuyela kini,” kusho Simakadze longuSomandla. “Kodvwa niyabuta nitsi: ‘Pho, singabuyela kanjani?’" 
Malachi3:8 “Umuntfu angemebela yini Nkulunkulu? Noko niyangebela. “Kodvwa niyabuta nitsi: ‘Sikwebela njani?’ “Ngekwelishumi nangeminikelo. 
Malachi3:9 Ningaphansi kwesicalekiso, nonkhe nine sive, ngobe nichubeka nekungebela." 
Malachi3:10 Letsani konkhe kwelishumi endlini yengcebo, kuze kutewuba nekudla endlini yami.” Simakadze utsi: “Ase ningilinge ngaloko, nitewubona kutsi ngingeke yini nginivulele emafasitelo asezulwini ekutfulula, nginitfululele tibusiso letinyenti, nize nehluleke kutfola indzawo leyenele yekutigcina." 
Malachi3:11 Ngiyawuvimba tilwanyakatana kutsi tingatidli tilimo tenu, nemivini emasimini enu ingasali ite titselo,” kusho Simakadze longuSomandla." 
Malachi3:12 “Lapho-ke tonkhe tive tiyawutsi nine ningulababusisiwe, ngobe live lenu liyakuba live lelihle,” kusho Simakadze longuSomandla." 
Malachi3:13 Simakadze utsi: “Nikhulume kimi emavi lanelulaka nalabuhlungu. “Noko niyabuta nitsi: ‘Sikhulumeni lokumelene nawe?’ 
Malachi3:14 “Nine nitsite: ‘Akunamsebenti kukhonta Nkulunkulu. Yini nje lesiyizuzile ngekwenta lakufunako nangekuhamba njengebantfu labalilako embikwaSimakadze longuSomandla? 
Malachi3:15 Kodvwa nyalo sibita labatigabatisako sitsi bangulababusisiwe. Impela benti balokubi bayaphumelela, ngisho nalabo labamelene naNkulunkulu nabo bayaphunyula.’ ”" 
Malachi3:16 Nalabo-ke labesaba Nkulunkulu bakhulumisana bodvwana, Simakadze walalela weva. Incwadzi legocotwako yesikhumbuto yabhalwa embikwakhe macondzana nalabo labesaba Simakadze bahloniphe Libito lakhe." 
Malachi3:17 Simakadze longuSomandla utsi: “Bayawuba bami ngelilanga lengiyawulungisa ngalo konkhe, babe bantfu bami labaligugu lami. Ngiyawubaphephisa njengendvodza nayiphephisa indvodzana yayo leyisebentelako." 
Malachi3:18 Niyawuphindze niwubone kahle umehluko emkhatsini walabalungile nalababi, ngisho emkhatsini walabo labakhonta Nkulunkulu nalabo labangamkhonti.”" 
Malachi4:1 “Impela lilanga liyeta; liyawushisa njengemlilo lowesabekako nalohhumako. Bonkhe labatigcabhako bangangihloniphi nalabenta lokubi bayawuba tinhlanga, lelo langa lelitako liyawubalumekela ngemlilo,” kusho Simakadze longuSomandla. “Kute imphandze nome ligala leliyawusala kubo." 
Malachi4:2 Kodvwa kini lenilesabako Libito lami, lilanga lekulunga liyawuphuma linekuphilisa etimphikweni talo. Niyawuphuma nitjakadvule njengemankhonyane lakhululwe etisingeni tawo." 
Malachi4:3 Lapho-ke niyawubagcobagcoba phansi lababi; bayawuba lutfuli ngaphansi kwetinyawo tenu ngalelo langa lengiyawulungisa ngalo konkhe,” kusho Simakadze longuSomandla." 
Malachi4:4 “Khumbulani umtsetfo wenceku yami Mosi, timiso nemitsetfo lengamnika kona eHorebe kuwo onkhe ema-Israyeli.”" 
Malachi4:5 “Bukani la, ngiyawunitfumelela umphrofethi Elija, lingakefiki lelo langa lelikhulu nalelesabekako laSimakadze." 
Malachi4:6 Uyawuguculela tinhlitiyo taboyise kubantfwababo, netinhlitiyo tebantfwana kuboyise; ngaphandle kwaloko ngiyawuta ngitewushaya lelive ngesicalekiso.”" 
Matthew1:5 Salmoni watala Bowazi kuRahabi; Bowazi watala Obedi kuRuthe; Obedi watala Jese; 
Luke3:25 umsa waMathathiyase, umsa wa-Amosi, umsa waNahume, umsa waHesli, umsa waNagayi," 
Luke3:25 umsa waMathathiyase, umsa wa-Amosi, umsa waNahume, umsa waHesli, umsa waNagayi," 
James5:11 Khumbulani phela kutsi ngulabo labaciniselako lesitsi babusisiwe. Nake neva ngekukhutsatela kwaJobe, niyati-ke nekutsi iNkhosi yaletsa siphetfo sini kuye; ngobe iNkhosi inebubele nesihawu lesikhulu."
